name: Charming, Cozy Rotterdam Center
comments:
We were extremely pleased with our stay at this apartment for the final week of our 3 week European vacation over the Christmas holidays. It was very spacious for the two of us with high ceilings and lots of windows at both the living and dining room ends of the apartment. The bedroom is located in between and can be totally isolated from the ambient light at night by heavy curtains separating it from the other rooms - making for a very quiet and restful sleep. The kitchen (including a refrigerator, freezer, dishwasher, gas range and oven) and dining room (which seats 6) were very functional and offered us the opporutnity to host friends and family for dinner on several occasions. We made good use of the gas fireplace firtst thing in the morning and in the evening. The building was constructed in 1895 and is owned by the same people as Hotel Van Walsum next door giving us ready access to Jos, his brother and their staff for any of our needs. Several minor maintenance issues were attended to promptly. The location is a short walk from the main shopping and restaurant street in Rotterdam, Nieuw and Oud Binnenweg, and the number 6 tram stop at Mathenesserlaan which connects with central station and, in turn, the metro and train system connecting Rotterdam with den Haag, Amsterdam, Brussels and Schipol International airport. The apartment is just a short walk from Museum Park and the number 7 tram ride away from the Spido boat tour of Rotterdam harbour.

Our son is working as an intern for an architectural firm in Rotterdam and was very appreciative of the design aspects of the building and the apartment, leading him to muse about the potential for a monthly rental for himself. We'll be back and wouldn't hesitate to recomend this to others.

name: Charming, Cozy Rotterdam Center
comments:
I stayed in the apartment for 5 days. The location is excellent place which is many restaurants, cafe and public transport. especially Coop supermarket and café Ari are great. Jos, the owner of the Hotel Van Walsum, is great hosts! It was helpful to have access to the hotel, as they and their staff were very friendly and responsive. I'm so busy for a few days. I have a breakfast at hotel Van Walsuem twice. It was wonderful for money - a lot of choice, a garden, large windows.
I would suggest it to everyone!

name: Charming, Cozy Rotterdam Center
comments:
This is a great option if you need privacy and space. The apartment was really really lovely inside. Its in a nice location as well. This place is loosely connected to Hotel van Walsum. Jos and Anton own the hotel next door so you have access to the amenities of the hotel as well.

We got breakfast one morning which was an excellent dutch continental breakfast. We took advantage of the hotel bar and patio area on many of the nights during our stay. As an added bonus, there is an awesome cat who will come and hang out with you on the back patio and he loves to be pet. The night staff was great to chat with and, since it is a small hotel, it was a very relaxed environment. We were also able to get safe enclosed parking in the hotel parking lot which was very convenient.

The nearby streets have a variety of great shops and food options. You can find anything from bread bakeries to organic turkish kebab. For those looking for the Coffee Shop experience, there are many great options nearby. My recommendation would be to go during the day.

All in all, great place to stay, beautiful accomadations, and Jos was a great host.

name: Charming, Cozy Rotterdam Center
comments: It was really nice experience. We've been looking for some typical dutch apartment with lots of space, huge windows and with a touch of good taste for the interior. We got just what we wanted.

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments:
i stayed in the beautiful Loe's apartment in november and it was my first experience with air b n b ...never again i will look for hotels since the experience was totally positive
the apartment is very well equipped,very well decorated and all the details have been thought to make you confortable and the feeling is cozy as a house can give you but in the meanwhile also very professional as an hotel ...we had snacks, coffee and also a bottle of wine offered from loes and in the bathroom (wow a spa looking shower ) we where provided with slippers, plenty of new towels and first class hotel bathrobes..
the view from the apartment is on a beautiful garden and the location is just perfect for visiting rotterdam and many places are walking distance even if you also find tram stops and the metro station just outside the house...the area is also provided with lots of restaurants and places to buy food
i would suggest loes's apartment definetively and she was very kind and helpful with us

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments:
Loes is likeable host. Great and fast contact, during the stay too!
Her apartment is excellent localisation in same center of city, close restaurants, bars, attraction and all what you need else but there is still a quiet.
Upon arrival a wine was waiting for us and a welcome information on the board in our language :)
Apartment is equip with all things: from all dishes, glasses, pots, pans, towels to new slippers too :). You do not have to need anything with you.
In apartment are maps and brochures about the city. Loes sad abaout Rotterdam too, and we knew what we should see: Markethal, Erasmusbrug Gate, Cube Houses...
Rotterdam is climatic, awesome city, without traffic jam, full of bicycles and tulips (april). You must see yourself.
I will back here :)
Thank you Loes!

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments: Loes has created a funky,fabulous apartment for guests.  Great space for a couple. The apartment is very spacious, light and is in a very convenient location. Just minutes to the metro. Rotterdam is such an accessible city, the museums and architecture are wonderful. The streets around the apartment have good cafes bars and restaurants and great shopping too. Highly recommend Dependence Apartment.

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments: This apartment was very clean, beautiful and very homey, with great amenities. Location is perfect, close to the city center and public transport, but in a quiet street with a great garden view from the big windows. Host is great, very welcoming and forthcoming, offering practical solutions to questions and needs. Summarizing, I would absolutely recommend this place to everybody!

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments: The fabulous stylish apartment in the quite place of the Rotterdam despite of it is near the city center streets with a lot of things to do. Need to say Loes is super host!

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments:
Loes is an excellent host. She met us on arrival and went out of her way to help us with some unusual questions and requests. A delightful person.
The place is surprisingly spacious and comfortable for the cost. Highly recommended

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments: Very nice apartment, with beautiful big windows. Great location, very quiet, and a fantastic bathroom. Apartment is very large and comfortable.

name: Apartment Dependance Rotterdam
comments:
What a fabulous stay in Loes' apartment! It's the perfect base from which to explore Rotterdam and beyond.
The metro station is even closer than it appears on the map, most have multiple entrances, this one being a just a 30 second walk from the apartment. From here you can whizz into the centre or out to gorgeous Delfshaven or Schiedam (among other places) but the city is also wonderfully walkable! Loes' apartment is so well located, it was lovely to stroll in any direction, and when first arriving, is a simple 15 minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal.
The apartment itself is a delight, exceptionally comfortable with everything you'd expect from a top host and accommodation. Loes is a superb host and made clear she was on hand throughout our stay should we have needed her at any point, and made sure of welcoming us in person on our first day in the city.
We highly recommend the apartment and hope to return one day to explore even more of Rotterdam! Hartelijk bedankt Loes! 🙂

name: Sunny garden apt in Kralingen/R'dam
comments:
I strongly recommend this apartment in which I lived for almost 2 months. It is located in Kralingen, probably the best neighborhood of R'dam with its very safe, quiet and peaceful surroundings, parks ponds and easy access to the city center. (7 min by tram). As a postdoctoral fellow at Erasmus University, the location was simply perfect (fifteen minutes walk from the campus). On Lutshofstraat, you will find some local shops and gourmet-type, fine shops, restaurants and cafés. There is also a large park Kralingen Bos nearby where you can jog around a nice lake with sailboats.

The apartment is clean, sunny, furnished with all the furniture you need for a short or long stay (stove, oven, washing machine, flat screen TV, Ipod dock station, Wi-Fi Internet). The highlight of the flat is undoubtedly the sunny private garden where you can have a coffee, meal or simply relax and read your newspaper.

The guest Michael was very thoughtful. He made a long distance call to talk to me and make sure the apartment will meet all my needs. He gave me a very warm welcome the first day and the fridge and pantry already had the essentials to start it (milk, fruits, cookies, some wine and beer)!
So if you want to stay in a quiet place and enjoy all R'dam's attractions at the same time, this is the perfect place! I enjoyed each day of my stay there and hope to come back soon!

name: Sunny garden apt in Kralingen/R'dam
comments:
Michael rented his appartment for a longer period to us. Great place, quiet neighbourhood while still being very well located near the center of Rotterdam and the stunning view of the Maas river.

Michael is very flexible and service minded, having a local contact for all questions.

name: Sunny garden apt in Kralingen/R'dam
comments: Our host met us at the arranged time and showed us around the apartment and answered our questions about nearby amenities and made us feel very welcome. The apartment was as described in the listing, it is a good sunny space and met our needs perfectly. We were cycle touring in the Netherlands and required somewhere in Rotterdam on the ground floor of a building and where we could park our bikes off the street, and this was possible in the apartment. There is a good selection of food shops and two supermarkets about five minutes walk from the apartment. The apartment is close to a tram line which has a frequent service to the centre of Rotterdam and goes past Rotterdam Centraal railway station

name: Sunny garden apt in Kralingen/R'dam
comments: Michaels Wohnung ist sehr angenehm und ausgestattet mit schönen Gegenstände und Details. Die Wohnung hat Charme. Der Garten ist ein Highlight. Das Wohnzimmer hat Südlage, sehr schön.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Lovely hosts! Fantastic place just 10m from central station and in a very calm street! Room was perfect and everything exceed our expectations! Breakfast was delicious! Hopefully will return in the future!!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Perfecte locatie! Op loopafstand van het station en vanuit de B&B zijn alle high lights goed te bereiken. Tip: huur een fiets! B&B is gezellig ingericht, erg ruim, inclusief eigen keukentje. Van alle gemakken voorzien! Fijn, breed bed die desgewenst versteld kan worden. Toilet en douche zijn te bereiken via de gang. Dit zou voor sommigen een nadeel kunnen zijn, omdat beiden niet direct aan het slaap/woongedeelte zitten. De badkamer is mooi ingericht, met een ruime douche en een dubbele wastafel (fijn!).
Gastvrij ontvangst door Machteld. Heerlijk uitgebreid ontbijt (verschillende soorten broodjes, druiven, sap, melk, diverse soorten beleg) op een zelf te bepalen tijdstip.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Machteld was great at answering questions and giving clear directions to finding her home.  She welcomed us warmly, despite our lateness in arriving.   The apartment is spectacular; despite the photos, the room is even lovelier than it appears-high ceilings, light with a view of the back garden and access to a small private terrace, spacious and beautiful.  The shower room is huge, and the shower, double sink, long bench beautiful.  In the suite are lovely delft patterned dishes, everything one could need for cooking (and more), and even a beautiful little tea pot.  The beds are electric-and so comfortable we slept deeply.  The apartment's location is lovely-within easy walking distance of both the Central station and the Markethall, the Erasmus bridge and Museums, and much more that makes Rotterdam such a beautful city. Machteld has magazines, a tv, advice and listings for many of the attractions  to explore, and gives help with recommended restaurants and city attractions.  Her breakfasts are just scrumptious, plentiful and varied. She accomodated my husband's avoidance of red meats graciously.  She loves her city, and is a great host with a beautifully decorated mansion.   I wish we could have stayed a week, and we hope to return.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Amazing stay in Rotterdam. The room is bright and spacious, exactly what is shown in the pictures. Machteld and family were great hosts, very helpful, kind and welcoming. The b&b is very close to the station and is in perfect walking distance for those who come by train. The breakfast was great.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Very spacious room, with beautiful over growing garden view. Felt very welcome and the breakfast was great.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: A beautiful apartment in a great location close to Centraal station. Machteld's place is bright, clean and charming, and she is a most welcoming and helpful host. The attention to detail was second to none, and the breakfast delicious!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Five minutes' walk from Rotterdam Central Station, a fully equipped apartment with lovely garden in a leafy street, stunning Dutch-style breakfast provided by welcoming hosts who leave excellent chocolate bars every day - what's not to like?

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: 10 min walking from the main station and 10 min from the center. Very well located.  The highlight of this apartment is the garden. Behind the small garden pictured in the photos is a large garden with a table and swings, all available for your use. Overall great place (and we enjoyed the breakfast).

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Lovely modern self contained apartment with separate bathroom and shower room and amazing breakfast! Comfortable memory foam beds, exceptionally clean, big mature garden, kitchen, fridge, and only a short walk from Rotterdam Centraal station (through a lovely park!). Machteld and her family were delightfully accommodating and communicative whilst also giving us space to ourselves. A wonderful place to stay during your time in Rotterdam!!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: We had a very nice stay in Machteld's apartment. The flat is quiet, spacious, bright, clean and tidy. The kitchen is well equipped. The breakfast served was nice and delicious. Machteld helped us to find ways to sightseeing spots. She let us to leave the baggage after check out so that we had an extra half day trip to Den Haag. We strongly recommend this bnb to any traveler to Rotterdam.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: The beds were so comfortable. The breakfast was outstanding. I loved the bathroom! The view to the garden from the room was stunning. Such a charming location and amazing host. Dank u wel!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: The apartment is not far from the central station, just within the walking distance. it was at the first floor of the house with a lovely garden view, breakfast included. It was the one of the most delicious room breakfast we’ve ever had. When the weather permitted, you can also enjoy your meal at the garden. We really enjoy our stay there.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: This is a very comfortable setting just north and within walking distance of Rotterdam Centraal.  Well appointed room with a beautiful back yard and great hostess.  This was the highlight of our AirBnB tour of the Netherlands.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: The location is perfect, right in the city. The building itself is a beauty with character. Detailed old windows at the entrance and a beautiful city garden in the back. Breakfast was proper! I really value the flexibility of the host.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: We enjoyed our stay very much! The hosts were so nice meeting us and checking us in, the breakfast was really great, and the view onto the terrace and backyard was beautiful; nice Tempurpedic mattresses too! Definitely recommend for your stay in Rotterdam! (Plus the short walk to Rotterdam Centraal Station makes things so convenient.)

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
We enjoyed our stay at B&B Walenburg. The room is spacious, bright, and extremely clean. Just outside the room is a small private toilette and rather large bathroom. Communication leading up to the stay was great, and Machteld met us for an easy check-in. Although we were downstairs from the host, the place felt private. We only saw the owners at check-in and for a quick breakfast drop each morning. However, the few interactions were warm, and they made themselves available if we needed anything at all.
All needed amenities are provided and then some. We loved the fresh flowers cut from the beautiful garden and chocolates that were there upon our arrival. An amazing breakfast was delivered to our room each morning at a time of our choosing. Machteld really goes the extra mile to ensure a special stay, and we really appreciated those touches. We enjoyed the beautiful garden and nightly visits from the cat “Blij”.
Area was extremely pleasant with plenty of bars and eateries in short walking distance. We looked forward to the walk along the water to get to city center. Definitely stop in for a non-AB InBev beer at the Walenburg Café as well as the best pizza at Angelo Betti nearby. I highly recommend staying at B&B Walenburg!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Heel ruim en gezellig verblijf, veel privacy, prachtig uitzicht op de tuin, gezellig terrasje, superlekker ontbijt en perfecte locatie op wandelafstand van het station!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Nice room with a great view of the backyard. It is located near the Central Station in about 5 min walk. The center is about 15 min walk. Quick responses and easy registration. The host gave us a map and told about the main attractions of the city. Breakfast from was quite good (eggs, cheese, fruits, pastries, jam, and the room had a kettle and coffee-machine). The bathroom and toilet were separate, but located in the hallway. I would like to add that it was quite cold in the room at night, it was about 12 degrees outside and the heating did not work. Perhaps, it could be fixed somehow, but we did not ask the host because we came late in the evening.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: There is a beautiful garden in Machteld's house. It is bright, and very quiet. Machteld and Vankl served abundant breakfast every morning that impressed us. We stayed there for 4 nights, It is worth to treasure. We strongly recommend it.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Large room looks out on a beautiful garden; very comfortable, bright, and clean.  Quiet neighborhood; accessible to train station and trams.  Hosts are great.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: This is a really nice find - close to the station, very cosy and surprisingly quiet. The backyard gives a great view and is entirely private. The hosts are very communicative and accomodating, and can offer lots of advice about where to eat and what to do. Highly recommended!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: The room was really nice and clean. Machteld always there for help with quick responses. Breakfast was included and it was really tasty. I even can’t finished some of cheeses and packed with bread to eat on my flight. It is close to train station but a bit long walk to city center. We’ve satisfied a lot with the stay overall.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Our stay at Machteld's was wonderful. Machteld is a kind host and the airbnb was very comfortable. We enjoyed a lovely breakfast at our preferred hour every morning, a great location near lovely coffee bars and a short walk from the centre and train station, and a comfortable bed every night, including a good crib for the little one. Even though it was a bit too windy to sit outside while we were there, we enjoyed the lovely garden through the big picture window! Thank you, Machteld!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Machteld’s place is wonderful, with comfortable beds, space and a lovely garden. It’s worth noting that the garden does not have that much privacy as there is a path that goes to the neighbours’ house.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Great place to stay with a view in a beautiful garden!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Een prachtige ruimte in een prachtig huis! Veel privacy ondanks de gedeelde ingang en Machteld en haar man zijn heel aardig en fijn in de communicatie. Mooie buurt van Rotterdam en lekker dicht in de buurt vam het CS!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: One of the best AirBnBs I have ever stayed in: only 5 mins by foot from Rotterdam Centraal station, on the quiet, residential side, with most of the journey through a nice, leafy park. You have the whole ground floor to yourself/selves, with a very large bed/dining room and a huge bathroom, both with sunlight pouring in and fresh air, if you open the doors to the garden. Lovely outdoor patio facing into a secluded garden with nice plants visited by bumblebees and the sound of birdsong and the gentle clucking of the resident four free-range hens (no cockerel to wake you up). There is a safe place inside to store a bicycle if you hire one (highly recommended to explore R’dam and around). Very tastefully provided kitchenette and bathroom with a choice of fluffy or waffle towels. And of top of that: a Dutch breakfast is provided (!), which you can either eat at the circular dining table within, or on the patio outside if it’s not raining. And if you’re lucky, one the hens’ll have laid you a free-range egg to have with your breakfast. I only met Machteld once, but saw her husband, Remko every morning with the breakfast tray. Both very friendly, but they they don’t intrude and it’s comforting to know they’re just upstairs if you need something. Perfect for either a solo traveller or couple who appreciate having a nice garden oasis in which to relax / have a break in the afternoon from work (I was attending a conference) or sightseeing. Only (very slight) downside for a couple is that the bed is two singles put together, not a double. 100% recommended.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Pretty space! Lots of light- close to center!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: We had an overnight stay at Machteld’s lovely apartment and wish it could have been longer. Machteld was very welcoming and helpful and the communication at every step was excellent. The apartment was very conveniently located close to the City Centre and Central Station but was very quiet with a lovely garden view and a place to sit out and enjoy the birdsong. Would definitely recommend.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Ruime en karakteristieke woning met veel privacy. Machteld en Remko zijn erg vriendelijk en hebben ons goed ontvangen. Het was een prettig verblijf!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: An amazing host and a wonderful family! They made us feel completely at home and were incredibly helpful in every possible way. They were also flexible with check-in and check-out when requested for valid reasons. The location is perfect—close to the city center yet offering a peaceful garden view. Highly recommend staying here for a comfortable and welcoming experience!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Great stay - lovely room with access to garden view. The breakfasts in the morning were also wonderful and made us feel right at home.

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
I really enjoyed the apartment, especially the opportunity to have outdoor space right in the middle of the city. The terrace was definitely my favorite part of the stay. I truly appreciated the host’s hospitality and her willingness to help with unexpected situations.
It was very thoughtful that the hosts served us breakfast, even though I must admit I’m not quite used to the Dutch way of having all that bread in the morning.
The early morning construction noise from the neighboring building was quite disturbing, but I understand this is beyond the host’s control, as local regulations allow it.
I would definitely consider staying here again—especially if there were a way to ensure quieter mornings without drilling and hammering!

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Machteld and her husband were extremely warm and welcoming. Please note this is in their personal home, but you get the whole first floor to yourself. We did experience some construction noise early in the mornings during our stay, but unclear if it was from upstairs in their home or a neighbor’s. It never lasted for long. The garden is a gem and their homemade breakfast every morning was the best part of the stay. Beds were extremely comfortable too!! (Two twin beds) Location is very walkable (20 mins to central part of town) and close to public transportation.  Would definitely recommend their place to someone visiting Rotterdam :)

name: City appartment: b&b Walenburg
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: The stay was amazing!!! Remco arranged a very easy check in and showed us around the appartment. He prepared amazing breakfast for us and even recommended great spots to visit around the city. Very nice and quite stay since the room window is facing a lovely garden

name: Apartment  Rotterdam Noord
comments: Michel and his family are adorable. His accommodation was perfectly located in a quiet street, easily and quickly accessible from Rotterdam train station. The room is lovely and contains a kitchenette with a coffee machine and coffee beans, a kettle and an assortment of tea bags. Shower and toilet were just outside the room, very clean and modern. Breakfast was delicious and varied. The location, accommodation and host were utterly charming, and the host was very knowledgeable about the area and facilities. Highly recommended!

name: Apartment  Rotterdam Noord
comments: My husband really enjoyed his stay at Michel's place. The room is spacious and thoughtfully designed. You have a large bed, cupboards, a sink, a coffee machine and a table in the room (as on the pictures provided). The room is on the ground floor, but there are coverings on windows, so you can enjoy your privacy. Super clean and tidy bathroom! He would definitely book again when in need to travel to Rotterdam again.

name: Apartment  Rotterdam Noord
comments: Really nice place, super well located, the little balcony and garden are super nice too.

name: Apartment  Rotterdam Noord
comments: Great apartment Very convenient to tram and Central Station Beautiful street Comfortable bed and very nice living and dining area. Close to shops and restaurants Great location for exploring Rotterdam

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Perfect accomodation! Very good location (central, near the public transports), quiet street, quiet and beautiful house with peaceful small garden. The room was very clean and cosy. Nice atmosphere in the house. Equipped kitchen at disposal, wifi, clean bathroom,... And Marion is a great host, very kind. I would definitely recommend this place.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: A beautiful sunny & light filled space with great artistic atmosphere. House is packed with interesting books and art. If you are interested in the history of Rotterdam and the earlier modern art developments here use your change to chat with Marion she has lots of facts and interesting stories to share ;)

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion was an exceptional host! My boyfriend and I arrived later in the night and she was so kind to pick us up from the Central Station. The home itself was so cosy and full of art. It was in a very quiet, and peaceful neighborhood. We stayed in the double room on the second floor - had our own personal wash station and a balcony that we used to dry our clothes. Marion was so lovely; we shared many great talks in the garden outside. I definitely recommend this place for travelers because Marion was a true highlight of Rotterdam and my boyfriend and I's trip through Europe!

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments:
Myself and my daughter had a lovely 5 days stay with Marion!
We are very happy and thankful to have met such a caring, kind and warm hostess who is also an art scholar!
Marion's beautiful home itself is a mini museum of art work! Besides paintings, art work, an exhaustive collection of books on art, there is a piano in the living room which my 13 year old could play on and practise.
We also loved hanging out in the quaint garden behind the house where we had tea and snacks. She gave us a lot of helpful tips to explore Ansterdam and Rotterdam area.
Then there is little Oskar, Marion's pet cat! We were delighted to have him around!
We really hope to visit again!
What a beautiful memorable time we had!

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Mrs. Marion is an excellent host, ready to help when she can. Mrs. Marion provided us cozy breakfast, also offered to cook us dinner and we could freely use the kitchen and the backyard. Very friendly, an adorable personality, respecting other's privacy. We enjoyed our stay at Mrs. Marion's very much. Also, the house was very clean! Would definately recommend!

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: This is the place to stay in Rotterdam! An amazingly beautiful and well-designed house (as a result of being an artist herself), great hospitality. We had a very comfortable stay in Marion's house with my wife. The house is quite centrally located, has all the amenities needed. The room she provided was large, bright and comfortable. The house also has a beautiful and peaceful garden, where it's a pleasure to have breakfast or take some rest in the afternoon. It was also a pleasure to meet Marion and have some chats. As a quite experienced Airbnb user and a full-time traveler who has been around the world staying in many types of accommodations, I can highly recommend her place.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion is a great host. She is very kind, friendly and always smiling. The room is light and spacious with comfy bed. The whole house was tidy and nice, full of art. It is located 10 minutes from Roterdam Centraal. We also enjoyed the company of cats who were friendly and neat. I definitely recommend this place.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Absolutely perfect place near the city centre and train central station. Cosy big room with a nice view from the balcony. There is everything you need in the house. Perfect breakfast on the terrace. Bikes included! The host is very kind and warm, ready to help you with everything and take care of you. We really enjoyed the stay in this house.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion’s place is fantastic! The room is really big (you can do your yoga in there) with a little balcony, and the flat is well located on a quiet street, close to centraal station and the centrum. Marion is also a wonderful host who makes you feel right at home.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion is the nicest host ever! She was very kind to us all the time, and she is indeed a very nice and interesting person to talk to. Her house is very well decorated and cozy, and very close to the city center (10 min. walk from Central Station) in a quiet and safe street. The room is very big and has everything you can need (even a balcony!). 100% recommendable for your stay in Rotterdam!

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion is a lovely host. She is very welcoming and friendly. We felt as a family members , Marion was taking care of our comfort. Marion's house is very typical dutch house for one family in 3 floors. Our room was on second floor, big, spacious and bright. House has artistic soul, decorated with beautiful art pieces. Location is very good - near to station and city center. We were very pleased to use two bicycles, was nice bonus to feel as local people. We highly recommend stay at Marion's home.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Amazing place! Very artsy, in a great neighborhood close to the train and city centre, and Marion is a great host! She prepared us coffee and some breakfast, which was not expected but very much appreciated! The room itself is large, with a small balcony to enjoy the view. Lovely visit, and we would happily stay again.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion was very welcoming. Her house is very stylish and well located in Rotterdam. The room is inspiring and bright. We enjoyed staying there !

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments:
Marion is one of the best hosts I've had with Airbnb.
Really nice person and made me feel at home right from the start of my stay.
The house has a great location in the city center, in a quiet street.
Absolutely recommend it.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: What a find! A superb, light filled, spacious room in a large, historic home filled with art and interesting stories. Located close to the city centre, centra station  and various museums. Marion is a warm and hospitable hostess. I couldn't recommend this place any higher and can't wait to return.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Beautiful house full of art! Also the room is very spacious and has a desk as well as fast wifi, which is perfect for those who may need to do some work while there like I did. The room has a balcony with a view that is gorgeous, and you're within walking distance to many places. Marion was also very accommodating, which helped me feel comfortable while being alone in a new country and trying to figure everything out. I would definitely come back.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Lovely host and very nice room with a balcony

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marion was a lovely host. She was responsive, attentive, and made you feel right at home. We felt happy to have Marion as a host. The issues we had were the surrounding area felt unsafe. A lot of loud noises on the street during the nighttime and very loud neighbours, making it hard to sleep. The balcony was covered in scaffolding making it pretty much unusable and there were builders right outside our window, which unfortunately wasn’t mentioned to us prior to our stay. We ended up leaving a few days early which was a shame as like I said Marion was really nice.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments:
It was a good stay in Rotterdam.
Big spacious room with comfortable interior and a balcony terrace upstairs were the best! You also have a kitchen and a shower upstairs. As well as another guest’s room. Everything is around the corner - groceries and bus stops. Thank you, Marion.

name: Spacious room close to city centre
comments: Marions place was lovely and we were happy to stay there for our short trip to Rotterdam. It’s right in the city center and we could walk almost everywhere, so it is a great starting point to explore the city. The kitchen was simple well organized and perfect for simple cooking. The terrace and the balcony were a great bonus!

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Marion was a very welcoming and friendly host. I had a very comfortable stay with her in rotterdam and extended my stay by another night - I could have easily stayed for longer! I actually stayed in the larger room (at the higher rate) she has on offer as her single rooms are currently being occupied.  But all of the rooms are as she has advertised, my one being bigger than I expected! On a sunny evening, it was fantastic to enjoy the roof deck and enjoy the company of her other guests. Marion also helped me with directions to get to her house and then to get to the places I needed to go. Kindly, I was able to use her kitchen and she respected my privacy while enjoying chatting at other times :) She is a lovely and interesting person - if I am ever staying in Rotterdam again for a long period, I will check with Marion first to see if she has a room available! Thanks Marion :)

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Marion is such a wonderful and kind host. I stayed in the room with a terrace for three nights and enjoyed every moment of my stay. The room is very bright and cozy and it was very convenient to have a separate kitchen on the floor. The house in general is unique and full of character. Marion is an artist and has decorated the house with paintings and photographs beautifully. I recommend this room for short as well as long stays!

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Marion was a very welcoming host and provided useful tips. The room - as the whole house - was clean and beautifully decorated. It's a great location in a charming street close to the city centre and the central station. I had a comfortable stay and would choose this place again anytime!

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: It was such a great experience at Marion's! She waited until my arrival for me which was at about midnight, was friendly and explained everything. The house is a beautiful, typcial dutch house with some paintings and a nice balcony. It was good to use the kitchen. It is in running distance to central train station and center. A supermarket is nearby. I really liked to use the bike Marion loaned. The best was the personal contact with Marion who is a really nice and interesting person! I can only recommend!

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
I stayed with Marion for a couple of months. During my stay with her, she was very nice and kind. She addressed all of my concerns. It was easy to communicate with her and she respected my personal space. Occasionally, I spent time with her talking about art, travel, and life in general, and about Oskar, her lovely cat.
The size of the room is more than enough for one person, and I liked that it has a big window to let in enough light. The room is also adjacent to a terrace which I can use whenever I want. There is also a kitchen and a shower on the same floor.
The location of her house is very accessible. It is about a 5 min walk to the nearest tram station, and about 15-20 mins to the central station and to the city center.
If ever I have another chance to visit Rotterdam, I would definitely stay with her again.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
Marion was a great host and the check in was very flexible. The room was ready for me despite showing up some 3 hours earlier than anticipated. The room was right next to the shower, kitchen and private balcony.
Marion also provided some useful information about the public transport and closest supermarket.
There was a bike provided but I chose not to use it.
All in all the accommodation and host were very good.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: The house is well located in a pleasant, green area and not far from some really nice cafes. I enjoyed the atmosphere of the neighbourhood and its convenience close to the central station. The house is fantastic, unique and bright, with a comfortable and spacious room that felt like I was already at home. Marion is very friendly and I doubt I will forget my stay here for a long time to come.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
The room was very convenient for one person. The bed was super comfortable and there was a big window that brightened the room.
The whole house was very clean! The only disadvantage would be that there were too many stairs, which apparently is usual in the Netherlands, but it never affected me in any way.
The neighborhood was super safe and quiet, and there were supermarkets, cafes and a tram stop very close to it. Coming and going was very easy, as one could also walk to the centre.
Last but not least, Marion was very friendly and always helpful when I needed something. Thank you very much! I appreciate the amazing communication and how discreet you are :)

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
Stayed in a different room on the first floor as the room booked (2nd floor) had water issue. Marion put me in her own bedroom which was very comfortable. Bathroom & toilet were adjacent & clean
Only used the kitchen on 2nd floor for coffee & heating up food in microwave a few times
Marion is very friendly & house very quiet in a nice neighbourhood. you can catch several bus/trams just a few minutes walk away. I took a tram that connects to a bus to Kinderdijk!. The bus/trams also go to Central train station or it is only a 10-15walk from Marion's place. I know as I had to walk to catch an early train on a Sunday😆
Just a note that the stairs were narrow (typical for places in Europe), so if you hv a big/heavy luggage, you may want to be prepared going up 2 flights of stairs to the original room on the 2nd floor. Look at the pic posted by Marion.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Had a nice stay at Marion. Lovely house and lovely neighborhood. Marion was wellcoming with tea and cake in the garden when i arrived. The room had everything I needed. Only thing was that there was construction going on on the roof every day which made quite some noise and construction people stayed on the roof terrace. Communication about the construction would have made the stay even better.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
I had a pleasant 3-nights stay at Marion’s place.
Marion was out when I checked-in but I met her tenant Lucy which is very nice.
The room was spacious enough for a single traveller, with a desk and a sink which is practical.
The single bed was very confortable and the blanket warm enough for autumn. The shower is just over the room on the corridor and shared with 2 tenants.
There were mosquitoes even if temperatures weren’t high but there is an insect repellent in the room for you to use. The neighbourhood was quiet and tram/buses are just around the corner of the street (10” from downtown with the tram).
I enjoyed talking with Marion which is such a nice, interesting and joyful person, she was also responsive to all my texts before my arrival ! If you are travelling solo on a budget this is definitely a place I would recommend.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Marions home is a cosy place to stay. You share bathroom and kitchen with other guests, so that should be ok for you e.g. in terms of noise or privacy. Of course you have your own room and everyone (1-2 other guests maximum I guess) is very nice, especially Marion is super hospitable and sweet. It was easy to find and close to the main station and restaurants, supermarket etc.  I can totally recommend and felt very "home". Marion even picked me up in the middle of the night and pouring rain, which was an angle-move and which I highly appreciated.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments: Marion was very welcoming and her house is a delight with lovely art and indeed lots of colour. The room is spacious and the bed, although small, is very comfortable.

name: Colourful Room Close to City Centre
comments:
Marion is a very kind and welcoming host.
The room is exactly as described—colorful, with big windows that let in plenty of sunshine. The whole house is filled with art, as Marion is an artist herself!
You’re welcome to use the well-equipped kitchen, and there’s a lovely balcony with tables and chairs—perfect for a relaxing morning coffee.
The location is also great: just 5 minutes by tram from Rotterdam Centraal, then another 5-minute walk to the house. There are supermarkets, a bakery, and restaurants right around the corner. The neighborhood itself is quiet and cozy.
**A small note for future guests: the room is on the second floor, so keep that in mind if you have big suitcases. The shared bathroom is also on the second floor (shared with a student who lives there permanently), but it’s clean and right next to the room. The WC is downstairs on the first floor, which I found a little bit inconvenient.
In general, I liked it very much. I hope to come back

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
I stayed on Petra's boat for one night (February 18th, 2014) and it was fine, nice view of the harbor, full breakfast. The thermometer does default back to 15 degrees C within 3 hours of being set at 20 deg C and Petra said she would replace it this year.

-Alex

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: It was a challenge finding Petra's home but once we did, it was absolutely delightful. The place was comfortable, charming and fully functional. Private bathroom was a benefit, mattress was perfect, and breakfast was top notch. Petra chatted with us for quite a while when we arrived which was great. Profile was accurate.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra is very sympathetic and welcoming! We had a great time on her barge, located in the old harbour and very close to everything. The view on the enlightened cranes, from the room, is magic! In the morning Pertra awoke us whith a gorgeous and delicious breakfast. Thanks for everything Petra! We recommend you to everyone!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: The barge cabin is incredibly cosy with great views. Petra a fantastic host and I couldn't recommend the breakfast box highly enough. An ideal place to stay in Rotterdam.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra's boat has everything we expected from an airbnb: an authentic  place, warm and coast, well situated with lovely views over the water and the old boats of The Maritim Museum. Petra is spontenaous and concerned, she gave us good tips and spoiled us with a fine breakfast. We recommend this bnb! Luk and Marleen.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Ons eerste verblijf in Rotterdam was een aangename verrassing, vriendelijke mensen, veel te zien, een stad die je per fiets moet ontdekken. Het Romantic Deck House on old barge is zoals je al kan verwachten een romantisch kamertje in een oude vaarschuit en lost alle verwachtingen in. Het kamertje is wat afgelegen van de rest van het woongedeelte op de schuit, er is dus een zekere privacy. Gastvrouw Petra is een vriendelijke dame, trots op haar stad en klaar met raad en tips zonder opdringerig te willen zijn. Oh ja, neem zeker het extra ontbijtmandje als optie. Zeker de moeite.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Getting to the boathouse took some figuring out and walking, but once there Petra was there to greet me and show me around. The space is lovely, with a bed in an alcove, kitchenette and dining area, plus a bathroom with shower. The view of the other boats bobbing on the river was very nice. Although I only stayed a night I thoroughly enjoyed my stay in Rotterdam. Petra's breakfast basket was outstanding.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Its a really unique place. Located super central but give you the feeling of hiding away from the rest of the city. The view out of the little windows at night is totally special, seeing the lights of the harbour dancing on the water. Thank you very much!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Petra welcomed me at her beautiful boat. The apartment is as you see it on the photos. Very cosy, quiet, with charming details and everything you need. The location is great as well. Only 5 walking minutes to the famous MarketHall and other touristic highlights. But the boat itself is at a very quiet spot. Public transport is close as well.

A great place to stay and discover Rotterdam - and to live like a local at a very special spot.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a lovely evening on Petra's boat! It was the best night's sleep we had in our entire trip, hearing the waves and the very slight rocking was quite relaxing. The bed was very comfortable. The room was bigger than we expected for being on a boat! The location was great for walking to several different areas of the city.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra made us feel very welcome and was friendly without being intrusive. The barge was extremely well equipped with a lovely living area, comfortable chairs and an amazingly comfortable bed! The views from inside the barge and outside were spectacular. The gentle rocking of the barge was sooo relaxing. Very quiet area yet very central. This is within walking distance of central station (20 minutes walk). The best place we have ever stayed! Couldn't rate in highly enough. :)

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a great weekend in the deckhouse, the place is very cute and Petra was a very nice host. I recommend taking the breakfast option too, it's a filling menu with many options and it looks like Petra puts effort into it. The weather was good so we also lied on the deck in the sun for a while. It was a fun experience to live on the boat, since it's different than on soil. The boat is located very close to the center too (around 5-10 min walk to the main shopping streets).

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We loved staying here as part of our trip to Holland. It was everything as described and what other positive reviewers had stated. The boat is centrally located and a quick water taxi or walk to further tourist activities. We would definitely book with Petra again

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra's place was so sweet and cozy we didn't want to leave, and we probably wouldn't have if it had been available going forward. Petra herself is a lovely person and was interested in our well-being while staying on her boat.  It was fun watching boats go by from our window and we were within walking distance of the tour boat, the Maritime Museum, and the Market (an amazing place if you are a foody-type). Can't say enough good about it.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: The barge is charming, as pictured, and lots of fun. I was worried about noise from boat traffic, but there was very little and we slept very well. The barge does rock just a little bit when other boats passed during the day. All becomes still at night.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Our stay on the boat was great! It's a very cozy and romantic little 'cabin' on water. We are quite tall (1.88m) and couldn't stand up straight inside. But we knew about this before we arrived so it wasn't really a problem. (it was worth the soar neck!)
Everything was clean and well taken care off, the bed feels like a warm little nest. Petra was helpful and friendly, but we had a lot of privacy. Very cool and unique place!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Even if we had some difficulties to find the boat and the fact that there wasn't any toilet paper, we had a really nice experience at Petra's place.
We were a little disappointed when we found out that we had to pay extra for the breakfast, which we thought it was included.
The way to the boat is difficult to find : you have to enter a really little street that looks like the entrance of a parking lot. Fortunately Petra helped us to find the way there and was really helpful.
The price is a bit expensive for what you get but it is a good opportunity to spend your holiday on a boat.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
The houseboat is lovely, super located, nice furnished, slightly bobbing, clean, a perfect retreat, with a low ceiling.
Petra is really friendly, helpful, uncomplicated and trustful.
Mietzi is purring, black, soft and friendly.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
If you're staying in Rotterdam, this is a great way to have an authentic Dutch experience on a converted barge.
The wheelhouse was a nice size for my and my travelling partner, the ceiling was good for me (5"6) but a little low for my partner.
The kitchen and amenities are all you need and the bed is very comfortable. We did have a plumbing problem but Petra worked really hard to fix it and got it sorted for us.
If (like me) you've never stayed on a boat before I would bring ear plugs, the wash from the water taxis that run close by until midnight makes quite a noise on the steel hull.
Overall a nice place to stay and great value.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra is a great host, very helpful and resourceful, and quite an inspiring person in general. Staying on her boat was a memorable experience. Having breakfast on the deck with that view was very special for us. Thank you Petra!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Petra place is one of a kind, on a boat with a deck and the view, if you wish for special kind of room. It's a small place for petite people and very compact, this is how boat people really live. Petra is a nice host, she wait up until 11pm for our arrival from 3-hour train delay. Thank you Petra, we enjoy our stay on boat in Rotterdam harbor.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: I stayed with my 17yo daughter for 3 days and it was a wonderful time. Petra is a nice host and we've had interesting conversation. The boat is historical, has a lot of nice details and looks as shown on fotos. Only the spiders outside were hard for my daughter to see so we kept the windows closed. You stay super central but quiet and always with small waves that bring you a perfect sleep. Keep going, Petra, you really have a nice ship and place in Rotterdam. Thanks for everything, Sven and Llini

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Very nice trip in Petra's boat, it's a little place with everything you can need, the sight you have on the roof is wonderful and the bed very comfortable ! Only one down side : there are many spiders outside and they sometimes come in if the windows are open.
Thank you Petra !

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: A very special place to stay in the heart of Rotterdam. The boat has been lovingly restored and is a comfortable and clean bnb. The hosts are friendly and helpful. The boat is moored in a peaceful and quiet location but it is easy to reach the nightlife in the centre of town on foot or by bicycle. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Just beware of the mosquitos if you leave the windows open!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had three nights at Petra’s just before Christmas and it was just perfect. Such a cosy (but also pretty spacious!) place...we almost didn’t want to leave our cabin! The bed was comfy and the shower was powerful. Really warm too and Petra had even added some Christmas touches to the cabin to make it feel really festive. Location is great, easy to explore all of Rotterdam. Fenix food factory in the south of the city was a particular highlight.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Big WARNING sign here: if you want to have a life-time experience of living on a boat, Petra’s barge could be your choice. However, bear in mind that there are two great drawbacks, which you must take into consideration, before your decision is made. First, there are great amount of spiders surrounding the exterior of the boat, leaving spider webs everywhere. Although Petra did her best to keep the interior part spider free, these creatures would start trickling in, even if you just leave a window slightly open. I am not sure if it is seasonal in June/July, but I saw the spiders are everywhere in all boats parked near-by, and they are almost impossible to be cleaned up. Second, inside the barge it would be very hot starting early afternoon until 10pm-ish, thanks to the direct sunlight from the top. This is quite unbearable in June/July, although it might be better in other seasons. I wished that Petra could have communicated these drawbacks better in the descriptions.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: The boat is very beautiful and cozy. We loved to stay on the balcony on top of the boat. The room was very clean and you have everything you need. It is centrally located and you have an awesome view. Petra is the perfect host and very nice. I highly recommend the stay on the boat!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Authentic way to be in Rotterdam, on the water! Great view to wake up with...

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Stayed at Petra’s place just for one night in the weekend. The water gently hits the sides of the boat making a nice calming noise in the background. Great to relax, meditate and sleep. She also provided a great amount of cutlery, tea and koffie for those who wants to have a warm drink. Furthermore, there is a supermarked (SPAR) close by in case you want to buy some food/ pharmaceuticals or drinks. Location is perfect for getting anywhere within the city for shopping.
Highly recommended!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Very nice place. Not recommended for tall people. Must be under 1.75 meters. Cool views from the windows.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Einmaliges Erlebnis. Private Kajüte mit allem was man braucht. Ein kleiner Kühlschrank war bei über 30 Grad sehr nützlich. Bei der Hitze waren private Leiter mit Bademöglichkeit und anschließend kühlem Getränk auf dem Privatdeck (keine Terrasse auf dem Dach) unser Highlight.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We enjoyed the stay on this cosy boat. It‘s a new and great experience to live some days, eat, sleep and wake up on a boat. At first, we needed to get used to the swaying of the boat. But as we got used to it, we really loved it. The bed is very cosy, the terrace on deck is stunning at night and we had everything we needed on the boat. It‘s a good spot to discover Rotterdam. We discovered everything by foot and there are loads of Restaurants, bars and shops nearby… also there is a nearby supermarket, so you can enjoy a good glas of wine and some cheese on deck while watching the city lights on the water. Michiel gave us a very warm welcome, Check-in and Check out were perfect. We definitely recommend the boat, if you want to try something new. Thanks for the great stay. All the best Steffi and Nico

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Perfect weekend getaway :)
Boat was cozy and the view to the river was divine!
**Not ideal for tall people though.**

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Great place! We loved sitting on the deck (having a really great view) and really enjoyed our stay. Keep the low ceiling in mind (standing upright only possible for people smaller than 1,75).

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: great and unique Airbnb. booked for the weekend in Rotterdam. Very peaceful despite being central to everything. great communication and easy check in. The bed was super comfortable and had the best night's sleep. I have lived on boats and nothing compares to falling asleep to the gentle rocking of sleeping on a boat! enjoyed a glass of wine on the deck and the shower was excellent. The boat was warm and inviting with the windows letting in natural warmth and sunlight.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a great Weekend staying on the veinard. It's a great starting Point for exploring Rotterdam. Everthing you need is nearby like Supermarktes or Cafés. The boat is very cozy and the bed is comfy. And the view from the deck is amazing, we would definitly stay here again.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Very nice and cozy place! There was everything we needed on the boat, even coffee machine with capsules. The bed was comfortable and cozy.
The ceiling is a bit low so for a tall person might be a bit uncomfortable.
There is a small table and chairs on the deck and it was great chilling there in the evenings. The view is amazing!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
My husband and I stayed on the Veinard for 5 nights, and we had a great time. The ship is conveniently located; a very short walk from the subway (Beurs or Leuvehaven stations) and the grocery store (SPAR). Despite being well located, it's very quiet - and the gentle rocking of the ship allowed us to sleep phenomenally well.
The ship is well-equiped (fridge, microwave, electric stove, coffee maker, etc), so one of the best things during our stay were the happy hours/meals in the ship deck, which has such a great view and great vibe.
PS: during our first night, Rotterdam had a very hot Summer day so the ship was a bit warm. But nothing that a couple fans (provided upfront by the host) couldn't resolve; we had a great night of sleep nonetheless.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: An amazing experience, very comfortable and romantic setting. Great bars nearby and the views of a night were brilliant. Felt very welcome 🤗

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Lovely accomodation on the marina, a great check-in experience and awesome evening views!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
We were so pleased with our stay! The location is incredible. The boat is close to many bars, restaurants and shops within walking distance. The space is enough for two people. It was our first time staying in a boathouse and we loved it.
Our interaction with Michiel was top notch. He was waiting for us upon arrival and made checking in and out a breeze.
Everything we needed for a two night stay was available to use, from tea/coffee, toiletries, cutlery, fridge and even games tucked away in drawers for rainy evenings in. Spar was right around the corner for light shopping (bottled water).
The bed was a toasty, warm little nook. I was worried about the movement of the boat as I get motion sick but I didn’t have any issues at all.
I’d happily stay here again should I come back to Rotterdam.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
We really enjoyed the stay in a such original place. The view is amazing getting the modern and historical part of the city mixed. The accommodation is fully equipped and very well located.
Esther is a very nice and sweet host.
To highly recommend especially for couples:)

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: characterful room on a lovely boat in a great setting.  the ceiling as explained is low and dont forget to measure yourself with shoes on! we went on a very cold weekend and it means a fan blower is on a lot.  i imagine in warmer weather and using the roof it would be really delightful. especially with the night view of the river! the area which i know fairly well is good for coffee and meals

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had an amazing time, the house boat has everything you need for a perfect time in the heart of Rotterdam. Beautiful view of the city, especially when it’s dark and you can enjoy the city lights!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Originele manier voor overnachten weekend Rotterdam. Ondanks middenin centrum opvallend stil. Op loopafstand van allerlei hightlights. Zeker een aanrader.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: This airbnboat is a magical place to stay in downtown Rotterdam. It was well located for venturing out into the city. The boat was exactly like the pictures and was very cozy. I am a very big guy (6'3") and I was still able to fit in the bed with my partner, although I was at the max height probably. I did have to hunch over to move around the ship, but I never found it to be an issue. We ate dinner on the roof a couple times and it provided a great view and setting for a quiet moment. Great find!!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: My wife and I had a delightful stay on Esther's boat. Esther was a lovely host. The boat was charming and the location was fantastic. It was the polar opposite of the industrialised, low-effort locations that dominate Airbnb these days.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Loved my three day stay at Esther's barge! It was the perfect place to be based for my conference with easy access to the various parts of the city and transport links. The location is lovely and peaceful while having a great view on the water and near-by buildings. The barge itself is spacious and comfortable and a unique space to enjoy Rotterdam on the water. My only thing to note for other visitors is that, given the time of year, there were lots of spiders around (mostly) the outside of the barge - so would suggest that if anyone is uncomfortable with spiders to mentally prepare yourself (this shouldn't deter you from staying here as it's awesome!) - and most likely the spiders helped control arguably more pesky mosquitos!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: For sure, this is a great experience to try at least once in your life. It’s nice to wake up, open the curtains and find yourself in a canal with ducks and good vibes. The only thing that annoyed us was the amount of big spiders that you can find at every window: to whom is arachnophobic, this could be a downside.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: The Boat is divided in three apartments, including the central one where the owner, Esther, lives. The apartment I rented is very cosy, well kept and with a romantic view. It is equipped with everything even if the bathroom is a bit small, making the stay adapt for people who are used to stay in small spaces.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Interesting and unusual place to stay.
This unit had windows to see the wonderful “on the water” view. The comforters were warm. The floor heat and additional small room heater also kept us warm on the chilly autumn days. The shower spray was small, but the hot water was nearly instant.
Restaurants nearby.
It was very quiet at night. The water was calm late in the day.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: very cute place to stay, very cosy and the view from the boat is very nice :)

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: the location is fantastic,right within walking distance of the centre. if you like quirky you will love it. no noise at night apart from moorhens ? quacking. it might be tricky if you have mobility problems as access to the boat is on a metal gangplank and you have to shimmy down stairs to the cabin. I loved it.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Really nice and fun airbnb. They were communicative and friendly. The ceiling is ~176cm, I’m 5’ 10 and had to duck a bit. The location, views and boat itself are great.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
This boat was darling!! loved this romantic spot! Great walkable location. darling little space!
It was a little tricky for some uber drivers to find, so check the map and help guide them down the street. It’s a very little road, but there is a turn around and once you get to the end, very close to the boat.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a fantastic stay! It is a beautiful houseboat in a really central location. Michiel accommodated our slightly earlier check in time and always communicated with us promptly.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Unique opportunity to stay on a vintage 1913 boat in the Rotterdam harbor!! Peaceful, beautiful and comfortable in the very heart of everything!
Step on the boat and you have the view of the harbor, the gentle swaying of the water and total privacy. The description and pictures tell a true story. Step off the boat and you have access to all transportation and variety in this vibrant city.
In fair weather you have the upper deck to enjoy. In foul weather, the full enjoyments are yours of the amenities of the quarters, and watching the active harbor. You are just steps from restaurants, cafes and groceries.
Your host has thought of everything - information, easy systems and wonderful communications. This is your chance to try a truly unique and lovely Airbnb!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Really nice Location and surprisingly calm. We slept good. The view of the skyline is awesome. Definitly worth to visit

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: my friend and i wanted to have a special place to meet up and visit each other. we could not have picked a better experience than staying on esther’s ship. we stayed on the back end bunker where the view of the open canal is the best, with a rooftop deck. we had a load of fun. everything was accessible and the area of rotterdam was amazing to walk around, but we mostly wanted to stay on the ship because we loved it so much. thank you for such a special experience and your amazing management staff that kept us cozy 🩵🩵

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Veinard was a quaint and comfortable stay. Highlights for us included having breakfast on the decking in the sunshine, being rocked to sleep / rocked 24hrs a day and the great shower facilities given it's a boat. Sadly, on the first night we slept fairly badly partly due to an abundance (8) of moderate to large spiders and the warm temperature. Luckily by night two we had the hang of things, slept with ear plugs & eye masks and used the fan which Esther helpfully provides on the boat.
The bed was a great size, the kitchen was well equipped and we found ourselves using all of the space over the course of the stay.
At £500 for 3 nights you're definitely paying for the experience rather than a luxurious stay - but that's what we were after.
The boat is next to Erasmus bridge and close to the metro / a water taxi pick up which was ideal. We definitely recommend the free walking tour and the market on Tuesdays.
Lovely stay. Great experience.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a great time on the boat! My friend and I stayed here for 2 nights for my birthday and visiting my sister who lives here. We wanted to have a fun different experience in Rotterdam! Everything was as described, it was easy to find and the space was perfect for us two. The bathroom was way bigger than we thought and we could stand fully though it was close to the roof if you are very tall. There is a heater if you need but the boat stayed pretty warm, we were here end of September. Very fun to be on the water. There are general noises on the boat if it’s windy but other than that a pretty quiet area where the boat is for sleeping. Thanks again!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Esther and Michiel are wonderful hosts who graciously share their houseboat’s front cabin with guests. The room itself is cozy, with a delightful atmosphere. The view from the bow, particularly in the evenings, is wonderful. It was a lovely place from which to plan our treks into the city, on foot and on bike, and a relaxing home to return to at night. I highly recommend it.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Well, if you’re hesitating to book this Airbnb, you shouldn’t.
A unique experience, combining calm and privacy while being at a walking distance of Rotterdam.
Everything was as described and communication was smooth with the hosts.
Would definitely recommend!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Spending a night or two in a houseboat has been on the bucket-list for a while, and this one was a dream come true! Super cosy (and romantic) stay in a unique corner of Rotterdam. Easily accessible to metros and the Markthal. Kitchen was stocked with the needed basics. The occasional gentle sway of the water was a fun experience. Grateful for the heater in Nov! We also enjoyed a nightcap on the deck with the lights and city views. It was really peaceful, but do close the curtains if you want real privacy 😅
Check in and out was easy and well organised and communication was seamless. Thank you Esther and Michiel for a unique Airbnb experience we both loved!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Lovely few days in Esther's gorgoeus boat. We were very grateful for the heater for our November stay. A cosy room for 2 people. We enjoyed sitting out on the deck when the weather permitted - the boat is parked right on the corner so your view isn't obstructed by other boats. Great kitchen facilities, well equiped. Comfy bed, with the waves gently rocking you to sleep :)

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
I had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam on a houseboat located in a small marina at Scheepmakerskade. I was there with a friend, and we had such a great time. Rotterdam is an incredibly beautiful and clean city, with lots to see and do. The people are super friendly and cool, which made the whole experience even better.
Our host was very kind and welcoming, and the check-in process was super easy and smooth. One of the highlights was spending the evenings on the rooftop of the houseboat, just relaxing and enjoying the peaceful atmosphere. Id definitely recommend this place for a unique and memorable stay in Rotterdam!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Staying in an lovingly restored 1913 freight barge moored in Rotterdam harbor was an outstanding - and unusual - experience that I really enjoyed.
The place is exactly as described. Major positives: the location in the harbor across from the maritime museum's boat collection is stunning; the gentle sound of the water; the coffee machine worked well; the wifi was speedy; communication was friendly and Michiel very flexible; the bed comfortable; there was an effective space heater for one cold evening.
Things to be aware of: the ceiling is a little low (I'm 6'1" and couldn't stand up); there's a fair amount of clambering to get in and out; the shower was a little cool; the wifi turned itself off after a few hours of not being used, and it didn't reach to the outside deck; there's a slight rhythmic banging when the swell hits the rudder. Some reviews mention spiders - I saw none in early April.
I'd love to go back!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Wir haben zwei Nächte in der geräumigen Schiffskabine verbracht und es sehr genossen! Die Kabine ist sehr gemütlich und verfügt über eine kleine Küche und ein Bad sowie ein Tisch zum Sitzen. Die Decke ist etwas niedrig, also große Menschen sollten auf ihren Kopf aufpassen. Das aber störte insgesamt nicht. Der Check-In und Check-Out verlief problemlos und war sehr einfach. Das Schiff liegt in einer ruhigen Umgebung, aber sehr zentral. Ein Supermarkt ist etwa 5 Minuten zu Fuß entfernt, die Erasmusbrücke ca. 10 Minuten zu Fuß. Besonderes Highlight der Unterkunft ist die kleine Terrasse auf dem Deck des Schiffes: dort lassen sich bei schönem Wetter tolle Abende verbringen. Definitiv eine sehr besondere Unterkunft!

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Very good communication, nice location, very nice view. Although the shower needs some maintenance.

name: Romantic deckhouse on historic ship central R'dam
comments: Living in Esthers Boot was incredibly exciting! Sitting on the deck when the lights are turned on in this pulsing city. All the architectural highlights visible, even the Erasmus-Bridge... You don't believe your luck! We were also very interested in Esthers artwork, learning from two magazines about her investment in the preservation of Antarctica via art and networking. All in all it was a great experience which we can highly recommend!

name: Boutique hostel in the middle of Rotterdam
comments:
Hostel Ani & Haakien has become my home away from home. I feel quite emotional writing this review as I am completely staggered by how attached I have become to a place in such a short time - I only booked for 5 days but ended up staying for two weeks! The people who work here have become like my family and I have never felt so at home in a new and foreign country.
