It was the best decision I have ever made to stay at the hostel to meet new people and find my feet in a new city - if only every city in the world had a Hostel Ani & Haakien!!! The rooms, kitchen and bathroom were always super super clean and I really always felt at home. The hostel often hosts fun events and on Thursdays pasta night is a great way to bond with fellow travelers. The free breakfast is also a great perk and the services that the hostel provide make it a perfect option for any kind of traveler - working, exploring, or just visiting the city for a good time! I really cannot emphasize enough how great my stay at the hostel was. I moved into a temporary flat today and am already missing the great vibe and awesome people ;)

The only thing that was a bit of a downfall was the fact that the floors in the dorm rooms are quite squeaky so it gets quite noisy when people are missioning around in the dorms and hallways. But otherwise I give the hostel TOP MARKS for friendliness, cosy-ness, cleanliness, general warmth and just a absolutely great atmosphere. BEST. HOSTEL. EVER!!

name: Boutique hostel in the middle of Rotterdam
comments: A delightful hostel at a great price.  A great combination of trendy and homely.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments:
Det greated us personally upon arrival, showed us around the house, informed us of the do's and don't, showed us the map of the city and provided tips of where to go.
The chalet itself is very nicely decorated, brand new, very spacious with a very romantic terrace facing a canal.
Although it's not in the center of Rotterdam, it's easily reachable by bike within 20'.

Mind you that despite the sign B&B, which stand for Bed & Bred, neither breakfast nor bred are provided. Which in our view was fine, but might just confuse some future visitors.

Det was very helpful, showed us the whole house, gave us tips of places to go, etc.

We highly recommend her place and would gladly visit her again in the future.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: This is a unique and beautifully decorated/equipped house in a fabulous setting. Quiet and peaceful, full of atmosphere and attention to detail. Det was delightful, warm and friendly, doing everything possible to make our stay as lovely as possible. fresh eggs from her chickens were the icing on the cake! Can't wait to book again!!

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments:
Det is a great host.
The 'Hooimijt' is very nice decorated and you have lots of space and privacy. We found the place very clean. Will return for sure!

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Lovely place to stay, easy 10min walk from tram; we were there for a hockey event so the house was in a great location from that point of view

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Det's hooimijt is a lovely, characterful building with a lot of privacy in a green, semi-rural location. Close to everything yet also far away. Nice surroundings for a run or walk.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments:
What a beautiful home Det has created! This was the perfect place for us to stay with our 3 year old while visiting this area. It’s 30 minutes from Gouda & Delft and about 10 into the city by car. There is a fantastic park for children at the end of the street with swan paddle boats and so many other fun things.
Det has a wonderful gift for design and this home has everything we needed. We loved having breakfast in the garden and walking down the street to see the neighbors animals. I highly recommend staying here. It’s in the most beautiful area I saw in Rotterdam.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Amazing! Very comfortable, full kitchen, well stocked. Close to everything you could need. Incredibly accommodating host. Beautiful, open,  bright space.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments:
The apartment is very cozy and stylish. The location is great - you are in the middle of green gardens while the city centre is easily reachable by bike/car/public transport.
It’s a great place to relax for a weekend trip or also for longer stays. Large living room and kitchen area! Complete privacy. Lovely outdoor spaces.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Fijne en zeer mooi verblijf. Rustig gelegen toch dicht bij het centrum. Je hebt veel privacy en door alle ruimte ideaal voor kinderen! Fijn contact met Det :)

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Clean, comfortable, and classy converted barn apartment. We lacked nothing and felt at home. Perfect communication. The city is a reachable by the tram and the residential location is close to the airport and highway for easy escapes to the beach and The Hague. Wonderful playground across the street  which our kids loved (not open everyday) and restaurants are reachable in twenty minutes on foot. The apartment is adjacent to the owners property and enjoys a private entrance and deck. Although not a true Bed and Breakfast, if you are looking for something outside the city center to call home, this home is great!

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: Very nice owners of the apartments. We were with a small child. We liked everything. One day they even came to wash our windows - it was unexpected. Very cozy place. Pleasant communication with the hosts. Thank you, we even recommended it to our friends.

name: Luxe Guest house in Hooimijt
comments: It was wonderful staying a week at Det's guesthouse. Very spacious, clean and beautiful cabin style interior. The kitchen had the basics like salt pepper oil and some extra spices which was nice so you dont have to buy everything being on vacation. Nice dreamy backyard with wildflowers where their friendly dogs came to greet us everyday on the other side of the fence. There even was a washing machine if you needed it, very nice. There is mosquito nets in front of every door and window, so no problem in the summer time. It was very peaceful and quiet. The surroundings where great for walking in nature with our little one. Its also close to a kids amusementpark Plaswijck park and childrens farms. Everything was great! Highly reccomend!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Excellent experience staying on a barge in Rotterdam harbor. The location couldn't be more perfect, I took my coffee up onto the front of the barge every morning to enjoy the sun and view.  The accommodation is in the front part of the barge and is cosy and very nicely decorated. Nice places to eat nearby (e.g. local cafe, v11 light boat, markthal, etc).  Easy to find (I walked from Blaak station). Handy to attractions (I walked to the nearby WaterBus stop near the bridge and had a trip to see the Windmills).  Well equipped kitchen and nice breakfast. Petra is a very welcoming host and helped me with local information, thanks! Would definitely stay again.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
It was a lovely holiday at Veinard in the very Centre of the city of Rotterdam. You can reach a lot of the cities highlights - like the Markt Hal or the famous Erasmus bridge. But it's also possible to rent a 'fiets' and explore the city by bike.
The cabin in the bow of the boat provides a lot of nautical atmosphere and everything that's needed for a comfortable stay. You can even experience the rise of the tide sitting on deck!
It was a pleasure to be hosted by Petra. She was most helpful, courteous and relaxed.
It was so nice to experience a piece of the authentic Rotterdam in the heart of this beautiful and buzzing city.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
The whole experience of sleeping on the boat was great, a true highlight of our trip!
Petra was kind enough to welcome us late in the evening and it was smooth sailing from that point onwards. The cabin was warm and we really enjoyed brewing some of Petra's coffee and tea. It's located centrally and plus you get to say you've slept on a boat!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Definitely worth to experience ! Lovely place , with  beautiful views,  and cosy environment! RECOMMENDED!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
What a nice little hide-away place. Right in the middle of the city and the always lovely Witte de With quarter but at the same time so peaceful and quiet at night. We were a bit scared about it being wavy and all but the moment you lay down on the bed you don't feel it anymore. It's a unique place to stay and definitely worth every penny.
The place was lovely decorated and Petra is super nice. She is very calm and helpful but gives you all the privacy you want. The rooms are bigger than you'd expect and the bed fitted my (very) tall boyfriend perfect. He even managed to have a nice shower. (The bathroom is also a lot bigger than I expected!)
Overall the nicest place, would really recommend it to anyone.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: you'll be rocking with the flow of the river and enjoying and tiny life like experience. Lean and delightfull

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Stop reading reviews and book now! Our only regret is that we could only spend one night due to a delayed flight. Petra is a fantastic host and we loved the space! The pictures really do not do it justice. There's a convenient parking lot only a couple blocks away, and Markthal is just a few blocks away. Unique experience and a perfect location!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
I am torn in writing the great review that Petra deserves. If the space becomes too popular it will not be available for me to stay there again.
Pros- cozy, quirky, great WiFi, location near transit and water taxi.
Con- confined access might be difficult for guest with large luggage
I highly recommend Petra as a host and the unit
TP

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Perfect place to stay in a perfect location in the very heart of Rotterdam. This boat was a great and funny experience to share. Having an aperitif on the deck after an exploring day of the city was delicious. The view on the lightened buildings in the evening is stunning. Esther passed by to say hello as she wasn't on the boat at that moment ; Michiel who welcomed us was a good host and adviser. A place to say to recommend at 100%.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a delightful stay on Esther's boat in Rotterdam. The location in the maritime quarter is really special, and we managed to time our visit with Wereld Haven Dagen which made for a really fun atmosphere in the area. It's lovely to sit on the deck and watch the other boats tootling around the harbour. The decor in the boat is very charming, and we were super impressed at how spacious and thoughtfully fitted out the space is. We would happily stay again.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: This was our first time sleeping on a boat, and it was a nice experience! The central location was super useful, making it convenient to explore the city. Our room was very cozy, and we could also sit on the deck and look at the harbor while having breakfast. The frequent slight rocking of the boat ended up making us a bit nauseous after a while, but that's on us. :)

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: We loved staying on the boat! First time sleeping on one and it made it a magical experience. The boat is super cosy and warm and the space has everything you need to live comfortably for your stay! Super location too, with great views over the harbour and within close proximity to loads of amenities. High recommend this place to anyone looking for a more adventurous and rememberable stay in the Netherlands!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: We stayed for three nights at the end of January, when the temperature was between -2 and +4C. But we were still comfortable in our little apartment on the Veinard and had a memorable stay. It was our first visit to Rotterdam and we enjoyed the Maritime museum (indoors and out), the Niewe Museum, the waterbus up the Maas to Dordrecht and just walking around the streets and parks. The location is terrific for getting around the city centre and we felt that staying on the Veinard was very good value. It's not your standard hotel room and all the better for that.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Great place! It’s the front end of a very long boat. Very quaint and although it’s small I feels quite specious when you sit at the table. The door to go downstairs to enter is quite heavy so I can imagine that maybe if you’re a bit older it might be hard to open.
Everything was as described. Fresh towels and bedsheets. Unfortunately barely any coffee left (only two cups). We were there when it was very hot (30C) and it does get very warm in there but there’s a window in the roof that can be opened to cool the place down at night.
Overall, perfect for when you want to explore the city while having a fun boat experience.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
We had a fantastic time. Brought our bikes and from the boat every city highlight is a 5 minute ride. Still a very peacefull and quite spot.
The cabin itself is super cosy and bigger than we expected from the photos. Highly recommended.

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Amazing houseboat experience! The boat was cozy& the interior is incredible. Truly makes you feel at home, the kitchen has everything you need for a short/ long term stay. The complimentary wine was a lovely touch. Pillows& bed is extremely comfy, the soaps are all organic.  It’s around 20-30 mins from Centraal and an overall great location to visit many places in Rotterdam with ease! The views surrounding the boat is breathtaking& you’ll be able to see a lot of great architecture in the city. Markethal is really close by for yummy food& Museums are a 15 min walk. I really recommend staying here, the experience of a houseboat is so cool. I’ll make sure to  stay here every time I visit Rotterdam :)

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: We had a wonderful time on this wonderful house boat/ship! it was our first time staying on a boat, at first I was a bit nervous with the swaying, but after a couple of hours I came to absolutely love it! the place had everything you need and was very private! the bedroom in particular was super cosy - we didn't want to leave!! getting into the boat was very easy, I had read a review saying it was difficult to get in, but that was not the case at all - and I'm someone who has a slight fear of water. there is a nice walkway all around the boat, with railings to hold on to, and the opening is down some large stairs, that easily fitted our large backpacks and us! The check in person was very friendly and recommend a great coffee shop to us! the boat location is within 10 mins walk to all the main Rotterdam sites which was great! and was a 25min walk to the main station (or shorter on transport)! we would love to come back again to this wonderful house boat/ship!! Thank you Esther!!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: It was a beautiful stay, very close to the city center and nice views directly from the boat! The inside was very comfortable and cute :)

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: What a great spot, right in the heart of the city while being quiet enough due to its unique location. Of course being on a boat, the accommodation is far from normal, but it's uniqueness and way that the property is laid out making amazing use of the structure and features of the boat.  All the facilities you need to base yourself and explore the city. You don't need to spend money on restaurants when you have this as a dining view on deck! The host lives on site and is helpful and approachable if needed too. Highly recommended!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments:
Bear in mind that a house boat is something special.... so comfort may fall a bit shorter than in normal accos. And a steep staircase comes with it.
It was clean, no spiders have been spotted (only some mosquitos) and it has the most necessities. Also coffee capsulas were provided!
Location is great, sometimes noise when all vessels come into port at evening time.
For loading/offloading luggage you can park for some minutes next to the boat, which is a bis plus!

name: Unique room in bow of historic ship central R'dam
comments: Wir hatten einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt in Rotterdam und können es nur weiterempfehlen! Das Haus war nicht nur äußerst komfortabel, sondern auch architektonisch ein echtes Highlight – ein wunderschönes Bild für sich. Die Lage war hervorragend: Wir konnten alles bequem erreichen, sei es zu Fuß oder mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln. Sehenswürdigkeiten, Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten lagen in unmittelbarer Nähe, was unseren Aufenthalt noch angenehmer gemacht hat. Insgesamt war es eine großartige Erfahrung, und wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments: It was a tiny clean room not far away from the center of the city. Although in the description was written that there isn't any essentials available, but everything was included (shampoo, bed sheets, towels, dishes). Jose was a very kind and friendly man. He helped us carrying our stuffs to the flat, which was in the second floor. At the beginning the high amount of very narrow stairs really shocked us, but then we discovered it's the typical Holland Architect! During the day, it was very warm in the hot Summer day. But during the night there wasn't any problem, with the windows open. Jose suggested he will put fans for next guest. Generally, I would recommend this flat. Especially for young people who doesn't have problems with the high narrow Dutch stairs ;)

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments: This stay was absolutely marvelous. Stunning view, amazing bathroom, a balcony to relax. Just be ready to "climb" up a few flights of stairs to the Airbnb itself. Highly recommend staying here. Side note: don't lock the entry door when you first enter since the host lives on the main floor.

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments:
Jose was really nice !
The flat is small, calm and you don’t have noises to disturb you.
The instructions were clear as well, everything went well
I recommand 100%

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments:
Jose was very accommodating regarding check in/out, which helped alot. Plenty of towels were also provided. The apartment is closeby to the coference Ahoy - so if that’s where you’re going, you’re only a short walk away. Metro is also closeby, which was great. It’s a few stairs up but the view is worth it.
It’s a shared entrance to another apartment, but I never saw them. Finally, it gets fairly warm when the sun is out so just be prepared for that as there is no AC and I was pretty unlucky with mosquitos when I was there. Other than that the photos provided represent the experience well.

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments:
Totally recommend the studio from Jose.
Very easy and flexible check-in and out and good communication with host Jose. The studio was very clean and inventory was new and functional. Big shower, the bed was not to soft and the kitchen is rather small but well-equipt.
There is a pub across the street, grocery shopping in 5 minutes and the train station nearby. The location is well-suited if you visit Ahoy (15 minutes on foot) or the city centre (15-20 minutes by foot+train)

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments: We had a great stay , very convenient location for the AHOY. Nice and peaceful place, private and light and airy. Very comfy bed and nice shower.

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments: It's really nice place, the host is friendly and he's willing to help with any questions. The communication is fast, Jose will answer you in just a couple of minutes. 😊  The room is bigger than looks on the photos, it has a beautiful view from the balcony on the city lights. There is a washing machine and a dryer, all needed utilities. I would recommend to anyone for the stay👌

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments:
Het is een mooi appartement! Gelegen in een rustige volksbuurt. Qua locatie is het super. Supermarkt, winkelcentrum, (lekkere) restaurants zeer dichtbij. Ahoy is ongeveer 15 minuutjes lopen. Wat ik jammer vond was dat het bed erg hard is en de gordijnen echt licht doorlatend zijn. Zoals ook in andere review staat, de trappen naar het appartement zijn er wel wat. Bij de voordeur hangen trouwens 2 sleutelkastjes... klein detail als je met het verkeerde kastje bezig bent 😀
Ik heb José voor vertrek een vraag gesteld, helaas nooit een reactie op gekregen...

name: Private Studio Ahoy/Zuidplein
comments:
The location of this AirBnb was nice as it was right next to the Rotterdam Zuidplein Shopping Centre. We've rented bikes at the central station, which was a perfect way to navigate in the city and to the residence.
We've noticed a couple of things that might need a check up: The faucet on kitchenette was a bit loose and unstable. The fridge was not cold enough to keep foods like dairy or meat fresh. We had to unplug the tv each time for it to work. The door to the bathroom opened by itself all the time, which isn't pleasant when using the toilet. The shower didn't drain well, after taking a short 5 minute shower the bathroom floor was flooded each time. There were no blackout curtains, so light comes in easily.
We've paid €158 per night, so we expected a bit more refinement for this price.
Nevertheless, we've slept well, as the mattress and bedding was good. The room was beautifully decorated and the tiling in the showers is gorgeous!
The owner is kind and communicates well.

name: Groepsverhuur Luciana en/of Catherina te Rotterdam
comments: Pieters boat is large, well equiped at a great location with an awesome view…and its a freaking boat!! Pieter is extremely friendly, open and serviceable.

name: Groepsverhuur Luciana en/of Catherina te Rotterdam
comments: We had a good time on pieters boat. The location is very central and the view from the boat at night is fantastic. It was also very cool to be a large group of people together on board. Everything was clean and the kitchen was functional enough to cook something, even though there is not enough space for more than one person cooking. Draft beer was not fresh/did not taste good, boat was cold when we got there (we turned up the heating and everything was quickly heated up). Please note that the boat can rock quite a bit even if it is harbored, so you might get seasick or need a few days afterwards to get used to being back on solid ground ;)

name: Groepsverhuur Luciana en/of Catherina te Rotterdam
comments: Fantastic views, great for big groups. Pieter was very helpful.

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: Dieter's apartment is spacious and perfect for 3-4 people. From the balcony you get good views of the neighbourhood as well. The location is also extremely convenient - close to public transport, supermarkets, cafes and you can cycle to the city center in about 15 minutes. Dieter is a very helpful host - he drove us around the city on our first day to orientate us, and is very responsive whenever my friends and I need assistance. We've enjoyed our stay and would recommend this apartment!

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: I stayed at the apartment for one month and it was perfect. It has everything that you need for temporary purposes, that includes, appliances, dishes, internet, beds, garage, etc. The host was also great! He cared just enough to make us feel welcome and confortable, but not so much that we felt like we were being watched. Plus, as the picture shows, just looking out the window makes it worth the stay.

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: My family and I had a nice stay at this apartment. I was met by Dieter's wife who was kind enough to show me around the apartment complex. Nice and spacious apartment for four adults. Stores and restaurants within walking distance as is public transportation which makes this place a nice location. It's also got a great view of the canal and a very nice sunset at the end of the day. We chose this place also in part of their privately sheltered parking spot which was a fabulous bonus. Dieter was friendly and very responsive to questions and inquiries regarding the apartment and the city. Would recommend.

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: Having had another airbnb host cancel on the day we were travelling to Rotterdam (because she'd double booked her apartment) we were very pleased that Dieter then offered his apartment to us at very short notice. His wife, Daniëlle, even drove back from their holiday to give us the keys and show us the apartment. The apartment is well located, spacious and very well equipped and has a lovely view. It was particularly good to find that we could use their two bicycles. It's in a quiet area but only a 15 minute cycle to the centre. It really felt like a home from home.

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments:
My family and I stayed in Dieter's apartment for two weeks in August/September. It was a wonderful experience that started when we met Dieter for the fist time. Very friendly and kind guy, explained us everything and told us we could call him anytime if there would be something wrong. Which was not the case at all. The apartment was well furnished, clean and a pleasure to stay in. The view is wonderful and we spend many hours on the balcony enjoying it.
We would surely recommend this nice home away from home!
Thanks a lot Dieter!

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments:
We stayed for a month in Dieter´s apartment. The apartment is comfortable and we enjoyed the view. Having a privat parking place was great. Public transport is very close and efficient. Is is not fare from the center.
We would stay there again.

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments:
We stayed at Dieter’s place during a whole month, and we definitely recommend all to choose this place. The view gives you the first WOW experience. It is a lovely place, fantastically located, you can walk to the Centre of Rotterdam by crossing over the Erasmus Bridge, which is a great experience. The house offers all you need for a perfect vacation. We definitely recommend this house and we would definitely stay again.
5 star rating for Dieter and his house. Dieter is an excellent host, very responsive and attentive.
Almerina

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments:
Great spacious apartment at an amazing location. We stayed there for 3 weeks and enjoyed many fantastic sunsets from our living room and balcony.
2 spacious bed rooms so also good if you have some guests over.
Highly recommended!

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments:
We had a great time at Dieter's apartment: nice location, spacious, well equipped and a spectacular view. Dieter was an attentive host. We love to come back next year!
Martin

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: Very good place ,amazing view and amenities.i recommend it at the fullest

name: Fully equipped 2 bedroom appartment
comments: We recommend Dieter's house to everyone who wants to visit Holland and have a nice and enjoyable vacation.  The location of the house is very central, close to everything, the house is wonderful and has all the facilities and amenities.  This is our second visit to Dieter's house and we highly recommend this beautiful house to everyone.  The view of the house is spectacular and very relaxing, perfect for a beautiful vacation. Great place and Dieter is a super host, always reachable, gives the best experience when needed. Thank you again Dieter. You get a 10 out of 10.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments:
I had a fantastic time at Rocco & Fabinas apartment. It’s in a relaxed side street of lively part of Rotterdam but still very easy to reach by tram or even on foot – it’s roughly 15 mins from the centre.

The apartment shows that Rocco and Fabiana know a thing or two about architecture and design. It’s full of stunning details, lovely design touches and finished with great eye for detail. The result is a cosy hideway. Don’t worry if it’s raining – staying in definitely is an option here. The kitchen is small but feels great, the bedroom is comfy. The bathroom has has quirky solutions which turn out to be great for everyday life.

Another plus is the area in which the flat is located. It might look a bit rough but don’t let that put you off. People are friendly and helpful, there a great cafe just down the road and a big supermarket is 10 mins away – what more would you need?

I would definitly recommend the apartment. In fact, I’ll be back as soon as I get the chance.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Our stay at Casa La Rosa was marvellous! The apartment is so well designed (you can tell the owners are architects!) - we loved the layout and design - very good use of space - we love the couch! The bed was also very comfortable, which can be a gamble in many other airBnB places. Easy to get to from central station by tram. Fabiana gave us an excellent overview of the city which meant we saw some lovely sites - actually we fell in love with rotterdam and stayed an extra day - Fabiana was able to accommodate our very last-minute request. Excellent communication - I would recommend, and we would definitely stay here again when we next visit rotterdam - which I hope we will, as we really enjoyed this city.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments:
We stayed in this apt. for 4 days with my wife. The guest wasn't at home so we have been received by a friend that was kind and helped us with the parking and for everything we need.

The house is really nice, a little smaller than how appear on pics, but perfectly fine for a couple or a family (using the sofa bed in the bedroom). Very well designed and organized.

The house was sufficient for the cleaning, far from perfection (we know we are a little maniac but that is). The apt. was probably closed for long so we had to keep the windows open and to remove some dust around. The linen were clean but consumed. We received just a set of 2+2 towels which is not much for 4 days (we anyway could use the washing machine).

The neighborhood is quiet and multietnic anyway not so far to the center (we always walked to there).

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: We zijn heel vriendelijk ontvangen en alles is precies zoals in de beschrijving staat. Snel internet, gratis koffie en thee, eigen badkamer en keuken. Voor de eerste ochtend hadden we het normale ontbijt besteld. Op het eerste zicht lijkt het misschien wat prijzig, maar als je de ingrediënten ziet, en de moeite die erin gestoken is, valt deze perceptie snel weg. Ruim voldoende en heel lekker. We hebben enkel wanneer nodig contact gehad met de verhuurders en dit ging steeds bijzonder vlot. Prijs-kwaliteit meer dan oké. Kortom: ideaal voor een koppel dat graag wat privacy heeft.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: fabiana and rocco's apartment (and their own home upstairs) is extremely beautiful and comfortable. i found them to be thoroughly bright and likeable people (they never intruded but i did have the very good fortune to hangout with them). i would recommend this listing without reservation to anyone who appreciates luxury, architecture or respectful/respect-inspiring hosts !

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Fantastic little apartment near the centre of Rotterdam, in a quiet residential street. Fabiana and Rocco are great hosts and really welcomed us to their home, helping us with parking and getting around, and making my 2 year old son welcome with toys and a travel cot set up on our arrival. Cannot recommend this apt enough. Thank you both for making our weekend so easy, hope to stay again one day

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Fabiana and Rocco were away during our visit, so we did not have an opportunity to meet them.  We were met upon arrival by Gemma (a friend and neighbour) who did an excellent job of welcoming us, showing us the apartment and recommending some highlights of the city.  The apartment is very small, but we knew that going in.  The apartment is about a 20 minute walk from the train station and about the same to the downtown tourist areas.  There is lots of public transportation, but we prefer walking.  The apartment served us very well.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Rocco and Fabiana were very welcoming to their wonderfully restored home. The space is a self-contained unit with ensuite and kitchen and also has a nice balcony - lots of light, and a great base to explore Rotterdam for a few days, good information in the unit for what to see and do, also tips from Fabiana and Rocco. A real bonus was Fabiana cooking a home cooked Italian meal for us and Rocco giving a great tour of their home and the restoration involved. Great hosts - very hospitable, interesting and made every effort to improve our stay.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: We had a very comfortable and enjoyable stay at Fabiana & Rocco's apartment. The location is superb - very easy to get to from the central station by tram (6 mins). The apartment is beautiful, bright and airy, a very effective use of space means it feels like we have lots of room to hang out in. Fabiana & Rocco have also added a lot of homely touches so guests can feel 100% at home. The kitchen is in full working order with  a full range of utensils, crockery and kitchenware, it was really nice for us that we could prepare our own breakfast before we set out for the day. The apartment is quiet and we had restful nights on the comfortable bed. Would highly recommend to our friends and family. Thank you again.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: This was a very last minute booking on our behalf and it was fab, really nice apartment. Check in was perfect and we had a really nice evening on the balcony

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Fabiana's place was great for us. Unfortunately we left early because we wanted to stay in Amsterdam because our flight was out of Amsterdam and we could go out in the night not worry about getting back to Rotterdam. Fabiana was a great host. Very helpful. Her home is warm and inviting. The people of Rotterdam are nice people. I love that there are stores with black hair care products. I would recommend them again.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Friendly and approachable hosts, lovely small street close to anything you might need in the city. We mostly walked but public transport is close by as well.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Fabiana & Rocco Family are very nice, he try hard to introduce Rotterdam and suggest many useful information to us. The apartment with the nice view and good location.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: We haven’t met Fabiana in person, but the check in and check out process was organized very well for us. It is a small and cosy apartment near the tram stop. The kitchen is very well equipped, we found everything we needed to prepare breakfast and warm up meals for dinner. The bathroom is really small, but one can get used to it. The room is very bright, it has big windows and a comfortable bed. It is not very far from the city center, but we didn’t find the walking nice in that area so we used the tram or bicycle instead. Overall, the apartment was clean and comfortable.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: Fabiana and Roccos place was great! There is a steep flight of stairs however the place and location are worth it!

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments:
Fabiana & Rocco's place is small, but comfortable. It provides more than enough amenities & ample privacy. It is also only a 8-minute tram ride from the central station.
Rocco & Fabiana are friendly & gracious hosts.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: We really enjoyed our stay in Fabiana and Rocco’s very well-designed apartment - you can tell they are architects. The apartment is located a pleasant 20 minute stroll from Rotterdam Centraal, past many delicious Surinamese, Thai, Indian and African restaurants in a beautiful part of town. It is also well connected on public transport so easy to get to when you have heavy bags. The building itself is in the lovely old Dutch style, with big windows, overlooking an attractive tree-lined street. Was only sorry we couldn’t stay longer.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments: The place is really nice and bright. It is located near the city center. You can get to all the attractions and the main station in less than 30 minutes by foot. Given the quality and the price for his place, it is for sure a rare find in Rotterdam.

name: Casa La Rosa – B&B / Shortstay
comments:
Fabiana‘s appartement is really great!
Location is nice and not far away from the city center. You can easily reach it by walk.
A bed is located in front of the HUGE window, so morning wake ups were really pleasant in sunny days!
The last and not the least, Fabiana can suggest lots of nice places to visit and share local tips!
It was a real pleasure to stay in Rotterdam there! ;)

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
WAAW!! Best AirBnB experience ever:
M.J. was amazing, she was very helpful and gentle with us. She also respected our privacy and in the same time she offered us great activities that correspond to our interests. The appartement is just perfect. The terrace is very sunny in the morning and it was our favorite place to take the special breakfast. I won't tell everything because I will let M.J. surprising you like she does with us. Enjoy your stay!

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
Marjan made us very welcome to her fantastic apartment. We really loved our stay there and the outside balcony is indeed a great place to enjoy for a breakfast or in the evening for nice glass of wine that was given to us by the host!

Everything was as exactly, and even better, as described. She even gave us some Dutch supporters gear that we used to watch the exciting Holland-Costa Rica game at a pub at the Meent.

We loved it and most definitely on our next trip to Rotterdam will stay at her place again!

Thanks again Marjan for the great hospitality shown!

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
Marjan was just simply amazing. As a Rotterdam veteran (my fifth trip), I was pretty self sufficient for this trip and didn't need a lot of assistance putting together things for my stay but when there was a problem or a question? She was right there with the answer.

The apartment was absolutely gorgeous. The fresh flowers (even in early September really helped warm the atmosphere. The roof garden was delightful and a beautiful spot to spend an evening with wine and delicious Dutch cheeses. Her complete guide to the apartment and nearby local restaurants was extremely helpful. I cannot thank Marjan enough for her warmth and hospitality and look forward to staying with her again in 2015.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments: It was a wonderful experience to stay in MJ's apartment, though we were not able to meet MJ in person since she was travelling during our stay, but MJ has been so thoughtful and detailed in arranging everything well in advance.  MJ has arranged her friend Hum to pick us up from the train station even though her apartment is close to the train station, we don't expect this luxury 6 star service but this unexpected service really made our journey an easy one with all big luggages from Asia.  Hum is very friendly and helpful and provide us tips and local information including weather forecast information which is so helpful to us.  MJ has arranged everything including lovely tulips to decorate and welcome us with a beautiful welcome card too.  We were so impressed by her thoughtfulness and attention to details as well quality focus.  Besides, MJ has arranged many things including bread, eggs, cheese, fruits, juice, milk, wine and beverage for us to prepare our daily breakfast, we don't have to rush to buy daily goods and can absolutely enjoyed so well during this short trip in Rotherham.  We found everything we need and the apartment is nicely decorated and very clean and spacious, it was very quiet at night and we can rest very well.  Lots of books to read and according to my husband it is definitely feast for the eyes.  There is a little canal in front of the apartment and we enjoyed so much the view of lovely swans passing by as well as birds flying in the sky.  The little balcony is also beautiful decorated by MJ with plants and flowers.  We found everything we need in the kitchen for cooking and the espresso coffee machine is fabulous too.  MJ prepared lots of candles where we can tune the apartment in different mood during the evening.  It is very bright in day time too.  The neighbourhood is very nice and we found many restaurants and shopping nearby, including the most famous Markthal market with 5 minutes walk.  In general, words cannot express our wonderful experience in MJ's apartment and it is definitely an unforgettable airbnb experience with MJ and Hum for they are really sincere and extend the most warmest hospitality that we had never experience before therefore we would highly recommend to stay in MJ's apartment if you want to experience a true airbnb journey (both hardware and software).

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
Meeting MJ for the first time was like meeting an old friend you haven't seen for years.
She very kindly met us at the station and showed us the hotspots around the neighbourhood where would be staying. MJ couldn't have been more helpful.

Her home was very warm and welcoming with beautiful flowers on the balcony, a welcome card for us and flowers in the lounge. The apartment had a very homely feel with a beautiful contemporary design. This very quiet apartment was only moments from the city centre and train station in a safe neighbourhood.
The apartment had a lovely feeling of space and was ideal for the two of us for lovely weekend.

She had stocked the larder in fridge with local goodies for us to eat which was completely unexpected.
She stayed in contact to make sure we had found everything and if we needed anything.

The perfect apartment. The perfect host.

We hope to stay here again next year.

MJ is a great ambassador for AirBnB she really lives the values the company have stated, I cannot recommend staying here enough if I could give it six stars I would.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
MJ is a very welcoming host. As we arrived, she showed us the apartment and also the neighborhood (she lives just next to the city center). There is plenty of parking spots in het street, and she registered our plate so we would not have to pay for the parking. She even booked a restaurant for us.

The apartment is beautiful, very comfortable. She asked us what we liked for breakfast so she could buy us some good food before we arrived.

If you're up for a stay in Rotterdam as a couple, het apartment is perfect.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
Flat is really cozy with nice furnitures and nice spaces and with an outstanding view of the canal. Is really relaxing to watch the water flowing while eating something in the living area. Location is really convenient, just a 2-min walk from the Meent and a 10 min walk from the Martkthal. A lot of bar and restaurants around.
MJ is a great host. In the apartments I found a lot of very useful information about the home, the neighbourhood and the whole Rotterdam. She was very friendly and always reachable with a message.
It was really a pleasure to have a few days stay in this great apt. Totally recommended!

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
M.J. was the perfect host. She is a very friendly and nice person, always available, if you need help. The apartment was excellent, lots of books to read, what I really like. I could use everything in the flat and it was like a second home.
You can find everything you need in this apartment, the balcony is really beautiful for a short rest after walking through the town or to spend an evening outside.
Thanks so much, M.J.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments:
This was the second visit to MJ's lovely apartment home. Seeing MJ again was just like meeting an old friend.
Her apparent is beautiful, peaceful and the flowers on the sunny balcony give a garden feel to sitting out with your breakfast.
This apartment is an oasis in a busy vibrant city.
MJ very generously provided everything for our first breakfast and checked the next morning to make sure everything was OK for us.
Beautifully clean and so well presented it made our visit the Jazz festival even more special.
MJ embodies the ethos of AirB&B, highly recommended.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments: MJ is a very generous host. She was generous in her time, always quick to answer questions or provide help, and very generous in providing a well stocked fridge, a huge bowl of fruit, coffee and teas, and just about anything else we could need to make us feel at home. Her guide to the local area, where to eat and shop was really useful and we really enjoyed using the guide books provided to discover the city (great art, striking architecture and a cool, interesting vibe). The apartment is as stylish and comfortable as described and I adored having what felt like a personal library to enjoy after a day exploring the city. The location is central but the street and the apartment are very quiet. There are interesting shops, a supermarket, excellent cafes and restaurants nearby, and the regular Tuesday & Saturday market as well as the stylish new Markthal are only a few minutes away. (Try Noc Noc for really good coffee and then browse the nearby vintage shops.) We walked everywhere but there is a tram stop just around the corner and it is an easy 10 minute stroll to the central railway station (an easy option for taking a day trip to The Hague and Delft). Even with the lovely warm late summer weather we were surprised how uncrowded and relaxed the city felt and how easy it was walk around and enjoy. MJ's apartment was the perfect home base for our week's visit; we could have happily stayed for longer.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments: Bright and Spacious apartment in lively Cental of Rotterdam. Short distance can find many restaurants and shops, and convenient to the metro too. Great communication with the host M.J. and we received detailed directions to find the apartment, which was much appreciated M.J. also kindly organised some welcome fruits and breakfast for our first 2 days stay. Would definitely stay again! Thankyou M.J.

name: Stylish apartment on Rotte canal with roof garden
comments: The location of the apartament is excelent, closet to public transport, stores, restaurants, supermarket. The view of the apartament is beautiful. Marjan was very friendly and great hostess, communication was quick and attentive.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Maarten was very nice, offered great information about the city and activities we could be doing.
His appartment is very cosy, comfortable, modern and clean and we absolutely loved the view.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: nice appartment and nice view and place

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Maarten' s apartment is perfect! Maarten is a helpful and wise friend. He showed us the places worth going downtown and gave us good recommendations. The apartment has a big balcony, which is the best part of  the house. We will definitely choose Maarten's apartment the next time we come to Rotterdam！

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Maarten's place has been the perfect place for our Rotterdam trip. It is very nicely located next to a bridge, and the amazing glass front of the apartment plus large balcony on the top floor of the apartment building allow one to savor the view.
We were only two, but the place has a separate sleeping room with a total of three beds (one double) and one couch. So there could probably sleep up to 5 people.
Marteen gave drew us on a city map a tour that fit our requirements and time available, perfectly. We enjoyed the walk with all the architectural sights a lot! We started our sight-seeing trip by taking the bus a few stations to the Museumpark and from there by foot.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: The room has a nice view of the canal and with so many beds, it is great for a family or a group of friends.  Maarten provided us with excellent and frequent communication about the listing.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Very central place, nice and clean residencial house, with everything you would need. Great view for the canal and bridge.
Marteen was a very nice host and even picked us up at Amsterdam airport (30 mins by car) late at night.
Would recommend this place to anyone!

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: I had a very good stay at Maarten's Airbnb. The view from the balcony is amazing and the place is very good ass well.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Nice view from the balcony with easy access to supermarket, shops and public transportation.
In general, a good place for stay.
For parking, the parking place which the host helped to pay first is not the underground parking garage as shown on the photos. Need to double check with the host for parking location first or you may pay additional fee for parking at wrong place like us.
You'll also need to prepare your own detergent/soap for using washing machine for free but need to pay €5 for dryer each time.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Good value for the money with great view from the balcony.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Very friendly and helpful host. He took his time out to guide us with places to go etc. the place was really a surprise .. really spacious and clean and have varieties of board game available for the night gamers.
The view was amazing and the location just couldn't ask for more.
Overall we wished we had more time at the place. Would really choose this place again if opportunity arise for our trip here.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Absolutely amazing place to enjoy Rotterdam!
Maarten was a lovely person and a fantastic host, he communicated well before the trip and knew all the hot spots in the city for us to visit.
His apartment was in an amazing location with the best balcony to enjoy the weather.
Highly recommended place to stay!
Thanks Maarten!!!

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Very beautiful view, location is awesome

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Maartens place is in great location view is great from the balcony it is in easy reach of tram network that covered all our needs. We had everything we needed for comfortable stay in the apartment it was well equipped and only a few yards from the super market. Maarten was great host met us at the apartment gave as an overview of city before he left which was very useful. Communication was good, and he also provided excellent directions to find the apartment in first place.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Maarten's apartment was spacious and comfortable for the four of us (2 adults and 2 children). The sofa is new and very comfy (different than the photos). The rooms are a good size and the views out of the huge windows are really lovely.  The kitchen was well equipped and the oven quick and easy to use. The front view over the inner courtyard is pleasant too. The apartment feels quite private as it seems to be just one of two accessed from the lift on that level. At street level, the side communal door is just metres from a well stocked bakery and large grocery store. There is a choice of transport options from the square (bus or tram into the centre or train station) also there is a direct tram to Schiedam in the other direction. Maarten took the time to give us plenty of local information when we arrived as we were staying for one week.  Even though the weather wasn't always great, the apartment was all that we had hoped for and comfortable to relax in. Highly recommend.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Fantastic location, view of the river and bridge. Warm and homely and a joy to come back to after a day out. Loved it.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments:
Great view! City lights, canals and bridge - enjoy it at a terrace, living-room or just in a bedroom - flat boasts an inspiring wall-size window!! Just great!
The host is very friendly and helpful!

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Great place, spacious apartment with everything needed for a comfortable stay. Nice location. Lovely terrace  with a scenic view. I would love to stay at this place again. Highly recommended.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Nice place in the north of Rotterdam, nearby shops and public transportation. Nice, big balcony, nice beds and we felt comfortable at home. Maarten was a nice and friendly host, we had a good experience!

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view

Hartelijke groeten en tot ziens, Maarten!

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Maarten's apartment was a joy to stay in.  It was easy to get around Rotterdam as there was an excellent transport infrastructure just minutes from the accommodation. The balcony was exceptional for sitting and relaxing. Maarten was an exceptional host. He was so generous and kind with his time and knowledge about all the questions I asked.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: Highly recommend! Beautiful view from the balcony and supermarkets nearby. My family loves this place

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: This accommodation is definitely worth it.  Especially the view.

name: Sleep by the bridge with great view
comments: We arrived by cruise to Rotterdam early in the morning and Marteen allowed us to check in early and even picked us up at the cruise terminal for a small fee. Marteen's place was roomy and well equipted and convenient. The large front balcony and sliding glass doors off the living room and bedroom overlooking the canal were very nice. Thanks for everything.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
We stayed at the Easter weekend at Yvonnes cozy little house and we enjoyed it very much. Yvonnes B&B is perfectly equipped, very clean and furnished in a comfortable and modern way. Yvonne is very hospitable and she does all to fit it well for her guests. There is a big and very interesting museum garden behind the house for a nice little walk in the evening or just sitting around.

The B&B is located in Overschie in the outskirts of Rotterdam in a nice and calming area as part of an old village. Cycling tours to Delft, Den Haag and the coastline are fun and mostly easy (depends on the wind), also a trip to the center of Rotterdam, by bus or by bike is easy going. Bikes can be rent in the neighborhood. Ask Yvonne!

A bus stop is a 10 Minute walk away with direct connection to the main railway station in central Rotterdam..

Yvonnes house is an interesting central spot because of it's near mix of rural areas, industrial off-areas, typical dutch canals, rivers and bridges and all the shopping opportunities, cultural and architectural highlights of Rotterdam.

We recommend this house and Yvonnes welcoming manner and her overall courtesy. And her opulent breakfast. And Arthur. And the dogs and birds.

We will come back.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Many thanks Yvonne, for making us so welcome.  Your little house is just magical, an oasis of traditional Holland 1 km from the urban city.  We had the best of all worlds; a private little house of our own, in a lovely peaceful and pretty street, somehow just minutes away from everywhere we wanted to be. We had everything we needed, and the breakfast was delicious.  I would warmy and heartily recommend staying here to anyone, you really do get the very best of everything - from parking to privacy, wonderfully comfy beds to the beautiful garden for sunny breakfasts.  Faultless!

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Rotterdam served as a second pitstop during a spring Holland road trip . This charming yet modern town is peaceful. And Yvonne played a special part in this visit by accepting a last minute request a day prior to arriving.
The photos of her charming guest house is amazing. The actual sight in person overwhelmed in beauty and cosiness in real life.
Yvonne ensured every moment through our stay was stress free. She went beyond the normal host role, and reminded me of a warm and welcoming mom willing to brighten your day with her endless sweetness and caring nature. From offering tips, talks, providing the perfect breakfast, and just making her home super welcoming, makes you wish a week could be spent here. Highly recommend!!

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
De Speelman is een zeer knusse B&B met heerlijke bedden en een meer dan goed verzorgd ontbijt. Huisje is goed onderhouden en van alle luxe voorzien, mooie linnengoed en een fijne warme douche.

Vanuit de B&B ben je, met het openbaar vervoer, zo in hartje Rotterdam. Ook goed bevallen was het om vanuit de B&B, met de fietsen die Yvonne ter beschikking had gesteld de omgeving van Overschie en Rotterdam te verkennen. Yvonne weet leuke bezienswaardigheden en is erg gastvrij, met inachtneming van de privacy. Heerlijk genoten van de witte welkomst wijn.

Parkeer mogelijkheden bij de B&B waren er genoeg. Yvonne reageert vlot op reserveringsverzoeken en berichten, er zaten geen minpunten aan het verblijf van de B&B De Speelman. Echt een leuke overnachtingsplek, een aanrader.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Yvonne was such a kind friendly accommodating host. She even picked us up & dropped us off at the station. Breakfast was wonderful & the house was so Cosy in a quite area with s lovely view of the museum garden We'd highly recommend her place
Yvonne etait super Gentiles & tres arrangeante. Elle nous a même récupéré & déposé à la gare. Le petit déjeuner était super. La maison très cosy dans un environnent calm & typé dinné une vue sympa du jardin du musee . Nous la recommandons chaudement

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Dear Yvonne,

it was a beatiful time I've spent at your De Speelman B&B appartment. Thank you very much!

The place I like much more then any 5* hotels. Because of Yvonne's hospitality and amazing location it is a real place you don't want to leave.

Lovely and cozy house, with fantastic garden view, morning birdsongs, fresh air and relaxing atmosphere. Exactly the place where you should come after long day in Rotterdam.

I was surprised by a lot of extra sweets everywhere and strawberry in my fridge. Breakfasts were always in time and very tasty.

Also Yvonne gave me a bicycle so I could spend whole day riding nearby Rotterdam. Also Yvonne made an excursion in nearest garden-museum, which actually has an entrance from the courtyard.

Don't be afraid of the airport nearby. It doesn't make a lot of noise and will not bother you.

I hope you stay here when visiting Rotterdam because I definetely will! Thank you one more time Yvonne, you are the best!:)

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: It's a cute apartment in a lovely old street just 15 minutes from Rotterdam's modern centre by bus. Yvonne's hospitality and helpfulness are outstanding. The bed is big and comfortable; the kitchen/sitting room well equipped and the fridge full of all the basics you need. In fact, you won't need much anyway because of the lavish breakfast Yvonne provides. There's a fascinating garden area behind that links to the fascinating museum of old village life (the museum is only officially open on Sunday afternoons). The staircase up the bedroom and bathroom is narrow and steep, but that's just part of the character of the place. Highly recommended — a glimpse of old Holland right beside the contemporary city.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Yvonne was the ideal host. Everything exceeded expectations, the place is cozy and very clean and Yvonne was very responsive and flexible. Breakfast was a delightful and relaxing start to each day while I was there, and Yvonne was flexible about timing of everything and checked in to make sure I had everything I might need, which I always did as she thought of everything. She lent me a bike my first day to take to the art fair, which was only a 12 minute ride away. It's in a charming city residential area that I loved being in to relax between art week events. I'd strongly recommend to friends and family!

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Very friendly host, very clean, very beautiful old Dutch street

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Such an amazing experience at all levels of my stay (5 days) in this charming place. Yvonne is a lovely and very friendly host who literally takes care of you from your arrival until your leave. She is never far away if you need anything and welcome you with an everyday warm smile. The house, for 2 persons ideally, is absolutely cosy, clean and very comfortable, well equipped (more than expected since I found the fridge full of food!!) and surrounded by a green nature, a peaceful and beautiful garden. Nothing is missing! Last but not least, unlikely I did not have time to enjoy Yvonne's breakfast since I was working and leaving the house in early morning but she was asking me everyday to prepare a breakfast and what I like.  Yvonne's place is really unique, not far from Rotterdam city center, in a historical area with typical old streets. All is perfect to rest and relax for 1 guest or a couple, for a week-end or during holidays in The Netherlands.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Charming place on quiet and pretty street, lovely small restaurant a short walk up the street.  Yvonne very friendly and helpful and me and my two terriers felt right at home! Highly recommend

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: WOW! Yvonne's neighborhood is charming, and she is a delightful hostess. Warm, offering help, asking what i needed was balanced perfectly with giving me space to sit in her amazing yard in the mornings - worth the price of the stay! The bed is very good and the home/neighborhood oh-so-wonderfully quiet. Convenient busses took me from Yvonne's haven into Rotterdam and the Hague and after full days of touring, "coming home" was pure delight.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Het verblijf bij Yvonne was prima. Fijn huisje, dicht bij de stad en toch erg rustig. We mochten fietsen lenen en het ontbijt was goed. Verder veel extraatjes (chocolade, nootjes, drankje). Persoonlijk had ik op iets meer privacy gehoopt. De tuin wordt gedeeld met Yvonne en haar bezoekers, waardoor we binnen bleven en liever niet in de woonkamer zaten, omdat die vanuit de tuin direct zicht is.

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Je voyage régulièrement et je n'ai jamais eu une hôte aussi gentille et aux petits soins. Nous avons toujours eu droit à un déjeuner de roi, avec des viennoiseries, des petits pains, du jus d'orange pressé, café à volonté,... Un festin tous les matins. Le logement n'est pas hyper grand, mais tout est fonctionnel, et vraiment très propre ! On a même eu un espace pour dîner dehors ! De plus , on avait un endroit sécurisé pour nos vélos. Yvonne est attentive à nos besoins. Elle aura toujours de bons conseils pour les visites. Le logement est super bien situé pour visiter Rotterdam et alentours. On s'est régalé à vélo. On hésitera pas à y retourner !

name: B&B De Speelman (home; 2 pers)
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Wir hatten eine wunderbare Zeit bei Yvonne! Schon im Vorfeld war die Kommunikation super – herzlich, schnell und unkompliziert. Beim Ankommen haben wir uns direkt willkommen gefühlt: Yvonne ist unglaublich freundlich und aufmerksam.
Die Unterkunft ist liebevoll eingerichtet und voll ausgestattet – es hat wirklich an nichts gefehlt. Eine besonders schöne Überraschung waren die Knabbereien und ein paar Dinge im Kühlschrank zur Begrüßung. Auch die Klimaanlage hat bei den sommerlichen Temperaturen für angenehme Nächte gesorgt.
Ein besonderes Highlight war das Frühstück: Frische Brötchen, Eier, Joghurt, Obst und Müsli – perfekt für einen guten Start in den Tag! Außerdem hatten wir die Möglichkeit, Fahrräder zu leihen, was wir sehr gerne genutzt haben. Die Radwege in Rotterdam sind top und in nur etwa 20 Minuten ist man mitten im Zentrum.
Yvonne hatte auch tolle Tipps parat, was man in und um Rotterdam unternehmen kann – sehr hilfreich, gerade wenn man zum ersten Mal in der Gegend ist.

name: Near Erasmus University long stay.
comments:
I came to the Netherlands for 3 days of conferencing. My daily destinations were not close to this residence but THIS choice of accommodation was absolutely the right pick. I got there late in the evening and was warmly welcomed. My timid request to have a little something to eat having sacrificed searching for food so I could navigate an unfamiliar location to arrive before 10 pm was responded to with ease and kindness. Very grateful for that.
The room was warm and comfortable with good ventilation. I have an allergy to fabric softner and air freshners- this room was fragrance free and a pleasure to sleep in. As a whole the house was clean and simple to navigate. Conversation with her other guest as well as her delightful pride and joy Ava-Luna made a sociable welcome without pressure.
The designation of superhost is absolutely correct! Thank you Sandra Eliza!
PS: AirBnB the address is correct but the GPS coordinates are a bit off. It lands you a few houses away. Not sure if that can be tweaked- another traveller may find it disorienting if they are unable to sort out the way address listing are structured.

name: Near Erasmus University long stay.
comments: A great host with a big warm heart! Eliza was always kind and thoughtful, and her house was so pretty. My room was clean with an amazing view, and the location of the house was fine as well. I had my own fridge and freezer, so it was nice for a long stay. Thank you, Eliza<3 I miss you already :)

name: Near Erasmus University long stay.
comments: The review "SUPERHOST" its not enough for Eliza!!!!!It's my first time to stay somewhere with airbnb,and i was sceptical....BUT Eliza is a very friendly person,her home is super clean,the location is very quiet,and the home is quiet as well!!!I Eliza,was waiting for me the night i arrived with a hot cooked meal waiting for me....!!!!!One day when i was away for the whole she called me to see if everything was OK.somethin that I appreciated so much!!!!I couldnt be a good host as Eliza for sure!!!!I am grateful!!!!! Thank you Eliza so much for everything!!!!!

name: Gezellig & rustig appartement vlakbij het centrum
comments: We had a lovely stay in Aukje's place. She welcomed us and it really felt like a home - not just a business. The area is peaceful and has a local atmosphere yet is about 20 minutes pleasant walk from the Central Station. There's also a metro stop even closer that will quickly get you into the centre or to The Hague the other way. On our first day we did everything on foot - walking right into the centre. The second day we got the tourist day card which included The Hague. Rotterdam is a wonderful city and if you want to feel right at home there, stay at Aukje's place. She responds quickly to any questions and gave me a good vegan restaurant recommendation. The kitchen is well appointed with everything you need to enjoy a good meal and the shower works well and there a lot of TV channels including Netflix and Youtube with comfortable sofas to watch them. Finally the apartment is full of light and has two balconies! Thanks Aukje.

name: Cozy apartment with garden!
comments:
Evlein is prompt, organised and very helpful in the arrangements for my stay at her apartment. The location of the apartment is excellent for transport links, very friendly street and restaurants and a lovely park nearby.
The apartment is lovely, decorated in style, has a nice garden to enjoy what is left of the summer. I have stayed there a couple of weeks and look forward to staying through the next month.

name: Cozy apartment with garden!
comments: Evelien is a very kind and welcoming host! The apartment is fantastic! I think it is even better than the pictures show (and they already show how nice it is!) The location is fabulous - close to a cute shopping street with gourmet food (10 min walk max), only steps from the lake and nice running/walking trails, with a great Italian restaurant and a pub right on the same street. If you have never been to Rotterdam and you are only visiting for a few days, you may want to be more centrally located. But I stayed here for two months while working at the university (also only a 15-20 min walk away) and loved it! Both the tram and metro are only five mins away so it is also easy to get around. Evelien left lots of helpful recommendations for restaurants, shops, etc and was always helpful in answering any questions (and even rescuing me when I embarrassingly locked myself out by accident)! But she also gave me lots of privacy. I can't say enough great things about Evelien and her beautiful place! Highly recommend!

name: Cozy apartment with garden!
comments:
Evelien was a great host. Since my flight to Amsterdam had got there early in the morning, and her prior guest left in the morning, she had the place ready for me by 9:15 am. That was very nice and kind of her.

The place is VERY clean, modern and I felt right at home. The kitchen was well equipped too. There were plenty of towels and the bed was very comfortable. The view behind was nice.

The one part she didn't even mention is the proximity (4 min walk) to the water and running trails. The place is about a 10 min walk to the tram stop (Voorschoterlaan), maybe a 12 min walk to the metro station, and a 15 min walk to the Albert Heijn grocery store(thai restaurant, indian restaurant...etc), which is very convenient. The tram 7 brings you directly from Rotterdam central to Voorschoterlaan. The tram 7 took less than 10 mins to Erasmus University and the frequency was amazing even late into the night.

Overall, I was very satisfied with my stay and the place is a gem. Evelien and her boyfriend are great hosts too. You can't go wrong with her place.

name: Cozy apartment with garden!
comments: The neighbourhood where the house is located is quite good, next ot he house there's a river and a beautiful view. Everything it's close. Evelien was very good host, she gives to you a entire list of where to eat, where to go and she is available if you have any questions. The house is really cozy and beautiful. Excellent!

name: Cozy apartment with garden!
comments:
The apartment was lovely, with a living space perfect for hosting dinners and comfortably fitting up to seven people. The kitchen was well-equipped, though there was no dishwasher, but everything worked great. The garden was wonderful and truly unique in busy Rotterdam. During the few sunny days we had, it felt like a true piece of heaven. The bedroom was also very spacious. The highlight, however, was the location—living right next to the lake was amazing, with many evening promenades on the gorgeous little bridges.
I would highly recommend this apartment to any young working couple or students from Erasmus University.

name: ZooZooHouse
comments:
Great apartment, huge, bright, fully equipment and convenient location. 5 mins'walk to the central station. 10 mins'walk to the city center.
We lived here for 4 months and we love this lovely apartment. Don't worry about anything because Cris will help you out at any time. She is really nice and warm-hearted.
Perfect experience and we gonna come back sometime in the future.
Definitely recommend.

name: ZooZooHouse
comments: I am an exchange student in RSM this spring. for 6 months. My experience in Cristina's place is extraordinary and unprecedented! The apartment lies just opposite to the Central station and next to the China Town. The location is very good for traveling in Europe and living in Rotterdam. There are stores nearby and public transportations such as metro, bus, tram and train. The two-floor apartment has a fully-equipped kitchen with every tools you need for cooking and baking. The two bedrooms are cozy with good view and light. Bathroom is designed in a innovative way, which is very impressive for users. Living room is very good for small party and gathering of friends. I spent my whole winter here in Rotterdam. The hot water and heater makes me feel like in spring and even in summer at home lol. The house even equips with printer and speaker which is enjoyable and convenient. The landlord, Cristina, is always helpful and responds to every messages swiftly. I'd like to say, everything is perfect here and thank you very much for hosting me and Juri in your apartment in Rotterdam! I also want to recommend here to everyone on Airbnb. Choose here if you visit Rotterdam! If I got a chance, I will come back!!

name: ZooZooHouse
comments: Lovely apartment, very spacious with great views of city. Perfect location, only 2 minutes walk away from Central Station. Cristina was very quick to reply to all my emails. Thanks again Cristina :)

name: ZooZooHouse
comments:
We stayed at Cristina apartment for three months, and it was a fantastic experience! The location is perfect, right in the city center and just a 3-minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal station. The apartment is bright, spacious, and clean, with lovely views.
Cristina was very friendly and always quick to respond to any questions or needs. I felt very comfortable throughout my stay. I would highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: Beautiful room in Rotterdam
comments: It's a beautiful tidy room with a good location near to city center Blaak. We really enjoy the four days in Rotterdam. Nice roommates, nice kitchen and balcony. We love it！

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: The apartment is shared with Manon, she was very kind and helpful!! The rooms have very small windows, but they were clean and tidy.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Staying at Manon's was exactly what I had expected - she is a friendly, open and caring host.
What I did not expect was the bathroom to be so nice and just for myself, the nice garden with a great varanda and the location to be even better than I had imagined. Even though you are in the center of Rotterdam, you do not have the burden of noise or crowds.
Am gonig to miss it all! :-)

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
A group of us stayed at Manon's place for a few days as we had a wedding in Rotterdam to attend. Manon was warm and welcoming, and was very patient leading up to our arrival, fielding my queries, requests and last-minute changes. Her place is as her pictures portray and the living and dining areas are rather spacious. We loved her big garden!
As per previous reviews, the bedroom configuration is a little odd - one of the bedrooms can only be accessed through the bathroom - but it was nothing too difficult to work around. The rooms, beds, and bathroom were all comfortable and clean.
Location-wise, I liked that it is in a rather quiet street, yet close to a main road with shops, cafes, and restaurants. It is also conveniently near the city centre, and easily accessible via tram and Metro. Manon was also clear and helpful with giving directions.
Thanks for letting us stay at your place Manon!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
A beautiful flat with lovely decoration and a nice garden and terrace!
Quite near the center with a good restaurant around the corner.
Manon was very welcoming and came to greet us even though we arrived quite late.
The bed rooms and shower are located in the subterranean space and are therefore nicely cool during hot summer days whilst being slightly humid.
A beautiful black cat sometimes visits.
Overall a very nice stay!
Only people who mind very narrow stairs or no sunlight in the bedrooms should think twice.
Thank you, Manon!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: My husband and I had a great stay in Manon's apartment. The kitchen and main living area is lovely and bright and equipped with everything you need. Bedrooms and bathroom downstairs are very good too, we just had to get used to the steep climb up and down the very narrow stairs! Manon was there to greet us when we arrived and was very pleasant and always good about getting back to me with any questions I had before and after we arrived in Rotterdam. Would definitely recommend her place and would stay here again!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Lovely decorated appartement with a porch and garden. The kitchen is quipped above average and there is a nice dining area. Be aware though that the sleeping area is in the basement. It can be a bit cold and humid in winter and the windows are tiny. The house was kept very clean.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Apartment is amazing, ideal for a nice stay in Rotterdam. Luckily the weather was beautiful for us in May 2016. 3 of us stayed here for UFC Rotterdam. Great public transport links, had no problems at all. Manon is very nice, she let us check in early and check out late as we had an evening flight.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Manon was friendly and made us feel welcome. She was contactable and responded quickly to questions.
Nice, well maintained apartment with everything that we needed. Living space upstairs bright and airy although bedrooms and bathroom on basement level.
Great location close to city, within walking distance to everything we wanted to do, but still quiet with the bonus of an outside space.
