Manon let us leave our luggage at the apartment on a check out date as we had a late flight which was much appreciated.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Manon's apartment is vary beautiful, well equipped, full of light, clean, peaceful and with a charming terrace and garden. Actually the only thing wrong is that the bedrooms and the bathroom are in the basement that is just a bit humid.
Anyway the apartment is vary vary nice and the price is correct for the quality of the apartment.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: From start to finish Manon was a great host. She communicated promptly and effectively. She was warm when we arrived and helpful with our questions. The apartment was as advertised, clean and bright. She was also kind enough to hold onto our bags our last day until we left town, a big help!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: The location was great and the living area had great natural light!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Location - Perfect for everything. In the heart of the real city.
Transport - The Metro, less than 2 minutes walk away, provides excellent access to the whole city - as does the trams, which are 5 minutes walk away
Apartment - Exactly as described. Clean. Idyllic. Calm. Comfortable. Homely
Hosts - Kind. Informative. Communicative. Generous.

Manon and Manfred made sure to stay in touch with us before arrival so we had all the information we needed. They offered help for when we were there, but as the location was ideal, there really was no need to bother them.

Unfortunately, we didn't have an opportunity to meet Manon, but Manfred met us at the apartment and gave us a full tour. It matched the description and photos perfectly. A home away from home!
A wonderful, homely place, for people who wish to enjoy the sights of Rotterdam, as well as relax in the apartment, or in the garden.

Whilst other reviews mention 'dampness' in the bedrooms, we disagree. It has more to do with the weather of the city than the apartment. It has great heating, there are windows for ventilation, and all the things you need when you are away for a weekend, or longer.
Absolutely perfect. Thanks to both!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Lovely, bright home in a quiet neighborhood. Close to public transport and other amenities.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: This is a great home, really comfortable and light inside, in a great location. Perfect for exploring Rotterdam. We would definitely recommend this place to others, and stay here again.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
We had a great stay at Manon's place. The house is really central. It's an old house, but we like that. Everything is taken care of. The house was clean as well. The sleeping area and bathroom are in the basement. There are some small windows. But it can feel and smell a bit humid. But we didn't really mind.
Communication with Manon was perfect. Altough we didn't get to meet her, she was very kind and fast in responding. Thanks for the good stay!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Manon's place is a wonderful place to stay during a trip in Rotterdam! It is spacious, clean, nicely decorated, well-equipped and it has a sunny balcony.  The place is located in the museum quarter, and near to nice cafés and restaurants. We really enjoyed our stay here and highly recommend this place!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Great host, extremely kind and thoughtful for getting the place ready early for us to check in early due to our long flights and jetlag.
Easy location, cafes, restaurants, shops, museums all within walking distance. Narrow stairs didn’t bother us at all. Thank you Manfred (Manon’s husband) for lovely place.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: The place was very nice and cozy. The balcony was superb.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
It was a great location to stay!
Central quiet spot close to the highlights of Rotterdam. Very friendly host! 5 stars!!!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Had a wonderful 2 nights here. I was looking for a relaxing place with a garden, close to the center. It was exactly that. The house is light and spacious. I’ll be back for sure!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
The accommodation is located in an ideal area to access the whole of Rotterdam... on a quiet street only 10 minutes walk to the centre, 2 minutes walk to the hospital. Beds were all very comfortable and there were 2 showers which Meade things easier. Kitchen was well equipped and the dining table a great size, there is a balcony overlooking a very pretty and private garden.
I would definitely recommend

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
The kitchen area and outside patio were the highlights of this space. We enjoyed breakfast on the back patio in the mornings looking out over the garden area. Bedrooms are both located in the basement, which in the summer is nice because it is cooler, but the stairs leading down might be challenging for some. They are quite steep, even by European standards and they curve making it challenging to bring any luggage downstairs safely.
There are some limitations to the bathroom downstairs, which were explained when we checked in. Not a deal breaker, but will necessitate the use of the upstairs toilet in certain situations. We did not use the shower downstairs so I can't speak to that but the upstairs shower had good water pressure and worked just fine.
Beds were relatively comfortable and we slept reasonably well. The kitchen is very well stocked so if you are planning to actually do some serious cooking, you'll be all set. There are, however many restaurants in the immediate area as well as a metro stop. Despite the many things close by, the apartment was very quiet.
The upstairs was clean but the downstairs could use a bit more attention to detail. I don't know if this was because the rooms hadn't been used in a while and there isn't much natural light to gauge dust/cobwebs or not. The sheets on the beds were clean though.
We didn't have any trouble checking in or out. We were met at the apartment and given a run through of all we needed to know. Our host told us that he was leaving the country the next morning but didn't provide anyone to contact if we had any needs (if we "really needed him, we could call and he would try to help"). Fortunately we didn't need anything but it would have been nice to know there was someone close by in case we did.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Perfect located in a quite street with walking distance to all spot. We had a great stay!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
A bright, spacious and nicely decorated apartment in a perfect location! Very central and close to museums, bars, shops and restaurants but on a quiet street.
The kitchen is equipped with everything you need and the terrace is a lovely spot for eating or relaxing. The steps down to the bedrooms are pretty narrow, but okay with a little bit of care. Very smooth check in and check out. Thanks!

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: the apartment was lovely, the pictures really don't do it justice. Nice quiet street away from the city centre but close enough that everything was within a 15 minute walk. we will definitely be back

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Beautiful spacious lots of natural light home in great part of Rotterdam. Less than 15 minutes walk from Central train station. Great host.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: This is a very nice , very large apartment in a great location. It is well supplied with everything you could need. The beds are very comfortable and although the stairs to the basement are treacherous, the bedrooms are so quiet that it’s worth it. We didn’t get to use the garden much due to the weather, but it was nice to sit in the bright warm kitchen and drink coffee looking out at the greenery. Location is fantastic, right where you want to be to explore Rotterdam.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Comfortable, cozy apartment on a nice quiet street. Central location with everything in walking distance. Had everything we needed.
As other reviews do mention, the stairs down to the bedrooms are very steep and narrow but we managed ok.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: we have stayed in a few great places in Rotterdam and Manon's apartment was one of the best. The apartment was very private yet very close to many restaurants, grocery stores and different forms of transportation like the metro and bus and tram stops. The bedrooms were comfortable and quiet in the downstairs space and the living area upstairs was bright and airy with lots of windows. there are steep stairs to the bedrooms but we didn't have a problem with them at all. Manon was very responsive any time we reached out and we had a wonderful visit. I would highly recommend staying here.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: The apartment is large and well-equipped. It's in a lovely, quite location within easy walking distance to the centre and also parks and museums. Manon was a responsive host and was flexible with our changes to check-in times when the airline changed our flight time. We would definitely stay here again.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Manon’s place is a home away from home. It is spacious, bright and very comfortable and nicely decorated. The back deck and back yard make it even more splendid. And the location couldn’t be better- smack in the center of Rotterdam, so an easy walk to shops, cafes, restaurants, museums and sights. We loved it !

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
Great place right in the center of Rotterdam yet in a quiet street. We loved waking up to the garden view.
Absolutely recommend it.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: A lovely big house in a nice residential neighbourhood but close to cafes, transport and Rotterdam attractions. Noise from next door’s diy was not too intrusive and was part of the experience of living locally. The garden and patio area were great and the living room comfy. Manfred was very helpful and pleasant.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Lovely spacious place with lots of natural light in the living spaces

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: Manfred was very good at communicating and an excellent host. The location of the home was spectacular.  The home is older and as would be expected,  the basement where the bedrooms are slightly damp since the home is at sea level.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments:
The location is great and took 15 minutes to walk to the central station. The house is clean and bigger than I expected with 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and huge kitchen.
The downside is that the 2 bedrooms and 1 bathroom are in the basement, which can be humid. Even though there are a lot of windows, but some of them (windows facing the street) can’t be opened. Otherwise the airflow in the house will be better.

name: Big appartement with a garden.
comments: The apartment was light and spacious and really well located. It was also characterful. The heating was easy to operate and it was warm. Too cold to sit in the garden in November but great to look out on a green vista. We would stay there again - there is plenty of interest in Rotterdam

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
It was really great and fresh place
And nice view !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The Hosts were very kind and helpful! This house/loft is one of the most beautiful houses i have seen in Rotterdam, where i lived myself for ten years. Everything is newly renovated, lots of light coming in and lots of space! I love the vibe and the deco/furniture. It was very clean and the bed/pillows super comfortable. Hosts thought of 'the little things' like tea, coffee, sugar, salt, dish wash liquid and so on. All well prepared. I hope actually that i have a reason to come back here one day soon! Great place in a multicultural neighbourhood!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We spent 3 days in Rotterdam in loft apartment Arjen. Within walking distance there are 3 supermarkets and many shops. It is located only 4 tram stops from the Erasmus Bridge. The apartment is clean, functional, bright and spacious. Also hosts are very discreet and polite. It was a very nice stay and we will return.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
I stayed at Arjen's loft for a week end: it's a bright and functional apartment in a great position (public transport is just 2 mins away, if you feel in the mood for a walk the city center is just 15 minutes away) and the terrace gives you a great view of the city. The host is really friendly and helpful!
Definitely raccomended!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
This appartement was the loveliest place of all my airbnb housings on my journey. I came in and felt so sure. This room has a very warm and cosy atmosphere. Also very clean. There is everything you need.
And a huge roof-deck with a beautiful view of the skyline of Rotterdam.
Natalie and Arjen are very nice, caring and uncomplicated hosts.
In the neighbourhood there are a lot of shops and restaurants. Within a few minutes by tram you get in the center.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: This appartment is very nice, very comfortable, with lots of sunlight because of many windows! I came to Rotterdam to visit the musical festival in Baroeg club, so this appartment was the closest one and I liked it much! It's situated close to the City Bridge - about 15 minutes walking - and stands on the street with lots of shops and stores. There is a huge supermarket Dirk on the opposite side of the street, where I bought the products to make food on the kitchen. Well, after all I can truely say that I was really satisfied with this appartment and can leave here only the best recommendations about it's owners.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: De loft van Arjen en Nathalie is heel gezellig en leuk. Je hebt alles wat je nodig hebt binnen bereik. Hun appartement is op loopafstand van de tram richting centrum en gratis parking in de buurt. Verder waren Arjen en Nathalie de perfecte gastheer en vrouw. Voldoende privacy maar beschikbaar indien nodig. Ten zeerste aan te raden voor een bezoek aan Rotterdam!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We were very happy about our stay. the info we found on this website was very acurate with the reallity. Nathalie made us feel welcome and gave the info that we needed. the room was also nice bright and clean.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: we had a great stay - the flat was as nice as it looks in the pictures and anything else just as described, great view - overlooking the skyline of rotterdam! (: communication was friendly and uncomplicated - arjen & nathalie were very kind, thanks a lot!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Perfect stay at nice apartment in Rotterdam. It is really centric and there is super market next to the door.
Beautiful view from the terrace also TV available in the apartment. Thank you for the nice welcome and the fresh fruits and flowers on the table!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The apartment was very nice and exactly as described. Quiet, clean and with a beautiful view of the Rotterdam skyline (especially at night!). There is everything you need within a 5-minute-radius (walk) of the flat (tram/supermarket/drugstore/fastfood (we counted 11 ethnics in a five minute walk!!!!) and restaurants. And even if you don't want to use car or tram: it's only a 15minutes walk from the apartment to Erasmusbrug.
We loved it.
Communication with Arjen & Nathalie was very good and very easy,
in one word: PERFECT
Thank you.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
e rented this apartment on 21-22 February 2015. The hosts were very friendly and helpful, they were also very flexible regarding the check-in and checkout times. The host also gave us useful hints about the city, what to see and how to get to different locations, which was very helpful.

The apartment itself is very nice and cosy, with a nice balcony overlooking the roofs and the city skyline. The steep and narrow staircase is quite challenging though, it might not be the best option for people with small children and for elderly people. The rest was perfect. We could easily reach the city center by tram, the tram station is quite close. There are also a lot of shops and restaurants around the apartment.

Thank you for the wonderful experience!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had great stay in the Loft apartment in Rotterdam. Everything was described the way it was. When we arrived Nathalie showed us the flat and gave us really useful information about the city and its landmarks. The flat was equipped with everything we needed and the host had thought even for the small details like fresh coffee and candies at arriving. The flat itself is really cozy and the feeling is like staying in a luxury tree house with amazing view to the new landmarks of the city that look amazing in the evening lights.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nathalie is a very nice host. The loft is a cozy place and has a very good atmosphere. Our daughter and we loved to stay there.

It is located in a multicultural district with many shops and restaurants. Good public transport connection, not far away from very modern Rotterdam city center.

If you travel with car, ask Nathalie for the name of the street where you can park free.

We enjoyed our stay there. Thank you Nathalie.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We had a great time in this lovely, cosy and comfy loft. Nathalie is very warmful and she gave us tips about what to do in Rotterdam. The loft really looks like the pictures. It is very light and spacious. You will find everything you need ! We really apreciated the coffee and fruits available. It is very close to the Tramstation and a supermarket !
I definitely recommend this appartment !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Top rate apartment and fantastics hosts. Arjen and Nathalie are very special. They helped us up three flights of stairs with all our luggage and set us up in the best loft in Rotterdam! It had large windows on all four sides and this allowed for wonderful natural light and breezes/fresh air (much welcome after staying in many apartments previously with little light and natural ventilation ). Then, seeing how my wife has difficulties with her feet and managing the stairway, they arranged for us to take a first floor apartment after our first night in the loft. This 'new' apartment was also exceptionally well appointed and everything you could possibly need was on hand - plus extras! Cooking facilities, appliances, furnishings and local tourist tips and information were all first class. This extra care and courtesy shown by Arjen and Nathalie provided us with an outstanding and memorable stay.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie was a great host who provided a strong line of communication. She was quick to respond to all messages and very informative. The line that goes by her house happened to be down the day we were arriving and she sent me alternative directions as soon as she found out. The loft itself is a great space; very spacious and clean, skylights throughout, a large full kitchen, and a balcony with a beautiful view.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The Loft is very beautiful, the view of Rotterdam skyline is amazing. It was quiet and the beds were comfortable. Nathalie was very friendly, explained everything and has maps and info-material for Rotterdam. I would instantly recommend this accommodation to anybody! We had a great time, thank you!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
It was a very nice stay. Nathalie, the host was really kind and showed us lots of things to do in Rotterdam. The loft is very beautiful with a great view at Rotterdams skyline.
It defenitely deserves a stay.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice! Host went out of her way to help us with our bikes! She knows her city well and gave us some good tips for food and where to go. We loved the loft! And the view!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay here. Nice room, lots of light, cosy. Everything you needed was there. Lovely terrace as well. We liked the location as well, with free parking spots in the neighborhood, close to the supermarket. We used the bikes and discovered the city by bike which was really nice.
Nathalie was really friendly and gave tips!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
This apartment truly is a gem! It is spacious and the balcony offers you a great view of the skyline of Rotterdam! We had everything we needed and Nathalie was a great host and was always open for our questions! She told us about some great spots in the neighbourhood and we were als able to use her bikes! The apartment was really clean when we arrived and is located in a multicultural neighbourhood!
Thanks for the amazing stay Natahlie!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Our host made us feel very welcome. She had brochures about the area and good information on places of interest to visit.
Tea, coffee, cream and sugar were available to us as well as fruit.
The loft was very clean.
The view out the back of the loft overlooks buildings, you can see the bridge in the distance. The front view is just of the street which is not residential but businesses.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
an eccentric retrò in r'dam. in few words: amazing. our luck has been staying in both the apartments. the renowned one is a comfortable, design-inspired and with a deep sixties' mood: you can discover it in every detail. take a look to spend your time in the bathroom: a real experience.
then, upstairs. the loft. a view of the r'dam skyline straight in front of you, a nice roof to take a seat and enjoy a beer waitin' for your dinner, only wood that sorrounds you. when and if it rains, and trust me, it happens in summer too most frequently you can figure that, the loft becomes a romantic buen retiro to spend your time.
tram 25 takes you in the center of r'dam in within 20 minutes (it depends where do you want to go): in ten minute you're in beurs, that means that you can start to discover the city.
then: can I spend a few words about nat? she's so kind! a very nice woman, with a good karma. if you need something, ask to her: she'll find a solution.we didn't have the chance to meet her again before we left eraly in the morning: and I feel a little bit disappointed, because she has been so nice with us that we'd like toi give her a big hug. but it was my fault!
nothing to say left: thumbs up for this host!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Had a lovely stay. We were greeted by Nathalie who made us very welcome and showed us all we needed to know. We were able to shop in the very close supermarket and eat out on the private balcony. The apartment was very well equiped, clean and comfortable. Highly recommended.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a great few days in Rotterdam. This loft is gorgeous with good views of the city from the terrace. The host was really nice and helpful with advice on where to visit. I would definitely recommend it for any trips to Rotterdam and for couples getaways!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Perfect location with a beautiful view over the city. Nice and tidy. Nathalie was a great host; very friendly and helpful. If we're going back to R'dam we'll hope to stay here again - highly recommended!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie was a very nice host! She had helpful tips for the city of Rotterdam and was nice enough to borrow some dutch bikes. Her flat ist good to reach and definitely has a view!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Honestly, this loft is where you want to live. A spacious apartment with unique design, all the necessary facilities and that View! Absolutely gorgeous:) Nathalie is very helpful and easy-going person. We have had a great time here and definitely, this was not our last visit of Rotterdam. Thank you one more time for everything)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Had a 2 night stay at Arjen and Nathalie's wonderful apartment. We arrived late after some delays to our flight, Nathalie was very understanding and welcoming despite us arriving at nearly 11pm at night! The apartment itself is fantastic and looks exactly like the pictures suggest, cannot fault the place. Would definitely stay here again should we choose to visit Rotterdam! Many thanks for your hospitality

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie proved to be yet another great Airbnb host.  Communications before, during and at the end of my stay were terrific. Nathalie  and Arjen's Loft apartment was incredible - open beam A-frame ceilings, great kitchen, patio, great view of the downtown, groceries. pubs and restaurants nearby, and an interesting neighborhood.  Lots of pamphlets and information about the city.  Higlhy recommended.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nathalie was very kind and welcomed us friendly. The loft was great, nice view and lots of daylight, and well located in an opcomming area of the city. The free bikes we could use where a big plus!
Thank you Nathalie for our great stay in Rotterdam!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Beautiful apartment with a nice view over the skyline of Rotterdam. Great hostess and well located shops are allround the building and the city center is only five minutes away! will come againd :-)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The loft is very beautiful, well decorated, comfortable bed, spacious and light. Nathalie was very welcoming and flexible in meeting our needs. It is easy to reach from the train station (one tram, 20 minutes) in an ethnic neighborhood of the city.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nathalie was really welcoming. She offered us plenty of tips to enjoy the city, and gave us several maps and brochures of the main attractions.
The apartment itself is very nice, very comfortable, with nice views and well connected. However, what really stands out is how clean it is. The bed smelled particularly pleasant.
We really liked it.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Our hosts were very welcoming and gave us a lot of information about what to do in Rotterdam. The insider tips were very good. It was wonderful to be given a bike for free, because that is definitely the way to get around in Rotterdam.
The loft was wonderful. Very light and clean and for two people very spacious as well.
We would consider staying there again, when travelling to Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I had a wonderful stay at the loft. Nathalie was friendly and she allowed me to check in a bit earlier as my flight to Amsterdam was in the wee hours of the morning. Thank you and I would definitely recommend to stay at Nathalies!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Perfect sunny house with a beautiful view. Not so far from the city center with the free-use bicycles... Around the house you have a variety of supermarket and groceries.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We had a great time here in the Loft, spending two nights in total in pure comfort.

It's a lovely, light and airy space in a convenient location for accessing central Rotterdam.

Nathalie was very welcoming and helpful in informing us of all of the things we could get up to in and about the city.

Thanks a lot!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie has been incredibly wellcoming and the place was stunning, well kept and clean, with all amenties needed. we stayed one night in the loft and one in the floor below, the vintage styled flat.Just bare in mind there is a cat (in their flat): we were allergic and left the windows opened a lot to make sure the smell/cat hair were gone! beside this I would totally reccomend it. The neighbour is not this great, but yet, with 4 stops/10min of tram you are in the city center. Nathalie gave us lots of tips on places to visit + maps.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Excellent place, though a wee bit far from the city center but then transportation ain't an issue with lots of convenient and regular connection. We travelled by tram and it was most preferred. Yes, A flight of a bit congested stairs to be climbed to reach the place (it's on the third floor - no lifts) climb is a bit cumbersome if you have luggage though Nathalie did help us even get our luggage up. Once in the loft, it's really nice and cozy and you would feel good about yourdecisionto choose such a beautiful place.
Overall a very good experience.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The Loft was very neat and beautiful. I stayed her together with two friends and we were absolutely amazed by the view of the Loft and the location. The loft is very well equipped with everything you need. You can cook food your own, there is a coffee machine and you can relax outside, or inside whatever you like :). Nathalie gave very helpful information and was a very nice host. We had a lovely stay and will definitely come back once again!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The stay was great. The loft is very cute and charming. Its location is right next to the tram station which takes you to all the nice attractions in rotterdam. Nathalie was very sweet and helpful when we arrived and available for any question during our stay. However, the only disadvantage was that the bathroom was downstairs outside the loft which wouldnt be a problem usually but there was another couple in the downstairs appartment which eliminated the privacy of when we needed to use the bathroom. But no encounter happened so all was good :)
All in all the loft is lovely, the location is perfect and Natalie is super sweet, friendly and helpful!
Recommended for a great stay in rotterdam !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a fantastic stay in Rotterdam at Nathalie's loft apartment. The space is beautifully designed with lots of natural light, and a cosy space for sleeping and chilling out. The kitchen is well equipped with everything you need. The location is perfect with a grocery store, tram stop, everything you need within 5 minutes walking distance. Nathalie was very hospitable  and friendly and gave us good advice on what to do around the city, and happily lent us bikes to explore. We will definitely stay here again if we find ourselves in Rotterdam!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
It was a really great vacation in Rotterdam. The flat is close to the centre. It only takes 10-15 minutes by bike.
Although it was quite hot these days we were able to let the flat cool down in the evening.
I loved that it is really bright in there. For the night there were curtains to shade. What was absolutely helpful.
Natalie is a very friendly host. She recommended us a few activities and gave us bikes for travelling. Even before the vacation she answered every question of mine.
I would always come back ! Thanks a lot !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie greeted us upon arrival and was extremely quick with communication. I never waited more than 5 minutes to receive a reply from her. She gave us great recommendations on what to do in Rotterdam. The loft is great! It was extremely clean, had a very comfortable bed, warm shower, and nice balcony. The location was perfect right next to a tram stop, but we walked to the center everyday!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie was very nice and made sure we were comfortable. The street is maybe not the best area but there are some cafes and two trainstations are nearby. It was very clean (especially the bathroom) and quite spacious. Sadly the weather was not so well but otherwise you can sit outside and enjoy the view.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Hi Natasha .
You made us feel so welcome in your beautiful loft. The view, the location, the most comfortable bed in the world, and of course the bikes you provided that we used everyday all fantastic .
Thank you

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great space with everything you would need. Loved the balcony area with it's nighttime city-scape views. Bathroom size (small, no sink) and location (downstairs) wasn't ideal, but happy to make-do given how charming the overall accommodation is. Location of property is a bit away from the action of Rotterdam center. However, the area in which loft is located is vibrant and safe. City is easily & enjoyably reachable by tram or bike. Nathalie was a great host and very helpful. Would definitely revisit. This property would not suit individuals who find it difficult to climb stairs, as there are many stairs to climb to get to the loft.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: this space is excellent value for the money, with a beautiful balcony/view. it is located s 3 min walk away from the tram line, abour a 15 minute ride into city centre. lots of amenities in the area as well.!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A lovely place to stay with a great private balcony. Nathalie was very accommodating & helped us with local recommendations, the beds were really cosy and the space clean, light & airy. The only thing that would have made it better was if the toilet/shower was on the same floor.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Penthouse is nice, with a beautiful wooden structure and a wonderful view from the terrace and awesome sunsets. I was at the house for every sunset I spent in the city and I cannot imagine a better place for being at that hour. Still, as everything was alright within the house, it's not that great to reach it. Rather far from the center in a city where public transportation is quite expensive, and having the most steep and straight up flight of steps I've ever seen.
I was also a bit disappointed because I rent it thinking it was an entire appartment for myself, but the bathroom was not at the very same flat and not only you ought to climb down the stairs but you have to cross through common areas which is uneasy when you just go out nearly undressed from the shower.
Anyway Nathalie and Arjen did his best for making things easy for me and they were quite attentive.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely Art Deco apartment in quiet residential area. Top quality bedding and a lovely rooftop view of Rotterdam skyline.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Arjen & Nathalie are very friendly hosts. They were always helpful in case we needed something. For example: when we arrived the apartment was a bit cold but we said this Nathalie and she immediately asked for the temperature we wanted. In 10 mins the apartment was already warm.
The apartment is very bright and the beds are super comfortable. Well, for the stairs you need to be fit, but apart from bringing up the suitcases we did not have difficulties with them. We helped our son to move out from the Netherlands and Nathalie let us to leave his stuffs downstairs. The communication was easy with them, so we could get the suitcases when we exactly needed them.
Only one remark: a wardrobe would be very useful. Obviously if you just go there with your partner for 1 or 2 nights you won't really miss it. However, we stayed for 4 nights and living in suitcases was a little bit uncomfortable. Due to this we give only 4 stars. Otherwise everything was perfect, thank you! :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The lot is a great place to stay for some days.
We were two persons and the loft was spaceous enough even by three it would have been no problem.
The loft is a little a out of the centre, but the public transport starts 50m from the front door.
Due to the loft having the balcony towards the backyard it is pretty calm in the loft and on the balcony.
I would definitely recommend to stay at Arjen's and Nathalie's place.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nathalie was very kind and flexible. Her apartment is really beautiful. There was nice furniture like a cozy bed and an armchair. We stayed there with 4 people, so one of us had to sleep in the little attic floor, which you can reach over a ladder. On the big table were some colorful flowers and fresh parsley. The kitchen is well equipped with coffee, tea and everything you need to cook a meal. Only the dishes are a bit few with just 3 forks and 2 knives. We liked that the room was very bright with lots of windows. From the balcony, you could watch the skyline of Rotterdam. The bathroom with lots of towels is located downstairs and very small. It's just like a toilet with an integrated shower, but that wasn't a problem for us.
If go outside, you are on a lively street with many shops and two tram stops nearby. There is an international atmosphere with mostly turkish people. The next supermarket is just about 20 meters away, where we found everything we needed.
All in all, I definitely recommend this place if you want to spend a great time in Rotterdam. We all agreed that Natalie's place would be the best apartment to live in for a group of students like us.
One last idea: For complete awesomeness there has to be a hammock!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: It is a really fantastic place with very well location and bright, clean and big  space. As well as the warm welcome from the house owner. It is pity that I only stay for one night, but I hope I will come back again.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We absolutely loved our stay here! Very convenient to public transportation and easy to find. The loft was spotless, and beautiful. Lots of light, and a great view. Nathalie was an awesome host; super flexible, responded quickly to messages, and gave us great directions and advice for exploring Rotterdam. This loft is a gem and I would highly recommend to anyone.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
What a great space!
Very close to local transport, and a great view from the roof terrace

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nathalie ist super nett und hilfreich.
Direkt nach unserer Ankunft hat sie uns viele Tipps gegeben, Wege erklärt auf einem Stadtplan, Restaurants empfohlen und so.
Wir waren 5 Tage dort und hatten eine tolle Zeit.
Ich habe noch nie so gut geschlafen in einem anderen Bett! Das war, abgesehen von dem gesamten wirklich tollen Appartement, ein Highlight.
Es steckt super viel Liebe im Detail: frische Blumen, ein kleiner Bonsai und andere schöne aber keinesfalls kitschige Dekorationen.
Die Terrasse bietet einen tollen Ausblick in Richtung Stadt!
Das einzige, was etwas nervig war auf dauer ist, dass das Bad ein Stockwerk tiefer ist, aber das wusste man vorher. :D
Alles in allem ein wirklich tolles Appartement mit einer netten Vermieterin. Wir würden wieder kommen.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Super fancy loft with a view. Nice host!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Arjen & Nathalie are nice host. They are very frendly and  eager to please every wish. The apartment was very clean and have a nice view. We were very satisfied with our stay there.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Wow. The view from this place is amazing. Very comfy, spacious, and clean. The kitchen has everything you need to cook a good meal, too! Nathalie is very welcoming and helpful. She directed us to some of the best food we had on our trip. We definitely want to come back.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: It's a lovely room! Better than the pictures. I really enjoyed the sunshine from the top glass. 超级棒的房子！如果喜欢这种玻璃通透的感觉，这房子绝对是一个好选择。

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Together with a boyfriend, we stayed at Arjen & Nathalie's exceptional apartment for 1 night during 1-week bike travel around South Holland in April'17. The place was very nice, clean, full of sunlight and had an excellent view of the balcony, located 15 minutes by bike from the city center. It is situated in a historical building, so the stairs are steep like almost anywhere in the Netherlands and Nathalie kindly let us store our two bikes in her own apartment, which is on the ground floor, for the night. Communication with the host was fast and easy, we got helpful advice about places to visit in Rotterdam.
Hope to be back again sometime soon!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great flat, nice bed, the bathroom is not at private and walking the stairs a few times to be won't be pleasant that being said great apartment great view nice for an intimate get together with someone have a drink a conversation... Certainly with beautiful atmosphere​, friendly host, plenty of coffee... Trust me it's intimate

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely place with a  beautiful view. Super close to tram and supermarket

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Awesome place, lots of space. Loved the balcony. Stairs to get to apartment but adds to charm.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice room with a wunderful view and rooftop terasse! Natalie was very nice and helpful. Thank you for the stay!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: This lift above the city was incredibly cozy and very unique for the price that you pay! Natalie was helpful every step of the way, responding immediately with tips and suggestions. When we needed to arrive earlier than planned, she coordinates with the cleaning lady to let us in, and then stopped by later to introduce herself. The coffee, tea, and cooking equipment were very much appreciated--as well as the fantastic view from the back patio. Would definitely recommend!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a lovely time, the loft is very nice, cozy and has an amazing view. Nathalie is a lovely host, very helpful and warm.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice topfloor apartment in the middle of Rotterdam. Lots of light because of may windows and a private terrace. Cozy bed with curtains (the only curtains, but that's ok with me). Kitchen fuly equiped and everything clean and tidy. Toilet and shower one floor beneath, no problem. Nathalie is very nice host and really takes care. AH supermarket at 1 minute walk, very nice. Lots of restaurants and bars in the neighbourhood. Easy way out of town by car. A very nice place to stay, I'll be back!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Place was lovely, brilliant views of the city and great hosts, exactly what we wanted after a long cycle!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The appartment of Arjen and Nathalie is lovely! The most beautiful thing about the whole appartment was the rooftop terrace with view to the skyline. Nathalie was very friendly and flexible. Moreover she anwsered all out questions and gave us some secret recommendations.
We had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Very nice loft with a beautiful terrace with view!So usefull for a stop in the city,very recommend,Arjen & Nathalie so nice people!
Free parking very close to the house, 5minutes walking distance!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
This room is great room.
Large..great balcony.. good location
Most of all there is small upper room(garret room). My son is very very like this space.
I recommend to you.
Thanks a lot~

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great apartment, loved the balcony. Close to public transport, and only 15min from the city centre, however would note the suburb itself is more the 'unfashionable' end of town.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
we had this apartment for 3 nights and would highly recommend it.
It’s one big room (loft-style) with a small kitchen and big windows, you can
find your own bathroom on the lower floor.
The owner was very friendly and helpful, told us where we could find a delicious restaurant
in Rotterdam and what to do on a rainy day.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie was great! She was quick to respond and Check-in went smoothly! She spent great time and detail explaining the good sites and food areas to visit! She provided maps as well. We went to her suggestions and were extremely happy! The loft is beautiful! Breath-taking! Private balcony as well! Would absolutely recommend!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A lovely apartment with great views and own balcony and decent kitchen facilities -we only stayed for a short while, but was roomy enough for a longer stay. It is handy for trams into the city centre and other local facilities. Worth being aware, if you have mobility issues especially, that it's up four quite steep flights of stairs, and the bathroom is on the level below the living and sleeping area and relatively small.  The climb is definitely worth it though, to have your own attic space overlooking the city.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The appartment looks exactly like the pictures, is very clean and cosy. Nathalie was a great host and made everything we needed possible. Despite a late Check In (a delayed flight) she was very friendly and showed us everything we needed, very late at night.
The communication was easy and quick. I can highly reccomend staying with Nathalie and Arjen, we had a great time.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Staying at Arjen & Natalie's place was my very first Airbnb experience. The loft has a nice view and was very comfortable; I felt very at home there.
I really appreciated Natalie's patience with my communication challenges and and all of the helpful information she provided. She even helped me carry my monster suitcase up stairs!
If I am ever in Rotterdam again, I would most certainly stay at Arjen & Nathalie's!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Really nice appartement. The terrace gives a nice view of the city. There is a lot of space and everything that we need. The tram station is at a few minutes by foot. I really recommend this place.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great place for everybody. Lovely view - we really love it. Perfect kitchen :-) THX a lot for this place for people of AirBnB.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The place is light and cosy. A beautiful location, and easy to explore various parts of Rotterdam from. The hosts were helpful and very accommodating. The only unexpected thing was the stairs, which were steeper and more narrow than what we were used to from our home country. So not the best for older people or if you have a lot/huge luggage. But otherwise, a lovely stay that I'll love to go back to.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great location and value for money. The loft is comfortable particularly the main bed, it is very well equipped to make your stay stress free. The stairs are traditional so expect to climb but not an issue once you are at the top the views are great. The ensuite is on the floor below but private, during the night one worries about disturbing the neighbours.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We hebben genoten van jullie woning. Het was schoon ,ruim en veel privacy. Het enige wat wij jammer vonden was dat toilet en douche niet op dezelfde etage was. Maar we komen zeker terug. Vooral de bereikbaarheid was super,met de bus 66/77binnen 10 minuten bij Ahoy,KFC  en Mac op 3 minuten loopafstand,winkelstraat en parkeergarage om de hoek :-)ook erg fijn dat we onze spullen eerder mochten brengen en gastvrij ontvangen zijn . Gr Arjan en Toos

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice place and close to center with beutifull view.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Perfect stay.
Nathalie is a very responsive and nice host. This was our second time staying at her apartment and we will for sure book with her even for our future trips.
The place is clean and comfortable with a nice view from the balcony.
Tram stop is just outside. We like it !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice view!🌇

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Great place cozy and cute touches.
Pretty place in the top of the old style European building. Skylights on the roof, giving plenty of light.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Good space, excellent view of Rotterdam skyline.  Slept well, good kitchen...  Easy to get to transportation, Nathalie is great host...

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The room is very open and bright. So cute. We had dinner on the patio at sunset and it was magical. Very close to the metro.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great place to stay, best city view from the balcony and a warm welcome and tips what to do from Nathalie.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Upon arriving, Nathalie offered us the room downstairs with the larger bathroom, but we couldn't pass up on the gorgeous sunset view from balcony - you can see the Erasmus bridge from here! Perfect place for a cup of tea. The neighbourhood was quiet and peaceful, and I only wish I could've stayed longer. There's some steep stairs coming up, so just bring what you need for your stay and leave the rest in the car. Overall a wonderful place to spend the night :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Amazing loft with a beautifull view. Very clean and a nice host. Near of public transport and center. Perfect for us !

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
nice Loft, with amazing view on Rotterdams Skyline. Stairs up are kinda steep, so might not accessible for everyone..
All in all we enjoyed our stay a lot!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great loft with good views from the balcony.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Wow. What a great apartment! Great value for money, really cool space. Very open and spacious. Felt very private and the balcony is a great touch. 100% recommended, particularly for a group.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We had an okay experience at Loft with a View from Arjen and Nathalie. Nathalie welcomed us and gave us a lot of information, including local tips where to eat or go for a drink. There were many brochures and she also pointed out some nice biking or walking routes. We mostly discover cities by foot, but didn't check beforehand where the appartment was situated exactly. The apartment is an one-hour walk away from the centre of Rotterdam. We weren't really comfortable walking around in the neighbourhood, but I guess this is something that differs from person to person. Because we didn't really want to buy public transport tickets, Nathalie was kind enough to lend us a pair of bikes. They weren't in a good state, but we managed to get to the centre anyhow. Nathalie responds very quickly to messages when you have a question.
The apartment was perfectly equipped and had everything you need on a trip abroad (towels, sheets, shampoo and shower gel…). Even though it's situated on the top floor and has no airconditioning, the room is easily ventilated by opening all the windows, so this shouldn't really be an issue. To get to the bathroom, you need to descend to the floor below. It's located on the hallway, where there are two other doors that give entrance to appartments rented by other people; so you shouldn't try walking around naked after you've taken a shower. The bathroom is very tiny but this doesn't limit you from using it the way you should. The bathroom was clean, but there was no bathroom fan/ hood so the room stays kind of damp and starts smelling after several uses. Our overall experience was positive though! Our main concern was the neighbourhood the apartment is located in. I believe you could book a room in the centre of Rotterdam in a cheap hotel/ hostel that renders a better base to discover the city for the same price or less.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The stairs up to this place are something else I must admit. So travel light. However when you're there the space is beautiful and the views on the balcony at night make great photos. Very spacious studio apartment with everything you would need and local shops around.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a fantastic stay in Rotterdam at Arjen and Nathalie’s place. The beds were comfy and the space was beautiful. We especially enjoyed the balcony! Nathalie greeted us and gave us some great recommendations. We ended up having a fourth guest stay with us and Nathalie was very flexible and made up an extra bed for us on request. Very steep stairs but beautiful once you’re up there. Great hosts and a lovely apartment with everything you need.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Wonderful studio! Stylish Dutch room with a brilliant balcony. You can enjoy beautiful scenery, especially sunset, in balcony, chat with family and drink tea sitting outside. Very comfortable experience.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: This has been a beautiful apartment. Nice Dutch loft in a great location Nathalie was a great host the balcony was great to sit out on and look at the city. We highly recommend anyone visiting Netherlands to stay here.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely roof space ,  the stairway to there is sporty )  nice terrasse wiht a view to skyline

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The loft was very clean when we arrived. Very spacious. Facilities to cook a quick meal. The bathroom is downstairs but guests use it all by themselves. Even a small balcony. The location is not very central, takes you 20 mins by tram to get to main station. But the area is worth a stroll and definitely one of the more lively parts of Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Perfect stay for 2.  Spacious room and big size windows. Very clean and stylish. Stunning view from the balcony! Location is good , very close to tram stop which to main stations and attractions. Nathalie is amazing and gave us many good advice, reply very quickly and helpful. Will come back again.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely loft apartment. Very spacious and very clean. Balcony was massive. Would definitely recommend if staying near to Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The place was really well located, close to the tram and easy to find. The apartment itself has a lovely atmosphere and amazing view from its terrace. Couldn’t have got a better place to stay for our trip in Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We were 3 people staying at this place and we enjoyed our stay at this beautiful loft very much!
It was clean, there were towels for everybody, the host welcomed us warmly, ... The view from the balcony is really pretty and one can spend a nice evening there.
The shower and the WC are in one small room and are only separated by a curtain, so it may be practical if you travel with Flip Flops because the whole bathroom gets wet when someone showers ;) This was the only aspect we had to get used to, but hey, it's really worth it as the rest of the loft is spectacular!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
I appreciated nice place and also kindnes:)
It would be so perfect when i visit in Summer because the view from balconey is just wonderful!
And the from the Rotterdam station, it takes 25min by tram so very convinient:)
Thank you Nathalie,

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice accommodation in rotterdam. It feels like home and has a nice view from the balcony. I would recommend this loft to anyone.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Deze plek is enorm fijn! Heel veel privacy, en een eigen toegang naar de straat. Kijkt uit op de skyline van Rotterdam, en je kunt lekker naar buiten op het dakterras. We werden super warm ontvangen, ook al waren we onverwacht aan de late kant aangekomen. Het keukentje was volledig uitgerust; van thee & koffie tot kruiden om mee te koken. Echt een aanrader!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Beautiful AirBnB. Arijen welcomed us and showed us the awesome loft that is hidden behind the steep staircase. An amazing roof terrace with a view over Rotterdam and a living space that is unique, clean and  furnished with great eye to detail and everything you need for a pleasant stay - would completely recommend this to any traveller! I hope to visit Rotterdam again soon and I will surley stay again at Natalies and Arjens place if possible. Thanks guys :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Schönes Loft! Highlight ist die Terrasse - man merkt, dass es keine private Wohnung ist, aber alles vorhanden :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The accommodation was very cozy and the view was indeed very nice :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice and bright apartment with a large balcony. Close to the tram stop. Nathalie was helpful with information about public transport. We had a great stay.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice view over the city with sunset on the balcony! Lovely and helpful hosts every time! Thanks for making the weekend perfect 😊

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Amazing stay and overall wonderful experience. The apartment is a comfy cellar loft with a balcony and plenty of beds, well-placed near a trams station. Nathalie is most open and helpful. Would recommend.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The loft is very spacious on a nice location near a big street with all kind of shops. Still the place is very quiet and you can enjoy the skyline of Rotterdam from the lovely balcony. Public transport is nearby, making it an excellent place to stay when you visit Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Incredible little loft. Cozy room with great patio and view

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Thank you to Nathalie! Everything was perfect! The view of the Rotterdam’s skyline is brilliant! Dream location!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I really enjoyed my stay in Arjen and Nathalie's place. There is quick and easy access to the Tram system directly outside the apartment which only takes 10 minutes to get to Rotterdam Centraal. Very clean and lovely balcony.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very cozy apartment with beautiful balcony and a nice view. Also you can cook there and coffee and tea are provided.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The place have very good space stay in. Able to make a bit cooking and have nice time drinking outside the loft when weather is nice.
Although is not inside city Center with day travel ticket is very easy to travel everywhere. Place is clean with wooden floor as my partner got dust allergy which did not have much reaction during our stay. Natural light in day time is amazing to chill and recover in the house also.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Cool place to stay for a couple or 2 friends. Be aware, that the place can heat up quite a bit in the summer (well it’s under the roof). Do not expect a real bathroom, it is rather a toilet with an integrated sink, but if you are not complicated, it’s all pretty fine :)
All in all pretty functional and in a cool area around 30 mins walk from the center. Several trams take you there in no time.
Supermarket is on 100 meters and you find easy space to park, if you come by car.
Nathalie is very friendly and the terrasse and view are amazing!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
This was a great and quirky place to stay. Nice and spacious, with a cute little roof terrace and lots of windows. We had everything we needed, though a word of warning for those less mobile: it's on the top floor and Dutch stairs have notoriously small steps, so getting up and down them with heavy luggage was a little bit daunting. We managed though.
The location was great, there's a tram stop a 2 minute walk away, and if you're there for football or an event at de Kuip it's a 15 minute walk. Would definitely recommend.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great loft apartment with lovely views. Great hosts with lots of info on the local area and plenty of tips on what to do. Would highly recommend.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Die Loft-Wohnung von Nathalie ist super! Richtig schöne Einrichtung, in quirliger Gegend gelegen, alles da, was man braucht und gute Anbindung an die Verkehrsmittel.
Highlight dann natürlich noch die Dach-Terrasse.
Das einzige Manko vielleicht ist, dass im Bad, welches sehr klein ist, kein Waschbecken gibt.
Aber insgesamt wirklich zu empfehlen!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Very clean and cosy place we enjoyed the terrace and the view.
The room was spacious and well equipped.
Quick note, the stairs are very steep if you have heavy luggage.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice clean, spacious place with great view over the city. Few minutes walking from area where you can park your car for free and from there you’re with the tram in 10 minutes at Hotel New York where you can take a water taxi to anywhere you wanna go. Good place to stay for a few days! You can even cook if you’d like. Recommendable!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We sadly only spent one night in the apartment but it was definitely worth it!  The furniture was very pretty just as the great view from the balcony. We directly felt comfortable in this cozy place. Nathalie welcomed us very nicely and it was even possible to check in a bit earlier. All in all a great apartment for a short trip to Rotterdam, the tram station is  3 minutes away and brings you directly into the centre.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice place full of light and with a nice view on Rotterdam. The tram is really close and connect easily to the center. Only little negative point is the bathroom, witch is quite small and mixed the shower and the toilets in one.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Stylish place. Attic is comfortable for cozy evenings with wonderfull city views

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The attic has a fantastic view especially at night. The place is not located in the city center but close to trams and supermarkets.
However, the stairs are way to steep. I will not recommend the place if you are with heavy luggages. And you need to go downstairs and use the bathroom since it’s separated from the attic.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The apartment was cozy and clean. It was really easy to get there from the Central Station and the view from the balcony was great, both night and day. We felt ourselves welcome and got great tips for our short trip. The apartment was also well equipped. The only downsides that come in mind are long stairs and small bathroom. However, we'd be glad to come again on our next trip to Rotterdam.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Gorgeous attic space, lots of thoughtful touches and very well equipped. Extremely comfy beds and good quality bedding, we slept really well.  Amazing view of the city and a great neighbourhood too, couldn’t recommend more highly!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great stay at Natalie's place, which is just 10 minutes from the city centre. You have an Albert Heijn just outside your house and a variety of other shops. The place is greatly decorated and the view from the terrace is unbelievable, with the Erasmus bridge and the Rotterdam's city centre skyline in sight. Last, but not least, Natalie is a lovely host! Looking forward to return here!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I highly recommend staying here. The loft was beautiful and cozy! The balcony was a nice touch. Would definitely stay again!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Cozy flat with a great view in a affordable neighbourhood. Close to the tram as well.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The appartment is very pretty and cozy! Also beautiful view and a very comfortable bed. I would definitely recommend it!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The place is great! It is out of the city center but very well connected. There’s a tram that brings you there in 15 minutes and the stop is really near the apartment. Nathalie has been very nice. The place is very clean; a netflix account is offered for the guests and the view on the city that you get from the balcony is amazing. Highly recomended!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A beautiful stay with an awesome view, but not right in the city center. We enjoyed our time!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice apartment with a nice view of Rotterdam. Recomendable at 100%

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Excellent view of the city, decent location close to tram stops and supermarkets. The bathroom is not ensuite and does not have an attached sink and one must use the sink in the kitchenette. The apartment is spacious yet cosy

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Brilliant stay in Rotterdam; the place is lovely and perfectly located to visit the city. The view’s nice as well. I loved and I’ll come back.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
This place is awesome! Nathalie was very accommodating of us not having phone service and came over promptly once we were able to contact her! Easy walking access to grocery store, restaurants and the tram into the city were all major pluses!
Be ready for an insane, steep and long staircase up to the top of the building, but it’s worth it! Great view and space!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I really had a great time in Rotterdam, also thanks to Nathalie apartment. The view over the city skyline is beautiful !

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely loft space, cozy, super nice host, great view

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
We were very well received, and the apartment was great, atypical and had a beautiful view of the city.
The only drawback was the shower and toilet, which are not on the same floor as the apartment.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very comfortable apartment. The view from the terrace is amazing, especially at night. Communication and check-in was easy, Nathalie welcomed us and gave us some very useful information about the city. Highly recommend!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The Loft is super cozy! All the Windows bring so much light inside. And when it rains, it makes these cozy Rain Sounds on the roof windows! We really liked our vacation there! Communication also was great.
Only little things: it was not super super clean...when we left Food Outside there were a lot of ants. But well it was not to Bad.
AND: (a Tip beside the AirBnB) If you come by car, don‘t park it in the Street! We parked it down the Street at a free parking Spot and the day we wanted leave, two wheels were out of air. Somebody must have opened the Ventils. A guy who lives in this street told us that it happend 4 times to his car.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The loft has a beautiful view of the city, it's very quiet and comfortable. It has all the amenities and the hosts are very kind and helpful

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A very beautiful and relaxing appartment, with a great balcony.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nathalie gave us very good tips to travel around and she was a available when needed. The place has a great view on Rotterdam city centre.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice loft with a nice view! It is a bit far away from centrum but with the metro everything is fine. The shops near around the loft are numerous.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very clean space, amazing view and great location!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Good Public Transport, but offside Rotterdam Centrum. Supermarket & fast food in front of the door.
nice Host (Nathalie) & easy Check-In.
good View.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great apartment with a nice view, and very friendly hosts! We felt very welcomed

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We would like to fully recommend this place as comfy and very good located, parking, shops, tram stops. The view in top apartment is stunning. Good choice 👌🏼

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam! The apartment was very nice for a short stay. Beautiful view and balcony. The host was very friendly and helpful, gave us many recommendations and tips for our stay, thank you very much :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice flat, with also nice view from the balcony. The owner was very friendly and helpful. We visited Rotterdam in April and it was still pretty cold outside but the flat was warm and cozy. With the tram you are in 10min in the city center.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: This AirBNB is magnificent: it gives a warm, cosy feeling inside and a wonderful view on the balcony outside. It’s super easy to get in the city centre with the tram from this location. There weren’t any disturbing noises in the neighbourhood, but during the day it was still blooming with life. In short, it was an amazing stay and I would definitely recommend spending some time in this beautiful home.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: This was the perfect getaway for two days. It is very accessible by public transport and down the block from a grocery store. Everything we needed was easily found in the apartment or a quick walk away. The ample light in this place gives such a warm feeling to it. Our host was wonderful and explained everything we needed to know. The kitchen is small but works perfectly fine. We cooked all our meals and had no problems. The private balcony is a plus and you can easily block out the light in the sleeping area with the curtains. The bed comfortably fits two people. The only concern we had was the wifi was a little spotty when we used it. This is a great place to stay but beware or the steep steps that are to be expected in a top floor apartment in the Netherlands.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
I had a great stay at the loft.
The communication in advance and the personal welcome by Nathalie were great.
I can recommend the loft without reservation.
The view from the roof terrace, especially in the evening, was even more beautiful than the photos show. A parasol/umbrella would have been nice and would have made use of the roof terrace even better :-)
Thank you, I would love to come back!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: It's a nice place to stay, cosy and private with a nice view. Be aware that it has very steep stairs for getting to the apartment which can be a problem to some.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: nice place with good light but not the fanciest area of Rotterdam

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Wonderful host. Very sweet and lovely. Allowed a late checkout and overall wonder place and a beautiful view.
Only downside was the stairs where we had to carry the luggage. Apart from that it’s a brilliant place to spend time in Rotterdam. Lot of shops close by.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a great stay for 2 nights. It's a peaceful shelter in a crowded area. A lot of space and daylight, also a great view on the city skyline.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: very nice appartment, great view!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Great value - comfy loft with a great view. Well worth the price

name: A Loft with a View
comments: really lovely time at their place. watching the sunsets from the balcony was incredible. would stay here again!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We had a great stay in this beautiful loft. It was warm, cosy and had a great view

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The place was really great it had a very nice balcony with a great view :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
The apartament is very nice. Clean and tidy. A lot of light and good designed.
We cooked our meal right there and it was pretty convenient. The only disadvantage is that the bathroom is aside from the apartment and one has to go up and down stairs to visit it.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The Loft is spacious, well equipped and with a stunning balcony view to central Rotterdam. We really enjoyed our stay. Very close to good transport connections. Not ideal if coming by car, though street parking is possible and free parking is available at the football stadium or park and ride facilities....

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Lovely loft and the balcony is a real treat. Would definitely be back.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I had very nice time in the apartment. Hosts were great, very easy to communicate and helpful. The place is really amazing, the view from the terrace is stunnjng and gives you the chance for a quiet evening by yourself of with friends.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
A great stay in this bright and airy loft apartment. Easy and clear communication.
Sadly the small bathroom and no bathroom sink did let the place down a little.
But a great option for a short stay.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Fantastic loft with an excellent view of the skyline! And very easy to get into the centre of Rotterdam, and The Hauge & Delft from the apartment! Nathalie and Arjen were very friendly and helpful - highly recommended!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Cute little loft with a nice view and all the extras. Great stay and nice hosts. Beware, stairs are difficult to climb.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Absolutely stunning views! The steep stairs might pose a challenge for those with mobility issues, but manageable. The kitchen was well-equipped, although a few games and a third chair on the balcony would have been a nice addition. Smooth check-in and check-out process, and the place felt cozy, especially with the lovely Christmas decorations. Nearby to the tram. We really enjoyed our stay :)

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very lovely flat with an amazing skyline view. The location is not super central but will be just fine when the train stopping right in front of the building will be running again. The room more then makes up for that!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Wir hatten eine sehr schöne Zeit in der besonderen Unterkunft von Arjen und Nathalie. Die beiden waren super nett und sehr hilfsbereit!
Die Aussicht und die Wohnung waren einfach nur toll und auf jeden Fall unser Highlight in Rotterdam.
Direkt unten drunter ist ein Supermarkt, was sehr praktisch war. Vielen Dank!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Stayed here for an event at Rotterdam Ahoy. Beautiful, clean and spacious, balcony was so lovely. Nathalie let us check in early and check out late which was fantastic. Just be aware there are 4 flights of narrow and steep stairs up to the loft since it’s in the attic! Also there is no sink in the bathroom so unless you use the shower you have to go upstairs and wash your hands in the kitchen after your business. Nonetheless we still loved our stay and would recommend. Thank you Nathalie!!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nice loft with a view towards downtown Rotterdam.
Be aware, that the bathroom on the floor below is accessed from the buildings hall.
The rooftop terrace is well protected from the wind and great to enjoy the mornings and evenings when the sun is out. The place is spacious and gets a ton of sunlight.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Really enjoyed our stay at Arjen and Nathalie’s place. The loft is very cozy and even better in person than in the photos. Nathalie was very accommodating and responsive to us as we could not make the prescribed checkin times due to a flight delay.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Really good 3 nights spent at the loft. The host is responsive. Close to public transports. The place was well cleaned up and warm. The view looked nice.
I definetly recommand.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Had a great stay. Nathalie was friendly and easy going with our check in time. She met us at the apartment to give us the key and show us around. Apartment is airy and bright and it's really nice to sit out on the patio when the sun is out.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Nice play, pretty cozy. Watch your steps guys, stairs are pretty steep. The little balcony is the highlight of the place, but be careful for the bathroom, it is a bit uncomfortable.
The place is quite distant from the city center, you'll need transportation to get there. You'll be in a residential neighborhood, and it is quiet in the late hours.
It was a pleasant stay, Nathalie was extremely kind and helpful. I'll recommend it

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Lovely welcome from the host Nathalie, messaged us to confirm our time of arrival and was waiting for us when we arrived. She showed us all around the apartment and explained the area to us and transport. The balcony is the highlight of this place it’s so cute and the views are stunning! The apartment is very clean and has everything you need for your stay. The stairs up are steep but it is a loft so nothing that we didn’t expect! The bathroom is separate to the loft but it is private however the walkway it’s on is not but we did not see anyone else during our stay. Would recommend bringing some slippers to walk back to the loft after a shower to avoid making the floors wet and slippery. Overall I think it was perfect spot for friends or a couple to stay and explore Rotterdam but also very easy to get to other areas such as Amsterdam or Den Hagg. We also drove and found parking easy in the area for a charge.
Thanks for a great stay!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Super mooie lichte loft, goed bed, goede faciliteiten en hele aardige host. Qua privacy was het niet helemaal volgens verwachting (badkamer delen en er keek een dakkapel van de buren rechtstreeks de kamer in), vandaar de 4 sterren.

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
Fijne zolderruimte met aangenaam zomerterras en leuke view op de skyline van Rotterdam.
De erg steile en gehorige trap vonden wij misschien net wat minder.
Winkels zijn vlakbij, net als de tramhalte en een betalende parkeergarage.
we hadden een leuke tijd! Bedankt

name: A Loft with a View
comments: The loft was a very cozy and comfortable stay, with great views over Rotterdam city. The bathroom could use some additional ventilation, but otherwise it was a great place to call home for the weekend. Thank you Arjen & Nathalie!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: I cozy loft, perfect for one or two people. I didn’t have the chance to meet Arjen but Nathalie was very helpful, gave clear instructions and a quick but informative show of the place when checking in. I was able to check in earlier which was perfect. The only inconvenience was the lack of a sink in the bathroom and the loft isn’t very soundproof. Other than that it’s an amazing place to stay with a beautiful view, not to far from Rotterdams Centrum!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Nice Loft with a fantastic view over Rotterdam.  Very cozy and close to the public Transport. Some shops nearby. Would definitely come back.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Even though the place is on a busy street, it doesn’t feel that way when you’re up there. So, a perfect stay when you want to be in the city but don’t want to hear all the noice. Would definitely recommend!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A nice loft with great view of Rotterdam Center and easy access via a nearby tram station. Quite comfortable space with all the amenities. Recommend!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: A real find in a cool part of town, right by a tram stop and with a city skyline view from the terrace. Tons of character and perfect for our needs.

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Really enjoyed our stay at Arjen and Natalie's, tue loft was really nice and cozy. One of the more unique Airbnb's I've ever stayed at. The Studio Loft had everything we needed and more with a great view of Rotterdam from the balcony!

name: A Loft with a View
comments: We really liked the loft, it was large, cosy, had lots of light and everything we needed for a short trip. The balcony was particularly nice. Arjen and Nathalie were very flexible with check-in and check-out, which made our trip very easy. We would definitely recommend the loft!

name: A Loft with a View
comments:
A cozy place to stay with a balcony.. the acces to the bathroom is a bit inaccessible because it separated on the other floor.
But overall is a nice place to stay

name: A Loft with a View
comments: Very nice loft, very bright from all the large windows but could also be dimmed by curtains if one plans to sleep in. Nice location, I used the tram 5 to get around fast. Kinda steep stairs haha but totally manageable. Terrace very nice and the view as well

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
the appartment is located in a quiet area of the city.
