the public transport just near the house give us the opportunity to live the city center in few minutes.
the appartment is so confortable and clean.
the host give us all the informations about the trasports and places to visit during our holidays.
kitchen room (with a big windows on the main road) and the bathroom (build in darkrock) give us the opportunity to live the place in a lovely ambient.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: The apartment was fantastic! Nathalie was delightful, and even had Rotterdam maps for us to get around the city and to orient ourselves.  Clean, chic, and absolutely delightful stay a bit off the beaten path, but very close to the 23 and 25 tram lines that will take you into the city center in less than 10 minutes.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
This apartment is very well equipped and decorated, also very clean, thumbs up for that!

Natalie communicated very well and had street maps and tourist info available in helping us to explore the city. Public transport is easily accessible and many shops are around. You can reach central in under 10 minutes.

The apartment is a 1 bedroom and has a spare bed for child in the room. My girlfriend loved the bathroom and the big bath tub.

Will definitely recommend this apartment to fellow travellers.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: This airbnb experience was one of the best I have ever had. The apartment is gorgeous (bigger than I expected!), the wifi is quick and bathroom is beautiful. It's very easy to get to on the tram (just over the Erasmus bridge from the ventral part of the city). I added an extra friend last minute, and it was not a problem. We also needed a later check out time (we were running the Rotterdam marathon and wanted to be able to shower/store our bags during the race, but had a late flight that day) and Nathalie made it happen. Although there were other renters in this apartment after us, Nathalie has a second apartment above this one she let us use, after also moving our bags there during the day while we were racing. She definitely went above and beyond to make our stay incredible. Thank you so much!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Although it was brief we had a really lovely stay in Rotterdam. The apartment is beautiful and has an incredible view, comfy bed, luxurious shower/bath and Nathalie is so knowledgeable about the area.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Nathalie has been incredibly wellcoming and the place was stunning, well kept and clean, with all amenties needed. we stayed one night in the loft and one in this  vintage styled flat.Just bare in mind there is a cat (in their flat): we were allergic and left the windows opened a lot to make sure the smell/cat hair were gone! beside this I would totally reccomend it. The neighbour is not this great, but yet, with 4 stops/10min of tram you are in the city center. Nathalie gave us lots of tips on places to visit + maps.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Even though we arrived a bit earlier than we expected, Nathalie was very gracious and allowed us to park our luggage for a bit.  The apartment is very clean and spacious and the bathroom is a dream.  It was great to soak in the tub after a long day of walking around being tourists.  The apartment is very close to a tram line (about 20 minutes from Central Station) and to a supermarket for getting supplies.  We didn't spend much time in the neighborhood so can't really comment on restaurants, etc.  On one night, there was quite a bit of noise from what may have been a party in the neighborhood or in one of the restaurants. Not a major issue.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Perfect location, the flat is in a lively neighborhood, close to shops and restaurants. Good transport connnection, the tram is just at 3 minutes walk.
Lovely flat, with a great light and a beautiful style. The bath tub is fantastic!
Nathalie was very kind with us, and even let us staying a bit longer on our last morning.
We definitely recommend this place !!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: We stayed here one night, it was fantastic. Very easy and simple to find using the trams from central station. Nathalie was very easy to communicate with and easy going. We didn't have a destination time as we weren't on a schedule which Nathalie was fine with for check in and check out. The apartment was very spacious with a nice view of the street. It had everything in the kitchen you could need. The bedroom was spacious and the bathroom was excellent. We had been travelling full on for a while beforehand so the large bath was perfect for a nice relaxing night! The house is close to public transport and an easy bike ride to wherever. Nathalie let us borrow her bikes which was great! Would highly recommend this apartment!!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
This house is very spacious and cozy and has all the necessary, the kitchen has a large window so it's very bright and the bathroom is large with a shower and a bathtub.
It's not so near the Centrum, it's ten minutes by bike to reach it but it's located in a street with shops, supermarkets and restaurants that was good.
Nathalie was very kind and available despite our late, the communication was really good.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
The apartment is wonderful, stylish and very cozy. There is more than enough space. Of course, one of the jewels is a bath tub, so rare in
the Netherlands :) Coffee, tea, towels, bath crystals, shower gel and everything else needed is available, making the apartment feel like a really good hotel. Everything is clean and in order. There is a little unpleasant smell in the corridor, but since it was outside the apartment, it didn't bring any trouble with it.
It was a little bit hard to find a space to park, the streets nearby are quite busy. The neighborhood is quite far from the city center, and is not suitable for those seeking exquisite cuisine. However, it is a takeaway heaven, plus there is an Albert Heijn, literally just behind the corner.
Overall, it is a great apartment, with amazing and very responsive hosts ;) fully worth the price.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: This place was absolutely adorable and we loved to stay there! Our host was such a sweet lady who greeted us and gave us tips about the city. It was an adorable apartment and it had an amazing bathroom! I loved the shower. All of the Vintage stuff in the kitchen made it look cute and it was on kind of a lively Street period there was one night where the bar next door was up all night and you could hear them partying but I feel like it definitely made it part of the ambience.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: This place was perfect for our quick one night stay in Rotterdam. It was easy to find and the neighborhood was lively without being too busy. There were plenty of small restaurants to choose from in the area. The bed was also super comfortable after a long day of travel. The bathroom was clean and beautiful. The retro decor was fun. Natalie was very helpful when providing a bed for our toddler and even brought toys for him to play with, without us asking. Our flight was delayed several times so Nathalie was very flexible and worked with us on our arrival time. Definitely would recommend this place.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Exactly like the pictures except there is a big building facing you out the windows.  Good parking. Plenty of shops close by. nice bathroom and Nathalie was more than helpful.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
This was the perfect apartment for us as a family with a three year old and an 8 1/2 month old. Yes, it's up a flight of stairs, which wasn't ideal, but we were already aware and prepared for that!
Nathalie left a toybox to entertain our babies, which was a lovely touch, and a travel cot, so I didn't have to haul ours from the car. The little bedroom, which is attached to the main bedroom, was great to give our little boy some independence while also keeping him nice and close. The bathroom was just lovely and the vintage decor throughout was really to our tastes.
There's a sizeable supermarket just a few minutes away for supplies, and we had access to Netflix on the Smart TV, which meant we had a nice night after the babies were in bed.
Rotterdam had some incredible buildings and museums, which we got to really quickly and easily from the apartment via the tram.
It was a great place to stay and Nathalie is a fabulous host who made herself available whenever we needed her. Thank you for a lovely stay!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Apartment is every bit as good as described, stylish, clean, well-equipped, close to tram line so quick and easy into centre. Natalie replied promptly to emails, gave helpful advice and was very welcoming. Super bathroom with shower and large bath, furnishings of high standard. Light, roomy and good value for money.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: De ruimte is stijlvol, weinig tot geen hinder van straatlawaai. Supermarkt en openbaar vervoer bevinden zich vlakbij. Enige minpuntje is misschien de slaapkamer met enkel bed. Deze is eerder geschikt voor een (jong) kind dan een volwassene. Er is namelijk weinig privacy. Wel is er een sofabed in de living. Badkamer (inclusief toilet) zijn enkel bereikbaar door de master bedroom. Verder was het heerlijk om in dit appartement te verblijven.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: This is the cutest little apartment! Everything we could ask for, really. The space was bright and clean, and very close to public transportation. Amazing bath and shower, wonderful hosts, and comfortable beds. I would definitely stay again if I make it back to Rotterdam.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Voor mij en mijn kinderen is het appartement van Arjen & Nathalies een geweldig fijne vakantie ervaring geweest. Als oud Rotterdammer nu wonend in Finland was het fijn om weer even in mijn stad te zijn. De locatie van Arjen en Nathalies is heel mooi, netjes, voorzien van alle fijne levensvoorwaarden. Mijn zoon wilde gelijk in het bed slapen in de nis die gemaakt hebben. De kinderen hebben ook heerlijk genoten van het bad en de fijne ruimte.
Wat iemand wel moet weten en dat is gewoon eigen aan de Rotterdamse locatie is dat deze plek een levendig stadsvorm heeft. Dus buiten geluiden en buren geluiden horen nu eenmaal bij het huis en de locatie.
Maar het fijne van de woning is, is het gewoon een hele fijne, veilige atmosfeer heeft. De Beijerlandselaan is een levendige Rottterdamse laan en ligt op steen worp afstand van de Kop van Zuid en dan heerlijk met de watertaxi het Rotterdamse leven in varen is gewoon heerlijk.
Voor mij en mijn kinderen is ons verblijf heel fijn geweest en we komen graag weer een terug wanneer we weer naar Nederland komen.
Dank je wel Arjen & Nathalies voor jullie goede zorgen en wens dat jullie nog veel meer AirBnB bezoeker mogen verwelkomen in jullie appartement.
Vriendelijke gezonde groet aan een ieder die de tijd heeft genomen om deze review te lezen.
Bastiaan Anthonie Baaij

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: The place is original, though slightly old-fashioned. You cannot wash only your hair as the shower does not have a movable handle, and the bath doesn't have one either, it's all or nothing :-D The place is far from the centre, on the other side of the river, about a 35 minute walk, but worth the price you pay. The bedroom is quiet, the palce comfortable, only the stairs are quite steep if you have a big suitcase...

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: The apartment is great, full of bright colours, and in a great location. The retro style is different to most places, and the modern bathroom accents the apartment really nicely. Everything was really clean, check in was easy, would recommend to anyone staying in Rotterdam.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Good communication and recommendations.
Location is out of centre but a lovely walk into the centre or you can catch a tram which is always a lovely way to see the city.
Apartment was really gorgeous- a proper treat for us. The bathroom was my highlight. So luxurious. Amazing bath and shower and loved the stone walls and floor.
Bed super comfy. Everything was very clean and well made up.
Dream fridge. Beautiful details (like the telephone and coffee machine). Loved the small balcony area as well.
So spacious and airy.
Nathalie is super friendly with a lovely personality.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Excellent stay, the flat was very clean, uniquely decorated with that vintage 70's style, well equipped, very nice bathroom too. The host was very welcoming as well. Location is perhaps slightly not 100% ideal as it' s not directly in the modern city center, but it's not far from there either (10 min with the car). Neighborhood is a simple multicultural everyday-life area, maybe not the most interesting, but there are plenty of basic shops around for your daily needs. Direct parking is not free, but there is free parkings a few minutes away. All in all very nice experience though, we enjoyed it! Would definitely recommend!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Nathalie and Arjen’s place was wonderful. It was easy to take the tram from the city station and to take the same route to all the places we wanted to get to. Nathalie was so helpful with all our questions and was attentive to anything we needed. The apartment was spacious, adorable and I could have stayed forever! The beautiful one bedroom apartment was spacious enough for my boyfriend and I to really relax, make some food and enjoy ourselves. It has a beautiful open feel with great windows, and a back balcony that let light and air in on the crisp mornings. It has cute retro touches which I loved, and the orange color palate throughout felt very Dutch!The bathroom was also spacious and newly updated.
The neighborhood was great- we could have walked places or taken the tram anywhere easily. There is an Albert Heijn right by to do shopping for grocery items, and many little restaurants and bars. This place exceeded our expectation I only wish we could have stayed longer!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Stijlvol en ruim appartement met superleuke retro details, in een levendige multiculti buurt (maar wel rustig en volop privacy) met tramhalte voor de deur. Dus binnen no-time in het centrum.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Nice, bright, well looked after apartment. Very easy transport links. A good spot for exploring the area.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: prima plek om een paar dagen te verblijven. Goed afgewerkte sfeervolle retro(jaren70) accomodatie met 100% privacy. Brandschoon en goed betaalbaar.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: We actually had to last minute book our room another night because I misdated our booking and Nathalie was so kind and helpful in letting us reserve an extra night! They were wonderful hosts, and the information and tips they provided were extremely useful for the rest of our trip. The apartment was stylish and cozy, very fun to be in. It was also extremely clean and comfortable and the view from the living room window was precious. Highly recommend if you want an authentic, warm, unique stay!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Staying at this little gem was an unforgettable experience for me and my Boyfriend! I am all about a cozy, authentic, unique atmosphere and this place was just that! It had just the right vintage touches and a comforting view from the apartment to make our visit cozy and enjoyable. Nathalie was so helpful and sweet— she even met us upon our arrival as we actually got trying to find the place because we were confused. She also gave us so many helpful tips and recommendations that were useful throughout our trip. We will be booking again when whenever we return to the Netherlands!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: We stayed here for two nights and it was pretty nice. Everything you need was there and the look of the Apartment was really cool and vintage.  You can easily take the tram to the City centre (15Minutes) and can park your car for free in a street a bit away. (Walk 7 minutes) a Supermarket is directly in the same street as the apartment is. Natalie was very friendly, sympatic and helpful. I recommend a stay in their apartment.Thank you!!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Arjen & Nathalie were nice hosts, I always got a fast respond to my questions - even when it was late at night. The apartment was spacious (didn't expect it to be that spacious) and really really beautiful. I loved all the small details about the flat. On the pictures I didn't even see the balcony. We didn't miss anything in the flat and the bathroom was perfect! With the rainshower and the spacious bath tub. The train station Rotterdam zuid is in about 15 min when you walk. When you walk to the centre it takes around 50 min. There are a lot of supermarkets near to the accomodation - just around 2 min walk (the district is mostly crowded by turkish shops and people). The beds were comfortable, the couch was pretty much sat through but you don't spend that much time on the couch anyway.. :) There is a McDonalds, KFC, Albert Heijn and Dirk nearby. The crowded restaurants nearby were a little loud on the weekend but we didn't mind.  We were super comfortable in the flat, loved everything about it and would definitely come back. Thank you so so much for having us!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Our stay at Arjen and Nathalie’s apartment was delightful. The place is so beautiful and welcoming. We had the best time. The communication with the hosts worked perfectly and everything is exactly as described.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Loved our stay in Arjen and Nathalie’s apartment. Really clean, even better than the pictures suggest. Communication prior to our arrival was great and Nathalie was really friendly and helpful when we checked in. The location is a short tram ride away from the city centre, which we were expecting, but trams were a little bit more expensive than we were expecting. Obviously nothing to do with the hosts, but maybe something worth taking into consideration when booking!  We still felt like the apartment was great value and better than spending more to stay centrally, even with public transport costs. Apartment has everything you could need for a great stay (but note there is no oven), and there’s a little balcony as well which was lovely in the sun.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
We were happy with our stay in this apartment. Its clean, spacious for 3 people and has all basic necessities. The location is quite nice as well, the tram is just a few minutes down the road and it takes you into the city fairly quick.
The communication with the hosts was fast and they were very accomodating when we had a delay in our arrival.
The only thing you should be mindful of is that the building has VERY thin walls. We could hear the upstairs neighbours talking and walking around the flat, even though they were communicating at normal room volume. It didn't bother us as we were out of the house for most of the day, but if you're a light sleeper or a bit noise sensitive its nice to know before.
All in all we would recommend it and absolutely stay here again!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: A very nice apartment with everything you'd need and with a very spacious bathroom and balcony that gets the sun in the afternoon. The location was great right next to a tram stop that takes you to the centre in less than 10 minutes. The communication with Nathalie was very good. I would definitely recommend this place if you are visiting Rotterdam

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
The flat was comfortable, as described and a nice place for us to rest after a busy few days.
Nathalie was quick to respond to questions and helpful and flexible with check-in and check-out; she even suggested things happening locally that weekend that might interest our 6 year old son.
It was really convenient that the supermarket was so close and the flat had all of the utensils and amenities we needed for eating /drinking for a couple of days.
Beyond the hosts' control, there was a city festival happening in Rotterdam the weekend that we were there, and therefore the outside noise was a bit too loud for us.
Having a child with us, we used the tram to get in and out of central Rotterdam (as tourists, the minimum ticket we could buy was for 2hrs use, which felt quite expensive for what was a relatively short tram ride), but the route was easy to navigate, had regular trams and was quite quick.
The area where the flat is located has quite a different feel to it than the harbour area (where we'd stayed beforehand) so, having a child with us, we spent evenings inside the flat - but our son was happy watching the few English TV channels we had access to, or using the reliable wifi to watch Netflix on his iPad!
On balance, the flat was comfortable and we were happy there for our short trip, but, as a family with a young child, the area wasn't the best choice on our part.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
The airbnb of Arjen and Nathalie is very cozy and has a great style!
The kitchen offers everything you need to cook and there are supermarkets and shops directly closeby.
The only thing is that the bathroom is a bit dark as the lamp there is not the brightest.
However, we very much enjoyed our stay and the vibe of the place! :)

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: The Flat is light, clean and has a good atmosphere. The apartment has everything you need. There is enough space for three people. Nathalie is a very friendly person and answers fast on SMS.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
The house was very cosy, in a quiet location and with a nice view to the commercial street.
A beautiful vintage interior & decoration, with personal touch.
Everything was under care and thought.
Nathalie was there for the check in and gave us a warm Wellcome.
It was convenient that an indoor parking space, for a fair price, was just around the corner.
We would like to visit again.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Super cute apartment! And lovely with the big windows in the kitchen! With public transport getting to the tourist attractions was easy as well. Communication was easy, Nathalie was super nice and friendly!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Thank you for having us Nathalie! We loved our stay in Rotterdam. The flat was beautiful. We especially loved the huge bath and large windows overlooking a cute little square, which on Sunday held a little festival with vintage markets and live music. Cannot recommend enough.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: Better than described! Lovely balcony too that isn’t pictured. Fab for our stay in Rotterdam. Thanks!!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Very comfortable place to stay, Arjen and Nathalie have gone to a lot of effort to make it authentic. Up one and a half flights of steep stairs, as is usual for the area.
Great location, but it can be a bit noisy in the living areas, the bedroom at the back is fairly quiet. Currently when getting there on the 125 or 23 tram it is difficult to get to as the road is blocked off due to roadworks, requiring a much longer walk.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Our hosts were very accommodating with arrival times and information. The bed was soft and comfy and my teenage son enjoyed his adjoining room , which was separated from ours with a curtain, his exact words were "It's cool!".
The place was clean and charming.
Close to nearby tram stops so getting around was easy. There were local supermarkets, and a lovely patisserie called Almina, which had coffee, tea and a range of hot and cold food, it was open from 8-10. We enjoyed our stay, thank you!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: It was a lovely airbnb! The hosts have thought of the small things and have tried to make the flat really have that vintage flair, all the way down to the smallest details! The location is close to grocery stores and trams and Nathalie and Arjen were very responsive leading up to my stay. The apartment was clean and the balcony off the bedroom was a lovely little space to enjoy the afternoon sun.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments: We had a lovely time at the flat. Is slightly out of the city, but very easy transport. Flat very close to the tram stop, so easy with luggage. Flat was exactly as pictured, very cosy and well heated. No outside noise in the evenings. Hosts were friendly and responsive

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Apartment was lovely, clean and modern with everything we needed. There was a hob, air fryer and microwave, kettle, toaster and coffee machine. A few condiments there as well for cooking like salt and pepper.
Bathroom was lovely and clean, big shower and bath.
Super easy check in and check out
The place is a little out of the centre, tram takes about 10-15 mins to get into town. This was fine and reflected in the price of the Airbnb, most places in the centre cost a lot more. It felt slightly rougher in the area we were in, as two females, but we never felt particularly unsafe.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
This was a great apartment for a Rotterdam trip. Just a minute walk away from a supermarket and the tram and about 35 minutes walk into Rotterdam Central.
The apartment itself was really nicely decorated with a 70s retro feel. It had lots of natural light, even in winter, and was well kitted out. An excellent coffee machine too!

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Nathalie's place is really nice, spacious and - as announced - vintage-style. We particularly enjoyed the design of the kitchen & living room. The check-in was easy. Kitchen equipment is good so that you can do proper cooking (with 2 hotplates). There is even a small balcony.
While the flat is outside the city centre, it is well-connected by tram (running every 8 mins. or so), and the station is less than 5 mins. walking distance. A supermarket is just around the corner (open until 10 p.m.), and there are a number of shops., restaurants, and cafés along the street.
We would come again when we are back to R.dam :-)

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
Great stay and way bigger than it looks in the pictures!
Central location there is a supermarket about a minute away and a lot of shops and restaurants.
Living room window has a great view of the street.
Balcony was great also.
Overall very clean and very comfy stay if you enjoy the decor.

name: Vintage Apartment
comments:
We had a very nice stay at the apartment. it is very pretty and has everything you need for simple cooking and breakfast.
the neighborhood and the neighbors were kind of noisy, which didn't bother me, but it may be a problem if you have very light sleep.
but all in all i would recommend!

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
Sondra and her family are all very nice and friendly, I had wonderful memories at Rotterdam's living experience because of this lovely home. everyday I woke up by daylight then got into the kitchen to enjoy the breakfast and coffee, starting a energy day. Sondra let me use all the machine in the kitchen, and offer free tee and coffee and fruit, that's really kind. I also got a welcome dinner by Sondra, which taste really delicious! Sondra help me to wash the clothes, when I got back the clothes, they were clean and dry! the bathroom is always clean. this place is really deserve to 5 stars, I'll definitely choose to live here again when I come to Rotterdam next time.
thanks a lot, Sondra and your family:)

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
We spent two nights at Sandra's house and we really enjoyed that. She, her daughter and her husband were very welcoming with us and we loved their warm attitude and the talks we had.

As for the accomodation, everything is clean and cosy. It is easy and free to park a car on the street just along the house and the centre of Rotterdam is easily reachable through the metro far from 5 minutes from the house.

Dank u wel Sandra and see you soon! :)

name: Near Erasmus University
comments: Everything was perfect.  Eliza is such a nice hostess.  She made us comfortable since the first minute and provided us all the information we needed. She also left the keys with us, so we could return anytime we want. The house is really close to the metro and is really easy to access the center of the city. The room is upstairs and you can have all the privacy you want.  We loved the breakfast.

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
We would definitely recommend the stay in Sandra's house within her family. She is a very warm-hearted person and from the very beginning you feel welcome.
We had a nice clean room with a beautiful view over a river and shared the bathroom with the family, which was never a problem.
Every day started with a delicious breakfast from Sandra (at any time we wanted) and an exited conversation about what we've done the day before and what to see in Rotterdam. You could ask her everything.
Her house can be found easily and the metro station is only a few minutes walk away, even though the metro does not run that frequently as you are maybe used to it.
All in all we had a great stay in Rotterdam, because of the very friendly people living there and Sandra completed this impression.
Thank you Sandra and all the best for you and your family.

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
Het logeren bij Eliza was een heerlijke ervaring. Ik voelde me welkom in haar gezin. Bij aankomst kon ik direct aanschuiven bij het avondeten. Dit was iets waar ik niet op gerekend had en maakte dat ik me welkom voelde.
Ik kreeg een lekker ruime en leuk ingerichte kamer. In de kamer een is een kast voor de kleding en een bureau.
Er is een ruime badkamer.
Alles was schoon, wat zeker niet onbelangrijk is.
Eliza gaf ook tips en aanwijzingen over haar stad.
Het is een gezellig gezin om bij te logeren.

Staying with Eliza`s family was a nice and pleasant experience. They made me feel very welcome. When I arrived I was invated to share the eveningmeal with them. This was something I hadn`t counted on.
The room I stayed in was light and large and nicely decorated. It has a closet for your clothes and a desk.
The bathroom is very roomy.
Everything was clean, wich I find important.
Eliza also gave me some tips and recomendations about her town.

Thx Eliza and family.

name: Near Erasmus University
comments: Everything was great, we enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam. Eliza was really nice welcoming us with hot tea and small talk when we arrived. She also provided us breakfast with asking what kinds of meal we like (we had bread and burger but she said she likes cooking chinese food too ;)). It was great staying in suburb of Rotterdam with nice green environment and canal view right in front of your accomodation. Thanks Eliza :)

name: Near Erasmus University
comments: it felt like family and i understand why she has so many positive reviews, behind each one of these reviews there is a beautiful story and mine was fantastic. Thanks dear Eliza

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
Eliza was a brilliant hostess and she deserves all the great reviews. She made my first stay in the Netherlands comfortable and relaxing and could have not asked for a better start.
I just want to thank you again Eliza for everything you have done and all the best for the future!

name: Near Erasmus University
comments:
It was an absolute pleasure staying with Eliza and her daughter. I lived with them for just over a month. This was shortly after I started my research and teaching job at the university.
They were always considerate and respectful of my privacy and also very friendly and welcoming at the same time! We had some really lovely chats in the evening after a tiring day in the office, talking about everything from travel to culture and cooking!
Here is another example to show how considerate they were. They asked me around what time I go to bed so that they can be extra careful at night not to wake me up. Maybe they even spoiled me a bit!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great location, very central. Beautiful view and very enjoyable apartment. You will find all you need there so don't bother to bringing anything with you. Apartment is fully equipped is close to restaurants and Rotterdam city centre with all the shops and restaurants (just around the corner) 3 min walk from central station. If I need to stay again in Rotterdam I would definently come back to the same place. Alex who is a host is very helpful and proactive.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We spent few days at Rotterdam for business and choose these apartments as place to live. I want to say Thanks to Alex for his hospitality. Apartments are really cool and have best location. The view of Rotterdam is perfect. It is really nice to spend evening at balcony with cup of tea after hard working day.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Our stay at Ape Calypso was a dream ! Everything was even better than we thought, the apartment was big, comfortable with top equipments, from kitchen to bathroom, including the bedrooms, with birds singing from inside the alarm clock :-). The view from the balcony at night is great ! I particularly enjoyed the sun early morning on the
terrace, protected from the cold wind, and the sun still there for lunch and a part of the afternoon was soooo good. We bought different kinds of things to eat at the Markthal (beautiful !) and brought them back to the apartment, it was perfect ! Alex was available all the time, by mail or SMS, answering all questions or wondering about our well-being. perfect organization for the parking at arrival and departure. A real good address in Rotterdam. We'll certainly be back !

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment is fantastic.  super central, modern, fresh, with great light and views, and terraces on two sides.   Alex was really welcoming, helpful and communicative.  I would definitely stay here again.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex is a fantastic and welcoming host, the apartment is true to the pictures or even better, clean and well facilities, free and secured parking lot in the basement, every room has a balcony or you can choose the big one next to the living room to relax or have a drink with friends or enjoy the nightscape.
The location is great as well, just in the heart in Rotterdam, 3 min walk to the station, supermarket just downstairs.
We can always get quickly replies and information about the city from emails before we arrived,
Overall it was a great experience, we would definitely come back.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
We spent four days at Alex's apartment in Rotterdam. The apartment is awesome, just as described, and Alex is an excellent host, providing all the information we could ask for and easy to reach and very helpful. He left detailed and very exact information and provided a map with which we could find our way on bicyle around Rotterdam. We actually rode our bikes out into the countryside, following his advice.
In the evening, we enjoyed watching the lights of Rotterdam going on and we could't seem to get enough of the view. It was a wonderful stay in a wonderful apartment. Thank you, Alex

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Thanx to Alex`s skills as handyman, we had a wheelchairramp for the balconys in no time :-)
Thank you for taking our needs serious, it really helped our long-weekend in Rotterdam become "a walk in the park."
I will very much recommed this apartment for stay in.
And also Alex/wife as nice proffesionell landlords :-)

Best regards Ørjan G

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We were greeted by Alex who was friendly and helpful and had been very easy to get in contact with. The apartment is beautiful, clean and has everything you could want for a city getaway. Views from the balcony are fantastic and the locality to the train station/ underground/ trams was excellent. would highly recommend this apartment. Many thanks Alex and Sandra.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We enjoyed our stay very much as everything was perfect. We could come earlier than first expected and also leave later. The apartment was very clean and well equipped. Fresh fruit and a card for public transportation were available and Alex contacted us to make sure that everything was OK during our stay. The apartment is very centrally located on 17th floor with a perfect view of Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
This Apartment is quite perfect! You have an amazing view over the city and the apartment contains everything you need for some days off. Alex was very flexibel in communication and he picked us up on the airport! (Many thanks again)
The whole building is very modern and is located very central, perfect for a city-trip.
The apartment was very clean and there were some fruits in the kitchen for us :)

We could recommend the apartment without any limitations.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Fantastic apartment in a great location. Clean, spacious, modern, amazing views, brilliant facilities. Best balconies ever. Nice touches with a bottle of wine and fruit on arrival and soap / shampoo. Alex had to deal with a sick daughter on our arrival day but he found a friend to let us in with no fuss. Good Comms before departure too. All excellent. Thanks Alex.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Superb apartment. Much better than the pictures. Love the view and not to mention one of the most comfortable beds i have ever slept in. Alex is very reaponsive and helpful owner. Highly recommended for anyone visiting rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment was fantastic, all things considered it was the best holiday apartment I have ever stayed in. The location is perfect for exploring the city. Alex was not there for the check in but it was very smooth. We found the apartment, collected the keys from reception and were enjoying a coffee on the balcony within 10 minutes of arriving at the station! Alex was easily contactable throughout should we have needed anything but everything had been thought of and we settled right in. Back to the coffee and the balcony...the coffee machine is top notch and the balcony has the most amazing view over the city with real comfy seats. The rest of the apartment has everything you could need and it is luxurious throughout. Check out again was perfect, luckily no one was staying the next day and we were able to check out with no rush and enjoy a bit more of the apartment. Thanks Alex, it made our stay in Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Our stay-in experience was great!

The location was perfect for visitor to explore the city as it's so convenience to travel anywhere by train, by tram or by metro.

The apartment was spacious, comfortable, modern and well-equipped. The view from the two balconies were awersome! Great view of Rotterdam.

Alex was an excellent host, very nice and helpful!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: It's a wonderful experience to live in this apartment. There is nice view from the house and it gets everything we need inside.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great place to stay in Rotterdam if you are with a family or as a couple. Public transport right around the corner as well as grocery shopping. all the restaurants and cool things in Rotterdam at walking distance. The apartment is great, spacious, with an awesome view on the big balcony. Alex and his wife have done a great job decorating this place!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Even late in the evening Alex was there to hand over the keys and instructions on the equipment in the apartment. The apartment itself is wonderful! Literally everything is taken care of and you feel immediately at home. We didn't haver that brilliant weather, but we had our breakfast on the very spacious balcony.
We will come back here!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex was there when we arrived and did a great job making us feel welcome.
Very clean, great location, spacious and modern apartment with great views.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Modern clean spacious 2 bedroom apartment only 300m from the central station of Rotterdam, an incredible panoramic view from the 17th floor terraces, friendly and helpful host. What more could you want? Even a bottle of wine for guests was available.:-) It is my clear choice next time in Rotterdam. I highly recommend! Enjoy it.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Fabulous apartment. Really central to shops restaurants and public transport. Really comfortable beds. Upscale amenities in the apartment, such as coffee maker and american fridge and smart tv. Views are amazing.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Perfect location near everything, with great views from the 17th floor. The host, Alex, was really nice and flexible and we couldn't have asked for more.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Absolutely fantastic apartment - large and spacious, extremely well equipped. And super family friendly - Alex provided a cot and highchair, and there were even toys to keep the baby amused. The flat is 2 minutes from central station, and a 15 minute walk to Erasmus MC where I was working. There is a supermarket on the ground floor of the apartment block, so it couldn't have been easier and more convenient. The balcony is lovely, and with fabulous views. I can't recommend this place more highly!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: This is simply the best Airbnb we have stayed in to date. The apartment and views were amazing. Alex was an excellent and accommodating host.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex was a terrific host and the apartment is perfect.  It is precisely as pictured and everything is new and top quality.  It was absolutely spotless when we arrived.  Although in a busy area, it is high enough to not have much street noise with windows open.  Kitchen is very well appointed - major appliances as well as cooking and dining necessities.  If you want to cook all meals, you will not be wanting for anything.  A decent grocery store is within 30m of the front door and a big one about 5 minute walk.  Location is ideal - countless shops and restaurants nearby.  Train station a few minute walk.  Movie theatre even closer.  Pretty much perfect for a comfortable stay in Rotterdam!!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
What can I say? Like really?
What a wonderful super host Alex is. Very friendly and got lots of tips what to visit during my stay. The apartment has one of the best views I came across, very stylish and super clean. It is located in the center so u can get around very easily from there on through beautiful Rotterdam. This is a place to be and feel that you are living!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Lovely modern apartment in a very convenient location. Can walk to most places of interest, though there is tram, metro and train very close indeed, and Alex kindly left a couple of chip-cards that are necessary for tram and metro travel.
Two nice sized bedrooms, two lovely balcony areas, and a fantastic bathroom.
Everything was so easy, from the communication with Alex, to the garage and parking space access, to the very simple check-in and check-out.
Would highly recommend !!
Only one thing worth noting is the supermarket in the same block does not accept either Amex or Visa ! Which could lead to some people being caught out (as we were), but of course that is not related to Alex or the apartment.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Amazing apartment, everything from the stunning views to the coffee maker is excellent. We stayed 5 nights with two small kids and they were super comfortable. Alex was also a great host, really flexible upon check-in time, and with lots of useful tips for Rotterdam. Would come back in a heartbeat. Tough to follow up on a family trip after this apartment and some excellent weather we enjoyed.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great appartment right in the city center. Very bright and nice place to be. It has really everything you will need during your stay. Alex is a great host and very welcoming. Highly recommended.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Great appartement. Very quiet with parking place on site included.
Terrific view of the city with a very nice terrace
Very confortable flat, well equiped and close to the train station.
A very friendly welcome made by Alex who was aivailable and reactive
A very good stay for our family ! We recommend warmly

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Prepare to be wowed. This is a fantasic apartment with stunning views. We felt like millionaires and Alex is such a great guy who was helpful and made sure everything was perfect for our stay.  Rotterdam was a great surprise too and loads to do and eat and drink.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex’s place was so much better then we expected, really close to central station, the city centre and with easy access to public transport right at the front door, super modern with all the extras we have not come across in any other properties, such as Netflix, awesome coffee machine, high end furnishings and appliances, a fantastic sized balcony with a spectacular view. We would love to call Alex’s place home and will definitely recommend it and return for future stays.
Shane & Trish
Australia

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great apartment, it is as the pictures show. The view from the balcony is great, especially at night. We had a great weekend!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
This was the best Airbnb experience we have had. The apartment was spotless, was in a great location and had breathtaking views. I cannot express just how lovely Alex’s place is. It was even stocked with fresh fruit and a bottle of wine and a few spices and cooking oil. The bed was super comfy. The bathroom was roomy. The balcony; oh the balcony!!! It was so nice to sit out on and enjoy wine in the evenings and coffee in the mornings.
Do yourself a favor and stay at Alex’s place. You will not want to leave.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
We have stayed in apartments in Amsterdam on four occasions this was by far the best apartment. The apartment has fantastic outside spacious balcony with lovely seating areas. We stayed in October the weather was very kind to us we ate outside enjoying the lovely view.
Alex was a lovely host with lots of very thoughtful touches such as fresh fruit, supply of delicious coffee and even a jar of biscuits.
I would highly recommend the apartment. We will be back!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: This appartment is absolutely amazing! Much better than in the pictures, great location just a few meters from Rotterdam Centraal . The view is excellent and the appartment is very big and has everything you will need for your stay

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Wonderful flat in the center of Rotterdam. The view is amazing.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
I stayed 11 days/nights in Alex’s apartment Apé Calypso, nicknamed after the Calypso apartment block, a prominent building near Central Station wherein this apartment is contained. The location was excellent for my purposes of attending the International Film Festival Rotterdam 2019 (IFFR for short). All but one festival venues were within 10 minutes walking distance, and the one exception could be reached by subway in 20 minutes. As a result, my standard festival menu of 4 movies per day could be “done” without loosing time in traffic, thus leaving enough room to prepare for the next movie to see, and to update my festival notes afterwards. And to top it all, the Calypso building also contained an Albert Heijn supermarket on the ground floor, so obtaining groceries could be done in a minimum of time too. #####

As a self-catering traveler by choice, the kitchen is important for me and the first to inspect upon arrival. I found everything I needed: ample pots/pans, dishes, cutlery and so on, and even some herbes and other small things you usually do not bring along when travelling but still come in handy when cooking for yourself. #####

The apartment is on the 17th floor, with two sides providing for a nice view over the city and its skyline. Two balconies, one southward and a smaller one westward, offer a convenient place to sit, even protected against rain due to being totally inside the building. It did not protect us, however, against the cold in January, so we used the balcony only to make pictures of the surroundings. #####
Communication with host Alex was perfect, before and during my stay, with short turnaround times to provide a useful response. Due to my yearly film festival visits to Rotterdam since 2010, I already knew my way around in the city, so I did not test his touristic knowledge. Rather, my enquiries were about home appliances and the in-house fitness room that one of my guests wanted to use. I needed his help not very often, however, as the comprehensive House Manual and his introductory explanation at check-in time were very clear and useful.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: alex is a super host and is apt is just perfect. super central, totally cosy and a wonderful view over rotterdam! the fruitbowl and the care of how alex is hosting makes the stay perfect! thank you - and i will be back for shure!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Had a perfect stay in Rotterdam! very nice appartment with great views!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Amazing accommodation even better than the photos. Alex was a great host and met us at 1pm when we arrived. The balcony was stunning and we spent a lot of time sat on the cushions. The attention to detail was appreciated including having some travel cards at our disposal. The building is in a great location but still quiet.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Such a lovely apartment! Absolutely Fantastic!!!  It was all great: location, views, amenities, and very thoughtful decorated and inventory. I highly recommend Alex's place. Alex was also very welcoming and swift in communication. I'd love to return next year!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
I would say this is the most excellent apartment in all my past experience in terms of style, cleanliness, convenience, safety.... it’s really a cool place! There’s a big balcony where we could relax & enjoy a cup of coffee or drink! The scene from the balcony is so nice!
The facilities are more than enough & are well equipped with tender loving care!
Dear Alex, thank you for all the arrangement for checking in & waiting us at the front door to welcome us! So patient to explain everything about the apartment & the visit! Thanks again.
It’s highly recommended!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: It's hard to explain how nice Alex's space is, pictures really don't do it justice! The flat is stylish and spotlessly clean, the beds are very comfortable and the shower is great. It was also nice to have access to a washer whilst we stayed, as we'd been traveling for a bit by that point. By far the balconies were our favourite bit, words can't describe the breathtaking views of Rotterdam and how nice they are to view from the spacious balcony with a cup of coffee. Alex was a fantastic host, met us in person and was very responsive throughout the stay. Would definitely recommend!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Amazing location, great views, great clean space filled with nice touches to make you feel welcome.
It’s right in the city center, any more centrally located is practically impossible. I grew up in Rotterdam years ago, so I know :). The view is amazing and better than you can imagine. Walking distance to central station, shops, casino, bars, movies etc.
Alex was a great host to communicate with and arrange the stay.
The whole experience was way better than we expected.
I would stay here again in the future if I’m in the area.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
This was by far the best airbnb experience we ever had!
The view is breathtaking, the beds are comfortable, the whole apartment is very clean and there are so many details in the apartment we truly appreciated – for example different colors of the towels, all the kitchen interior you need, soap and tissues, Netflix, umbrellas,... it felt like home!
The furniture is tasteful and new, we loved the combination of yellow and grey.
Everything was perfect, clean, stylish, thought through and we enjoyed our stay at this place so much – Thanks for having us, Alex!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: I can highly recommend this apartment from Alex. The location is perfect for exploring Rotterdam or even Amsterdam being minutes from central station. Alex was a great host meeting us and being flexible with timings. The apartment is just amazing, situated in a modern block with private parking underneath. Security is high with electronic swipe access. The apartment is spacious, bright well equipped and has two balconies overlooking the city, the main with dining and comfortable seating making a totally useable outdoor space. Just brilliant all round.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Very nice apartment with all necessary utilities and amenities! The view is very nice as well!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Location top - notch, spectacular views, responsive and helpful host and luxurious, modern accommodation - couldn't ask for more. Highly recommended.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: What can i say about this place? AMAZING is the only fitting word. The views are warming the heart, the location is top, the beds are comfy, the host welcoming us was a nice personal touch. A+ all the way!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Where to begin! The location of the apartment is right in the centre of town and ideal for the Cool district and Katendrecht with easy connections at nearby Centraal Station.
The apartment itself is well proportioned and very well maintained with commanding views over the city.
Alex met us at the property and showed us round and made us feel very welcome with great sightseeing tips.
Looking forward to staying at Alex's apartment again the next time we are in Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: All of the other 5 star reviews are spot on. This is a beautiful, convenient apartment.  Alex goes out of his way to provide an enjoyable experience, and the touches he provides makes the apartment feel like a home rather than an AirBnb.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Can't think of a better place to experience Rotterdam from! The view is absolutely amazing! Little touches like the fully stocked coffee machine were appreciated. Would definitely like to stay again when I'm in Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment was amazing. We particularly enjoyed spending some time sitting and chatting on the balcony.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex’s place is amazing! Very stylish and with super comfortable beds. The outside terrace is lovely with a great view over Rotterdam. Alex was very kind in explaining everything, and always responded quickly . Definitely a place I would like to return to!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Perfect flat in Rotterdam.
We had a great time at Alex‘s appartement.
It‘s exactly like in the description/photos.
It‘s clean and tidy. Everything is on it‘s place.
Even the knives are sharp.
Very good coffee!
We loved the terrace. Great view over the skyline and great to hang out.
Alex is a friendly host, who has it‘s flat perfect organized. Check in was easy, Alex was waiting for us. Parking is easy.
Thank you Alex, we will come again!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex is an uncomplicated and friendly host and the appartment is 100% as described. It was equipped with everything we needed and the view from the balcony was just great! The location is very central (restaurants, central station, albert heijn, bakery max. 5 min away). A big plus was also the parking space in the building. We felt safe and it was very quiet in the appartment.
Long story short - for us it was just perfect. If you want to stay in Rotterdam we would definitely recommend this appartment!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Amazing apartment with super nice balcony to stare at Rotterdam from such great heights! Sunrise looks so beautiful from the very comfi double bed! Super clean, stylish, quite and well equipped place. Alex is a very kind person that has been a pleasure to meet during check in. Our communication was excellent from the start and I would definitely recommend you to stay over!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: An awesome apartment, clean, big and modern. Alex is one of the best owners I've ever met. The location fantastic with a breath taking view from the balcony, it is equipped with everything you need for a home. I definitely recommend! 10+

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Perfect location, fantastic view. Super airbnb. !!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex's apartment is a dream.
Everything is tastefully furnished to a high standard. There were high quality dishes and cooking utensils. The knives are sharp too. The beds were great and freshly made. There were also fresh towels. The bathroom has a rain shower.
The main balcony was the absolute highlight. The view is a dream. It is covered and has great seating. It was always pleasantly cool in the apartment even though it was up to 28 ° outside.
The location of the apartment is perfect! You have the center in front of the door and many places to eat.
The building itself conveys a certain luxury. There are 3 elevators and a doorman. Everything is controlled via a chip on the keychain.
The garage has a license plate scanner and opens and closes automatically. All in all, I give the accommodation a full 5 stars.
Kind regards

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Loved this apartment. Excellent in every way. Really spacious and comfortable, with absolutely superb views and in a perfect location. Everything we could possibly need was provided, as well as simple, foolproof instructions to all the equipment. Alex was a superb host, easy to contact if needed, and the little extra touches, such as fruit, travel cards and lots of tourist information were really appreciated. The apartment is only a couple of minutes walk from the main train station, shopping and lots of lovely restaurants and bars. We will definitely be back. Thanks Alex.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Perfection.  Great place with splendid views of Rotterdam.  This was our 2nd stay at Alex’s place.  Hopefully next year we can stay here again. Thank Alex!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
The location is perfect. very nice secure building with a gym and a grocery store underneath.
The apartment is bright, clean, has city views and everything you need. certainly a recommendation!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great place. Fantastic view of city. Alex gave such great directions and information. This is such a well appointed high rise Airbnb. Higher priced but well worth it.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We had a fantastic stay in Alex’s apartment! It was really clean, comfortable and spacious and it has everything you might need. The balconies and views are wonderful and the location is very convenient. Alex was very welcoming and came to meet us when we arrived and showed us everything in the apartment and gave some great tips on visiting Rotterdam. He is an excellent host and this is a wonderful apartment - thanks again for having us!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Highly recommended. It is a clean, spacious, and well-eqipped place with a great view. The location is close to the central station and handy for all the tourist sites, shopping and eating. Alex was very communicative and helpful.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Accomodation was excellent, definitely 5 out of 5, great apartment with a great view. Alex was really accommodating when we had some last minute changes also, really appreciated! Would definitely stay here for any future trips to Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Fantastic locations near restaurants, transport and sights. Underground secure parking. Awesome balcony with views over the city. If I return to Rotterdam I will be trying to stay here.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: This is definitely a great apartment in an amazing location if you want to visit the city of Rotterdam. Very easy to walk everywhere in the city and also access the public transportation if you need to. We would definitely stay there again and the views from the balconies were amazing!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Modern, clean apartment in a great location with stunning city views.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Highly recommended! I really enjoyed my stay here. Excellent host and amazing apartment. Modern upscale apartment with everything you need including a beautiful view of the city. I will definitely be back next time I visit Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex was a fantastic host from start to finish. Responded to any questions straight away. He even allowed us to check in early and leave a little later. The apartment is simply stunning. The views off the balcony were amazing showcasing the entire city. The furnishings were high end and spotlessly clean, as was the entire apartment. We met friends over there who live outside the city and he even allowed them to use the allocated parking space the evening they visited us.
Nothing was too much trouble.
If you’re going to Rotterdam and want a beautiful apartment in the perfect city centre location. Look no further.
We will be back

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Great location!  Very close to the central train station and near shopping, restaurants and public transport.  Apartment had everything necessary for a comfortable stay and the view of the city was fabulous.  Alex was very responsive and helpful and gave clear instructions.  The apartment was stocked with fresh fruit, transport cards, maps and travel info, along with a well equipped kitchen, and two spacious balconies.  Would definitely stay again!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: The pictures don't do this apartment justice! The views from the balconies are divine, the place was spotless and well appointed with everything we needed, and Alex was a very helpful host. We would stay there again in a heartbeat. Location can't be beat.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex is really responsive, helpful and welcoming. He introduced the place to us and even offer some guidelines for tourists, and some instructions on how to use the amenities in the apartment. My parents enjoy their stay in Rotterdam, and the view from the 17th floor is really great, they have great memories of staying at Alex's place. The location is quite nice, just a few minutes walk from the central station. Will definitely recommend other guests to stay here!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Best AirBnB ever! This was a truly unique place right in the heart of Rotterdam. The trainstation is only some meters away and the the appartment, especially the huge balcony, has the best view of the city! Alex was really friendly and met us at the appartment. He took a lot of time explaining everything to us. At check-out we accidentally locked our car keys in the appartment and Alex picked up the phone and rushed over to the appartment eventhough it was early on a Sunday morning - what an excellent and truly remarkable service! The apparment was also really well equipped (especially the kitchen) with comfortable beds. Would definitely recommend this apparment to anyone staying in Rotterdam!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
The unit was beautiful and clean. The view was amazing and the whole unit was totally private.
Getting into the unit was easy. There was a parking spot in the garage that we could use for free.
Alex was very helpful and he was helping us to get inside, he explained how everything worked.
We highly recommend this place. 10/10

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Alex’s place has exceeded our expectations, it had everything and beyond that. The view from the balcony was amazing, the beds were comfy, everything was high quality and luxurious. If that place was 50% less than what it is, I would have had the same opinion about it.
Highly recommended and most definitely would return.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex was an excellent host. He met us at the door and walked us through every house detail. As far as the house, It was as described. This place had beautiful views of the city well-equipped kitchen and plenty of bedding and towels. I couldn't ask for anything more. Thanks again, Alex, for your hospitality!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We stayed at this fantastic Airbnb for a week and it was worth it. Alex is a very pleasant host: smooth communication, friendly welcome, flexible check-in and check-out times, attentive touches, such as, fresh fruit and umbrellas. The spaces are really nice and the kitchen is well equipped (all appliances you want, big fridge, nice crockery etc.). The location is excellent, in a secure building and close to the station, the city centre and main museums. And last but not least, there are two balconies with the very best views of the impressive Rotterdam Skyline.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Das Appartement hat eine tolle Lage in Fußgehweite des Hauptbahnhofs und ist überdurchschnittlich gut ausgestattet. Highlights sind unter anderem die zwei Balkone und die phantastische Aussicht über Rotterdam.
Alex ist ein sehr aufmerksamer Gastgeber, der uns auch mit vielen Tipps versorgt hat. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt in Rotterdam rundum genossen.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
We were really happy with our stay in this apartment - it made our stay in Rotterdam even better :)
It’s a beautiful place with a breathtaking view, super clean and comfortable. Alex was a great host and was always available for any questions. We can definitely recommend this apartment to anyone staying in Rotterdam!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Everything was exactly as described, or better. Beautiful views from large windows and multiple balconies facing different directions. Comfortable, quality furniture in all rooms. Exceptionally clean. Located in a dense busy area near Rotterdam Centraal but up on the 17th floor it's remarkably quiet with well insulated windows and virtually zero noise from neighbors. Most well equipped kitchen of any Airbnb I've stayed in. Lots of toys and games for kids. Host was friendly and easy to communicate with, and the big bowl of fresh fruit was a really nice and practical welcome touch. I'd definitely recommend staying here to anyone looking for a place in this area of Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: We really, really liked it. It was just like it was described. Alex was an super nice host and the view is just incredible. Especially at night. We loved it and we’ll definitely come back.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex's apartment was great, we settled in really quickly & it felt very much like home. It was centrally located, with fabulous views across Rotterdam, & had everything we needed, including very comfortable beds!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Excellent apartment, very central, wonderful views.  The apartment made us feel comfortable, relaxed and safe in a big city.  Alex took great care to be in touch and was always helpful.  Strongly recommended.  Great  attention to details in the apartment - for example fruit , coffee beans and wine!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment is very beautiful and has a fantastic view. The location could not be better, everything could be reached by foot but there would be also a train station directly before the house.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: This place was perfect. We had all our luggage with us, it was an easy five minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal train station. The apartment is on the 17th floor with an amazing view of the city, with balconies from the living area and the main bedroom. It has everything you could want - lots of cutlery, dishes, glassware, pots, pans, coffee beans, juicer, a bowl of fruit etc. Beds were comfortable, bathtub was huge. There is a supermarket two minutes away. Alex responded quickly via Airbnb whenever I contacted him prior to arrival. He met us at the apartment and explained everything. He was very pleasant. I definitely recommend this place!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Wonderful condo. Easy to prep meals in well furnished kitchen.
Awesome views of the city.
Reception staff and host, Alex, were very accommodating.
Easy public transport or walking to central sights
Convenient Coffee shop and grocery next door.
Note-grocery did not accept credit cards--only debit or cash

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: A really great Airbnb we highly recommend !!  Alex was great at check-in and always available to answer any questions. He is a great host.  The location could not be better. It’s in Central Rotterdam, very close to the train station with many restaurants nearby. The apartment has every amenity you could possibly need, A fully stocked kitchen with all kitchen appliances, large and small, A beautifully appointed bathroom and two nice size bedrooms. The view is spectacular. We will stay here again.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Had a great two night stay. Alex was warm and welcoming. The apartment is large and it was great to spend time on the terrace and enjoy the view of the city. Thank you!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex's apartment is huge, beautifully clean, extremely well appointed, and fantastically situated. There's a brilliant view of the city, and the apartment was very comfortable, quiet, and had all the mod cons. It's so close to the central station, and right next to a useful tram line. I can't fault this place at all and would stay again without hesitation.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
If you are visiting Rotterdam, this is the most perfect place to stay. The apartment is stunning with such tremendous views all around you won't want to leave but when you do the location is perfect. You are very central and can walk to so many attractions or take the train, tram or metro all within 400 meters, great for arriving from the airport.
The apartment was very clean, warm, well laid out and had everything you would want. The beds were super comfortable and there was plenty of hot water plus lots of little extras that really help (washing up liquid, dishwasher tablets etc).
I would love to return and Alex was extremely helpful and a great host, thank you.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Awesome location with amazing views! A high-end apartment that was squeaky clean and plenty of space and nice toys for our kiddos. Felt very safe and great launch for our trips to cities/towns nearby.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Everything was perfect, the view, the cleanliness, the comfort.  Even the small extras, fresh fruit, coffee beans for coffee maker, everything you needed and more!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
The apartment is fantastic and we would highly recommend it. It is extremely clean and well presented and has everything you could possibly need, and some extra touches too. We absolutely loved it. The views are stunning, day and night and even in October we enjoyed sitting out on the large and sheltered balcony, enjoying the morning sun. The area is very nice and convenient, with a shop and eateries right on the doorstop and it is very close to the Central Station and very walkable for touring the city.
Alex was a great host who met us in person at check in and was very friendly and helpful.
We were very happy to have found such a lovely apartment and we very much enjoyed exploring Rotterdam too.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Wow this apartment is just Beautiful absolutely immaculate throughout. Alex is a fantastic host nothing is to much trouble for him. Myself and 3 friends stayed for a weekend, plenty of room for 4 people. Beds are so comfy. The apartment is fully equipped with everything, even umbrellas provided. Great views of the city. I would definitely recommend Ape Calypso and we will use it again. Easy to get about train station 10 minutes walk. It is the best apartment I have stayed in. Well done Alex and Thank you so much

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex was an amazing host. Apartment was beautiful as were the views. Only had one issue with the shower but Alex promptly got on top of this and was sorted within a couple hours:) will definitely be coming back

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
We can only recommend this apartment.
Our stay there was really perfect: located in the center of Rotterdam, but completely calm inside. Great views, clean and even some basic supplies like coffee beans are offered.
We had a personal check-in and were therefore able to ask some questions. Great communication with the owner.
Highly recommendable apartment !

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments:
Me and my friend were very pleased with our stay. Alex is a great host. He was very responsive and very welcoming. Showed us everything we needed and gave us some info about things to do in Rotterdam. The location is amazing. Very close to Rotterdam Centraal and has plenty of stores and restaurants nearby that satisfied our cravings. The apartment looked like in the pictures. It was very clean and the view is amazing. The gym is an added bonus. The high ceilings are super nice and the balcony is very cozy with little wind. You can barely hear the cars on the streets. Kitchen also had everything we needed and the apartment is very modern. Overall I'm very pleased with everything. Only minor annoyance was the shower. The water goes a bit everywhere but there is a sort of mop that helps so it's no big deal. The big rain shower head makes up for the little flaw :).
I can very much recommend this Airbnb. Alex is a great host and you'll have a great stay guaranteed.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: From top to bottom this is one of best vacation rental experiences I have ever had. To start with Alex is an amazing host… very responsive, proactive and helpful. Communication was always a breeze. Then the location of this place can’t be beat and neither can the views. But what makes it even better is how clean and well thought out everything is. I never needed or wanted for anything. Alex had thoughtful touches like fresh fruit and toiletries. I will highly recommend this place to anyone traveling to Rotterdam and if I return this will be the only place I I would ever consider! If I could give it higher than a 10/10 I would!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex was a great host - this was our best Air BnB experience to date. The apt was beautiful, well stocked, and had great views of Rotterdam. The detailed instructions on appliances were appreciated. Highly recommend staying here!

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Beautiful apartment in a central location - very close to the station! Apartment had great facilities and beautiful views across Rotterdam. Lots of lovely little touches around the place and host very chatty. Would recommend.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Amazing stay at Alex’s 17th floor flat. The apartment is airy, clean, and has an amazing view of the city. Book this place if you want a central location with all the amenities you need. Thanks, Alex for an amazing stay, will def book again if in Rotterdam in the future.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: One of our favourite Airbnb experiences. The apartment was as described, with lots of extra touches. Alex was very responsive to any query. Having the private balcony, with incredible views was certainly a highlight of the apartment. I would recommend it to anyone who wants to be in Rotterdam.

name: Apê Calypso, Rotterdam center
comments: Alex’ apartment is very well appointed, in the middle of the city, and with beautiful views from the two balconies. The apartment includes all the amenities you need and Alex provided detailed operating instructions as well as helpful visitor information suggestions.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We had a very pleasant time at Barry's apartment. The district is calm, and the living-room has a nice view on Blijdorp's park. The proximity with the public transports is also quite convenient.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Barry was a great host. Arranged a parking ticket and was present at arrival. Came back to fix a minor issue with the tv. His appartment is right at a great park and close to metro and highway. Nice and cosy. Small balcony. Good price vs quality hang out!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Nice and cozy app, ful of sunlight, calm with sight on a park. Parkingspace nearby. Barry was very helpful, drove us around to show us restaurants, supermarkets and the metrostation. But the best of all: Barry has a licence for small airplanes,so for a very good price we had the chance to see Rotterdam from the air, the huge harbour, till the Northsee! So impressing! We recommend this place warmly.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: First off, Barry is very kind and accommodating. His place was very clean and full of light; perfect for the duration of our stay. It's location is in a quiet neighborhood conveniently located near the metro and train station. I recommend this place for any group or couple. Thanks!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
This apartment is exactly like the pictures! Perfect for a family because of the park just accross the street. And the city center is pretty close, even by foot (and if you prefer, the subway station is about 300m away).
The communication with Barry is easy, and he takes very good care of his guests!
I highly recommend this place!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: The appartement is bright and simply furnished and has a view to the park accros the street. I enjoyed my stay.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Great place, I highly recommended staying here if in Rotterdam. Lovely neighbourhood, close to public transport, a cool park is on the doorstep as well which is nice. The apartment itself is bright and airy with everything you need to be comfortable, to cook etc if you want to, and feel at home to chill out. Barry was a pleasure to meet and get recommendations from.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Very kind and polite host, the apartment had a beautiful park across the street.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
