comments: Barry's apartment was exactly as the photos describe it, and is a very practical place for a couple that wishes to stay a few days without being right in the center of Rotterdam. The host was also very welcoming and communicative, which helped us make the check-in very easily. The balcony as well as the park right outside the front door are sure to be good points for the summer, we would definitely recommend Barry's apartment !

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: I had a great time staying here for a few days. The apartment is bright, clean, and comfortable, and the nearby parks were great for exploring in good weather. All of my communication with the hosts was quick and friendly, and I had a lovely time. I'd definitely stay here again!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Highly recommended! This is a stylish, modern apartment in a great building, immediately beside a large park in Blijdorp. After several visits to Rotterdam where we stayed in city centre hotels, we were looking for the opportunity to stay in a residential neighbourhood with character and charm. Barry's apartment offered this and it was a pleasure to stay there.
The neighbourhood has all the amenities you will need. There are two excellent restaurants within a five minute walk: the Vroesenpavilion in the park and the Leuk eetcafé just a few streets over. There is a grocery store (an Albert Heijn) less than 10 minutes away, and the apartment is very convenient for public transit and bike paths as well.
If you are looking for a bright, airy modern flat that will give you some sense of what it is like to live in a cool Rotterdam neighbourhood rather than just visit it, book this apartment!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
The place is nice and cosy to stay. It’s is right by the beautiful big park. The view outside dinning room is spectacular appreciate during autumn season.
Alto shower was very small and a ward to shower, but clean and tidy.
Kitchen had some clutter so we found difficult to store our items. Also cooking there wasn’t the easiest as amenities where hard to find and didn’t feel welcomed in there.
Overall Barry was very nice to communicate and check in was very easy.

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Barry was very communicative and flexible throughout the whole process. The apartment was beautiful, with a great location and view over the Vroesenpark. Would definitely recommend to solo-travelers or couples! Definitely worth the full mark :)

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: A super place with an outstanding view. Barry is great and is easy to communicate with. Listing is accurate. The park nearby is a treat!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Barry’s apartment is an absolutely wonderful place with bright light and direct views in the nearby park, which offers a beautiful balance of nature and city life. It is also very close to the nearby metro station, with easy access to nearby cities. I felt very welcomed!

name: Bright and Cozy Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Light and cozy! enough for two people to stay in and definitely worth it!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Een gastvrij ontvangst in een ontspannen sfeer bij een capochino o.a. uitleg gehad over the high light of Rotterdam.  De kamer is ***** wat kunnen we er meer over zeggen. Makkelijk bereikbaar met openbaar vervoer, de tram is een uitstekend middel om Rotterdam te verkennen. Het ontbijt was uitgebreid en voldeed ook aan *****. Een echte aanrader en ook als je wat vieren hebt. Jet je attentie is bijzonder op prijs gesteld.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
We had a great time in Jet and Frank's apartment!
The place is pretty close to the central station so we just walked there. Frank welcomed us to the house and even gave us a ride to the street "witter" for dinner. His recommendation was awesome, we tried some local holland food :)
In the morning, he offered us cappuccino and we bad a great chat.
Just strongly recommend this place to stay, which is perfect for four persons! Can't wait to go back to rotterdam too cause it's a cool and modern place!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: We had good time at Jet and Frank's place. The exchange in advance and dealings during our stay were all uncomplicated and neat. The room and bathroom are clean, tidy, spacious and stylish designed and furnitured. Their home is in a lovely peaceful street and practical situated for visiting the center or if your travel by train or public transport. A place where we stay with pleasure again.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Very clean. Comfortable bed. Fantastic curtains, that allow you to sleep out, without being disturb by light! The hostess is very friendly.
I lived in Rotterdam 10 years and I think this is an ideal location when visiting the city. I will definitely be going back again.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Jet and Frank are very interesting and nice people. They have a very nice house in a beautiful and quiet street.
For the guests, they have a confortable room for four and a very nice bathroom.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Great communication, warm and friendly hosts, beautiful room, gorgeous street, and close to trams which take you all around Rotterdam.
I stayed with two friends and did not realize based on the pictures that the two beds are in the same room, but that made it very 'gezellig' (and the room is very spacious).
Jet and Frank recommended having breakfast at "Espresso Dates" on Middellandplein, and that was an absolute fantastic recommendation. I would go back here!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Warm welcome by very friendly hosts in this amazing  street and beautiful room. Very comfortable bed, great bathroom. I would definitely recommand this place to anyone who visits Rotterdam!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Fijne kamer met centrale ligging in de stad!

Bij aankomst werden we ontvangen met koffie, thee en een gezellig praatje. We voelden ons zeer welkom. Jet en Frank waren ook zeer welwillend om ons informatie en tips te teven over highlights van Rotterdam en leuke locaties om te bezoeken.

De kamer en aangrenzende badkamer zijn schoon, ruim en van alle gemakken voorzien. Fijn dat we ons eigen plekje hadden, we konden komen en gaan wanneer we wilden. Aanrader!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Jet and Frank her husband where extremely welcoming and generous hosts. The room was very clean and cozy and the street beautiful and quiet. We can recommend them with no doubt!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Our host were very welcoming, it was perfect.
Thanks for good advice to visit Rotterdam!

The room corresponds to the description. Everything is very clean. The bathroom is nice.

It is possible to park in the street. It s less expensive than Q-Park.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Beste Jet,
Bedankt voor de hele fijne ervaring in Rotterdam. Het warme ontvangst met plannetje heeft ons onmiddelijk de highlights getoond, waardoor we geen tijd verloren met de weg te zoeken.
Troeven: top locatie op een goede km van het centrum, heel leuk appartement, zeer gastvrij.
Groeten

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: After a short walk from the station, Jet welcomed us with a nice cup of tea and some cool water. We immediately received loads of useful information about Rotterdam: a city map with highlights, where to shop, how to move in Rotterdam,.. We only stayed in Rotterdam for 2 days, so this information helped us to fill in our day schedule on what to see and what to do. Bed- and bathroom were very clean and spacious, exactly as shown on the pictures. We would absolutely recommend to stay over with Jet & Frank, because of the nice, warm welcome, the perfect location and the flexibility of the stay.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Na gezellige ontvangst een goede en beknopte uitleg over de highlights in de stad! ontspannen sfeer! Lekker geslapen.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Very clean. Located in a beautiful street.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
De aankomst was heel prettig; we werden ontvangen met koffie, koekje. Jet en Frank gaven ons uitgebreide informatie over de stad Rotterdam. We kregen een citymap mee en tips over vervoer en highlights. Omdat we vooraf contact hadden gehad, kon Jet ons ook goed adviseren over tips voor onze twee zonen van 10 en 12 jaar oud.
Kamer was mooi ruim, ook voor 4 personen, mooi sanitair, zeer schoon. Fijne, rustige straat om de verblijven. Koffie/thee aanwezig met een koekje, gebruik mini-bar tegen betaling uiteraard.
Straat goed bereikbaar vanaf centrum te voet of met tram.
Tips voor ontbijtplekjes waren goed! Op hele korte loopafstand legio mogelijkheden. Wij hebben genoten bij Espresso DAtes.
Onze eerste airbnb ervaring was een zeer positieve!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Jet & Frank's place is HIGHLY recommended!  It was about a 15 minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal.  We found out that we could have taken a tram and got just a couple blocks away.  Either way, it was easy to get to.  It is located on a beautiful street.  The hosts are both fantastic people!  As soon as we arrived, Frank let us in and took us right to the dinner table, offered us drinks, and pulled out a map of the city.  He explained several attractions/destinations/dining options within Rotterdam and circled them on the map.  He explained the best way to get to them.  He was disappointed we were only staying one night, because he could have recommended so many more things to see and do!  Which, by the way, we did make a mistake of only staying one night.  I'm sure we missed seeing lots of things the city has to offer.  The room itself was fantastic.  A king-sized bed with separate comforters (what a great idea...nobody can steal the covers!).  The bathroom was fabulous!  It had a large sink, heated floors, and a roomy shower (for European standards) that also has a heated floor.  Also worth noting, is that there were mittens to use as washcloths (since washcloths are difficult to come by in Europe).  They thought of everything!  Lots of guides/pamphlets right outside the room and a stocked mini fridge.  They both were so willing to chat with us and get to know us.  We sat and chatted about Rotterdam and even American news!  I can't say enough good things about this experience.  Book it, now!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Beautiful house very well located. The room is huge and the bed is very comfortable. Jet and Frank are delightful!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
As my first Airbnb experience, I wasn't sure what exactly to expect. However, when my friends and I arrived, it only took a few minutes before I understood how great our stay would have been. Lovely hosts who went over and beyond to offer us a good time in the city and excellent quality and service for our room. But above any of that, their warm personalities deserve more stars than I can score on this review.
I actually thought "Why visit the city? We don't even have to leave this room to enjoy ourselves", to illustrate my opinion. Although I'm more of an in-door person.
To our hosts, thank you for taking the time to "show us around" (on the map) and for the top notch room and service you offered us. Lastly, I apologize if you heard some noise at night; one of my friends can't sleep without the TV on...

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: A very delightful stay! We had a warm welcome from Frank, who kindly gave us a map and a lot of information about interesting places to visit in Rotterdam. The room was wonderful, with a stunning bathroom and equipped with all basic necessities and we were left some delicious local cookies, tea and coffee. The apartment is well located to reach everything. We hope to be back soon!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Really nice place in Rotterdam! Frank gave us some suggestions about where to go for sightseeing and diner! The room gives a lot of privacy, its cozy and warm. Good beds, really clean and great shower.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: We hebben een heerlijke tijd gehad, de ontvangst was top en de lokale tips van Frank erg goed. Daar hebben we veel aan gehad! De kamer was super, rustige buurt, heerlijk bed en alle voorzieningen bij de hand. En op goede afstand van alle highlights. Aanrader!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Hi Frank and Jen,

Thanks for being such a great host . we really enjoyed our stayed in your fantastic room .i was there with two of girl’s best friend from Dubai. We Are welcomed by a big Smile and nice Cappocino . The place is clean and fantastic for couples or friends. The location is the best location in Rotterdam as it is surrendered by loads of resultants and nice local shops which we enjoyed walking around.
It is 15 mins walking to central Station and 15 mins to cubes house . we felt saved, welcome and home in your house. when we were leaving my friend unintentional broke of the picture frame glasses which were hanging on the wall but Frank was very kind and didn’t accept any money for the repair.

Its one of our best night in Rotterdam and highly recommend the place.


Thanks a lot.

Roza

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Heerlijk plekje voor een uitstapje in Rotterdam! Mooie locatie op loopafstand van alle highlights. Super gastvrije en vriendelijke eigenaren, goeie bedden en heerlijke douche. Aanrader!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Jet and Franks home is situated in a lovely street, easily accessible by train (10/15 minute walk) or by car (street parking) and it’s walking distance from the centre. We received a warm welcome. They also gave good tips for hot spots, coffee, breakfast, dinner ... The room is spacious, big enough for 4 guests and has a luxurious bathroom.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: Just as all the reviews say, a simply fantastic place with the kindest hosts. Beautiful, quiet room 15 mins walk from the train station. Book it!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
My daughter and myself enjoyed very much of our stay at Jet and Frank's house. We had full privacy and all confort needed.
The house is located near public transport and central station. Count about 10min to the Erasmus bridge. So perfect!
After a long day out, we enjoyed very much the quietness and cosiness of the room.
All was super!!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
We zijn een weekend bij Jet en Frank te gast geweest.
Zij doen er werkelijk alles aan om hun gasten een goed verblijf te geven. Het was echt top!
Maar ook geven ze de gasten heel veel privacy.
Het appartement is sfeervol, schoon en ligt op een prima locatie in Rotterdam.
Ik kan het iedereen aanbevelen die een adres in Rotterdam zoekt!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Jet & Frank are just the perfect hosts!
Their home is beautiful and light, you have everything you need, the eye for the detail is on point and everything is the way it has to be!
I recommend to everyone planning to go to Rotterdam to stay in their lovely place!
Thank you Jet & Frank!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: The best BnB I have ever experienced so far, Jet was super sweet and took good care of us! The room is super clean with a really cute view. The bathroom, 10/10 THE BEST!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Simply one of the best AirBnBs I've been to!
Jet & Frank were fantastic hosts and they know Rotterdam like the back of their hands. Must-see places in Rotterdam? Check. Great restos to eat at? Check and they will even plot them out for you on a map upon your check-in.
The room they rented out to us was very spacious, cozy, and homey. The beds were amazing to sleep on after a day's travel; we always woke up rested and fresh after a good night's sleep. The street the house is on is not a busy one so there isn't a lot of noise going on at night. To top things off, the bathroom connected to the room was expansive and squeaky clean.
Having said all of these, I highly recommend Jet & Frank's AirBnB to anyone wishing to visit Rotterdam!

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments:
Good location to walk or bike from and to the central station for your early morning flight.
The room was spacious both the sleeping room and private bathroom. Coffee, tea, candies, water and a fridge in the room. Big windows with really good sound insulation and totally darkening shades for a long sleep.
Easy access with bikes from local rental apps to all of Rotterdam.
Nice welcome with by the hosts, with a detailed overview of the city, restaurant recommendations, public transportation etc.
Modest and private as we are from the north this was the first time time we did not book an entire apartment but a private room, we were positivity supported by the experience. Next time wile visiting Rotterdam will book again.
Recommend this place if you want to have a clean, cozy, comfortable and quiet place to sleep and relax while visiting Rotterdam.

name: Spacious | Comfortable | Private
comments: We only stayed one quick night at Jet + Franks, wish it had been longer. Very welcoming and friendly hosts with great local recommendations. The space is nice, big windows that open to a quite street, nice huge bathroom with super hot water. Nice comfy bed! In a great location near the canal. Easy 10min tram ride to Rotterdam Central Station. Would love to stay again!

name: Familiehuis in Kralingen
comments: My wife and I stayed here for a week with our two young son. It was perfect for us, and I’d happily stay here again. There was ample space for our family; the kitchen was well equipped; and the little back patio was perfect for afternoon meals. Joy, our host, was warm and helpful, and I appreciated her suggestions and help during out stay. The neighborhood is full of nice restaurants and parks, and the street is quite at night. A great place overall.

name: Familiehuis in Kralingen
comments: Lovely location and great house in a very nice neighborhood. The metro station is 4 minutes down the street and there plenty of little shops nearby for groceries or food

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
We lived for 3 months in this beautiful house at the Baroniestraat waiting for our furniture to arrive from abroad to move in our own house. We had a great stay and felt very much at home. The design of the house is unique, it's modern and cosy at the same time and really well thought through. We especially enjoyed the light and sunny living room!
Opposite to the house there is a nice public square with an Italian restaurant serving great pizza's and pasta's and an ice cream shop next door. We spent many evenings there enjoying the sun and it's perfect for young families as you can see the house from the terrace so even when your kids are in bed you can have dinner out and keep an eye on them!
Gerard is a great host. Easy to reach, he responds quickly and is very flexible. He even left some nice welcome goodies for us and for the kids, which was very thoughtful! Also the house was spotless clean!
There are many shops around the corner so you don't need to go far, however for sightseeing etc the city centre is 10min away either by bike (comes with the rental) or by public transport (stops in from of the house).

We would highly recommend the Baroniestraat to anyone who wants to explore Rotterdam for a while!

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: We had a fantastic long weekend in Gerard's beautiful house in Rotterdam. The house is very cool - quirky, light, spacious and comfortable. Gerard was a great host and left us oranges for fresh juice, coffee and other breakfast bits. Despite our flight being delayed he did a great check in. We didn't use it in the end but loved the offer to use the bicycle. The house is in a great location on a quiet road opposite a tram stop and near to lovely shops and bakeries. Thank you Gerard we had a lovely time.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: Great location!  Gerard is awesome to work with and he is a very thoughtful Host. We couldn’t believe the beautiful food essentials left for our stay.   And, the house is very livable and intuitive. Loved the gig windows everywhere to allow fresh air to circulate.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: Gerard's place is excellent if you are traveling with a group (as we were). There was plenty of space for 4 adults and 1 3-year old. The living area was perfect and we appreciated the small touches (bottle of wine, rolls, jam) that we supplemented with our own groceries and was able to make nice meals in the well stocked kitchen (great pots and pans, plenty of plates, cups, etc.). A bit out of the way of central Rotterdam but the tram picks up almost across the street and its an easy ride from there.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: The house is perfectly placed to catch the tram for easy access to the city centre. We had 3 children with us and there was plenty to do locally, they particularly enjoyed visiting the bakery across the road. The house suited all of our needs and even though there was a heat wave during our visit the large windows kept the house cool.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
Gerard for us is an “exceptional “ Super Host!! We wish we could put into words all of our wonderful experiences from the time we arrived until the time of departure 32 days later. Baroniestraat 2 is just about smack-dab in the middle of nice cafes/restaurants, bakeries, grocery stores, after-hour shops, clothing stores, banks/atm’s, mobile phone stores, boating, public transportation (1 of 3 almost at your doorstep), parks.... OMG!!
And yet, the neighborhood is quiet, and friendly, and gives us that Netherland experience that we hoped for. The home itself is comfy, with huge windows that allow sunlight in. Just draw the blinds/curtains for privacy. We were greeted with a bottle of wine and glasses plus a few other items to get us started. What a welcome!!
As it turns out my husband and sister couldn’t make the trip. Our daughter just started university in Rotterdam this fall. So I got the opportunity to explore Rotterdam a whole lot on my own. There’s so
Much we can recommend. There’s so much more we can say about Baroniestraat 2 but we feel it best for future guests to experience for themselves.
Would we recommend your accommodations to others? Without a second thought.
Would we want to stay at Baroniestraat 2 on our future Rotterdam trips? Absolutely, if Gerard would have us back!!
Thank you Gerard for allowing us into your beautiful home. We hope that we returned the favor by treating your home with the respect it deserves. This was our first ABB experience and you have helped to make it a memorable one. You set the standard for Airbnb!!
Thanks again,
Nathalie and Hana.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
Great location and Gerard is a wonderful host - very quick and easy to communicate with. Free parking off the street was a huge bonus for us! Overall I was pleased with the visit.
If you are staying in this house though, you should know that there are 3 sets of extremely narrow and steep staircases to climb (one to get to the kitchen/living room area and two others to access the second and third bedrooms). Anybody with even minor mobility or steadiness/balance issues will likely find them challenging, if not dangerous. I know small, steep stairs can be common in the older houses, but in none of the other places I stayed were they this narrow. Still a lovely place, but just know what you are getting into!

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
Our stay at Gerard was super pleasant. We did a lot of meals at home, and let me say the kitchen had everything we needed and it felt like home. The common area made for some lovely afternoons, with the windows open and the sun shining until 10pm.
Gerard was a super host, always checking up on us and making sure everything was ok.
I highly recommend this place if you are planning to go to Rotterdam.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: great location as it was close to transport into Rotterdam.  Our stay was during summer and we were disappointed there was only one fan available.  It was great to have access to off street parking.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
We had a wonderful stay.
With our family of 5, the house is spacious enough. Especially the amount of windows on the 2nd floor make it a very open house.
The conditions were great as well: easy entrance, the privat parking and wifi made the organization of our stay easy!
There is a good supermarkt 5 min walking, nice restaurants and a tram to get you to City Centre in 10 min.
I would recommend this house for families who want the peace/easiness at home and mobility to city centre.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: Gerard's house really has its personality and style. Lots of light. Stairs are as much ladders as stairs. Quiet neighborhood. Tramway line 8 conveniently stops one minute away from the house. For us coming for the cinema festival, it was a good choice. It was winter, so too cold to enjoy the outside.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: A very typical dutch home, with all the beauties of lots of stairs, bedrooms and living room each on a different floor, great use of all the space. We very much enjoyed staying in the house. Gerard was a great host and gave us a warm welcome. The location is good, though you have to pay for parking on the street from 9 a.m. to 11 p.m. Restaurants, groceries are very close, it is a quiet location.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: We had a lovely stay, house was as listed, had everything we needed and great location for exploring. Easy to find and park, but there are charges for on street parking - P and R car parks offer an alternative to charged parking.

name: Under architect renewed house
comments:
Gerard’s place was a really nice stay! It’s a bit away from central Rotterdam, but with public transportation or by bike (my personal recommendation) it’s not too long.
We had some warm days there and when we arrived home in the evening the living room would be pretty warm as well. We found ourselves having to choose between open windows to cool and bugs possibly entering, or just keeping the windows closed.
This is, however, the only negative thing I have to say. Everything else was spectacular and our stay was wonderful!

name: Under architect renewed house
comments: Gerard is a friendly host that will leave you bread jam and coffee on the table. The house has everything you need for a long stay and it feels like home. The house has 4 floors and really tiny stairs, with no bathroom on the living room floor, so anytime you want to go to bed or to the bathroom you need to go through one or two flights if stairs. This can be an issue for families with toddlers. The part of the neighborhood is peaceful and you have restaurant, bar, train station etc just in front of your doorstep. The balcony is small and can’t be used during rain and the yard is gray and cold, so if you’re a smoker it would be a hustle. Overall it was a good experience in a warm rotterdam home. The location is great because it’s well connected with the city centre region and the highway, so in no time you’ll be in the hague or on your way to amsterdam. Thanks for the hospitality Gerard, hope we didn’t leave too big of a mess🐸

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments:
Marion has showed such great hospitality! She is a very interesting and deep person, who can make your stay in Rotterdam a way more interesting. In her house I always felt myself like at home. The atmosphere is very friendly and lovely.
The house itself is located just perfect: very close to Central Station and main road with all necessary shops and cafes, but, at the same time, in a very quiet, real "Dutch", street with a canal just near by.
I would definetely stay again in Marion's house.

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments:
Marion is a good person.
She's kind,open.And she has interesting viewpoint.
I spend good time thanks to her.

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments:
Marion it’s a great host, always available for anything you need, a nice person to talk to.
The room it’s super comfortable, clean, light and big.
Great balcony and kitchen as well.
The neighborhood it’s near everything and at the same time very cozy and private.
Marion’s apartament it’s a very good option in Rotterda.

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments:
The room is okay and really close to Erasmus MC. There is no lock on the room. Very nice option that you can borrow Marions bike to travel around.
The room is on the second floor, adjacent to another room which is rented by a student.
The shower is a glass door on the hallway, directly in front of the other room. This was an unpleasant surprise...
In addition the toilet is on another Floor and the door can not be locked. This could have been mentioned on the website. The price of the room is very low, so if these things don’t bother you it is good to stay here!

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments: The perfect host in Rotterdam, Marion is more than welcoming and provides a home away from home - perfect location to explore the city, walking distance from the central station, especially recommended for female travellers and couples, nice rooms with dutch flair and a roof balcony and garden terrace to enjoy breakfast or a drink in the evening.

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments: Our stay was in a pleasant place, with a very good host. Marion gave us a nice welcome and checked us in quickly. We had everything we needed for a pleasant stay after long walks during the day. A glass of wine on the sun terrace was a good end to the day.

name: Single Room close to the City Centre
comments:
Ich hatte eine wunderbare Zeit bei Marion. Das Airbnb war gut gelegen und das Highlight war die Dachterrasse, auf der man sich gut erholen und einen schönen Ausblick genießen konnte.
Ich habe mich sehr willkommen gefühlt. Der Austausch mit Marion und den anderen Gästen hat mir immer eine Freude bereitet. Ich komme sehr gerne wieder. 🥰

name: Charming hotel on the waterside different rooms
comments: The hosts were very welcoming, friendly and helpful. The breakfasts were generous with a lot of choice. The hotel was close to public transport, and our room was light and had a nice view over the canal.

name: Charming hotel on the waterside different rooms
comments: The hosts were friendly enough and cooked fantastic eggs and bacon, but were hands-off in terms of offering advice about the area, etc., unless one asked, I guess (which I didn't). I knew that it was going to be bare-bones, which I thought would be okay since I was on a tight budget and am not picky, but it was like being back in a hostel in college. The pillows smelled like they had accumulated a *lot* of people / mildew and such. The sheets/duvets were very pilled, and cheap to begin with, which made them feel like they were not exactly fresh and clean -- so combined with the smell, that was unfortunate. The bathroom smelled like a dirty urinal and from the stain on the tiles at the base of the toilet, I guess some folks missed and it wasn't cleaned properly. The building as a whole had a weird semi-stale-cigarettes smell, despite its non-smoking signs. One day, one of the folks working there entered my room without knocking to bring in towels (which are the size of hand-towels), which was discomfiting. Another day, I came back to my room to see a key to it left in the door and no one in sight, so had anyone wanted to steal my stuff, they would have had ample time to do so. When I tried to return the key (and object), no one was at the front desk, so I had to just leave it there. The walls are paper thin, so you hear people coming and going and doing things in their rooms -- and beds. The canal view is nice, but the street is busy, so you hear lots of cars. Otherwise, the neighborhood is very diverse, which I liked. The hostel is right off one of the main roads, so it was a good location for walking around and a nice walk to museums as well.

name: Charming hotel on the waterside different rooms
comments: Location is great, nice view of the Delfshaven and plenty of things within walking distance. Sadly, the rooms are quite old and tired. For the price we would have expected a little more, but it served the purpose - 6 guys going to Rotterdam to see the sights and enjoy the nightlife.

name: Family / garden home at the river
comments:
We really enjoyed Nicoline's home!
Location is quiet despite being near the highway; in this way you can reach a lot of destination within 30 minutes with car (of course the downtown, Kinderdijk, Den Haag, Gouda, ...).
You can see also a nice sunset from living room window or a lot of rowers who train.
The house is well equipped and our children were happy to have care of the cat Peer.

name: Family / garden home at the river
comments: Lovely place and easy communication, fast reply. House is great and comfortable. Sun shines through large windows and it could be very relaxing to have your breakfast on the verandah in the morning sun and sit and enjoy the canal view in a bench in front of the house in the evenings when the weather is warm. Warm welcome waited with clear instructions. Not too complicated 15 minute walk to tram station taking you direct into Rotterdam centrum in 10 minutes. Cat was an extra bonus and great to communicate with.

name: Family / garden home at the river
comments: The house was very comfortable and cosy, with a nice garden and beautiful views over the river and canals.The location is a bit outside the city centre but if you rent a bike it is easy to get back and forth, just a 15 minutes trip to the central train station. The hosts were great with communication and made our stay very easy.

name: Family / garden home at the river
comments: Great home with amazing views, nicely furnished and many extras. The kids (3 and 6) loved the garden and kid's room with many toy cars. The green space behind the house was even larger than expected.  Front view over the river is priceless. The river was a welcome refreshment in the hot summer. Nicoline was very helpful and fun to chat with.

name: Family / garden home at the river
comments: We loved staying here - it's a beautiful spot by the canal and very peaceful. The house is really stylish with lovely furniture, lighting and plants, and there's plenty of space. It's easy to drive, cycle or get the tram into town. It's important to be aware that there are steep stairs to the upper bedroom and that the ceiling there is low at the edges, since it's in the attic. Great communication from the hosts who are very kind and friendly.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Björn was very timely in responding to all communication. He met us as the train station and escorted us to the apartment! Once there, it was everything Björn described and more. It is definitely Rotterdam's coolest apartments on the coolest street. The apartment was clean and furnished with everything we needed. The location was within walking distance to the markets, shops, metro, hip restaurants,... pretty much everything! Will definitely stay here again and highly recommend Björn's apartment to others!! Bedankt again!!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: It's always nice when reality lives up to what's in the photo.  Cait and Bjorn came to our rescue when our original host cancelled just four days before we were due to travel.  Communication was quick, friendly, helpful and easy, and made what could have been a very stressful time anything but.  The apartment is gorgeous, the street has a great feel to it, it's a fantastic location within the city that's close to lots of different attractions/venues and it had everything we needed and plenty more besides.  It was perfect for our stay and we wouldn't hesitate to book again.  Thanks again Cait and Bjorn for helping to make our first visit in Rotterdam a really memorable one - heel erg bedankt!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Bjorn and Cait’s place is fantastic. The espresso machine came in handy, and the flat is large, spacious and centrally located in Rotterdam. The large windows provide lots of natural light. Perfect spot and highly recommend!
Kristin and John

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: You will feel like at home - just a very very cool home. I was overwhelmed by fresh flowers, a perfectly functional kitchen, lots of spices, coffee, tea. Great location close to everything, a late night supermarket across the street. Will definitely book again if I can come back to Rotterdam one day!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Wow.   This apartment is probably our favorite air B and B stay ever ! It’s beautiful and spacious and in a central location .   It is very clean and lovely touches like an online guide for guests and some welcome snacks. Cait was available very quickly on the air B and B app to answer any queries and was very accommodation of our request to drop our suitcases early .  There is nothing to fault !  You are also walking distance to central station and other tram and metro stops , a huge shopping district and wonderful cafes, bars and resturaunt . We loved having a coffee in the morning looking out at the trees of the big Windows.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait and Björn appartement was beautiful, clean and very well equipped. Especially the kitchen. Central location in the most famous street of Rotterdam !

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Fantastic pet-friendly apartment with lots of thoughtful details. Loved the vinyl record player and a small collection of retro music albums. Loved the glass (non-transparent) wall in the bathroom! Very conveniently located as well.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Very nice and clean spacious place. In the most amazing street of Rotterdam. Would recommend for sure !!!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Nice apartment in a really good area, in the centre surrounded by many nice restaurants. The bedrooms are in the back side of the house so it’s really not noisy and nice to sleep in although it’s located in a busy street

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Great spacious apartment in the coolest street of Rotterdam. I really liked the styling and the great bathroom (with daylight!). It is as in the pictures, a great spot for lounging. MANY good restaurants nearby.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
A nice, spacious apartment to explore Rotterdam. The apartment is located in a very trendy street with a lot of restaurants. (Don't worry about noise because the bedrooms are located away from the street.) The apartment has lots of amenities in the kitchen area and a washing and drying machine- which are great for long term stays.
The stairs are steep and narrow (typical by Dutch standards).
I highly recommend this apartment.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Eine wirklich sehr schöne und gut ausgestattete Wohnung. Die Lage inmitten der Witte-Street ist für abendliche Ausflüge natürlich top. Restaurants, Supermarkt etc. alles in unmittelbarer Nähe und fußläufig zu erreichen. Alles in Allem. Top !!!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
We enjoyed so much our time in Cait’s place! This spacious house, it’s huge great windows, the wonderful decorating, the excellent location, the cleanliness, the quit bedrooms- everything was just perfect.
Cait’s was very kind and we highly recommend her lovely place.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Cait’s house is smack in the middle of all the action. A really nice place and the communication was excellent.
It can get noisy in the street but the bedrooms are in the back where it’s really peaceful.
We really enjoyed our stay.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
The Airbnb lies in the heart of Rotterdam and there are plenty of restaurants, shops and bars within walking distance. The WiFi is fast and there is a TV to watch Netflix or YouTube. Cait is a great host and very friendly! The lightbulb on the toilet has burned out and we couldn't find a spare bulb, so Cait instantly offered to come by when we are out to change it!
Other than that the Airbnb has a really nice open living space and the two bedrooms and a bathroom are in the back where there is less noise from the street. Also given its great location, it is the perfect place to stay while exploring Rotterdam and I can just really recommend it!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Everything was perfect for the Rotterdam Marathon, the place, the street, Cait was very helpful and reactive !

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Nice place, nice living room. In the best street of Rotterdam

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait and her apartment are both highly recommended! Cait was communicative, attentive, responsive. She was a great host. She gave us recommendations, and was flexible for our check in and out times. The apartment is at a really good location. Central and close to so many things. Parking was easy once we knew the area. Most things we could walk to or take the tram to. The only down side for us was that on Saturday night, people were out and partying until 3:00-4:00am and we would hear them, as the apartment is right on the busy, fun street. Other days it was totally fine. Not a problem, but something to know. The apartment was clean, spacious, comfortable. All amenities were there. Everything worked great. Don’t hesitate to book this place!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Fantastic apartment. The location is on a lively street with some great restaurants. The apartment had everything we needed and was very comfortable. Communication and check-in with the owners was very easy. We'd definitely stay there again.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Great apartment in the best street of Rotterdam! Cait is a great host that greeted us personally and introduced us to the apartment. She left some goodies that were very well received by the hungry kids. All in all a great experience and we look forward to coming back. Thanks!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait is an amazing host. She is quick to respond to her messages and gave us many great recommendations for food, attractions, and stores. You cannot beat the location! On the best street (full of restaurants, shops, and bars) and close to the metro. Other reviews had mentioned the noise on the weekends, which is true because the house it right above the street, but the windows did a good job of blocking the noise. We joined in the fun and never had complaints about the noise. The beds are comfy, the kitchen was fully stocked and it was amazing to have a laundry room! We highly recommend this apartment!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: The location is very convenient for access to restaurants, bars, metro, waterfront and market hall. The central train station is also walking distance Our 3 year old loved the toys and books provided by Cait. The main living room and the back bedroom get a little bit of the noise from the street below, but the middle bedroom was quiet enough for child to sleep soundly. Cait responded promptly to our messages and it was a good stay overall.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: We had an amazing weekend and would definitely recommend this flat. It is so roomy and bright, with a really comfy seating area and a well stocked kitchen. The location was absolutely perfect for exploring. Cait was really responsive and helpful. All in all a great Airbnb!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Lovely open living space, great layout with cool furnishings. Really comfortable sofa, chairs and beds. Although on a lively and noisy street we were aware of this when made the booking. Bedrooms are at back and quiet there. Location really great!
It was good to meet host on arrival. We did have an issue with the key briefly as found the lock tricky. However Cait was very quick to respond when I messaged her. She phoned me back immediately, there was a bit of a knack to it actually. Her instructions helped us.
The description listed a toaster but it didn’t work. Some of tea boxes empty. No microwave though listed. Little details and I’m sure Cait would have sorted it promptly if we had called her. Just small details that could make it perfect.
The important things about the accommodation were great & we had a lovely time.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Our stay in Rotterdam to visit with our daughter was made so much more enjoyable by staying at Cait's apartment. I will say that the nightlife on the street below is........active! But the bedrooms were in the back and once we were in there, we could not hear a thing and slept soundly.
We hope to visit Rotterdam again and to be able to stay in this super convenient and roomy apartment!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: This was a nice flat. However this was NOT a quiet place, it was the king's holiday.  The flat is directly over many pubs and clubs. the sound was extremely loud and not peaceful in any way. if you are looking for a fun party atmosphere this would be your place, if it's quite you desire then I would keep looking. The host did tell us about king's day but not about the excessive noise.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: We had a great experience here! The apartment is fantastic - well equipped, comfortable and our host Michiel was really friendly and helpful. Location is central and the street is full of restaurants and bars but as you sleep at the back there is no noise. Couldn’t recommend it highly enough!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Nice clean place that were consistent with photos. Well kept.
Michiel, who we interacted with was great and responsive to a couple of small things we needed.
Location is on a busy bar-lined street and we felt we were in the heart of the city. We arrived on a Friday and the street was very busy and loud on the weekend but it didn't really bother us.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Very nice welcome when we arrived. Everything well explained and easy. A bit noisy for sensitive sleepers but we did expect noise due to the central location.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: This truly is a cool place to stay. Located on a great street, the place had everything we needed. Stylishly decorated throughout, this is a perfect place to stay when in Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: We enjoyed staying at Cait's listing.  Even though we did not cook, the kitchen has everything you need. The plates, cups and glasses are immaculate, which is special compared to other AirBnbs. The entire apartment was absolutely pristine and could not find any fault.  The location is perfect. From the apartment it is easy to get to the station, cafes and restaurants. We had a very enjoyable time staying here.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: This apartment is ideally located for a family trip to Rotterdam. It’s on a vibrant street filled with great bars and restaurants and is so close to all major attractions such as museum park, galleries, markethal and the maritime museum. The place itself is immaculate. Well designed, with top of the range appliances and all amenities you’d need for a comfortable stay. The beds are comfy and the cot on offer is really good (most are not!)  Our toddler appreciated the space to play and the toy basket that was on offer which was a nice touch. Cait was a great host, always happy to help and super friendly. Highly recommend if you want to be in the action of the city!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Cait's apartment. It is clean and spacious, as well as extremely well-located. We had no issues with noise from the nearby bars. The house is very comfortable, and she left us some snacks.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait's apartment is perfectly located in Rotterdam, and is a really stunning flat. It is on a very busy street with lots of restaurants and bars, but we did not find this too noisy at all. Cait was so friendly and helpful and we loved staying there. She even left some snacks for us, and the flat is very well equipped for everything you need.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Rad apartment in the coolest location. Definitely party-centric so prepare for crowds and noise over the weekends!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
We had a great stay, it’s a perfect spot to experience the downtown of Rotterdam. The hosts were so clear and communicative and gave great recommendations. The apartment itself was spotless and had lovely natural light. The bathroom was honestly my favorite, the tile is stunning and who doesn’t love a waterfall shower.
A little loud on a Friday night but with earplugs I slept great. Would stay again!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
This apartment is a great location. Walking distance from the station and the city centre. The street is full of cool restaurants and bars. We were there on a Tuesday evening and spent a great evening in the cosy bars along the street which spill out onto the pavements.
The apartment itself is great, clean and modern and Cait was very helpful, friendly and quick to respond. She greeted us on arrival and made us feel at home!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Thanks for having us at your place, amazing apartment, perfect location and just the right spot to chill after 107km cycle.
Ideal for access to the city’s nightlife, but so relaxing even though you’re right on the Main Street. A lot of nice cocktails available within a stones throw so pace yourself.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments:
Amazing Airbnb with good size bedrooms and large living space. The location is perfect and is on the busy street with lots of great food and drink options.
Cait was a great host with clear instructions and was very friendly.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: This is a comfortable and well appointed apartment right on a quite lively street.  Hope to visit again soon.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait was really flexible with our arrival time and met us to show us the space, which was nice. The place was super cute and clean, the shower was really great and the beds were very comfortable. There was a little bit of street noise that kept my brother awake a little but it wasn't too bad- I had ear plugs and didn't hear a thing.  There were a lot of great sounding restaurants very nearby- we didn't get to try them because we were only there one night but there were a lot of good options. The space was so cute.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Apartment definitely has everything you need. Is a well equiped kitchen.   It’s a second floor so if you have large luggage you will need to carry up some stairs. Some reviews talked about the noise we were there over a weekend and days either side and the noise from the street didn’t really bother us in the bedrooms at all.  Shower pressure was good and water hot, apartment was also warm during the winter when we stayed. Would stay again.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait's place was a great jumping off point for our trip! The apartment even had toys for children which was a nice surprise. It was relatively quiet given how busy of a street it is and nice to have access to so many restuarants and bars right below the apartment. Cait was warm and welcoming and was very responsive to our questions. Highly reccomend this apartment!

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: We had an great time at Cait's apartment. Our two kids discovered the toys and loved them. Cait also provided a high chair and baby crib which was very much appreciated. The record collection was impressive in the apartment, and definitely contributed to the cool factor.  There are many restaurants and attractions nearby, and public transit is only a few minutes away. The stairs up to the apartment were a little bit narrow, however did not cause any issues for us. It was a little noisy at night due to the restaurants in the street, but it was not an issue for us. Overall we had a great stay and would come back again.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Cait's apartment is right next to the Cool District and after staying there I can say it lives up to the name. Being right in the middle of Witte de Withstraat is brilliant as there are so many bars and good restaurants to choose from. Other reviews have mentioned the noise but we didn't notice this and found the apartment to be quiet amid all the hustle and bustle of the street. The apartment felt spacious and comfortable. The selection of vinyl was great and a nice addition.

name: Rotterdam's Coolest Apartment (100m2)
comments: Great apartment in a fantastic bustling location.  We used it to travel to the Formula 1 racing and its close train links made it perfect.  Afterwards the street it’s located is full of life, great bars and restaurants.   The rooms were spacious and clean.

name: Apartment in Rotterdam, direct connection to Ahoy
comments:
Nathalies Apartment is very cool!
Have everything you need!
Big Living room - 3x balconys - kitchen with everything
Close to Metro, Supermarkt and Bars

name: Apartment in Rotterdam, direct connection to Ahoy
comments: I was completely satisfied with the apartment. Lot‘s of light, great public transport and overall a nice place to stay in.

name: Cozy B&B Rotterdam Center 3
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Cozy little room near Rotterdam Centraal, perfect for our early morning flight to the airport.
The good: Tatjana woke up super early to make us a delicious breakfast at 5:20 AM. The room came with a small balcony, and the bathrooms were spacious.
The bad: Unfortunately, Tatjana doesn't speak English very well so communication was a bit difficult. Wifi was spotty unless you sat right next to the router.
The ugly: We had to pay 10 euros extra upon arrival because of some discrepancy with the payment record. In short, the amount she received was not enough, though the amount I paid online was correct. Not sure if this was because two people were staying overnight or what, but we just decided to pay and move on.

name: Cozy B&B Rotterdam Center 3
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
A great location, just next to the Central Station, so just 30 minutes from Schiphol Amsterdam Airport!
Very good breakfast.
And I had the (one) room with a small balcony, which was a pleasure.

name: Cozy B&B Rotterdam Center 3
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Tanya was friendly and pleasant. Her flat was spacious and had everything we needed. The toilet and shower area were very clean and toiletries were included. Our room had a balcony area which was nice.
A breakfast was included with a wide variety of items for people of varied dietry needs.
We enjoyed our breakfast chat with the host and would ultimately recommend this place for anyone looking to stay short term in RD.
The flat is a 5 minute walk from RD Centraal station.

name: Cozy B&B Rotterdam Center 3
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
I had a good time at Tatjana's BNB. For a series of reasons, I was set in the double room that is big, spacious, with a telly and quite bright. All was clean, both the room and the shared spaces. Despite there're 3 rooms, all was silent and quiet during day and night.
The area is quiet too. In 6/7 miniutes walking, you can reach Rotterdam Centraal and in about 15/20 the heart of Rotterdam. Anyway, plenty of public transports are available at the Central Station, that'll bring you anywere.
Tatjana is a fantastic host, friendly, lovely and always available. I spent some time talking to her and was really nice and funny.
She strives to make her guests to feel like at home. The breakfast was amazing and full of different fresh choices: to make sure I was comfortable, she even asked me my preferences! Top!
I'd recommend to book in. Thanks a lot Tatjana. I hope to meet you again!!!

name: Cozy B&B Rotterdam Center 3
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Great location, room and price. We loved our balcony room. Tatjana is a very nice senior woman, and we would gladly stay here again. This is the best value in the Centraal station area.

name: Spacious family home with garden near CS and Zoo
comments:
Nice place with four bedrooms and a nice backyard. Located right across the street from an outdoor-swimmingpool, close to the store and just a few minutes walk from the metro-station.
We had a nice stay!

name: Spacious family home with garden near CS and Zoo
comments:
The owners were friendly and very responsive on messenger. They have a lovely garden that we used often for dinner and 2 lovely cats that were mainly self sufficient.
Lots of space and really close to anything you'd want to get to, including the zoo and a nearby park and swimming pool.
Slight note of caution, the stairs going down to the basement (where the laundry room & 2 bedrooms are) are very steep with narrow steps though this appears to be pretty common for the area. I have mild mobility issues and struggled a little with them and they could be a little dangerous for young toddlers, our son is 2 and we wouldn't have been comfortable with him using the stairs unsupervised but we didn't actually have issues with them on the visit.
It was clean and comfortable and our son loved playing on the piano. The kitchen also came stocked with herbs and spices, etc.
If we were to visit again, we would consider this airbnb again.

name: Family friendly house with roofterrace (6p)
comments:
Siamo stati molto bene in questo bellissimo appartamento su tre piani. La casa è ben arredata e confortevole. Ci siamo sentiti a casa. In particolare abbiamo apprezzato il momento aperitivo sulla panoramica terrazza con vista sui tetti della moderna Rotterdam.

We had a wonderful time at the Marlot apartment. We feel at home. The house is wide, confortable and weel equipped also is very trendy. We loved the roof balcony where we had our apero time. The apartment is well located in a nice area of Rotterdam.

name: Family friendly house with roofterrace (6p)
comments:
We stayed in Marlots house for a weekend and it was just awesome! The interieur, styling and setting of the house is just like the pictures and even better (stunning view from the roof...). We felt very welcome and would definetly recommend Marlot and the Apartment for your trip to Rotterdam especially since you have plenty of nice places around and the city is in walking distance.
Thanks for hosting us Marlot!

name: Family friendly house with roofterrace (6p)
comments:
We stayed at Marlots house for 4 nights and had a great time there. Since Marlot was on holiday, her neighbour welcomed us, showed us around and offered to call her if we had any problems. The house has three floors, is lovely furnished and absolutely beautiful. We were really surprised about the possibility to access the roof - the view from there is stunning! The little spot up there that belongs to Marlots house was even furnished with some comfortable lounge chairs.
From the house the city center is easy to reach - you can either walk (about 30 Minutes, passing the Cruiseship-Terminal and the famous Erasmus-bridge; walking from the house into the center already feels like a little sightseeing-tour) or take the public transport -a bus leaves right in front of the house. (We also discovered that Uber is a cheap and easy way to reach the city center). If you don't feel like going into the center the quater of Katendrecht, where Marlots home is located, offers a lot of beautiful restaurants, bars and cafés right around the corner (about 5 minutes walk).
Thanks a lot for offering this place on Airbnb, we would definitly rent your house again.

name: Family friendly house with roofterrace (6p)
comments: Amazing apartment with roof top terrace, which impressed is the most. Lovely location with quiet streets and park but very close to a very nice place with restaurants and bars. Was perfect for family stay

name: Family friendly house with roofterrace (6p)
comments: Perfect location with excellent transport links, whether by bus, metro, bicycle or boat! Variety of amenities with attractive cafe's, bars and restaurants within easy walking distance, and the chance to swim in the nearby docks. The accommodation was wonderful with everything we needed, topped with fantastic views of city from the roof terrace and Marlot was a perfect host. Highly recommend!

name: Bright open 2 story top appartment
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Paul appartment very much. It is very bright and stylish. And Paul is a very nice and helpful person.

name: Spacious 3-room apartment in a relaxed area
comments: What a beautiful place. Spacious with excellent light and very near the park. Very nice experience.

name: Spacious 3-room apartment in a relaxed area
comments: The apartment was great - loved the balcony! Highly recommended in case your are visiting Rotterdam.

name: Spacious 3-room apartment in a relaxed area
comments:
The flat is exactly as described and in the photos. The living room and dining space is even lovelier when you are there and we felt right at home. It has all the amenities you need, there was food in fridge, and the balcony is a great bonus.
Location is perfect - close enough to the center but away from the crowds. There is a tram stop, a grocery, and restaurants right around the corner. It is a student area and there were a few house parties but they all ended by 11pm so were able to sleep well all nights.
Wouter is a great host and very responsive. The only thing to note is the very narrow stairs, they are not for the faint of heart or large luggage. Aside from the ones pictured there are 2 flights just to get to the flat on the 3rd floor. It is hard to imagine how narrow they are until you see them but they are easy to get used to. Pack smartly or in cubes that you can easily carry up and leave the luggage down.
We had a great stay and would definitely stay again.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Good location with a good view.  Roomy apartment.  Near lots of good things.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
It was a very pleasant stay and we had a wonderful time in Rotterdam.
When we arrived we were received by one of Esther's friends, she gave us refreshments and some information about the apartment and the public transport to North Sea jazz festival as that was the purpose of our stay.
The apartment had a really nice view, and everything was clean and tidy. Very comfy beds and great kitchen facilities.
We would differently come here again and recommend it to everyone who's planning on going to Rotterdam.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Me and my friend stayed at Esthers place for 12 days during the group stage in Womens Euro cup, and it was the perfect choice as we had to travel to two cities and Rotterdam centraal station is just 7 minutes away. On top of that the appartment is on the 12th floor so you have a great view over the city and a cozy balcony. It also has very big windows so you can light up the living room with sunlight. The apparment is also close to shopping streets, supermarkets, bars and restaurants and we highly recommend the pancake boat or pannenkoekenboot. One thing is for sure, the next time i visit Rotterdam i will start checking Esthers place first.
Thank you again Esther for your hospitality and your beautiful appartment.
Árni Garðar

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Confortable, well located, restaurant bar shops are close to the apartment. Central Station too! Nice view.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Awesome Place very central in Rotterdam. Great view from the balcony. Worth a Trip!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Very nice apartement in the mittle of Rotterdam.
Had a great time with a very special view on top of the city.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Amazing view of the city ; pictures don't do it justice . well located for the Rotterdam spots ; clean flat and friendly hosts

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great apartment with a lovely view over the city of Rotterdam. The reason of our stay was just across the street so that was perfect :). The apartment was very clean, the beds were comfortable and the lady who was there at arrival was very nice. Will definitely book again.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Esther’s place is incredible, with unmatched views of the city. Thanks for hosting us!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
This penthouse is where you want to go for your stay in Rotterdam. Super nice location and even better hosts. The view is as well breathtaking.
10/10 would recommend :)

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Beautiful Penthouse in perfect location close to Rotterdam Centraal Station. Great view, perfect terace, tasteful furnishing. Very fast, helpful and friendly communication and check-in including some Rotterdam insights and tips. Thanks again, hope to come back very soon.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Fantastic apartment, location is right in the city centre. The photos don’t do the place justice, very spacious and great views of the city. Welcoming gift of a bottle of Sauvignon Blanc was a nice touch too! 10/10

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: The house was very clean when we arrived. The appartment is very beautiful and the view is just incredible. Very good!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: This place has a great view and is next to public transport and a short walk from central station. Also there is a grocery store across the street also. Would stay here again.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
I can only recommend this place!
We’ve spent a couple of days in Rotterdam and this apartment is pretty much the best thing if you want to live very central, you enjoy a great view over the city or if you simply want to relax.
Everything you need is within like 5 minutes of walking
A big thank you to our host Bella for the warm welcome as well!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Had a nice stay at the apartment: fairly spacious, nice view, good price, nice host. A few things are good to know: You can clearly hear every tram turning on the roundabout, and every freight train that passes. Also, I had the impression the apartment is rented out for most of the time. Lot's of little things that are not really a problem but it sums up: broken light, loose tap, broken heater knob, loose toilet seating, missing garbage bin lid, etc.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Beautiful Appartement with a beautiful view ! Don’t miss out

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Fantastic apartment in a great location, just 5 minutes walk from Central Station. The beds were really comfortable and the place was spotless. The views from the balcony are stunning, it would be a great space to sit and enjoy in the summer. Bella was a great host, really friendly and helpful. We would definitely stay again!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Esther’s place is fantastic! Just a five minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal Station, it’s in the middle of everything, with beautiful views of the city from the living room and bedrooms. The apartment is fully equipped, including comfortable beds, clean towels, a washer/dryer in the bathroom, and fast, reliable wi-fi. Esther’s co-host Bella had lots of useful information about the apartment and neighborhood at check-in, and was quick to reply to communication.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great place to feel in the heart of Rotterdam , Bella makes you feel at home and the place is light and comfortable

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: A really lovely flat. Perfectly situated in the centre of the city, which was ideal for us as we were here for work, but within walking distance of all kinds of interesting places to eat and drink - Bella gave us some tips which were very helpful! Bright and spacious flat, with a comfortable living room  and excellent beds. If you're a light sleeper, you may want to consider bringing ear plugs to block out the city noise at night, which is the trade off for being so central.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Central location, easy to walk to main tourist attractions, restaurant and trams.
Bella was great and communicated well.
The apartment lack "attention to detail" as mentioned in previous reviews, the lights have not been repaired and the toilet seat is still broken.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
A Vintage decorated house. The host is really detail minded that provided many things for us to use. Bella gives us really warm welcome us during our arrival. However, the house is under some renovation, so some of the lights are missing in the house. I think it will be better after the renovation.
A club is right at the ground level of the house which is really very convenience for those who wish to go to the club at night. Supermarket just around 5 mins walking distance.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: The place was great for the four of us. The location was great, and the views from the balcony were amazing. Had a little miscommunication with checking in, but my phone stopped working and there was a delay in messaging. Would recommend staying here.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Location is very good for those who like shopping, nightlife, shifting on public transport etc.
The view from terrace is amazing.
We traveled with two toddlers, and apartment was quite safe for kids.
The only thing that makes us upset is just before we checked-in the washing machine broke down, and there was no chance to wash our clothes.
Owners are very nice and open.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Between the location and the city views out both sides of the apartment, we could not have asked for a better place to stay!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Tolle Wohnung in toller Lage! Der Preis für die Lage ist nächtlicher Lärm, wer das nicht gewohnt ist... Tolle Tips der Gastgeberin (Parken!) Am späten Sommerabend die beleuchtete Skyline von der Terrasse ist ein Highlight!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Esther and Bella's location was perfect. Very central. Super communication, super apartment, great views and great value.  I highly recommend a stay there.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: lovely house. it has awsome view, elevator and good location. Also Esther is so kind and pleasant. I recommand this house!! and if you are going to stay here, you must visit 'op het dak' which is rooftop restaurant with small garden. it is very near from this house.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Really nice place, great views and easy communication with host.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great location! Beautiful penthouse with a view. Kitchen and living room are great spaces. Bella was very nice and helpful and gave great advice about the city. The place could use some home improvement, but we enjoyed our stay nonetheless!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Had on,y 2 nights, 1 and a half days in Rotterdam, so the location near the train station allowed me to get a feeling of Rotterdam.   Walked around the incredible pedestrian friendly city, seeing some of the highlights.  The apartment was bright and clean.  Being on the 12th floor gave a great view.  Even watched a lightning storm over the city at night.   Bella told me about a couple of local places to visit that were not in the guide books that were amazing. Communication was easy and check in and out a breeze.  Would stay again.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Very caring and hospitable landlord, excellent location, we don't need any transportation in Rotterdam for three days, because all places can go quickly. Bright living room, comfortable bed, great outdoor view.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great location, spacious apartment. Can be some noise at night.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: The apartment is clean, but there are a few broken things and it is missing lights and a smoke detector in the bedroom.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: AMAZING Location and view. Very easy from the train station and super quick to all the spots you would want to go.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: If only there were 10 stars to give, I'd give them!  What a beautiful apartment - perfectly located, with a gorgeous view, ready to live in.  The host welcomed us with flowers and a bowl of fruit, and she even had thoughtful amenities for our young toddlers - a crib and a high chair.  She even helped us find a babysitter!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: We had a nice stay at Esthers Apartment, which is located very centrally , has good space, great views and light. It is Not the quitest due to the traffic around it but it didnt bother us since that noise is quite constant. The Apartment has a great cut and we would definitively go there again!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Amazing place in the city center. The view is incredible and the flat really cosy. My friends and I would recommend it 1000 times ! She even left some products in the bathroom, so helpful. Will definitely come back.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great place in the heart of rotterdam - with a nice view. Would recommend 10/10 ;)

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: When you want to explore Rotterdam from a really central apartment, this is the place to be. It has everything, is spotlessly clean and has the best view. My family and me had a great stay! Thank you for everything 😊

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Well-equipped and spacious apartment at a perfect location. Fast and efficient communication with Esther and Bella. The balcony was great to relax in the spring sun. Would definitely stay again!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great place with excellent views. You can see most of Rotterdam with everywhere within walking distance. Would recommend to anyone and would stay there again. Thankyou!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Very lovely apartment on an excellent location. Nice view on the skyline! Everything in walkind distance / tram statiok in front of the door.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: A great location and value for money for a very spacious and comfortable apartment offering all necessary amenities for an enjoyable stay plus stunning views. Short walk  to Rotterdam Centraal, secure location, a very useful printed guide for guests and a wonderful balcony that offers also the option to bbq. I would upgrade certain elements of the apartment and I would definetely stay again.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great location, very central to many attractions. Apartment very spacious, well equipped and a lovely view.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Super nice appartment, great location, fantastic view. nice beds and matrasses.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Great location for everything. Very close to Markthal, train and parking (less than 2 blocks). Tip on that - pay using the inside kiosk - payment center outside the parking structure is broken.
Great breeze on top floor - makes for great sleep - might want ear plugs if street/train bothers you. We found it helpful white noise but to others it may seem too city.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: An overall good experience! Great hospitality and a clean apartement with an stunning view.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great apartement with a great view over Rotterdam and very kind hosts.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Great place right in the heart of Rotterdam. Super lovely host and an amazing view from the balcony!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: We stayed in this lovely penthouse apartment for a business trip. It was very clean, we found everything we needed and enjoyed a relaxing stay. It's also close to the station, nice restaurants and offers a great view of the city. We also appreciated Esther's warm welcome and local travel tips. Thanks again!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Amazing location very close to train station- great view and very friendly host. Will be booking again

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: A wonderful home in a great location! The trains can be a bit loud at night, but if you’re not a light sleeper like me I’m sure it’s not too bad!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Fantastic location, great view, and attentive and helpful hosts! Can definitely recommend.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Lovely apartment at a great location. Fantastic view. Esther and Bella are great hostesses, they respond quickly to messages and were kind enough to allow an earlier check in.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
