The apartment is very well located, and has a beautiful view. Esther keeps the apartment very clean and modern with a lot of services available. The place is warm and very comfortable.
I highly recommend this place, the communication is so fast and she is open for special requests. If you are looking to stay near the city center and also near the station. This is the perfect place

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Esther's place is fantastic. So central to everything. The apartment is spacious and sparkling clean with city views. It has a fabulous balcony which would be great to use in the summer! We wished we could have stayed for longer as 2 nights in Rotterdam is certainly not enough time!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Amazing place with one of the best views of Rotterdam. The penthouse was super clean, spacious and cozy. We loved our time here and can't wait to come back.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: We stayed 3 nights at the Weena Apartment which has a Beautiful view from the balcony over Rotterdam. We rent two bikes and reached everything we wanted to visit. The bicycle Shop is three steps away from Apartment. We had a great time and can definetly recommend it!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Very nice place:  easy reacheable, very comfortable and great location as well as the views! Would recommend it anytime and like to visit again soon!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam, best view over the amazing city!

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: The apartment has a really nice view while communication with Bella and Esther was really good. Unfortunately both the dishwasher and fridge were broken and didn’t work. Also, if you need a place to focus and work or just relax and take it easy, you may have difficulties as it’s quite noisy in general.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: Fantastic location, beautiful apartment at the top floor with a great view. Esther was great and we had a fantastic time while in Rotterdam. I vividly recommend this apartment.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Felt like home.
The location of this apartment and the view from the balcony are amazing, the weather didn't serve for us to enjoy it enough but we will definitely be back whenever we are visiting Rotterdam.
Everything is within a walking distance, literally everything, I didn't have a car and didn't use Uber at all and we are a family of four.
The whole building, the apartment, and the neighborhood are very family friendly and there are alot of activities you can do there.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
The apartment is at the beginning of the city center. Where one of the main streets begins. Very close to shops, grocery stores and bars.
Esther and Bella are always available and ready to meet and help.
Good times we had at Esther's airbnb.

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments: My stay was great, Esther and her colleague Bella were easy to talk to and helpful with anything I bugged them about. Esther's apartment is in a great location to explore the city, pretty much right in the heart of all the action, and a stones throw from the main station if you wanna take a quick trip to Den Haag or whatever. I will miss the lovely mornings sitting out on the balcony too, the view is fantastic to say the least. Again, appreciated my stay very much, but be careful the mosquitos do manage to find their way to the top floor! =D

name: Getaway in Centre of Rotterdam long term rent only
comments:
Who doesn’t appreciate bunches of flowers and a bottle of Prosecco on arrival!
Esther was welcoming, friendly and accomodating. She met me at the apartment ahead of the scheduled check-in time to show me around the apartment and building.
The balcony offers a great view over the city with natural light flooding the living spaces and bedrooms. The kitchen has all the necessary essentials to cook a comforting meal, whilst the separate shower/toilet is tidy and functional. The internal washing machine and clothes drying rack is very handy. The wifi is strong to support remote working and video calls across multiple devices.
I did not find the outside noise to be an issue, however, you can hear the passing trains, trams and sirens of the city below. If you are a light sleeper, a sleep mask may also be helpful.

name: Appartment in "centrum/west" (the place to be)..
comments:
Pedro and Mischa are very thoughtful and professional hosts who think about everything their guests may need. I really mean everything.
The apartment contains all you need and more. Good lighting, an excellent powerful shower and the best bed. The location and access to all forms of transportation could not be better. Tram, metro and bus is all walking distance.
Mischa even let me use a bike to cycle around the city and schooled me on everything I needed to know to become a pro cyclist.
I highly recommend staying at Pedro and Mischa’s apartment and will definitely stay there again should I visit Rotterdam in future.

name: Appartment in "centrum/west" (the place to be)..
comments:
Very nice hosts - Respectful of your privacy but available if you needed them.
Location was amazing along a beautiful canal. Easy walking distance to tram, bus and metro. A few grocery stores within a 5-minute walk.
Stayed here for over a month and worked remotely with no issues.
Would definitely stay here again.

name: Appartment in "centrum/west" (the place to be)..
comments:
It was a beautiful location, the hosts, both Pedro and Mischa were very helpful throughout the stay. At the time of check in they weren't home but a friend of theirs was there to let us into the place and show us around.
Whenever we had a question or something happened around the place Mischa was quick to answer any text and she also apologised if it could be loud upstairs. A light bulb broke halfway through our stay and they were very fast to come and replace it.
Since the apartment is in the basement, it's quite a low ceiling so if you're tall (over 1.80), do mind your head 🤣. There were plenty of amenities and plates, cups, silverware so you at least didn't have to do dishes every day just to eat or drink something. It was a very good stay for the price.
It's located between two tram stops and a bus stop so going anywhere was a breeze, and they even offered for us to use bikes to go around the city.

name: Appartment in "centrum/west" (the place to be)..
comments:
Amazing central location, very short walk to the tram, metro station and super close to the centrum.
Hosts are very kind and responsive if you need anything just let them know and they are there to help as best they can!
While connected to the main house you still have privacy and the place has everything you would need!

name: Lovely family home with garden
comments: Nice apartment. The access is at the ground floor, directly from the street. The bedrooms are at the ground floor while the kitchen, dinning area and living room are at the upper floor. There is also a small garden but we didn't used it too much. The surroundings are ok, the house being located outside of the city center. You can walk in 20-30min to the city center. Our kids loved to play with the toys (there are lots, and Charlie was very friendly in sharing them). Thank you for everything Charlie. See you soon.

name: a cozy sunshine room
comments: Firstly, this place is a great value. Good price; good location; great host, very responsive, very friendly, very helpful, even made me some Taiwanese food cause I told her how much I love Taiwanese food and it's hard to find anywhere else in the world; good roommates - many of which stay there because they are students; and a quiet, quaint place. I am very happy with everything and would be glad to stay here again, the only thing I would ask for is either a different room or different shades in the morning to block out the sun - in summer, you only have about 5 - 6 hours of darkness, with the sun peaking in around 4:30, and the current shades don't work very well to block out sunlight, so if you're a light sleeper like me, the sun might get you. Everything else has been wonderful. There is a full kitchen available for use; refrigerator's to store cold or frozen food and cabinets for dry food; electronic water kettle's; access to cleaning supplies, should you want them - I only used them cause I stayed there for over a month; she provides linen's; she can provide an iron if you ask, though there is 1 iron for 2 houses, so use sparingly; you have access to a closet to hang your clothes; and the bed's are not bad for sleeping. As for the location, there are a few food places nearby that are open late, the metro and the train station are fairly close, there are western and Asian grocery stores close; a mall close by with a variety of options for eating during the day (Most Dutch places are not open very late); a laundromat is close; the only thing that is not very close is downtown, but that's only a 10 - 15 minute metro ride or 20 - 25 minute bike ride away. The greatest factor to deciding to stay here is the fact that Doris is Taiwanese and most Taiwanese people are very courteous, kind, helpful, and ready to be of service. Again, I would stay here again if given the opportunity

name: a cozy sunshine room
comments: Doris is an amazing host. I had a lovely experience. The room is clean and in a great location. Lots of sunlight too.

name: Lovely bright 2-bedroom apartment Rotterdam Centre
comments: My partner and I stayed in this home for the great location near the center of Rotterdam, the metro across the street and the supermarket. Highway access was also very close and there is lots of paid parking. The home is large and comfortable with all needed supplies. At the time there was no tv, but, I asked the host if this could be added in the future. There is strong wi-fi however and everything really was as advertised. We had a great stay.

name: Lovely bright 2-bedroom apartment Rotterdam Centre
comments:
What a great stay 😃! Dane’s apartment was perfect! We were visiting Rotterdam for a week and we absolutely loved it! 🙏
Both bedrooms had big and comfy bed with lots of storage! The kitchen had everything we needed for cooking purposes, even spices/herbs, oil, and a coffee machine with coffee pods already provided! There’s a cute little balcony in the kitchen that gives to the courtyard!
Both the living room and dining area are very spacious! The couch is big and comfortable, perfect to relax at night! There’s also a dishwasher and washing machine/dryer which we were very grateful for!
In terms of location, it was PERFECT!! If you wanna be central, this is the place to be! It’s one stop on the metro from Rotterdam central, but alternatively you can walk to the center in less than 15 minutes. The metro station is right across from the apartment! There’s a grocery store (Albert Heijn) right on the corner aswell which came very handy! Lots of restaurants and bar options around, but the apartment itself is tucked away on a quiet street so it is not noisy at night!
Communication with Dane was very easy, he is a great host 🙏. We would go back to his apartment in Rotterdam in a heart beat!

name: Lovely bright 2-bedroom apartment Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Location wise this is perfect 50 yards from the subway and a 15 minute walk from Central station , There is a supermarket next door a pizza place down the road and is opposite a lovely green park area,
The place is clean lots of space with big windows and everything you want washing machine cooker dining room balcony with a view of an over grown court yard but handy to hang out the washing at least,
One thing if you struggle with stairs this is no good the stairs leading up to the Apartment front door are very very steep then once into the place the stairs up into the actual apartment are even steeper you will struggle with them and luggage.
We stayed as a group of athletes competing in the Police and Fire world games July 22nd to July 30th 2022 fantastic city but watch the biting fly's not mosquitos fly's they do like a meal of human so take some replant . Rotterdam has a lot of shops, restaurants and bars its very clean and friendly.
The host is great and communication is very easy.

name: Lovely bright 2-bedroom apartment Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Overall it made a decent base for our 5-day stay, but had a few issues and would benefit from some simple improvements.
The flat was spacious and in a pleasant area, with good access to transport, shops, bars. Furniture was comfortable, heating worked well. Netflix-enabled TV and Nespresso coffee machine were present. The beds were good and we slept well. We could sometimes hear noises from the neighbours, but these were brief.
However, some equipment was tired. Considering the price, we expected better towels and plates, plus the microwave was unclean, and fridge door unstable. Also note steep interior stairs, right outside the bedroom door. We felt a safety gate would prevent potential accidents, eg during night trips to the loo.
On the last day, we has a stressful event when the toilet flush popped out of the wall. We had been using it normally and hadn't caused any damage. The host gave a quick and friendly response to this.
So generally OK but in need of a little TLC.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: It's a really nice, visibly, sunny apartment! There's everything for comfortable, good staying. It's very close to metro and supermarket near to home. During our staying we have funny and happy mood. Apartment has 2floors, 2 bedrooms, wide balcony and enter to the roof, where you can enjoy picturesque view. Also our staying was private, neighbors did'no make any noise or troubles, and host's friend was glad to hand us with any questions.                                                    We like this house and be happy to stay there next time

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richard was enormously gracious: he showed us around the apartment, left restaurant recommendations, left us laundry soap, and basically did everything he could to make us feel at home. The apartment is lovely: sunny, spacious, well taken care of, and comfortable. There are two bedrooms -- one on the main floor and one upstairs -- and a large sitting room with a lovely view. Everything was very nice.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richards apartment was very cosy, with a lot of light and personal atmosphere. The neighborhood was also very idyllic - quiet, calm, with couple of nice places to come by, that Richard showed me right after I arrived.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
I live in Rotterdam and rented the apartment for my niece and her boyfriend for them to have a place on their own while they were coming from France to visit for a week during Christmas. I met Richard the day before they arrived to visit the place and get the keys. Richard is very kind and helpful. The appartment is great too! Very spacious and full of light. Just next to the city center but still a bit outside so it is still very quiet and there is a nice park nearby. My niece was very happy of her stay there. I highly recommend this listing.
Alex.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We had a wonderful stay. The apartment is situated in a nice and quiet neighborhood. There is a supermarket around the corner and the central station is a 10 minute walk away. Apartment is very cozy, lots of light and very comfortable for 4 people.  Richard also provides lots of information like city maps and brochures making it easy to find your way to all the beautiful places in Rotterdam.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Richard was there to welcome us after a long day of travel, showing us some key places in the city to visit, and recommendations. He even helped us get back to the train station with our bags at the end of our stay.

The neighbourhood was quiet, if just a bit removed from the city centre, button a bike it didn't take long to get there. There is a park right across the way and a school playground so the kids could play.

The place itself was pretty spacious and comfortable for our family of four. Be prepared for stairs, even within the suite, and if you're a light sleeper, bring an eye mask as the sun starts shining it at 5am in July. Other than that, we had almost everything we needed for pleasant stay.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Thanks to richard, we can enter the house very easily. There was somewhat many stairs, but after we went up the stairs, it does not matter.
We had a great time in that house and there was useful information about the city(rotterdam). The location of the house was good and in the middle of the street between the house and the central station, there were beautiful lake ! And there was big supermarket near house, so u can buy everything you need. Richard came to house to explain how we can enjoy the city. It was great to meet him and thank u !

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Richard was a very attentive, helpful and friendly host. He left the key hidden for us on as check-in as the flight was delayed so arrived later than planned. He had a huge table of information laid out like tourist information and he left us the metro cards which we just topped up to travel with. The location was fantastic, public transport was very close and not even far to walk into town. There is a great supermarket just across the road as well and a really good Chinese restaurant just 2 blocks away.
Great spot for friends but not ideal with a toddler or baby as stairs are very steep and narrow. This was my first Air BnB experience and all round good experience. Thanks Richard!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Richard's place is located in a very quiet neighbourhood that is conveniently close to central station. You look over a wooded park on the living room side.
A quite large supermarket is 2 minutes down street.
The flat itself is like on the pictures, not very large but ok for 4 persons. You should know that there are quite steep stairs to access the apartment and to the bathroom and upstairs bedroom within the appartement. So if you have legs problems, or small kids with trolley it won't be for you.
The main bedroom is connected to the living room by a small intermediate room filled with books and tourists informations, but the doors are transparent.
Richard was very reactive and friendly, good host.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richard was very helpful and provided us with a lot of information. The flat is located near the train station in a quiet neighborhood. Equipments is a bit faded (heater, shower, ...) and would require some refreshing but the flat is pleasant and full of light.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Bright spacious apartment in quiet location.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
We (2 adults + 2 kids (9y and 3y)) stayed for 4 weeks. Location was perfect for kids, big playground just outside and walking distance to park and central station. The neighbors where not used to kids and the noise they make, so there was a complaint. This is not a problem when the weather is nice, but it makes it difficult to stay inside on rainy days.
Richard was very accommodating to our needs for flexible checkin and was kind enough to invite us to his garden house where the kids picked lettuce and herbs.
The apartment gets very warm when the sun is shining and it is difficult to cool it down.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richard has a great place. Plenty of space and well equipped kitchen. Check in was easy and he was very friendly and knowledgeable about the area. Supermarket is just across the street, and public transport just a few mins walk away.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: The apartment is very cool : Luminous on both sides and very enjoyable to live in, nice view over the parc, full of books and a surprise with this huge cactus on the balcony of the second floor. As planned by the photos and descriptions, i was pleased to find a very nice spot at Richard's place, here in nord rotterdam, a nice neighborhood. Richard made it very easy through the internet and when we arrived so i could only say it was perfect.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Great location. The living room is comfortable and kitchen has everything you need. Apartment is clean and comfy, just lots of Dutch stairs in order to get in.
One tip: There is no option to darken the windows and light is coming in from the street. It would be nice if the bedroom could be darken.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
You won't find a friendlier host. Richard was great, he was very flexible with our flight schedule after it was delayed. He stayed to show us around the place. He had maps and pamphlets of which he used to show us around Rotterdam too. Communication was great.
The place has a great view of a park right outside. The kitchen is cute and has all staples you might need. If you are missing anything there is a large grocery store just across the street. (store does not accept visa, Mastercard or American Express). The sink is a bit smaller than what we use in America but if you're using the dishwasher it doesn't really matter.
The bathroom is downstairs separated from the shower (upstairs) which is also different but not a problem. The bedroom was spacious with a large window and a small balcony outside. Small table to enjoy your coffee outside.
There is also a large art table. Many books to read. The living room has speakers you can use to enjoy your music. The top floor has the shower and washer. The shower is lacking some water pressure but again it's not a major issue. All items for the shower and washer were supplied. We didn't use the room upstairs much but it was also spacious. There is art displayed in each room that gives the place a nice touch.
Overall we enjoyed our stay at Richards place. It was centrally located (biking 5 min/ walking 20min) and had a great view. various stores and restaurants nearby. Richard was a great host which made it all the better!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: I was with my colleagues at Richard's apartment during Rotterdam Film Festival. Apartment is great, spacious and full of light. Location is great - in 15min walk you are at Central Station, but you can also use tram. Apartment is great equipped, there is everything you can need. Richard is very friendly and helpful. I recommend this listing to everyone :)

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: A nice apartment with a lot of problems. No light in the stairs , the shower is not working properly. The microwave burnt.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We didn't meet Richard face to face as he was on a work trip, but his friend Mirjam is a lovely lady. The apartment was just as described, full of light and fun details! Unfortunately the shower broke in the beginning of our stay, but Mirjam fixed it really quickly! All in all, I strongly recommend Richard's place if you're ever visiting Rotterdam. :)

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: large, comfortable, fully equipped apartment with balcony. very well located. metro to central station and the city center, tram and airport bus only 5 min walk away. supermarket around the corner. very nice and totally uncomplicated host. highly recommended.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We had a great stay at Richard's place. Communication with Richard was always good, and although we didn't meet Richard in person we were met by his friend and co-host, Mirjam. Mirjam was really helpful, and we were grateful that she was so flexible with our check-in after our original flight was cancelled and then delayed the next day! Mirjam also had lots of local tips. The apartment worked well for us, a family of four, we particularly liked the large sunny room overlooking the park outside. The apartment is in a good location, easy to get to the Central Station (15 min walk) and close to a metro stop, Blijdorp. Supermarkets and restaurants are also close by. The centre of Rotterdam is easy to reach, 25 min walk or by metro. Loads to see and do in Rotterdam, we really enjoyed both the city and Richard's apartment. Thanks!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richard was a great host, and the place is very rustic and bright. Great stay.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We have spend quite some time at Richard's beautiful appartment. It is located in a nice neighbourhood close to the central station (and the city centre) and all necessities like shops, bakery, nice cafes, the park and the metro station can be found in 5-7 minutes walk. Richard is great at giving tips and making an introduction to the city. There are also multiple maps and additional info on the shelfs and even books to read in the evenings in Richard's library. The appartment is spacious with big windows and two balconies. It also has a typical dutch layout which we found very enjoyable. Would go there anytime again!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: super nice sunny bright apartment und super nice host:)

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: our stay at richard's was fine, the apartment is quiet en conveniently located. Second bedroom is something of a thing though. Very tiny, with pigeons nesting on the balcony outside and a squeeky bed. The room needs some improvement. Bathroom and livingroom & 1st bedroom all fine.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Such an amazing place !!! So bright and beautiful. Lovely balconies for breakfast. Close to the central station. Richard was so helpful and hospitable. Couldn't recommend this place enough!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Great host, fabulous apartment and the location for train station and central area was brilliant, bike hire just 2 streets away was an added bonus!
we would certainly recommend and we will use Richards apartment again.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Staying at Richard's was a pleasure. Richard is friendly and welcomed us into his home when we checked in, giving us a tour of the flat and tips to enjoy the city. The apartment is spacious, clean and furnished with everything necessary. The locations is also great, facing a park and on a quiet street but only a 10 minute bike ride to the center of Rotterdam. We had a great time at Richard and would recommend the place for anyone wishing to stay at a nice and cosy place in Rotterdam.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
I invited my parents to come over and spend Christmas in the Netherlands. Since I live with my girlfriend and didn’t have much space, we decided to rent an Airbnb in the same neighbourhood.
I was lucky to find Patrick’s place close by (aprox 3 min walk), and he’s always been helpful and responsive.
The 2-floor apartment was cozy and cute. Lots of light in the apartment thanks to the wide windows and good warm temperature.
All the amenties were there for us, such as Maps, guides, plenty of books, kitches appliances…
Many thanks for hosting us, we would definitely rent Richard’s place again!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Great quiet neighborhood, short walk to Rotterdam Central! Richard was super friendly and had many great recommendations. Big windows, lots of great light. Would very much recommend.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
A sunny space with great airflow in main bedroom and sitting area. Not so upstairs, however - as we were there when it was very hot, the upstairs bedroom was stifling. Thankfully Bella delivered a fan and saved the day - without this it would have been terrible for my daughter!! The place is a bit dated, but airy and bright with a nice green view over the park. We found the lack of an oven a little challenging at times, but otherwise a pleasant and easy stay. Good area within walking distance of metro and centraal station, some nice places to eat and some lovely green spaces.
Steep and narrow Dutch stairs to enter.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Lovely place to stay. Great location.
However, i didnt expect that many stairs to get into the apartment.
The bed did a lot of squeaking and as a light sleeper. I found it hard to sleep.
No big issues, if you are travelling light and a deep sleeper. I would be happy to stay again if there was a change in bed. Haha

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Our first time in Rotterdam and after a long day of travel with 2 children Richard was more than accommodating for us to check in slightly early. We were greeted by Richard at the apartment and he took time to show us around, give us great recommendations and made sure that we had all our questions answered.
If you’re looking for somewhere to stay that is a little bit quirky, and filled with character than this air b&b is perfect.
Local area was perfect, everything was walkable (centre was about 20 minutes walk)
We couldn’t have been happier with our accommodation and would definitely stay again!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Richard is a great host and his apartment is a dream, very bright, spacious, and clean. The rooms are all nicely set up and tastefully decorated. Simply beautiful, it was very pleasant to stay here during my visit to Rotterdam and I will definitely come back.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
The host was great! He communicated with us prior to arrival and met us at the house to show us all of the amenities and talk to us about the area.
The house was clean and spacious for me, my husband, and our toddler. Just be ready to deal with the stairs if you book this house. 1 outdoor set of stairs + 2 more indoor sets to get to the main floor of this apartment plus one more flight of stairs up to the second bedroom and shower. The stairs are narrow, as is typical in the Netherlands, but even our toddler managed them fine.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Bright, spacious and quirky apartment. Bit rough round the edges but well appointed. Great, quiet location, very friendly and responsive host. Very steep stairs to and in the apartment but lovely for a long weekend.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We had a great stay at Richard's place.  The apartment has lots of space, beautiful light and well stocked kitchen.  It's in a great location with shops, restaurants, parks all nearby - plus only a short journey to both the airport and the centre of Rotterdam.  Thank you for having us

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: Great Dutch home in peaceful area but close to city centre by metro or foot. Lots of space and light. In the evenings it's lovely just to soak up the last of the daylight listening to the birds after a busy day sightseeing. Would definitely recommend the flat and staying in Rotterdam. Excellent transport links to many other areas too.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: The apartment is in a lovely part of Rotterdam - easy to get the metro/tram into the centre and the kids loved the playground that is right outside! The nice thing about this place is that it's like how Airbnb used to be, when you stayed in actual peoples homes, rather than professional Airbnb landlords, so you get a great local feel. We were here on a roadtrip and would note that the "free on street parking" is not on the same street as the property - it's a 15 min walk away - and the paid parking directly outside the apartment is very expensive. This wasn't clear to me in the listing or in comms with Richard/Bella. Otherwise, when an issue with a door did arise, they acted quickly to fix it and we had a great trip. Thanks Richard!

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: We had a really great stay at Richard’s flat. It was bright and spacious and in a good location- only 5 minutes walk from the metro. Although we didn’t meet either Richard or Bella, their communications were clear, helpful and friendly.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: As described, light, airy and great location. The area was green and peaceful yet only a 10 minute walk from the station.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
I stayed at Richard and Bella's place with two friends. The location was excellent - Blijdorp metro station is 5 minutes walk away, and Rotterdam Centraal train station about 15 minutes walk (a beautiful walk as well). There are plenty of cafes and restaurants nearby, and a supermarket across the road.
The flat itself lovely; tastefully decorated, plenty of artworks hung around and some nice houseplants. The flat felt homely and comfortable. The stairs are very steep, so do be mindful if you have mobility issues. There was pretty much all the supplies we needed in the bathroom and kitchen. The view from the flat was lovely too. There's a park to the front with plenty of greenery, and a communal garden at the back which you can enjoy from the balcony. The flat was filled with natural light.
We didn't get to meet Bella and Richard, as we checked in later than expected, but they were extremely helpful and communicative. Our stay was a pleasure and we would be delighted to stay again.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments:
Nice place, great base for any holiday. Close to Metro and not too far if you would rather walk.
Lots of natural light and very nice apartment.

name: sunny spacious quiet apartment
comments: The apartment is in a very pleasant location, close to grocery stores and bus stops, which made everything convenient. We especially loved walking to Rotterdam Central Station and passing through the beautiful park on the way. The natural light inside the apartment is wonderful, and the accommodation was comfortable and welcoming.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: CJ is an attentive and appreciable host. Everything was well prepared at our arrival. The accomodation is clean, well equipped and perfectly comfortable. Since the weather was nice, he gave us access to the roof and put chairs and table there so that we could enjoy a wonderful evening with a view over Rotterdam. If you like privacy, it's the perfect place to stay. Still, CJ will give you any advice you need and help you where necessary. Very pleasant host, great room. Highly recommendable!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
I've been living in this room during two months, and definitely it has been the best decision I could make, and I'd choose this room again and again!!! For me it wasn't easy to stay for two months in another country, but the room is so cosy, nice and comfortable and made it so easy!! And Cees Jan and his wife Hennie are sooo nice!! They helped me all time I needed and always with a big smile. The street is very good located, and probably one of the nicest residential streets in Rotterdam. So without any doubt, this is the best option for a short term stay or for a weekend as well! You'll be like home, sure!! The shower also works perfectly, the bed it's so comfortable... well, I was so happy to make that choice!!!! Even the stairs are so funny;) so typical too!!! I hope to come back to the netherlands soon and stay here again! Highly recommended;).

Elena

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: CJ was a great host and I really enjoyed my time in the flat. I was in Rotterdam for a work trip and found the room very relaxing and well-equipped with internet and a work space. The neighbourhood is quiet and close to the city centre and train station. There was also a great Moroccan bakery nearby that CJ recommended. The room was very private and self-contained with a roof terrace that I imagine is lovely in summer. It was cold in winter, but there is a great view! The only thing some people might have problems with are the stairs - you have to be fit to climb them - but over all the flat is great value and I would stay there again.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The accommodation was as advertised. The room was large and spacious with room to eat and work and was very comfortable. The loft space is really cool with lots of light. CJ was a very kind host and made me feel very welcome: offering me a lovely meal after my arrival late in the evening and even dropped me off at work the following morning. This was very much appreciated. CJ is clearly concerned about the welfare of the guests and even left out books and guides to help them enjoy their time in Rotterdam as much as possible. The fresh tulips were also a very touch.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We had very good time. The studio looks exactly same as on the attached photos. We really enjoyed the fabolous terase, nice view. Kitchen has everything you could need, comfy bed and fresh flowers on the table really warm welcomed us ;) Nice place, kind owners, close to central station, very quiet location ;) highly recommended!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We had a wonderful stay at Cj spacious studio. The studio is as shown on the pictures or even more beautiful. From the room you have a view to the backyard of the quarter and it was a lovely summer atmosphere with people doing barbecue and children playing. The rooftop terrace is lovely to have breakfast and we got an introduction to Rotterdam right away upon arrival by Cj.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Location was terrific for exploring Rotterdam and beyond. Quiet residential area, 10-15 mins walk from Centraal station or #23 tram. The shops, tram stops and places to eat are just one street away, and there's a friendly bar on corner. Apartment is larger and more stylish than we expected from photos. The 4 flights of steep stairs really are a killer but they're also very typically Dutch.  We were apprehensive about sharing a toilet but it was just outside the room on the same floor and was only used occasionally by one other person. The washing-machine is in your own bathroom so very private and we used it twice, during our 8 night stay. Really great value accommodation and very private too. The host lives with his family next door and we only saw him once, when we checked in. During our stay, we just phoned if we needed anything or had questions, and he was always friendly and helpful.  Would definitely stay here again.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We had a great stay here, you have to walk some flights to reach your room, but then you can enjoy a nice private room with own kitchen and all necessities you need.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Cj was very kind and gave us many useful information about public transports and shops in the neighborhood. The flat is comfortable and well cleaned but there are a lot of little stairs to reach it. Not suggested if you have health problems in walking. The house is anyway well located to visit the city and also to take trains. The kitchen forniture is basic but good to cook a quick meal. The fridge works well. The terrace has a  great view but it is a bit tricky to reach.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The room offers everything you could ask for. A cooking place, separate bathroom, much space, nice view and a very compfy bed. It is located near the main train station and easy to reach. I can only recommend this place.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Everything went very smoothly with Cees Jan. The studio is perfect, very clean, bright and well equipped. The bed is confortable. The roofterrace is awesome! Cees Jan was very nice and took time to talk with us about the surroundings. The walking time to/from the train station and the city center is about 15 minutes (30 minutes to the Erasmusbrug). I highly recommend this place.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We highly recommend Cj'S place. The studio is well equipped. You are going to have everything you need. Also sharing the toilet wasn't a problem at all! Without forgetting the beautiful rooftop with an amazing view :)

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: This is studio apartment is a wonderful find! The room is very relaxing and offers all amenities including a hair dryer. Watch out - there are many stairs so this is only going to work if you don't mind some light exercise. In my opinion the studio is well worth the climb. I slept SO well in this spacious, clean and quiet room.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: CJ's place is a wonderful place to stay! I stayed here for six weeks. It is very central - the location is perfect. It is also very comfortable (just be prepared for the workout walking up four flights of stairs!) and has everything you need for a good stay in Rotterdam. CJ and his family are very friendly and very helpful if you need local advice. I highly recommend this place!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The penthouse studio is amazingly great and even better than the photos showing on the airbnb website. It's well equipped and stylish. Persionally, I like the view through the big window which is just next to the bed. You can see the quiet but lively community courtyard out there. Location is good as well and it is not hard to find it. Basically, it is just 15 mins by walk from the central station. I definitely recommend this cozy and stylish penthouse (studio) for who wanna visit Rotterdam.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Goede prijs kwaliteit verhouding. Voldoende privacy, fijne locatie, veilige en rustige ligging. Communicatie verliep prettig. Geen luxe, maar wel alles aanwezig voor een prettig verblijf.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
Cool space. Comfy bed. Great views.
Superb all round. CJ very accommodating at check-in and a sneaky extension of check-out so we could clean up post marathon. Very generous. Stay here!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
It was an absolutely fantastic experience!
The 3 nights I stayed seemed so short that I am actually willing to stay there again.
The owner was really communicative, open to questions and remarks, never too invasive.
The room is actually as the pictures show on the announcement, and perfectly clean. Moreover the view on the roof of the building is simply outstanding, the ideal way to get to know this amazing city.
For new incoming visitors: pay always attention to the stairs which in fact turn out to be steep. And for the same reason I don't personally recommend this room for parents having little children.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Hatten ein schönes Wochenende in Rotterdam! Die Unterkunft ist genau wie beschrieben, sehr sauber und ruhig gelegen. Die Innenstadt ist in 10 bis 15 Minuten schnell zu Fuß erreicht, in der es eine große Auswahl an Restaurants und Cafés gibt, falls man nicht selber kochen mlchte. Unser persönliches Highlight war die Dachterasse, auf der man den Sonnenuntergang beobachten kann, wenn es nicht bewölkt ist :)

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The room is well equipped, clean and very close to central station. Big thumbs up for the nice roof balcony, would definitely recommended!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
Cj met us in person as we arrived to the place and showed us around promptly. He was very kind, hospitable and respected our privacy throughout our stay. The space is well-equipped, with a small kitchenette that allowed us to prepare meals for the day, and enjoy coffee/tea in the morning.
The rooftop was incredible. It had an amazing view and was a great place to watch the sunset. We rented bikes during our stay, and the place was convenient to get to and from. The shower and washer was at our private disposal, however the toilet was shared with another guest out in the hallway. This was never an issue in terms of scheduling or run-ins.
Overall, we had an incredible stay and fell in love with the city. Since we went in the fall, the weather was rather cold and wet, but coming back to this cozy abode made it all worth the while.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: My boyfriend and I spent couple of nights at Cj's place during our visit to Rotterdam. Its a lovely space and perfect for backpackers! The room is on the 3rd floor and it has loads of steps! However the good news about that is that you have access to the roof terrace and is amazing!!! Beautiful room with beautiful views! The place has a great location and communication with host was super easy. Highly recommended!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: This is a wonderful place to stay.  The bed is comfortable, everything is clean, there is a refrigerator, microwave, small two-burner hot plate, and washing machine in the room.  The four flights of stairs are steep with narrow steps, but we got used to them and they are part of the delightful ambiance of the place.  The room is very quiet and quite spacious with a light and airy feeling.  We enjoyed our stay very much and hope to come back again.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Great location for walking into or driving into Rotterdam. Easy access to transport and shop's. Quick access to the motorway to Amsterdam. Parking was flexible. Our stay was truely unique we were blessed with a lovely Winter sunset one night. And it was very cosy. If anyone wants to stay somewhere quieter and Away from hussle of the city this place is it. Make the commute in. Worth it. We enjoyed the street art this port City had to offer.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: A great place to stay while visiting Rotterdam. It's a 15 minute walk from the Central Station in a residential street. Be sure to checkout the rooftop garden. When checking in, be sure to ring all of the available doorbells in unit A and B to properly alert the host.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
This is a very good stay, with a good view on the fourth floor and an open-air terrace, we really like it!
The service is very good and the response is very fast. The stairs are not a big problem for us, but the bath water is a bit blocked.
From the house to the Rotterdam station, the sights in downtown Rotterdam can be reached quickly by walking, everything is wonderful! Thank you!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The accomodation was the best Choice for our stay in Rotterdam! You can Walk to all the sightseeing attractions or just through the nice streets of Rotterdam;) the apartment is directly in the Center and a real dutch housing experience, including a steep and small staircase.  Cj was really nice and helped ist with everything. We can definitely recommend it!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
We really enjoyed CJ's place -- especially the spectacular rooftop view (lovely picnic). The place was very clean and had everything that we needed. The only thing to keep in mind is that the room is located on the 4th floor, so you will need to climb some narrow stairs--not a problem for most people, but not suited for the elderly/those with mobility issues.
Overall, would recommend!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
Very stylish space with plenty of amenities including cooking appliances & kitchenware if you fancy preparing a meal in! As it is on the highest floor, a lot of privacy, but obviously the toilet is shared.
Absolutely brilliant location, about 10-15 mins walk to Rotterdam Central station. Easy access to the main centre & the Markthal. Also plenty of Donkey Republic bikes available nearby for an easy rental so one can commute the Dutch way !
Both CJ & Hennie were very accommodating with us dropping off our luggage early. & CJ also gave us some useful recommendations of nearby places to eat :)

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
The owners are very nice. Apartments is situated near with bus station - it’s comfortable.
Quiet and comfortable street. Also owners let us leave our luggage for extra hours.
Definitely I can recommend this place!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: CJ is a great host, very friendly and flexible with our check in schedule. His space is spacious, clean and with a great view. We had a wonderful time in our Rotterdam Airbnb

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The place is beautiful with nice accents, very comfortable bed, spaczona terrace with nice view, nice welcoming host with local guiding, and is equiped with everything that You need making Your stay perfect. Recommend 100% +

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Lovely space: central, quiet, and easy to get to cool places around Rotterdam. Rooftop balcony a plus. CJ was totally helpful and an ace communicator. Can recommend and might even be back soon!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The room is situated in the perfect district. It’s a small quite street with beautiful old buildings. Not far you can find dozens of restaurants and bars as well as grocery stores. The kitchen is good equipped with everything you might need.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The apartment has a large room located on the top floor of a building located in a quiet area, 15 minutes from Central Station. It is possible to access breakfast or dinner on the rooftop, with a nice view of the city. The only problem is the difficult access with luggage to the top floor. Otherwise, everything is very good, the host is friendly and I recommend this accommodation to all those interested.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Very nice Host with a nice flat in the City. Also a great rooftop view for some sundowner drinks.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Great location. Welcoming hosts. The room is great and well stocked with everything you could need. Loved the view!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
Nice and comfortable studio apartment, equipped with everything that you will need (even for longer stay). There is a shower in the bathroom (in the apartment) and the toilet is shared with other apartment, but they keep it really clean so it's not a problem. There is also a rooftop terrace with a nice view.
Location is 10 min walk from central station, in nice street and neighborhood.
Cj and his wife were great hosts, they have answered all my questions and requests.
I've stayed there for a month and would definitely recommend it!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Very good location and such a reasonable price! The neighborhood is nice as well. It might be good to pack light as the stairs are pretty steep.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: The room looks like the description and photos. CJ was very available, caring and welcoming. The stairs and the floor are a little noisy, it can wake you up if you have a light sleep. Otherwise everything else is impeccable.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Incredible place, highly recommend! Lovely windows and a roof terrace! close to the station and very comfortable.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: I was in Rotterdam for 5 months and this was the best place I stayed in - cozy, in a beautiful tree-lined street close to everything, quiet and comfortable. CJ was a fantastic host. I’d 100% recommend!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We were travelling light for 2 nights and just needed a base in walkable distance from the train station as we wanted to zip around on train and see as much as we could of the beautiful sites surrounding Rotherham including the Botanical Gardens.  Not only was the accommodation walkable from the harbour, shops and restaurants but easy to find too with the clear instructions given by the lovely host, with a few top tips on arrival of where we could get some shopping and eat nice food. The room had all the facilities we needed, clean and well presented, warm and peaceful.  Stairs are indeed a climb , good if you want to get your steps in, but I believe most Dutch buildings are like that.  it's worth the climb to the roof top for the view ! Thank you for a wonderful and relaxing stay

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Great location, peaceful and comfortable. Communication was excellent and Cj even allowed me to check out slightly later. Would definitely stay again

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: We had a good stay at CJ’s. The apartment is as described in a good location. There were a couple of minor issues such as the main light not working, but nothing big - for a short stay in the city it was all we needed! The roof terrace is a nice addition.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Is a lovely stay! The rooftop is beautiful and the room is very spacious with an array of simple cooking supplies that helped. The stairs may be steep but the view is worth it!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Very cute place in a beautiful street of Rotterdam!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Responsive host with a clean apartment. It’s a short walk from the train station and close to busy streets where you can find anything you need. Nice rooftop view too when it isn’t raining. The bed was a bit uncomfortable but not enough so to ruin the stay

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: This is a cozy studio with everything you need for a few days! Location was excellent, you can easily walk most places or about 10 minutes to the central station if you prefer. They had great recommendations and helped with all our questions about transport and visiting local areas. The bed was comfortable and the apartment is very quiet at night. Beautiful roof top terrace with great views. Rotterdam is a must see. Thankyou again for hosting us!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Amazing stay in Rotterdam. Close to Rotterdam Central station. The street is amazing, very green and Dutch. :) the studio itself so gorgeous and cozy. Has a nice view to the rooftop of other buildings which are so cute. The studio is very spacious, clean, well equipped. You also have access to a terrace. Beautiful up there on sunset. The owners extremely kind and helpful! Would definitely choose this place again when in Rotterdam! 😊

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: What an incredible find - right near the heart of Rotterdam, but in a quiet street. The apartment was ideal for my short stay, and I felt very at home!

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Space felt larger in person than in pictures.  Lots of natural light and ventilation.  Amazing roof deck through hatch right outside door to studio.  Typical of Dutch buildings - very steep stairs lead to studio at top floor of building.  CJ communicated on check in day and displayed flexibility about timing of check in.  Met me in person to orient me to studio and its access.  Spacious shower in unit, spotless shared toiled right across hall.  Handy washer/dryer right outside studio.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
We had a great time staying at CJ’s and Hennie’s place. The room was so comfortable and cosy. I appreciated the surprising amount of amenities provided like induction cooker, microwave, and even simple foods in the kitchen. Shower and toilet were well-kept too; we didn’t use but liked the laundry and dryer options.
They also kindly accommodated flexibility in check-in and check-out times which was very helpful when our travel plans unexpectedly went awry.
Do note the room is at the top of a building and the stairs (approx 4 flights) are very steep! If you have mobility issues or heavy luggage this may not be suitable.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: really nice place in a quiet street. host was easy to correspond with. very clean

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Cj is a very nice host. He welcomed us with a great introduction to the studio and neighbourhood.  The studio is lovely and comfortable. Everything comes very handy. Great quality to price ratio. Highly recommended for those who are comfortable with climbing four flights of steep stairs.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Really nice studio apartment! Feels much larger than it is, due to its rather high sealing. The roof terrace is also very nice, and has a great view. The kitchen has everything you need to make dinner. Located very centrally in walking/cykling distance of every major attraction in Rotterdam. The neighborhood is also very charming, and some nice walks can be had in it :-) Cj is also very helpful and is easy to contact if questions or problems arise.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: Nice room with a kitchen and a shared bathroom, walking distance from the central station. The neighborhood is beautiful, especially in the autumn, and can be observed from the roof terrace. There are several flights of steep stairs but that was the case in all the places I stayed in Netherlands. CJ is a very welcoming host, he showed us the room, the terrace and gave a few recommendations for restaurants and shops close to the house.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments: This is a lovely retreat in Rotterdam. Very quiet neighborhood with lovely view of the rooftops. The stairs are many (and typical Dutch narrow) so best for small suitcases! Close to grocery, trams and coffee shops.

name: Spacious studio, near City Centre / Rotterdam CS
comments:
Massive thank you to CJ for hosting us on our Eurotrip.
His place was perfect, just what we needed, a great night sleep after along day of driving.
the views from the roof terrace was amazing.
Thanks again, would defiantly stay again

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: One of the best Airbnb I have ever stayed at. Rebecca and Sietze have furnished their apartment with good taste and comfort in mind. The details are very thoughtful but they still have a lot of ideas for improvements. The view on the river is relaxing and quiet, very enjoyable during a meal. Worth to mention a very well equipped kitchen for those who like cooking. Communication has been easy and quick. They are always available and friendly. The location is the best you can get in Delfshaven. I loved every minute I have lived in this place.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
Loved Rebecca’s sweet apartment. It was in a nice part of town, just a short ride with public transit into the city center or a leisurely walk.
Rebecca and her husband were great. All the necessary amenities for cooking at home are there. The street lights are a little bright if you are a light sleeper.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
Wonderful stay
I highly recommend
Clean
Nice view
Cute people that host their guests with love aand care

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
We enjoyed the week in the Rotterdam very much. Rebecca and her Family are so lovely and they helped us a lot during our stay.
The apartment is super clean with new and modern furniture and the view from the window is just amazing!
It's the best airbnb experience we've had so far!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
We had a great experience in Rebecca's apartment. The apartment is very welcoming, comfortable, clean and very well furnished by her designer husband. After only a few minutes, you will feel at home. The view on the river is the ice on the cake! Rebecca and her husband and her daughter are the loveliest hosts you could wish for. It has been such a pleasure to get to know them!
The flat is about 25 minutes by walking from the central station and the city center, only 10 minutes by tram (23 or 24). The street is very nice due to the many big trees and flowers, and walking distance from the most authentic part of the city (Delfshaven). The apartment is also close to Nieuwe Binnenweg, one of the main streets in Rotterdam, with supermarkets, cafes and restaurants in case you don't want to arrive to the city center.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Well equiped and spacious apartment with a beautiful view

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: It was a pleasure staying at Rebecca's apartment.  Rebecca is a top person and host.  I concur with all the other positive reviews.   If you want to feel relaxed and  comfortable in Rotterdam  do yourself a favour and book Rebecca's place!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Rebecca's apartment is one of the best stays we have had with AirBnB. Her family's thoughtful touches made the home comfortable and welcoming for weary travelers. The home is absolutely spotless, has scenic views of the canal and is only a three minute walk from the metro. We highly recommend!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Great location. Nice view from the dining table.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
Rebecca was a very friendly and accommodating host! She helped us with the parking and we were allowed to use the tram tickets, so we were in the city centre very quickly and easily.
It was a great flat with a beautiful view - very stylish.
We will be happy to come back.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: A wonderful experience! The flat is really big and bright, well decorated and equipped. Rebecca is a warm and helpful host. I’ll be happy to come back in the future. Highly recommended!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Rebecca’s apartment was amazing! If you stay here, you are treated with a beautiful waterfront view and designed interior, well stocked kitchen, and plenty of amenities. It was nice to be able to do a load of laundry after a week of travel and we made great use of the kitchen to cook breakfast. The location is easily accessible by tram and metro from the city center and train station. Lastly, Rebecca is very friendly and welcoming and communication was always prompt :)

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Would recommend this fantastic spacious studio unreservedly. Great view of the canal, light and spacious & just a short walk to Delfhaven old Rotterdam & a 10-15 min tram ride from Rotterdam Centre. Rebecca and Sietze very friendly and helpful. Would book again !

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
We enjoyed this stay so much , the apartment is beautiful and well equipped for your stay. The view of the canal and design of the apartment were exceptional . It was easy to get a tram to the centre. Rebecca was very friendly and answered any queries promptly .
We would definitely stay again if we were back in Rotterdam

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Wonderful apartment with everything needed to have a peaceful and pleasant stay :) The area is also beautiful with the canal view and quiet neighbourhood. We were able to walk just about anywhere from our apartment. The apartment is stunning - looks even better in person, clean modern and comfortable ❤️

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Fantastic stay at Rebeca's apartment. Breathtaking views!!! I loved watching the boats pass by. We even saw swans swimming around the canal. My daughter loved it! The convenience of the tram and metro is a plus! Very w tuft alkable area. Grocery stores are also close by. Rebecca and her family were very welcoming! We enjoyed every moment of our stay. I will certainly recommend it to friends, and hopefully, we can come back soon again.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Super clean and super nice hosts. Rebeca did the absolut best hosting and helping I have ever experienced. Spacious apartment in a quit street, with views of boats sailing by at the canal. Equipped with all what you need and then some - also for small kinds. We were there with our 18 month old boy and enjoyed it. Perfect stay :-)

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Comfortable stay in the 1st floor apartment up one flight of stairs. Rebecca very kindly provided high chair and cot as well as toys, bib, sleeping bag, and duvet to help make sure our little one was very content. Very comfortable double bed too. Good shower. Would stay again.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: A fabulous stay. The view from the AirBNB is breathtaking and the cleanliness was spot on! We were warmly welcomed by Rebecca and Sietze. They are remarkable hosts, very kind and attentive to our every need. In particular, Rebecca was able to recommend many places to visit during our stay in Rotterdam, and we couldn't agree more. The couple even pointed out points of interest for the rest of our trip in Delft and The Hague. A real gem!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: We really enjoyed our stay as a family with a small baby, cot and highchair were provided and we used the kitchen a lot for staying in simple dinners plus takeaways. Very comfortable bed for snoozing! Very useful washing machine as well. It was very easy to navigate to nearby sights and even further out as easy to get to main Rotterdam station. There was really good communication with the hosts, they answered questions quickly. Only drawback was incredibly steep flight of stairs to the property, was doable with small baby and our light folding buggy but maybe would bring a baby carrier next time. Very peaceful street with a lot of families and lovely fronts with lots of plants, would stay again :)

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: I absolutely loved my stay in Delfshaven – what a cool area with such a beautiful view! Rebecca and Sietze were super welcoming and truly amazing hosts. I loved the flat, and the view of the Delfshavense Schie added a special touch to my experience. The conversations I had with both Rebecca and Sietze were truly memorable; I really enjoyed hearing their perspectives on the city and the country, especially as someone considering moving to the area. All in all, this stay gave me a unique and wonderful introduction to the city, and I’m so grateful for the experience.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Rebecca was a kind, friendly and responsive host. The apartment was perfect. Beautifully decorated and furnished and extremely well equipped. It was very comfortable and peaceful with a lovely view over a major canal. An easy half hour walk from Rotterdam central train station and perfectly located for the conference I attended. Highly recommended.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Our best AirBnB experience. Everything was as per the listing. Very comfortable, very clean and very well-appointed. Coupled with this was Rebecca: she was extremely helpful and an excellent communicator. A faultless experience which will forever colour our Rotterdam stay in the most positive light.

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments:
Rebecca’s space was incredibly peaceful, beautiful, and private — so much so that I felt right at home. One side has a large window that faces the canal which is ever changing with boats and light. The opposite side has another large window that faces the neighborhood and feels like you’re in a treehouse because you are at the same level of the leafy tree canopies. The neighborhood is quiet and very walkable. Rebecca and her husband were so kind and welcoming. Her communication was prompt, clear, and always helpful.
Don’t hesitate to book Rebecca’s space!

name: Stylish riverside apt in R'dam West
comments: Rebecca and her family are fantastic hosts, friendly and with great recommendations. The apartment is so nice to be in, with everything you need. Great views of the canal on one side, leafy green street on the other. Very close to the metro and tram which get you everywhere. We felt very at home, and the bed was up there with the most comfortable. Highly recommend, don’t hesitate on booking!

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments:
Highly recommend this place to everyone who wants to enjoy rotterdam and the area. Amazing flat and brand new interior. The view and the sunsets from Marcin's rooftop terrace is incredible and we even got to see a shootingstar at night :)
The private room is perfect for two and thanks to Marcin we felt like being at home. Did a lot of cooking in his new kitchen and enjoyed the light show his living room offers :D
Thank you Marcin for the wonderful time we had. We definitely would like to stay with you when we come back again.

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments: Marcin was the best. His apartment was awesome and our room felt like a five star hotel. He welcomed us with a glass of sparkling wine and told us some interesting facts about the city. His apartment is also very close to metro station & to the city centre itself. I highly recommend staying at Marcin's place and I sincerely hope to see him again.

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments:
Great apartment - clean, modern and pleasure to stay in.
Nice view from the balcony :)
Would recommend staying here!

Marcin is hospitable and friendly guy. He told us about the cool places that made our tour of the city more interesting.

We had a great time, thanks! :)

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments: Marcin is really very nice and friendly, and the location is very near by the metro station, he provide us a warmy welcome and very cozy room, and the living and balcony is also cute and every furniture is 100% clean, he is really kind to answer your problems and also very thoughtful to make sure you can safely arrived his house, we really enjoy the days in his lovely house and thanks to Marcin

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments:
Super happy that we chose to stay at Marcin's place. We pretty much had the entire place to ourselves during our entire stay so felt more like we booked an entire apartment than just a room.
Marcin was such a kind person and went beyond his way to accommodate us, both with giving us privacy but also with making sure we had all of our questions answered with the city and helping us find places to eat etc.
The apartment itself was perfect. It was clean, nice furniture and had everything that we could ask for, besides that it was super unique and had a nice charm to it.
We got so much more than what we paid for and was super happy with our trip, we will definitely come back again :)

name: Nice apartment in Rotterdam South
comments: The flat was really nice, it was very clean and the view from the balcony was also nice. It's a short way to the next metrostation where you can drive to the Centrum. Marcin wasn't there when we arrive but the communication with Neil was very good. We enjoyed the stay in this flat.

name: Downtown city center
comments: It was quite late in the evening when me and my daughter arrived the Centraal Station, Rotterdam from the airport at Amsterdam. Maarten was very kind to wait for us at the main exit of the station and help us deliver the luggages to his apartment. It was raining quite heavily and we really appreciate for his helping us.   The apartment is very spacious and newly furnished with all the utensil es necessary for a living like at home. There are two bedrooms which are equipped with central heating supply. The pillows, blankets and bed sheets are clean & with sufficient wardrobes for storage.  We can also cook for ourselves at the open kitchen already equipped with an oven, micro wave, electric heater & a coffee machine & fresh coffee beans. There is also some soft drinks, beer, iced food like pizza, ham and butter in the fridge. The security of the apartment is also reliable and there are CCTV at the two main entrances of the building.  Besides, it is just a stone throw away from the shopping centres and transportation is also very convenient.  The last but not least, the view at the apartment is excellent. We can sit at the balcony to see the fountain located at the roundabout under the sunset. We should never forget about the night with the full moon rising from the east whilst we're having a beer after the dinner cooked by ourselves at the apartment. We certainly will book for this apartment should we have a chance to come back next year.

name: Downtown city center
comments: A fantastic apartment with a fabulous view! Maarten was very helpful, friendly and went out of his way to pick us up from the railway station. Welcomed us with a bottle of wine, beer, juice and food! The best Airbnb experience I've had. Dankjewel Maarten!

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's apartment was absolutely fantastic! It was located right in the center of Rotterdam and had a beautiful view of the water fountain in the center. The apartment itself was very well maintained. Very clean and spacious. Maarten was also a wonderful host. We were delayed getting to the apartment and he waited patiently for us. He also allowed us use of the carport so we saved a lot of money on parking on the street. Overall a great experience and place to stay!

name: Downtown city center
comments:
Maarten was a reliable and helpful host. The flat is big, decorated with modern furniture, exactly as featured in the pictures, comfortable, quiet and very clean.
Our favourite place: the two sofas on the covered balcony that offered a fantastic view.
Perfect location near the train station and very central.
We enjoyed our stay

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten was a great host. Open and friendly and provided us with everything we needed. The apartment is very central, clean and easily accessible. Beds were very comfortable and it had a nice view looking into the city. I can certainly recommend this apartment of you are visiting Rotterdam. Than you Maarten for the great stay.

name: Downtown city center
comments: The apartment is near the central station, easy to go everywhere.  The room is at 9 floor and have good view. Maarten is so kind and gentle, we  will surely introduce our friends to choose his apartment if anyone will travel to Rotterdam.

name: Downtown city center
comments: My stay at Maartens apartment was great. We were in Rotterdam for a conference and had never been before. Maarten met us downstairs and gave us a tour of the apartment. There is plenty of space in the apartment and a great balcony/sunroom. Maarten also gave us some tips about where to go and what restaurants were good, he was a very helpful host

name: Downtown city center
comments: Marrten"s house is superb. Just 5 min walk to central station. I really like its decor and it"s very well equipped. The kitchen has everything you want. The balcony is also amazing. We do enjoy our stay here and do recommend his house to others.

name: Downtown city center
comments:
Maarten as a host was perfect!
The apartment is amazing: big, bright, clean and perfectly located and well conected.
He was very helpful and he made our stay a lot easier.
I would highly recomend to visit Rotterdam and have a lovely stay at Maarten's apartment.

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's place is great. It is really close to the central station (5 mins walking). There are many restaurants and shops nearby. The apartment was clean and spacious with a big leaving room and a really nice closed balcony. I recommend Maarten's place for any type of travelers (business or family trips).

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's place is very central, very well located, with easy access to points of interest and public transport. Just beside Holiday Inn Express and across from Hilton. Pictures consistent with actual apartment. Loved the balcony with the view.  Also handicap accessible. Has a lift and a walk in shower.  Very spacious for wheelchairs.  Host was very helpful and accomodating. Don't hesitate to book it if you're going to Rotterdam and the place is available.

name: Downtown city center
comments:
If you’re for an apartment in Rotterdam, look no further!
Marteen’s apartment is beyond stylish and exceedingly confortable – those reclining chairs at the balcony will slow your sightseeing plans.

You see a lot of perfect little details like the wine bottle at arrival, and major features like the side by side walk in double shower.
At arrival the hosts were very friendly and they gave us full details of the surroundings and were really excited to refer us to their favorite restaurants in the vicinity.

name: Downtown city center
comments: It is a great and spacious place. Feeling comfy after get in the room. View is great. We can enjoy sunset in the living room and balcony. New refurnishment of bathroom in model style. Everything clean and tidy. A well-equipped kitchen is amazing that make us enjoy cooking. Maarten is a helpful and thoughtful person. He reply our questions promptly. It is good to stay in Maarten's place.

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's appartement is ideally located for exploring Rotterdam, and we did almost everything on foot. The building itself is quite an experience and I'm glad today architects don't build things like that anymore (hopefully...). But from the 9th floor you have a great view over the town, with lovely sunsets from the back windows. In the flat you find everything you need, the Saeco is a real joy in the mornings, and Maarten supplied more than enough beans for our whole stay of 4 nights, plus a bottle of wine and some nibbles - we almost didn't have to do any shopping. Everything matched the descriptions. Maarten was on holiday when we arrived, but he arranged for a friend to meet us, and after sorting a tiny misunderstanding with the adress (it's Weena, not Weena Zuid - my mistake!) saw us safely to the apartment. Despite being on holiday, Maarten answered all our questions very quickly and was a perfect host even from a distance. Can only recommend this flat!

name: Downtown city center
comments: We were here for one week. The location of the apartment is excellent; nearby the shopping area, restaurants and the railway station (~ 5 minutes walk). The apartment was spacious with 2 bedrooms, a very nice balcony where you can sit in those 'lazy' chairs with a cold drink and enjoy the city-life. Also it has a wonderful shower. I would definitely recommend this apartment to anybody who wants to be in the center of everything.

name: Downtown city center
comments:
