A great place in my home town Rotterdam, 5 min walking from central station, trams for the door and a great view.
A warm welcome, with a bottle of wine and extra's on the bar, you feel instantly at home. The appartement is clean and there is coffe, tea, coffe milk to use.
If you want to stay Rotterdam this is the place to be.
Maarten you are a great host, thanks :)
Ignar

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's apartment is great. Very spacious and bright on a sunny day. We used all facilities including kitchen and washing machine and it was great. Just like being at home! Communication and check in were excellent. Maarten was always available to answer our questions.

name: Downtown city center
comments: Marteen and her girlfriend has been excelent hosts, always available for solving doubts and very awared about our needs and confort,. He left us a lot of useful information about the city and a bottle of wine to welcome us!!! We were really grateful to him :-) The appartment is fantastic, full of natural light, very very clean and confortable. The excellent location, 5 min by foot from Rotterdam Centraal makes this appartment the perfect choice to enjoy a few days in Rotterdam. I fully recomend Marteen and his appartment!!!! :-)

name: Downtown city center
comments: Maarten's apartment is in a fantastic location with a nice view, easy walk to fun parts of the city.  It has all the all amenities one would need, and was a great home base for exploring Rotterdam.  Especially liked the espresso machine and excellent showers.

name: Downtown city center
comments: Great apartment with spacious living room perfect for two couple or four friends. The bathroom is stylish and with a lot of space. The nice city view from the big windows is also an extra bonus.

name: Downtown city center
comments:
Awesome apartment. Location huge huge bonus so close to train station.
Great view from apartment !!!!
Totally recommend to future travellers.

name: Downtown city center
comments: My husband, mom, and I loved our stay in Maarten's apartment. It's an older building, but the apartment has been updated and stylishly furnished. It was super comfortable and outfitted with everything you may need, including an espresso machine. We got a kick out of the multi-colored lights and bluetooth speakers in the bathroom, it was a dance party every time we took a shower :) Probably the best part of each day was sitting on the comfy lounge chairs on the screened-in balcony, sipping coffee, listening to the city waking up and watching the endless streams of folks biking to work.  The location is perfect - a short walk to the train station, public transportation, and in a safe neighborhood with tons of restaurants and bars a short walk away. Maarten was an extra-awesome host - he was very responsive to messages, texted with me to coordinate our arrival, and even offered to pick us up at the train station. You should definitely stay here if you get the chance! Also, Rotterdam is amazing, I can't wait to come back.

name: Downtown city center
comments: We stayed in many airbnb abroad and our stay here was by far our favorite experience.  The location is great and the apartment is gorgeous.  Great view of the city center and it is well decorated, clean, and the showers are amazing :).  Also very quiet despite being in the city due to their windows.  Our host met us at the train station to orient us to the apartment and she was so lovely and helpful.  We felt at home (the wonderful coffee maker helped) and like we were really on a luxurious vacation.  Would definitely recommend to others!!!!

name: Downtown city center
comments: This home was absolutely perfect! Looks exactly like the photos, was in the perfect location, and had a pretty great view from the balcony! Marteen was very easy to reach and communicated with us the entire trip. Would definitely recommend this spot to anyone!

name: Downtown city center
comments: perfect & so kind!! i loved the view most!!

name: Downtown city center
comments:
Brilliant, perfect, amazing and that still doesn't describe this apartment!
The location is literally in the middle of Centrum! Opposite the hilton and next to the holiday inn. Great views at night and super stylish in design. ( The shower is amazing).
The apartment pictures do not do the apartment justice !
Maarten is a brilliant host who responds quickly to any questions and was kind enough to leave many refreshments to help you start your trip - a bottle of champagne included.
Very big and roomy, great for pics, eating out or in and relaxing. Something for everyone

name: Downtown city center
comments: Our stay at Maartens Appartment was just perfect, from check-in, communication etc. everything was easy and fast. Also we got nice tipps from Maarten. As we also got to Den Haag and Amsterdam, the Appartment was perfectly locatet, close to Rotterdam Centraal. Also to visit Rotterdam the Appartent is very well located and A nice view from 9th floor above the fountain :) highly recomend Maartens place.

name: Downtown city center
comments:
Maarten is an amazing host, he is very welcoming and easy to reach out to when there are question - either before the stay or during. His apartment is located very conveniently, everything you‘d need is within a 5-10 min walk, it is directly in the city center making it the best point to start all your sightseeing in Rotterdam. In reality, the apartment is even more beautiful than the pictures, there is plenty of space and it is very well-equipped, too. Everything you would need to live is already there!
An absolute highlight is not only the open-kitchen design of the living area, but also the bathroom and the balcony/loggia. The beds are very comfortable, allowing a calm good night’s sleep.
We really enjoyed staying here very much. This is most likely the best airbnb-stay I have ever had!

name: Downtown city center
comments: Beautiful modern apartment with a gorgeous view of the city. Right in the center of everything!

name: Flat in Rotterdam Oostplein area
comments:
Upon arrival I found Elaine's apartment to be the ideal place to start my experience moving to the Netherlands. Its central location allowed for easy access to all amenities, including public transportation, with a tram station and grocery store 1-2 minute's walk around the corner.
The flat itself was lovely, spacious and comfortable, providing everything one could need: a relaxing lounge with TV, a decent sized kitchen with balcony, a spacious bedroom overlooking a garden below, with a large bed and desk, sufficient cupboard and drawer space, ironing board, clothes hanger, washing machine and a great shower!
Communication with Elaine was no problem, she provided clear instructions every step of the way, from my arrival (in liaison with a housekeeper who prepared the flat for me), through the month (with little notes of instruction left around the flat), and finally a check up phone call on my last day.
All in all I would highly recommend her apartment; she made me feel right at home

name: Flat in Rotterdam Oostplein area
comments:
It was a very great place to stay would definitely come back!
Elaine was very helpful and answered very fast on everything. She is an amazing host
The apartment was very close to city center in a very nice neighborhood and everything you need: cafes, supermarkets etc.
The apartment itself is very spacious with nice balcony and you can find anything you need in here.
It was very nice and thank you for everything!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
We had a great experience visiting Rotterdam. The studio is only a ten-minute walk from the station.
CJ and his wife Hennie are great hosts. CJ offered to help us with the luggage, whilst Hennie was very understanding when we were running late to leave the studio.
The room is very spacious and clean and the bed is comfortable. The 'dining table' is next to a huge window, which is very nice when having breakfast. The bathroom was also very clean and there are towels available in case you didn't bring any.
I forgot a t-shirt. CJ was willing to send it back to me. Great service overall. I highely recommend this place if you consider visiting Rotterdam.
Therefore, 5 stars.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Our stay was wonderful. The apartment is a lovely peaceful place really close to the city centre. The room has all you need for a short stay. The bed is really comfortable, the shower nice and hot. We loved the rooftop terrace. The city view is amazing. Definitely recommend this place to anyone who visits Rotterdam.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
The room is well located, near the central station and several trams.
It is really nice and cozy, but getting to it is a little bit hard because there are lots of steps.
The roof terrace is pretty cool to hang out and watch Rotterdam by night!
You have a shower in your room, but the toilet is shared with another room, this is a small place with no window.
Overall, Cj was a great host and friendly!
We really enjoyed our stay!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
4박 5일 머문 로테르담의 날. 잊지 못할 것이다. 세탁기사용과 큰 욕실이 좋았습니다. 여분의 침대도 준비해주셔서 좋았어요. 영어를 잘 못해서 커뮤니케이션에 어려움이 있을것이라 생각했는데, CJ의 친절하고 빠른답장 너무 감사해요. 그리고 조용한 주택가이고 센트럴 역에서 도보로 다니기 좋았다. 감사해요. 건강하세요.
The day of Rotterdam, 5 days and 4 nights. I will never forget it. I liked the washing machine and the big bathroom. It was nice to have the extra bed ready. I thought I could communicate with you because I am poor at English, but thank you for your kind and speedy reply to CJ. And it was a quiet residential street and was good at walking on Central Station. Thank you. Take care of yourself.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Nice location, calm and cozy street, 10 mins to the city centre or railway station. Stairs are not very comfortable but it's ok.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Great room! Lots of space and light. Especially the balcony and roof top to sit outside and enjoy the view. Very worth a stay in this place!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
The apartment is cozy, beautiful, large, have all the facilities and else.
Is not that easy to get to the top floor, so don’t use big luggages!
But totally worth it! And there is a plus of the roof top view, quite beautiful!
The place is close to the main station, and We didn’t need public transportation for anything (take a walk and visit the city, and all the streets, you won’t regret).
We recommend the staying, for sure!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
We had a relaxed and comfortable stay in Rotterdam and CJ's Studio.
It was an excellent starting point for our trips to the city and CJ was a great help to find solutions for our car (to park it in the street) and the bikes (parking at the central station).
The check-in, check-out and all things around our stay were easy. We would come back and we highly recommend to stay at CJ's Studio.
Thanks!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Very nice place worth its money. It had a very cozy room fully equipped with a kitchen and a shower. Also a huge window with a view looking down the street and a small roof area with fantastic view of the city rooftops. The hosts were very helpfull, polite and very informative. Definitely recomend this place.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Outstanding hospitality! The view from the terrace is a plus but in general the studio is great. They do mention in the description that the stairs are steep, so bear that in mind for luggage or ability to go up/down.  Has everything to make a basic meal and is close to bus, tram or 10-15 min to the central station. Certainly recommend it!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: The apartment was walking distance from the Rotterdam Central station. The stairs were a little steep but the apartment was lovely and very clean. The view was beautiful and the terrace was a bonus!! Our hosts were very friendly and accommodating. Overall a very nice stay :) I would recommend it!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Beautiful studio with large windows and very nice view. Great location. Recommended.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Warm experience,  nice apartment, beautiful view! Recommend!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: CJ’s place was amazing! 15min walking distance from Centraal Station and 20 min from the center of the town! Shops, restaurants and markets are all in walking distance. Super great hospitality while checking in, smooth and fast process and the room is full with natural lights and the roof top terrace was perfect. Highly recommend to anyone to check it out!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Das Apartment war sehr sauber und schön. Das Bett war gross genug für 2 Personen, die Küchenausstattung war ausreichend und Handtücher waren ebenfalls vorhanden. Die Dachterrasse war unser highlight! Obwohl das wetter nicht gut waren haben wir jede Gelegenheit ergriffen, diese zu nutzen.
Der Bahnhof ist in 10 Gehminuten erreichbar und die Wohnung befindet sich in ruhigem Wohngebiet. Ein Supermarkt ist knapp 5 Gehminuten entfernt.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Amazing place! Prefect place for take a train or visit shopping streets.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: A beautiful room that has everything you could need. Location is perfect, close to the train station and food/grocery stores are just 1 street away. Room is located on the 4th floor, so there are steps, but not an issue if you pack light. Overall, a beautiful stay

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
CJ was a wonderful host. He was very flexible with check in (as we arrived quite late) and also with check out. He also responded very quickly to every message I sent!
The place is definitely as shown in the pictures (and better). The only slightly annoying thing is that the toilet is outside of the little flat/room and you do need to share it with others (if the other room on the floor is occupied). This did not prove to be a problem in any way at all, as there was no moment where we needed to use it and it was occupied. So don't let that put you off! The room has its own private shower.
The flat has loads of amenities, with loads of available towels, toothpaste, body wash etc, along with a small and perfectly functioning kitchenette. The bed was comfortable and the room was warm!
The area is a little sleepy (but with lots of shops around), but a really lovely walk to central Rotterdam. The best of both worlds really!
I would highly recommend staying here!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: A truly great place to stay and to explore Rotterdam. CJ is a very pleasant and experienced host who takes the time to inform you at your arrival. It’s located 15 minutes by foot from the city center and shops are only 5 minutes away. The apartment is situated on the 4th floor so some stairs need to be climbed, but that will give you access to a roof terrace and some lovely city views. It’s clean, super practical with it tiny kitchen and very quite. The office activities one floor below can be heard a bit during daytime (weekdays only), but since you’ll probably  be outside it’s barely a problem. Very recommendable I would therefore say.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Definetly recommended. Clean, friendly, great view over the rooftops and really good location. You are reaching the first Restaurants etc. In 10 minutes if you are walking.
The pictures show exactly what you get. Its worth a trip!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
I got welcomed to the airbnb by the host accompanied by a lot of stairs to climb to the room. thankfully our host helped us carrying our heavy suitcases up to our room. once in the room we got a quick tour of how things worked and where to find them. everything looks and feels really professional, clean and comes exactly as described. the rooftop is easily accessible and has a private feel to it's a very serene place with a beautiful view of Rotterdam. note: the small box next to the tea and coffee items is salt and NOT sugar haha!
thanks for the amazing stay CJ, we had a wonderful time in your airbnb.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Cees Jan is an excellent host, the terrace is great for an evening drink and the studio is located close to the city centre but situated in a quiet street. We loved staying there. It was hot - we enjoyed the best of dutch summers - so it heated up during the day but cooled down at night again.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Wir waren von Freitagnachmittag bis Sonntagfrüh in der Wohnung und haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. Bei unserem Empfang wurden wir sofort persönlich willkommen geheißen und haben alle wichtigen Infos bekommen. Das Zimmer war sauber und gemütlich. Leider war die Toilette auf dem Flur und wurde auch von einer anderen Bewohnerin genutzt. Glücklicherweise hatten wir aber die Dusche für uns. Ein Highlight war die Dachterrasse, die wir nutzen konnten und die einen tollen Ausblick auf Rotterdam bot. Positiv erwähnen möchte ich auch die Lage der Wohnung, man konnte zu Fuß in ca. 20-40 Minuten zu vielen Sehenswürdigkeiten (Markthalle, Erasmusbrücke, Euromast etc.) laufen. Zudem waren ein Aldi und andere Supermärkte zum Einkaufen in der Nähe. Bei der für uns recht komplizierten Bezahlung der Parkgebühr über eine App war uns der Gastgeber zum Glück behilflich. Wir würden allen Gästen empfehlen (wenn möglich) mit dem Zug anzureisen, da Parken in Rotterdam (so wie generell in den Niederlanden) leider sehr teuer ist. Wir haben in der Straße der Wohnung 1€ pro Stunde gezahlt. Insgesamt waren mir mit unserem Aufenthalt sehr zufrieden und empfehlen die Unterkunft gerne weiter.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Nice place. Quiet, tidy and fully equipped. Cute room and balcony. perfect place to spend some days around Rotterdam.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Cj place was a very convenient location, cosy and had a nice view. Recommended.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Very enjoyable stay!
Roof terrace has a fantastic view. Room is clean and offers everything you‘ll need.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Tolle Unterkunft. Sehr gemütliches sauberes Zimmer mit kleiner Küchenecke und Waschmaschine. Besonders die Dachterrasse war ein besonderes Highlight im Sonnenuntergang. Die Umgebung ist super ruhig und zentral zum Hauptbahnhof. Die Gastgeber waren super freundlich und wir konnten unser Gepäck dort ebenfalls stehen lassen bis zur Abreise. Alles in allem gibt es hier wirklich nichts zu bemängeln, wir kommen gerne wieder!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: This was a very suitable room and location for my short visit in Rotterdam. The location is in a neighborhood away from the busy streets, close to businesses needed. It is a 66 step stairway to the comfortable room, the reward is the rooftop terrace with sweeping views of Rotterdam.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Hennie & CJ were great hosts. The communication worked very well. Very nice airbnb and wonderful view from the roof terrace. gladly again!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: The location was great and the apartment was really cosy. The balcony was wonderful as well.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Cj war so nett!!!!!! Das Studio ist zuckersüß, die Lage und der Preis unschlagbar! Die Kommunikation war toll! Man muss viele steile Treppen bis unters Dach klettern, das war aber für uns kein Problem! Die Dachterasse ist ein Highlight! Immer gerne wieder!!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
CJ was a great host, he was responsive and gave us a very informative and nice introduction to the area, place and overall we felt very welcomed here 😊
The location of the stay was absolutely fantastic, there are plenty to do in the nearby street (CJ will tell you about it) and we enjoyed the walk toward the city center too! The room was clean, organized and had everything we needed. I would recommend any friend to get this room, and I’ll be booking again when I return to Rotterdam 🥳

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Cj was kind and welcoming. He carried my heavy luggage up the stairs (there are a lot and they are steep)! So I am grateful for that. The room was very clean and practical to live in. The washing machine was great to have. The kitchen was easy to use. The bed was comfortable and warm. The view from the 4th floor was nice. Although it is a room, it felt like a suite. Book it!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: My boyfriend and I had a wonderful 3 night stay in this airBnB. When we arrived we were both feeling a bit under the weather and full of cold but the bed was very comfortable and the room nice and warm. When we felt well enough to explore there were a number of leaflets in the room giving us ideas of things to do in Rotterdam and upon arrival CJ had also told us of some things nearby. CJ also helped us carry our luggage up the stairs to the room which was very helpful as the stairs are quite steep and there are a lot of them! The view is also pretty nice from the room especially at night when you can see the lights across Rotterdam. The roof terrace is also lovely however we didn’t really go up there. It would be nice if the toilet was in the room however it is only a few steps down the hall and shared with the other room down the hall so not really any different than in a house. Would defo recommend and if we stay in Rotterdam again we would certainly look to stay here again!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: I absolutely loved my stay at CJ and Hennie's place. The location was great for exploring Rotterdam, and a short and simple walk from the Centraal Train Station. The stairs were steep and narrow (as others have noted), but easy to navigate for an active person with little luggage. The rooftop deck was a really nice bonus with great views of the city at sunset. CJ was super helpful with check-in and made sure I had everything I needed for my short stay. The shared toilet was no problem - I never encountered the other guests during my 3-day stay.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Wir haben den Aufenthalt in dem kleinen Apartment sehr genossen. Typisches Altbau Haus mit holländischem Stil, was mir persönlich sehr gut gefällt. Die Dachterasse war ein persönliches Highlight für mich. Der Gastgeber war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, im Haus war es sehr leise. Zu Fuß erreicht man alles sehr gut. Für unseren Kurztrip waren wir rundum zufrieden :)

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: great location, atmospheric neighborhood with good breakfast options, nice hosts and the roof terrace with skyline view was super

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: CJ’s wonderful studio is very comfortable with amenities exactly as pictured! Plus, CJ offers a personalized touch and is happy to provide recommendations for the area, and also helped us carry our bags up the (as other guests have mentioned, steep and narrow) stairs. For young travelers, or those unintimidated by very narrow and steep stairs, this is a perfect AirBNB, and the rooftop balcony is a huge plus! If we are in Rotterdam in the future, we would absolutely consider staying here again.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Es war super ! Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und hatten ein paar entspannte Tage. Die Dachterasse ist definitiv ein Highlight! Sehr sehr freundlicher Gastgeber! Vielen Dank, wir kommen gerne wieder.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Cjs air bnb was absolutely gorgeous. Lovely little room with a gorgeous french balcony looking out onto the street. 15 minute walk from the train station which was helpful as we were here for the rolling loud festival at AHOY so getting the metro was really easy. Overall really happy with the place, the stairs are steep as mentioned in other reviews but it’s nothing too bad, you get used to them. Cj gave us recommendations to cafes, supermarkets and the room included a lot of amenities like an iron, hairdryer, towels. 10/10 stay, lovely little find and definitely worth the price.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: It was wonderful! A cozy room with warm hosts. The location is very central, but the street is quiet and pleasant. Would definitely come here again!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: We had a lovely stay in Rotterdam! the apartment is spacious and very well supplied. We especially loved the roof top access, the views were incredible. Very quiet street and centrally located. CJ was kind and answered all of our questions promptly 😊

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: If you are able to get up four flights of stairs this is definitely a good place to stay. close to the city and very clean. pretty much like having your own studio apartment

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
it was a really nice space, beautiful room, with a terrace on the ceiling with a stunning city view. we had everything we needed!
the only downside was that the bed was very hard to sleep in and we could feel the springs some places and we both had a tight neck by the end of our visit.
but if you like a hard bed, then it's great for you!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: We loved our stay at this beautiful apartment - a very traditional Dutch house with a beautifully equipped and extremely comfortable room with shower and kitchen. The bed is extremely comfy, there is a great view, and I would’ve stayed there for much longer had it been possible. Highly recommend!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
We stayed at CJ’s place for 4 days during our visit to Rotterdam.
It’s a lovely and beautifully furnished studio style apartment. It’s on 4th floor, and has quite a steep climb, but this is definitely not something that bothered us.
The apartment comes with a private shower and a bathroom that is shared between another apartment on the same floor.
It’s located in a great spot, 20 min walk to Rotterdam Centraal, and also well connected by trams and buses both to the station and the city.
There were also a lot of really amazing cafes and restaurants around which worked great for us!
CJ was always available and responsive, and gave us local recommendations, and also was helpful to let us leave our bags for a little longer during checkout as our flight was later.
All in all, I would highly recommend this AirBnB if you’re staying in Rotterdam, and also if you want to go around nearby like The Hague, Gouda and Utrecht.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Die Unterkunft war nicht weit vom Bahnhof entfernt und leicht zu finden. CJ war so freundlich und hat uns ermöglicht, eher einzuchecken, das war super!
Wie in der Beschreibung auch schon steht, geht es steile Treppen hoch, das muss auf jeden Fall bedacht werden. Wir haben uns in der Unterkunft sehr wohl gefühlt, das Zimmer hat alles, was man braucht. Die große Dachterrasse mit dem tollen Ausblick ist ebenfalls ein Highlight. Da wir noch weiterreisen, war es für uns sehr hilfreich, dass wir die Waschmaschine und den Trockner benutzen durften. Vielen lieben Dank!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Super cozy apartment with a beautiful view from the rooftop terrace. It was also not far from the central station.
Cj was also very friendly and gave us a good introduction of the city and recommendations of where to go and what to do.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt bei Cj sehr genossen. Das Studio befindet sich in einer so schönen und ruhiger Lage - und trotzdem ist man zu Fuss innert 10-20‘ im Herzen von Rotterdam. Man hat viel Platz für sich und unser Highlight war die Terasse über den Dächern von Rotterdam. Wir würden jederzeit wieder bei Cj übernachten!

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments:
Fantastic stay in Rotterdam walking distance from Rotterdam Centraal. Prime location for tourists and travellers alike. easy transport links to the rest of Rotterdam and the Netherlands as a whole.
Fantastic views from a rooftop terrace and the ensuite shower was a very welcome refreshment after some pretty hot days in packed convention halls.
Easy checkout. Only gripe is there's a lot of stairs that are very steep so I would not recommend for the disabled or the elderly.
Overall a very pleasant experience, Thank you to Cj and his family for putting up with my heavy boots on the floorboards of a late night.

name: Stylish studio near Central Station / City Centre
comments: Schöne kleine 1-Zimmer-Wohnung. Ideal für ein Kurztrip in Rotterdam. Wohnung liegt zentral, aber dennoch in einer angenehmen, ruhigen Gasse. Sehr gastfreundliche und herzliche Gastgeber. Geschirr leider nicht alles sauber und Dusche schon etwas abgenutzt, aber trotzdem noch funktionsfähig und ausreichend für kurze Aufenthalte. Haben uns wohl gefühlt. Dachterrasse ist ein kleines Highlight, für schöne Sommerabende.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
I really felt welcome in this place. Communication with Kim was uncomplicated and she accommodated my desired arrival time! Since she was not available her father welcomed me and showed me everything necessary. There was some fruits and croissants for the first breakfast which was unexpected but very welcomed!!
The place is clean and very close to the Metro. Convenient are the take-aways and the supermarket in the proximity!
The room is big, was very clean!
There was some noises from the street.
Overall I can really recommend this place!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Our 2 nights stay at Kim's place was great. Apartment is exactly like on pictures and even thought we were a little skeptic about "glass wall", it didn't bother us at all. With the black curtain it feels like a normal wall. Metro, Tram, Mcdonalds and Jumbo store are right on doorstep.
Can't forget to write a word or two about Kim. Very friendly, enthusiastic about the city. Showed us what we can see, what's happening... She even got us breakfast.
Really nice experience!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: This was one of the best airbnb experiences ever. Rotterdam is an amazing city and Kim made it so convenient for me to get around. She explained everything, gave me some interesting brochures and books about the city, and really took the time for me. The room is huge, light and warm, and the place has everything you may need for an excellent stay. I was able to use their bikes as well, and managed to get around everywhere so easily. Kim and her lovely dog even took me to the airport. Thanks so much Kim for your hospitality!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: It was my first time air bnb and my choice was absolutely amazing!!!!!:-) I really like this house omg:-)  I took so many pics with my friend , so clean and bright and big windows:-)location also amazing !!!easy to find it !!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim was an excellent host. She was very responsible and kind, so it made our stay "more" enjoyable.

We stayed in her place for 4nights. She welcomed us with some complimentary fruits, chocolates and bottles of water in the refrigerator. She gave us lots of informations such as city maps, brochures and etc,. The night before we left, we needed to do laundry and She picked up our laundry and drop it off for 3euros. Thank you So much Kim; ) The neighborhood seemed little bit dirty but it was ok with us. Two tram lines and a subway station in front of the apartment was fantastic.

The room was very spacious for two people and everywhere you look, you can tell it was clean and thoughtfully organized. Sharing kitchen and shower/ toilet room with other guests at the same floor wasn't difficult for us. In fact, we were lucky to have a nice couple while we were there and ended up sharing our contact informations before we left. Heating was great in the room. Good shower but the booth can be little bit tight to move around. You may hear some Noise from upstairs.

Thank you Kim! We wish you all the best,

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim couldn't possibly have been nicer! we communicated several times before and after the arrival in the apartment and she was always available and super kind and helpful. The apartment is on the first floor with traditional dutch stairs, very manageable on a daily basis, but somewhat difficult with luggage for me and my friend, and Kim actually offered to take our luggage up on the day of arrival and down on the day of departure. She was also flexible with the time of arrival and let us leave our luggage in the apartment until the afternoon on the day of departure. Kim kindly gave us plenty of  advice and information about Rotterdam including several brochures. The apartment is wonderful, newly renovated, our room was large and bright with everything we needed, and a shared kitchen and bathroom with another guest room. Both rooms have doors that close. Very good location with supermarkets, subway and trams literally a few steps away, 15mn to the city center, and a lovely historical part to visit nearby. We loved our week at Kim's comfy room and will definitely come back next time in Rotterdam.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Thanks very much , Kim,
We were welcomed warmly by your father and enjoyed staying in your flat very much. Everything was according to the description and very neat.
Only one thing has to be considered: Sometimes it gets quite noisy on the street. For people who are sensitive, just be prepared ( like my mom was)
:)

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Our stay at Kim's was wonderful. Everything was pristine, and the entrance way is full of information booklets about the city.
We arrived to check in and Kim's mother was there to let us in and show us the ropes. The room itself is more spacious than the photographs can show, and the shared kitchen is great if you want to make a quick meal rather than going out. However, there is no oven or toaster, so we made pasta and salad, the ingredients for which were purchased just across the street at Jumbo.
A few fast food spots are within 50 paces of the front entrance, as is the metro and trams to get you all over. Including Rotterdam Centraal, the Euromast, Markthal, and the cube houses.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim's room was spotlessly clean and looks exactly as it does in her photos. The apartment is on the first floor and has two bedrooms (each rented out separately) and a shared kitchen and bathroom. The Comfy Room is very large and gets lots of sunlight. The kitchen is fully equipped with all the cooking utensils you need to make meals.
It is a 30 second walk from the metro station and a 1-2 minute walk from the supermarket.
We didn't actually meet Kim, but her family were very lovely to us.
We would definitely recommend this AirBnB - it was great!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
The room was very comfortable and really clean.
You are directly at the Metro Station, it's about 10 meters away. So you are in the city center very fast. Kim gave us a map and told us some places to go. That was really nice.
Unfortunately, it was a bit noisy but the street was not very busy.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim's apartment was great! The room is ample and bright and has everything needed. Kim was really friendly and available. The communication went without any problems and she also recommended lovely places in the city. Thank you Kim for the great weekend in your apartment.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
I stayed here for work, which was around the corner. Within 5 minutes after my call, Kim was present.
The room as well as the other facilities are impeccable: cleanliness and amenities.
I didn't spend much time in the room, but had a wonderful rest. Light sleepers might experience some noise from outside (traffic, passersby).

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: The location in Delfshaven is actually very convenient. It is an easy walk into center Rotterdam. The metro is right across the street. Kim makes you feel very welcome. The room is very clean and well appointed.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Wow, what a great place and great host. Kim is definitely one that goes the extra mile to make sure you feel welcome. The listing is VERY close to transit, stores, places to eat, etc.
This room faces the street, and noise outside may be an issue if you need absolute quiet. But hey, you are in the heart of the city - so it happens. But the noise does quiet down by 11PM.
The room is huge, and the bathroom is fantastic. The stairs to the room are a bit tight, so be careful.
If I return to the area, I will be certain to check availability with Kim. Thanks again for a great stay!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Nice room with a comfortable bed in the center of Delfshaven, near metro and tram. Unfonrtunately the upstairs neighbours make quite a lot of noise sometimes.
The hostess is very nice and welcoming!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
This place is really lovely and has everything you need and more. I was especially happy about the 2 bikes we could use during our stay :) We barely heard the other guests and only ran into them once. (I hope we were quiet enough for them). If you want to sleep in in the morning the only downside is a kid running around in the upstairs flat.
We arrived really late on a Friday due to a late flight and cancelled trains. Kim was really nice about it and welcomed us even that late!
We slept well and enjoyed our trip! Thanks a lot :)

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim's house is at a very strategic location which is only a few steps to delshaven station. Nice kitchen for those who wish to cook own meal. The only setback is kitchen and bathroom are shared with the others. If occupant of the other room is making noise or cooking at late night, it will create little inconvenience. The rest is perfect.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: This was one of my best stay. The location is excellent the room is light-flooded and spacious. But the very important thing is the great hospitality and support from Kim. She is a very lovely person and supports her guest in all questions.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
My husband and I stayed in this apartment for two nights in our visit to Rotterdam. Kim was very kind, welcoming and accommodating. She left us breakfast and the room and shared area had everything you could possibly need. It was a true home away from home. It was only a step away from the tram and metro. Our only complaint is we heard some noise from the neighbours above, below and in the park outside the apartment. The room also only locks from the outside, so at night, it's not possible to lock your room door. Otherwise we loved it and would definitely recommend it to others. There's also a very yummy Dutch restaurant only a few steps away called Het Eethuisje van Delfshaven that we highly recommend. It's a kind old Dutch woman that prepares all the meals and it feels like Grandma making a home cooked meal.
Thanks again Kim! We really enjoyed our stay! We will definitely recommend your place to others!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Beautiful room and restroom. Sheets smelled wonderful!! :)  Kim had breakfast croissants and fresh fruit available for breakfast. Coffee, tea, dishes... Perfect for long stays. Fan available in room. Shared restroom. Tram  right across the street.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim's is 25 meters from a tram stop.  The room is beautifully appointed and recently remodeled.  The beds were very comfortable, there was a great deal of artificial light, three large windows with builtin blinds, and a cold mini fridge in the room.  A kitchen is shared with one other room, as is the bath.  The kitchen has a coffee maker, microwave, fully set of dishes, glasses, cups and several cooking pots.  It was more complete than most in a short term rental.  The bathroom was all marble and completely modern.  Kim's place is very professionally operated.  Kim was out of town, so her dad was helping out and when he heard we were going to take the harbor cruise, volunteered to drive us to the ticket office, which is not where Google maps shows it to be by quite a distance.  That was very thoughtful.  In her absence Kim had Denny, who lives in the same building, look after guests.  Denny offered to mail stamped postcards for me, because we were leaving the county that day and I rarely see a mailbox.  Overall this is the best run AirBNB I have stayed in and I would not hesitate to return or to recommend it.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Excellent location! Surprisingly, good sound insulation (one of the walls of the room is made of glass, behind the glass is a common kitchen). Everything is clean and tidy, the room matches photos. The host was very friendly and caring.
A great place to stop in Rotterdam!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Very nice hosting, coffee, water and breakfast included, with several guidebooks and tips. Worthful to check that it is only a room, while kitchen and bathroom has to be shared with others only a glass door away... Upper neighbours were very noisy when we were there. Otherwise, if you do not mind to be very close to two strangers (if the other room is also rented), I recommend the place to stay as Kim is a very nice host.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim is a very good host. She offer great hospitality - she even did my laundry on the Christmas Eve. Her location is close to tram and metro, which provide easy accessibility to where you want to go. However, it could be quite noise at night since it’s close to the commercial streets.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: The location was conviently located to grocery stores, pubs, restaurants and coffee shops. The metro and tram were right outside the door which made it easy to get around the city. The people upstairs made lots of noise but I believe they are moving out. Besides that the place was wonderful! We never met Kim because she was away but she responded to messages quickly. Her aunt welcomed us, she was an amazing lady that made us feel right at home!

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim's short-stay apartment is nicely kitted out with everything you would need for a short stay (i.e. long weekend). It is well located (next to both a tram and metro stop) and a number of bars, restaurants and local points of interest (a beer next to the canal is priceless, check out the 'Wind Korenmolen de Distilleerketel').
If renting one room then you will be sharing the kitchen and bathroom but the doors/walls between rooms cut out any neighbourly noise! The area is quite lively on a Friday/Saturday night but no more so than any other inner part of other major cities across Europe. One to return to.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: The location of Kim’s place is super convenient since it is literally one minute from the tram station. Kim is very friendly and helpful. She even leaves bread and fruit for us as breakfast. The only thing is that it is a little noisy in the daytime since it is right by the street but at night it is quiet.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim was great as a host and quick to respond.
The place was as seen in the pictures and everything were sparkling clean.
If you don't mind the noise from the road and the metro it's in a great location whether you are there for vacation or business trip.
Definitely would recommended it.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: The room was exactly as it is featured in the description. Very clean and very good amenities, all the necessary for a great stay and even more. The place was a bit noisy in the evening because of people talking a bit loud on the street, but this was not a problem even for a light-sleeper like myself. Kim was very kind and helpful and gave us a baby bed for free for our 6-month baby son. Overall, our stay was fantastic.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim was great as a host and quick to respond. The place was as seen in the pictures and everything were sparkling clean. If you don't mind the noise from the road and the metro it's in a great location whether you are there for vacation or business trip. Definitely would recommended it.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim was great as a host and quick to respond. The place was as seen in the pictures and everything were sparkling clean. If you don't mind the noise from the road and the metro it's in a great location whether you are there for vacation or business trip. Definitely would recommended it.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim is a very nice and friendly hostess. Room is convenient with public transport nearby. The noise from the street and people was bothersome.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Location location location! This airbnb is literally steps away from the metro and tram station. It was also very stylish, with plenty of space for me and my belongings. The space was clean, and well thought out with everything you could need.
Down the corner are several grocery stores, food establishments, a laundromat, and a phone store. Anything you would need was right down the block. Many of these places were open late as well.
You can hear the people talking in the street, but I didn't mind at all. That's part of the reason why I loved this location. I love having all the people there.
Getting around Rotterdam is very easy too with the OV-chipkaart, and there were screens at each station to tell you how long the next tram/train will be. It is 15 minutes to get to Rotterdam Centraal, which makes this a perfect location for staying in if you want to take day trips to visit other cities as well.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: It was a lovely room and Kim was helpful. She kindly let us check out slightly later.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
It was so nie and comfortable to stay here, the space is very big and light. We had a good time!
Also everything smells good and clean.

name: Comfy Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Very big room. A lot of light. Everything was clean. Just in front of the metro station.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
We had a nice stay in the appartment. We felt welcome and our host was very friendly. The bread for breakfast the next morning was a nice adition. The room was new and clean with a nice bathroom and a good kitchen. The location was perfect with a metro in front and a supermarket across the street.
We would defenitely come back!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Buurt was prima met een avondwinkel aan de overkant en de tram om de hoek. Prettige ontvangst en alles zag er keurig uit! Ontbijtje voor de volgende ochtend stond klaar. wij hadden de achterste kamer. In de gemeenschappelijke keuken heb je geen privacy als de gordijnen in de voorste kamer open zijn. Verder een prachtig grote badkamer; van alle gemakken voorzien.
Ik weet niet of het aan de temperatuur lag maar wij vonden de ( syntetische?) dekbedden te warm. Verder vonden we de vloer wel erg koud op blote voeten . Misschien is het handig om aan te geven dat gasten dikke sokken of sloffen meenemen. Dank je wel en als we weer eens in Rotterdam moeten zijn komen we graag weer!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim ist sehr freundlich, aufgeschlossen und eine tolle Gastgeberin.
Im schönen und absolut sauberen Zimmer haben wir uns auf Anhieb wohl gefühlt.
Ein Highlight war das Bad mit den tollen Marmor-Fliesen.
Die Tram- und Metro-Stationen sind direkt vor der Haustüre und das Zentrum ist somit schnell zu erreichen.
Wir würden jederzeit wieder bei Kim übernachten!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
We stayed at Kim's location for just one night but wished we had longer. The location is so great. Just minutes from trams and the metro, meaning you can get anywhere in Rotterdam so quickly. And we were super happy we chose to stay near the cute Delfshaven neighbourhood instead of downtown. We'd love to come back during nicer weather and maybe cycle around.
The apartment itself was lovely. Kim was so kind and helpful. We loved the croissants and fruit left for us. And if we had more time we would have used the kitchen more. Only having the sliding glass door seemed weird at first, but it was not a big deal at all. And the bed was very nice.
So yeah, we would definitely recommend staying here for a great time in Rotterdam.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: This was my first experience with Airbnb and i can say that i'm really satisfied. I've been there for two nights with a friend and the room was exactly as described, clean, bright and with all the comforts. Kim was very kind and helpful, she gave us plenty of information about the city (maps, guides and city tours). She brought us the breakfast the first day even if was not included, and gave us two bikes to visit the city. Also, after the check out she allowed us to leave our luggage in the hall until the late afternoon. I strongly recommend her room!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim had prepared meticulously for our stay. She had brochures and maps for us and after finding out what kind of travellers we are, she gave us some tips on places we would enjoy on a budget. Kim was incredibly helpful.
The room was light and airy with heating if needed. We had everything we needed for our stay and for eating in and in general. The area was perfect.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim and her family are very friendly and accommodating! Our stay in the Lovely Room was great. Everything is clean and the room gets lots of light. The kitchen and bathroom were clean and had everything you would need. Also, Delftshaven is a beautiful and vibrant part of Rotterdam.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: The accomodation was simply perfect. The best value derives from the location since it is litteraly 10 meters from the metro station, so you reach everything from there. The room inside was very good, big, spatious and with a lot of natural light. Even the other share facilites were new and perfectly clean. Very nice stay, I would recommend this place. Oh! and Kim is a perfect owner, very helpful.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim was very patient with us when our plane got us into the city later than expected. The room itself was small but clean and comfortable. Kim had a well organized set of welcome materials available for us including maps and tips. One of the unexpected highlights: Kim has 2 bikes she allowed us to borrow for the day, so we didn't have to rent bikes. It was really convenient and saved us time and money. The only downside is that the door to our room didn't lock from the inside. While we could lock the room while away, we couldn't lock it while sleeping or relaxing inside. This wasn't a big deal for us at all, but it may be for other travelers.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim's place has everything - lovely kitchen and wide clean bathroom, nice cozy room with big windows and comfy bed. A tram stop and Metro just located at the corner made our trip so easy. We were so warmly welcomed by Kim. She was there whenever we needed help, with the quickest replies. Such a lovely person to host you!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Kim's lovely aunt welcomed us on the first day and explained everything very thoroughly - the communication couldn't have been better! The location is perfect for exploring Rotterdam since there are Metro/TRAM stations right in front of the house. Those will take you to the inner city in just a few minutes.
The room looks exactly as shown in the pictures, very clean and comfortable as described. Same thing goes for the bathroom! Also, the kitchen is very well equipped in case you want to prepare your own meals.
We couldn't have asked for a better host because she left us privacy and so much space which made our stay very pleasant overall!
Thank you for having us, we would come back anytime!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: We stayed for 2 nights at Kim's place. Her place is in Delfshaven which is in the historical part of Rotterdam. We had to take the tram from Rotterdam CS to reach her place and from there it's a 2 min walk.There is also the metro entry gate is right infront of her door (literally). The only things we didn't like were that our room was one the first floor and it's difficult to take up big luggage using the stairs which are very thin. The room given is wonderful but if you have luggage bags like we did then there is a slight issue with space. Kim is extremely helpful and offered to let us use 2 of her OV chip cards for public transport as well as gave us keys to use her bicycles. We had a pleasant stay at her place.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
What an exceptional place to stay. We loved every single bit of it, and if we return to Rotterdam this will definitely be our first choice.
The whole place is spotless and clean. The bathroom is huge and clean. And we were welcomed with delicious croissants and fruit.
The host's aunt, Denny whom welcomed us really went out of her way to make us feel welcome. Even when our flight was delayed and we only arrived at 23:00 pm.
Everything you need is provided in the kitchen area and public transport is literally metres away.
We walked in as strangers and left as friends.
What an absolutely great experience. We highly recommend staying here.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: It was a lot more then what I expected, the place is right out of the metro but in a quiet neighbor ; with a supermarket across the street, Kim and her Mom were very friendly and kind, offering all kinds of assistance to our needs. Will definitely visit again if I come back to this city.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim was a wonderful host. Showed us our room and everything we needed to know about the place. Nice room with tv and our own fridge. Only shared the bathroom and kitchen with two other guests. Supermarket just up the street and in a lovely area. Thanks Kim!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim runs a lovely space in the second floor of her home in Rotterdam. You get your own room with comfy beds, a TV, curtains to black out the glass doors for privacy. Kim even provided some breakfast free of charge. I didn't meet her during my short stay, but I was very comfortable and had a lovely stay. Would highly recommend :)

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim’s place was great, located right by a metro stop making wandering the city easy. Kim provided a bunch of awesome tips and gave us breakfast in the morning. Worth noting: the style of the Airbnb was a little odd. There are two rooms on the second floor, both with sliding glass doors and curtains for privacy. You are able to lock your door when you leave but not while inside-I could see how this could be uncomfortable. We were the only people staying at the time so this was no issue, but i would have liked to know this beforehand. Overall a great stay and Kim is an amazing host.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Thank you ,Kim
Nice landlord. It’s good location and
convenient. I love it . Except for a little noise downstairs at night, (just sometime not all night), everything is super good.
It is highly recommended that everyone come to live.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
A very easy to find place, near the bus and metro station.
And open kitchen space is clean and nice.
Near the house is a very beautiful old town, river, boat, there is very beautiful!
You can walk to every day just 5mins.
Just in the summer, the room is hot, if open the window, there are some mosquitoes, if closed ,then is to hot.
If not in the summer, I think is very good.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
The rooms are as pictured, though they might be slightly smaller than expected. This was not a problem for me as it had everything I needed overall. There was always coffee and tea stocked in the kitchen area which was very nice and there's a grocery store right across the street. The location could NOT BE any better! Delfshaven is right on the harbor and was cute to walk around but the tram and metro is literally right outside the door, no exaggeration on Kim's part. I ended up taking the tram everywhere in Rotterdam, very convenient and the lines were easy to follow. The metro required knowing Dutch to get a card from the machines, so I didn't end up going on. But I'm glad I stayed here instead of in the City center as I saw so much more of Rotterdam than I would have otherwise and it was a quick tram ride there anyway!
I believe Kim was very busy the week of my trip as I actually never met her face to face! Her father let me into the space and when she brought my key and breakfast I was fast asleep from jetlag. I wish I had met her as I would've appreciated her take on what to do locally, but there is tons of literature on Rotterdam and activities to do while you're here so that was very nice and well thought out anyway. The bathroom and kitchen are beautiful though if you are only renting the one room it may be worth it to speak to the neighbors and work out a schedule if you have to be anywhere in the morning. There is a mini fridge in each room separately which is nice and she included a few snacks along with the breakfast. Now to bring up a few negatives, though overall I loved the apartment and found it very convenient for my work +sightseeing trip.
The doors to each bedroom are glass, so you can completely see into them unless you draw these thick black curtains across the length of them. Not a perfect amount of privacy but it did do the trick. The thing I most disliked about the doors is they DO NOT lock from the inside. There is no door to the apartment either, so anyone who has a key to the building has access to this place and that I found less than ideally secure as a single woman traveling alone. I would not stay here again for that reason alone though otherwise I loved the townhouse and its location. Rotterdam is a very safe city overall and I encountered no issues anywhere, but I prefer to have a completely locked, private space while I sleep. The stairs also are extremely steep. I'm a young person, but I have trouble with my knees sometimes and these were not kind. If I was carrying anything I had to take several trips and I do worry about someone older renting this place unawares which is why I'm mentioning it now. The outside door can also be very tricky to unlock! The amenities were mostly on point, but as I was there in November the room got very cold at night. There was no discernible way to completely close the window and the bed itself only had a fitted sheet and a light comforter on it. It would have been nice to have a flat sheet and/or extra blankets just for those cold nights.
Everything else in my opinion was on point which is why I gave this place 4 stars. If Kim was a little more forthcoming about especially the stairs and the doors on the listing I would have given it 5 stars. Though a few times I did message Kim and receive no response. If she updated the locks on the doors however, I would stay here again. Thank you, Kim!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
You have to go up steep stairs to the room first but you'll be amazed for a cute, clean, organized, bright, warm, and comfortable room!
A big table in the shared dining room is pretty helpful for PC work and also having meal.
A supermarket and 2 drug stores are right around corner.
The kitchen has enough space and is functional esp for those who want to cook in the place.
I'll definitely recommend this place!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim's house is completely match the description. You have your own room, separated from the kitchen and the other room with glass partition and curtains, so it can be loudly because of your neighbors. But we were lucky, our neighbors were very pretty people :) Kim also gave us a few croissants and fruits for breakfast, it was unexpected and cute :)

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim’s place had an ample kitchen with coffee maker, dish ware, stove top etc. the bathroom was also spacious. The bedroom was small but it was plenty for what I needed. The area was nearby the Delfshaven harbor (1.5 blocks) however the streets around the apartment are busy and sometimes loud. It’s a neighborhood with character and there happened to be a large house party on apr 26 (Kings night) but it was the National Holiday so it was ok ☺️ taking the tram was easy and Kim told me how to get from the train station by tram which was so simple! She answered questions throughout my stay and was extremely helpful.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
This is a flat in the charming old part of the city with good public transport connection to central Rotterdam. Metro is few steps away, also tram.
Room is small, but light and very comfortable: great bed, glass wall, fully equipped kitchen with expresso machine (!!!) and nice bathroom.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim’s place was for sure sparkling clean! Although we never met Kim herself, Her mom helped us out with all the questions we had. The bedroom is a little too bright for my taste but I definitely recommend it!

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim’s place is just as described. She had excellent communication and gave detailed directions to find her place. Room is exactly as in the picture. Stairs are very steep. Only cons were that the bedroom door doesn’t lock from the inside but you can lock it when leaving out and one window wouldn’t close. Overall it was great experience.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: This is a pretty good place for the price and well located,  but lacking in privacy. Hard to explain the arrangement. There's another guest room nearby and a glass door that makes it more like a partition than a separate room. The sharing of kitchen and bathroom with other guests is a bit intimate. Clean place and nicely decorated though.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: De accommodatie van Kim was erg netjes en fris. Je deelt een keukentje en badkamer met andere mensen, maar daar hebben we geen last van gehad. Hun slaapkamer ligt recht tegenover de eigen slaapkamer, maar er is zeker genoeg privacy. Er lag ook ontbijt klaar: fruit, croissants en koffie. We werden ingecheckt door de tante van Kim, dat verliep heel vlot. Wij zijn blij dat we dit gebied van Rotterdam ook hebben leren kennen; historisch Delfshaven ligt op een halfuurtje stappen van het centrum, maar met de metro sta je er in een halfuurtje. Zeker de moeite waard dus om hier een verblijf te boeken.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: When I arrived the room hadn't been cleaned yet. Kim did all the best to prepare it quickly though. In general, there was everything needed in the apartment for the stay and even more, be it in the kitchen or in the bathroom. Kim seems ready to satisfy a request if she can. My room was the smallest, so there was no closet or dresser where I could put my clothes. A pity considering that I was staying 4 nights. The position is perfect for the public transport, I really appreciated. If you like sleeping late in the morning and your sleep is light, consider that you will hear eavy steps of the neighbour living above you. But this, I think, is a problem of old built dutch houses and not of the owner. I had the chance of seeing the second room, larger and really beautiful. I would choose that one the next time.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Cozy room in a good location! The appartment in total was very clean and beautifully bright. Only challenge for cozy couples: the seperate mattresses in the double bed kept drifting apart...
The host was very nice, responsive and helpful :)

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: If you're looking for a nice place to stay when visiting Rotterdam I can recommend Kim's place. It's located less than 50m from the subway, so in about 10 minutes you're downtown. I slept very well, there are no loud bars in the direct neighborhood. The only noise in the room is the refrigerator, but it's very subtle. The room has a separate entrance, so it's very private.  The other room on the floor was unoccupied, so I didn't have to share the bathroom with anyone else, which was nice. There's also a well equipped kitchen, which I didn't use.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: This place is a great affordable option for a great location location in the cutest part of Rotterdam. Has some quirks, like the bed being two singles pushed together, but we didn't mind. The only downside was that the large windows meant the sun warmed it up a lot, and stagnant water on the rooftop below out windows meant mosquitoes while we tried to sleep with a fresh air breeze. If it's not summer then you'll have no worries.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Nice location and Kim’s mum is nice. But the people sharing the place at level 1 makes alot of noise

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments:
It’s a fairly nice apartment, especially given the price.
Pros:
• Solid location, with a supermarket within ten feet, food places, public transport
• Clean flat and responsive host
• Organised and mostly convenient
• Dishwasher is a huge plus, saves so much time and energy.
Cons:
• If you get Room 2, you sleep with a fridge next to the bed. If you’re a light sleeper like I am, it’s very annoying. Wish it had been opposite to the bed, like hotels.
• The stairs are teeny. It was a huge pain to get my suitcase up there.
• No oven, which kinda shortens your options for frozen food. Wish there was foil in the flat so we could do something makeshift on the stove.
• No obvious place to store clothing. My friend put his small bag next to his end of the bed, and I used two of the dining table seats to prop up my big bag.
• Fridge was tiny.
• Despite Room 1 being empty and visibly much bigger, no option was offered to us to move into that or be able to pay and upgrade to it.

name: Lovely Room @ Historical Delfshaven
comments: Kim’s apartment was exactly as described. The room was clean and comfortable. There was limited storage for clothing/bags but for a short stay this was not a problem. The kitchen was well equipped and clean. If you want complete privacy this might not be a great fit as the other room is very close and obviously there is a shared kitchen and bathroom. But we found with the sliding door and big curtains we were very comfortable. Kim was extremely responsive and helpful to any questions we had. The metro station is right outside the door with great links around the city. The old harbour is gorgeous to walk around. Good value for the price compared to other options in the city.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Betty welcomed us very timely and guided us through all the comfiness there is at their place: little fridge full of refreshments, plenty of snacks, tea, coffee.... She also arranged for parking in the area and explained to us the highlights of Rotterdam. This is without mentioning how beautifully decorated and clean her apartment is. I highly recommend Betty's place.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: We loved our stay in this very cozy Bnb! Betty was the sweetest thing ever. She thought of everything we could possibly need! She was very considerate and hospitable. She attended to all our needs and made sure we were as comfortable as we could be. She was responsive and the line of communication felt open and comfortable. The washing machine was on the level of the apartment we rented, and she warned us in advanced before doing her loads and even wanted to know of any noise complaints if there were any. She timed doing her laundry when we were out. We didn't mind it at all, but we thought that was nice of her to think of. There were problems with the heating during our stay, but she made sure to have someone take a look to see what could be done very quickly. She had so many things set out for us, including food and drinks, as well as toiletries and towels...a lot of the things a traveler may need during the stay in her home. It was a very relaxing stay, with easy lighting and a garden terrace. Betty made the stay an even sweeter one that expected, by her thoughtfulness and her hospitality during our stay. If we come back, we'll definitely be staying over again!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Betty and Hendrix provided us with much information before and during our days in their place. It's a well set, charming little place in a quiet street. And we had a very pleasant time feeling like home. Thanks!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay at Henrik's. Even though we never had the chance to meet Henrik, his sister helped us with keys. The apartment is spacious and there's definitely room for two in the huge King size bed. The balcony is very cozy and is perfect to finish up the day with a cup of tea. There's no kitchen but Henrik supplied us with sandwiches and spreads for breakfast.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
We had a great stay at Betty and Hendriks place and really appriciated the extra value of breakfast, slippers, towls and maps and guidebooks provided. Betty was really welcoming. Next time we will come when the weather is warmer and more suitable for enjoying their lovely balcony. We found it a little cold in the apartment but since they have hot shower and lots of extra blankets it was fine.
The location is slightly of the city centers more buissy streets so if you wish for walkingdistance to shops and bars it is a little bit far, but nothing in Rotterdam takes more than 20 min so it is really no problem taking the tram a few stops to get to the center.
We fully recommend Hendriks palce.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Hendriks flat, the hosts were very friendly, the area is quiet and nice, the flat has a fine balcony.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
The green room were very charming with big windows, high ceiling and beautiful garden in a calm neighbourhood.
Betty were very welcoming and really made us feel at home, she also gave us great advices on what to see and do.
We can highly recommend staying here when in Rotterdam!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
Diese Wohnung ist ein kleiner Traum: sehr gemütlich und geschmackvoll (incl kleine Vasen mit frischen Zweigen), es ist alles da, was man braucht (ein tolles grosses Bett mit schönem Bettzeug; Kaffemaschiene, ausreichend Zutaten für‘s Frühstück) , die Lage ist gut und Betty sehr nett und hilfsbereit.
Auf jeden Fall weiter zu empfehlen - schön drauf aufpassen, dass es so ein Highlight bleibt!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
The flat is more than great for a family with kids for a relaxing stay in Rotterdam. Kralingen, the district itself is very calm, there are playgrounds and child-friendly restaurants nearby, where you can begin or end your day. Anyway you can easily get into the city center in 15 minutes by metro/tram.
The flat itself is very comfortable, very stylish, with all the equipments you need for a baby and for a relaxing stay when the child is asleep :) (balcony, wine, books, dvds, music cds). The breakfast is great as well.
All in all you can feel the care of the host, Betty. She is really making a good job! Thanks!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Staying at The Green Room was truly delightful. Hendrik was very quick to respond prior to arrival and was very flexible with our timing. We didn't get to meet him as he was then working, but Betty welcomed us warmly. (giving us a tour of the room, instructions on how to use the appliances and a few pointers on things we could get up to on our stay, from the large collection of Rotterdam travel guides/books within the apartment). The room was really nice, cosy and well decorated, and the breakfast provided was more than expected (enough to take some as snacks on the go!). On the last day, we were able to leave our bags behind for the day and pick them up before going to the airport. Highly recommended!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Super clean and cozy! Lovely balcony and little yard.  Betty was lovely and gave us many usefull tips what to do in city.  Could not be better place to stay!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Wonderful apartment and a truly welcoming host. It was a real treat to stay in this apartment, and it provided a great base from which to explore the remarkable city of Rotterdam. The rooms themselves were beautifully furnished and provided everything we needed, and of top of this we were delighted by personal touches that our host offered (maps, snacks, teas and a wonderful birthday treat for my husband)! We can recommend this as one of the best experiences we had through airbnb. Highest recommendations!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: We felt very welcome. Betty had numerous tips and took time for us to explain anything we wanted. Good location. Close to subway 700 meters and tram. 300 meters. Very nice restaurants and bars in the neighborhood. The breakfast was the best we ever had. All genuine Dutch products. It was a real delight. The apartment was very clean, well furnished and it was really quiet during the day and the night. Lots of guides and books about Rotterdam. Betty responds very quickly when you have q question. Do not hesitate to go!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
Our stay at Hendrik and Betty’s place was idyllic- we didn’t want to leave! Great location right next to a beautiful park and 10/15 minutes cycle to the city centre. Betty was such a relaxed host and gave us plenty of recommendations. The little balcony was the perfect breakfast spot and we enjoyed sitting outside in the mornings.
We would have appreciated a kitchen area to cook, but this was a very minor issue.
Overall a peaceful spot right next to the city centre. We would 100% return in the future.
Thank you Hendrik and Betty!!!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Quirky space with lots of extras on offer and personal touches. The place was clean, bright, great amenities - everything you needed and more. Lots of decor to look at and a lovely balcony for coffee in the morning! Very private space but still felt like assistance was there if ever needed. A short stay from the city centre via tram and we had no issues with the location at all. Would definitely recommend.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
The place is fantastic and Betty as a host just incredible.
The place has so much love, communication was super fast, locale Recommendations a highlight!
We loved our time we spend in this place Rotterdam and would always go back!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
Everything about this place is beyond fantastic, I super recommend it!
My boyfriend and I stayed there for a week and we utterly loved it – we found the apartment clean and cosy, and the general atmosphere was so welcoming that coming back in the evening was a genuine delight! Moreover, the place is within easy reach, both if you walk or you take the public transport.
The furniture is lovely, the bed is super comfortable, and we really enjoyed the breakfast (especially the stroopwaffels!). We also appreciated the presence of many books and movies both in English and Dutch, such a nice treat when you want to relax.
But the true icing on the cake for us was Betty: she welcomed us with such warmth and kindness that we immediately felt at home, providing us with many helpful indications and encouraging us to contact her in case of need. She truly is the best host you could ask for, and we'll definitely book there again in the future!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: It is a very comfortable and cozy flat. Very spacious. Great attention to detail. Very good location: outside the city and the noise; within walking distance to Kralingse Bos (park) and its lake, as well as the river.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
Betty was a great host. When we arrived there was a selection of drinks and deli meats, cheese, bread, butter, coffee, tea and some spreads and treats as well, enough to feed us breakfast and lunch for days. So nice to see after a long flight and taxi ride. Fun to finally get to try some chocolate sprinkles on bread in the morning :)
My wife and I are a little picky about beds but the bed was big, and very comfortable, and we slept well.
Betty was very nice to talk to and helpful whenever we had questions. You probably won't need to ask too many questions because they have just about everything you need. We felt very lucky to find an affordable place where we could sleep comfortably in our first ten days in Rotterdam. You really couldn't ask for a more open and gracious host.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Betty is a superb host, greeted us at check in with lots of helpful tips and snacks. I don't think we have ever been to such a generous air bnb. we had complete privacy the whole time we were at the green room, which is a lot larger than the pictures give credit for. thank you for a wonderful stay.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Die Unterkunft von Hendrik und Betty ist wirklich toll! Sie ist nicht nur super schön eingerichtet, sondern auch top gelegen. Zu Fuß ist man in ca 15-20 Minuten in der City, wir sind tatsächlich nur gelaufen, weil es so nah ist. Auch das Parken in den umliegenden Straßen ist kein Problem.
