Die Unterkunft war sauber und ein großes Highlight war der bereits gefüllte Kühlschrank. Betty hat uns alles gezeigt und war jederzeit für Fragen da. Wir haben uns pudelwohl gefühlt und würden definitiv wieder kommen! 😊

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Hendrik’s house was lovely, extremely clean and had all amenities one could possibly need for a short stay. The house has a pretty nice backyard with plants all around, there were also throws outside if you wanted a cozy setup outside. Betty gave us a nice tour at check in, and we were simply blown away with some refreshments (fruits, chocolates, chips) and a well stocked mini fridge for snacks and breakfast. There is ample lighting in the house. There were also a lot of books and dvds as well as details on where all to go about in Rotterdam. Would highly recommend this bnb!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments:
I highly recommend a stay at Hendrick and Betty's apartment. It is in a historical building on a quiet street but close to the tram link, a supermarket, bakers and restaurants too. You can easily and pleasantly walk into Rotterdam in 30 minutes.
Betty provided us with a map of the city and there are lots of guide books and info sheets to help you discover about Rotterdam in the flat. The flat has a double bedroom and a good sofa bed in the sitting room which my 6' 3'' son found very comfortable. There is a sweet balcony and a small garden although we didn't use them due to the time of year. Betty provided us with lots of food for breakfast including bread, waffles, yoghurt, cheese and salami. There was wine, beer and fruit juice and also chocolate. It was a real feast. Betty even offered to wash and dry our crockery each morning. A fantastic service. Don't worry if you forget something I will almost guarantee that Betty has thought of it for you. There is a full range of toiletries including deodorant, cotton buds, body lotion etc.
The apartment was perfect for a stay in Rotterdam and felt very relaxed and homely. I would highly recommend a stay here.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Betty was a fabulous host. As previous reviewers have said lots of lovely snacks and breakfast goodies. Clean, quiet and everything you need. And some wine and beer too! Some great restaurants nearby. Recommended!

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: A cute and cosy little space. Loved the little balcony under the tree for breakfast. And the breakfast supplies were amazing!   It’s always such a treat when the little extra touches are thought of.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Enjoyed a lovely few days here.  Our flights were disrupted but Betty still met us when we arrived to show us the apartment.  Very quirky place with lots of lovely touches.  We really appreciated the goodies left, and had a very comfortable stay. Easy to navigate from the tram system line 7.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Betty was very welcoming and helpful. The Green Room was comfortable and the fridge was well stocked. The accommodation was a bit chilly when we arrived, but it was soon warm after we messaged Betty. There were lots of interesting books and information about Rotterdam. Betty cleaned all our used crockery ready for when we returned, which was much appreciated. On arrival, Betty warned us they they have been experiencing disturbance from student houses neighbouring the property. Our first night was untroubled. The second disturbed by what sounded like rowdy drinking games in the room next door to ours but it didn't last long. The third night Betty messaged to warn us that she had heard from the students of plans for a party that would finish at 1am. The music pounding through the wall did end promptly, but far too late in our view. We feel very sorry for Hendrick and Betty but for us, this is not a viable option at weekends in term time.

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Super kind and friendly! Our flight arrived late but Betty still patiently wait for us. The place is clean and cute, just feel like coming back home. They also prepared some snacks and drinks, how thoughtful! Thank you for having us 😊😊

name: B & B the Green Room  in Rotterdam
comments: Had a lovely friendly welcome from Betty and a great stay in Rotterdam.  The flat is within easy distance of restaurants and a walk/tram away from main sights. Really lovely to have breakfast included! Betty was very flexible about a late check out too, due to a night flight departure.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose welcomed is in his very nice apartment. We arrived quite late but he came to pick us up at a meeting point. The room was clean and bright (very comfy bed!) The apartment is well located, close to the centre and the central station !

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Maria hosted my visit while I was there, she was helpful and friendly :) I loved the view from the room, and how it looked in the morning

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Awesome view, beautiful night sky and morning view

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose was very thoughtful host, helped us with tips and offered us little breakfast. The location is perfect - the view of canals is dream!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: I had a great but short trip with Jose in Rotterdam. The location is close to the statio and an easy walk to the town centre - though a little tough to find but once you know where it is, it's part of a lovely residential estate. The room is on the top floor with superb views, everything met my expectations. Jose is really friendly and we had a good time talking, he also let me put my bag there til I had to catch my train. Thank you for the great stay :)

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
This was a great experience. I was in Rotterdam to run the marathon and Jose was a top-class host. He met me as arranged, showed me the facilities and gave me the freedom of his home. The apartment is beautiful, spacious, bright, warm and with excellent kitchen facilities.
The room is large and is very quiet with a big, comfortable bed.
There are good supermarkets and shops nearby and the apartment is very central in Rotterdam - only 10 minutes walk from the main railway station.
Five stars!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: I arrived in the evening after Jose finished with work and it was great to sit and have a chat with him and his friend. I felt welcome and the area is nice and even though it's in the center it's quiet. I would recommend having a map of where to go before arriving as the small streets can be confusing otherwise! All in all a great place to stay even for just one night.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Wonderful host! Spacious room! And great view! Thanks!!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
Jose is a very friendly warm host. He went the extra mile, picking my husband and I up from a location near his apartment in order to ensure that we would not lose our way. Communication with Jose was always efficient. His apartment is in a beautiful neighbourhood, surrounded by scenic rivers and just a short walk to city centre. The tram is a short walk away as well so it is convenient to travel to anywhere in Rotterdam.

Jose's house is very clean and spacious, and the room is better than picture- comfortable and bright. The toilet is right beside the room and easy to use. Jose was very thoughtful to take care of us, such as turning on the heater on rainy days.

I will recommend anyone to stay at Jose's place!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose is a very nice guy and easy host to deal with. Great communication before and during the stay and he makes an effort to make you feel at home. In my case I was there for work so was mostly out anyways. The location worked fine for me. Flat and room are v. clean and otherwise quite comfortable. The two minor points are that it is a smoking flat (if you don't mind then this obviously would work fine for you) and it's a little complicated to find as the main street is on the inside of a locked gated area. But Jose explained things v. well so the last is a minor issue. I enjoyed my stay just fine.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Had a really good stay at José. Room was clean and tidy. José is a laidback guy who is helpfull. Having breakfast in the sun at the balcony was a nice way to wake up

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
The place was comfy and had plenty of room and privacy. It's also easy to walk to Rotterdam Centraal (15 minutes-ish) and the Markthaal (also 15 minutes). A tip for American tourists is that the stairs are a bit narrow and windy! But that seems to be every home here in the Netherlands.
Jose was very welcoming and accommodating! He let me check in a bit earlier than 3p.m. He let me know that he was going to be watching a game with his friends and invited me to join. We watched 3 episodes of 13 Reasons Why together.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: a very characteristic house with a great view and lots of steps, but definitely enjoyable!!!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose's apartment is located in a great place - close to Rotterdam Central Station and city center, but in the same time it's very quite. It's on the 3rd floor, so from the room and the balcony there is a nice view over Rotterdam roofs.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Great location that's close to Rotterdam Centraal Station. The room has a beautiful view of the city at night.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: José is friendly and welcoming. There is a smell of smoke in the shared spaces but the bedroom is clean and cozy, but a bit light. Location is excellent and the view is nice!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose is very accommodating and kind.  I got a bit lost on the way to the apartment and he ended up having to come and find me, did not appear to be annoyed at all.  He is also respectful of personal space and shared his tips for getting into the center of town (not more than a 10 min walk).  I was not aware that there would be so many stairs (four flights to get to the apartment and then another to go up to the room).  [side note: the tub and shower are on the same floor as the room, but the restroom is on the floor below, next to the front door.] The bed was very comfortable, and the balcony offers a view of central Rotterdam.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
I highly recommend staying at Jose’s home. The home is simple and clean. Jose was kind enough of offer coffee and breakfast (thank you!!).
While on your visit, go to the 7th floor of Nhow for the best views, bazar for the best food, and pay the 3 euros to tour a cube house for the most unique experience. I also recommend Op Het Dak for food and a unique experience.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: The location is perfect to go around Rotterdam! Jose is really nice and hospitable person, willing to answer all of your questions regarding places to visit. If you do not have problem with the morning light throw the windows, I would highly recommeded :)

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
Well as he explains that ventilation is somewhat noisy but it did not matter for me.
Someone who is sensitive to the noise may not be able to stay there until 23:00,

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose is a very good host, helpful, kind and accurate, he gave us the directions to easily find his place. The room is nice and clean, there is a minor noise during the day as written in the description, but the nights are totally quiet. The location is like a small island with some houses - it is itself a unique place in Rotterdam.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Great place, with great view at an excellent location.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: The bedroom is simple but comfortable, spacious and bright. Great renovated bathroom, very clean! About 15 min walk to the central train station. There are some steep stairs to get to the room, but nothing major. Would stay there again :)

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose’s place is conveniently located in an architecturally interesting building complex very close to central Rotterdam. He is a great and uncomplicated host, who is willing to help anytime. The room has just what you need and even offers some view of the neighbourhood. Certainly a very nice and quiet stay worth it’s price. It was perfect for my short stay.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose is perfect a perfect host. My room was very clean and everything was well prepared. Jose was very patient to describe how everything works. And what is the best? The room is on the top floor with perfect view. The room is big enought. because it is under the roof is the atmosphere very cozy. The house is very close to everywhere.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Great location, cozy room, and a beautiful view! Right in the heart of the city! I really enjoyed my stay :)

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
good location near city center. room is clean and just sufficient for 2 grown adults.
toilet is shared with owner however and lock does not work. washing machine is not included as well, but it’s stated from the listing from the get go. just a reminder to those booking!
you do have to climb 2 flights of steep stairs, 1 to enter the house. and 1 to the room. so those with big luggages better be careful !
overall, jose is a good host and would recommend this place for a short stay!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Extremely clean room with a nice leafy view over Rotterdam! Breakfast is a nice touch with Percolator coffee. Overall would highly recommend

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
Jose was a very flexible, easy-going, and helpful host. The room has a big bed, a desk, enough space and a very nice view. A very central location in traditional shaped houses.
It was a nice stay and I am happy to recommend it further!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
We had a nice stay a Jose’s place. The room is really good for 2 people to stay for a few days. Rotterdam is an interesting city, unexpected different.
A plus is the cleanness of the house, the tranquility although it’s so close to the center and the balcony.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: Jose is very friendly host, and the place is good price with good view. The share bathroom is clean. Thank you very much

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
The room was as described on the pictures. Simple, but very clean. On top of that, you have a nice view from the windows.
The bed is comfy. The entire place and in particular the bathroom were extremely clean, probably cleaner than most hotels. I really appreciated that.
The location is perfect, walking distance from the train station and the center. It is central, but in a quiet neighbourhood.
There are steep (Dutch) steps to reach the flat, so I would not recommend it for someone with disabilities.
Jose was very reactive when I contacted him.
I only have a small comment about check-in, as the access information he provided were not the best. Hopefully he will improve on that aspect. But other than that, it was a great rental and I would be happy to return there if ever in Rotterdam again.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
I had a nice two-day stay at Jose's apartment.
Located right next to the canal, and five minutes away from great shops, restaurants and trams, it was still able to be peaceful and quiet, with a great view of the city at night. The room was spacious and clean, with the building itself being architecturally impressive, with a modern feel. One of the best features was the very responsive, adjustable heating in the bedroom, which was great for the colder days/nights. Jose was both responsive to messages and flexible with check-in times, which was great as my train arrived early in the morning on my first day.
The only feedback I have is that maybe the room could do perhaps with a rug and a mirror, as it felt a tiny bit 'bare bones' at times. Also, I feel as though there could be a little more flexibility with the use of the kettle after 11am as guests, like myself may require a cup of tea/hot drink throughout the day, especially in the colder months (and especially Brits!).
Thanks!

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: The room in Jose's appartment was super comfy with a good and big bed, a wardrobe to store your clothes and a little desk to work if you need to. Being a solo female traveller I wouldn't normally book a room in a guy's home but Jose was super nice and respectful, never intruded on my privacy. He also allowed me to put my baggages in the room in advance of the reservation time which was super helpful. The neighborhood is gorgeous, with tiny canals, cats wandering and a family vibe.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments:
The Appartement is located in a good walking distance to the city center, a parking garage is nearby. The room is small but light soaked and cozy. If your visiting in summer times, be aware of mosquito bites due to the little river floating by the apartment building. Communication was pretty easy, too.
All in all just a perfect spot for a city trip. 💚

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: I had an amazing stay at Jose's! The place is very clean with a great view outside. Jose is a welcoming and responsive host! I highly recommend this place to whoever needs a short-term accommodation in Rotterdam.

name: Cozy room in Rotterdam Centrum
comments: goeie plek om te overnachten. dicht bij centrum. jose en zijn vriendin zijn vriendelijke mensen.  veel privacy gekregen en rustige nachten

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments: Johan and the apartment are both wonderful.  He made me feel incredibly welcomed, as if we were old friends.  He picked me up in is car at the central stations, and he also showed me some of central rotterdam  by foot.  The room is lovely and has a large window overlooking a central courtyard/garden area.  The living room has two large picture windows looking onto a cozy street with big trees and lots of bike racks.  I absolutely recommend staying with Johan.

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments:
Absolutely perfect!! Johan is an amazing host, he picked me up from the train station saving me from travelling with all my luggage!!
The flat is beautiful and Johan is actually improving his light system making the house definitely unique!! :) Furthermore the flat is not far from the train station, just about 10-13 minutes walking distance!!
I definitely recommend Johan place if you're looking for quality time in Rotterdam!!

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments:
Johan is amazing host and a wonderful person. I enjoyed staying and spend time at his place. he lives in a beautiful and quiet street, walking distance from everywhere!
Just 10 minutes walk from the central station. 2 minutes from super market and a really bakery, and 30 seconds from a really nice bar/restaurant.
I highly recommend to stay at Johans place.
I really enjoyed at Johan&Daves place!
Thank you!

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments: Johan is super nice and the house is fantastic. I really like the area and the light with the big window in the room. Thanks for cute Dave. Thanks for everything, especially the last dinner.XD I will remember the sweet meal and people with touching singing forever.

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments:
The place is super comfortable, lots of space in the room and beautiful natural light ! Really great area, with a big park just down the road and a cheese shop too (they do great sandwiches).
Johan was super accomodating and friendly, never intrusive. He answered questions promptly and was super flexible when I needed to make an adjustment to my booking.

name: Apartment in Rotterdam Blijdorp (north)
comments:
Johan is a great host, the apartment is clean, cozy and bright.
Very close by the city center, Johan makes you feel at home.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Arie-Jan went well and truly beyond requirements to make sure we were accommodated well. A lovely chap and a lovely view, especially if you like to watch the boats pass by.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: It was a perfect stay! Lovely apartment with a wonderful view over the river Maas. Sitting in the cove in the morning sipping coffee and staring at the river. Just perfect. With the bus-stop in front of the house it's super easy to get into town. We felt completely at home and would love to come back again.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
We were surprised when we arrived to Arie-Jan's place. We had no words to describe such a lovely and authentic place. The view is awesome and there is a charming scent in the entire place! The days we stayed in Rotterdam were super rainy, so it was the ideal excuse to enjoy such a view with warm cup of tea. We found so easy to commute from Arie-Jan’s place to the center of the city, either by walking – around 15min or by bus (which you can take right in the front door).
We, definitely, will come back to Rotterdam and to Arie-Jan’s place! :)

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam. The appartement is very nice and has everything you need. the view from the appartment is stunning!! Arie-jan is a good host, very easy reach and always willing to answer all our questions. Thanks Arie Jan.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: We had such a nice time in Rotterdam. That was especially due to the fact that the hosts were so kind and made our arriving, stay and leaving very uncomplicated. The contact was perfect.  The View of the Apartment is unbelievable!!! We're coming back soon!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Very nice apartment with a beautiful view. We loved the window seat! Arie-Jan is a nice host, he was helpful and easy to contact.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Excellent place to stay for a visit to Rotterdam, in a beautifully decorated appartement with great view on the river. We hebben een goed verblijf gehad in het comfortabele en mooi opgeknapte en ingerichte appartement van Arie-Jan. Een bijzondere plek, met prachtig uitzicht op de Maas. Inrichting en uitzicht voegden een extra bijzonder tintje toe aan ons uitstapje vanuit Amsterdam naar Rotterdam. De beschrijving op de site klopt. Arie-Jan reageerde snel op onze berichten en vragen en de ontvangst was prima.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Cosy home, very nice view!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: All I can say that Arie and Jan have a beautiful home with very nice view. We had a lovely time staying and wanna say thanks!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Very welcoming hosts! Waiting for us to arrive and they were very helpful in advising us on tourist attractions and distances. We had their number to call if we had any difficulties... which we did not! Lovely home and grateful to have it to ourselves for my husbands birthday! The listing was exactly as described and we would definitely stay here agin! The view was spectacular and the apartment itself was walking distance to everything, but the airport which took a short a taxi ride! We loved it, thanks so much Manon & Arie-Jan for making our stay so enjoyable! Ann & Bob X

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: We loved the view of the city and river from the city! The apartment is unique and nicely decorated. Parking was easy and the host was available via message to answer questions promptly.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: The apartment was easy to find and enter (the host graciously giving me all the details) and it has a great view of the river. The interior is new and very nice (just like in the pictures).

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
The apartment is perfect, the view is extraordinary, well placed between the two sides of Rotterdam, 20 minutes by walk of everything.

PLUS : a free parking is in the front of the apartment.

Thanks Arie-Jan.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful, warm apartment on the second floor overlooking the Maas River.  Amazing nighttime views of Rotterdam through the picture windows and a great spot for early morning coffee at the window seat.  Walking distance from all the city has to offer...will stay again when in Rotterdam.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Wonderful spot, authentic and quiet. Good starting point to discover the city by feet.
Since the apartment is more a "loft" style without separate rooms, it is best suitable for couples.
The view allows you to stay at home on rainy days enjoying the "live-TV" Skyline of Rotterdam.
Arie-Jan was helpful from the first contact on, called me more than once to ask if anything is OK. Very friendly and caring.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Arie-Jan was a nice host and the Appartement is really beautiful. The balcony, which we did not expect, was a great addition for our group and the location at the Maas between Erasmusbrug & Williamsbrug is simply amazing.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Charming flat with an amazing view on the Rotterdam "skyline". Thanks !

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: All i can say that Arie is very nice and have a very cool home with a super view. Thank you so much for everything.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
This beautifully decorated home with a stunning view of the river was the perfect getaway.
Arie-Jan was lovely and extremely helpful from beginning to end.
The apartment is well situated as it is on a bus route and is walking distance to many of Rotterdam's attractions.
I would highly recommend this hidden gem as your next home away from home!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Great views! Super location. Very clean and tastefully decorated house. Arie-Jan was very good with the communication. Was a nice weekend away! I would happily recommend a stay at Arie-Jan and Manon's beautiful apartment!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: the view is nothing short of perfect and your home was very cosy. thank you for a very lovely sunday!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Arie-Jan went out of their way to help arrange my arrival. They were easily accessible and helped me find a local grocery store that was only 3 minutes walk away. Their home is beautiful with spectacular views.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Excellent view! Really nice bay-window to chill and stare at the river. Beautiful decoration and very charming layout. The location is very good as you can be at the city center in 10 minutes by bike or 20-25 minutes on foot. Only remark - it was not so clean.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Awesome view and all was perfect

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful apartment with an amazing view!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Very very nice place. It’s on an island in the river with excellent home decoration and amazing river view.
The hosts are very enthusiastic too! When we arrived at Rotterdam central station we had some trouble for the tickets. He directly called us to help, and willing to take us by car.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: This is a gorgeous authentic apartment with a beautiful view on the river. The amenities are good and the bed is very comfortable.  It’s in the city, yet in a quiet spot, away from the busy traffic. Arie-Jan and Manon were quick to respond and very welcoming.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Arie-Jan’s home is so gorgeous I didn’t want to leave while I stayed there! The place reminded me of an east coast beach cottage and I felt completely relaxed during my entire stay. I would recommend this place to anyone looking for a tranquil place to unwind with an amazing view!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Arie & Jan were very friendly and responsive throughout the process.
The apartment had great water views and was close to the center.
Check it out if you get a chance!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful apartment at the river bank. Stunning view and a lovely old ambience in this apartment with it stylish interior and wooden floors.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: This place is simply stunning. The view of the river is breathtaking and relaxing. The host was beyond awesome and I felt at home during my whole stay. I Highly recommend this amazing place. Thank you Manon and Arie-Jan you guys were awesome !

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful view to the city. Easy  parking in front of the building (for free) and a close distance to start a city tour by walk.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: The apartment is as described and like the pictures. The location is a 10-15 minute walk to shopping and night life. The view of the river however is marvellous and the neighbourhood friendly and quiet. Check in went smooth enough. I did not meet Arie-jan in person but he was attentive by calling upon our arrival. We had  a wonderful time and would stay again

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: My friend and I visited Rotterdam for the week, and were delighted with our stay! Absolutely lovely hosts, who respond to any questions very quickly, and are very happy to help with any issues you have at all. The main living area and bedroom are large, but other rooms are quite small. However this isn't really a problem, and the small space is utilised well. Would have been nice to have a lock on the back doors by the balcony, but other than that everything was great. The location is 10/10 too, it's the perfect spot if you're looking to travel round Rotterdam or any surrounding areas (we went to Amsterdam one day and The Hague another day - trains and other public transport is very easy to get to and navigate). Recommend this Airbnb wholeheartedly!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful apartment with fantastic views

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Location of this Airbnb is fantastic. A beautiful old Dutch style home and Views are magnificent. Quite area but close enough to get to everything. Although we didn’t use the bus, we noticed a regular bus service on our doorstep. We felt perfectly at home in this Airbnb and would definitely recommend it.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Amazing location! Great apartment with the best view of Rotterdam. Easily accessible! Free parking, quiet neighborhood with good restaurants down the street and a very convenient supermarket. Loved Koozies down the street for a late breakfast or lunch! Easy 15 min walk to Markthal or to the bike rental place. We rented bikes and for a few days and we left them downstairs without any problem.
The apartment has everything we needed to cook at home and it was very comfortable. Fast internet access and Arie- Jan was very prompt with his response and very accommodating. We spent 10 days in the apartment and it truly felt like home away from home.
The stairs coming up at steep but it was never a problem for us.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: amazing location with a view of the river and city

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: This space is beautiful and the view is absolutely amazing.  It has a cool rustic feel with old wood floors and high ceilings.  Communication was good, and the hot greeted us on arrival.  An area map was provided and it was an easy walk to Markthal and the Cool District.  We really enjoyed our stay and would definitely stay here again.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: This is an incredibly amazing place.  The view of the canal and the lights of the city  in the evening was particularly beautiful.  The decoration is very stylized and has all the amenities you need.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Amazing apartment with a great view, perfect location and a nice style!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Great view's, location and helpful host's

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: The apartment has an amazing view and is located on the peaceful island overlooking the river. It's very spacious and bigger than it seems in the pictures. It has all amenities you might need and the hosts are relaxed, flexible and friendly.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
We had a great stay in the apartment. It’s right next to the bus stop; which takes to to Rotterdam Blaak.
It was clean, spacious, cute balcony and the hosts were amazing.
Could really ask for anything more?!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: The apartment has an amazing view on the river. It one of a kind, really romantic and cozy. It’s a perfect choice for a romantic escape

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Beautiful view and great decoration

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Great place for a quiet romantic getaway! Lovely view over the river and very comfortable lounge to watch the world go by.
Not a huge amount of things on the island, but it's lovely and quiet with ample parking (although it was pretty busy when I arrived, I did find a parking spot fairly easily).
Arie-Jan had great communication and was there to greet me upon arrival and departure.

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: The apartment has fantastic views of the water, which are even better than they look in the photos! It is clean, well-equipped and fantastically spacious. It is located in a quiet and attractive neighbourhood but only a short walk across the bridge to the centre of Rotterdam. It's a brilliant base from which to enjoy all the interesting and trendy aspects of this wonderful city. You won't be disappointed!

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: We had a great stay in Rotterdam the apartment is lovely with amazing views across the water - you can watch the boats and barges all day. name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
Almost great experience.
I would like to thank Arie-Jan for his hospitality, he was always ready to help in any situation. The appartment is situated on the island in 10 minutes walk from the city center. Also there is a bus stop to the nearest train station almost in front of the door and that is really convenient especially when you have a heavy luggage. The area is quiet and green with a lot of birds singing and waking you in the morning :). The appartment is cutely decorated and offers a great view of Nieuwe Maas river and Willemsbrug bridge.
I must also mention some moments which could be important for some guests.
- The place is a bit dusty and filled with some old owner's staff (almost all secondary closets are full with clothes, newspapers etc).
- No noise insulation, you can hear even neighbour's speech.
- The wooden floor is creaky and needs renovation.
- Appartment is cold, especially in the bedroom (at least true for the beginning if May).

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments:
The real Rotterdam-Dutch Experience!!!
Because I lived 5 years in Rotterdam I know the city very well. I miss and love this city so much! Therefore, I was looking for an apartment that would give me the real Rotterdam-dutch experience. From the pictures I right away knew that Manon and Arie-Jan's place would meet my expectations and priorities. Once we arrived , we were amazed, because the interior was even more cozy and pretty than we expected.
I entered the apartment when it was already dark. Turned on the Christmas lights , sat down in the oriel window , enjoyed a glas of wine , took in the breath-taking view of Rotterdam by night and thought " Life is wonderful" 🤩
Here is a list of the things that made our stay so perfectly comfortable:
- Typical dutch apartment
- Amazing view
- Beautiful design/interior
- Perfect location: 15 min walk to city center, 2 min to Spar supermarket, close to high-way
- Easy and free parking
- Fast and easy check-in/out
- Fast, easy and friendly communication with Arie-Jan
- Suitable for 2-4 people; I travelled with a friend and my baby son
- Apartment has everything you need for a comfortable stay

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Quick response time. Great apartment. Best view of Rotterdam! ;)

name: Authentic, comfy appt with a stunning river-view
comments: Arie-Jan and Manon’s place looks exactly like the pictures. It is spacious, clean, stylish, and has a beautiful view. Although a bit outside of the city center, there was free parking right in front of the building and it was still within walking distance to the city. Arie-Jan provided great detail to make check in easy and responded quickly to any questions that we had. I would absolutely recommend staying here to anyone visiting Rotterdam! The only thing to note beforehand is that there are 2 flights of steep stairs leading to the apartment, so if you are traveling with young children or have mobility issues, accessing the apartment may be difficult.

name: Cute Room for Two in Amazing Historic Ship!
comments: Fantastic fantastic location....that part couldn't be better. The communication and greeting with the co-host couldn't have been more pleasant. If you like a groovy, eclectic decor from your hippy-maharishi days of the 60's, this place will definitely ring your wind chimes. The chosen decor, and sleeping on a mattress on the floor will further transport you back to those glory days of no-money, self indulgence, and free love.  To make your stay a full sensory experience, you will be treated to thick, rich aromatic indulgence of diesel fuel, motor oil, mold, and an overabundance of incense to mask and mix the flavors for your delight.  Note: this boat is a work in progress. All it needs is more work, and more progress....but as they do say......location location location....and in that department, this boat is hard to beat.

name: Cute Room for Two in Amazing Historic Ship!
comments:
The communication between us, prior to staying on the boat, was very helpful as we needed to drop our bags off a few hours earlier and there was absolutely no problem there. We were welcomed on to the Avontuur by Sanjula, Premala's co-host, she was extremely welcoming and made us feel at home instantly! Inside the residence, it is extremely beautiful, all throughout is the feeling of love and unity. The living room is spacious and full of interesting musical instruments and crystals. The bedroom which we stayed in was very cosy, much larger than the picture online and had a multitude of books from many genres to have a perusal of. At the back of the boat where the entrance for guests is, there is a massive meditation room which has a soft wool floor that is lovely to lounge around in. The very modernised bathroom, with plants, shells and gems from across the world makes you feel like your in the tropics when showering under the powerful shower. Overall, the inside of the boat is unbelievably spacious (It is literally humungous), very bright due to the sun roofs and is completely jammed with knowledge and culture from all corners of the globe. The large, comfy garden on top of the boat is lovely to chill in on a sunny day and again is a lot bigger than the pictures suggest. The location could not be any better, you are right in the centre of Rotterdam, minutes from most of the Cities main hotspots and there is a supermarket right outside.
Staying on the Avontuur was a truly empowering experience, Sanjula is such an incredible woman and the meaningful conversations that you sometimes immerse yourself into really stay with you. Me and Becky have both left the ship feeling invigorated and lifted, ready to move forward and progress within ourselves and out. Being in Premala's home isn't just a place to sleep and shower, it is an undeniably rewarding experience that we could not recommend any more highly If we tried!
We are already planning when we are coming back to visit this stunning ship, it's extraordinary and unique inhabitants and see the beautiful city of Rotterdam. :) :) :)

Als je aan het douchen bent kan de gastheer je bekijken vanuit de eetkamer wat niet zo leuk is voor de privacy. comments: we had a fantastic time. Premala is a kind and genuine host. His place his very special and has a calming, yet energetic feel. name: Cute Room for Two in Amazing Historic Ship!
comments:
I stayed for a full week on the Avontour and it was full of both relaxation and adventure.
I'm a pretty extreme introvert and was a little anxious about not having my own fully contained space, but I felt instantly at home thanks to the warm and welcoming hosts that Premala and Alexandra are.
They have created something truly special on this ship and it was the highlight of my time in Rotterdam (which in itself was a beautiful city to explore).

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's apartment was perfect for our weekend stay. Very convenient and with gorgeous views of the city. We felt right at home.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's flat was wonderful. Very central and close to everything. Amazing view from the living room which was very spacious. Tamar was very accommodating and helpful. We had a lovely stay.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Very comfortable and spacious apartment, perfect location for a weekend of enjoying Rotterdam city centre. Attractive views towards the south and high enough (11th) not to hear the street noise. Very nice shower and good beds. Only minor thing we missed was an iron and ironing board, but absolutely recommend renting this flat for your stay in Rotterdam!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Tamar is the best host...the Apartment was like the photo, Perfect .and the view just amazing.I can't say anything bad even if i want because everything was perfect . Recommend to everyone even to the most demanding
Thank you Tamar

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's apartment is just even better than the photos suggest. In a convenient spot and walking distance within all points of interest, great view, clean, tidy and fully equipped with everything one might need for a pleasant stay. She has been a great host being flexible and understanding with our check-in and check-out times fulfilling every need we had. An absolute recommendation!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar was a fantastic host. Really speedy replies to our questions, flexible about our check in time and full of great suggestions of things to do when we got there. The apartment was really clean and comfortable and has a fabulous view over the city. We had a great time in Rotterdam and would certainly stay with Tamar again.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This is a really nice apartment; it's spacious, bright, airy, and well-equipped. It's just a few minutes' walk from Rotterdam Central station, shops and restaurants. Tamar was a great host - both in person and when responding to messages. Definitely recommended.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Tamar was fantastic. She allowed us to check in early, which was a huge benefit as we were in town for a conference and it was wonderful to drop our bags before going to our meeting.

The apartment was huge (with a fantastic view!) and more than large enough for our party of 6. The kitchen is fully equipped and allowed us to make a full breakfast every morning before heading out.

Communication was a breeze via text and Tamar even allowed us to keep our bags at the flat an extra few hours so we could do some last minute sightseeing.

Overall, this was a great stay and I would highly recommend Tamar and her space for future stays.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar was a really good host. Our taxi driver had hard time relocating the building. Not only did she help the taxi driver, she also waited for us in the front of the house. The apartment is in a very good location, walking distance to pedestrian only shopping streets and markthall. Highly recommended.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment was exactly like the photos were showing, really pretty with a great view. The communication with Tamar was perfect: she replied quickly and was available for any further questions. The apartment is located right in the city center with everything in walking distance! We had a great time!!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great value.  We stayed here 7 nights to visit my wife’s brother.   Tamar was a responsive but unobtrusive hostess.  Advantages: great location (a few blocks to Central Station, 3 blocks to grocery store, close to many restaurants and shopping). Reasonable price. Quiet, spacious, hot shower, comfy beds, windows can open.  Full kitchen and washer and dryer.  No air conditioning but not needed as temperatures were 55 – 75 degrees Fahrenheit (13 – 24 celsius) in August.  Free wifi. Disadvantages: no closets to hang clothes.  Would return the next time we are in Rotterdam.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamars apartment was just great! Tamar let us check in earlier which was much appreciated and the apartment was clean, well organized and had a great view over the city. I will be back if I'm in Rotterdam again :-)

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great apartment in the heart of Rotterdam, with an impressive view. Tamar was very flexible for the check-in, which is always a plus.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Loved this apartment - the location was  fantastic, right next to the central station and easy walking distance to lots of lovely restaurants and shops.  Everything was spotlessly clean and Tamar was very helpful about check in times and leaving luggage after check out.  The apartment has great views across the city.  It was also useful to have the washing machine and dryer to use. We much preferred Rotterdam to Amsterdam - would recommend a trip to the Market Hall (lots of restaurants and street food stalls) and our children loved the zoo (one of the best we've been to). We will be back soon I hope!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar apartment is perfect: clean, spacious, very well located and with a stunning view!!! The communication with the host was very easy and she answered always very quickly. I highly rccomend this apartment.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This is a lovely modern flat with a fantastic view out over Rotterdam.  You could not get a better location close to the city centre and the train station.  The rooms are clean and comfortable, and the bathroom modern With a huge shower.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is excellent. Very well organised and amazing view from the wi dows . Everything was perfect. A very nice wellcome pack for breakfast and break times. Really very well equipped kitchen. Very clean. Very nice fornitures.  But a special remark to the owner, Tamar, who was absolutely nice and wellcoming.  She was also very helpful when we forgot the keys inside the apartment.....

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: It was the second time we stayed in this AirBnB and it was even better than last time. Excellent location, great view. Perfect place to both work and relax.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
- Very central and clean apartment
- Tamar is a friendly host - communication was perfect and the check-in as well
- Fantastic view over the city and easy accessible
- I recommend this apartment and would stay again.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Very convenience.walkable.nice view apartment.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Awesome place with stunning view. Excellent location down town within 2 minutes walking from Rotterdam Central Station. Silvia, Tamara's mother, received us warmly with a cup of coffee and a croissant! 100% recommend this place and for sure will be back!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is lovely. Spacious and clean with everything you need in it. A perfect city centre location to explore Rotterdam, with a great view. The host was very friendly and responsive. We'll certainly be back again!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This place is amazing! We stayed here for two nights over Easter weekend as a group of 5 girls and had a great time. Check in was really easy and Tamar was a great host. The location is spot on, you are literally a 2 minute walk from the train station and being on the 11th floor you have a lovely view across the city. The apartment is really spacious so as a group we didn't feel on top of each other, we would definitely return here on our next trip to Rotterdam!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Wonderful place !
Center of Rotterdam !
Nice view at 11 floor :)
Enjoy the city and the house.
Helpful and nice host !
Highly recommend

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Everything went well. The apartment is well located, clean, and with a nice view.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: absolutely wonderful place in the heart of Rotterdam, with amazing view over the city

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: A safe and secure, spacious apartment with great views over Rotterdam. Two minutes walk from Rotterdam Central Station. As it is located right in the middle of Rotterdam's beating heart, you may find it perhaps a tat noisy at times during the night. Just bring earplugs as you can't get a better situated AirBnB in the Port City. The owners are great communicators and made access to the apartment so easy.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This is the best Airbnb we have ever stayed in. Absolutely 5 star with a fantastic panoramic view of the city. It is less than a five minute walk from the central station and is slap-bang in the middle of the shopping/restauranting area. We can confidently recomend this place.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Apartment as described.  Photos accurate.  Tamar's mother met us at 11 am as agreed, so we could drop off luggage early.  Much appreciated. Location great. Easy walk (< 5mins.) from Railway Station. Many restaurants, supermarket, and other stores within mins. walk. "Grote Markt" very worthwhile visiting, about 15 min. walk, right near so called cube houses (one is open to visitors), and Old Harbor.  Apartment very spacious and quiet. Great 11th floor views.  Were there when it was unusually warm (~30 Celsius) which made the apartment a bit uncomfortable.  Overall, definitely recommend.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Clean, spacious and modern apartment with nice city view in an excellent location.  Responsive and friendly host.  Thank you, Tamar for hosting us.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar was very kind when we missed our train and ended up needing to check in at 23:00. She still personally met us at the flat and showed us around. Flat is on the 11th floor and you have great views. Clean, comfortable.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Beautiful and modern apartment, next to shops and restaurants. Great view and very comfortable.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's apartment is clean, specious and very comfortable and makes you feel at home. It is beautiful especially the big glass windows overlooking the Center of rotterdam. It has everyhthing you need. The location can't be better than that! It is in the heart of Rotterdam, and everything is within walking distance. Shops, restaurants, cafes, cinema, grocery stores, you name it. Tamar was on a holiday so her lovely mom welcomed us and showed us the apartment and suggested many nice places for us to go to which we did. She even helped us carry our huge luggage all the way from the car to the apartment. I would definately stay in Tamar's apartment again if I ever go back to Rotterdam. Thank you Tamar and mom for making our visit to rotterdam unforgettable.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The pictures look great - the apartment is even better !!! Fab views, amazing shower and superb location with lots of bars, restaurants and shops all in walking distance. If you book this place you will not be disappointed and just over the road (literally) from the station. Tamars mum works downstairs and was always at hand for any advice and recommendations. Loved Rotterdam - and the apartment was big plus.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Great location for a weekend in the city, with easy access to all sights, shopping and great restaurants. Tamar was very nice and patient with us as we had some delays on arrival. The apartment is perfectly adequate with all you would need for a weekend trip: nice hot shower, elevator to the 11th floor (with great views), near Albert Heijn and with a fully equipped kitchen. Was quiet, we only barely heard some neighbors upstairs, not at all noisy for the city-center location.
Parking is a bit tricky, we chose to park in the Schouwburgplein garage. Worth checking beforehand to get deals on parking as it really isn't cheap to park in Rotterdam.
Check-in was a breeze and check-out just as easy, thanks Tamar!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This is a fine, 2-bedroom apartment right across from the central train station, and adjacent to the de Doelen Centre where conferences are held and the orchestra plays. It’s on the 11th floor, so the views are very nice. It is a bit noisy at night from revelers and traffic outside. It is spacious, and decorated with good taste although a bit uninteresting (lots of bare wall space). The double bed could use a new mattress and the telephone shower was broken, but the rain shower head worked fine. All in all, very good deal for the money. Very close to shops and restaurants and bars. I recommend it!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Lovely modern flat with a marvellouz view.
Nice bathroom.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Awesome location, very close to the central station. The view from the appartment is beautiful, it's very clean and the beds are also very comfy.
I can recommend this accommodation.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's short narrative of her home barely does it justice! The view is incredible, only second to its location! Steps from Centraal station made her apartment in the best locale (transit, food, cocktails). Tamar, and her gracious mother Sylvia were 100% reliable, accommodating, and helpful to a pair of first-time Rotterdam travelers. The apartment was impeccably clean, unbelievably roomy, and beds were very, very comfortable. I'd like to keep her home a secret...But absolutely must share with future Rotterdam visitors. You must book! You will not be disappointed!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This flat was everything we hoped for. A really central location. Very comfortable and modern with great views. Warm and cosy. And extremely quiet with no disturbance from any neighbours. We would definitely recommend it to anyone planning to visit Rotterdam.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The appartement is very nice in the nicest area. Very clean an with te best view.  I would highly recommend Tamars place.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Nice apartment with a great view.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Huge apartment on the 11th floor. Great views. Tamar was a very nice host. Everything was as expected. Highly recommended.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay in the modern Rotterdam.
Tamar was very responsive and helpful before and during our stay. The house itself is very clean, spacious and fully equipped. Located on a high floor of the building, you can also get a beautiful view of the city from the windows of the apartment. The location of the apartment is really great, very central and close to all the attractions, popular restaurants and bars.
Overall, we had chill and pleasant stay in this city and will definitely be back to explore more!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: It’s a very spacious, clean, well-equipped apartment with a great view and location. It’s very close to central station and most of attractions in Rotterdam. Tamar is very nice and respond quickly. We had wonderful stay in Tamar’s apartment. Definitely recommend!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
The appartment is very good, beautiful view, close to the Central Station, restaurants, shopping area and supermarket.
Tamar was very friendly and all questions were answered quickly.
We were in 4 adults and one children of 5years old and the appartment was perfect, with all itens necessary to stay comfortably.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We enjoyed our stay. Very nice apartment: spacious, clean and well equipped. It's close to the central station and the center of Rotterdam. We loved the view on the city!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: First class. Amazing flat - the best view of the Rotterdam skyline. Great communication with the host.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We were two couples that stayed at Tamar's property and we found it to be very comfortable.  The views from the 11th floor were stunning.  We did day trips to Delft and Kinderdijk and this property is so close to Central Station, it made it very easy.  The place itself was nicely laid out with enough room for the four of us to relax.  We would definitely stay there again!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This place is sooooo Awesome! The view, the location right next to Rotterdam central train station, the Gallery Kitchen food was all so amazing!! We were all so happy staying at this fabulous place! Modern contemporary apartment with such a phenomenal view! Highly recommend! The hosts are the BEST too!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Really beautiful apartment at the eleventh floor with amazing view of the city. It’s centrally located in a cool and safe zone plenty of shops and restaurants. Tamar was a perfect host! Surely we’ll back again!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: A lovely spacious apartment with great city views. It was within 2 minutes of the central station which was ideal for us as we were using Rotterdam as a base for day visits to Utrecht, Delft and Leiden. The apartment was also quiet and clean. Tamar was  a delight to deal with. She was very friendly and easy to deal with. She replied promptly and was very flexible about check in and check out.  I would have no hesitation in recommending this place.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: It was just perfect arriving at Rotterdam Central. As Tamar was busy working her mother let us in and explained everything. It´s just as it is prescribed on Airbnb. Of course very clean and everything for a comfortable stay in Rotterdam. I especially loved the kitchen for cooking. What a view into the city. We slept well, it was very calm in the 11th floor. We hope to come back.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar's place is a stunner - a wall of windows overlooking Rotterdam from 15 stories up (11th floor plus intermediate floors).   Shower alone is worth the trip overseas!  Biggest best one I ever had in an airbnb.  Host was great, location was perfect right across from our conference site.  Fast wifi.  Easy walk from the train station (and a big starbucks).

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
I’m so glad we rented Tamar’s condo; it looked spectacular on the Airbnb site but was even better in person. This was our first trip to Holland so we were a little nervous about the visit.
First of all, the location is perfect: It’s a quick 10 minute walk to the train station, 2 blocks to the grocery store, 1 block to a movie theater, and less than a block to many nice restaurants.
Second, the condo is newly remodeled and furnished with many thoughtful touches. There are lots of electrical outlets in every room and there were many extra items, such as toilet paper, trash bags, dishwasher detergent, shampoo, conditioner, laundry detergent, soaps, toothpaste, extra lightbulbs, extra towels, and more.
Next, the condo is clean and comfortable. The sofas and futon are comfy and the beds are extremely comfortable, for a good night’s sleep. The kitchen and bathrooms were clean, as well as the windows.
Last, Tamar is very sweet, thoughtful, and compassionate. I left behind a drawer of items and she immediately let me know and offered to send them to me.
I can’t wait to stay in the same condo when we return to Holland the next time!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is super central and very clean and bright. We didn’t spend a huge amount of time in it because we were visiting Rotterdam for a friend’s wedding but it had everything we needed. Tamar was a great host, she replied to my messages very quickly and she gave us a very good recommendation for breakfast. I would definitely recommend staying here if you’re looking for a super central base for exploring Rotterdam.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great views, and location, the perfect place for a city break in Rotterdam.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: There are so many positive reviews about Tamar's place! I don't think is necessary to write another one. If you are going to Rotterdam, look no further and book this amazing home!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
A neat and clean apartment with amazing view over the city.
Tamar is such a lovely host and always ready to provide extra information in regards to your travel.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar’s place is truly wonderful. The views from the apartment are spectacular and it is very well located to all the great must see sites in Rotterdam. Tamar was super efficient in responding and her mum met us for check in and she was an absolute delight!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Clean Flat with an Amazing view and a comfortable Bathroom. The Check-in/ Check out was very simple and Tamar was very friendly. The Communication was  good and we had a Great Time in Tamars Flat.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Perfect location to stay in Rotterdam, apt has a lovely view of the city. Its quite comfortable and spacious. Kitchen is fully equipped. The owner responded very quick to my queries.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great stay at Tamar's apartment.  Tamar was really helpful and let us drop off our bags early at the apartment as we had a very early flight.  Apartment is in a great location only a few minutes walk from Centraal Station.  Very spacious and clean with fab views over Rotterdam.  Would recommend this apartment!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We stayed in Tamar’s apartment for 3 weeks in May and June. The location of the apartment is outstanding, just 3 minutes walk from central station and thus very close to all the public transport. Shops, bars and cafes are all around in this very lively and safe area of Rotterdam. The apartment is spacious and clean, and well appointed. The furniture is new and makes the appartement feel like home. We cooked at home much of the time and the apartment has everything you need for that. There is a small Albert Heijn store just around the corner for daily shopping. There are ample towels and a washer and dryer. The views from the apartment are wonderful. All in al we really had a great stay and would return if we can.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This property was outstanding . It is great central  location to visit the Hague , Amsterdam or Kinderdijk Windmills.  Also, it is right  in the middle of downtown Rotterdam across the street from the train station and right in the middle of the restaurant and shopping district

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: A nice apartment in a great location with an amazing view. Spacious and clean but felt quite impersonal. If you’re after a pen or a deck of cards you’ll be out of luck! There was everything one would need but for the price of the apartment a little milk etc would have been a nice touch, as often provided by air b&b hosts. Quite noisy for the 11th floor, you can hear loud music and shouting from the street. Certainly not a  bad place to stay but have stayed in better.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Great flat with a view, spacious and clean. Close to Rotterdam Centraal and walking distance to most places we went.
Thanks to Tamar and her family for their help and hospitality. We'd love to come back anytime

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great position, spacey&bright

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is located in the center of activity in Rotterdam with easy access to good public transportation.  The apartment is large and accurately portrayed in the photographs.  There is an AH store close by if you want to cook, but, if you choose not to cook, many restaurants are steps away.  It was nice to have an option to do some laundry with washer/dryer in the apartment.  The security in the building is good and we felt safe staying there even though its in a big city.   The view from the apartment is wonderful.  It could be hot in the summertime as there is no air conditioning but fans are provided.  Tamar is very helpful.   We had to check out by 11 a.m. so that the apartment could be cleaned for incoming guests, but Tamar offered that we could store our luggage at her family's nearby restaurant so we could do some more site seeing in Rotterdam before we had to leave that day.  We took that opportunity to go on the Spido boat cruise tour of the harbor which was well worth the time.  Tamar is easy to reach and very responsive.  Jennifer

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Fantastic location, very convenient. Clean and very nice. Amazing views!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
If you look for a place where to stay in Rotterdam, look no further: Tamar’s apartment is the perfect find!
The flat is very spacious, lots of light, clean and with a great view.
The location is also great as it’s close to all main attractions.
Last but not least, Tamar is a fantastic host: she’s very fast in answering and really helpful and welcoming at check-in :)

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Spacious and well-designed apartment with amazing views. Great location.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We greatly enjoyed staying in Tamar's appartment. The location is excellent (nice view!), the appartment is very clean and had everything we needed. Would definitely stay here again!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
We enjoy the stay, great place and good view.
We ll come back.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Very clean, beautiful view, couldn't be more central. Totally recommended!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar is a perfect host, with great care for her guests, ready to help and adjust to their needs. Due to the very bad weather conditions our plane was late one day, during which we have had up to date communication with Tamar, she was taking care that we get best conditions upon our new scheduled arrival. The apartment If fantastic with super location and great view.  Clean,  with all needed amenities for enjoyable stay. For sure will be there for the next travel to Rotterdam.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment has a really great location, close to stores, restaurants and central station. I only have to walk to go to these places. The apartment was clean, well equipped and nice decorations. I was staying with my whole family and we had a really great time staying at Tamar’s apartment. It has a great views too of the city. I would go back again someday

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: A fantastic beautiful apartment in the heart of the city. Only a few steps away from the main station and the city centre, so perfect for every kind of trip.  All was very clean and spacious, great view from the 11th floor over the city. Tamar is a lovely host with all the tips you need and replies immediately, if there are questions. Totally recommended!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Nice view and apartment but keep in mind it is more for 4 people then 6

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar responds very professionally and fast. Her mother checked me in and gave me the best useful tips for me to get around town for work. The place was spotless, fully equipped, and had one of the best views of the city R'dam. I will be returning very soon!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Very nice hosts and extremely well located apartment. You can reach everything by walking. At night a dream view of the city. Very nice hosts - highly recommended!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
The location, view, bathroom and the spacious and bright livingroom are a few things we enjoyed the most.
Wifi connection was good enough for streaming and normal surfing.
However, if coming by car, be ready for some really expensive parking, typical for Rotterdam centrum (4eur/hour or 30eur/day). There are better alternatives outside the city center. If you have more luggage, there is also an option to park at the Central Plaza(underground) and go straight from the underground parking to the apartment.
Overall we absolutely loved Tamar's place and we're looking forward too seeing more fireworks from this nice apartment.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
The whole city at a glance, what a view!
But bring some earplugs for comfortable sleep as there is a nightclub down below.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
Great apartment, exactly as the photos show it, in a very central location near to all public transport, restaurants, bars, shops. Wonderful view of the city especially at night.
Tamar was very easy to deal with.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great space with an open floor plan and plenty of space for several people to unwind after a day walking around the city. Large dining table for an at home meal or evening games. Very easy walk to the main areas of the city, and great view. The washer and dryer are a nice to have feature to minimize the amount of clothes needed on a multi-week trip.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We stayed just two nights at Tamar’s 11th floor flat and it was great. The view of the city, the cleanliness, the decorations and the warm warm were all added bonuses. We were welcomed and shown around by Tamar’s mom, and she is lovely. The flat was a few minutes from the central train station and basically everything else you need. It was spacious and fully stocked with kitchen appliances, cooking supplies and bathroom supplies. We had a really nice stay and would highly recommend.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is in a perfect location to get to know Rotterdam. You can reach the whole city by foot and most things are more or less right in front of your door. The view is also amazing.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Wonderful hosts, perfect location and a great view at the heart of Rotterdam

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: We had a wonderful stay with Tamar. Check-in was easy, and we were able to check-in early and were given the opportunity to leave late. Tamar answered questions we had during our stay. The view is incredible, there was plenty of room, everything was clean, and the location is pefect. It's great to have a washer and dryer onsite.  I would absolutely recommend this place to anyone looking for an apartment near Central Station (VERY near to Central Station--a 3-minute walk). Seriously, this was a wonderful place.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Tamar’s apartment was perfect for us.  Everything clean and modern and a great location short walking distance to central station trams/trains/ buses and many restaurants and shops.  Also the view of the city from the 11th floor with large windows was spectacular.  This apartment is absolutely perfect for a couple or a couple with small children.   Because only one bathroom and one closet I would not recommend for two couples.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
great location.
easy access.
great host.
great view.

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments: Great warm and spacious place with views over the city

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
We rented this flat because it was very child-friendly. Besides that it has a wonderful view of the city. My kids were amazed by the skyline! The flat was very clean and had everything we needed.
The flat is very well located: one can walk almost everywhere or take the public transport very easily. Since it is in the heart of the city, it can be pretty noisy at night, but it gets quiet around 23h.
I can highly recommend this flat for families!

name: Apartment city centre Rotterdam
comments:
The check-in went well - we were met by the owner and she took us through the flat.
It was clean and comfortable, well situated in the city center , the view on the city is amazing.
We liked it very much and enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam.

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Hostel was easy to find from the main station, even though I was only in the city for one night I felt very at home very quickly. Rooms were large and warm with comfortable beds and the downstairs area was lovely too. Highlight was having dinner with all the guests, food served was excellent and it was a lovely way to get to know everyone. Would stay here again in a heartbeat!

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: A lovely and very chilled hostel with a great communal area. Perfect location next to the station on a quiet residential street.

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: We really like here,everyone is kindly,everything is interesting,the room is clean and bright.feel like home here,and I believe I'll be back

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Hostel Ani & Haakien was one of the best hostels I've stayed at so far. The value for money alone is fantastic as well as the atmosphere and friendliness of staff and those that are staying. They keep you up to date with the goings on of rotterdam and give you the finer details if you ask which I greatly appreciated. They also have the most beautiful cat but good luck getting to stroke it. There is also a small garden to sit and relax and chat with people. The rooms themselves are bright, clean and comfortable. You're provided with a locker and the toilets/showers are very nice. The kitchen facilities are great and really alllow you to make what you want or just to grab breakfast in the morning. I only stayed one night but I will definitely swing by to stay again.

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments:
The location is only a stone's throw away from the main station. The hostel has great service, the staff absolutely classic, very obliging and has the overview and it is cheap. If you want to walk to the center it takes about 10-15 minutes, but there is also a tram nearby. There is a lot to discover in the surrounding area and so I walked a lot.
I found the atmosphere very friendly and inviting, it never got boring because there was a program from the hostel itself like e.g. game night, movie night ect.it is also often sung and music played which I found very pleasant.
There is a large, open kitchen - which invites practically everyone to cook and eat together.
and there's a beautiful and fluffy hostel cat :)

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Great stay was slightly inconvenient that the plugs are in the lockers not on the wall next to the bed

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Place wasn't too far from the train station, so it was really easy to get around. City center is also close by which is a huge plus. Dealt with several delays with my flight which caused me to go past their hours of reception. I messaged them about my situation and they stayed a few extra hours until I arrived to make sure I was checked in. It was a gesture that was extremely appreciated after a whole day of traveling. Would stay again if I'm ever in the area.

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: I am a return visitor, so I don't think another review is necessary. I reccomend the hostel also for the vibes of the people in it

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments:
The place is close to Rotterdam central which makes access to different parts of Rotterdam easy.
The problem with the room was the noisy floor that made noise with each step

name: Bed in shared room in the center of Rotterdam
comments: well just stopped by to sleep,  calles the owner, fast reservation, all set, slept very well some guys slammed tbe dor at night but then everyone sleped and no noise, exactly what i needed to start my next day fresh and aware

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Arrived in Rotterdam in the morning after a slightly delayed flight, Ralf awaited to greet me- very kind! The bedroom and bathroom were very clean, a nice little space to relax and sleep. The rooftop deck is fun to be outside and watch the city. Very nice little coffee/tea pot and stocked mini-fridge in the room although didn't need to use fridge. Ralf and Rahmat both extremely helpful with directions and finding fun things in R-dam. They provided a little map which was very helpful! Go to Paddy's Irish Pub, and UEB coffee!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
