comments: A lovely and very clean room with a view in Rotterdam Centre, with great hosts Ralf & Rahmat. I got all the help I needed from them while there and also beforehand with really quick response times. All perfect and I can warmly recommend it!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The room is so clean, well equipped and perfectly situated! And this area is quite safe, quiet with the good restaurants  nearby. Especially you can enjoy a wonderful moment of warm sunshine  from the beautiful balcony. Ralf and Rahmat are the best hosts I 've ever met! They are so nice and offer us lots of useful advices. You can't miss the great "Dutch style breakfast" !  I adore this city,the windmills, the habour and almost everything. When I come back, of course this room will be my first choice! Many thanks!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat's house is beautiful and we had a fantastic time staying in it. It's on a nice quiet street, but in a really lively neighbourhood, and is walking distance from almost everywhere (and cycling distance from absolutely everywhere). The guest suite itself is very comfortable, spotlessly clean, and equipped with everything from listings magazines to coffee and stroopwaffels. Rahmat welcomed us warmly when we arrived, and both Ralf and Rahmat were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Thank you for everything!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Rahmat and Ralf were model hosts - patient with my indecision about timings, attentive, charming. The room was lovely with views of roof tops and trees and the sky turning darkest blue at dusk. And our afternoon on the roof terrace was delicious. We sat in the sun and ate cake and wanted the afternoon to go on for ever...

It's a great location too: a lovely green residential street, just one road back from the cafes, shops and restaurants of Nieuwe Binnenweg, and 10 minutes walk from Museumpark and the centre of town. And it's a tram ride from Het Hoofdkantoor and the best coffee in the Netherlands (thanks for the tip off Rahmet!)...

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Super host! Best Airbnb experience so far. The room is lovely with all the necessary facilities, we love the balcony with great view. Location is good and convenient, easy to go to markethal any cube house. The most important is Ralmaht and Ralf are very accommodating, they prepare welcoming drink and welcome signboard to us, we are so surprised! Highly recommended and will choose again if we visit Rotterdam next time

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Ralf and Rahmat were fantastic hosts. Great communication, and a beautiful room! We really enjoyed having a meal on the balcony.
It's 100% worth the walk upstairs. I would definitely stay here again :)

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Rahalf and Ranhmat are super host for sure! They are amazing and helpful. I really enjoy chatting with them. First night, I chatted with Rahalf holding a bottle of beer on the beautiful balcony! I love this experience! That's why I always choose Airbnb during travelling. And the room is awesome! There is everything you need in your seperate room, such as fridge. The design is wonderful!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
After traveling around around Europe for two weeks, we booked an Airbnb in Rotterdam, which was with Ralf and Rahmat. Not only were we picked up from Rotterdam Centraal Station by Rahmat, but when we had to leave to go to the airport at 5.30 in the morning, Ralf woke up just to call a taxi for us. Ralf and Rahmat were certainly very hospitable people who definitely cared for their guests' wellbeing.
The room was actually one level; consisting of a study room, extended balcony, and bedroom with a built-in bathroom. Their room made us feel at home with its cosy vibes and modern feel - we were initially surprised by the quality of the room. The room, which came with complimentary biscuits and purchasable drinks, was located approximately in the centre of Rotterdam, with many restaurants and tourist attractions just a few minute's walk away. The furniture and lights combined to create a very romantic atmosphere, and the privacy created by the room being the only one on it's level meant it felt ever the more like home.
This residence was probably the best we've ever stayed at and so even though we only stayed the night, we'd strongly recommend it to couples looking for a private getaway in the heart of Rotterdam or travellers looking for comfort and luxury without having to book a hotel.
Our only complaint was probably the stairs, as they were rather steep and we had a lot of luggage. However, if you do not mind having to climb three flights of winding stairs, then feel free to stay with Ralf and Rahmat.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat are two wonderful hosts and the room and upper floor of the house is excellent: clean, very well designed, with lovely furniture and even fresh flowers. Me and my best friend enjoyed our stay for one night in this beautiful oasis, the rooftop terrace and view is unique. the location very central. Ralf & Rahmat gave us a city map with interesting sights in Rotterdam highlighted and assisted in planning our city tour. They trusted us with the keys, prepared fresh lemonade and are two very welcoming hosts. 110% recommend!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat went out of their way to make us feel welcome and comfortable, from a personalized welcome sign on the door, to providing a vase for my flowers, to serving iced tea.  Rahmat kindly carried my heavy suitcase up the four steep flights of stars for me.  The place is as beautiful as it looks in the photos - perhaps even more so.  It is so well kept and sparkling clean with a lot of attention to detail. We highly recommend it.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We had a lovely stay at Ralf and Rahmats house. The upstairs room is decorated and furnished very lovely and tasteful and has all the amenities of a hotel room (like a minibar and free coffee). The view from the balcony is terrific. We didn't see Ralf and Rahmat often (we stayed during a work week), but they were always nice and helpful. If we visit Rotterdam again someday, this would be our Airbnb of choice.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
This is a fantastic place - even better than it looks in the photo! It is tucked into a cozy attic on the 5th floor, and very light, airy, and with wonderful views over the nearby rooftops of Rotterdam.
Ralf was a truly wonderful host. He did everything he could to make us feel welcome, and was so easy and pleasant to deal with.
We highly recommend staying here if you can.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
One of the best Airbnb place I've ever stayed. Definitely would recommend it to anyone. The place is cozy and clean. The host welcomes us with a pot of lovely green tea and small chat. Also tasted lovely home made pie. The room is very clean with hotel standards. The balcony is indeed a plus to ease the tiredness after a long day. I really feel that the host welcomed us as their "guests" instead of "customers" by trying to make things convenient and comfortable. There's a local supermarket and pharmacy nearby. Also a really nice Italian restaurant to have quick dinner with.
Thank you very much, Ralf & Rahmat

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
We had a wonderful stay in Ralf and Rahmat's home. They were both really lovely and welcoming. Ralf also gave us some good tips on getting around the city and places to eat.
The room was beautiful and put together very well. It had everything we needed during our stay, very clean and comfortable. The mattress was very comfortable, and the shower was also great. The neighborhood is quiet and not noisy at all. The location is also handy - about 10 minute walk from most major areas in Rotterdam or the water taxi at Euromast.
The house is also beautiful. It gives a good idea into typical Dutch houses. There are quite a few stairs to climb to get to the room but once you're up there the view from the terrace is beautiful.

We had a wonderful stay, one of the best Airbnb's we have stayed in and totally recommend it. Thanks Ralf and Rahmat.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat were nice and cooperative hosts. The checkin and checkout proceedure was very smooth. The place is at a great location, the room is big, bright and comfortable, and with a very nice bathroom. If staying in Rotterdam, I would suggest the place very much. Especially if you look for a lot of privacy even if you book only a room. The latter seems, in the case of Ralf's and Rahmant's place, more as a small apartment. The only setback might be the extremely steep stairs leading to the flat, but you are warned about them when booking and should manage them easily if you're in avarage shape.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Fantastic room, with fantastic hostes in super nice and central neighbourhood. Best homemade iced tea ever. Everything in the room is thought through to the last detail on the practical side as well as on the aesthetic side. You also have a balcony with a realy nice view on the city.
This room is a gem, go for it.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The house is beautiful and the room is really nice with a private bathroom that is a plus. You have lots of privacy as the top floor is entirely for guests. Lovely touches like free traditional biscuits, coffee and fresh flowers add to the great customer service. The hosts are very flexible to the needs of the guests. The area is also nice, the street is lovely and quiet. I walked to historical Delfshaven and to the museum areas within 10 minutes.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Highly recommend! This was one of the best experiences I ever had on airbnb. Firstof my boyfriend and I got a warming welcome from Rahmat with homemade Ice Tea and Stroopwafels and lots of information papers to explore Rotterdam. The room with the bathroom is as beautiful as it looks like on the pictures. It is clean and cozy, perfect for a weekend in Rotterdam. From Ralf & Rahmat we got a lot of privacy, which I really appreciate. And still if we had any questions they were pleased to help us. Thank you for a very good time in Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: My boyfriend and I met while studying in Rotterdam, so we wanted to go back  to that awesome city and nothing could have made our stay better than the amazing guest room Ralf and Rahmat are offering and their warm welcome. That room has everything you can look for: location, comforts and view. Unfortunately we didn't have the chance to meet Rahmat, but Ralf was just lovely.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Very clean and well equipped, very central and easy access to the city, Ralf was very welcoming and gave us everything we needed. The room is comfortable, cute with great views and lots of storage space. We recommend!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Room: Incredible place and great value for money. Now my 12th Air B&B experience and this comes close to being the best ever. Bueatuful room - beautifully decorated and appointed. Very quiet room on tope floor of a lovely house. No street noise at all - great nights sleep on lovely bed. Good sized shower room. Nice coffee and tea available with a stocked minibar. They are such nice hosts - very gracious. I was welcomed with a beautiful jug of iced tea and waffles. Only downside was stairs -lots of them - bt the host was a perfect gentleman and carried my bag up to the top floor. There is an incredible deck to use with views of Erasmus Medical Centre.
Location: Only 4 minutes on foot from Claes de Vrieslan tram stop or 9 minutes from Digzigt subway stop. Terrific location - and most places you would want to go are only 3 or 4 stops by subway. The main street Claes de Vrieslan has a ton of great cafes and bars with next to no chain places. You'll be hard pressed to find a tacky Starbucks or chain restaurant in the neighbourhood. I felt perfectly safe the entire time - even walking around late at night. There are amenities shops within a few minutes walk - including high end health food supermarkets and beautifully designed coffee shops and cafes. They take their coffee ad cakes seriously in The Netherlands.
Value: This was a stunning room in a great house. The entire three night stay was the same as 1 night in a similar specification of hotel room.
Loved staying there and will use again in the future.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
We had such a nice stay at Ralf & Rahmat's apartment and felt so warmly welcome. The furnishing of our room was beautiful, the roof terrace was such a nice place to enjoy the view over the city and the hosts were so friendly.
I would recommend this apartment to everyone who wants a great stay in Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Many thanx to Ralf &Rahmat!!
Staying at their place was soooo nice and comfortable and soooo clean!! If there's a chance to come again at Rotterdam it's will be great to visit again:) Rooftop view was so nice and so quiet. Of course location was perfect to go everywhere in Rotterdam.
Thanx again to the host!!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat are fantastic hosts. The room is lovely, very comfortable and clean with a lovely balcony. Great location - quiet yet very central. Highly recommended and thank you very much guys!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat have been very kind and helpful. The house is exactly like in the pictures, bright, clean and cozy. The street is quiet and in the neighborhood there are lots of cafè and restaurants. The house is 10 minutes walk from the city centre. I really suggest it!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf is a fantastic host, he was extremely welcoming to us. The room is lovely, very comfortable, clean with a lovely balcony. Great location, very central. Highly recommended

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Wonderful stay here! Nice traditional style building with a great private room and balcony for yourself. Extremely clean and the area itself was really nice (local cafes and shops) and only a 15 minute walk (or short tram) to the centre of Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Our stay in Rotterdam was just perfect!
The contact in advance with Ralf & Rahmat was easy and friendly and they always answered our messages within one hour. They're both extremely friendly people and always help you as good as they can when you need anything. If not, they will just leave you your privacy.
Arriving there we immediately felt like being home. As the room is located near the city center but still in a quite area we could explore the
city perfectly and then come home to relax.
The room is furnished in a modern style with lots of space to store​ all of your things. In addition to the nicely arranged room there are two more important things to name:
The first is the beautiful little bathroom which is very clean and a similar style as the room itself.
The second one is the amazing rooftop terrace where you can have your breakfast, enjoy a cup of tea, take a bath in the sun... with a stunning view of the whole neighbourhood.
To summarise our stay it's just left so say that is was amazing and when we're back in Rotterdam again we're definitely going to visit Ralf and Rahmat again!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We highly recommend this Airbnb and agree with the comments left by other reviewers about location, the room itself and the hosts. There has been great attention to detail to make for an excellent stay (such iced tea on arrival).

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat's place is cozy but not cramped, private, well put together, and offers a nice view of the city. We had a really lovely time at their place!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We had a great stay with Ralf & Rahmat: a bright, cozy room that has a top location, very friendly and thoughtful hosts and lots of privacy. Thank you for the delicious ice tea! We recommend a stay with you highly!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Es war ein super Aufenthalt! Ralf und Rahmat waren sehr freundlich und nett. Bei der Anreise gab es sogar leckere Limonade mit den holländischen Waffeln. Das Zimmer und Bad waren sauber und mit Liebe zum Detail eingerichtet. Die Treppe ist wie beschrieben sehr steil und wenn man große Koffer hat ist Vorsicht und Kraft gefordert. Die Dachterasse ist jedoch das absolute Highlight der Unterkunft. Die Aussicht ist traumhaft, vor allem abends. Im großen und ganzen war es ein super Zimmer, das ich jedem empfehlen kann.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Cute cosy room which we really enjoyed, especially the balcony outside. Rahmat helped us with our huge luggage cause the stairs are really narrow

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Wonderfull location very near the city center with a lot of local breakfast, lunch and restaurant. Also the view from the balkony was green and very nice.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: It‘s like staying in a hotel! Thanks a lot to Ralf and Rahmat for making us feel so comfortable. There is love in every detail, you can drink coffee on the balcony or just lay down in your own big room. We loved staying there and would always come back !!!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Cute Airbnb in Rotterdam, close to the centre and with a very nice terrasse on the balcony :-)

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Already looking great in the pictures, Ralf & Rahmat's place is even better in real life. It is so lovely and cosy and has an awesome view from the roof patio! The place is very convenient to go anywhere and also has some great local restaurants within walking distance. Ralf & Rahmat are super nice and easy to communicate with. Surprisingly, they put my name on the door and prepared ice tea and cookies on my arrival, making me felt like a VIP guest. Couldn't recommend more!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The location is great in which only 10mins if you ride on a tram from Centraal Station. The hosts are amazing that they greeted us a with a very warm welcome. Room is spacious and there is a large balcony. Everything is super clean and nothing is unsatisfactory. Value for it!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: I would definitely recommend Ralf and Rahmat’s place. It is a very warm and cozy flat with thoughtful touches. They are also very understanding hosts who let me check out a bit later because of my late flight.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat have a beautiful home, and although you travel through their areas to your own room, there's plenty of privacy up on the top floor. We found the accommodation stylish and well located and thought the personal touches of our name on the door, plus the complimentary ice tea and stroopwaffels a delight. Both Ralf and Rahmat were lovely and made us feel very comfortable in their home. We would definitely recommend this accommodation to others.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay at Ralf & Rahmats place. Very good location, nice area around and you can walk into the city centre in about 15-20 minutes with nice shops/cafés on your way to the centre.
Ralf & Rahmats place is very nice and cosy, you have everything you need & the roof-deck is just perfect for having your morning café or tea or a glass of wine in the evening.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We had a pleasant stay at Ralf & Rahmat's. The room is located in a quiet area, on the top floor (so you have to go through the kitchen and living room floor to access it) with a nice view. We felt at home and enjoyed the little treats left by Ralf. Very well located, particularly clean. We highly recommend it!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat's place was fantastic for our weekend in Rotterdam. It is on a nice street and very near the metro stop. There are plenty of cafes and restaurants within walking distance. The room was beautiful, quiet, and clean. We loved the bright space and sitting outside in the sun on the balcony. When we arrived they had ice tea and cookies waiting for us, and on another evening we were treated to some cake. Would definitely recommend this Airbnb to other guests looking to stay in Rotterdam.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Dear Ralf and Rahmat, we had a wonderful stay at your apartment and appreciate your warm welcome with cookies and lemomade. The apartment is well located, we really liked the attic, its design and the large terrasse/balcony. We definitely recommend it and would love to come back!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Ralf & Rahmats appartment is around the corner from the main street leading into the shopping district of the city. There are 3 coffeshops next door and a lot of shopping and food possibilities 5 min away.
We personally loved looking at the city with the bikes you can rent from them and enjoyed our stay very much.
But we wouldn't recommend staying here if you have a lot of heavy luggage or can't climb steep steps, because the stairs to the top floor are very adventurous.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: 10 out of 5 stars..,-)   The perfect location for a city trip to Rotterdam.  Welcoming  hosts, very well equipped little appartment under the roof, lots of privacy & pure luxury to be allowed to use the roof garden. Thx R&R - hope to stay with you again!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat are great hosts and have a wonderful house. The room is on the top floor and is very private. There is a balcony close to the room with a cool view, which is a very nice bonus. I highly recommend staying at their place.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat were excellent communicating and gave all the necessary details. The house is in a very pretty area of Rotterdam and close to many of the attractions. It is a really stunning place with a very comfortable room, a terrace with brilliant views, and all perfectly clean. Little touches like our names on the door made it seem special and the guys were really friendly and helpful with suggestions. I would love to go back!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We stayed for two nights but now wishing we could have stayed more! The house is beautiful, has a big balcony and the room enjoys a lot of privacy. Extras travel guides with recommendations and bikes and little personalised welcome notes! Thank you Ralf and Rahmat for letting us stay in your beautiful house!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Beautifully Arty, creative Space, worth every step up for the stunning views.  Clean and Spacious with incredible Hosts.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat’s place is great. The room is so clean and seemed a bit bigger than pictured here. It’s stylish and has everything you need for a short or medium stay. It’s in an amazing location, no more than 20 minutes from shops, cinemas and cool food markets. You also have complete access to a balcony which is lovely to sit on in the mornings (if not too cold!) thanks guys for a great stay, will come back for the next IFFR film festival!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmats place was exactly as described in the description and in the reviews. Super friendly and welcoming hosts. A lovely, clean, modern place, with everything you need. Much more than you would expect for this price at this location. Really nothing to add.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat's apartment really is something! A tidy bathroom, a little fridge and huge bed are just some of the comforts you will have. The service was very good too. Checkin and Checkout were uncomplicated and my girlfriend and I had our privacy. Can definitely recommend this place if you are in Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The roof studio with balcony is wonderful, as is the hospitality of Ralph and Rahmat. Rahmat welcomed me with ice tea on the roof and cookies. There is also a very convenient koffiemachine in the room and a fridge with some drinks. Do mind you - there is no kitchen. But food you can get outside at the shopping street.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
It was a pleasure to stay at Ralf & Rahmats Place. A very warm welcome was prepared from Ralf and we had our own space directly under the roof, what was such an amazing view over the whole city.
Absolutely recommended!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: really lovely an wonderful place, great view and perfect hosts! top recommendation!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Das AirBnB von Ralf & Rahmat ist in einem super Zustand und befindet sich in einer guten Lage in Rotterdam. Die beiden sind sehr freundlich und aufgeschlossen, sodass die Kommunikation toll funktionierte. Besonderes Highlight der Unterkunft ist auf jeden Fall die Dachterasse, auf der man beispielsweise morgens nett frühstücken kann. Auch der Rest ist sehr schön eingerichtet - es lohnt sich auf jeden Fall, zu den beiden zu kommen.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Nice spacious room and dito shower area.
Though your privacy is limited as you are passing through shared areas, the room is making it all up.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Super clean, comfortable, and spacious room with kind and welcoming hosts. The location is superb and in walking distance to several unique districts in Rotterdam. As I stayed here to be close to my university (and study as much as possible) I loved the little desk. It was situated right by the window, so plenty of daylight. Ralf and Rahmat very kindly welcomed me into their home and thoughtfully asked whether I had everything I needed. It felt like I had a little studio to myself.(note: no kitchen, didn't mis it, but the fridge was nice) The readily availablity of coffee and tea was the icing on the cake. Did I mention the super comfortable bed and nice hot shower already? (oh and the books about Rotterdam/the Netherlands should you be keen to sort your tourist-travel-plan) Well as a solo traveler: I can highly recommend it to other solo travelers. I felt very comfortable and welcome. Thanks again Ralf and Rahmat!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Well situated, a nice place and very friendly hosts !
For a short stay ideal, for longer periods it might be a little small, cause there is no kitchen and not so much privacy.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Wonderful stay at a very good location, nice area, near to center, museums, the jazz club "Dizzy", buses, trams and underground.
Very nice, welcoming and helpful hosts! The room is nice, light and clean with a good bathroom, espresso machine and refrigerator. Nice terrace at good weather.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf and Rahmat were really great hosts. Very hospitable and helpful. The location of the apartment is great, super close to the center of the city. The room was very clean and large. Amazing terrace with view.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ein sehr schön eingerichtetes Zimmer und sehr nette Gastgeber. Besonderes Highlight ist die sonnige Dachterasse, die zum gemütlichen Verweilen einlädt. Auch die Lage ist super, man ist in wenigen Minuten zu Fuß in der Innenstadt und bei den meisten Sehenswürdigkeiten der Stadt. Wir wurden von den Gastgebern sehr freundlich empfangen. Bei Fragen oder Wünschen konnte man sich immer bei  ihnen melden👍

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Pleasant stay.
The hosts are welcoming and nice.
The room is as described, clean and spacious.
Good location and nice street.
Thanks you for hosting people at your home and let them have a nice experience

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Ralf and Rahmat's place is a real gem. Located on a perfect quiet street near enough to everything. These guys are a bit of what makes Rotterdam great!
The apartment is ideal for a short stay and if you are lucky they might make you the finest ice tea ever!!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Beautiful and fully equipped room on the 4th floor of a traditional & lovely Dutch house :) was really thankful for the quaint room along with the stroopwafels (sorry they are finished!) and the refreshing welcome drink (mint & orange)
Ralf & Rahmat were v friendly & helpful in every way; would highlight recommend staying with them!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
This location is prime! Quiet and charming street yet close to public transportation. The room is also quite quaint, the bathroom was modern and the bed was very comfortable!
The host even helped me with some issues regarding the trains since I couldn't speak Dutch. Highly recommend this Airbnb!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Stayed here for two nights with my wife while visiting Rotterdam. Nothing but good things to say. Exactly as described. Would definitely recommend and would definitely stay here again!
Super cozy and clean. Ralf and Rahmat were very friendly and welcoming. Quiet street in a nice area of the city.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We had a very comfortable stay in this lovely room which was conveniently located in an amazing building. Super comfortable bed and polite, informative hosts. The stairs were a slight challenge with our big bags but gave us some much needed and overdue cardio. Would definitely recommend this stay!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The room was spacious, cozy and clean, with a private bathroom. Ralf was kind and accommodating, and warmly welcomed us with a fresh limonade and some biscuits. The appartement is located in a quiet and charming street, near to several tramway and bus lines so you can easily go to the centre. Recommended!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
I did not expect the place to be as beautiful as it was! The view from the rooftop was GORGEOUS. I spent an entire day out there.
Hosts were very friendly and kind! They provided with a lot! Very accommodating and hospitable. Wish I could have stayed longer

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We loved our stay with Ralf and Rahmat. It was a perfect, private little space for our stay in Rotterdam and we enjoyed the privacy that we were given. The check-in was extremely easy and we were greeted with a delicious refreshing drink which we very much appreciated on the hot day!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The hosts were very friendly and welcoming. The room was neat and cosy. There were very small things that weren't perfect off course (the fridge made some noise, the tv was very small,...) but overall a great accomondation close to the city center.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: We've never felt as welcome as with Ralf and Rahmat. The hosts are very welcoming, yet there is privacy. The space looks amazing, it's squeaky clean and really cozy and pleasant to be in.  Everything is as in the description and so much more. Next time we are in Rotterdam, we'll book it again for sure!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Es war ein total schöner Aufenthalt in Rotterdam bei Ralf und Rahmat. Die beiden waren schon im Voraus immer erreichbar und alles lief problemlos. Ich habe mich in dem Zimmer direkt wohlgefühlt, es war alles da, was ich brauchte; es ist praktisch und trotzdem gemütlich eingerichtet. Highlight war die tolle Dachterasse! Ich wäre am liebsten länger geblieben.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Great place to stay.
This is a really nice part of Rotterdam. So nice that one day I didn't leave the area.
Bed is so comfy.
Big ensuite.
Rahmat very helpful.
Just be prepared for the 4 flights of stairs.
This place was so good, I wish I was going back to Rotterdam just so I could stay there again!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat welcomed us really well! I highly recommend staying with them as hosts, as you will have your own floor and a balance of private space. They are also very friendly. The location of the house is very good, you can go to the center on foot (about 15-20 minutes). We personally never used public transportation while visiting the city. There is an open market and kiosks on the street in the location of the house. Apart from that the room was very clean! It was a really clean room that made us feel at home. Also the terrace is very nice (especially if it is not raining.) Thank you very much!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Excellent hosts and a great place for active travelers! Four flights of stairs was no big deal especially with the roof deck. Ralf and Rahmat were always friendly and had information at the ready for exploring Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat's place is exactly as listed. It was a short walk (15 minutes) from Centraal Station.  The neighborhood is very quiet, but close enough to restaurants and grocery stores. Upon arrival, we were greeted with a nice welcoming infused water and stroopwafels. The space was beautiful and the outdoor terrace was an added bonus. Make sure that you read the listing very carefully. You do have to walk up four flights of stairs, that are very steep and narrow, so make sure that you have minimal luggage (we had backpacks, which made it very easy to go up and down the stairs). I would recommend Ralf & Rahmat's place to anyone who is traveling to Rotterdam. Thanks, guys!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
If you want a comfy and quiet place in Rotterdam, I highly recommend Ralf & Rahmat's apartment!
I traveled for a conference and stayed there for 2 nights.
Ralf gave me a very warm welcome, showed me the apartment and even prepared some cookies and homemade lemonade for me!
Even though you have to pass through the living room to reach the last floor, privacy is 100% guaranteed. The room has all the comforts you need.
Ralf is such a kind and friendly person. I had a little problem with the WiFi and he immediately replied to my texted to help me.
If I will ever have to go to Rotterdam again, I will for sure stay at Ralf&Rahmat's again! :)

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
I had a really comfortable journey while I was staying at their house. Everything clear and tidy, the room got everything you needed. Towels,hair dryer,water boiler..
also the location is really close to the city, it’s easy to go anywhere with 15 mins by bike!
Ralf and Rahman are polite and friendly,and they offered a really privacy beautiful apartment to you.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Ralf & Rahmat’s apartment was a lovely place to stay.  It’s worth the climb up 4 flights of stairs to get to the spick and span attic.  Even though we arrived when the temperatures were in the mid 20s, it was not too hot as some attics are.  We had lovely weather throughout our stay, so made lots of use of the delightful terrace, eating breakfast out there and supping wine in the evening.  It was so peaceful - you wouldn’t believe you were just a half-hour walk away from central Rotterdam.  Our hosts were very helpful with local knowledge.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
I enjoyed a great time here in R&R’s house. It’s a transitional but modern Dutch house. Nice, pretty, bright, private and of course tidy. A warm room, a private bathroom, a beautiful terrace. It’s so relaxing and comfortable makes me feel like at home.
The location is great. It’s a quiet and safe block with a lot of cafes and restaurants just downstairs. And the most important, it’s very closed to all kinds of traffic tools! Best location for travelers who are interested in real citizens life.
The hosts R&R are amazing. They prepared everything for me. When I arrived at late night, they helped me with my suitcase and even offered me with the wonderful ice tea and cookies!
I hope I could stay longer here. Next time I will come back definitely!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: The location of the airbnb is great - there are many bus/tram stops nearby. The Central Train Station is 2 stops away with a tram, so it’s really comfortable if you want to visit other cities. The rooms is amazing - typical dutch room and there is a balcony where you can enjoy a view (if the weather is fine). And last, but not least - Ralf and Rahmat were incredibly nice with us. They made us a lemonade with cookies to make us feel welcomed, how nice that is. Also, the communication was very easy with them. I recommend this place 100 % and when i get back to Rotterdam someday, I will definitely choose it again.

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
Abbiamo soggiornato tre notti a casa di Ralf & Ramat, ci siamo sentite subito a casa. La stanza ha tutto quello che serve (ed è davvero molto bella e ben arredata) e la privacy è garantita al 100%. Ralf & Ramat sono degli host molto gentili, disponibili e amichevoli, siamo state benissimo a casa loro!
Ci hanno accolte con del thè e dei biscottini, ci siamo sentite davvero coccolate!
La posizione è eccezionale perché sì trova vicino alla metro e alla fermata del bus quindi è stato davvero semplice raggiungere tutto in breve tempo. Non vediamo l'ora di tornare! :)

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Cozy apartment with nice view in a central area. I absolutely recommend!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: Beautiful place to stay with a great view! Peaceful street, walkable to local transit. Ralf was very responsive and so generous upon arrival! Really cool Dutch house!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
My friend and I had a wonderful stay at Ralf and Rahmat’s place. The room was absolutely lovely—spotlessly clean, beautifully organized, and very comfortable. The neighborhood was also charming, full of nice restaurants and cafés, and within walking distance of major tourist attractions.
Ralf and Rahmat were fantastic hosts: very friendly and welcoming, yet respectful of our privacy and space, which made us feel completely at ease.
We would absolutely recommend this stay to anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments: This was my husband’s and my favorite place we stayed at during our 3 weeks of traveling through Europe. They were so kind, warm, and welcoming (and sent us helpful instructions on which tram to take to get to the house). We arrived on a very late train and they stayed us to let us in and brought mint tea and stroopwafels to our room. The place is clean and beautiful. Wonderful bathroom and it was such a treat to use the balcony when the sun came out. We wished we could’ve spent all three weeks in their cozy oasis. We would highly recommend staying here and would love to return!

name: En suite room in quite street@edge of city centre
comments:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We needed to rest but wanted to be in Rotterdam. The top floor location with access to the roof top garden were perfect for enjoying coffee and reading. The neighbouring back gardens made the location very peaceful, even in the middle of the city.
We were able to walk to the places we wanted to visit or get a tram. We were able to use the paid on street parking. Rahmat sorted it as soon as we arrived for the duration of our stay and we paid him - very helpful. We had taken careful note of the clear information about the stairs so had adjusted our luggage accordingly and it wasn't a problem. The stairs we worth it and the whole house is very stylish. Would definitely recommend a stay.

name: Cosy 1 person room in the city center of Rotterdam
comments: Mahmoud was a wonderful, kind and gracious host. He was friendly and caring, and we had nice (if all too brief!) conversations. I particularly appreciated the hot water bottle he left for me! The space is small and simple in a clean, peaceful apartment in a location near the city centre and has its own little balcony. It was perfect for a solo traveller on a short visit. I had a restful time there. Thank you so much Mahmoud!

name: Cosy 1 person room in the city center of Rotterdam
comments:
Het was een prettige ervaring met een mooie schone kamer met privacy. Het ligt centraal gelegen wat ook heel fijn was.
Mamhoud is een zeer betrouwbare en vriendelijke host.

name: Cosy 1 person room in the city center of Rotterdam
comments: Mahmoud is the best host i have ever stayed with. friendly and very very helpful to me at all times, although i only stayed for one night. staying with Mahmoud felt more like staying with an old friend. the place is also perfect, it even came with a little balcony where i had my breakfast. I cannot say enough good things about the place and about Mahmoud. 10/10 would recommend!

name: Cosy 1 person room in the city center of Rotterdam
comments: Mahmoud is a very likeable and hospitable guy. It's a really nice cosy little place, with a nice balcony attached to the room, great for when the weather is nice. And it was just a short walk around the corner to the nearest Metro station.

name: Spacious urban appartment in heart of Rotterdam
comments: I was not aware that stay at Rotterdam was going to be so nice because of this beautiful home. We loved everything about it, from the view to the accessibility to activities.

name: Spacious urban appartment in heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Liek's place is wonderful, ideal for a short trip to Rotterdam. About 20 minutes all from Rotterdam Central Train Station. Space is light, very well equipped, lovely balcony and lots of great house plants. Kitchen is amazing with coffee machine and soda stream. Apartment is very close to all of Rotterdam's highlights, but still nice and quite for a chilled stay.
Air BnB's seem quite pricey across Rotterdam and Amsterdam but still much better than staying in a hotel.

name: Spacious urban appartment in heart of Rotterdam
comments: We had a great time at Liek and Prim's appartment. Perfectly located nearby the animated Witte Straat, the appartment is calm, bright, decorated with great taste and well equipped. Liek is a welcoming and accommodating host. I recommand it!

name: Spacious urban appartment in heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location, very good place to stay. the kitchen is very well equipped and has everything to cook a great meal. The apartment is located in a calm street although central. One thing is that the apartment is on the third floor with no lift.

name: Spacious urban appartment in heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Great place to stay in Rotterdam. The location of the apartment is perfect, located in the middle of the city center, but located quietly in a side street. Some parking spots in front of the building available, Liek assists you with paying the parking fees.
The apartment is beautifully decorated, equipped with everything you need. It was very clean. Liek is very friendly and helps u with everything you need during your stay. Would highly recommend staying there.

name: Space & Comfort
comments:
Felik's apartment is great! It is very modern and comfortable at the same time, all the pieces are very space full. Great view from the kitchen. In there you'll find every cooking appliance you need! The bathroom is very beautiful and functional. Great bed. Everything looks great and works in the apartment. I highly recommend it! And Hugo, their cat is very kind also.
We really enjoyed the fact that there's a big and beautiful park nearby, 5 min walking. Great place if you like to run like us. The metro station is a bit faraway, 10 min walking. So as the nearest bakery and supermarket, about 10 min walking also. Once you get to the metro, the center of the city is about 4 or 5 metro stations away.
The friend that received us when we arrived were very very kind, he showed us all the apartment and gave us some tips of what to do in Rotterdam. Feliks also made us very comfortable in staying at his apartment. He left the internet password, and made sure that the parking was for free for our car. We really appreciated that.
The girl that came by when we were leaving the apparent was very kind also. She arrived earlier so that we wouldn't have to wait for her.
The only thing I would say is that the room where the cat does his needs and where he eats is kind smelly, which is normal for a cat.

name: Space & Comfort
comments: I chose Feliks' place to accommodate my parents and sister coming to visit me during the Christmas holidays. I could not have made a better choice! The apartment is very comfortable and clean, with a great view on water. I live in Kralingen, so it was perfect to have them closeby. My family loves animals and the friendly cat Hugo was the perfect addition to the place. Totally recommended!

name: Space & Comfort
comments: The apartment itself is really great, it has everything one could need. I was especially happy about the modern bathroom and kitchen. From the top balcony at the kitchen, you have a nice view across the little river with all the birds living there. And the area is just wonderful. The lake is only about 5 minutes of walking away and with a bike it only takes 10-15 minutes into the city center. I would recommend it to everyone who wants to have a relaxed stay but still wants to explore the inner city.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskars apartment really is what it says - Luxurious! It has everything you need and more (He had even put slippers next to the bed for us).
The place is light, spacious, stylish and super clean. Oskar is a really friendly person and communication with him was as smooth as it gets. He showed us the apartment and then left us to do our things. He has a very detailed infofolder, where you can find out everything you need to know about the apartment and the neighbourhood.
I give him five stars all over, and can without a doubt really reccomend his place. This is one of my top 3 Airbnb experiences!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar was a fantastic host - he offered to both pick me up and drop me off Rotterdam airport after a long and tiring trip from New York. The airbnb photos don't do it justice; it's especially lovely during the mornings, and is beautifully lit thanks to the sun-facing window panes in every room. Even the bathroom has a reassuring skylight, that's quite meditative, quite like a spa in fact. If you are needing to get a good's night's rest, it's a real treat as there is a skylight in the bedroom that shuts out daylight completely as well. Overall, my stay in Rotterdam was made all the more lovelier thanks to Oskar's hospitality and the quality of the space far exceeded expectations! Highly recommended.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar's apartment is absolutely amazing. Really clean, really nicely decorated. Bottle of wine for us on the table, nice outside area, really comfy bed, lots of nice light from the windows, great shower. Perfect! Would definitely stay again. And Oskar made it really easy to contact him and meet us and give us keys. Oh and great location too!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: We truly enjoyed our stay at Oskar's apartment. We liked the dynamic contrast between the historic building structure and the stylish modern interior design. The apartment is bright, well-kept, clean, and has all the amenities guests need for their stay. We loved the fact that we were welcomed with a bottle of delicious red wine. The apartment also featured a small coffee machine including capsules as well as several bottles of water. All this shows that Oskar is a very friendly and, above all, attentive host. He communicated in a very fast and reliable way and we always felt very welcome.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
A wonderful apartment in a great location. This place might contain the greatest shower I've ever used. Oskar helped us with our bags, had great restaurant recommendations, but otherwise gave us total privacy.
The design touches made to the apartment make it shine as a truly beautiful home.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: My sister and I spent some days in Oskar's apartment and we had a perfect time. The apartment is very nice and perfectly equipped and it also has the perfect size for 2 persons. We enjoyed the view over the roofs of Rotterdam in the evening. Everything was very clean and we liked the little welcome presents. The conversation with Oskar was very friendly and helpful. At our departing day he let us store our bags until the evening. Thanks a lot for the relaxing days and we would recommend his hospitality in any way!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Heel mooi en fijn appartement! Supernetjes verzorgd. De luxe van een hotel met de privacy van een eigen appartement! En dat midden in het centrum.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: The neighbourhood is really great, well located: not far from transport, museums, cafes, bars and shops, but peaceful and quite. The place is beautiful and relaxing, has a fireplace and nice lightning. Oskar is very hospitable, we had all we need: fresh towels, sleepers, water and a bottle of wine. Thanks for hosting us!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
The flat was greater than we expected. Even better than most hotel we have been. Nicely decorated, good luminosity. Good bed quality . Nobody can see you when you are on the balcony it s lovely. We were really well welcomed. Oskar is aware about our comfort and gave us nice tips about our trip in Rotterdam.
We will come back for sure !
Thanks 🙃

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Luxurious stay. Even though located at second floor, Oscar helped us to move our bags. Located at quiet street at busy area. 3 minutes walk to tram station and 10 minutes walk to Rotterdam central.Bright and clean apartment with all amenities. Spacious shower room with all toiletries.Plenty of towels and hand towels. Crisp and clean bed spreads. Excellent Wi fi. Highly recommended for any tourists.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Great host! Great flat with cute balcony and interesting art! Will be back and advise everyone to rent! :)

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Our stay at Oskar's apartment could not have been any better! The location was convenient to Rotterdam Central, allowing us to make easy day trips to Delft and The Hague. And when we weren't exploring, we were enjoying our time in this fantastic AirBnB - the bed was comfy, the view out the skylights was inspiring, and the shower was just amazing. The kitchen was also well-appointed for lazy nights in. Oskar and Jan gave us a fantastic tip on dining nearby (ask them about their fave Surinamese food for a real treat!) and they went out of their way to make us feel welcome, including giving us a chance to taste Dutch fish. Both Oskar's place and Rotterdam so exceeded our expectations that we're already wanting to return!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: A stylish flat with good taste all over the place. From the choice of furniture, lighting to the abundant of splendid decos. The inclined ceiling echoes with the clear blue/ starry sky to become scenic pictures above us every hour. Oskar is a super friendly and thoughtful host who is always ready to provide help. A small additional tip to reach the place: There is a tram station nearby, Kruisplein, which is perfect for guests to get literally everywhere. Even more convenient than metro.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
A stylish apartment, beautifully designed displaying impeccable taste. Very spacious , light and airy.
Oskar was an excellent host, after a lovely warm welcome we didn't see him again but we knew he was there for us if we needed anything
Previous reviewers have been most complimentary and ,trust me, you can believe them. Particularly loved the little roof garden...breakfast in the sun each morning...perfect. Everything was totally clean and nicely prepared for our arrival. Really classy shower room. Super fast wifi. I could go on singing the praises of this property all night but will sum it all up with one word....perfect.
Can't wait to return!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskar's apartment is lots of fun - great artwork, interesting books, light-filled well-designed space. The bed was probably the highlight - each side is adjustable with mood lighting and a skylight.
Location is great, on a quiet street but close to trams and everything.
We were hoping to utilise the fireplace but it was unseasonably warm so the air-con was a definite benefit. Would love to stay again, was our first time in Rotterdam (Oskar's local tips were helpful and he greeted us for check in/out and carried our luggage up the stairs!).

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: It is a luxurious apartment with sky view on the highest floor.  The fixings and furnishings are well designed.  Especially the bed is very comfortable.  It is very close to the centrum that it takes about ten minutes to the Central Station.  Many shops, restaurants and supermarkets are just situated around the corner.  Walking southwards, there are trendy shops found on the Nieuwe Binnenweg.  To the east, Meent, Cube House and Markthal are just in walking distance.  Don’t forget have a coffee at centre of the Het Park.  All in all, I’m most addicted to have a leisure stay in Oskar’s apartment and will come again.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskar’s apartment ticks all the boxes. The location is good, with just a short walk from the train station, and close to lots of great restaurants.
Oskar is super helpful, but also leaves you to get on with enjoying your stay. The apartment is bright and very clean, with everything you need if you want to cook at ‘home’. The bathroom is spacious and includes lots of shampoos, moisturiser, etc. The bed is electrically adjustable, and in the cold and wet weather we were grateful for the cosy feeling the gas fire gave. Thank you Oskar!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: My wife and I spent a week at Oskar’s and had a wonderful time! Everything was as it is in the pictures. Comfortable bed, lovely balcony, great fireplace and equipped kitchen. The location was great too- especially for taking the train for day trips! Thanks Oskar!!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
What an amazing place! Everything we could have wished for. The apartment was clean and beautifully designed throughout with all the latest technology! Very relaxing.
We loved the sunny balcony too!
The host Oskar was welcoming and friendly making check in and check out easy. He even kept our bags safe on the last day so we could enjoy the city more.
I'd recommend Oskar and his apartment whole heartedly.
Can't wait to return one day

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Could Rotterdam have a more perfect flat? Other reviewers have said it all, EXCEPT they haven't raved about this remarkable light and space. Allow me! You might not care, if you are out and about every day. But if you spend time "at home", you are in for a treat. What comfortable ambiance and precious quiet, even with true city centre convenience. Morning light floods in from the balcony. All afternoon and evening, light fills the large main room from multiple directions through the many skylights. The bedroom remains peacefully subdued with a screened skylight for slow wake-up at daybreak or daytime naps. Light gently reflected from every direction illuminates the artwork and comfortable furniture in the large main room. Skylights and balcony doors open to let in bird song and fresh air. When it's wet, you will appreciate the rhythmic rain on the skylight, while you are snug and dry. Put on the fire and relax. Privacy is complete, the table serves as a perfect work desk, if need be. The well-designed bath has heated floor and towel bars, also great laundry facilities. In-house meal preparation is easy in this functional kitchen. On top of it all, Oskar could not be more helpful and friendly. Enjoy his exceptional hospitality. Highly recommended.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Everything has already been said and I’m happy to share that it’s ALL true and then some. I stayed for 10 days and felt right at home, it was very hard to leave. Eating a home cooked meal on the patio while the sun was setting was a highlight. Likewise of all of the amazing amenities and thoughtfulness of the hosts. I am already plotting my return. Thank you, Oskar and Jan for letting this city girl discover Rotterdam (and Utrecht, Amsterdam, Brussels) for the first time in style. Cheers!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: If you have looked at the pictures of Oskar's apartment and read the positive reviews then you know that this is a stylish and clean apartment within easy reach of the train station and local transport. My wife and I really enjoyed our time at Oskar's and really appreciated that the apartment had proper champagne flutes (many places have crappy wine glasses) and most of the lights were on dimmers (something that we have not often experienced in other apartments). I did not use the TV to watch shows but was overjoyed to find that it had access to many radio stations. I would not hesitate to recommend the apartment.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskars place is wonderful and just as the pictures and descriptions say. It’s close to the train station with everything you need within close walking distance. Quiet street with minimal city noise despite being close to the station.
The place had what I needed, was very clean, and the balcony and sky lights were amazing in both sun and rain.
There was a fuse issue with the electricity but Oskar fixed it almost immediately! Thanks to Oskars responsiveness, it didn’t disrupt my stay at all and also can reassure future guests that even if something goes wrong unexpectedly, Oskar will fix it!
Would definitely highly recommend to all!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: This is a great choice for accommodation in central Rotterdam. Spacious and light, the apartment is well-appointed and tastefully decorated, with a balcony which has outdoor seating. It is on the top floor of a beautiful terraced house. The location is within easy walking distance to a variety of shops and restaurants, and public transport is close by. Oskar is an attentive and friendly host.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: This apartment is in the heart of the city, very close to the train station. The apartment was just like the pictures, everything was in great condition and very clean. We especially loved the little balcony. If we are ever in Rotterdam again, this is the place I am going to check first. 5/5

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Location is great, lots of food around. The apartment itself is pretty spacious with a nice balcony. Check in/out was a breeze. Bed/bedroom was very comfy!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar’s apartment is tranquil, light and beautifully decorated, a haven in the centre of town - and with its own balcony, which we really enjoyed in the evenings. I could not recommend this property more highly, and we will definitely be back!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Wish I could live in Oskar’s apartment. Very nicely decorated and super clean. Terrace is a wonderful addition especially as sun is on it for most of the day. The space is light and not overlooked. The shower room is nice and open and it was a joy to use. Speaking with Oskar was easy and I would definitely stay again.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: This is from my wife Agnes and I totally agree with her: “From one concept designer to another – Oscar, I see what you’ve done there and I applaud you! Cato Suite is a gem of an airbnb with a complimentary hotel experience. Comfy vintage leather chairs along with a lamp and glass coffee table provide for a nice little movie corner, whilst the arranged hotel amenities in the bathroom and everything one may need in a kitchen will come handy for any traveller. The bedroom, the little wine bottles ready for your arrival and even the ‘reception’ space decorated with vibey artworks in the staircase – every bit of it tells a story that one traveller (Oscar) wishes to pass to another.” Thank you, we will return.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Great place in Central Rotterdam
Close to all nice places and to central station
Appartement is great, lots of light and place
Communication was very easy
Would certainly come back

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: The apartment was superb. Everything was like in the photos. The bed is big and confortable, the bathroom amazing with a pair of speakers integrated, the kitchen full equiped, a lot of natural light, and the check-in and check-out super easy. Simply fantastic.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskar is a great host with some very helpful recommendations.
Very helpful to accommodate our slightly early check in time and was very friendly when we met.
The apartment is very nice and cosy, perfect for our stay.
Thank you very much Oskar!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: A great few nights on a peaceful road in a perfect location. Stylish flat, lovely balcony, great shower and friendly hosts. Oskar and Jan pulled out all the stops to make us feel at home and it was very much appreciated.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
There are many apartments on AirBnB that advertise themselves as "luxurious", but often enough this translates into a slick and soulless interior, made of cheap materials that fool the observer only upon the first glance, betraying the fact that they were built for rent.
This apartment however, is very different. It's probably better that I not spoil the nice details that you will discover should you decide to stay, but let me mention the tasteful, unobtrusive lightning that makes this penthouse apartment even cozier than the pictures suggest.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
The apartment is conveniently located close to the train station; great for day trips in and out of Rotterdam. The neighborhood seems to be transitioning into a better environment; there was a mix of good restaurants and questionable bars along the two main avenues on either side of the apartment; focus on Nieuwe Binninweg rather than West-Kruiskade for local services.
The first thing to be aware of regarding the apartment is that access is by a two story narrow and slightly steep stair case. Oskar met us at the door and very graciously carried my wife’s suitcase (and offered to take mine as well!}. He briefly reviewed some of the relevant operations for the fixtures—very helpful especially for using the skylights in the bath and bedroom. There is a lot of travel information in the apartment. The kitchen is adequate for short stays.
We also met Jan one morning. They both are very pleasant and likable, and we enjoyed our conversation with them. We would return again.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar’s place was lovely, a very short walk to Rotterdam Centraal. Loved the openness of the space due to the skylights

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Fabulous apartment in central location. Spotlessly clean and very well provided for. The balcony area was a real bonus too given the lovely weather during our stay. The hosts were also incredibly kind and accommodated a late arrival due to our delayed flight

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
A wonderful apartment close to central station & walking distance to cafes & restaurants.
The apartment is light and spacious with a little outdoor patio.
Air conditioning was welcome for the warm summer nights.
Super comfy bed.
Oskar & Jan were fantastic hosts- we received a warm welcome & they were very responsive to any questions we had.
The little bottles of wine on arrival were most appreciated.
A real home away from home, would definitely stay again.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
The apartment was easy to find, was a nice cozy place, with a balcony to have breakfast in the morning.
The A/c helped a lot, had some hot days in the period I staying there and that kept us nice and cool.
I would definitely recommend anybody to stay there, and i for sure will again.
M.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: My stay at Oskar's place was just outstanding!!! I will not go too much into the details. Just read everyone else's reviews of their experiences while staying at Oskar's place. I honestly concur/agree with each of them 100% and more. That's why his place is always going to be my #1 choice during my visits to the beautiful city of Rotterdam!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskar und Jan sind beide sehr nette und zuvorkommende Gastgeber.
Die Unterkunft war sehr gemütlich und sauber. Die Regendusche ist dazu ein absolutes Highlight.
Die Lage der Unterkunft ist perfekt, da man zu Fuß nur 5 Minuten zur Central Staation braucht und es zahlreiche gute Essensmöglichkeiten gibt.
Wir würden jederzeit gerne wieder in diese Unterkunft und danken Oskar und Jan für ihre Gastfreundschaft.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Really stylish flat right in the middle of Rotterdam, every detail thought of. Oskar was a brilliant host, he suggested a secure car park which is less than 5 minutes walk which was a lot cheaper than on street parking. Would definitely recommend

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: I cannot thank Oskar enough for this stay. As I was travelling for a work reason, my schedule kept changing but Oskar was so kind to be flexible with us. Check in/out was super easy and special thanks for letting my partner's luggage stay after check-out. I enjoyed the spacious living room, equipped kitchen, and shower pressure. Unfortunately I did not get to explore the area much but many supermarkets and cute restaurants/cafes exist in a walking distance. It's only 5 minutes from Central station but in quiet residential street. Thank you, Oskar.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Lovely apartment very close to the station and it was a great base for our four night visit to Rotterdam. Really nicely furnished and very well equipped . The balcony was nice to sit out especially in the evening. Jan met us at check in and was very helpful. Would highly recommend.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Great location-very close to the train station. Extensive shopping nearby. Pretty much an easy walk to many notable places in Rotterdam.  The flat was very comfortable. I enjoyed Netflix TV and Nespresso coffee. Plenty of hot water and the apartment was well heated.  It's a significant climb up two flights of stairs, but the stairs are very well lit.  Overall I had a great stay!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: We had an amazing stay at Jan and Oskars place. The apartment was bright and beautiful with really tasteful design. Felt right at home, with all the amenities considered. Location was perfect, walking distance to all the really cool areas of Rotterdam we wanted to visit. Would recommend.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: This Airbnb has a really convenient location. It is clean and has really good natural lighting. We used it as a base camp to explore Rotterdam and Antwerp. Definitely recommend.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar's Place is exactly as described and same as the photos shown on listing.  It is a very bright, clean and quiet apartment, very comfortable for a vacation stay.  Location is close to the all public transportations and lots of restaurants around.  We would definitely stay there again if we come back to Rotterdam in the future.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: This apartment was pristine, beautiful, and modern, only a short walk away from tons of restaurants and Rotterdam Centraal. I absolutely loved the updated bathroom with a washer,  and the gorgeous terrace! Oskar was kind enough to meet us in person during check in and explain a few things about the apartment. For American travelers, be aware that this apartment and all those in the Netherlands are up some pretty steep stairs. Another pointer--we left the beautiful windows open which let in a peaceful breeze on our summer trip, but unfortunately we also let in some mosquitoes. Take advantage of the AC, which is rarely found in Europe!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: We loved our stay at Oskar’s place. The location is perfect, so close to the centraal station. The apartment is kitted out so well, it has everything you could need, as well as being beautifully decorated. Having the balcony is also excellent for summer visiting! Check in was so easy as well. Thank you to Oskar!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Easy check in and check out.
Well appointed space. Kitchen stocked with pots, plates, toaster, and dishwasher. Appreciated having a washer. Plenty of natural light to hang dry clothes.
Would recommend as location is ideal. Only 10 minutes from Rotterdam Central train station.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Really nice apartment in the center of Rotterdam, easy to access from the train station - Oskar & Jan are very welcoming and there was everything needed to have a nice stay in their place, especially the little balcony that was great to enjoy the warm weather!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: What a beautiful & bright apartment you’ve created upstairs, super central but feels very cozy at the same time and the place offers everything you need. Thanks, Oskar!!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: The apartment is just like the photos, elegant and bright, and was equipped with everything we needed. We really enjoyed the stay there. Oskar is very friendly and helpful, thank you!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Very well-equipped and comfortable top floor apartment within a short walk of the Central Station and with easy access to all of the area's attractions.
Ideal for a short break in Rotterdam - the only thing to be aware of is the two flights of steep stairs, which might make it difficult for those with limited mobility (or too much luggage!).
Hosts were always helpful and friendly and we had a lovely time - highly recommended.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
What a lovely apartment! Bright and spacious, beautifully decorated and furnished and has everything you need. Lots of nice little touches from the hosts too. Only a few minutes walk from the station and close to everything without feeling to busy or noisy. Absolutely perfect for my 2 nights in Rotterdam and I would have loved to stay longer.
The stairs might be a problem for some as they're quite steep but were no issue for me. And Oskar kindly helped me with my bags when I arrived to make it even easier.
Staying here made my trip better, which I think is the biggest compliment I can pay. I really can't fault anything. Thank you so much Oskar!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oskar and Jan were very cooperative and helpful. easy to communicate. Jan was personally present to welcome us at check-in. He patiently explained the locking mechanism and all the gadgets at the property. The collection of toiletries and perfumes was huge.
Location of the apartment is easily walkable from central Station Rotterdam even with luggage. Very happening place yet private and peaceful. The small balcony was a huge bonus. Very well naturally illuminated and ventilated.
Hot water was also not a problem at all.
A plus point for Indians was the presence of Dove facility in latrine. Save paper.
All in all a great place to stay whether on vacation or on business visit.

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments:
Oaskar was a true Super Host, from the first time I communicated with questions, to our arrival, way before check in time, he stored our luggage so we could begin exploring Rotterdam. to the final day of our stay, he went above and beyond to help us get our luggage to the train station when our Uber left us high and dry.
His apartment is darling, clean, tidy, and extremely unique, exactly as described and pictured. Completely charming which made the visit perfect. The bed was pristine and extremely comfortable. Fully stocked kitchen with all you need for a short stay. The little balcony was great for a glass of wine and watching the city lights come on.
We learned about Dutch stairs while we were there!!!! But it was part of the experience.
The location was very convenient to the Central Train Station. Oskar gave us several recommendations on things to do while in Rotterdam. It was a perfect trip in all respects
I wish I could rate him and his apartment more than a 5!!!!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: I stayed at this Airbnb while attending a conference at Ahoy Rotterdam — my first time using Airbnb, and it exceeded expectations! The apartment is located in a quiet, pleasant neighborhood, yet just a short walk from Rotterdam Central Station, which made getting around incredibly easy. The space itself was open, full of natural light, and even had a private balcony — a lovely bonus. It truly felt more comfortable and personal than a hotel stay. The host was also fantastic: very service-minded and approachable. Highly recommended!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: I loved the place. The design was artsy artwork all over the place lighting was perfect during the day and great ambience at night bathroom was clean, symbol and had a nice collection for bodycare the bedroom was cozy and had electric ceiling window and shutters there is a nice terrace and beautiful bids singing outside:)

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: Oskar’s place was so great. 10 minute walk from the train station. Beautiful top floor apartment with tons of light. He let us in to get settled and was a gracious host. 12/10!

name: Luxurious apartment downtown
comments: A great stay overall. Quiet, cozy and bright apartment with everything you need for a short stay. Would definitely recommend. Oskar is a kind and responsive host. Thanks!

name: Cosy bright apartment in a lovely neighborhood
comments: Located in a safe and lovely and quite (no traffic) area of Rotterdam, with free parking in the street, and the high level restaurant Rijntje 50m at the end of the street. The house is modern, very clean, extremely good preprared for the guests and we felt very cosy inside and enjoyed our stay a lot.

name: Cosy bright apartment in a lovely neighborhood
comments:
We were extremely disappointed with our stay. Whereas Patricia and Michiel were friendly enough, the description of their apartment absolutely did not match the reality of their home
The apartment is on three separate levels, with stairs that would not pass building codes in most countries. Particularly the stairs to the basement bedroom were rickety and looked like they were put together in a children‘s woodworking workshop. We would never have booked this place if we had known these details. In fact we would go so far as to say that the apartment should not be listed anymore on Airbnb until it is fixed.
Further, many little things just did not work. The door to the balcony was broken, the bathroom in the bedroom had a toilet and shower that were out of order, two of the stovetops worked poorly, the toilet on the ground floor did not have a basin. If one were sleeping in the main bedroom, you would have to climb two flights of stairs to go to the toilet. I could go on…

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments: Tim's place in Rotterdam is perfect for a young family who like to stay close to the action in Rotterdam. The area was lovely and quiet, and on sunny evenings we ate on the balcony over looking the lovely garden area of the street with lovely friendly neighbours too! You are also only a stones throw from all the great coffee places and shops on Nieuwe Binnenweg which also has a good supermarket. We got a super sweet welcome from Tim and even though he couldn't welcome us in person his lovely neighbour let us in and we had a fab welcome package. The house is bright, airy and really hip with great artwork. We felt so comfy and at home here that we can't wait to return next year. We can enthusiastically recommend Tim's place as a great airbnb experience!

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments: Very bright flat, air is fresh, great bit of nature within a city but a short walk to some great bars/cafes etc

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments:
We had a really nice stay at the apartment and Michiel is a very helpful and super friendly hosts! It is a „real family home“ so you’ll find everything you need and a very cozy atmosphere.
You are near to all sights in walking distance in a really nice quarter of Rotterdam. There is a really nice balcony and garden as well to sit and relax - I highly recommend this AirBnB!

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments: We really enjoyed staying in this light, bright, comfortable accommodation, which was ideally situated for Rotterdam, the tram and Rotterdam Central station. Michiel was there to greet us on arrival and always very responsive. Would recommend.

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments:
