Had a great stay here. Absolutely beautiful accommodation, my wife and I are interested in art/culture so appreciated the décor!
We didn't really use the garden, but the balcony was lovely to sit out with an evening drink... certainly warm enough in the height of summer.
The bedrooms setup is slightly strange as in there's 2 in the basement and 2 on the 1st floor. At first our older kids (5 & 7) weren't happy about being so far from us, but they soon got used to it. The basement bedrooms were lovely and cool, a real delight on a hot day.
The street is very quiet and quite pretty. The surrounding areas maybe not the best in the dark, but we were usually home by 19:00-20:00 anyway and had no issues after then.
There are a couple of attractions within walking distance, i.e. the Maritime Museum & boat cruises (15-20 minutes walk) but the tram is excellent for everything else anyway.
Overall we loved this place and would be happy to go back.

name: Spacious family city apartment with garden (150m2)
comments:
Had a fantastic stay here, easy access to trams and trains to get into the centre, paid street parking just outside with plenty of other car parking options available. Bars and clubs just around the corner if needed. The place was unique artistically decorated with everything you could need for a comfortable and homely stay. Would definitely recommend and stay again.
Paul

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
We spent a great time in Nathalie's house. She is really welcoming et explained us what we should visit in Rotterdam and how to get there.
The flat is big, bright and warm, very pleasant !

Thanks again!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: We was out and about in the city the majority of the time, but this place was comfy, clean and in a good location. The atmosphere and cheap beer in the Feyenoord bar nearby was a highlight! All round a good weekend away.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
The place is very nice, the house is comfortably and it has a lot of space.
It is not interceptor of the city, but the public transportation is really good, and there are free bikes to use.
Our flight was wig two hours of delay and we arrive past midnight, Nathalie was really great and she received us! Is very kind, she also prepare an extra bed for us.
We recommend the place!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Perfectly located on a shopping street with a great supermarket only 2 mins or less away, really great seafood restaurant over the road, bakeries every few meters.

From Rotterdam Centraal it's one easy tram ride (route 25) and a few paces to the door

No trouble even with luggage to get there

The apartment itself is on th 3rd floor (with two other really nice apartments listed by the same owner located above and below this one)

Very light and spacious, everything you need to make simple meals, artfully decorated and clean.

Nice little balcony at the back

Brand new bathroom with slate floors, the kind of shower you never want to leave and lots of room for all my makeup etc on the counter.

We had seemingly brand new towels, generously provided.

No complaints on the bed, slept very well both nights :)

Nathalie was very accommodating with an early checkin, knowledgeable about what to do and how to do it in the Rotterdam area

Always easily reachable but never intrusive all in all a super host

One of my favorite Airbnb experiences :))

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Very nice place and view:) lovely appartment !!! I recomand !!!!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: The apartment is very big and cozy! Comfortable kitchen equipped with everything you need. Big windows, cool design of the apartment, balcony with table and chairs. Very good bathroom. Nathalie was very friendly, she explained everything, gave us maps of the city, some discount coupons. The only drawback is the cat smell in the hallway.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Nathalie's apartment was fantastic!
Spacious, full of sunlight all the day long, a supercomfy bed to really relax and an accessorized kitchen not just with all possible cookware but also spices, coffee and much more! Nathalie is a very nicd host who'll privide you all the info you need with lot of politness! Definitely recommended!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: It is a really nice and big apartment, bright and clean, not very close to center but you can take trams which come very often. Nathalie is a wonderful host, she's very nice and easy to communicate.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Overall perfect. Besides late night noise from a bar downstairs.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Arjen and Nathalie's apartment is lovely! Spacious, modern and with everything you need, situated in a great place to access the delights of Rotterdam. Having the bikes was an amazing bonus (although be careful where you choose to park them, the authorities may tow them away!!). Nathalie was very helpful, quick to communicate and suggested some great things to do such as visiting Kinderdijk- a must do!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Her house was very clean and the shower was also perfect. There is a nice night view outside the window. She was kind and showed me exactly how to open the door!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Arjen and Nathalie's place is cozy, bright and nicely decorated. It has a convenient location that is close to public transportation and grocery market. A very comfortable place to stay.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Stylish, clean apartment with ample transportation options in and about Rotterdam. The place has everything you need, wifi, large bed, full kitchen, balcony overlooking cherry blossom, tram outside the door, bakeries, bikes, etc. Would stay her again the next time I'm in Rotterdam. Rotterdam is a great town in of itself as well!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Nathalie welcomed us at the door and was very friendly and accommodating throughout our stay. She had plenty of great suggestions for us, we only wished we had more time in Rotterdam to do more! The apartment is in a residential area with a lot of shops, bars, and grocery stores nearby. It was easy to get to taking the tram from the central station. There is a steep flight of stairs up to the apartment, which was to be expected in a Dutch home. My elderly parents made it up just fine! The beds we're comfortable and the apartment had everything we needed- hair dryer, pots, pans, toaster, ect. The space is bright and comfortable. Definitely would recommend staying here.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
What a lovely stay.
Nathalie greeted us and showed us into her lovely spacious apartment. The apartment has a nice balcony area and large appealing windows. Equipped with all we need for our stay.
Excellent transport links via the tram which crosses the river to central Rotterdam with return possible as late as 0130.
Football fans will be pleased with the Feyenoord cafes locally positioned and the vicinity to De Kuip stadium.
Cheers again Nathalie.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
A lovely apartment in a great Rotterdam location. Cool spot for walking and Nathalie handed us a map at check in and marked off the apartment and several suggestions. Great balcony. We suggest a walk to the Fenix Foods warehouse where there are several vendors from cheese to tapas to brewery of beers.
TIP: The stairs up are typical Holland. Steep and many. Nathalie will store your heavy bags. Pack light a bag if this is a few days trip and pick up the heavy bag on your way out.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: This is a lovely, very spacious apartment with a sweet little balcony. The stairs up to the apartment could be hard for somebody with mobility issues but otherwise I would absolutely recommend a stay here.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Spacious apartment, quiet (bedroom), close to shops. The balcony was an added plus.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: We had a great time at Arjens and Nathalies apartment. It was just perfect clean and very comfy with a great view. Also it is perfectly located next to the tram station and you can reach the harbour area and city center within a few minutes.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
I had a nice stay in this apartment. Easy to reach with the tram. Very close to grocery shop. Well equipped.
Nathalie was very reactive to my questions. She was also flexible as I missed my train and arrived much later than expected.
I was just a little bit disturbed sometimes by noise from neighbors.
However, my global feeling is positive.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
It’s a wonderful apartment with beautiful view and all of the necessary amenities. The host is amazing, she will advise you where to go and respond in a few seconds.
I recommend you to stay there

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: This one is a very very beautiful AirBnb! It´s really kept as natural as possible, also very bright room, very clean, absolutelty perfect! Also we loved the bathroom and the tile´s - so we were very happy to have found such a beautiful stay!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Pros: Very spacious, beautiful bright apt. With full kitchen amenities. Bedroom very clean. Close to metro bus. Nathalie greeted us and she’s very helpful.
Cons: Stairs are steep and narrow; can be difficult for elderly. Walls very thin; can hear noises from neighbors and street outside.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Very spacious apartment at the top of a narrow staircase, Nathalie was there to help as it is quite steep and our luggage was heavy. We felt safe in the apartment, it is very airy with good natural light.  Comfy king size bed and a modern kitchen.  Apartment was very well situated next to a tram that took you to the centre in 15 minutes.  Albert Heijne and Durks  were close by.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Nathalie is great host, she is very neat as well as her apartment. Reference pictures and actual place are the same, we're so impressed.
I really recommend this place.
Fortunately, we stayed here during Saturday and Sunday, so free parking on the street and it was safe and closed to her apartment.
Their apartment is full of convenient things you may need. All are mentioned in their profile. From hair dryer, Big refrigerator, bread toaster, oven & utensils in the kitchen, hot water heater and heater itself and clean& good smell towels.
Great neighborhood which near Public Transportation such as , a Tram and 24 hour supermarket.
Nathalie and her family was very helpful. There were there to help us a lot on the day we checked in.
BTW, I really love her place, as well as the area and her support.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Very cozy and roomy place with a nice view to the street.
Every amenity was there and transportation to the center was really nearby. I can recommend this place.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: We had a wonderful stay at Arjen's and Nathalie's apartment. The apartment is well equipped and very cozy and also has a spacious and quiet balcony. The tram to the city centre is only a few minutes from the apartment and their are a number of shops close by. If you come by car, pay attention to the parking regulations. We couldn't find a parking spot for free around the apartment and parking fees are quite high.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Our stay was great, my partner and I visited for four days and both felt incredibly comfortable and at home in this apartment. My favourite parts of the stay includes the giant cozy lamp, the beautiful morning rays of sun, the balcony and the lovely shower!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: The house is very spacious and bright. Loads of light coming into the livingroom in the morning and sun in the room in the afternoon. Albert heijn is right next to the house, but the neighbourhood is bot the best to have stroll around. However, there are many good take aways in the surroundings. Nathalie was very kind.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Hosts very friendly and easy to communicate. Very nice flat, very comfortable and clean. Street market in the area, City Center approached in less than an hour by walk.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Very nice apartment! Clean, cozy, comfortable. The kitchen has everything you need for a couple of days, there's a balcony and the living room has a big sofa. The host is very nice, she helped us find a free parking spot for our car and was very welcoming. We had a great time in Rotterdam :)

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: Nice, cosy and comfortable place. The host was very polite and welcoming, always keen on providing us with any information we asked for. The house was located really close to supermarkets and there was a tram stop right there in the main street.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
Great stay and very accomodating people. The kitchen is fully equiped other than an oven you have everything you need for all meals of the day, makes it really worth it as you can simply buy groceries literally 3 mins away walking.
Its 15 minute bikeride from the home to Central. The apartment is excellent and super cozy., even has a small balcony for the smokers.
Literally all you need is provided and Nathalie will answer all questions. Highly recommend this place

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments:
A welcoming host, who gave us some nice pieces of advice what to visit. Spacious apartment with lots of light. Clean and with all necessary facilities.
The location is pretty away from the center, but with good tram connection.

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: It’s a nice place overall, just be careful with the bed, as we had to have the slats replaced during our stay, and then the staircase up to the place is very steep and kind of dangerous so be careful with that as well. Outside of that, the layout of the place was super nice and had lots of light coming in, along with a nice small balcony in the bedroom. Overall, very cozy, and made for a good stay for a short trip!

name: Comfortable Apartment
comments: The apartment is ideally located and has all needed for a great stay, the living room view is great and there is a lot to do in the area.

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments:
Awesome stay in Rotterdam. Cozy, full of natural light and very peaceful. Found myself home in this place.
Jeroen is a very proactive host, always ready to make things work.
Definitely a place to return.

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments:
Jeroen's place was perfect. A lovely clean, spacious and light apartment with everything you need. Beautiful old building with lots of character. Bedroom with a view over the city, and a nice balcony. Jeroen met us outside the building and briefly showed us all we needed to know. He was very flexible, and made us feel very welcome.
He gave us his own bike to use and we rented another one, which is the perfect way to get around here. Several lovely cafes nearby at walking distance. Really a perfect place for a great stay in Rotterdam. Thanks Jeroen!

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments:
I had a great time staying for almost 2 weeks at Jeroen's place. The location was perfect for me. Apartment spacious and I loved the decor, windows, high ceilings. The piano, plants, records, and books were a total vibe. I used the kitchen daily. I felt totally at home.
Anytime I needed something Jeroen was very fast to respond, pleasant to communicate with, and quick to offer solutions.
Important : If you have mobility issues, know there are some serious stairs. I actually left my big suitcase in the living room and brought up my packing cubes only lol. You go up a narrow staircase to enter apartment, and then bedroom is up 2 more flights of stairs.
But honestly steps are good for you :) I loved being up above for the bedroom and the balcony up there.
Bed comfortable, sheets and towels all good, good shower heat and pressure.
One suggestion : It's time to throw the scratched pans. But there were some nice ones from Le Creuset.
I recommend & would stay again!

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments:
Stunning old world-meets-modern charm duplex in the heart of Rotterdam. Super close to great food, groceries, public transportation, shopping, parks and more.
Very stylish space with modern touches in a more historic area. Huge windows let the sun in and the street is quaint.
Perfect for a couple or solo traveler.

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments:
Jeroen’s apartment was a great place to stay! It was comfortable, peaceful, and in a walkable neighborhood just outside the city center. It was easy to get around with a tram stop nearby, and there were plenty of markets and parks close by. it was nice to come back and unwind on the cute little balcony (bonus: cats in the courtyard below)!
The stairs inside the apartment are quite steep, but otherwise, it was a great home base for enjoying the city. Jeroen was super friendly and helpful throughout. I’d definitely recommend the place and would happily stay again!

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments: We very much enjoyed our stay in Jeroen’s large, light airy apartment with  tree views. The comfy bed and bedroom were very spacious with a balcony to enjoy in fine weather. Good location with only a 15 min walk to Central station and trams close by that made it easy to explore Rotterdam and other nearby towns, and also take the Eurostar for our onward journey to UK. Good restaurants nearby, as well as supermarkets. As with most Dutch houses there are steep stairs, so need to be aware that it’s one flight to the apartment front door (and living/dining/kitchen) and a further double flight to the bedroom - all helps with your daily step count! Our son and his Dutch partner, who live in Rotterdam, would happily live in this apartment - and would make more use of the piano than we did.

name: Spacious artist-home in beautiful street Rotterdam
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Jeroen’s condo.  The space is beautiful, and the interior was tastefully furnished. Jeroen is a very thoughtful host and quick to answer questions before and during my stay. One thing to note is that the bedroom is challenging to access if you’re carrying heavy luggage, as you would need to climb up a long steep flight of stairs to get to the room. Other than that, the space was perfect for our needs.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: We simply loved staying at Sue's house in Rotterdam! The hosts were extremely welcoming and helpful in navigating the neighborhood, and even gave us a ride to the airport on the last morning. The house is truly lovely with many welcoming touches and a superb view from the rooftop terrace. We walked to the grocery, restaurants, parks, and Symphony Hall in just a few minutes. Everyone in Rotterdam was especially friendly and helpful. :)

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: We had a delightful stay with Shirley and Steve in Rotterdam. They were extremely friendly and helpful and the room was in a renovated apartment which was spacious, well lit and comfortable with a large modern private adjoining bathroom and shared toilet. We were made to feel very welcome with tea, coffee and a few small snacks and water bottles in the room and offered to use the main kitchen if we needed to. The house is in a great location, approximately a 5 minute walk from Central Station and an easy walk to great restaurants. On our arrival Steve showed us maps and pointed out the best places to visit in Rotterdam and very kindly gave us the use of their bikes for the day. Steve and Shirley really took the time to get to know us as guests and we would definitely recommend staying here if visiting Rotterdam.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve are very nice couple and so do their house.When we arrived Rotterdam,Steve prepared coffee for us and introduce Rotterdam to us.The house is very close to many Chinese restaurant and easy to visit every good view on foot.It costs about 15mins to walk from central station to the house.Strongly recommend.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley was an excellent host! The room was beautiful with a small balcony! Perfectly located a short walk from Rotterdam Central and the MuseumPark! Shirley gave us some local tips and directions which was very helpful and the stroopwaffles in the room were delicious!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Steve and Shirley are really excellent hosts . The room and bath room is very clean and bright . With everything we need. The most important thing is they make us feel like home not just place to stay . They are really amazing host and also friends with great space . It's really the best choice to know Rotterdam with Steve and Shirley .

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shriley's house is a wonderful place to stay! Everything looks (at apparently is ) very welcoming, bright, comfortable and clean. Both the bedroom and the bathroom are  large - compared to other AirBnBs in that price range. What we especially appreciated was the "sweets-bar" right next to the bed :) Shirley and Steve are both very lovely hosts and will, for sure, make your stay at their house as as pleasant as possible. Highly recommended place: Feelgood factor included!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve are the most kind and nice host couple I've ever met in Europe. The house is clean and bright, and you can find the snacks they prepared in the bedroom. The bathroom is roomy, very awesome. With the good location, you can go central station and other sight on foot. everything is fantastic !

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: This is the first time we have stayed at a private room listing rather than an entire apartment. As there we now just two of us left, it was a perfect choice. Shirley and her beau Steve welcomed us into their wonderful apartment in Rotterdam and made us feel completely at home. The place is well situated with easy walking distance to both the central train station and the downtown area. Also directly near tram stops.  Room is large, open, bed is great and the private shower is all new. The hosts are great.  As with most of places in Europe, there are a few stairs within the apartment, which itself is at street level, but Steve helped to move our luggage so it is all is very easy to manage.  Definitely worth trying if you find yourself in Rotterdam.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Great location and hosts. Ten munites' walk from the central station. Shirley and Steve had been nothing but completely helpful and welcoming. Feel very much like home during our stay.
Steve met us on the street for we arrived at night. He then helped us carry the luggage upstairs. Shirley made tea for us and chatted with my daughter. Really grateful for Steve & Shirley's hospitality. Thanks a lot.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve were really nice hosts. They were always friendly, Steve carried our suitcases upstairs, they gave us many tips where to go, what to eat etc. We were welcome and we felt at home in their house. The room was better than expected, it was so bright, the bed was so comfortable, we had a little fridge with water and other drinks. The bathroom was really big and absolutely clean, we have nothing to criticize. We also got their bikes, so we could use them all day to explore Rotterdam by bike. All in all I can say that my friend and I are so happy for staying at Shirley and Steve, the room, the location, the hosts - it was pretty perfect. Thank you for these days :)

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley and Steve’s place is usually booked.. If its available, consider yourself lucky.. Just go for it..!
This was the first time that we opted Airbnb, and we are happy that made the right decision. Our stay at Shirley and Steve’s place was truly amazing . They were very hospitable, friendly, amiable and beautiful people. They guided us all about the DOs & DONTs for Rotterdam. Steve told us about some terrific places to eat, and we must thank him for it - especially the “Kapsalon”.
The room that we had was very clean, spacious and had a beautiful city view.. The bathroom was a delight, as it was very big and well equipped. In the room we were greeted by some awesome chocolates, stroopwaffles and wine.. Steve even helped us carry our luggage and that was a really sweet gesture on his part.
The place is easily reachable through Rotterdam Central station at a walkable distance (10-15 mins), and very close to the tram stops (2-3 mins walk).. Lots of good places to eat nearby.. All the main attractions in the town are easily reachable through trams available near they place..
All together Shirley and Steve’s place is beautiful and anyone staying there will have an amazing time.
P.S.: Our main reason to opt for Airbnb was to meet new people and make friends in the new country, and that we indeed made..!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve are the best hosts i ever had. They welcomed us with unconditionnal kindness, showed us around and we had good talks together. The visitor's room is just way ahead of what i expected : comfortable bed, large bathroom with all commodities, mini fridge, etc. I wish i could have stayed longer ! Plus, it's located near the central station, near a busy commercial street and the major attractions are very close too. Their place is a real deal breaker !

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Expect to feel so comfortable and at home that you'll never want to leave Shirley and Steve's! They are some of the loveliest, warmest couple I've met through Airbnb. Their home is large, open, and personally speaking, the airbnb room rivals a fancy hotel's. The tram is two minutes from the house, and there are plenty of restaurant choices if you want to eat out. Shirley's home is just off a busy street, so that when you come home, you are home.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Great Host who took time for us. Shirley had great breakfast spreads! A very short walking distance from Central Station and restaurants and shopping. Also close to bus and tram lines.
Our room was big and clean as described with small balcony. We really enjoyed our clean private bathroom. Thank you and we can't wait to visit again!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley's house is a fabulous place to stay!
My wife and I were in Rotterdam for architectural tourism so we stayed out all day cycling around the city. We very much enjoyed the 3-night stay in late August.
The area where the building is located is nice and quiet, very close to Centraal Station (5-minute walk). Along the way there is a bike shop where we rented two bicycles for 4 days (highly recommended in this wonderful Dutch city).
The flat is adorable! Charming, really spacious, clean and tidy, with a bright and very spacious double bedroom (I am accustomed to living in London, so I have appreciated the bedroom size difference).
Shirley and Steve are wonderful hosts, sweet people, extremely accommodating, very helpful for everything we needed.
Definitely highly recommended!!!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
We had a wonderful time at Shirley & Steve’s place. They’re kind and helpful people.
The room is nice, clean and bright, provided with all the necessary.
I would absolutely recommend this place.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: I cannot recommend this place even more. Excellent location (walking distance from CS and many attractions), room super spacious and with beautiful balcony, fast communication, stylish details in the bedroom, and private bathroom. It is like a little hotel boutique, but Airb&b still. Shirley & Steve were super kind and friendly, always asking if I needed something. Shirley even made me some company while I was having dinner late (that is very thoughtful!). If you are visiting Rotterdam, do not hesitate to STAY HERE! 👏🏼

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
We had a good time in Shirley’s house with her extremely perfect hosting!
Good location with nice views since it’s near to China town and Central Station; clean and big room with nice living supplies for using; as well as detailed introduction of whole views of Rotterdam for our easy roaming and exploring in this good and charming city. We will not forget the outstanding experiences given by Shirley these days!
Thanks so much Shirley and highly recommended!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steven are so nice. They helped us a lot. Her house is well decorated and not far from the railway station and china town. Our room has a very comfortable bed, big windows, big washing room, We feel very comfortable to stay there. Shirley are so nice to make us at home, to give us lots of good advices of the visit in the city. We definitely recommend Shirley’s house in Rotterdam.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: They are very nice. The view is good and the room are look nice and clean.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Steve and Shirley are a great team!
A polished act, care about you and take their Airbnb seriously. No wonder they get bookings and great reviews! See you again! X bisous brian et Declan

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: It's very worthy to be there, the room is beautiful and amazing. The bathroom is terrific. And when the sunshine come across the window, it's very romantic to stay in the room

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Highly recommended. Shirley was a very attentive and open host, with quick communication and good local tips. The room and whole house were very light, clean and airy. Location excellent between town centre and old harbour. Steep stairs up if that is an issue for you.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley and her husband offered excellent hospitality in a very clean, beautiful space. Shirley was flexible despite us having to change our check in time, and her communication was great. The room itself is actually more like a little hotel room rather than just a private room in a house. There is a mini fridge filled with drinks, an electric kettle, a variety of snacks/mini meals, and two sets of bowls & cutlery. There's also a bathroom just off the bedroom that is quite updated and stylish.
One of the highlights of the room is the floor-to-ceiling windows and small balcony. These fill the room with light and make for a very pleasant view out onto the street (but there are blackout curtains to keep it dark in the early morning, too)! The location was also great--just a few minutes' walk to the Centraal station and a variety of restaurants and bars.
We found the room and the hosts to be superb, and I would recommend Shirley's place to anyone looking to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley is such a nice person and a host! Her husband Steve helped a lot with some tips and also with baggage. Both are very smiley and positive people. The room is very comfy, bed is great, airy room hence the small balcony. Toilet is separate from bathroom which is so good, it's something you're usually missing in hotels, very convenient. Shirley welcomed us earlier than 12, because our train arrived early, that was very nice of her. I'm a southern woman, for me hospitality means a lot, so believe me, these two wonderful people will make you feel like home! Wish you to have a lot of respectful guests, Shirley! Thank you for giving us home in Rotterdam! :)

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley and Steve are a very warm and caring couple. I appreciate they listened to me, giving me suggestions, and also sharing their life wisdom for me. They are the best chefs ever. I enjoyed having dinner with them.
The room is more than a five-star hotel. Comfortable designed bathroom, peaceful lightening, mirrors, a closet, well-organized space. Shirley is so sweet to prepare Dutch sweets, gorgeous beverages, and breakfast for me.
The location is very convenient. 2 mins walk to a Tram station, 2 supermarkets nearby. 10-15 mins walk to Rotterdam central.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley and Steve are super nice, they are sweet and kind hearted couple. Their hospitality is excellent and they are always more than just a host to help and give us advice. They simply treat guests as their friends.
Their apartment is well positioned that central station is within 10 mins walk, while China town and good restaurants are within walking distance. The room is very large and comfortable with nice balcony. Everything was just perfect.
Shirley and Steve truly made our stay in Rotterdam unforgettable. We are so glad that we‘ve stayed in their apartment.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: This place was really beautiful, and the added touches and thought the hosts put into making me feel welcome and comfortable were a delight. Would recommend and in a VERY convenient location!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley and Steve are really friendly and welcoming, and I really enjoyed our chat during my stay.
Room is clean and as advertised. Hot shower worked very well.
Convenient location that is close to light rail stations, supermarkets and restaurants.
Highly recommended!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Absolutely 5 stars! Shirley's place is larger than expected. Both the bedroom and bathroom are generous and very comfortable. Be aware that the place is located on quite a busy street that you can hear throughout the night. Come equipped with ear plugs and you will be delighted!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve are awesome hosts! They are extremely kind, very dedicated to their guests and careful about details. For example, one day we arrived late, Shirley was watching a TV show on her one day off of the week and we just asked about an open supermarket in the area. She immediately left her break, opened the fridge and cooked for us! Steve carried our bags up and down the stairs upon our arrival and departure. They have a very nice little parrot, Toto, who flies around the house and perches on the shoulder of whoever calls him. The room is very comfortable, large and with a balcony facing an avenue. Despite that, it is quiet at night and sleeps very well. In the room there is a coffee maker, refrigerator and electric kettle. In addition to coffee they left a wine, beers and coke for us in the room! The house also has a very comfortable kitchen-dining room that they gladly share with guests. They also offered us space in their refrigerator if the one in the room was not enough, and on several occasions they even offered us products from theirs to cook! The location is very convenient, a few minutes walk from the central station and close to the center. We would definitely stay with them again in the future.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve made us feel welcome from the moment we arrived and throughout our stay. Our room was clean, comfortable and tastefully (and quirkily) decorated. The bed was very comfortable and the bathroom spacious and well-equipped. The room is in a good location, within walking distance of many of Rotterdam’s attractions (as well as the railway station) and this made it ideal for our stay. Shirley was always polite, friendly and helpful with her advice and recommendations for things to do while we were there. We would not hesitate to recommend this room, although it should also be said that in order to access it, you need to climb two flights of steep stairs; so do not take a big or heavy suitcase with you.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley's place was amazing, everything is in walking distance with great food options close by. The room and bathroom were also super spacious and very clean. It was a real lovely stay! The flight of stairs were a little steep but that is expected of buildings in the area. Both Shirley and Steve were angels, thank you for being so kind and friendly and for helping with the luggages. There were two adorable little birds, Tutu and Kiko as well. Shirley had a lot of recommendations as well, and it was always very pleasant when we interacted. Truly a superhost! Would love to come back next time for another stay 😊

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
I recommend everyone to stay at Shirley’s place! She was lovely, helped us with whatever we needed, and gave local recommendations!
The location is 3-minute walk from a tram station, or you can have a short walk to the city centre.
The room was spotless and spacious, had snacks and drinks, a smart TV, and a balcony!
There is a spacious shower room and a separate toilet.
Would stay there again!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Perfect base for visiting Rotterdam, about halfway between the train station and the museum platz.  Lovely hosts in a diverse walkable neighbourhood. There's some traffic noise but it's generally peaceful. Highly recommended.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Although the street is busy, we did not hear any noise inside and slept well. The room has a bathroom, but the toilet is outside the room, in the corridor. Not ideal, but it was okay.
There is a lock on the door, but only from the inside, which means you could not lock it when leaving the place.
Also, steep stairs, not ideal with a large suitcase.
Overall good value for money and for a couple.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
We hebben een leuk verlengd weekend achter de rug bij Shirley en Steve. We voelden ons heel welkom en kregen zeker voldoende privacy ondanks het feit dat ze het huis met ons deelden. We konden altijd terecht bij hen voor handige tips over Rotterdam.
Bedankt Shirley en Steve en hopelijk tot nog eens!!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: I am so glad I ended up finding this listing. Shirley and Steve were such perfect hosts. It felt like I was visiting family for the holidays. I am so grateful they spent Christmas with me. They are just so friendly and welcoming, it’s like a blessing. I loved talking to them for hours. The room was so spotless and so so clean. The room was spacious and I had more than what I needed for my week-long trip. Lots of peace and privacy. Rotterdam is beautiful and wonderful. There is so much to do. I had some of the best coffee in my European travels here. Everyone is friendly, helpful, and warm. The city is also 100% walkable. I recommend renting a bike and traveling that way for fun. Day trips to Amsterdam are super accessible through the intercity trains from Rotterdam central. I already miss Shirley, Steven, and Holland.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Shirley is a super lovely host, very warm and welcoming, and helpful with suggestions of things to do / places to eat! The house is very clean with a big comfortable bedroom and private bathroom as well.
Stairs are quite steep so be prepared when getting up and down them especially with luggage. The toilet is separate from the main bathroom (is in hallway) but wasn’t too much of an issue.
Balcony in the bedroom is lovely, decorated with flowers, and has a pretty sunrise in the morning.
Pet birds are super cute and sweet, I loved seeing them every morning!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
we had a great stay. Steve and Shirley are wonderful hosts, they made us feel like family! They also have beautiful lovebirds which are very friendly and fun to watch.
The room and bathroom are huge, with lots of natural light and a very comfortable bed. it felt very private and safe. our hosts gave us lots of great recommendations, cooked us a delicious breakfast and even lent us their bikes to explore the city.
we thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. Wish we could have stayed longer!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
We enjoyed our stay at Steve & Shirley's home. The room was very big, comfortable and clean. Tea, coffee and snacks in the room and the option of breakfast downstairs in the kitchen.
The bedding was good quality as were the towels. Big bathroom with 2 sinks and also some bath products provided.
Great location: 1min walk from the station and not far from restaurants. (We ate at La Pizza and also Oliva (a little further away and more upscale), where we had good meals.)
One tiny point to be aware of: the 2 flights of steps up to the room are very steep and not for everyone.
Thank-you for the warm welcome Shirley and we enjoyed meeting your little birds!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: I already wrote a review since this was a 2nd stay for us, but again, my husband and I really enjoyed staying at Steve and Shirley's.  You can really feel how much hosts put their care into their home, our room and to the guests. The location is also great, we were able to drag our suitcases from the station by walk.  It is a very nice walk to the downtown area, but there are some good cafes, bakeries and cafes nearby also.  Big thanks to Steve and Shirley for opening their beautiful home for us !

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley really goes above and beyond as a host. Both her and Steve are friendly kind and so helpful. I spent 10 nights there and they really made me feel at home. The room and bathroom very clean and spacious with amazing natural light, Toilet is just right outside the room. Very convenient to Central Station which was great given how many day trips I did out of Rotterdam. Highly recommend!!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Thanks to Shirley and Steve!
We really had a wonderful time in Rotterdam.
The house is beautiful and the views are amazing 🤩
About 5-10 minutes away from the central station, so it’s very convenient.
Shirley and Steve were also very friendly and nice to us🥰🥰 (And Dodo of course very cute hahaha )
We just felt like at home.
Anyway Highly recommended!!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: We had an amazing stay in Rotterdam at Steve and Sherly's Airbnb. The hospitality was exceptional, making our family—my wife, daughter, son, and I—feel right at home. The snacks provided were a delightful touch, and we truly enjoyed every moment. We’re already looking forward to returning for a longer stay. Steve and Sherly, you’re always welcome to visit us in Zimbabwe! Thank you for making our trip so memorable.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments:
Der Aufenthalt bei Steve und Shirley war einfach unvergesslich! Das Zimmer war riesig, wunderschön eingerichtet und mit allem ausgestattet, was man sich nur wünschen kann: Kühlschrank, Kaffeemaschine und das Highlight – ein großes, luxuriöses Badezimmer, das einfach überwältigend war. Alles war super sauber und ordentlich, und das Bett war so unglaublich bequem, dass ich mich sofort wie zu Hause gefühlt habe.
Eure Herzlichkeit und Offenheit haben meinen Aufenthalt besonders gemacht. Es waren so schöne Gespräche, die ich sehr genossen habe – ihr seid wirklich zwei bezaubernde Menschen! Und dann sind da noch eure wunderbaren Haustiere, besonders Tschu Tschu, der mein Herz im Sturm erobert hat. So ein süßer und goldiger Vogel!
Sollte ich wieder nach Rotterdam kommen, werde ich ohne Zweifel wieder bei euch übernachten. Ihr habt meinen Urlaub in den Niederlanden zu etwas ganz Besonderem gemacht. Vielen Dank für diesen wunderbaren Aufenthalt – ihr seid wirklich großartige Gastgeber!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: We hadden een heerlijk marathon weekend in Rotterdam. De kamer is mooi en ruim met aansluitend een grote badkamer. Steve en Shirley zijn erg vriendelijk en gastvrij,  waardoor je je meteen thuis voelt en toch meer dan genoeg privacy hebt

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Steve and Shirley were among the most hospitable Airbnb hosts I've ever met. It was great to exchange travel stories over breakfast and meet their beautiful and friendly pet birds. The bedroom and bathroom were huge, sunny, and nicely decorated. The two flights of stairs were typical Dutch - narrow and twisty - which could be a plus or a minus, depending on how you look at it. For this trip, my suitcase was heavy and not a mere carry-on, but the hosts kindly helped me and it was fine. I only wish I could have stayed longer than just 2 days.

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: We enjoyed our stay with Steve and his wife.  They were super friendly and nice, and offered lots of helpful tips about areas to explore in the city.  The room was big and bright, just like the photos!  large bed and bathroom (thought the toilette is in a separate room down the hall).  There is a small fridge (with some free drinks and snacks!) and coffee table for making coffee in the morning.  Location was really close and walkable to most things, or else easy trams run close by.   Close enough to the city energy, but far enough to feel peace and rest. Would stay here again

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: I had a lovely stay here, the hosts are amazing and very welcoming. The room is very spacious and bright, would definitely stay here again!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley’s appartment was great - nice big room and bathroom with a small balcony. Great location and very walkable into the city. Shirley and her husband were super friendly and gave great recommendations for us. Would recommend to star at at Shirley’s place if you’re in Rotterdam!

name: Large bedroom Lets be surprized
comments: Shirley and Steve were most welcoming and made us have a great stay at their cozy home, just a short ealknfrom central station through nice vivid hood, very spacious room and bathroom, even a cute balcony, comfort bed and super nice and friendly exchanges, it was always lovely to meet and talk - even offered drinks, super friendly. We've followed their nice recommendations and of course loved the birdies, too. Would definitely return, wonderful experience!

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Marnix is a great host. The flat is very spacious, in a nice neighborhood, close to everything you need. It's charming, clean and full of light. I definitely recommand Marnix's flat!

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Manix has a great flat in a nice street near the centre of Rotterdam. The place is modern and very light, close to trams and about a twenty minute walk to Centraal Station. Manix is very helpful and responsive.

name: Big apartment near center
comments:
This apartment was as described and photos are true. It is on the last floor in building without an elevator and steep slope of stairs may be uncomfortable for some people, but on the other hand you'll find very luminous apartment at the end of the stairs.
Even if we haven't had much time to cook there was everything that one might need (pots and pans, plates, glasses etc.) and for grocery stores there is nearby Albert Heijn and Dirk. Tram station and bus station is very near and parking place is easy to find, but not that convenient; fortunately it was free from 18 to 9 o'clock.

We didn't meet Marnix but the hand-over of keys was uncomplicated thanks to Ceceil.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: The apartment is very specious and bright, perfect for 2 people. I had a lovely time staying there. Marnix is very kind himself and accommodating. The apartment is about a 20 min walk from Centraal Station and not too far from the rest of the main tourist sites. I would definitely stay again.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: The apartment is in a quiet street, at the 3rd floor ( for us it was not a problem at all but there is no lift for information). City center is a walk of +-25 minutes, depends where you're going. We went there for the new year, fireworks on the Erasmus bridge were really nice. You can park in the street. Uber is really easy to go in the city center if you don't want to walk. We didn't took the public transport but it's in the next street. Marnix was a great host and flexible, he went with us to show where to pay the parking and was there for all our questions before.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Marnix’ place was like comming home after exploring another city! Perfect. Clean place with lots of sun on the balcony wich we enjoyed thoroughly. He was also a flexible host check-in/out-wise.  Thx for this weekend, cheers!

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Marnix was a great host. The apartment was excellent with everything we needed. Within walking distance to restaurants and shops. The neighborhood is working class, safe and quiet. WiFi reception was good. Nice balcony.

name: Big apartment near center
comments:
Marnix' apartment was perfect for my stay! It was a lovely clean apartment with homely touches. It's just 10 mins from the city centre, and right next to the beautiful Heemraad park. There's a great little balcony off the bedroom to appreciate the sun in the evenings. I didn't have time to do much cooking while I was here, but if you did there's nice big space to make food with all the appliances you'd need.
Marnix himself is a great host who was easy to get in touch with when I had a questions, and was very kindly flexible with my check out time when I was running late to leave :) When I make a return trip to Rotterdam I will definitely ask to stay here again.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: A great host, extremely helpful. A lovely apartment, clean and spacious with a lovely balcony great for enjoying the sun! Thanks!

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Marnix place was really beautiful.  The highlight, for me, was the fantastic espresso machine because I was in town for work and that really helped with the jet lag.  The space is great and everything is several steps above your typical AirBnB.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Great place. Nice view, spacious apartment, close to everything. Delicious roti at the corner. Highly recommended.

name: Big apartment near center
comments:
Great apartment with nice natural light! Spacious and very comfortable.
Love all the plants and the huge kitchen table!!! Nice to be upstairs with privacy but light.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Very good localisation (tram stop close), comfortable double bed, sunny place, with balcony. Well equiped kitchen with big table.  On 4th floor without elevator. For us it was no problem. Very nice option for longer stay or for families.

name: Big apartment near center
comments: Marnix's home was a great place to stay - very large living and kitchen area, and the balcony had great afternoon sun. The area was really walkable and near multiple trams, so easy to get around. Very quiet at night. Marnix was very responsive and helpful for checkin/out as well. Really recommend!

name: Big apartment near center
comments: We live being at This spacious apartment felt like a home away from home. Beautiful art , books ,furniture and a great kitchen and dining room. Lovely balcony . The location is perfect close to the Heemraadsingel which is a beautiful tree lines canal great for walking and relaxing under the trees. I hope to return again .

name: Lovely 1 bedroom apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We had a great few days at Veronica’s apartment. Extremely clean, super bright and very stylish. Veronica is very nice and I would recommend her flat to anyone who is looking to spend a week-end in Rotterdam!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: We have stayed in frans and jose apartment for two nights. The apartment is well designed with a cozy wooden fire place on the ground floor which every evening we set around it to have dinner or tea and enjoy their company. Both of them became like our family  they were super friendly to us. We cooked together. Frans made for us perfect breakfast with good table design and also classic music ;)) it was dreamy meals ;) . Thanks Frans. They have give us maps and information about the city and show us nearby neighbohrhood like churches and shops ( albert heijn is just 7 min walking away). There is clean and tide rooms and coridor plus bright bath. I hope to go over there again to see them. I strongly recommend to stay with them cuz they made delicuse meals and for sure share with guests and so friendly you can feel exact like home. Thank u jose for ur super energic welcomings.:)

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Our stay with Jose and Frans was a delightful way to start our tour in beautiful Holland. Jose sends out a positive and joyful vibe from the moment you meet him and his apartment is truly welcoming, clean and well equipped. In the morning we were offered coffee on the charming little terrace downstairs, while a relaxing classical music was playing in the background. Highly recommended!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
Our stay at this house was like at home, everything ok from the very beginning until when we left. We found every bit and piece working and the house is clean, tidy, well decorated and at a walking distance from the city center or central Station, but quiet at night.
The guests are a delight, trying to help in every little detail if you ask them, but you have your privacy as well, so it's up to you, they are there, just in case you need.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
Great stay in Hans & Jose's house! Our hosts were very welcoming and because they were staying in the house during the day, they could really answer to our questions and guide us.
Beautiful characteristic house, very clean and confortable, great location (10min from the main street by bus or bike) we would definitely recommend it!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: They had everything described one the house description and more... The house is impeccable and confortable and both Jose and Francis where helpful, polited and very discreet to when approach me and my company to share some glasses of wine and chat a bit. Hope i will come back to Rotterdam even if just for visit them again.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
Great host! We truly enjoyed our stay. Frank welcomed us and offered some tea. They permitted us to leave baggage before check in and even help us bring our luggage to our room upstairs. They also lend us travel card for commute.
Room was nice, spacious for 2, and clean. The bathroom is only for guest and they genuinely give you privacy.
Location is near bus station and there are a lot shop nearby.
Great place for a short/long stay.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: The house is absolutely beautiful, and it's located across a church, which makes the view outside the window stunning as well. The electric sockets in the house however, are awkwardly placed making them quite inconvenient to reach. Also, the neighbourhood is not very tourist-friendly, many workers in the small shops can't communicate in English.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
We had a lovely but brief stay in Rotterdam, but our hosts made the trip all the more special. We were greeted on arrival with tea biscuits and some local cheese.
We say in their lovely garden and we're given some great recommendations! We had our own floor of the house, which was thoroughly clean with great views of the beautiful garden one side, and the decode the church the other.
We really enjoyed our trip, and would be sure to pick Jose's place if we return to Rotterdam!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Jose'a place is absolutely wonderful. The rooms are pristine, spacious, well illuminated, and they have ncice  views of the garden and the street. Jose and Franz were truly welcoming and made us feel at home at their space. We also had access to a small kitchenette where we enjoyed coffee and chocolate that they made available to us. I would highly recommend Jose's place for anyone traveling to Rotterdam.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Great place! Didn't interact with hosts much other than checking in and leaving but they were nice and helpful. You get the whole top floor (3 rooms plus nice private bathroom) so plenty of space and privacy. The stairs are rather small and steep so if you have trouble with stairs it may not be ideal. 15-20 min walk to downtown and Rotterdam Central station. Everything was very clean. Bed was fairly comfy but is two doubles stuck together so there is that crack in the middle, but this is common in Europe. Supermarket nearby, and restaurants within walking distance. Great value, would highly reccomend!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: The place is clean and cozy and in a nice neighbourhood. The views from the windows helped us to  soak the atmosphere of the city. It's walkable distance from many sights. The hosts are helpful and welcoming.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Fijne, gastvrije eigenaren, mooie plek, veel privacy, toplocatie, we gaan zeker terug!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Heerlijk verblijf gehad bij Jose en Frans. De tweede keer alweer. De lokatie is fantastisch en de kamer is fijn met veel privacy. Jose en Frans zijn supergastvrij en behulpzaam. Als ik in Rotterdam moet zijn...

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: The flat is really nice. Specially cleaning and bringing. And you can have a good view for the church. And the owner is very kind. 👍💕

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
Jose e Frans sono stati davvero gentili e accoglienti, ci hanno messo subito a nostro agio. L'alloggio è confortevole, pulito e ben fornito di tutto l'indispensabile. Si gode di un'ottima privacy.
Speriamo di ritornarci!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: It was very amazing to be staying at Jose's place. He was very corteous all the time! My partner and I arrived late to his house - because our flight arrived late - and he received us with a smile, a dinner and a wine! We chatted late as if we were old friends! We felt really good. The house is beautiful, the accommodation (third floor) impecabble, clean, and its near from the central station, like 20 minutes walking. We were very comfortable. The sad part is that we spent a little time in Holland, and we would like to have enjoyed more of the company of Joseph and Francis and bought them some gift for the great reception. Highly recommend !! Thank you, José and Francis! I wish you all the best things. :)

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: The place is very clean and comfortable. We have two bright rooms with good view of church. Everything was perfect. Recommend!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
This is really a 5 star airbnb! The space is private (the whole top floor of their building), spacious - with large separate bedrooms, a bathroom and a small but stocked sitting/tea room - clean, and has a great view onto a large court with several gardens.
Jose is professional and upbeat. Quick to offer a drink, but also to get out of the way if you have a busy schedule. The location is on walking distance from the station, about 15 minutes. All in all highly recommended.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: La casa è carinissima, si trova in una posizione comoda ai mezzi, ma volendo si può arrivare in centro camminando per 15-20 minuti. La stanza si trova al secondo piano e gode di un'ottima privacy. José e Franz sono stati super gentili e disponibili. Consigliatissimo!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Such a kind and thoughtful host! My family and I were very comfortable in this delightful home with peaceful back garden. Our rooms were located on the top floor and were quiet and relaxing! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and felt incredibly welcomed by our host! Thank you so much!!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Jose's place was perfect for our needs - more than enough room for the three of us. Our favorite highlight of the space was the backyard with the beautiful garden and patio space. We chose to walk (vs. tram or bicycle) while we were in Rotterdam and found that Jose's place was in a great location. We will definitely look up this space the next time we are in Rotterdam.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Everything was clean and just as described. The house is a 15-20 min walk every from the central station and thus perfect for the stay, as the public transport is a bit expensive for tourists in Rotterdam. Jose and Franz are very nice and helpful! A minor negative point would be that due to the house being a bit older, the windows are not perfectly isolated, so that there is a bit of an air draught in the rooms when it is windy outside. But that's nothing one more level of the radiator can't solve.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: We stayed in the room with garden view and had the 2nd floor for our own. Everything was clean and as described.  Although Jose was ill, he helped us getting a reduced parking ticket for our car. we would recommend to stay at Jose's place,especially in spring or summer it must be very nice with the opportunity to sit outside in the garden.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Great spot in Rotterdam, very centrally located for just about anything you could wish for, gorgeous garden, room is a fun perch tucked under the eaves, up high overlooking all the neighbors’ gardens. Kitchenette next door, great bathroom. Just be forewarned of the (typical) very narrow stairs leading up to the room, and that “second floor” in Europe translates to “third floor) for Americans.☺️  Don’t bring your large suitcases - do what we do & have a smaller suitcase you bring in each night filled with that night’s need, leaving your large suitcase in the car. We found parking right in front, & paid our host directly for it (nominal fee).  He went out of his way to help me look for my glasses, even speaking with our Uber driver from the night before for us. A super superhost!!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
Our stay at Jose’s place was great! Good location, nice view from the window, clean rooms and bathroom, so much space - the whole floor! Jose is a good host, was really nice to meet him)
WiFi is a bit slow, but Rotterdam is so beautiful that you’ll forget about it)
Highly recommended!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: A really nice place to stay. The whole top floor is for guests, so nice for privacy. Spacious bathroom. I stayed in the back bedroom which overlooks the garden. Nice hosts with very easy communication and check in. I would definitely recommend staying here.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: We had a nice two nights stay at Jose’s at the second floor of a very pretty house. Travelling by bikes, we let our bikes in the street at night and had no problem. Very friendly host and nice French speaking!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Woke up at 6 AM to find out that the heater was off, no locks for the doors and customers should have more privacy and quite environnement.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Jose and his partner are great hosts. I stayed at their place with my sister for a city trip and we were both delighted by the location, friendliness, and their general way of looking at the airbnb experience. I can only recommend booking at their place. Genuinely lovely people,.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Very clean and bright rooms. We would definitely come back!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: José en Frans hun verblijf is netjes en ruim opgezet. Een goed bed, een fijne badkamer met bad en een nette ruimte voor koffie en thee, of om een kleine maaltijd klaar te maken in de magnetron. Verder erg gastvrij ontvangen, goede en snelle communicatie, maar ook zeer zeker privacy!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: The stay at Jose and Frans's place was absolutely amazing! Top location in the center of Rotterdam on main street; very open, patient and kind hosts; good rooms, big bathroom. No complaints!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Jose is an excellent host and has very good communication in English. This is a nice value as there is 2 large rooms each with a full sized bed and desk as well as a kitchen with a fridge to store your food or make coffee and a private bath.  The bus stops are conveniently located on the street in front of Jose's home.   Very nice stay.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Really recommend staying here - their top floor is light, comfortable and spacious. Very accommodating hosts :)

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Het verblijf is top. Heel goede locatie om van hieruit Rotterdam te bezoeken. De volledige bovenverdieping was tot onze beschikking met meer dan voldoende privacy. Twee fijne gastheren.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Thank you for enlightening my journey in Netherlands, Jose indeed is a very friendly host who I definitely would recommend anyone to stay at his place!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Wir hatten eine schöne Übernachtung bei Jose in Rotterdam. Der Empfang war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend, die Räume in der obersten Etage haben eine sehr ansprechende Größe und sind ausserordentlich sauber und gepflegt. Das nagelneu wirkende Bad ist ein Highlight. Es war alles perfekt und wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. Vielen Dank!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
We had a lovely stay at Jose’s house. The house is spacious and clean. Public transport is close by and multiple restaurants at walking distance. Sabor sabor was a Mexican restaurant we tried which was 200 Mts and good food. The stairs, as already mentioned in the listing, are slightly steep.
Hosts were very helpful for all our needs and made us feel welcome in their house. Overall we had a very pleasant stay at this house!

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Great place for our short stay in Rotterdam! Walkable distance from Centraal Station, Near to Rotterdam Zoo and quiet neighbourhood. Great privacy as we can occupy the whole third floor during our stay. Has a mini pantry for little beverages, no sink and washing machine, but José offered to help us if we needed it.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
We had a wonderful stay at Jose's place. The rooms are big and clean and all necessities are there. It's about 25 min walk from the central station.
The hosts are very nice, explained everything and were very approachable.
Rotterdam is a great city to explore. We recommend renting bikes and cycling around the city. Much faster than walking and public transportation and very safe due to the many separated bike lanes and traffic lights. Definitely recommend to stay at Jose's and would rent the rooms again if we come back.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: A great place to stay in Rotterdam. A classic dutch 3 story home with a beautiful back garden.  Easy access to transit to get to most classic tourist  destinations in less than 20 minutes.  Hosts were very attentive but also gave us tons of privacy.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
The apartment is not far from the central station (20 minutes walk). Downtown is also close to the apartment. Furthermore, I liked the view from the apartment window.
When it comes to Jose, he is so kind, helpful and friendly man.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments:
The room is very spacious and bright, comfortable bed and very clean.
Guests can use a small kitchen (fridge and microwave) and that is very useful for people like us who love to dine in when travelling. We had a very pleasant stay.

name: Third floor for guests near centre
comments: Outstanding hosts! Cozy centric place, top communication and still privacy needed given!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Finding the boat was so easy, as we came by public transport it is an easy ride by tram 25 from Rotterdam Centraal Station. This part of Rotterdam is very nice, but in easy reach of all amenities and requirements, shops and restaurants. A watertaxi from stop 38, Stieltjesstraat brings you to where ever you want to go, the City Center, Leuvehaven. The SS Rotterdam, Great. The ship itself is so unique to stay on, and so cosy with Nespresso machine in the bedroom/lounge. The wheel house is lovely to sit in with these lovely purple chairs. On deck at night time with all the little lights on having a meal and a drink, so enchanted. Mr. Lansdorp is a very kind man, and gives you all info needed about the ship and Rotterdam, what to see and what no to miss whilst staying on the ship. Next time we come with four, and then with an easy connecting door to the second bedroom. Perfect host, with beautiful stories to tell.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: I loved my stay in Hans' place. He got out of his way to help me with the checke-in. The boat is located in a good area of the city, with beautiful views. Would definitely come again to his boat.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Wonderful, fun experience staying on the Nautilus!  Hans was so nice to meet us and provide welcome beer and snacks!  We were a bit late, but Hans was so kind to wait for us.  His boat is so unique I would recommend staying here to anyone who enjoys a place out of the ordinary.   There are several places to gather and enjoy a glass of wine and soak up the sights and sounds of the neighborhood.  We loved our stay here!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
Hans was waiting for us when we arrived at the agreed time. He welcomed us with some beers and showed us around the boat. The seats on the deck were really cozy and so was the bedroom. I was surprised by the size of the boat! Hans also has his place there, but we had our privacy, this was absolutely not a problem. We really enjoyed our stay here.

Even though the boat is located by a quiet street, it's not that far from the citycenter. We walked there, I think it was only 15 minutes. We were able to park the car right in front of the boat. On sundays this is free.
(BTW: the cat is a real cutie ;-))

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: What a gem in Rotterdam! Hans made it easy to check-in and parking is available immediately in front of the boat for free during the evenings and early morning. His boat was truly a cozy and comfortable getaway, still very accessible to in the city but more secluded with amazing views.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: I enjoyed my stay on the boat, the view and the surroundings as well as the beer for my arrival that i was able to enjoy under the sun as well as the breakfast!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: An awesome property for a good value. Well furnished and comfortable and in a good location near the tram station and only a ten minute walk to the Erasmusbrug Bridge and waterfront. Hans is a warm and welcoming host who even provided snacks and a light breakfast for us. We will definitely stay again if given the opportunity.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: We genoten van volledige privacy. Ook de kindjes kregen hun plekje op de boot. Gezellig ingericht en van alles voorzien zoals het hoort. Heel charmant bootje met veel liefde, gezellig en warm ingericht. De gastheer gaf ons ook alle uitleg die nodig was om ten volste te genieten van ons veel te kort verblijfje. Top!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Great stay aboard the Nautilus. It's kitted out with everything you need and is well appointed in a tradition style. In fact it's so nice to sit out on  the deck and take in the view that we  couldn't bring ourselves to go out!Hans was a welcoming host who was very helpful.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Amazing stay! The boat is very cozy and makes you feel at home with the addition of a great view. Very close to the city centre, shops and everything you might need and very clean. Hans is an exceptional host. A lovely experience, definitely recommend!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
This is a unique experience, with a tranquil ambience. MB Nautilus is about 10 mins walk south of Erasmus Bridge, and five mins from a water taxi stop. The marina has bars, shops, and restaurants, the Pincoff Hotel is good for a late breakfast and meals, and there are 2 x supermarkets within a 10 mins walk.
If you love boats and water, or like me, have maritime connections, this is for you. You need to remember this is a 100+ year old boat, and its age and limitations mean some compromise on facilities. Having said that, plenty of hot water, a good clean shower and toilet, fridges, and a coffee machine, made this a comfortable stay. Relaxing on deck with a drink, or with friends in the evenings was delightful, but being on the water it can get a bit chilly in the evenings.
With a speed of 30 knots, the local water taxi's are very James Bond, and can get you in 5/10 mins in style, to the landing stages for the New York Hotel Restaurant, or near the town centre, and many other locations, from the pontoon 5 mins away on the river by the Pincoff Hotel.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Utilities worked great, super cozy atmosphere. A great, kind, and informative host. He is as likable as the actual houseboat. It was serene waking up to the sun beaming off the ocean into the windows of the boat. Very cool art and decor, and a great feel overall. God bless

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Boat very good for couple even thow can fit 4 people - there is no privacy in the bedrooms for  4! But it is a nice experience having a boat to sleep!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: We had a real pleasant stay for three nights! Hans is a great host and the Nautilus a real lovely boat! Once you come to Rotterdam you should try a stay on this boat! It is full of lovely little details and romantic lights. It's a great experience to live on a houseboad with all the bigger houses of a town around you. Also it lies in walking distance to the city center. We had a wonderulf sleep with the swaying of the waves and we loved to take our breakfast on deck while observing the seagulls around us. It's highly recommended by us.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: A lovely place to stay for a few days. Very spacious and great view of the canal. Comfy bed and great local tips, would recommend!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
This boat was lovely. It was such a cozy and romantic place for us to stay, the lights on the deck made this really something. The host was great as we wasn't so sure as to when we was turning up due to us biking from Ter Aer, so he waited for us to arrive which was helpful.
Cooking facilities on deck for breakfast was just what we needed and there was many ways to go to the centre as it wasn't far at all i.e. tram or bikes. There was many shops in the vicinity which was great for us as we was doing our own food!
I would definitely recommend this if you would like something different.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Wonderful place, definitely worth anyone's time in Rotterdam. If you're a very light sleeper like me you might struggle if it's heavily raining as there's little drip and drop noises, but even then I was comfortable and content. No complaints at all, and the host himself is very kind!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
The boat is really charming and a truly special accomodation. Hans put a lot of effort into the details and decoration. He welcomed us and gave us some basic information about the boat and the city. It would be nice to learn more about the boat and its features (there were some doors where we did not know where they lead to which was a bit scary in the evening).
The boat is very clean and has everything you need. It is super nice to sit outside and watch the sunset with a glass of wine. I would recommend to stay here if you are looking for a truly special home. As two girls, we were a little bit uncomfortable to be on the boat alone so I would recommend it more for couples (just my personal feeling).

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
Hans was very welcoming when we arrived and a joy to chat with and here about the history of the area, his lovely boat, the local attractions and food.
The top deck is very cozy, inviting and relaxing, there are blankets to keep you warm on cooler nights that were a nice touch as well as clear outdoor wind / rain curtains that could be rolled down.
This is a functioning and old boat, if you have any mobility issues it could be difficult to get on and off the boat and the stairs to get down to the bedroom are more of a ladder. But you're staying in an old boat, so these things are all part of the experience.
The second bed and bedroom are smaller than the main bed but is cozy.
Overall we really enjoyed our stay and would recommend having this unique experience.
Thanks so much Hans! Take care.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Well-preserved vessel with old-school vibes. Great outdoor sitting area, but the host seems very concerned about neighbors and noise so I'd suggest keeping afterhours outdoor socialization to a minimum. I would not recommend staying here if you have physical limitations that might keep you from walking down extremely narrow stairs or a swaying, steep gangplank. Otherwise the boat was a very comfortable and charming place to stay!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Absolutely superb stay on a fascinating boat. The amenities, beautiful old wood, lighting, flowers, sofas, cushions all added to the atmosphere. Cool drinks left in the fridge for us too after a long hot day at Efteling - the host was thoughtful and communicative

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: We really enjoyed our stay on the boat, lots of character, plenty of room and fun to stay in a different setting to normal. It's very nice to chill in one of the many seats around the deck and enjoy the view of the water. There are some bar restaurants nearby in the marina and you can walk to the cube buildings and indoor market fairly easily. Highly recommended.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Staying on this beautiful old boat is a magical way to enjoy a visit to Rotterdam. Comfortable beds and spacious seating areas on deck for leisurely evening drinks. Silence all around as you watch the light in the water change from dusk til night. Friendly attentive host

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
This houseboat is a delight and special BnB. We enjoyed our stay and had a great weekend in Rotterdam. Everything is nearby, good restaurants and we used Uber to move around town. The facilities on the BnB are in a nice and clean condition as well as the bedrooms. We believe that in the summer season this would be an even greater joy to spend time above deck sitting in the comfortable lounge possibilities.
We enjoyed our stay, and recommend this to any one who wants something different and a relaxing stay.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Mooie boot met veel privacy op een fijne locatie nabij OV

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
