comments: We had a lovely stay aboard Nautilus. We had our privacy although Hans was never too far should we need anything, which we didn't as his instructions were very good. A unique experience for anyone wondering what it's like to stay on a boat. Shower was lovely and hot and the boat was warm throughout. We'd love to revisit in the summertime. Thanks again!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: we really liked the Boat House for our 2 nights stay! We stayed with our 2 little kids. The klimb to get to the boat was a bit difficult, but we expected that. Also, if you have big luggage, that might be an adventure. But certainly, it's worth the effort. The location is a bit further away from restaurants, etc, but if you have a bike, it is easy to get to the city center. The highlight is certainly the rooftop bar. we decided not to go for dinner but to have our dinners at the boat. I would definitely recommend it since it's a great experience!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Super Boat, perfect Harper for street fishing.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
Heerlijke plek, lekker chillen in de stuurhut (tijdens een storm)
verwacht geen strakke hotelkamer maar trek je bootschoenen aan en kom aan boord.
Schipper voor een nacht. Aanrader, veel privacy, mooi dakterras.

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: Me and my bestie absolutely LOVED our stay on the Nautilus! We were there for 2 nights. It rained while we were there but the cover on the deck keeps it mostly dry! The bed (deceptively) doesn’t look comfortable but it really is, oh my, what a sleep we both got! Our host gave great recommendations, including a place where we had a wonderful dinner and watched boats pass by. He was very thorough when showing us how to use the lights etc in the spaces. We have recommended this stay to all our friends and are very eager to return :)

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments:
Hans' boat is a wonderful place to stay, definitely the highlight of our trip. Comfortable bed, clean bathrooms and beautiful views from the terrace. The location is excellent. Easy to get to from Rotterdam Centraal via tram and the city centre is walking distance.
If you have any mobility issues this is not the stay for you. Being a boat, it involves narrow walkways and a steep staircase/ladder into the bedroom. We had no issue moving around but it is something to be aware of before booking!

name: B&B BOAT NAUTILUS ROTTERDAM
comments: There’s quite a bit of work being done on the front of the boat, and it looks like a construction zone, rather than a clean ship. The inside of the cabin is nice, but smells like fuel or varnish. Opening the windows helped.

name: City center Rotterdam - Wijnhaven - panorama view
comments:
Our stay in the apartment was very comfortable.
We get the key from the friendly neighbour, who showed us the apartment and our place to park in the garage. He also gave us some tips what we must see in Rotterdam.
The apartment was perfectly cleaned and we got everything what we needed and we get a nice welcome gift from Dana!
The view from the 21'th floor, in which the apartment is, is amazing. The apartment from Dana is recommendable.

name: City center Rotterdam - Wijnhaven - panorama view
comments: Dana's apartment is lovely! The view it has is just amazing and the small terrace is the perfect spot for hangouts. The location is perfect and services are few min walk away. Dana is very easy to communicate with and a lovely host. We have been very happy with our choice! Thanks again!

name: City center Rotterdam - Wijnhaven - panorama view
comments: Dana is a great host. She provided us with all help we needed including some tips regarding where to go, where to eat. The apartment is also amazing with astonishing panoramic view. Location is in the very center with all sights within walking distance.

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: I can only recommend this place. Location right next to one of the main go-out streets in Rotterdam, clean, lots of space and with a host very keen on helping to make your stay as good as possible.

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: We loves our stay- the apartment is really beautiful and spacious and the location great. It's in the city centre but doesn't feel busy and there is a great bakery next door and plenty of cafes and shops around. The apartment has a really nice balcony and great living space and is very cosy.  JC was super easy to communicate with and would highly recommend this place!

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: Lovely light spacious apartment well located for bars and restaurants. Amazing bakery and fish restaurant right underneath!

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: Very good area in Rotterdam. Can be a bit noisy if windows are open, lots of bars and restaurants in the neighborhood. Nice and clean apartment!

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments:
Nice Apartment, very clean and a super Communication with the host!! only a few fly screens at the windows and the balcony door would be nice 😃. We have a Great stay in Rotterdam. The Apartment is exactly in centrum only a few minutes away from Markthal and also close to Euromast. Can’t say anything Bad about it. Recommendation.
Greetings Andy

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: Great apartment in the center of Rotterdam - bright, functional and even has a balcony. Would recomend!

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment is in a fantastic location and close to amenities. The area has a great vibe and we loved roaming the nearby streets. The place was clean and surprisingly spacious. Rooms are comfortable especially the couch and living room! We very much enjoyed our stay and would not hesitate to recommend this place or stay again in future.

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: Great apartment in excellent location to get to know central Rotterdam. Lovely space to come back to in evenings and chill out. The breeze on the balcony is so welcome in hot weather. Everything that anyone could need is available. The stairs are a bit of a challenge though. Even so I would stay here again. Witte de Wittstraat is where it’s all at for food and drinks.

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam center
comments: The apartment looks like in the pictures, is big and centric. Unfortunately, as it is in the attic it is extremely hot in Summer time and it has not Aircon. My family and I had a bad experience during our staying as we couldn't sleep at all: the heat, the outside noise, and multiple insect bites on our body. This happened to my son and I, while sleeping in the main bedroom. Therefore, it was a really bad experience and we interrupted our vacation trip due to allergic reactions and lack of sleep. The Airbnb support was very empathetic and helpful to negotiate with the host a compensation. Thank you Airbnb team! For future guests, if you rent this place, be aware of the heat on  Summer time  and....as strange as it sounds, you should consider bringing insect repellent to use before sleeping (!!)....

name: Fully Renovated Design Loft, Next to Euromast Park
comments:
The apartment was exactly as seen in the pictures. Very well lighted and beautifully decorated. We felt very comfortable staying at Jamils place. Great neighborhood as well!
I would definitely recommend this apartment even though I would advise not to be more than 4 people.

name: Fully Renovated Design Loft, Next to Euromast Park
comments: In comparison to some of the other parts of Rotterdam, the block within which you find Jamil's flat may look a little bit plain. But up the stairs, and through the door it is like you enter a different world of green plants, sky and trees out the windows, and beautiful birdsong. The kitchen is extremely functional, and the apartment feels expansive but also cozy. It's a great relaxing place, close to the metro and several tram lines. There's a bike shop close by, and several bike share services that made it convenient to get around as well (mobike and donkey, at least as of April 2019). As a guest staying for a couple weeks, it really felt like a home away from home.

name: Fully Renovated Design Loft, Next to Euromast Park
comments: This was the perfect place to stay during my visit to Rotterdam. The flat was spacious, stylish, and clean - exactly as described. Jamila is a great host, very responsive and easily reached. The street is almost totally residential, but just a few blocks in either direction bring you to streets full of shops and cafes that should meet your needs. The metro is also a short walk away. I would recommend this rental.

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments:
I had a fantastic time while in Rotterdam and Bernardet´s house exceeded all my expectations. The room is lovely, very bright and pleasant, with an en suite toilet and a fantastic shower.I couldn´t have wished for a better place to stay while in the city. Very central in a diverse area with loads of shops and bars, art galleries and a lovely park.
Metro station is just two minutes away so location is ideal.
Bernardet is charming, very welcoming, friendly and very generous indeed she made sure that I felt at home.
A real privilege meeting her.
I should be back very soon I hope.
Thank you very much Bernardet

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: My sister and I enjoyed our stay at Bernadet's home! It has everything you need and it is very near the museums and vibrant Witte street. Bernadet was very accommodating and helpful, she also gave us good tips on places to visit while we were in Rotterdam. Would definitely stay again.

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet is kind and inviting. The space is clean and comfy, with plenty of privacy.

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay with Bernadet. The set up of her apartment is great because you have your own floor with its own bathroom/shower. She's super nice and had so many details worked out: bottled water, coffee, tea, snacks, extra trash bags for dirty laundry, soap, shampoo, and probably more I can't remember right now. Check in was easy.
The apartment is about two minutes from the nearest metro station and you can walk to/from the main train station in about 15 minutes. It's about ten minutes to a street with a bunch of shops and restaurants but not in a busy area so it's nice and peaceful at night.
We'd definitely stay with Bernadet again.

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: This is my first experience using AirBnB and it was a great start. Bernadet's place is perfect for exploring the wonderful city of Rotterdam. It has everything you could possibly need! Great location, very quiet but still very central, the city centre is literally a short walk away, neighbourhood felt safe and secure. The room itself is lovely, it is very private, up it's own set of stairs in the apartment, with it's own very modern and clean bathroom facilities, it's basically like having the place to yourself. All basic amenities are provided with thoughtful extra's, fridge, tea and coffee, kettle, toiletries etc. The bed is amazingly comfortable, we haven't slept that well in our own bed for years! Bernadet herself was the perfect host, very friendly and welcoming, on hand for anything you need but at the same time very respectful of your privacy. Highly recommended!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet's place is the perfect place to stay if you are going to Rotterdam! The room is big and bright, the place is clean and tidy and Bernadet is a very welcoming host. Also the location is good. Definitely recommended!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: This is an amazing airbnb with a loving host! The room was excellent, super clean and cosy. The bathroom is brand new. You're close to an arty barstreet and everything is nearby (walking distance from the station). Highly recommend this airbnb :D

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadete provides a lovely, clean, comfortable, roomy space that is within walking distance to the happening part of town, yet it is on a quiet street far enough away from the busy noisy area for an excellent nights rest. The light-blocking curtains are so helpful for sleeping during the long summer days in Rotterdam. We loved how the whimsical stairs took us up to our own oasis. We felt very cared for and especially enjoyed the chocolate! Thank you Bernadete for the wonderful few days staying with you!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: We stayed for a weekend at Bernadet's place to see the highlights of Rotterdam, overall we were very pleased with our stay here. The room is light, large, tastefully decorated and with little extra's like coffee/tea, towels, a small fridge, maps and info brochures to make the stay extra special. The toilet and shower rooms are for private use. Bernadet was helpful with tips related to local amenities and helped us to organize parking. +/- 10 min walk to the centre (Blaak). ErasmusMC is literally around the corner so perfect for employees/ visitors. Highly recommended!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet's apartment is well situated, a walking distance from the central railway station where I arrived to. It's a cosy room with private toilet and bathroom in the upper floor of the apartment where Bernadet lives herself. It was in good privacy and I enjoyed my short visit there perfectly. It was a right choice for the purpose of my business travel alone. Bernadet is a friendly warmhearted and helpful person who was well in contact with me before my arrival. I enjoyed a lot and would recommend this to everyone!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Comfortable and private room in a nice location (about 15-20 minute walk from the city center). The room is up 2 narrow flights of stairs so be prepared to haul luggage.  I enjoyed my stay and would recommend it for anyone looking to stay in Rotterdam.

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet was very friendly and helpfull! After a longday standing at my booth at the Object, she helped me out and ordered by telephone a lovely diner and shared a glass of white wine, which was very hospitable! Thanks for that! The shower was luxurious and the bed slept good! I had a good stay at her place, I really would recommend her!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Clean, great spot and had our privacy. Bernadette is Great and very helpfull. I felt like home. Thnx

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: De airbnb van Bernadet is alles wat je nodig hebt voor een citytripje naar Rotterdam. De ligging is rustig, maar vlakbij (op wandelafstand) het centrum. Bernadet is heel vriendelijk, was flexibel bij het inchecken en is steeds bereikbaar. De kamer met eigen badkamer en toilet zorgen ervoor dat je alle nodige privacy hebt. Fijne plek in een fijne stad, aanrader!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet's apartment is clean and bright. It is very convenient from Rotterdam CS to her place by foot. She is very friendly and helpful and gave us some advice to explore the city as well. I'd like to be here again!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: I really enjoyed my stay at Bernadet's place. I felt warmly welcomed and had all the help and support that I needed during my stay. Bernadet is a really kind and friendly host. Her place is very cozy and comfortable (you have your own privacy). I truly recommend staying with Bernadet. All the best!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet's place was a wonderful place to rest in Rotterdam. It was plenty spacious for two people, had great natural light, and was comfortable to have breakfast at the table. Thank you for a great stay!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Friendly, homely place with great privacy considering you're staying in someone's home. Good mattress and windows that open. Host Bernadette is really accommodating, easy to communicate with. Nice that it has a workspace and good wifi - the only thing I missed was the refrigerator that was listed under amenities but I might have misinterpreted that. Thanks for having me visit!

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments: Bernadet is a very friendly lady, welcomes you  warmly and makes sure you're settled in nicely. She also gives great tips to get around the city. She checks in with you, but gives you more than enough privacy as well. I would really recommend staying here. The location is ideal, really central, yet in a calm neighbourhood with a lot of nice hotspots closeby .

name: Top spot Rotterdam centre, own bathroom/toilet
comments:
Bernadet is a friendly and kind host. The accomodation is cozy and clean and you can expect exactly what you see on the photos. Central location but the room (you have the top floor of her house) overlooks the garden and a quiet side street.
The best cafes and bakeries (Tealab, Petitjean bakery with the second best croissants of the country, Jordy'bakery, 30ml, Kino cafe...etc.) are closeby. If you choose to walk towards the center you find yourself in Museumpark within 5 minutes.
I live in the city and choose the room for my sister who came to visit me. I knew Bernadet´s neighbourhood but still it was beyond our expectations.

name: Artsy & cosy hostel Rotterdam female dorm
comments: nice calm hostel. Near the centre but a quiet street. helpfull staff, clean rooms and sheets. good price

name: Artsy & cosy hostel Rotterdam female dorm
comments: Great hostel on a quiet street between two bustling streets that have diverse food options around. Very well connected to public transportation and a short walk to a lot of cool spaces in Rotterdam. Everyone at the hostel was great, friendly and the overall vibes were amazing. DEFINITELY RECOMMEND if you're ever in Rotterdam. (They have soo many maps, it's like a geographer's and urban planner's heaven.)

name: Artsy & cosy hostel Rotterdam female dorm
comments: I had a good time in that hostel. Very near to the central station and in a  quiet street :)

name: Artsy & cosy hostel Rotterdam female dorm
comments:
I don’t think you could ask for much more from a hostel. The place is well organised and clean and the staff were friendly. Other guests generally were very friendly and respectful.
The location is good - very central and easy to access. A couple of times I felt slightly uncomfortable when walking back late at night, but that may have just been my imagination.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Very modern apartment with spectacular view and art design. Evrything you need from dish washer, washing machine, wifi, big kitchen. Close to beach, supermarket, train.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: This place is just incredible. We have been visiting the Hoek for 60 years and have never had a house with such an incredible view! The location right by the waterway and a 10 minute stroll to the town centre is perfect. The house itself is beautiful and spacious. The terraces made our trip. We didn't want to leave. Thanks Ben and Anne!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Beautiful view and spacious home in a perfect location, close to the beach and harbor!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: This is a beautiful, spacious, very clean and well taken care of apartment. The view from the apartment is awesome. A " home away from home." Everything you need is there and more. Ben is a very friendly and professional host. I would recommend this to all my friends and family that are looking for a place to stay in the Netherlands.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: If you love ship spotting, amazing sea views and a beautiful and comfortable apartment, then this is the place for you! The apartment is modern, beautifully decorated with art works, good quality furniture and excellent appliances. The host was very friendly and helpful. We loved our stay and will definitely use the accommodation again.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: What a fantastic house!  Loved the location.  Spent considerable time on the balcony watching the ships go by.  Also quite close to the beach.  The house itself is beautiful and very stylish.  Overall, we had a great stay.  Thanks!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Excellent views over the river "nieuwe maas" with ships passing by (binoculars provided). 10 minutes walk to the beach front and supermarket / subway station. Luxurious appartment with lovely art, a great fireplace, and well-equipped kitchen. Lots of sunshine and privacy too. Great value for money.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Fantastisch huis, geweldige omgeving. Je bewoont alleen de eerste verdieping, de eigenaren wonen eronder; maar je merkt daar helemaal niets van, de privacy is gegarandeerd.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: The photos don’t show how gorgeous this place is. The space is huge and bright, with lovely views. It’s dark and quiet at night and during the daytime the sun shines through the huge windows and doors. The balconies are nice too. The house is very clean and comfortable and has everything you need. We had a wonderful stay, the house was very relaxing and the location is perfect. We spent hours walking along the beach and watching the ferries. Thank you Ben and Anne!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments:
We had a great time during our ten-day stay. We enjoyed the spacious and beautifully arranged apartment with a fantastic view.
The nearby beach and the neighborhood are perfect for walks and bike tours.
Ben and Anne were very welcoming and supportive during our stay.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: This is a beautiful house with stunning views and the host went out of his way to assist us and create a perfect stay. It is our second stay and I’ll definitely consider Ben’s place again in future. He was very helpful and extremely reliable and the house is a dream!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: The appartment is very spacious and very clean, and offers an amazing view. We felt very comfy at Ben's place and had a great time, especially when the weather went a bit crazy outside. Thank you!

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: great experience in Ben's house, everything you need to feel at home. great view also in the winter season. For sure Ben and Ann put a lot of passion to design the furniture composition. strongly suggested for a family with kids.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Die Wohnung ist einfach nur super. Sie ist sehr groß und die Ausstattung sehr toll. Für die Kinder waren die vorbeifahrenden Schiffe das absolute Hightlight. Von der Dachterasse aus konnte man diese noch besser beobachten. Besonders abends kann man oben noch bei einem kleinen Umtrunk die Aussicht genießen. Ben hat uns persönlich empfangen und war immer für uns erreichbar, wenn wir was gebraucht haben. Der Supermarkt ist ca. 5 Gehminuten weg. Von hier aus kann man auch ganz gemütlich über den Pier den Strand erreichen. Wir haben hier wirklich schöne Tage verbracht und war für uns fast ein wenig zu kurz. Wir würden sehr gerne wiederkommen.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments:
We had a a great stay here in Hook of Holland, thanks to Ben and Anne for a fabulous Airbnb! The apartment had everything we needed, beautifully decorated and we felt very comfortable. Lovely morning sun in the luxurious master bedroom, daytime sun in the open lounge/diner, super roof terrace. We enjoyed the views onto the estuary watching the ships. Sadly the fort museum and cafe directly opposite were still shut as it is out of season but lots of other things to do nearby. We were in walking distance to the train station (you can jump on to get straight to Rotterdam in 30 mins) and walking distance to the parade of shops where there is a Lidl, ice cream shop, restaurant etc. And in the other direction, wonderfully in walking distance to the sandy beach and all of the beach bar/restaurants. We ate very well during our trip! Plus great cycling on the cycle pathways. A great spot - worth a visit.
Thanks to Ben for being so helpful and his warm welcome. Highly recommended.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments:
Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. Die große Wohnung ist wunderschön eingerichtet, der Blick auf den Hafen gigantisch und Ben sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Wir haben selten in einer so wunderbaren Unterkunft Urlaub gemacht.
Ein Highlight neben allen, schon mehrfach von anderen Gästen beschriebenen Dingen, sind die Bilder in der Wohnung. Ich empfehle allen Gästen mehr als nur einen Blick darauf zu werfen.
Wir kommen bestimmt wieder.
Vielen Dank an Ben und Anne für dieses traumhafte Feriendomizil.

name: Luxe appartement nabij zee, strand en duinen
comments: Ben was a wonderful and attentive host. He is so kind, helpful, and friendly. The home is beautiful and well appointed, in a very safe, peaceful location with a stunning view of the sea. The metro, restaurants, and shopping are within a few minutes walk, as are several attractions. This home was perfect for our first, and definitely not last, visit to The Netherlands. Thank you!!

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Amazing weekend. I was there for work but wow the penthouse was spectacular. The views were 10/10 and it was a beautiful home with everything equipped. The hosts were beyond brilliant. They are their for you and for your every need. Such amazing guys. Would definitely come back.

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Julien and Michel were very friendly & attentive hosts. The Apartment has been very well thought out and has everything you could possibly need, and the view is simply amazing. Will definitely be booking again when I go back to Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Amazing apartment with amazing view, definitely will stay there again if we go travel to holland again. Julien and Michel were super helpful and friendly!!

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments:
Julien and Michel's flat is a cut above the rest. We enjoyed near panoramic views of Rotterdam, the Maas river, and watched the lights of he city by night. The best part of this incredible penthouse is the balcony on the 27th floor with full afternoon and evening sun.
All of the appliances are deluxe and the location exceptional. Julien and Michel are excellent hosts, great communicators, warm and welcoming.
Enjoy this fantastic place - you don't want to miss out!!

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Everything was great in Julien & Michels Appartment. You have a great view from that appartment and 3 for yourself and a nice terrasse. We enjoyed the time in the appartment very much and remarked this spot for our next visit!

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Very nice place with incredible view!

name: Luxurious penthouse in the center of Rotterdam
comments: Great, central location, a stunning view, especially at night and very forthcoming and super responsive hosts.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Lance's apartment is an ideal place for short staying, e.g., tourists, business travelers, etc. The apartment is just near the Erasmus Bridge, so you can walk easily to the bridge and see the beautiful views of the harbor. The downtown (city hall, Beurs, Blaak, etc.) is also quite nearby (we often walked to these places during our 4-week staying).

The apartment is also very accurately described in the website. It is furnished and decorated very well, showing Lance is a man of taste. Lance is also very considerate and keeps a very good storage of stuffs (coffee, tea, towels, etc.) in the apartment. It was a comfortable and cozy staying there for us, so I highly recommend it.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: lance is a great host. communication and hospitality was super. location is perfect if you want to be close to restaurants, bars, and the cultural highlights of rotterdam. highly recommended!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Communication with Lance before arrival, during my stay was excellent although I didn't get to meet Lance in person. The location of the apartment is perfect, walkable distance with most attractions! The apartment looked exactly the same with the photos, clean, bright, cozy and pretty. It is not big but it can fit 4 people with no problem as it got a double bed and a inflatable double bed. It has everything you need, equipped kitchen, coffee machine, washing machine, etc. I really enjoyed my stay there and would highly recommend this place to anyone!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Had a great weekend in Rotterdam at Lance's place. Easy check in and Lance was very communicative. The flat is well located for the metro or bike hire, and there are streets nearby with lots of shops and nice restaurants/cafes.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance's place is perfectly located for exploring Rotterdam. It's right in the middle of everything in one of the better neighborhoods in Rotterdam. It faces a busy street but the bedroom is in the back and is quiet and very comfortable. I stayed at Lance's place with my partner as one stop on a long bike tour across the Netherlands, so the ability to do laundry was very useful to us. We were only there two nights but wished we could have stayed longer.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Well in my mind I've been going back and forth. Lances apartment my be the best I have stayed in with Airbnb.
You saw my star ratings there was really nothing close to being seriously bad, the steps were a little to handle for
A 70 year old man with back and hip prpblems. The Nieuwe Maas river is 1/4 of mile walk straight out in front and it
Pubs and restaurants plus you catch the harbor cruise there. Behind the apartment you walk 5 blocks and your a
street with plenty of, again pubs, restaurants, shop, and coffee shops. Last but not least is the tram stop almost out
front door, tram 8 takes to the central station. I would highly recommend Lances apartment for anyone staying in Amsterdam.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance's apartment was perfectly located for our needs.  I was in Rotterdam to compete in the World Championship Triathlon Event.  The American team host hotel was no more than 150 yds from our front door.  Lance was a very gracious host.  We were on time in our arrival and Lance was there to greet us.  He was very helpful in his instructions and very responsive to our questions.  We knew from the description that the apt was small, but it was quite efficient and certainly offered a great deal more than a hotel room.  Because of the windows facing the street, the apt is very bright and friendly.  The apt is very clean.  The steep, narrow, stairs took some getting used to but we were warned of this.  We would highly recommend this apartment!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance was great ! He even solved a last minute problem at 7:30 am in the morning , very responsive and has so much knowledge abt home because he had lived there , so he really knows what he is and you are talking about which is very important at stays through Airbnb. The location of the apartment was perfect , I needed to attend a conference at the Mainport Hotel which is literally accross the street . One of my best stays at airbnb , thank you very much once more Lance : it was you who made it perfect !

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance´s place is exactly as described or even better.  Very bright flat with a nice view of town. Perfect location, easy acess from the station and very close to main attractions in Rotterdam.  The fully equiped kitchen and the breakfast offered are a real plus.  Very nice decoration! Lance is quick to answer messages and was very kind in helping me with my luggage at check in. I would certainly reccomend his place!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment was great, really close to touristic places of the city. Lance left us some food for breakfast. The beds were really confortable. My friends and I totally recommend it!
Lance was very nice, he let us check in before the official hour because we arrived at 12 in the morning, and also check out later because our flight was at 7pm.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance was a wonderful host. He even greeted us at the apartment at a very late hour as our flight was cancelled and the journey delayed. The apartment has all the necessities (towels, cooking equipment etc.). It's located very close to the Erasmus bridge and a metro station (1 min walking distance) which made it very easy to explore Rotterdam city. The apartment was very clean and the bed super comfortable. Would definitely stay there again!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance was very helpful and friendly. Check-in was easy with him. The apartment has a great location, you can do everything by foot but there is also public transportation around. There is a supermarket and a car park nearby too. However, we found the apartment quite noisy at night. One of us was sleeping on the EZ bed (comfy!) in the room towards the street and the bedroom goes out to the back where people were playing music and partying quite loudly while we were there (July). We would still recommend this place to stay in when you come to Rotterdam!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Excellent place, convenient to supermarket (5-7min walk) and central and about 5min walk to nearest metro. The place is exactly like the pictures. Love the natural lights that stream in through the windows. Would recommend to other guests. Very near (abt 7-10min) walk to the waterbus that takes you to the windmill attraction.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: I can highly recommend Lance's place to anyone looking to stay in Rotterdam. I stayed as a business traveller and found that Lance's place has everything I needed, and more, for my stay. The apartment is in a great location, on a busy road but not so much that the noise is disturbing - the bedroom is very quiet. I felt that leaving some breakfast items was a lovely touch.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: All the other positive reviews are spot on! Great host! Very thoughtfully presented! Great location...

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance was a really great host. He was responsive, easily made last minute alteration to our booking. The place itself has few issues: cold air and street sounds from the windows in the living room, and little surface in the bathroom/kitchen/fridge. Other than that, we liked the apartment. The bed was comfortable. Heating, water - everything worked well. The apartment was very welcoming, and had everything we needed, and even more.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Our 3 days stay at Lance's place was great! It was a cosy appartement at walking distance from one of the best streets in Rotterdam, "De Witte De With straat". We really recommend this place!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
The best AirBnB we have stayed in. Lance provided many small and thoughtful touches to the place - milk in the fridge, small cereal to get us started, kitchen was well equipped. The place was spotlessly clean and though on a busy street, the noise didn’t bother us at all.
Great location, 3 mins walk to the metro and a supermarket.
Lance was there to greet us when we arrived and was good to communicate with prior to arriving

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Great location. Very well explained  how to get there, Less then a minute from tram stop, 20 min walk from central station. Close to shops, cafes and restaurants. The apartment is very clean, stylish, not too big,but comfy for four of us.  Lance provided many small and thoughtful touches to the place , milk in the fridge,juice, cereal , coffee...Enough to start the day. Great view from the app,, towards Erasmus bridge, maybe a bit busy street, but that was not a problem at all. Comfy beds, kitchen well equipped, great communication  ,everything perfect. We definitely recommend this place for stay.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Apartment was just as described. Clean, organized and with all necessities. It had a nice open view and about 5-10 mins away from the centre. Hosts are friendly and always available when needed.
Great value for this stay!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is perfect for a quick stop at Rotterdam. It was perfectly clean and located near the streets with restaurants, activities... I recommend !

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
We spend two nights at the apartment and I would definitely book it again.
The location of the flat is perfect, the shopping street, all the bars and clubs aswell as some sights like the Erasmus bridge and the Markthal are within walking distance.
The flat was clean and was equipped with everything you may need (Coffe Mashine, microwave, washing machine, ...).
The host always replied within a couple of minutes if we needed anything and the check in was super easy aswell.
So go ahead and book this apartment, you won’t regret it.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance is a great host. He shows you the most important things in the Appartement and gives you a good feeling being his guests. The Appartement is really great and somehow inspiring because the big windows in the living room. We started to feel home in Rotterdam mostly because the Appartement was so cosy. THANK YOU, we will come back.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Location, location, location! This apartment is situated at a prime spot and all highlights are within walking distance. The apartment is cleverly designed with all the gadgets you need.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance  welcome me very nicely on my arrival. The flat is great and is very well equipped. It is clean, very light and located in a very nice central area of Rotterdam. Next time, I will for sure want to stay here again. Top

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Everything is great. Communication is great, the location is great, view from the windows is incredible (I loved it), what else can I add?

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Overall a great place to stay. Hosts included some cereals, milk, orange juice, jams, and basic cooking supplies which made our stay very pleasant. The space is nice for 2 people, has a small balcony where the washer is that allowed for some fresh air. Loved the location

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: The flat is in a brilliant location and Lance catered for us really well, meeting us to show us around on arrival and giving some great tips. Sadly the flat was not clean, as we would have expected, which is the only reason we can't give a higher review.  Judging by other reviews this hasn't been an issue for others staying.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Super nice welcome, the flat is very well equipped and we loved the location! One highlight was the bluetooth music system:)

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance is a very welcoming host!!! The apartment is very well situated and it has everything you need for a short tome stay. The bedroom is quiet. The living room is more noisy, due to the street in front of it and the cars passing by. I would advise to rent the flat only if you are a two and you sleep in the bedroom.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Lance's place was ideally located close to major tourist attractions, close to amenities, restaurants and bars as well easy access to the central train station for days trips to other places in the Netherlands. Lance himself was delightful and kind, even let us dump bags in earlier than the check in time whilst the place was being cleaned. The apartment itself was well stocked and had a full set of things like a washing machine and kitchenette. Would highly recommend.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Absolutely brilliant. Loved the decor (you will notice it cleverly compliments an artwork you can see from the lovely view out the window), the breakfast, essentials and coffee provided. Best of all was the location. Right near the Erasmus Bridge, a tram stop and a metro stop, allowing you to easily go anywhere in Rotterdam. Lance was lovely. I would definitely stay again.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Was here for a conference for a week and this was the perfect location. So close to places to walk and eat, Metro to get around too. It was fabulous to have my own place with breakfast snacks and coffee provided by Lance were awesome. The kitchen was worked for heating up leftovers. Living room great for hanging out  watching bikers below.  I enjoyed opening the windows and having a little balcony. Having a washer dryer made it even more perfect! The Indian restaurant next door was good convenient for the night of my arrival.  I would definitely recommend and for sure stay here again!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Lance was very kind and helpful. The inly thing we did not really like was that the street was very very noisy.
I recommend this place!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam. The place is very centrally located and very clean. We would definitely come back and can recommend it. The bed is comfy and the living room is big and bright.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Super Unterkunft mit überragender Lage. Es war alles problemlos zu Fuß zu erreichen und die Erasmus Brücke direkt vor der Tür war mein Highlight. Die Wohnung entsprach genau den Bildern also gab's hier keine Überraschungen. Lance ist ein toller Gastgeber und ich hatte hier eine tolle Zeit. Gerne wieder!

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Much smaller and the stairs were a surprise. We are in our late 70's and not what we expected.
The location was great, nice neighborhood with many resturants. The LR had a lovely view and river close.
The bathroom very small but good water pressure.
Lance had everything you needed and more for breakfast,a real treat.
We enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Great location! Tons of restaurants, shopping, sites to see - all in walking distance. Metro is literally around the corner and just a 30 min ride to The Hague. Groceries and pharmacy across the street. Quiet neighbors, felt safe walking around. The place is small but works for two, not so sure about three people, but if you're not shy then it'll be fine. Lance is a fabulous host, lots of information to share. We had a lovely 4 night stay.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
We had a pleasant stay in this accommodation, which boasts a fantastic location—easily accessible by foot, metro, or tram. The bed was very comfortable, and the small kitchen was well-equipped, perfect for preparing meals. A special highlight was the thoughtful provision of complimentary amenities, including orange juice, bread, coffee, and more, which meant we didn’t have to worry about breakfast on our first day—a lovely touch!
However, there were a couple of downsides. The single-glazed windows let in a significant amount of street noise, and more importantly, they made the rooms quite cold. Despite the presence of three electric heaters in the living area, they struggled to bring the room to a comfortable temperature within a few hours (it was around 0°C outside).
Overall, the stay was enjoyable, but some improvements in insulation or heating would make it even better during colder months.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments: Fabulous location.  We were attending a 2 day event at Rotterdam Ahoy and the metro station a few mins away was easy to use back and forth both days.  Loved the stained glass window panels.  Also the breakfast items were a definite bonus.

name: MyPlace - Apartment in Central Rotterdam
comments:
Lance was a great host, and the apartment itself is fantastic—very bright, plenty of space, has everything you need. Great location as well, right at Erasmus bridge, many other hotels in the area so it’s well-serviced, plus its steps to the metro.
Thanks Lance!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: We absolutely loved it!! I feel like an Airbnb superhero for finding such an amazing accommodation.  The easy going atmosphere was the perfect remedy to our plane ride from NY! So much room to relax upstairs and downstairs, cook, watch Tv and read travel guides by the wood burning stove. It's also just a short drive to Rotterdam if you are looking for night life! Marieke is a very welcoming host while also offering us a lot of privacy. We would only be so lucky to return again!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
We had a great stay. It was rather on the chilly side but after we heated the wood stove it got warm and cozy upstairs.
The place is very clean with a great bed, very nice and helpful hosts with lots of privacy.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
Surroundings beautiful. Apartment very nicely decorated and everything is provided for.
Minus is that there is no private sitting area outside and that it is very noisy inside with the road at the front and back, the flight path of Rotterdam airport overhead and the 3 companies on the premises including one right beneath the bedroom. That wasn't to nice when they start hauling stuff around first thing in the morning, and playing loud dance music at 06:30 Saturday morning wasn't appreciated either.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
Our stay in Marieke & Arne’s place was a unique experience. As described in the listing, it is an old barn that is thoroughly and thoughtfully renovated. It is super clean and complete. On the ground floor there is the bathroom and kitchen area, with everything you need for an ultra-comfortable stay (dishwasher, coffee machine and even coffee pads, tea, etc ). The bathroom looks so new and clean that you think you are the first one using it after the renovation!
Upstairs, there is a very spacious living room, with a large and cosy couch (as well as TV, stereo system, etc.). There is also the bedroom, with a very comfortable bed.
The place is surrounded by beautiful landscapes and biking/hiking routes. It is calm and quiet, and the same time very close to shops, restaurants and bike rentals (5-7 mins by car). You can very easily reach the beautiful city of Delft, and many other great places (such awesome beaches, etc.).
Check-in and check-out was also very smooth.
We were there during the weekend as well as working days, and there was no disturbing noise to complain about.
Marieke and Arne are great people to meet. Very friendly hosts and always there if you need something. It was a real pleasure for us to meeting them.
Overall, our stay was incredible and there is absolutely nothing to complain. We strongly recommend the place if you are looking for relaxing and comfortable spot to spend some quality time.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Marieke & Arne zijn geweldige hosts. Ze gaven ons volledige privacy en waren heel flexibel qua aankomst- en vertrektijden. Het appartement is van alle gemakken voorzien. Er is in de keuken ook echt alles aanwezig wat je nodig hebt om uitgebreid te koken. Wij vonden heel leuk dat wij volop gebruik mochten maken van de houtkachel wat veel sfeer toevoegt aan je verblijf. De bedden waren heerlijk en de omgeving rustig. Wij waren daar op een weekend met zeer slecht weer maar het appartement biedt genoeg mogelijkheden (veel ruimte, leuke zitplekken, spelletjes, boeken, de houtkachel) om te onthaasten. Wij zullen deze AirBnB zeker aanbevelen aan vrienden en familie.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Een leuke locatie. Keurig ingericht. Complete met alle benodigde keuken-accessoires. Centraal gelegen tussen Rotterdam en Delft. Auto te parkeren op ongeveer 200-300m. Veel privacy. We waren in de winter en dus gezellig gebruik kunnen maken van de haard. Hout wordt voldoende door verhuurder verstrekt. Het lawaai viel ons erg mee. Zeker een aanrader!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
Stayed for a week in February and location is great for visiting Rotterdam, Delft, Kinderdijk and Dordrecht etc. Walking paths straight from the door, surrounded by a network of water with lots of different birds to spot. You can look at and plan the routes in that area on http://wandelnet.wandelen123.nl/
The barn is sandwiched between a river carrying large barges of produce and a road which can be quite busy and fast, despite it being single track. You are also close to the airport and a railway line so there is quite a lot of noise pollution although your senses are heightened when staying somewhere different. The log fire was well used, keeping the upstairs cosy in the evenings but the kitchen was freezing! It was a very cold week though.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Marieke & Arne were very welcoming from the start and were ideal hosts. The location really is perfect. Close enough to both delft and Rotterdam that you can ride to either within 20 mins, and the paths too both are stunning. Genuinely an amazing location, we did not realise it was in the middle of a nature reserve! Very quiet and peaceful with lovely views and a very cute street leading to it with an amazing church. We had lots of plans but ended up just riding around and exploring the area, stayed 6 nights and could easily have spent another 6 there! Add to that that it takes around 45 minutes to drive to Schipol airport and it really is a great location. The barn itself was better than I had expected, and I was expecting it to be nice! Everything you need for your stay is provided. You don’t have to buy a thing apart from groceries. The pictures don’t do the place justice. A really lovely rainfall style walk in shower, plenty of towels provided and even shower soap + shampoo/conditioner make for a good morning. The kitchen is fully equipped and has all the cleaning products / dishwasher tablets / bin bags etc you’d need. Also had tea coffee and spices for cooking, really thoughtful. Upstairs was a much bigger area than the pictures make it seem. I was worried at 6ft the ceilings might be too low but was very wrong as I had plenty of space. Comfy sofa and a nice place to be! The only three cons I have with the place, all of which are upstairs. When we went it was quite hot and the upstairs of the place did feel considerably hotter than outside. The hosts do provide fans for use which make it tolerable but some kind of dehumidifier or cooling unit would have made it a much more pleasant stay. It was exceedingly hot during our stay though so please do not let this discourage you. For 95% of the year I’m certain it will be cosy (especially in winter as they have a wood burning stove and have all you need to start a fire + free firewood). As a result of the heat we had to leave the windows open and got bitten to death by mosquitos, some kind of screen would be handy! The bed had motors which could let you adjust it into lots of positions which was very cool and we did make use of this, however it does have very firm mattresses and personally I had trouble sleeping. Ended up on the sofa the last 2 nights. My partner also felt it was firm. I’m not sure if this is just us but personally I found it difficult to rest well. The only other con was the TV. It was really quite old and as a result we couldn’t hook up a laptop to watch films (no hdmi, only scart or dvi, which...

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
This is an amazing barn situated in a really amazing place of the world! I stayed here for two weeks in November 2018 with my partner and it was magnificent. The wonderful wood oven / heater makes things extra snuggly and romantic in the evenings in particular. Especially while enjoying a glass of red wine.
It’s a fantastic place to be based outside of the bustle of Rotterdam but close to everything to let you explore all of Zuid Holland and even Belgium too (we went for a day trip to Antwerp).
Delft and Schiedam are only a 25-30 minute bike ride away and Rotterdam is about 30-35 minutes away by bike. While we were based at the barn, we also went to places like Gouda, Utrecht and Den Haag for day trips.
Marieke and Arne are fantastic hosts and quick to respond to queries as well as help with some local tips.
If you are considering to stay here, do be mindful that it is near farming lands, so you may hear some machinery from time to time during daylight hours. And you will need access to a bike or a car as the public transport (the bus stop is a 10-15 minute walk away) is not that regular, meaning you may not be allowed on the bus as it’s already full by the time it comes. Services for the bus also end very early in the evening... So make sure you have that rental bike handy! It’s the best way to travel anyway.
I absolutely loved staying here and I believe everyone else will too. Pictures don’t do the place justice.
Thank you Marieke and Arne! We will definitely come back to your part of the world one day soon.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: We looked at the reviews from previous guests and were not disappointed.  Not only is the place "cosy", it is very well appointed, making it a home from home.  Handy location for nature walks or cycling to Delft.  Communication with the host was excellent.  Would not hesitate to return!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Wir hatten eine sehr schönen Aufenthalt bei Marieke und Arne. Die Scheune ist wunderschön und hat auf zwei Etagen alles, was man sich wünscht. Die Regendusche im Badezimmer ist ein Traum. Die Küche ist voll ausgestattet, wir mussten nicht einmal Kaffee mitbringen. Auch Handtücher (sowohl im Bad als auch in der Küche) waren ausreichend vorhanden. Ein absolutes Highlight ist der Wohnzimmerbereich mit dem Holzofen, den wir ausgiebig genutzt haben. Das Bett im Schlafzimmer ist sehr gemütlich. Die Umgebung ist das absolute i-Tüpfelchen, ganz viel Wasser und viel Grün. Wer mit Hund reist, fühlt sich wie im Paradies. In Rotterdam ist man in ca. 20-30 Minuten. Check-in und Check-out verliefen ohne Schwierigkeiten. Ich kann mir definitiv vorstellen, eines Tages wieder Urlaub hier zu machen. Vielen Dank!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Wood fire, Beautiful views and lovely people, 40 mins to Rotterdam & lovely canal situated to the side of house

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: It's a beautiful big living room with a nap-worthy couch. The views from the windows look out on the sheep fields and the outdoor seating. There wasn't any food nearby on a Monday, so we biked to Schiedam.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
An excellent place to relax and make day trips
I just returned from a very relaxing holiday in Marieke & Arne's place. The old barn is located in a small hamlet just outside Schiedam, a great location to enjoy the countryside as well as making trips to Delft, Rotterdam, Schiedam and The Hague.
The kitchen has all the equipment one needs, including a coffee maker that grinds fresh coffee beans. The bathroom has a luxurious feel. The living room is spacious and has many different sitting, relaxing and even working nooks. I stayed here on my own and enjoyed reading in the large seat, working from home at the table, and watching TV on the large sofa. I was allowed to bring my 2 cats; they enjoyed hanging out on the window sills and keeping an eye on the sheep in the meadow opposite the road.
The bedroom is also spacious and the bed is excellent.
Without a bicycle or car, it takes about 30 minutes to walk to the nearest bus or tram stop, which I did several times. There are lovely footpaths connecting Schiedam to the old barn.
The outside area has quite a number of seats and benches to hang out.
Furthermore, the communication with Marieke and Arne was fast and easy; they answer email messages very quickly. Also, I was allowed to put my bike in one of their sheds, thus protecting it from rain and moisture.
There may be some noise from boats on the river Delftse Schie and airplanes from The Hague / Rotterdam Airport, now and then. However, this didn't disturb me at all - mostly, it is just nice and quiet, 'in the middle of nowhere' but close to the big cities at the same time.
I would certainly recommend Marieke and Arne's place to anyone!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Nice house and lovely area. A bit of highway noise can be heard sometimes.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Everything was great with the place beeing at one of the greenest locations around Rotterdam. The street nearby is very narrow and can be tricky at times but it is not too loud and in the evening it is very quiet. We also enjoyed the space in the yard where we could sit down and enjoy the fresh air. Very much recommended!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
Marieke und Arne waren wirklich tolle Gastgeber. Arne hat uns direkt durch die Wohnung geführt und uns alles gezeigt. Die Wohnung war sehr sauber und es war sehr geräumig. Außerdem war sie sehr schön aber schlicht eingerichtet. Der Kamin mitten im Wohnzimmer war ein echtes Highlight bei dem (leider) schlechten Wetter.
Darüber hinaus ist die Umgebung sehr ländlich und ruhig. Sie lädt sehr zum spazieren gehen ein. Man ist quasi immer am Wasser.
Wir kommen gerne wieder ☺️

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
We spent some wonderful days in this cozy barnhouse together with our dog. The house was beautifully decorated and the Air Con was a big plus. The surrounding area was beautiful and quiet, we took long walks with the dog. We drove some 30 min to the beach and some 20 min to Rotterdam city center
A couple of things for future renter:
- The street leading to the house is fairly narrow, the smaller your car is, the better.
- the staircase to the living room/bedroom is fairly steep, going to the bathroom at night therefore needs some attention
- the bathroom does not have a window, the distinct "smells" stay in the room/hallway
- the mattress is fairly thin, we had our troubles with back pain

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Marieke and Arne's place was beautiful and very cosy. The location was great - halfway between Rotterdam and Delft, right by the canal, with opportunities for semi-rural walks. The house itself felt private and had stunning interior décor. We very much enjoyed spending our holiday relaxing and cooking in the house, as well as reading in front of the wood burning stove! The kitchen was well stocked with equipment (although my only recommendation would be a slightly sharper cutting knife). The bathroom was also great. Be warned that the buses to Rotterdam / Delft don't run on the weekends, so to get anywhere during this time you have to walk / cycle / drive - although we enjoyed using this as an excuse for long walks into Delft.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Beautiful little "estate" combining two private homes, two small businesses, and the AirBnb in a fully fenced, delightfully restored and updated old farm. Pay attention to the fact that the small but adequate bathroom and the fully functional and modern kitchen are on the lower floor, while the large sitting room and the bedroom are both upstairs and the stairs are steep and the treads are small. This can make late night bathroom visits interesting.

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
we enjoyed our stay very much and felt very comfortable at this nice place. it's beautiful and cozy, it felt very much like home. we loved the kitchen with the fridge, oven, sitting area and cooking place. the bathroom is small, but sufficient. the only thing we were a little sad about, was, that there is no window in the bathroom, and therefore it was a little musty after showering. BUT this is complaining on a high comfort level.
we would definitely come back and recommend this place!
it's also beautiful nature around, with lots of animals to watch and for nice dog walks. we say thank you ❤

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments: Wir hatten eine super entspannte und gemütliche Woche in der Unterkunft. Der Kamin ist ein echtes Highlight! Die Küche ist sehr geräumig und auch Wohn- und Schlafzimmer bieten genügend Platz, sodass auch ein längerer Aufenthalt komfortabel machbar ist. Klare Empfehlung!

name: Cosy barnhouse surrounded with nature!
comments:
The apartment is very cozy but far from the city center (only one bus line, doesn't drive after 8 pm and not at all on weekends), therefore I only recommend this apartment if travelling by car.
The nature is beautiful, but the airport relatively close.
The bed and other furniture are comfortable. The kitchen is well equipped and clean but has no windows and the steam vent doesn't work.
In the bathroom, the lavabo is poorly constructed, the water splashes all over the place.
The air-conditioner is limited to temperatures between 16 and 21 degrees, it's impossible to heat above this temperature.
The hosts are friendly, always replying very quickly, and sharing a lot of information.
However, an information about the possibility of mice in the apartment as it is an old barn (we didn't see or hear any) has been given very late and after payment.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: The stay of 60days at Luna's place was so great! And she is very kind. Her place is spacious and clean. And the view from a room window is nice! It is quite comfortable. Thanks!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
We had a wonderful stay at Luna’s house. The neighbourhood is beautiful, an old historic centre of Rotterdam, with very nice pubs and places to eat around.
Luna was so friendly and helpful, she received us in her nice 16th century house, and we had a small room at the top floor with a beautiful view over the harbour. A good place to feel like at home. If you want to borrow bicycles, don’t forget to ask early, so they can arrange this. We would come again at any time! Thank you, Luna

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Zeker een aanrader!! Heerlijk bed, bad en douche en prachtig uitzicht over de haven. Luna heeft ons ook veel leuke plekjes aangeraden en geeft je alle privacy.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
Luna's place is a great place you won't miss. You get full privacy, a whole floor for yourself where no other people pass by.
My stay was even too short to have a nice chat with Luna. She is a very nice welcoming person. Recommended.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna was a lovely hostess and wanted us to have a nice stay. She is very kind and considerate. The house was an interesting old Dutch house with a nice view of a church and canal.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna was a lovely and friendly host who communicated well and made us feel welcome in her home. The room is beautiful and has a great view. The room, bathroom and toilet were all very private and we felt comfortable to come and go as we pleased. Delfshaven was lovely and an easy metro ride into Rotterdam (we walked but it is easier to catch the metro). Delfshaven was quiet because we stayed just before Christmas but we imagine it would have a lovely charm at busier times of the year. Thanks for having us Luna!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: This place is a CHARM, the view is gorgeous and the space is super comfortable and clean, I will miss the sunrise through the window right from bed.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna was a really nice host, she received us very caring and gave us any information that we needed. The stairs to the room were really steep but the room was very cosy with nice views and with love in details. We recommend this place especially because of the kind host Luna and the way she prepared everything!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Als je als koppel graag wat privacy hebt tijdens een verblijf, is dit de ideale plek. Je hebt een ganse verdieping voor jezelf, inclusief badkamer en apart toilet. De gastvrouw is er wanneer je haar nodig hebt, maar dringt zichzelf zeker niet op. Het is een zeer vriendelijke en warme vrouw die ons enkele goeie tips kon geven over diner en ontbijt. De buurt zelf is zeer levendig. Het huis bevindt zich vlak aan het water van de haven. 's Morgens sta je op met de zon op je gezicht, wat zeer fijn is. De slaapkamer heeft geen verduisterende gordijnen, maar voor ons wat dit geen enkel probleem. De vloer bestaat volledig uit tapijt = geen koude voetjes! Maar voor allergieën toch opletten geblazen. Ook wil ik het super schattige hondje vermelden, waar we meteen verliefd op geworden zijn!  Bedankt voor het leuke verblijf!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna was an extremely warm and helpful host. Perfect communication and everything was great. Beautiful room, lovely bathroom, and a lovely canal right outside the window. The room looks just like the pictures, so pretty and charming! Location was a bit out of the way of the city center, but it's a nice and quiet neighborhood. Definitely recommend.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna is one of the warmest and most supportive people I have met so far. She is the perfect host and I recommend staying at her house also because you get to meet her. The room is absolutely stunning as well as the street where it is located. The infrastructure to the city is very easy and convenient. If I come back to Rotterdam I will always choose to stay at her house!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
La casa di Luna è una tipica casa olandese, stretta e sviluppata in verticale.
Dei 3 piani, uno è a completa disposizione degli ospiti.
La camera da letto è bellissima e molto grande,con un letto a baldacchino davvero romantico e comodo, inoltre la finestra affaccia sul canale e la vista è fantastica.
Nella casa c'è anche una camera per lo yoga, infatti Luna è una insegnate di questa disciplina.
Luna è simpatica e disponibile, rispetta molto la privacy ma è sempre pronta a dare informazioni sia sulla casa che sulla città o sui mezzi di trasporto. Anche il suo cagnolino è molto simpatico!
Il bagno è grande e molto comodo e tutto pulito alla perfezione.
Siamo state 3 giorni ed è stato un soggiorno davvero perfetto!
La zona della casa è fantastica, appartata ma vicina al centro e collegata benissimo, sul canale si possono ammirare le vecchie barche e un mulino a vento molto caratteristico! ♥️

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: I stayed 2days at Luna's place. The room has plenty space and the bed was comfortable. Private bathroom and toalett are just great. You have total privacy here. Shops, tram/metro stations restaurants are nearby. Host is kind and welcoming. Easy 5stars.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Aanrader voor iedereen die de sfeer en onhebbelijkheden van een oud huis kan waarderen. Veel privacy, romantische zolderkamer en leuk uitzicht. Bed sliep prima, of het in de zomer heel warm kan zijn,geloof ik meteen. Maar bij ons was het aangenaam. Supercentraal

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Aangenaam verblijf gehad in mooi verzorgde en karaktervolle zolderruimte (opgelet: zeer steile trap) met privé-badkamer. We kregen alle privacy. Verduisterende gordijnen ontbreken waardoor het al vroeg licht werd. Goede ligging in rustige buurt en vlakbij tramhalte en restaurants. Hartelijke ontvangst en steeds goede communicatie, bedankt Luna!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: The view was beautiful and the room light and airy with a very comfortable bed! Luna was a great host and always willing to share recommendations and offer help. We really enjoyed our stay!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Erg fijn verblijf op een toplocatie. Volledige privacy op de bovenste etage van een prachtig pand. Luna reageert snel op berichten en is erg gastvrij. Wij hebben een ontbijt bijgeboekt. Ook dat was prima in orde. We komen zeker terug als we weer in Rotterdam moeten overnachten.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
Very nice room, nice place, nice view, nice area, nice host !!!
Thanks !

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Beautiful loft room overlooking the canal. Picturesque views of the clock tower and windmill. Lovely host :)

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
Just describe what it is without personal judgement so anyone looking for a place in a new city can avoid my lesson:
Pros: Good location with close station, also nice view from the window;
Cons: (1) very steep staircase; (2) the bathroom and the toliet is not in the room; (3) the toliet is separated from the bathroom; (4) there is no lock on the door and you cannot lock the room no matter when you are inside or outside; (5) the second floor is not only for the room posted, there is another tenant living on the second floor and he/she may also use the bathroom/toliet, which was not told in the first place. You may request not share the bathroom but if the feeling of not being nice enough to share doesn't bother you. (6). The workplace provided is the photo of the tea table, if you can work comfortable in any place or you are not travelling for work, then ignore this. (7). The price is high compared to what was provided. (8). I moved out in advance but just be clear that nobody else to be blamed because I didn't communicate and confirm the above conditions when I booked it.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Although the listing is for only a room in the house it is on a separate floor with its own bathroom so there is plenty of privacy. It looks out on the historic ships of Delfshaven and there is a lovely church across the harbor which chimes occasionally. The room is on the 3rd floor of a townhouse built in the 1600s and is cozy with lots of character from the exposed beams and ceiling joinery. A beautiful spot tucked away off the main thoroughfare, yet close to shopping and transit.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Very cosy and romantic room, with view on the river & old houses, in a charming old part of Rotterdam. Thank you Luna for your hospitality!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: We had a nice stay at Luna’s room. Luna is very friendly and helpful. The room is nicely located and comfortable. We were just surprised that we had to share the bathroom, because it was described as a private bathroom. This should be changed in the description of the room, because we did not enjoy the level of privacy we were expecting. Nevertheless we enjoyed the stay at Luna’s room which is perfect for a weekend trip to Rotterdam. Thank you very much!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Overall, Luna’s place is a rustic, charming accommodation in the heart of delfshaven. Close to tram, train, bus and walkable, it is an excellent and suitable location if you want to be close to sites and affordable. Bonus but in my opinion the best part was the yoga room, a dedicated space for reflection and spiritual practice. This set the vibe for the place. Another extra was the neighborhood itself. Wow! The best Syrian desserts are around the corner as well as many delights from all around the world. Canals, history, and architecture. Thank you.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
Luna's place is fantastic. Set in a beautiful part of Rotterdam, we're so glad we chose to stay here. Luna was great with communication in getting us set up and was super flexible too.
The room itself is great, and gets plenty of gorgeous light in the morning. The bathroom is shared, but if I'm honest you wouldn't know it.
Overall a great stay and would definitely stay again when we visit next time

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna's place has a view on the most beautiful spot of Rotterdam. Located 10 minutes walk from the center you easily reach the harbour and all the main tourist attractions. Located in the old part of the city, here you breath the true Rotterdam. Don't make mistakes, go there! P.s. restaurants, breweries and pubs just a few minutes walk away!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: The house is in a very nice location, on a historic harbor with lots of interesting shops and cafes. Luna was very generous in offering space in the house, and was flexible when I had to adjust my dates twice prior to arrival. The house is authentic, from the 1600s, and there is certainly much to appreciate (stained glass, baroque ceilings, the views). I felt that a bit more care could have been taken in maintaining certain aspects of the house (kitchen, carpet, ventilators). Luna is the type of host who will take an hour out of her busy day to sit down with a glass of wine and get to know you.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: It was a pleasure to get to know Luna! The accommodation is on a breathtaking street: water below the window, a windmill at the end of the street... Public transport is excellent. I had my own bathroom, toilet, warming kitchen. This two months staying by Luna was calm and cosy!

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: The location is super convenient and my room had a wonderful view that I will always cherish. I will always remember Luna's warm hospitality and all she did to make my stay comfortable. Highly recommended! More power to Luna.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: We had a great time!! Luna is a very warm and communicative host. The place is on a beautiful street and it’s very well connected to the city. Overall we had a very good experience.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
Luna is very welcoming and heartwarming. She’ll make sure you have anything you need, and in case anything is not available she’ll make sure you have it in the following days.
The views you get from the inside of the house are amazing ✨

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments:
stayed 1 month in Luna's place and I would like to say the pros and cons.
Luna is a really nice person and she tried her best while she was away to make my stay enjoyable. She even let me stay 1 day more than planned in the room.
The neighborhood is also very nice.
However there was a lot a things that didn't go according to the plan.
-We were supposed to be 2 in the house (the 2 rooms rented on Airbnb). But we ended up being 4 or 5 ! It is not the same when you have to share the same toilet and bathroom with 2 or 3 other persons for one month ...
- only half of my bed was fonctionnal. The other half the mattress was going through the bed frame.
- There is almost no light in the whole house or room.
- The furniture is in a very bad condition, my desk was barely standing.
- The same is applicable to the kitchen. There was only one electric stove with 2 burners for 4 persons. No oven, no grill, .. the water tap was not standing up by itself
But there was a dishwasher at least !
- In the bathroom the shower is in one corner, on linoleum, on the same level of the rest of the bathroom with no curtains ..
And all of this for 1450 euros per month...
This is ridiculously expensive and I don't think I would have taken this room if I knew all of the above.

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: I would like to thank Luna for the stay, she has been a great host and always gave us nice advice. The location of the AirBNB was really nice, we had to walk a bit to get in the city center but the view from the window was absolutely crazy. Thanks again Luna, we won't forget that stay in Rotterdam !

name: ♡  Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!
comments: Luna is a wonderful host! Warm and very accommodating. I spent a month here and the time just flew by. The house is right on the beautiful canal and the street is gorgeous and quaint. Luna is a sincere and kind person who I found myself always having lovely conversations with. The accommodation was just what I needed and everyone else who stayed was peaceful, friendly and respected each others privacy. Thanks again Luna for being a fantastic host! 🩵

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: We had a great time in the captains cabin. It is a cosy, nice and warm place, the host is real helpfull and kind. Great location for exploration the highlights on foot

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Our stay on Premala's boat was fantastic! The space was very comfortable and had all of the amenities you'd expect of a home on land. The location was perfect, within easy walking distance to most of the major spots we wanted to see in the city in our short time there. Permala had great advice for three things to do within walking distance: the market/cub house area, a cultural street full of unique restaurants and shops, and a green nature area along the canal. We had a great stay and would highly recommend it to those looking for a fun boat house experience and great host in Rotterdam!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Great place. Nice viewed. Close to the centre and something different. We would definitely recommend staying here!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: The Avontuur is gorgeous! And the location is ideal! Staying on the boat was an urban adventure. She has all the amenities...And only a slight rocking. As this is a boat, all the stairs are actually ladders. I stayed here with my big dog, so this was a bit challenging.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Wonderful space and although in the thick of the city the captain's hut give you a sense of privacy. Would 100% recommend
