name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
WIr haben wundervolle 3 Nächte in der Captain´s Hut der Aventuur verbracht. Super viel Charme, super Ausstattung, super Lage und mit Premala auch ein super Host. Er hat uns viele Tips gegeben, was man innerhalb von 15min alles erreichen kann- von Streetfood bis Windmühlen.
Es war einfach toll! Eine bessere Unterkunft hätten wir uns nicht wünschen können. Wir kommen auf jeden Fall wieder!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Words cannot express how wonderful my stay was on the Avontuur! The boat, and wonderful host Premala, truly made my stay in Rotterdam.
The captains hut is a delightful private area in the front of the ship, right in central Rotterdam. You couldn’t pick a better location. It’s in walking distance to everything, easy to find, and quiet at night to sleep. The captains hut has everything you need from a kitchen with a stove/oven and mini fridge, to a bathroom with a tub/shower, a Bluetooth speaker, outlets, candles and incense, a hammock, a private deck area to sit under the stars, and more. I recommend bringing food if you want to cook! There’s a market very close by to pick stuff up. On top of that- Premala is a very welcoming host with tons of recommendations on what to see and do in Rotterdam! He’s the reason I stayed and explored the city and I couldn’t be happier I did. I highly recommend and wish I stayed for more than one night!!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Very unique experience !!  Enjoyed sitting on the deck with a glass of wine.  Premala is a very knowledgable and kind host !!! The city is amazing !!!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Cosy, central, feels like home. And what a view! Prenala is an attentive & gracious host. Everything you need on board or close by.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: This place was amazing- both the place and the host. It was a quiet yet central location and incredibly peaceful. We arrived quite jet lagged and took a long nap in the middle of the day and had no problems with noise. Premala was incredibly accommodating and went out of his way to give tips, etc. We would have stayed longer if we could! There were a lot of extra amenities that were also very appreciated (coffee, hair dryer, etc). Can’t recommend it enough. Thank you!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: I had a great time in Premala's abode. He told us, upon introducing himself, of the boat's history. I really appreciate his local tips, it makes Rotterdam seem far more interesting than what I had read before. I really liked the private balcony /porch. It was quiet as well. I enjoyed waking up to the dawn of the day and the light shining in from the small boat windows. I had a great time!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Cosy place to live and exciting experience for me and my partner! Premala is very kind and enthusiastic. Movement of boat was comfortably slight so I had very good sleep on the boat. If I had chance to Rotterdam again I would definitely choose his boat!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
I was staying in the “Captain’s Hut” and lucky that I could extend my stay for more days. To summarize this place and the vibes I can say it was like a “fairy tale”.
The Captain’s Hut (upstairs) has a hammock and so many cosy items. This room was very inviting in the evening to have some rest or even good music.
A few steps down I had my living room with a fire oven. Sitting in front of the oven and watching the fire was so reassuring and healing for me.
Even the last day I still found new cosy things and items around the room. There is a lot of love in every centimetre of the ship! I had everything I needed and even the kitchen is well equipped.
Premala, the host took care of me in every way. If it was only a bike I needed or some advice where to go, he always found the right mix of being there and giving me privacy. I had many inspiring talks in the evenings with him.
The ship is perfectly located and within walking distance to nightlife, nature, sightseeing or restaurants and bars.
I am already planning my next stay as I feel I’ve found a unique place! I also want to join the yoga and individual lessons on the Ark on my next stay.
Enjoy my friends!
Fabian

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Let me tell you one thing, BOOK THIS PLACE NOW. Not just the best Airbnb I've ever stayed at, but one of the best physical environments I've ever spent leisure time in. Now add onto that that Premala himself is an amazing host and individual, and you have a no brainer decision. We intended to spend a couple nights in Rotterdam to dodge the prices in Amsterdam, and instead ended up spending four nights there. Premala, Avontuur, and Rotterdam became the centerpiece of our time in the Netherlands! Premala's approach to mindfulness and his passions is infectious and made the trip really unforgettable. Picture yourself cozied up on a boat with a roaring fire, movies, and the rain battering the window and water outside. That alone should make the decision easy enough! 15/10 stars.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: For all of you who are looking for a hidden boat of Eden, a unique yet authentique way of spending some nights on the water, which in the end is one of Rotterdam's most beautiful features, shoot definitely come here! We were there in winter yet sunny time, and a lovely, warm and cosy place to live and sleep in. I can only dream of how summer would be like on the boat, Premala told us about bbq's, jumping off the boat for a swim, a big sunny roof terrace to share drinks on,...! We immediately felt at home and were sad to leave that quick. It felt as if we were in a slightly different world for a moment, amazing! This is an experience we will never forget! Thank you Premala

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: The coziest and coolest experience! We really enjoyed hanging out on the ship watching the lights sparkle on the water next to a warm fireplace. Location was perfect--only about a 10 minute walk to the food market & tourist attractions and a 15 min walk to De Witte's bars and restaurants. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a unique and fun experience in Rotterdam!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Perfectly located, fun place to stay. Slightly tricky to get on and off the ship but all in all it was a great place to stay

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Verstopt op een onverwachte plek ligt dit prachtige schip, omgebouwd tot een woning en een aantal airbnb mogelijkheden en een zonnig terras. De captainshut is prive, voorzien van alle gemakken, en erg gezellig ingericht. Omdat het centraal ligt, ben je zo bij alle highlights in de omgeving. Bovendien zijn de eigenaren bijzonder vriendelijk en gastvrij. Ik zou het iedereen aanraden!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Great experience. We stayed 4 nights and we wished we could have stayed longer. It was perfect for us (couple) as we had our privacy. The location is perfect. There's no better thing than having a terrace on the deck for you to enjoy the sun and the canal. Premala is kind, calm and makes sure that you have everything you need. One of the bests airbnb we have been, the kitchen has everything you need. We felt at home almost imediatly. Looking forward to be able to come back and stay in that amazing ship. Thanks Premala and Wendy for sharing with other people your beautiful house.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Staying on a houseboat is quite an experience! The space is well appointed and organized, as anything on a boat has to be. Most spacious bathroom I’ve ever seen on a boat too. Don’t be surprised that the floors are slightly slanted, it’s a boat! Premala also gave us great recommendations for food, coffee, and sites, all of which were excellent!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Premala's home is absolutely magical. It's hard for me to write this without feeling a lot of emotions, but I'll do my best to express how special this ship is. The minute you step on board, you feel the love in this space. The ship is just beautiful.
We stayed in the Captain's Cabin, which had a big kitchen, comfortable bed with an amazing down comforter, and the most thoughtful touches throughout the room like incense, candles, and peaceful decor. The bathroom had a soaking tub with Himalayan salts to add to your bathwater. The wood smelled so good throughout the ship -- if you love old, good, real wood, you'll be in heaven!
Premala was so kind and inviting, and gave us some great tips on places to see and restaurants/bars to check out. We visited Delfshaven and fell in love with the timelessness and overall, we loved Rotterdam so much. It is such a special city, and Premala's ship is the perfect place to rest and relax so you can enjoy it.
Practical tips: There is a great supermarket across the street called SPAR, and the ship is about a 6 minute walk from Beurs tram station. Be sure to eat at Bazaar for dinner!!
Thank you, Premala, for one of the most soulful, beautiful, memorable space to stay in. I will never forget it.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
You can expect an out of the ordinary stay on Premala's boat. It has a calm and serene atmosphere. In the bad weather the walk along the side of the boat to the back can be a bit tricky, especially for the first time - but once you master it you become confident quite quickly. It is worth it to get to see and stay on this piece of Rotterdam history. I would suggest arrival in daylight would make life easier, but there are some very pretty lights if you have to arrive in the dark.
As we stayed in the captains cabin it was easier to find than if you stay in the main part of the boat. Instructions are very clear and Premala is always on call to help if needed.
The space was large enough for 3 adults to comfortably stay. The kitchen area was extremely well furnished with everything you would need. We easily cooked a meal twice while on board. There was a Spar supermarket very near to the boat for provisions.
The cabin is full of character and has the creaks you would expect on board. It is full of lovely etsy touches. We only wish it had been warmer to take full advantage of staying in this unique Air bnb - we found it far too cold to sit in the wheel house, and didn't even attempt to venture up on the top of the deck where there are lovely sitting areas (which would come into their own in the sunshine). We went in particularly wet and windy weather and it was cold. Asking Premala to light the stove was much welcomed after getting quite wet one day. This made the Captain's cabin even more cozy.
The location is very near the centre and public transport makes travelling round the city very easy - transport is well integrated so changing form bus to metro to tram is no problem. A walk at night time is an essential - especially down to the waters edge where all the bridges and buildings are lit up beautifully in the dark.
Being able to have a look round the rest of the boat was amazing and only added to my desire to stay again in the future. Don't miss out on a stay on Avontuur!
You do get used to the gentle sway of the boat - and it is a very quiet stay to say that it is in the middle of a major city.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: We had an amazing stay at the boat. It is a very romantic place with the fireplace and all the different lights.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Ich und meine Freundin waren für zwei Tage in der Capitnas Hut, wir fanden es super schön das wie viel Privatsphäre hatten und ungestört sein könnten, aber super schnell auf unsere Anfragen reagiert würde. Der private Bereich am Deck war das Highlight für uns, beim schönen Wetter kann man sehr gut entspannten und bei Nacht den Sternhimmel betrachten!
Die Lage war ausgezeichnet und sehr zentral, alle Sehenswürdigkeiten waren in paar Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar.
Gerne wieder und wird definitiv weiterempfohlen!
Danke Jack und Premala!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Hello,
we spent 2 nights in the cargo ship. the price of the accommodation is absolutely overpriced. The entire property was dirty, dust was everywhere, the fridge was only cleaned as requested, there were no umbrellas on the private deck, paint pots were everywhere and a lot was temporarily repaired with adhesive tape. At the beginning we had no lights in the accommodation and you cannot lock the ship. I had my laptop and a very expensive camera in the ship. It would have been nice if the cabin could have been locked.
We expected something better for the money.
The central location of the accommodation was good.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Premalas Boot war ein Highlight unserer Reise. Vom herzlichen Willkommen über die gute und schnelle Kommunikation vor und während unseres Aufenthalts und dem abendlichen Austausch an Deck - eine großartige Erfahrung!
Wir hatten den hinteren Teil der Kapitänskajüte für uns alleine. Mit Bett, vollständig eingerichteter Küche, Bad und sogar unserem eigenen Terrassenteil. Es ist alles sehr urig und mit viel Liebe zum Detail eingerichtet. Um uns herum Wohngebäude inkl. einer Wein- und Foodar, sowie einem Cafè mit dem besten Cappuccino, den ich je getrunken habe. Trotzdem ist es sehr ruhig.
Zu Fuß ist man schnell im Geschehen von Rotterdam. Wir haben viele tolle Tipps bekommen und auch ausprobiert. Ein einzigartiges Erlebnis. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Great location at the city centre of Rotterdam! Premala is an excellent host, and the accommodation is exactly as described. We got fresh towels and clean bedding. We did feel like some things could have been a bit more neat, however the wonderful nightview on the deck made that up for us.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
A unique space on a 100-year old Dutch barge.
Friendly and sociable host who provided us with a lot of information about things to do in the area.
A highlight for us was the private outside space beyond the wheelhouse, where we ate breakfast and drank in the evening, with views across the water.
We enjoyed our stay very much and it was nice to get to know Premala, who was a great host.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
A bit dirty (curtains and windows).
The location is good.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
Premala and Alexandra were the most thoughtful and mindful hosts we've ever had the pleasure of staying with.
The Avontuur really is a special place that is challenging to put into words. Imagine an environment with the spirituality of a Buddhist temple, with the warmth and cosiness of a log cabin with a raging fire in a snow storm, with the central location of a penthouse in the heart of the city, and with the peace of a bench on a quiet spot of the Mediterranean sea. All the imagery that comes to my head at least! Inspiring as these are qualities we work to bring to our own home as well.
In practical terms now.. it was an oasis in the heart of the city. Super comfortable and cosy, with the gentle movement of the water in the dock adding to the sensation of relaxation you feel as soon as you walk through the door. The captain's hut is a warm inviting space with all the amenities, which you can tell has had such love and care into it. The bathroom was interesting with a sit down shower which is novel to me at least, but this adds to the experience of being in a different place. The ship is covered in houseplants which bring great energy and fresh air. The private deck is the perfect space for a smoke without disturbing anyone, and/or sitting and enjoying the sunshine with a lovely view of the water and other boats. Sitting out there at night is also fantastic with the city lights reflecting off of the water, creating the kind of picturesque scene that inspires some to paint.
We signed up to do a private yoga class with Premala, one of the paid extras identified when booking, and it was fantastic. I had never done a full yoga class myself, while my partner had never had a private session. Premala was awesome. His style was one focussed on gradual stretching, compression and opening up. In the intro before we started he eased us into this concept, highlighting that his style was not an athletic one with overly-challenging postures. It was all manageable as a complete beginner, and it was all about stretching to the limits that your own body can manage. The class left me feeling invigorated and warm, with my whole body gently exercised and tested. I'd had leg pains from all the walking involved in city trips, and remarkably between the yoga and the environment of the Avontuur this disappeared too.
I would highly recommend Premala's class for anyone who's ever been intrigued by yoga, or wants to work with someone talented to improve their practice and take it to the next level.
Overall we adored our time on board, and couldn't reccomend enough staying on the Avontuur for anyone with good vibes looking to really relax and luxuriate in a serene environment. Having also loved the city of Rotterdam, we'll be back some day in the future for sure.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: thank you Premala for your hospitality, it is an Amazing boat and an amazing place to be, quiet and with a wonderful view. We loved it and will come again for sure when we'll be back in Rotterdam

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Nice place, nice boat, nice terrasse, nice view

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Premala’s place is a unique experience. Don’t expect hotel style accommodations,  as it’s a boat… But if you’re into staying in cool funky places with a creative feel that’s central to many great places to eat and drink. This is the place. The boat is very warm and cozy and the hosts are a delight, especially if you’re interested in what the city has to offer. I would stay here again

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: My friend and I had a great stay. The boat was built in 1913 and looks like it has a lot of history and is very cozy. The location is great as it is close to a lot of restaurants, bars and points of interest. We had the Captain's quarters which came with a private bathroom and a spacious private deck. The private deck was definitely worth it with good views and it's a great place to relax and sun bathe. The host was very helpful and friendly. I would definitely recommend staying here.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: If you are reading this review, you are meant to go. Just go. It changed my life.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: My stay with Premala was exactly what anticipated and I enjoyed every bit of it. Watching the moon from the back of the boat was a delight, it gave me the wonderful option of capturing many photos of the scenery the airbnb offers like no other. The wood burning fire place was a big bonus, I love them so having it in use was the icing on the cake for me. He even started it for me which was very kind. I would be so happy to visit Rotterdam and stay with Premala again in the future!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Highly recommend the Captain’s Hut! We are a family of four (kids age 8 and 13) and all loved it. Cozy room, lots of extra amenities (hot tea, hair dryer) and beds were comfy. Getting on/off the boat, you do have to walk on a narrow path/side of the boat, but there is a handrail and it’s lit at night. Steep ladder to get down to the accommodations once you’re on the boat, but totally doable and all part of the adventure! Perfectly situated within walking distance to all the city’s highlights and lots of great food. Plus, really great host! Thank you Premala!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: Our family of four- two adults, two kids (13yo and 10yo) had an amazing stay here. It was such a fun, memorable, and unique experience to stay on a boat. The location was great- close to great restaurants, coffee shops, and grocery/food store. (Highly recommend Bazaar, which is super close). Our host Premala was incredible and so welcoming. Keep in mind, you are staying on a boat, so it’s not spacious nor a 5 star resort, but for us (and many) it is perfection and will be a fond memory forever. The top deck of the boat was amazing, with plants and a lovely vibe. We enjoyed sitting up there and got to meet the star of the boat, the host’s uber friendly little dog Sasha. Our family highly recommends this cute and unique little haven, a highlight of our three week trip in Europe.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: What a wonderful experience. Premala and Alexandra were wonderful hosts. So welcoming.  We enjoyed staying in the Captain's Hut  which was really cozy and we particularly enjoyed being able to sit on our own private terrace.  We actually decided to stay an extra night,  and stayed in the Cozy Room on the main part of the barge, with shared facilities. . So we had the full 'Adnentuur' experience.  The beds were super comfortable in both parts.   I haven't slept that well in years.  The atmosphere was very relaxing   and the barge was fantastically and very cooly furnished throughout.  Beautiful lighting. We loved it. A real haven to go back to after a hard day's sightseeing.  Thank you.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
What an amazing experience!
If you love the mix of an old ship with green peaceful - inspired interiors, just go for it.
We loved the place for its people, the setting ( we even had an amazing private terrace!) and the gentle sway of the ship.
Amazing views by night as well.
Even our quite tall dog was welcome and learned to cross an access - bridge!
Highly recommend it!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
This little place is such a haven ❤️ I felt very comfortable here and had everything that I needed. The cabin has clearly been maintained with a lot of love - all of the fixtures and decorations have had thought put into them. The way that the boat occasionally gently rocks (it is very, very gentle) and the sound of the water lapping against the sides makes the place even more cozy. You have your own privacy on the Captain’s Hut but there’s also the option of seeing other guests in communal areas which is great.
Premala is a wonderful, welcoming host and I would definitely stay with him again.

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments: For 2 blokes in there 30's this was great fun. Having the captain's quarters to yourself and being able to chill on the terrace was a real highlight. Some of the negative reviews on here are I feel from people who didn't look properly at what this is. It's not a hotel, it's a ship of healing. Steep stairs and a thinnish walkway were no issue for us after the first usage. The hosts are very friendly, accommodating and a true highlight to our stay. Thank you for your hospitality and Happy Birthday!

name: Captain's Hut in historic city center
comments:
An Unforgettable Stay on Premala and Alexandra’s Boat
Our stay on Premala and Alexandra’s boat in Rotterdam was truly exceptional. The boat offered a unique and cozy atmosphere that made our trip special.
The location is excellent—centrally situated with easy access to shops, restaurants, and local attractions. One of our favorite moments was relaxing on the terrace in the evenings, soaking in the serene waterside ambiance.
Alexandra was an exceptional host—warm, welcoming, and always ready to assist. Her hospitality made us feel right at home. ￼ ￼
Overall, staying on the boat was a delightful adventure, combining comfort with a touch of novelty. We are already looking forward to our next visit to Premala and Alexandra’s boat.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: I came to Rotterdam with a friend looking for a different experience and that is exactly what we got out of the stay at "het avontuur schip"! Although there was a blackout because of a short circuit, we managed with candles and flash lights until Premala fixed the problem. The room is very cozy, clean, and relaxing! The swaying of the ship was calming, helping us to a good night sleep. The place is quite and peaceful and in the middle of the city! I would recommend it to people who want something different than the usual hotel stays!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Whatever you want to see in Rotterdam, you will find in less than ten minutes since the ship is located in the middle of the centre! Because of the surrounding buildings no noise will disturb you sitting on the deck or sleeping inside the most amazing ship I've ever seen. The rooms are great and everything is lovely arranged so sleeping in the avontuur litterly feels like an adventure!

Premala complies just with every wish you can have about a host.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Premala greeted us warmly and brought us into his home. He was able to give us a few suggestions as to what we should do with our two night stay in Rotterdam. The boat is in a quiet harbor, but with a few quick turns, you can be in the center of Rotterdam. We were able to rent bikes from Premala to easily access the city. My partner and I had to fill the bike tires with air, but luckily, the Rotterdam Centraal station has a 24/7 bike care station below the main entrance. We were delighted at the smell of incense in our room, and to see we had a private mini-fridge, tea pot, and electric water boiler. We also liked that we could control the temperature of our room, as the boat could get pretty cold. The entrance to our part of the ship was intimidating at first (very steep, metal staircase), but we quickly acclimated. The Wifi was spotty, but as seasoned travelers, this was not much of an issue. You can ask any Rotterdammer a question on the street, and they always seem happy to help.
We would happily stay again :)

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: If you're visiting Rotterdam, then this is the place you need to be! Ideal location, right in the heart of Rotterdam without the noise of the city. The boat is sublime, and surprisingly very big; you forget you're on a boat as soon as you delve onto the deck below. It had a very chilled out vibe to the place and a shower that only God's can dream of. Premala is an amazing host, made us feel at home and informed us on anything we asked in relevance to Rotterdam. Sitting on the top deck at night was my favourite, looking out onto the marina and city beyond. When I come to Rotterdam, I will most definitely be staying here again!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Staying on Premala's boat was a really fun and different experience. He made it easy to find the boat, and he gave us a thorough overview of the boat itself and the city. I couldn't believe how spacious it was on board, and you could tell how much work Premala has done to restore the boat and turn it into an amazing home. Our room had everything we needed, including a personal mini-fridge. Access to the boat is via ladder, so be mindful of that if you have mobility issues. It was a unique way to travel and we were grateful for the hospitality!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: The place is amazing, and old boat converted into a charming place for yoga and meditation. Location is perfect, very central but as quite as country. Be aware that entering is narrow and steep, better travel light and fit

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Fun place to stay...definitely unique and central to everything yet quiet and feels secluded from traffic and people. Be prepared for a bit of an adventure and don’t expect a hotel experience. You will likely meet some interesting folks. Cozy room was warm but may not be to everyone’s taste due to the one tiny porthole as window and sleeping on a floor mattress (surprisingly comfortable though). Salt lamps and incense allow you to create a healing environment if you want. The captains cabin seems magnificent but has a lot of windows so you might bring an eye mask.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
I cannot express how beautiful and unusual this place is. It is not for everyone, but if you love eclectic, beautiful, peaceful places- you will adore this beautiful ship!
Noor was welcoming and warm, but unfortunately, Premala was traveling. We only saw him very briefly as he was coming home from a three-month trip. I would very much liked to have a conversation with him.
The room is quite small, but as other reviewer’s have said, beds were extremely comfortable. The furnishings were eclectic and beautiful, and the hosts provided everything to make us feel at home. I will warn you, however, this is not a handicapped accessible space!
Thank you Noor and Premala!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Staying on a house boat in the center of Rotterdam was super cool and highly recommended. Premala had a lot of great suggestions for local places to eat. One night I couldn’t sleep and enjoyed using the relaxing yoga space. There is a lot incense usage which caused a slight struggle with allergies. Also using a shared bathroom when the boat is full (6 people) can require some pre planning. Overall an enjoyable visit.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: I spent a great time in this house.the cozy room is a nice place to stay . And Premala  is very kind and respect the privacy. Also he gave me a lot of personal information of Rotterdam to travel around . I learned a little Dutch for him.if you want to experience the local life of Rotterdam, you should come to Premala’s house!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Premala's air b&b is a good place where to stay for some days. It's clean and it is in a good position near the centre of Rotterdam. Premala and Wendy are very kind. Unfortunately if you need sunlight there aren't windows but is a boat, a very beautiful boat. I liked to stay there and meet Permala and Wendy. I recommend this place!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Me and my boyfriend had a two night stay at this magical place. The atmosphere, the touches, the energy, it is really amazing. Located perfectly, just 2 m I nutes away from a beautiful view of Erausmus Bridge, 5 min walking distance from the Cubiq houses and old harbour, everything is really easy to reach. Highly recommend a nice dinner on the ship garden on sunset, it is breathtaking. Premala is an amazing host,provided us with everything we needed, always positive and ready to help! I promise you won't be disappointed if you choose this place for your vacation. Deffinately this will be our choice if we are lucky enough to visit again Rotterdam!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
This is an unbelievable stay with gorgeous view of the canal
One of the feature and best in Netherlands

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Very unique experience of sleeping in a boat! The location is perfect! All the highlights of Rotterdam are within walking distance! Very quiet area!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: He was very nice and friendly that we talked a lot of interesting topic. His ship was larger and more relaxing than expected and the atmosphere was "different" in a good way, compared to other world. There was an balcony at the rooftop area, which was also relaxing.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Alles in allem kann man das Hausboot von Premala wirklich sehr empfehlen!!
Premala und Jack sind super lieb und total Gastfreundlich.
5 min zu Fuß ist ein Parkhaus wo man für 21€/Tag parken kann.
Zu Fuß sind im Grunde alle Sehenswürdigkeiten zu erreichen. Ob das Cubehouse, die Markthalle, Erasmusbrücke oder witte de withstraat. Dort kann man gut essen gehen oder gesellig was trinken.
Der Supermarkt ist auch keine 5 min entfernt. Sowie ein Café.
Der Stil des Hausbootes ist einzigartig, ausgefallen und wunderschön.
Die Regendusche war mein persönliches Highlight samt dem tollen Deck, wo man entspannt seinen Wein trinken konnte.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Our stay at the ship was amazing. We felt welcome and relaxed right away. The area is beautifully decorated and incense, tea lights and the fireplace enhanced the warm glow. And there is so much to discover! We met a few people on the ship who were all very friendly. Such a good vibe. And thankyou Premala, we enjoyed the energy and inspiring talks. Hope to see you again!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: A very cozy place, furnished with great attention to detail and well located. Wendy attaches great importance to tranquility on the ship. We have tried our best not to make too much noise but I guess, we have not succeed as expected. We would have been better off in a more casual place. The opinion might be shared by the host ;) Nevertheless, a great experience that I would not want to miss.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Such an amazing stay in Premala’s ship ! It couldn’t have been any better. Thank you so much for this delightful experience. It was a huge pleasure. I sure will come again really soon to emerge again in this Avontuur

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Pros:
1. Good location
2. it's a ship, so it could be an unique experience
3. I like the inner decorations of the ship
Cons:
1. You have to walk along the side of the ship deck to enter the ship. IMHO, there's not enough protection since you can drop into water especially during a rainy day. I would suggest to add a hand rail to the outside of the deck.
2. During our stay, there were people sleeping in the living room couch very early. So staying in the living room is not really an option for you.
3. You room is very small (~ 10 sqm). The window is also very small (mostly likely smaller than your head) and very high. So to us, the room is very humid. Sleeping inside during the night is not very pleasant.
4. The sound insulation could be better. During the night, you can easily hear people snorting in the other room (not sure there door was closed though).
In general, if you want to have an unique experience, this might work for you. Otherwise, this might not be right for you.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Lovely and relaxing stay on a beautiful boat in a delightful location. Both the accommodation and the Dock where it is berthed are little havens of peace in the bustling city centre and Premala has made a amazing work of transforming the old barge into something quite unique. Must be seen to be really appreciated. I'd highly recommend it.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Premala is a very caring and attentive host, one of those who value privacy, but who at the same time know how to create authentic relationships in a short time.
In addition, the ship is very well maintained and in the city center.
Perfect!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: A wellbeing retreat! 💚 By far the best AirBnB in Rotterdam! Very healing and heartwarming. We appreciate the great communication (hosts are responsive and accommodating) and the wonderful interior design details -- the ship home is a lovely sanctuary beaming with radiance and filled with loving energies. I love the incense and candles and green tea in the bedroom, the beautiful bathtub, all the plants everywhere and all the healing crystals that brighten you up and give off such positive vibes! Plus, I enjoyed the Divine Wisdom I have received from Oracle cards and inspiring books on energy healing ! Will definitely come back!  💖

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Thank you Pramala and Alexandra for hosting us on your boat.
Untypical and sensitive, that’s how we would describe our 2 nights stay on the Avontuur :)
Love and light for you both

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Premala created a very beautiful and spiritual space that I loved to live in for 2 days. Both Premela and Alexandra were very kind and were very kind and helpful souls. Both answered quick to messages and when present were a delight to be around! The boat itself is beautiful, with beautiful interior and a lot of interesting things to find that all carry a story. Premala also gave us a bunch of information on what do around and past Rotterdam that beforehand which is such a nice gesture! I felt very welcomed and respected, I‘d absolutely love to return someday.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: My mum and I stayed in Premala’s boat one night and it was a great experience. The surroundings of the location are very nice and the boat itself is stunning. Full of giant plants and cute lights, the boat’s atmosphere will make you feel relaxed and peaceful. The bathroom is also very well equipped and I advice you to have a shower in the big bath there. Everything is very clean. It was easy to find the boat and the entrance, and Alexandra was very kind and helpful, and she explain us everything we needed to know about the boat. Recommended!!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: The Avontuur is a beautiful boat, with unique decorations that really bring the ship to life. At night they light lots of candles for a special atmosphere. Premala provided plenty of local recommendations before my arrival (food, activities, day trips). He also was kind to invite me on a smaller boat trip to have an evening picnic with 5+ of their friends. The only thing that was unexpected was that there were always several of Premala’s friends on the boat besides the other guests, even at night. While they were all very kind and interesting to talk to, it wasn’t as peaceful for me to be alone with my thoughts like I was expecting, even at night as a group of them would play games a little bit past the 11pm to 11am “quiet hours”. I don’t think this is common but something to be mindful of that there may be a few more (kind and great!) people on board that you’re sharing common areas with. Otherwise, a truly unique experience - all right within the heart of the city!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Premala's boat is a garden of Eden in the heart of Rotterdam. The atmosphere of peace and relaxation will sweep you away, especially as you sit on the gorgeous roof terrace. They were incredibly friendly and communicative hosts, happy to help with anything you need.
The location is close enough to the busy streets of Rotterdam, without being so close that you can't forget it's there. If you don't check out wanting your own Dutch barge to live on, you haven't done it right! We cannot recommend a stay on the Avontuur more!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
If you are looking for a peaceful yet englightening residence to spend a few days,then Premala's Unique dwelling is it. You will definately leave there greater than when you came.
Will definately stay there again.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Spent a wonderful evening with Premala and Alexandra, with the warm lighting and mysterious atmosphere of the furnishing.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Heel mooie boot, gezellige en lieve host, betrokken. Niet een locatie met de meeste privacy, maar als je dat niet erg vindt een goede uitvalsbasis met een spirituele "touch".

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
Als je op zoek bent naar iets wat minder standaard is dan je gemiddelde BnB, je open staat om je privacy eens lekker los te laten en te delen met je medemens, je eens wat opener van geest te voelen en te ervaren dan ben je hier aan t juiste adres.
De lokatie kan niet beter, je bent bij alle bezienswaardigheden in no-time.
Maar helemaal niks doen en gewoon een boek lezen kan ook, of nog minder dan dat...gewoon....niks......kan allemaal
Ik zeg geen goodbye maar tot ziens.....hier kom ik graag terug

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: Premala is a very gracious, friendly, warm host. we felt right at home. The boat has a great deck with a wonderful view. The living area is cozy and inviting. We had a very relaxing stay.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments: I returned for another night a week after my first stay  because it was so lovely to have a haven focused on relaxation at the end of a trip. Folks on the boat were lovely. The deck is the best twilight hour hang.

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
A wonderful place to escape the hustle & bustle of the big city while being close to the center. The hosts respect your privacy but I highly recommend getting to know Premala and Alexandra as they are amazing people!
I cannot recommend staying here enough, I’ll definitely visit again!

name: Cozy room in amazing historic ship!
comments:
What a lovely place to stay in Rotterdam! hidden gem within the Glashaven. There's action in every direction but miraculously it's very peaceful and quiet at the boat's spot. You can reach many of Rotterdam's highlights in a couple of minutes. Premala and Alexandra are such wonderful hosts, very friendly, clear communication and chill. The place looks as on the photos, a little wild, beautiful plants, very warm, special good energy.
I can recommend this as a good place to stay for a fantastic time in Rotterdam!
They also provide with good recommendations and are available for any questions one might have :)

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra is a real sweetheart from the very first to the very last minute. Her cute house is surrounded by pictueous streets, lakes and nature looking so cute as from a film set . The room is in a separate part of the house , in a quiet backside of a very cute house , with wood terrace, shower in the room and next to an artist atelier. everything is really nicely arranged , the bed is amazing for one of the best sleep I have had in long time.
Sandra is very Flexible and easy to communicates with . She switches easily from English to german and could welcome me even in very late hour. All wonderful! Totally recommendable also for students from Rotterdam Erasmus university which is 15 min by foot .

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Had a very good stay. Sandra was flexible on arrival time, and I definitely recommend her room as much privacy and has own shower and toilet.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Nice host, a lot of privacy. It's small and really cold during winter.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: We had a great time at Sandra's place - she was a great host! The room was private, clean and well located. We loved the bed, the shower is really nice! The location is good if you don't want to be right in the centre- it's 10 minutes from the lake, 2 minutes from a great street with shops and cafes. The city centre is only 15 minutes away by bikes. Overall- we were very happy and we'll be coming back!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra's place is very convenient - it's one block from the tram that comes from Rotterdam Central Station and is in a neighbourhood with food + groceries + banks.
We were able to rent bikes from Sandra at a very reasonable rate and explored Rotterdam on bike.
A great host who was actually improving her home with some new furniture and dishes during our stay. The room is not large but it has everything that you need. There is a workshop next door which has a fridge / coffee machine which you can use as well. There were no workshops going on during our stay which meant we had that side mostly to ourselves.
Just a heads up if you are travelling with a friend. The shower in the room is "open" and privacy may be a bit of a challenge in that regard.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra was very helpfull, is a very nice person and very kind. Very happy!
She offered us help all the time and made us feel in home. Very recommendable!! Amazing neighborhood too.
The house very bright and comfortable.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: We had a very nice stay at Sandra's. Nice room, with modern bathroom and shower. Although it is a shared place you get a lot of privacy. I would definitely recommend

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Excellente locatie in rustige straat in prettig gedeelte van de stad, eigen opgang, binnenplaatsje om je fiets te parkeren.Naast de slaapkamer ook kitchenette en ruimte om te ontbijten en de krant te lezen. Veel privacy  en hoge mate van gastvrijheid. Kortom een aanrader!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra’s place was great for a quick stay in Rotterdam. Exactly as described and offered much more privacy than most Private Room accommodation options. Sandra was delightful and very flexible with requests.
Would gladly stay here again. Thank you!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
We had a wonderful stay in Sandra’s property! The house is pretty and very clean. Sandra and her family is very friendly and giving a lot of advices for us, even helped us booked a taxi for early morning flight.
My husband loved the room so much, he thought it is really cool and artsy. We would definitely come back again. :)

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra’s room was really cozy, comfortable and clean! The place is on a nice street with lots of cafes and only a 30 minutes walk from the center of Rotterdam. Sandra was really nice and we enjoyed our stay at her place :)

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: De ruimte van Sandra is verrassend ruim en van alle gemakken voorzien. Een fijn groot bed, een heerlijke douche en o.a. voldoende toiletspullen en mogelijkheid om thee te zetten. De ruimte bevindt zich op een rustige plek met veel privacy.  Ik raad het van harte aan om een verblijf bij haar te boeken!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra's place is close to public transportation and a shopping street, which is great if you wanna explore the city. The room is not so big but has everything you need to be comfortable. Sandra was always available and checked in on me when I was staying. Truly enjoyed my staying and hope to stay here again when in Rotterdam.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Thanks Sandra and Paul for hospitality in such a wonderful cozy place!
It is very interesting here, next to the room there is a workshop for art, there is an atmosphere of creativity and kindness.
Sandra is an excellent hostess, everything is very clean, every detail for a comfortable stay.
I was in April. At this time it is usually still cold. But the apartment was warm and the heating worked. It is very pleased, because I love the heat.
Near the apartment there is a supermarket, a delicious bakery, very close to the center of the city. On the same street is a metro station.
I liked everything very much! Beautiful city! Great apartment!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Her apartment is not located in the city center but it is 2mins by the Metro, therefore is well connected to the city center. The room is smaller than I expected but there was everything that you need.
Sandra is good and nice host, she gave us all the information about how to arrive to her place. Unfortunately, I have to notice that there is not privacy at all because everything can be seen from the windows and if there are workshops is a bit nosy.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra was an amazing host! She welcomed us with some vegan snacks (apples and cake), explained us about the place and the sightseeings, as well the things to do in Rotterdam. The place was very stylish. We had our own private entrance; also plenty of privacy, fresh linen and towels, cosmetics, toilet paper, and so on. We had available a microwave, fridge, cutlery, dishes, more bed linen and blankets. Her place is near to the tram and very near to the subway. There are supermarkets and restaurants around. The bed was comfy and the shower a DREAM! I want so bad a shower like that! Thanks dear Sandra for everything. We highly recommend!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: The space was clean, functional, and comfortable. The street adjacent to the property was charming and bustling. Because there was no public transportation on that street it felt very local and genuine. And the walk to both tram and subway is quick - even on crutches. I loved my visit and Sandra was such a kind, welcoming, and accommodating hostess.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Great location, fancy neighbourhood, enough privacy, great public transport connectivity and a lovely host. What more could you wish for!?

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra has been such an amazing host! She is super friendly and open minded. Also leaving my luggage for the day in the apartment after checking out was no problem!
The room is really clean and light! I really recommend it as a place to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: A quiet, homely space exactly as described, with a wonderfully comfortable bed. It is in a charming neighbourhood within easy reach of Rotterdam central by tram and/or metro. Sandra is a delightful and fun host and we enjoyed the connection with her art studio and classes. Great value as a base for getting to know Rotterdam.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: A funky space in a delightful quiet corner of Rotterdam, only a short metro or tram ride to the centre. Amazingly comfortable bed and a real feeling of security. Sandra is warm and welcoming but not ‘in your hair’. The room is small but they wary it is set up, going straight in to the outdoor space and a studio next door, it feels spacious.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra's place was an ideal spot for a restful stay, while also being close to the city centre. It provided a perfect balance between the busier areas and offered a view into a friendly neighbourhood dotted with convenient shops, cafes and a nice park and lake nearby. I highly recommend it to all travellers, whether staying in Rotterdam only a few days or longer!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra was super sweet and really did above and beyond!
Very responsive and quickly answered my questions before I came. She offered to help since I was coming over with my cat because my street was going through constructions.
Even though her street had some construction work going on as well, the room I stayed it was really nice and quiet (not facing the street). You can get nice air if you leave the door to the porch open, or use the air conditioner - both options feel super nice.
The porch was cozy, and I was welcome to use her work space as well. I was also treated with some snacks :) I loved the lighting too, you can change the color and get some funky atmosphere.
Sandra did mention she occasionally have workshops in her studio - I was in the room while she had one, and it didnt bother me at all (and I'm very sensitive to outside noises). It was fairly short, and with a very small group. so 99% of the time the area is free.
I live close by so the metro isnt an issue to me, but if you're coming from anywhere else, the place is like 30 seconds away from voorschoterlaan metro station.
I would definitely recommend staying there.
Thanks again Sandra!

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra was so lovely and helpfull. The appartment was very clean and I like the rain shower. Also Sandra gave so many good tipps for Bike rent, car parking, food and flea market.
The house is in a very nice area, supermarket annd metro right across the street. I will come back again.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
We spent a few days as a small getaway in Rotterdam and for that the room was absolutely perfect!
Its comfortable, the shower and toilet are right by the room and in the evening it is quiet and peaceful for a good nights rest.
Sandra is warm and friendly host, looking out for her guests.
When we arrived there was a small hiccup at check in, which didn't bother us at all and was beyond her control. Yet she was ever so hospitable and apologetic about it, rectifying the situation in no time. This for me only goes to show that she cares about the comfort of her guests and puts effort into it. This made us feel very much cared for.
Apart for the amenities of the room itself, the location and area are a positive pointer as well. The metro line to the city center just down the street and a very pleasant lunch bar and grocery shop around the corner.
If ever we visit Rotterdam again we would always consider staying here if the room is available.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra is a great hostess, she makes you feel v welcome but also gives you privacy. The room and shower etc are ultra clean and the shower excellect.  We made use of her Art Rm to cook simple meals, everything we needed was there.  There are a shops and cafes within a few minutes walk. We will definately be staying here again when we next come back to Rotterdam.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra is a super nice host and even offered a meal to us when we arrived late.
A good bright room with private shower, the toilet is shared if there is an art course happening - which wasn't when we were here.
We'll come back if we are in Rotterdam.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
The house is in good location, it is 14 minutes by bicycle 🚴 from the central station Rotterdam! MY TIP YOU CAN RENT THERE EASY A BICYCLE NEAR THE RAILWAY STATION 🚉
The host was friendly, we were arrived at 0:10 in the morning and she was waiting for us.
To the room, the room is quiet because it is inside a building, so you will not hear some traffic sound.
To the bed is comfortable to sleep, and the mattress is 👍.
It is also a little kitchen in the room next to the Apartment were you can cook some coffee or tee, however we have not used it, because we were often outside.
To the workshop, we have been on a time, where Sandra had a workshop.
It was oke and we had our privacy.
Enjoy Rotterdam

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra is a lovely lady and her place is great to stay at. It has everything you thought you needed and more. Superbly clean, good location, peaceful street. Metro is 100m away. All in all, very satisfied with everything.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: Sandra is a very nice person, the room was very clean, with everything that you need for a nice and cozy stay in Rotterdam. It’s a quite neighborhood and close to a metro station. If you come by car, easy to find a place in the street. Perfect for single or a couple.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
Sandra's place is right next to the art studio and you can tell by the beautiful paintings everywhere. The room is as pretty as in the pictures, the bed is comfortable and the bedside lights are fun :D
We'd been travelling for 4-5 days and needed laundry, and even though it's not part of the Airbnb, Sandra was kind enough to sort it for us. She's so lovely, I would love to stay here again.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments: A perfect small room for a couple, next to a train station and a street with a lot of good restaurants and ice creams. Perfect for our weekend, we enjoyed every minutes spent there.

name: Hotspot in Rotterdam,  eigen douche, wc, airco
comments:
The apartment is nice and cosy, quite central and really close to the metro station. My visit was pretty short, but as far as I can tell it's also in a nice area of Rotterdam.
Sandra answers super quick, is absolutely helpful and friendly. She even wanted to send me my lost beanie back to Germany.
The room is small, but clean and bright with a comfy bed, shower, and toilet and separat entrance. I would come back again! :)

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
We've had a perfect week-end (from Paris) at Kajan's home, the flat was even more fantastic than expected, the view on the harbour incredible and Kajan is a great host. She had prepared for us a guide before our arrival with some tips to visit Rotterdam. The advised addresses are very good especially the little V and "Pierre" restaurants, that we advise too, our turn. Kajan is very nice, sweet and has an answer for every question you could have.
We recommand you to book your week-end/week/holidays at Kajan's home, you will not be disappointed at all.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Such a beautiful place. Kajan's place is located just outside of the city center. It is just far enough away to be very peaceful but a short walk to the city center. With incredible unobstructed views of both the port and the city center, we could have stayed in and just gazed at the unique architecture of Rotterdam. There is a wonderful bar just around the corner, Eetcafe Verhip, and a restaurant, Stroom, in the ground floor that serves a nice breakfast. We did not have the pleasure of meeting Kajan, but she made sure that we were comfortable, informed, and responded quickly to every question we had. I highly recommend her place. Such a great city and such a great host.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Kajan's appartment is nicely located in Rotterdam. Within 10 minutes you can be in the city centre and in the neighbourhood are also some nice restaurants.
The apartment itself is also nice and has a beautiful view over a part of the harbour of Rotterdam.
Communication with Kajan about the apartment was also very good and clear.
We definetly recommend this apartment if you are looking for a city trip to Rotterdam.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Nice appartment to stay. Beautiful view!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kayan is such a lovely Host, helpful and responsive. The place was super central with a view of most of South Rotterdam. If anyone is looking for a hip spot in Rotterdam, then I would definitely recommend this place. 😁

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan made every effort to make us feel very welcome! We had a wonderful stay in this very special apartment. Beautiful views across Rotterdam and a very comfortable place to relax.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
It was really a pleasure to stay at Kajan's place! The appartment is very cosy, clean and spacious with an extraordinary view!
All the facilities I needed (like fast internet connection, a nice shower, a comfortable bed and kitchen) were available to make my stay very relaxed.
Communication with Kajan went smoothly. She is very kind and helpful. This all makes you feel very welcome at her place.
Maybe a bit pricey (compared to alternatives), but definitely worth the money!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan's place is well located, easily accessible with the public transports from the train station. The views on the city are very impressive. The apartment is very beautiful and comfortable. Kajan was very helpful and also provided a well crafted pdf with all the relevant information for a first visit to Rotterdam.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
This place is really great!
Located directly on the harbor with a beautiful view - during the day and especially in the dark.
The apartment is spacious & it has everything you need. It is also centrally located and in the immediate vicinity is the metro. A supermarket is directly in the house.
Kajan is an extraordinary hostess who gives super fast answers. She also knows the city and gives great tips.
We were completely satisfied & would choose this apartment again at any time. :)

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Wow - what a view! Kajans apartment has a wonderful view over Rotterdam. The whole complex is very modern and nice. Kajan was a great host and gave us really good tips.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan's little appartment has the most amazing views over the city and the harbour. It is clean, well tended to, and communication with Kajan is excellent. Highly recommended!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Perfect place with a beautifull views.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Our stay at Kajans apartment was wonderful and the view is absolutely amazing! Kajan is such a nice person and gave us a lot of individual and helpful tips to explore Rotterdam. Everything was easy and went really well, even though she was all time ready to help us, if we would had any questions. We would love to come back sometime!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Great home with mesmerizing view!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: It was very clean and very cozy! The view over the port of Rotterdam is breathtaking! Also I liked the bed which was very comfy!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Lovely stay again with amazing views over Rotterdam.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan’s place has an amazing view! We loved looking out into the port to watch the boats coming in and out. She was a very responsive host and had wonderful suggestions. Only downside was that we were woken up both days we stayed by noises, couldn’t tell if it was due to water pipes or construction in the building. This very well may have been temporary noises. Not positive on that. Overall a good stay. Thank you Kajan!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Very hospitable host, who was flexible, friendly and helpful! She gave a lot of useful tips. Regarding the apartment, very clean with all necessary facilities and an amazing view. Thus, for everybody who is going to visit Rotterdam, I definitely recommend Kajan's apartment!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan’s appartment has a magnificent view and everything you could wish for for a weekend in Rotterdam. Great local tips, unique views of the sunrise from the bedroom and of the city skyline at night. Kajan is an excellent host.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
The place was perfect and very cosy. We stayed over new years eve and the views from the flat were amazing. The bedroom was nice and bed was made, there was no where to put our clothes but wasn't a big deal. The decor was really nice in the house and very modern. there was a supermarket and places to eat nearby
The living room had a nice spacious sofa and TV had so many channels and alot of English ones so was good for relaxing evenings. Kajan gave us plenty of tips, documents and always responded quickly if we had questions. Would definitely recommend this place. lots of security by the entrance so you feel safe. great location by the port as well

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Great flat, great views, great location, great host! We had a lovely time in Rotterdam and can fully recommend Kayan's place.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Me and my girlfriend had 3 awesome days in Rotterdam! The apaartement was clean, had a cool look and the view is amazing! We just needed 15 minutes to walk to the main spots of Rotterdam and if your a bit lazy you can always get the tram directly in front of the house. It was better than what we've expected so we will definitely recommend this place!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Absolutely astonishing view from apartment, very clean and smartly designed interior. If you want to enjoy a sunset and night lights of Rotterdam port after a nice walk thru the city - this is your choice! Thanks to Kajan for being responsive and flexible to our checking requirements :)

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Der Aufenthalt in Kajans Wohnung war sehr schön. Die Aussicht war ein Hightlight und man konnte das Zentrum Rotterdams fussläufig sehr gut erreichen! Die Wohnung war sauber und verfügte über alles, was man brauchte.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:

Another thing I am disappointed was that the flat had no ventilation at all, none of the windows could be opened.
The flat was properly cleaned and the communication with the host was good at all times.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Unbeatable view, incredible host, and amazing apartment. The apartment looks just like in the pictures, and Kajan couldn't be a better host! Unfortunately we had some problems with the iron and vacuum cleaner at the beginning, but Kajan fixed everything immediately. It was a pleasure to stay in the apartment, and even more so because of Kajan. There is a supermarket right downstairs and the tram is walking distance from the building. There is a park very close by, with beautiful restaurants and views. We rented bikes and parked them just outside, which was very handy. Will stay again for sure!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan is a great host, quick to answer, and very helpful with tips on how to get to the apartment or go around the city. The apartment was as described, in a great location with amazing views of the sunset and sunrise! It was located in a quiet and safe place. WiFi and windows worked both as supposed. A supermarket is conveniently just downstairs and the tram is just 3 minutes away walking. We would love to go back anytime!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Very nice apartment with a beautiful view and comfortable bed! There’s a grocery store right down stairs and the apartment is only a 10 minute walk to the train. Kajan was a such a kind host and made me feel so welcomed. Perfect stay in Rotterdam!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan was a great host, and the place was clean, quiet, and exactly as described/pictured. We really enjoyed the views of Rotterdam as we walked out of the apartment each day. One minor issue was that the lights in the shower and bathroom were non-functional, but Kajan informed us of the issue ahead of time and provided a solution to the problem before we checked in. I would strongly recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a great place to stay in Rotterdam.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Thanks for having us at your lovely apartment Kajan🙏 Everything was perfect and the view absolutely amazing 😍

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: We stayed in many AirBnBs this year, and this appartment was probably the highlight. Besides the generous space and the fantastic view, it also turned out to be extremely functional, comfortable, and quiet. Kajan was a fantastic and responsive host. Warmly recommended.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: What a great place to stay in Rotterdam. Kajan was helpful and friendly. The flat was as described - spacious and warm with an amazing view over Rotterdam and the water. I would definitely stay here again. Transport just nearby and a big supermarket in the building.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: everything was exactly as described apartment was spotless lots of space. the view was amazing from the lounge/dining area in the house and out the front 😀 people around the area really friendly aswell. the host was helpful and gave clear instructions with the check in.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
The view from the apartment is wonderful! The apartment is located in a beautiful neighbourhood and there is easy access to public transport (a supermarket barely a few steps away is a huge plus).
Kajan was a very helpful host, responding to all queries very promptly. Would definitely stay here again. 🙂

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Such a cozy place with a beatiful view. And the host was really nice and attentive, couldn't ask for more pleasant and at ease communication and welcoming!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: I enjoyed staying here  for its convenience to the tram, supermarket and restaurants on site and wonderful views. It was a quiet apartment and had everything you needed, including a Nespresso machine.  Made easy connections to the main train station for seeing other area of the Netherlands. Delfshaven is a short walk away to experience part of Rotterdam that has historical significance. Kajan reached out several times to make sure all was fine and made recommendations for local eateries.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Amazing spacious apartment with breathtaking views of Rotterdam. Location was perfect, good transportation links with the metro & tram all walking distance. There is a supermarket directly under the building with a variety of products to stock the fridge.
Kajan was an amazing host with great communication throughout the entire stay.
I would definitely recommend this space if you want a perfect place to rest & recuperate after exploring the city.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Amazing apartment well located with a beautiful view.
Kajan was very reactive and helpfull.
I highly recommend !

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan's apartment was lovely, quiet and clean. The views were amazing. It was very convenient to have the washing machine and the kitchen was very well stocked. We loved being able to play the guitar and get into the city easily.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
We spend wonderful days in the apartment, lovely place with amazing view.
Thanks for all, easy check in and good communication.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Amazing place to stay with a great view over the port of Rotterdam. Lots of space, well equiped kitchen and comfy bed. The tram stop is close by or it's easy to walk to the main sites too. We recommend this place a lot!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Great View? Great Apartement

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay at Kajan's place. It is clean, quiet and well located. We liked that is practical: a supermarket is a couple of minutes away from the building. Same for tram no 8 that takes to city center in 20-ish minutes. Close to Het Park and Euromast. We also liked the place itself: on the 12th floor, we enjoyed the beautiful view over the Meuse river, the neighbourhood around, sky and clouds. Lots of natural light. Communication with Kajan was easy and smooth during our stay.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: It was pleasant to stay at Kajan. The view is amazing from sunrise to sunset. Supermarket on the ground floor of the building. I definitely recommend to stay at this place

There is a washing machine, dishwasher etc. Great view and it's right above a local super-market if you cook your own meals. Kitchen gagdets are very handy we cooked our own food for the whole week. Strongly recommend!

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan's place was amazing, the view was beautiful. The area was very handy with public transport and the supermarket very close. Kajan always answered our messages very quickly and was always in contact. We had a great stay here.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

Had a great stay during my days in Rotterdam. The apartment on some of the upper levels gives you a great view. The communication with the host is also great. Very friendly and quick. Some of the things inside the apartment need a bit of care. But all in all great value
Can totally recommend

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan's place is spectacular ! There is a beautiful view, a grocery store and 2 restaurants just steps away as well as a tram stop. This was our first time in Rotterdam and it definitely will not be our last. This was the perfect place to introduce us to this vibrant city !

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Bathroom has poor construction leading to water flowing out of the bathroom (eventual water damage) and no ventilation, air system doesn't seem to work, difficult to operate windows, bedroom is dark and not private, kitchen is claustrophobic and dark, attempts to poach fees

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam

There is an Albert Heijn down stairs about half a block of walk.
The host was super responsive to everything and very helpful.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Excellent place to stay in Rotterdam, especially if you are planning a long stay. The view and design of the apartment is excellent. We were here to settle our son in the university, hence were busy and could not enjoy the area and house fully. Hopefully can make another trip and stay here.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Gorgeous place, with insane views of the city. Close to everything, yet very peaceful. The host is super sweet and made my stay even better. 10/10 recommended.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Kajan was very responsive and helpful. The view is worth a million.  Apartment very easy to navigate. Worth a repeat for sure

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Beautiful apartment with awesome views of the Maas and the Euromast tower, easy city access via the tram as well as a great host.
Would definitely recommend.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments: Great spacious place with amazing view. Comfortable and clean.

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Lived for 10 years close to the apartment of Kajan so I'm well known with the area. But Kajan's apartment really felt like coming home again. Really miss my view of the Erasmusbridge, the cruise boats and the water. This wasn't the same view but it was a perfect alternative.
Really nice place, plenty of space. Really nice area to walk around - next to the Euromast. Also great for kids if they want to go with the "Pancake boat".
Will absolutely come back when I want to stay in Rotterdam longer. Prefer the apartment compared to a hotel

name: Amazing view over the Port of Rotterdam
comments:
Kajan's apartment overlooks Rotterdam port with spectacular views of the water on one side and the Euomast on the other. The apartment is spacious, light, airy and comfortable; the building itself is very cool, neighbours are friendly and there are handy amenities (restaurants, supermarket, tram) extremely close by.
Kajan couldn't do enough for her guests! She is super responsive and provided great recommendations and suggestions and answered any questions promptly. She is sweet and thoughtful. I would absolutely return to her apartment if returning to Rotterdam.

name: Cosy and spacious near city center
comments: A lovely bright, clean and spacious apartment with plenty of room for us all.  Arrangements worked well and everything was ready for us.  One minor drawback worth a mention: the stairs to the apartment are steep and narrow and might be a problem for an elderly or disabled person.  But we had a great time and Rotterdam is an interesting and friendly city.  This was our first stay with airbnb and I will definitely try it again.

name: Cosy and spacious near city center
comments:
This is a great place - truly one of the most fun times we've had at an AirBnB. Arnout and Brenda are so amazingly helpful and the place is great. It's much bigger than it looks in the photos - the living room area is huge. The three bedrooms are all good, one next to a very nice balcony and one with bunk beds that our children loved (they also loved the toys)
There are two beautiful, friendly cats that really lit up our stay and we had great recommendations of where to go and what to eat (they even left us some breakfast food). The immediate local area is pretty, easy to get around and has great places to eat. Don't be fooled either - you can get to Rotterdam Centraal station *very* quickly - there are three frequent tram routes and it's 5-6 mins on the tram. The tram stop is right at the end of the road.
We discussed as we left how we'd love to come back - I think that's the highest praise you can have!

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: Vincent owns a cozy apartment at a large apartment building with a beautiful view over the city. It is very conveniently located in the middle of the Wijnhaven, nearby actually everything that Rotterdam is famous for. Vincent was not in town and his friend Martijn arranged everything. He made sure that I felt comfortable and everything was organized, he even put a nice breakfast in the fridge for me. I can recommend everyone to stop-and-stay at his place.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: I like the apartment and the view . Vencent was helpful and friendly and he arrange every things before we arrived . I recommend the stay in this apartment .

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments:
Where to begin, being from Texas I was concerned that I wasn’t going to find a apartment that didn’t feel like home. However the “ Great Views” apartment felt like home as soon as I arrived and throughout the 77 days I stayed. The host was awesome! Courteous and knowledgeable about the area which is very helpful. The apartment is located in a fabulous, upscale, quite, exclusive location. He has a wealth of knowledge about Rotterdam and where the best eateries are.
Great Views apartment has a gorgeous, mesmerizing view of the Maas river that you can enjoy no matter the time of day or night, simply captivating. From the balcony you can enjoy the view of city center and Markthal. The apartment is spacious and inviting. The kitchen has a full array of cooking equipment, the bedroom had extra blankets for the cold mornings and the bathroom was roomy with plenty of clean towels.
During my stay my brothers came to visit me and I asked the host if he could accommodate them in which he did so by providing extra beds for them. He showed great hospitality towards them also.
Everything you could need or want is within walking distance. Markthal, museums, restaurants, shops ( from boutiques to major department stores), train station and around the corner there is a grocery store that has anything you might need. I definitely enjoyed my time and the apartment will always be my first choice!!!

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
