comments: This place was awesome.  You can't get a better view in Rotterdam.  the area was conveniently located close to the Blaak train station and had a grocery store right around the corner.  It is a quick walk to a lot of bars and restaurants and the Markethaal.  The apartment itself was huge and comfortable.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: We loved our stay here at Vincent's! The location was perfect for exploring Rotterdam and greater area- close to the Markethall, Blaak Metro station, etc. We loved the views from the windows, and Vincent was very helpful and responsive for any questions we had. Hope to be back sometime again!

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: Great apartment for a short or long stay. Views are amazing. All the amenities you need including washer and dryer. Spar right around the corner. Vincent is very responsive. Would definitely book again.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: Vincent responded quickly and was very kind and welcomed us. He guided us to major tourist attractions. And his house is perfect. There was everything that was needed. The view of the house is excellent. It is very close to Rotterdam Blaak Station. It is right in front of the market hall. There are various shopping, food, and attractions around the house. I will choose this house if I have a chance next time.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments:
This apartment is in a super central yet very quiet location since it is on an "island", making it ideal for those who want to get around easily but also have a place to escape from the city noises.
The apartment itself is fairly clean, but I would not call it spotless or clutter-free for those who prefer a higher standard of cleanliness. Some basic amenities were missing and although Vincent offered to buy them, it was easier just to get it ourselves. We also had some issues with worn down kitchen cookware and Vincent came around the next day to replace the whole set with new ones. It would have been nice if they were replaced prior to our stay, but at least he was very responsive and proactive to try to make our stay better.
Overall despite some small issues, it was a great place to call home for a month in one of the best cities in Netherlands.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments:
Our stay at Vincent's apartment was stunning. The flat is very comfortable, with everything you need for a long stay: a fully functional kitchen with lots of appliances, a washing machine and dryer, and a comfortable workplace. The view is just mind-blowing, and indeed, the apartment is very quiet despite being very central. Since we came by car the parking place is a huge plus. Vincent is a great host, friendly and helpful.
10 out of 10, highly recommended. We'd love to stay again.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments:
Vincent's place is located 5 minutes away from the city center, comfortable, spacious and looks as described. As a host Vincent is extremely kind, helpful and considerate and that has made all the difference. We stayed for longer period and Vincent was a great host!
The apartment was clean, spacious, well stocked and in a building that is safe, quiet and has good views. There are good amenities and being so close to Markthal and Beurs was a huge plus.
Definitely recommend Vincent's place.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments: Vincent was very helpful and friendly. When I arrived after a long flight and was quite hungry, there was a basket of fruits at the BnB, which was a nice touch. I really liked that the house has everything we need, and I didn't have to stress about settling down. It was ready to go from day one, which makes it feel like home. Esp since I'm on work trip, it helps me save time.

name: An island within the city. Silent and central!
comments:
Prime location with a beautiful view!
Vincent was very flexible and helpful in accommodating our needs, both prior to as well as during our trip. We were welcomed with a nice bowl of fruit :)
The place has the basic necessities.

name: Historical sailing ship in city centre
comments: Basic but hej it stays a boat. Super cosy and in the middle of Rotterdam's city centre. Walking, cycling distance from most highlights. Warm welcome and excellent tips from super friendly Deniz !

name: Historical sailing ship in city centre
comments: Super geregeld, top ontvangst en wat een locatie! De sfeer op de boot, de locatie (alle highlights in de buurt) en de faciliteiten maakten ons vriendenweekend tot een groot succes. De verhuurder, de matroos en de schipper kwamen allemaal gedag zeggen en zijn heel prettige mensen. Je voelt je meteen welkom! Wij konden geen reden bedenken om de boot niet nog eens te huren. Ik kan het dan ook alleen maar aanbevelen!

name: Historical sailing ship in city centre
comments:
Gezellig, originele en sfeervolle verblijfplaats in centrum Rotterdam. je hebt lekker veel privacy, alles voor jezelf en met een beperkte groep (9 personen) zowel betaalbaar als heerlijk ruim. in de kajuit gelijk veel gezelligheid, prima hutten en een leuke ervaring.
verwacht niet teveel luxe als 't gaat om sanitair en de bedden: het is immers een schip, maar meer dan prima! zeker aanrader en wellicht varen we in de zomer ook nog wel een keer mee ;)

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments: Stayed here for a midweek and enjoyed the place a lot. Clean, nice light, everything you need to be comfortable and in a calm area. Sebastiaan was very responsive and helpful with parking and practical matters. Would def recommend

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments:
We had a great time at Sebastiaan and Vanessa’s place. Everything is clean and tidy, the kitchen is very well equipped and the living area is bright and comfortable.
I would definitely recommend staying here!

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments:
I had such a lovely stay in this beautiful, clean and cozy apartment. The interior deco is beautifully curated with art, books, and tonnes of sunlight in the spring time. The rain shower was amazing!
The house was also well stocked, which was a really nice and thoughtful touch. The apartment is is really private yet only 5 min away from the tram station so getting to the city center was both convenient and efficient.
While I didn’t get to meet Sebastian and Vanessa, they we really responsive, proactive and friendly providing detailed instructions and even local recommendations.

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments:
If you're looking for a good definition of the Dutch word 'gezellig', then you'll find it in Sebastiaan's apartment. The place makes you feel at home, it's very nicely decorated, practical (all amenities are there), spacious (much more than you'd think from the photos), and full of natural sunlight.
I stayed there for almost a month and had no problem whatsoever — Sebastiaan was always super responsive, flexible, and on my last day, he helped me solve a biiiig problem, for which I will be always grateful (and embarrassed about ;)).
If you work remotely, then the internet connection is also impeccable and super fast.
The location is ideal — close to a park, gym, supermarket, swimming pool, restaurants, and within walking distance from the centre, station, etc. If you cycle, then it makes reaching the top places even better.
Overall, a 100/10 experience — hospitality, flat, and location that should set standards for other AirBnB hosts!

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments: I highly recommend staying in Sebastiaan and Vanessa's beautiful Airbnb!  It was exactly as advertised- light, airy, spacious and peaceful.  With super fast internet, a fully stocked kitchen and spotlessly clean, it is everything you want in an Airbnb. There is a spacious upstairs and downstairs, so you feel comfortable and at-home anywhere in this space. To make the experience even better, the hosts were incredibly accommodating and responsive to all questions.  We had a wonderful 5-star stay!

name: Spacious, Cozy, Sunny Apartment in City Center!
comments: Sebastiaans place was stellar. Exactly as advertised and perfectly fit our needs. Blazing fast internet and super comfortable. public transport was minutes from the front door. A well stocked kitchen allowed us to cook and the balcony was nice to sit on. Perfect adventure spot for us thx Sebastiaan.

name: Perfect private appartment + garden in centre
comments: Peter Frank is an excellent host - super helpful, quick to sort out any problems and always available. The space is nice and bright and located conveniently close to public transport, but yet not noisy. I would recommend this place to other traveller's looking for a safe, compact and clean space with good amenities in Rotterdam.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments:
Great location, fun accommodations on this old sailing ship. Windows dripped a bit making it damp, and could have had a better equipped kitchen/galley.
But it worked great for our group attending the ITU World Triathlon Championships.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments: Me and my friends had an amazing get-together. The setting and view is just mesmerizing and being inside the boat even during midnight with music and laughter we weren't disturbing anyone.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments:
All went very smoothly. The boat was as described, very spacious, ideal for big groups.
Top location, and premium view.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments: if you want the best view this is it but be prepared for mildew smell and no kitchen water working.  we had to bail ship first day.  tried for 6 hours to air it out but no go.  for the price was not worth it but if was cheap I would rough it.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments: It was the perfect setting for our annual weekend with 14 friends. Cosy together on a boat. Amazing views. The boat has all the necessities (cooker, oven, fridge, freezer, dish washer, BBQ, beer tap, wifi), even some spices left there. The boat is moving, which scared some at the beginning fearing sea sickness, but that's all between the ears. Finally no issue for anyone. We had some issues with the beer tap, but they were solved. The communication with Pieter was very efficient. We had to go back to the boat after check-out as we forgot something, but that was no issue. This level of trust is very much appreciated.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments: Een gezellig verblijf op een top-locatie waar je toch privacy hebt voor een grote groep.

name: Groeps accommodatie "Marie Galante" in Rotterdam
comments: We had an unforgettable weekend with a family gathering. We loved the location and the very cozy atmosphere on the boat.       The view on the river is just amazing and the boat is located very central in Rotterdam within walking distance of most sights. Bedrooms are very small but we slept just fine, old and young. We can highly recommend this place!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: The apartment is very clean and has exactly what you need, the garden is pretty quiet and lightened in the morning, with a nice odor of magnolias ! It's right in the center, very next to the museums and the canal, the location is perfect ! And Kees and Marjolijn are really kind persons, ready to help if you need anything, I definitely recommend this airbnb !

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: We spent a very nice moment in this place. Clean, quiet, functional,  we can hear only the songs of the birds. The cosy place opens its doors and windows on a green garden changing during the day with the different light of the sun. The bed is very comfortable. I was there for a big professionnal audition and felt really in the good place. Kees and Marjolijn spread simply their huge humanity. Thank you again and again. Julie and Bruno

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Live as a Rotterdam - close to everything, especially the Museums.  This garden apartment is quiet - not facing the street, but the back garden.  Has everything you need including a diner booth for eating.  The bed, shower and kitchen are all basic - but clean and working.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Very well located, with restaurants and shops nearby, 10 minutes walk from the very center, the park and Boijmans museum. Kees & Marjolijn have been very helpful, giving us tips about the city... and the place is sooo quiet, surrounded by nature. All you can see from the window is trees and plants. Very pleasant stay:)

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: This is an amazing apartment. It is sandwiched between a tram stop and a metro station so it's super convenient to get around. It's very warm and cozy and there's lots of light. The mattress is firm and comfortable. Good shower! Good sized kitchen! It could do with an oven or a microwave though. Cable TV is fun and a plus. We love everything about this apartment. Communication with Kees was a breeze.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: wonderful apartment in Rotterdam. the apartment is amazing and it’s right off a quiet street in the heart of the city. the host communication was fantastic.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: A great location, quiet and elegant. A garden with a table and chairs to have your morning coffee.  Museums minutes away and shopping and great stores on the main street. Minutes from the Metro and Tram, 20 minutes walk from Rotterdam Central Station and a great stores and statues along the way. Easy access to everything you need.  A great stay and wonderful hosts. My second stay here and hope to come again.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Great location! Rooms are cold, tile floors, no privacy in shower (connected to kitchen)

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: This slightly quirky space had everything we needed for our two night stay. The basement stayed nice and cool during the summer heatwave and the back terrace was a nice escape. Very convenient location. Just a short tram ride to central station. Would stay again.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: There are so many great things about staying here, but I think that our favorite thing was the location.  We were able to have breakfast at a different café or bakery each morning, and there are many of them within a five to ten minute walk.  If you are going further, the trams are just around the corner and the Metro is less than two blocks away.  We visited nearly every part of Rotterdam, as well as the Hague, Gouda, and Amsterdam with day trips from the apartment.  Even with all the sightseeing, we still spent a lot of time relaxing at the apartment as well.  The garden patio is a great place to enjoy a glass of wine or beer and some of the excellent local cheese.  Since our stay was two weeks, the washer/dryer was a big plus.  And two things that not everyone thinks about until the stay, the bed and the shower were both fantastic.  And of course the apartment is very clean.  The bottom line is that we would definitely stay here again!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
This apartment is in a great location and easy to get to everywhere needed.
The layout is a little different, I.e no overall door to apartment and a shower in the kitchen makes it more difficult for privacy.
Overall it was a good stay and a clean apartment with all appliances needed, even a nice beer in the fridge too! Thank you!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
I had another lovely stay in Kees and Marjolijn's beautiful and commodious garden apartment. Steps from the #4 tram and a very short walk to the Metro station with shops and grocery stores very nearby, a 15 minute walk from Rotterdam Central Station and near museums and historical sites, the location is superb for a visit. The apartment is a few steps down from the street and the back of the apartment opens up to a beautiful inner private garden. Comfortable and quiet a perfect place to relax after a busy day. Thanks for the opportunity be be you guest yet again.
Reed

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: We hadden een slaapgelegenheid nodig dicht bij het ziekenhuis ivm operatie van onze dochter. Kees en Marjolijn waren zeer gastvrij en waren zeer flexibel en behulpzaam. Het appartement had alles wat we nodig hadden en bied veel privacy. Aanrader.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Very nice appt, right at the center, yet in a quiet street. 5/5

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
Kees’ and Marjolijn’s place is ideally situated in Rotterdam Center. One end of the street connects to a vivid commercial street with all kind of restaurants, supermarkets, bakeries etc, while at the dead end of the street, approx 2 minutes from the apt, you will find a metro station. Amsterdam Central Railway Station and the Rotterdam main shopping street are both within walking distance of the apt.
The apt itself is not luxurious but has everything you need to have a comfortable stay. The kitchen is well equipped, the wifi worked perfect, a lot of channels on the cable, good matrasses, and a Nespresso machine to start the day and finish your meals. Though the position of the bathroom and the second bed room may seem a bit odd -as explained by the hosts in the description of the place- it wasn’t a problem for us at all.
I can definitely recommend the apartment of Kees and Marjolijn

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Accomodation is pleasent, check-in and -out process simple, Mr. Kees leaves you full privacy. We would repeat this rental, and suggest it to others.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
Well located, easy to access. Very clean apartment. Friendly host. We enjoy our stay. Only one remark : the bathroom in the kitchen, lack of privacy.
Bien placé, à 15mn à pied de la gare centrale, facile d’accès, appartement calme et propre. Hôte sympathique. Nous avons apprécié notre séjour. Une seule remarque : la salle de bain dans la cuisine manque d’intimité.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Great location flat. You can hear noise from the upstairs flat but that was our only fault

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
Kees and Marjolijn's apartment is great as a base from which to explore Rotterdam. Cosy, convenient, like the best airbnb places it feels like a home from home.
Extremely well connected to the tram and metro network, less than 20 minutes from Centraal, and the museum park is in walking distance. For my 80-year-old mother it was perfect, and - compared to most Dutch houses - there were not too many steep stairs to climb!
Looking out into the garden from the sitting room / main bedroom is really nice.
The kitchen has all the basics you need. Having the bathroom sink and shower adjacent to the kitchen is not a problem when travelling with people you know well ;)
The mattresses are great, there is an abundance of duvets, pillows, towels.
If you're sleeping in the front room (single bed), best bring some ear plugs because it faces towards the main street, so you may hear people and traffic passing, and you may notice the building's front door opening and closing.
Marjolijn and Kees, as most reviewers have pointed out, are lovely, helpful, and very responsive to questions.
There are two OV-chipcards in the apartment that guests can use, plus lots of info about Rotterdam, so you can continue the sightseeing after coming home from an excursion.
Delighted to find that there was a DVD player + screen in the front room, in addition to the widescreen TV in the main room.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Location is very central to where we wanted to be - Tram, clothing stores, and restaurants nearby, near family too. Easy walk or tram ride to main train station. Main room comfortable and practical - We liked the booth and window view to the garden outside for breakfast and take out. Kitchen workable too. Had everything we needed - even hairdryer. Second room, front room less cosy. Pictures accurate. Shower in kitchen doable, but less ideal if you have more shy parties. My teens found it less ideal, albeit a creative solution.  The key pad made check in and going in an out super practical. Kees helped us with technical issue which was great.  Worked well for us!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: The flat is a super cozy nook in the perfect location, close to the center but not in unbelievably an noisy street. Its outdoor garden gives feeling of privacy while allowing plenty of daylight in. And Kees is extremely helpful, taking details into account and making the check in and the whole stay unbelievably easy! Definitely would recommend!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: A perfect flat for a stay in Rotterdam. Great location and no noise despite the flat being near a busy night-life area, lots of places to eat, drink and shop for food, records, and anything else you might need.  Tram 4 from central station stops at the end road and metro Dijkzigt station lines A, B, and C at the other end.  A truly short walk to the centre of Rotterdam and very safe area all round, just watch out for bikes.  The apartment has everything and more you will need for a great peaceful stay.  The hosts Kees and Marjolijn were all you could wish for.  Would book again when in Rotterdam thoroughly recommend.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Great location! We enjoyed a lot our stay and having two bedrooms. If you need the second room in the front which is directed to the street side and you are sensitive about city noise, bring some earplugs. The main room is an island of tranquility! The apartment is as described in the text and on the picture. Recommended!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
This is a very nice place that is very well situated in Rotterdam. A metro station is just about 100m from the flat, but you don’t even need it for most of the things to visit. We stayed at the ground floor, which is accessible through stairs downwards when you enter. Even though the shower and bathroom sink are in the same room as the kitchen, the toilets are separate so it wasn’t a problem for us as a couple. The garden is beautiful though you can’t really walk in it (it is best enjoyed from the small terrace in front of it). Kees is readily available by text messages and keen to help. One thing to note: on order to use the microwave you’ll have to take it from the cupboard and put it on the kitchen worktop. It’s heavy so you won’t be able to use it if you are on the older side, except if you bring a power extension cord with you ;)
The parking on street is not affordable so you need to follow Kees’ instructions and park in the Kralingse Zoom Park&Ride, which has its own metro station and is about 5 stations away. Just use one of the 4 pass cards provided, because it is a bit costly to buy one just for the stay. For everyday grocery shopping there’s an Albert Heijn at a walkable distance.
We greatly enjoyed our stay and location of the place really helped us take advantage of it.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Kees’ flat was positioned perfectly for us to be able to take advantage of Rotterdam on foot and gave us a nice roomy base to come home to. The diner style dining-table booth and the art deco arm chairs were all nice touches. The garden was also peaceful and private making our morning coffee a delight. Highly recommend a stay here if you’re coming to town!

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments:
Our stay for 4 N at Kees place was comfortable.Instructions to reach the place were very clear.Living room of the apartment is quite large with separate attached Kitchen,Bedroom and Bathroom.
Kitchen was fully equiped. Washing machine was a big plus.
Kees and his wife are very nice and of helping nature.
The apartment was clean and well furnished.
Only one negative point in my view was sound like dripping water on the ceiling of Bedroom which can be disturbing at times.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Very spacious place. Great location - close to Tram and Metro. Several great restaurants in the neighborhood/down the street. I hope to return to Rotterdam and would stay here again. Kees provided clear instructions (including photos) on how to get in to the place.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Kees's place did the job for our 3-night stay - it was as expected based on property description and previous reviews. Not cozy or homely or warm (in late June) or nicely finished, but spacious and perfectly adequate.

name: Garden Room Apartment in the city center
comments: Lovely apartment on a quiet street. There is everything you might need during your stay. Also, neighborhood is nice: with many different restaurants and close to the center. And last but not least, the hosts are very friendly and responsive. Thank you, Kees and Marjolijn! :)

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Wonderful host and superb accomodations. Perfect location with a Metro station at our doorstep.  Walking distance to most sights and the best views of the city and harbour.  I hope to visit again soon.  You won't be disappointed.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Breathtaking views of the city. Elegant and perfectly furnished apartment, few steps away from the subway (5 min trip to the city center).
Nienke has been an amazing host (useful tips, fast answers, friendly).
It has been my best stay with Airbnb so far!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Highly recommended! Nienke’s apartment is super awesome! Very spacious and has beautiful open view towards the harbor. You can enjoy a romantic sunset every night. The building is literally right next to the metro station, super convenient for public transportation. The facilities are modern, clean and well maintained. Nienke is also fast in response whenever we need something and clear in communication. My parents enjoy their stay over very much!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke is a charming host. She make our stay great and tried to make sure we had all we need. I recommend 100%. Stunning view and all Facilities available in the flat!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Great place to visit Rotterdam. Views over downtown from many windows.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke was a great host! The apartment is located a few steps from the metro station. The interior is amazing and the view was spectacular. Nienke always answered messages quickly and made sure that everything was taken care of for our arrival and departure. Best apartment in Rotterdam! Thanks for everything!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke was very good host. The apartment was very nice with a good location and an amazing view. Good place to visit Rotterdam.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke was very nice. She made checking in and out very easy and left essentials for us. We were very happy! The flat was close to the center with a great view of the city.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke'a appartment was superior to all our expectations. We went there as a group of 4 students to visit Rotterdam for a weekend trip. We were absolutely stunned by the view you have over the skyline and the harbour of Rotterdam (especially by night!). Communication and Check-in was easy as Nienke answered fast to all of our questions. We will definetly come back once a time and would recommen this to everyone who wants to have an awesome stay at Rotterdam

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Потрясающие апартаменты с шикарным панорамным видом из окна (город как на ладони)!!! Очень просторно, чисто и атмосферно. В двух шагах от квартиры располагается метро, которое вас доставит в любую значимую точку города. Хозяйка квартиры очень радушно встретила нас, объяснила все детали, рассказала про достопримечательности и отправила список лучших ресторанчиков города с персональными комментариями. Впечатления: обязательно вернусь!
Nienke's loft was way more beautiful then in pictures, the apartment is in a perfect location, you have the metro station just under the building! Nienke was so kind to show us everything that could be useful for an awesome stay in Rotterdam. From the living room you can see all the city, by night you don't even want to leave the home...the view is spectacular. Into the flat there is everything that a person could need and even more!
La casa di Nienke è spettacolare. Le foto non le rendono giustizia...situata al quindicesimo piano si ha una vista magnifica di tutta la città, dentro la casa vi è ogni cosa per stare nella massima comodità! Un divano immenso in un salotto immenso che di notte è una bomba con la vista su tutta la città! Molto ben piazzato, la fermata della metro è sotto casa, sempre sotto vi sono le bici che potere noleggiare e una miriade di ristoranti. L'ospitalità della proprietaria è stata a dir poco perfetta! Se leggete questa recensione indecisi tra più case, non ci pensate nemmeno, prenotate, non ne rimarrete delusi!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: We were celebrating New Year's Eve at Nienke's Apartment and it was amazing! The view is just incredible! The beds were really comfortable. The kitchen is fully equipped.  We had great two days at her apartment. Thank you for everything! All the best, Sabrina

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke’s place is amazing ! It’s better than in pictures and the pictures are awesome. You will find everything you need in Nienke’s place ! The two bedrooms have space to put your clothes, the beds are really comfy. The living room and the kitchen are beautiful, you don’t want to leave this place. The view of the city is amazing every time, when it’s sunny, at night and even when it’s rainy and cloudy.
The apartment is close to every good spots in Rotterdam, the metro is really close (it can’t be closer) The building is close to a canal so it could be a really good spot to enjoy the sun !
Nienke was always up to help us even if we haven’t met her. Her friend Wesley welcomed us and was as nice as Nienke. They were perfect hosts ! I recommend this place x 100000 and will book again without any doubt !

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Great location with a subway stop just outside. Amazing views.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Very very large clean apartment with great views over city and harbor. Host very responsive with great local help. Metro literally next to building. Great choice.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke's house is very high quality place to stay.
The amazing view, well equidment in the house, very convinence of travel (the metro is nearby), a silent enviroment...
Nienke responses rapidly,.cme feel at ease.
It is about 20 minutes by metro to go Rotterdam central, such you can go everywhere by tram.
About 8 minutes by walk to go supermarket.
About 10 minutes by walk to go Rotterdam central park.
Highly highly recommand you stay in Nienke's house. I am sure you can have a amazing memory.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: very nice appartment with spectacular view. within good reach also to Amsterdam

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke’s place is fascinating. The place is convient as it locates right above the metro station. However, we rather enjoy the comfortable apartment and nice view from 15th floor.
Nienke is a great host. Communication is fast and clear. We really enjoy our stay. It’s definitely the best Airbnb experience.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
We have wonderful stay in this Impeccable apartment. The space is exactly as it described. Fully equipped,spotless location, and loving Nienke’s bubbly personality.
I also surprised with the welcoming gift from her, and we kind of fall in love with this place while we walked in with the “view” it provides.
All in all, it’s such a pleasure for having us spending our holidays here in Nienke’s place in Rotterdam, definitely recommend it to our friends who plan to visit Rotterdam in the future.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke’s house is fantastic. We stayed there as a family of thre for six nights. The location is great. There is a metro station downstairs, but it’s also very easy to walk to musea (Museumpark is a ten minute walk) . Restaurants and stores are around the corner or within walking distance. . Nienke is a very gracious host , easy to communicate with and she loves her city. The place was sparkling clean with everything you need for a comfortable stay. The kitchen is very spacious and you can make the best coffee around. We also couldn’t get enough of the view. One big plus is the affordable and safe parking downstairs if you come with a car. I would highly recommend this place .

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: We stayed 2 weeks in this comfortable and well-located flat, with stunning views. There are all the amenities you expect, all appliances worked, the beds are comfortable, and the well-equipped kitchen enabled us to cook our evening meals, as is our preference. The subway station is just below the building and various attractions are easy to get to either by walking or with the metro or trains. The water bus is also another alternative, with a stop about 5 mins walk away. There is a good supermarket is about 5 mins walk away. Nienke is a lovely host and checked with us to make sure everything was going well. We were sad to leave, and would happily stay here again if the opportunity presented.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Big apartment with all necessary equipment. Good kitchen. Nienke is best possible host. And the view! Imagine the New Years Eve fireworks from the 15th floor! Thank you Nienke!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke's apartment is great and the view is amazing. It's located very conveniently: close to a subway station, but you can also easily walk to the city center.
The communication and check-in were excellent and quick. She even has some great tips for restaurants and bars. I'd recommend staying at her place.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Amazing views

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: the apartment is just as wonderful as described in the ad! Spacious, cozy, great facilities ..... and the view IS amazing

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke is a wonderful host; she is very welcoming and lovely. We had no problems checking in, and she gave us plenty of tips to some amazing places in Rotterdam! The apartment itself is incredible: it is very conveniently located, has everything you could desire in an AirBnb, and the views are absolutely sublime - especially at night!
We would highly recommend staying here, if we could rate higher than 5*, we definitely would.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: We loved this place. Spectacular views at any time of the day. With the comfort of every little detail you can think of. Even a subway just outside of the appartment. Nienke was super nice and helped us with some restaurant recommendations. We really appreciated this.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Apartment is even better than it seems on the pictures.
We loved it and it’s amazing view including skylines of three cities.
The host was always available, flexible and helpful with everything we needed.
We can only recommend the apartment and the host!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
A really great place to stay. Wonderful apartment, fantastic views with a great power shower. The kitchen is also very well equipped if you want to cook.
The flat is well located - the
metro station is 10 seconds away and you can walk to some of the cities main attractions within 15 minutes.
The host was very helpful and replied quickly to queries.
10/10: would recommend.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: A very nice apartment with a fantastic view over the city. Nienke, our host, was friendly and welcoming.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
We had a brilliant week in Nienke's apartment with our 7-month old daughter. Nienke was superbly welcoming and helpful from the very start of the booking process. She's genuinely one of the best Airbnb hosts we've ever had, and this apartment was one of the best we've stayed in.
It's an incredibly light and airy apartment, with spacious rooms and equipped with everything you could want - washer, dryer, dishwasher, microwave, oven, hob, toaster, kettle, blender, WiFi, TV with Netflix etc... genuinely everything! The location is ideal - right above a metro stop that takes you into the city centre in under 10 minutes. Parking was really helpful, right below the apartment. We were so sad to leave this beautiful apartment! We'll be back, for sure!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Great and cordial host, lovely and modern appartement, very good equipment, amazing view over the whole city. Perfect to relax & great connection to the metro. We enjoyed it!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Stunning apartment with great views. Nienke is a great host who was very helpful and friendly. We would love to return.
Thanks Nienke!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: My wife, my son and I loved staying at Nienke’s place. Nienke made us feel welcome straight away and even asked if we needed a high chair and a travel cot for our baby, which she provided. She was very friendly and warm when we arrived, and gave us a precious list of  recommendations about the best places and restaurants to go to. Nienke’s flat has an amazing view on the city and is in a prime area to wander around and visit key places in Rotterdam on foot. We would definitely stay there again. Thanks Nienke! 🤗

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
We had a good stay.
The kitchen is wel equipt with everything one may need and the coffee machine is great.
The bathroom also good, nice big shower and also a bath, everything super clean.
The living room is huge, with a nice sofa to hang out after a busy day out.
The connection to the city is excellent, the metro station is next door.
Every morning and evening we enjoyed the view, it’s amazing to see how city wakes up and all the lights at night are like magic.
I would love to stay there again.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke's flat is in a great part of Rotterdam - right in the centre but also quiet and peaceful, and on the 15th floor you get an extraordinary view of Rotterdam and really feel very special indeed! We were there to visit our daughter who had been on an internship with a famous architectural firm there and the flat, which is an iconic piece of Rotterdam architecture in its own right, was the perfect location from which to explore the city and to relax in the evenings in very chic but also comfortable and homely surroundings.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Had great time at Nienke's place. The apartment had everything we needed with amazing view. The metro station is genuinely 15secs away and gives you freedom of movement and comfort.
Nienke is a great host and I would definitely go again if I'm at Rotterdam.
Thank you Nienke 🫱🏻‍🫲🏽

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
A warm host. She met us at the downstairs door. So thoughtful.
What a great space with fab views.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Excellent place to stay. We stayed for 8 days, Nienke met us and had a bottle of Prosecco and some nice Dutch treats for us. The place is great, fully equipped, including a wonderful expresso machine. The views are stunning and location is excellent. Highly recommend and I look forward to our next stay.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Great place with a lovely view. More importantly an amazing host. Super responsive and absolutely made us feel at home. Definitely a recommendation and will surely stay here again

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Beautiful apartment (photos don't do it justice) with views over Rotterdam, great view of sunset. Nienke was a fantastic host, she met us late at the apartment and with a bottle of prosecco and snacks on arrival. She gave an extensive list of recommendations, was really easy to communicate with and allowed us flexible check out as well. 100% recommend staying here, you will not regret it

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Nienke’s place was perfect for our week-long stay. She met us at check in and helped acclimate us to the space. They layout was great and very spacious. We loved walking to the metro which is right outside the apartment. Such a cute area and gorgeous views of canals and sunsets. Nienke is super sweet and always available to help. Fabulous communication and gracious host. We’d love to return someday!

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: This was a fantastic place to stay.  It was right on top of a metro station, was clean and well appointed, had a fantastic view, and Nienke was communicative and friendly!  Would definitely stay here again.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments:
Nienke’s place was perfect for our weekend trip to Rotterdam. It was spacious, well equipped, right next to the metro, and in a great walkable neighbourhood. The views were great, especially at sunset. Nienke was also very helpful, easy to communicate with, and responsive. We also appreciated her flexibility with check-in and check-out times to help accommodate us.
Will definitely stay here again.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: We really enjoyed stating at Nienke’s apartment. Nienke was so helpful during our stay. Really fantastic views from the apartment. Very close to the metro and the tram for getting around. Lots of places to eat and drink nearby. Would have no hesitation at all in recommending this apartment.

name: Amazing skyline apartment!
comments: Wonderful place, wonderful view, wonderful host

name: Stylish, light & spacious apartment in city centre
comments: Very nice apartment, near the Erasmus MC. It was very spacious and clean, also the balcony is really beautiful.

name: Stylish, light & spacious apartment in city centre
comments:
Lovely apartment in the center of Rotterdam. Everything is in walking distance.
Beautiful, spacious place with a nice balcony for after hour drinks. Quit bedrooms.

name: Stylish, light & spacious apartment in city centre
comments: Big Central Apartment with everything you need. We really liked the sun on the balcony at the afternoon.

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments: Very nice flat and great communication! Lovely balcony. Highly recommended

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments:
This is one of the best airbnb apartments I have ever visited. The apartment is warm and stylish with a view of the Rotterdam skyline from the bedroom, kitchen and lovely balcony and a view of the cosmopolitan Bergselaan at the front. The apartment has a fully equipped kitchen (including oil, baking paper etc) for those looking to self-cater and also plenty of comfortable places to relax. The bed is high quality and I have rarely slept so well away from home. It's also amazing to stay in a house in Rotterdam (circa 1930) that wasn't devastated during the Second World War.
Petra is a great host who gave me great tips about Rotterdam and made sure to check up on me via text message. My only regret is that I couldn't stay longer! Hats off to Petra and the great apartment in a fun and lively area of Rotterdam.

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments:
Petra's home is an amazing place, very comfortable an very well designed.
There is everything you need to spend a nice holiday in Rotterdam, a lovely view, perfect located in the city center.
Petra is a great host.
Thank you very much.

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments: As advertised...lovely balcony for morning coffee...perfect size for 2 people...great location and great cafe nearby - coppi coffee and cycles!

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments:
Absolutely decent cost=quality. First thought that I got when we arrived: "is this full apartment exactly for us? No way!" Such a charming place stay for a long time (we were 8 days) and explore Rotterdam and near cities. Great interior in living room and bedroom, big kitchen with all stuff that you will need, cozy balcony. We definitly fall in love with this apt.
About real "minuses":
No mirror for full length. Only in shower room "face mirror".
No wardrobe. Just a big black rail for hangers.
Floor in living room is kind of curve. You feel that for the first time, then you get used.
Really small toilet room. My husband 192cm tall. He got real trouble to get sit on toilet with closed door :)
Someone wrote here that noisy neighbors live from above or something. Idk, for 8 days we didnt get any noise from anywhere.
Thanks Petra for this lovely place. We really enjoyed It.
Mark & Ira

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments: This was a very cool stay - my wife and I were tired from our travels so were quite okay spending more time at our host’s place than we normally would. Lucky for us Petra’s apartment is a delight - well-cared for plants, good lighting, a comfortable bed and sofa, good wifi, and walking distance to everything we needed on this trip. 10/10 would stay again :)

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments:
This is a lovely and quite unique apartment in a convenient location. The apartment itself is bright, comfortable and cozy. We loved all the plants, the lighting and the vintage glass double doors, which create a very cozy and atmospheric environment. The location is quite good because it's a short walk from metro, the bus to the airport, lots of lovely parks, and a pleasant 15 min walk from Rotterdam Centraal.
Petra and Jim are great hosts, excellent at communicating and very flexible in accommodating our needs, and provided us with all the information we needed.

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments: We found Petra  to be very responsive and accommodating.  There were a few issues with the toilet area during our stay, but we were able to work around with no major issues. The space was perfect for our comings and goings and “chill time.” Thanks for the welcome wine and note. We enjoyed some balcony time and just window sitting. The apt is in a great location for walking and catching the tram and filled with lots of plants!

name: Historic house near center Rdam
comments: We felt right at home and loved the hippie-esque feeling with the hand drums, singing bowl, and the ambient light collection. We especially loved all the beautiful plants, and the calming atmosphere with the willow tree in front of the backyard window. We appreciated the authentic Dutch living scenario with the large window facing the street view - the classic steep Dutch staircase up to flat was challenging at times, though ;-)

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Berty is communicatief en een goede gastvrouw met een super ontvangst, haalde ons zelfs van het station op. Vanwege een probleem met het gehuurde appartement bracht ze ons naar een ander dat zojuist in de verhuur gekomen was. Willebrordusstraat 102. Dit was verder van het centrum en van een mindere kwaliteit dan het gehuurde. Kleiner in oppervlak en zonder deuren tussen de ruimtes, behalve de badkamer dan. Je moet daar niet veel om privacy geven dus. Ook geluidsoverlast vanuit het pand erboven. Wifi zwak. Maar Berty maakt veel goed, ze had gezorgd voor een goed gevulde koelkast!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Very creative way of transforming a storage/warehouse into this nice two bed unit. It is super close to the subway and tram stop, and within a short walking distance to the main street with lots of nice restaurants and bars. Yet this unit is located just off the main street in a quiet alley so no noise at all at night. It is also very close to the famous bridge and waterbus stop.
Would definitely stay here again if I come to Rotterdam in the future.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Great, clean and unique space that is centrally located and with easy access to all that Rotterdam has on offer.
Located down a quiet side street yet still under five minutes walk to great cafes, restaurants and bars.
Highly highly recommend.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Well located converted storage space, or possibly part of a larger house, I'm not sure.
Well stocked with necessities, and wine!!
Not a lot of natural light and no outside view.
Berty is very helpful and easily contactable.
Would I stay again...not sure!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Fantastic location close to everything you would want to see in Rotterdam! In a small alley with workshops/storage spaces, that means little ventilation or daylight access.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Berty was easy to contact and the check in and check out were really uncomplicated.
The accommodation is extraordinary but you got no windows, so it's a bit dark in the flat.
I would recommend this accommodation if you want to visit Rotterdam and want to have a flat in the center.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The converted garage is a cool space to stay in the heart of Rotterdam close to the eclectic Witte de Withstraat. Berty was great at communicating with us and we enjoyed our trip. With had some issues with noise - they were demolishing a building opposite the garage and apparently a new building is going to be constructed in its place - not great if you like your lie ins!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Great spot! Close to everything in Rotterdam, quiet street, and a great host. Berty was easy to communicate with and very responsive. The place was very clean and has a lot of space. Nice kitchen and bathroom and the sleeping sheds are so fun.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The unit is very cute and has a number of special touches. Berty was very responsive to my messages, and minor issues during check in and check out were resolved quickly. The place is in a convenient location, and had everything that I needed, including plenty of space and a very cool shower area. The little cabins are adorable and add some privacy if you're staying with multiple guests.  It was great to have a nice big kitchen, and everything was extremely clean and tidy. Thanks for a lovely stay Berty!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The apartment is well located, but, due to demolition and construction works in the street, the environment is quite noisy and dirty. The apartment is large and indeed cosy, but there is less natural light than we expected.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Nice apartment on a perfect location! The communication with the host was also great and with a quick response! The apartment is ideal for exploring all the hotspots of Rotterdam and having a sleep in a quiet street in the city center (we mainly used the apartment as a 'sleep address' and we were gone during the day). I would recommend it less for people who are planning to stay 'at home' during their stay.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
L'alloggio è molto spazioso e pulito, con una cucina attrezzata. Le due stanze da letto sono ricavate in due casette di legno separate poste una accanto all'altra: questa soluzione non garantisce molta privacy però i letti sono comodi e abbiamo dormito bene.
L'assenza di finestre rende l'appartamento un po' buio ma vicino alle camere c'è la porta di ingresso che permette di cambiare l'aria. Il proprietario è molto preciso e gentile.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Well located. Not much privacy if you need it. TV was a struggle and internet very slow or absent in certain locations of the house

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Berty’s place is everything you will come to expect from Rotterdam and The Netherlands as a whole: It’s quirky, functional and stylish.
The location is near (Leuvehaven - within a 3 minute walk) a Rotterdam metro line. It is a 10 or so minute walk from Spido (who provide major boat tours of Rotterdam), 10-12 minute walk from the Markthal and CubeHouses.
We personally didn’t use public transport once, and saw and did most of what you could hope to do in Rotterdam. If you’re coming from Rotterdam Centraal, then use an Uber or taxi if you’re not travelling light.
There is a good working shower, kitchen hob, fridge, TV (with Netflix (you’ll need an account) and YouTube ), and dishwasher.
The bedrooms are two compact cabins (actual wooden cabins) with little room to move around - we didn’t mind this - but those with mobility concerns should know be aware.
Beds were very soft and comfortable - as were the linens and pillows.
The property comes with three fans - ideal for the hotter days, and a giant radiator that works wonders at heating the place quickly.
The door to the ground floor property will make you feel incredibly secure as you sleep - it has 3 locks and 2 bolts.
WiFi is patchy depending on where you are in the property, but it does work.
+ Location is superb for the price
+ Most amenities you could need
+ Stylish and quirky
- Patchy WiFi
- bedroom cabins are small for two people to move around (ideal for 2 solo travellers though)

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Getting there with the metro is easy, finding the street was a surprise since it was so close! Easy access, everything provided and clean, new surfaces everywhere. The mini-houses inside are interesting and provide some privacy if needed.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The apartment is suitable for families with kids. The kitchen is big, but not enough light. The location is close to the public transport and the main tourist attractions.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: We we're a group of 5 people spending a weekend in Rotterdam. The place is right in the middle of the city, so you can walk easily everywhere. Supermarkets, restaurants and bars are just around the corner. There is no daylight which was ok for us since we were out all day anyway. The size was okay for five people. We can definitely recommend the apartment!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: We had a really nice time! the location was perfect, just maybe 150 meters from de witte de with street. Although when first arriving at the door we had our doubts because of the view around us, but when entering it was really cosy and clean! Great place!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Berty’s place had a great location in the center. Most of the places are within walking distance and tram and metro stops really close. Kitchen was roomy and enough seats for all five of us. Apartment was renovated from old office/industry building. Decoration was personal. There was not daylight in the apartment and in the evenings it was pretty dark. However, a nice base for discovering Rotterdam and extra points for great location.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Good location, but some of the lights not working. Price abit higher but worth for its location ONLY, home condition could be improved

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Perfectly located in a quiet street of the city centre, but really close to all major attractions, supermarkets, metro and bus lines, etc. We really enjoyed the unique style, especially the huts. It was quite spacious for the two of us, but even 4 people should not get any problems. The flat was really clean and the beds were good, as well.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The apartment is exactly as pictured. It's quirky and cool, and we really enjoyed our stay. The location is perfect--just a block or so away from the action, but quiet and calm for sleeping. Shower pressure so strong that at full blast the drain struggled to keep up due to the sheer volume of water; just turn the pressure down slightly and all is well. I recommend this apartment to those looking for a great location that also allows for quiet sleeping.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Berty’s place is very central and this is its main attraction.
If you like something a little bit different it’s great.
It is a little dark given the lack of natural light, and a little stuffy given the lack of ventilation, as it is a converted small industrial unit.
Single travellers do be aware this listing is not on a residential street.
None of the above prevented us from having a lovely stay in the centre of Rotterdam with main attractions, restaurants, and galleries on our doorstep.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Great location. Very quiet, but like cave. No windows.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: An out of the ordinary place in an excellent location. +: Responsive host, funky underground vibe, close to all the action, spacious kitchen, great shower. -: hardly any daylight, a bit noisy, huge construction site across the street

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Nice place, perfect location right in the center!
No windows though but we still had a good time and we loved the style.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Very good location - hard to imagine better - and an imaginatively set up space. Perfectly clean, good amenities. No windows, but you're not going to need them.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
The location is great.
The place is dark (no windows).

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Great location for downtown Rotterdam in quiet little back street

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: First of all, say that this place is not an apartment. It is a storage unit used as a living compartment. It is located in a very narrow alley where no one felt unsafe just because it is located in central Rotterdam. The shower was in deplorable condition, not like the photo from the profile, it was like a hole in the wall with a shower coming out from a water pipe. The worst part is that has no window at all, and the little bit of ventilation is a small fan at the front door. It was very claustrophobic. The mattresses weren't comfortable, and neither were the pillows.  If the price would have been half or less of the prices charged, no one would have been that unhappy with the accommodation. We literally felt ripped off.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: The surprise was that it was a ground floor storage unit that had been converted to an apartment, that had no windows. On the plus side, the location was really central and convenient!

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: very quirky place. looks like it was perhaps a converted storage or basement (my impression). however for Rotterdam great value. loads of space. the bedrooms are actually indoor sheds which for me was hilarious and funny. beds were ok but 4 single beds rather than a comfy double bed. the place had everything you needed. fully fitted kitchen, towels, even toiletries. the only issue would be minimal natural light because of the nature of the property. the host communication was minimal but did the job. we ended up having a problem regarding check out time, I had asked in my initial request for a late check out and I thought it was agreed. I guess if we had a telephone chat or better communication this would not have happened. overall happy with the experience and I think it was very good value for money

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
Please be aware that this is not an apartment. It's a basement. The place smells of humidity and has no light coming in. The owner places for whatever reason two house gardens for kids inside the basements and placed beds inside. There is no space to move within the apartment when you get in. Imagine trying sleeping in a smelly place inside a kids wooden house. That's what it is.
The shower ceiling is basically open and it's just a tube coming from the ceiling. The upstairs neighbour bathroom flush goes directly over your head when you are in the bathroom. I hope that will never start leaking! The apartment goes directly into the street, and the alley is isolated and dark. The Netherlands are a safe place but even there we felt uncomfortable at night.
I told the owner about the smell and that we felt uncomfortable in the apartment. She replied that thats not the Hilton and that I had the whole place for myself.
I paid 150 euros per night!! :O

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments: Great apartment on a quiet street. Check in was easy and Bertine was a responsive host. Great location and easy walking distance to the sights of the city. Will definitely be back.

name: Rotterdam C. Fun house garden sheds as bedrooms.
comments:
I’ve never written a bad review for a host before, but this host was spying on us from the front door. Paranoia made us look for cameras inside as well but I cannot confirm there were any.
I had booked the place because it advertised 6 beds and I was in rotterdam for a film festival with a large team. I expected the unexpected and made sure to have a place with extra space. Of course, two people from my team had flights changed/canceled and they arrived with me to stow luggage and attempt to book a new rental under the short notice. The host reached out to us with concern, which I kindly wrote back to explain our situation. Updated the listing. She continued to spy on us throughout the day, giving me an exaggerated play by play of who was coming and going. Again, I wrote her politely explaining the situation which she replied back with attitude and condescension. Please know if you choose this apt shes watching. Wave hello and goodbye to her. Shes watching you. Very disappointed.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Berty's place is fantastic and located in the city center, so it's close to everything you want to see in Rotterdam. About a 20 minute walk from the central train station and around the corner from lots of cafes, bars, and restaurants. Berty was very easy to communicate with and even made arrangements with us to meet earlier in the day and drop off our luggage since we were in town so early.
The place itself is very spacious and enough for several people. It is along a busy street, so there are people walking by fairly regularly but it's a very accessible place. The apartment is very clean and Berty even left us a bottle of wine as a gift. It was a great stay and highly recommended!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay with Berty!
The Appartement is perfectly located between the famous Erasmus bridge and the City centre. The witte-de-with street with its many bars and restaurants is in walking distance. The beds are very comfortable and the place has everything you need. Berty is a great host and I definitely do recommend this place for a long weekend in Rotterdam!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Communication was smooth, place was clean and has a superb location close to everything. The place was a store originally but has been nicely refurbished to a spacious apartment, only minor issue that due to it being a store originally there aren't many windows that can be opened for ventilation (and some of theme are rather high up).

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
100% RECOMMENDED ALL PERFECT. Clean, Beautiful, Comfortable, Nice and polite Hosts, Location amazing. Really recommend Berty's Airbnb services and accomodations as Host. During checkout I was forgetting some dog stuff in the apartment and they go aftet me in the street to give it. Thanks for everything. All the Best 5*****
Cheers
Aless

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: I booked this for friends visiting me in Rotterdam. Coming from someone who knows the city quite well, I think the location was great. Its walking distance to a lot of tourist attractions, but also close to some nice bars, shops etc. Its close to witte de withstraat, one of the busiest streets in rotterdam, and also close to kop van zuid and katendrecht, a must see in rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
The location of the apartment was great. It is right around the corner from Witte (a street that has great shops and food) and walking distance to public transportation.
We were surprised to find out that the apartment used to be a store or office. We noticed this right when we entered the apartment and were surprised that no one mentioned this in the reviews. The front door opens directly to the street therefore there are blinds that cover the whole front of the apartment (so that people cannot see in). The space was large, but it did not feel like a home.
During first night, I was bit several times by a mosquito. When my husband and I tried to look for the mosquito the next day (to squash it), we noticed that there were dead, squashed bugs on the walls and ceilings.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: This Airbnb is in a great location if you are accustomed to city living as it is a converted storefront that sits on an 8 lane roadway. Metro stop right out the door and bars and restaurants right around the corner. I like quiet and cozy so this wasn't for me and not knowing it was on a busy road that seperate south from north rotterdam I would have been concerned if I had been alone. My son was with me so I wasn't afraid at all. The Rotterdam bridge is 2 minutes away and takes you to Fenix food factory and the boat to kinderdijk. The owner of the AIRBNB also has a bike rental shop a few doors down. Renting a bike in this town is a must. Because the weather was so warm, the windows were ooen upon arrival and like the rest of Europe, no screens so we had a problem with mosquitos. Netherlands mosquitos are like small birds (And I live in florida :)  I slept with only my hands exposed and they had new bites each night.  :(  Apartment was decorated nicely. No cable and internet was too slow to watch anything on the tv (netflix) but who needs tv anyway. ;)

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Lovely apartment with amazingly comfy beds.  Plenty of space and close to centre. Everything you could need, including cot and highchair, and some thoughtful extras. Bit of noise from the street but nothing to keep you awake. Host very helpful.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: This converted shop is really light and toasty warm (we came in winter), the location is fantastic and the beds are comfy. If you want something traditional or to do a lot of complex cooking this might not be the place for you but for our work trip it was ideal and it was a great base to explore from on my time off as it is so central. Also nice a quiet at night which is always a plus. Happily recommended :)

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
The apartment was great. It is spacious, clean and very comfortable. The location is perfect.
Maybe one thing can be improved, there was no window that you can open to get a fresh air.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: We were 4 friends and only stayed one night. We chose the location because it was close to the wedding venue we were due to attend. It seemed to be well connected via public transport with the rest of the city. The place was spacious and very bright. There was coffee/tea available which was great. Communication with host was quick and efficient. We managed to check in early and check out late which we really appreciated

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
We visited Berty's place for a long weekend with the two of us, to visit Rotterdam and North Sea Jazz. Our young children (2 and 6 years old) joined us for the last night. The location is great, right next to the Metro Station, at walking distance from the shopping center and the Markthallen. Parking is expensive but the (somewhat cheaper) Erasmus parking garage is at 5 minute walking distance.
The place itself is great! A stylish apartment which feels nicely spacious due to the high ceiling, two bedrooms and a simple, but proper kitchen and bathroom (with shower). You can hear some of the street's noises but it is not problematic. It is suitable to visit with kids although with young children (<4) you should be careful that they don't break stuff. Children's seat and baby/toddler bed are available.
Berty was quick in communication and flexible; she was not around during check-in but everything was taken care of. No problems there!
Altogether, a great place to stay and an excellent starting point for visiting Rotterdam!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Nice house, good location, only missing thing is the balcony in the house

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Rotterdam AirBnB (1st place)
Bertine seemed to be a nice lady and met us at the apartment, even allowing us to check in a little early.
The space is a converted ground-level storefront on a busy sidewalk with people walking by all day and night.
The living room is sprawled across the main floor with a TV stuck in the corner 5-6 meters from the couch. The was no TV channels to watch - only Internet hookup. It made it next to useless to watch after a long day touring the city.
The kitchen is well equipped and very functional, but no oven or microwave. Also no freezer in the under-counter refrigerator.
The only bathroom is downstairs, but it needs work. There are a couple of holes in the walls, the glass shower surround is missing a panel and has a shower curtain jury-rigged in that spot. The tiny mirror is above the sink at about 2 meters up making it next to impossible for a shorter person to use. There is a door to an adjacent apartment that has no lock on this side, which didn’t instill a great sense of security.
We stayed at the end of July, 2018. It was hot with no a/c and only 3 windows that opened (front and bathroom downstairs and back upstairs). The living room window was so high you need to use a boat hook to open and close it, and when the wind changed directions, it would often blow shut. The wall of “storefront” windows at the front are exposed to morning sun, and the windows upstairs at the back were exposed to the evening sun, creating lots of heat gain in the apartment. This may be good in winter, but not so good in summer. With no screens on any of the windows, and the main sleeping area upstairs, we had to choose between stifling heat or biting mosquitoes - we choose to open the windows and were eaten alive by the bugs at night - 4 nights in a row!
Also, there are no room-darkening shades or curtains, so bring an eye mask, especially in summertime. Did I mention it was on a busy street and sidewalk? Bring earplugs too, if any city noise bothers you.
To top all that off, there is a big construction project going on just behind the unit, with heavy equipment and jack hammering starting just before 08:00. It usually stops by 16:00, so at least the evening is just the “normal” street and city noise.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
This is a lovely apartment in the centre of Rotterdam. We stayed with our 1 year old daughter for one night in August. It is a great location and the space is very well decorated and light and open.
I do suggest bringing bug spray if staying in the summer as we were bitten by mosquitoes quite badly in the night.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
The apartment is very spacious and in a brilliant location in Rotterdam to base yourself and explore the city. Communication with the host Berty was very prompt and informative, which was greatly appreciated. Berty was very accommodating for our needs to do with checking in and out.
Three of the four of us who stayed unfortunately we're bitten by mosquitoes every night. The high ceilings also made it difficult to catch them to prevent further bites.
Some street noise can be heard on busy nights (We were there on a Sat night during Pride) but we (including our 4month old baby) were still able to sleep.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Nice place on a central street in close range of many facilities. Lots of space, clean and comfortable!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Perfect location, but a lot of noise in the neighbourhood.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Excellent location: really close to center of Rotterdam. But it was a bit noisy as the room is along a busy street.
Looks good, but inadequate equipments. The beds were uncomfortable for us. No microwave oven nor toaster.
It was good that the host responded to my message quickly and check in was really simple.
In total, it was OK. I will stay there again if the equipments are improved.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
I stayed for 3 weeks in Berty's places and had a good stay. I would say Berty's place is particularly perfect for a shorter stay, but to make a good decision, I have listed the pros and cons as I experienced them:
Pros:
- Location. It does not get better than this if you want to stay in downtown Rotterdam. The metro stop is practically in front of the door and you can walk to various highlights in the city. The place is on a busy road but because there is first a bike lane and a parking spots, it is not super noisy (there is obviously general city sounds).
- the apartment is unique (original decorations) and spacious, especially for this price.
- Communication. Berty quickly responded to messages and the check in was very easy due to a lock box on the front door.
Cons:
- The apartment is originally meant for a store and as a result, has store front windows. The main bedroom is upstairs and has lots of windows that do not have blinds and cannot open. So it is warm and very bright. The second bedroom is slightly darker but has no windows either and no blinds. The entire place gets warm because there is only one big window that can open and two small windows.
- Construction. A huge construction project is happening (June 2019) right behind the building. Construction noise starts at 6:30 on week days.
- Mosquitos. I am originally from the Netherlands but have never seen such big mosquitos before. They were such a problem for me and my 4yo son that we bough a mosquito net. We were there in June.
- Kitchen. The kitchen will do for a short stay but is small and minimally equipped.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: We had a great time at Berty's place, very spacious, exactly as on the pictures, the description is accurate. Perfect location. Would recommend bringing earplugs for light sleepers. The place definitely helped make our weekend in Rotterdam a blast!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
The livingroom was a lot bigger then we thought.
With a very high ceiling and it had a very spacious feel.
the title said cosy so we thought smaller.
overal we had a wonderful stay.
but there were complaints on saturday when we made to much noise.
in the neighbours defense we did go to bed round 8am.
10/10 would rent again

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Good place Slightly noisy at business hours due construction works outside but its not question to the host Berty a good person helping in time manner Be ready with a curtain in shower aiming does not spell water to the floor For the Rotterdam first time coming quests be ready a little sophisticated public transportation system and paying method for

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
I stayed there 2 weeks during my international project with one of my classmates.
One of the few good things about this apartment is location.
It was mentioned in one of the previous reviews that shower curtain replaces one shower cabinet door and that the shower head is loose, unfortunately they were still in that state when we visited.
Light in the apartment is very poor. The lamps don’t really give enough light if you want to work with your computer or read a book.
Smart TV works only if you use your personal Netflix account.
There’s a door in the bathroom that leads to the basement. It has a “private” note on it and it’s closed but there is a gap between the door from where you can see the basement (there’s also a light on). From that gap you can either look down to the stairs that lead to the basement or look up from basement. Apparently someone is living there and to be honest we (2 girls) didn’t feel too safe going under the shower, it’s like somehow it was violating our privacy. We kept the bathroom door open at all times since there’s hardly any ventilation in that apartment and unfortunately the people who live in the basement smoke inside so all of our clothes smelled like ashtrays while we were there. And actually they still do. Smoking stopped at some point after we mentioned it to Berty.
Walls are super thin so you can hear everything and I mean EVERYTHING that neighbours do. Hardly got any sleep.
Berty is very responsive, so that’s a good thing.
This price is only fair because of the location really..

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Appartment is quite ok and well located. Cleaning is below average and there was no light in the bathroom. Biggest inconvenience is significant construction work in the back of the building. They work starting 7am including Saturdays and noise makes it impossible to sleep after that time. Not recommended if you are here for holidays. Not owner’s fault but minimum manners would be to notice travellers that some inconvenience may be caused. Berty ignored our messages and had no news since. Dont expect to stay an extra minute on your last morning, we for kicked by cleaning man at 11.00am sharp. Charging 300€ per night for these conditions is very expensive.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
