comments: The location is very central, the flat is roomy and has good WiFi. Major construction works just outside the flat caused considerable noise and other impact during the day. Do check if the work is finished if you want to avoid this. Otherwise good value and convenient

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: The flat is very spacious and the main bedroom is on the second floor. It’s super close to the train station and shopping/ night life centre. I was working in the flat for most of my stay and the long table made it very comfortable. The flat is basically a store on the street level so the front “store window” is the main source of light.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Super apartment! Very close to center of the city with great views.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Great stay at a very central area. Walking distance to the best Rotterdam can offer. Kitchen could be viewed as a bit small, but nonetheless you can make it work! Heaters are amazing for the cold winter.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Location was perfect for the marathon : just in front of the start!
Even if the flat is old and miss of light, it was ok for our group of friends.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: The apartment is in a fantastic location, with easy access to everything.  We also felt safe in this location. Restaurants and bars are a close walk from the apartment and multiple modes of transportation are very close, some right outside the front door. The unit is as described and spacious. Beds are comfortable. I recommend ear plugs if you are a light sleeper, but the noise is regular city, street noise. The unit was clean and has a great layout. Would stay here again.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Real good place, close to the center and in front of the metro station. The main problem is the noise coming from the street, the apartment is literally on the street, with all the noise of people passing by or, like in our case, the working for repairing the street.
The house is well furnished even if some furnitures are old and appear quite dirty. It is suitable and perfect for 2/3 days staying.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
if you're a 4-5 group for a short stay this is perfectly fine and really well located
however we had a few issues the place wasn't very clean and a needs to be fixed in places
the living room couch (>4 people) is for heavy sleepers as well because you won't have proper sound or light isolation
the stay was overall satisfying

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: This is a comfortable, roomy and unusual apartment that would be difficult to beat for exploring Rotterdam by foot or Metro. The main space is two stories high, and the bathroom is roomy and the kitchen just fine for simple cooking or heating up food from a market. Curtains can be opened or closed to bring in our shut out light.  There's an occasional mosquito but Bertie has spray there and I don't think I ever got bitten. If anyone is extremely sensitive to street noise or unused to an urban environment, this is not the apartment for them. That said, both myself and my guests had no problem sleeping through the night. I certainly hope to return to this place, and to bring family or friends, so that is the highest recommendations I can think of. It was such a pleasure to walk out and be in the middle of central Rotterdam, with lots of excellent food options and many friendly people.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Positives :
- Very good location, near downtown, centraal station, restaurants and facilities. Subway station right in front of the door.
- Lovely appartment, former commercial place that was pretty well converted
- Spacious living room
- Two person room and bed were cozy and confortable
Negatives :
- Very cold when we arrived, as heaters were on frost protection mode only, and window in the bathroom was opened.
- Also NO heater in the bathroom so it was extremely cold the first could days.
- 1 person beds weren't confortable
- TV very small, cheap and not working, even though it was on the pictures the host said it wasn't part of the location
- Communication with host was awful, after one message sent to her asking her about the TV not working great she answered in dutch (all our communications before that was in english) and she stopped answering the following messages.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: This was my second stay at Berty's place, which says it all--My wife and I wanted to come back. As many people have said, fabulous location with the metro right outside your door, a selection of restaurants and cafes right around the corner, and a short walk to downtown shopping and the Markt hall. The spacious central area of the apartment is good to relax in when you come home. Spacious, bright bathroom with a good shower.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Bertie’s place because of the location which was excellent. It was directly opposite the beautiful harbour & it was within walking distance to great restaurants, shops & attractions with the tram & metro outside the front door. It was clean & the beds were comfortable. We were unaware that it was a converted shop so it wasn’t built to reduce the noise of passing pedestrians & traffic. Also it was described as cosy, but in Summer it was really hot with only one window in the whole apartment that could be opened for aeration. The photos didn’t show the walls that needed painting.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
Berty was helpful. There was an issue with the sink leaking, and it was fixed immediately and cleaned. I appreciated that.
There is not any air conditioning, which is common in this area. But I did not realize they’re also are not windows that can be safely opened because it’s on the ground floor. The bottom bedroom does not have any ventilation at all. I think it would be fine most of the year- not when it’s hot.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Bertys Wohnung verfügt über alles, was man braucht (besonders toll fanden wir den Ventilator, der hat die Hitze etwas erträglicher gemacht) und liegt wirklich mitten in der Stadt, man tritt aus der Tür   und befindet sich im Zentrum, eine Metrostation vis-a-vis. Rundum gibt es jede Menge tolle Restaurants, Cafés und Bars, Museen und architektonische Highlights sind fußläufig erreichbar.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: it was a great location for where we had to work and there were lots of shops and restaurants close by making it very convenient. The lack of sockets and dim lighting in the bathroom was a bit of a negative when trying to get ready, but everything else was fine.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: In fact, this flat is just a shop with big windows facing the street with pedestrians and noisy cars passing by right outside. All windows are blinded, so the only way to get a bit of a view is to open the door and cope with all the pedestrians and traffic. Only one window can be opened in the entire flat and no windows can be opened in the bed rooms or in the toilet. It must be very hot to stay in this flat during summer! We stayed during winter and even then we missed ventilation. There is mold on the window sills in both the bed rooms.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Echt een super toffe air bnb. Precies op de goede plek in Rotterdam als je het mij vraagt. Om de hoek bij een leuke gezellige straat en vlakbij alle highlights!

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: The location is very good, very close to the main city. The only issue is that the windows are not enough, there is a noticeable smell, and you need to open the door for a while after checking in to clear it.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: We have a nice stay at the flat. The location is fantastic, close to many restaurants and sites in Rotterdam and right at a metro station. While it is located on a busy street, with a bit of street noise in the living room, the bedrooms are in the back and are quiet.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Cheap accomodation close to Witte de With street

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments: Space Apartment. Well suited for a few people. Great location if you don’t need a view but just a good central place to call home.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
We spent 5 nights at Bertine's place with our toddler. We really appreciated the baby equipment provided and the toys which kept our child busy when we were inside.
The apartment is very well located downtown and it's easy to reach the main attractions by foot or with the public transport.
However we were unlucky to be there in what was probably the hottest week of the year, 30 degrees and more, and the place was just insanely hot. The bedroom windows do not open so we couldn't cool down the bedrooms at night, and as it is so centrally located, keeping the door open until late was also not an option as it was too loud. Our baby definitely overheated and it was quite stressful. That made our stay much less enjoyable although we realize that it probably won't be a problem for the majority of people.

name: Rotterdam Centrum. Spacious cozy house in centrum.
comments:
we were there for 4 nights with a toddler, location is great and is really the best feature of this place, ideally located in the centre and right next to public transport made getting around a breeze.
high chair and cot provided were good.
kitchen small but did the job for us as we ate out for most of our meals whilst there.
biggest draw back for us was the street noise, which was quite bad every night but especially on Saturday night.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
Great stay. Close to historical Delfshaven with cosy restaurants and great harbour views.
Apartment is spacious for 2, comfortable bed and great value jacuzzi.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: A wonderful place to stay with an amazing view. The place was clean and well kept. Sam, the host was very accommodating and was very helpful. I would definitely stay again if I was back in Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: We werden hartelijke ontvangen door Sam. Het appartementje was boven verwachting leuk. Het ligt ook aan het water, wat je op de eerste foto niet kon zien. Het was behoorlijk ingericht met alle noodzakelijkheden, en extra's als fohn, gevulde koelkast en een heerlijke yacuzzi, waar we helaas, door ons korte verblijf ,geen gebruik van gemaakt hebben. erin. Het ligt in een mooie Rotterdamse, toch wel levendige buurt, maar door de dubbele beglazing hoor je niets van enig lawaai buiten. Bv boten of de winkelstraat verderop. Voor 2 personen is het van harte aan te bevelen. Fijn was ook dat Sam allerlei tips had voor lekkere restaurantjes in de buurt en highlights van Rotterdam. We hebben genoten van ons verblijf en Dam hartelijk dank daarvoor!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: I loved Sam's place in Rotterdam! It was just what I needed after lots of traveling. It is the perfect place to relax and enjoy the view of the canal and has a lovely jacuzzi that makes the apt something extra special. Definitely recommend and would love to stay there again if I visit Rotterdam!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sunlight, seagulls and the distant rumble of the tram – how I delighted on watching the comings and goings on the Schie canal whilst staying at Sam's beautiful apartment. When not out and about exploring Rotterdam's remarkable architecture and street sculptures, it was great to have such a comfortable apartment in which to be based. Sit on the balcony, glass of red wine in hand, and daydream as the boats sail into view and the bridge lifts. Sam was on hand when needed to answer questions about the metro, landmarks and eating places – a very friendly and considerate host. Thanks, Sam!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sam's place was absolutely lovely. The pictures don't lie! The view from the balcony over the water was breathtaking, especially during our trip there in autumn when the trees were a beautiful golden red.  The wet room houses a jacuzzi and a hot stone table that gave me and partner a much needed recovery from our travels.  Sam was incredibly hospitable and experienced in AirBnbing, everything was thought of and prepared and professionally done. We would love to come back again if we make another trip to Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
Sam is a very polite and sympathetic host. If you have questions about your stay in the city, do not hesitate, he will answer any of them.
Very neat and clean apartment, the windows of which partially overlooking the canal. I will advise these apartments to friends if they want to stay in this city!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Lovely apartment, great view. Sam is a very thoughtful and friendly host. Loved the bubble bath and the supercomfortable beds.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sams apartment has every single thing you could need and more! It’s very clean very comfy and the view over the canal is breath taking

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sam is super nice, and his place is located in a very nice spot in Rotterdam. Sam's apartment is spacious, very comfortable , and well equipped. The view from the windows is amazing, and the best part is, of course, the Jacuzzi. Highly recommended!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: My stay at Sam’s was fantastic. The place is a short walk from the tramway and was so easy to get to. Sam is such a wonderful host & person. The view from the room is beautiful & it was so relaxing to spend time on the hot stone and jacuzzi. The whole experience was splendid. DEFINITELY will come back if in Rotterdam (& if Sam’s place is free haha - which is a rare occurrence). Thank you, Sam.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
What a gem! This apartment was perfect for a couple - it was spacious, clean and quirky.
The location was fab. We walked from here to the centre easily - even in winter - and only used the tram/metro when we had our luggage. We loved the layout (especially the jacuzzi). There were so many special touches like toiletries, tea and coffee, local tips. Sam replied ever so quickly and was eager to help to ensure we enjoyed our stay.
We fully recommend a stay at Sam's apartment with a view! Thanks Sam.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
Sam is a wonderfully welcoming host and eager to help with anything you need. We really felt like coming home to a good friend!
And the view from the appartment is really fabulous, especially in the mornings of sunny days.
We woull definitely recommend this place!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Was a great stay. Apartment is as advertised and enjoyed every moment there. Beautiful view of canal and just down the street from some great restaurants. Minutes from metro and tram. Would recommend to all heading to Rotterdam!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: great apartment with a beautiful river view. Would highly recommend

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
Sam ist ein wunderbarer Gastgeber, dem das Wohlbefinden der Gäste sehr am Herzen liegt. Das merkt man nicht nur im direkten Kontakt zu ihm, sondern auch an der Wohnung selbst! Er hat sogar einen Ordner mit Sight-Seeing Vorschlägen erstellt durch den man sich wunderbar inspirieren lassen kann. Wir haben uns überaus wohl gefühlt!
Die Lage ist sehr gut. In 4 Minuten ist man zu fuß beim nächsten großen Lebensmittelgeschäft. Dort sind auch die Haltestellen für die Straßenbahn und Metro. Damit kommt man gut zum Bahnhof und direkt in die Stadt. Und das alles bei einem wunderschönen Ausblick!
Der Whirlpool war natürlich das absolute Highlight der Reise.
Vielen Dank Sam, hoffentlich sehen wir uns bald wieder :-)

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Great location, wonderful views , great host with lots of helpful tips about the apartment and it’s facilities

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Beautiful location with a stunning view from the balcony. Sam was a great host, Jacuzee is lush as well. Would recommend for a picturesque stay in a central locatiion. Good value too.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sam was lovely, he met us and showed us everything in the apartment. We felt very comfortable here. The apartment was clean, nicely decorated and has lovely light and views. It was nice to sit and watch the boats go past. There's a good supermarket nearby, I have some food allergies and found everything I needed there. The historic area is really nice and it's easy to get into town - we went by tram. There are nice restaurants and bars nearby.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: The apartment is in a great location, only a few steps away from the metro station. Sam is a great host and makes sure you have anything you would need.  The apartment itself was clean and nice with a great view.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: This apartment was wonderful - great view, cool vibes (I love the stained-glass windows and the multi-color hanging lights).  The bed was extremely comfortable, and we enjoyed having our coffee while overlooking the canal.  Our only regret was that we couldn't stay longer!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Hope to return here soon - Sam is a lovely host. The flat is really comfortable and in a brilliant location. Lots of places to eat and drink in Delfshaven itself and metro station just down the street when you need it. If youre lucky, you can watch the cool barges head up and down river from the balcony with your morning coffee.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Very nice apartment with a nice view.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Matches description, host clear with instructions, apartment has beautiful views.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: I read all the previous reviews and it is apparent that virtually all of them liked this place. So did I. In fact I gave it a high rating for value. Having said that, I think prospective renters should be aware of a few of the inconveniences, in case any of them matter to you. Start with the steep narrow stairs in case you must carry heavy luggage. The chairs you see in the photos are the only places to sit - but they are comfortable and the view is great. The kitchen area is very small and the dishes and cutlery are limited. But the most annoying aspect was no sink (or mirror) in the bathroom. You must use the small sink in the kitchen for everything. However, none of this dimmed our enjoyment of the place. The view makes up for a lot and Sam is a great host.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sam's place is advertised as having a great view and it really does. Being able to sit on a balcony and watch the boats, both large and small, navigate the canal was fascinating. My first impression of the neighbourhood was that it was a little gritty but after a day, and a little exploring, you see that it is safe, interesting, and has everything. Being minutes from the Tram and the Metro was great and makes this an ideal location to explore Rotterdam and beyond.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Excellent stay! Very easy to travel and explore Historic Delfshaven and City of Rotterdam from the home. View of the canal was lovely. Took the tram, train and bicycled all over.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: If you want to stay in one of the oldest parts of Rotterdam, then this is the place! Apartment has a very nice view across the canal (De Schie), is very close to shops, restaurants and public transport. Sam is an excellent host who goes out of his way to make the stay of his guests easy and unforgettable.

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments: Sam's place was great!! The location, cleanliness, decor, view from the balcony, uniqueness, etc. (all which matched the photos!)  made this a great place to stay for our two days in Rotterdam. But what really really impressed me was that Sam went above AND beyond in his actions to make sure we were able to stay there. Previous to our stay, Sam was very responsive. Then a few days before our arrival, Sam messaged to tell me that he would be in the hospital during our stay but had made arrangements with his neighbor to let us in and get us settled. I was amazed that under the circumstances Sam was so proactive and made sure we were taken care of. I definitely would stay here again!!

name: Rotterdam: Apartment with a View!
comments:
Sam's Apartment was exactly what we needed ! Felt right at home and absolutely loved the spa tub and had a restful and recharging stay. We would have stayed longer however, the apartment was booked solid for months after.
Great view and a family oriented neighborhood, found lots of gems like the pin ball museum (under 10 minute walk) and not a bad walk (20-40minutes into Rotterdam central)
thank you for the great experience !

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments:
Nicolette's carriage house is located the Hillegerberg-Noord area of Rotterdam. Nearby lake with walking and bike trails, stores, restaurants and tram stop made it a perfect location for our visit.
The carriage house is very charming. The grounds are gorgeous, beautiful view from first floor, with an outdoor table for two.
Our stay could not have been more perfect, thanks to our gracious hosts and adorable twin boys!
Kevin & Suzanne - New York City

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: Nicolette and Bas are WONDERFUL hosts to an absolutely charming house.   Our expectations were exceeded.  It's a great location, 10 minutes on the bike and you are in the centre in Rotterdam or step out the door and you are on the main shopping street of the beautiful Hillegersberg with great restaurants and stores looking out over the water.  We will definitely be back!

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: Nicolette’s carriage house is so pretty and we had a wonderful time there with our 9 month old boy. It is nicely decorated with plenty of space, comfortable bed and good shower. The neighborhood is nice with a small shopping street and beautiful lake on the next corner. It is easy to get downtown with the tram stopping right at front. Nicolette thoughtfully found toys for our son and left us some wine. Highly recommended.

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: Perfect place to relax. wonderful view and nature. All the advantages of the city without its inconveniences. 15mn from the centre by bike.

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: We had such a great time in Nicolettes tiny guest house! It’s a lovely und peaceful place in a cool city. It was very nice to visit the neighbourhood with the small shops & drink a coffee near the water. Nicolette, her husband and the three kids are very nice, they were always there to answer any question and respected our privacy. I can highly recommended it :)

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: A very charming & peaceful place perfectly located and not far from the city center. Nicolette and her family are very friendly, gave us helpful tips and respected our privacy. We can highly recommend it :-)

name: Charming renovated carriage house
comments: A really homey and comfortable place to stay! I was attending a conference at Rotterdam Ahoy and it was an easy 45 min commute with the tram & train and was so nice to be able to come “home” and snuggle up on the couch or in the bed with a glass of wine or tea and unwind. Thank you for a wonderful stay!

name: Cozy Apartment near Central Station.
comments: The place is nice but didn’t have good kitchen utensils. We were also woken up every morning at around 6:30 due to the upstairs neighbours running around. There is also a lot of noise throughout the day from people on the streets just outside

name: Cozy Apartment near Central Station.
comments:
A fantastic apartment in a great location. Just a 2-3 minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal and a big supermarket (Albert Heijn). A 10 minute walk to the zoo as well. Big, stylish and clean apartment in a quite area of Rotterdam. The apartment had everything we needed. Full access to everything, including, dish washer, oven/microwave, plenty of plates, cutlery and utensils. Strong WiFi. A very nice wash room with a spacious shower area. Slight noise from upstairs but nothing which bothered us or stopped us from sleeping.
Communication was brilliant from start to finish of our reservation.
We had a great time staying at Jasper's apartment and was better than we expected. Highly recommended staying here!

name: Cozy Apartment near Central Station.
comments:
A nice small appartment, suitable
for two, a small family, or two singles. Near to the central railway station and the city centre. Some
sound from
the appartment above and from
the street. Not serious, but for someone who is easily disturbed, may be not the right choice.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Staying at Marjolijns was a great pleasure which we can highly recommend. Wonderful people and place. Big, light and cool room with a wonderful and private balcony. The house was in walking distance to everything you need - the metro, center and sights. But grab a bike and do as the locals - see and enjoy Rotterdam on wheels. If you are a Dane though, bring your own helmet, as the Dutch don't wear that (yet 🙄😉) Lovely family and a great city... we come again...
We give them 5 x 🎷(saxophones) as we also participated in The North Sea Jazz Festival.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Marjolijn and her partner were very welcoming and accommodating for my change in arrival time.
It was a lovely home with plenty of space for me and my mum. Sadly we couldn't enjoy the balcony as it rained most of our visit to Rotterdam

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
If this place is available during your stay in the city, book it without think. Marjolijn and her partner are lovelly people. They were the best hosts I,ve already have using airbnb, always ready to have a good chat if you want and at the same time very respectful regarding your privacy. The house is simply amazing - provides much more than we usually need
during a journey. Besides the big and charming bedroom (wiht a good bed and a cozy balcony) you will have a private bathroom with hot shower and a bit infrastructure to have coffee and tea whenever you want with complete privacy. The location is perfect - in a charming and quite street really close to everything. I couldn't had have a better choice in Rotterdam. I highly recommend them as hosts and this place.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Fantastisch verblijf bij Marjolijn. Veel ruimte, veel privacy. Charmante kamer met uitzicht op groen. Prima geslapen en zeer gemakkelijke en flexibele communicatie!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn is a very nice and helpful host. The room is nice with a fantastic balcony overlooking  beautiful gardens. A special place, great house and very near to the city. Parking spaces were available and the bed is very comfortable. Enjoy your stay. Rotterdam is a very lively and interesting  town.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We stayed at Marjolijn's for only one night but liked the beautiful house at first glance. The room is absolutely quiet inspite of being located quite central and the view from the balcony is great!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marojolijn’s place is great - really great design and wonderful balcony. Really near to all the museums. Thoughtful touches like a kettle and tea. I would recommend!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Het was zalig verblijven in het prachtige herenhuis op een toplocatie. Bijna de volledige bovenste verdieping is beschikbaar met volledige privacy. Een prachtig terras maakt het helemaal af. Zeer hartelijk ontvangen !

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: This was a lovely accommodation with absolute privacy and all the necessary amenities in the house. It was easy to access trains and buses from this location, while supermarkets  and restaurants were at walking distances. Marjolijn and Marco were very helpful in providing me all the assistance I needed during my stay.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Great host in amazing house with beautiful green surrounding, especially your private balcony. Private and quite although the hosts live in the same house as you have your own floor. Everything you want to see is in walking distance. Highly recommend.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn provides excellent accommodation for those who want to explore Rotterdam - spacious, private, and with the extra attraction of a balcony giving a view across the city.   The house is very well located in a wide street which has regained (thanks to Marco) much of its former elegance.  Everything you need, and most places you would want to visit, are within walking distance.  Great value.       Michael & Susan.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Our stay in Rotterdam couldn't have been better! Marjolijn and her husband were so warm and welcoming. We had never rented a "Private Room" through Airbnb because we usually get our own place, but this spot worked perfectly. Their home is beautiful and our space was very private. The private balcony was wonderful - we sat out there every morning and evening. The location to parks and restaurants is great - everything is walking distance from their place and there is a tram stop right around the corner. The wifi connection is excellent too, overall highly recommended.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: A perfect and spacious room with a comfortable double bed with a great balcony, located in a central location close to the city center in a stylish building!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The location is amazing! Only a short walk into center! Hosts are lovely and very welcoming. The space is fantastic, the private balcony was amazing to sit out on! Tried to book a second night but they were fully booked! Amazing stay!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: A great place and location, lots of space and the balcony was lovely in the evening. Highly recommended!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Perfecly located. Beautiful room and cosy balcony. Marjolijn and her husband are very nice hosts!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The apartment has a very good location. Marjolijn helps us a lot. In the apartment you will have private bathroom and toilet. The balcony has a very good view. Highly recommend!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Rustige nachtrust, mooie kamer met veel licht, maximale privacy op eigen verdieping. Buurt met veel groen.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Very large amd spacious room , high windows and balcony... conveniently located

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn and Marco are great hosts and really nice people to talk to. They have a beautiful house and really nice spacious room with a balcony overlooking the back garden. Location is great too, as nearby you have cafés, supermarket, restaurants, tram and metro station literally 5 minutes away.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn’s place is in a beautiful street of Rotterdam, very close to great places for food and drinks, walking distance from the city center and very accessible public transport.  Our stay was wonderful, Marjolijn has been a great host to us, very accommodating to our needs. We stayed for 10 days and our whole stay had been wonderful, the room was very clean and beautifully decorated with all the necessary amenities. We totally recommend Marjolijn’s place to everyone who wants to visit Rotterdam and we will definitely try to stay at her place again if we visit the city in the future.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: very nice place to stay, balcony with amazing siteview, not so far from the city

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam! Although the place is central it is very quiet and relaxed. The house is beautiful and the balcony very nice. Marjolijnis a great host and a great representative of Rotterdam. We would definitely stay here again. Marjolijn, thank you for having us over!
Kind regards,
Bart & anna

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Fijne kamer met comfortabel bed, zonrijk terrasje en veel privacy in een prachthuis.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We enjoyed the view of the garden from the balcony, and the great location. Recommended.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Very nice host! The balcony is awesome and the living environment is comfortable. It is located at a convenient block. Highly recommend.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Lovely balcony!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: I strongly recommend this cosy and clean place! Moreover, the balcony is so nice and Marjolijn and her husband have been really nice with us. An authentic place to be in Rotterdam.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijns huis is prachtig en oud. De bovenste verdieping is ruim en er is privacy. De verdieping is onder aan de trap af te sluiten met een deur. De kamer is ruim en er is buiten de kamer een klein keukentje om ontbijt te maken met koffie en thee.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Good location. Nice room with art on the walls. Awesome balcony! Friendly hosts.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Everything was great in this classical fashioned house in one of the most beautiful streets of Rotterdam.
Would definitely stay here again on my next visit!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Exactly as described. Great location, very nice room with a balcony, beautiful view.  Excellent hosts. I would recommend it!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Het verblijf bij Marjolijn was heel fijn. We hadden de bovenste etage voor ons. Er was een douche en een keuken met een kraan waar we thee en koffie konden maken. Koken kon je er niet maar wij wilden sowieso in Rotterdam eten dus voor ons was dat helemaal goed zo. Op de etage was ook de werkkamer van de verhuurders, waar alleen overdag gebruik van werd gemaakt. Wij waren overdag weg en hebben dit nauwelijks meegekregen.
Het huis is super mooi ingericht, alles is schoon en er is een balkonnetje om lekker buiten te zitten.
De gastheer en gastvrouw waren heel behulpzaam mbt eet locaties en ontzettend vriendelijk en maakten af en toe een praatje met ons. Het was een fijn contact en tegelijkertijd hadden we ook genoeg privacy.
Ook de buurt is erg leuk om rond te lopen. Je bent snel in de stad. Of te voet of met de tram.
De laatste dag mochten we onze bagage nog even laten staan, zodat we zonder bagage nog een halve dag Rotterdam konden bekijken. Dat was erg fijn voor ons!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Aangenaam verblijf in een sfeervol mooi oud huis.
Gastvrij ontvangst en prettig contact tijdens ons verblijf.
Veel privacy.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Comfortable, romantic, intimate, clean, private and large space, a very beautiful and romantic balcony and two extremely discreet and friendly hosts, Marjolin and Marco.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
The room is amazing - spacious, light and exceptionally clean. However, the highlight is definitely the beautiful balcony. Apart from the room, we had access to our own bathroom and even a kitchenit with a coffee machine and fridge.
The house is situated in a quiet neighborhood full of great pubs and coffee shops and is just 30 min walk away from the city centre.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The location was great, pretty much in a centre. Marjolijn was amazing, super friendly, answered to our texts literally in a minute and always there to help. The rooms were beautiful and clean and the balcony seemed really cool.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn's home was really nice, cozy, and clean. The host lives on the first floor of the apartment, and the private room is on the second floor. Beware while coming with big suitcases, as Dutch staircases can be quite tricky. The space was sparkling clean, cozy and very central. Tram within 2-3 mins walk and a metro station within 5 mins walk. The room is equipped with anything one might need and the balcony is amazing. And it has a Dutch toilet, which was definitely an interesting experience for us. Really loved our one-night stay at this Airbnb and fully recommend.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Marjolijn is a very haartelijke host and gives you a real home.
The beautiful house is situated next to Bus, Tram and even by foot you get everywhere in a short walking distance.
The house is situated in a quiet area, is bright and clean and comfortable.
For any question Marjolijn finds a solution and is giving help.
Thank you for a wonderful stay. I´d love to visit Rotterdam again (there is so much to explore: culture, art, architecture, good food, vintage shops...) and stay at Marjolijns house.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn and her husband are very good hosts. The room and the balcony are very comfortable.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We spent one night there and really enjoyed the room! The balcony is very sweet, everything was very clean and the communication with the hosts was amazing!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The experience at Marjolion was unique. My boyfriend and I spent a night in his wonderful house, well-furnished and cozy. The location is great because it is close to the centre, within walking distance, in a quiet and calm street and at the same time close to many nice bars and restaurants. I highly recommend it.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The place is very good for money good location. Didn’t feel completely welcome when we arrived because we asked if we could drop our bags off early and she agreed then had a go at us when we arrived saying she wanted to go to the shop and that it wasn’t a hotel even though we were before check in at 4pm. The place didn’t feel completely private and there was windows in the bathroom door and bedroom door. They also were getting their roof fixed at 8am every morning so if you like a lie in probably not the best until that is all fixed.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Marjolijn place was nice and tidy with a beautiful balcony. The plce was warm and cozy and not really far from the center.
The host was nice and friendly and would definitely go again.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Aardige mensen, mooi statig pand in een goede buurt van Rotterdam. Dichtbij het centrum, station en musea. Prima kamer je hebt veel privacy op de bovenste verdieping van het pand.  Er zit ook nog een balkon bij (voor beter weer)

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
We werden zeer warm welkom geheten in het fantastische huis van Marjoleine. De kamers waren een ideale uitvalsbasis om de geweldige stad Rotterdam te ontdekken.
Het huis bevindt zich in een prachtige buurt met statige herenhuizen waar het toch rustig vertoeven is. In het hart van de stad maar toch aangenaam en kalm.
De stad en de belangrijkste highlights zijn vlot bereikbaar. Eten en drinken kan in de nabije omgeving zeer goed. Maar met een tram of metro ben je snel overal.
Aanrader!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Hartelijk ontvangen door Marjolijn en haar man in hun prachtige woning. Terug naar de essentie van airbnb, een ruimte huren waar mensen leven maar toch met een eigen privé. De accomodatie was boven onze verwachtingen. Zeer ruim, gezellig en smaakvol ingericht. Hoewel ze er eigenlijk niet op voorzien was  het er ook perfect voor ons dochtertje van 1,5 jaar. De bovenverdieping kon afgesloten worden waardoor ze vrij en veilig kon rondlopen op ons verdiep. Marjolijn en haar man waren erg behulpzaam en respecteerden je rust en privacy. Een echte aanrader.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Marjolijn was a super friendly host.
We felt right at home in her beautiful rotterdam townhouse!
+ we got to enjoy the blossoming magnolia in her garden while sipping coffee in the morning dun on the balcony.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: The hosts were so friendly to us! We had the entire second floor to ourselves. The bed was comfortable and had there was a nice balcony with a garden view. An incredible place to stay while stopping through in Rotterdam!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: My daughter and I had a great stay at Majorlijn's place, it corresponded to our needs, budget and location. The room is on separate floor with a balcony that oversees lovely green gardens, it has a private bathroom and toilet. Perfect for our stay - we spent all day out exploring and it was a nice peaceful location to return to after busy days. Also, there's easy access to tram and busses.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We had the entire floor and the balcony view was splendid. It is very comfortable to rest here and I will definitely recommend to anyone.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Absolutely wonderful stay at Marjolijn's. She was such a lovely host that was so accommodating and responsive, she kept my bike in a safe place and she always replied to messages very promptly. She was so nice when I accidentally left my charging cables and sent them to me by mail. Very nice walk from her place to Rotterdam city centre and her place is surrounded by great restaurants. The private balcony is definitely a highlight of the property. I would stay again at Marjolijn's place if I am in the area again.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Our stay at Marjolijn's place was great. She accommodated us when we arrived a bit early to drop off our luggage and her husband gave us a nice recommendation for breakfast.
The location was perfect for us. Walkable to interest points but a bit further away to have some calm to get a good night of sleep.
The room in the 1920's house was clean with high ceilings, a private balcony and great style. Everything was functional and available.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Would absolutely recommend for a stay in Rotterdam. Marjolin and her husband are really welcoming and made this place feel like home! Especially the little balcony is great for having drinks in the evening :)

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
Airy, spacious room. Balcony lovely to sit out, evening or morning, and surprisingly quiet.
Our host was most helpful in where to store our bikes and to go easy walking distance to eat. Good range of restaurants nearby.
Steep stairs - not suitable people with mobility issues.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn's place was a great choice for our short stopover in Rotterdam. It was a pleasure to meet Marjolijn who was a very friendly and reassuring host. The space is excellent, as you effectively have a small flat on one whole floor to yourselves. The rooms are tall and spacious. There is a also a lovely balcony to the bedroom with a peaceful garden view. The bed is big and comfortable with nice crisp sheets. There are many shops, restaurants and bars a few minutes walk away, and it takes about 30 minutes walk to Rotterdam Central station. This is a great chance to enjoy a stay in a traditional home in Rotterdam.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments:
I really enjoyed my stay with Marjolijn in Rotterdam. The house is large and beautiful and right by a little park. It is quiet and peaceful but everything you need is just a five-minute walk away. Public transport is even closer, and while I did not come to explore the city, it would have been easy to do so.
Communication was always prompt and friendly, and whenever I needed something (coffee, the way to the next supermarket, an umbrella) it was quickly provided to me.
Big recommend and especially the guests who travel at drier times will certainly enjoy the balcony!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn is a very friendly host and she showcases the rooms and the surroundings. We could see the lovely garden from the spatial balcony. You could have a cup of nice tea and  have a sit there.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: I really enjoyed my stay at Marjolijn’s place. The location was fantastic. The room was comfortable and quiet with a gorgeous view out the balcony. Marjolijn and her husband were extremely friendly and welcoming. Would recommend 😊

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: mooie rustige plek in een bijzonder huis. relatief veel privacy en duidelijke communicatie. En bij vertrek een goede ontbijt tip! (Lilith)

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Beautiful house in a very nice area of Rotterdam, lovely and quiet but just round the corner from great bars and restaurants. Great to have the little kitchenette and fridge and we enjoyed the room with the balcony. Thank you for a great stay!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We had a lovely stay at Marjolijn. The house is in a lovely old style and a nice area. The little balcony and view over the gardens is also great. The room itself is nice snd spacious.  We could get reduced rates for parking just outside the house which was very useful.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Great place! We love the balcony and the view of the garden. It's a quiet area and we had a relaxing night. The place is relatively walkable to the central area.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn and Marco are great hosts - very friendly and helpful. Location of the accommodation is excellent and the building is lovely, full of beautiful architectural features. The outside balcony is also wonderful for having breakfast or relaxing in the evening.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: I stayed at a wonderful Airbnb in Rotterdam on a quiet street. The room was cozy with a lovely balcony, and the host was very accommodating. Perfect for a peaceful and relaxing stay!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We really loved this place! Their home is really beautiful and the room is super nice and cozy, has everything that you would need :) Although the door doesn’t lock that was not an issue at all, since they were really nice and we still felt like we had a lot of privacy. Overall an amazing choice, would definitely stay here again!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: I absolutely recommend this place. Clean and very private ,close to the tram station. The host was quick to reply and flexible for the check-in which was great. The room was clean and very spacious  with a beautiful balcony. Everything was as described.😊

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Even wennen op de 3e verdieping van dit prachtige historische pand, maar al snel genoten van de ruimte die ik daar mocht gebruiken. Alle authentieke details geven een extra sfeer mee. Marjolijn en haar man zijn erg vriendelijk en dat maakte dat ik me op mijn gemak voelde met alle privacy. Alles wat ik nodig had was aanwezig, al mistte ik in de avond wel de mogelijkheid om wat muziek aan te zetten of tv te kijken. Op loopafstand van het museumpark.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: Marjolijn’s place is nice and comfortable, we enjoyed our time there. The house is clean and everything we needed was available. Really nice balcony and the room as well. Marjolijn is kind, responsive and proactive. Very satisfied :)

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We really enjoyed our stay with my gf! Beautiful room with a balcony, wonderful house and friendly hosts. Highly recommended!

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: We had a wonderful stay in this beautifully designed space. The balcony offered a peaceful green retreat, often visited by birds, and the apartment is full of thoughtful architectural details and creative touches. It was such a pleasure to experience a place with so much care and character.

name: Room with private balcony, bathroom and toilet.
comments: It was a pleasure to stay in this home. The room was clean and tidy, and the terrace had a lovely view. There are some nice places to eat and drink in the neighborhood. We walked everywhere and only used public transport to drop off and pick up the car from the p+r in Kralingse Zoom. Thank you, Marjolijn!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny is a very friendly and welcoming host, easy to get in touch with! The place is located close to the city centre, 20 min walking to Rotterdam Blaak. The walk to the studio is very pleasant, with nice views of the city centre, river Mass and Erasmus bridge . The neighborhood is calm, quiet. The studio is clean and tidy. The price is very good for the studio. Overall a very good choice if you want to visit Rotterdam!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny is a superb host. Our flight was late night but it was no problem to check in later. When we asked for a hairdryer he went to buy one for us. The place is clean and newly renovated. Everything was perfect!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: danny was very kind. he waited for us until past midnight. our flight was delayed almost 2 hours and we didn't have any problem, he was there. his place is fine, clean and you can get the center of the city by walk. there are also buses line near. I recommended.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Our accomodation at Danny's has been really nice. The studio features a water boiler and a selection of teabags. The bed is comfortable and there are a lot of pillows. The shower was powerful and hot, very pleasurable!
Near the house you can find some orange bikes 'oBike', with which you can freely move towards the city centre! Or just use public transportation, bus47 is just behind the corner!
I only have to note one negative point: in the morning we have been woken up by steps and noises (kids?) in the hallway (shared with the house)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: The Room is new, clean  and the bed is very confortable.  No noise during the night. Danny is great to help You for all You need and to give indication to visit Rotterdam. By the apartment there is a good market and Italian pizza. In 20 minutes You are in the center and in 2 minutes You are by the water and You can see an Amazing skyline of Rotterdam.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny's apartment is a perfect spot as a base to explore Rotterdam.  Slightly off the beaten track, on Nordereiland, the location is quiet and peaceful, yet well placed for getting into the centre of Rotterdam.  The apartment has everything you could wish for, is spotless and comfortable.  We found that the island itself is not very well served by public transport, but a 20 minute walk over the bridge to the North takes you to Bleak, a hub for trams, trains and buses and right beside the impressive Markthal, cubic house and city library.  We thoroughly recommend Danny's delightful apartment as a base for a visit to the wonderful  city of Rotterdam.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Very nice hosts, good location with fantastic view on Erasmus bridge & city center. We loved our stay, especially the comfy bed. Definitely one of the best offers on Airbnb.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: We didn't meet Danny but his girlfriend was extremelly careful and nice host. We had a lovely stay there and would deffinately recomend it. Everything was so clean, the location is nice, but you have to walk a bit (15 minutes) to get to metro or most touristic places. We loved the freedom and privacy we had there.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Danny's place is very confortable, clean and quiet!
We enjoyed a lot walking to the city center since the view is quite nice!
We warmly recommend to stay at Danny's place!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Heel praktische kamer met alle nodige voorzieningen en bijhorende privacy. Rustig gelegen en toch dicht bij het centrum. Wij waren super tevreden.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny give us really good advice about few places to visite, the flat is cute, not to far away to the center, and there is à great view on erasme's bridge by night :)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Great size studio. Plenty of privacy and separate amenities to main residence. Danny's wife was really helpful. Gave me a lift to where I wanted to go. Would stay here again

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Privacy, clean .... Great

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny was really quick to answer to our texts and even wrote a nice comment in Deutch on my sister's postcard when she asked him. There were some sweets in the kitchen, a nice gesture that is always welcome ! His place is in a residential area on a somewhat island linked to Rotterdam by the Erasmus bridge. It is a twenty-minute walk to get to the Blaak market, a walk even nicer at night when the city lights are shining !

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: This is a wonderful place to stay. The location is quiet with beautiful skyline  and bridge views just around the corner. It is also only a short trip into city center. The space has everything you need for either a long or short stay and is decorated in a  clean and modern style. Danny has tips on local places to eat and things to see and do in Rotterdam if you haven't already made plans. I enjoyed my stay very much and will stay here again when I'm in the city.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Danny's place Is such a wonderfull option to stay in Rotterdam! Super clean, stylish, welcoming room with an amazing and comfy bed. The place Is well located (near to cube houses), and 1 block away you can find a great skyline view!
Danny Is very helpful and recheable by the phone, and super dedicated to the details. I appreciate the welcome snacks and the alternative of bike rental. Thanks for a great stay in.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: The room is nice, but the noise in the house at the evening was not very nice.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: A great self sufficient apartment. Self check in was super easy and everything we needed was there. The location is great for the centre, especially free parking right outside the house. It is only street parking, not on premise parking but that was fine. Shower was amazing! Thanks!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Nicely furnished room with a kitchen that provides all of the basics, located on a little island with a great view of the city.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Perfect place, very clean, nice neighborhood. Location is great.
If you are lucky you can park your car right near the window of the apartment (parking is free on the whole island). Danny is perfect host. Thank you)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Apartment is as expected. Tastefully decorated and spacious enough for 2 pax. The place is also very clean and tidy.
Need to have some luck finding street parking along the apartment's street. Otherwise, sufficient street parking is available nearby. 20-25 mins walk to the marktral and Cube apartments.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny's place is centrally located and a 20 minute walk from downtown Rotterdam. There is a good view from the island as well. Check-in was easy, as Danny's wife was able to let us in when we arrived. The place is somewhat small and the walls seem paper thin. The bathroom is also relatively small, but everything was very clean. For parking, I didn't realize the free parking in the listing referred to normal street parking, but it didn't seem to be an issue as we found a spot 2 streets down (parking is free on the island). All in all, I would say that it was a decent place to stay, albeit a bit inconvenient because of the parking.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Great place for a short trip to Rotterdam. Especially the free parking on the island is a great benefit. You can reach the city center by foot and enjoy the view of the Skyline and Erasmus Bridge by night.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Very comfortable little spot with many thoughtful comforts. I expected a city-centre, street level location might present problems with noise but the Noordereiland seems perfectly quiet at night. Danny was helpful with what proved to be a later than expected check-in. This is an apartment within the family home but completely private.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny was an excellent host, him and his family made sure I have everything I need. The location is a 5 mins walk to the bus stop and close to breathtaking views.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Super gezellige studio op Noordereiland , eicht bij het centrum etc.. propere studio met alle faciliteiten aanwezig , gratis parkeermogelijkheid is ook een groot pluspunt alsook dat je privacy hebt in de studio, ik heb een heel gezellig weekendje achter de rug en wij komen zeker nog terug ! Danny is een zeer aangename gastheer !

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
We stayed for a night here and were very impressed with the standard of accommodation and the location is fabulous for a visit to Rotterdam.
The studio flat is spotlessly clean, the bathroom has an excellent shower and seems very newly refurbished. The coffee machine was excellent and gave us a good start before our day of sightseeing in Rotterdam.
The flat feels very private and there is a lock on the door, the bed is excellent - very comfortable - and the street is quiet.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny‘s accomodation is a real treasure to be. Right in the middle of this beautiful river, a totally quite place, calm neighbourhood, town centre in walking distance with spectacular views on the way into town at any day or nighttime. This is really nice. Danny is very friendly and helpful, communication is quick and easy. If you are visiting Rotterdam (2 persons) come to Danny‘s place, you will not regret it.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Danny’s place. It was an easy walk for us from the sites we planned to see with cool views all around the area. The area was spacious and immaculate and was perfect for what we needed!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Soft bed, fairly quiet street, well-stocked kitchen and clean facilities. Danny is a warm host and the location is excellent - though the bus stop is a bit of a walk, it is a pretty one! Bathroom is a bit cramped, but still usable.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Do yourself a favor and book with Danny and Cielo when staying in Rotterdam! Their place is close to the bus, but it is also enjoyable to walk into the city center over the Willemsbrug (bridge). The view of the Nieuwe Maas is beautiful. Danny and Cielo were quick at responding and made my visit pleasant.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Danny's place is pretty secluded (in a good way) on a nice little semi island in Rotterdam. Very cool, and quant at the same time. View of the skyline in the evening is very cool, and there's a cool little neighbourhood on the island with a grocery store nearby. Also still close to the city centre; really a good spot. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Danny's :)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: The room was nice and comfortable, the shower was great and the entrance is private on the ground floor. The street and the neighborhood are quiet and safe. Communication was smoothly. Would come back if I am in Rotterdam!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Very nice place to stay! There’s a bit noise from the street, but the apartment is lovely, and the hosts are very kind!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: If you would like an apartment at a A location, this is it! We loved that the apartment was located just beside the Maas so we could have a nice view on the skyline of Rotterdam :) for the rest, this place has everything you need for a comfortable stay (including nice coffee to wake up)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Awesome service, had some problems with my connected flights and travel in general. But communication was quick and clear just like I like it !
Room was good and wel stacked with stuff to use. It was a cozy nice place to stay !

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Perfect location for amazing views, lovely people and a great selection of restaurants
Anny made it all hassle free and I would love to go back some day! :-)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: The bed is really really good, the street is calm. Shower is great too!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Nice appartment,  comfortable bed, great quite area close to the city centre.  Close parking area for 8 Euro/day. 2 minutes walk to the river with wonderful view to the bridges and Rotterdam skyline. We really enjoyed that in the evening. We met Annys husband and he had wonderful tips for sightseeing. When we visit Rotterdam again we would try to book this apartment again.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Greta place to stay! A really good location and a very responsive host. Flat has pretty much everything you could want. Only slight downside is how cold the apartment was even with the heating on. Apart from this though a great stay, would recommend!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Great communication before, during and after stay over! She even had little snacks and tea in the flat for us. Great windows/ light during the day and the curtains don’t let any light come through during the night. Very nice and would definitely recommend!

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: the studio is very neat and clean but there is a space in the window facing the street that has no curtain and is covered by an extra bed and a closet, the heating does not work all the time.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: small but cozy little 1-room studio. easy-sleepers be aware - some noise from passing cars and people can be quite loud. otherwise splendid and great host.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Nice and cozy studio for a few days in Rotterdam. Perfect for up to two persons.
Sometimes it is a little bit loud because of the thin walls and the bed directly in front of the window.
All in all it was enough for my trip.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
The place is exactly as shown in the photos. You will use the same main door as the Anny, but then you have your own door with a lock that looks exactly like the images.
The area is about a 20min walk from old harbour but during the day (not weekends) there is a shuttle bus that takes you off the island, otherwise you need to walk.
The island itself is very calm and quiet with great views of Rotterdam. There are a few restaurants and a supermarket 5mins walking from the Airbnb.
If you don’t mind being a little way out of the city centre I would 100% recommend this place.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: Nice, quiet, comfortable place and still very central - it's an easy bus or walk to the main areas you'd want to see. There are good parks and cafes around, and the end of the island (5 min walk) has an incredible view of the Erasmus bridge. Overall very good value for money.

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: A great place to stay - great views, peaceful, useful Spar for shopping  and the island is perfect for a morning run. The studio has all you’ll need for a few days exploring Rotterdam

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments:
Very nice and calm place in a quiet neighborhood, walking distance from the city centre
Kitchen equipped (slightly, not thoroughly)

name: Private studio with  complete kitchen and bathroom
comments: A nice studio in a good area with a nice view of Rotterdam nearby. Danny was a very friendly and extremely responsive host, made sure we had everything we needed and was flexible with check in. The studio had everything as described, but perhaps better for a shorter stay than a longer one due to its size. It was fairly clean, a few stains on kitchen utensils, and a slight mildew/damp smell that caused some allergic reactions. To those not sensitive to this, I highly recommend because of the accommodating host and reasonable distance from the centre of Rotterdam. Overall a good experience!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
Sander and Jelle are great hosts, the apartment is amazing. It has modern incredible design with great view and has good condition, many useful home furnishings, i feel really comfortable at this place.
This area is better than center and is very close to them. Very much enjoyed our stay and would come again!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: Unique and fun experience on Rotterdam's river. Sander is very friendly and helpful. Slightly confusing about what is included and what is optional. Meet the cleaner at your own peril.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
The stay was really nice, an amazing interior and quite an relaxing and fascinating experience to be on a floating house. Everything was clean and the beds were really comfortable.
The check-in and -out were very easy due to the locker box.
The pool was not set up, but the weather was not warm enough anyways and just sitting on the "balcony" was pretty nice.
All in all we really enjoyed our stay in the Wikkelboat!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: This houseboat is an amazing combination of modern efficiency and cozy comfort. It's a truly unique place, the hot tub is a great way to wind down after exploring the city- you are close to the street so you may have some looker-ons! The design utilizes pretty much every cool new tech and is very fun to explore. Beds are super comfortable and eating on the deck on the water is amazing.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
The place is original and well placed.. Near the market, with a beautiful view. Just a star minus for the clean there was dust and I'm allergic ... But the was wood all around us...
Sander is a reactive host! He always answer at our question instantly!
Found the key was like playing a scavenger hunt !
It was a very nice journey!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
The wikkel boat is super awesome and is located in the perfect place under a huge tower. The contrast of the two is what makes this stay special. It's fully high tech and there's everything except a washing machine. The lights could be changed as per ones mood and the two decks on either sides are good to do almost anything with your clothes on !
Highly recommended for the ones who can afford it. Is like living a dream!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: We were glad to have stayed here, in part because of what an unusual experience it was. It's definitely unique. The folks behind this thing have really put a lot of thought into it. Design-wise it's fascinating, though to my taste too much branding whatnot everywhere. It all felt a little corporate. The location, while interesting because it's on the water and seemingly right in the middle of everything, is a bit exposed. The houseboat's got lots of glass, which is great of course, but there are people walking right by on bridges. Big curtains ensured it felt pretty private at night, though the small porthole windows, including one by the bed, had no shades. The only other thing I'd caution is the bathroom had an intense fruit-smelling scent of some kind (FYI to those who're sensitive to that kind of thing).

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: A stay in the Wikkelboat is undoubtedly a one-of-a-kind experience. The location is unlike any other stay we've had- you're on the water, so it feels a bit like a lake house, but you're also in the middle of the city center surrounded by some dramatic steel and glass architecture. The location is great (15min from Rotterdam central / 15min to the Maritime Museum) and the space is very well designed- you'll be surprised to find that everything you need is efficiently packed into the small house. All of the windows have thick curtains to give you some privacy, but when they're open expect to be the center of attention as passers-by will wave and take pictures from nearby bridges (we even had and chat with a group of guys sailing by in a hot-tub-boat).

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
The Wikkelboat is a very special and beautiful place to stay – we liked it! The details and style is fantastic and all the equipment exactly how you need it.
It floats in the very center of Rotterdam and is ideal to explore the city.
Only thing to get used to: you are very exposed, when you stay there. People tend to stop, take photos and look at the wikkelboat. No matter, if there is someone in it or not. We kept waving to passing people on the bridge while sitting in bed. Funny for a while... we closed the curtains after all : )

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: Wikkelboat is a fascinating concept - not quite a #tinyhouse but a #tinyboat. Stylishly designed with fantastic and thoughtful amenities - there is a lot of detail that goes into this space. We were here for the Rotterdam Marathon! Communication with Sander was a breeze and he was patient and responsive with our questions - there were 3 of us and 2 proper double beds (Murphy beds) with comfortable mattresses - we had a good night’s sleep in a very clean place. Everything was centrally located - we were within 1km of the race expo, start line and 15-20min walk from the finish line and had a beautiful view of the harbour. Sander was also incredibly kind, accommodating and friendly - and it was a pity we had to rush off after the race; we really wish we could have stayed longer here!! We would definitely stay here again if we return to Rotterdam.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: The wikkel boat is located top notch. Short walking distance to restaurants, market hall and other stuff. We stayed for a business meeting and enjoyed the slightly different kind of accommodation quite a lot. :)) Easy check-in, easy checking out. Next time we'll come visit privately and are gonna make a use of the hot tub. Thanks guys!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: This houseboat is so fun to live in. The atmosphere is perfect when you put on some music and enjoy the view with a glass of wine. Sander and Jelle are so nice to suggest us the jacuzzi. However, there is quite a lot of insects in the house, the dishes were not clean and a little stain on bedsheets and pillow case

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: We absolutely loved the stay. It was a wonderful experience and very unique. Highlight of the trip!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
The place is unlike any I have stayed in. The view was amazing to wake up to.
The process was great from check in to check out. Appreciated the contact that was provided. Wish we had been able to stay longer.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: A unique stay in Rotterdam. Boat is charming with all amenities and host is responsive. Recommended to keep windows closed at night as we were attacked by mosquitos.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: Awesome location! Everything was fine, even the light is adjustable in every colors, musicstation, beamer and so on. The whirlpool is awesome even on cold days! A litte dream in the center of Rotterdam!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: The wikkel boat is a delight.  The space is well thought out and the amenities are outstanding.  We were very thankful that there was air conditioning as we stayed during the heatwave.  We especially enjoyed eating breakfast on the deck overlooking the water.  The location is perfect for exploring Rotterdam. Definitely one of the coolest places for a city trip!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: This spot is totally awesome to tick the bucket list on a floating house stay. I was solo because covid sucks but would be fun with a few pals, it has enough room. Was a fun getaway tucked in the middle of the city. There is construction right next door at the moment, which wasn’t too loud, but just so you’re not at all expecting privacy. It was much more quiet at night and I loved to have use of the hot tub!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: I can’t say enough, just fabulous! Right in the middle of town, but also quiet at night. Beautiful view, jacuzzi, outdoor space, and super cool boat. We were comfortable with 4 people.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: Die Lage ist toll, man ist nur ein paar Gehminuten von der Markthal entfernt.  Das wikkelboat selbst hat alles was man braucht. Die terasse mit dem Blick auf den Kanal und die Brücke ist das Highlight. Der Whirlpool ist leider auf der anderen Seite, was schade ist aber auch der Whirlpool funktioniert toll und gibt zusätzlich Entspannung. Die Sauberkeit war nicht ganz toll, daher ein Stern Anzug. Ansonsten würden wir jederzeit wieder auf wikkelboat.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: What a special place! We loved it, but are a little nervous to tell people how amazing it is because we don’t want it to be all booked next time we come. The views are amazing, it was also nice and private when needed. Close to great food and shopping. Also close to public transportation. The hosts were also super responsive!

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: A great small space with everything you could need. Could be truly amazing  if moored in a slightly nicer spot without the view of a concrete bridge.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: Cute place. Be aware it really is compact! But pretty functional and well thought-out. Downside is that it's right next to a footbridge, and the rear deck is clearly visible to pedestrians and the bar across the water. The hot tub is great but it's on the front deck tucked against the footbridge - after dark you'll have more privacy but will still have late night stragglers looking down at your bemusedly. The view would be nice if it was on the rear deck but the trade off is privacy! All in all, definitely a new way to experience staying in a city centre.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
This wonderful houseboat was a dreamy place to stay in Rotterdam. It is very spacious as the beds are Murphy style and leave lots of room when not in use. The kitchen is well equipped and morning coffee looking out the huge sunlight windows was so relaxing despite being in a very urban place. I especially enjoyed the hot tub. It was very clean and just the right temperature to fully relax me!
A unique and very comfortable place.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments: The Wikkleboat seemed very warn. The bed frame was all taped up and did t sit flat. On a main walking path so no privacy really. It seemed like the Wikkleboat was originally to face the other way with the hot tub facing away from the land and that would have at least been better. It also would be nice to have fully frosted window in the shower as a man kept standing on the bridge while female was showering. It was though a very unique experience that was fun for the whole family. The layout inside was very good and spacious.

name: Wikkelboat Nr1 @ city centre with Spa
comments:
It is a fun place to stay, close to Blaak station, with lots of things to do and places to eat. A great location.

The foldout beds are comfortable and easy to use.
When we arrived, the lighting system did not work, so we had to reset the unit (it is a unit we have at home) and screw out and back in the lightbulbs - just be aware if they don't work when you arrive.
