The kitchen and bathroom are small but functional - but this is a houseboat, so it is as expected and was not an issue for us. It was nicely set up with a Nespresso machine and pods (thank you). The hot tub was warm and clean, but it is right next to the pavement/road, so you may feel too observed.
Overall, if you want the fun element of a house boat, it is highly recommended.

name: Ruim familiehuis (120 m²) met airco & dakterras
comments:
Marijn's apartment is a big (4 floors) and fully furnished house, with a nice terrace on the roof, all kind of equipments, including a lot of toys for children...
It's definitely a great choice for a family with kids (maybe not too young because of the stairs).
It's located in a quiet area (with a nice playground behind the house) but still close to public transportation to get to the center. Free Parking available on the street
Marijn was not in Rotterdam for the check in but he had planned everything in advance (thanks to his neighborhood) and was always available for questions.
He also left a small (and good...) present at our arrival...
Great choice, highly recommended!!!

name: Ruim familiehuis (120 m²) met airco & dakterras
comments:
We definitely had a great time in Marjin's place.
Everything was outstanding our expectations, from the cute living room to the sunny rooftop view.
The appartement is easy to access, in an amazing neighborhood and is fully equipped.
The host even gladly gave us some tip activities to discover the town.
We warmly thank Marjin again for his kindness 😄

name: Ship's hold on houseboat "Mizar"
comments: What a great experience! The houseboat is central to everything with ample on street parking (also close to the train station). Each bedroom has an ensuite shower. We were surprised by how spacious the space was. Very little movement for those who get motion sickness. We would definitely stay here again!

name: Ship's hold on houseboat "Mizar"
comments: Location, location, location! This is a great place to stay in Rotterdam! The house boat is quiet, yet very close to everything in Rotterdam. We loved out stay there. It is spacious and comes with everything you will need for a good stay. If you are debating about staying here or not -- just do it. It will be a highlight of your trip!

name: Ship's hold on houseboat "Mizar"
comments:
Our stay was not terrible by any means but there are a few things that should be noted about our stay.
1) If you smoke marijuana this is not the place you should stay. We were aware that you cannot smoke inside the house, we had no intention to anyways. We smoked on the patio where we were told we could only to be accused multiple times that we smoked inside the home due to the smell. I understood the concern but to be constantly accused of something you’re not doing is annoying.
2) Monique went inside our room when we were not present. A bit intrusive if you ask me. But I understand it’s her house. I suggest keeping a mental note of the lockbox code when you leave to make sure it hasn’t been changed when you get back.
3) There was some confusion with our check out date (on our behalf not the hosts) and she kindly allowed us to stay an extra night.
Overall we truly enjoyed our stay and this review is not meant to bash the host, just shedding some objective light on our stay specifically. If you’re not a smoker and the lack of privacy doesn’t bother you then this may be the perfect home for you.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: This was an amazing apartment and Reuben was a great host. His communication throughout was very helpful and accurate. The apartment was beautiful and spacious and had an awesome view of the canal. The location was easily accessible via public transport and in close proximity to the best street with bars and restaurants in Rotterdam.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: A really nice appartment, spacious with a beautiful view and close to the city center and many public transports. Ruben is really welcoming and we felt right at home in the appartment.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
Very nice apartment whit everything you need. Grocery just across the street.
And a fantastic view over the canal. Nice to sit on the terrace and just se and relax.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
We had a great stay at Rubens apartment, he gave us good advice for stuff to visit and also put some tourisdt guides in the kitchen, the apartment was clean and tidy, it´s close to the city centre and you have a nice view from the balcony.
Thank you!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Great location can walk to many restaurants, museums and the Mart.  A wonderful view of the harbor.  The apartment is very comfortable and met all our needs.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Perfect location, great host, clean and tidy with nice view, also various facilities offered.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
Amazing stay. As a host myself i tend to have higher than normal expectations. I hope to receive the same level as i like to provide my own guest.
Communication - Quick and extremely helpful
Location - For my stay the location could not have been better. Having a market right across the street made it even more convenient.
Parking - Having available parking if needed was one of the biggest factors.
Apartment - Pictures don't do it justice. It was much nicer in person with everything you need.
Overall it was a great stay and i would recommend anyone to stay there.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
Best place ever in Rotterdam !
The location is perfect for visiting the center, at 5 minutes to the coolest neighbor with bar, museum and restaurant.
The apartment is clean, quiet and worming,
The view is really romantic,
And Ruben was an amazing host.
P.s. : go to eat to Dertien, very close to the apartment and a great restaurant.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Lovely apartment with a great view from the balcony, Reuben was very helpful

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Very pleasant appartment with great view

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Highly recommend. Great host, beautiful apartment and stunning location. Restaurants nearby, grocery store next door, metro down street, Close to everything but quiet.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: A perfect little apartment in a quiet spot just a few minutes from all the shops and restaurants.  The views over the little marina were amazing and we loved sitting outside and watching the sun set.  Perfectly clean with everything you might need.  Comfortable bed.  Great communication with Ruben.  Would definitely stay here again.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Lovely apartment with a great view over the marina. Location is also central and walking distance to restaurants / supermarket and metro down street. Ruben is also a very communicative and excellent host who gave many tips for the area. Highly recommended!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
El piso de Ruben está muy bien ubicado en el centro de Rotterdam con unas vistas muy bonitas y tiene un supermercado enfrente. Ordenado con todos los detalles, limpio y la cama es muy cómoda! El piso es muy grande y equipado con todo. Lo recomiendo sin duda para la gente visitando a Rotterdam y los sitios alrededores. Muchas gracias Ruben!
Ruben's flat is located in a great area in Rotterdam, super central and right next to a supermarket. It has great views over the harbour and is equipped with everything that you would need to spend a great few days in the flat. It is very large, clean and cozy.
We were able to communicate really quickly with Ruben and he was very kind during our stay. Thank you Ruben!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: We had a great time. The space and the location are wonderful. We thought of eating out in the evening, but then realized that the best place to have dinner on a warm summers evening is the balcony of the apartment. We highly recommend this place.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: This Airbnb is exactly what it is described as. I was more than pleased with the layout, the cleanliness, the stylish decor, the location was superb and the view of the water from the balcony made morning Tea time very special.  Ruben was very accommodating as well.  My only wish is that the second bedroom would have been available but it worked out.  Anyone that rents  this place will be extremely pleased.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: We really enjoyed our time at Glashaven. Our favorite part was the balcony - such a great place to sit and chat while looking out on the harbor. The apartment was clean and spacious, and conveniently located to walk to anywhere in town. Ruben’s communication was excellent - quick and useful responses and smooth check in. Definitely recommend!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: We enjoyed to stay at Ruben’s place. It’s the center of the city but we can call it quite residential  urban area. Everything was super comfortable, the apartment’ interior is nice and cozy. It’s full of light and warm colors. Ruben is a super host: easy to communicate and ready to help. The great bonus of the apparent is a small balcony facing the haven where you can enjoy the sunset every evening. We hope to visit this apartment again.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
Beautiful apartment, spacious for 2, really nicely decorated. Fantastic view of the old harbour! And so close to all the action: Witte de With, Museumplein, Markthal, Oude Haven, Erasmusbrug… Great bed also.
And Ruben and his friend Johnathan were very helpful!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Well located apartment with outstanding view to the harbour for a good price. Definitely recommend it. It’s worth every euro cent.)

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: If you want to stay in Rotterdam,  this is the place to be. Ruben's apartment is amazing, located in the best part of Rotterdam,  close to Beurs, walking distance to all the main sites. The terrace overviews a small port with houseboat, very calm with a beautiful view and light in the evening. We really enjoyed staying there for the weekend. Ruben was also a very accommodating host. Definitely recommend.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Amazing location in the centre of Rotterdam but away from the noise of the city bars. The apartment looks out over a lovely marina. We stayed 2 nights and spent most of the time wandering around Rotterdam or sitting on the balcony watching the sunset and the river taxis and boats.  Ruben was waiting for us when we arrived and showed us where to park (there is an extra charge for parking). He showed us around the apartment and left us a bottle of wine. The apartment is spacious and comfortable and was perfect for our stay.  Would definitely recommend this place.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Ruben was very nice and friendly, and the check in and communication was very easy. The apartment was in a very nice location with beautiful views. We had everything we needed, and enjoyed our stay. Thanks Ruben!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Very centrally located apparemment, supermarket across the street and adequately equipped.  Ruben as host was very cooperative.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Centrally located flat, lovely balcony with a great view. Would recommend

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
I really loved my stay at Ruben's great apartment. Nicely furnished, very bright, well equipped and with some nice flowers. It is conveniently located near both Beurs and Blaak stations, just a very short walk to Markthal, Kijk-Kubus, Old Harbour, Maritime Museum, and Witte de Withstraat. Other Rotterdam attractions are also easily accessible either by walking or by taking the public transport.
For me, the view from the apartment is its best feature. Large windows in the living room and the kitchen face a little harbour. The harbour is closed for traffic so it is very quiet and serene and watching the boats and the seagulls from the balcony while the sun goes down was something I enjoyed doing every day.
Communication with Ruben was smooth and prompt. Overall, I had a great stay and I hope I will stay at Ruben's place again.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Ruben's place is in the perfect location. The view from the balcony is fantastic and you can spend hours sitting there. The apartment is quiet and spotless and I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting Rotterdam. We hope to return. Many thanks for letting us stay Ruben.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
Everything was really nice,
Really pleasant apartment, nice view on the terrace

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: It’s indeed a beautiful and spacious apartment. The view over the old harbour is just beautiful. Nice restaurant and trendy shops just a minutes walk away.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: I had to check-in late due to circumstances and Ruben was very helpful! The place is beautiful and clean with a lovely view. Highly recommend staying here.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Very nice apartament! A special view and location!

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments:
We had a very nice stay at Rubens apartment. The Place is quiet but also located close to great places like Witte de withstraat. The view from the balcony was a highlight.
Check in was easy and Ruben was a friendly and helpful host.
Would definetely recommend this apartment.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Ruben’s flat was very comfortable and we found it an excellent location for transport links.  Also a pleasant walking area close to amenities with a supermarket directly across the road.   Lots of restaurants nearby.  Pleasant view from the lounge/dining area and a lovely little balcony space.  The actual building in which the flat was located was very quiet and very well maintained.  We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Very lovely and homely place with beautiful view overlooking water and facing sunset direction. Spent new years here and could walk 5 mins to the main fireworks. Great location.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Perfect place to be for Rotterdam with an awesome view.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: We had a fantastic long weekend - in a delightful flat with spectacular views. Ruben is a top host and was incredibly helpful in rearranging our visit because of illness. I would be happy to recommend the flat to any of my family or friends.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: First of all Ruben was very flexible both with check in time and late check out when our train schedule changed. He met us at the apartment for a quick intro,. The apartment is located in central Rotterdam, overlooking the Old Port, sky scrapers, house boats, but is very quiet. It is lovely to enjoy the balcony. The apartment is spacious and modern, very comfortable bed and nice furniture. A lot of attractions are a few minutes away. Highly recommend this listing.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Very nice, confortable, quiet and well located appartment, with a great view on the channel. We recommend it.

name: Spacious apartment in city centre incl. parking
comments: Ruben’s place was really nice l! Very central, with a wonderful view. We truly enjoyed our stay there!

name: Quiet, comfortable and central
comments: Thanks Rogier for having us stay in your house. Stian who checked us in was very welcoming and helpful. The house is brilliantly located for public transport- the tram is just at the end of the street.

name: Quiet, comfortable and central
comments:
The stay in Roger's home was really nice, as they are their house which they live, so stuff is there, photos, amenities and decoration, so it really feels you are in your home too.
The stay has many amenities, big fridge, a big couch and several tables and chairs, it's quite spacious, and also has a beautiful garden with chairs and a table. Bedrooms and bathroom are located upstairs, every room is quite spacious and with everything you need.
The neighborhood is really quiet with little noise, plenty of children playing on the street and in a 5 minute walk you can get to bars, restaurants, groceries or to some canals.
The communication with the host has been smooth, they waited for us in both checkin and checkout, they gave us some tips for our trip too.
Really recommend staying there if you look for a family-friendly place.

name: Quiet, comfortable and central
comments: Rogier's house turned out to be a perfect home for us in Rotterdam. It is centrally located, spacious, quiet, well equipped and clean. It gave us (a family of four with two adult children) enough room for privacy as well as the opportunity to enjoy being together. Before our arrival, all our questions were promptly answered and our wishes fulfilled. During our nine-day-stay the host Stian was very helpful as well, thank you for that. In fact, no reason to complain at all! This house can be highly recommended.

name: Flat in Rotterdam
comments:
We had a wonderful weekend.
The flat is very lovely, bright and spacious, with all the furniture and a balcony as a bonus !
Iva lend us two bikes which allowed us to completely enjoy the city. Thank you for everything, we will come back for sure !

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Stayed here for the North Sea Jazz. All in all good value comparing to Hotel overpricing; really nice garden view through the balcony, quiet area to sleep well; Antonia lives downstairs in any case. For festival travelors important to know that subway doesn't run to station coolhaven after midnight, plus Taxi from Beurs app. 15€, from Ahoy directly 25€ each Festival day.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
Nice place to stay, clean, bright, well decorated. One small detail, the house is not well sound proof, so you have to be careful not to be too laugh.
Antonia was flexible and she answered immediately to our questions !

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Nice and cosy apartment with beautiful garden view from the balcony. Furnished modestly yet thoughtfully. Antonia is very friendly and smiles a lot :-) Lived there for about 10 days and it was a very nice way to get to know Rotterdam a little bit. Thanks!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Cosy, bright and clean place, very good location.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
Antonia's house was just perfect for our little trip to Rotterdam - would definitely book again and recommend!
The house is very spacious, cosy and bright and has a very large balcony, as you can see in the pictures. I was a big fan of the decor, felt rigth at home!
It's not in the center of town, but it is very well located (close to metro and tram or 25 minutes on foot to the central train station). We walked everywhere as we found it walking-distance from everywhere we wanted to go. This is a more residential area, with loads of shops and cafés and other amenities.
Anotnia was super accommodating during check-in and overall a great host! Thank you!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Good situation and apartment with beautiful view.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Lovely flat. Spacious. Well equipped with a traveler's needs,  and it has a balcony for meals or tea.  We cooked. We ate outside on the balcony with trees swaying in the breeze and birds chirping. Rotterdam is a walkable city, but buses and metro are just 1-2 blocks away if needed. Strongly recommend this place.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Nice cozy place, with a beautiful terrace and view.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Great host and a very nice apartment with a terrific balcony.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: The place is spacious and clean as well not far at all from centre city, the street is very quiet good to rest at night, Antonia is a great host very nice and organized, i recommend it!!!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
The apartment is located on a nice calm street, though very close to the main Street and to the tram station, that will take u easily everywhere u want.
The apartment was very nice, light and clean.
The communication with Antonia was flawless, as she answers immediately.
Antonia was very kind to us and we loved to stay at her beautiful place.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: The place is bright and spacious. You get enerything you need.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Awesome place! Clean, spacious, full of light. In a quiet neighborhood, but also 5 minutes from all public transport that quickly takes you anywhere you want to go. You do have to climb a floor of stairs, but we had two heavy bags and two carry-on sized bags with us and managed fine. Between the sofa bed and bedroom bed, it was comfortable for four people.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: A nice spacious apartment with balcony, all amenities provided, good communication with the host. A 30 minute walk from the centre but close to a metro stop.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Welcoming and flexible host, plus the place was nice with a good balcony

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Antonia was a very nice host that was quite accommodating! The apartment was very nice with a lot of light and absolutely spotless. Only at a 10 minutes walk from the city center.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Antonia's place is very clean, in a great location, and is very spacious! We were big fans of a balcony with a wonderful view of the garden. I will definitely stay there again when I return to Rotterdam. Perfect stay!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Very comfortable and bright flat with big balcony at the quiet street near the historic and picturesque Delfshaven district. 25 min walk to Central Station, many bars, restaurants and supermarkets nearby. The host Antonia was super friendly. Recommended!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
Very nice apartment.
The balcony is a big plus.
Definitely recommend this one!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Great location, comfy and a nice rear balcony to enjoy the sun.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
My friend and I spent a week in this apartment.
It is very charming, tastefully furnished. The balcony is very large and offers a beautiful view.
A steep, narrow staircase leads to the apartment. You should be sure-footed. There is a railing to hold on to.
Check-in and communication were very professional, and Antonia responded very quickly.
We were surprised by how dirty the apartment was. The kitchen doors were sticky, and there were crumbs and stains in the drawers. In the bedroom, there was a considerable amount of dust fluff scattered in the curtain. There were cigarette butts on the balcony. Luckily, there's a vacuum cleaner, so we vacuumed it first.
We asked Antonia to at least give the kitchen another clean. She did it herself immediately. But i guess we still have different opinions about cleanliness.
Overall, everything seemed to have been superficially cleaned for a long time.
If everything were thoroughly cleaned and then maintained, this would be a magical place to stay

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments:
The flat is functional, spacious and bright and in a quiet, multicultural area. Antonia always responded quickly to my questions. The flat is a half-hour walk from the station and the centre is only 20 minutes away. No need to take public transport.
100 metres from the flat there is a very nice and friendly pub with good beers, and not far away restaurants of various ethnic groups.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: We had a wonderful time at Antonia’s. The balcony was a perfect place to eat breakfast and listen to the birds. Super accessible by bike, foot and tram. Would highly recommend a true residential experience.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: I found the apartment for a very reasonable price due to a convention being hosted in the city and it was very well priced compared to hotels. It’s located less than 5 minutes walk from both a tram and metro station. It was very clean and spacious and the balcony is also a nice bonus. It’s a great place to stay and would recommend to anyone!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Antonia's place is in a great location, a few minutes walk from Coolhaven metro station or tram stop  and  it is easy to get around the city. The neighbourhood was quiet and the apartment has plenty of space. The balcony was nice to relax in the evening with some beers or have breakfast in the morning. Would definitely stay here again if I visit Rotterdam in the future as it has everything you need and is in an ideal location.

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Antonia's place is a nice home base for a visit to Rotterdam. It's definitely bright, which is great, but bring your sleeping mask for the early and late sun in the summer. The furnishings are basic, but comfortable for hanging out, and the balcony overlooking the back garden is so peaceful. There's a mocha pot for your morning coffee, a few pots and pans for the stove, cutlery and dishes, a combo microwave/oven, and a dishwasher, so your set in the kitchen. We'll definitely check availability for our next visit!

name: Bright apartment with big balcony
comments: Well located apartment with nice large balcony at back

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments:
The appartment, the city and the location was simply perfect. The rooftop was amazing and the views from there were very beautiful.
Xana was a really good host, very helpful and comprehensive with the arrival time. She also concerned that we had a great stay...
Best trip we ever had so far.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: The rooftop terrace is just amazing, great view from up there! We felt very at home in Xana's apartment, also thanks to the friendly welcome she gave us. Great location, not far to walk to the station and even the zoo is very close.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: Good location (7' to centraal station) very nice living/dining room, interesting roof tarrace - although quite an effort to use it - as loooots of steep stairs, but once u get there - good view, and set of furniture. Second bedroom is very small to the extend that u cannot close the door when bed is unfolded to double (very comfortable by the way). Therefore not ideal for two couples.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments:
Xana was always available and very helpful
the apartment is in a very good location .....minutes walk to supermarkets and a few more minutes from the heart throb of Central Rotterdam; so your able to visit all the lovely restaurants and wine bars, and various entertainment and still able to take a liesurely walk back to the welcoming apartment
There are a couple of flights of stairs to the apartment but it is well worth it

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: Good located flat near the central Station with a nice View at the rooftop. Crazy stairs, but all in all quite nice.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: Lovely spacious light apartment - very central - roof top terrace will be lovely in summer - we went in winter so weren't able to appreciate it so much. Very well equipped and ambient and was great for our family of 5.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: i recommend this location as a perfect spot. to walk from the Rotterdam Central to the apartment quick walk easy safe street. the apartment was very spacious and had everything to make our stay magical. The apartment comes with an amazing balcony where you can also see part of the city. Transportation from the apartment are very efficient and you are walking distance from everything. Perfect stay I would highly suggest Xana accomodation

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: Xanas place was lovely and we really enjoyed our stay. The place was well equipped and super comfortable. My only concern is to take care when walking up the stairs to the front door as it is quite narrow and dark. Never the less this is hardly significant providing you take your time and watch your step. The house is super close to the station and not far from the supermarket and other restraints. The house was pretty centeral and had a pretty cool roof top in which you can sit and eat breakfast or simply just enjoy the view around.  We all thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Xana's place, as we hope to return as soon as we can!

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: I booked this house for 5 people and it was amazing: beautiful common room with a big television and couch. Nice bedrooms and big bathroom, plus the roof top is available to chill outside enjoying the view. Not so far from the center and relatively close to the train station. Truly recommended!

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments:
The flat was in a perfect location and was very clean and generally comfortable to stay in. One of the bedrooms was extremely small and was only suitable to sleep in, we werent able to keep out luggage in there or use the to get changed which wasnt ideal. But it was ok for a couple of nights.
Xana was very communicative and helpful. She kindly allowed us to check out an hour later which was much appreciated - thank you.
The biggest issue though was that our original booking was cancelled less than 72 hours before we arrived - the place had been booked since the end of may. The reason given was that the host was unwell.
However, the place became available to book immediately on the website for £100 more. Due to a lack of options at such a late notice, we rebooked the place. It was really a strange situation as it doesnt seem like a fair thing to happen. In all our time as a group using air bnb this has never happened before.
I feel conflicted writing a not entirely positive review as Xana was helpful and the place was overall good. However, cancelling to put up the price doesnt seem right.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments:
Lovely place. So nice decorated and furnished. We really enjoyed our stay there especially the view from the rooftop terrace is amazing.
She got strict rules for your stay but if you're there you can imagine why!

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: We had a nice stay with my partner. The house is located in a quiet location and the house is equipped with all comforts. Cozy atmosphere and a great view, The stairs were a bit too steep, not useful if you have difficulty walking. Furthermore, it lived up to our expectations and a must if you want to get out of the city as a couple, but also want to be in the city within 5 minutes.

name: Renovated app/ in city center with rooftop terrace
comments: Had a fantastic stay here with 3 of my family/friends. the property is a good distance from the main city with transport links easy to get to. The stairs are very steep and small as described but way worth it for the very spacious, clean and sleek looking apartment. lovely living room with a nice TV and very comfy sofa. bathroom was nice with good water temperature and pressure. the rooftop feels very private and has a decent view to some of the higher buildings in the city. The hosts were very helpful with recommendations In the local area. this was my first time booking a place in the Netherlands andI was a bit worried about other reviews that gave the implication Xana would scam us into additional fees but the price of the stay was accurate to what we experienced and we left very happy after 3 nights!  - would 100 percent recommend and stay again!

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: I definitely recommend this listing. The place is spacious and private- you are renting the whole floor. The location is central and situated on a nice street with lots of greenery. The unit was very clean and convenient, the bedroom has a small kitchenette equipped with the essentials. Hans is a very nice and attentive host. Great value for money and would rent again in the future.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: Hans provides a huge room and bathroom, that are separated from his living area. So you have a lot of privacy and not the feeling to intrude into someone elses home. The hand-over of keys was really uncomplicated and the flat is in decent walking distance to any relevant spot to visit in Rotterdam. We really enjoyed our stay in this amazing city :).

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Absolutely great place, with an exceptional scenic view just in front of the doorstep! All things are as good as the pictures shown, if not more. Very neat and clean room with luxurious toilet.
Hans is really helpful to find with us the best time to keep the luggage and handling of keys before check in time.
The home is very near a tram stop which leads to major spots of Rotterdam, whole being at a walking distance from the city if you want a nice stride along the beautiful canals under tunnel of trees with ducks and swans and all kinds of cute birds.
Thank you Hans for the nice stay. My mother and I enjoyed a lot. :)

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
This room is in a great location - just the right distance from the city centre to avoid the noise and bustle. The immediate neighbourhood has many shops (selling foods, fruits, even OTC medicines) that were open even during the weekend.
It's spacious enough to easily accommodate 3 people, and we loved the really big and modern toilet.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: We stayed in this accommodation from Thursday to Sunday in August / 2018 with our two girls (3 years and a half and 20 months). The girls were very comfortable. The small one slept with us since the bed is very wide (1.80 wide) and the biggest one sleeps in the additional bed. The location is perfect and you can easily walk to the center (you can also take the tram whose stop is 2 minutes away). The neighborhood is very nice and beautiful and there is a supermarket 5 minutes from the house. In the room there is everything you need to be comfortable: fridge, microwave, coffee maker and kettel to prepare breakfasts or to heat soups or sandwiches for dinner. The bathroom was wonderful for us since it has a large bathtub where our girls took a bath. It is a great detail that there is no problem with the arrival time. In our case, the flight landed very late and we arrived at the house at dawn. A great site at an even better price! Thanks for everythink!

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: The room and bathroom are as described in a side street terrace house. Not far away from the city center and easy to reach by public transportation (metro/tram/bus). Perfect for a couple days stay in Rotterdam! Recommended. Hans provided all the important and useful information in advance and was easy to communicate with.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Great place to stay in Rotterdam.
Very friendly host, beautifully clean. Large room with great amenities.
Very close to tram stop and supermarket but located in quiet street by canal.
Highly recommend.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: The apartment had a big bathroom with a lovely bathtub. The tea and coffee were provided and a lot of glass and mugs available. Also, an additional heater was provided for the convenience of guests. Toilet and shower were clean. Two umbrellas were provided. Microwave, coffee maker, fridge, TV, kettle, kitchen towel, bowls, plates, utensils and toaster were provided. There was no stove in the room. The walking distance from the Rotterdam Central Station is about 20-25 minutes. I would recommend the tourists to get the travel card at Rotterdam Central Station before arriving the apartment for your convenience as tickets can only be purchased at the Metro station or Train station. A good choice to stay as it is located at the ground floor.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Good apartment on a nice street with a river and birds. Room is okay for three guest. There is a small fridge in the room, a microwave, a kettle, coffe maker and a toaster. There is no oven or stove so plan your food preparation for a microwave. Bath is great with warm floor, spacious shower and a bath. It’s 20 minutes walk to the Central railway station. TV has Chromecast so you can stream movies on it.
Hans is very responsive and helpful. I recommend this home for stay.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: Disappointed stay at Han's place. The  bedroom and it's furnishing looks tired and is in need of upgrading, eg. table, sagging mattress, curtains need a wash and empty tea, coffee boxes. We expect more for the price. No meeting with the host. The location is ideal to explore the area and a pleasant walk to the centre with a lovely bathroom to return to for a nice shower.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Het was een fijn onderkomen. De host was vriendelijk en gaf goede details hoe binnen te komen.
We hadden alle privacy. Zowel de slaap/zitkamer als badkamer waren prima.
Het enige wat wij een beetje onpraktisch vonden was dat je in de badkamer moet koken. Maar voor de 2 dagen dat wij er waren was dit ook prima te doen.
De locatie ligt op loopafstand van het centrum en de supermarkt is om de hoek. Dit maakt het heel fijn.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: Nice and peaceful place 10 minutes with bus or tram from Rotterdam centraal. However, the closest tram station was under renovation when we were there. Very spacious bathroom and bedroom. The room was also well equipped with a coffee machine, microwave, and stoves for light cooking as described. Overall a very nice stay 👍

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
The location was quite convenient, with good access to local attractions and amenities. The surroundings were pleasant, offering a nice ambiance. The host was also communicative and helpful.
However, I couldn't ignore the presence of mosquitoes, which was a bit bothersome. Althogh windows were fully covered, but the mosquitoes came mostly through the ventilation pipes in the bathroom. Additionally, the place seriously needs maintenance and renovation; there were various issues that affected the overall comfort and functionality. Unfortunately, the overall feel of the place was not fresh, which detracted from the overall experience.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Strange that there are so many reviews praising this place and Hans, as we had a very poor start to our short break..!
Whatever you do don't dare to find a fault in this guys apartment or you will be thrown into the street.. We are far from picky and have stayed at a few Air B&Bs now and we have an average standard and this place was well below. All we asked for was a fresh change of sheets, pillows and pillow cases as the ones on the bed were well past there sell by date and were bobbly, dirty and smelly, Hans just argued and argued and argued that he has had no complaints and we should leave the apartment immediately.. Be warned!
We luckily found somewhere in the same price range that wasn't as run down with great views and fresh beds with hosts that had a much better attitude.

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments:
Hans' house is located in a very pretty and pleasant neighborhood. It's relatively close to the center (around 25 mins on walk), and ofc you have all the bike routes.
We've had some trouble to sleep due to a pack of geese that swim in the nearby canal, which made a remarkable noise at night; not Hans' fault of course, but it's worth noting in the review.
The bathroom is very spatious, warm and has everything you need. The towels that we were gave were not best quality but they got the job done.
The heating is very strong, but you can regulate it with the valve.
The checkin and checkout were smooth using the keybox, and Hans' was very kind in also allowing us to keep our luggage in the house for a few hours before our departure.
Overall, we had a very nice stay in Rotterdam!

name: Private room and luxurious private bathroom
comments: Great base for a few days exploring Rotterdam. The neighbourhood is close to the city centre and easily accessible on public transport. Hans was a communicative host and gave good recommendations for the local area. The room faces onto the street which means it can be a little noisy at night if you're not used to cars, bikes and people going by.

name: Cozy room + Private Bathroom in Center
comments:
A perfect hub for city trips, with comfy bed and bathroom to recharge, a cozy and well equipped kitchen, some fresh air and pleasant views
It's been quiet, well organized and welcoming to stay at Jose's apartment. He's an easy to deal host. I'll be glad to come back

name: Cozy room + Private Bathroom in Center
comments: I had a lovely stay at Jose’s accommodation. The location was very accessible from the train station and to the city center, the room was cozy and clean, same for the bathroom. It was also very convenient to have it inside the room for more privacy. Jose was welcoming and friendly, he even helped me by giving me the contact of someone in the city, as I’m moving there and was seeking an apartment. Overall, I highly recommend it for one person/a couple spending a few days in Rotterdam!

name: Cozy room + Private Bathroom in Center
comments:
Jose is nice host and easy to deal and talk with.
Room is with good bed, rail, private toilet, shower and
nice view from window in chill private area
~15 min by foot from central bus station.
Was happily supprised to see good conditioner and toothpase in shower, that's not often the option.

name: Beautiful Loft Apartment nearby Central Station
comments: Ingrid is one of the rare hosts that truly cares to meet you on location, make sure you aren’t following some 18 step scavenger hunt just to get into the place, and was extremely flexible in the timing of our check-in.  She was communicative through our entire stay, helped us find some local resources when we had difficulty, and was even willing to help fix up the place with better cooling when record hot temperatures struck during our stay.  The location itself is fantastic - being so close to Rotterdam Central Station meant we were close to the rest of the Netherlands and the rest of Europe via train.  And while the 3 flights of stairs to get into the place was a challenge in the beginning (and not recommended for everyone), by the end of our stay our cardio fitness was much improved!!!  Highly recommend this place if you are willing to walk up a lot of steps to get to a place…it’s worth the climb!!  And highly recommend Ingrid, whatever place she lists - she is a gem!

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is close to lots of things in central Rotterdam. Although the apartment is on a busy street, the bedroom is in the back and is quiet.

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments:
The house is way better than it looks like in the pictures! It's beautiful, spacious and very bright. The kitchen is well equipped and there's a very good American coffee!
Would love to go again!

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: We stayed in this lovely vintage home for a weekend and had a great time. The appartement is amazing and clean. The bed was also good. We were welcomed by Milou who’d made us fresh coffee and gave us some tips. The appartment is perfectly located in the city. We enjoyed breakfast across the street at lilith’s (tip!) and discovered the rest of the city by bike. Definitely would go to this apt again if we’d like to go to Rotterdam once more.

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: great location, super nice apartment with light coming from all parts which great, well stocked with everything you need if you cook and cozy balcony. way better than in the pictures. 11/10 overall

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: This place is beautiful, the character touches really stood out. Anyone who wants to have an exceptional time in Rotterdam should stay here. The location is fantastic and the views from this apartment were breathtaking.

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: Wonderfull, old Dutch apartment,  which the owners have restaurated and furnished with an obviously unique sense for interior design. We loved our stay in this tastefully decorated accommodation, which has everything to offer: it is within walking distance from the central station and has tram stops nearby, which makes it easily accessible. There are numerous stores, grocery stores (including bio health food supermarkets with organic food) and many cafes and restaurants with excellent food! On top of that it's centrally located,  yet quiet, with a balcony and trees towards the back. Our contact person was very nice and helpful,  and we will be more than happy to come and stay here again. Thank you so much for contributing to a great stay at Rotterdam!

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments: Eva’s place is wonderful! Perfectly located in the center of Rotterdam within walking distance of many things. The apartment is bright, spacious and full of charm. We stayed for 9 days and felt comfortable and completely at home. I couldn’t imagine a better way to visit Rotterdam! P.S. they have a mid-century coffee maker in their well equipped kitchen that is a marvel

name: Beautifull apartment centre Rotterdam
comments:
We loved our stay at Eva’s and Alexander’s flat. It is perfectly located in a area with nice shops, good restaurants and fancy street art. It is just a few minutes walk from the popular center, or the old neighborhood!
The flat is much better in reality, than in picture : wide and full of light. The decoration is really really nice. The equipments are perfect.
Eva and alexander leave us a note with adresses they like, we tried some of them, it was really good.
Perfect place to stay in Rotterdam, and our favorite since we start airbnb travels!

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: A lot of steep steps and doors do not lock, however a very cosy house and beautiful balcony and bed

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: My friends and I spent a wonderful weekend at Regina’s place.  Well decorated,  well located,  comfortable, peaceful, her apartment is an oasis for rest and relaxation and the roof top is just amazing. Surrounded with plants and flowers, we had very nice moments enjoying the view and sun. Perfect!

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments:
Regina's place is absolutely amazing. Great quiet neihboorhood within walking distance from Rotterdam Central Station.
The house is very spacious with 3 large bedrooms, shower room and 2 separate toilets. The stairs are steep but add to the charm; less-abled will not be able to manage though.
We were with 3 for business. Plenty working space available and great internet connection throughout the house, even on the balcony.
I highly recommend this place in Rotterdam and hope to come back again soon.

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: Highly recommend Regina's place.  The atmosphere is bright, filled with lovely objects and made very special by her wonderful aesthetic.  I would highly recommend.  The top floor with the outdoor terrace is absolutely exquisite.  The living-dining area is also large and comfortable and very pretty as well.   She supplied coffee, tea and all spices necessary for cooking.  Regina was extremely helpful with recommendations and was able to accommodate our extremely early arrival (6:45 am) with a smile.   We really appreciated that!  The stairs are a bit challenging.  There is no toilet on the top floor, so you must be able to negotiate the steep staircase even in the middle of the night.  I would have preferred another bathroom for six guests.  Other than that, it was ideal.  What you hope an Airbnb experience will be!  :->

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments:
It was a fabulous stay we had at Reginas apartment! The view from the roof top terrace is phantastic, the flat is stylish, clean, full of plants and lovely details. Kitchen full equiped and Regina herself an absolutely friendly, helpful and care taking host!
You have to be prepared for steep, dutch stairs, but as I said before: the roof terrace and the flat reward the climb! Thank you, Regina!

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: Regina’s place is spatious and light. Great bath, great terrace. My son could play in the very nice play garden which i could see from the terrace. Lovely!

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: Beautiful apartment, and amazing bedroom with a balcony. would definitely come back.

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments:
We had a wonderful four night stay in Regina’s beautiful home. It is so spacious, clean, light and in a great location. The kitchen is really well equipped and having access to a roof terrace at the top was an added bonus. Our 8 year old son loved the children’s play area just behind the apartment. The neighbourhood is very quiet and walkable from the centre, we felt very at home there.
A really great stay and we’d love to come back.
Thanks Emma, James and Oscar

name: Sunny house with a beautiful roof top terrace
comments: Feeling at home in a wonderful apartment.  Light, plants, space for every member of the family, even a roof garden …. Fantastic

name: MyCityLofts - Calypso
comments:
Calypso is a great place to stay. Apartment is bright and spacious and well equipped.
Check in and check out was well handled and convenient.
I thoroughly recommend this rental.

name: MyCityLofts - Calypso
comments: They don't own these apartments but act as agents for other owners.  The place we ended up in, (not the original one booked or alternative) was well located and good view, but so many things in the place don't work, some look like they have been that way for ever.  Not well equipped for much cooking,  including cooker hood not working which makes the whole place smell of whatever you cook. A number of lights didn't work (a mix of no bulbs or broken plugs) and no bedside tables nor bedside lights which is annoying.

name: MyCityLofts - Calypso
comments: Great location in central Rotterdam, nice apartment, the communication and in particular check-in were perfect. Furthermore, although not in the pictures, the apartment is on the 10th floor and there is a large balcony with a fantastic view of the city.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments:
5 stars appartment, clean, bright, large, confortable, views, great location
very kind owner

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Great flat,very recommended. Very spacious living room,full of sunlight. Great panoramic view of Rotterdam. Great connection to the center,either by walk,car or metro. Very clean,great kitchen and other rooms. Perfect contact with the owner. Could not ask for more.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: We loved staying in this apartment! It was very spacious, clean and had a luxurious feel to it. It's also very well located, close to the city center and public transit, but without the noise and busyness.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: This apartment was the best choice!! Clean, stylish, fantastic view & super friendly host.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Overall good. Expected more because of many good reviews. Did not see Serap throughout the entire stay. The apartment is very clean, however the espresso machine has waste water filled to the rims and stuck in a cleaning cycle when we arrived.  Serap did respond promptly to messages/call and we managed to complete a fake cleaning cycle.  This took a while. And with no kettle for heating water, we get hot water from espresso machine.  The bedroom is too bright to my liking. Basically at 6:00h I have difficulty to continue to sleep. The windows only have simple bind curtains that cannot really block light.  Other than that, the place is spacious, comfortable, and quite safe.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Very nice person, very friendly, thank you so much for making my stay in Rotterdam such a highlight :-)

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Serap's appartment is absolutely wonderful! Great location (in a trendy area), wonderful view and great design! One of my best airbnb experience! I strongly recommend Serap who is also a wonderful host, providing you with great local tips!

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Beautiful and spacious home! Very clean. First bedroom is large and beautiful but the second bed was a cot that rolled a little every time I turned while sleeping. Metro line is right across the street and the area is great! 5-10 mins to Market Hall in the heart of Rotterdam. Awesome location!

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments:
The apartment is very pretty, well maintained and nicely decorated. Well situated just few steps from Erasmus bridge and 20 minutes walking to the city center. It is located on the 6th floor: the sleeping room overlooks a canal so is very quiet(I sleep with open window).
Very clean and full of amenities. Serap got in contact all the time during our week stay. Check-in and check-out are very easy.
In front of flat there is a public parking from 6 pm to 9 am. Less than 10 minutes walking along the road trese is a big supermarket.
We didn't use public transportation but tram and underground are 400 mt far.
We recommend this flat.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments:
We went for New Year, which we didn't realise but it's a big thing in Rotterdam - insane fireworks which were very enjoyable (but you probably won't get to sleep until 1am so don't go for a quiet New Year's eve!). There was a huge firework display on the Erasmus Bridge, just round the corner from the flat (like London's) but we were in and settled by 11pm so though we couldn't see the bridge fireworks there were millions of other firework displays going off and the flat has huge windows so we just watched it all from home!
The flat itself is scrupulously clean, very stylish and very well equipped in terms of kitchen (but no toaster so we used oven grill for toast) . I probably could have cooked up a storm with all the equipment Serap has so it was great not to have that horrible thing of 2 pans and one potato peeler when you open the cupboards..... It had a posh integrated coffee maker which we were a bit scared to use but you wouldn't be if you used that sort of thing normally - we just boiled water in a pan for cuppas (no kettle - that isn't a criticism just letting people know). The open plan kitchen/diner was a pleasure to be in. The large windows add to the sense of space and make the flat very light. The netflix and large TV were much appreciated, and the wifi was excellent.
The bed in the double room was very comfortable and the shower was good, the bed in the single room was slightly disappointing - my daughter (16 and reasonably tall) was a bit too large for it and said it was more like a fold up camp bed which moved when she moved and wasn't very comfortable. All in all I'd say that the flat is a joy and a great base to explore from with the Tram and Tube just round the corner - the only slight downer was the single bed so probably best for a smaller child rather than an adult. Serap was a great host and though not there in person answered all our questions speedily and gave us useful local recommendations for food - I'd heartily recommend this flat and this host (and Rotterdam!)

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments:
A 2 min walk to the metro so great location but away from the centre so nice and quiet.
The living area is massive, cosey and with great views.
Damn comfy bed/mattresses, so slept like the dead.

name: Spacious two-story luxury app near Erasmus bridge
comments: Very kind host! Beautiful apartment with a nice view.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Patricia's place is cool and stylish and has everything you might need for a short stay in Rotterdam. It's about 10 min cycle from the town centre.  There are also trams and buses and metro.  Everything was fine except for some late night noise caused by other people in the building.  This kept us awake. Had we put earplugs in we would not have heard it.  Bike friendly - we were able to store our bikes inside.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Patricia's place was even better than we expected. We were staying there a few days for a friend's wedding. It is bright, sparkling clean, and filled with her own art and other beautiful personal touches. The green outdoor space is perfect for enjoying (on those rare days without rain), but even in the rain it adds to the charm of her place. You can clearly see that Patricia is an artist by the colorful decor and wonderful details, like the Art Deco stained glass window above the front door. The bath and kitchen features were top quality. Just as important, Patricia is an outstanding host who went above and beyond to help us. We arrived several hours late because of road accidents, but she was patient and welcoming when we finally arrived. We asked for help with a last-minute request for a wedding gift. She phoned a shop on our behalf to put a rare item on hold for us. That kind of generous hospitality is truly special and always appreciated. Patricia was  gracious, kind, calm, and helpful, which was exactly what we needed during a hectic time. I highly recommend this rental to anyone visiting the area. Patricia is a gem, just like her place!

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Patricia’s place was lovely - very cool studio with all you could ask for, nicely decorated and a very homely vibe. Kitchen was great and bathroom and shower were very clean. Patricia herself was really helpful, replies quickly, and was very friendly, I would definitely recommend staying at this place! One thing about the bikes - one of the bikes is slightly tall and someone under 5 ft 8 would struggle to ride it I believe

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments:
Art studio is a good description of this the place :) It is a cozy and spacious flat, with a small garden, therefore suitable particularly if you intend to spend some time in the flat, eg if you are not in town purely as a typical tourist.
It is clean, especially the bathroom was sparkling clean. That said, do not expect a sterile place: the garden is artsy in terms of cleanliness, and kitchen has quite some left over stuff of previous users (which I found useful, but as said, it is not sterile).
The location is as described, it is somewhat away from the centre; by bike the centre is some 15 minutes (bikes are provided); it is too far to walk. I got the impression that the place is in a suburb mostly populated with Polish expats, and a wider neighborhood also has a strong Muslim presence.
The bed was too soft, for my taste at least. The heating worked perfect. Proper coffee machine is a big plus. Parking on the street worked flawlessly for me.
Patricia is a pleasant host :)

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Das Loft ist zauberhaft eingerichtet, alles was man braucht ist da und die Fahrräder die man nutzen kann sind das absolute Highlight! Man ist schnell in der Stadt und kann Rotterdam in vollen Zügen genießen. Wie würden auf jeden Fall wieder kommen!

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Prachtig, ruim en schoon appartement. Het gebruik van de fietsen is echt van toegevoegde waarde, alle highlights van Rotterdam bevinden zich op fietsafstand.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Patricia's studio apartment is perfect for two people to enjoy a stay in Rotterdam. There are two bikes that can be used and my husband and I took them and rode in the underground tunnel (must try!) to the other side of the city. The garden is absolutely lovely and we enjoyed spending time there and chilling with her cats. Communication was great and Patricia was there to check us in. She gave us directions to a free parking street less then 10 mins walk from the house and also to a nice place for lunch ! Rotterdam is perfectly positioned and we used Patricia's place for day trips to the Hague and Delft. The studio was sparkling clean, bed was super comfy and he shower was brilliant! Cannot recommend this place enough ☺️

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Stunning studio, large open space with lots of natural light. Patricia was easy to contact and a great host who went above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed for our stay. Cannot fault our experience and highly recommend!

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Nice, clean, quiet and bright apartment in lovely Rotterdam.  Tram stop around the corner.  A cute garden visited by even cuter cats.  Patricia is a really nice person.  All communication was good and fast (for example there was a small problem with the heating system, but he fixed it immediately).  So the rest of the days were cozy and warm.  I would stay again. Thank you!

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Patricias place.  The bikes were an awesome addition, they  worked just fine for what we needed.  You do hear noise from the apartment above, but nothing outrageous.  We would stay here again if we return to Rotterdam.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments:
It was a bright, clean and large space. It was a quiet neighbourhood which was good.
Could have used a little more guidance on spots for an informal dinner.
Thanks Patricia.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Patricia apartment is in a lovely quiet street, it's spacious, comfortable and well equipped.  The location is well connected to the bus and tram system. Oude Charlois is a 10 min walk and well worth a visit.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments:
Für Katzenliebhaber ein Traum, die Nachbarskatzen sind unglaublich zutraulich und süß, eindeutig das Highlight der Wohnung.
Einziger Kritikpunkt die Wände/Böden sind sehr dünn, man hört jeden Schritt von oben laut und deutlich, ansonsten suuuper.

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: What a beautiful place to stay at Rotterdam!!! Access was easy, the hosts were friendly and responsive, they helped me right away with an issue at the entrance and with the heating. I did not have the time to enjoy the garden nor the bicycle, but the ambience was really great. I got lucky with sunny days so a lot of natural light entered the apartment. It was very clean, it had everything you might need in the kitchen and the coffee was great. I really felt like home immediately, the wifi was excellent and I was able to work really comfortably. The decoration was unique, I really loved it! I had an amazing two days stay there and totally recommend the Artist Studio! Thank you Patricia and Pauline for everything!

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: Spacious, calm and stylish apartment near Rotterdam Ahoy and Zuidplein. Lots of space, everything was very clean, the bed was large and comfortable. One of the highlights are the two bikes that can be used - a must to get around Rotterdam (and feel a little bit like a local).

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments:
Ricardo and I had a lovely time in Rotterdam, and really enjoyed our time in the city as well as at the apartment. It was clean, colourful and comfortable. There was plenty of space and a cute garden. Thank you very much!
There were a two things that didn't match the description in the listing:
- The bicycles were not fit for use (we were disappointed to find that they were very rusty, the seats couldn't be adjusted, they had no bells, and most crucially they had no brakes at all - therefore, we did not feel safe enough to use them);
- It is listed as a "loft" (i.e. top floor) but is actually on the ground floor (this wouldn't ordinarily be an issue, but there was quite a lot of noise disturbance early in the morning from above which affected our sleep, and most of the time movements in the upstairs flat could be heard very audibly downstairs - we weren't expecting anyone to be above us, so this was a surprise).

name: The Artist studio, 65m2, sunny garden & 2 bikes
comments: It was excactly like in the pictures. clean, tidy. had everything you needed. Balcony was very beautyful. Nice place to drink morning coffee. the only downside - the toilet floor was cold, a carpet would have been nice  or something. all-in-all recommend.

name: Central apartment with garden
comments: Evie's place is amazing. Better than you can see in the pictures actually. The space has a beautiful garden and the light is outstanding. The place has everything you might need during your stay. The location is also very good, hood quiet but near everything. The hots are super kind and were always available for any question. You will have a great stay here!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan were absolutely amazing. I truly felt like family! Their concern and generosity is beyond words. The views are spectacular....the metro and tram is just across the street and the room is so cute....you wanna stay there forever. Pan and Nico even gave me a gift when I left! Who does that?! When I forgot my passport in the closet, they both went beyond necessary to get it to me....and they still checked on me to make sure I made the flight. This place is highly recommended....more for the hosts😍

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico en zijn vrouw zijn ontzettend leuke en vriendelijke mensen. Er is hen niets teveel. Goede bedden, heerlijke douche en een ontzettend gaaf uitzicht. Let wel: zij zijn daar ook dus je deelt (behalve het kleine kamertje) de rest van het huis. Als je erg gesteld bent op eigen privacy dan adviseer ik je een andere plek. Maar als je van een leuk praatje houdt en hele prettige mensen wilt ontmoeten die jou een leuke tijd in Rotterdam willen geven, dan is this the place to be!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Truly amazing hosts in a beautiful apartment which is convenient to public transport, local stores and restaurants.  Pan's cooking is amazing, the home cooked Chinese dinner is unbelievable, the company and conversation great and more food than I could eat!  Their help, generosity, information, friendliness was outstanding.  I would HIGHLY recommend staying with Nico & Pan for anyone traveling to Rotterdam and wanting to stay in a fabulous house with gracious hosts. Their home is spotless, the room is directly opposite the stunning bathroom, has it's own door directly onto the viewing terrace, and they made me feel right at home in their kitchen. Thanks so much for an excellent stay in Rotterdam!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pam are very friendly and caring hosts, that made sure we had a comfortable stay in their beautiful home. The view IS amazing.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: The house is super clean and nice view. Convenient for travel around and a very nice host! Highly recommend!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are excellent hosts. The room was exactly as described. And the room was very spacious and comfortable, super clean and tidy. It’s room with beautiful view. The area is very quiet, close to the metro, I liked this place. I would gladly come back to this apartment when visiting Rotterdam again. I'm recommended this place to stay in Rotterdam. Thank you Nico!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are great hosts and really lovely people! They warmly welcomed me and my friend at their place, cooked delicious breakfast for us and explained the city. Their beautiful, clean and cozy apartment is very well located and has an amazing view to the whole city!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: A clean and tidy room with an amazing view. The room is small and too close to the living room but it is not an issue if you wake up early. The appartement is extremely modern.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Great, hospitable and friendly hosts, AMAZING view from the windows, good location not far from the city center. I would highly recommend the place.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: We had a great time in Nico and Pan's place: great location, gorgeous view over Rotterdam, very nice and welcoming people!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: I chose this airbnb for the location very near to my convention. However, it is right next to a metro station which is direct to Centraal Station and connections to anywhere else. Holland tends to have excellent public transport.  The room is  small, but there is a space outside then room where you can sit in front of the 18th floor picture windows that go all around the flat. The place has been refurbished with beasutiful modern fittings and appliances and a spacious floor plan. It is spotlessly clean. It is hard to imagine someone being disappointed. And of course Nico and his wife are great hosts, warm and friendly and very helpful.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Nico and Pan are the best hosts we have ever met! They were extremely hospitable and gave us some useful advice.
The house is very modern, charming and its views are spectacular. Moreover, the location is perfect and it has excellent connections.
Thanks to them, our stay in Rotterdam was unforgettable.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Thank you Nico and Pan for all the hospitality you gave to me during my stay at your apartment. You were real great hosts and I enjoyed every day being together with you. Thanks a lot for all your help, the many interesting conversations we had and not to forget the delicious breakfasts you shared with me on weekend.
I liked your modern and clean apartment and the outstanding view over the skyline of Rotterdam. All in all you made me feel very comfortable and I always would like to come back again, if I had the chance. I can highly recommend this apartement.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are very kind hosts and i would recommend their warm home to everyone. The house and room are beautiful, cosy and very clean. The view is amazing and the location is perfect. Would definitely stay here again.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are perfect hosts and it was a pleasure, to stay in their clean, modern apartment with this wonderful view over Rotterdam. Thank you for your very good advices, what to do in your spectacular city. You deserve 4 * for your AirBNB.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan were so gracious and kind during my stay. They provided a great breakfast on weekends and helped me find things to do locally. Their apartment has an amazing view. Highly recommend for the solo traveler who wants to interact with locals!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are warm hearted and give us lots of tips for the trip. We also talked about the differences all over the world. The house is very clean, modern and have the best view of the haven . In one word, it is an recommendale place to stay there overnight. 很赞的一家民宿。房东夫妇都很热情，会提供许多当地旅游的建议。

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: friendly host, great view, nice location, clean facilities, all is excellenct.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
I enjoyed my stay very much. The view is great, and the place is sparkling clean and functional.
The hosts were very pleasant.
I would recommend this place for people who enjoy interacting with the hosts. On the other hand, if you are looking for privacy, then I would recommend something else.
In my case it was just right.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Three nights in a very nice house and a breathtaking view.
Nico With Pan are the most lovely, very nice hostess with Metro station right outside the house.
Thanks!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Warm, welcoming and fantastic views. A diamond stay.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: This was my first experience on AirBnB and it was amazing. The room was small and cozy. The bathrooms were super clean and spacious which was perfect. The view as the name suggests was extraordinary. Nico and Pan were very warm and helpful. I would recommend staying here.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Wonderful hosts with a really cool place, and quite possibly one of the best views I've woken up to

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
it was the first time for me to use air bnb and i chose nico and pan place. and i was so glad with my choice. good location, clean, good view and they were so friendly.
and because i stayed there on weekend, they made the breakfast, we had it together and also talking about manythings😄
delicious breakfast and interesting discussion.
i'll be back for sure.
very recommended place to stay!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
We had amazing place to stay in Rotterdam. Nico and Pan are very nice and friendly, they really helped us especially when we had a problem with the bus timing to go to Rotterdam and they let use check in earlier. It’s really helping as we haven’t sleep.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are so kind! they made me feel very welcome. Friendly and happy to chat, but also respectful when you feel like just resting in your room. it's a small room but perfect for me as a solo traveler with a tiny desk, tall closet, kettle to make tea on your room and a chair to watch the amazing view. I used the place as a base to get to university. Awesome location to explore the 'kop van zuid' area with hotel New York, Katendrecht, the markets.. on foot. Also: excellent connection to central station. I recommend getting the donkey Republic app to rent a bicycle for getting around to the other parts of the city, they are usually directly around the building. The fact that they reserve place in the fridge and bathroom cabinet, and explain how the microwave works, really makes you feel that they welcome you to life alongside them. It was an exiting time with deadlines looming, but the happy couple made it to be a very pleasant smooth stay. lastly : the place is super clean!

PS. the loo seat is something else. Pan is very proud of it. 10 stars all the way. PPS. The hotel restaurant and bar next door had a terrible italian chef. He was an Italian but terrible cook.
