name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
First of all Nico and Pan were amazing! ☺️
they were both very friendly and helpful and I really appreciated that they were quite quiet the time I was around, even if i would have never asked them to be bc its their space after all.
The Room as well as the bathroom(s) are clean and u really have everything you need. there are some towels prepared for you and u are even able to use their shampoo and stuff, if you want to. You can also use the kitchen and got some space in refrigerator in case u need/want to storage something.
What makes this room so special is that you have the most amazing view of the Rotterdam skyline! it's breathtaking and I could have watched outside the window for hours.
it's perfect for solo travelers and I'm sure I will visit them again next time I be in Rotterdam ☺️🙏🌞.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Even though I only stayed for one night, they were super friendly and showed me around the place to familiarise with the basics. The view from the room is also very nice and enjoyable, especially if you plan to stay longer. Everything was super clean, which I really appreciate. They were very thoughtful too, excellent hosts.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are really lovely hosts. They are very friendly and helpful. Their place is super clean, the room has every comfort you need and the view over the city is really beautiful.  I highly recommend anyone to stay with them.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Everything just as promised. Really pleasant hosts with a beautiful home. Super easy to communicate with and be with. Beautiful views of Rotterdam, should not be missed !

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Perfect location and friendly hosts. The apartment was dry and warm, despite the rain. View from the balcony 💔.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: I am absolutely satisfied with my stay. Uncomplicated and flexible check-in, very clean apartment and great view.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: I really enjoyed my stay with Nico and Pan! Their warm welcome made me feel truly at home. The breathtaking view from the apartment was a gift, gazing at it while drinking your morning tea. Every detail was well taken care of, creating a comfortable environment. Thoughtful consideration is given to every aspect, and that made it an amazing experience for me as a guest.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
I recommended it 100%!. Both Niko and Pan were super nice and discreet. The room was lovely with a very nice view. The room also had a kettle with some coffee, tea and creamer if you like to make!. If I ever visit Rotterdam again I would definitely go for this place.
Thank you Niko&Pan for the hospitality🙏🏼.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Good place friendly people amazing view from the balcony

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: I strongly recommend Nico's place. The flat is conveniently located opposite a metro station. The place is clean. The room is good size. The bathroom is large with a spacious shower with plenty of water pressure and hot water. Nico is super friendly and always available to answer your questions and give recommendations. The view from the flat over Rotterdam is beautiful.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Really enjoyed my night at Nico's place and it was incredible value for money. The view from the room is amazing and he is super friendly and welcoming. The apartment provides you with a comfortable bed,  extremely modern bathroom and private toilet room, plus a large living area space where Nico is happy to chat with you and share stories. The fact that this is literally in the same building as the Art Hotel but a third of the price means it's a no brainer if you're looking for a cheap stay in Rotterdam close to a metro station for ease of transport!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: A small but cosy room with an amazing view, even with a rainy grey sky. Nico was also very flexible. In short, it was a very nice stay.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: This place is perfect for a solo traveler for a short stay. It is right across the street from a Metro station so you can get anywhere quickly and efficiently. The view can’t be beat! I appreciated the kettle in the room with makings for coffee and tea. The host was friendly and helpful. I recommend staying here when in Rotterdam.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: It was a really nice stay and the view is breathtaking. Niko and Pan were very helpful and friendly. I will definitely consider booking with them again next time I fly to the Netherlands.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Great view with kind, accomodating hosts who communicate well and clearly! Highly recommend!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Both hosts were very friendly, Nico met me at the door on the first night even though I arrived quite late due to flight times.
They were kind enough to invite me for a great breakfast on Sunday and share some stories.
Nico had a great local knowledge and is happy to share it with you if you ask.
The metro is a 1-2minute walk from the front door so getting into the city centre is easy but the walk is also manageable as I did this instead several times.
The listing is as mentioned, you are sharing their home and they keep to themselves. Free coffee provided and a great view from the balcony.
I would definitely recommend.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Had a great stay at Nico with Pan. Beautiful location. Very clean and comfortable and an amazing view. If you, like me, love skylines like Dubai or New York, Rotterdam is the Dutch city that comes closest! Really enjoyed my stay there. Highly recommend!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: very close to metro station. quiet and lovely neighbourhood. the landscape is wonderful from the balcony. ı have traveled for 13 years by airbnb. this place is the most beatifiul place ı have ever stay. nico is a kind talkative and helpful person. strongly recommend all travelers

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
I recently stayed at an Airbnb that exceeded all my expectations, and I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone looking for a memorable getaway.
The accommodation was beautifully decorated, combining modern amenities with a cozy atmosphere. The attention to detail was evident in every corner, making it feel like a home away from home. From the comfortable furnishings to the well-equipped kitchen, everything was thoughtfully arranged to ensure a pleasant stay.
One of the highlights of my visit was the breathtaking view from the windows and balcony. Whether it was the sunrise, sunset, or just the everyday scenery, the vistas were mesmerizing and provided a perfect backdrop for relaxation and reflection.
The host was incredibly welcoming and helpful, going above and beyond to make sure I had everything I needed. Their local tips and recommendations added a special touch to my visit, allowing me to explore hidden gems in the area that I wouldn't have found otherwise.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Perfect! Great location, lovely house & room, super clean and comfortable. And the best of all is the VIEW — When I arrived it was during sunset and the house offered a panoramic view of Rotterdam! Also, Nico is super nice and hospitable. Really thankful for the help he offered. Definitely recommend to other guests!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: nice view to the city, very near the the subway station.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
The room is small but very very nice and cozy, the apartment beautiful the best views in Rotherdam, the location just the perfect one, the metro and tram right down the building.
Quiet and nice neighborhood.
Shower and toilet modern and great.
The small table with tea bags and coffee ☕☕ in the bedroom is just excellent, the small cookies delicious.
The chair and small table outside in the balcony, you can sit and enjoy your coffee or tea. Nico and Pan great hosts.
I recommend this place, you won't be disappointed.
Thank you Nico and Pan.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: A place with truly stunning view over the river and the city in a small, but well organized and stocked room for a solo traveller with a comfy single bed. Nico and Pan were super welcoming, kind and always helpful. Overall a great experience and I will be sure to book again if I'm ever back in Rotterdam!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan were lovely hosts. They were so kind and friendly, and made me feel very welcome as a solo female traveler. Their home is gorgeous and the views of the city skyline are incredible. Great location right beside the metro stop too. Very good value for money. Great people and great apartment. 5 stars :)

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: a great place to stay the vew from the flat was spectacular the metro was across the street 15 mins to the centre of Rotherham very clean flat i would recommend it to anyone

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Their place was perfect. Strategic location and close to the train station. Their house is very clean and modern. What is even more amazing is the view from the balcony. I feel like I can see all of Rotterdam from their place. I celebrated New Year there, even from the apartment you will get an amazing view on New Year. Not to mention, they are very friendly and willing to help if we have difficulties. I highly recommend their place :))
Best Regards,
Hana

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Glad To had stayed at ur Apartment, in a very pleasant interior with a sensual view of the Haaven.
That home kept as in the pictures.
With satisfaction again gladly !
Especially friendly hosts Nico and Pan.
Best regards

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Very cozy Room with excellent views.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Great location and beautiful views from the balcony.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are very friendly hosts, they will make you feel at home and welcome upon arrival. Their home is very cozy and well decorated, with an amazing view of Rotterdam. I would definitely stay with them again if visiting Rotterdam.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: super friendly couple, apartment with incredible view

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
From easy check in, to picking up my bags later on the last day, my stay with Pan and Nico was brilliant. As a solo female traveller & my first time using Airbnb, it was strange at first, but within a day or two that feeling passed and I was just sharing a space with 2 lovely and accomodating people.
As I was trying to keep costs down on the trip I really appreciated a space in the fridge to store some basic things to make a sandwiches and some space in the freezer for a bag of ice for a cold drink at the end of the day, there are also lots of glasses, cutlery and dishware to use as well.
The separate showeroom and toilet (with bidet) were spotless. Shower was nice and hot with great water pressure and plenty of clean towels available
The bed was firm but comfy and spare warm blankets in a large wardrobe where the hairdryer is kept. It was a bit hot on my first night, but keeping the window open at night sorted that out.
And, the view? Absolutely brilliant, just like my stay ☺️

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: absolutely worth the money I paid and I would absolutely stay here again.  I wouldn't hesitate to recommend staying at Nico and pan's place.  The view is stunning and the accomodations are really nice.  You can tell Nico and Pan love hosting new people at their place.  I can't say enough about how lovely my stay was.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan are great! I felt at home straight away. They have an amazing view of Rotterdam, so great I spent at least 30 minutes sitting in front of it. There's a very nice Italian restaurant at the base of the building, serving decent pasta and fantastic desserts. The location is high energy, but the room in contrast, is tranquil. A great mix! I loved it.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: What a beautiful location in Rotterdam! The view from the balcony is spectacular. There is easy access to the Metro and other public transport. Nico and Pan were helpful and friendly. Highly recommend.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
Nico and Pan are absolutely beautiful people and equally wonderful hosts! (Must say Pan is incredibly kind and thoughtful and made me feel welcome the minute I arrived).
Can’t speak highly enough of their immaculate, stunning apartment either….photos definitely don’t do it justice as the panoramic views are unbeatable!
Guest bedroom is gorgeous too with plenty of space to move around freely. Also equipped with generous tea/coffee facilities as well as an ultra comfy bed. As a bonus, it has a delightful private balcony encompassing even more incredible views, (sunset was amazing). Bathroom with separate toilet are lux as well.
Another bonus is the location as only metres from public transport. Definitely 100% recommend.
PS. Thank you Nico for your recommendation to visit Delfshaven! A highlight for sure! Would stay with Nico and Pan again in a heartbeat!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Nico and Pan were very friendly, hospitable and accommodating. Their place is super clean with amazing views.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: The amazing views from the balcony were very memorable for evening sunset and morning sunrise

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: Excellent view from the balcony, adjacent to metro station makes it accessible through public transport. Absolutely recommended for solo travellers.

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments: The room is very nice and clean. The view from the balcony is great. Nico was very friendly. I had a great stay!

name: Room with the best view over the city skyline
comments:
It was a pleasant stay at Nico's place.
Very friendly and helpful host.
Nice view on Rotterdam.

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments: Fantastic spot in Rotterdam. Communication with Melle was easy and on point. Great loft. Very spacious, the loft even has a swing! Located directly by the water. It was nice to just go out the door and have a glass of wine by the water. Thank you for the great stay.

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments: This was one of my favourite Airbnb experiences. Melle's place is a tranquil and warmly decorated huge gallery space with ceilings of +4m high! And everything is there: hotel-like quality beds, hottub, additional studio for another couple and plenty of pretty views and comfortable seating areas spilled with art and design. We were there as a couple, but it easily fits six without giving up any privacy. The location is central, with harborview and a park on 5 minute distance. We'll definitely come again.

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments: Really unique place with great location. Lots of space and next to a quiet street.

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments: This spot was a 10 out of 10. A unique light filled space set next to a canal, the metro and an Albert Heijn (Dutch supermarket) in walking distance, and close enough to walk downtown to the museum park, the Erasmus brug and Hotel NY. Thank you for sharing your home!

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments:
Lots to enjoy at this space, would recommend!. Very unique and artistic converted factory space, perfect for a larger group (family of 6).
Coolhaven metro stop is very close-by, as is a newer residential community with a few restaurants and coffee, as well as the park. Very centrally located and short ~10 minute metro to many places and activities.
Key features include having the canal right out front to watch the boats go by, easy storage for bikes we rented in the foyer, and plenty of room for eating in or relaxing at the end of the day; and great natural light and artwork throughout the apartment. Our hosts welcomed us and gave us a tour, and were available during our stay to help out.
Thanks for a great stay!

name: Central 350m2/ 6p river side design apartment
comments: This was a large, slightly quirky, 3-bedroom apartment with a great location and views of the canal. The living space is huge. Coolhaven metro stop is close by. This means you have access to everything.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments: One of the Dutch architectural highlights, a must see for both Dutch and tourists visiting Rotterdam.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments: Very light rooms and a great opportunity to stay in this piece of architecture history.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments:
This place was amazing. Even better than visiting a tourist site is living in one! The place is minimally, but stylishly decorated and provides all needed amenities - even basics for cooking like oil, salt, pepper. The location is fantastic and secure as each individual room has its own key. I usually do not like to rent a room and share a space, but the other guests were all great and it had a very easy going vibe.
The location is excellent, across the street from Market Mall and the metro/tram station. The only issue I had was a glitchy internet connection that intermittently cut out and could not be remedied right away; however, Geert was quick to respond regarding the issue and give me an update.
Overall, the Cube House was very comfortable, fun, and a great introduction to Rotterdam.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments: Great spot to be for a night to explore Rotterdam. Clean and light.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments:
We were so curious to stay in the Cube! After arrival and unpacking we went for diner. Coming “home” and seeing the light litted, three pair of shoes in the hall suprised us. It seemed that three other parts/rooms were occupied by other guest. We didn’t know this and this was not clear to us while booking.
During the night, our bedroom next to the toilet, I hardly sleep because of other guest using the toilet. Apart from this all our curiousity of being in the Cube was satisfied, house was clean, nice welcome with Dutch stroopwafels and peppermint, fast response on question of Geert.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments:
For anyone in the slightest interested in architecture and/or design this is a must go to if you ever stay overnight in Rotterdam. This is one of the iconic cubic houses and in much better state and better decorated than #70 (open to the public). Plenty of light, spot on furniture, the tilted walls, it is all very special and remarkably comfortable. You immediately feel at home and are sad to leave so soon.
One the negative side just the fact that you are in the centre, and therefore subject to the fuss of a busy city. Neighbours are noisy and loud music entering the house from the outside goes late in the night and starts early in the morning. However, it isn't bad enough to prevent this place from getting the 5 stars.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments: How cool is it to stop in one of Rotterdam's cube houses.  These are crazy places and great for a short stay.  The accomodation is shared but that is ok as there are 2 showers and a large lounge as well as the 3 bedrooms.  Not many places like it in the world so we were delighted we could stay in it.  Glad I don't live in it though as probably just too wierd.

name: Iconic Cube House - Cloud Room
comments:
Enjoyed my stay for sure.
Had absolutely no privacy issues. Had access to a proper kitchen, vacuum cleaner, wash/dish machines etc.
People I shared the Cube was very friendly and respectful.
Definitely recommended.

name: Iconic Cube House - Tree Room
comments:
Easy to find and access, beautiful and very unusual house. We loved our room but there is no lock on the doors and the guests staying in the other room's kept getting confused with doors and entering our room until late in the night. Not suitable for privacy, no curtains on windows, the bathroom is super small and has to be shared between the 3 rooms.
Must be a much better experience if you rent the whole place, the architecture and the location are amazing and Geert is super nice.

name: Iconic Cube House - Tree Room
comments: Cool experience to see the inside of these iconic buildings. Place was simply but tastefully furnished, allowing the architecture itself to be the highlight. Clean, good communication with host and easy self check in.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: Private 3rd floor apartment with a great sauna and jacuzzi.  Nicely decorated and had plenty of great amenities.  Paul was a great host, and was very flexible letting us stay until my flight left in the evening.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments:
Review
I can see why Paul is a superhost, he went absolutely above and beyond for me and my mother as we came to Rotterdam for the first time ever. His hospitality and kindness was not just good qualities as a host but as a person.
The top floor and room we stayed in was lovely and cosy while being spacious and I will personally miss the bed because I had such good sleep every night we stayed for. The jacuzzi and sauna were very relaxing.
Anything we needed he helped us with and was very welcoming and open to us even though we missed our first flight. I will definitely be booking again when I visit Rotterdam again.
Thank you Paul!

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments:
Paul’s place is awesome! The private floor is perfect, and has cool features like a jacuzzi, sauna, private bathroom/shower, mini fridge, and nice decor. Paul thinks of everything: stocked mini fridge, directions for jacuzzi, meeting us at the door, etc. He is also very friendly and sociable!
The location is perfect, too: a quiet street that’s within a 25 min walk to the train station, and walking distance to many Rotterdam attractions.
One thing to note for those who get hot: there is no AC. But Paul does provide a fan! Overall, our stay was very memorable... in the best ways.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: Paul's loft was a wonderful olace to live. There's a lot of space and the Jacuzzi is a big highlight. Paul himself is one of the kindest persons I've ever met. In addition to that he is really caring. He's very very self-conscious, cares about organic products, green energy and cleans the streets in the morning volunteeringly. His loft has a good location to a good pricepoint. Primarily we didn't get the system of parking, but you can just ask Paul to register your "traffic sign" and it is not a expensive. The only two things to care about when deciding whether you want to rentthe appartement is that a) you have to be fit in walking difficult stairs to the 3rd floor and b) the bedroom has no A/C so we had like 30 degrees in there. But all in all wonderful appartement

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: This was one of the most relaxing airbnbs I have ever stayed in. The sauna and giant bath tub under the slanted window are a dream come true — to treat yourself after a long day of wandering Rotterdam. And the fridge provided some free fresh fruits and croissants to bake. Lovely stay!!!!

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: This 3rd floor loft accommodation is cute and good value. Be prepared to carry your bags up 3 flights of steep narrow stairs. The generous sized room has everything that you could want or need, plus the sauna and jacuzzi next door if you want it. Paul generously left lots of helpful foods, eggs, cheese, fruit, yoghurt, breads and an easy to use coffee machine. Great hot shower in room.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: We had a great stay and had everything we needed! In a great location and super easy to get to the centre either waking or by tram. We chose it over other slight more central accommodations because of the sauna and are glad we did as it was a super fun bonus to our trip! Paul was a great host and really quick to respond to us.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments:
Paul is great, very responsive. Offered us earlier check-in to drop our bags off. The Sauna and Jacuzzi bath were great after a long day out walking around. Clear instructions. It is equipped with Aircon. Easy check-out.
It is a rooftop room, there are a few flights of narrow stairs. Not recommended for people who can't climb them.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: Paul is very friendly and helpful. The place was clean and even provided breakfast, coffee, tea. However, there is no place to keep your clothes except for some chairs and you have to keep the blinds closed all the time since the neighbour‘s windows are right up to the airbnb‘s windows.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments:
We had a lovely stay!
Paul was a very helpful and caring host. Our privacy was respected at any time.
It was amazing to chill out in the sauna, while also being very well connected to the City Center.

name: Loft with private sauna and jacuzzi
comments: This was the perfect spot for staying in Rotterdam. We enjoyed the cebtral location amongst the terrific variety of restaurants + parks. It was very quiet inside and out. Had everything we needed and we were delighted with the helpful host. Will definitely book again when we are back

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments:
My staying experience was for the most amazing. I enjoyed spending time around the cozy and thoughtfully designed corners of the house and at my room looking at the great tilted view of the cubehouses' neighborhood. The facilities were perfectly clean an had almost all the comforts and the location was just perfect.
On the downside, the bad Internet connection and low temperature of my room (the sky room) during the night were 2 very inconvenient factors for me since I visited Rotterdam for work and I cought a really bad cold.
It's really a pity because, apart from these two factors, both the house, and the hospitality could have all the capacity of providing a great staying experience, which finally wasn't.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments:
First of all, Cube house was amazing space. Especially you can see beautiful sky and sunrise from windows of sky bed room, the top of the building.
It was unforgettable experience.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments: staying at the cube house is a cool experience. We stayed in the room at the top and it was amazing to have that view. The house has awesome architecture and its very clean. Towels, sheets and everything around the kitchen is provided. We shared the house with other people who were in other rooms. Everyone was respectful and friendly. Fully recommend it, especially also for the good location. Thank you!!

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments:
Hostel vibe. Bedrooms are big. Bathroom/toilet are joined into one room, they should really need an update. The rooftopbedroom where we stayed have no windowblinds so whenever the sun rises, so are you. And summertimes i can imagine it can be really hot in that bedroom.
The house is unique, really artistic build.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments: Fantastic place to stay. Located in the centre of the action with very unique rooms. We stayed in the sky room which had a beautiful view. It is very bright in the morning if you like to sleep in, choose another room.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments: It was so cool being able to stay in one of the cube houses! I hardly saw the other guests that I stayed with but they were all very nice as well. Super close to markthal and Rotterdam Blaak station so I recommend getting tickets to Blaak rather than Rotterdam Central. However, note that there are some stairs on the way to the house and narrow stairs inside as well so I recommend bringing a backpack or packing lightly if possible

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments:
The cube house it's a very nice stay. It was very easy to find and to check in and out.
The location it's great and the ambience in the house was also very nice and calm.
The only drawback was that, we got the uppermost room, and as other people have commented, it's very bright and there aren't any light blinds, so the sun may wake you up early in the morning.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments: We had an amazing stay! This airbnb is a destination in itself. Next to the airbnb, there is a cube house museum where people pay to go in but we get to STAY inside the cube house for the night!! It was in a great location and we can actually see the Markthal from our place. There are lots of cool bars next to us as well. The actual apartment itself has everything you need. We were able to cook for the evening and even had really delicious coffee in the morning (there is an expresso/coffee machine). Geert has been great to communicate with and was super helpful when we realized we left something behind. I highly recommend staying here! It's a once in a lifetime experience and one of the highlights of my trip.

name: Iconic Cube House - Sky Room
comments: The 'Kubus woning' is awesome. We've stayed in the top room of the cube. The cool thing about this room is the view of Rotterdam. Really cool. Only negative point is that there are no blinds. No window covers what so ever. Every person is supplied with a sleep mask. This came as a surprise to me. Other then that, our stay was great. Location, transport, restaurants and the house itself (Great price/quality )

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: This is a clean and practical two bedroom apartment in a central location in Rotterdam, with a nice view onto the canal. Everything was very accessible from where we stayed. We received a very warm welcome from our host and any queries or questions we had during our stay very promptly answered. There was no TV however this did not bother us as we were not in the apartment for long periods of time as I imagine will be the case for most visitors. We had a very pleasant stay in this apartment.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments:
I spent 5 days in Alet's apartment: the area is quiet and very characteristic, close to the canals and well served by public transport.
The house is very bright, with large windows and Alet offers its guests everything necessary for a comfortable and pleasant stay.
I will surely come back :)

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Really lovely apartment. Full kitchen, dining room and sitting room. You can hear the neighbors when they come home walking up their steps, but that was the only night time noise.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments:
This place is AMAZING! A truly authentic, large, clean place. Alet is very accommodating and quick with her replies. The location is great, 5 min walk from Delftshaven and 10 min from the Metro.
Great balcony to enjoy a drink and relax. Fully equipped kitchen, if you want to do your own cooking. Absolutely one of the beat airbnb’s I have stayed in.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Alet's place is excellent: a large apartment, nicely decorated and with a lot of personal touches; add to that large windows and a cozy balcony where you can enjoy a glass of wine or beer and you have it all!. It is also in one of the few historic areas remaining in Rotterdam. The area is full of restaurants and very lively. Alet is a great host, not intrusive (she lives on the floor below) but always available. I strongly recommend her and her apartment!

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Great flat  with good transport links . Flat was warm and comfortable with nice views of the canal. Alet is a welcoming host and we really enjoyed our stay.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: We loved our stay here. Such a gorgeous house, and next to the best part of Rotterdam (Delfshaven). Alet was a great host and made sure we had everything we need. Had some lovely nights just sitting in the main room overlooking the canal with a glass of wine. Highly recommended.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: alet‘s place is an authentic, privately owned apartment, close to the center of rotterdam. we loved it for the space, the tasteful furniture, the view on a canal and on the other side to the lively gardens and  neighbourhood. alet is a gifted artist and you see her artwork on the walls. the appartment is filled by daylight, there is sunset on one side and a nice balcony on the other. highly recommended if you want the non-commercial airbnb spirit like it was in the beginnings!

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Alets’ home was beyond our expectations. A gorgeous structure with cool style + vintage furniture. There was a huge map showing all the hot spots but take it from the host on where the locals hang in-between. Across the street from water and a historic part of town; we vote Alets’ spot much nicer than uptown where the hustle and bustle is. Would recommend for anyone and hoping to visit again on our next trip to Rotterdam.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: This apartment is lovely. Eclectically furnished, bright and airy, exactly as photographed. It is just over 30 minutes walk to the centre of Rotterdam and is in a quiet neighbourhood with shops and restaurants. We did not use public transport but it is near both the metro and tram stop. Alet is a welcoming host and there is everything you need as well as copious amounts of tourist information. I would definitely stay here again.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Wonderful place with a great view!

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments:

Throughout our stay Alet was responsive, friendly, helpful and extremely flexible making the stay stress-free. The apartment is in a good location just a short walk from the Metro, Delfshaven and a good sized Jumbo supermarket. Inside it was clean and has everything you need to do a bit of cooking, and we enjoyed sitting on the balcony watching the parakeets (which initially caused a major double-take...! had no idea these were common in the Netherlands)
If we return to Rotterdam we would definitely consider Alet's place again.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Spacious and nicely decorated flat, with character and retro features. The flat had a outdoor balcony overlooking the back gardens, a great place to relax in peace, the front room had big windows overlooking the canal. Kitchen is well equipped and the beds are comfy. Just over 30mins walk to the centre and a few mins to Defltshaven.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: nice place to stay...great light....big pretty views, quiet

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Alet was as nice and as helpful as could be.  The apartment was spacious and had nice views.  In the front you had a view of the canal and in the back there was a lot of greenery.  There were two problems we had while there.  One was weak wifi.  Alet was very surprised about this since she pays for the fast level of wifi.  The second was mosquitos in the apartment.  My husband and I were not bitten at all, but we saw them.  My adult daughter, on the other hand, was covered by bites and tormented with discomfort from them.  This problem may have been due to the heavy rain which happened during most of our stay there and maybe the proximity to the canal contributed.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven
comments: Great place to stay, quiet street with the city in easy walking distance.

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven

name: CHEZ ALET, Rotterdam centrum, Delfshaven

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
Gerdie and Donald are very welcoming, generous and attentive hosts. We felt very comfortable in their house.
They have a beautifully furnished and unique home- we directly fell in love with it! 🙂
We lived at the roof of the house which included a lovely living room, a bed room and a balcony. The living room is very cozy and well equipped with tea and coffee. From the bedroom we had a nice view to the city skyline and the beautifully decorated balcony. Everything was very clean and cozy.
We had nice conversations while drinking a glass of wine together. Gerdie and Donald gave us some inspiration for our weekend, explained how to use the city bikes and equipped us with maps.
Their house is located at noordereiland, which is a nice place to stay due to its quiet and peaceful environment. It took us 10-12 minutes by bike to the city centre..
We would have loved to stay longer and will definetly come back! :)

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view

Gerdie and Donald are very welcoming hosts who are endeavoured to recommend nice places in Rotterdam. It was nice to have some chats while drinking a cup of tea. At the same time we enjoyed the privacy we had in our two rooms at the top floor.
We loved the nice view on the skyline that we had in the bedroom, just as the cozy and well equipped living room in which we perfectly could study a little.
The living room offered an espresso-machine, a water boiler with tea, some cookies, a little fridge, a bottle of wine, everything you would need.
This time we didn't rend bikes but went to the city by foot which is totally fine (about 20 minutes).

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view

The bathroom was shared with Gerdie and her husband Donald, but it was very clean and comfortable -and most of all, really beautiful.
Gerdie is a great host, she is friendly and she perfectly knows when to be there for her guests and when to give them their privacy. The provided breakfast was delicious and more than enough. Gerdie really knew how to make us feel comfortable. She also informed us where to find the best places to eat or drink.

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
Gerdie was an attentive and caring host, and she met my girlfriend and I at check-in and helped carry our luggage up the many steep steps to the room. After chatting with us for a bit on the terrace, she booked reservations for us at a popular seafood restaurant down the road, and kept in touch throughout our stay.
The room was comfortable, and having the sink in the room was a convenient bonus. The charming terrace was a perfect spot to spend mornings and evenings, with a wonderful view and virtually no city noise.
The shared space next to the room has a lot of thoughtful amenities, though it is worth noting that it is shared with another guest. As Gerdie generally lives in another part of town given the pandemic situation, the upper floor did have somewhat of a hostel vibe, though while we didn’t run into any issues because of it, it is worth noting for expectations.
Gerdie’s hospitality was kind and thoughtful, the house was comfortable, and the location was perfect for peaceful, scenic walks along the water while still being close enough to the city center. Definitely recommend!

comments: Gerdie was the most perfect host. Donald and Gerdie really made our stay special and we felt very much like a home from home.   The terrace room is very special. comments: We really enjoyed our stay in Gerdie‘s terrace room. The view of the Rotterdam skyline is absolutely stunning! The house on Noordereiland is beautiful and charming and the furnishing is very tasteful. Gerdie is a cordial host with lots of useful tips on what to do in Rotterdam. Thank you for the good time we spent in your house Gerdie! 😊

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Great home to stay, quiet area, but still you are close to the center of Rotterdam. You need to climb quit some stairs to reach the top roof room, but worth the effort to have the great view of the skycrapers.

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
First things first, the view! Such a pretty view and you get to wake up to it every morning! Gerdie was extremely kind and was very flexible with my early check-in. The room is very nice; very calm, but it does get a tad bit warm. Thankfully there’s a mosquito net above the bed you can use if you want to crack the door at night. There’s also a sink in the room which I never realized was such a useful thing until now!
The only downside is that you have to go up 4 floors of stairs, but it’s not too big of a deal. I absolutely loved the place and would easily come back again if I ever find myself in Rotterdam!

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Nice and clean room on top floor. Charming house with steep stairs. Great views from the terrace. Gerdie was a friendly host. Location was good, peaceful neighbourhood.

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
I stayed at a room with rooftop terrace. It is amazing room, the other one offered is not so cute and comfortable. In my room I had a bid bed, a sink, a wardrobe, a table and a rooftop terrace with table and chairs and an amazing view. Near the room was a common room with a table, fridge, coffee, tea and snacks. Downstairs was a toilet and two floors down - a bathroom. If you travel with a large suitcase or have trouble using stairs this place is not for you — the stairs are really steep. The building is heritage, the area is quiet and a bit isolated, so sometimes you have to walk for 25-40 minutes to get somewhere.
The hosts are lovely people, very considerate and welcoming. Highly recommend and will stay again

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Very nice room with a stunning view, would come back any time :)

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Cosy room with breathtaking view of Rotterdam skyscrapers. Bathroom and common space are great and clean. Very well situated in the middle of the Rotterdam in a charming neighbourhood.

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Lovely host and beautiful Airbnb within walking distance of everything you need. Very cool pretty view from rooftop window. Must be gorgeous in the summer with the patio

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
+ nice room with a great View
+ Everything was really Clean
- too many rules und things to be observed
- the room was cold and the small heating did Not Work good enough
- Gerdie has not a good Feeling for privacy (she knocked at 23:30 at our door)

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: it was such a wonderful stay! My friend and me felt like home. Especially the view from the bed…wow. Everything was clean. Gerdie & her husband are very nice people. We got tips from her where we could eat (& it was the best pizza!) - also very helpful with finding the way to the city etc. Definetly recommend & i‘ll be visiting again!

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
We had a great stay at Gerdie's place!
We really enjoyed the unique location on this island, the room is lovely and the terrace is so nice (with the view on the City Center skyline and on the bridge).
Gerdie was very nice and helpful during our stay.
We strongly recommend this place!

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments:
It was a great place to stay! Loved the terrasse and staying on the island in the heart of Rotterdam. The curtains are very good at keeping out the light, especially for the summer months.
Gerdie was a lovely host!

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: Gerdie was welcoming and helpful. The city skyline view from the room was  great. The bed was extremely comfortable. Everything was just perfect!

name: Room and roof terrace with a stunning skyline-view
comments: The room was lovely with a beautiful patio and gorgeous views day and night.    The stairs were a bit steep and there are several flights but it was worth it.   There is a separate shared kitchen and bathrooms but it was not a problem and they were beautifully remodeled.   We rented bikes for our stay and rode everywhere which was fun.

name: Private apartment in city center
comments: The house was big, clean and bright. The location is optimal. It close to main interesting points and to nice bars. I will reccomend It to friends!

name: Private apartment in city center
comments: Fantastic location... Walking distance to all the action but on a quiet street.

name: Private apartment in city center
comments: Tim and Bas' place was really lovely. It looks even better in real life than the pics. Lovely ground floor house with an arty feel, and a nice outdoor area to sit and have breakfast. It is also in a fantastic location, a quiet street off a really nice and fun main road with lots of cafes and bars. Highly recommend!

name: Private apartment in city center
comments: Our stay at Tim's flat was really nice. The location is perfect to visit the city, close to shops, central station, and museums. The large windows of the flat are a real asset of this place, which I recommend !

name: Lovely appartment in Rotterdam City Center
comments:
A top-notch location. You can have a different taste in interior design or require some specific amenities, but you can't argue this place has a perfect location.
Only five minutes walk and you're in the center of the city with of its museums, shops, restaurants, and bars. Ten minutes in a bit different direction, and here is the waterfront with plenty of space to enjoy the view and relax. The main railway station is only 20 minute away by foot, or less than 10 on a tram. Amazing.
Also keep in mind that this flat is located in an older house and it has some imperfections. But if you can live with that, if you're coming to Rotterdam to experience the city, and not just one flat, you can't pick a better option.

name: Lovely appartment in Rotterdam City Center
comments:
The house amenities were not ok ( the dishes were all with missing parts and broken), the dishwasher was not working and during the 47 days of the rent she wasn’t willing to fix it or replace it.
The lights in the bathroom weren’t working when we moved in but she managed to send someone to fix them as well as the door handler.
The house wasn’t properly cleaned.
Also the towels and bedsheets were very old and not properly serviced.
Also the electric cook top was broken and difficult to use.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Perfect location if you want to explore Rotterdam ! 2 mins from centraal station and beautiful surroundings. Lovely little studio, we were so excited when we arrived there was cute fairy lights it felt incredibly homely. Amazing hospitality, our flight was delayed yet Hester met us at the station and had huge plate of leftover pasta waiting for us which was perfect after our journey. Would love to come back to Hester and Alex's tiny studio !

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Klein maar heel fijn, slim ingericht en gezellig. Ideaal gelegen op loopafstand van centrum en station. Het grote daklicht voegt veel toe en maakt de studio lekker licht. Fijn wakker worden met zicht op de wolken. De eigen ingang is heel prettig. Veel privacy, en steeds snelle en leuke reactie van Hester op berichtjes. Echt zeer aan te bevelen.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: I really enjoyed my stay! The place was clean, quiet and extremely well located. It was also very well lit with a lot of natural lighting. The communication and the check in and check out process was really easy! I definitely recommend staying here when in rotterdam.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Excellent studio right across the street from the train station. The space is enough for 1-2 people and it's great that there's also a nice terrace in the backyard.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
The Tiny Studio was a real find! Less than five minutes from the central station, you have easy access to train, metro, bus and tram (light rail). You also find many convenient eateries in the station’s concourse.
The studio has its own private entrance on a quiet street in a very green neighborhood . And tiny as it may be, it was very cleverly conceived and contains everything you might ever need.
First-time visitors to Rotterdam will appreciate the extensive tourist information about the city.
Hester was an excellent host. She always responded quickly to our inquiries and she even met us at the station upon arrival.
Truly a place to remember!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: So far the best stay in the Netherlands! The studio is clean and bright, and it's equipped with everything you need. Hester is a very nice and helpful host who tried her best to take care of everything. Will return for sure!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Great location, close to public transportation, grocery, cafes, and points of interest. Hester and Alex have collected different pamphlets, books and maps to help you make decisions of where to eat and what to see.  The tiny studio is bright, cute, and comfy.  You’ll enjoy your stay.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Dit is een bijzonder adresje. De studio is ieniemienie klein maar er is alles wat je nodig zou kunnen hebben.
Er is een aparte ingang waardoor je heel veel privacy hebt.
De locatie is super. Op 400m van het station maar toch in een mooie rustige woonwijk met prachtige huizen en veel groen.
Wij komen super graag terug. Alleen de minder goede matrassen geven nog wat twijfel.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: This beautiful tiny studio apartment was well equipped, and had a beautiful roof window, which gave the room plenty of light. This made the place feel spacious. The location is perfect as it is a 2 min walk from the central station :)

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: The small studio is very sweet & nice and located perfectly  near centre of Rotterdam. After a short walk you find a lot of restaurants in the near neighborhood and the City Centre of Rotterdam is a 10min walk away. The appartment is superclean and - although it’s small - has some clever details. We especially liked the big panorama window, where you can see the stars at night. The appartment has also a small terrace. Hester prepared lots of broschures and information/travelguides in the studio for her guests. We had dinner at one of the recommended restaurants on the first evening... was perfect! Its a very quiet area and you won’t hear any noise at night. Thanks a lot for your hospitality, Hester. Would love to come back!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: The Tiny Studio was indeed what it said it was, a tiny studio but it was oh so well thought out, and Hester and Alex had really made the most of the small space, so it included everything you needed. It seemed light and bright whilst not being cold and sterile, it was comfortable, clean and had really nice touches like the welcome drink,  eye masks and plenty of city information to read. The location was fantastic, really close (3 minutes walk) from the back of Rotterdam station in a quiet neighbourhood with several nice restaurants and bars very close by (we particularly liked 'Blij'). The value was really good for Rotterdam and in such a central location. They were accommodating of our check in time, very fast in replying to messages and the check in process was very efficient which we appreciated so we could make the most of our time in Rotterdam. We very much enjoyed our stay here and would stay again. Thanks Hester and Alex

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Prompt responses to emails. Owners live across their garden, who are friendly and approachable. It’s a “tiny studio” but excellent use of space, bright and airy. A few minutes walk from Rotterdam Centraal station.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Was Very well located for me. The loft is not attached to the main house, so it definitely has a lot of privacy. Was also very fun to leave the loft and be directly in the city 😁

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: This is a perfect place to stay in Rotterdam. The studio is located on a lovely residential street with a very short walk to the central station. The area feels really safe, even late at night. There are several shops, cafes and supermarket close by. The studio has everything you'd need and is very clean and comfortable. Hester and Alex were very quick to respond and accommodated my late arrival. I would definitely stay here again if and when I come back to Rotterdam!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Wonderful location.  Short walk from the Central Station, trams, metro and buses, yet on a peaceful residential street.  The space is very quiet, private and compact.  Kitchen was well equipped.  Grocery store nearby.  Handy extras such as shopping bag, guidebooks, umbrellas, etc.  We enjoyed staying there.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: A tiny but very cosy and bright appartement, very well situated, few steps next to the train station. The host was super kind and welcoming!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: I had a great stay in the studio - the location is perfect for exploring Rotterdam yet quiet in the evenings. The studio has a lot of beautiful natural light and is a nice, cosy space, perfect for a solo traveller.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Thank you Hester and Alex, your tiny studio was perfectly placed for our activities and had everything  in a bright yet compact space. The mattresses were just right for us which is important and you had lots of hooks etc to hang things on...not everyone considers this. We enjoyed our stay there and the lovely,  lively city of Rotterdam. We would recommend your studio to anyone visiting this area.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Can really recommend this lovely place!!! The title doesn't lie, it is tinny, but almost any comfort is foreseen! So no feelings of deprivation ;-). Also very well located close to station and bus park, and in a lovely part of Rotterdam. Make really time to visit that neighborhood as well!
The place is very clean and tidy with a cozy furnishing.
And not to forget the ease of communication with the hosts, their flexibility and gentleness. No bad words for this place!!! Just a tiny (;-)) for those who are sensitive to light: bring an eye-mask cause it might be to clear in the room to sleep.
I like to discover new spots, but this one is a real temptation for not choosing twice the same location ;-)

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Very cute little studio. The roof window is exceptionally lovely! Nicely located 2 min to the main railway station.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Tiny studio is a cute and pleasant experience for light travellers. Don't be fooled by the name, because it has everything you need in it. The glass ceiling gives an even more cozy feeling to the place. Unfortunately we couldn't meet physically, but we felt the warmth through the quick responses and special touches prepared for us. Thankful for having us!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Hester & Alex mini apartment is a delight!
The location is super central. The tiny-apartment is clean, well decorated and very conveniently. It's weird because you don't feel like you're in a huge city when you're inside the apartment, it's an oase.
We would go back! :)

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: The location is very convenient to the train station and central Rotterdam, and the studio is very clean and well equipped. There is a lot of light, with a skylight window. Hester and Alex are very prompt and courteous and we had no problem checking in and out. The studio is cute and comfortable and would have been perfect except it was quite cold (in January) with only a space heater and thin blankets, and the bathroom sink is very small and has no hot water. Not their fault, just the nature of the place. I highly recommend this studio but it is very very tiny!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
GREAT STAY! We highly recommend this place, very well-arranged and convenient for two people. Our hosts were very flexible and wrote back almost instantly to our messages, plus they were welcoming.
As specified, the garden is not for the guests’ use but we could enjoy the chairs on the street side. We did picnic along the canal right around the corner, which is perfect for a summer night! Wifi is helpful but sometimes unstable so don’t rely 100% on it if you are a digital nomad.
Finally, all sanitary measures were respected and we felt very safe during our stay (cf. Covid-19).
Overall, first time and great time in Rotterdam!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Wonderful communication with the hosts, they were very open and nice.
A great place where to spend the nights and during the day go explore the surroundings. There was a comprehensive folder of information about nearby cafes, food places, shopping, and cultural events in the place, and the room, even though small, didn't seem that small because it is very light due to the huge and amazing window in the ceiling!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
In case you are travelling to Rotterdam and want a cozy place with friendly and accommodating hosts this might be the perfect place for you.
The study is true to the description (so yes, small) and has everything to offer one needs in a very small space. I would recommend it especially for stays of a few days if you know that you get along well in close proximity ;)
The kitchen hast pretty much everything one could need and already had several things for our use (oil, vinegar, coffee, spices, ...) so we could cook great meals.
The bed is comfortable and enough sockets for all the technology one could bring. We loved the skylight which made sure that the appartment was very light, even in the greatest downpours.
Furthermore the location is super comfortable. In a very beautiful area of Rotterdam, quiet, close to the cetral trainstation, close Cafés/Parks and Pubs.... what do you want more?
Lastly Hester and Alex were very friendly, easy to contact and immediatly there if any help was needed. Thank you so much for our great stay!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Tiny Studio, massive impression.
We have been very lucky with Airbnb so far and when we restarted our travels after the pandemic, Hester & Alex’s Tiny Studio confirmed our belief. A very cosy, stylish and (more than) well-equipped studio, Tiny Studio is a perfect place to stay in Rotterdam. We love the thoughts and care the hosts put into making this small space a home away from home for the guests – the compact yet complete kitchen with 2 induction cooking plates and different food supplies, the comprehensive information folder and maps, the shopping bags, the first-aid kit, extra heater for colder days, and many more. Hester was nice and courteous and the communication was fast and efficient. Even though the Tiny Studio is right in the host’s backyard but guests are left alone and do not feel they are intruded or intruding in the hosts’ space. The location couldn’t be better: Only a 2 minutes’ walk to Centraal Train Station where you can take the trains to many different towns for day trips, and a walking distance to most of the attractions in Rotterdam. We came with rains and miserable weather but the huge skylight window and the extra heater thoughtfully supplied keep the place bright and cosy.
We will definitely stay here again the next time we come back to Rotterdam.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: As someone has already pointed out, you really need to get on well with the person you share Tiny Studio with!  That said, it's also very cosy and romantic and lovely to come back to after trekking around the city.  We were there in the winter and really appreciated the warmth but I imagine it's lovely in summer also, being on a very quiet street near the canal. We were grateful for the thoughtful provision of basic groceries like coffee, tea, salt and pepper etc.  This place is excellent value for money and we definitely hope to stay there on our next visit.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
This Tiny Studio is a cosy, wholesomr & extremely central place to be in Rotterdam.
Ideal for two people, and a perfect starting point to explore the city since you can walk anywhere! The communication with the hosts was also easy, friendly and clear. Also, the skylight surprised us. 🌙
Overall, highly recommendable!
Dankjewel, Hester & Alex! 🌞

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
The tiny studio is perfect for 1-2 people. It has everything you could need in a small cute and cosy space! It is also located 2 mins from Rotterdam central station and approximately 15-20 mins by foot to Rotterdam city center. Many shops, restaurants and supermarkets are located in 5 mins walking distance.
The open glass rooftop and big windows contributed to a bright space! I would definitely recommend.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
It is a very central (few minute walk from the train station) small self contained apartment. perfect for a few days visiting people or being a tourist. It has everything you need and is right in the centre. There can be noises associated with that in the night but on the whole it was quite quiet There is a food shop on the corner a minute away and plenty of greenspace around.
Communications from Hester and Alex were clear and response times good.
I would stay here again.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Tiny as the name suggests, the studio is charming and cozy. Conveniently located very near the central station. The road leading to the studio, right along a picturesque riverbank, is easy to roll your suitcases on. Shopping and restaurants are within a few minutes walk.
Obviously the tight space does require one to be a bit more creative in doing things that can be done easily in a bigger space. Very well equipped: iron and ironing board, portable heater, double burners for cooking, and ample of crockeries and utensils. Hester and Alex have thought of it all.
One thing to note: the main entrance is the one that leads directly to the street; and not the one that leads into the patio (as depicted in one of the photos). So street sound does get into the room easily. And the studio's window faces the host's living room a short distance away on the other side of the patio, so the blind needs to be down most time to create a bit more privacy. The skylight features however creates ample of light for the room.
All the same a great experience.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Amazing air bnb! Hester and Alex were extreamly welcoming and kind, and made sure everything was going well. The location was excellent, a few minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal and near other acrivities like coffee shops, movie theatre, shopping streets and restaurants. There is also a beautiful river and a small park next to the bnb, and the walk to the city centre is about 15 minutes. The air bnb itself is small and cozy, with all the necesities you would need for your stay!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Tiny, bright, well-organized studio a couple blocks from Rotterdam central. Comfy beds and easy check-in. Highly recommended!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Such a wonderful location with wonderful hosts! This tiny home is perfect for 1-2 people seeking some privacy in Rotterdam. Very close to the city center/Centraal station in a peaceful neighborhood. Hester and Alex are such thoughtful hosts, willing to help you with whatever you may need. Very accommodating. I hope to return when in Rotterdam.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Ein wunderschönes Wochenende in einer tollen Stadt. Architektur, Kultur und Kulinarik. Und als Highlight das wunderschöne Apartment von Hester und Alex: zentral, kompakt und ruhig, wir werden wieder kommen!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: All was great. The place is next to the train station but it is very calm and the view is beautiful around.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
Located in a beautiful, surprisingly green, leafy area offering great cafés and restaurants, with the bonus of being super handy for the station.
Light, Bijou studio with all amenities, plus I particularly appreciated the reference literature I used to plan my time exploring this cool city.
Dankjewel! I’d happily return to see more next time.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
very lovely studio, we like it very much
near from central station, 1 munite walk, easy to find, and quiet residence area, safety
room is compact and comfortable, you can find anything you need
most attractive is there are 3 windows, and one of them is skylight window, it is so good!
there are 2 supermarkets near from studio, very convenient

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Our stay with Hester & Alex didn’t disappoint! The place was very easy to find and a short distance from Rotterdam Centraal station. We had a simple check in and felt very at home. The place is small, but the perfect size for a short stay in Rotterdam. The personal touches such as recommendations highlighted in the guide books definitely made us want to stay an extra night!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Everything was perfect, the studio is really nice and cozy, full of light and has got everything you need. Its in the perfect location really close to the central train station and the city center itself, but at the same time its quiet and nice area. Thank you!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: A cute apartment with absolutely everything you need for a short stay. Fantastic location in a leafy residential street near the canal and a few minutes walk from central station. Loved the enormous skylight with view of the stars! Altogether an excellent option for the city centre.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: My husband and I spent a few days in the apartment and despite the terrible weather    outside (our daughter says it's always like that here:) we have good memories of our stay.  We liked a few things very much: independent entrance to the studio, excellent lighting (very efficient skylight in the ceiling), warmth despite the November weather.  We appreciate the owners' efforts to create an aesthetic, cozy and functional place.  If we add the fantastic location, all we can do is thank you for a nice stay.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
We had a wonderful stay at Hester and Alex's place. The location is perfect as it is located right next to Central Station, yet on the quieter and more residential side which offers picturesque views.
The studio was small and cozy, but it had everything we needed for our four-night stay in Rotterdam.
Upon our arrival, co-host Michiel greeted us to show us around which was greatly appreciated. Michiel even arranged for bike rentals and dropped them off outside the studio.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Perfect location! Close to the train station, but still quiet street.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
The location is good. Super close to the main train station, around 20 mins to the centre, 15 mins to some nice cafes and restaurants in the Noord neighbourhood. The street is pretty, a stones throw from the lovely canal area. Easy check in.
I was disappointed with the property itself and was glad to leave. The photos must be fairly old so don’t, in my opinion, reflect the current ‘well used’ condition, damp etc. The property wasn’t clean enough when I checked in.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Great place with great ambience. Very short trip to rotterdam central with good connections to the entire city. Amazing skylight could even see stars while sleeping!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
my second stay here, everything was excellent again. really well appointed for such a small space, great communication. Incredible location. Highly recommended!
(a note to those susceptible to mosquito bites, I left the window open overnight and was bitten very badly. I'll use the fan provided next time!)

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: It may be small, but it is conveniently located next to the train station, which is a must for travelers. Additionally, the place has a clear roof, allowing for natural lighting. Lastly, all basic cooking amenities were kindly provided. I recommend stopping by!

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: This place is really small in a way that photos can not give back. And it's really cozy and very welcoming. enjoyed our stay here very much. The roof window is great. We found a small bottle of wine upon arrival, the kitchen is tiny, but you have the basic things: some teabags, olive oil, salt, pepper.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments:
The stay went very well, the accommodation is very functional and bright,
there is all the necessary equipment, exchanges with Hester & Alex were very cordial,
They were very accommodating and responsive to respond to a specific situation.

name: Private Tiny Studio in Central District near C.S.
comments: Excellent location right in the middle of Rotterdam in a quiet street next to a canal. The small studio is very bright and had everything we needed for a short visit.

name: Group accommodation Rooms on Water
comments: I brought a group of ten to stay here for a nonprofit board retreat/meeting. The space was perfect for both meetings and relaxing. Rooms and common areas are just as pictured-fresh, clean, stylish. Small things like having plenty of dishes, glasses, silverware, and coffee carafes made our time so easy here. Bedrooms with en suite provided plenty of privacy. Evenings and mornings on the boat deck were so special with views of the Martime Museum. I’d highly recommend this space and would gladly stay here again.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Lovely flat with a nice view!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Charming apartment with lovely bright living room and cute furniture, modern sparkling bathroom, and a convenient tea selection :) there isn't kitchen access as far as I know so be prepared! The area is scenic and quiet but takes a bit of walking (two bridges) to get to Rotterdam Central.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Caspar's place is in a great location with cool views of the water. We stayed here two nights and wandering into Rotterdam was not difficult. Parking was always available. Check in and check out were easy with good communication.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Caspar's place is large and can easily accommodate a group of people. It is beautifully furnished and very comfortable. The place is very clean with many sofas and beds plus a great view on Rotterdam bridge. The only drawback is that the WiFi is very slow. You can reach it comfortably by bus. The nearest metro is 10-15min walking time away.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
Casper's place is spacious with great river view, the location is great as well!
The communication with Casper was easy!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
Communication was fast and easy with Caspar. Welcome words by his partner were very warm and appreciated. They live in the same house but grant you privacy. We do understand their demand for respecting the house and the neighborhood. The beds are on the third floor. So you need to be able to climb the (steep) stairs with your luggage. There was ample free parking space on our arrival (noon) opposite the house. Later that evening we still spotted open spots in the neighborhood. The neighborhood is clean and calm. We could easily sleep with open windows on a warm night. We started out doing things on foot. Count on around 20 minutes-30 minutes on foot to the nearest big attraction 'Markthal'. Later on we used Mobike to rent bicycles (1 euro for 20 minutes, which was also around the longest single ride we did). As you need to install the app (1 mobile device/app per bike) and top it up with money (creditcard, min 5 euro) it could be a good idea to do it beforehand. Not the best possible bikes (somewhat stiff) but still convenient. The app points out where to find available bikes.
We were only three people and only here for one night so we did not use all possibilities (sitting room with coffee and tea maker, a lot of beds). Sleeping quality was good. There is a supermarket (Spar) on the island. For a proper breakfast (we went to Koekela and enjoyed it) you probably have to walk cycle (Koekela, or nearby Vlaamsch Broodhuys around 15 minutes bike ride). Recommended for calm location (with front view on the water, Erasmusbridge) and warmth of the hostess.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: We had a very pleasant stay at Casper's and he is a very good host. It's a relaxed, very quiet and cosy period apartment.  Plenty of space and room to breath with large window water views.  There are the customary stairs, typical of period houses in Holland.  It would suit large groups very well.  All amenities were as listed wifi etc and clean.   We walked everywhere from the island which for us was fine.  If you have your own transport or bikes then this would be an excellent stay if walking was not your thing.  There's more than enough friendly local facilities nearby.  I would highly recommend this stay.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Great location to explore Rotterdam. Quiet, spacious place with a lovely view of some Rotterdam land marks. Very friendly host.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Very spacious rooms, nice location and friendly hosts. Nice view over the Maas.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: What a beautiful place and beautiful kind people! Caspar and his wife were nice and helpful with many tips. I would return at any time when visit Rotterdam again. Amazing view!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Overall a good place to stay. Located in the heart of Rotterdam. Great home, sort of vintage with free parking. The couple of negatives are that there is no private entrance and despite the host listing that there are 2 separate bedrooms, the host only opened one for us as we were 3. He should have been more polite to ask if we need another room or not. I also don’t like when host points out that we have to ensure that the ‘house is as clean as we received it’, it obviously doesn’t happen as we can’t sweep of dust etc. hence it looks a bit rude and inappropriate but I guess the Dutch are more direct and can come across a bit rude but I can’t take away from the good experience I had there. It’s a good deal overall. Pretty amazing view of the city

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: The appartement and the view is beautiful !

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
Very nice and spacious place. Love the balcony and terrace.
