name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Casper's place is really nice and I would recommend anyone to stay there. I extended my stay, which is why I am reviewing the place twice.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: It was a very stylish vintage house; located in the heart of the city; with a nice river view. It was clean and it included all the basics we needed. Caspar was very nice and helpful.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Great location with perfect view, yet very calm and very clean. Very friendly reception; uncomplicated key pick-up & drop-off. The place was equipped with everything we needed for a great weekend with our three daughters. We will come again.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Nice building, great view to the Maas, sunny living room in the morning. Very steep stairs. Living room and kitchen was shared.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: We had a great time at Caspar's place, it's a beautiful house in a great location with a view on the river! Caspar was really helpful, all my questions were asnwered within an hour and the lovely Cobi explained everything when we arrived. Really great experience!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: This was a beautiful apartment with a fantastic view! I would highly recommend!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: The whole place was spotless and well-maintained. The building is impressive, and Cobi was a very pleasant host. The view from the living room is also stunning. The area is not well connected to the city, so a lot of walking is involved. Also be warned that you will climb high stairs to the 3rd floor. Overall, I liked the rooms but having the toilet on a different floor was not cool in the middle of the night.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: We were welcomed by Cobi, who managed to squeeze in an early drop-off of bags, which was very helpful. The apartment is spacious and pleasant, although (like most Dutch apartments!) not equipped for a heatwave. The three separate bedrooms on the top floor can fit a lot of people, on the floor below is a kitchen, bathroom, large living room, and balcony.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
The apartment is very comfortable and nicely decorated and equipped with what we needed. Caspar is a very nice host and easy to communicate with.
The view from the apartment is really great on the river and the Erasmus bridge.
It is located on the Noordereiland which is a very quiet and peaceful neighborhood connected with the rest of Rotterdam with 2 bridges. However keep in mind that a bit of walking is needed to get to the city center with limited public transportation available.
Overall we were very happy with our stay and recommend this apartment willing to visit Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
Historical building in central but calm location with friendly hosts. In contrast to the other apartments we stayed in in the Netherlands this one was less nicely furnished. We would have appreciated a lock at the bedroom door to feel a bit safer.
Great view out of the living room!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Caspar is an incredible host, super friendly and always willing to help us. The house was built in 1900 and the atmosphere is fantastic, with amazing view to the canal.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments:
Beautiful light and roomy clean home with a lovely view over the river and balcony facing east - ideal for having breakfast! Comfortable bed, but keep in mind there's only single beds here. I stayed in this place on my own as the other rooms were not rented out, however there is only one bathroom with double shower and a separate toilet so might be a squeeze sharing with others. I believe the max tenants this house can have is 6. The home itself is 2 floors up, and bedrooms are on the 3rd floor. Steep staircases in between so be careful ;)
Getting to this home is very easy from Rotterdam Central station (15 mins by bike, 10 by car, 15 by public transport, 45 min walk). Buses are not running past midnight.
I had a wonderful stay here, and Caspar is a very lovely host!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: The appartement is really charming. Very beautiful view. Be aware that the room is old but I liked it very much. The bed was very comfortable. Overall everything was excellent and Caspar was very sympathetic.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Very clean, good view from the windows. In 15 min walking you can reach a few food halls.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: This is a lovely apartment with a beautiful  view.  The area is peaceful and quiet but there are a couple of restaurants and a nice pub close by. This part of Rotterdam is especially beautiful as the old buildings are preserved but you can see the striking architecture of the new city across the canal.   The apartment itself has huge windows facing the canal in the living room, which is a comfortable place to relax in the evenings.   High ceilings and many pleasant touches give the space a homey yet classic atmosphere.  Will sleep a large number of people, but this is not a “party space”, as the building is peaceful and elegant.   Highly recommend for anyone who would like to enjoy modern comforts in a historic building.

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Beautiful old building and warm hospitality. Me and my friends loved sitting in the cosy livingroom and looking out at the water. Only complaint is no curtains in two of the three bedrooms. Recommend bringing an eye mask!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Great place to stay. Beautiful views and spacious apartment

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.
comments: Great place to stay. Very comfortable and spacious especially for larger groups. Liked the peaceful vibe and welcoming atmosphere. And of course the view!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.

Overall a very cozy space with everything that's needed!

name: Rotterdam, Center Isle.

name: Perfect sunny Appartement

- Good WiFi
- Supermarket in a few minutes
- Communication with the host was great
Some minor things like kitchen essentials, towels and bath furniture will be improved soon, I'm sure.
Note there's no free parking in close proximity, expect to pay 1.67 per hour on the street (which is still OK by Netherlands standards). It might be not easy to find a parking spot after 8pm.
The stairs are very steep, keep it in mind if you have small children or heavy suitcases.
The bedroom on the 2nd floor is quite small

name: Perfect sunny Appartement
comments: Beautiful apartment, steep staircases demonstrating Dutch living.  Less than 5 mins walk to the tram and less than 20 mins walk to Rotterdam central. Nice park next to the apartment. Excellent Indonesian food across the street.  Bike rental 15 mins walk away....you have got to cycle around this city! I loved just sitting on the balcony taking in the neighbourhood. Good supermarket 7 mins walk away. Couple of bars in the neighbourhood which are really good.

name: Perfect sunny Appartement
comments:

we have rent bicycle just few streets near the flat and it was very nice to go everywhere like a real Dutch ! Rox indicated us a very good place for free parking. Everything was good !
We recommend very much this place !

name: Perfect sunny Appartement

The last day when we go get the car someone smashed one of the car window and got a small amenities bag, police was there waiting for us and said we should NOT have leave the car in that place overnight cause it’s dangerous.
We then wasted 4 hours exchanging new car.
So if you are not driving then it’s not a problem.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location

He couldn't reach the cleaning service. So the host and i agreed to refund the cleaning fee. After 12 days and three reminders, the host paid only the half of the agreed amount back.
No recommendation.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location

There's free parking a little while away, but we there's a locked carpark in the basement of the building so we used that instead.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Very nice apartment with a great view and friendly Host.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
We were forced to vacate the property
soon after arrival (despite having booked it for 5 nights) as it was not fit for purpose.
The flat was unclean by regular standards (nevermind during the COVID-19 pandemic where extra measures are taken by most establishments).
On arrival we were informed that the WiFi and TV weren't working and there was a drainage problem with the shower. The flat itself was fine, good views and nice location however, nothing inside it (furniture, bedding, equipment etc) could be described as "luxurious" as stated, in fact most of these things are very tired looking - for example; the first white bath towel we went to use had brown stains all over, bedding was bobbled...etc.
We felt uncomfortable with the fact that the neighbouring tennants had displayed signs around the communal areas saying "No Airbnb" and the host himself had asked us not to speak to the neighbours about this, however, we were approached by some people who lived in the building regarding this, which was both awkward and uncomfortable.
The apartment is listed as sleeping 8 - it has a double bed and 2 leather-style sofas that flatten to make a surface to sleep on however, couldn't really be classed as beds.
We really needed to stay however, as last minute options were limited and costly so we tried to communicate our concerns with the host but he ignored most of the issues raised and offered nothing other than to look into fixing the WiFi. Later, he acknowledged the cleanliness issue and offered to send round a cleaner the following day, however, we did not feel comfortable staying overnight in an unsanitary conditions.
As a result we left after just a few hours in the flat and requested a refund, which as yet, we have not received.
If you are looking for somewhere to crash for one night and you're not fussy about hygiene, this place would be fine - just don't go expecting a "luxury apartment" as listed.
From viewing previous reviews it seems that ownership of this property has changed - maybe this is why experience differs also.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Perfect location to explore rotterdam from! Amazing view!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
NOT LUXURY.
We had to leave the apartment due to the unsatisfactory and subpar conditions of this “luxury” apartment.I have stayed in many airbnbs and this has been inadequate to their standards and not at all helpful host. Despite having a great view from the apartment living room and nice location, the apartment was not up-to-par with airbnb standards. He said the lines were ‘very good quality’ and that is not correct: The linens were scrawny, thin, and wrinkled. This is not as described as the name of the apartment like “Luxury” there is barely any furniture, construction noise, and not sufficient to fit the amount of people it says= uncomfortable. It offers a unfit bed that fit’ two people ‘ and the uncomfortable sofas that flat out to a small bed. This is not enough for 5 people. Very uncomfortable, more like a bachelor pad for a single male not for the amount of guests is says. This is not what an airbnb apartment rental should be in such bad standards. And the ‘free’ parking advertised was horrendous. There were homeless people all around and the conditions inside this parking lot was unclean and appalling. When we tried to message the host with the concerns he responded very RUDE and quite impolite. He refused to give a refund with such an expensive listing for an un-luxurious apartment.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
We had a wonderful stay at Peter's. The location is fantastic - 5-10 minute walk from the Maritime Museum, Markthall and other attractions and you can't get a better view! I'm going to address some of the comments from other reviews, primarily. I can only speak for our stay, but it was great. Overall, we found the place to be clean -sheets and towels were clean, floors mopped and swept and bathrooms clean. Is it pristine? Not quite (it's someone's home, not a hotel, and it shows some signs of age - like needs paint, etc), but it was perfect for our family and I didn't have any concerns it had not been cleaned, as some other reviews indicated. Peter was prompt and helpful in his responses and met us at the apartment, which made me very comfortable. He was a fantastic host.
Our family is 5 persons - two adults and three children (ages 8,5 and 3). It suited us well, but may not be so comfortable for older kids or adults. Two kids each slept on a couch and the third we put on a mattress on the floor. Could have used more blankets, but we had what we needed, and I have recommended more blankets to Peter. The mattresses are stored in the laundry room, so you have to pull them out to use the washer/dryer.
The free parking is offsite. It isn't the best location, but it's not terribly far. It is very limited in the number of spaces. We didn't have luck getting a space when we went, but there is paid parking right in front of the building that is very convenient.
I also saw comments that the place isn't "luxury" like in the description. For the rate you are paying in the center of town, I define luxury as the location. If you want fancy sheets, etc, then find another place. If you want a view and convenience, this is a great space. The furniture is not new, the walls need some paint, etc, but it was very comfortable. So, while I wouldn't say it's "luxury" in the sense of a luxury hotel, it is a great stay and, I think, a great price for what you get. We had a great experience.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Very nice place, amazing view. Peter welcome us at our arrival and is very friendly. We enjoy our stay.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: All good, nice view of the city! I recommend it for a  stay in Rotterdam

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: The unit is a large one-bedroom located centrally in a new building but it is NOT luxury. Upon arrival the rental wasn't cleaned well, the fridge and kitchen was full of other people's food and the condition is generally poorly maintained. The bed sheets and towels are low quality and the parking is off-site under a dodgy bridge next to a comedy club. There is also a large construction project with daytime noise nearby. In my opinion this rental was not worth the price relative to other rentals in Europe.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location

Overall, very unpleasant, uncomfortable and not safe.
If you look for a great Rotterdam location, go for it, otherwise I would stay away.

comments: Very ideal location. Everything within reach and a breathtaking night view.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: my stay at Peter's lodge was wonderful, the apartment has an amazing view, it is very close to the center where you can go and enjoy a coffee. the arrival in the apartment and the communication with the host was better than how I imagined it. Peter is a kind person and always aware of his guests. without a doubt I recommend it

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: the view is amazing!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
Nice view, great stay.
Peter is reactive and available
Thanks

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Peter is a nice host that gives great instructions as to how to get there and how to access everything. The place and the view you get in Rotterdam is incredible. The place has all the amenities you will need and I would highly recommend it to other travelers or couples. It was a very fun stay!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Nice host who communicates very clearly. The view in the apartment is also a very nice add to your stay.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: The place is really nice an has a great view. The host is nice and communicative. The only negative thing was the Toilet. It was not very clean smelled pretty bad

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
The location is fantastic, and the view of the city is great. While spacious, I would caution renters that intend on using more than just the two-person bed in the bedroom. Pull out bed and the couch didn’t work too well for us.
If you’re a couple, though, I think you’ll enjoy this spot!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
amazing apartment. very spacious and great view.
we really enjoyed our stay at Peter's place.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Beautiful appartment at the best place! With a crazy view!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Wonderfull appartment in the heart for Rotterdam, with a beautifull view. Peter is a very clear and good communicator and very helpfull. Checkin and checkout was very easy.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
Everything went really well the communication with the owner was perfect
But there are a few things that could be changed to make the stay even more enjoyable:
The quality of the furniture in general was really poor
Same for all the lights (especially in the bathroom).
I recommend this apartment because it’s very central and Peter was a great host

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Great apartment, with superior location and stunning views. Could just be cleaner and closet/drawers need sorting out by the Owner (found many clothes and towels of likely former Airbnb Guests). Overall can highly recommend.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
the apartement was really nice you don‘t have to walk far to see some stuff. some things like a window were broken but we were instructed on how to still use it!
communication works perfectly!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: I would definitely recommend this penthouse✨ it was very spacious, clean and the view is unmatched. There was also very good communication with the host. I loved my stay!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: There were a few things that made the stay a little difficult, only one key, if you have multiple people there is no way for someone to enter building without the fob. More keys need to be issued. The air did not work very well at all. Had to have window doors open all the time due to this. Couch is not what its cracked up to be. Very used and uncomfortable for sleeping. If it wasnt for location and price id be very dissatisfied. Host does communicate promptly though.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
We were disappointed by this stay despite its great location. The apartment was listed as luxury which is hugely misleading. There were mouldy items in the dishwasher and even crockery and cutlery in the cupboard were dirty. The bedding was ripped and tired. There were several broken features (bin, dishwasher, light fitting, WC tap and flush). There was damp laundry hanging up in the cupboard.
It is a shame because the apartment was well positioned and could have been fixed up to address these flaws. We were also disappointed by the host’s response to our comments, which implied that we were unreasonable or complaining but it was a really disappointing start to our holiday.
I think at a lower price and/ or with these these internal features corrected this could be a decent stay.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
The location is magnificent and the view is amazing. Free parking is very convenient. Smooth communication with host.
The interior of the apartment is neglected however. The place appears to be a permanent Airbnb and the other people in the building seem unhappy with the situation. A lot of the inventory that one would expect in the kitchen was missing. The place was not very clean. There was some damage that has been mentioned in previous reviews, large sliding door in de living room was broken. Overall, too expensive for what it is.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: A view not to be missed!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: The view is amazing !

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: View is amazing, as well as the location. Near all of Rotterdam’s landmarks. However, the bedsheets were not clean, and there were some minor things that needed fixing.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
The flat was quite spacious and with a lovely location - around the harbor and super central.
The check-in process works well, there are lots of instructions and help is available if needed. Communication with the host worked a bit too slow before the beginning of the stay, but during the stay it was okay.
The flat is generally clean, but some things are very worn -off and could be so easily fixed e.g. the towels. These towels were so old and some even had stains on them, it was quite unfortunate.
Also the sofa where the third person can sleep is spacious, but has an uneven surface probably because so many people have laid there that it is simply not straight anymore. I had to bundle together sheets/towels to attempt to fix the hole…
Not all windows could be open, it seems some of the locks are broken so the host asked not to open it due to safety reasons and inability to close it, which is fair, but then you cannot really air.
It would have definitely been helpful to have some basic things like soap, enough toilet paper (there was 1 roll), hangers, etc. Nothing big, just some basics to make you feel comfortable in your stay.
I think if there is some small investment this place could be quite charmful, but right now I would definitely not put it in the category Luxus of airbnb. Its like low level-average.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Great location and view, but a bit unsanitary. Holes in wardrobes, tap water in the toilet did not work. Felt like the place had not been properly cleaned since the guests before.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Great location, great view, very responsive host!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: We had an amazing stay. Beautiful apartment with a fantastic view to the canal and city. Very clean apartment and safe area too .

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Lovely apartment very close to the city center! An amazing view and very clean. Would definitely recommend!

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Goede communicatie en host was goed bereikbaar. Leuk appartement met een superview.

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: I had a pleasant time in this accommodation it is close to lots of shops and the view is magnificent and Peter was receptive and available by message

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Beautiful view and comfortable place

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: Great apartment with stunning view and very nice host

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments:
The location of the apartment, the view out of it from the 10th Flooor... the stay was briliant and the host very kind and on point.
Will come back eventually!
Thanks

name: Long term rental Beautiful Apt central location
comments: The place was amazing, the view and the Host!

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: It is again the place you can call home when you travel out of the country. Ozkan's place in Rotterdam is a beautiful high class apartment located in the central of the city, it's just across the famouz Markthal and all sorts lf public transport. 6 minutes walk to the closest tram and metro station and 2 stops away from the Centraal station. Ozkan and his house mate Xavier is more than a great host, they are very helpful, accommodating, and very fun to talk with. We had a great time staying and had our own privacy although we are staying in the same house. We totally recommend this place.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Ozkan's apartment is in a really good location, close to everything you'd need. The room is small and quite basic, but sufficient for one or two persons if you're only looking for a place to sleep. My only problem was that the window doesn't open - which I found really annoying as I felt the air was never fresh inside. Anyway, the kitchen and the lounge are beautiful, and if you're lucky with the weather, you can chill on the balcony.
Other than that, the communication was easy and I could check in and drop my bags relatively early even though the room was not ready.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Ozkan’s place is really nice and good location. However, room didn’t have an opening window and so was rather hot, and the AC was then loud when turned on.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Great location, great living room and kitchen, with a sunny in the mornings balcony! Bedroom was small but had the essentials. Was a bit disappointed by the window that doesn’t open to air the room.
Communication was excellent, quick and polite!

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Had a good place to sleep, the only minor thing was the temperature in the room. I couldn't get it lower as my room had no window to open space, only to the corridor.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The apartment is bright and spatious and in a very nice location 2 min by foot from city center. We just didnt like that the room does not have a window and in the night you must keep the door closed because there is a boiler making noise just next to the room itself. Not the best especially during summer.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: It’s very convenient to access to the center of the city yet safe place.  It’s cosy room and nice view from balcony and bed room.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Location wise is great and near the city centre. Lots of eatery places nearby. Okzan wasn't around and was welcome by another tenant who was friendly and did his best. Communication was fine before checking in. I didn't like the room though. You had to go through a little space with a boiler and washing machine plus a vacuum and mop to the room. It was small and stuffy (without windows) from the heat. I requested for a fan but unfortunately it isn't provided for. Had difficulty to sleep. Luckily it was for 2 nights only and I moved to another room which was bigger and more comfortable (with windows). Not my best of experience from the many AirBnB nights I have stayed globally.  But I guess you will have to familiarize yourself with the different services provided in different countries.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Good place, very stylish. Unfortunately one room is very small next to the boiler, so it makes some noise, but a very low one. Ozkan wasn't there but there was another host which was very helpful as well.
I recommend it

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Ozkan's place has the most comfortable bed I've ever slept in. The apartment is spacious and you have everything you need there to make your stay the best possible. The only minus is that the window in the room does not open, but it's just me because I like sleeping in cold. :)

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: A very nice Apartment in the City Centre of Rotterdam. We shared it with three other people but most of the time we were each in our own rooms so we had privacy. The common spaces like the living room and the kitchen and the balcony were shared respectfully. All in all a pleasant experience.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The room is located super central. You can walk around all famous places. The check in was very smooth as we were well informed about everything in detail priorly.
The room was bit smaller than what we expected and no window opening makes it bit suffocating if we don’t keep the door open.
The common areas are top. We spent a lot of time sitting in balcony and comfy couch of living room.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The apartment is really nice and the location is great, but I don't recommend staying in a room without a window to the street (little light and fresh air).

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The flat is in a great location to visit the center and get around with transport even to other cities. That's mainly what I did while in the city, and I didn't spend a lot of time in the apartment.
The room's window cannot be opened, and while fortunately the weather was not really warm during my stay, it did get stuffy and I wasn't told of this detail, nor of how to deal with it.
A good place to explore the city if you don't plan to spend a lot of time in the room, I'd say.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: A simple, comfortable room. The room can be hot in summer as there is no window to the outside. The common areas of the apartment are very nice and well equipped and the apartment is ideally near the centre of Rotterdam.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The behaviour of the temporary host was far from pleasant. Weird and uncomfortable attidude.
No amenities present as noted, no idea if we used clean or dirty towels.
The room has no window, so no option to get some air.
An unpleasant stay, especially because of the temporary tenants. We did not feel comfortable at all and left the place earlier then planned.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: We vroegen de eigenaar wie er verder in het appartement zouden verblijven, aangezien wij veel vreemde gasten niet fijn vinden. Hij vertelde ons dat er een 33 jaar oude architect in het huis zou verblijven, en dat we genoeg privacy zouden hebben. Met 1 persoon de ruimtes delen: prima. Daar wilden we niet voor cancelen. De architect was het weekend weg (of we dat geloven moeten, geen idee) en er verbleef in plaats daarvan een vriend van hem uit New York die de volgende dag vertrok. Wat verder prima was. In de ochtend werden wij wakker door drie a vier vreemden in het appartement. Ze spraken amper Engels maar hoorden ze wel zeggen dat ze ook niet wisten dat er anderen zouden verblijven. Toen ik Ozkan berichtte zei hij dat nadat ik had gevraagd wie er verbleven, nieuwe boekingen waren binnengekomen. Als je merkt dat je gasten het fijn vinden te weten met wie ze in een huis komen te zitten, vooral voor meerdere dagen, laat dat dan Ff weten. Zijn diezelfde dag naar een hotel gegaan.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The room was a disappointment. The window cannot be opened so there is no way to let some fresh air in and no A/C. We woke up in the middle of a night because it felt like a gas chamber, so we had to open the doors to the hallway to be able to breathe. I reached out to the host after that and he suggested maxing out the ventilation fans in the room. That kind of helped in the beginning of May, but I do not believe this system would be powerful enough for hot summer days, also those fans are very noisy at maximum speed. The location is good and the hosts have been responsive though.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The flat was as described, with a nice living room and balcony. There are a lot of restaurants nearby.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Great central location and a beautiful room and view from the balcony. Ozkan replied fast and everything went smoothly.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Excellent location within easy walking distance of the old port, Blaak station, markthalle and my conference. Easy communication with the host, helpful description of the way to the apartment. Nice apartment, somewhat noisy, and the hallway light shines into the bedroom. Best for people with sound sleep.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Good area, quiet enough but close to good transport links, and nice balcony

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Really nice apartment with beautiful balcony. The room is a bit small with no outside window. Clean bathroom. Ozkan left clear instructions for check-in. Good room for a night or two in Rotterdam.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Nice stay at his place, very well situated close to markthal. The only issue we have faced was the seagulls noise in the early morning :)

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Our first time visiting Rotterdam and the location was brilliant for accessing the city and beyond. The park and ride was an excellent place to leave the car and if you use public transport, the parking is free for 3 days at a time.  We didn't notice any noise from adjacent apartments at all. The bed was really comfortable so slept well. Lockable door meant we felt free to leave things in the apartment. Communication before during and after the trip was excellent all queries dealt with. Host Pavlos was very helpful, friendly and accommodating.  Would definitely stay again.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Very centrally located apartment. Host was very eager to help with the parking permission in the area. Uncomplicated check in. No sheets until late evening/ midnight at the day of arrivel due to a problem with the dryer the host did not follow up upon.
Make sure you get to learn how to start the room’s ventilation system, since the room has a window to the hallway of the house that does not open and gets hot when the sun shines onto the building.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: This place is amazing, very well situated and comfy. We had such a nice view and the place is cozy. We loved it.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: I have had great experiences about Rotterdam, a vibrant ultramodern and metropolitan city. The apartment is near Markthal, so it is really convenient for shopping. There are some restaurants in the area. However, if you want to walk when you arrive at the central station to this place, it takes about 30 minutes.  This is a really quiet and nice area with green surrounding. At arrival, we got two tiny and super old rags( not towels) for showering, it made us uncomfortable. For two days, we stayed there no one took care of the bathroom and the toilet( very small one), so they were definitely not clean. Unfortunately, the soundproof of the room is so bad, so if someone is cooking or opening the doors, it will be very noisy inside the room. Just in front of our small room is a washing machine, when we arrive, we were super tired because the flight was delayed, we wanted to take a nap, however, it was impossible because the washing machine was so noisy more than 2 hours. I have not met Ozkan, but his friend Palov was really friendly with good communication. .Hopefully, you can improve the cleanness of the apartment, so it would be great to stay there.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Its a nice apartment but the experience was quite rough around the edges. This airbnb felt much more like a hostel than a home. While the communal space was fashionable and well-decorated, it was clear that there was very little thought put into decorating the bedroom or making it appealing to guests. The room is tiny and stark white with only one thin sheet. I wish I would have read the other comments before arrival, because a fellow commenter is correct that the towels we were given were basically rags. We were given a small towel and one old bath towel for two people. There were always many people in the flat, which made it difficult to cook; this was disappointing, as the kitchen was the main reason we booked this airbnb. The only trash can in the flat was in the kitchen and was always too full, making the stay very inconvenient. However, the communal space is very well decorated, and the balcony is nice. It is in a very good location. I really believe that this can be a better airbnb if the hosts put some more effort into things like nicer sheets and towels.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Ozkan and Pavlos’ apartment was great for a quick trip to Rotterdam. Their apartment was conveniently within a 5–7 min walking distance from the metro (Blaak and Oostplein). The bedroom was clean and spacious enough for 1–2 people. I am not sure if Dutch walls and doors just tend to be thin (had a similar issue in another Airbnb in Utrecht), but it was quite easy for noise to pass through the apartment. This was my only issue, especially early in the morning when I was trying to sleep and they were getting ready for work. Overall, I had a comfortable and easy stay. Would recommend.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Our hosts were very nice and helpful. The apartment is very close from the town center so it’s really easy to move by foot or with a bike.
The only problem is that we can’t open the window in our bedroom and with 30 degrees outside it was hard...

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Het lijkt wel een busstation, totaal geen rust of privacy

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The location is absolutely perfect. Although the host doesn't communicate at all and is not welcoming. Beware because you cannot open the window and the washing machine is practically in the room so it gets really hot and loud. The flat, especially the bathroom, was very dirty.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The flat is in a very nice area, but the window in the bedroom is sealed, therefore the room is extremely warm

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: It was a pitty that the flat wasn’t clean. Probably it might be a nice flat with a very good location but we couldn’t stay because of the pollution.  Furthermore there’s no possibility to open the window in the smaller room.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The owner was not there during our stay. The person who hosted us was nice. Unfortunately, the room is much more narrow than it looks on the photos and you can't open the window. The room was really uncomfortable to be and to sleep. The apartment was alright, only the shower was not clean.
The location is pretty central and the kitchen is well equipped.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: A small private room in a large, comfortable apartment, 6 mins walking distance to Rotterdam Blaak. Good to stay there, but one thing not ideal is that the window in the room cannot be opened.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The Apartment is located right downtown, there is a nice park right in front of the door and lots of nice bars and coffeeshops just around the corner! Ozkan was a very nice host, communication and organisation was very easy and nice! The Apartment has everything you need, a nice big kitchen and a bathroom that is beeing shared with other airbnb guests and even a balcony!

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: A nice host and great location in the center of Rotterdam. The very room itself was quite small and had no ventilation (the window does not open) so it was a bit hot and humid. Generally not bad option for a short stay for one person.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Ozkan's place is conveniently located which allowed us to do many things on foot. It is quiet, you won't hear much city noise during the night. The neighborhood is pleasant, there are plenty of small shops and restaurants to discover. The host is very responsive and adapts well to requests.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The location of the apartment is great, everything is in walking-distance. I never met Ozkan in person, there was a (apparently permanent?) tenant who seemed to take care of everything. The guy was friendly, but sometimes seemed to forget that he was not alone in the apartment. There were dirty dishes in the sink for several days, and the laundry rack was in the hall. Upon request he took care of the dishes, though. Some more airing would improve the odor from cooking in the kitchen-living room area.
The room was ok, the mattress neither too hard nor too soft. Unfortunately, the window could not be opened.
Conclusion: is fine to stay, but perhaps for no more than a few days.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Decent room and great views from the building

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Good communication and had a nice stay at Ozkan's place.  I never met Ozkan. Communication, check in and check out went through the tenant, which worked well. The flat is well located, with a nice balcony, and has easy access to Rotterdam centre via the tramway.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
Room is next to a water boiler and pipes, constant noise even at night. The window cannot be opened and gets really stuffy.
Floor was full of dirt and disgusting to walk barefoot.
Tenant did not feel welcoming and invited constantly strangers making it unconfortable to use the kitchen, with noise up to 3am.
Great location though.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: Nice and cozy apartment in the city center. Tha room was a bit small and with a window facing the inner part of the building, but was okay for a short stay. I never met Ozkan as I was received by the tenant, but he provided information via message. The location was perfect with easy access to the mains spots in Rotterdam. Recommended :)

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments:
The stay was peaceful and confortable.
The bedroom was cozy, the windows are big so the sunlight can come in.
Loved the balcony and the view it offered.
Pavlos was nice and helpful.

name: Nice and modern room in city center apartment
comments: The apartment is located in a really nice neighbourhood, with lots of restaurants and cafe. It is really well connected with the rest of city via metro or tram. Ozkan is really friendly and flexible with the check-in. The room, however, is really small and has no windows and no ventilation system. There is a fan. The shower was really dirty and smelly.

name: Charmant hoekhuis met tuin & kat – natuur én stad
comments: I haven't get the chance to meet Michel and I met Patrick who was very friendly and explained everything to us. Check in/out was very smooth. The house is very clean and located in very safe neighborhood. There is toys room which was great for my kids. The public transport is within walking distance. Street parking is also available. I will definitely stay in Michel's house once I visit Rotterdam again.

name: Charmant hoekhuis met tuin & kat – natuur én stad
comments: It's a great home with loads of amenities and was filled with stylish touches and modern fittings. Slight issue with some of the cleanliness in the bedrooms, but in general a great place to stay. Definitely recommend to stay there if you plan to use it as a hub, and the free car parking was crucial for our visit.

name: Charmant hoekhuis met tuin & kat – natuur én stad
comments:
Michel’s place was so beautiful and Femmetje is the cutest ever!
The location was perfect to get around to where we needed to be (only a short walk to the metro). The house itself is spacious and light, with everything you need.
Michel was super friendly as well and explained everything and was on standby quickly if we had any questions.
Overall I highly recommend staying here and if we’re ever back in Rotterdam we will stay here again :)
Thanks Michel & Femmetje!!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Great location and quick walk to city center.  Very hospitable hosts, and clean shared spaces.  Our bedroom offered lots of privacy, and was clean and comfortable with extra touches (snacks, water) to welcome us.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Very nice room in a lovely apartment. Wonderful view from the window!
Thank you very much Paul!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul is a amazing host! He responds really fast and is one of the friendliest host I ever met. The location is wonderful with a tram station just outside the place. The room are are really clean and you feel you have a private space as Paul has a curtain that separates his living space with the guest’s. Strongly recommend the place and Paul!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Excellent location! Tidy and spacious room with a nice view. Public space is also clean and tidy. really recommended.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The flat is in a perfect location and the house has an interesting flair. The Bedroom has a large window that looks out to the green. Communication with Paul was smooth and he is a very accommodating host. Clear recommendation.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The location is the convenient. It’s only 10min Walk from the central station. All the shopping streets are close.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: 10 minute walk from center station. Clean and bright room , and the bathroom is awesome. very recommended!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: It was great to stay at Paul's. The place is super central, close to all great restaurants and the museums. Paul offered us great tips about the city and was very responsive. The apartment is clean and bright. The room was comfy and private. I would recommend to anyone staying at Paul's!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
It’s a really nice place with clean and comfortable room, the room also prides ample natural light!
Paul is very kind and hospitality to make us feel like home, including give us some useful recommend about foods/routes.
This area has good public transport network, it takes about five minutes to the street by walk.
We’ll also choose Paul’s place again if we come to Rotterdam😊

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: I loved staying here! This is a beautifully designed modern apartment, and the room has huge windows opening onto a neighborhood park. Paul was not only attentive and communicative, but he gave me the best tips for exploring Rotterdam! I was in town for a conference but in my free time Paul's tips were the perfect guide for me to bike around and explore. I would definitely stay here again.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: In the city center. Paul gave really good tips for exploring the area. Even though it's for a room in the apt, you have a lot of privacy and it feels like it's your own place.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: This is the best Airbnb that I’ve ever stayed! Perfect location, quiet street and cute bedroom. Paul is really friendly and easy to communicate, and he gave us some useful tips about traveling around Rotterdam.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The apartment was very stylish and centrally located, with interesting 1950s features. Our room had very comfortable beds and a view of green space. Water and snacks were provided which was a thoughtful touch. The bathroom was modern and use of the kitchen was appreciated. The entire apartment was spotless and very well maintained. Paul and his family were very welcoming and helpful hosts who showed us what to do in the city. We would highly recommend staying here!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: I was suppose to stay at Paul's but due to covid-19 issues I needed to cancel only after the cancellation policy date (literally last minute). Paul was extremely generous and had agreed to work it out with me. I have no review about the place but I can give a super positive feedback about the host, Paul, which is not less important, especially when sharing a flat together.  Cheers.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Lovely apartment very close to amsterdam central station. Very clean and comfortable room. Extra special is the view of the small park where you can hear the birds singing while you sleep in the middle of the city.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Really nice hosts and place. The titel 'Green Oasis' definitely fits.
We had our morning coffee on the balcony which we really enjoyed.
You can place your bikes in a storage downstairs which is very practical.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul was very helpful before and during our stay. He also adapted to our arrival and departure schedule. He gave us a nice overview of the city so we could visit in 2 days the most interesting points. The room was clean and we had all we needed. Completely recommended. Thanks Paul! Maria and Paloma

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Really an oasis! Perfect base to visit Rotterdam.
A lot of privacy and everything you need for a pleasant stay .

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Prima verblijf, top locatie in hartje Rotterdam, netjes en schoon. Geen klachten over de kamer en zeker een aanrader als je iets zoekt.
't voelde alleen een beetje awkward dat de keuken en badkamer van het verblijf werd gedeeld met de eigenaar, maar we ondervonden geen hinder of inbreuk van privacy dus dat viel verder wel mee.
veel plezier in Rotjeknor

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The apartment is super stylish and in a great location overviewing a park right in the middle of the center. The room was clean, the bed amazing and Paul was a great host. Also there's cheap parking close by. I highly recommend this place for a city trip.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Very correct and friendly hosts. Good communication. We have enjoyed the view on the park, the sun shining through the trees, the beautiful interior and the good location in the city centre.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: We really enjoyed our stay with Paul. Paul was very friendly, accommodating and helpful. The apartment is really lovely and thoughtfully arranged. The location is in a nice, quiet area with a wonderful view on a park not far from the central station. Rotterdam is such a beautiful city and we definitely recommend staying in this accommodation!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Paul’s. The communication and check-in were easy and Paul and his wife were very helpful. The flat is located in the city center but nonetheless it was super quiet. Although we recommend this place, we had a sleepless night due to many mosquitos in the room. So if you’re planning on staying there in the summer time, keep the windows shut at all times.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Definitely recommend this stay. Very central yet out of the way enough to not be disrupted by noise. Kind and welcoming host. Would definitely stay again.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: This green oasis is nearby shopping malls and the supermarket(Albert Heijn). We can get the room from Rotterdam centraal station by foot. The room was adorable and clean. We need to share the kitchen and bathroom with host, but it was not uncomportable. We used cozy plates and cups for our breakfast and dinner. It was good opportunity to save the cost for meals😄. Beds are comfortable and the view over the window was nice. I really want to recommend this room to my friends and the visitors of Rotterdam.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul’s place was perfect in just about every way - quiet location that’s in the city center, clean apartment, private space, an outdoor balcony, and great wifi. I used Rotterdam as my touch point for travel to other cities as well and it was perfect. Paul also gave a great run down of Rotterdam, sight seeing, and personal recommendations which was greatly appreciated. Would highly recommend!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Perfect location, super friendly, awesome architecture and a relaxing park view. The shared area and private room arrangement is very well set up and I felt super comfortable. Paul gave me great tips on things to see, and there’s tons to do close by. Highly recommend!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Paul's home really is an oasis in Rotterdam. The park view is serene. All spaces were immaculately clean. The kitchen is bright and well equipped. To top it off, the design of the home is tastefully crafted — highly recommended!
Paul also gave us pointers on where to go in Rotterdam, and it helped us make the most of our time there.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
The cutest bedroom with the most gorgeous view right smack in city centre. I highly recommend this place for its homeliness, cleanliness and location. They have the most comfortable beds too!
Paul and his wife have been the nicest people and we felt very welcome.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Prettige ontvangst, duidelijk en snel in communicatie. Fijne plek voor een bezoek aan Rotterdam! Heel centraal, rustige plek en op loopafstand van het station. Keuken en badkamer deel je met de eigenaren, maar voldoende privacy. Aanrader.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul was a helpful and warm host! Provided extensive information on the different highlights in Rotterdam. Overall, a very fuss free & comfortable stay

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The place is really central, 10 minutes walk to the station. Paul was super kind and gave to me usefull tips to go around. I was there only 24 hours, could have stayed in a hotel, but I liked much more the atmosphere of the house. Nice bedroom view with a lot of light coming from the window,  the bathroom is shared with Paul and his wife but super super comfortable and clean.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Great location, good view from the room which is able to see dogs walking in the park, quiet neighborhood that we both slept well and perfect hosting! as well. Strongly recommend to stay here if u would like to visit Rotterdam!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul is a great host, and he and his wife share a nice kitchen and bathroom.  Our house is near a very busy shopping street in Rotterdam, so we can get anything we need within walking distance.  In addition, Paul will show us many attractions in Rotterdam, a very modern and well-connected city.  We had a blast!  Thank you so much, Paul!  As a side note, if you're afraid of the cold in winter, you should remind Paul to turn on the heater, since they're used to living there.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Very good stay! Great location right in the center of everything, but still pretty quiet and with a beautiful view. Paul was very kind to explain a bit the history of Rotterdam and the cool places to go. The house os comfortable and very well decorated. While you ll have a private room, the kitchen and bathroom are shared with the host. We enjoyed very much our time there.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul has been available and always ready to reply for any issue. During the check in he also informed us on what to do in the city and gave us a map. The apartment was overall very clean and it is very very close to everything making it possible to reach most of the places by foot. The room is very quite and peaceful and our privacy was respected.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul and his wife were both so friendly to us! If we encountered any problem, they would kindly help us. For example, the kitchen sink got stuck at some point. But after we reported it to them, they fixed it immediately, which is very nice! Paul’s apartment makes you feel like home, it doesn’t have luxurious decors but is so beautiful when the sun light comes in through the big windows. And the bathroom is really clean, which is one of the main reasons why we like it so much! We had a really great time there! Absolutely recommend it!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: This is the best place to stay in Rotterdam! The house is located in front of quiet park and you can enjoy lovely view from large window in your room. The furnitures are sophisticated and beautiful, the hosts are so kind and always help us. There are many restaurants and shopping places near by, so you can enjoy around this house. Everything is great for us, thank you so much!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The place is really a green oasis in the middle of the city next to the main shopping streets and restaurants. Private room was simple but cosy, all what you need for a short stay. Bathroom was sparkling clean and the kitchen was a well equipped one, we just felt like at home. Absolutely recommend.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul is a really nice person, our trip in Rotterdam turns much delightful thanks to him!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Paul is nice guy, but I think I came in the wrong time, the above stair will do construction stuff every 7:30am which make me hard to sleep.
Also, the summer is hot in Rotterdam where have too many mosquitoes if you open the window but there is no fan that can cool down.
Anyway, the place is good but come in summer time the mosquitoes was very annoyed

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
We really enjoyed the stay at Paul's. He welcomed us for the check-in and gave us plenty of useful information about the surrounding area and its attractions.
The apartment is near the station and it's convenient to visit the centre on foot. We used the kitchen to prepare our meals and we found everything we needed.
The room was comfortable and bright thanks to the big window on the park.
All in all, a great place to stay!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Super aangenaam verblijf! You get the best of both worlds ligt midden in
Het centrum, maar toch in rustige omgeving waardoor het je geen lawaai hinder hebt s’nachts. Paul was steeds bereikbaar voor advies en vragen en respecteerde je privacy. We hadden enkel niet gelezen dat er een hond was maar, dat zagen we als een meerwaarde!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Although it is located in the center of the city, it has a wonderful view and comfortable rooms.Staying here has become a cherished memory. I would like to stay again.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
The apartment had large windows onto a beautiful green square; so spending time in the apartment feels really nice. You’re no more than 15 mins walk from most attractions in the city and there’s a tram stop outside of the flat.
Paul was relaxed and gave us a great recommendations plus a little history about the city which meant we discovered areas that we may not have.
All in all a great stay that I would thoroughly recommend.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Super verblijf in het hartje van Rotterdam. De bedden liggen super goed en Paul zorgde voor een zeer hartelijke ontvangst. Alles was exact zoals we verwachtten en het delen van badkamer en keuken verstoorde onze privacy helemaal niet. Dikke aanrader!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: This apartment was very clean, comfortable, and affordable. The room has a large window that faces out to a park, so it feels like an oasis in the middle of the city.  The location was good and we walked everywhere in Rotterdam.  Paul was very accommodating by letting us check in early and providing recommendations.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Paul was a great host, thoughtfully provided all the information in details. They live next door but totally respect our privacy. The room is beautiful and centrally located in the city. The green space next to the room is a gem in a big city like this.
The only small nuisance was some mosquitoes. Otherwise we had a perfect stay :)

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Great room with a great view, location perfect 👍

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Een echte aanrader!
Bedankt voor alles!
Geweldig om in hartje Rotterdam in een groene omgeving te zijn.
En onze host zorgde voor veel privacy.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
Paul’s house is very close to the Centraal station 10mins walk from Rotterdam central. Right next the building there is tram station and lot of other shops and restaurants around the corner.
He is a wonderful host , after arriving at his place he provided us a detailed overview of things , and also provided us information about the places to visit, restaurants near by. He is very friendly and also allowed us to keep our baggage’s in his place after checkout time , so we could collect later in the day.
If we visit Rotterdam agin, we would come back and stay in his place.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments:
We hebben heel erg genoten van ons verblijf. De ligging is perfect en zeer rustig tegen een park.
Heerlijk ontbijt op 150m van de accommodatie. Paul heeft ons veel info gegeven over de bezienswaardigheden in Rotterdam…en dat zijn er wel wat !
De keuken en badkamer zijn gemeenschappelijk maar is zeker geen minpunt. Je hebt genoeg privacy. Ik kan het iedereen aanraden voor enkele mooie dagen in Rotterdam 😉

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul is very nice man I have to say. The Paul’s shared room indeed provides some kind of privacy however I think with that amount of money you rent a place and not a room. Beds were not good and difficult to sleep, and there always was a bad smell in all the house. In overall, I would say that it’s worthing to stay here for 1-2 nights maximum not more. The best thing of the place was the location. Location of the room is the best location in the whole Rotterdam.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: We truly had a wonderful stay. Paul was so helpful from the start and gave us clear instructions how to get to the apartment. He also gave us great tips to get around the neighbourhood and the city. The location is amazing, very central but still peaceful during the night. The room was beautiful, spacious with big windows (exactly as the photos). Would recommend Paul's place to everyone!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: Paul is a great and friendly host who gave us good recommendations during our stay in Rotterdam. He made sure we felt comfortable and have privacy despite sharing common areas such as the bathroom and kitchen. The airbnb is located at a great area of Lijnbaan which is a shopping district with many shops and amenities. It is also near Rotterdam central and the tram station for easy access. Overall, we had a great stay and would recommend to those looking for a short stay in Rotterdam and do not mind shared spaces.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: The place is indeed an oasis, very peaceful with lovely trees outside the window, and very central. The hosts are very friendly and helpful, the flat is beautiful inside, and I enjoyed my stay very much.

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: We hebben genoten van ons nachtje Rotterdam! Paul gaf ons leuke tips en het was ook fijn dat we in het hartje van Rotterdam onze fietsen veilig binnen konden stallen. Ook het uitzicht op het park was leuk en gaf rust. Ondanks dat we de keuken en de badkamer deelden met de bewoners hadden we toch voldoende privacy, we merkten er bijna niets van. We komen graag nog een keertje terug!

name: Green oasis in the city center
comments: What a gem, this place. It’s located amid the bustling and busy centre of Rotterdam and yet to my surprise I found myself enjoying the comfort of calm and privacy. It’s serene, you have a green view of trees, the room is spacious, stylish and comfortable. There even was a mosquito net! The house is well equipped and Paul is such a friendly and easy going man making me feel right at home while we bonded over shared interests. I would strongly recommend his place if you visit Rotterdam!

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: It's a nice n safe family home with great hosts where I immediately felt comfortable. The room itself is built-in, so no windows to the outside. A big plus is that you have a private shower in the room (with ventilation) There's a shared kitchen and a private toilet. It's a good price - quality rate and near the city centre, highway, public transport, shops, restaurants etc etc. I recommend this place.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Nice family who is willing to provide you with everything you may need during your stay, calm atmosphere and quiet neighborhood, still the kids do a little bit of noise in the early morning.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Mei is very welcoming and greeted us with warmth. The room was clean and it had a private shower. Toilets weren’t private but they were right in front of our room so it wasnt too far to get to in the morning or during the night and we don’t bother anybody with the noise. We also had breakfast in the morning which was very nice. We had access to a small kitchen and we thought it was very practical for coffee or tea. Mei’s place was near a metro station and some little restaurants. The greek one was really tasty ! To sum up , we had a really nice stay and Mei really is a super host :)

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments:
Good stay to visit Rotterdam! Everything as described. Here are a few details I want to point out:
- no window in room
- bed not so stable (made noises when turning around, maybe not made for adults sleeping there regularly)
- only one chair at room
+ very nice and helpful host
+ great location (only two minutes to the metro)
+ we were allowed to use the refrigerator, fridge, oven and kitchen
+ it was very clean
+ free parking
+ although there were kids, it was very silent in the night and in the morning, sleeping until 10 am was no problem
If you want to see Rotterdam and expect not to sleep in a 4 star hotel, this is a good place for you. One or two nights were fine, but we would not stay there for a week. It fullfills it's purpose.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: I beleive that a room without a window is not a bedroom and, in this way, should't be offered in airbnb as so. No window, no natural light... A darkroom is depressive. Apart from that, they are noisy from 6am and you can hear everything since the walls are super thin.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Good stay, the room hasn’t a window tho but it isn’t a big problem

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments:
Firtly, they were nice and kind. the place was clean. the good side about the room, you have a private shower inside the room, and the toilet is next to the room.
However, the room is next to their workroom and there is no wall only glass covered with the curtains and paper. When the light of the study room was opened, the light also went into the room. They work until 10 pm sometimes, which is uncomfortable due to the noise and light. The location is a little bit problematic, it is outside of the Rotterdam. There is no window and enough ventilation.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: The room is easy to access - the street train close by and on the house's base floor. The bathroom is small but clean and directly in the room. A toilet is just across the corridor. Communication, check-in and help with bike storage were perfect.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Mei's place is in a very quiet area with plenty of free on-road parking. That certainly made my life easier! The room was spotless, warm, and quiet. Mei mentions that she has children and to expect a little noise- I really didn't find that I was disturbed at all and so.wouldnt worry about it if you're considering booking here. I had use of a kitchenette right next door to the room, which was great. This was a great and affordable place to stay.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Nice little room on the ground floor with ensuite bathroom and a small kitchen with everything you need. The host family – who're very friendly – lives on the upper floors, so there's a lot of privacy. Nice and quiet area close to Rotterdam center.

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Good value for money and the host responds quickly, although I wish they were more welcoming (I only met them for 1 min when showing me the room).  The place is also a bit far from the city centre and the room felt rather claustrophobic as it does not have any windows;  Otherwise ok for a very short stay

name: Private bathroom,free-parking 二人间,私人浴室  Rotterdam
comments: Mei’s place is clean and walkable to supermarket and metro. Mei and family is very helpful and kind. There is free parking on street. Recommend!

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
Если вы планируете познакомиться с восхитительным Роттердамом и его прекрасными жителями, то непременно останавливайтесь у Марка и Аниты! Это один из лучших домов, где нам довелось побывать, пользуясь сервисом Airbnb. Дом находится в историческом районе, в 10 минутах от центра города (автобусная остановка в 2-х минутах от дома), недалеко от аэропорта и зоопарка. Это не несет никаких неудобств, потому что отдельное удовольствие доставляет жить там, среди традиционных голландских домов, цветов и деревьев, слушать пение птиц по утрам и вечерам, наслаждаясь прекрасным видом с террасы. Комната находится на третьем этаже того же дома, где живут хозяева. Интерьер исключительно стильный и комфортный, есть все необходимое - от кухонных принадлежностей и утюга до натуральной косметики. Анита и Марк очень-очень приветливы, готовы помочь советами и информацией, приготовили угощение к нашему приезду, что было очень приятно! Мы в полном восторге от этого дома и надеемся когда-нибудь вернуться!
If you are planning to get acquainted with the delightful Rotterdam and its beautiful inhabitants, then be sure to stop at Mark and Anita! This is one of the best houses where we have visited, using the Airbnb service. The house is located in a historical area, 10 minutes from the city center (bus stop is 2 minutes from the house), near the airport and the zoo. It does not cause any inconvenience, because it is a pleasure to live there among traditional Dutch houses, flowers and trees, listen to birds singing in the mornings and evenings, enjoying the beautiful view from the terrace. The room is on the third floor of the same house where the owners live. The interior is exceptionally stylish and comfortable, there is everything you need - from kitchen utensils and iron to natural cosmetics. Anita and Mark are very, very friendly, ready to help with advice and information, prepared a treat for our arrival, which was very nice! We are totally excited about this house and hope to return someday!

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
Beautiful, traditional Dutch home in Rotterdam. Very quiet house with gorgeous windows to enjoy the sunshine and the summer weather!
Located next to a gorgeous sloot (canal) and ancient church. The sloot is beautiful to walk through and has really beautiful foliage and birds. Great connections to Rotterdam Centraal to visit other cities in the area.
Anita and Marc go above and beyond to stock the unit with all sorts of amenities. We would definitely consider staying here again.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: We had a very warm welcome from Anita (Marcs wife). Sadly he had to work so we didn't get to meet him. Anita took time to make sure we settled in well, was available at all times, in case we had questions. She showed us around the house and gave us tourist tips and a map. The couple also offered us a late check out, since the weather was not so great. I would definitely recommend this place for it's atmosphere, privacy, warmth, beautiful location and amazing hospitality. :)

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: Marc and Anita, you are really kind and It is a very nice studio. Thank you! Wish you lots of good visitors. About the place, it is nice and clean, also very light. Hosts left us some fruits, cheese and vine. Also it was kind of cold,  so they gave us warm  slippers.  Thank you. And there is a small cute terrace

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
Marc and Anita’s place is incredibly beautiful - so stylish, functional and comfortable. The bed is one of the most comfortable I’ve ever slept in and the balcony is a great touch.
They were both so welcoming and informative, and Anita even prepared us dinner on the first night as we arrived late.
Would 100% recommend.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
Big compliments for great hosts.
The apartment arranged with great attention to detail leaves nothing to be desired. We have felt very comfortable.
Who is not good on foot, may have problems with the narrow stairs. However, we had great support from Marc and his lovely wife to master this obstacle perfectly.
The airport is very close. Those who sleep lightly will find earplugs for peace at night. Ideal for a couple or good friends.
Many Thanks to the hosts.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: This apartment is very special, very light and in a peaceful and pretty location, right by the canal. We used the bikes to cycle into town, it was very easy and fun. We would highly recommend the apartment and Marc and Anita are very wonderful hosts. Until the next time!

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
One of the best AirBnB's I have ever experienced. You can feel the level of thought that went into creating this cozy and "home-ish" room. Marc and Anita are very friendly and supporting people and will ensure that you have a great stay in their house. You can ride 2 bikes for free, the wifi is good, in the kitchen you can find spices and all the basic stuff, the balcony has a great view and so on... I do not have one negative thing to mention. Maybe some people will not like the kind of open bathroom, because there is a glass door, but it is no big deal I would say.
Definetely recommed visiting beautiful Rotterdam & staying in the Studio ZUCKER. :)

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: Marc's studio was the perfect place for our three night stay in Rotterdam. The space was warm, light and had a well equipped kitchenette which was perfect for making breakfast and a light dinner. Marc was very welcoming and his recommendations for restaurants locally and in town were much appreciated.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: Marc and Anita’s loft was perfect for our stay.  It is a beautiful space and they have thought of everything you might want or need.  We loved the outdoor space and the comfy bed.  Although it was a bit warm  at night we slept with the windows open and a nice gentle breeze cools the space. We loved having access to two bikes and we used them every day.  One bike has saddlebags so we could pick up a few groceries or carry our items while we biked to see the nearby sights.  We especially enjoyed taking the bikes on the Waterbus to Kinderdijk to ride amongst the windmills.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: Calm location a little outside of the city, friendly hosts, beautiful home, and we loved being able to bike around. A few things to consider: the bathroom is not fully enclosed (so you won’t have much privacy if sharing the space with someone); the support beams are low if you are taller than 6’ (2m); and there are no screens on the windows (so mosquitos will get in, but there is a mosquito net over the bed). Overall we enjoyed our peaceful stay, especially the balcony.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: Great place while visiting Rotterdam or Delft, especially by bikes that were available for us! :) Amazing apartment, very comfortable and well designed (only good quality furnishing). My only recommendation would be to take earplugs, nearby church looks nice from the window but can wake you up with church bells at 5am.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
Wonderful place - wonderful experience.
Loved this space! It was spacious, clean and great location.
Marc and Anita were such friendly host and has a Beautiful Big House.
The room is very nice with a comfortable bed and the bathroom was really clean and nice.
Marc and Anita are warm and gracious host, experienced and delightful host ...
Their home is nicely decorated too, feel so warm and made me feel welcome and at home from day one.
I definitely recommend staying with them,
I enjoyed a lot, and my stay was great!
You will truly feel at home
Highly recommended
5 Stars

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
We had the most wonderful stay! From the moment we arrived, they made us feel incredibly welcome and at home. A highlight of our stay was the homemade apple pie—absolutely delicious!
The accommodation itself was spotless, comfortable, and thoughtfully equipped with everything we needed. The location was also perfect—peaceful and scenic, yet conveniently close to everything we wanted to explore.
I can’t recommend this stay enough.

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments:
The place was cozy and comfortable with such a great lighting, perfect for a relaxing stay. Great location — only about 20 minutes to the central station by bike, or you can easily catch bus 33 or 40.
Marc and Anita were incredible hosts, super friendly and welcoming.
Would definitely come back again if I have the occassion!

name: Studio Suiker - Ruime design studio met terras
comments: My stay at Marc and Anita’s place was very nice and peaceful. They welcomed me with a kind gesture (small snacks) and gave me a few local recommendations. The loft is located in a quiet residential area and you can reach Rotterdam Central either by bike or public transport which is very convenient. The loft was very clean, bright, and cozy. Thank you!

name: Family's stay四人间free parking
comments:
Mei and Ben were amazing accommodating hosts: leaving breakfast out for us, letting us use all amenities in their home outside our room, and extending our check out time to accommodate for our late flight.
