The place itself is somewhat far from the city center (approx 30 mins). However, with its amenities and free breakfast included, the location was well worth it. I would recommend a stay at Mei and Ben’s place.

name: Appartement met zonnig dakterras aan het park
comments: This cosy flat I would highly recommend. Valerie was a great host. The place is clean, tidy and comfortable. It has a perfect location: close to the city centre and in a quiet, nice neighbourhood. It offers a great view on the Vroesenpark!

name: Appartement met zonnig dakterras aan het park
comments: Loved Valerie’s place, it’s in a great location  across from a park, there’s a grocery store and bakery a block away. Very spacious apartment, as well. The stairs are narrow and steep (3 flights) just fyi but all in all very happy and would stay again.

name: comfortable,cheap room for backpackers near subway
comments: Mei and Ben were wonderful hosts. They are lovely people and their beautiful children create a relaxing and happy atmosphere in the house. The room is brighter, bigger and nicer than the pictures show. The area is quiet, and the metro and the supermarket are close by. Highly recommended!

name: comfortable,cheap room for backpackers near subway
comments: Mei was so helpful and patient with me as I dealt with a delayed flight getting in to Rotterdam. The room was clean and there was a fan! Perfect for backpackers looking for a place to sleep.

name: comfortable,cheap room for backpackers near subway
comments: The apartment is very nice! Location is very convenient, safe and near public transport. Mei was very helpful, thoughtful and friendly, certainly a super host. Thanks again for your delightful hospitality!

name: comfortable,cheap room for backpackers near subway
comments: Our hosts were friendly and helpful. The description in her profile was accurate. However, we were somewhat surprised that the children woke up so early and made a lot of noise early in the morning.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is simply great! Spacious and stylish. Has everything you need. Also great view towards tje city center and a harbor. Definitely recommend!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment was great. Stayed for almost 2 weeks and didn't want to leave. All amenities included. Alex provided a good set up for our family with young child. Really enjoyed the location. Very close to transport: metro and tram. We preferred to walk. Good terraces close by. Supermarket 5 min walk.
Interaction with Alex was easy.
Highly recommended!
Spectacular views, sun all day!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Alex is an amazing host. His apartments is really luxury. Everything you need in 130sqm flat.
You even don’t need to go to Euromast to get amazing view – you already have it in this place.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This place exceeded our expectations. The view was absolutely gorgeous, we had some of the windows open or partially open all the time, the rooms were spacious, there were plenty of amenities, plentiful supply of towels and sheets, dishware, condiments and other food stuff. This place is also good for business travelers or people who need to do work during their trip like me.....good table and space for my laptop and other accessories to get work done in a visually pleasing yet quiet place.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Alex's apartment is lovely and the views at night are really beautiful! When we had a problem, he immediately was there to help us. Definitely would return! :)

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Beautiful apartment with a breathtaking view over Rotterdam. Enjoyed two weeks there. Check in was perfect and service from Alex as well.
Thanks a lot!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Best view in town and easy access to everything. Metro is all right there and quiet.
Of all I've been to. This ranks at the top.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: I was staying in Rotterdam for business and Alex's place was perfect - very spacious and clean with a lovely kitchen and dining and living room spaces. The views from the apartment are fantastic, and the location was great - right next to the metro and tram, and a nice walk to city center. Would recommend!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Alex's place is truly above and beyond expectations, location is top notch and the views from the apartment cannot be explained by words, we will be coming back!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Alex was a great host, ready to help with any of our questions, and with lots of suggestions. The apartment is bright, modern and spacious with windows on three sides. The pictures don’t do the views justice - we’re not city people but still really enjoyed looking out across waterways & greenery. Soft and fluffy pillows, duvets, plenty of towels. A calm respite from the city below! Quiet bedroom for a good night’s sleep. A couple of minutes’ walk to the metro station & tram. A great choice when visiting Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Alex has a fantastic place! It is clean, spacious, and with modern amenities. Plus spectacular views! It is in a great location, especially because it is a 5 minute walk from the Metro--part of Holland's amazing mass transit system. No matter what part of the country you would like to visit, especially Amsterdam, it is ideally located.  It is a great value for the price. And Alex was an excellent host. Clear and prompt communications. He also provided some good information about Rotterdam. I cannot recommend this place more highly.  You will not be disappointed!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment was great, really spacious without the clutter of many rentals. Everything we needed was there. Phenomenal views. Convenient to metro. A few nice restaurants and a grocery store were in the neighborhood. We would definitely return.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This is a great home!  Amazing world class views and a very large and beautiful apartment.  The location was fantastic!  Train and tram stops just a few steps away and of course biking anywhere is very convenient and there is bike parking right outside your door.  (When you stay in different places in NL, you learn how important that is!). Check in was easy and very quick to reply.  All you need is there for a great comfortable stay..... and no stairs! Lol again, a very nice thing after staying in many places in NL.  Love this apartment and this city!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Big apartment, very nice view, really close to metro station. Owner is so kind and helpful!!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Great accommodation and host! Loved the place and location and views were perfect! Would stay again for sure!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is indeed luxurious and has a beautiful view! We enjoyed every moment there and would love to come back. We were always able to reach our host Alex who was very courteous in every aspect.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Alex is a very nice and considerate host, flexible and responsive. The apartment is specious and feels like home. The facilities are amazing. Super clean, great view and 1 min walk to the metro station. Highly recommended.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Really had a great stay there. Alex's apartment was  spacious and the bedding was extremely comfortable. His great taste for design shows in every room and is sublimated by the 180 degree view of Rotterdam. Looks particularly awesome at night. Also, the building is pretty quiet and well secured. Overall equipment and machines are high quality. The location of this flat is just a hundred meters away from some of the best spots in Rotterdam. Alex was helpful and very approachable. He made sure to answer every questions I had, in a timely manner.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Nice, spacious appartement near the city center, with good views. Several restaurants within walking distance and the subway is across the road and gets you the center in minutes. We had a pleasant and comfortable stay.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Alex is an amazing host.
Not only did I enjoy the apartment during my stay, he was also so kind to help me after my check out for dropping me off to the place I rented because I couldn't find any Uber during the rush hour on Friday. The apartment has amazing view, even better than the pictures. The location is great; it only takes 3 stops with tram to go to the center. The neighbourhood is so calm and quite. If you move out to Rotterdam or come here for vacation, Alex's apartment is great place to stay! He informs you about your every question and problem immediately as well. It's been a great stay.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
We loved our stay at Alex's apartment! The place is spacious, and it was so relaxing and refreshing to not have clutter falling from each cabinet and shelf. The clean and modern design was just what we were looking for while spending a week in Rotterdam. The huge windows on 3 sides of the building gave excellent views of all the different waterways and marinas along with plenty of sunlight. Our favorite part was the open kitchen with perfectly seasoned cast iron pans for cooking our own meals. The location was ideal as well, just 2 mins from the metro line and many different tram lines. Wish we had booked it for a month or more.
in addition to this, Alex was an excellent host. He was responsive, clear and very welcoming.
We can't wait to be back for a stay next year!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: it is a very beautiful and very welcoming house, it has a very beautiful view and it is very quiet, I will return with great pleasure

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
This flat is in a great location with easy access both to the Katendrecht and to central Rotterdam via the Erasmusbrug.
The flat is a really good size with a great eating/sitting room with views on 3 sides. It's light and airy with good facilities including a decently equipped kitchen if like us you enjoy cooking.
The host Alex met us on our arrival so he could give us tips about where to to/what to do.
A real pleasure to stay there.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Alex is a super nice person, and a very caring and welcoming host! He always responds very quickly, is clear and available. He checked in us personally, explaining us all the comfort of the home.
Alex's house is modern and well furnished, with a beautiful view on the cityscape! Spacious and super functional the apartment has all you need to feel like home, even for the smallest! We have moved to Rotterdam for a couple of weeks with our newborn and Alex made us find everything we needed (even a cot and an highchair). The building is accessible with the stroller, thanks to the comfy lift.
The neighborhood is delicious, quiet and well connected with the city. Highly recommended a drink at sunset in the bar on the closest marina! The metro and bus stations are very close.
We can't wait to come again to stay at Alex apartment!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This was the best AirBNB ever!!! Bright, spacious, modern, super-clean, clutter-free, fabulous view, high quality kitchen/appliances, luxurious bed, great shower, 2-minute walk from metro and trams with easy access to everything. Alex welcomed me and gave me a tour, and even left fresh flowers and chocolates!  I hope to return on my next visit to Rotterdam. Highly recommended.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: perfect views of the city of Rotterdam , Perfect apartment , perfect location ,feels like home :) ! Thank you Alex for your hospitality and patience , 100% recommended !

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
This apartment is so incredible that from now on we're planning all our Rotterdam trips around its availability!
Not only it is huge and fully equipped with everything you may think you'd need, the view and location couldn't be any better either.
Check in/out and communication with Alex was seamless and I already can't wait to stay there again.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: It was a pleasure staying at Alex‘s apartment. It is as advertised. The flat is spacious, has great views of the city and has everything you’ll need for a great stay in Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: Your flat was wonderful. It was very cozy and had a stunning view. The kitchen is well equipped. In total the stay was amazing and we would love to stay there again.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: We have stayed in airbnbs all over the world and alex's place is among the best. It is very large and has great views. Well equipped and comforatble. It is quiet and the beds very very nice. Would certainly go back.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
It was our second stay at the apartment and it can't get any better. It's beautiful, spacious, well decorated and it has EVERYTHING you might need. The button of my coat fell and of course there was a sewing kit at hand.
The location is the best, a block away from Erasmusbrug with the tram and metro across the street. All of supermarkets and essential shops are at walking distance and the kitchen is very well equipped for cooking all sorts of meals. It's perfect for both a quick or a longer stay.
Best Airbnb in Rotterdam and Alex is a wonderful host! Always very attentive and responsive and even allowed us an early check-in.
As long and it's available and Alex accepts us, this is our choice of accommodation in Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This was our second stay at Alex's appartment. It is a great place, close to Metro and Tram, but also easily walkable to the centre. Appartment has great facilities, great views and is a pleasure to stay in. Alex is a great host and we would definately stay again.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: We had such a wonderful two weeks at Alex’s. Right from the start, he was welcoming and answered all our questions. The welcome gifts of wine, chocolates and fresh flowers were such a nice surprise!  His apartment is spacious and beautifully decorated. Another welcome and unexpected gift was the amazing view. There are many windows, and all of them have water views!  And at night the city lights were as amazing as the daytime views. Another plus is that the metro is just across the street, and from there you have access to trains all over the Netherlands-and beyond. We took a train from there to Paris!  The transportation system is easy to use, and on time. We were so relaxed and felt at home. We highly recommend Alex’s place and hope we can return some day! Thank you for sharing your home, Alex!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Alex certainly lived up to his reputation as a super host. The apartment was enormous with views of the water from three sides and views of many famous landmarks — from the 15th floor! Metro & tram are just outside and everything is within easy reach. We loved our stay and would happily stay here again.
We had all the conveniences - full kitchen, laundry, TV, great WiFi. Also the metro stop really is directly across the street. Very comfortable furnishings, beds, sofas, dining chairs. We loved it and hope to be back!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This beautiful apartment is a little outside the city center (about 30-40 minute walk to the train station) but right across the iconic Erasmus bridge. Beautiful city and water views from a high floor, with the convenience of a carpark within the building complex. (Note to Americans -- the "1st floor" is often one floor up. ;) Walking distance to grocery stores (and the Jumbo we walked to take credit cards, not common in Dutch grocery stores, apparently), we ate in quite a few nights and enjoyed the large table. Washer and dryer very welcome for packing light + California king bed. Alex was a great communicator and also very helpful when we had trouble with the carpark gate and he was over in 10 minutes to push buttons with us and get it working. Recommended!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: The photos don’t do justice to the place. Fantastic views on three sides of the building, plenty of space. Metro directly across the road. No tourists.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: This apartment has a fantastic location (subway and trams are within a super short walking distance) and a great view from the 15th floor. It is very spacious, comfortable and has all you need for a nice stay. This includes fast internet and the possibility to stream your own music through various devices in the apartment. Really a great experience, enjoyed discovering Rotterdam and other cities around knowing that in the evening I'll have a comfy apartment waiting.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments:
Absolutely fantastic stay! The apartment was beautifully furnished, spotlessly clean, and incredibly comfortable. Everything felt thoughtfully designed and well-maintained. The location is good, not in the city centre but easy access to all the highlights of Rotterdam.
Check-in was seamless thanks to clear, straightforward instructions, and every detail was handled with care. From the cozy interior to the excellent amenities, and some drinks as a welcome. The view is amazing! It felt like a home away from home. I would highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Rotterdam. An exceptional experience from beginning to end!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: We loved our stay at Alex’s apartment. It was exactly as described and indeed very spacious and luxurious. Whilst it is not right in the city centre, it is only a short tram ride away and it is worth the journey to have the space in this apartment. The apartment is also very well equipped with everything to make you feel at home. Alex was delightful to communicate with and very responsive and all instructions were very clear. We would certainly recommend Alex’s place!

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: It’s a beautiful apartment with a 15th floor view of the entire area. Idyllic. Everything I needed was there.

name: Luxurious apt (110m2) near the Centre of Rotterdam
comments: I loved staying at Alex’s place. It was super clean, very spacious, quiet at night and the view was absolutely stunning. Alex was a great host, very responsive, and the check-in instructions were clear and easy to follow. I’d definitely book this apartment again for my next trip to Rotterdam. Thank you ☺️

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments: The Place is clean and the garden is beautiful and well maintained. A full Minibar with sodas and wine for free. Free street parking but not on premises. Wifi is abit weak,  flucuating between 1  and 25 mbit.

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments: Mooie plek, privacy volop, gaaf verbouwde schuur (top gedaan Robbrecht), ontbijt prima, lekkere koffie, tuin prachtig, fietsen langs de Rotte naar de stad erg leuk! Een tip: leg ook nog wat fruit neer, altijd fijn. Dank voor het prettige verblijf.

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments:
Jan Laurens and Robbrecht's Gardenhouse is a total jewelbox. It's so lovingly and thoughtfully constructed and maintained, and they struck a great balance with offering information and affording privacy. They had a gratis minibar with softdrinks, wine, and chocolates waiting, as well as a guide to the area, and Robbrecht was touching-up the (perfect-looking) exterior trim as I arrived. It was like staying in a boutique hotel, except all of the cords had been built into the walls, because their attention to detail was that high.
Their garden is a marvel- it abuts a canal that you walk around a hedge and under some willows to see, and the garden has immaculate annuals and perennials, as well as some specimen trees. It's not directly downtown, but if you don't mind a short trip with Uber, taking the RET, or riding the bikes, which is really fun, you'll get to discover some elegant Rotterdam neighborhoods, including Jan Laurens's.
Thoughtful folks and a beautiful place.

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments:
"All of the above." That summarizes our stay at Jan Laurens and Robbrecht's guesthouse.
A unique custom-built miniature structure built by Robbrecht himself, and infused with a craftsman's care to detail made our stay in Rotterdam very memorable. Set in an manicured garden with a small canal running behind a hedge, you will find yourself transported to an idyllic setting where you will scarcely believe that you have full access to transport and amenities on the street in front.
Thoughtful touches include spa soaps, fresh bottles of wine, soft drinks, coffee and tea, as well as chocolate left by the hosts.
And, of course, access to the pair of "Oma Fiets" is definitely a highlight, and allowed us to explore both the neighbourhood and Rotterdam the Dutch way: on bike!
Robbrecht welcomed us and orientated us, but we had full privacy to simply enjoy the setting on our own.
There are no cooking facilities: neither microwave or hotplate, but this didn't matter to us. And the large kitchen sink doubles as the bathroom vanity; again not an inconvenience, but something to know about.
Amongst the many unique places where we have stayed, this ranks right up there at the top!

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments: Dit tuinhuisje is zeer gezellig en mooi ingericht, brandschoon en voorzien van alle gemakken. Het is perfect voor 2 personen en je hebt veel privacy. Met de fiets ben je zo in de stad. Zeker een aanrader!

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments: We enjoyed our stay in the Garden  House so much we hope to have the opportunity to stay again. The Garden House is charming! I loved the geraniums in the window boxes, the garden is very pretty, and the bikes gave us opportunity to explore the countryside. We were amazed by all the waterfowl and animals we could see on just a short bike ride. Not to mention canals, the Rotte River and several windmills. Thanks for stocking the house with needed items, coffees, teas, and the wine.

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments:
Das Gartenhaus ist klein aber schön. Das absolute Highlight ist der wunderschöne Garten.
Mit den Fahrrädern kann man die sehenswerte Gegend erkunden und ist auch in 25min im Zentrum von Rotterdam oder in 15min am Bahnhof Richtung Den Haag.
Die perfekte Unterkunft für drei Tage.
Die Gastgeber sind sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir hatten eine gute Zeit.

name: Bed & Bike The Gardenhouse - Rotterdam
comments:
Leuke B&B en vriendelijk host.
klein maar super efficient ingericht, gelegen in een groene omgeving.
We hebben dankbaar gebruik gemaakt van de 2 beschikbare fieten om de highlights van Rotterdam te bezoeken.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie and Donald are a fabulous guests, feeling like at home in that sweet room with incredible views of the river and the skyline, the location of the house is perfect, in a lovely Island ( I call it la Isla Bonita ) with original Rotterdam houses and close to the center and to the Metro station, I will come back for sure! Thanks Gerdie and Donald!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie's attic room is cosy and warmly decorated, as is the seating and dining area adjoining it. Everything is as it should be and some elements surpass expectations (for example the flurry of pillows on the bed is sure to meet the needs of fussy sleepers such as myself).
Gerdie's rooms are simply part of her house, so you should expect to run into her and her partner. When you do, you will find them equally delightful as the rooms.
Gerdie's zolderkamer is gezellig en warm ingericht, net als de leef- en eetruimte die er aan palt. Alles is zoals het hoort, en sommige elementen overtreffen verwachting (bijvoorbeeld de veelheid aan kussens op het bed helpen kieskeurige slapers zoals ik).
Gerdie's kamers maken deel uit van haar woning, dus je zal haar en haar partner waarschijnlijk kruisen. Je zal hen even hard op prijs stellen als de kamers!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie and her husband are wonderful and incredibly kind people. Their hospitality is stunning and Gerdie has taken fascinating care of her guests.
She was always available for any question and always tried to make the stay as pleasant as possible.
The location is fantastic, a wonderful view and centrally located. Everything you need can be reached by bike in a short time.
It was great.
Thank you very much Gerdie.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Everything is amazing! The apartment is located in a quiet neighbourhood near the city centre and surrounded by the nice view of the river. Gerdie is one of the best hosts I've met - very friendly, considerate and always communicative to make sure I have what I need. It was such a pleasure chatting with her, getting to know her insight about the city. There're also small decorations around the apartment showing how thoughtful she was in offering a cozy living experience for the guest. If I have to pick the most memorable thing from the stay, it would be the delicious marmalade she made for my breakfast! Would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Perfect location with a great view on the Erasmus bridge and the river, Gerdie was really nice and the room was well cosy.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie was a really lovely and extremely helpful host. The flat is beautiful, cosy and perfectly located on the cool old fashioned island. The view is absolutely stunning. We had a couple of great talks with Gerdie and would definitely recommend everyone to stay in here.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Having travelled extensively, I can honestly say Gerdie and her husband are two of the best Airbnb hosts I have ever met. The hospitality throughout the stay was outstanding - Gerdie even shared some of her delicious dinners with me! The room is cosy and clean, boasting some fantastic views, and with all the amenities you could need for a comfortable stay. The location is superb; close to Rotterdam Centraal with the metro station just a short walk away. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a great stay in Rotterdam.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is the perfect host! Always trying guests to feel comfortable. The apartment is in a very quite place; not far from the city center by walk. The room and its sitting room are absolutely clean and comfortable; a nice place to stay. Awesome views from there! Rotterdam deserves another visit and, for sure, I will be back if possible to Gerdies' place! Absolutely recommendable!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is the most friendly host I have met, and I appreciate her hospitality very much. The room itself is cozy, the view is amazing, and the location is very convenient. Would definitely visit again!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: We stayed in the room at the top of the building with a view of the Rotterdam skyline. When the weather is nice, you can sit on the terrace, richly decorated with plants. The room is comfortable, pleasant and tastefully decorated, as well as the other rooms you can use such as the dining room/lounge and the bathroom. Gerdie is a great host and makes sure you lack for nothing. Top location and top service.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Pleasant stay in Gerdie’s place! The view from the room is amazing. The house is super clean with easy check in/ out process. Gerdie is a communicative host, and as I tried to improve my “Nederlands”, she patiently bore with my “broken” language. Very recommended.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Amazing host! Gerdie is very organized, warm, welcoming, kind, fun and a great cook too.
The apartment is has a great location in a quiet neighbourhood and nice views from both the guest rooms.
The rooms, bathroom, toilet, and guest area - all are super clean and very well maintained.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
i had a very nice stay in this typical dutch house, thats located on an iland in the middl of rotterdam. every thing was nice and clean and gerdie was very welcoming. i even got pancakes and homemade soup from her :) the wlan worked very well, what was important for me because i had do lot of onlinework. the most i enjoyed the wonderful view of the maas, out of my window, during working.
thanks a lot. ill come again :))

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie is the perfect super host. The location has a beautiful view over the Maas, the rooms are clean, spacious and she even made us dinner and breakfast.
6/5 stars

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is very welcoming & made us feel like home. She helped us with the public transport. She makes these little notes starting from your names on the room door to the welcome note on the living room. She also made us a wonderful breakfast on easter morning. Totally it's a lovely place with a beautiful view from the window. Really enjoyed our stay here.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is truly a SuperHost. She makes you feel comfortable and welcome while also allowing your privacy.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is the best hostess we had of the whole trip. She was very kind at every moment with us. The location is excellent, with an amazing view! I recommend it 100%!!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Smooth checkin, place as described, with a great view. neighboorhood has many cozy local cafes and restaurants. Near the center,.but very calm and with a small town fell (some 20 min to the nearest tram/metro, so mostly locals). Host Gertie was nice and very attentive, before, during and right after our stay, with excellent insider tips and directions, and a welcoming soup and breakfast.  Three very nice, sunny, warm days. Would definitelly return if again in Roterdam.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Great location with a nice view of the center of Rotterdam. The room is definitely a little small but great for the price, and Gerdie is an amazing host with lots of insights into Rotterdam for visitors!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: My boyfriend and I stayed at Gerdie’s place for three nights during a festival. First of all, Gerdie is a very nice and welcoming host who really wants to make your stay as pleasant as possible :) the attic room is just as described in the listing. It’s definitely big enough for one person, and big enough for two if you’re only staying a couple of nights. The two separate beds are comfortable, although squeeky. The appartment is in a quiet neighborhood, but you will hear traffic noises from further away in the city (sound travels easily over water). The curtain blocks the view, but not the light. So if you’re sensitive to sound or light, bring ear plugs and a sleeping mask. We did and it was enough to give us a good nights rest :) The bathroom looks indeed luxurious, new even, but the shower was a little flaky: it kept getting cold and then warm and then cold again. There are three pairs of very steep stairs to get to the room. Because the room is at the highest point of the house (obviously) it can get pretty hot in summer, as it did when we were there. Gerdie provides a fan to help with that, which we appreciated. The island is quite nice to have a stroll on, nice views all around! Especially at night when all the buildings light up. Walking to the nearest public transportation (the subway) will take you 20 minutes, after that it’s only a couple of minutes more to get you into town. All in all I would recommend this place if you don’t mind the little remarks I made above!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie was incredibly kind and knowledgeable about the surrounding area. We immediately felt welcome and she made our whole stay headache free. The view from our room was incredible too!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: My stay at Gerdie's place has been exceptionally good. The house is beautiful, and in a beautiful location. Waking up to that view was breathtaking every single time. I can never say enough good things about Gerdie and Donald. They have helped me so much in my first days in this city and I cannot thank them enough. They are among the few people who personally take care of you and are willing to get to know you too. My stay with them has been a beautiful memory that I shall cherish forever. ❤️

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is a lovely person! We had very pleasant conversations and she helped me with all she could. The place has an incredible view, and in a super tranquil neighborhood. Can’t recommend enough!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is a super open minded and empathical person truely interested in people and with every respect for privacy. A host with passion. I never had my name at the door in an airbnb. Here it as not for orientation, but just to feel welcomed. It is a great private sorrowly maintained and renovated house with very steap stairs. I had forgotten about dutch houses. But we/she managed my folded bike. I should have asked beforehand, and as it was there I challenged her to a too high extend.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is a wonderful host, very friendly and helpful. Location wise it’s a great place with beautiful surroundings. Although needed to climb a significant numbers of stairs to reach to the room (typical Dutch house, I suppose), the view from the room was amazing. Best place for solo travellers. I enjoyed staying there. Thanks.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie was a superb host and very helpful. I enjoyed talking to her in the evening and reading all her useful hints for activities in the city. And it was very nice to find my name on the door of "my room", when I arrived :-) The island location of the house and great views from the window on Rotterdam's futuristic architectural sites gave another charm to my stay. Absolutely marvellous!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: I stayed for two nights at Gerdie's place and it was by far my favourite of the places I stayed whilst in the Netherlands. Gerdie was responsive right from booking to arriving and was super friendly and welcoming on arrival. The room was better than expected, with a great view and everything was clean. It is up 3/4 sets of very steep, narrow typical Dutch stairs. Gerdie suggested a local restaurant for me to eat at on the night prior to running the Rotterdam Marathon and even called to see if there was space for me. I felt safe there which is important as a solo female traveler. Would happily stay there again. Thanks Gerdie!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Nice place to stay. Close to the center of the city, but far from traffic noise. Authentic and peaceful place with nice panoramic views.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: It was a fantastic stay; the hosts are very kind and friendly; the room with wonderful view; the condition of my room was nice. Overall, i could have an experience to stay at the well-renovated lovely dutch house.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: The view is amazing. Gerdie is really nice.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie is a beautiful household!
everything was perfect, my stay was totally comfortable and pleasant!
pay attention that stairway is too complicated for heavy bags.
Great view, nice location, perfect recommendations. Thank you!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is an amazing host. The place felt like home. Very cozy place with a nice view and surroundings. Very recommended!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie's place is a wonderful place to stay in. The room is very comfortable and homey. The view from the room is also stunning. It's on the Noordereiland with very peaceful surroundings. Very close to city center. Not to mention Gerdie's hospitality is what stands out the most. I don't think I’ve met a friendlier host. She was very accomodating and helpful. If I had the chance, I would've stayed longer. Definitely will come back the next time I'm in Rotterdam.
Note: the room is at the attic with 4 flights of stairs. If you don't mind the stairs and don't have that heavy of a luggage, this is the perfect room and Gerdie is the most lovely host.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
I had a fantastic stay with Gerdie at Rotterdam. Had a warm welcome from her and she gave helpful suggestions on what I could do around Rotterdam during my stay. She also checked in daily with me to ensure everything is going well.
I was also able to prepare simple meals with what is available im the common room (microwave, fridge and toaster). The view is lovely from the window in the room, especially at night! Room was really comfortable as well. I’ll definitely stay with Gerdie again when I visit Rotterdam in the future.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie is fantastic
I was still able to check in easily despite being very late. She was available throughout, the accommodation was clean with a beautiful view and at the best possible price.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is a wonderful host.  She always responsive, friendly and attentive to help you whenever you need it.  She was flexible in my checking because the bus was four hours late.  The view of the room is beautiful, and her house is located in a peaceful neighborhood.  I would give her 6 stars if I could.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: The home was incredibly cosy and very Dutch! Please be aware this means that a lot of steps will be involved, but I’d say it’s well, well worth it! The stay is located on an island which is one of the few preserved areas of Rotterdam, as the Germans sheltered here during WW2, and it’s now a protected cityscape due to its intact architectural character. The room has a beautiful view of the river, contemporary buildings across the Maas and the famous Erasmus bridge. I also really loved the common area for the airbnb guests, sticked with a coffee machine and delicious stroopwafels!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
gorgeous room in a lovely peaceful location, with great river views. beautiful house and great host.
watch out is that room is up 4 flights of steps, no issue for me though

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Hi,
Gerdie and her husband provide a safe place to stay in Rotterdam. Gerdie has been doing this for a long time and is well aware of the needs and requirements of all the travellers that come to stay with her. The best things about this place is the location, the view and the accessability to the supermarkets or Rotterdam Centrum/Blaak from her place (you can also walk to these places, I used to do that). She keeps the place very clean. It's an old style dutch house and you may have to climb some stairs, but for the price I paid for a week I found it worth it. It was very comfortable and the neighbourhood is safe and beautiful. My first experience in Rotterdam and I really enjoyed it.
Regards
Geet

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie is a great and friendly host. She makes sure you're comfortable and my room had a great view of the Maas river. The stairs can be quite a climb but all of this is quite clear in the description.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie is amazing - super kind and attentive, made me feel like home.
The room has a nice view of the bridge and the perfect structure if you need to work from there.
I can't wait to come back 💙

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Great location in terms of peace and view. A little hard to get back to but that’s the price you pay for the island feeling. Gerdie was helpful and kind. I felt at home. This is an attic location so prepare yourself for stairs- typical in Holland! If the sun is shining check out the nearby Koozie cafe. Thank you Gerdie for everything

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Gerdie and Donald were wonderful hosts. The accommodation is located in a tranquil area with stunning views of the Maas,  but also worked extremely well as a base to explore the city and other parts of the Netherlands. Thoroughly recommended.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Great location on an island in the middle of the river. Not far from the action and the sights with a bit of walking. Nice views from the room and the hostess Gerdie is LOVELY!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Great host with proactive, friendly and informative communication. Room is perfectly fine, and the small cooking place is perfect for breakfast and light meal (no water on that floor, need to go down one floor). Steep steps to get to the room, best to be careful with carrying luggage up and down.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: The Attic room has an awesome view! Once you have all your luggage up there & you get settled, it really is so cute & cozy! Gerdie & her husband were lovely & helpful. I recommended this place to other travellers coming to beautiful Rotterdam!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: Comfortable and good views

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: The place is beautifully located and offers a great opportunity to experience life in a traditional Dutch house with a rich history. The room with a terrace provides a wonderful view of the city skyline. The host is very friendly, helpful, and communicative.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Gerdie is an amazing, affable, animated, wonderful, woman. She is so helpful and communicative. Was a delight to talk to and learn about her and Rotterdam through her eyes. Really can't say enough good things about her.
Her place is zo gezellig. Exactly what I was looking for. Very clean and tidy. I wish i could move in as a fulltime tenant.
Seriously, perfect.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
I would have recommended this place if Gerdie had shown more hospitality on the last night of my stay. There were layers of misunderstandings, and she communicated inappropriately. She got upset for the reason that was not true and straightforwardly exhibited that by snatching my belongings and yelling at me, saying, “I have a sick family, and this is how I speak.” She was mad at me because she sent a message when I was sleeping (I sleep early at 9pm), and I apologized for not checking it promptly, just to be nice to her. However, she didn’t apologize for her hostile behavior but kept exhibiting it. I didn’t feel my privacy and sleep schedule were respected, and as a guest who paid for a room, this was a terrible experience.
In the end, she even grabbed my face and said, “You’re leaving tomorrow morning, bye, bye..” repeating. I was stoned and shocked when she touched my face with her hands. It was like I was staying in a hostile relative’s house for free, not as a guest who paid.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Thanks so much to Gerdie during my stay.
The place was super clean, and she was so thoughtful to provide stuff for the guests, a heater, snacks, tea, coffee, and soup. You would feel like living at a warm place in Rotterdam.
The room is very quiet on the top floor as an attic room with your name on a small blackboard. I stayed for 2 nights, and the view out of the room window was so beautiful at sunrise and at night.
She was warm and kind, climbing up to chat with me with bad knees. I enjoyed our conversation and my stay there.
I recommend this place to anyone interested in staying in Rotterdam for a while.
Hug again.

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
A very pleasant stay with Gerdie, a lovely cosy room perfect in Rotterdam with a lovely harbour view
Very clean house and respectful host, would return if possible:)

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: If you are in Rotterdam, don't think twice to stay at Gerdie's! She is a very friendly and helpful person, I felt very welcome and at home. The surrounding is extremely pretty, especially the view from outside the bedroom. From there it's just a 20 min walk to the tram station (Station Blaak) where the Markthalle and Cube Houses are located. Alternatively you can take the bus, with the halt being just a 2 min walk from Gerdie's. I would definitely stay here when I come back to Rotterdam!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments: it was so great! thank you! would reccomend! great view and great room, nice hospitality too

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
Perfect stay! Gerdie is such a lovely person and very helpful. Her house is so beautiful and with the bus you quickly arrive at the city centre or walk 15 min. The room was very cosy and the amenities very clean and comfortable.
The location on the island is really nice and the view on Erasmusbridge very cool!
I will definitely try to come back!

name: Attic room with a view over the river Maas
comments:
The home is in a real good location, easy to get to, peaceful and a nice view from the room. Good value.
Gerdie is wonderful, very nice and accommodating with good recommendations.

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: My parents had a lovely stay in this beautiful spacious apartment with the stunning view over the river and the skyline of Rotterdam. Steef and his wife were excellent hosts!

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: Beautiful, stylish, clean apartment in a special neighbourhood on Noordereiland. The original features of the 1884 home are exquisite and the view of the Rotterdam skyline and river activity from the lounge and balcony are the highlight. Highly recommended for individuals and couples who don’t have a problem with one flight of steep stairs 😊

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: Luxury experience! The host, the place and the location is absolutely fantastic. Steef was an incredible host, very communicative and even rescued me from the locked out balcony super quick. Recommend the place 100%

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: We, a couple from Germany felt well from the first moment and  we think Steef describes the comfortable equipped apartment very well but it is difficult to have words for this grandiose view we enjoyed every day.

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments:
Perfect location, iconic view and balcony. Your stay makes you feel a « real » amsterdamer !
Steef is so welcoming and helpful at any moment.
Just care about the stairs if you’re not too strong with heavy luggage !

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments:
Steef and Mehrnusch were great hosts! We had a pleasant stay! Nice view of the river. Be mindful that there’s a bridge to reach downtown.
Be prepared to climb some stairs but it worth it!

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: The best views in Rotterdam. If you want to wake up in the morning with a 180 degree view of the Maas river, if you are facinated by long river boats passing by every 10 minutes, if you want a private balcony facing sunsets over Erasmusburg, or if you're just looking for a small quiet island community while still being extremely close to downtown... Then you should stay here. Probably one of the best locations in all of Rotterdam.

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: Flat is absolutely stunning! Gorgeous view from the living room and balcony. Very quite area, perfect for a relaxing time by the river or as for me it was a great place to work from. I’ve stayed for 2 weeks and enjoyed every moment. Definitely recommend it! Best stay in Rotterdam so far!

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: We were so lucky to find this beautiful apartment. The view is spectacular and the apartment gorgeous (even the steep staircase which is common in Holland did not hinder us).  The apartment is very conveniently located to public transport (bus) and is in a quiet  and private part of the city. It is also within walking distance from the city centre (groceries , restaurants etc).  The wifi in the apartment was excellent and combined with the wonderful view made working from home a charm. Steef and Mehrnusch are fantastic hosts and this apartment will be our first choice every time we are in Rotterdam.

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments: I had a great stay in this apartment, the location was extremely convenient just a 20-30 minute walk to the busy center but the neighbourhood where the apartment is located was very calm, quiet, and beautiful. There is a supermarket just around the corner and a big market every Tuesdays and Saturday a 20 minute walk away (or 2 bus stops). There was a gym right across the river, an easy 10 minute walk, which made it extremely convenient for me to get to in the mornings. The apartment itself had everything you needed for a relaxed and comfortable stay with terrific views of the river. Mehrnusch and Steef were great host, quick to respond to any questions and very accommodating and helpful. Good Internet, Netflix, and Hot water pressure were added bonuses to this great apartment. Would definitely stay again when next in the area.

name: Iconic apartment with river view, near city centre
comments:
I recently stayed in this beautiful apartment and I can't say enough good things about it!
The location was perfect, with easy access to everything I needed.
The apartment itself was stunning, gorgeous view over the river with beautiful interior and all the amenities you could wish for.
The host was attentive and made sure my stay was as comfortable as possible.
I would love to stay here again in the future!

name: Authentic Wheelhouse on Ship "Mizar"
comments: The suite is just as advertised. An old boat (1930's) has been converted into 3 apartment suites. We stayed in the end suite and it was lovely. The check in was smooth, the boat was easy to find, and the location is wonderful - right on the canal next to the Martimer's Museum. We stayed for 4 nights and slept well each night.  Monique as a host, was warm and welcoming. There was space to sit privately or outside to have a glass of wine. The only room that might be tricky for some is the bathroom. You have to be quite agile to get in and out, but this is expected for staying on a boat! Highly recommended!

name: Authentic Wheelhouse on Ship "Mizar"
comments: Monique is very responsive to any question. The houseboat is very stylish decorated with original elements and with a nice view from the steering hut. City center is within a nice walks distance and around the corner is a supermarket and nice coffee bars.  I highly recommend saying at Moniques house boat!

name: Ruime woning in centrum van Rotterdam
comments:
Perfect house for a citytrip in Rotterdam. We had a great weekend with friends in Saskia's house. House conform to photos, spacious, clean, freshly decorated, most rooms have been renovated and refurbished. Bright house with a lot of charm (mezzanine, garden, balcony ...).
Saskia and her son were very helpful, responsive and caring to us. The house is very well located, close to the central station (and public transport), in an authentic street, very charming and quiet.
Good value for money.
We recommend 100%!

name: Ruime woning in centrum van Rotterdam
comments: Saskia and his son welcomed us very well. We've really liked Saskia's appartement! It's luminous, warm and so well decorated, close to the train station, in a quite street. Perfect place for a weekend of citytrip!

name: Central semiprivate floor great for solo travelers
comments: Staying at Koko's was very convenient. I like the clean design of the place and that it's located in a quieter neighbourhood  of the city. Cafés are in a 10-15 minutes walking distance but Koko also offered me to have coffee and breakfast at the place. He is a very sweet host and gave some good recommendations on what to do in Rotterdam. Because I was on a work trip I didn't get to spend much time in the apartment or the surrounding but I enjoyed the stay a lot and found Koko to be super easy going and great to chat to. If you're looking for a calm place slightly off the center I definitely recommend staying with him.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Very big and lovely apartment with a great view on Delfshaven. Host is kind and caring. Close to metro and tram stops. Few minutes and you are in the core of Rotterdam. A perfect stay.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Thank you for the wonderful house for me stay In Rotterdam ! The location is closed to central station . There is so many restaurants and food around ! The views is really good ! I would like to
Come back again

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
The property was very clean and tidy at our arrival, it was very well equipped with all modern appliances, besides, a very decent, stylish furniture. The location is marvellous, only 150 m walk from the Metro station, and few steps to the Tram station, with a relaxing view over the Canal.
The host was very hospitable, and good communicating. Very polite and offering help all the time.
Collectively, my stay was very comfortable and amazing.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: This huge apartment, with its balcony, is really nice and has everything you need! It is very well situated, with charming Delfthaven just across the bridge and a tramway to Central Station down the building, and a direct bike path to Delft... The crossroad is a bit noisy but it totally worth it!  Ingrid is a nice and welcoming host, she made us feel at home (or at a friend's home). We highly recommend her and her place

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Thank you for letting us stay in your stylish and spacious apartment with a homely feel! Also in a fantastic location in Rotterdam with good views from the balcony. Would definitely return!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Super hospitality and a beautiful, well-appropriated flat with an incredible view. Ingrid is a superb host, and her home is a welcoming and peaceful oasis. We felt truly spoiled, and would have loved to stay longer!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: A lovely home in Rotterdam with tons of natural light and a very enjoyable outdoor space. Ingrid was a great host and very accommodating during our stay. The bed was so comfortable and the living room was perfect to unwind after a long day. Would definitely visit here again. Thanks for everything Ingrid !

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Perfect Airbnb. Great historic location with amazing views like a luxury New York loft style decorated out with designer finishes and tasteful art pieces. Full of amenities and spotlessly clean.
Ingrid herself was very Professional and easy to deal with.
Wish we could have stayed longer.
Thanks again for everything Ingrid.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Wonderful bright flat very close to metro and trams. I’d certainly stay here again.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Ingrid, thanks for allowing us to stay at your amazing home. The view of historic Rotterdam is what we were drawn to along with the stylish flat and tons of windows. We were so pleased to learn the location was the best of both worlds. Steps away from the old world and steps away from a tram that took you on a short less than 10 minute ride to city centre with great shops and stops along the way.
It was so easy to navigate as the tram did it for us. On and off service, we got a day pass and was able to jump on and off as we like as well as ride the subway.
We ate at such a charming and romantic restaurant at a 2 minute walk over the short bridge along the canal. It was just lovely. Grocery store just minutes walk was nice as well.
Your place was super clean with all the modern touches. The bed provided a restful night sleep and the linens were new and comfy. Waking up to the view of the canal and ancient landscape of buildings across from it was breathtaking.
Water pressure was really good and doing our laundry before we left was very convenient.
Thanks for the fresh tulips, wine and beer and the tips.
We will highly recommend your place to our friends coming out later this year. Again PERFECT location and flat!
Sincerely, Tracy and Frank

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Ingrid's apartment was perfect for our short trip to Rotterdam...we had a great time. Dinner at le souk restaurant in Delfhaven was definitely a highlight!
The apartment was very comfortable, clean and tidy, homely and well appointed. Check in was seemless and communication excellent.
The apartment is close to shops and restaurants, and only a couple of minutes from the tram stop back into the centre. Stunning views of the river, especially from the balcony with morning cuppa!
Would definitely stay here again if back in Rotterdam.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: nice modern open plan apartment with windows and balcony overlooking canals and the old un-bombed part of rotterdam(great views), can even walk to a working windmill! easy to get to with  no 4 tram stopping almost outside, 200m to a metro station 10mins into the centre. some great bars just across the canal with lots of local characters. the owners were very helpful with a early check in and the well built apartment had everything we needed! thanks a lot xx

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: We absolutely loved it! What a beautiful apartment with Ingrid as an extraordinary sweet host. Nothing to complain: wonderful flat with high end equipment and a beautiful view!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Pretty appartement with a nice balcony and a nice décoration,
Great host. I recommend it

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: It was really great in La's apartment. It's exactly like on the photos, bright, stylish, full of art in, we find, the best quarter of Rotterdam. Contact with La was extraordinarily easy,  she answered quickly, always without any complications. Highly recommended. Andrea and Gerd

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Great apartment. Perfect location, amazing view, new building with elevators.  10/10

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Like last time when we were in La' s fantastic appartement we felt completely welcomed and comfortable. One has a great view to Delfshaven  and to the city it's a walk of 15 minutes. La is quick and easy communicating and we will return when we're the next time in Rotterdam.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: The place is fantastic. It is much more spacious than on the photos, the view is amazing, the neighbourhood is very charming. Ingrid is super friendly and made us feel absolutely welcome. She also keeps some great art pieces in the flat which is a great pro too. I would definitely come back, greatly recommended

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
Ingrid’s apartment was super, amazing view of the canal, lots of space, modern look and feel and still quiet for rest
Well situated and Ingrid was extremely attentive
Thanks so much Ingrid!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
We had a pleasant surprise... the apartment was larger than what we saw in the photos. Ingrid was a wonderful host; she shared a few details about the apartment and neighborhood; and she provided some beverages as well. Ingrid also showed us how to use the espresso machine.
We were confused by the lighting in the main room and kitchen. Ingrid explained how it worked, but after a long travel day, we were barely conscious when she explained. If we had stayed a few days longer, we'd have it all figured out.
The large balcony and view were two of the best features of the apartment. Looking at the river and the pre-World War 2 buildings on the other side gave us wonderful view.
We easily walked to grocery stores and plenty of restaurants. The subway stop was a quick walk away. For us, this was a wonderful place to stay and a good base to explore Rotterdam.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
I stayed in Ingrid's apartment for 11 nights, what a luxury and a treat. I definitely needed Ingrid's welcome tour, from the location of the secret light switch for the under counter lighting, to the controls to raise and lower the head of the bed. The apartment beautifully reflects her wonderful aesthetic. The expansive windows gave me views of the colorfully lit ferris wheel, and the fireworks on Kings Day! I enjoyed looking at the canals (the apartment overlooks a junction) as well at watching the lift bridge open to allow huge barges to go through.
As others have mentioned, the proximity of the Metro (Delfshaven) and tram was a plus. If I stay again I will take the train from Schiphol to Schiedam Centrum where it's any easy transfer to the Delfshaven Metro stop. It's a quick walk to several grocery stores. I became a 'regular' at Al Malek Sweets near the Metro.
I thoroughly enjoyed my visit to Rotterdam, in no small part because I had Ingrid's apartment to come 'home' to.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Ingrid's apartment counts as one of our all-time favorite Airbnb experiences. The space itself is large, very clean, and with a charming view from its many windows and its balcony. What especially stood out to us is how gracious a host Ingrid is. She clearly enjoys sharing her space with travelers and goes out of her way to help them enjoy the beautiful city of Rotterdam.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Gorgeous view and apartment!  Only 7-minute walk to metro station.  Ingrid’s home is amazing…deep soaking tub, good shower pressure, comfortable bed.  No air conditioning, but bedroom has ceiling fan.  No microwave, but has high-end stovetop.  Highly recommend!!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Ingrid’s place was beautiful and perfect for us! The apartment was huge, super clean, and had everything we needed! The location is great and very walkable - lots of little cafes/pubs and grocery stores nearby! Hubby enjoyed many hours sitting on the balcony watching the people go by and marvelled at the huge boats squeezing  through the draw bridge opening! Totally recommend!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Ingrid’s apartment has a fabulous location. It’s close to public transport, and you can look out the window to see views of commercial barges going down the canal. The neighborhood is safe and has restaurants,  grocery stores and great bars within walking distance. The apartment is well appointed and has everything you need for dining in or out. The pictures do not do justice to the sunlight and open feel of the great room. And, it’s very comfortable for just relaxing. The patio is, also, comfortable and spacious. There is very little street noise at night. And we are pretty sensitive to that kind of thing being in our 70s!!  Ingrid is the perfect hostess, so gracious and responsive to any questions we had. We fell in love with the water activity, art and people of Rotterdam during our two week stay in Ingrid’s apartment. We highly recommend the city and her home.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
The apartment is really nice, spacious and cozy.
The coffee machine was making a great coffee 😍
Fully, no max possible fully, equipped kitchen. Bathroom with both bath and shower. Big living room with windows with a beautiful view of the river and the terrace. Also our small boy really liked fox under the TV set, they became friends . 😄
Our stay was quite good, even though we had a unpleasant accident with our son breaking some stuff, which we openly informed Ingrid right after it happened without hiding anything, and we did find a mutual understanding and solution on this matter.
Thanks once again, Ingrid!
Best wishes!)

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Great apartment! More spacious than we anticipated. Fabulous views, very walkable, generous amenities, including a top-notch espresso machine. Highly recommend!

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Ingrid’s place. The living room and bedroom are bright, airy and spacious and have enjoyable canal views. The kitchen is well-equipped and the dining table is generously proportioned.
We very much liked the location — a short stroll to friendly bars and pubs on Nieuwe Binnenweg and comfortable walking distance into the heart of Rotterdam.
Ingrid is a charming host, generous with her time and resourcefully responsive to questions.
Highly recommended.

name: Stylish apartment for the great Rotterdam getaway
comments: Fantastic Airbnb! The pictures do not do this apartment justice. It is a spacious, bright, clean and comfortable space that is very tastefully decorated. Balcony also spacious and provides views out to the heart of Delfshaven. 5 minute walk to Metro and tramline direct to Centraal Station. Ingrid is the best host! Very communicative, friendly, and interesting! I will be back. Do not hesitate to book this unit if you are going to Rotterdam. Thanks Ingrid!

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Nice location, between two lively streets with a lot of cafes, restaurant and neat shops. The apartment is very clean. Checkin was very easy and communication very quick.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
I have been in the studio during the marathon weekend. The host is super kind and available for anything you may need.
The check-in procedure is quick and straightforward. The equipped kitchen was very well appreciated.
Even though the studio is on the ground floor the street is quiet.
I recommend the host and the flat. I would definitely go back there.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
The appartment is located on the ground floor of a quiet street, and has a very large blinded window - no view but a lot of daylight.
Very clean, comfortable, all amenities in and around, perfect location and easy check-in and out.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
Location is very fine near of stores, restaurants and points ir interest. The apartment was very clean.
On another hand, bedroom is just beside the side walk (separated by a glass) so any noises from the street could be heard. There is no outside view at all and for some people (like me) it is bad. Also the furniture/decoration are quite unpersonal, not cosy.
The place is ok but with this price I would look for something little bit better next time.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Good location, centric but in a quiet side street. It's at ground level facing the street. Clean which is a often a miss in airbnbs. Two supermarkets nearby. Basic furnished with essentials. Room for improvement: a dining table appropriate for the space as the one there is too big and seating facing the wall. Also missing outlet next to bed to charge phone which is something basic to expect. I had to crawl below dining table to connect the phone aAlso need small heating unit as the temperature cannot be controlled by guest...the apartment is at ground level so it is on the chillier side. These small improvements could make the place cozier and more "mature." It is great value for young solo traveler or young couple for a couple days.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Loc's place is nice, in a lovely neighborhood and never far from any of the sites in Rotterdam. The unit is private, has its own entrance, and has no shared accommodations.  Kitchen was good for storing food and making simple meals. Internet worked well, and the bed was comfortable. The bathroom has a hair dryer and a shower with good pressure and hot water. Place is quiet, some noise when people are coming and going since the front entrance is right outside the apartment but nothing unbearable. Apartment is on the ground floor, so good option for those with limited mobility. Easy check-in process and clear instructions from Loc. Would stay again!

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Everything was just as described, the studio is clean, spacious and bright, the location couldn't be better and communication with the host was quick and easy. Would definitely come back!

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: We had a nice stay, the apartment was clean and the city centre was in a walkable distance. Unfortunately, one could hear everything in the house when in the apartment - also people walking up and down the stairs of the building. Nothing for people with light sleep, but otherwise a good spot to discover Rotterdam!

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
Studio autonome et non habitation partagée, un plus. Tout était conforme à la description et même si ça n'est pas en plein centre ville, j'ai pu tout faire à pied.
La literie est de bonne qualité, tout était propre et le logement facile d'accès, à un bon quart d'heure de la gare centrale à pied et sur le chemin, du streetart en prime.
On entend juste un peu le bruit du dehors car le logement est à rue et au rez de chaussée mais c'est un très petit inconvénient par rapport aux divers avantages.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
The studio was great, as described on the photos, clean, bright, with all necessary furniture, appliances and tableware.
Walking distance from railway station and main facilities. There are 2 big supermarkets and many cafes in the area.
I can recommend this accommodation.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments:
Good place to stay at, however the window next to the bed is a bit weird since people from outside could (if they wanted to) look into the room from a very specific angle which was somewhat uncomfortable.
During our stay, we heard loud yelling and stomps above us as well, but that depends on the tenants (i think it was an airbnb above us as well). There is minimal venting (or so we perceived) so we had to open the windows (top open) to air the place out to an extend!
But overall it is a clean place in a calm area, relatively close to couple public transport stations and grocery stores!
It was a pleasant stay overall minus the windows !

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: It is a great location and very clean. In case you are very sensitive to noise, you will hear the persons entering and leaving the house (the studio is placed next to the main entrance). but it wasnt a problem for me, not at all. highly recommended.

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Het is echt een heel schone studio. Voor ons was de matras en de kussens te zacht, maar dat kan persoonlijk zijn. Alles is aanwezig,van handdoeken tot zout, suiker en koffie. In een eerdere review gelezen dat het koud was en verwarming niet goed was, daar is nu geen sprake van. Het was aangenaam warm bij binnenkost en goed zelf te regelen. Minpunt is het parkeren. Wij hadden geluk dat we voor de deur konden parkeren, maar dat is niet vanzelfsprekend in deze straat. Hou ook rekening met de hoge parkeerkosten (zal stads eigen zijn).

name: A clean and cosy private studio in Rotterdam
comments: Well located for public transport and not too far for most people to walk to the centre. Various good groceries and cafes/bars nearby.  Well-equipped kitchen. Main issue was that the flat kept in a lot of heat as only one window opened. There was a good fan but it sleeping wasn't always easy. But it was an unusually hot week, and it wouldn't put us off from staying again as it was overall a good deal and the host was reliable.

name: Historical Delfshaven Apartment 1 w. Garden
comments: The place is a very lovely apartment to spend your time while in Rotterdam. There aren't too many places to go in this neighborhood, but the tram stops just 100m from the place and you'll get to busy streets in no time.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
Es liegt einfach super zentral. Haben uns gut aufgehoben gefühlt.
Parken mit Auto ist leider kostenpflichtig, oder man parkt etwa 15 min von der Unterkunft entfernt, dafür kostenlos.
Das Heizen mit dem Ofen war unser kleines Highlight.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
The view is amazing, in the evening you can see a nice sunset!
The location is perfect!!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
Eric is a wonderful host. He is a really nice guy and the communication is really good and easy.
The Boat is very beautiful. The best place to be in rotterdam. The boat is a good place to discover Rotterdam. Everything is very easy to reach. We have had a beautiful and great time on the boat. We've been there the second time and will definitely come back. The surrounding and location is absolutely amazing. Many bars etc are in this area. The old haven is directly here and you have a wonderful view on the old haven and old haven house. Very central, very easy to reach, absolute good feeling on board. Kitchen, Wlan and everything you need to have a nice and relaxing time is on board. Really great.
We loved to stay here.
Thank you Eric

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Incredibly charming houseboat right near key architectural highlights of Rotterdam's modernist architecture (cube houses!). My partner and I were arriving in Rotterdam by bike and Jeanette was very accommodating with our check-in time, which we were very grateful for. I thought we might have to compromise with the quality of amenities for the houseboat experience, but these two nights were the best sleep of our trip - hands down - and the shower was AMAZING. Super convenient location for navigating all that Rotterdam has to offer - we weren't more than 15 minutes away by any attraction by bike. Cats on the neighboring houseboat made our visit. : )

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Beautiful boat and perfect view. Thank you for this experience. :)

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
This is a great place to book for your next stay in Rotterdam. It is so charming, old atmosphere/ vibes and in perfect condition. There is everything there you need with some extra special touches... napkins, candles, lots of beautiful bedding, plenty of nice towels etc. And everything is super clean!!
It is also in a wonderful location , right next to the old harbour, lots of great restaurants, grocery store all in close proximity. If you want to experience life on a boat in the canal then this is the experience for you!!
Although the owners are next door they provide privacy, space and definitely do not interfere with your time there.
Oh... one more definite plus is the sweet little balcony out back that comfortably sits four for morning coffee and evening drinks :)
Book it... you won't be disappointed!!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed this beautiful houseboat in the best spot in Rotterdam, situated within easy walking distance of the Markthal and the cube houses.  The corner the boat is on is surrounded by lively cafes. The woodwork and boat features have been lovingly restored. Especially enjoyed sitting on the aft deck. Jeanette and Eric were gracious and helpful.  They live in the neighboring boat. We highly recommended this romantic place with a very interesting view. Loved the cats.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
We had an awesome time in Rotterdam. One of the highlights was the cozy and lovely boat of Eric.
We loved every minute of it. The location is remarkable close to the center of Rotterdam. Bring or rent a bike and got to the Markthal or Museum’s Park.
From us it’s a clear recommendation to visit Rotterdam and stay at Eric’s boat.
See you soon,
Carlo, Mia and Tobi

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
Goede centrale locatie en unieke context, fijn terrasje om buiten te zitten op de boot, de boot was leuk ingericht en goed uitgerust. Echter vele dingen van de andere reviews, waar wij op waren afgegaan, hebben wij anders ervaren. De boot is gelegen nabij enkele cafés waar er tot in de vroege uurtjes veel lawaai is. Van rust geen sprake en oordopjes zijn aangeraden - het dakraam in de slaapkamer sloot niet goed en liet daarom heel veel lawaai door. Verder was de boot zeer stoffig en niet altijd even proper, daarnaast werden we de eerste avond (onaangenaam) verrast door zeer veel spinnen binnen. Wij waren een gezelschap van 4 vrienden en de boot was aan de kleine kant, zeker de bedden waren niet ideaal want smal en niet recht.
Op de warme dagen tijdens ons verblijf was het bijzonder warm op de boot en moeilijk af te koelen.
We zouden niet opnieuw kiezen voor deze boot.
