name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: We had a wonderful stay on the boat. Location was super. Very walkable and near public transportation. The boat was a lot of fun and made for a unique experience. Nights were a little noisy with bar patrons, but nothing a little white noise couldn't balance out.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Staying on Eric’s boat was a unique experience. On the Rothor, you are close to the water with beautiful views of the old harbour. The sound of the waves licking the boat was very peaceful. Lunch on the deck amazing. This is a working harbour, so you hear people working on their boats and you see the harbour master on his daily rounds. We loved that. The Rothor is comfortable for 2, albeit a bit chilly in cold weather, but the host had provided electric heaters which heat the small space fast.  Bang in the city centre, everything at walking distance and the metro close by. Recommended!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
What a lovely way to experience a port city like Rotterdam! The boat was a wonderful and unique experience. Rothor was spacious, clean and comfortable and complete with all the amenities youll need. The open space kitchen and living room with windows and doors that open to the water is quite the experience.
The location is fantastic, right at the center minutes from sights like Markethl, cube houses and views to iconic bridges like the erasmus bridge. Its also a close walk to groceries.
Lastly Eric and Jeanette are wonderful hosts, responsive, friendly and mindful of our stay. Bonus is the sweetest boat cat who came for pets 🥹
Thank you Eric and Jeanette!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: I can't wait to go again! Great location, easy walk to food and transport, great market on a Wed and Sat literally 5 min walk away, round the corner from the famous cube houses too! Boat was so well equipped, with tea, coffee, seasonings, condiments and utensils, perfect home away from home. Comfy bed, and good shower. If I wanted to be super picky, I'd say maybe needed a bit of a spring clean, little dusty in some corners but that's really stretching for something negative to say! All in all, a fabulous rental that I would be delighted to stay in again.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
A lot of thanks for Eric and Jeanette! The boat was beyond expectations, Jeanette was very kind and helpful, she guided us and show for us what is there to do in Rotterdam and help us with the baggage's in the check out time.
Such a delightful apartment and hosting!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
This was our second time on this classic boat, Rothor. You are surrounded by retired boats, turned into houses and the nearby Maritime Museum.
The location is very interesting and a short walk to Rotterdam Blaak train station. Your host, lives on the adjacent boat, which also hosts another rental unit. There is a floating platform in between the two boats with a garden. Two friendly cats.
This can be a lively area well into the night. Privacy on the boat is good. You have many windows, all with curtains and great views.
Strong internet. We look forward to staying in this special place again.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: A unique experience and Jeannette was super friendly and helpful. Great restaurants and train station within minutes. Getting the wood burning fireplace going on every night and having Jeanette’s house cats coming over to check on us was the highlight :)

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: We enjoyed every minute of our stay. Jeanette was easy to communicate with and her answers prompt. Rathor the boat was charming and vintage with every need for a leisurely weekend to hand: well equipped kitchen, bathrooms with a wide range of eco products. I loved the 360 degree windows and gazing straight onto the water, ducks, swans and of course boats including a floating jacuzzi!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Jeanette was so welcoming on arrival. The boat was easy to find and 5 mins from Rotterdam Blaak station. Beautiful location on the water and view of the White House. The Oude Haven has some nice restaurants and bars really close for a drink or some food. It was even nice sitting outside as everything was heated. The Markthal is nearby for yummy food (fries, stroopwafel, Kroket, waffles etc) and easy to get to more central on the train or walk to museum district. Jeanette’s cats will welcome you and are very friendly and cute but won’t bother you if you don’t want them to. It’s such a lovely place to stay - the boat was chilly at first but warms up quick with a fire or heaters. We had a little bit of noise on Fri and Sat from the pub across the way but didn’t spoil it as everything else was so positive. Thank you to Jeanette for being a great host!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Amazing location and beautiful view. Highly recommend utilizing the fireplace.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
Loved the experience of staying on a boat. Jeannette was a generous and responsive host. The boat had everything you’d need and was a home organizer’s dream. And having a kitty visit us was an extra delight.
One night there was a lot of fireworks noise coming from à bar nearby (other nights, it was normal city noise), but some sensitive sleepers may want to bring ear plugs.

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Our first trip to the Netherlands and it was perfect having the experience of staying on a canal boat!  We loved the quiet of staying on the boat while being so close to restaurants and the train station!  Enjoying a glass of wine on the little deck was so enjoyable!  Our visiting cat made it even better!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
This was a great kickoff to our 5 week European celebration of our 50th wedding anniversary. first of all she was very accommodating to let us rent the unit for one week with two days being prior to our Danish and Norwegian Cruise and then take the five nights upon our return from the cruise. we didn't do any cooking other than make coffee but we certainly could have because kitchen was fully stocked. We were there for an unusual heat wave in Rotterdam but we could easily open all the windows and there were 4 fans to be comfortable through the night.
Other reviews might mention the noise from the nightclub nearby. Frankly it didn't bother us - the noisiest night was Saturday night and it's only open from Wednesday through Saturday & it doesn't open till 10:00 or 11:00 at night.
We're in our early 70s and found this a unique once in a lifetime experience. Airbnb's aren't a hotel, so if you aren't looking for some at times quirky adventures do the hotel. You won't regret this choice!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments:
Our stay on Jeanette’s boat, Rothor, was amazingly perfect!!!
The boat is perfectly outfitted with everything we needed but even more amazing was the location/enjoyment of being on the water.
We enjoyed sitting on the deck with a coffee/tea with the city and canal view. Everything was easy to get to by foot as the location is central.
It was easy to contact Jeanette and she was a super host in providing extra information about the area and places to eat/things to do.
Highly recommend!!!

name: Boat apartment Rothor on top location (1-2 pers)
comments: Jeanette’s sweet boat, The Rothor, was, easy to find, very clean and it was great fun to watch the canal boats and floating hot tubs going by. The location was also great for picking up food at the huge twice-weekly market at Blaak, just 5 minutes away and there is a Jumbo grocery store was just as close. The kitchen was well stocked, making cooking great. There was some noise from the club opposite on a couple of nights, but the location is generally so great.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu's place was an excellent base to explore Rotterdam from. A very short walk from the central train station and trams right in front of the building.
The apartment was perfectly clean and comfortable with an incredible view of the city. Highly recommended. 10/10.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Friendly hosts. A fabulous view on a great location.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lulu’s place is located at a very convenient location. Only 3 minutes from Rotterdam Central station. I was here for a conference and the apt to conference venue was an easy 7 minutes walk.
Many resturants, shops, transportation near by. Beautiful view from the apt.
Lulu was very kind and responsive. There was a pitcher of water with lemons in the room for me upon check in, this added an additional touch. She even allowed me to use her washer and dryer which helped a lot!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu’s place was: clean, conveniently located, friendly, private, easy-going. I had a great time. I highly recommend it. You can walk everywhere, and the view of the city is great. The hosts are very hospitable.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu and Luuk appartament is great, very clean modern and definitely has the greatest views of Rotterdam.
Lu and Luuk are great host!
Me and my friends really enjoy your appartament.
Regards
Ghislaine

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Super Stylish centrally located pad with incredible views of the city, couldn’t beat waking up to sunrise over the city as you roll over in bed! Lu was a lovely host, she gave us a great guide on how to go about exploring. The house was immaculate clean and warm.
We actually didn’t see much of Lu after we had checked in so it felt like a private weekend.
Would recommend

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu's space was in a great location and amazing views of the city. Spotlessly clean. Thanks Lu

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
The apartment is really well located, there are a lot of restaurants and shops in the surrounding area. Also the central station is just a short walk away and you can find other transportation at this place.
The rooms are really stylish and everything is super clean. Really liked the design.
The apartment's view is just excellent, especially at night.
Lulu and Luuk are very friendly and welcoming, they gave us a short list with the best restaurants and bars and if you need help in any way, you can contact them, they will help you. They are great hosts.
Highly recommended. 5 stars.
If we come back to rotterdam, we will definitly book again!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu`s appartment is absolutely amazing, the view is breathtaking and the room very private. You have your own bathroom. Lu is a super nice host, there are little details that will make you feel very welcome. The bed is comfortable and the bathroom nice and clean. Thank you Lu!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu’s apartment is super nice and clean. The location is also very good. You can have a amazing view of the whole city at night. I like the style she decried her place. I will recommended others to this place if you planning to visit Rotterdam in the future. I like it a lot. It could be an ideal place for two people’s vacation. You will enjoy it.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Luke was here for our check in. He is very nice, friendly and he is always here if you need something.  The room is very beautiful. 26 floor with an amazing view of the town. We are in the city center so the location is perfectly located. We visit all walking. The room is spacious, the decoration very beautiful. The bathroom also. All was perfect. Thank you very much

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Convenient and uncomplicated for a business trip, with a cool view from the 26th floor.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Splendid view, very central to public transport, shopping centers, wine&dine locations. Busy street. Great host. Would book again.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu is a welcoming jet cautious host and it has been a nice, comfortable and hospitable stay in her apartment. The room has a gorgeous view and everything is clean and tidy. Lu offers comfort similar to a hotel with water and chocolate waiting in the room to welcome the guests. Facilities include key to the building and apartment, towels, hairdryer, toothpaste and -brush, Nespresso-coffeemaschine in the kitchen, umbrella and slippers. I appreciated the possibility to open the window because I don't like air condition. Talking to colleague staying in a hotel nearby I recognized another advantage. Due to the hight of the building - the apartment is in the 26th floor - even with open window it is relatively quite and no flies or mosquitos disturb a good night sleep. In walking distance (10 min) are different shops, bars and restaurants, as well as the central station. The tram station infront of the building connects you to the entire town. The only item I missed in the beginning was the possibility to lock the room. However as soon as I did get familiar with the place and Lu it felt ok. All in common it has been a perfect mixture to balance out the work at the congress nearby in De Doelen and busyness of the city .

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The apartment is well located and it is  comfortable. Close to commercial as also  business area and central station , different restaurants in the area as also club. You can enjoy nightlife as enjoy a walk in the modern architecture of Rotterdam. Quiet and safety quarter. The view on the town early in the morning or in the evening it worths.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The apartment was amazing with a great view over Rotterdam. Lu and her husband were very welcoming and communicative. Thanks for hosting!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
This place is absolutely stunning. The service is beyond expectations. Every room is clean, and we had great communication.
The view? You have to see it yourselves.
Thanks Lu,
Kevin.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The view was amazing. And so was Lu :)

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Great place, great host, even better view :)

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Very cool and well located! Practical facilities and incredible view! Check the check in tips, they’re well detailed and help a lot.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Amazing view of Rotterdam in a very practical location. Just a few minutes from the train station, close to witte de Witt, market hall, etc. Very clean and tidy! And also really nice and friendly host.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Me and my boyfriend had an wonderful time at Lulu her appartement. Everything was good, the rooms, the location and Lulu her kindness. Even tough its a shared appartement, we’ve had all hé privacy we wanted. She even bought some croissant for our breakfast, that was very kind of her. She made our 1 year anniversary a little more special!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
A apartment in the middle of Rotterdam Centre, amazing view. Really nice host.
One con is that it is quite loud at night and makes it hard to sleep for someone with a light sleep.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The airbnb is perfectly located. Everything was nearby, we didn't need to take a bike or subway. The market hall was 10-15min walk. The apartment was neat and the view was amazing. The host welcomed us very well. She is pleasant, friendly and always available to help you with tips or guidance. DEFINITELY A MUST!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Great apartment, great view, especially at night

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Great apartment with a stunning view.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: lu is a great host and the place is a must. especially the view.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu is a great host!!! The appartement was So Clean! She's flexible and very kind! Appreciated the incheck and promptness. Everything on time and this appartement is exactly what you expect it to be! Killer view and great space.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The apartment is like a dream. 80 meters above sea level, on the 26th floor, you have a view to dream of. The interior and privacy are perfect and the hosts are so kind. I recommend to stay here, rent a bike and discover Rotterdam, the city that never sleeps ;-)

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: View is amazing, location is close to Rotterdam Centraal. Lu is nice host, thank you

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Beautiful design appartement !!!
The view from the 26th floor is amazing !

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu is a kind and friendly person. She and her husband were nice and very helpful. The airbnb itself is amazing, at a perfect location, with magnificent city views from the 26th floor. There was everything we needed during our stay and we were extremely satisfied with our trip.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu is very welcoming, he does everything to make you feel at home. The house is comfortable and well decorated, quiet and  clean, with a breathtaking view of all Rotterdam. It is located near the train station so walkable. When I come back to Rotterdam I go back to lu.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: We had a good time at Lu’s appartment. The communication was very good and swift. The appartment and the view we’re Amazing. Definitly a place to recomend

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
A room with a view. wonderful. In a nice appartement with very kind, helpful and flexible hosts. We stayed for the marathon, which is great as the apartment is very close to the start and after the finish you end up in front of it.
The hosts told me they have a 100% success rate for participants of the marathon, so take your chance 😉

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
I can highly recommend staying at Lu‘s apartment.
It has an unique view over Amsterdam - exactly as shown on the pictures. Service is overall great, Lu is a very supportive person and if you ask her she will help you to do your trip planning without missing any of Rotterdam‘s highlights.
City Center is less than 5 minutes walk away. There is a restaurant on the opposite side of the street which I can recommend as it offers quick and great breakfast.
Would definitely stay there again.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Comfortable room with amazing views, Lu’s spot is perfect for a stay in Rotterdam

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: The view, the place and the host are amazing. It’s a very friendly place to stay and really close to the city centre and the central in case you need to go to amsterdam or other places.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Great host, great view from the room, and amazing location. Easy 5 stars, 10/10.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu it a great host very kind and very opened mentality, the appartement was very clean, the view from the guest room  is amazing and comfortable for sleeping, the location of the appartement is literally in the heart of Rotterdam near to a lot of place of shopping, bars, restaurants. Only what i can say it a great experience in Rotterdam when i stayed in Lu’s appartement.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu is a great host! She greet me so warmly with drinks and cookies and gave some advice about places to go. The place is higher than my expectation and well equipped! I had my own washroom and quite good privacy. I would love to stay longer next time.  Highly recommend!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: VERY central as advertised - main station, Chinatown, commercial areas, quaint pockets all within a 5-10-15 minute walk. the room gets a lot of light, bathroom very clean and spacious. hosts are always smiling and accommodating. will definitely book again the next time I'm in Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
This is the best place to stay if you like views, a beautifully decorated home, a central location and a lovely host. communication was smooth and we felt right at home from the get.
Lulu is super helpful and can provide tips on restaurants, bars and things to do around Rotterdam.
would love to come back soon!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: I highly recommend booking this beautiful apartment for your stay in Rotterdam. It is perfectly located in the center  (only 5 min walk to the central station). The view in the room was even more beautiful in real life and the whole apartment was just stunning. Thanks Lu, for being such a great host! I will definitely book your apartment again when I‘m coming back to Rotterdam :)

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Within walking distance of the public transit. Helpful and communicative hosts, answered many questions I had about the area. Respectful of privacy and readily made the living area and bathroom accessible and private. Clean and spacious sleeping area. Host/roommate let me use their Dyson fan, which I appreciated. Would stay again.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Loved my stay with Lu and Luke in Rotterdam. It was fantastic to be able to live with the locals and get their tips on making the most of my time. Good mix of private and shared spaces - and stunning views from the apartment. And great location if you're using Rotterdam Centraal to get in.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Exceeded our expectations.  The guest area is spacious and fresh, with mesmerizing views and a heavenly bed.  Communications were prompt, helpful and hosts were very accommodating.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Nice room with an amazing view of the city. Easy access to the center or the central trains and buses. Highly recommended

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Absolutely clean and modern apartment! Very nice night view from the window of the room. Located in the center of Rotterdam, convenient for walking to central station, cube house and Blaak market. Lu is absolutely a great guide in Rotterdam, give lots of good suggestions for visiting and know the best fried fish in Blaak market！

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu's place is everything you'd want in an Airbnb. It's right smack in the middle of Rotterdam city and you could walk there easily from the central station. Check in was easy and she was happy to help you with anything. The view of the city from the unit was breathtaking. Cleanliness was top notch. Overall a great experience and would recommend it to anyone

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Lu and her partner are fantastic hosts--friendly, welcoming, helpful. The apartment is perfectly located to enjoy Rotterdam, with incredibly easy access to the Centraal station and the central shopping area. It has a great view of the city, is clean and very easy to access. I really appreciated the hospitality and the space.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: This was much better than I had ever imagined. The flat is absolutely stunning and the view was beyond humanly possible. It is absolutely perfect for a nice stay in Rotterdam if you are an urban enthusiast like myself. Also the location is really convenient and close to absolutely everything. Bonus: Lu was the most welcoming host I could ever get

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
The location is amazing and Lu and her partner are very nice.
We couldn’t get enough of the view.
Everything is as the picture showed.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu& luc gave me a great airbnb experience in their beautiful house.
I moved to rotterdam for a new work,while i was lookin for a new rent,I stayed at their place.super helpful,friendly couple.
Also their house is just amazing with architecture and stunning city view!
Definitely advised

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu is a wonderful host with a beautiful place! The view is amazing and the room looks exactly like the pictures!
She is very warm and friendly, will give you great recommendations. Highly recommend staying at her lovely place if you have the chance:)

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Beautiful view, very nice room, clean bathroom, close to the city center and a lovely host.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Clean and modern place
Room with a beautiful view (no curtain on window)
Nice hosts
Pictures give a correct impression of the appartment.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu & Luc were a pleasure to stay with. The place was perfect, well designed and clean with everything you needed for a hospitable stay. The skyline views are beyond beautiful, the bed was comfy and the linen and towels were all good quality and clean!
Lu & Luc were very generous with their time in recommending their favourite places to eat and visit in relation to my interests. They were also highly respectful of my space and even folded up my washing for me when I was out (very kind). They are great people with a great home and would highly recommend to anyone!
Thank you so much Lu & Luc and hope to see you again to stay when in Rotterdam sometime in the future!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Nice place near the central station, with a great city view. Nice hosts.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: This place is amazing. Best location and view of the city. Lu is a super host, she will give you the best recommendations depending on your personality. A ridiculous distance from the train central also makes it a great place. I'd definitely comeback here with no hesitation.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: THE best location, coziest room and fabulous hosts! I felt right at home every afternoon I would come back from the conference. The views over the city of Rotterdam are astonishing! I’d love stay again at Lu’s apartment.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: Great place to stay with a wonderful view

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: I had such a wonderful experience! Lu was kind, informative and happy to help me in any way! The view from the apartment was absolutely spectacular! I will definitely stay with Lu again if I’m lucky enough to do so! 😀

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
Lu's place is conveniently close to the central train station, right at the end of one of the luxurious streets of Rotterdam. The apartment is modernly renovated, and the view from the room is really nice.
During my stay Lu was abroad, so her husband Luuk handled everything. He immediately made sure I felt at home, asked to know about anything that I needed, and that I could use the kitchen without doing any dishes. We had some really nice chats over (late) breakfast, and he was always pleasant to be around.
The room I stayed in allows privacy and is quiet, conveniently fitting my needs; the only downside was the mattress, which was a bit too soft for me - but nothing too serious.
Definitely a 5-star for me. Will happily stay there again whenever I am in Rotterdam!

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
My stay with Lu was perfect. The Appartement is very beautiful and I felt very welcome and at home. I visited Rotterdam for business purposes and Lu‘s Appartement was the perfect place to rest and enjoy the view over the city.
Would definitely recommend it.

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments: One of the best Airbnb places you will ever find. And, it is just a 3 minutes walk from the train station. The place has a beautiful view of downtown Rotterdam. The place ia pretty spotless and kept very clean. An elegant place to stay. The host is very responsive and allowed me to come to their home a bit earlier than usual. It is easily the best place I ever stayed at an Airbnb

name: Rotterdam Central 26th-floor Design Apartment
comments:
The room was very nice, apartment situated just few min walk from the central station and basically in front of city center. Easy to find and access.
The room has astonishing view, quite comfortable bed and apartment is very warm.
Lu and her husband very sweet people
As well Lu gave recommendation of places to visit and I used some of the recommendations and enjoyed my time

name: Boat apartment Hoop
comments: Great location, great access, a lot of privacy and a clean and nice and original location.

name: Family house near Historical Delfshaven
comments: Sandra's place was perfect for us (a family with 3 teenageers). Each kid had his/her bedroom. All beds were confortable. Rooms are nice. The house is well equiped. We even used some of the family's bikes ! At first we thought that we might be a bit far from the center and that the house was located in a residential (and maybe too "quiet") neighboorhood... Absolutly not! just around the corner you reach Delshaven and its old houses and pleasant bars / restaurants ! and when you walk through you reach a very commercial street where you can find everything you need (next to te metro station). In the end, we thought it was a perfect localization.  it was also very easy to find and rent bike thanx to Donkey Republic App. Some bikes were available in the square in front of house.

name: Family house near Historical Delfshaven
comments: Sandra has the most beautiful home, it was a delight to stay there over the weekend. Everything was clean and cozy, a perfect base in Rotterdam. The city centre is a bike ride or metro away, and everything you could need on your doorstep. 10/10 would come back again!

name: Family house near Historical Delfshaven
comments:
Nice place as described. Free car park and 10 minutes walk to metro.
Only complaint is windows are opened as rooms are hot in summer. But because of that there are mosquitos.

name: Homely apartment with garden and bath
comments:
Mariette’s place is full of flowers and very cozy. You can park the car just in front of the window.
What I didn’t really enjoy were the lights because they were to week.
It is 30 minutes walk to the city center.
You have AH nearby and Mariette was really nice and left us some note with here recommendations for coffee and food places.

name: Homely apartment with garden and bath
comments: I had a wonderful stay at Mariette's apartment! She was an amazing host, incredibly helpful, friendly, and welcoming. The check-in and checkout instructions were incredibly clear, making the process seamless. The apartment itself was spacious and absolutely lovely. It felt just like home. The fully equipped kitchen was a highlight – it had everything one could possibly need. Thank you, Mariette, for making my stay so enjoyable and comfortable. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a fantastic Airbnb experience!

name: Homely apartment with garden and bath
comments: The Airbnb of Mariette is a very nice, clean and cosy place with a beautiful little garden and many plants. Everything is really stylish and the kitchen very well equipped. The apartment is situated in a quiet street and area. The next metro station and supermarket is around the corner. Definitely a good place to stay and explore beautiful Rotterdam! 👍🏻👍🏾👍🏻👍🏾👍🏻

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments: Fantastic! great location, clean place, wonderful decor, comfortable, nice balcony, all around amazing :)

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments:
This apartment is a blessing. The way the living room is decorated, with the windowdoors to the sleeping room, flooding the whole apartment in daylight. When you wake up & open the curtains, the sun smiles at you & you have a view of a little city idyll. A random tennis court lies in the middle of trees, making you feel like you are not 7 min walking from central station, but you are... Simply great & feels bigger than expected.
With the bike, you are everywhere you need to be superquick. Plus & Aldi are in walking distance, so you feel home really quick. Overall the perfect spot to discover Rotterdam from. Thanks

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments: Luca's apartment is great, perfect for a couple! You get everything you need in the kitchen and bathroom, and a lovely living room and bedroom with a balcony. The balcony was lovely to have breakfast in the morning under the sun. It is 10  min walking from the train station and there are trams around. The house is clean and has all the necessities. Would definitely stay here again if I come back to Rotterdam!

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments: Luca’s apartment was perfect for a few days getaway. Cozy space, nice light, super comfy bed, compact kitchen and bathroom, and great workspace if needed - lots of table space. It’s a short walk from the central station and an easy walk or cycle to the Cool district / center.  Very much in the middle of several lovely neighborhoods. The shower ceiling is a bit slanted, so very tall people, take note!

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments: Great place, great location, loved the little balcony. Very good communication and forward thinking/helpful questions from the bnb owners. Would recommend.

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments:
Such a lovely apartment with a balcony. Loved Rotterdam!
Would recommend to everyone.
x

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments:
Great place with great lightening !
The bed is huge and comfortable!
You'll find anything you need in this apartment!

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments:
Mixed experience. Overall overpriced.
Positives: Luca was flexible about checkin times and had left a bottle of wine & a few chocolate treats. Some nice herbal teas and lovely little quiet balcony adjacent to bedroom.
Negatives: wifi didn’t connect on 1st night and TV didn’t work. No instructions provided. I tried to call Luca about it and sent her airbnb message but she didn’t respond until after departure and even then had no clear instruction what it could have been. I’ve been in many airbnb places, and for this price (about 115 euros per night!) I would expect clear instructions for TV and wifi. In the end I only got wifi to work on my phone, not on laptop. Thankfully I have some movies on laptop so that I could unwind a bit after a long day in the city. The only room that felt comfortable to be in was the bedroom. Front room with that very busy road in front not very relaxing, but that didn’t seem to bother other guests who all loved it here, so that is subjective.

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments: Luca's apartment was perfect for my friend and I to stay for a weekend city break. It was really hot that weekend but at night the flat was lovely and cool thanks to the balcony next to the bedroom. A perfect base for exploring, but very comfortable and quiet if you need some downtime. Luca also offered some fun tips without us even asking which was so nice with it being our first time visiting the city.

name: Cozy Oasis in Rdam with Balcony
comments:
Overall we had a pleasant stay at the loft, the neighbourhood has a beautiful pond to chill out in the evening.
In the loft we found some stains on the sheets, the diswasher had dirty plates in it and the fringe was almost full, which was unfortunate, but managable. We could work out the issues with Luca easily.
The balcony was bit different from the photos, there were no table to eat at.

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: This place is tops! You may be unfamiliar with the area and look at it and wonder, "Why is it so amazing and affordable? Is it in a bad or boring part of town?" Wonder no longer! It was a FANTASTIC location! My daughter and I had such a nice time enjoying the space! It was super clean, bright and well equipped!

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: Such a cool place! You can’t beat the location, just a few minutes walk from Rotterdam-Blaak train station, the MarktHall and the Cube houses. The space worked for our group (two couples) and we were able to have privacy in our respective bed areas. The jacuzzi was sooo nice! We had been a little worried about privacy but it honestly wasn’t an issue, the portholes can be covered up and you have to go through a locked gate to get down to the two houses. It got a bit windy the one night we stayed and while I found the small amount of rocking to be soothing another one of our party was a little sea sick from it so definitely know yourself before committing. Wish we had stayed longer, Rotterdam is a super cool city and the Wikkelboat made for a great base to explore from. There is even a water taxi stop a few minutes walk that was super convenient. Would highly recommend to anyone who is ok with sleeping on the water and looking for a unique space!

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: A Unique space, secluded but also very Central. Very clean with everything you could need. The 2 double beds fold down making great use of the space. The jacuzzi was definitely a highlight and me and my two friends sat in it for ages with a glass of wine.

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: The place was amazing!! Great view and location. The host helped us as soon as contacted.

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: Amazing experience, enjoyed the jacuzzi with the amazing view the entire time. Easily walk in the city and spend some good time with your friends. Can recommend this for everyone, better than any hotel. Looking forward for my next stay at this place

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: A very nice stay! The view was amazing, the location was beautiful, the place is well equipped and very cozy. This was better than expected thank you so much 😊

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments:
Place is nice enough, design is good and location is great but maybe it’s a little tired. Coffee machine was gross - Layer of gunge on the water tank including mould. We spent ages cleaning it and then the machine still wouldn’t work as the service light was on. The sink in the bathroom was also partially blocked . Granted we didn’t report these things while we were there so didn’t give host opportunity to put right as we wanted to enjoy our time in Rotterdam rather than deal with this.
We had a lovely stay in Rotterdam but for the money the attention to detail in cleanliness was a real let down.

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: Wir hatten ein schönes Wochenende und waren super zufrieden! Der Whirlpool ist ein Highlight und die Lage ist super. Es lohnt sich wenn man mal etwas anderes erleben möchte und wir würden es unseren Freunden weiterempfehlen!

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments:
Tolle Unterkunft, alles gut Fußläufig erreichbar. Entspricht voll und ganz der Beschreibung.
Danke für das tolle Erlebnis auf dem Hausboot, der Whirlpool war unser persönliches Highlight!

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments:
Wir hatten ein super Wochenende in Rotterdam.
Wir können das Wikkelboat mehr als empfehlen.
Super zentrale Lage aber trotzdem ruhige Lage.
Die Betten waren super bequem es war alles da was man brauchte.
Das große Highlight war der Whirlpool.
Wir werden Definitiv wieder kommen.

name: Wikkelboat Nr. 2 @ city centre w spa & bikes
comments: There’s so much I enjoyed about staying on the water in this tiny private house with a deck and hot tub. I loved the location, and even though the houses attract a lot of attention (ppl taking photos and even asking me about the rental) it is still like a little oasis in the middle of Rotterdam. I loved the location and parking was super easy. It wasn’t quite warm enough to sit outside but I enjoyed the sunshine coming through the floor to ceiling windows. It is an efficient space and equipped with what I needed to make my own meals, relax and get a good nite’s sleep. Because I was traveling solo, it was a little more than I budgeted for but worth it because I would love to come back with more ppl. Having lived on a sail boat and a research ship, I appreciated the details of a houseboat home and efficient use of space. Nadia even came over at the start to say hi in person, a nice touch. I would definitely stay again!

name: Ruime, dubbele bovenwoning in Rotterdam Kralingen!
comments:
Liesbeth was incredibly welcoming, the place is beautiful and even nicer than what the pictures show. We had a great stay and we absolutely recommend the place!
Good to know for the light sleepers: the tram outside can be noisy so bring earplugs.

name: Ruime, dubbele bovenwoning in Rotterdam Kralingen!
comments:
Me and my family stayed in Liesbeth’s apartment for a weekend.
Liesbeth is a true host, a super, super host 😀. She welcomed us with an intro to Rotterdam and the apartment, accomplished with a cappuccino.
The house is from late 19th century and the apartment has a lovely atmosphere with a nice personal decoration style. I think this how Airbnb was intended to be from the very beginning.
Any down sides? Not really. Good to know is that you need to comfortably walk in quit steep stairs and that the toilet room is small and that the noice from the trams are slightly disturbing on one side of the apartment.
In summary a very good stay - we would be happy to come back!

name: Heart of the City!
comments: The apartment is very cozy, comfortable, really well located, walking distance from bars and nice restaurants as well as sightseeings. The view is also a very nice plus. Simone was extremely friendly and did everything she could to make us fell home. I would definitely recommend this place!

name: Heart of the City!
comments: What a lovely woman! Simone welcomed us and was available throughout our stay for anything we needed. The apartment is beautiful with great panoramic views and it’s very spacious and traditional, the space was perfect for us!!💕

name: Heart of the City!
comments: The apartement is super spacy, very cosy and everything you might possibly need is in there. The location is amazing; now that I know the city a bit, I would recommend everyone to especially explore the area in which the appartment is located (beautiful streets, nice restaurants and bars... though no noice disturbance whatsoever). Simone is a great host; communication goes very easilily and she is always available for questions or issues. Would recommend!

name: Heart of the City!
comments: Simone's place has an awesome kitchen which includes washer and dryer. We were sick from traveling and had to make our meals which this places provides all what we need. Shower was nice. Generous with towels. Plenty of counter spaces. Bright living room. Overall the experience was OK because we had a bad experience with check in process. The place was not handled by the host directly and the proxy was almost 1 hour late. We usually wouldn't mind but because we were sick and we were sitting outside in the cold that really does not help us getting less sick. Besides the check in, we also wished there is more ventilation in the bedroom. Otherwise, the place is great.

name: Heart of the City!
comments:
We had a very good experience staying at Simone's place. Simone is a charismatic, friendly and welcoming person and communication with her, prior and during our stay, was great. Her place is spacious, has nice views of the city in both directions, is equipped with everything needed, it is clean and it is in an excellent location. It felt good to back to it each day.
Thank you again for your hospitality and for a great stay.
Domnica & Burcu.

name: Fancy apartment with 2 rooftop terraces
comments: Perfect apartment, spacious and located in one of Koolhaas' recent new design buildings! Saskia is a perfect host and has good suggestions where to eat (just try restaurant De Jong!) and what to do in Rotterdam. The apartment has two big terrases and is located right in the most trendy spot of the city. We slept very well (large and comfortable bed) and the kitchen has all the amenities to prepare a decent meal. Rotterdam has a lot to offer (musea, architecture, harbour, water taxi) and this great apartment is a good base to explore the city. The apartment is very quiet and bright. We would certainly recommend to stay here again.

name: Fancy apartment with 2 rooftop terraces
comments:
Saskia is a great host, very kind and ready to help his guests !
The apparement is so lovely with a wonderful view. It's bigger than the picture and in a perfect location.
Highly recommend !

name: Fancy apartment with 2 rooftop terraces
comments: Wonderful apartment with incredible terraces. Looks just like the photos. Perfect location making getting around very simple.  Groceries, stores and restaurants all close by. Saskia was a delight and was helpful in getting us set up.

name: Fancy apartment with 2 rooftop terraces
comments: We enjoyed the apartment! The apartment was spacious and the windows and terraces made the place perfect. The location was also good! Saskia helped us with good instructions and excellent communication, thank you😊

name: Fancy apartment with 2 rooftop terraces
comments: I had a very pleasant stay at Saskia’s apartment. Her apartment is great, cosy, very calm and convenient, with a lot of light and well located. Saskia is a great host, the communication was very easy.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: A fantastic flat - clean and well supplied with essentials. The location is amazing - right across the road from the beautiful new Central Station, but still a lovely quiet and safe street. Aimee could not have been more welcoming and helpful, she was a fantastic host, and also was very helpful and communicative prior to our arrival. With a double bed and two singles plus a sofa bed in the living room it was absolutely perfect for our family of five's four night stay in Rotterdam. We had originally planned to stay in Amsterdam but were so glad we decided to make Rotterdam our base instead - and with this flat right by the station we could be in Amsterdam in 45 minutes without the noise, hassle and expense of staying there.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments:
Aimee’s place is just perfect. Beautifully decorated, full of light and nice touches , it has everything you need or might need to spend a comfortable stay in rotterdam. The neighborhood is great, with near by supermarkets, beautiful canals and restaurants and conveniently close to the central station and city center.
Aimee and Hung are just marvelous hosts, always making sure everything is going smoothe and you have everything you need. They host us in person, which we really appreciate.
It was definitely an unforgettable stay!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: Great place, right across the street from centraal station but with a neighborhood feel, super clean, stylish, and even family friendly with toys. Wonderful hosts. Highly recommended.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments:
Once in a while, Airbnb throws an apartment and host(s) at you, that you wish there was an option to give 7 stars. Aimee and Hung checked us in early, let us check out at 6pm (!!!), were incredibly quick to point us in the direction of the best restaurants for amazing Vietnamese, Chinese, burgers, waffles, and everything else we asked them. The apartment itself is GORGEOUS, it benefits from both owners being architects. There were basics in the kitchen in salt, pepper, olive oil balsamic, etc which was really convenient, and it was really nice to find beers, water, ketchup and mayo in the fridge when we arrived. They had also left us toiletry packs and some great shampoo and body gel. The apartment is opposite the train station for a 5 star location, and it gets a lot of sun in the afternoon. Overall an apartment where everything had been thought of, and provided. Aimee and Hung obliged our request for a glass of wine with them on our last night, and we ended up spending an amazing 3 hours gaining so many different perspectives and getting to know two really interesting people. Can't wait to go back to Rotterdam and stay with them again!
Thank you so much for having us!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: We really enjoyed staying at Aimee’s place, super convenient location, so close to the Centraal train station for regional trains and also trams. Supermarkets also close by. Aimee left a heap of stuff in the kitchen to get us started, and even a few beers in the fridge. There is paid parking on the street right in front of the apartment. Worked out really well for our family staying with at Aimee’s place, thank you.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: Aimee’s apartment is excellently located, right across the street from Rotterdam’s central station. Even so, it is exceptionally quiet so you can sleep easy at night. The kitchen is modern and well-equipped if you like to cook, and the interior design of the apartment is aesthetically pleasing if that’s your thing!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments:
Our stay at the Aimee's apartment was something what the Airbnb concept was originally about to mean: local contact, real home feeling, easy arrangements and very nice and spacious space to stay in a new city.
Aimee made our stay special with good instructions how to get to the apartment and how everything works there. We also got good tips to explore a city and a neighborhood. And welcome gifts was really nice suprpise.
The apartment is large and a kitchen has every utensils you would need (except a toaster tbh). The bigger bedroom is separated from the kitchen with a thick curtain and from the corridor with the door. The smaller bedroom has space only for a single bed and one of us slept in the living room. That extra bed was very comfy, though.
The location is good, just next to the railwaystation. But if you want to get to the city centre, you have to first walk to the other side of the railwaystation (7-10min) and take a metro or tram from there. so it takes around 15 min to get to the shopping streets, museums and maybe 20 min to Erasmus bridge.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: Aimee's apartment was absolutely brilliant. The pictures don't do it justice, it was very roomy, with a large lounge area, and great sized bedrooms and bathroom. It was the best Air bnb we have stayed in, not just because of the accommodation, but because of all the thoughtful touches from Aimee and her family.  It was so well equipped! the kitchen is a high standard and there is plenty of utensils and equipment to make your own food. It felt like a home from home. The location is perfect. Literally a 2-minute walk from the station, and in the center of Rotterdam.  Despite being so close to the station, there was no noise at all and the bedrooms face the garden.  My daughter was auditioning for Codarts, which was less than a 5 minute walk away.  Aimee was a wonderful host, her communication was superb, she is very caring, spent time talking with us and making us feel incredibly welcome. We had a truly lovely time and I would highly recommend Aimee's apartment to anyone.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: My family of 4 absolutely adored Aimee's place.  The location was exceptional -- right across the street from Centraal Station, yet very quiet.  The place was sparkling clean, the beds were very comfortable, and the kitchen was easily the best stocked that we have encountered.  Aimee thought of everything -- from an abundance of Nespresso pods to a variety of delicious snacks, to kid-friendly dishes, to all sorts of spices  -- every cupboard was a treat to open!   Aimee was so communicative, meeting us at the apartment to show us around, giving suggestions on local cuisine, and quickly responding to a very minor issue we had. When we couldn't figure it out via text, Aimee came to the apartment and sorted things out immediately. We loved having a washer and dryer available and the rainfall shower was delightful.  We are already talking about our next trip to Rotterdam and we definitely want to stay at Aimee's!!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: Really amazing place to stay and incredible friendly hosts. Perfect distance to the station and the supermarket. Lots to do in the area and Aimee and her husband were great at suggesting places. Only complaint is that there is only a curtain between the washing machine and main bed which made sleeping a bit difficult when washing at night.

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: We had a wonderful stay at Aimee's apartment.  She is a lovely person who made us feel right at home.  The apartment is bright, modern, very spacious, and incredibly quiet.  The kitchen was great, with washing machine, separate tumble dryer, dishwasher, oven, microwave, and all the dishes we needed.  The location was perfect for us,  just minutes to the train station for day trips, but there is no noise from the trains.  It's also an easy walk to the center of Rotterdam.  Highly recommended!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments:
Amazing stay at Aimee and Hung's residence! The unit is clean and well maintained. Even though you're on the main street by the train station, it is very quiet inside. The location is perfect to get around Rotterdam by walking or public transit.
Aimee gave us so many wonderful recommendations for restaurants and things to do in and around Rotterdam. Thanks to her, we were able to travel up to Kinderdijk by water bus and see the new Fenix museum on opening day! We would gladly stay again the next time we're in Rotterdam!

name: Perfectly central located, modern & clean city app
comments: Aimee's apartment is a PERFECT place to stay while visiting Rotterdam. The beds are comfy, everything was clean and the living space is welcoming and a perfect size for relaxing. The apartment is surprisingly quiet, even though it's across from Central Station, and there are grocery stores around the corner, which is convenient.  We enjoy walking, so we walked most places, however the Metro and Trams are both right across the street, so it was easy to hop on public transportation when we didn't feel like walking. Aimee also provided great suggestions of what to see and where to eat. I highly recommend staying here!

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments:
lovely apartment with everything you need. close to rotterdam and easy public transport.
easy check in and nice little welcome touches in the apartment.
free parking on street, a good base in a car as right next to the ring road.
make sure you visit schiedam especially the little jenever bar there jeneverie 't spul
place has steep stairs so not suitable for people that might struggle with this or for under 3 year olds.

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments:
We had an enjoyable stay at Martin's house in the suburbs of Rotterdam. It is a considerable distance from the city centre, £26 by taxi from the station but an Uber is much less, buses fairly expensive. Despite this distance we had a lovely holiday partly as the house itself is so well equipped and spacious for the cost. Ping pong bats are provided and net for the table for games. And there is a bottle of wine as a welcome on arrival. You will need to be very quiet from around midnight because of the neighbours who may overhear music and voices, so keeping windows closed and noise volumes right down could be a way to prevent any problems with upsetting a neighbour. Unfortunately we fielded a complaint in the night but I was trying to keep my family quiet. There is a Lidl supermarket twenty minutes walk away ideal for bargain shopping. Rotterdam is an interesting city well worth a visit and not far from Amsterdam.
The only problem I had was that we were told we could stay on later on our departure day as no guests had reserved that night so I made plans to leave Rotterdam with family after midnight for an early flight next day. On our arrival day we found that this situation had changed so we had a long time between check out and our flight at 7am with our bags but we managed to find a 'Bag BnB' in Rotterdam. Aside from this minor detail all was well and there were some quite pretty areas nearby to wander round such as a canal and old houses around.
If you are looking for a budget supermarket Lidl is a 40 minute walk away, round trip, and the centre of Rotterdam can be reached on foot in about an hour or by Uber or bus for shopping or sight-seeing.
Well worth a visit and I am happy to recommend Martin's house to future guests.

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments:
Oh my goodness we LOVED staying at Martin’s place! Spotlessly clean, beautiful decor, spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and super well-equipped kitchen (we like to cook so it’s a joy to find good spices and supplies). For reference, we are a family of 2 adults and 3 kids. Easy bus transport to the center of Rotterdam and slightly longer to The Hague.
Martin was amazing with communication: quick to reply and also sent us some great recommendations on things to visit in the area. In short, we could not recommend it more highly!

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments: Martin is a great guy with whom the communication was very easy and smooth. The flat was really beautiful, bright and clean, we even got a note and some waffle from hosts which was sweet. The neighbourhood was safe and quiet, there’s a shop nearby and free parking which made our visit much easier. Totally worth visiting! :)

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments: We had an enjoyable stay at Martin's air Bnb. Martin was easy to communicate with and was very flexible with our arrival time and our late checkin. The apartment had everything we needed and was generally well represented by its description. Two things to note if you plan to stay there. Although Martin did have pictures, it was still a surprise how steep the stairs were from the front door to the main floor and another steep set from the main floor up to the bedrooms. And secondly, if you have a car, there is free parking on the street but it is limited and is often hard to get. Be prepared to walk if you are looking for a parking spot later in the day.

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments: Martin was a fantastic host and a beautiful home! We felt so comfortable and at ease. Everything was great! We hope to come back in the warmer weather to really enjoy the outdoor spaces as well. We rented a car and street parking was very easy to find. Highly recommend staying here if you have a larger group or just need privacy (3 bedrooms). Thanks Martin!

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments: Our stay was absolutely lovely. Martin was there in person to welcome us and show us around the apartment and answer any questions we had. His hand guide for those staying was extremely helpful. We found the dwelling to be very spacious and full of natural light. The roof top sitting areas were an excellent add to the space. The amenities were just what you need to get by on vacation, and basic party items as well.  Coming from the USA it was important to feel safe and it was a legit rental. Would highly recommend and stay there again. Thanks Martin!

name: Ruim en stijlvol appartement met dakterras
comments:
We had a wonderful stay in this Airbnb accommodation! The apartment was exactly as in the photos. We especially liked the atmosphere of the apartment. Everything we needed was there, also plenty of towels. The location was also good. Parking spots are available in the streets. We used the bikes but they are very old.
Our host Martin was very friendly and helpful, provided us with valuable tips about the area and was always available. We felt completely at home and would definitely recommend this accommodation to others!

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments: Paul’s place was the perfect place to call home while we were in Rotterdam. The house is located down a quiet street, while being very close to the lively Nieuwe Binneweg. Paul is very helpful and the room is spotless. The room is huge with your own couch and desk. The kitchen is well equipped, with a stove, oven and microwave, and there is even a coffee machine for making your own morning coffee. The couch gets beautiful afternoon sun and is the perfect place to relax and read a book after a busy morning exploring the city. We cannot recommend this Airbnb highly enough!! Thanks Paul!

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments: This place is absolutely wonderful! Everything is new and clean, you have everything you need. Paul welcomed us and provided useful suggestions about getting around in Rotterdam. The house is situated in beautiful quiet neighborhood with stylish houses, but you can easily find a place to eat nearby. The location is also good enough, it is not right in the city centre, but we enjoyed our walks by foot through beautiful streets. The only regret we have about our stay is that it was only 2 nights. Now we honestly think that we should not have booked a place in Amsterdam, and instead go there by train or bus from Rotterdam. In Amsterdam you get less value for much more money. If you want to visit several cities, just book this place for the duration of your whole trip, it is really worth it.

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments: I felt like I stayed in my whole airbnb alone. Though it’s private room in the house you can keep your privacy and feel safe. Cozy bed, nice interior, clean bathroom, everything is great!

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments:
Paul was kind enough to host us even though it was a last minute booking.
The room is very tidy and clear with comfy bed and nice sunlight. The kitchen and the bathroom are clean and well equipped which make you feel like home.
It is well located. It takes only about 15 mins of bus ride to downtown, 10 mins by foot to supermarket Jumbo.
If you come with a car, you can easily find a public parking spot nearby.
Paul also provides transport cards and let us pay him back the amount we used (he has his own card reader, don’t need to go get cash!)
I think the price is totally worth it and will 100% recommend to other people.

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments:
Paul was an amazing host and really welcoming. He even let me check-in earlier, so I didn’t have to drag my luggage around for four hours, since my Flixbus arrived early in the day.
In the two weeks I stayed there with my girlfriend neither of us had anything to complain about.
It is a lovely place in a nice area, and the location is perfect if you want to be able to get to the center fast, but don’t want all of the noise that comes with living in the middle of the city. Great value as well!

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments:
Wow!
The room is big, bright, warm and supercomfortable!
Paul is a really nice host, he welcome us personally and introduce us in his beautiful home and give us some tips!
The shared kitchen was usefull and a nice place to cook a meal or just drink a tea or coffee in the morning!
The neightborhood was interesting as well, I recommend to spend some time to explore it!
We were the only host during our stay so we had the floor just for us and it was amazing!
Totally recommend and we hope to get the chance to come back soon or later in this life!

name: Paul’s Room in Delfshaven
comments:
We had a nice time staying at Paul’s place. There were no other guests so we had the kitchen and the bathroom for ourselves. The washing machine and dryer are a great bonus.
Paul is very responsive and even though he lives in the same house, he was very respectful of our privacy. He also makes sure any problems are fixed fast, and he helped us out right away all while being on holiday.
The bedroom has lots of natural light, and the bed has extra storage room underneath. The mattress is fine, but maybe the pillows could use a refresh.
The bathroom is great, even has floor heating, and the shower is very spacious.
We also worked from there and had no trouble with Wi-Fi, works great also.
The kitchen is quite big, and all appliances work well, and we also sometimes used the kitchen table for work.
Overall, very good value for money and the location is great! We’d recommend staying at Paul’s place and we’ll definitely reach out again whenever we’re look for an Airbnb in Rotterdam.

name: Modern nieuw appartment naast station Maashaven.
comments: Very nice clean place. Lovely family. The upstairs location offers privacy with a fridge and little kitchen being available for use.

name: Modern nieuw appartment naast station Maashaven.
comments: Had a very quiet and comfortable stay at Priya's, no hassle. The family valued my privacy and I never lacked for any amenities. Would 100% go back again and definitely recommend to anyone looking for a peaceful stay in Rotterdam.

name: Ruim en rustig appartement op de witte de with
comments: We had an awesome time at Wendy‘s house. The apartment was clean, nicely decorated and in a very handy location. It also had a nice, spacious balcony. She is also a very nice person and open to answer any questions about where to go, what to do etc. The bed is comfortable too. The kitchen is well equipped , so cooking is not a problem. There is no toaster or coffee machine though, but the cafés just out the door are really nice. We would definitely recommend staying at her place.

name: Ruim en rustig appartement op de witte de with
comments: We stayed for 10 days and found the space remarkably quiet for a setting that was so centrally located.  Within comfortable walking distance to the central train station, and around the corner from the metro and tram, as well as right next to the main shopping area, multiple museums and art venues, and right by lots of local pubs and restaurants, everything was within easy reach (including Leiden, Den Haag, Amsterdam, Hoek van Holland).  And yet the apartment was quiet all day and especially at night, which we greatly appreciated.  Gwen was very good about communicating with us, gave us plenty of tips, and was super easy to interact with and super friendly.  Excellent wifi, good washer, ample living space, plus small balcony and lots of plants.  Guests should be aware that the host normally lives in the space, with all the benefits of having more household items available (except no microwave or workable oven), but also needing to live alongside the host's personal items.

name: Ruim en rustig appartement op de witte de with
comments:
Lovely warm place to stay, Makes you feel like home with nice balcony
Perfect location, near to everything by walking
Easy and fast communication.

name: Ruim en rustig appartement op de witte de with
comments: We enjoyed being Gwen's guests for 5 days. Communicating with her was easy. She was fast to respond and gave us all needed information. Gwen kindly checked us in and explained about the apartment and the area - which is central, close to bars, restaurants, shops, tram and metro stations. Stiil, the apaetment is very quiet. Gwen's lives at the apartment while there are no guests, which gives the place a real home like feeling. If you are flexible enough to organize your belongings in a somewhat small area, you will find this apartment very enjoyable. The bedroom and toilet are at the first floor, and after climbing the Dutch stairs you will get to the living area, a small and organized kitchen, and a dining table. Opening the day at the small balcony by the kitchen is a nice start for a day in the city.  Thank you, Gwen!

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments:
What a delight to stay in this cube house. One of Rotterdam’s major landmarks, but so reasonably priced. Quick responses and courteous with good amenities!
Would highly recommend and I look forward to staying here again if I visit Rotterdam again.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: A wise decision to live in the amazing house. Fantastic exterior and interior；perfect location in city centre across from the famous market and Metro station；many impressive details and designs make us feel comfortable and delighted. Thank you for the great hosting.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: Best Airbnb experience of my life! Everyone needs to stay here! The space was so unique, extremely clean, and across the street from Markthal!

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments:
Staying in this house was excellent and amazing!
The cubical walls and windows give a very special feeling. spacious house.
Top floor is an amazing space with windows all around (but bring a sleeping mask if you plan on sleeping there: no curtains!)
Location extremely central: right next to the Markthal, practically on top of a metro station and NS station Blaak.
Very clean, easy access with keycode.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: Unique opportunity to experience this architectural landmark, perfect for a short city break. Very quirky, great fun but also comfortable and practical because of its central location. Beware there is a general lack of blinds/ curtains,  light will come in and in some spots the neighbors are in line of sight. This wasn't a problem for us though:-)

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: Staying in the Cube House was absolutely fantastic.  The interior was quirky and fun.  My daughter loved sleeping in the room at the very top which had great views in all directions (though there are no shades, so sunrise was our wakeup call!).  There was plenty of room for my family of 5 and everything was clean and ready when we arrived.  The location is wonderful - easy walking to restaurants, stores, waterfront, etc.  It's about a 25 minute walk to the train station, which we did easily with suitcases in tow.  I highly recommend staying here if you are looking for a unique experience.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: This place is definitely unique and a lot more spacious than expected.  The train stop, markethal, shops, and restaurants are close by so great location for that.  The host was very responsive and house was really clean.  One major thing to consider is the noise level from inside the house.  It’s a tourist attraction so you’ll see a lot of traffic and hear people but if you’re out exploring the city from around 8am-7pm, you’ll have no issues with this unique experience.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: It is a very nice place to stay. We got immediate response from the host when we face problems. The room is clean and the view is fantastic. It is also well equipped.  We recommend it 100%!!

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: A cube house is an extremely dysfunctional house.  It is quirky, with steep stairs, crazy angles and inefficient use of space.  While we were initially charmed with these things, after a day, we became annoyed that there were no blinds on the windows, no fans, no screens, and lots of night time noises (cars, motorcycles, screaming people).  We did not sleep well for the three nights we stayed here.  If I were to go back to Rotterdam (really, you only need one day to enjoy the perks of this city), I would definitely choose to stay somewhere more comfortable.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: I’m an architect and was interested to stay in a cube house to experience living in these experimental homes. Be prepared for a very different experience! The houses are quirky (obviously!) and spatially a little awkward - Sloping ceilings giving one or two head height issues (I am 6’1” though). The stairs are steep and a couple of flights to negotiate including the entrance. You have to be prepared for a lot of tourists looking at the house as well, it’s opposite the ‘museum house’ in the complex. So can get busy. The facilities at the house were good and The location of the apartment is excellent, close to the new food market development and train and tram station.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: The house is one of the cubic houses and the structure is really beautiful and interesting. The location in the center of the city allows you to experience it by walking comfortably. To signal that to get there and inside the house there are many stairs and that it is preferable to be in 4 and not in 6 as the sofa bed on the top floor is uncomfortable and small for two adults. Furthermore, despite having given us masks for the light, the room is very hot and at dawn you are awake. For the rest, Wero was precise and available. The house is very clean and welcoming. I highly recommend it for its location and structure.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: The location is really nice, near public transport. The house is really Unique and the interior design is beautiful. Although I have to say it’s difficult for a family with kids, the stairs are not safe at all, they are way too high. In August its hot because and no ac we had hard time sleeping . The window locks are broken, I wish the owner would fix them for safety . And because the houses are also an attraction so they’re always noise especially when we open the windows . For some reason people are always sitting in-front of the outdoor entrance stairs, it was a little disturbing. The nearest parking is 20£ hours per a day, but they did mention that there was no free parking. It was a nice stay, it might’ve had it’s difficulties but it was unique.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: Weekend in an architecture pearl? The cube house was THE perfect place 2 B to discover R‘dam from the very city centre whilst living in a famous design home! Sleeping under the sky windows at the cube roof or chilling in the spacey cube living room was perfect relaxation during city trips! White and friendly furniture and decorations made it quickly a home. Very short ways to Market Hall, High Street, Old Harbour, Maas Bridges and the Maritime Docklands. Not to forget easy bike rentals at the subway station BLAAK in front of the cubes - to discover Euromast Tower, Delfs Harbour, and Maas islands! It was gorgeous!!!!

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: I loved it and would love to come back again, great location and spacious modern apartment. There was more stairs than expected (not just inside the apartment but also to get from the street to the apartment) my parents had a little difficulties but the host did warn me about it. Thank you again:)

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: It was so cool to live in a landmark of Rotterdam! Location and views were absolutely beautiful. The facilities and general condition of the house weren't exactly what you'd expect at this price though.

name: Iconic Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments: Very nice to experience living inside this must-see Rotterdam architecture for two days. We enjoyed watching a movie in that cosy corner and reading a book on that glassy top floor on a sunny sunday morning was memorable. Fully equipped kitchen. Good beds.

name: Centre city of Rotterdam
comments:
Fleurs Apartment is very nice and spacious!
The chickens in the photos were the highlight of this AirBnB!
My friend and I would really recommend to stay in this AirBnB if you would like to stay near to Rotterdam Centraal (20 min walk) to save up some money or if you would like to take care of three precious chickens which could lay some eggs for you!
Everything else was great and the communication between us was perfect.
Thank you Fleur!

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments: My stay at this cozy, warm and charming place was simply great and with no doubt, I felt at home! As described, the place is well-located in the vicinity of Rotterdam Centraal and other key points of interest, in a nice and vibrant neighborhood. The communication was fluid, quick and super clear and everything was clearly explained and described :) The place was spotless and in perfect conditions! Despite that the flat is literally surrounded by a number of day cares -which entails the usual presence of happy little dudes who are normally noisy- the place is for the rest of the day quit, except for the customary environmental sounds of a busy street. It was a nice time for me and would stay at Harald's place in the future! Thanks for hosting me!

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments:
This is a wonderful place, exactly as described in the overview.
We really enjoyed our stay at Harald's apartment. However, I believe that the bedroom is not dark enough at night (due to street and backyard lights). Also, for the people who are sensitive to sound during the sleep, the bedroom is located on the street side. So, you would expect some sound coming from the street sometime. However, in the most of the night time, it is really quiet.
Harald is one of the most accommodating persons I have ever met.
Thank you Harald!

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments: It's a good airbnb overall, the host is really friendly and accommodating, the location is good, the garden is nice, it looks nice, the only real downsides are the heating system that needs to be improved, unsuitable for children and adults should also be aware that there's a metal gas heating unit next to the bed on the floor that will reach temperatures over 200c (checked with IR thermometer) and the limited supply of hot water to the shower due to the boiler's lack of input power and thermodynamics, and the living room doesn't have any curtains so you don't get much privacy from that side, something for the host to improve.
