As it is today I would say it's a better experience for a summer airbnb than a winter airbnb.

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments: We recommend this apartment 100% the truth, we were delighted very comfortable.  Good location and good communication with the owner has everything you need recommended.  Greetings, we hope to return one day.

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments: First of all, the house was perfectly equipped. All domestic details were organised, clean and working well. We had a good communication with the owner and the instructions were clear and helpful. The house is at a walking distance from the center, with a very accessible tram service to the train station. No disturbing noises, quiet area of Rotterdam, apparently safe. Recommended.

name: Authentic City App. with peaceful garden.
comments:
Harald is a great host and we had a very nice stay. The instructions were very clear, we could find the house and do the check in easily and without any time pressure.
The house is located in a ground floor of a busy street, near the city center and with public transport on its doorstep.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is a very different and interesting hostel in a very good location in Rotterdam. The room, although small, is just what you need and was very clean. The bathroom, despite being shared, is really nice - great shower, spacious and with privacy. The hostel's lounge provides a good experience on the drinks and tables for the guests. We would definitely recommend the place. One last notable point is that in the morning a group of most likely wasted guests arrived yelling at 6am and kept playing games extremely loud. That has last for one hour or so and the host of the moment hasn't done anything. But on the other hand the next hostess which was very polite and caring was deeply sorry for the issue, showing us that she cared.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Very clean and private room. It’s located in a popular street with lots of coffee shops and restaurants nearby. The staff are very nice and would love helping all the time.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: This place is SO cool. The location is amazing, one of Rotterdam’s main streets for bars and restaurants and only 10/15 minutes walk from Centraal Station. The CityHosts were all super friendly and gave amazing recommendations. And the pods are great, we loved the Bluetooth speaker and light features. The bathrooms were clean and had shower gel and shampoo. Could not recommend more!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Perfect spot for super short stay, the location is amazing & the staff is very friendly. Not indicated for claustrophobic people, the space is very very small and I don’t think i’m goin to repeat the experience, definitely not for me! And about the concept itself: the innovative tech social experience is poor (like the interior design itself) & the vibe is mainly based on the color light setting in your extra small room-container directly from your app, after your check in.  I would recommend it only for last minute booking or super quick stay.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Super cool place un best Street in Rotterdam!! And great local addresses shared by the staff :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Good location and friendly staff. Suggest choosing a top pod if you’re a light sleeper as you could hear all the footsteps of others walking around on the bottom one.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It was a great experience to stay at the CityHub. The hub itself was really cool to sleep in. You’re able to control the lights and sound through your phone. The bathroom was also very clean, luxurious amenities and complimentary towels and even Rituals shower gel and shampoo. All in all, it was a really awesome experience and we will definitely stay at a hub again. You should too!!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Cityhub is really an advanced and interesting hostel. You are just like living in a capsule and the app for Cityhub can be used easily to adjust the temperature and strength of light. We had a good time there... the bathroom is extremely clean and thoughtful!!!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Great place to stay in Rotterdam.  Pod may be slightly claustrophobic for some but had ample room in a great part of town.  Shower and bathroom facilities were great and a great common area to relax and have a drink.  USB and power outlets by the bedside to charge devices.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub Rotterdam is AMAZING! The place was futuristic and very clean. I loved the hubs, even spacious enough for my girlfriend and I. I won't give too much away, you must witness this place for yourself. Do it. The location was perfect and the restaurants down on the street were PHENOMENAL! I especially recommend Warung Mini!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is perfectly located next to all of the museums, around the corner from V2_ and across the street from TENT. Everything you need is in the kitchen, and the sleeping pods are super comfortable. I particularly enjoyed the cheeky selfie phone shelf across the bed ;-) The pods tend to vibrate a bit when heavier guests are walking down the hallways, so if you're a very sensitive sleeper this might be a bother. Otherwise, everything was top notch, would definitely stay again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub Rotterdam is our favorite hotel now! :) The main advantage is of course style of the interior - we felt like in a space shuttle. :D And the special App for managing light and music is also super. Everything was perfect during our stay in CityHub, thanks a lot!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
This place is awesome! In my Euro trip, I'm having it as my favorite! They gave a WiFi hotspot to carry and it has batt for probably 5 hours and you can charge it with a powerbank, we used it even during our day trip to Amsterdam. Their bed are super soft but firm and their bathroom which are shared were very clean! The cubicles are sound proof so you can't hear nothing from the outside (super relaxing). They have an app that you can control the Lights of the room and even chat with the staff members when you have a question. I particularly left my sunglasses at the bar tables, when I found out we were already 30 min away. I chat them and they found my sunglasses and kept them safe. It's an amazing place in the right location if you like parties! They also provide with suggestions about good spots for party! I was able to attend a local festival because of their suggestion, it was an incredible experience!
110% recommend!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Hosts were very friendly and always ready to help with travel tips and plans.
Room was extremely cosy, and speakers and adjustable lightings were a nice touch.
Would definitely book this place again when in Rotterdam!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The CityHub is in a great location,and people there are very friendly and enthusiastic! But the Bluetooth and the light sometimes are not work, it is a pity!But in total,it’s excellent!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Without staying in CityHub, the trip to Rotterdam would be incomplete.
The city itself is quite modern and advanced in terms of architecture, infrastructure etc. But the CityHub became to us a Rotterdam’s unique state of the art which helped us to experience a brand new way of living in a hotel.
The hotel is pretty innovative in terms of how few space there is used for living for an individual and how comfortable you feel with that accommodation. It is super cool.
In addition, you can take advantage of different tiny benefits that are provided by hotel. For instance, free WiFi around all the city (they give you a small portable modem) or the great application that helps you to tune the light color and bright in your room and manage your booking.
Special thanks to an awesome receptionist Ivanna, who has warmly welcomed us, gave us a lot of tips regarding Rotterdam, drew an itinerary with the interesting places and helped us not to get lost :)
By far, this is my the best hotel experience ever, defiantly 10/10!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is a pretty good hostel. The room is very comfortable and there are Bluetooth speakers and lights. It’s a enjoyable experience for guests. Also, everything is awesome.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Amazingly quirky space. Absolutely loved our stay here! Local tips and friendly faces are the highlight. The app is amazing. 110% recommend City Hub!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Stayed at the CityHub Rotterdam for 4 nights. Great location for getting into town. Hub was very clean. There are spacious/clean bathrooms to choose from. SPAR grocery is 5 minutes walk. On site, there is a lounge area where you can take wine, beer or other drinks at a more than reasonable price. Just outside, there are a few tables to enjoy the enthusiasm of the street. I fully recommend CityHub and thank their staff for being so kind. Fabienne - Montreal, Canada

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: as someone who had never stayed in a hostel before, this was a great experience. the place was super safe, the elevator required your bracelet to be scanned, and only let you onto your assigned floor. the door to outside was locked at 11pm so nobody who hadn't already checked in could even get inside of the building too. the bathroom was very clean, including the showers, and even had a hair dryer and ironing board. only complaint is the light in the hall not completely shut out by the blinds. beware that upon arrival you take a little survey and your answers determine where you're placed, so don't pick your reason for staying "you don't wanna know" for some giggles— you'll be placed nearby some very restless people. overall would recommend, especially for single or couple travelers!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: already left a review :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: City hub is a really nice modern stay. It was awesome that we could control the light and play our own music in the pod. Pod was relatively sized. Very close to city centre. The staff there were helpful with suggestions.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Perfect experience. Love the modern concepts and room settings. The light is incredible. Staff is all omniscient and hospitable. Really love this, definitely will choose it another time.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Great spot with easy access to bars and restaurants and public transport.
The Hubs are very clean and comfortable, and have an amazing app to control all the lights and steam music.
The lounge is a great chillout zone, with coffee, tea, softdrinks and alcohol.
The bathrooms are all clean and well stocked with extra fresh towels.
All together, a great new and refreshing hotel experience, I highly recommend it.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: funky place. really cool app that lets you control lighting. not a ton of space for luggage but bed is comfy and not claustrophobic. bathrooms were a little far from our cube. great location though with lots around.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: All was perfect in the very central hotel in Rotterdam. For me a new and very special experience to spend the night in such a capsule hotel, that's very contemporary, but rooted in the architectonic ideas of the 1970's. All very clean, well prepared, no sound at all from my neighbour, easy and friendly check-in and check-out. Allthough I tend to be rasther claustrophobic in small rooms I had no problem here, because of the smart light installation. Good way to travel and spend a night in Rotterdam, because the location is perfect! There were no specific breakfast offers in the hub, except of teas and coffees, but a friendly tip where to go near by. The hub is absolutely recommendable for an easy and reasonable night in Rotterdam.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The room is quite small but the price-performance-ratio is excellent and the hostel has a very central location in the middle of the popular night life street.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Significantly better than any regular hostel, this "pod" hostel offers guests privacy in their own "L"-shaped half-room. Very modern and high-tech, this place requires you to download their app to control your pod's lighting (which is annoying), and requires guests to self-check-in and -out. Replete with a bar, this is a fun, well-kept space. Bathrooms and "pod" room were extremely clean.
Definitely recommend everyone check out one of these "pods" -- economical for a single traveler, and extremely convenient. Highly recommend!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
The hub is very cool, trendy and clean. You can connect to the surrounding speakers with Bluetooth. Choose your own lights. That’s a cool extra touch.
No keys needed, you get a wristband which gives you acces to everything you need. I would recommend this place

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: One stays in nice sleeping coccoons within an old building, feeling like high tech camping or being on a ship that does not move around. Small but comfy, not half as claustrofobic as could be expected. Common showers are clean, a bathrobe for moving around is provided. Lighting in one's pod is controlled by app.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Very good location, just in the centre of the city, the guys that work at the reception are very kind and ready to help with all your requests, capsule is also nice and rather clean, I’ve heard some noise that night, it might have been smb’s cellphone vibration. I liked a lot that you can regulate the sound and light at your capsule

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: We loved it ❤️ The neighborhood was full of life without too much noise. It was peaceful with everything close by, bars, supermarkets, coffeeshop and monuments.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: This doesn't need a review; just go with it, CityHub is amazing.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
The City Hubs were really nice and bigger than expected. Everything was clean and the Implementation of the App was fun to experiment with. You could even connect your phone to the Bluetooth speakers of your hub and enjoy some music during your stay, its set up so no one could hear you outside of the hub. The location was also really good, its in one of Rotterdam's biggest streets, so you'll always find something to do.
We came by car wich we had to park outside of Rotterdam (Park and Ride-Kralingse Zoom), but it was for free if you had the "OV-chipkaart" that you can buy at the train station. The stay was very nice and we would consider to book this Air B&B again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Had a great stay! The city hub app offers really nice features and the location is just perfect in a lively street full of bars. It is still quiet inside the hubs. Would recommend 👍.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Perfect accommodation for a city trip. The pods are big enough to feel comfortable and the bed is very comfy. Music and light can be changed in the pod. They are very well insulated and you don’t hear any outside noises and the aircon keeps you cool. Highly recommend!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
I had never been in a place where a little bracelet (with a little chip inside) gives you so much access.
Everything is connected, from your door to everything you might want to pay.
The room, the showers and the bathroom are really clean, I would recommend to stay there for a night. Maybe not for too long though. The fact that (at least, we didn't, maybe it's not the same for everyone) there is no direct sunlight in the room kinda makes it dark.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: very clean and tidy place, beautifull bedrooms, very small but the light around it is amazing!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
If you are searching for a futuristic, super cute and clean place you should definitely visit CityHub. The staff is super friendly, extremely helpful and openminded. The staff basically is there 24/7 and always ready to help you with any question.
The CityHub is located in the heart of Rotterdam at the most central street with all bars and restaurants around. Although it was located there you could sleep perfectly at night. As a guest you are provided with towels for your body and face. They have shower gels, shampoos and hands & body lotions from "Rituals" and they smell amazing. The "Ritual" soaps really impressed me 😍😍😍.
I had an amazing anniversary with my girlfriend and they made it even cuter ❤️❤️❤️❤️. I felt super welcome and safe. 🌸🌸🌸
The prices are also very affordable and the hub where you sleep is is super cute. I could definitely recommend this place for everyone. ❤️

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Great place, maybe a little far from the main station if you have a lot of luggage. The neighbourhood is full of interesting restaurants, bakeries and shops. There is also a coffee shop right below the hotel and another one across the street. The hubs were amazing and fun. The facilities were very clean ant staff was exceptional! 11/10 would recommend!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
A clean hotel with an innovative concept.
While situated in one of the most popular streets in Rotterdam, CityHub offers an oasis of calmness when you enter. Once inside, you will be greated by one of the hosts who will ensure that you have a comfortable stay. As many travelers frequent here, it is a good place to meet new people and make friends. The facilities are innovative yet convenient. Everything is selve-serve, so no need to consider opening times for the bar. They even have a vending machine for toothbrushes and such.
Will recommend to all my friends!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Unfortunately I can't be to happy about this place. The reviews were very good, and thus I booked a "room" for two nights. But the "room" was just a bed in a cramped space. Very claustrophobic. The photo's online which they show you are taken perfectly. They do not clearly show how cramped these spaces are. you can't even sit up right in your bed. Apart from this the shower had a problem which made for the water to rise and rise and overflow the badroom. Could have been a problem that was only there we were there, but it seemed like it was there for longer.
It's just too much money for things you get back. My advise is to pay just a little extra and get yourself a better airbnb or a hotel even.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We had a nice stay at city hub! The hub is located at a street filled with bars and restauramts, which is very nice. A lot of interesting spots and sights are in walking diatance and there was always someone from the staff to ask, when there is a problem.
Unfortunately you need to use their app in order to be able to do certain things like send a message or control the lights in the hub itself.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Are you tiny and don't need a lot of space? CityHub is the place for you!
Ten minutes and feet from Rotterdam Central Station, it is located on a street full of bars, cafes and restaurants.
Check-in and Check-out are done by themselves and are very simple and intuitive.
The room is small, intimate and essential.
The common areas (bar, bathrooms, sofa corner) are well cleaned and heated!
In the room and in the bathrooms you will find towels, soaps for the shower and cream (next time i won't bring mine)
My friend and I were VERY satisfied.
I will definitely come back with other friends or we will use the other CityHubs present in other cities.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: A nice place to stay, in a lively street. Just an overall nice experience. That's all I can say and I can't wait to come back.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: A perfect choice for 2 to 3 nights. Very welcoming and helpful staff! Calm, clean, and perfectly located at the hip and lively Witte de Withstraat street.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Tussen hostel en hotel in; wel je eigen hub met bed, maar een gedeelde badkamer en wc. Helaas geen keuken maar wel een magnetron. Voor de digital nomads: werken in je hub op bed, via de kast als tafel (als je de bovenste hub kiest), of in de gezamelijke ruimte (je hebt een aparte ruimte om te werken en waar je kan praten) kan allemaal. Erg modern; je krijgt toegang via je eigen armband en er is een telefoonhouder voor een selfie in je hub, en rgb light control met app. Hosts erg behulpzaam en aardig. De hub was niet helemaal schoon (we vonden haren), maar de badkamer en wc wel altijd. Liggen interessante winkels in dezelfde straat.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: small but in the busiest street of Rotterdam. recommend

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: This place is fantastic. It is a super cool experience and the pods are actually extremely comfortable. Definitely a little bit small for two people but its cozy. Located on a street with a ton of nightlife and so easy to get around!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Staff of very kind and helpful. Location is on a popular street with a lot of restaurants. Easy access to/from the train and tram. Clean and has a great sense of community.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: A great place for the tech-savvy traveller who wants to try something a bit different. Room lighting and Bluetooth speaker system in the rooms are a nice touch, whilst everything else is very easy to navigate. Big fan and would stay there again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: clean hubs with multimedia bluetooth speakers and ambient lighting..Good shower and bathrooms. good food options..only negative thing was upstair neighbors, we could feel them walking loudly/making noise just above our hub late at night. Just be careful not to choose the down hub but an upper hub. Everything else is just perfect.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Really good stay at city hub. The place is well located and the staff is really nice. Beds are comfortable and the automatic system with bracelet is nice. :)
However, two remarks :
- I got a « bug » during my stay and someone got the same room as me, and entered my room while I was about to sleep. Quite a stress. I’m all in to automate everything, but make sure that the system is 100% bug free… Nevertheless the staff handled it nicely, offered me a free breakfast. Quite good.
- The place is quiet at night, but the ground around rooms is not. It means that someone walking in the corridor will make thuds. So if you have a light sleep, it could be a bit annoying.
I still recommend the place, I had 3 amazing days in Rotterdam. ;)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Just as expected, small and cozy but still lovely. Great location on a busy street full of restaurants and pubs!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
A quiet but lively neighbourhood, some cafés to have a delightful breakfast nearby. Autonomously accessing the hotel with the wristband is a great idea.
High five to the music playlist we can hear in the showers, that helps to start a day in a wonderful way 😁

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We loved staying at the CityHub! It is so well located in Rotterdam, everything was so spotless and well thought. Our pod was very comfortable and peaceful, we loved the little details.
Toilets and showers were very clean, towels, shampoo and shower gel smelled delightful.
Check-in was straightforward and the wristbands are a fantastic idea!
As for the common areas, we only used them for tea/coffee and were very practical.
Last but not least, communication was impeccable from our host, we had everything we needed since the moment we booked.
Loved the experience and would happily book again! Thank you CityHub!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
A very smooth and original stay in Rotterdam (Wristband Power!) , located just in the bubbling Witte de With street! The personal was very accommodating and available at all time for any query!
Definitely recommend!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: simply AWESOME!!!! this is by far the coolest place I have stayed at. it is located in a great street with lots happening around - so great location. close to the central station and the city hosts are so lovely and welcoming. Highly recommended!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: I really enjoyed my stay here, the pods are so cool, especially the lighting and audio systems. All the communal areas were very clean, and the hosts were very helpful. It's also in the perfect location right next to some of the best bars and restaurants in the city. I would definitely stay again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Excellent concept. The cabins are small but big enough to feel comfortable. The rest looks like a youth hostel with high standards. The shared showers and toilets were very clean and comfy and the staff was very welcoming !
As a bonus, we appreciated the “connected” hotel. Control the colors of the light in your cabin with your smartphone, play your Spotify music through your cabin’s speakers, enter your room, pay your beverages with your wristband, etc

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Generally I was happy. price a little high for shared bathroom. There was low to medium level noise until 2pm.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is the perfect location for a city trip. Everything was clean, the people there were very nice and the great smelling Bathproducts from Rituals are a cute little highlight :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Our stay was very enjoyable. Don't expect a lot of luxury, just a bed, some space for your bags and that's it. I did enjoy the (wake up) lights at the bed.
We just slept at the hotel, we were gone all day, so this was perfect for us! The lockers before check-in and after check-out were a big plus!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Nice, clean, techie kind of place. If you want privacy, modernity and an excellent location, this is the place.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: great place to stay in the total heart of Rotterdam. Even though it is directly located on one of the liveliest and coolest streets in the city center, you don't hear a sound from the outside streets, but still can enjoy the view of the nightlife in the street below while brushing your teeth in the bathroom. the beds are very comfortable unless you are an extremely sensitive sleeper, you don't really hear lots of noises from the hallways or neighbor bunks. The bathrooms are well-equipped and clean. There is always someone in charge for you to ask any questions or give you a helping hand with everything in the lobby. Overall, there's a great atmosphere at CityHub, people are happy to reach out to you and make connections easily or, leave you to do your things equally if you prefer that. I came multiple times already and I am very happy to come again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
City hub is great, my partner and I loved staying in Rotterdam.
I just would say that the room needs a bit of ventilation, a small open window would make perfect.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is a cool modern place right in the centre of Rotterdam. It's a cosy place where everything you need is at your disposal. The hosts are nice and helpful. The comfort and privacy of a hotel for the price of a hostel. 🦋✨

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We had such a great experience staying at City Hub and we can highly recommend it!
It was in walking distance from all the great locations in Rotterdam, and the street had lots of great bars and restaurants. The staff were super friendly and helpful in recommending places to go.
The pod where we slept were very comfortable and the toilets and baths were very clean.
All in all a SUPER experience!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: For what is essentially a capsule hotel, CityHub offers a great experience. The rooms are spacious and with manually controlled lighting, and one can always spend time in the lounge area downstairs. The whole experience is seamless, from check-in to even simple things like buying a coffee by scanning the keycard. Plus, the location is great, positioned right at a bustling street filled with cafes, shops, restaurants and the like.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We really appreciated CityHub. The concept is cool, everything is smart and easy to use, from the tablet for the check-in/out procedure to the whistleband. The staff (24/24) is the real added value to this place, everybody was nice and smiley, everytime!
All the common spaces were comfortable, clean and tidy. The hall is very well equipped with all the goods you could ever need (wine, coffe, tea, yogurts and even a small collection of practical things for your journey).
The Hub is essential, but the lights and music create a beautiful atmosphere. I only remark that is not an acoustically isolated hotel room, so you might hear other guests..
We’d love to come back!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Excellent place to stay and Its in nice and popular street.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Its a small space, but everything about it is cool - liked the toiletries, easy acces, center location. I would expect little bit of noise from people around if you are VERY sensitive, but the sound insolations is fairly good, ventelation is decent too. In general would visit agian 👍

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The bed area was quite dusty (the lights and the fan above). everything else was as advertised and quite nice

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The location is great! You can walk to it from the train station and also walk to lots of sight views that are nearby. Everything was clean and comfy!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
impeccable stay, the room is very good for one person but can be too narrow for two even if it would largely do the trick, however it remains very original with the neon lights and the integrated Bluetooth speakers!
the hosts at the reception as well as the people running the restaurants and shops in the street are very nice and welcomed me when I said I was French
the room is located in a very lively street, which is very heart-warming!
the shared toilets and showers are very clean
thanks again cityhub, I would definitely come back!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub was all around great. Extremely responsive and communicative. Everything was accurate to the description. They are a great central location where one can walk anywhere. The street is a happening spot but the room was perfectly quiet. Would recommend and stay again!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Pretty neat place, lovely location , minimalist and smooth. Speaker in the pod was kind of worse than my phone  (not a fancy one mind you) , and two of the 6 lights mood settings didn't work, but it didn't bother me, those are some small humps. Overall pretty happy, will go again for sure

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Wish I could stay a few more nights! My single night here was easy to check in, and I was able to purchase a breakfast special for across the street. I needed help with check in and the staff were communicative and friendly. The only thing was that there is not much sound proofing so I could hear every footstep, but I’m a heavy sleeper so that wasn’t a problem.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
It was an amazing experience, so much to do and see around the CityHub, the metro is so close, so is a beautiful park and vibrant local shops! The pods at the hub were perfect for my stay, (id say enough room for only 1 girl who loves to shop fit just right, any more might be a bit tight). Clean sheets, moody lights, surround sound and at night it was very sound proof. I slept amazing.
A trip to remember! Im definitely coming back as soon as I can!
Xo ox

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Overall a great experience, but here are a few things you should bring to fully enjoy your stay:
- Earplugs : most people walk like elephants, making the floor vibrate. If you don't want to wake up all night, earplugs are the best solution
- Eye mask: the On/Off buttons for the light are always lightened, and the windows still let the light of the corridors pass, which results in your room never being dark.
But with these two accessories your stay will be perfect! We had a great time, there are multiples restaurants in the area, a metro station nearby, and the hosts are super nice!
The bathrooms and showers are clean and there is shampoo and bodywash/bodylotion.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub Rotterdam is a great place to stay and explore the city. Local restaurants and bars are good, plus walkable to the main sights and train station. Beds are very comfortable and the shared bathroom was very clean. Felt private, only noise is from people walking outside the capsules - a little cramped for two in the capsule in terms of storage if you are staying for more than a long weekend but the lockers downstairs are easy to use if you want to keep a bag there (even after check-out). So easy to come-and-go using the wristband key. Would definitely recommend for exploring the city and a comfortable night's sleep!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: We had a great time at cityhub. Everything is super clean, beds are comfy, nice bathrooms. Location is superb, in the best street of Rotterdam

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Fab stay, love the pods.
Download the app for cool lights!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: People there are really friendly and the rooms are fun, in my opinion. It's perfectly located so you can enjoy the beautiful street that CityHub is in or even the whole city without being far from it.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: room was much smaller than expected, very noisy all hours. you can hear people walking/Stomping around outside and up above. bathroom wasn't very clean, cleaner was in there whilst I was showering and didn't seem to want to be there at all. She kept making alot of unnecessary noise banging about whilst 'cleaning' and sighing alot. Host was friendly and helpful. I wouldn't of booked If I  know how noisy it would be and small.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: First time staying in a City Hub and it was really lovely! Everything was simple—their bathrooms were clean and well stocked, it was easy to get around and use self service for things like snacks and storage, and the pod/hub itself was super comfortable and surprisingly spacious (I could sit up in bed, and didn’t really look like that in the photos). The app to control the lights and use Bluetooth for sound was a plus. Would recommend for tourism travel.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Very nice experience, first time in a hostel with that concept but really happy about it. Easy to find, just in the centre, clean space, beautiful room whit light, Spotify and very comfortable bed. I will be back for sure. Ah, one last think, all the guys on the receptionist was super friendly and helpful. Very nice place ✌️

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Simple futuristic accommodations. Built in speakers and soundproofing make for a good night's rest on a busy street. 24 hour attentive staff available.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Really convenient location, all the shared amenities were kept really clean and nice. Had no issues with noise at night at all and some of the staff were really friendly and went above and beyond

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: A little bit small but all you need is there at the bare minimum. Bathroom and kitchen were cleaned often enough. I did have troubles operating the app for the lighting. And you can feel vibrations if someone stomps through the hall or the neighbour moves a bit too energetically, but it was minor. The nights were quiet and I got a good night rest.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The stay at city hub was beautiful. It was altogether a different experience. Even though they are hostels, they are entirely different which also gives you enough privacy. The bathroom was very clean and the place was very quiet. Such places do not give you the feel of a hostel.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We stayed 3 nights and it was really great ! The hubs are clean and the temperature inside is good. The shared toilets and showers are very clean, there's Ritulals soap, shower gel, shampoo and lotion if you need some.
The shared space is great, you can buy drinks or food (very affordable prices). It's nice to know you can ask the city host for anything if you need to.
My favourite thing was the location : you are in the heart of one of the coolest streets in Rotterdam. You can do a lot of things without needing to take public transports and without walking for too long.
I would recommend CityHub, 10/10 !!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Really lovely concept and great location! Just missing a proper kitchen and also the chance to regulate your own hub temperature. A window would be nice too as the air gets really dry at night!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
I was apprehensive - I’ve never stayed at a hostel/City Hub before. But it was a lovely place. The staff are very accessible. The shared shower/bathroom space is very clean, well maintained and the showers work perfectly.
The bed is comfortable. The location is very good and easy to find. The swipe in as a wristband works really well.
The only slight flaw was a minor stain in my bottom sheet which I noted too late in the night to inform reception. I am sure had I informed reception they would have helped swiftly as they were very approachable. Just to staff to pay close attention to sheets.
Otherwise it was a lovely experience and I would recommend/return.
Thank you CityHub!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Very cool place to stay in Rotterdam. Everything is clean and very modern. You can change to light of the room with an app and it’s climated very well.
We nearly couldn’t hear any noises outside our hub and it was pretty private.
Downstairs is a „kitchen“ with microwave, kettle, fridge (no stove or oven and no ceramic plates unfortunately). Everything was super clean all the time and the showers had shampoo and shower gel.
Also it’s located in the middle of a really cool and living street and a lot of things are within a walking distance.
The staff was very friendly and helpful.
We would definitely recommend staying at City Hub!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Nice concept, slept very well and quiet. Located in a nice bar street. The Hosts were very nice, we were even allowed to buy a kimono :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: i was a bit apprehensive about the type of accommodation, but can confidently say it was a perfect stay in a great location. i had loads of sleep and the amenities were clean and modern. i had no issues with noise and i was able to get work done in the pod too. 10/10

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Super clean and great shared facilities! The check in was easy and the location is excellent, on a street with lots of bars and restaurants creating a great atmosphere. However the ‘rooms’/hub is small and the atmosphere of the hostel was quiet.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Cityhub is located in the centre of Rotterdam. Perfect place to stop to relax when you travel. A lot of city life in the street. Metro station is nearby.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Amazing value for a budget overnight stay whilst we backpacking around the Netherlands. It was really well designed to minimise noise, in fact it was so quiet we didn’t realise there were so many other people there in other pods at all! Shared bathrooms were really clean, and the individual shower cubicles were great. A really good place to stay on a budget.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Good location, clean and very easy to check in/out. Even though it is on an busy street, it is very quiet.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Loved the changing lights and Bluetooth speakers! It was a vibe

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Staff were friendly. We were very grateful for a last minute booking to be able to fit in! The perfect street in Rotterdam for a bit of nightlife!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Same as described! Very clean.
The only negative thing I experienced was there is no option to open the window to get fresh air inside the cabin.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The location of CityHub is great, in a very lively street with many restaurants and bars. There are lockers on the first floor which is very practical if you arrive before your check in time or leave after your check out time. The concept of the rooms (in a kind of capsule) is very original and pleasant. However, there's one big drawback. It's poorly insulated and the whole room trembled when someone walked down the corridor. We suffered from a lot of noise from our neighbors at 3 and 7 a.m., which was very unpleasant.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: To stay at  CityHub is an experience in itself. And I loved it! Hosts were super friendly, everything was really clean. The street is super busy in the evening but when you get in the hotel you can’t hear any outside noise. Would definitely stay there again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Great little hostel right in the centre of Rotterdam. Heaps of restaurants nearby and only 10/15 mins into other areas.
The cubes themselves are very unique, clean, and the mattress/pillow quality was a massive highlight after spending 2 weeks on uncomfortable bedding. Would definitely stay here again

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Check in was super easy and close to nearby shops. Even though there were shops below, on the street, the hub was sound proof.  Perfect for a city break when you only need to stay to sleep

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Amazing stay! We booked last minute, was cheap and so worth it! It was very cozy and practical. Just beware of the specific street of the Hub at night. Lots of bars means a lot of drunk people as well as the homeless that kept on bothering us when we got back at night. Other than that everything is absolutely perfect!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Great place in a busy location. But we couldn't hear the street noise from our room which was great. Lovely, clean rooms with a fun pop of colour (picked by yourself). Comfortable beds and clean bathrooms with beautiful Rituals soaps. We rented bikes with the city hub for £13 (per 24 hours) which was a fun and handy way to get about. I'd recommend it 😊

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is a great place, close to everything (grocery stores, nice pubs and restaurants etc.). Rooms, bathrooms were clean. Also a veeryyy friendly host, they recommended local bars and quick to respond. Rooms are not big but comfortable and the highlight is you can pair room speakers with your phone and put music and you can control the lights which was sooo coool. I would totally stay again and recommend to whoever visiting Rotterdam!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Enjoyed my stay at CityHub Rotterdam! Located on a happening street with bars/restaurants. Good security. Pods were clean and comfortable. Shared showers were as described. Would stay again and would probably request an upper pod instead of the lower one that I stayed in this time.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
CityHub was amazing! Really close to all the central places, lots of restaurants and such close by. The rooms were so cool and the self serve bar and snacks were great. Bed was comfy and the bluetooth music and mood lighting was a great addition making it such a cool place to stay.
Will definitely stay again if we come to Rotterdam in the future!
Staff were also so friendly :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Cool gimmick with good location, comfy bed and great facility’s. However the pod itself felt stuffy as the air vent was visibly dusty. 90 euro a night felt slightly over priced.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The CityHub is located in the Witte de Withstraat: the heart of Rotterdam. From there you can go anywhere – nice dining, cool pubs, nice bars and great access to public transportation. The CityHub itself is super modern. I can't think of any other place that made check-in that easy. I loved the fact that the key is a wristband that you will never forget. You can even use it for the locker after your check-out. However, be careful with booking one hub for two persons as it could get a bit narrow and dense. In the hub you can connect your phone to the bluetooth speakers and set a wake-up light with the app. The soap in the bathroom is super fresh and nice, however the pump was broken on half of the bottles. The staff at the reception is very friendly and can give suggestions of where to go in the evenings via the app or at the reception. Very recommended!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: I recommend this place for short stay, 2 nights but not longer. The rooms are ok, but to small, you can find there everything you need - towels, soap, iron. There was to much dust in the rooms - on the ac, on the lights

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The best place we’ve stayed in, more than any hotel experience! We’re always doing things and exploring when we travel, so this was perfect to come back to, to sleep and get ready. The bathrooms were fully stocked, pleasant and responsive hosts and incredibly clean rooms. The features such as the lighting and speakers were very cool. We just wish CityHub was available in even more places than Rotterdam, Amsterdam, and Copenhagen! Will absolutely be back

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It was nice one day stay, the place is just 1km from Centraal Station. It's on a happening street, even though I like the concept of how they built pods with a minimalistic approach.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Better than expected for my 1st time experience in capsule hotel design.
The room was clean and tidy, and most important for light sleeper like myself, it's very silent although it's located in a street that's well known for the night life.
It was practical to keep the luggage in a safe locker provided by the hotel, while waiting for check-in time. The staff was super helpful and welcoming.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: amazing location, super comfy cube, playing with lights is so much fun. definitely worth the money, very helpful stuff and good coffe at low price

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Located in a very central and cultural street. Beatiful cafes and everything close. The hubs are as advertised and quite clean. Only downside was the matress, very uncomfortable.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
This place is quite nice. A very accurate description when referring it for the modern urban traveler. It’s simple, tasteful & clean with nice bathroom amenities.
Two aspects of staying here was challenging for me — the level of darkness & sound. The windows are covered by window shutters which can only close out lights partially although it does provide full privacy. I prefer to sleep in the pitch dark. As for sound, I could head door knobs opening, closing & conversations happening in the hall. Perhaps due to the types of people who book this location there wasn’t too many loud folks. I didn’t hear my neighbors or knew if I ever had one so there is some form of sound insulation happening. It wasn’t enough to block out the aforementioned above.
Front desk had super helpful staff 24/7. Really appreciate having a welcoming presence at all times.
They were able to arrange a cab to the airport at 3am for 30€.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: What a great formula: but not for me! The biggest blow was not having a private bathroom! This is such an important aspect for a (certainly an older traveller with the usual nightly issues) that only devoting one line in the description is not enough, since the essence of hotel space for me (no matter how small) is at least having the privacy of your own cubicle type bathroom. The rest is secondary, provided it's clean and the room not noisy. The place was clean, but a bit noisy, because of the ventilation system. Getting in would have been a total disaster, but the hostess was incredibly kind and forthcoming and helped out with everything. Kudos to her!  My feeling is that the older you get, the less suitable this formula might be for you. And if you consider yourself to be a foreigner in the digital domain  (I do not), forget it. That said; for anybody up to 45 who wants to visit the big cities without spending a fortune for a place to sleep but wanting convivial company: great!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Like this place. Great location with easy access to nearby restaurants and bus. 10-20min walk to city center. Great cafe area for working too. Very clean. Hub is fun to stay, with bluetooth speaker and color lights to play with.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It was our first time staying in something like CityHub and it was a great experience for us personally since the toilets were so clean, the space in the room was so ergonomically well designed that we didn’t feel too squeeze and we enjoyed the little bits of personalisation to the room like being able to play your own music from the speakers in the room via bluetooth and being able to adjust the lights. We enjoyed the board games provided for guests at the main living area and it was overall, a great one night stay!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: There was some disturbing noise, but everything else was excellent

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The tiny hubs are very cute to stay in and they have customisable lighting through a very handy hotel app. The whole experience is like camping indoors, with a lot of comfort, very clean bathrooms and amenities. Also, very friendly hosts, ready to provide info on anything. The price was a bit higher cause of Christmas week but other than that, totally worth it.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Die Ankunft & Check-In war sehr angenehm. Die Unterkunft war kompakt und wie beschrieben. Das Stimmungslicht, was man selbst steuern kann, war ein kleines Highlight. Die WC-Anlagen waren sauber und modern. Das einzige was uns gefehlt hat war die frische Luft. Die Lüftung ging zwar, aber man konnte im Hub kein Fenster offen haben. Ansonsten alles super :)

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
We had a good stay at CityHub. Obviously it’s a small space, but for a two day stay to see the city, it worked pretty well.
It was quieter than we anticipated. You barely hear the other people when you are inside your capsule and you can’t hear noise from the street at all.
Everybody was very friendly and helpful. The hotel offers a couple more amenities than we initially thought. Like a possibility to store your luggage even after check-out. And a to-go breakfast you can order and pick up at reception.
All in all, it’s a pretty good place to stay for a few days to explore the city, if you are okay with a smaller space you’re staying in.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Nice place in general. Staff were both friendly and helpful. They also gave great tips about places, stores and restaurants in Rotterdam. check-in/out went smoothly. Common areas were in very good condition and were always clean. Finally, despite of being in a busy street full of pubs, restaurants and cafes, i didn't get any noise whatsoever. All in all it's great place and highly recommended. oh yeah one more thing. I found the concept of having lockers where you can keep your luggage even after checking out awesome as it was extremely convenient.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The location was greater - close to the central central and downtown area. The room is very cool, you can change the light and play music. The bathroom is a tiny bit dirty but they're cleaned regularly. Overall, we had a fun experience!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: nice place for light traveller

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It's a very nice facility in a good location. It's kept very clean, the showers and bathrooms were nice and it was very easy to find everything. The only thing that basically ruined the night for us is that the pod was so so hot. There was no way to adjust the temperature, no thermostat, no fan, and no window to open, therefore we will not be staying here again

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Decent location but most likely the price is too high for what you get.
The pods are clean but not entirely dark as light slips through the cracks of the window.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Was pleasantly surprised and enjoyed being in the space. Would recommend to anyone interested in experiencing an innovative mode of accommodation, and look forward to visiting again.
Also the lighting in the hub is a personal fave, and the hosts are always super helpful and knowledgeable.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Really like the place and how well thought out the place is. Privacy, convenience, community, even a little bit of luxury. Will come again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Great, friendly, helpful staff.
The doors are difficult to open.
The floor shakes when other guests walk past... really annoying when guests walk past at 12am - 5am . Also, the other guests don't particularly care about the time at which they play loud music or have loud conversations ... I had 2 hours of sleep and was awoken at midnight... then again at 3am . The noise and vibration from the floor continued until 5h35.
Wonderful staff cannot make up for horrid sleep interruptions.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Really unique experience, the hubs are quite spacious and the location was awesome. Plenty of walkable sights and architecture right nearby, good bars and restaurants on the same street. 10/10 would recommend to anyone travelling in Rotterdam

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: If you’re looking for an affordable stay with a unique design, this place is an experience you don’t want to miss. It’s like a hostel but with privacy. While the bathrooms were very clean most of the time, peak hours (morning 8-10) it was quite messy. Great location with good bars and restaurants.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
The hotel was a little smaller than expected – the room however a little bigger.
The bathroom wasn't very private, a little complicated to take a shower. But that was expected.
The hallways could have smelled fresher, looked cleaner. It all looked a little old – the pictures suggested it to be more modern and fresh.
There was not really any common area to sit down.
The hotel is located directly in a street with bars and restaurants – that's amazing for going out, but there are also weird people walking around…

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Everything here is very simple. I like the light controls with the phone app, and the air quality inside the pod is excellent. The people who work there are very friendly too.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Very good place lone travelers and couples on a budget. This was my first hostel-like experience and I felt very comfortable. The hubs were nice and the facilities were very clean.
If you like partying and such festivities the location is perfect, as it is is right in Witte de Withstraat. If you don't care much about partying, the hubs are very quiet from any outside noise.
The staff were very nice and helpfull. Ask them for suggestions!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It was really nice to be there , sleeping cabin gives you complete privacy and feels like very  romantic environment. Every place in hotel is clean and staff remains very helpful all the time.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Overall the stay was fine for what we needed, but it was somewhere between a hostel and a hotel. Cityhub state a 72 hour reply rate on the Airbnb app and redirect you to their own platform which is not as UX friendly; the communal bathrooms were a bit worn, and cleaning was more “on request” than routine; and somehow the floors/ceiling insulation in the hallways was incredibly weak so you hear every person walking or talking from inside the pod and if they run you feel the movement. We stayed a week night and a weekend and on the weekend there was considerably more activity later in the night which was where it felt a bit more like a hostel. All in all it suited our needs at a reasonable cost but not a first choice moving forward. I did enjoy the Bluetooth speakers inside the pod, the lighting, and the music in the bathrooms!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: if you want a pod, it's perf. the pod was bigger than we expected and didn't feel claustrophobic + speakers and lights are fun

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Was really nice. If you want a calm environment maybe not so good since it’s located right at a busy bar street.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: This was my first experience with the CityHub and it couldn't be better. Room is exactly what they advertised. Small, clean with beautiful lights and sound system. Every inch of the space is cleverly used. Shared bathroom was clean. We didn't hear any disturbance from other hosts. The receptionists were 20 out of 10. They were really helpful, smiling and with great English. I would stay here or in other CityHub again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Overall we had a comfortable stay. Toilets are clean and hosts are friendly. Their Bluetooth and lights are on point.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
enjoy one off the most comfortable ways to have privacy ass well as sharing space.
on an absolute top location if YouTube enjoy food culture and people

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Good price. Basically a sleeping compartment. 4th floor bathroom & showers were under repair, had to take emergency stairwell to 3rd floor. Emergency lighting was slow to illuminate.
Frendly staff.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub has been our favourite place to stay during our travels! Its a 20 minute walk from Centraal station and practically entirely virtual, making check-in quick and easy. The pod itself is amazing, you can control the lighting and speakers from your phone. The beds are comfy, and though small, pods have enough room to store bags on shelves/under steps. Our cityhosts were very hospitable, when we spilt water on a bedsheet they were helpful in replacing it instantly. Though the hub has no kitchen, we were able to bring in food or cook basic meals in the available microwave. The common space is very chill and a nice place to eat and just hangout. Overall, we would absolutely recommend the pod experience - its easy, different, convenient and fun!!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: CityHub is a fantastic place to stay. It is almost entirely automated, and the furniture is brand new and has a beautiful futuristic aesthetic. The room's lights are controlled by buttons or the app, and you can also set them to be romantic, calm, or naturalistic. Another great touch is the price—for what you get, it is a steal.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: The place is right in the city center, spotlessly clean and privacy-ware! Very recommended.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: There was some noise, but everything else was perfect.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: By far the best place we found during our trip in the Netherlands. The bed rooms are large enough for 2 people and very comfortable, the bathrooms are clean. In a nutshell, everything is made to make you feel good (music in background, Rituals shampoo and body wash, customized light moods). It was a very good experience and for sure we want to try other CityHub places!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Surrounded by a restaurant street. Feel safe and easy to walk around. Overall feels like a more luxury version of capsule hotel I saw in Japan. But there are a lot more spaces. Also the shower room is super clean and well designed. Overall a very good expereince.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Tucked away in the heart of Rotterdam was CityHub and their thoughtfully designed pods that offered both comfort and modern convenience. The space featured an innovative layout, complete with adjustable lighting to set the perfect mood and a surround sound system easily accessible via Bluetooth. Every detail was well-considered — from the sleek, impeccably clean bathroom to the smart use of space. It truly offered exceptional value for money, combining style, functionality, and location in one impressive package

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Nice spot right on a main street in Rotterdam. I walked in and almost immediately booked another night, preferring this over a hostel dorm. Tons within walking distance, but no street noise.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
Prestige location if you are visiting Rotterdam, Netherlands. A be try vibrant street with plenty of bars, cafes and restaurants nearby. Also close to the Metro, trains and buses. I felt safe and the hosts were incredibly helpful and friendly!
I really appreciated the hosts at CityHub, they went above and beyond to make me feel welcome.
Thank you very much. I will certainly come back or stay at your other locations when I travel. 🤍🤍🤍

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
The colored lights in my room stopped working after my first day here. I messaged someone in the app and they said the app’s light control was probably messed up, but didn’t offer anything else.
The sheets/comforter had some lint and fuzz in it when I arrived. The pod itself didn’t feel extremely clean. Clean enough I enjoyed my stay but I was a little sketched out.
The staff were super friendly and fun to talk to. The area is great, I walked around all day every day finding new things in the neighborhood.
The self serve beer, coffee and snacks were really convenient. I’d definitely stay here again.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: It was great and all the lights and stuff. location and price wise it was a great deal. the only downside is people around , I was able to hear people talking in the night and doors . But wasn't too bad. earplugs recommended for proper silence if that's what you are looking for.

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments:
It was one of my best hostel/ airbnb experiences ever! It was very fun to stay at Cityhub. There was a tiny inconvenience with fire alarm going off, and the manager very politely wrote us an apology email and gave us a 15% discount code for next time!
City hub Rotterdam was located in a really lively and beautiful street with so many stores and awesome bars and restaurants!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: This was an amazing place to stay. Right in the centre and so affordable. Such a quirky and cosy pod. Very unique and different. The pod was lovely and clean, had mood lighting and was surprisingly spacious. The bathrooms were immaculate and the hosts were amazing. Super friendly and informative. Gave us some great recommendations for the area. Very safe and friendly community. Would highly recommend and will definitely be back!

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: Loved this place!!! Great concept, super clean and great hosts<3 Everyone was so sweet definitely recommend!! Witte street is amazing so many cool bars and right next to central station

name: CityHub Rotterdam!
comments: We had a good stay here, very cool concept, but there was room for improvements on a couple of things. One thing was the noise of other guests walking around that we could easily hear, which I can see being a big problem for light sleepers, and the second was the lack of an area for stretching and exercise, specially that the hub sizes don't allow for that.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: This space is in the perfect location with a beautiful design! Loved the balcony and tea set! Thanks Ron and Susanne!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
We had a great stay at the apartment. Everything seemed to be very new and super clean. It was perfect for a city trip.
Fast internet, international TV channels, a nespresso machine and a nice balcony with a green view are the little extras which are nice to have!
Really, nothing to complain!
Thanks Susanne & Ron! :)

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Susanne and Ron are wonderful hosts, and the apartment made for a comfortable and convenient base for the 2 weeks we stayed in Rotterdam. They even left us a new set of fresh towels by our door halfway through the stay. All the reviews and details of this listing are accurate--it was clean, nicely appointed, and in a great neighborhood easily accessible to the city center by foot or train. Thank you Susanne and Ron!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Eine sehr schöne Wohnung im Herzen von Rotterdam. Die Wege zur Stadt sind vielfältig und in 15-20 min zu Fuß erreichbar. Der Einkaufsmarkt und Kneipen/ Restaurants direkt vor der Tür. Die Wohnung ist sauber und hübsch eingerichtet. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man für einen Kurzurlaub braucht. Die Treppe zur Wohnung ist ein echtes „holländisches“ Highlight. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden die Wohnung immer weiter empfehlen.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: I really enjoyed my stay at Susanne and Ron's apartment.  It was sparkling clean, cozy, and inviting.  The balcony was a nice bonus and I enjoyed the view of the trees.  The location was very convenient to the City Center and other attractions.  Grocery store is right across the street and bike rental just a few minutes away.  There is a bike rack right out the front door of the apartment to store your bike.   I tend to cook most meals rather than eat out, and the little kitchen had everything I needed.   Check-in was very flexible and Susanne provided great ideas for seeing the local sites.  I would definitely stay here again!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Housekeeper was a wonderful host, very friendly and careful. Susanne and Ron are very responsive and highly accommodating. The flat is comfortable, clean, spacious and bright and super homey! The bed was comfortable, kitchen, bathroom and shower were modern. Wonderful coffee on the balcony awaits you! The WiFi was functional. the apartment is located within walking distance from the market house, under the windows of a supermarket, near the canal and promenade. From the main station, direct access by tram or metro, stop very close to housing. A little unusual spiral staircase leads upstairs, without an elevator, but this is not a problem for an active guest.
Great stay. Thanks! Maybe we see eachother again!!!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Nice and bright apartment, on a perfect spot in the city. Thanks.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Very very small.
At the top of 2 flights of nearly vertical and super narrow stairs. No elevator. Avoid if you have any balance or hip-knee issues.
“Apartment” is actually one room and the bed is ~ 2 meters from the front door!
The room is directly above a busy street that has trams running 24/7 and nightly loud bar hoppers until 1/1:30am. Avoid if you are a light sleeper.
Automatic light in the bathroom means you will be in the dark after 5 minutes in the shower.
Lacks a full size fridge. Not really a kitchen as just a large studio area.
Laundry area is right outside the door so you may hear that late at night.
Bed says full size or queen (can’t recall) but it is actually 2 twins side by side so there will be a gap/opening in the middle.
Host was not responsive to questions and info at arrival time. Did not respond for weeks unfortunately.
Was really wanting to like this place as the options in Rotterdam are limited but the cost was too high for the mixed value.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Great stay at Angela’s apartment. The apartment was exactly as described, and the arrival and departure are with self-checking which is very convenient. The only missing thing was a shutter because we had a lot of light early in the morning !

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: We had a wonderful 3 nights in Angela's beautiful apartment. The location is PERFECT - extremely close to the city centre. Angela is very responsive to messages. We loved our stay in her lovely apartment. The balcony is wonderful as well. The only issue we had is that the internet is very slow, so we were unable to get as much work done as we would have liked to.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: All the reviews very accurate and we really enjoyed the weekend. For the postives: Lovely, clean flat in a nice part of Rotterdam. Negatives: One of the window blinds doesn't work, the water tap is very shaky, towels don't smell too great and the staircase is extremely steep.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: It was a nicely decorated apartment but if planning to stay here one must ask the host if the place has been checked for routine maintenance. The kitchen faucet was loose and the doorknobs came off in our hands. Also does not have blackout curtains and one of the blinds was missing.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: My parents had a great time in Rotterdam! The appartment is nice with a perfect location to explore the city and a supermarket just on the other side of the street. Communication was quick and easy. The taps and the door handle that were loose when we arrived, got fixed quickly.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment was very clean and well equipped. it isnt too noisy, also If you open the door to the nice balcony at night in Summer. it is perfectly located in the center of Rotterdam near the big bridges. good and also not too expensive parking places are available near the apartment.
The contact with Angela was really friendly and problem-free. She was really courteous and answered all my questions.
only the stairs could be a bit exhausting for some people.
I had a good time and will come back.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Fantastic apartment in an excellent location. Really spacious for the two of us and lovely and light

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: This little studio is very well located near the city center, some 2 km (1/2 h walk) from the central train station (or 1 km from Blaak, and there is a metro and tram that takes you to the house). It is not a very noisy area and has a little balcony on the back. Check-in was very easy with a code to the front door and key in a coded keybox. Note that this is an old (but well renovated) Dutch building with a typical, very narrow steep stairs, so this is not for people with mobility issues. Wifi was unstable, but we had our own data so that was not very important to us. A great alternative to a hotel room, and highly recommendable!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
I enjoy my stay. The room is spacious and centrally located - 5 mins walk to trams and metros, 15 mins to cube house and on the way you will walk pass a nice harbour. The room has everything I need.
On things that other mention:
1. Wifi. Ok for me to do basic work, watch videos and stuff. But it can be unstable sometimes, not sure if you can do con call.
2. Stairs. Indeed very steep. If you have very large luggages, you might have a hard time.
3. Noise. This one is the only thing that bugs me. On my first night the guest living upstairs is walking around until 2am so I barely slept. After I flagged it to Angela, things improved massively. I do hope people can be reminded when they checked in.
But as I said, I fully enjoy the stay. And would definitely stay here again.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Nice open-plan studio that feels very spacious just as the listing shows! The bathroom with the double sinks is also lovely and clean. Having a co-op just across the street is also very convenient. The location is not too far from various spots we visited in Rotterdam in a week, and there are always Donkey Republic bikes around the area for rental. Overall, we enjoyed our stay. One thing is note is the staircase is the building is extremely narrow and steep so if someone has mobility issues or needs to carry large luggages up the stairs, it could be quite difficult.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: I had a wonderful stay in this spacious and updated flat. The bed was comfortable, the kitchen had everything I needed (including coffee) and the bathroom was palatial. I especially liked sitting on the balcony. Both the metro and tram were a few minutes away. Self-check in was easy as was communication with the host.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: This appartment is wonderful for everyone who wants to stay in Rotterdam and doesn‘t have a problem with walking (the stairs are veery small & steep). Everything in it is very beautiful and the appartment even has a nice balcony to enjoy the evenings. It is also very simple to check-in and out. We really enjoyed our time in there and can recommend it to everyone!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Very well furnished, nice apartment. Just 10 mn walk away to The city center. We enjoyed a lot our stay. Angela update was enough for us to easily find the apartment and enter. But you have to be aware that it is hard to bring your luggage due to narrow stairs. Also if your neşghbour is making noise you can hear it easily. We had only one day this problem.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: We really enjoyed staying at the apartment. Its beautiful, the little balcony is nice and there is everything u need. Check in and Communication was easy. The apartment is located perfectly, so u can reach everything comfortably by bike, even by walking! We would definately book it again!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Had a great stay here, the apartment was close to some pretty great bars and restaurants and was easy enough to bike to and from every day. There were lots of art galleries and museums very close by, so truly a great spot to explore Rotterdam by, especially when you get a bike. The apartment was spacious and clean, and the little balcony was nice in the back. Felt very safe staying here solo, even when coming home late at night. Would stay here again!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Angela’s place is comfy, clean and very spacious.  Close to Tram and Metro, easily walkable.  Street noise overall is low and Angela was very responsive when assistance was needed.  We had a great stay.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Bright spacious apartment with great location

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Lovely flat in an amazing area a few steps far from the Cube Houses and close to town. It has three big windows and big bathroom. Excellent.
I commend this place.
Downside is the stairs as in too narrow and too high, although it is typical in the Netherlands.
If I’m back in Rotterdam, I would consider it as a good option.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Generally we had a really great stay and the bathroom was impeccable. Especially two sinks. The flat was nice and generally clean. I'm normally not very critical, although we found it a bit hard to feel comfortable there.
The steps leading to the flat are extremely steep, so I would discourage elder people or someone with mobility issues to stay there. This should be included in pictures. Especially, that the light sensor is triggered very late, so you basically climb up or step down in the dark. It is too dangerous in my opinion.
Apart from that, it is extremely noisy flat. Each time the tram was passing by it was horribly loud, and we could not afford to close windows as it was pretty warm. So, it was quite hard to fall asleep and get a good night rest.
In the back, though, there was a horrible smell of the burned oil from the nearby restaurant, making the balcony useless for us.
All in all, we had a good stay, although not as comfortable as we hoped.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Pros - good location, light and clean apartment
Cons - noisy from the road and bars and neighbouring apartments
No response to request to fix the light on the steep stairs

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Very nice apartment, loved the big windows and the furniture. Nice kitchen and beautiful bathroom. There is a certain level of noise from the street-OK for me.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
A very nice apartment I used now for the second time. I love the big windows and the open space plus the charm of the floor that is tilting as it is an old house.
The staircase is really steep - OK for me but others might have issues

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: amazing place to say, as others have said the stairs are really steep but you can't fault the place, great balcony out the back of the flat aswell!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Angela’s apartment is beautiful with big windows perfect lighting for models/content creators
A very nice location. 15 min walk to downtown. Trams pass in front of the street.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Had a lovely stay at Angela's! The apartment is really nice. If you're a light sleeper bring earbuds and a sleeping mask because you can hear the cars from the street and the shades still let some light in.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
I initially booked a longer stay but had to check out after one night because of unbearable smell of smoke. I am however not writing a negative review because I don't think it was necessary under the host's control. I think what might have happened is that the previous tenants were smoking inside pretty frequently although the place has a non-smoking policy or the smell came from the neighbours. Just keep that in mind if you are sensitive to strong smells.
The place itself looks like the pictures and is clean. Angela is responsive and polite.
Things to note:
- the place has old windows so you will hear everything happening outside. Also there are no blinds so there is some light noise as well. If you're a light sleeper, keep that in mind.
- the kitchen has all the essentials so you can potentially cook simple meals during your stay
- no TV so bring a laptop if you'd like to watch something during your stay
- the stairs are steep but it's common here
- the area is pretty safe but noisy

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Pleasant studio in a lovely area of Rotterdam, very accessible for public transport. Furnishing, lighting and kitchen equipment is on a fine line between minimalism and a bit too basic. Overall we enjoyed our stay.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: I had a great stay at Angela's apartment. The place is spacious, full of light, quiet, and very pleasant. I'd come again!

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Spacious and bright apartment that contains all the necessary stuff for short and long stays (we spent two weeks there). Perfect location to visit Rotterdam's landmarks, well connected, and close to services and transports. Recommended

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Apartment was clean and tidy, as was the bathroom. Bed was comfortable.
Could have done with another set of blinds on the left window as was very bright in the mornings but this is an easy fix.
Nice Turkish restaurant and pub on the doorstep.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Great apartment in a convenient location.
Nice and spacious but kitchen could do with being slightly better equipped, cutlery, cooking ware etc. Be aware the stairs to the apartment are extremely steep.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Really lovely studio close to the centre of Rotterdam. Angela’s place was very clean and the bed was super comfy. Only tip would be to bring an eye mask as the light comes through early in the morning
