name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
Angela’s place was a great spot during my conference at Erasmus University. It was perfectly situated where I could walk to the university or to the city center, and the tram was directly in front and convenient.
The apartment is nice. The bed is comfortable. The terrace was a welcome spot to relax after a long day. I enjoyed the small kitchen.
My only two issues were that I never discovered how to turn the bathroom light off. It seemed to have a mind of its own. And the street was a bit loud at night with people.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments: Ángela’s apartment is very well located in Rotterdam — it’s nice and cozy. Just a few steps away, there’s an excellent Mediterranean-style Spanish restaurant that I loved. The only thing to keep in mind is that a lot of light comes in in the morning, as the curtains aren’t very thick. So if you’re sensitive to light when sleeping, bring a sleep mask. Other than that, everything was perfect.

name: Design appartement Rotterdam
comments:
the whole appartment, even if it has a framework of x square meters, being all-in-one and the bathroom in a separate room,
Looks more huge, also u have a balcony and big Windows for air,
the laundry machine is outside the appartment door in a specific compartment,
it was perfect, and it was shiny,
also, u enter the building through a pin-specific keyboard at the door,
and the appartment is with a door key, a normal one,
thanks for being here yesterday till x moment, have an awesome life, 🐣❤️.

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments:
Pros: The view was Breathtaking
They had on-site Security
Location was in the heart of the city
Bed was very comfortable
Receptionist was very friendly
Cons; The room wasn't welcoming. I felt like I was in a hospital
The WIFI didn't work for any of the guest. The walls were so thin, the Security guard knocked on my door to tell me to turn my TV down and plus I think I heard the couple next door getting busy

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments: In the heart of the center, a 12-minute walk from central station, on top of the Sting next to the Bijenkorf, this studio is very conveniently located.  On the 13th floor with a large glass wall you have an excellent view over the city, especially from the balcony that has sun all day long.  The studio is very luxurious with everything you need for a short stay.  The staff is very friendly and respond quick to questions.  It's a great place to stay if you like the city bustle without being bothered by street noise in the studio.

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments: Hands down the most amazing spot in Rotterdam! The view from our apartment was breathtaking- right in the city centre looking down on the mall and the main streets. The modern arrangement of the house will really compliment your trip if you’re looking for a contemporary place to stay. We will definitely come again in the future!!

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments: Incredible views, prime location - 5 min walk to the station. Perfect for a weekend getaway 😎

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments: Great location. Cool view.

name: Urban corner studio in Rotterdam. 21+ only!
comments: Quick respond. Very spacious, we enjoyed overlooking the street view of Lijnbaan and the city buildings. They charged us for tax and fee by mistake when checking in, but after I found out I’ve already paid in advance, they quickly refunded me in cask. Overall the quality is great.

name: Urban Studio | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Amazing host , apartments are so worth it you should try it out the view is amazing .Thank you

name: Urban Studio | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments:
That was the worst AirBnB experience I ever had.
1) Industrialization, Urban Residence have hundreds apartments at this location, its a factory. I did not find the homeness, the uniqueness and love which I usually find on AirBnB. Its an expensive Hotel, not more.
2) I arrived on Wednesday, the worst was the night from Friday to Saturday: On floor above, partying was ongoing until 4 o clock in the morning.
3) When I pay for AirBnB, everything is covered, including taxes and cleaning. That was not the case with Urban Residences. Arrived on site, I a was asked to do an additional payment.
4) When I booked Urban Residences, I have received numerous email asking me to create a Profile on a non-AirBnB website, and purchase additional services. I found it so aggressive that I did ask to stop sending me eMails. Thats not an AirBnB spirit, thats a business maximising its profits.
While the rooms have been good, right in the centre with a great view, I would not book it again.
What I found funny was the big advertising poster at the entrance of Urban Residences. There have been a woman and her two big dogs in one of the apartments admiring the great view over Rotterdam. Well, when registering at the reception, I was informed that pets are not allowed in the rooms.

name: Urban Studio | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Good location and nice view!

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: Top location and good views!

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: Housing with a nice view on the city

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: It was an amazing experience. The place was clean, really quite, comfy and had everything we needed. The best part of it was the sensational view. Thank you! 🙂

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: What a wonderful Airbnb with a spectacular view. We will come back!

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: Nice location, nice view.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: Great view, location. The suite was also very clean and spacious.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments:
Stunning view!!!
We had a very nice stay. Very modern interior. Everything you need.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: The apartment has everything, very clean and the views are amazing! The location was also perfect, right in the heart of Rotterdam.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: Amazing location and views. Would definitely stay here again!

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: We had a wonderful stay Urban Residences. The location and the apartment itself were incredible. Very clean with amazing views. Would recommend for anyone visiting Rotterdam.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: The view from the room is just amazing. Couldn't find a better place than this in Rotterdam. Also the best part is you can rent a bike for 24 hrs from the hotel itself and they have safe indoor parking.

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments:
Great location and french windows
Cozy at dusk

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments:
The apartment is a 10/10. Very modern, includes any possible utility and its view on the skyscrapers of Rotterdam is spectacular. Also the position is perfect, in the very core of the city and at a walking distance form most of the most famous highlights of Rotterdam.
It is not cheap but I'd say its worth its price

name: Urban Family Suite.  21+ or families only
comments: The apartment has an incredible location with breathtaking views. Anyone we interacted with was friendly and helpful. The interior is stylish although often feels a bit like style over substance. The apartment could have been cleaned nore thoroughly and the sink in the toilet kept leaking. But overall no big issues and we were happy with our weekend at Urban Residences.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Amaaaaaaaaazing location!!, and the view was breath taking! The apartment was so stylish and huge in a very luxury building.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Great place to stay in Rotterdam in the middle of city center with amazing view and best price!

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Great place, beautiful view and a very zen atmosphere. Super location, easy parking in the garage. Recommended!

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: A nice place to be in Rotterdam, located in the heart of the city with a great view and super comfortable beds. It’s a shame that not everyone looks after this apartment as their own. In places it has had better days. All in all we had a nice stay. Thank you.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments:
Uber modern and bright, very spacious and amazing views of the city.
Very central location, very comfortable beds, nice coffee machine and great sized bath
Friendly staff and very clean and comfortable living area

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Great location, view is spectacular, spacious and superb to host a few guests too. Parking in Q-Park next door recommended if you drive, reserve for the length of your stay in advance.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Amazing location-- in the city center but also within 15 mins of the Central Station. Worked perfectly for my family. We especially loved the view and easy bicycle rental.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments:
Beautiful view, great localisation.
The apartment has everything needed in it. (but laundry not included)
Towels and everything was in.
We found the apartment not so well kept but pretty comfy, and just for the view and localisation we would recommand it.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Great stay in a spacious apartment with fabulous views. Superb location: literally on the junction of the 2 main shopping streets and a fabulous supermarket at 2min walk. Also very close to the central station. Better kitchen utensils would have been handy and the beds were a bit too soft, but all in all it's a place we'll happily return to and recommend.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Big building, perfect to be in the center. Cautious if you have vertigo (big windows with higher floors)

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: We absolutely loved this place, the central location, the views, the light and amazing sunsets over the city... Perfectly presented rooms with white linen throughout and the kitchen more than fit for purpose. A very decent supermarket nearby when we fancied cooking some of the local produce and a 2 minute walk to the city's most connected, central Metro station. Plenty to take in locally, don't miss the tapas bar in the Markthal and a ride on your very own water taxi. Delft's a lovely day out for a more traditional Dutch city experience and the Stedelijk Museum in Schiedam also worth a look. Thanks to all the friendly helpful team at Urban Residence. Mark.

name: Urban apartment with panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: The place and location is great, right in the centre. Communication and instructions were clear and accurate, the only downside is that the main bathroom doesn’t have a toilet seat, which might not be great for a big group staying at the house. Having said that we loved our stay and the VIEW..

name: Urban Large Apartment | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments:
Great location, awesome views.
Would recommend.

name: Urban Large Apartment | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: The apartments was perfect for our needs. Spacious and comfortable with a great balcony and great view. The location is perfect, right in the center, with everything you need right there. But the best part was the people at the reception. We had a medical issue and they were amazing in helping us find medical care. We needed a comfortable home for five days and that’s exactly what we got.

name: Urban Large Apartment | panoramic views. 21+ only!
comments: Beautiful view from my room & cleanliness is 100% haha I am definitely coming again!

name: Urban Large Penthouse. Age 21+ only!
comments: Excellent accomodation. Great View. Recommended!!

name: Urban Large Penthouse. Age 21+ only!
comments:
We stayed in the penthouse on the top floor. I’ve been to Rotterdam many times so I know that for the money I spent, I could have gotten something of better value.
Pros: It’s a very spacious apartment with comfortable beds. The views are excellent and the staff was very helpful. There were plenty of clean towels, and the coffee machine with the pods was perfect. Great location with shops, restaurants, and supermarkets just downstairs.
Cons: the apartment could have been cleaned better. The main areas were clean, but in the corners and tight spots, it had been neglected for some time. We were there in June and while the weather outside was beautiful, the apartment gets hot with those big windows and is very difficult to cool down, even with the windows open. The bathroom floor had a massive crack in the middle and needs to be repaired. A once over with general maintenance to service the apartment would be a good idea.
All in all, a decent place to stay.

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments: Very close to Rotterdam Airport - ten minute walk. Lovely views, quiet, clean. Easy to get into the centre. Great communication and hosting. Recommended

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments:
Very cozy appartment, really nice view and fast and kind answers.
Nothing negative at all, great place to stay!

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments:
The flat is very cozy and comfortable with very big windows and a very comfortable livingroom and well equipped. The location is very good especially if you have a car and you want to explore the other cities of the Netherlands because you can be on the highway in one minute
The bus stop is just 10 minutes walk to reach Rotterdam downtown.
There is a baby park just in front of the building if you are with children that’s a good opportunity. Communication with the host has been very good.
It is just very close to the airport so if you have a light sleep that could be an issue because of the taking off.

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments:
Stunning view and nice location, both for own and public transport.
Very clean house with great amenities..

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments: Very nice stay for 5days. Near the airport,  but no noise. The sight view is quite good, and free parking area. Highly Recommend!

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments: This is a great apartment with a really nice view.

name: Dutch treat apartment
comments: We loved the view. It was a great stay at this flat. It has everything we need and we didn't heard any plane, actually it was a very quiet and calm neighborhood. The host, well, he was the best! He was very helpful and very nice with everything we needed. Highly recommended!

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments:
The flat is great localized, everything is almost around, and the popular street is a great advantage if you like going for a drink or restaurants !
It was clean and nice, the questions we had were answered really quickly which was something really appreciable

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: Best location impossible! We did it all on foot! The sofa bed is quite comfortable and the place was extremely clean. I found the double bed very soft for me (my backs do not like it) and the living room very bright at night, with a bit of noise. even so, our stab was great!

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: Everything was perfect. The appartement was bigger than expected and the location just awesome. The room is very calm with a beautiful landscape. For the living room there just a lit bit of noise but it is bearable to sleep. I recommend, amazing price for location ! I will return for sure !

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments:
Very good location in a vibrant street with lots of cool cafes and restaurants. Still quiet when the windows are closed though! The interior design is beautiful and well kept. Note - the floor isn't even - a charming detail for us though.
Would absolutely book again!

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: This place is 2 minutes walking distance from Metro station, super convenient. Downstair the street is the most worthy of visiting street in Rotterdam if you are up for drinks or the chilled vibe. The living room is large and everything is clean.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: A very stylish, spacious and modern apartment with everything one could possibly need. Wonderfully located as well. A lively street filled with lovely cafes and restaurants. Right next to tram stops and supermarkets. We had a great stay.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: Top locatie met voldoende privacy en de gezelligheid van het uitgaansleven in de WdW straat.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments:
The location of the apartment is extraordinary, as Witte is a lovely street with a lot of options for bars or dinner. The apartment is extremely spacious, clean and just gorgeous. We loved every second there.
The only issue we encountered was the heating, which didn't work, so at night it did get a bit cold in the apartment.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: A fantastic apartment in a great location. It was very comfortable and we had the best stay. A couple of points to be aware of - there are two flights of stairs going up to the apartment which are very steep - not an issue for us but you may need to know. Also the tv didn’t work which we weren’t concerned by but it may be a concern for others. Neither detracted from our stay and we’d definitely stay again. Thank you Kick & Neda for a wonderful stay!

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: A lovely clean apartment right in the centre of nightlife. The bedroom is at the rear of the property so you don’t lose any sleep. Comfy bed. Like most properties in Holland, the stairs are steep so not really for the faint hearted. The windows at the front allow light to stream in and it is kept lovely and warm. I recommend this accommodation for the location and the airy ness of space.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: Large, beautiful apartment on great location.   Lots of narrow steps but it’s worth it.  Comfy bed.  Kitchen has everything you needed.   Washer, tv and my favorite, the bathtub!   It was huge and very clean.  I loved Rotterdam.  The weather sucked but it was comforting to know I could relax in the apartment.  I liked it so much, I extended my stay. Highly recommend.  It’s on a very busy street w night noise but just keep the windows shut and it’s no problem. Bedroom is in the back of the apartment so it’s not an issue for sleeping in the bed.

name: Best apartment in most vibrant street
comments: Nice apartment at great location, close to everything you need. The street is very vibrant, lots of noise at night but it didn't bother us.

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Daan’s apartment was amazing. I stayed for a month & had a great time. Images don’t do it justice, it’s a lot bigger & better in person!
The apartment:
It’s very spacious with lots of closet room for your clothes. The bathroom is a bit small but not a dealbreaker. The kitchen was well equipped with pots, pans, kitchenware, oven, microwave, dishwasher & washing machine. No dryer but there was a handy drying rack to dry clothing near the balcony. The wifi held up pretty well. I worked from the apartment for a lot of days & had no issues. No lagging with gaming either.
Commuting:
It’s about 10 minutes walking to Rotterdam Central station (directions on maps says 16 minutes but I’m a New Yorker so I walk fast.) By tram it’s about 15 minutes & if you take a shared scooter like Felyx it’s about 6 minutes. There’s a metro station about 7 minutes walking from the apartment.
Daan as a host:
Extremely helpful. Responded almost immediately every time I reached out with questions. He checked on me to make sure I was enjoying my stay but wasn’t annoying like some hosts can be. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you!

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
What can I say about this apartment if not only positive things. 🤩
Located very close to the center of Rotterdam, in a very quiet neighbourhood with many public transports, Daan apartment is “ THE PLACE TO BE”.
Even if the building dates back to the 1930s, inside the apartment you will find a very warm interior design that combines retro and modern style in such a way that you still feel immersed a little in the 30s but equally in the present.
The view from the living room windows is as wonderful during the day as it is in the evening. 😍
The rays of the sun in the morning which then tear the vitralium that separates the bedroom from the dinning room will show you even more this incredibly beautiful historical side.
But wait I don’t want to spoil everything about this place to you … you will have to comme and see it with your own eyes ( and you won’t regret it, trust me ).
What to say about Daan?! Very attentive to details, very active, very friendly…truly a SUPER HOST. See u soon!

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We loved staying in this charming apartment with accents such as the stained glass and mosaic tiling. The location was great, less than a 10 minute walk to the metro and tram stops. We highly recommend this place! The host was kind and allowed flexible check-in and checkout.

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
The best Airbnb experience we've had in recent years! This very spacious apartment with its own history is located in a quiet part of the city. There are great places for breakfast, coffee, or lunch nearby, and large supermarkets are within walking distance.
This apartment is the perfect place for a peaceful retreat, with absolutely everything you might need. It features numerous interesting interior details, unique lighting elements, and an excellent library of books on various topics. There's a capsule coffee machine, toaster, washing machine, and we were pleasantly surprised by the full-sized dryer.
The host, Daan, is truly a dream host. You can feel the care and attention he puts into the apartment and its elements. He was always available, left a beautiful and interesting guide to the apartment and the city, and even a bottle of wine, which was very touching. We would gladly return to Rotterdam to spend more time in Daan's apartment

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Lovely period apartment.
Quiet neighbourhood with same era buildings.
Public pool nearby.
Shops very close with sushi counter. Felt like a 10min walk from central station thru quiet & green back streets.

name: Beautiful 1930’s en suite apartment in Rotterdam
comments: This is a lovely apartment, exactly as described. The space was flexible with the sliding doors meaning the bedroom - dining area - living area could be one space or the bedroom closed off. The kitchen and bathroom are big enough for one person at a time. The space wasn't ideal for our toddler, she could reach the glass lightbulbs in the bedroom for example but we managed and the location was great for exploring the city. Daan arranged a discounted parking permit which we really appreciated and we found a parking space nearby. There is one set of steep stairs to reach the front door of the apartment.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Our stay in your house was great!! The neighborhood was very quite and beautiful! Very close to the central station and the centre of Rotterdam!! The house is very nice and full of natural light...beautiful!! Zahir was very nice,replied  fast to all my requests!! Thanks a lot!! Sara.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Zahir is a fantastic host! We really appreciated the warm welcome, and the apartment is really nice. The location is fantastic; it couldn’t be much more convenient. It does get pretty hot, as it’s mostly windows, but the view is great and we had abnormally warm weather. Word to the wise: listen to Zahir’s suggestions. We had a fantastic time checking out the places he suggested. He knows what he’s talking about.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: This apartment is perfectly located close to the central station. Overlooking a beautiful canal and trees. The house is light and stylishly decorated. I definitely recommend this apartment.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: The most convenient apartment I have ever lived! It is located opposite to the central station, where you can see it through the window! There is supermarket in walking distance so you can cook or buy supplements yourself, or if you want to eat outside, you can simply ask the very nice and kind hosts, and they will answer anything for you.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: I love this house very much. It's really close to the central station so the transportation is convenient. The room is really clean and spacious, and the decorations are gorgeous. It's really quite at night, and the view of the street is beautiful. The host is very nice. Love the city and the place.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Very good location, in a calm area and with an outstanding view for a relaxing days.  Zahir & Sam were very nice and always help with our requests.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
The place was large and clean, great view of the canal out front.
It is about 60 meters from Rotterdam Centraal, which gives you access to Amsterdam, and well as Belgium and France.
Zahir was very friendly, met us at the apartment for check in, and gave us some great tips for food. He was very accommodating.
An overall great experience. Highly recommend a stay here!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Great appartment in residential area. Just 2 min walk to the central station. Appartment was clean, cozy and with good amenities. Also there is a lot of light from the windows and good view. Communication with Sam and check in were smooth. Also she provided me with good local tips. There are few local cafes and restaurants nearby. Also there is a couple of supermarkets in 10 min walk. I travelled in Rotterbam on business event and hotels doubled or tripled their rates because of that. Sam's appartment was a good choice for me and represented a great value for money. I would stay here again :)

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Very nice typical dutch appartement With view on a canal. Zahir is very nice person too. We had a very pleasant journey.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: The flat is very good located, just in front the central train station and very close to the city center. Zahir and Sam were very flexible for the arrival and departure time. They also gave us some good tips/adresses for dinner around the flat. If you plan to sleep in the living room, you may a little bit be disturb by the noise of cars but there is not so much traffic and it’s a small street so that’s ok ! The decoration is very lovely, it’s a really nice place to stay.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Great apartment, excellent location. Comfortable for 4 people although you have to enter the bedroom to have access to the shower. Kitchen with good amenities. Great communication with the host, and easy check in. The only thing I would improve would be adding more blackouts in the living room so that the people sleeping on the couch wouldn't have so much sunlight by the early morning. No TV but no problem at all. The WC is way too small and that could be a problem for taller people, not for me tho. Overall it was a great stay and I definitely recommend the apartment. Awesome view, right next to the central station. We felt at home.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Great stay in Rotterdam! Perfectly clean flat, well located near centraal station, no noise and very well decorated :) communication was excellent, I highly recommend it !

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
This place is a real gem. Located only 5 minutes from the central station by foot (so close you can see it by looking out of the window) it‘s so convenient! After an 8 hour bus ride we wanted nothing more than to fall into bed.
Rotterdam is a lovely city with so many things to explore! And the little hotspot book guide that you can find in the apartment helped so much! So many amazing places to check out!
The apartment itself was wonderful! I can‘t believe that Sam and Zahir aren‘t interior designers by profession because their place was so beautiful and stylish! Big windows and a lot of natural light, paired with modern, lovely touches of design. Really great for taking photos haha. Super pretty color scheme, open wide space, a very functional kitchen and bath. The bed is big and comfy, the closets huge enough to fit everything you need inside.
Stocked up on shampoo and all kinds of amenities, this place is prepared for everything. Even the books were so good and well-chosen.
The only things one needs to note is that the stairway is really steep and narrow so it might prove difficult to get up there with bulky luggage. Also the toilet is very small and may pose a problem to people who are a little bigger. But nothing unmanagable!
Sam and Zahir are amazing hosts who will definitely help you with what you need!
All in all it was an amazing stay. Thank you again to Sam and Zahir!
Sincerely,
Sindy and Do-Jin

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: A great space, has everything you need, located super close to the train station. The only 'bad' thing to say is that the living room never gets quite dark, so the person who has to sleep there might be woken up early because of the light.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: The apartment is perfectly located, close to the Rotterdam station. Try the Booon café nearby, nice and calm. The communication with Sam was perfect. The apartment is also very quiet and bright.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Hi, the appartment of Zahir & Sam was very nice. Supergood location next to the centralstation but very quiet. Zahir & Sam are very nice people who helped us with any question. The only thing we might suggest is to hang some extra curtains in the living room for the sofabed, but the rest was perfect! We would definitely come back to this place!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Zahir and Sam's place. The apartment was clean and comfortable with a great view of the neighborhood but the thing that made our stay truly memorable was our hosts.
Zahir and Sam are IDEAL hosts. They are friendly and welcoming people. Even before we arrived they went the extra mile to allow our early check-in because of our travel schedule. Our first day set the tone when Sam met us at the train station when we arrived at around 7 A.M. During the short walk to the apartment she gave us vital advice on how to travel in the city and advice on activities. She even helped us carry a week's worth of heavy baggage up a flight of stairs (she took the heaviest case).
In addition to the expected niceties, we were given home made granola, yogurt and milk to help us deal with our long travel. During our stay if we had any problems or difficulties with the apartment or needed advice on travel Zahir and Sam ALWAYS provided a solution. Every interaction with them involved friendly conversation and smiles. They made us feel at home. It was like staying with family (but without drama!).
We HIGHLY recommend that anyone visiting in Rotterdam should arrange to stay at Zahir and Sam's Air BnB. If we had a 6th star available to place on this rating we would use it!"

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Stylish and cozy place with an amazing view and great location!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: So nice - a great view of the canal and breathtaking architecture of the station. Wow.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Near the train station, the owners just installed new windows. There wasn't any noise issues and the proximity to public transport made travelling around easy. The owners also own a nearby coffee shop which had pretty good coffee. Keep in mind that there are some pretty narrow stairs to the 2nd floor, but it was manageable hauling our luggage through it. The owners were really friendly and responsive.
Overall would stay again.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: We had a great stay at Zahir and Sam’s apartment. The apartment is minutes from the station yet it was quiet with lovely views. Spacious enough for 4 with comfortable sofa bed. Cafe’s and restaurants around the corner and easy transport around Rotterdam (although we mostly walked). Would love to stay again.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
We were happy, spacious, light, calm.
modern kitchen, very comfortable bed.
the communication was easy and Sam solved all questions.
very central and quer at the same time.
We would live to come back.
I fully recommend 🍀🌸🙏Maren from Cologne

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
We had an incredible stay at Zahir & Sam’s apartment. Communication was clear and easy, as was finding and accessing the apartment.
The apartment looks even better than the photos! Bright and spacious and tastefully decorated.
The location is excellent, in a very pretty and safe area close to central station and other transportation as well as cute bars and restaurants in east walking distance.
We can’t fault our stay!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
We spent a nice weekend in the lovely place of Zahir and Sam. The apartment is located super close to the train station but with a nice view to the gracht surrounded by trees.
The apartment has all you need. We would definitely choose this spot again for trip to Rotterdam.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Staying here feels very much like home, with an incredibly beautiful view from the window, a clean interior, and tastefully chosen furniture! Especially noteworthy is that it's just a two-minute walk to Rotterdam Central Station, making it ideal for day trips to explore other parts of the Netherlands and even neighboring countries.

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Excellent location, beautiful bright appartment, well -equipped. Highly recommend!
The host is very helpful and responsive! :)

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Incredible location and beautiful views, but had some hot water issues

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments:
I’m so grateful for the opportunity to stay in this beautiful apartment.
First, the location was perfect. It’s literally right behind Rotterdam Centraal Station, yet the area is remarkably peaceful. The view of the canal from the apartment was stunning, and I enjoyed it every day.
Second, the apartment exceeded my expectations. It looked great in the photos, but it was even better in person. The space was ample enough for four adults, and I loved the interior design, especially the abundance of greenery.
Finally, Zahir and Sam were very responsive and easy to communicate with via messages. Their prompt replies made me feel very comfortable throughout my stay. I truly felt like I experienced the perfect Rotterdam apartment and will definitely stay here again if I have the chance to visit Rotterdam!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Great location, just opposite the Rotterdam station. There's a flight of stairs to the apartment, but we managed with two medium to large sized suitcases slowly. Apartment is clean and tidy, bed and sofa bed are comfortable. Loved the huge windows and the view outside. Zahir & Sam are super nice and helpful, e.g. helped us to get shampoo and body wash, quickly came to our assistance when we couldn't get the washing machine to work. All in all, loved this place and would recommend it to those who want to visit Rotterdam and nearby places!

name: Stylish apartment, best location in Rotterdam!
comments: Beautiful flat. We had a super time, slept really well, the flat is very well situated, lots of light, not at all noisy, with a fantastic view.

name: Uniek Pension Schip in Rotterdam, Kop van Zuid
comments: Perfect location, only shared appartment with strange owner. Gives you no privacy and wants to see money for every breath you take on this boat. Gave me an unpleasent stay ! Such a shame because the boat is a beauty! I wont recommend anyone to stay here!

name: Beautyfull house, with super sweet cat.
comments: Carmilla's house is super big, there is enough space and is right on the water. We had breakfast outside or had a glass of wine :-) You have to take the bus to the city center (about 15 minutes) or, what we did, you walk home in the evening. Perfect trip in Rotterdam. Thanks.

name: Beautyfull house, with super sweet cat.
comments: Das Haus hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Es ist alles vorhanden was man so braucht. Besonderes Highlight für unsere Kinder war die sehr freundliche und ruhige Katze, die auch mal mit im Bett geschlafen hat. Terrasse und Garten konnten wir wegen des Regenwetters leider nicht nutzen, sind bei Sonnenschein aber sicher schön. Aussicht direkt in die Natur, toller riesiger Spielplatz nur 5 Min. zu Fuss entfernt. Komunikation mit der Gastgeberin Carmilla war eindwandfrei.  Wir können die Unterkunft weiter empfehlen.

name: Spacious comfortable room 5mins to city centre
comments: Leo is an extremely nice host caring a lot about his guests. He even offered me the lift from and to the train station which I haven't expected by booking the accomodation. :) The apartment is located in a very good area not even a minute away from a tram station and couple of minutes to the breathtaking view on the Erasmus bridge and centre of Rotterdam. The apartment itself is beautifully designed and decorated. You won't miss here anything. Home feeling inclusive. :D It was a pleasure to be Leo's guest and I would definitely recommend to book his accomodation!

name: Spacious comfortable room 5mins to city centre
comments:
Leo is a super friendly and very welcoming host. The apartment is spacious, clead and provides everything you need, also the kitchen is fully equipped. I stayed for three weeks for work and had both privacy when I wanted or a nice chat with Leo.
The location is perfect, easy to go to the central station in 15 mins by tram. I enjoyed the walks around the neighborhood.

name: Spacious comfortable room 5mins to city centre
comments: Leo is so nice !! We were so lucky to be his guest at this apartment! We saw an extremely beautiful sunset view at the balcony! We stayed here just like our own home, watching TV in the evening , having a cup of coffee in the morning~

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments:
Very large and spacious apartment. I spent 3nights there with my girlfriend and we had a lovely time. The location is also amazing. Just at the end of the street there is a lake where you can have a nice quiet walk. The neighborhood is calm and the city is not far away by tram or metro.
If you’re looking for a short or long trip in Rotterdam, this place might be for sure the place you’re looking for. The host is very kind and helpful for anything you’d need.
Thank you Carolina and Steve (and Carli) !

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments: Excellent and quiet space. Great natural light. Wonderful neighborhood. Piping hot water. Worth the quick tram ride from centraal.

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments:
Me and my boyfriend spend the days before new years at Caro's place. She and Steven will offer you their cosy home, which is near the center of Rotterdam (only a few minutes by tram). We had a pleasant stay, also thanks to Carli who let us in. The communication with all of them was very easy and we got quick responses.
The place provides everything you need for a short city trip and there is a supermarket close by.
There is a lake near by, which is great for a little evening walk and I bet the little back yard garden is grear during summer. If you book Caro's place maybe you should know that it is a house of the older kind. So you might hear the neighbors or people on the street, which was not a problem for us. But if you expect it to be absolutely quiet, you could end up being disappointed. Other than that I can not point out anything critical. We had a great time and would definitely come again.

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments: The place had a very cozy feeling and full of natural light. The hosts were very responsive and friendly!

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments: Spacious, beautiful apartment with a great kitchen, fast internet, a large, bright table over-looking the garden for working and enjoying meals. Easy access to the main train station by the tram line just outside, and multiple grocery stores a short walk away.

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments: Carolina's place is very luminous and airy. lots of utensils in the kitchen. comfortable bedroom (street side). very good communication with host. would definitely come back.

name: Amazing location - Loft in City Center
comments:
This was a great base for our exploration of Rotterdam. Quiet, lovely street, a few short blocks from the grocery store and the large park/lake. There are a handful of nearby restaurants. Very green and easy enough to catch public transit.
The unit itself was a pleasure to live in for four days. Comfortable bed, basics in the kitchen and a well configured bathroom.
Carolina was thorough in her communications, from booking, well into our stay. Very smooth experience!

name: Nice 2 pers.room including shower toilet
comments: Great view and super nice Host. Not responding to messages though.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Coco was very helpful and accommodating . Checking in and out was easy. The flat is in a great location with a wonderful view. The only thing we were missing was a coffee machine. There was a good coffee place downstairs though. Indeed a great place to stay at.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Wonderful modern flat with great views.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: The apartment is perfectly located, with beautiful views from the windows. Restaurants and shops within walking distance. Comfortable beds and cleanliness, everything was  nicely. Coco, thank you and good luck!

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Beautiful appartment and a very good location in the city. The balcony is amazing as well! Everything was clean and even better than expected! Very nice host as well!

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: We really enjoyed our stay: the location is great, city views are beautiful, and the apartment itself is stylish and cozy. Also communication was smooth and easy. Highly recommended.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Beautiful and spacious apartment with lovely view.  Host was very organized and instructions were timely and easy to follow. Really enjoyable stay.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments:
No faults at all. Good communication.
Two bedrooms. One toilet, one shower room. Nice balcony. Neat, clean and well designed aptment. Equipped with all u may need for a stay.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Great view and amenities. Easy access to almost everything due to central location.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Very nice and cozy apartment, perfect location only 4 minutes walk from the train station.  Many good restaurants in the neighbourhood.  Fantastic view from the balcony

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: We loved our stay and would absolutely recommend. The apartment is bright, spacious, beautifully decorated, clean & comfortable. The view from the balcony was an amazing way to see Rotterdam. The hosts were super helpful and kind, we were greeted for the checkin, and they were quick to respond. It’s located a few minutes walk from the train station and was very easy to find. Lots of shops, bars, restaurants nearby. We had a lovely time and would definitely come again.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Everything was perfect! Location, space, interior, size, entrance, view. Just everything, 100% recommended :)

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: Super place to stay. Very clean, bright and at the center of everything.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments:
Coco’s apartment has it all — a perfect location, close to the Metro and trams, restaurants, a grocery store, and fun things to do (like eat gelato or shop).
The apartment is a beautifully designed space that feels open, airy, and welcoming. I especially loved being able to start and end my days on the balcony overlooking the Schouburgplein with views across the city.
This is a perfect place for an extended stay or for work — the WiFi is super fast, which I appreciated.
Coco is a thoughtful and responsive host and I highly recommend this apartment!

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments: A great apartment with attractive decor and city views. Everything is on your doorstep. The perfect place for our family trip to Rotterdam.

name: Luxury Modern Home in City Center
comments:
We had a great stay in Rotterdam. Apartment is as described. Appreciated the hooks in the hallway and the full length mirror.
Kitchen has everything you need and is very well equipped.
Bedrooms are spacious with more than enough storage and beds are comfortable.
The apartment is in a great location with lovely views of the city.
We enjoyed sitting out on the balcony in the evening; would recommend!

name: Comfortable bedroom 'I' in center of Rotterdam
comments: What a fantastic AirBNB—Brigitte's place was definitely the best of my entire Europe trip. It hits all the superlatives—clean, comfortable, inviting, relaxing, modern, super stylish, beautifully furnished. The bed was so comfy that I almost wanted to just sleep in and skip seeing Rotterdam (glad I didn't cos it's now one of my favorite cities I've visited). The location was also ideal—really close (5 min walk) to Centraal Station (cool building!) and very walkable or bike-able to all the other city highlights. Most of all, Brigitte was a delightful host, very proactive and responsive with communication before my arrival, preparing wonderful breakfasts for me each morning during my stay, and very fun to chat with about Rotterdam and anything. She's created a lovely home and AirBNB, and if I get a chance to come back to Rotterdam, I hope her place is still available. My highest of recommendations!

name: Bright & spacious private apartment
comments: I stayed with my family in this apartment and we loved it. The kitchen is big, well equipped and bright even on a rainy day. The living room is spacious and a great place to chill out. On the top floor there is the bedroom and a nice bathroom with a big shower and a great bathtub. Stairs to the apartment are very steep but this is very common in Holand. However family with small children might find them challenging. Location is very good: tram and busses are next door, and so is the supermarket and a nice park. Parking easy to find. Communication with Boj was easy and very fast. I would highly recommend this apartment !

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
Awesome place!!!
We had an amazing time at the windmill's lodge. The place is beautifully located in the park Kralingse plas, next to the historic windmill. The house was the former residence of the miller. It is a unique place, because there aren't any other homes inside the park. The place itself is beautifully decorated with a lot of care and attention to detail. Kitchen has everything you need and more (good coffee!). Beds are very comfy. The view from the apartment over the lake is just magnificent!
We had a lovely stay and highly recommend this place.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Beautiful and very calm place, nice lake, excellent views from the window. Clean apartment, it has everything you need.  Not far away from the city center.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Stunning place with beautiful views, well taken care of. Outstanding communication.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Great place. New clean and stylish. To be really picky. Shower screen doesn't close fully and turns the bathroom into a wet room. Sofa isn't very comfortable. Apart from that I can't fault it. Beautiful views and would highly recommend the restaurant down the road Italianan Literally straight down the road towards the town can remember the name

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Perfect apartment on a beautiful spot at the water near the city of Rotterdam. Nice location to take a walk around the lake of in to the woods. Clean and a nice view.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Such an amazing studio with high quality furnishing and equipment. Great location at the lake, very close to nature and walking around the lake is a highlight! Good connection to the city centre and the highway if you want to visit other cities close by like Den Haag or Leiden. We had an amazing and romantic time and can only recommend the studio.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Lovely and spotless place with a great view on Kralingse Plas. If the weather allows, you can enjoy beautiful sunsets across the lake. Don't miss to visit the mill next door.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
Great apartment, an incredible view and kind owner. Ericia was ver helpful with all our concerns and we felt very welcome.
Definitely want to come back again!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: One of the coolest places we've stayed! The lake views from the apartment are stunning and it was a comfortable place for us to spend 3 nights.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Very Nice and a beautiful view

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Very beautiful place with a view! We had a very nice time there.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: A 100% recommendation for a stay in Rotterdam! The house is just beautiful, inside & outside, and the location/view is a 10/10. Even if there's a street on one side and people walking by it's not loud or disturbing at all. The appartement is well equipped. We were three people so we also used the couch to sleep but it was really comfortable. Also Ericia as a host is just perfect :) Can't find anything to complain on!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: A beautiful place in an idyllic location, with spectacular waterfront views of the city of Rotterdam. Very stylish interior design, this small apartment feels roomy and like a treehouse. A wonderful choice with plenty of restaurants and bars to choose from within walking distance.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Great getaway in the city with amazing view especially in the sunset! We had a great time

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: We stayed at Erica’s place as part of a relaxing getaway. It was perfect with lovely views of the water.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: The view is pretty much unbeatable! Lovely short-stay for 1-2 nights. Surrounded by a beautiful park area with no housing, nothing, around. Exciting stay. Can only recommend.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
Lovely location with a beautiful view.
The part of the garden that belongs to this apartment is also lovely, with a beautiful view over the lake.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
Great location surrounded by the lake and the woods. Staying next to a Windmill is an awesome experience!. Easy Private parking. The kitchen is well equipped. The host's communication and instructions for check-in was clear.
Suggestion : There is one fan (ventilator) in the bedroom. If a 3rd person is staying in the living room in Summer time, better be prepared to handle the Mosquitoes if you plan to open the windows for a cool breeze!.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Erica’s place is wonderful! The apartment is beautifully decorated, functional, extremely comfortable and spotless clean!  The views across the lake are breathtaking and the walking and cycling paths are just in front of the house. We loved our stay and look forward to going back!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Lovely place at the lake with a astonishing view. A good place to find inner peace.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: We had a very lovely stay in Ericia’s studio. The view is stunning. The studio is super clean and well equipped. We would definitely recommend others to stay here.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Wonderful location. View of lake and access to paths were magical.  Apartment clean and comfortable. Ericia  responsive and helpful.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Such a great place to stay in Rotterdam, also for 'vacancies in eigen stad', right on the Kralingse Plas but still walking distance to tram 7 to get into the center of town.  The new roof terrace looks right onto the windmill!  The bathroom and shower have a magnificent view over the lake.  We watched swans doing their mating dance and countless other water birds.  The place is exceptionally clean and organized, as well as stylish.  Recommended 100%.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Great location and host. Beautiful view, clean and near to the subway

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Stunning place! Autentic and beautiful! Modern inside, lovely view, all you need in the kitchen.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Loverly space with fantastic view over lake.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
I would highly recommend Stadsherstel Rotterdam - we stayed in the Karot Studio on the first floor and this space was perfect for us.
The apartment was spacious, impeccably clean and the view out to the lake and gardens was so relaxing. So beautiful to sit and watch the sunset each night and watch the water birds come up to the garden of a morning. We didn't want to leave!
The windmill next door is very interesting and my son and I had a tour when they were open.
The location is excellent if you want to visit Rotterdam but not be in the centre - the park is beautiful with multiple playgrounds, a little farm and some excellent restaurants and cafes in walking distance. If you are visiting with young children this is an excellent location to base yourselves.
Communication was fantastic - very easy to check in and out and Ericia was very responsive.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Very nice cottage like airbnb with fantastic views of the Kralingen lake and beautiful park settings. Nice lake side restaurant with terrace 2 min walk away.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Unique and charming studio with amazing views and an actual windmill next door!  We spent a lot of time just staring out of the windows over the peaceful lake, watching the birds and occasional boat go by.   The studio was spotlessly clean and well equipped for a short stay.  The bed was comfortable and there were plenty of towels provided.  kitchen was great for simple meals (we mostly just had breakfast in the studio before going off to explore).  The location is on the edge of a park with walking paths and a quiet atmosphere, yet the freeways were easily accessible and a short drive away.  One of the most memorable Airbnb stays we've had and I look forward to coming back one day!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
There is not a better place to stay in Rotterdam! I live in the city and booked this apartment for my mum when she visited. The apartment has everything 1-2 people need, a comfy bed, nice roof terrace, and table and chairs looking out of the window so that you still have the view even if it’s raining! Free parking. Communication was great.
Overlooking the Kralingseplas (lake) is the best view in Rotterdam, and there are lots of walks around the lake (5km) or in the woods. Several restaurants very close by (De Tuin… next door for a wonderful terrace, De Schone Lei at the “top” of the like for fish and great views, or Osteria Vicini just 5 mins away for pizza and a great atmosphere). The house is about 10-15 walk to the tram and metro into the city centre (a quick metro ride). Also recommend the Trompenburg Arboretum for a relaxing wonder among the trees and plants.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: We had a great experience at this apartment. The view of the lake and the windmills together was amazing at every time of the day. All accessories are present. Great communication with the host. We rented bike and rode to the center, looking at nature, sculptures and buildings all around the city. So far, it was the best experience on Airbnb. Thank you Ericia.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Location was incredible and convinced to move to the area! The views were also amazing and it was so peaceful... definitely recommend for a relaxing getaway or work trip.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Marvellous place… view over the lake breathtaking. Studio clean and very comfortable. We may come back !!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Great place to stay! De Karot has the most beautiful views of De Kralingse Plas. It did not feel like staying in the city. Although it was hot, the mosquito screens and fans helped to cool down the apartment.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
Super cute place to stay. It’s such a plus that there is parking. The view is gorgeous. Bed is very comfortable. It’s about a 10-15min walk to a metro to get to center of the city. The surrounding neighborhoods are very quiet and beautiful. It’s not a trendy area but it is gorgeous and peaceful. We weren’t able to visit the windmill next door - it’s only open Wednesday, Thursday and Saturday. But it would be so cool to go.
We stayed there in the height of summer and the upstairs was REALLY HOT. We had to ask for 2 extra fans to get some air circulation going. Which was so helpful. There are a LOT of mosquitoes and spiders *outside* and around the windows and on the little deck (NOT IN THE APARTMENT). Bring bug spray to sit outside! Thankfully it did really cool down at night and was totally pleasantto sleep. We weren’t in the apartment much during the day but I could imagine it gets pretty darn hot in the summers.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments:
I loved the lovely flat by the mills, a fusion between modern and old styles. Very nice and comfortable spaces. Good location in front of the lake with great views.
I definitely recommend Ericia’s
place.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: 10 stars! This place just kept on giving with surprises! I had no idea it was in an actual working windmill. They run it on Wednesday, Thursdays and Saturdays. And it's a spice mill so it smells amazing. There's a light show in the park across the street that we didn't even find until the last night. The view from the apartment is so peaceful and amazing. I thought it would be a little hard to get to every day, but there are these bikes called donkey republic bikes that you can just rent by app and return them from the restaurant next-door. We went back-and-forth on them for six days. It was great. The apartment itself was super comfortable and well stocked. The kitchen was small but totally functional. Felt like the luckiest person to stay here.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: This place is an oasis in Rotterdam. I am a local and stayed here for a long weekend as a break. Completely peaceful and completely magical. A 15-minute walk to the nearest public transport, but the free parking made up for it (as did the location generally). The place was spotless and tidy; tastefully decorated. The view is INCREDIBLE. Very much recommended as a romantic weekend away, or as a place for some rest. Ericia was a little difficult to get in touch with at first, but I got all my information on time and it was very clear and helpful.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Great studio, right next to the lake with a stunning view

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: The apartment is exactly as pictured. You wake up to a view of the lake and windmill which is pretty magical. Its a 10 min walk to the metro and it takes 6-7 mins and you're in the heart of Rotterdam. As referenced in other reviews: you won't do too much cooking as there is only a 2 ring burner; there is no welcome book; whoever does the cleaning needs to get behind the sofa as it was full of debris. But these are minor irritations as the apartment is in a great spot and I'd happily return

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: The view of the lake was great. Be mindful of the steep staircase into the apartment. Otherwise this apartment is ideal.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: The apartment was in a lovely neighbourhood and had beautiful views over the lake. We had a personal tour of the windmill which was fantastic and very informative. It was very easy to get into the centre using public transport and it is also very straightforward to hire bikes. We had a fantastic trip, thanks Ericia!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Zie review bij het andere appartement (wij hadden beide ruimtes als geheel geboekt)

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Best Location and such a beautiful view! We would be happy to come back :)

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 2/2
comments: Absolut wunderschöne Lage, wir haben auf der Terrasse gefrühstückt und selbst wenn man drinnen am kleinen Tisch sitzt, blickt man fast direkt auf den See. Mit etwas Glück kann man einen schönen Sonnenuntergang beobachten. Mücken waren erstaunlicherweise auch kein Problem, trotz des Gewässers gleich vorne dran und der Jahreszeit. Diverse Spinnen vor/hinter dem Fenster und in gewissen Zimmerecken schienen sich sehr wohlzufühlen, aber das störte uns nicht so. Perfekte Ausgangslage, um den See zu umrunden (zu Fuss oder mit dem Fahrrad). Im See schwimmen schien leider nicht so üblich zu sein, vielleicht war das Wasser nicht sauber genug. Obwohl man schnell im Zentrum von Rotterdam ist, ist Ericias Airbnb eine absolute Natur-Idylle. Die Einrichtung ist modern aber eher einfach, gewisse Dinge für die Küche mussten wir noch kaufen (Tabs für die Spülmaschine, Salz). Man kann aber gut kochen im Airbnb. Diese Unterkunft war ein Highlight und wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

name: Light and cosy Apartment
comments: Amazing host, very polite and helpful. Offered great recommendations for places to visit for food, entertainment and culture. The apartment itself is nice and cozy, has a balcony and is very close to both bus and tram stops. I enjoyed every bit of my three weeks stay, absolutely loved the city and the vibe. Thank you Daan!

name: Light & Cozy two-room apartment
comments: Fantastic little place in Rotterdam. Very cozy and modern, tons of natural light. Very comfortable bed. One thing to note is the very tight and steep stairs if that’s a problem for you.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: We had a lovely stay in Ericia’s AirBnB. First of all, the location is amazing. We really enjoyed having our breakfast and dinner on the terrace, with a view of the lake. The interior of the apartment is beautiful, cozy and modern. We loved the luxurious beds. Overall, we would definitely recommend Ericia’s place for a romantic getaway or a little staycation in Rotterdam!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Stunning apartment, beautifully kitted out (best bath!) and with amazing views! Our host was super helpful accommodating our needs with a 9 month old and giving us tips on the local area. Would definitely reccomend! Thank you for having us!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: incredible apartment with a fantastic view.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Old windmill cottage,  which is actually completely new inside and tastefully styled to fit the old character of this location, under a windmill and with a beautiful garden all directly lakeside with an unbroken view over the water. Private parking onsite and easy access to the cottage. Easy walk to the Metro Station for visiting Rotterdam city centre but with great facilities on the doorstep, this cottage provides the serenity and comfort on the urban fringe. Many restaurants and recreational activities around the lake and within the urban area could easily keep you busy for a week or more while feeling right at home.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Location/Location/Location......
This place is amazing both inside and out.
Stylish decor to allow for comfortable nights in, amazing bath tub for relaxing with a glass of wine. Breakfast with a fantastic view just meters from the edge of the lake......almost didn't want to see any of Rotterdam, but stay in the cottage....
Short walk from the local underground, with adjacent mini supermarket(SPAR). We stopped here without the need for a vehicle, just hopping on the public transport links to be in the center of Rotterdam in a matter of minutes.
We will be stopping here again - you feel very rural by the setting, without having to travel miles away from Rotterdam.......And there is a windmill right next door!!!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: The place is quite big and the view is absolutely stunning. We especially enjoyed the sunset on the balcony over the skyline of Rotterdam. It is a unique place to stay and relax.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Great Place with a windmill, amazing view and perfect for a weekend of sport.
We were with friends and access directly the waterfront for SUP.
The house has everything you might need. Communication was perfect and everything was very clean.
A++++

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Awesome location and beautiful windmill. If you want a relaxing weekend while having some Dutch culture this is the place. Very clean had all the amenities. Lake side view with a nice 3 mile walking trail surrounding the lake. Ericia the host was great, very easy to communicate with.
Only con:
If you are looking to stay now there is construction going on with the windmill and they start very early in the morning. I would suggest people to book once construction is completed.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Beautiful location, amazing view, lovely bath and the kitchen is perfect!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Fantastic location, and great lake view

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
The place is amazing, very clean, stylish and perfectly organized. Quiet location, privacy and a stunning view all over the lake.
The host is very polite and always ready to help when needed. Very professional work.
Looking forward to book it again.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Simply wonderful! The apartment is beautiful, modern and extremely well-kept. Very comfortable sofa-bed for an extra guest, too. The host provided lots of useful information and was always available for additional requests and communication. The location is absolutely perfect. Although only 10-15 minutes from the bustling city centre, it's located right by lake and forest, which gives you a breathtaking view from the garden and windows as well as a perfectly quiet street.
Would definitely recommend to everyone coming to Rotterdam!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Staying on the lake is amazing and the view is worth it itself. There’s also a lot of good restaurants nearby and the walk to the tram/metro is reasonable as well.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Great place to stay right beside De Ster windmill. Probably the most peaceful rental property in Rotterdam!  Beautiful views!  Stylish house. Beware flooding bathroom as the shower drains more slowly than the water flows       Keep switching on and off.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Location is great, couldn't be better: superb view on Kralingse Plas, wonderful opportunities for walking, biking and the city at hand, free parking next to the house. Appartment is lovely decorated, bright and spacious. Outside area (terrace) great. Hygiene and maintainance need attention: fridge, milk foamer, some kitchen cabinets and fire place weren't clean and some things are broken, such as blinds in the bed room. A little more spheric  lamps would make it more cosy.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Very clean space, great communication from the host, and the lake view was lovely.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Beautiful location, charming house and well appointed. The view is stunning, amazing walks around the lake while still being close to the city centre. Our communication with Ericia was smooth and easy.
We had a problem with geese who come every morning from the lake and dirty the grass and the paved sit-out. Impossible to enjoy outdoor view in these conditions which is a pity because it is the main reason we booked this house.
We also had a problem with electricity outage, unfortunately the problem was not resolved so we were 1.5 days without electricity. Luckily it did not affect the hot water & cooker so we could function. Ericia did her best to help but could not fix the issue before our departure.
Overall, it was a poor end to a stay that began well and could have been great without these 2 issues.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Beautiful space and location! Really easy check in, comfy space, lovely view, and all for a great price. A little out of the way, but I was very pleased and would definitely stay again!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: We loved the apartment! It's absolutely cozy, well furnited and well equipped. You'll find everything you need. In summer it is a little bit hot but still amazing. Having breakfast and dinner with this amazing view is just amazing! If you go around the lake you can even see the skyline of Rotterdam. The only weird thing was the bed which was screwed to the floor so you can't move it. And unfortunately because of that it wasn't well cleaned behind the bed (a lot of housedust and a spider). For people with an allergy to house dust it's kind of hard to sleep without medicaments. But except for this part, everything was cleaned well. We would still recommend this place because it's insanely beautiful! The kitchen is well equipped and it is so close to the city center but still quiet because of the lake. Perfect mix!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: The apartment is part of a heritage complex centered around a mill.  Everything is very well managed, furnished and decorated with the desire to do the best possible.  The city center of Rotterdam is very close by metro and at the same time the place benefits from the proximity of the lake and nature.  There is a large Albert Heinj supermarket 13min walk away which is very convenient.  A small regret with the possibility of ventilation in the apartment in summer when it’s hot.  There are few windows that can be opened.  It quickly gets hot inside at the end of the afternoon. The place also lacks a little bit of privacy with a bit of traffic.  Otherwise everything was perfect !

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Great place to stay and have the best of both worlds. Easy access to the city and amazing lake views with access into the water. The place pictures are accurate. The place is spotless clean. You can use the kitchen for easy cooking. This is a cottage like stay and if it’s available and you can afford it, you will have a fantastic time.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: This place is outstanding! Before I got there I thought it was out in the country but it's located in the city! Amazing views and a 1 minute walk from a fantastic restaurant

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: This is an amazing property - you have a view of ducks out the front but are 10 mins cycle from the centre of Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: This is the second time that we stayed in this lovely place in Rotterdam. It is extremely peaceful and cosy. The views of the lake are extraordinary. Will definitely return again!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: We stayed with three persons for a long weekend in the appartment and it was great. The location is amazing, situated right in front of the lake with a fantastic view. If you want to spend a relaxing time, you can easily spend the whole day on the terrace, enjoying the sun and sunset.  The appartment itself was very modern, nicely furbished and clean. You need to be aware that the flat above is also rented and you might hear some noise, which wasnt disturbing for us. We would definitely come back.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
Spectacularly situated on a lake. (I think it's the only residential property on the lake.) Sailboats, canoes and kayaks, no jet skis. There are a few places to eat within a 1-10 min walk, otherwise it's a little far from public transportation, tho availability of rental bikes via an app very nearby.
A few days a week there are visitors to the adjacent windmill, but it's not a problem.
Kitchen is very minimal (no oil nor salt even), and no microwave, so you have to be flexible with meals if you're making them yourself.
I didn't realize until the last day that the garden shed had lounge chairs to sit out in the beautiful yard with a pear tree and other nice plantings.
Worst problem was mosquitos and we happened to have a very appetizing child they liked to feed on. There's a screen on one window and we kept the other windows shut but somehow they got in anyway.
A very relaxing, special rural place in such a large metropolis.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: We had a lovely stay here and the cottage was perfectly equipped for us. We couldn't ask for a nicer view from the window and the garden was also immaculate. Excellent communications and instructions allowed us to settle in straight away.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: The millers studio is a great place to stay. It is a beautiful and well equipped apartment with a magnificent view out over the lake. The surrounding neighborhood is friendly and has some nice leafy walks around the waterways. It is a 15-minute walk to the closest metro station for onward travel but also very bike friendly if this is the preferred mode of transport. All in all, a great place to stay for a small family.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Beautiful and peaceful place in Kralingen, with a nice view on the lake. All commodities nearby, a very good place to stay !

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: Really great oasis in a busy city. Great views in a countryside setting 5 minutus from Rotterdam city centre. On hot days you can open the doors but they airflows isn't the best. However hot sunny\y days are rare in the Netherlands, so I guess we were (un)lucky. Great place recommended

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: One of my favorite Airbnb stays ever, a charming, comfortable studio with beautiful lake views. Great for exploring Rotterdam and surrounding areas.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: The location is peaceful. The unit was cozy. However, there was unforeseen construction which started around 07:30 both weekday mornings. In addition, there was a magical forest children's exhibition across the street. Loud music was played until 22:30 every night. We could hear it through the shut windows and doors. The owners were not aware of either situation and could not inform us in advance. They reimbursed us less than 10% of the stay for the inconvenience of both.

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: This place is truly special. The studio is spotless, cozy, and beautifully designed. The lake view is stunning, and the natural surroundings make it peaceful and unforgettable. The location is perfect, quiet, beautiful, and close to everything you need, including parks, grocery stores and the metro station. Everything was perfect. Highly recommend and would love to return!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments:
We had a wonderful 4 night stay here! The place was just like the pictures and the view of the water was so beautiful and picturesque with the windmill as well. It had everything we needed and Ericia gave us lots of helpful information/recommendations for around the house as well.
The only thing we found is that it is quite loud at night with road noice, as well as, you can hear people clearly from the upstairs unit, but obviously that is something that can’t be changed.
All in all, a wonderful stay!

name: Luxurious heritage lodge at lakeside - Studio 1/2
comments: We had the most wonderful stay by the lake, with perfect sunny, warm weather. It's like staying in a wildlife reserve! The view of the lake is so beautiful and peaceful. We swam in the lake and rented a boat twice, from the sailing club very nearby.
