We ate and drank in De Tuin, which is also next door and had an interesting tour of the windmill, which is attached to the property.  The accommodation was perfect for our stay, with great kitchen equipment and a powerful shower! We were able to relax in the garden on deck chairs, and eat our meals al fresco overlooking the lake. Lots of wildlife noise from the ducks and frogs to keep us company! We will be returning as this is the perfect location for us when visiting our daughter, who lives close to the lake.

name: Comfortable bedroom 'B' in center of Rotterdam
comments: Brigitte gave us a warm welcome and showed us around her place. Her place made us feel like home, warm and cosy. Location is slightly near the central station, approx 8min walk.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments:
Great hotel and location!
It’s right in the middle of the city so everything is reachable by foot. We arrived early and had the possibility to do an early check-in, also did we receive a free upgrade which gave us a nice view over the city. Hotel staff was extremely friendly and helpful with everything. The room itself was nice and very clean! We enjoyed our stay :).

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: Good hotel. Prime location and catchy decor. The gym was a big plus for me. I had a room on the 17th floor which gave me a great view over Rotterdam. Windows could’ve been cleaner though. Overall, very recommended!

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments:
Very nice room with a stunning view over Rotterdam for a fair and affordable price.
Located in the heart of Rotterdam so every destination is nearby and can easily be walked to in a couple of minutes.
Very friendly staff who always took care of our wishes and questions.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: Amazing place with stunning views of the city, we enjoyed our stay a lot. Everything necessary was there for us.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: Great place, beautiful view.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: amazing views

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments:
Wonderful hotel
We had the chance to get a 18th floor view.
I recommend it to everyone who’s hesitating trying it

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: While not your traditional Airbnb since it’s a hotel, it was very easy for bag storage until we could check in. East location close to train and shopping. Room was clean and shower had good pressure. The only minor complaint is that the bathroom is slightly dark for getting ready. Otherwise great

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: A good spot close to the centre but off a quieter side street. The place is a hotel listed on Airbnb so checking in with the front desk was easy. The room is small but nice, lovely bathroom and comfortable bed. The blackout curtains and air conditioning were also a plus.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments: the hotel itself is great, walkable to main attractions and transits. it was a good stay except that the room I got, didn't have much privacy, it was so noisy in the hallway, guests banging their doors loud and it woke me up every night.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Double
comments:
The hotel room is on the 18th floor of the hotel, giving an amazing view of the center of Rotterdam at night. Room was cleaned and the staff very efficient and polite, would definitely recommend! Bed was very big and comfortable too :))
Only thing is that there isn’t much hygiene & shower products given.

name: Lovely big Room  in house with great vieuw
comments: Luna was a great and welcoming host, she tried to make our stay as pleasant as possible :) Although this room we booked was not available, she provided another one ("Room in pittoresk area with great vieuw!") for the same price. The room was cozy and the view was nice to the canal. The apartment is easily reachable by public transport from the city center: you can take the tram or the metro. Shops and restaurants are available nearby.

name: Lovely big Room  in house with great vieuw
comments: Luna is a very good host, she wants to make everyone feel at home. She gave us a lot of info about Rotterdam and she was always happy to help. The house is in a very good position and the room has a great view. Good to spend some days in the city.

name: Lovely big Room  in house with great vieuw
comments:
The apartament is very well placed in Delftshaven, around 10-15min by bike to most of the things you'd want to do in Rotterdam.
The owner is a very kind person and she tried her best to accommodate me and the other guests, including giving local tips that a foreigner like me really appreciates.
The apartament is on the first floor in an antique building and the room is huge with a jaw dropping painting on the ceiling. Giving the place a very one of the kind feeling.
From the peculiarities I can point out that the bathtub while huge is in the room directly in front of the bed with 2 sinks next to it. (though it is private instead of shared like it said in the ad)
The view from the room's window is unfortunately not the harbor but a neighbors backyard in between other buildings and the kitchen shown in the photos is understandably shared.

name: Lovely big Room  in house with great vieuw
comments: Lunas place is located on a beautiful street very close to the metro and other shops. Very expensive however every place in Rotterdam is expensive. A cat and a dog are present in the house which suited us as we love animals.

name: Lovely big Room  in house with great vieuw
comments: My one-month stay at Luna’s place was amazing. It was a beautiful encounter, Luna is a radiant and caring person, always attentive, and our conversations were truly enjoyable. She really knows how to welcome guests and make them feel at home. The apartment is perfectly located on one of the most beautiful streets in Rotterdam, full of charm and character. I highly recommend staying here, and I hope to cross paths with Luna again someday!

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: The hotel is in amazing location, very near the central station in Rotterdam and near the main shopping street. The restaurants for brunch or dinner are just outside the hotel . The staff is really helpful, the room is clean and very modern. I would definitely come back to this hotel next time when I arrive to Rotterdam:)

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: Everything was Perfect. I really liked the idea of the Mini-market on the 2nd Floor, where you can buy food and drinks. Nice Manhattan-like view from the room, a lovely rain-shower and the hardness of the bed was on point! My to-stay Place for Future businesstrips to Rotterdam!

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: Nice room with perfect view!

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: Ellen is quite friendly and easygoing. We had a nice chat with her at the last day. The apartment was smaller than we expected, but it was fully equipped. We enjoyed the night time opening the window and chilling with some beers, canal views, musics, and breezes. And the location is perfect, walkable to the van Gogh museum and national museum, but still locates in the local residence area so it was not noisy and you can feel the local vibe. Many thanks.

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: GREAT LOCATION! AMAZING ViEW! LOTS OF AMENITIES! 24/HR SELF-SERVICE LOUNGE W/ DRINKS + FOOD!!! WOULD DEFINITELY RECOMMEND & STAY HERE, AGAIN...

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments:
The room was huge, really you have plenty of space. A tiny window but air conditioning was well. Beds were clean also the bathraoom. Everything was pretty clean actually. Beds are so soft, it might give you some back pain.
There were some flaws but it was pretty good when you are comparing with the price.
Thanks for the hospitalitiy!

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Standard Twin
comments: this hotel is so central, near everything, mear metros, museums and shops. staff are very friendly. rooms are spacious and clean. we were delighted with everything

name: The James Hotel Rotterdam - Junior Suite with Guaranteed City View
comments: Great hotel in the city centre of Rotterdam. The interior design was amazing. Really quite inside the hotel (no noise of other rooms/guests). Cheap parking garage around the corner. We definitely will book this hotel when we visit Rotterdam again.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
THE BEST AIRBNB EVER.
If you guys are going to Rotterdam and want to have one amazing place to experience it in with your friends or your partner choose here. I have used AirBnB around the world and this was the first time the photos didn’t do the actual place justice!!!!
The host David has been the most communicative and accommodating host yet. This place has everything you need.... and more!!! They have extra bedding, pillows, towels, tons of coffee tea and even filled up the fridge with some drinks for us to enjoy 🤪♥️🤪
There are two bikes you can use to check out the city. There is a humongous Albert Heijn in 5 minute walking distance, amazing restaurants and bakeries literally right around the corner. The location is quiet and yet has everything you need!
Honestly we loved this place so much we barely went out. There is a separate sound system for both floors. Crystal clear and easy to access with your phone! And the kitchen had all the things you need to cook with 🌈🌈🌈
The bathtub is a jacuzzi by the way. And it’s amazing with the ceiling window touches above. My boyfriend even utilized the weights that were set upstairs 😍😍 My absolute favorite was the upstairs balcony. It’s much bigger than the picture and that lounge sofa furniture is an absolute gem!!!!!
Just absolutely amazed!!!!
Most definitely will be back.
Highly recommended.
Get it get it.
TIP:
Please train yourself for what I call “the Dutch staircase of death”. And please do be careful if and when you are intoxicated or not in your right mind 🥴

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: A really wonderful appartment with a great host. David is quick to answer and are eager to help you with either questions or tips. The appartment is modern as shown on the pictures, and it offers nice features such as a balcony, TV and a music system.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: During our visit to Rotterdam our stay at David’s apartment was very much a highlight in its own right. The space looks even more impressive than on the photographs and provided for everything we needed (and more). I recommend David’s listing without the slightest hesitation.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Lovely apartment with a beautiful view, cool bathroom and awesome terrace. It’s perfectly located in convenient and quiet part of Rotterdam. Rooms were clean and comfortable. The apartment closed to the city centre, 300 meters from AH supermarket, nice bar and the patisserie. David is wonderful host, very responsive, was always available for any questions and communication was great throughout. Thanks, David!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
Davids apartment is very stylish and has a nice atmosphere. It's clean and you will find everything you need. We had such a good sleep in the nice soft beds. This apartment is located in a beautiful street a little outside the city center. In 15 min by tram you will be in the center of everything and the supermarkt is just a 5 min walk.
David is a very pleasant host and able to give you some great tips for Rotterdam and his neighborhood.
We had a fantastic stay and would highly recommend his apartment.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit in Rotterdam und in der tollen Wohnung! Es war sehr sauber und die moderne Einrichtung hat uns gut gefallen! Unser Highlight war die Dachterasse auf der man gemütlich sitzen konnte!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: I really enjoyed my stay at David's beautiful place! It is so beautifully designed and decorated, it felt luxurious just hanging out in the apartment. It is also perfectly located, the tram connecting Erasmus university to the train station is right up the street, and the lake is just down the road. Communication was great and David was really responsive when I had a small request.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Absolutely fabulous and stylish place in a beautiful part of Rotterdam. Loved the spacious stylish nature of the apartment with lots of terraces for use in summer to sit and have an evening drink. Well stocked kitchen and lived the laundry facilities. A fair few narrow steps up to the apartment but then. You get little views and no noise from neighbors or people above! Penthouse! Amazing that we had use of two bikes that were very good quality. David was amazingly communicative addressing our every need and making fabulous recommendations.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
We spend a fantastic long weekend at David’s apartment! The apartment is exactly as described and David very friendly and helpful!
Wonderful neighborhood with everything you need, even a huge lake at the end of the street to enjoy nature.
The area is also perfect for exploring Rotterdam, Tram station to city center just around the corner.
Top recommendation!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
David’s apartment was a really nice experience, it is located within walking distance to a lake with lots of activities. There is also a direct tramway that goes there from Rotterdam Central Station. The apartment was clean and we immediately fell in love with the kitchen’s atmosphere and the great wooden table. The upper floor is also particularly endearing with a great jacuzzi a big bed and a balcony.
The only drawback I would say is that there is only one bathroom in the whole apartment which makes it hard for 4 people.
I, nonetheless, am very happy to have stayed the week there. Thanks David!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: David’s apartment was a great base for our stay in Rotterdam. We enjoyed cycling through the Kralingse Bos and around the lake. It was an easy walk into the centre of Rotterdam or a tram ride from the end of the street. The local restraints were great. The apartment was really spacious with lovely big windows, plenty of sunshine and comfortable furniture. It was quiet in the evenings. We had a great stay.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
David’s apartment has the perfect location. Residential quiet, but easy access to city perks. Tram is a one minute walk, but this line does have some detours right now so check the schedule. The metro is less than a ten minute walk and in three stops you’re in central Rotterdam.
David was a really helpful host and great communicator. The neighbor were quiet and friendly.
The main bed was very comfortable, nice linens. Large en-suite shower and beautiful tub. The toilet is on the main floor.
The one thing to be aware of, as others have commented, is the stairs. Two flights to get to the apartment and one within the apartment. They were fine for us, but if you have small children, any mobility issues or heavy luggage consider the stair situation. No railing inside the unit.
Overall, great location, superb host and large space with beautiful balcony.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: We had a lovely stay at David's place. It's a bit of a walk to the city center, but absolutely pleasant, and the tram or bike is an option as well. The apartment was clean and very stylish. The shared space was lovely, and there was sufficient privacy between the bedrooms. The staircase in the apartment and the one in the building are a bit treacherous-not uncommon in the Netherlands, but steeper than we were used to. Overall, it was a lovely stay, and David was very responsive.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: David is a great host, very responsive and also proactive in giving local recommendations. The apartment is just how it looks in the pictures: very bright, spacious and with all the comforts you need to enjoy your stay in Rotterdam!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Very well equipped, lovely shower, worked well for 4 of us over a long weekend. There was building work going on but it wasn't too intrusive and David made accomodations for the lack of balconys that we'd hoped for. Great communication and wonderful restaurant recommendations. the fish place round the corner is a must! Would stay happily stay again 👍

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Super cozy place...loved drinking coffee on the couch while looking out the huge windows every morning....great relaxation. Jet tub to soak was amazing ❤️ Tram right there...15 min to the main train station if headed to the airport or Amsterdam...grocery store 5 min walk...great restaurants nearby...walked to the city central in 30 min...just a beautiful place...quiet neighborhood and relaxing.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
The apartment is located at a very good place, easily reachable by public transport.
There was a renovation going on while we were there, David made us sure that there won’t be any excess noise but you could clearly hear it till 10pm.
We felt like the apartment wasn’t cleaned well before our arrival, we’ve found a lot of hair and dirty utensils.
Overall the apartment was well located and fit our needs but the whole experience doesn’t justify the price.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: David is friendly and super responsive! Very clear instructions on how to get in and easy as well. Great location, less than 1 min walk from the tram station and the place is spacious and bright but might be a bit too warm during the day time. Also, if you have big and heavy luggages, it will take some time and team work to get the luggages up to the place since the stairs are very steep!

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments: Me and my friends really enjoyed ourselves. We were scared for the neighbour who complains if you make too much noise but we didn’t make any noise. So didn’t have any issues. Would recommend 100%. Love how clean the place was

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
We stayed as a group of four (two couples). The location is great — quiet area with shops and restaurants nearby, and the city center is reachable by public transport or a 30-minute walk.
Check-in and communication with the host were smooth. The apartment looks as advertised and is stylish, but not ideal for more than two people. It’s a two-level space: one small bedroom with a transparent door is downstairs; the second bedroom and the only bathroom are upstairs in an open area with no separation from the staircase — privacy is limited.
Both the apartment and building have steep stairs, which can be challenging, especially with luggage.
The shower drain was clogged upon arrival, and we had to fix it ourselves. It would be great if cleaning staff checked this in advance.
Overall, a nice apartment for a couple or a small family, with all the needed amenities, but some design choices and maintenance issues affected the experience.

name: Cozy apartment in Kralingen close to City Center
comments:
Positives- It’s a nice place to stay for a few days. Got everything you’ll need in the kitchen Incase you fancy being a chef for your stay. Nicely designed modern bathroom. A balcony for fresh air when it gets hot.
The stairs in general were a concern. I would say to be very careful on the stairs leading up the apartment especially if you’ve got heavy bags.
Overall, enjoyed my stay : )

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments: The cottage was as we've expected, comfortable and spotless. Hosts are really amazing people. House is located just 5 minutes from metro station. It is peaceful and quiet place. It was important for us to stay in such place with good internet and it was a perfect choice. Kitchen was well-equipped so it was really convenient to cook at home. Bed was comfortable and we've slept well. There are mosquito nets on some windows so we left them opened for nights. We've enjoyed our staying and it was a pleasure to meet so nice people. Highly recommend Henrico's place.

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments: Lovely, warm and bright cottage.  It's cozy and spacious and has everything you need. The hosts were kind and warm and offered everything I needed!

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments:
Henrico and Frederieke, Thank you for sharing your welcome cottage with us. We enjoyed our time in Rotterdam. We are happy to share our experience with others.
The cottage is as described and had all the things we needed to stay for 6 nights. The king size bed was very comfortable! The kitchen was perfect, we were able to cook a number of meals, which helped us greatly.
We also appreciated being a very short walk (less than 300m) from the Kleiweg tram station and just a slightly longer walk (500m) to the Metro station (Melanchthonweg). Between the tram and the Metro, we were able to get to anywhere in the area we needed. Whether it was Delft, Gouda, Rotterdam Centraal, Leiden, or Amsterdam we were a short walk and then it was an easy process of using the super efficient public trains, trams, buses, and high speed rail to navigate the surrounding area.
Cafe Kleiweg was a good place to have a beer and some comfort food (chicken wings).
We would certainly stay here again!

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments: Henrico and his wife were amazing. super  clean and many thanks for the wine and goodies. Central and away from the centrum. Highly recommend. comfortable bed. Love the privacy as well.

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments:
I cannot say enough good things about our stay at Henrico’s cottage near Rotterdam!
First let me say that the cottage itself is so gorgeous- the perfect blend of character and clean, sleek, modern comfort (the renovated floors, bathroom and kitchen!)
It was prepared for our arrival with a baby playpen and high chair as well as some welcome snacks which just made us feel so at home!
After arriving we had a chance to chat with Henrico and his wife in the garden and they helped give us the lay of the land with some great local recommendations. The cottage is about 15 minute drive from the center of Rotterdam, but the neighborhood it’s located in has a great street about a 5-10 min walk with lots of cafes, take away and sit down food options, shops and a grocery store.
We had rented a car, so this cottage was the perfect base to explore Delft, The Hague, the hook of Holland, and Rotterdam.
I cannot recommend this Airbnb enough!

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments:
Henrici was a fab host. We had perfect peace and quiet and privacy.. great location close to public transport. Very easy to get to Rotterdam but nice to have the quiet upon returning… easy to ride bikes everywhere if you wish. Very hospitable welcome pack.
Perfect quiet retreat to come home to after a day out and about
We loved our stay

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments:
Henrico’s and Federieke’s place was very cozy. They have taken one room and made a bedroom area, a well-equipped kitchen area and cozy living room area. It is very clean, bright and private, even though our hosts are just steps away. They also left us a welcome package, including a couple of eggs from the chickens. The only issue that I had at the cottage was mosquitoes buzzing and biting at night. I mention this to our hosts and they immediately provided a mosquito net to put around the bed. There was no more buzzing in my ear at night and I slept beautifully. Our hosts also provided two bicycles that are functional but have some issues. We used them to go to the super market and some restaurants within 5km. The metro station is a small walk away. Make sure that you use the path that is just on the other side of the tracks from the cottage. It will lead you directly there.
We would definitely stay at Henrico’s and Federieke’s place again.

name: Cottage in secluded garden near center Rotterdam
comments:
Nice little cottage with plenty of home comforts and easy access to local transit, which made it a good spot for getting in and out of Rotterdam easily for our long weekend.
There was a nice welcome basket of snacks when we arrived, along with clear instructions for everything, and local recommendations.
As others have mentioned, mosquitoes were an issue, and despite the net around the bed, the mesh on the windows, and getting rid of the ones we could see, my girlfriend and I still suffered quite a few bites. So this is something to be aware of in the warm weather.
Aside from this it was a nice place to come back to after spending most of the day exploring.

name: Double room near Rotterdam Central Station
comments: The Hotel is located at a big Street. The stairs to the Apartment are really really steep and the Fotos are Irritating. But the Balcony and the Rooftop where quite nice.

name: Double room near Rotterdam Central Station
comments: Overall good experience, good breakfast, very nice staff. Our room was on the street side, very noisy, bring ear plugs.

name: City Centre Family Room near Rotterdam Station
comments:
Room was clean and looked like advertised. However, several things stand out and make this a place I wouldn't recommend.
We were very surprised to be asked for a 100€ cash deposit upon arrival. Then, when getting to our room, we were greeted by a terrible smell. When warned about this, the reception staff was pretty unhelpful and just told us to open a window. The smell eventually cleared out of the room after a long airing out but the bathroom still smelled moldy.
Room itself was clean and comfortable, and location great, but the poor service and strange business practices make this a 2/5 at best.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: The place was gorgeous and we loved it. The historic apartment has been beautifully restored and is nicely situated. We could walk everywhere we needed to. Check-in was really uncomplicated and Maarten responded very promptly. We had a great time and enjoyed the bright, stylish and cute place. Only downside is that the sink and shower is also historically built and rather on the small side. Also, parking right at the apartment is a nightmare, therefore we parked in a nearby parking garage. All in all a wonderful trip to Rotterdam.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Good value for the price, BUT if you are someone for whom privacy is very important, this isn't the place for you because access to the upstairs apartment passes through this apartment.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments:
Great apartment on a quiet street but very close to lots of places to eat, and tram and metro stops. Maarten and Laura were wonderful hosts, there was always great communication when we had any questions and they were really responsive when we had a small issue with the key.
Our only tiny issue was that there is no door between the two sleeping areas, it may be best to travel with people you already know well!

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Very cosy apartment. You can reach a supermarket, a pharmacy and public transport in a view walking minutes. The check-in was very easy.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Beautiful apartment with lovely high ceilings, really light.  Maarten gave us a very friendly welcome.  The kitchen and apartment had everything we needed.  Be warned it's up some very steep steps!  Highly recommended.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: It is a great space with the big open rooms and lots of light! It feels like you live in Rotterdam while you are there because you are in typical dutch row house with open plan, in a neighborhood and have access to the tram, metro, restaurants and stores all within walking distance. Some of the set up is creatively done (dishwasher up high, two different sinks in the bathroom) - all a bit crooked and combination of styles.  But it all works, feels personal and has a certain flair, with beautiful old touches. Amenities also great - dishwasher, beamer (we watched movie), wifi, etc). Martin very friendly and flexible (added an extra day in the last minute). Be aware there are no doors to the bedrooms - which should be clear from the photos. Worked fine for us.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: It was great. Apparent was as described. And more - real Dutch house - little tilted/leaned with big windows. Nice and peaceful neighborhood. Whole family enjoyed (kids said wi-fi was great).

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Het appartement van Maarten is een fijne plek, locatie is top, metro en leuke restaurantjes zijn op loopafstand. Het appartement is ruim en schoon, alle faciliteiten aanwezig. Tussen de 2 slaapkamers zou een schuifwand of gordijn wel prettig zijn voor iets meer privacy. De communicatie met Martijn was prettig, bij vragen reageerde hij snel. Dank voor het fijne verblijf!

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: The flat was very nice and cozy.  Also  the location was excellent; the street itself was calm, but there were many good restaurants and shops just around the corner. Our host Maarten was very friendly and helpful and replied always promptly to my messages. We had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam!

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Really lovely relaxing apartment. Short walk to restaurants, shops including two supermarkets, laundrette and chemist. Peaceful street and close to public transport or walkable to the main station. Maarten was a great host and very friendly and helpful.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Highly recommended apartment close to all the action in Rotterdam. Clean, well-decorated and full of light

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Maarten’s apartment is amazing and my friend and I would highly recommend it! The apartment is located on a quiet street which was close to the city centre. It had everything that we needed:  Adapters, games, TV, comfortable furniture etc. There are large windows on both sides of the appartement which meant lots of natural light come through and this really added to the aesthetic. 10/10!!!

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments:
Thank you to Maarten for a wonderful stay. The airbnb was perfectly located in a really pleasant area of the city. The apartment is situated very close to the tram which connects to Central Station, super convenient. Two bars nearby - Cafe Steijn and Cafe Bakeliet are both recommended. Just a short walk to some nice restaurants, our favourite was Portugalia Tasca.
The airbnb itself was very spacious with plenty of natural light.
Maarten was a great host who responded in a timely manner to all of our queries.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments:
Beautiful apartment, very sunny, which is located in a quiet street.
Everything went well :)

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: A quiet street in a convenient and vibrant part of Rotterdam. You can walk this city from this place. Supermarkets, laundromat, bars and coffee shops closeby. Easy stroll into delft haven and coolhaven. An older apartment that has a well equipped kitchen, great hot water and lots of space and light. A super responsive and friendly host. Lovely spot, great city.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: The location was perfect,  10 minute walk to the museum park, 20 minutes to the station.  Just off a busy street with lots of take aways and small supermarkets,  with a functioning kitchen so you could self cater. The street itself was quiet and peaceful. The tram stop into town was a 2 minute walk. A comfortable and nicely furnished flat, with proactive and responsive communication from Maarten. I highly recommend this flat for a visit to Rotterdam.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Really wonderful place to stay. Beautiful street situated near great shops and restaurants. We loved the large windows and the bed was very comfy.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: A wonderful historic apparent with character, in a perfect location. Clean and light inside. I would highly recommend staying here if visiting Rotterdam.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments:
This is a beautiful apartment that felt spacious, bright relaxing and full of character. It had everything we needed for our stay. We especially loved the neighborhood as it was in the middle of restaurants, cafés, a beautiful canal and green space and very close to public transport. Although, the property is walkable to the centre.
Maarten is a super friendly host! He popped by to say hi, and messaged to see if we needed any assistance during our stay.
Would definitely stay again next time I'm in Rotterdam.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: This lovely spacious apartment was perfect for our family of 3. It was open and airy and just lovely to relax in after wandering the streets of Rotterdam all day. Maarten was a very responsive host. Good transportation links and easy walking to several sites.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments:
We loved our stay here as a family of 4. The apartment is beautiful, spotlessly clean, and well equipped with everything that is needed (although, as a family with two young kids, we possibly would have liked a washing machine - but Maarten notifies that there isn't one in the description). Maarten is very responsive and helpful.
Lovely neighbourhood with lots of local shops and a tram line a 2 minute walk. There is a park within walking distance (and our kids enjoyed playing on the little slides and benches on the street just as much!).
I would warn that, as others have said, the stairs are extraordinary steep. We found it quite fun and quirky and called them the "ladder" up to the apartment, but we were very cautious on them.
The kids beds were a little tricky, the higher of the two is on a wooden ledge which sticks and is very hard and our kids (quite excitable) did hurt themselves a little on them. The bottom pull out bed is on wheels and does move around a lot.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: Great location in Rotterdam, short walk to the Metro which gives access to all of the city very easily. Maarten was very helpful with tips and recommendations, always responsive when needed too. Managed to park on the street at arrival to drop the bags and then it was a short walk from the central parking location. All in all a good stay.

name: Historic apartment very close to city center
comments: The apartment is in a great location to get around the city by foot or public transport. The apartment is spacious and has beautiful light and a nice view out the back onto the shared gardens.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments: Beautiful spacious and stylish apartment with a wonderful balcony and a very comfy and relaxed feel. Milou and Berend gave us great tips for Rotterdam and is located right beside the tram stop. I would stay here again - highly recommend!

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments:
I can certainly recommend this apartment specially if you don't rely on cars, there's a tram stop literally in front you can see it from the living room. There's a lot of space, the owner is clearly partial to beer, the shower was particularly nice and the bed was more comfortable than I thought it would be from looking at it, table had plenty of space for work. Internet is Ziggo DOCSIS 3 200/20 which is better than most airbnbs and hotels even.
The host kept in touch in realtime through the "messaging app everyone uses" and was available for any questions. The stairs are steep, keep that in mind if you have a lot of luggage to get upstairs specially from ground level to your bed if you add up everything it's quite the steps.
I think my only real complaint is the occasional doorbell noise i kept hearing which was probably some motion detector from a business nearby which is unrelated to the airbnb but still worth mentioning if you don't have NC headphones. Other touches to improve which I did mention to the host and should be sorted for future guests related to the carpet and couch.
Overall it's a great place to stay :)

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments:
Fantastic apartment in a convenient part of the city. Bright and airy with a fabulous kitchen and spacious living area. The kitchen and shower room upstairs have been renovated to a high standard (just be aware that there are 2 flights of stairs to the bedroom area and another set of stairs from the front door to the living area)
We particularly appreciated all the extras in the kitchen - oil, balsamic vinegar, herbs and spices, wine and even a fresh basil plant!
We were able to walk to the apartment from Rotterdam Centraal on the first day and then used a 3 day Welcome card & RET on the trams and Metro thereafter.
There is a tram stop right outside the apartment which is very convenient.
We particularly enjoyed seeing the cube houses, walking round the Market hall and going up the Euromast Tower. We also visited Delfhaven and the windmills at Kinderdijk (via the Water Bus).
Milou was always very friendly and responsive, particularly when we couldn't close the window.
Thank you Milou

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments: very spacious, very bright, stylish and cosy apartment, feels like home - those are the words I'd use to describe Milou's listing. the calm residential are is located within walking distance (~15mins) from the Central railway station, and the same for some nice cafes, with tram stop just in front as well. one of the surprising features - the amount of stairs (I guess, it's Dutch style :))) - feeling the living room seems to be on the 2nd floor, while the bedrooms - on the 4th - it was fun for us.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments:
The apartment is spacious. The main kitchen/living/dining area is up two flights of stairs from street level, and the bedrooms, bathroom and washer were up two more flights of stairs.
The TV can only be used with a laptop or mobile: it was not connected to any channels.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments:
Had a very enjoyable stay in Rotterdam. Milou's apartment is about 10 minutes walk from central station and a tram stop is close to the apartment. There are supermarkets close by as well. We used Aldi as it was the only one we found that would accept our travel Mastercards. (Just a heads up for anyone else using a travel Mastercard).
Double glazing ensures that road noise is minimal.
The apartment is light and airy. The rooms are spacious and comfortable. Nice balcony to sit on.
The bedrooms were quiet, facing into the courtyard.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments: Great place, location walkable to central station, clean and well managed. Had an issue with the hot water, but resolved fairly quickly by host who compensated us for our inconvenience. Slight fly in the ointment, but my bad, as this was advertised,; no cable TV, TV accessible by Google App only, it would have been nice to just switch the TV and watch even some basic TV, without recourse to trying to use an app, which really offers limited content, unless you were perhaps more tech savvy than me and my other guests. On the whole a great stay and place to chill when attending the N Sea Jazz Festival, roll on 2025.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments: Milou’s place was perfect for our weekend in Rotterdam. It has a nice open plan kitchen and lounge, with a relaxed balcony for evening sun. It’s an easy walk or tram from Centraal which made it a great base for our stay.

name: Bright and spacious multi-level apartment
comments:
Spacious and light
Very clean.
Excellent bathroom with great shower.
Great location, number 8 tram stopped just outside and went into town. centre, including main railway station.
The second bedroom was a very small, with no wardrobe, storage, mirror or chair.
Those with mobility problems would find the steep narrow stairs a challenge ( especially with luggage)
Overall we had a very enjoyable stay.

name: Warm and spacious apartment
comments: Johan’s apartment is cozy, neat, very well decorated and it looks like the photos. I really loved the soft bed, great coffee and above all it has a great atmosphere made me feel at home during my stay. I really loved the location: it’s located in a neat residential neighborhood with all necessary shops and supermarkets in walking distance and it’s located in a very quite side-street where you can sleep after a long day. The city Center and all Rotterdam has to offer is in less than 10 minute distance from the apparent with a tram. Johan is a great host and a nice gentleman . He was sharp on time to give me the key, showed me the appartement, answered all my questions patiently. Communication with Johan was very easy, he answered all my questions directly and helped me to explore the city. I do recommend this lovely apartment to all. Thank you Johan for hosting me. Whenever I want to stay in Rotterdam, I’ll approach you!

name: Warm and spacious apartment
comments: We had a wonderful stay at Johan's apartment. Very stylishly furnished it even looks better than in the pictures and everything was exactly as described. The small backyard creates a nice garden atmosphere in the living room, since it's possible to open the whole window facade. It's perfectly situated for exploring Rotterdam by bike, public transport or foot. Highly recommended.

name: Warm and spacious apartment
comments: good place for a couple of days. thicker curtains for the street facing bedroom would have been helpful

name: Room in the heart of Rotterdam, Central Station
comments: Maria is very nice and communicative host! she has a very lovely apartment on second floor. it is on a wonderful queit street and nearby a station.

name: Room in the heart of Rotterdam, Central Station
comments:
Overall I enjoyed the home and the location. The room was spacious and the bed was comfortable. However, there were a few negatives I should mention:
The kitchen sink was choked for my entire stay, so though the kitchen was well equipped, I didn't want to cook as I wouldn't be able to clean up afterwards.
The room was not well cleaned, if you look closely, there is quite a bit of dust built up in the corner of the windowsill on both sides behind the curtain.
The balcony in the listing is being used as a storage space of sorts, so there is no possibility nor space to enjoy a bit of the outdoors there.
Lastly, I was asked to let a guest in for check-in. I ended up even having to introduce him to all facilities in the house etc. I've been travelling with Airbnb for more than 10 years but this is a first. I even rearranged my schedule to be there, & Maria seemed to stop replying on the choked sink after his check in had been settled.
Not a great impression.

name: Modern studio + two bicycles in cozy Liskwartier!
comments: I had a great stay here at Rosanne’s place. It was well designed and sparkly clean.  Rosanne always responded to my messages really fast. She gave wonderful hospitality while respect my privacy. It was such a nice little holiday get away as a Rotterdam local.

name: Modern studio + two bicycles in cozy Liskwartier!
comments:
Tot in de puntjes verzorgd!
Enige puntje van kritiek is dat er van ons wel wat meer privacy op het toilet had mogen zijn.

name: Modern studio + two bicycles in cozy Liskwartier!
comments:
This is a lovely apartment. It's so well designed, everything is exactly where you want it and works e.g automatic windows, button door, lots of plugs. It's also cosy, warm and comfortable.
The area is pretty and peaceful with handy shops and a great restaurant/coffee/brunch place called Arzu around the corner. It's 30 mins walk to the centre or a 10 minute tram (the trams are also really easy to navigate).
Rosanne is a very helpful, friendly host and made everything easy for me, including letting me check out late because she didn't have another guest.

name: Modern studio + two bicycles in cozy Liskwartier!
comments:
An amazing & stylish apartment in a great city area, easy to catch the tram, two well-running bicycles, and a parking garage near by (better price than street parking which was also available).
Rosanne was responding immediately with great recommendations.
Great stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
A nice apartment (though windows and the balcony are in need of some repair) in a very good location, very close to the Museums area and just on the border of the centre.
Warning: as mentioned in the description of the apartment, the internal stairs are very steep. If you have a mobility problem this is not the place for you.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: We stayed four nights in Jon’s place. He was very responsive and kind. He helped carrying our luggage upstairs. The apartment locates in an quiet residential street with short walking distance to supermarket, metro, and landmark places. It is very spacious and clean. Thank you Jon and it is a lovely stay!

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: really spacious and beautifully bright living room + one bedroom has a balcony with good view. traditional house with charme, but quite steep and narrow staircases!

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Clean, bright apartment convenient for the area we were staying in. Jon was great at keeping in touch. We had some issues with leaks during heavy rain, but Jon got straight on it.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: The house is very comfortable, but the bedroom was bit cold and the house was slightly hard to warm. However, the host is very kind person, so I recommend this apartment.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Jon is a nice and friendly Host. The place is near the center, has enough space and was quite clean. The Equipment and Furnishing in the Appartement is very basic and cheep and not always in a good condition. Especially the windows. Some don´t close properly or are leaking. If you stay there is in the warm season, it might get cold.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
We had a good stay at Jon's place. He is a very calm and friendly host and did his best to make our stay as good as possible. We could contact him if we needed anything and he took care fast.
The kitchen is big and very bright and the equipment was enough for us. Jon even bought a new pan we could use.
The house is quite old, has his edges and corners as written in the description, but for us four it fitted well because it offers a lot of space. On the balcony you can beautifully watch the sunset.
The house is located nearby a park where you can take a good walk and the metro station is just 5 min away.
All the best ,
Timo , Marina & Family

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
Our stay at Jon's place was very nice, the place was clean and mostly as we expected it to be.
The only things that bothered us were the fact that the apartment got really hot (but if you stay there at anytime, besides in the summer, you should be fine) and the fact that the windows were very old and therefore we couldn't open those to let in some cold air at night.
Jon himself was very nice to us, responded quickly and made sure we have everything we need during the stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: The balcony has a great view and it is bigger than it looks in the picture. Also, the location is also super convenient that you could walk anywhere. Jon is a great host and kind, also he replys quick. Highly recommend this lovely place:)

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Perfectly located to experience Rotterdam. Jon was very helpful and uncomplicated. The Apartment is very spacious with lots of light.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: It was a good stay at Jons apartment, it’s a bright but really simple place as described in the description. It’s close to a metro station and the museum Center. Jon was always fast to reply and got us some more wine glasses on the first day which we really appreciated.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Beautiful apartment: clean, spacious, conveniently located. I particularly loved living room. Be warned: there are lots of steep stairs, but we soon discovered that this is a common feature in Rotterdam apartments. We saw a beautiful sunset from the balcony (which I can’t guarantee you’ll see during your visit!) Jon maintained good communication with us before and during our stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Practical location to center / railway station. Large bright rooms. For our purpose it was a great choice for a friendly price. The owner was very helpful

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Nice view from the balcony

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: The check-in experience is really great. The room is bright and tidy, and the point is very big! There are supermarkets and various bars and restaurants nearby. The landlord is super good! The care for the guests is meticulous, but unfortunately I am a man, otherwise I may consider marrying him.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: We enjoyed the Jon's apartment, it is very spacious and very well located in Rotterdam. It is easy to walk to the city and there are also tram and metro stations in proximity. We saw beautiful sunsets from the balcony.  Jon was always fast to reply and was so helpfull. He was a very good host before and during our stay.  Just a negative point, some spots need to be cleaned. We had a nice stay in this apartment and recommand it !

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
We had a great stay at Jon's Place. Here are some points:
- very specious, large living room
- very clean
One thing to notice is that it what very bright in the morning, since the sheer was not working properly. But that's only a minor thing and I can recommend this location!

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Great apartment in a wonderful location. The place is in the whirlpool of old city and modern architecture, museums and parks. The area is multicultural and diverse, bright and beautiful. Jon is a wonderful host. He friendly supported our needs and was very helpful with recommendations. Can not recommend more

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: This was our first time in Rotterdam and Jon's flat was perfectly located for this visit with tram and metro around the corner and museums, bars and restaurants just a couple of minutes away. We also fully enjoyed the experience in a typical Dutch flat with its steep and narrow staircases, high ceilings, bright kitchen and comfy living room. At night it might get a little cold in the bedrooms in the attic, but Jon provided us with extra blankets. We will definitely return to Rotterdam and would be happy to stay in Jon's flat again.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Very happy with our stay here. The apartment is bright and spacious and in a good location for exploring the city. It was easy to find and Jon was helpful and got in touch to check everything was ok with our stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
A very quiet and cozy place close to the Rotterdam centraal, walking by 20 mins or taking metro for two stops.
The kitchen can definite add many points for the place because it is bright, clean, well-equipped, and with great view.
Moreover, the rooms are cute and also cosy.
Tough the stairs are really hardly climbed but the host described the situation clearly.
I will definitely visit there if I come back.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: It was an interesting experience to stay in a traditional Dutch house! The place is very spacious with large windows and a balcony. The bathroom was clean and very good. The kitchen was well-equipped. We were with two kids 5y.o. and 8y.o., for them the stairs were fine as well.  The place is located in a good neighborhood close to the public transport and the supermarket.  Jon was helpful and friendly.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: The accommodation matches the description, there is everything you need for a comfortable stay. There was a fully equipped kitchen , there were even filters for the coffee maker and tablets for the dishwasher. It is very convenient when you have settled in and you do not need to buy anything urgently for the household. There are shampoos and shower gels in the bathroom. The stairs are really very high, the owner warns about this.Located on a quiet street, there are supermarkets and restaurants nearby. The train station and the city center with lots of shops and restaurants are a 15-minute walk away. The owner was in touch, ready to help if necessary, but it was not required.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Beautiful spot no to far walk from Centraal where the shops and food are. Really enjoyed the space downstairs to chill with kitchen and living room. Nice balcony also for morning coffee

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: This was a very spacious two story apartment, up several flights of stairs, following a previous Airbnb also on the third floor. We came prepared, with two carryons each instead of a big suitcase. We are two  fairly fit 70 year old friends and my son and his wife in their 30s and we managed the stairs. The large living room and long counter modern kitchen with dishwasher and half bathroom are on the lower   floor. The upper floor has two bedrooms, a balcony with chairs, in which we dried clothes on the foldable drying rack included.   Both bathrooms look newly white tiled and the full bath has both a tub and shower. The neighborhood offers many multi ethnic restaurants and a live jazz club around the corner with music 7 days a week.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
This is a large flat with lots of light, a nice view and everything you need. The location is great and the area is very friendly and quiet.
As described by Jon, the flat is in need of some renovation works, but if you don’t mind the odd cracked tile or peeling off paint then this is a great place to stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
We had a good stay in Rotterdam at Jon's place. Communication was prompt and we didn't have much trouble.
The apartment was a bit old with squeaky noises and had steep Dutch stairs and some basic beds, but it was accurately described in the listing description. Hence, no complaints.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments:
We enjoyed our stay at Jon's apartment, it is very well located and many sights and the center were within walking distance, also the balcony offers a nice view. The apartment looks even bigger in real life than in the pictures.
The kitchen could be cleaner and unfortunately there were no tabs for the dishwasher during our stay.

name: Bright & Spacious 100 sqm Duplex with City Views
comments: Jon place was really nice, with two floors and a lot of space. It also has a large kitchen, which is a huge plus for groups of 3-4 people. It's a great space to hang out, cook and/or work. The bedrooms are also nice; one has a nice view and balcony. There are bathrooms on each floor, which is also quite handy. In terms of privacy and space, it's almost perfect. Location is also good, 15-20 min. walk to the center. Jon was very communicative throughout our stay, ready to help whenever we needed him. Overall it was a really nice and cozy experience for us.

name: Lovely Loft
comments: Diese Wohnung ist der Hammer! Top Lage, top Ausstattung, wunderschön eingerichtet (wie in den Bildern), ordentlich, sauber und das Highlight: der Whirlpool. Wir empfehlen jedem diese Wohnung und würden jeder Zeit wieder kommen.

name: Lovely Loft
comments: The apartment was exactly the same as on the site. We lived for almost three weeks. Everything was perfect: the decor, location, communication with the owners. The jacuzzi and the well-equipped kitchen were especially impressive. The apartment has climate control; sunny; the bedroom is quiet and the living room overlooks the busy street of Witte de Withstraat, which does not  disturb our rest. Everything is nearby - entertainment, museums, transport, supermarkets and stores. We definitely recommend it to everyone. Will surely come again. Best wishes, Lilia, Dmitry, Valeria

name: Lovely Loft
comments: Incredible location, central and easy check-in. There are flights of stairs, we are both cyclists and walk a lot but even when we got to the top of the stairs our legs ached, so be prepared for the stairs. The property is spacious, lovely light into the living room. The TV is dated and the hdmi cable didn't work for us.

name: Lovely Loft
comments:
Loved this apartment so much! Location was perfect - located on the main road of Rotterdam with lots of bars and restaurants. The apartment was beautiful and very spacious, equipped with all the amenities you need.
Only downside is that the apartment is quite loud as you are on a busy street, and also let’s a lot of light in in the mornings.

name: Lovely Loft
comments: Great location with plenty of bars and restaurants around, and the streets are closed to cars on weekend nights!  Fighting with the lock to get back in the building every time was a major pain though.  It can comfortably sleep 4 people, but you had better be comfortable with everyone because the bathroom has no door.  It's not truly one bedroom as the only thing separating the bedroom from the living room and kitchen is a partial wall, again, with no door.

name: Lovely Loft
comments: The flat itself is big and nice(except for beddings provided). Not recommended to light sleepers as it is above the “going-out” street.

name: Museum district with bars and restaurants
comments: The location is very good, you can enjoy the view of the whole floor, especially when you wake up in the morning, the sun shines all over the bedroom, which makes today more meaningful. What I love most is the heating in this winter season.

name: Museum district with bars and restaurants
comments: The house was super nice, only some things were not okay. The big heavy window was broken and when I opened it it almost fell on my head. If the window fell the other way it would fall on someone's head down on the terrace and kill the person. Also the button of the toilet was broken after one push, so we had to use the toilet of the restaurants downstairs. There was also blood in the matrass. Also the toilet smelt really bad, like it has not been used for a long time.  Normally I would not complain about this stuff, but the owners tried to give us the blame of all this, so that is why I am putting an honest review of the house on airbnb. That is why I also want to tell that next to those problems, the house was super nice and cozy. It had a nice location at a nice street in Rotterdam, the Witte de With street. Also the view on the street was nice and in the back you had the sleeping room where it was a lot less noise because there was a park at the back of the house. The neighbour called Bob was also really friendly and the communication between the owners before they put the blame on me was also really cool.

name: Museum district with bars and restaurants
comments: Thanks. Great location but given proximity to busy eating street it was a bit noisy till early hours. As it was hot we needed to have the windows open. Would be nice to have a hair dryer for my wife and a fan for the warm nights. The TV reception was poor so should be attended to.

name: Museum district with bars and restaurants
comments: Room with windows to the bar street is noisy in the evening, everything other is good enough.

name: Colourful appartment in a colourful neighbourhood
comments: Colorful house, clean, cozy and equipped with everything and more !!! Furnished with taste and genius! A few minutes by bike from the city center (parked outside on the street). Perfect stay !!

name: Colourful appartment in a colourful neighbourhood
comments: Centrally located to many different eateries, and within walking distance to the train station and downtown. The neighborhood is fairly lively with many on the street having a good time into the evening. Wouldn’t recommend if you’re looking for quiet, or want to be off the beaten path.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: So happy to meet leonieke & richard ! Everything was perfect and hope to stay their place next time ! Location, lake view and the apartment was really amazing, everything was proper and brand new ! Thank you again for making my first month in rotterdam comfortable & safe !

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: Great location and view.  Very comfortable and very kind hosts.  I would highly recommend.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: This is a stylish modern flat in a beautiful area of Rotterdam. Across the road is the beautiful Kralingen lake, which made my stay 1000x more wonderful. When you look out the window you can see the lake and sail boats, you can go for beautiful walks or go jogging. Normally there would be some nice places for f&b but I was here during corona lockdown- the beautiful location more than made up for it though:) I cycled to work 15 minutes into the city centre, but the metro is also super close, and shops cafes and restaurants around the corner. Last but not least, Leonieke and Richard are very friendly and welcoming hosts!

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: Clean, roomy, light, everything new. Feels very safe and everything on one floor (about 3 steps to get in to the apartment, but that's it). Welcoming hosts who were accommodating and friendly. Would highly recommend. Everything 5 stars. For one person the price is a bit steep but for a family or couple it's definitely a 5-star value! We will book again (and again)!

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments:
Love the setting watching the sailboats across the water on the Kralingse Plas. Quick walk to Albert Heijn and an 7 min walk to the number 7 tram and 9 minutes to the metro. Very quiet mostly residential neighborhood.
Very Responsive hosts.
Very Nicely stocked pantry drawer with even more than just the basil salt and oil: vinegars, assortment of spices, different flavors tea.
Only the 2nd time we’ve found some of the items in the welcome basket to be vegan. Had never before tried the now-renamed Ode Koek and found we like it a lot.
Enjoyed the deluxe double sink bathroom.
Very comfortable bed.
Novel central vacuum. Reason to stay here just on its own.
The one downside as I've become a light sleeper is that the bedroom is on the street side ground floor and intermittent traffic sometimes woke me in the early morning. But since the bed was comfortable it didn't matter too much.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments:
Fantastic Airbnb. Modern, comfortable, decorated with taste, and in very close proximity to a beautiful lake that is perfect for a morning run! Communication with the host was a breathe, very reactive and very kind.
Only downside we could find was that given it is street level, people passing by may look inside and you get some car noise day and night. Nothing too bad, but something to know.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: A beautiful, spacious, and elegant apartment, well equipped with a broad array of amenities. Comfortable, super clean, and well maintained by hosts who are quickly and cheerfully available. The neighborhood is now our favorite in Rotterdam. Great seafood restaurant, just five minutes walk, a local gem! Easy access to several beautiful parks, including the lake front park just across the road which offers lovely views from the front windows. the rear deck looks out on a very pretty informal garden. The shower was great. The washer and dryer, and central vacuum came in very handy. We hope to stay again.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments:
A nice apartment, with fantastic view on Kralingse Plas. The room is super clean with good amenities.
The host gives a lot of information around the apartment & Rotterdam, which is of great help!
Hope to live there again next time in Rotterdam.

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: Thanks to the accurate - and amazing - reviews, my only doubt before getting at this modern apartment was if I'd  be disturbed by those noisy scooters. I wasn't: the noise from the street referred to by Ivonne, Brice and Christopher wasn't an issue for us. What you see in the pictures is indeed what you get, but the high ceilings make it even more spacious. Also worth mentioning is the botanical garden just around the corner, open till October - my wife couldn't start her day without going through it. Not withstanding the excellent reviews, it really exceeded my expectations. And if you need anything,  the superhosts will be there for you!

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: Lovely and large apartment overviewing Kralingse lake and park. 7-12minutes to tram or metro and 5 min to Albert Hein grocery store. The hosts have been very friendly and responsive. Would stay again

name: Amazing location - Modern designer apartment
comments: Very nice unit with a beautiful park across the street.  Plenty of restaurants and shops within walking/biking distance.  I definitely enjoyed my time here and think you will too!

name: Spacious & private room, ensuite bathroom
comments: Jade is super kind and helpful. I enjoyed my stay. I had a lot of privacy but also help when I needed it

name: Spacious & private room, ensuite bathroom
comments:
A very nice family who bought us gifts, gave lots of recommendations and talked about everything possible - I felt like I was part of their family! The apartment was very clean, calm and we had lots of privacy upstairs!
Thank you very much!

name: Spacious & private room, ensuite bathroom
comments: Very comfortable and a welcoming family. Would recommend for those that want privacy and good conversation at the same time! Thank you for the wonderful stay.

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments:
Chantal's place is as charming as it looks in the pictures – and then some!
We really fell in love with it during our stay in Rotterdam and it was the perfect place to start the day with a nice coffee and to end it with relaxing in the bathtub or on the balcony, watching the setting sun over the city.
Chantal is very lovely and welcoming and provided us with any information we needed upon arrival.
We also loved the neighborhood with the beautiful Museumpark & Hetpark right around the corner and also we highly recommend checking out Lilith Coffee which is also only 10 minutes by foot and were we had some of the best breakfast ever.
We would definitively stay at Chantal's place again in a heartbeat!

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments: A spacious apartment in a quiet neighbourhood of Rotterdam. The place has a very "homey" feel to it and it is easy to make yourself comfortable here. The kitchen has just been renovated and with the organic grocery store right around the corner it is a great place to be able to cook yourself dinner (if that's important for you). There's a great view from the balcony, just make sure you can handle a lot of steep stairs to get to the apartment and view!

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments: We loved staying at Chantal’s place. There was loads of space, a lovely balcony and there were plenty of toys and nik naks to keep my 4 year old entertained!

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments:
Chantal's place was truly lovely. It had so much character and beauty. It's full of interesting art and wonderfully quirky touches. We love staying places that feel like a real home. The sunsets from the small deck were gorgeous. Everything we needed was available. Check in was easy. Wi-fi worked well as did the appliances we used. The bed in the main bedroom (the only one we used) was quite comfortable (and I'm fussy about beds). It was quite hot when we visited but with the windows open we were fine.
If you're from the US, note that windows in UK/EU seem to rarely have screens--we did get quite a few mosquito bites. Not the fault of the flat or owner, of course, just something to be aware of. There was a screen for one of the windows but where we're from in Scotland we rarely get such bites and so didn't think much of using the screen.
The only other thing to be aware of is the number and steepness of the stairs. Again, this isn't unique to Chantal's and is practically unavoidable in the Netherlands it seems. It wasn't a big deal, but we definitely held on to the, thankfully, sturdy railings when going up and down.
The flat was easy walking distance to the center of town and other areas we wanted to visit. It was close to a number of restaurants, markets, bars, public transport, etc.
We would, and likely will, stay again when we're in Rotterdam. A great place in a lovely city. Thank you, Chantal.

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments: We highly recommend staying in Chantal's apartment! It's a large, light, quirky place that made us feel at home. The neighborhood is great as well, there are a lot of really good restaurants just a couple of blocks away and the city center is only a 15-20 minute walk away. It was lovely to meet Chantal and she was easy to communicate with.

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments: This was my first time in Rotterdam and I was looking for a quiet, relaxing place that also allowed me to work, as this was a business trip. Chantal's place was a wonderful choice: I had the top floor to myself, with plenty of space, a workstation, a spacious and clean bathroom and a terrace balcony. I also had access to the kitchen and the living room and you could see Chantal's personal style everywhere, which made the place very cozy and welcoming. This was one of my top stays with Airbnb and Chantal was such a great host, very welcoming and helpful!

name: City center 1 floor appartment
comments: Really helpful host, especially loved sittingout on the balcony

name: Clean apartment in the best area of Rotterdam!
comments: We had a great stay in Ilse's apartment/ little house, which is only one street parallel to the Nieuwe Binnenweg. The place has a very nice covered terras with a lovely, almost poetic view on the church tower. It was clean enough to feel comfy and at home. The only internet acces we were able to use, was the one on the home Mac, there is/was no WiFi yet. Ilse was very helpful and flexible! We could recommend this place.

name: Cosy clean room in the best area of R'dam!
comments: Ilse is a very kind and friendly host, her home is comfortable, bright and clean. A typical dutch home. The location is convenient, 10 minutes walk from the Museumpark and 20 minutes walk from the Markthal. Easy check in - check out. I recommend staying at Ilse

name: Cosy clean room in the best area of R'dam!
comments:
Ilse and her flatmate were both really nice ! The room is great with a lot of light and in a really quiet area of Rotterdam.
I recommend !

name: Cosy clean room in the best area of R'dam!
comments:
I slept over Ilse's apartment for 2 days.
The house is a beautiful 2 levels apt, west to centre, 12 mins from cubic houses by tram, 30 mins walking. Living room, kitchen and balcony at first floor, 2 bedrooms and bathroom at the second. I slept actually in Ilse's room, which felt great as you can imagine the cure that she put into her own place. Soft king size mattress, bright room, clean and tidy.
if you have a car, Public park is rather expensive, but literally it takes 5 mins to reach a fully automated park station, which charges 13€ per day (basically 50% less than closer-to-center solutions or public ones).
Ilse, who usually lives there, was on holiday, but her house mate Zoë handled everything anyway, from A to Z. I really felt like going back to old good days of Airb&b, when hosting was the key asset, not simply renting. They made me feel simply at home, so I would definitely go back!
I suggest this solution to anybody who's looking for a cozy, not crazy area, close to centre, that provides that human touch which still matter while travelling!

name: 210M2  XL Loftstyle Dreamhouse in Rotterdam Centre
comments: I love to be in unique, creative spaces and Marco’s is amazing. Great location only one street over from delicious restaurants and an organic grocery store. The house has everything you need to cook and Marco is a great host.

name: 210M2  XL Loftstyle Dreamhouse in Rotterdam Centre
comments: This charming 3-floor Airbnb is an absolute dream! Each level is beautifully decorated with warm, inviting touches—think fluffy blankets, soft lighting, and adorable vintage details. The living area is perfect for relaxing, the kitchen is fully equipped, and the bedrooms feel like a cozy retreat. The top floor offers a lovely reading nook with stunning views. The location is peaceful yet close to local cafes and shops. The host was incredibly welcoming, leaving fresh pastries and helpful tips. Every corner of this home radiates comfort and charm—ideal for a relaxing getaway. 10/10 would stay again!

name: 210M2  XL Loftstyle Dreamhouse in Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Marco is very responsive and was very helpful when we were left needing an apartment at short notice. The apartment is huge and very bright. It has all the amenities that we needed for our 4 days there. Its close to transportation, shops and restaurants. We enjoyed our stay there.
It's not mentioned that the stairs going up to the apartment and between the 3 floors are very steep and narrow. Unfortunately my daughter did slip and hurt herself. It's a nice area but was on occasion noisy at night.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments:
In general, vacationing on a fully equipped ship in the heart of Holland is an amazing opportunity. But with Jeanette's listing, it's a not just a 'general opportunity': It's a once in a experience that cannot be missed. I stayed with Jeanette for a month and it was a month I'll never forget.
The ship itself is 80 feet long and situated next to a small barge that Jeanette has decorated beautifully with flowers, patio furniture, and other simple decorations that, for me, almost gave the illusion of being on your own little island in the heart of Rotterdam. You have your own outdoor sitting area at the bow which is also your entrance, as well as another sitting area on the roof. Both of which provide sensational views of the water, nearby bridge, and the stunning Calex Building - a surviving artifact of pre-war Rotterdam dubbed 'Europe's first skyscraper'. You'll also enjoy ducks and swans swimming in the water, the occasional boat sailing past, and a relaxing place to people watch.
Inside is two levels, with the entry level hosting a kitchen equipped with a mini fridge (that includes a freezer), stove top, a toaster-oven capable of temperatures reaching 250c, a coffee machine, espresso machine, and teapot. Jeanette has equipped the kitchen with an abundance of cutlery, plates, saucers, drinking glasses, wine glasses, mugs, and every type of cooking equipment and cooking utensils you could need. The living and kitchen area is completely surrounded by large windows (four of which can be partially opened) that will allow you to enjoy the views from the comfortable chairs and pull out couch. Climbing below deck on the quintessential steep ship stairs, is the bedroom, den, and washroom. It is on this level where Jeanette's hospitality and generosity is once again on full display, as she has provided an enormous amount of towels, wash clothes, and bedding - all tidily kept in the dens cupboard. This level is surrounded with portholes for windows, which can be opened once unscrewed, which serve as a charming reminder that this isn't merely a house boat, but was/is a fully functioning ship. Prior to booking I was concerned about how much light I would get in this area, however it proved no problem at all. On sunny days you get perfectly acceptable amounts of light, and on cloudy days the ample light fixtures more than makes up for it. The beds are comfortable, the washroom spacious and equipped with soaps, shampoo, and a hairdrier. Water pressure, hot water, and heating was never an issue. You won't have to worry about sea sickness either as the most you'll usually experience is a gentle sway, once or twice a day. Even on a windy day the movement was only occasional instead of perpetual, and rather than a disturbance, only added to the charm of being on the water. Wifi was perfect too.
The location couldn't be better either. The Martkhal, Cube Houses, Albert Heijn, hairdressers, restaurants, and the Blaak tram and subway station are all a short, simple, and scenic walk away. In addition to being centrally located, the area is safe and noise was never a bother.
You would be surprised how quickly you get adapted to living onboard - after a while it becomes like any other apartment. But the thrill of living on a ship never left me, and there was always something that reminded me of me current living arrangement and would promptly put a smile on my face. It's not just an airbnb or a place to stay: It's an entire experience. Regardless of how long you book, staying here - on a boat in Holland - will be something you'll never forget. But when you stay for a month like I did, it very much takes on a whole other, wonderful, experience.
Finally, Jeanette herself is a friendly, considerate, and prompt host who gives you lots of space and is always ready to offer advice, info, and provide assistance.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
