comments: Die Animathor ist ein herrliches Boot mitten im Rotterdamer Zentrum (wo es nachts manchmal ein bisschen hoch her geht ;-). Alles Rotterdam-Highlights (Markthalle etc.) sind fußläufig erreichbar. Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit und würden die Animathor uneingeschränkt weiterempfehlen.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: Great boat, clean, different Airbnb experience but there were was a lot of mosquitoes and lots of noise from the bars at night, which didnt let us sleep calmly. But it was great location and like the Photos.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: This boat was the perfect place to stay for the Rotterdam marathon weekend; close to the start/finish which was perfect for race day. It was also full of character and plenty large enough for 2-4 people as advertised. Jeanette was very responsive and helpful. The only drawback, as others have noted, was the noise from the bar across the street. This was not overly bothersome and would not stop me from recommending these accommodations to others.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments:
Just home from a wonderful week on Jeanette's boat.
Such a lovely experience!
Cosy and warm in the evening and when the sun shone you could sit up top and enjoy the views with a drink, it's picturesque.
Lots of nice bars and restaurants nearby and a Jumbo supermarket a few minutes walk.
We thoroughly enjoyed every minute.
Jeanette was super responsive if we needed her.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: Great location, with a terrific view of the old harbor and the White House.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: Nice central and unique place, as advertised.  Jeanette was always available but we also had fill privacy.  Full kitchen that we didn’t need and lots of ways to make coffee.  The heaters work (and we were likely the first of the year to need them).  Good shower and hot water.  Walking distance to lots.  Recommended!

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: We had such a great time and it was a lovely experience to stay on Jeanette’s houseboat. It was really charming and had everything we needed to have a comfy time. We mostly appreciated to have the possibility to start and end our day on deck while enjoying the sun and have a beautiful view of the city. Jeanette was really friendly, helpful and gave us a lot of tips how to explore Rotterdam. We would come back anytime!

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: what a great host! jeanette was very welcoming and very uncomplicated and relaxed. we liked the privacy even with staying on the same boat. just the nights are bit loud with several nightlocations around the block. but maybe it was also because auf the weekend and the finished exams of the teenies. thanks for everything - we highly recommend the stay for our friends in Berlin and around the world.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments:
Super location, we were able to walk to most of the attractions we visited from the boat. We also rented road bikes and kept them on board, the bike trail is right around the corner. Plenty of space for the two of us with each of us getting our own bedroom below deck and a nice sized shared space on the main deck. One of the cats is very friendly and will come right in if you leave the door open.
Jeanette met us at the gate right when we arrived and showed us how to get in the gate and the boat. She also gave us a tour of the space and tips on restaurants and the nearby neighborhoods.
The stairs to go below deck are quite steep, I found going down backwards easier than going down the normal way. Others have mentioned noise at night from the club next door, but we had no issues sleeping as it was fairly muted below deck. It can get warm as there is no AC, keeping the curtains closed helps and there are fans so you can open the windows for a breeze, just be aware of the mosquitoes.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: We had a wonderful time on the boat, the location is truly incredible (super convenient to visit Rotterdam and for day trips to The Hague and Delft). The boat is cute and neatly organised. The kitchen is small but well equipped. The views from the boat are lovely and Jeanette’s welcome was very warm. We strongly recommend staying there!

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments:
We loved our stay on Jeanette's houseboat. It is in a great location in the old Harbour with a view of the White House/Witte Huis, one of the few buildings in the centre to survive the WW2 bombings. It is really close to restaurants along the waterfront and easy walking distance of the cube houses and the Market Hall and just 20mins walk from the water bus to Kinderdjk.
We enjoyed sitting on the top deck in the evenings watching the sun go down and also enjoyed visits from the two cats.
Jeanette is a friendly host who really seems to have thought of everything for a comfortable visit. Our stay there was the perfect end to our visit in the Netherlands.

name: Boatapartment Animathor on top location (1-2p)
comments: Delightful place to stay, close to restaurants & local flavor.

name: Beletage
comments: We had a great stay. everything was as pictured, very clean and bright. comfortable bed and well equipped kitchen with coffee and tea even. Nathalie welcomed us personally. She was very friendly and gave us helpful tipps for our stay. We would always recommend staying at this place.

name: Beletage
comments:
Nathalie’s place is a good one, superb location. Everything is near (food shopping cafés...).
Her flat is as described, really good communication she answers fast.
The only « bad » thing is that in the bedroom there is no shutters so the morning light is a bit disturbing when you still want to sleep after 9 am. We french people are not use to no shutters in our bedrooms.
But I still recommend this place ! Thanks Nathalie

name: Beletage
comments: Such a bright and colorful AirBnB in an equally colorful and lively neighborhood with excellent public transport options. Had a great stay.

name: Beletage
comments:
Very nice Airbnb.
Very kind and helpful host.
The space is large, spacious, and well-designed.
The kitchen is well-equipped.
Drawback: 1h to walk to the city center. There's a tram stop right next to the Airbnb. However, trams are slightly difficult to manage if you are from outside of the Netherlands.

name: Beletage
comments: The apartment was lovely and spacious, airy, attractive decor, great sunlight.  Location was very convenient close to public transportation, restaurants, and supermarket.  Great location for Ahoy conference center.  Hosts were very responsive and accommodating.  Highly recommend.

name: Beletage
comments: The house Is spacious, but not easy to darken. There was a problem with the sink in the wc, not well reported. Very good equipment in the kitchen (coffee, sugar, dishes etc.). Parking in the street, in Rotterdam very expensive.

name: Beletage
comments:
Great spot overall! Very roomy with a super comfortable couch and a very nice bed. The hosts were very responsive to our messages and we had no trouble checking in.
The only downsides were that the bathroom sink was too small to shave or even brush your teeth, so we ended up ising the kitchen sink for that. The area was also a bit noisy, but we were there on a Friday night when there happened to be some sort of party down the street. Our second night was much more quiet and we had no trouble sleeping!

name: Beletage
comments: Nice and big place to stay. The apartment had everything you’d need to feel right at home. It was very spacious too. Bathroom set up was slightly strange but very manageable. The location was not central but very close to several bus and tram stations that could take you everywhere in Rotterdam. There was no AC so a little hot in the summer.

name: Beletage
comments: We had a great stay at the Beletage. Its cozy and fairly quiet, aside from some street noises which didn't bother us. Supermarket and public transportation are close by and the neighborhood has lots of local food options. Nathalie was friendly and quick to respond. Would definitely stay again!

name: Beletage
comments:
The apartment was just like the pictures, even bigger than we had expected it to be. It was clean and had all the amenities needed, we loved it! The bed was huge and comfortable. The location was perfect, with the tram station merely 1 minute away walking.
The neighborhood is nice, with lots of commerces and eating out areas. The only criticism we have is the fact that the bathroom sink was a bit too small so it was a bit hard to wash your hands or your face without water splashing all over. In addition to this, since the living room window is at street level there was only a small opening for air to come inside, which made the apartment quite hot. Although the weather was exceptionally warm, so it was probably more of a 1-time thing.
All in all we loved our stay! Will definitely be back!

name: Beletage
comments:
A spacious, comfortable flat in a busy multicultural area. Tiny shower room, but excellent shower.  Separate tiny toilet room - toilet didn't flush adequately and wooden seat a bit loose. Comfortable bed. There's a knack to opening the front door - pull the grid on the door towards you as you key in the number. We had a problem getting in at first - soon resolved.
Plenty of near eateries, mainly fast food, kebab type, fried chicken places though. There are no instructions in the flat for use of different kitchen equipment. (Helpful to have written instructions.)
Although the road outside is busy, the flat is set back, and the shops tend to shut about 6pm, so it's quite quiet. We did hear noise from the flat above (another let), and unfortunately on our last night, water started to come through the kitchen ceiling and splash onto the floor. However, it stopped quite soon - shower overflow? Although we didn't meet, Nathalie replied quickly to texts/phone calls and any problems.

name: luxurious apartment with garden near center
comments: Great little apartment in a quiet street but very convenient for visiting Rotterdam. Close to tram, metro and an easy cycle into the centre or to the beautiful lake in Kraalingen or Erasmus University. Comfortable bed, good communication. Thank you!

name: Space, comfort, not far from City, Stadium, Ahoy
comments: We had a great time at Han place. The apartment is super cosy and clean. Han is very friendly and helpful. We have been to a conference at the Ahoy, about 25min to walk, what we did. But there is also a bus nearby that takes you there. In the evenings we relaxed on the balcony and on the Sofa. I would surely book again with Han next time I come to Rotterdam.

name: Space, comfort, not far from City, Stadium, Ahoy
comments: Great cozy place and the host really cared about our wellbeing during our stay. We loved to finish every day of exploring Rotterdam by relaxing on the balcony.

name: Space, comfort, not far from City, Stadium, Ahoy
comments:
Myself and three guests rented out Han's place for 3 nights. The apartment in conveniently located near two tram stops for the number 20 and 25.
The property is lovely and cosy - beautifully furnished and very clean too. Our group felt immediately comfortable and were able to relax very quickly.
Han provided us with a tour of the house and information on the nearby facilities in map form (which was incredibly helpful with guiding us around).
We saw blackbirds on the wall of the balcony in the morning too which was very lovely!
I would recommend Han's place if you're looking for a relaxed and cosy space to relax in after busy days of exploring Rotterdam!

name: Space, comfort, not far from City, Stadium, Ahoy
comments:
Great hosts, helped me find local places to eat and relax.
Place looks just like the photos, super comfy living room and balcony to relax in the sun.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: Really enjoyed stay. The place is very well located, with great view over the marina, with great balcony and fish restaurant immediately below. And very handy for metro. Very well equipped, especially with state-of the-art electronics  / sound system. Very responsive hosts providing a lot of local insights. Would thoroughly recommend

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: The place is absolutely stunning with such fun/quirky details. It was the perfect backdrop for a couple of nights with friends in Rotterdam and is in a lively neighborhood with a great restaurant right next door. Things do quiet down early in the night so the street is peaceful/quiet for bedtime. Would highly recommend this place for anyone visiting the city.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: Exceeded all expectations.  Two children (11 and 13) slept in the loft space beds and loved the beds, describing them as just like sleeping at home.  They suggested writing a poor review to make sure it wasn't booked on our next stay in Rotterdam. We will definitely be back.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments:
I loved everything about this place! We visited as a family and our son loved the upstairs “treehouse” as he named it. He was excited to sleep up in his room every night! The kitchen is great for cooking simple meals while you stay and great morning coffee to help with the jet lag we were experiencing! The primary bedroom is large and bed is comfortable. The shower is great and there were plenty of extra towels & linens. There is also a washer/dryer combo to help you pack less.
What a unique place that goes from great party house to cozy family respite! Super close to public transit and very walkable. There was a Lidl just 3 minutes away. Loved the view of the canal from the deck and wished our trip was more relaxed so we’d have time to try out the hot tub or sit and enjoy a morning coffee. Next time!

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments:
Almost a 10
The apartment d’Ouwe Moer in Rotterdam did not disappoint: spacious with a dining living and open bar and kitchen area and well-furnished the apartment could be qualified by abundance. Abundance in good taste of the furnishings, art work, open bar (mostly gin and some empty bottles), lots of glasses, coffee mugs, silverware, kitchen utensils, hangers, towels. What surprised us was a lack of kitchen utensils: pots and pans. Aware most restaurants would be closed for Christmas we purchased to cook a Christmas dinner in the apartment and had to complete this with 2 frying pans which limited even the cooking of rice. The apartment further more counts with a nice view of a canal with yachts and a metro station at the corner.
The restaurant downstairs Kaat Mussels I think the name was is excellent while there are several restaurants close by. All in all, we enjoyed our stary to the max and would have rated this a 10 if not for the kitchen pots and pans.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments:
Had the pleasure of staying at this stunning location, and I must say, it's truly a work of art. From the moment I stepped foot inside, I was struck by the beautiful surroundings and the attention to detail that has gone into creating this masterpiece. The decor is exquisite, with intricate artwork and design elements that add to the overall ambiance. The space is filled with natural light, which perfectly highlights the stunning features and creates a sense of warmth and welcome.
But what truly sets this place apart is the sheer amount of things to do and explore. Whether you're interested in art, history, or simply enjoying a unique experience, there's something for everyone. Overall, I would highly recommend this location to anyone looking for a unique and memorable experience. Whether you're a local or just visiting, it's definitely worth a trip.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: A few nights stay here is a special treat. The accomodation was superb and the master bedroom was especially spacious and luxurious. A lovely balcony overlooks the harbour. Lounge kitchen and dining all were special and comfortable.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: We loved our stay here. The place is so beautifully decorated and thoughtfully designed. It has everything you need, is very comfortable, and there are a couple of great restaurants nearby. We could check in a bit early which was super helpful. It’s a quiet location but we liked that - so nice to have a drink on the balcony overlooking the harbour. Would definitely stay here again. It’s pricey, but worth it.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: We had a lovely stay at the pink house. It is a perfect location, right overlooking the water. There are plenty of restaurants, coffee, and things to do nearby. It is also very close to tram and metro stations which was very helpful. I love that it had a spacious balcony. And the kitchen was fabulous. I will say - if you are a chef, you may want to pick up a few bits and bobs for cooking. We were happy with what was provided, but if you're looking for a fully stocked chef's kitchen, you may need to assess before you do your grocery shopping. It was so nice having a good espresso machine as well. The furnishings were clean and very nice. The sun shower was such a highlight of the space. I would have liked larger towels but not that big of a deal at all. The space was perfect for our group of 4. We had one couple in the main bedroom and then two friends in the upstairs beds. We also crashed in the living room one night and it was spacious enough for all of us. 10/10 would book again!

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments: Great place to stay and enjoy Rotterdam. close enough to walk to the centre but far out enough for a quiet night on the balcony with a lovely waterside view. The space is great and has been decorated really well. Having the built in sound system was really cool. loved this place would come back again.

name: d'Ouwe Moer Apartment
comments:
We stayed here as a family (my wife and I with our two kids) and it was an amazing experience. The house has two bedrooms (one with ensuite bathroom), a very cozy living room, and a terrace with a view of the canal that’s perfect for evenings. The location is quiet but still within walking distance to the city centre.
Some unique things we noticed and really appreciated:
• Lots of dimmable lights in every room
• Great audio system with wireless connection in different rooms
• Big fridge with ice maker
• A disco ball!
• A urinal!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments:
The pictures of this apartment don't really do it justice, it's just absolutely beautiful and the view is the best thing about it. Getting up in the morning to so much light and the view of the ships passing by, the sky and all the buildings was an incredibly relaxing experience.
It's also very close to everything, supermarkets, tram station, parks, restaurants, etc. It's also equipped with everything you might need.
Communication was easy and fast and the check in as well was super nice.
I would definitively recommend anyone to stay here if they're visiting Rotterdam, you will not regret it.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Great bright and spacious flat with beautiful panoramic view. Enjoy stay here and see sunshines. Fully equipped, easy come by tram. Good supermarket at the same building. Thanks.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments:
A fantastic flat with incredible panoramic views of the harbour. It has all the facilities you could need, check-in and check-out were easy, and the whole place is as cool as the photos make it seem.
Only thing: if you don't like heights, I'd say it's not the place for you.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Lovely place, great views!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Amazing place, looks better than the pictures. Easy communication and great views of the city. Super modern and everything you could need. Thanks very much!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: The apartment is perfect! It is cult, it is full of art, with an amazing view!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Beautiful apartment about 20 mins from Rotterdam central by tram. Amazing view of the city and very convenient. The check in and out was very convenient, also Bram is very responsive and helpful. Would definitely recommend!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments:
A beautiful apartment, very clean and nice views all around.
All you need for a plesent stay.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Bram's place is terrific, we loved staying there. The view of the city and river are spectacular. It's super clean, convenient to trams and the metro, and has everything you will need for a great stay. One of our favorite nights after a day of sight seeing, was just picking up some stuff at the market in the building and staying in a making dinner...enjoying everything the apartment has to offer. Bram and Michiel are great communicators, and even had someone meet us to make sure we got settled in. I would highly recommend their apartment to anyone staying in Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments:
Apartment well decorated, gourmet kitchen equipped,
corner apartment with excellent front and side views,
Me on a business trip and my 11 year old son on vacation, we enjoyed it a lot.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: The place was very clean, with a great location and beautiful views of the harbour. A very comfortable place to relax after a day of roaming around the centre perfect for sunsets too 😍

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Our stay in Bram's apartment was amazing. The apartment is well decorated and feels very much like a home. The view from the 10th floor on the harbour was also very impressive.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Bram's apartment was amazing. It was clean, modern, and a really nice place to stay. There's a grocery store within three minutes walking distance which was very convenient. The view is incredible. If we ever visit Rotterdam again this will absolutely be the place we seek out to stay.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments:
Amazing apartment with a beautiful view. Very spacious and lovely place. Very clean and communication was great!
Definitely recommended

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: excellent apartment, better than described and stunning views!! would definitely stay here again!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Incredible view of the harbor, cozy space and transit options nearby - it’s a great option to choose if you’re planning on visiting Rotterdam.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Amazing place with views of the dock and a western sunset.

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Very good location, stunning view and helpful host:)

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: Stylish flat with a fantastic view in well connected location. Many thanks

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: We had a wonderful two-night stay in this stylish apartment. The space is beautifully decorated, especially the gallery wall in the hallway, which adds a unique and artistic touch. The views over the city and port are stunning, and the apartment had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. It’s located in a rather quiet area, yet close enough to the Euromast park, and the city center. Highly recommended if you’re looking for a place to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Luxurious Apartment | Modern Area | Skyline View
comments: We had a wonderful stay! The apartment is very spacious and beautifully set up, with an exceptional view over the harbour and the city of Rotterdam. The location is perfect for exploring different parts of the city, and having both a parking spot in the building and a supermarket right downstairs made everything very convenient. Communication was smooth and super quick throughout. We would definitely love to come back!

name: Stadswoning midden in Rotterdam!
comments:
The stay was fantastic. We were 3 colleagues travelling for work. We had three separate comfortable rooms in three separate floors and a spacy living room with a full working kitchen in a separate floor as well! (Four floors). It was very functional and provided our stay with space to work and spend time together and a chance to relax on our own as well.
It is a fully equipped family house and the family’s stuff is there. Personally I don’t mind, it feels more at home this way.
The location is wonderful. It is a quiet street but close to market and more busy street, super safe and in a walking distance to Erasmus Hospital and to a really nice streets with trendy bars.
It was a very lucky choice.

name: Stadswoning midden in Rotterdam!
comments:
Fantastic house, huge space, great kitchen, great neighbourhood.
Very close to all the highlights of Rotterdam. Definitely recommended!

name: Stadswoning midden in Rotterdam!
comments: We loved our stay in Rotterdam, this apartment is in a great location, less than 20 minutes walk from Central station and with a really lovely street of bars and restaurants around the corner, we walked everywhere and  it was perfect. Spacious apartment, was plenty of room for a family of 5 and we would recommend.

name: Stadswoning midden in Rotterdam!
comments: A perfect combination of a quiet street just two minutes away from a busy street full if restaurants and bars! Only a short walk away from parks and museums. Easy to park. just an amazing experience!

name: Stadswoning midden in Rotterdam!
comments: Family stay for two nights. This is a fantastic house. The location is perfect, close to the city centre, so loads to do and see, and very well linked by rail and tram. The house and street were quiet and we all had great sleeps on the comfy beds. We have two young boys and it was perfect for our stay.

name: City Center Loft Museum and Bars
comments: The property is located near the city center, very close to China town. So u don’t need to worry about the choices near by. The hosts are nice and responsive. Highly recommend. A few tips for those who are interested in this property. First, if u plan to stay in this property, like most of the properties in Rotterdam, they don’t have AC neither fans. Also, since the location is close to city center, particularly the side street is rich of tourist and nice restaurants. It might be slightly more noisy in the night time. Nevertheless, highly recommend this place.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: This is definitely one of the nicest 'city' Airbnbs I have stayed in. Some places are rather small and uncomfortable but this is a really good size for a one bedroom apartment and the furniture is also good and comfortable. And the view over the river is terrific. The apartment is in an interesting and picturesque part of Rotterdam and very easy to get to the main station by the Metro - just a few minutes. Highly recommended.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: The balcony where you can lounge and watch boats pass by even when there's a slight drizzle makes this an exceptional place to stay. It was clean, very spacious and tastefully decorated. Most of the central hotspots were just a few minutes walking away and for anything further out, there's always the water taxi. Well recommended.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Perfect place to explore rotterdam. The view from the apartment is great and so is the location. The check-in was also very smooth. Overall only good things to say about the place and host Jantine.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam. Jantine was very friendly, the communication was great and you will love the cosy terrace. What a view!

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Excellent view, great location, we enjoyed the stay throughly. About 10 minutes' walk to the central area, a nice parking garage right behind the building (about 21eur per 24 hours).

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments:
The apartment is beautiful, very well situated and has a nice balcony with a full view to the Maas river. It is a great apartment for a city trip to Rotterdam.
Jantine is a nice host and the communication with her was very good and the check-in and check-out went smoothly.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Incredible view of the Maas river.  Jantine’s apartment is in a great location —walking distance to Blaak station, Markethall, Maritime museum, and Erasmus bridge. Lovely small private patio overlooking the river. Good WiFi. Comfortable, clean, and quiet apartment. Large dining table that is very helpful to travelers. Clothes washer but no dryer. Bathroom shower is European style (no curtain).  Good Nespresso coffee machine.  We knew what to expect from the view, but were still impressed. Recommended.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments:
Jantine her apartment is in a fantastic location with the best view possible.
Nice apartment with all the nice things to see and do in Rotterdam close by.
My wife and me can highly recommend Jantine her apartment!!
Jantine is a friendly lady and it was easy to communicate with her.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Schöne Wohnung mit super Lage. Das Zentrum ist in wenigen Minuten zu Fuß zu erreichen. Das Highlight ist ganz klar der Balkon mit dem tollen Ausblick! definitiv zu empfehlen, wir kommen gerne wieder

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Jantine's place was a wonderful stay for my fiancee and I. Of course the lockdown in the Netherlands was not easy on us to be tourists but with Jantine's apartment it was great! The apartment has such an amazing view of Rotterdam, a great location and home like feel. The weather was a bit rainy for a few days so staying in was cozy with the living room to relax with a beautiful view!

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Great apartment with an amazing view, and walking distance to the city centre. I really enjoyed my stay, everything was perfect! Great communication with the host! Thanks a lot Jantine!

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Great location, great view! Pretty much anything you need for a stay in Rotterdam.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Great location near the Erasmus bridge. Metro nearby. Amazing view and Jantine is a wonderful host!

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments:
This was the perfect location for our trip, and dound everything thing we waited to see on foot.
the view is stunning and keep an eye out for the light shows on the bridge at night.

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: The view from this place is breathtaking! You can see the view from the patio, living room, kitchen and bedroom so no matter where you are you get to enjoy it! We loved hanging out in the patio! The bed is super comfy, the wifi is strong enough to work from with video calls. The kitchen had everything we needed! The living room was super cozy too if it was raining. I didn’t know how it would go with the shower having no curtain, but it was really easy to use and nice and warm. Very walkable and in a safe location. There is a paid parking garage just next to the building. Jantine was lovely too with communication. 10/10 would definitely stay here again!

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments: Warm and welcoming apartment with beautiful  river views of the Erasmusbrug bridge. I spent a couple of weeks here working from home and really enjoyed my time. Thanks Jantine for being a great and accommodating host! Hope to stay again for future trips to Rotterdam 🙂

name: Nice, comfortable apartment with the best view!
comments:
Jantine was a really nice host who welcomes us warmly :) Unfortunately, we had a train delay and arrived 2-3 hours later as we planned. Luckily, she was able to give us the keys directly and everything went smoothly afterwards
We really enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam 😊 the apartment has necessary kitchen equipment, a balcony and a big living room (together with the kitchen) to relax and enjoy the river view 👍🏽
Location of the flat: city centre, near metro station, not too long walk distance to centre with many restaurants

name: Rustig gelegen appartement dichtbij het centrum
comments:
Tyske place is beautiful and cozy.
The place is convenient with Metro and trams within 10min walk and plenty of Donkey republic and Lime bicycle around the area. The area has a Albert Heijn supermarket and cafe / bakery within 10min walk. The neighbourhood is quiet and peaceful.
The place is on ground floor so you don't need to be worried about carrying your luggage up flights of stairs. Her place is squeaky clean. She have a lovely and calm cat that will occasionally seek for a cuddle. The kitchen is a fully functional one where you can cook comfortably.
Her communication is super responsive and friendly. All her instruction were very clear and easy to follow. She provided a lot of information about Rotterdam touring guides which was really helpful.
My wife and I love the place so much that we end one of our Rotterdam visiting day earlier to enjoy her place.

name: Rustig gelegen appartement dichtbij het centrum
comments: Lovely and quant space outside of downtown. Neighborhood has a Suriname bbq spot across the street and more options a short spot to the main drag. Tyske’s cat was also very polite and friendly.

name: Rustig gelegen appartement dichtbij het centrum
comments: We had an amazing stay at Tyske's place! The house was super cozy, clean, and had all the utensils we needed. The owner was thoughtful and left clear instructions that made everything easy. A special highlight of our stay was the company of a cute and cuddly cat. We highly recommend this place for a comfortable and enjoyable stay!

name: Rustig gelegen appartement dichtbij het centrum
comments:
Tyske’s Airbnb is cosy, clean, and comfortable, nestled in a peaceful neighbourhood. I found almost nothing to complain about— which, as any German will tell you, is the highest praise one can give. 😉
Now, if I had to nitpick (and these are truly minor, personal preferences), the apartment is delightfully private, but that also means it reflects Tyske’s personality, filled with personal belongings. As someone who’s a bit shy and socially awkward, I occasionally felt like an intruder. Additionally, storage space was limited— be prepared to leave your clothes inside your suitcase or on the couch if all you bring is a backpack.
However, these are minuscule considerations that wouldn’t impact most guests. I wholeheartedly recommend Tyske’s Airbnb! You probably won't find a cosier retreat while exploring amazing Rotterdam.

name: Cosy '30's house near Rotterdam city centre
comments:
Mandy's place was very cosy and spacious, we had everything we needed for our stay. The location is pretty good, the place is near the tram stop and train station. The neighborhood is beautiful, a lot of parks and canals near by and it is also very safe.
The only unpleasant thing about our stay were the mosquitoes. There were a lot of them and we were woken up during the night because of them. It would have been nice to have mosquito nets at the windows, or an anti mosquito device in the house.
All in all, we loved our stay here and we will definitely come back next time we come to Rotterdam:)

name: Beautiful apartment + garden close to city centre
comments:
The hosts were very welcoming, helpful and comunicative. They also left us a pamphlet on Rotterdam with great tips and pointers.
The location was literally steps from the train station which was nice that we didn’t have to spend much on Uber or taxis. The area is very quiet as well which was nice at night time.
The place itself was just lovely. It was spotless, comfortable- especially with the jetted tub! It was cozy as well with many pillows and blanket and lights that could be dimmed. Bonus was the nice kitchen appliances and washer & dryer.
This place was so homey that it made me want to move to Rotterdam. Highly recommend!

name: Beautiful apartment + garden close to city centre
comments: Everything was just great. The apartment is less than a two-minute walk from the metro; it has everything you need and then some. The street is really quiet, and the bedroom is by the private garden, so you are guaranteed to have quiet nights. I think it's the first time that I can't even think of anything bad to say, not even the smallest. Highly recommended!

name: Beautiful apartment + garden close to city centre
comments: Absolutely loved our stay at Jozien’s house! It is located in a nice, quiet neighbourhood, close to a supermarket and park. There is a metro station at the top of the street which can take you straight to Rotterdam centre and The Hague. The house has a lovely garden and is super cosy and homely. We would highly recommend Jozien’s house to anyone looking to visit Rotterdam! 🫶❤️

name: Cosy & stylish small bedroom
comments: Lena and Philip are kind and welcoming hosts. The flat is as described and very clean and light. The kitchen is well equipped,we could use the appliances and the espresso machine as well. The flat is located in a lively neighborhood and we had no problem finding it. As usual, it is very convenient to go around by bike, but even with public transport there was no hazzle Going there. All in all it was a great experience to stay at Lena's place and I can recommend it thoroughly!

name: Cosy & stylish small bedroom
comments: Lena and Philipp are great hosts. Awesome hospitality, great communication and it was like feeling home. The house and room are fantastic, bright and always clean. Recommended!

name: Cosy & stylish small bedroom
comments:
Excellent place. Room was spacious and well decorated, with all you may need. Nice extra bonus is amazing sunset view from window. Nice and friendly host, who provided great information and tips.
Location is good, with shops, food and public transport in walking distance.
Recommend 👍

name: Cosy & stylish small bedroom
comments: Wir hatten bei Lena und Philipp eine ganz tolle Zeit! Die Wohnung bzw. das Stadthaus ist super schön, alles tiptop sauber, sehr modern, wunderschön eingerichtet und beide einfach unglaublich nett, total entspannt und flexibel. Mit der Buchung bei den beiden kann man wirklich gar nichts falsch machen. Das Bett ist gemütlich, drumherum gibt es lauter Möglichkeiten etwas zu essen, Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und mit dem Rad durch den Maastunnel ins Zentrum zu fahren ist auch ein Highlight. Fußweg zum Ahoy easy machbar. Klare Empfehlung! Danke für alles!

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: Ik heb tijdelijk in Simone’s airbnb gezeten omdat mijn eigen huis verbouwd werd. Onwijs leuk huis op een top locatie in centrum Rotterdam. Ik heb van mijn verblijf genoten:). De TV met ambilight en nieuwe keuken waren een bonus voor mij! Oh en een hele lekkere douche!

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: Great location, very nice view from both windows and a balcony. The apartment was supplied with everything what we needed.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
I had a very nice stay and felt very comfortable in Simone's appartement. It was so nice that I would love to come back one day. So I can recommend Simone as host very much. Next time I would bring a sleeping mask with me, because I am sensitive about light in the night.
Thank you very much!

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
The apartment was lovely and beautifully and thoughtfully decorated with a 100 degree tap, it is a wonderful and light space in an amazingly central location.
There was a few issues with our stay that I wanted to highlight and will hopefully be sorted by the time anyone else arrives:
The first was the check in - we were not given an exact address just a rough area which meant we were walking around for about 35 minutes trying to find the place. We were then met by Simon es partner who was great and showed us around. The apartment does smell a bit like damp but it is very airy so once we opened all the windows and got some through flow going it was a lot more pleasant.
The internet did not work. We tried connecting and when we did the internet was so slow and weak signalled that we couldn’t load anything. If the place is advertised as having Wi-Fi then we should be able to use it. This really did affect our stay as when we wanted to search about the local area or watch fils etc we just couldn’t.
The fridge/ freezer was not cold at all - it was room temperature and did not change when we tried to use the settings. Anytime we bought produce it would go off within a day.
The wall plugs felt very unsafe - they were coming out of the wall (on the right by the TV) and very loose - I wouldn’t want anyone to get a shock.
The TV remotes (except 1) don’t work. We tried swapping over the batteries but that still didn’t work.
The pillows on the bed incredibly uncomfortable and flat and there was no spares or and option for spares, this resulted in me and my partner getting sore necks.
The general stocking of the place was pretty low with not enough loo roll, the wash tablets for washing machine were low, only one hand soap (none in the toilet room), and a small drop of dishwashing soap and a dirty old sponge. It can be quite off putting.
One last thing is the light in the entrance hall at night. It is extremely bright and as there are windows in the doors to the apartment and the bedroom the room stays light all night which makes it hard to sleep in.
It was a really lovely light apartment and you couldn’t wish for a better location! All of these things are pretty easy to fix.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
I would highly recommend this to anyone staying in Rotterdam
I had a great stay at this property. Location is amazing: the area is full of restaurants, shops, supermarkets and everything you need during your stay. It is also close to public transportation and 10 min walk from Rotterdam Central Station.
The apartment itself is very nice. Its comfortable for 1-2 people, its fully equipped with everything I needed (including good wifi) and has lots of natural light.
Simone is also a great host. Everything worked just fine, the check in process was smooth, and she always made sure I had a good stay.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
The apartment itself is lovely. All amenities are there as described in the listing. The views are lovely. The apartment was clean and the host gave us a very warm personal welcome and checked in on us frequently to see if we needed anything and if everything was according to our wishes.
The location is amazing. The apartment is in a very central location with a supermarket and a busy shopping street within arms reach. Public transport is also very easily accessible, and you can get to any part of the city very quickly from the apartment.
Overall had a lovely stay, and would greatly recommend it to anyone looking for a home away from home when visiting Rotterdam.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
Simone's place looks like the pictures, and is beautifully located on the corner of the Rotterdam central market, near the Cool district with access to lots of restaurants and shopping. Comfortable furniture, convenient kitchen, and best of all extremely sunlit with windows and balcony on both sides, which when opened made the summer nights tolerable.
However being there in summer, it got a bit warm (over 30C) in the afternoons during the heatwave. The apartment is not equipped to handle this heat, with windows open or closed. There was no fan or AC, and leaving the windows open at night to cool it down let in several mosquitoes from the nearby canal that would bother us in our sleep. This is by no means Simone's (or the apartment's) fault, but it is something to keep in mind.
Simone's responsiveness was adequate, although there was some room for improvement at making the place more comfortable for folks like us who want to stay longer than a couple days.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
This was a very clear and uncluttered flat in a very central location. The WiFi and other services worked well. The bed was in good condition and comfortable. There is a modern kitchen and all that is provided works well.
It would benefit greatly from some more attention to detail however. it's not possible to use the draws in the wardrobe because the doors hit the bed before they are fully open. At night the light from the communal stairwell is on (and can't be turned off) and it floods the hall and bedroom in enough light to read by. There's nowhere in the shower to put toiletries, no can opener in the kitchen, we had to buy quite a few basics (salt, dishwasher tablets, olive oil, sugar, etc). The place has ben 'styled' very well - but less thought has been given to the basics that make for a comfortable stay.
The host is very considerate, and i'm sure can easily address these issues.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments:
The place is exactly as shown in the pictures: renovated, central, full of light and easy to use. Enough for two people to spend a couple of days in R'dam. Simone is also well acquainted with the area.
As we booked we reviewed the feedback from other users. Unfortunately, we just confirmed all of it. Under the bed we found a lot of dirt, the microwave was not cleaned, there were splashed mosquitos against the balcony walls, wifi did not work (as a solution we could use the network of a neighbouring apartment which was unstable), neither the TV nor the central heating (Simon's husband warned us about turning it too high, a joke?). The sleeping room is provided with a wardrobe that can barely be opened, same for the balcony doors as they hit against the bedframe. The night table is not provided with light nor a plug, so you must stand up every time you want to turn the room light off. There is also no plug in the bathroom. All small things that can be solved quickly.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: Our stay at our Airbnb in Rotterdam was fantastic. This is one of the best locations to explore the city as you are in the very centre with bars, terrasses, shops and entertainment literally on your doorstep. We loved the view and the light that the apartment has to offer. The apartment is spacious and comfortable and Simone was extremely helpful and accommodating to our needs. 10/10 we most certainly will come back.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: Very central location and a very bright & spacious apartment.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: Simone’s apartment was a great place to stay. Clean and with all the amenities you could need. Beautiful view from the windows of the river and great for people watching! Simone was helpful and easy to communicate with. The apartment is very centrally located so a little noisy at night but that didn’t bother us.

name: Apartment - Rotterdam City Centre - de Meent
comments: I stayed for two weeks to attend university. I picked this place due to the kitchen and washing machine. The washing machine had mold in the soap dispenser and did not work. There was a bucket under the kitchen sink to catch dripping water, and cooking was challenging due to no lids and thin dish towels. I locked myself out of the apartment, and since Simone was not nearby and had no hidden spare key, I had to spend the night at a Holiday Inn. Her husband met me the next day, noticed the patio doors open, and said they had the number of the neighbors below, so I could have used the first escape to get into Airbnb. They did not think of this,I had to stay in a hotel, which they did not offer to pay for, or at least half. This place is not equipped for an extended stay. This place is close to Meant and Blaak station, grocery store, and weekly market. The stairwell light shines into the apt hall way and bedroom.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: beautiful apartment with a wonderful view, the cat Lola is a love and very affectionate, we can't wait to return

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Sjoerdtjes place is amazing, very central and beautifully decorated. The view is spectacular at night and the cat Lola is just adorable. Definetly worth a visit.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments:
Wr enjoyed a fabulous weekend stay in this beautiful apartment. such an amazing view over the city, modern, clean & it felt so homely & relaxing too. Lola the cat was very welcoming too 😻 Location is very central too & in such s nice area.
definitely would choose to stay here again .

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Great host. She was very easy to get a hold of and I received almost immediate responses to my inquiries. The apartment is situated in a great area where there is access to public parking, restaurants and more. You also get a great view from the balcony. The only thing I would advise against is not having Lola (the cat) during your stay. I woke up every more to the cat scratching my feed and entered the home to an unpleasant odour coming from the cat’s litter box. Aside from that I had a good experience during my stay.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Astonishingly beautiful flat, great view, and fancy location. Smooth experience and good communication. Make sure to try out the e-scooters.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: It's an overall great place. Very tidy and cozy with a great view for an affordable price. Me and my friend had to spend most of the time indoors because of the rain but it still felt like a good getaway. Would recommend 💯%

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Fantastic place to stay, when visiting Rotterdam! I definitely recommend it, if you want to have an amazing view, nice apartment and have no problem with a cat.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Beautiful views and modern flat. Nice place for a few nights exploring Rotterdam. The bed was really comfortable and wide! Recommend getting the metro to hoek van Holland for a day at the beach :)

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Sjoerdtje loft was amazing it was gorgeous we are very thankful for staying there. She left her little cute cat around who is a bit to aggressive he has big claws but I loved taking care of Lola while I was there. What I didn’t appreciate is that Sjoerdtje lies where she said “ we broke a glass and put it in the closet” we are adults here and we did no such things and she knows that. Anything else she was a great host and had a beautiful loft tbh.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments:
We decided to do a last minute weekend trip to Rotterdam to destress. I saw Sjoerdtje’s place when I was already about to give up trying to find a nice accommodation for our stay. It is a gem to say the least. The house has a state of zen and a very charming personality. Added to that is Lola the cat who would occasionally rub his face against my ankle. I’m allergic to cats but he is a charmer and would not really bother you.
We brought our car and parked at the nearest P+R (Noorderhelling). We love to walk so we walked from the house to the center and back. The view during the walk especially at the bridge was gorgeous. There are lots of food places to choose from and even cafés for evening drinks around the area.
We couldn’t recommend this place enough!

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Its an amzing Loft with an perfekt View and very clean.  Its nice to have the cat around you, shes very sweet. There are a lot of good Restaurants near by. But the Kitchen also have everything you need.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: The city was great the room wasn't bad. the cat was a little destructive. The host is another story. I'd run far away tbh. I had air BNB remove my original review since apperently she has a additional 800$ cleaning fee even after tidying before we left.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Great apartment with an amazing view with 10 min walking to subway,  everything was amazing especially Lola :)

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: We are very lucky with this apartment! We spent a lot of time at home and often enjoyed the gorgeous view. the location of the apartment is excellent, we quickly got to the places we needed. the bed was also very comfortable, so we managed to get a great night's sleep on vacation. It's a pity, but this time there was no cat, maybe we'll see her next time! =)

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: Fantastic apartment ideal to relax after attending ASOT. Comfy bed and great views, you can even see the cruise liners coming and going! We would stay here again if available in the future! Easy to get to the metro 5-10 min walk and supermarket is close by too with lots of restaurants close by.

name: Beautiful, spacious, romantic loft with a view
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Sjoerdtje's place.  It was an ideal base for us in Rotterdam with the various places that we wished to visit.  Great views of Rotterdam from the apartment and especially enjoyed the wooden platform on the balcony to take my breakfast, over looking the tree tops and the Nieuwe Maas river.

name: The old milk factory
comments: Although miss jans is very welcoming and responsible, but to be honest, it is not a ideal place for tourists, and the renovated factory sounds fun yet is not so comfortable to live in, especially in winter——when the heat of the fireplace can not reach  the washroom. Without windows, it is also creating an unresting atmosphere in the large space.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
Zoals gewoonlijk hier weer een heerlijk verblijf gehad. Uitstekende communicatie, roken mogelijk op het terras en je mag zelfs je huisdier meenemen. Veel privacy en zeer vriendelijke ontvangst.
Het volgende verblijf is al weer gereserveerd.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
We loved the location. Make sure to bring a bike or longboard as the paths for bikes go everywhere.
The accommodation looked like on the pictures. It wasn’t clean enough for my standards tho. It’s a big place but having a window that could be opened would really help the air quality in there.
The host was super friendly and even searched for somethings we had left behind:)

name: The old milk factory
comments: Everything you need here including a little patio to sit out on. We had some trouble connecting devices to the TV so bear that in mind and also if you're a light sleeper the skylights in the bedrooms might wake you up. Would recommend overall as a place to stay

name: The old milk factory
comments:
Plusses:
place itself is nice.
The amount of the dishes, silverware, glases pots in the kitchen is huge :) like everything double or three times.
The dinnertable is huge as well, easily room for 8 people or more to sit at.
It's very spacious Room, no idea why it'snormally just for two people to rent, especially since beside the double bed in the sleeping room there is a two level bed in the living room as well.
Surroundings are quite.
Since I had booked with Pet I was happy to have easy access to green for the usual needs x).
Minuses:
The Place warms up and cools down very quickly depending on the weather, and has only a tiny openable Window. Was no issue for us, just for others to know.
Konversaition with the owner if not in dutch but also in general is not like what i have experienced in all the years of beeing at Airbnb's. According to how previous Hosts were positive I don't think it was my failure 😅. So accuracy of communication can be improved. But Lex is a nice Person.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
I enjoyed staying at Lex's place a lot. It was quirky and interesting, yet comfortable and *very* spacious!! He was around in the morning as I was leaving, and we had a good chat. He also gave me a tour of his fascinating facilities which was a real bonus!
The only point I'd improve on would be the bare fluorescent bedside light in the bedroom. A shade or barrier for this would be much better for bedtime reading and relaxing! 🙏 😊

name: The old milk factory
comments: Leonardus’s place is definitely a good bargain. Being very close to a bus station, it was easy for us to find the listing. The renovated milk factory has great lighting, for the bedroom and the main areas have windows on the ceilings. This listing also has a lot of kitchen utensils and a bathroom with proper water pressure. However, for internet addicts like us, I would imagine that this listing would be a little struggle due to the semi-existent wifi. We ended up doing some urgent internet tasks at the front yard and downloaded videos as much as we can when we had a good connection. This lack of access to entertainment was thankfully filled in by the lovely fireplace this listing has. Because of the rainy weather, we had the chance to enjoy the fireplace which Lex kindly taught us how to use. Lex, his daughter, and all the neighbors were all very kind people, always up for a nice chat.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
Pros:
- SO much kitchenware. You could organize a dinner for 50 and not run out of plates, cutlery, or glasses.
- Very spacious - could comfortably live 6 people.
- Provided lots of spices and oils, and even two cans of beer in the fridge.
- Good sunlight, except the bedroom has no windows.
Cons:
- Do NOT use any of the ovens. This wasn't indicated anywhere, but they're "broken" and you can only use the microwave and the stove. We did not know this, and used the microwave oven above the fridge which made the power go out. The host did not respond to Airbnb messages so we had to pay for a day of roaming in order to make a phone call. Note that the wall has an old phone number written down - we called and a lady answered saying she hasn't worked there in a year.
- Far away from public transit and bike rentals. Leaving on a Sunday, there were no busses available so we had to walk half an hour to the train station.
- Spotty wifi with outdated instructions.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
Place is just as described and as it can be seen in the photos. It is a bit old and has certain "old" smell. There are no windows in the bedroom and since it was really hot when I was there it felt really warm to sleep.
Location is close to the Feyenoord stadium which was important for me because I came to see Croatia-Holland football match. Connection to the city center is ok with a few bus stations in the vicinity.
I've used the place just to sleep over and to have the shower in the morning.
All in all great value for the price.

name: The old milk factory
comments:
Leonardus and his daughter Loreen are excellent hosts, very friendly and a lot of fun to chat with.
The apartment is spotlessly clean, very spacious and comfortable. It is an ideal place, especially for families with children. There is a bedroom with a double bed and in the living room there is also a bunk bed.
Our little daughter loved taking her first steps there.
It takes about half an hour to get to the center of Rotterdam by public transport, but you also have the opportunity to get to know the quieter and green side of Rotterdam.
Since there was a sudden cold snap, Loreen was so kind to light the fireplace for us. This made our stay really romantic.
We will definitely come back and recommend this place and hosts at the highest.

name: The old milk factory
comments: The apartment was great and exactly as described. It's not directly by downtown or oldtown  Rotterdam but they are easily accessible with bus/tram, which allowed us to enjoy the city without having to deal with noise at night. Lex was also very nice and attentive. Definitely recommend!

name: Style + Location = Perfect
comments:
Wi-Fi existed, but no internet. AC didn't turn on. One of the windows didn't close properly, so it was comparatively loud. There were no trash cans (or at least I couldn't find any). Water in the shower doesn't drain on its own, it requires using a squeegee (at least that's provided).
I sent a message to the host about these problems (via another messaging app using the provided phone number, which the host initially said he will accept messages to), but he never replied.
Definitely not what I expected for the price.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Beautiful spacious room with a lovely view. Everything you would need & expect for a bnb. Astrid was very friendly & welcoming. Really enjoyed our stay.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Lovely room with a nice view. Very cosy and stylish. Astrid is a very nice host, that can give you tips on Rotterdam.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Lovely apartment on a quiet & tree-lined street. Astrid decked out this room with everything a working traveler could want - coffee/tea, desk comfy chairs, and a great mattress. The evening light coming in from the balcony was lovely; private toilet and shower made me feel like I had the place to myself as well. Felt well taken care of the entire time. Would happily return!

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: My partner and I had a wonderful experience at Astrid’s place. The location is easy to get to from several different tram lines, and the metro is only 10 minutes away, too. The street is quiet and beautiful. We felt at ease in their home and would stay here again!

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: I had a great stay! The house is beautiful with (partly self-made) art. It is a relaxing place in lively Rotterdam. The room is clean and light and Astrid and Nico are amazingly friendly and welcoming hosts.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: We had an amazing stay at Astrid’s place. She has done everything to ensure you are comfortable as guests and provides everything you need for a relaxing stay. The balcony is absolutely stunning and a gorgeous place to have a morning coffee in the sun. We hope to be back soon!

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: We had a lovely stay at Astrid's place! The room and the house are absolutely beautiful and we enjoyed sitting out on the balcony. The house is in a very interesting part of Rotterdam with great restaurants and cafes nearby. Astrid gave us some very nice recommendations as well :) I would like to stay here again if I am ever back in Rotterdam.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments:
Astrid & Nico's home is very tastefully decorated, there is a private toilet and bath room, and I was free to use the kitchen. The room is very spacious with a lot of sunlight, nice for remote work.
Astrid is super helpful and friendly, takes care of the guests and also gives you space.
There is a bus stop right next to it, that brings you to city centre, very convenient location. Rotterdam west is multicultural area and have large variety of restaurants.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Great place. Astrid and Nico are great hosts! Friendly conversations and local accommodations were very helpful. Balcony is beautiful. Recommended.

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Absolutely loved my stay with Astrid and Nico! The room was spectacular and spacious, I really loved having this room and my own bathroom. Astrid and Nico were a delight as well, loved coming home and getting to chat with them. They were very generous and sweet hosts. 10/10 would come back!

name: Room with tree top view and private bathroom
comments: Lovely space, lovely hosts! Very responsive, warm, engaging, and also giving privacy. The bed stands out as so comfortable and cozy. Immediately you will feel at home here!

name: Comfy and modern apartment in the city centre
comments:
What an outstanding stay we had in this beautiful apartment. The location is absolutely perfect, walking distance from everything. Lovely bars just two minutes walk.
We arrived late due to weather and flights delays and as Wiwine was away she had her cousin check us in. Wiwine’s cousin kindly waited far later than the due check in time and was so lovely, friendly and welcoming. We arrived to find a bottle of wine, directions and maps of the city, house guidance and some little waffle snacks.
We would highly recommend staying in this beautiful home if visiting Rotterdam.

name: Comfy and modern apartment in the city centre
comments: Highly recommend! Perfect location, easy check-in and check-out. The bedroom and the living room offer a beautiful view of a canal, which you can see right from the bed or the couch. Staying at Wiwine's place was like staying at home. Fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, iron, nothing was missing. The apartment is also close (about 15min walk) to the main railway station, which is handy if you are traveling to Rotterdam by train.  Couldn't wish for more, everything was perfect 😊

name: Comfy and modern apartment in the city centre
comments: The apartment was in a great central location with lots to do nearby and convenient for transport. It was bright and airy and in a pretty setting by the water. Communication was super easy and quick and Indy was very friendly and flexible on check in. A great place to stay.

name: Comfy and modern apartment in the city centre
comments:
Wiwine’s place is wonderful. It’s without doubt one of the best places I’ve stayed throughout my years on Airbnb.
The location is just perfect. It’s walking distance to the Markthal, the amazing Cafes incl. Cafecito (super impressed by their Matcha), Ice cream shop De IJssalon (amazing pistachio) and ofc the metro. It’s also around the corner of the great farmer’s market, which is on Tue. and Sat., and right behind a super cozy elevated urban park. The huge north window provides a view of the canal and the bridge. In the quite morning time you could see the swans passing idly by around the parked boat. The equally beautiful south view through the patio gives you, over a perfect distance, a glance of the night life through well-lit street corner.
Thanks to this apartment I’m now in love with the life in Rotterdam and can’t wait to go back soon. Thank you again Wiwine and Indy!

name: Huge 300m2 river side design apartment
comments: Spacious, bright and attractive home. Perfectly located and extremely well equipped. Melle and Faiza are amazing hosts and I look forward to staying with them again soon

name: Central 50m2 river side Design studio apartment
comments: Great location, beautiful view, very cool apartment and great hosts.

name: Modern decorated house in Rotterdam
comments: This house has everything you need, but there are some challenges.  During the heatwave, we missed being able to open front windows on the ground floor for a breeze, the cement floor was very challenging to keep clean and there are many stains on walls and ceilings where there are water issues and active leaks.  With some work, we got the washing machine and dryer to work fairly well.  The kitchen is well stocked and the shower is lovely.  There is no car access in front of the property, which makes unloading difficult, but it's also very peaceful because of this.  The location is also far out from any sites and the city, which could be a plus or minus depending on what you're looking for.  It's fairly quiet and green for walks, with short distance to some public transport and shops, however, it takes a long ride to get to the center or Rotterdam and many transfers to visit other cities.

name: Cosy apartment with a nice garden.
comments:
Alon’s place is a residential area of Rotterdam. Clean and nice place!!
Parking on the street is free and it’s very close to the tram and bus. It’s very easy to get into central Rotterdam. He was very responsive when sending messages. I would def stay here again.

name: Cosy apartment with a nice garden.
comments:
Alon is a very kind and helpful host. He was very helpful with our little daughter, age 1, and prepared an extra bed.
His place is perfect for exploring not only Rotterdam, but also other cities like Den Haag or Amsterdam. The apartment is situated in a beautiful residential area with a little canal right across the street. It's a clean and very spacious place. On nice and sunny days you can enjoy the weather outside in the garden. Alon's place offers everything you need for your Rotterdam experience.

name: Whole apartment in Rotterdam. FREE parking!
comments:
The apartment was very bright, cosy and comfy.
The communication with Samantha was very good and she helped us with all our concerns. Many thanks!

name: Quite and spacious place in the heart of the city
comments:
Everything was perfect in Kim and Michiel’s apartment. The location is ideal, being few blocks away from the bustling city center and right near a great residential area with beautiful channel, where all kinds of birds are raising their offspring. The supermarket is also 5 min away. The residential complex, where apartment is located, is quite with very friendly neighbors, it’s a great vibe. Just outside is a pleasant lawn to have a quick picnic with friends.
The apartment itself had everything we could ever want. It is very spacious, has a lot of light coming from both sides, so the sun is coming in almost during the entire day. And when the sun is down, you can use the gigantic projector screen with great sound system for a cinema experience just in your airbnb, it’s great. Coffee machine, robot vacuum and playstation were also a great addition!
The workspace is impecable, we were working remotely and I’ve never been so productive
There is so much good I can write about the apartment, but the best part was how helpful and responsive our hosts were. They made our stay flawless and if we ever go back to beautiful Rotterdam, we will surely stay here again

name: Quite and spacious place in the heart of the city
comments: Absolutely the most organized hosts we have ever encountered! Before we even arrived, Kim and Michiel were helpful and communicative and remained so during and after our stay.  They arranged someone to greet us at the residence.  The apartment has everything you could ever want. We loved the work office, exercise room and balcony.  The apartment is beautifully decorated and comfortable.  They provide a thorough house manual and a things to do sheet that we referenced many times.  Sandra was also wonderful.  Everything about the home runs smoothly. The location could not be better!  We enjoyed seeing the swans hatch and all of the local interests are within walking distance. Our stay was a month long. We would love to return someday.  Thank you for the most wonderful experience we could imagine.

name: Apartment in centre of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment was perfect for my partner & I to stay whilst we were in Rotterdam! Amazing location, had everything we needed and was a really lovely space to be in - very clean and organised with great feng shui. Shirley was really helpful, giving recommendations of things to do and answering any questions we had promptly. She was flexible with check-in/check out and as our flight wasn't until the evening after checking out Shirley let us leave our bags there for the day and collect them before leaving for the airport in the evening which was really helpful! 100% recommend staying here if you're travelling to Rotterdam.

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments:
Beautiful historic apartment: spacious living room and kitchen/dinner room, bathroom with shower, and 2 bedrooms in the basement. The place looks marvelous, which really adds to the holiday feeling. We stayed here with our family of 4 (2 kids of 8 and 12 years old) and everyone felt at home.
The Delfshaven area is very nice, with many historic houses. Shops nearby, including a Jumbo supermarket, some restaurants, and lots of snack places, including the founding place of the 'Kapsalon' snack :). Metro is at 5 mins walk. In 10 minutes, you can reach the Watertaxi stop (booking your trip beforehand is necessary).

Only downside: it is a bit noisy, you hear quite some streetnoises. When in bed, you hear people on the ground floor above, and in the adjacent places, walking around. But hey: it's a city trip, not the countryside...
Communication with Art-Jan and co-host Michiel was fine. Overall, a great place to stay when you visit Rotterdam with family, as a couple, or with friends!

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments:
Spacious but did not feel as we are at home. If you like to live in a flat with old items then it will be a good option. Some cons: Furniture with bed linens were old. Only one additional blanket was available for four of us. Toileteries are limited. There was a smell seemed that the apartment was closed for a long period of time. Smell of dust with no ventilation especially in the celler. Lights are dim. Steep starirs to basement so it will be difficult if yiou have small children. Main door opens to main raod so lots of noise. And no parking on site.
Pros: Neat and clean bathroom, kitchen appliances were new. Opposite to small canal of water so you can walk and run.
Overall it costs more as compared to the place offered.

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments: It was a lovely flat, nice kitchen with lots of glasses, mugs etc, the area is really nice

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments: There is much to say here but clearly, this is no ‘Palace on a Canal.’  If advertised and priced properly I could be less negative.  It is on a canal but on an extremely trafficked, loud street.  It is no palace. No one greeted us (until day 3). The number on the lock box entry was wrong. The original ad was wrong.  It specified 1.5 baths, important for us with our teen-age grandchild; there was 1 bath.  We asked about the 1/2 bath. Managers did not call back immediately; instead changed the ad then said the ad never indicated 1.5 baths.  When told that Airbnb could retrieve the original ad they said a half a bath was not important and it’s meaning is not understood. After this dishonesty they were eager to please.  They would send someone to clean and provide clean linens toward the middle of the stay &upgraded the towels. The kitchen was not well equipped.  Two tiny cutting boards no ice trays in the freezer, no place to store food. Linens were scratchy.

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments:
This Rotterdam place has the charm of 20th century Rotterdam with of course modern conveniences.
On the canal is a beautiful setting and a great place to go jogging. High ceilings and large windows bring in lots of light and was great to relax in at the end of bust days. I would definitely stay here again.

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments:
The flat is beautifully decorated, with gorgeous art and furnishings. The kitchen / dining area is large with a lovely big table. The shower is great. Delfshaven itself is really nice and it's easy to get into the centre from there.
I think this flat would work well for a younger couple who want to be out a lot. We went with our two daughters (11 and 13) and, although their twin room was cosy, overall we did not find the the flat very comfortable to hang out in. The staircase is incredibly steep with very narrow steps. It's really quite musty downstairs with only a small window in the master bedroom (there is no window in the twin room). The noise from the road was very loud with the window open so we didn't sleep very well. I was also concerned about fire safety as there is no alternative exit from the basement.

name: Amazing palace along canal Rotterdam!
comments: We were met on arrival . loved the eclectic art and interior furniture. Good views of the canal. Plenty of room for the three of us, the main bed was comfy and the bathroom was clean and has a nice shower. The whole place was very clean. Easy to get to tram, bus and metro stops and you are a short walk to the old part of Delfshaven. The local American diner on the corner of the road is worth a visit. After booking and then reading the reviews about the stairs I was worried but they are fine for adults, the two single bedded room would not be my choice if I booked again, too small for my adult sons. Thanks for a lovely stay 😊

name: Beautiful design apartment in Katendrecht
comments: Bright, spacious and clean. Nice and quiet cosy neighbourhood. Great for leisure and business trips.

name: Beautiful design apartment in Katendrecht
comments:
Very nice appartment with a personal touch in a great location.
Groceries and public transport within walking distance (10 min.).
Quiet neighbourhood with cafés and great views.

name: Beautiful design apartment in Katendrecht
comments: The apartment is very unlighted, with beautiful and stylish design, and has everything you need for a comfortable stay in the flat. It has a very good sound and tv system, we really had an awesome stay in it. The area is quiet, and probably very nice outside of lockdown time. I totally recommend !

name: Beautiful design apartment in Katendrecht
comments: The place is as in the description and pictures. The flat is stylish in a quiet and great location. We found it very convenient to be nearby Fenix for drinks or Foodhallen... Also the views over Rotterdam from Katendrecht so nice!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie is such a friendly host and she has a lovely little dog. Her apartment is stunning and the room is very big with a cosy bed. The view is amazing - Euromast directly in front of you! I couldn't get over it and the sunrise was so beautiful :) I enjoyed my stay a lot and if I'll be back in Rotterdam, I'll stay with Jolie again. Highly recommended.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Fantastic view of the skyline, exactly what we hoped for. We also felt very welcome and at ease at Jolie’s place, almost like visiting a friend. She’s a great host!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: At Jolie s place, you’’ll be sleeping in a confortable bed, in a nice room with a superb panoramic view. The place is very clean and modern. Her company is very pleasant also and her dog too 😊

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: A large, airy room with a good view in a modern, tastefully decorated apartment. Accurate descpription in the listing and a very comfortable stay with a caring, smart host that was a pleasure to meet and have coffee with.
