An excellent Airbnb experience and would not hesitate to stay at Jolie’s place next time I visit Rotterdam!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: The bedroom and the apartment are spacious, clean, well-furnished, and full of light. It's just lovely and you can feel the care Jolie put in its design. The tram for the train station (15/20 min ride) stops nearby the building, and the supermarket is just downstairs. Jolie is a wonderful host. Together we had a good time, it was really a pleasure to stay there. Definitely recommended. Next time, I hope to meet Laika, too!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie is one of the friendliest and brightest hosts I‘ve ever met. On the first day, she welcomed us and even went downstairs to pick me and my friend up because we were too dumb to find the entrance to her flat. And her flat is just gorgeous and spotless. Everything is tidy and cozy, her taste in interior design can be found everywhere in small details. The guest room is big enough for the two of us, with an impressive view of the cityscape of Rotterdam. Location is also quite good, just a few minutes away from the tram station. We really enjoyed our stays there and will definitely book again if we ever come back to visit Rotterdam! Too bad we didn’t get to know her lovely dog, though.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Amazing city constantly evolving, stylish flat with stunning views, lovely and hospitable host... Excellent stay overall as these main ingredients came in perfect proportion and "à point" - definitely recommended !

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: a very nice private place, wonderful view over Rotterdam, food shop is around the corner and easy to get to city centreby tram, scooter.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Very clean appartment, kind and friendly hostess and adorable little Laika. Brilliant view!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Great and comfortable room with a fantastic view. The host (Jolie) is super nice and she made sure we had a comfortable stay

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Very happy with my stay at Jolie’s place. The apartment is just great, loved the design, the modern interior, but also coziness of it. Well, and the view off course. The bed was great, and it’s also really quiet in the room at night, so had a very nice sleep during my stay. Jolie is an amazing host and person, she creates a really comfortable and inviting ambience in the house. We had some great conversations, I’ll  miss that, and I obviously can’t recommend highly enough staying at Jolie’s apartment to anybody visiting Rotterdam!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: The loft is amazing and the view is superb!! Jolie is such a great host!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Great place with an amazing view!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Great place, beautiful view, kind host.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Very nice place ! a room with a view! to recommend

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments:
It was definitely my best Airbnb experience. Jolie is such a nice host and we had some of the best conversations I’ve had in a while.
The apartment is gorgeous, the views are breathtaking, and the location is very close to what you need (including public transport).
I’m looking forward for the next time I come here!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie was a great host. Beautiful apartment in a great location, with a great view. Wish I could have stayed longer.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: The house is very clean. The view out side the window is beautiful. Also the room is same as the picture. The host is really nice. I will like to stay there again!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Heldere afspraken en verwachtingen, een goed gesprek, een tot in perfectie georkestreerd huis, a room with a view. Tip: zorg dat je wakker bent vlak voor zonsopgang!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie is very kind and it is easy to get tram to Rotterdam stations. Very nice view of the room when sun set and sun rise.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie‘ place is a very nice loft in the city centre off Rotterdam an with a beautiful panoramic view. The communication about Check-In was perfect. During my time in Rotterdam Jolie was very welcoming, friendly and helpful all the time.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie is a very nice and accomodating host, the bed was very comfy and the room is awesome - as is the whole apartment. Being on the tenth floor gives you outstanding views of the city. The tram no 8 is right in front of the building, the metro only 8 min walk away. Jolie's sweet Dachshound Laika is an old lady already,  but absolutely adorable! We enjoyed our stay very much! Thank you Jolie

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: It was very Great to know jolie and her dog Laika .. we spent a very good time chatting upon my arrival . Her apartament was placed in a wonderful área with magnificent views and everything was very clean

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie is an excellent host - she is kind, accommodating, and thoughtfully prepared her space. The room is exactly as it appears in photos and it is very clean and comfortable, with a beautiful view of downtown Rotterdam. Joline was so kind, she even invited me to dine with her and her parents. Would highly recommend this stay and will be coming back to visit for sure :)

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Very beautiful place, the room is very nice and clean and has a stunning view. And Jolie is a very good host. I can recommend staying there.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Lovely place to stay. Friendly host, great view, comfortable bed, everything you need.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Great location, great views, great host! This room was perfect for my quick stay in Rotterdam - definitely recommend!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie‘s apartment is absolutely stunning, very spacious, so nicely furnished and decorated and immaculately clean. One of the best night sleeps I ever had in an Airbnb, super comfortable bed and breathtaking view over Rotterdam‘s skyline. Jolie is a wonderful host, would have loved to spend more time! 100% recommended.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: It was just the perfect place to stay in Rotterdam ! Jolie is such a kind host, and the apartment is really great with an amazing view ! I highly recommend it !

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Beautiful spacious and clean home, lovely and quiet and Jolie was very welcoming! Amazing view from the window too,  with lots of lovely places to eat close-by. Would recommend!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: The space Jolie offers is great! The beds are extremely comfortable, everything is clean and nice, and very homey. Jolie herself is super friendly and recommended us a bunch of nice places to go. Laika is adorable and doesn’t bark at all, very calm. The stay was amazing and the views from the room took this small trip to a 10/10 experience. Really grateful for having stayed with her 😊

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: I highly recommend staying at Jolie’s place. The place is beautiful and spacious, with a incredible view of the Rotterdam skyline. Jolie is very personable and helpful.. the perfect host. If given the opportunity I would absolutely book Jolie’s place again!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: I loved it! Views were so great and also a very nice stay in Rotterdam! Love to come back to this loft!!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments:
Jolie is an excellent AirBnB host. Her home is on the 10th floor in a location that gives you great views of the Rotterdam skyline and port. The views are so entertaining that you hate to leave the loft for other activities. The loft and access to the building are very secure. The neighborhood is quite safe with several good places to eat and a nearby grocery. Public transit access is close, just a few minutes walk from the building. Use Tram 8 to get to the city center and the central train station.
The guest room Jolie has prepared is large and comfortable. We felt very much at home in her home. We highly recommend staying with Jolie.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments:
Jolie is a nice host, she is super friendly and very flexible as long as you are reasonable. She is joyful, helpful and has a beautiful apartment with a great view.
Overall the best host we've had so far

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie's apartment is beautifully designed and tastefully furnished, with spectacular views of Rotterdam. Jolie is also very knowledgeable about the city/country, gave me many great tips and recommendations, helped me better understand the Dutch culture in general, and is overall a super interesting person to chat with!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Very good place to stay, beautiful view and easy access to transportation and stores. Jolie was very friendly and welcoming, she is a great host and I highly recommend her.  Would like to visit again.

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Beautiful, peaceful space. Nice cafes, close to public transportation. and immaculate. Beautiful view. Jolie is a kind, gentle spirit. I felt rested and happy! Lovely! Thank you!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments:
Jolie was a responsible host and did her best to make me feel at home.
Room is cute with a breathtaking view of the buildings.
Kitchen and bathroom was so helpful.
Thank you Jolie for everything ! 5 stars ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Jolie has a really nice and super clean apartment with an amazing view. Communication with her was great and very helpful. We enjoyed our stay!

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: The host Jolie is super friendly and caring person. Beautiful Apartment with a nice view . Everything is blingbling clean, super quiet at night for a good sleep. Coffee was prepared when I wake up the next morning, which I asked her the night before, she left a coffee capsule and a note with how the coffee machine works. Very delicate! 💜

name: Spacious private room in trendy loft
comments: Julie’s flat is a modern minimalist style, spacious and clean on the 10th floor. I spent 4 nights over a working days. Stunning views on both sides of the flat. Jolie was assertive and communicated well. Really enjoyed staying here!

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: I stayed here for two weeks for a business trip and from the check-in process to amenities to thoughtful touches the stay was delightful. The space is clean, stylish, and you can't beat the location if you want to explore the city! :-)

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments:
We had a wonderful stay at Onno’s and Rinske’s apartment. The location is perfect, next to the central station, supermarket, public transfer and the shopping street Lijnbaan. We felt like home in the spacious and clean apartment that is well equipped with everything you need for your stay. It’s cozy to sit on the winter garden style balcony and to watch the city lights when it’s getting dark outside.
Communication was very easy. Onno gave quick replies, was always friendly, helpful and really cared for us to have a comfortable stay. He also had some very good recommendations what to do and where to eat.
Host and apartment are highly recommended.

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: Just a short distance to central station and easy access to metro. Restaurants and shopping were  an easy walk. The space was certainly bright and had a great view.

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: The location of the apartment was great, and you could walk everywhere. Also the stlye and the little balcony of the accomodation was perfect for our weekendtrip. I can recommend it:)

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: Great location and view, you have everything you need around the place.

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments:
The location is amazing and the apartment as well! Super roomy and you have an amazing view. The kitchen is also very nice!
We would definitely come back!

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments:
I had a great stay for six months in this apartment. The flat is very nice and clean, large and fully equipped with everything you need for a longer stay -- and has great views over central Rotterdam. There is hardly a more central location you can find in Rotterdam with easy access to all services and amenities in the city.
Most of all, the hosts Onno and Rinske are great, ensuring that everything works properly and the tenant is happy with the apartment. And never before did I have hosts even inviting me for a drink upon check-out!
In summary, I can just highly recommend the hosts and this apartment for anyone planning a stay in Rotterdam. Thank you for the great stay!

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments:
It was great to stay at Onno and Rinske's place.
The central location, the wonderful view over de iconic Hofplein and Coolsingel and the ample facilities made it for us, as former residents of Rotterdam, a unique experience.
The interaction with Onno was very direct and pleasant, we hope to be back for a next annual visit!

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: Onno and Rinske's place feels like home. They are very responsive to any thing I ask them about. It's near the metro and a lot of nearby restaurants and shopping street. Hoping to get back here again.

name: Roomy city centre Apt with views
comments: I had a wonderful stay! The location is fantastic — very convenient to get around and surrounded by great restaurants and shops. The balcony was a lovely spot to relax, especially in the evenings. The house was clean, cozy, and very comfortable. The hosts were friendly and responsive, accomodated my extended stay. I definitely recommend this place and hope to visit again soon!

name: Unique Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 2
comments: Great location! Everything at walking distance. Beds are not great, but just OK. Bathroom nicely new but mirrorframe desintegrating from water. Stairs and walls really need to be painted. It let's the place down. Room on on top floor with view is lovely to relax. I split the cost with 3 friends which made it affordable, but would find it too expensive for what you get as a couple.

name: Unique Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 2
comments: Excellent stay. The cube house is very well equipped and was a pleasure to stay in. Location is great. I greatly enjoyed the design and the light coming in at different angles. Well worth the stairs!

name: Beautifull design home in the heart of R'dam
comments: We had a wonderful time at Silas‘ townhouse. The house is exactly as depicted, rather quiet and was amazing for our family. The bus stops right down the street for a quick way to get to town. The cute garden and spacious living area made for a fun and breezy time during the hot days we were there. There’s a playground right around the corner and a big store not far. We really enjoyed our stay and would stay again!

name: Cosy apartment in BEST area R'dam city centre!
comments: Great hospitality and perfect location. I highly recommend Gijs’ place for some quiet comfort as well as convenience, being close to the city centre. The check-in was very smooth and the space is very well equipped. All in all a delightful stay!

name: Cosy apartment in BEST area R'dam city centre!
comments:
The flat is in a perfect location less than 10 minutes walk from Markthal and Rotterdam Blaak. There are lots of shops and cafes right on your doorstep. The price is very good value. There is a good amount of space, fast wifi and two cute little balcony’s. Gijs’s was very efficient in replying to messages.
However it is a very long and very steep staircase up to the top floor. And the flat just needs updated and a tidy. Having a double bed with a duvet smaller than the bed and only one pillow was off. There was quite a lot of stuff that had been left in the flat belonging to the owner such as coats and toiletries and I had to clear the fridge out when I arrived.
A few things were broken like the front door buzzer and the handle out to the kitchen balcony.
With a big tidy up and some replacement furniture this would be an amazing flat. There is so much potential.

name: Cosy apartment in BEST area R'dam city centre!
comments:
Excellent apartment which was light, airy, very clean and well-equipped.
Location was superb for public transport and exploring on foot.
Good supermarkets within 3 minutes walk, and many good eateries within 5 mins.
Gijs was extremely helpful and we would happily stay again.
We stayed for 7 nights and the weather was good so we were mainly outdoors and included ferry trips out to Kinderdijk and Dordrecht but there are still loads of things we would like to see in Rotterdam.

name: Cosy apartment in BEST area R'dam city centre!
comments:
This was our second trip to Rotterdam for a short vacation. It's a wonderful city and a stone's throw from Delft and Gouda.
Our communications with Gijs were excellent. He was prompt, friendly and helpful.
The accommodation was excellent, and more than enough for two of us. There were many faculties (washing machine, coffee makers, hi-fi/TV) but we didn't need most of them. We certainly did not lack anything that we might have expected. The accommodation was cosy and clean.
The location was excellent: very close to the magnificent market, waterfront, and cube-houses. There were two supermarkets within 100m or so, and we were literally next door to an excellent French restaurant (Pierre's) where we ate three times. There were many other restaurants close by.
We were delighted with the accommodation and would recommend it without hesitation. We would certainly be happy to return. Our only regret was that we never managed to meet Gijs while we were there (he was on vacation) .

name: Cosy apartment in BEST area R'dam city centre!
comments:
We recently had a pleasure of stying at a Gijs’s apartment and it was a great experience. From start to finish, Gijs went above and beyond to ensure our stay was comfortable. Great attention to details, communication with Gijs was excellent. Comfortable to stay with child.
Convenient location surrounded by restaurants, cafes and shops. Despite the central location, the apartment was quiet.
Apartment is beautiful and very cozy.
A lot of facilities like coffee makers, TV, HiFi, baby cot. Kitchen is full-equipped and everything is in good condition.
We were delighted with our stay and strongly recommend Gijs’s apartment.

name: Luxurious Central Studio in Monumental Warehouse
comments: Great host, Bas knows the city backwards and all of his recommendations were top notch. The apartment is super clean and really well thought out, and the bathroom a particularly pleasant place to be. You literally step out onto the street and you’re in one of the most beautiful parts of Rotterdam, a city full of surprises! Don’t hesitate to state here when you’re in town

name: Luxurious Central Studio in Monumental Warehouse
comments: Geweldig mooie kamer! Wij zijn ontzettend warm en enthousiast ontvangen. Veel tips gekregen met high lights en lekkere restaurantjes. De studio zag er ontzettend mooi uit en we hebben hier op en top genoten! Dikke duim voor de host en we raden dit iedereen zeker aan!

name: Luxurious Central Studio in Monumental Warehouse
comments: This was our second stay here, we returned as we really liked the space & location is great for doing the local attractions. Walking to Europark & over the bridge to the south were highlights, as was our trip in a water taxi & it’s very close to catch the ferry to Kinderdijk. Highly recommend this place 👍

name: Luxurious Central Studio in Monumental Warehouse
comments:
The apartment is new, clean and cozy.
The only problem is that it is on the road and you need to keep the curtains closed all time and in that way the room is quite dark. However, the room is well isolated from street noise and cold.

name: Blaak Appartment
comments: I was so lucky to be able to stay at Melanie’s place. Honestly, it had far exceeded my expectations ~ from the interior design, overall atmosphere, the size of the space, lovely views outside the window, beautiful balcony….you name it. This place has everything one may need. The kitchen is very well equipped and the bed in the bedroom is very comfy too. The location couldn’t be more central. You have two subway stations nearby, tons of shops, restaurants, bars, all within 5 min walking distance. It’s is extremely convenient, peaceful and fun at the same time! Above all, Melany is just a very sweet and accommodating person. She was always responsive and helpful, plus she allowed me to leave later on the day of my check out, for which I am very grateful! I highly recommend Melanie’s place, you’ll love it!

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments: Ik heb een comfortabel verblijf gehad in Ellen’s appartement. Je hebt hier alles wat je nodig hebt. Ook light het huis vlakbij winkels, restaurants, en supermarkten, wat fijn is.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments:
We had a great week at Ellen's place while we were waiting to move into an apartment. We especially appreciated being able to relax and watch some TV on a big, comfortable sofa after a long day.
The internet connection was very fast, which was important because I was working during the days, and taking lots of video calls.
The neighbourhood was really nice, with a park just down the street and decent access to the tram and metro. A supermarket and a number of shops and restaurants/takeaways are all close by.
We were really dumb and one night ended up locking ourselves out. We called Ellen and she showed up within 20 minutes and quickly sorted us out. She was very nice about it and never complained. (Even the neighbours were nice and offered to let us wait inside!)
I always think it's how people react when something goes wrong that is a true judge of a person, and clearly in the rare case you might end up having a problem Ellen is the type of host that you would want. She's very kind and sincere and helpful, and very knowledgeable regarding things in the neighbourhood and what was going on in the city.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments: Ellen is a great host. Her home is JUST lovely and the neighborhood is beyond that. Quite, a peaceful, beautiful landscape. You can easily go for a walk while watching the duck on the river nearby the home. The home is far bigger than a standard Airbnb home. Normally Airbnb houses are smaller than what they look like in the photos, Ellen's house is the vice versa: it is bigger than it is seen in the photos. Comfortable bed, very sunny rooms, a lovely designed saloon, kitchen full of coffee, foods, drinks. Very nice bathroom all included. And it is only like 10-15 mins to the very central of Rotterdam. Although I stay a lot at Airbnb houses, it may be the first time that I personally wanted to write a review, cause I really really liked this home and Ellen. Hope to come and stay here again.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments: Great place , very comfortable bed , close to everything and a beautiful park across the street.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments: Ellen was very responsive and easy to communicate with.  The view from her modern Living room is lovely as it faces a canal and a park.  I was visiting family who live very close to Ellen’s house.  Public transport is easily accessible and we used it daily.  Overall, it was a very good experience.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments:
Ellen's apartment is situated on one side of beautiful park on a terraced road with a view road overlooking the park and lake. There are plenty of local amenities within 5 minutes walk including restaurants, cafes, a small supermarket, bars etc.
The apartment is spacious tastefully furnished with plenty of natural light and a well equipped kitchen The 2 bedrooms ( 1 double 1 single) were very clean and comfortable although a little more provision for hanging clothes would have been appreciated. My friend and I were in Rotterdam for the 3 day Jazz festival and were staying for a week and I don't believe we could picked anywhere better. The location is only a couple of stops from Rotterdam Central with frequent metro trains which also went directly to the festival venue - a real, result. Ellen is a warm and generous host with an abundance of local knowledge especially of the live music scene around the city. I will definitely try to book with her again.
Thanks very much Ellen.

name: Nice apartment 100m2,  ideally located
comments: We had a great time. Ellen kept in touch from the moment we booked her apartment and very promptly answered any question we might have or even offered suggestions for our visit  to Rotterdam. The living room had a great view of the small canal and park in front. The neighbourhood is quiet and beautiful. Metro station is just a 10 minute walk, so very easy to  get around. Thanks Ellen!

name: Modern, Spacious Home with Charm Close to Ahoy
comments: We spend 3 days on Michiel's place and we had an amazing time. The appartament it's very cozy, big and clean. You can easily find a parking place on the street, the price it's 1,75 euro per hour. Michiel is a very friendly host and he can help you with everything you need. I really recommend the place.

name: Modern, Spacious Home with Charm Close to Ahoy
comments:
Third Airbnb in a row during our Dutch Hollidays, this comment reflects our true and (as far as possible) honest thoughts.
Pros: - easy communication with Michiel (who is not the owner of the flat, only the "intendant")
- flexible hours of arriving.
- big rooms
Cons: - Not very dirty (except the rotten bread on the kitchen's closet !!!), but not clean either (even if we have paid an extra 50 € fee for "Covid Cleaning")
- the neighborood is not very pleasant. (dirty streets, weed smokers across the street, drunk "hobbo" @ the supermakt next to the house,...)
- but most of all, you can feel that all the house is not maintained ! ("automatic" curtains broked, no microwave owen, rusty cloth clamp,....)
At the end, you pay for what you get: the price is quite cheap for such a space, but on the other hand you're not in the most beautyfull area and the flat could be nicer !

name: Modern, Spacious Home with Charm Close to Ahoy
comments:
The accommodation is at most 10mins walk to Maashaven metro. Alternatively, there's a tram stop nearby that takes you to Maashaven metro in a minute.
Not much in the neighbourhood, but there's a small supermarket nearby.
Do take note the entrance to the apartment has a flight of narrow stairs, and to the bedrooms as well. Heavy/multiple luggage will be a bit of a challenge.

name: Modern, Spacious Home with Charm Close to Ahoy
comments: Lovely stay,  very responsive host, peaceful location near various shops and services. Self check in was provided, due to a late check in caused by a flight delay. Comfortable spacious home.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Fun experience, great location and views. Will definitely be staying again!

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: This is an amazing and unique place. If you are adventurous, this is the place for you. The views from the terrace are amazing. The location is perfect. And I appreciated the work that they do. I will never forget staying at this place!

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
The penthouse was amazing ! Penthouse Prison offers you a perfect immersion as an inmate, with prison cells as bedrooms. As a guest, you have access to a bathroom with a toilet seat and a sink - beware that it is a prison type toilet seat so it might be a strange feeling for the first couple of times -, a bathroom with a shower and a sink - this one is slightly hard to use (still prison like shower) but you'll learn the technique pretty fast-, a small living room in a prison cell, a kitchen (not a prison cell) which contains a fridge (no freezer though), a dishwasher and furniture, keep in mind there is a single stove but no oven/microwave. Finally you have a beautiful view on Rotterdam with a huge terrace that you share with the people that work on the levels under the B&B (you'll live on the 4th floor, don't do too much noise, people are working beneath you!)
I'll put a 9.5/10 rating for this B&B, nearly 10/10 except the toilet seat was not really clean, but it did a beautiful job. I love this Airbnb and will probably come again !

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: We loved our stay at the penthouse prison and it was so fun surprising our parents. They will be bragging about it for years to come! The highlight, however, were the people working at the cafe. Everyone was so friendly and it was such an uplifting environment!

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
First off, the location can’t be beat. Second, you get 4 private rooms. A roof top terrace (do not forget to prop open with a brick!).
Here’s what I didn’t know: none of the rooms has any windows. In fact, no windows in the entire penthouse prison. The cell block consists of 6 cells (4 bedrooms, 1 hangout room, one toilet). If you’re claustrophobic, scroll on. In order to see what the weather is like, you need to leave the penthouse prison and enter the communal kitchen.
The shower? You need to press a button continuously to get lukewarm water. Both my boys thought that this was a cool experience.
The heating system? An enigma.
How come no one mentioned the foosball table - you cannot beat that! We laughed, cried, sweated, swore. Ten stars.
The graffiti doodles everywhere?Awesome! The vibe? Definitely cool.
So, if you’re adventurous, no frills, and not a germaphobe, you’ll love this place, as we did. Perfect for friends traveling, or parents with teenagers

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
Great place to spend a night - central location, amazing host.
The only negative thing - a bit hot inside. Top floor, no windows to open. But they put a fans inside so it helps a bit.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Sehr zentrale und außergewöhnliche Unterkunft. Die Dachterrasse mit Blick über Rotterdam ist ein echtes Highlight. Sehr nette und bemühte Mitarbeiter, die auch nach dem offiziellen Check-Inn noch hilfreich zur Verfügung standen. Wir haben uns auf unserer Holland-Radtour wohl gefühlt. Die Dusche könnte gerne mal modernisiert werden.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
We were all given a free drink in the cafe downstairs due to some issue which held up getting in but only by 20 minutes or so. but when we did, I had to clean the shower which had a huge clump of hair and post googling.. is suffering badly from 'drain-flies', and the master bedroom was strune with discarded contact lenses. I think a step up on the cleaning and some fly tackling would really help as the shower is a small challenge in itself!
But that all said guests aren't perfect either! (I broke a glass by accident), and everyone at the cafe was so friendly, helpful and welcoming.
The concept and good cause behind the Penthouse is undeniably brilliant though. The location is perfect too for the train, metro, tram and bus network and is so central that walking most places is achievable with little effort.
The cells are great fun, beds comfortable and the rooftop garden more than makes up for the lack of windows. The table football got some good use as well!
Overall 5* from me

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Das Prison Penthouse liegt sehr zentral. Für wenige Nächte ist es eine tolle Attraktion mit viel Flair. Man sollte wissen, dass die Küche und auch die Dachterasse von allen genutzt werden kann. Ein Highlight ist sicherlich der Tischkicker und der tolle Ausblick von der Dachterasse.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Me and 3 of my friends stayed in the penthouse prison and we loved it. Amazing views of Rotterdam from the terrace and many games on the football table. Our only pain point was the shower situation where you have to hold a button for water. I think an improvement on the shower could really boost this stay.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Heel sympathiek sociaal project en hoewel de penthouse prison misschien niet de gezelligste plek is om te vertoeven (het blijft een ex-gevangenis) is het zeker een unieke ervaring. Het is ook echt een centrale toplocatie. Het Heilige Boontjes-café beneden is ook een leuke plek om te hangen of te ontbijten. Naar prijs-kwaliteit toe hadden we het gevoel dat het een beetje naar de dure kant ging. Vooral de douche is wel toe aan wat verbetering, met niet echt warm water en een knop die je heel de tijd ingedrukt moet houden (zoals op een camping). Ook enkel goed voor mensen die elkaar goed kennen, want er is maar één toilet met een deur die niet op slot kan en er is sws niet echt veel privacy in de prison zelf.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: Very quirky place to stay with a couple of friends for a couple of nights. Great location.  As mentioned shower could be better and the it could see a mop a little more often. Also there was dripping noises coming from radiant panels inside a couple of the cells which made it a bit difficult to sleep.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
A group of 5 of us for a 50th Birthday and the football - absolutely perfect and a wonderful experience!! The prison was a perfect balance between originality but comfort with the heating/lighting/nice shower/comfy beds!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ would recommend to anyone considering

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
Wonderful social project, and unique experience. Comfortable beds, fun fuzzball table, and amazing rooftop patio.
Friendly staff and, cafe options were delicious.
The atrium windows did make the sleeping areas (inside the jail portion) quick hot by mid afternoon and through the evening and first half of the night.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: A unique penthouse in the heart of the city. It was a special experience to stay in a former prison. The roof terrace is a highlight of the penthouse and you can pick up breakfast directly from the café downstairs.

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments:
Unfortunately, i would not recommend this option for a stay in summer : the heat inside the apartment was unbearable.
On the plus side the location is extremely convenient to everywhere in Rotterdam, and the rooftop view is spectacular!

name: PENTHOUSE PRISON (in) THE HEART OF ROTTERDAM
comments: great location, great rooftop, basic kitchen. but yes: it's sleeping in prison cells without windows or air condition...

name: Groot appartement in historisch Oud-Charlois
comments: What a beautiful apartment! Really lovely to stay in, comfortable beds, excellent amenities. Being able to sit out on the balcony was amazing. But it's equally great inside,  wait I fully presented with stylish design touches. Joni is an incredible host, so informative, kind and helpful. I couldn't recommend this place or its host enough!

name: Groot appartement in historisch Oud-Charlois
comments: Joni’s apartment was a perfect choice for our stay in Rotterdam. The apartment has a nice and positive atmosphere with lots of lovely details and daylight. It was a good place to recover after a long day and lots of walking around in Rotterdam. The communication with Joni was very friendly and easy. Would definitely stay there again. Thanks a lot to Joni!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Stylish apartment with a great view and a very hospitable and friendly host that would quickly help you with anything!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Conmunication is perfect. Location is a little outside the city center but great connections to the city. The appartment has everything you need, is very clean and has an awesome view of the port area and the Maas river. Would recommend.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The view was breath taking. The place was super clean and a cool layout. Immediately felt at home. The best part about the property was Antonio! The dude was quick at responses and his guide book was super helpful. Just an absolutely wonderful guy!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Modern, industrial loft with an awesome view. Had a great time!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We had a really nice stay at Antonios Appartement. We could find everthing we needed and the view is amazing! Also the communication was super nice and instant. The tram is directly at the building, so it was easy to go to the Center or elsewhere! I would really recommend a stay at this nice Appartement :)

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: This apartment is amazing. Clean,  fully equipped,  and beautifully decorated with a great view. Public transportation and everything else you need is close by. Antonio was helpful and very easy to communicate with. A great place to stay in a great City :)

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Amazing appartement!! Antonio was very friendly and helpful. He always responded very fast, if we had any questions. Also he gave us some tips for locations to go to in rotterdam. The pictures of the appartement can't compete with the real view. It is breathtaking. We arrived with car. The parking is compared to Germany costly. Overall we went everywhere by foot or by car. By foot it took us around 30-40 minutes to go to the most locations. But if you want to be faster, the metro is probably better. Overall we had a great time and the appartement is very cheap compared to what you get. Highly recommend it!!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
We had a great vacation in the Netherlands. The apartment was really nice and the view was stunning. Everything was very clean.
The parking is very costly arround the apartmen building in comparison to Germany.
Antonio was really nice and answered all of our questions very fast! Overall I highly recommend the apartment!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Our trip was amazing! The view out of the apartment, the apartment itself and the city was very good.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The view out of both sides of the apartment are outstanding. Really nice outlook on the city from a stylish apparent block. Nice neighbourhood to explore with AH at the ground level, a cool cafe also opposite the main entrance,  and good links to public transport. Had a great stay!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Everything was perfect. The view is amazing and the location also great. It was nice week in this loft. Thank you

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: super nice place, incredible view and very easy host

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Beautiful apartment with an extraordinary view! The communication with Antonio was simple and fluid and he answered at instance all our questions.
We had a great time!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Lovely apartment with an amazing view. It was very clean and Antonio was super helpful all the time.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: 100% recommend! The loft is exactly as described with phenomenal views over the city including the Euromast and Erasmus Bridge. Had everything we needed, clean and comfy, and Antonio provided excellent communication and flexibility

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
We had a lovely few days in Rotterdam 😊 Antonio was a very friendly host, who gave us a lot of info beforehand which was super helpful in finding the appartment, what to do in Rotterdam etc. The appartment was a really fun location for a few day, the view was amazing! 🌼
Next time we would probably come by train, since we payed quite a bit for parking - but that's just up to preference :)

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Very cosy. Great view. Supermarket is very convenient.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We stayed for 4 nights at the loft. Amazing design, clean, incredible view!Antonio was very sweet and provided a hair dryer. In exchange we left 2 wine glasses in the kitchen because there were none ;) the only thing missing was a balcony or the possible to wide open the living room windows. We were a little afraid to try. But nevertheless we highly recommend this place and would come back anytime!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Incredible appartment with a beautiful view. Everything was perfect, from the super confortable bed to every convenience in and out of the appartment.
Antonio is a really kind guest ready to answer to every question and helps you having the best moment possible in Rotterdam.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Everything was perfect. The apartment has an amazing view over the Rotterdam Skyline and the harbour. Antonio was a very obliging host and answered super quick to all of our questions. The apartment is located in an amazing housing complex, that was even mentioned in out Architectual Guide of Rotterdam. All in all a wonderful stay.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: This was breathtaking! I didn’t want to leave this apartment and the amazing riverside view. Everything was super comfy and parking and grocery shopping right in the building made our stay even better. Thank you so much.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Amazing loft with an amazing view. Just perfect for a couple 🥰

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The stay in Antonios appartement was outstanding ! From that place you can easily reach all important areas in the city either by tram, by water taxi or by foot. The appartement is super cool and equipped really with everything you might need. The look out of the windows is breathtaking and mirrors the vibrant city. And whatever you need - Antonio is available to help !!!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: A stunning, spotless and secure apartment, featuring panoramic views with magical sunsets, and in prime position on the water’s edge - just a short stroll from historic Delfshaven and a quick, hassle-free hop into the city centre by metro or tram, or a speedy water taxi across to Hotel New York. Antonio the host was fast and flawless on comms beforehand, brilliant and better in person, and went above and beyond when we took the liberty of asking advice on something he could have perfectly reasonably ignored. Rotterdam is truly awesome and we’ll be back for sure - fingers crossed this place is available when we do; you’d be hard pushed to find somewhere better.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Super closer to public transportation. beautiful view.
grocery store and drag show in the building which was amazing.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
awesome flat
the view is breath taking

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We stayed for almost a week at Antonio’s and by the end it almost felt like home - the apartment and the view are beautiful. You can walk almost everywhere in Rotterdam but there’s also a cable car and a metro stop right around the corner. And if you want to use the kitchen there is a AH supermarket downstairs which is super convenient :) a small heads up: we didn’t manage to get the oven to work but other than that the kitchen has everything you need for you to enjoy home made meal with a view :)

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio's Loft is amazing, located in a great area by the harbour. The view is fantastic.
It is also very quiet, very peaceful. You don't hear a single noise from the neighbors with is much appreciated. Communication with Antonio was perfect.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The view, the location, the amenities, and the fast WiFi were all ideal for our stay! Antonio is a great host and makes everything easy. The apartment building is next to a supermarket and walkable distance to historic Delfshaven and Het Park/Euromast. It’s also right on a tram line and a water taxi dock. I think the clean, comfortable apartment and having the beautiful view made us enjoy Rotterdam even more than we expected.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio's apartment is well located near the city center. The view is incredible, there's parking via Q-Parking and also a supermarket in the house. Watertaxi, Tram and Metro are only a few minutes away. Communication with Antonio was very friendly, helpful and fast. He gives a lot of information around the city and doesn't hesitate to answer any question. We had a wonderful time and would definitely stay here again! 5+ Stars!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Cosy apartment with a stunning view. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Nice stay in Antonio's apartment.  I really liked the soft bed and the view from the window. The location of the apartment was also very convenient, there was a direct tram to the railway station. The only thing we would recommend to improve is the oven. We were going to reheat the pizza, but the oven didn’t work, we didn’t notice this in the apartment description. Everything else was very good 👍

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Great Apartment with view over the water, really nice. Host answered quickly, always helpful and friendly. Good connecten to public transport.
We slept really well each night!
The guestbook was very helpful, but the explanation how to get from the garage to the apartment could be intensified :- )
I would revommend it to my friends and come back! :- )

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Our trip to Rotterdam was extremely nice, especially because of Antonio's apartment. We stayed for five nights.
Because of the coziness and the incredible view, you don't get the feeling of 'missing out' when you are just relaxing in the apartment. I think this is the best feature of the apartment – you always have the city right in front of you, and that makes you motivated to explore it.
Another great aspect is that it is very central. We rented bikes to be more flexible and to be able to see as much of the city as possible, and we never drove more than 15 minutes to any location.
We are really looking forward to our next visit. Thank you, Antonio!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: My friends from Costa Rica enjoyed their stay to the fullest. The appartment with stunning view and space made them feel home away from home. With a supermarket downstairs that can be reached through te elevator and easy access to nearby public transport ticks all the boxes you need. Antonio and his cleaning staff are very responsive and aimed at full service. This is how every AIRBNB experience should be. Thank you Antonio on behalf of your guests from Costa Rica

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Great place to stay! Antonio was very responsive and friendly - he even provided a guidebook of things to do in Rotterdam.  The apartment has a beautiful view of the water and was very clean. We loved having the washer since we had been traveling for a few days. Would definitely recommend this place to friends and family.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The apartment was really clean and had a beautiful view. Antonio was a great host. I would definitely recommend this Airbnb.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We stayed at Antonio's apartment for four nights, five days in Rotterdam. It was absolutely perfect and even better than the photos. We chose this location due to its great reviews of the view, central location and they were spot on. The apartment here contributed to an amazing festive weekend in the Netherlands. The space was clean, minimalistic yet quirky, and perfect for our weekend getaway. It was near the tram route into central which was so convenient, a supermarket underneath and also an amazing local Dutch pub right next door that was so cosy with great food. A genuine 10/10 experience and the apartment contributed to this Christmas trip. Antonio was responsive and helpful and we can't thank you enough for letting us experience this lovely, quirky apartment. Thank you!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: I stayed almost 2 weeks at Antonio’s place and would have loved to stay longer. Perfect location to reach everything, store and restaurants close by, unbelievable amazing view. Beyond that Antonio was extremely accommodating with an early checking and a little later check out. I will be back!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We had a lovely stay at Antonio‘s apartment! Nice location, very cozy bed and of course a stunning view. Communication was fast and easy as well

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
host was lovely throughout we were delayed so
didn’t get there til 23.30 but host was more than understanding when needed to unlock front door. place was beautiful and clean, views was amazing. really lovely and kind communication throughout will definitely be staying again another time 😄

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Great apartment and a great host!
Antonio is a friendly and caring guy, he was always very attentively. The apartment has a great view on both sides and gave us an heartwarming Welcome.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Fantastic Airbnb experience! Stunning views, seamless check-in, and a delightful surprise from the host. Perfectly situated in Rotterdam with a convenient supermarket right in the building. Couldn't ask for more – a five-star stay!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: beautiful place with a friendly Host, the view was the gem of the location and is really something else, Antonio is a very friendly and respectful Host, would definitely Book again a great experience in a unique location!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Highly recommended! We had a fabulous stay at Antonio,s fantastic loft. It was quiet and in a great location. The views were fantastic and the loft had all of the needed amenities. Fabulous restaurants. If you like Italian, Andiamo’s a couple of streets over is worth seeking out. It was the cherry on the cake of our stay. We would definitely stay again if we were ever in Rotterdam!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio’s place is absolutely perfect. Easy to access via the tram or water taxi. The view from the living room can’t be beat. I was sad to leave as I quickly fell in love with this home and Rotterdam.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio is a great host, the communication was very good!
His appartement and especially the view is amazing. It's well located for a few days in Rotterdam. Anytime again!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Quite possibly the best Airbnb I've stayed in.
The flat is clean, quiet, spacious and comfortable with fantastic views of the port on one side and the city centre on the other.
Tram stop on the main road and a metro station ten minutes walk away take you to the centre in ~15 minutes but Delfshaven and as far as Erasmusbrug are walkable too.
Antonio is an excellent host - proactive communication, friendly and with lots of local recommendations, and was flexible with check-in and out to match my travel plans and circumstances.
5 stars!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Revisiting my hometown of Rotterdam after 3 years to reunite with loved ones was made even more memorable thanks to my stay in this beautiful apartment. It offers breathtaking views of Holland's skies above the busy river. Also the walks along the riverside were simply delightful.
Antonio was a warm and friendly host. His clear communication and attentiveness to our needs ensured we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay, and his proactive approach in sharing directions and recommendations was greatly appreciated.
We look forward to returning.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio had the apartment just like the photos and welcomed us with some wonderful sweets.
The area is perfect and the view from the apartment is incredible.
It was a luxury to enjoy a few days in Rotterdam and stay at Antonio's house.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio's loft is great: cool decor, well-equipped kitchen, comfortable bed and fantastic view.
Antonio is a perfect host who communicates lightning fast and makes you feel really welcome. Thank you very much!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: I stayed at Antonio  place for a few days and I felt amazing. excellent location with a great view. the house looks exactly like in the pictures and is quite clean. Communication with Antonio was super pleasant. I recommend and will definitely return. Thank you

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We had an amazing stay at Antonio’s private flat in Rotterdam! The views from the unit were gorgeous and the available amenities made us feel right at home. Would definitely recommend both for the comfort and location as it was very easy to get around on public transport.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Really nice flat with a wonderful view

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio was very, very helpfoul and always reachabe. Before we arrived he sent me details of appartmant and some usefull tips for first time in Rotterdam.
Appartmant is ideal for a couple visiting Rotterdam. It has beutifull view from "living room". Especialy at night a view to Rotterdam harbor is great. In same building as appartment is a parking garage if you come with car which is super convinient (and cost 12,5€ per day). Garage has a lot chargers for electric cars and parking spaces are big enough also for big SUVs.
In building is also supermarket Albert Heijn wich work from 8h-22h every day.
Appartment is fully equiped. Dish washer, washing machine, fully equiped kitchen. Appartment is on 11th floor so there is no street noice. If I return to Rotterdam I will search for Antonio again!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio’s place was beautiful. The view was beautiful and it was convenient to the supermarket and restaurants. With a fully kitchen and space to unpack, it felt like home. Antonio was also a super responsive host.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: I can only agree with the other reviews! Very good location, supermarket and puplic transportation is nearby. Antonio was very nice and communicative.I can recommend this Airbnb!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We had a great time in Rotterdam. The apartment and its view was amazing! Antonio recommeded great restaurants to us. Communication was super easy. Thanks a lot, Antonio!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio was very friendly and accommodating. His place was very convenient and wheelchair accessible. It is above a parking garage and a grocery store. The view is magnificent.  We enjoyed our stay.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Nestled in one of Rotterdam's most coveted neighborhoods, Antonio's apartment stands as a testament to sophisticated city living. This exceptional residence offers breathtaking dual-aspect views of Rotterdam's iconic skyline, treating residents to both stunning sunrise and sunset vistas across the city's architectural masterpieces. The prime location provides seamless access to world-class amenities, excellent public transport connections, and a vibrant cultural scene that epitomizes the city's dynamic spirit.
The building itself is a testament to community living at its finest, fostering a warm and welcoming atmosphere where neighbors truly become friends. The diverse, international community of professionals and families creates an enriching living environment that perfectly represents Rotterdam's cosmopolitan character. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the living spaces with natural light.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Our stay in Antonio’s loft was great. Very nice loft on the 11th floor with a wonderful view. Supermarket on the ground floor very convenient. Close to tramstop for line nr 8 into the city centre.
Lots of nice things to do in Rotterdam: splashtour, diner on the Euromast, museum 40-45 and also the pinballmuseum is a lot of fun.
Communication with Antonio was very easy. We recommend staying here!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Excellent stay in Rotterdam, a stunning and unique apartment with a beautiful, open view, tastefully decorated, very clean, and hosted by a highly responsive and welcoming host with a great sense of hospitality.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio is a wonderful host. He is very informative and outgoing. The view of the harbor is amazing.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Antonio’s apartment in Rotterdam is wonderful!!
The view over the harbor is simply fantastic and especially enjoyable with a glass of red wine and Sade’s “Smooth Operator” playing softly in the evening background.
The apartment was very clean and perfectly well-equipped for a short trip, providing everything we needed to feel comfortable.
Antonio is a fantastic host: friendly, helpful, and quick to respond whenever we had questions or needed recommendations.
We genuinely enjoyed our stay and would gladly come back!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Characterful apartment with an industrial loft feel and impressive harbour views. Great security, you have to pass through two automatic locked doors before you even reach the front door of the apartment. Friendly neighbours happy to chat and offer advice.  Good rapid tram service to town centre and main rail station, just tap in and out on board with your credit card. Rotterdam has an excellent range of modern art galleries.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: A perfect location with an amazing view

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Such a lovely stay at Rotterdam. We enjoyed the waterfront, the sunset views and the locality. Antonio was so warm and welcoming through his communication, welcome note, and general care through our stay. The house is well equipped and centrally located too. Highly recommended!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: It was really a pleasure to stay at Antonio’s place it was comfortable and the view is great ! A parking is available in the building for 12€/ day it really is a great spot to enjoy Rotterdam

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio was a thoughtful and responsive host. The unit was modern and clean and had a great view! We would definitely stay here again.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: This was a unique AirB&B. It had easy access to bike lanes and transit. It was a short walk to Het Park. The view from the living room was entertaining with boats moving on De Nieuwe Maas and soccer matches below. The convenience of the grocery store on the ground floor was really appreciated.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
Unser Aufenthalt in Antonios Apartment in Rotterdam war absolut perfekt und hat unsere Erwartungen übertroffen!
Das Apartment selbst ist wunderschön eingerichtet und bietet alles, was man für einen komfortablen Aufenthalt benötigt. Es war makellos sauber bei unserer Ankunft, was wir sehr geschätzt haben. Die Ausstattung ist topmodern und vollständig, es fehlte uns an nichts.
Das absolute Highlight war die unglaubliche Aussicht aus dem Wohnzimmer. Wir konnten uns kaum sattsehen an dem Panorama – einfach atemberaubend!
Antonio war zudem ein hervorragender Gastgeber, immer erreichbar und hilfsbereit.
Wir können Antonios Apartment uneingeschränkt weiterempfehlen und würden jederzeit wiederkommen! Vielen Dank für diesen unvergesslichen Aufenthalt!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Great stay - and it really is a brilliant view. The flat is just as described, very quiet, comfortable furnishings, with everything we needed and in a good location. Only note is that in summer the flat can get quite hot - we were advised not to open the big windows fully, like the other flats in the block, and on windy days they were very hard to open at all. Antonio said the building management is aware of this. But we felt perfectly safe to leave the front door open, as neighbours were doing, when we were at home. Aside from that, a really good stay, and good value.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments:
I would stay here anyday, if for no other reason than the view of the ships and water. A grocery store is on the ground level, which was so convenient. Walking along the river and through the nearby park were beautiful activities.
Just a note, in case you are sensitive to warmth or a light sleeper--everything worked well except openingthe windows, which meant the apartment was very warm, even when I kept the curtains closed in the day. The windows do not open very wide. Also, on Friday and Saturday nights there was a lot of noise throughout the night that carried up to the bedroom, even with it being on the 11th floor. Those two things were the only drawbacks; everything else was very enjoyable.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: The vibes and view are unbeatable. It is close to tourist attractions, transportation (tram, bike lane, metro), and a grocery store. Antonio was super responsive to our questions! Excellent apartment and host!

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Very stylish loft with a breathtaking view that you just can’t get enough of. Communication with Antonio was very courteous and proactive. The apartment was easy to find, and check-in was very straightforward. Thanks again :)

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed spending 4 nights at this conveniently located spot. The views from the flat are great. It is well equipped and Antonio is a great host. Would highly recommend.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: This was my second stay with Antonio and I will return again. He is an outstanding host. The view is amazing. I highly recommended staying here.

name: Waterfront loft with City and Port view Rotterdam!
comments: Antonio was a great Host. He was always so responsive and polite. His place has an amazing water view. Downstairs had a small store that will make your life a lot easier in case you need some groceries and toiletries. My husband and I will definitely stay there again. Antonio thank you for being an outstanding host.

name: City, River & Comfort: Home with a Nordic Flair
comments:
We spent few days in the house with my 5 year old daughter and another couple. It is a big 2 stories house with an outdoor area, there is also a kids playground around it.
It was clean, safe and has a kid friendly room and toys that kept my daughter entertained. There are couple of restaurants and supermarket at a walking distance but you need a transportation to the city center especially if you have kids and want more of things to see.
There was no private parking to park our car, so we parked on the street and walked.
Overall it was great and the house was wonderful for our stay and the hosts were friendly. Thank you

name: City, River & Comfort: Home with a Nordic Flair
comments: We had a very good stay in this Airbnb. We agree with the previous positive impressions about the house and the area. I would like to place a note here about parking. Parking on the street in Holland is notoriously expensive. An alternative can be a large outdoor car park just around the corner (Parkeerplaats Entrepothaven) for 15 EUR per 24 hours. However, we decided for a covered car park in the city centre for 17.50 EUR (Q-Park Koopgoot) as we didn't move the car for several days (online booking recommended).

name: Charming, comfortable house close to citycentre.
comments: The accommodation was comfortable and equipped with all the necessary equipment. The street is quiet at night. The supermarket is a 2-minute walk away. We got everywhere quickly and easily by car. You have to pay for parking, but there was always free parking in front of the house. And what is most important, Krista is very kind and helpful. She was always in our favor in everything. And the cat is a friendly roommate. We enjoyed living in Krista's apartment.

name: Charming, comfortable house close to citycentre.
comments:
I’ll try to keep this short, but it’s hard – there was just so much that was truly great.
Krista’s apartment is exactly what an Airbnb should be: cozy, welcoming, and hosted by someone who genuinely cares about her guests.
The apartment itself is filled with inspiring art, beautiful furniture, light, and soul.
We actually chose to stay in and cook dinner on two evenings instead of going out – that’s how comfortable and at home we felt there.
There was honestly nothing we missed: the kitchen was well-equipped, the record collection was fantastic, the beds were incredibly comfortable, and the coffee was excellent.
When we arrived, Krista had even prepared wine, beer, and cheese for us, which meant we could immediately unwind and enjoy ourselves after our travel day to Rotterdam.
I wholeheartedly recommend staying in Krista’s apartment. On top of everything mentioned above, Krista is one of the kindest and most hospitable people I’ve met during my years using Airbnb.
Thank you!

name: Central located appartment with garden
comments:
The location was great, close to a metro line and withing walkable distance to Rotterdam central station. stores nearby.
The place was very spacious and the upgrades were nice.
However, it needed a general cleaning (floors were super dusty as was everything else in the living room and kitchen). Also, all of the kitchen utensils needed to be cleaned before being used. The spong was gross, and there was dirt and a dirty spoon in the sink upon arrival.
Other than that slight hiccup, it was a good place to stay :)

name: Central located appartment with garden
comments: Enjoyed our stay at Wim's rental. From the start, both he and his cohost were very quick to respond to any questions. Close to metro, peaceful street... rental was perfect for us!

name: Central located appartment with garden
comments:
Our Stay at Wim's was fantastic, very peaceful location, easily walkable to metro stop, train station and city centre.
lots of green space with ample parks nearby. The apartment itself was lovely, it was clean and bright with great amenities and a very comfortable bed. We would certainly stay again and recommend Wim's apartment.

name: Central located appartment with garden
comments: The apartment is very spacious and tastefully decorated. Location is great , close to public transport,  grocery stores and many good restaurants. The street is quiet , the backyard is very nice. You have everything you need for your stay. The hosts are lovely, very quick to respond and accommodating.

name: Luxury apartment near Rotterdam Central Station
comments: Herbert's instructions were very clear and easy to follow. The apartment was easy to find and within walking distance from Central Station. It has a lot of light and all the necessary items. Herbert is very responsive—when I requested an iron (which I couldn’t find at first), he brought one within a couple of hours. I will definitely stay at Herbert's apartment again given the opportunity.

name: Townhouse with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Lovely stay at Martine's house in Rotterdam. The balcony on the top floor was superb - lovely for breakfast, coffee and to marvel at the view!

name: Townhouse with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: great apartment, modern and very clean, good location right next to the city center, the balcony on the top floor was really cool with a nice view of the city

name: Popeye's Cabin @ De Coaster
comments: We had a fabulous stay!  It was such a fun experience!  The location is great.  The jacuzzi was a highlight (book separate) and we loved our space inside.  I really hope we can come back!

name: Popeye's Cabin @ De Coaster
comments: The place was amazing! It was exactly the same as the photos. Location is perfect and also it's easy if you're with a car. The parking was in front of the cabin and it was suprisingly cheap also the host has opportunity for parking on the street. It was very cozy and warm. The host is very helpful and responds fast. I loved it there. Definitely going there during summer. I reccommend it perfect vacation! Fair price

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
Really enjoyable experience! Well equipped place, there's even a dishwasher, glasses, plates everything! A beamer!!
RGB lights very nice! Maybe the place was a little dusty as my allergies were acting up, but that's the only minor thing I noticed, everything else was perfect and fun! Thanks for the nice Airbnb!

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
You will not be disappointed staying here. This was a fantastic option and a great home on the water away from home. It literally has everything you need including a combo washer/dryer, cookery, cutlery, ambiance and much more. Remember to bring a laptop or have an adapter that runs from your phone to HDMI if you want to utilize the projector/tv screen on a rainy day. Sitting on deck during the evenings was fabulous and the extras offered like the hot tub are worth it. When packing keep in mind it is a ship and luggage is taken on off via gangplank. The only suggestion besides luggage type and size I have for you is if you like open windows bring some mosquito spray to wear at night.
The hosts are super responsive and caring and do their best to accommodate your needs. Everything from Early check in/luggage holding and late check out, if needed, are accommodated when available for a fee.
We would certainly book this again for ourselves or our family and will suggest this as a destination stay for anyone traveling to the Netherlands.

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: This is not a 2 bedroom place. It is a one bedroom with a living room and couch bed.  The bathroom had a dirty towel hanging when we arrived.  The shower does not drain well at all and leaks out the side due to the lack of drainage.  People staying in the next room have easy access to your room. This is extremely unsafe. Multiple lights were out as well.

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
The apartment inside of a boat is definitely an highlight. It has everything you need. The location is perfect explore Rotterdam. Only disadvantage is because of the movement of the Boat, the moving sense of the light gets activated in a very short rhythm. Also the bumper outside knock on the boat. Better take ear plugs to sleep.
I would love to come back one day in summer. Thanks for hosting us.

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Great place. A unique experience at a very affordable price with an incredible scenic view.

name: Olive's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Beautiful historic ship, close to the maritime museum. This is a real ship with a diesel smell, not everything is level, things roll, there is no soundproofing to hear the others. The view and the location are amazing.

name: Private Room Nearby Ahoy and Downtown located
comments: Nice stay. Host was friendly and check in was smooth. The house is nice and modern. The rooms that are rented out are not pictured in the listing. The rooms have a bed, bookshelf, and nightstand. The bed was comfortable. The rooms are on the third floor so be prepared for a workout. There is a mini fridge on the third floor for the guests. Given that there was no storage in the kitchen on the first floor for our things I felt it was difficult to bring our food up and down three flights of stairs multiple times a day. If you like to cook while traveling just keep that in mind. Other than that, we had a great 2.5 weeks here.

name: Private Room Nearby Ahoy and Downtown located
comments: Our stay was decent, but rather after the second day there we noticed several unsatisfactory things, but unfortunately there were a few things that didn’t reflect the pictures and the description. The room pictured was nothing like the room we stayed in. And most importantly, we were not warned about the presence of a dog, it was quite unsatisfactory to sit in the living room and kitchen where there was uncleared dog hair on the carpet, kitchen island and furniture. On the surface, the house appears clean, probably because some areas are spacious. But once settled in, it becomes clear that the house isn’t cleaned as often as it should be by hospitable standards. The windows in the rooms were private enough to open them, but since they didn’t have nets, so you had to keep them shut in order to avoid sleeping with mosquitos and the tiny room becomes very stuffy. Lastly, The floors were EXTREMELY cold, it would have been best to provide guests with house shoes or to mention the need for them in the description. We stayed six days and because of these things, unfortunately we have to rate the stay a 3/5. The host was very nice, but probably wouldn’t book here again. We hope these suggestions will be taken into account to improve the stay for future guests.

name: Private Room Nearby Ahoy and Downtown located
comments:
Overall 3/5.
CLEANELINESS
Our room wasn't clean enough, as for the rest of the house (dusty, very dirty windows, many hair and toothpaste stain in bathroom). Kitchen smelled bad due to trash constantly open, and the fridge smelled of mold. It seemed an acceptable degree of cleaneliness for a normal house, but not for one that is rented to paying guests.
THE HOUSE
The check-in was perfect with smart lock, but after that we never met anyone of the two hosts for 3 days, and had no guidance at all about the house. E.g. we didn't know where to find essentials (hair dryer, cutlery) and what devices we could use or not (nor how to use them). We managed to find everything by ourselves easily but it felt weird, we neve used sauna, hot tub, pots, oven, etc.
ROOM
The bed was very comfortable (the pillow were not) but the room was small, hot and full of mosquitoes.
OVERALL
We spent so little time at the house so it was ok, but I wouldn't recommend it if you plan to stay there longer and cook/eat there.
I suggest the host to use written guidance about the house like many other hosts do, and the cleaning must be perfect. We never met the hosting guy (Shu) and the other person in the house was kind and nice, but that's not enough.

name: Private Room Nearby Ahoy and Downtown located
comments:
Kind hosts, big bedroom and privacy in the small living room upstairs. Big kitchen suited for cooking.
A lot of dust upstairs/ or they used to have a pet, which caused me to have allergic reactions. If you're allergic to dust and/or pets than this AirBnB might not be the best option for you.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: We enjoyed our stay here. Everything was perfectly taken care of and the communication was splendid. It could get a bit warm in the apartment on hot days, but after opening the big window it cools down very quickly. Furthermore, the host is aware of this minor inconvenience and is already working on a solution! I really recommend this place.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Niels has a great appartement in the upcoming neighborhood Katendrecht. Very close to a very nice square with good restaurants and local atmosphere. The appartement is clean, bright and has everything you need for a short holiday. Niels is a very caring and friendly host. I definitely recommend this place!

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Everything went well! The house is exactly as the pictures and had everything we needed for our stay. We even had coffee/tea and basic seasons available as well as toiletries such as shaving cream/razor, soap and shampoo/conditioner. The bus to the metro is right across the street and the neighborhood is very nice! Communication with Neils and check-in/check-out were seamless, we were even offered a late checkout, but we had to be somewhere else then. Recommendable if you're passing through Rotterdam!

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Niels was super friendly and helpful. The apartment is cool and stylish and had everything we needed to live there for a week. Niels even let us borrow one of his bikes which was super useful for a quick trip to the shop. The only downside was that during the weekday mornings there was some loud noise from the building site across the road.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments:
By far the best Airbnb host I’ve ever had.
Niels instructions were clear and everything was made to make our life easier. Self check-in was super flexible and easy. Niels was making sure everything was going for the best for us and offered a lot of commodities (a bike for example) plus plenty recommendations for food, visits, drinks, with a map.
The Airbnb is perfectly located, within a walking distance from Rotterdam center town.
