The Airbnb was clean, spacious and bright…. Perfect for a stay, with very reasonable prices for the Netherlands.
I couldn’t recommend Niels Airbnb enough.
Thanks again a million
Esther

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments:
We had a very nice stay in the apartment, which was very clean. Niels answers quickly, very friendly and helpful. As a tip for other guests - light & noise sensitive sleepers should bring aids.
There are bars/restaurants/supermarkets/ park options in the immediate area.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Niels was lovely, easy to communicate with and friendly. The apartment is in a great location, a real neighbourhood with local bars and restaurants. The kitchen and bathroom were small but exactly as described so we have no complaints, the living room was large and bright with high ceilings. Lovely walk to downtown Rotterdam. Definitely recommend.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments:
Niels’ place was a fun, relatively comfortable spot to have a brief stay in Rotterdam.
The accommodation was well furnished with the necessary kitchen amenities (as long as you like using a smart oven). Niels was generally responsive and helpful when we needed things - even lending us bikes (though we sadly didn’t use them due to other commitments in the end).
It was very close to a good spot to watch NYE fireworks so I recommend it for this time period especially! And to travel by water taxi to other city spots.
As another review noted, the soft beds (single mattreses together) and rather steep steps means that I would not advise this place for those with mobility or back issues.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Very nice, cozy, stylish and full of light apartment in a quiet and pleasant neighbourhood. Niels was very kind and willing to help. I would definitely recommend this place for your trip!

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments: Had an amazing time at Neil’s! He was very friendly and easily accessible. The apartment is not too far of a walk from some beautiful views as well. Highly recommend.

name: Kaappark, bright parkview apartment.
comments:
A Perfect Stay in Rotterdam - A 5-Star Experience!
We recently had the pleasure of staying at this wonderful apartment, and we cannot recommend it highly enough! From the moment we booked the place, the host's communication was prompt, friendly, and informative. He went above and beyond to make sure everything was clear and that we had all the details we needed for our stay. We also enjoyed the nice conversations with him.
The apartment itself is an absolute gem. It’s beautifully designed, combining modern comfort with touches of character that make it feel like a true home away from home. The space is impeccably clean, stylish, and thoughtfully furnished. The living area is spacious, with large windows that let in plenty of natural light. It’s equipped with everything you could possibly need, from a fully stocked kitchen to a very comfortable bed.
The bus stop (2 stops to reach the metro) is right in front of the door. You also can use the bikes provided to explore the city.

name: Rotterdam centre skyline appartment
comments:
Wir haben Emilie und Kris Wohnung mit fünf Personen besucht. Kris hat uns außerordentlich freundlich persönlich begrüßt.
Die Wohnung entpuppte sich dann als wahrer Traum: Alles ist stilvoll eingerichtet, geschmackvoll und sauber. Die Dachterrasse war definitiv das Highlight. Hier konnten wir sowohl die grandiose Aussicht auf die Skyline als auch die Ruhe beim Sonnenuntergang genießen!
Die Lage ist ruhig aber dennoch nah am Stadtzentrum. Wir haben alle Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß erlaufen können, insbesondere der Bahnhof und der Zoo sind um die Ecke.
Auch die Tipps, die die beiden uns da gelassen hatten, waren toll und wir haben dadurch sehr gut gefrühstückt und gegessen und einige interessante Shops entdeckt.
Wir haben uns rundherum wohl gefühlt und unseren Aufenthalt in Emilies und Kris Wohnung sehr genossen. Sehr gerne kommen wir bei einer weiteren Reise nach Rotterdam (die Stadt ist mehrere Besuche wert!) wieder in diese Wohnung.
Vielen Dank an die beiden für dieses schöne Wochenende!

name: Rotterdam centre skyline appartment
comments:
The apartment of Emilie and Kris is beautifully furnished, with plenty of space for 5 people, a nice rooftop terrace with a great view of Rotterdam. The kitchen is fully equipped with everything you'll need. The location is very convenient, a supermarket is near, as well as public transportation.
Kris and Emilie were very welcoming; the check-in and check-out and all the communication with both were straightforward and uncomplicated.
We had a lovely stay, and can only recommend this apartment for your stay in Rotterdam.

name: Rotterdam centre skyline appartment
comments:
Emilie & Kris have a very nice, modern home in a historic district in Blijdorp. Their home is very easily accessed from either the Blijdorp Station or Rotterdam Centraal and easy to find. The home was comfortable and had everything we needed for our 3 night stay. We enjoyed their light and airy home with lots of windows, enabling us to open them and provide fresh air throughout the home.
As is typical in Dutch homes, the stairs are quite steep! Otherwise, this was a lovely place to stay. We would absolutely return to their home in the future.

name: Bright & Comfy Apartment with Spacious Garden
comments:
We had a fabulous week's stay in this gezellig home that is bright in the day and well lit at night. We love the absolute quietness of the neighbourhood and the cleanliness of the apartment
The kitchen is well equipped with wares and utensils neatly organised, with basic condiments like oil salt and pepper which we used to make eggs for breakfast, and the oven works well and reheated our pizza fast
It is a very good area, quiet and peaceful, door opens up to a beautiful garden, about 10mins cycle to centraal, and near the tram.
Toilet's clean and functional, ample hot water and good amount of pressure.
There's a good hi-res TV and internet is fast enough for netflix
Michiel is a punctual professional host that communicates well
This listing will be our top choice for our future trips to roffa!

name: Bright & Comfy Apartment with Spacious Garden
comments: Clean and beautiful apartment! Ideal for a stay with your partner a little away from the busy streets of Rotterdam city center.

name: Bright & Comfy Apartment with Spacious Garden
comments: The house is much more wonderful than you can see from the pictures, it is a bright, clean, beautifully furnished apartment, where you can find all you need and much more. The "patio" is a wonderful space where you can relax even if the weather does not help. The kitchen is great, the dining room have wonderful views to the garden. The bed is the comfiest I'd ever get in an AirBnB. The neighborhood is very quiet and a nice park is just in front of the house. If you expect a calm stay in a beautiful place in Rotterdam THIS IS the house. If you expect to be in a hotspot in the middle of the noise and heck of the city choose where-else. I wish i had found this house available earlier, it would have been a blessing. Thank you, Michiel, for sharing it with us. It was a pleasure, I will definitely, try my best to stay at yours in my next stay in Rotterdam.

name: Bright & Comfy Apartment with Spacious Garden
comments: This is a beautiful and cozy home were you can enjoy the light and big garden. The place had more amenities than expected and has clearly been renovated. Very easy to reach the city center by tram or bike. Really relaxed and felt like home!

name: Large & Bright Cozy Beach Townhome
comments:
We are a family with 3 little children and we've had a great time at Whitney's place. We really enjoyed the ground floor where our children could play or watch TV while we made dinner in the open kitchen. The 3 bedrooms were large. One should take into consideration that the bedroom in the top floor had no door and its windows had no curtains.
The house is located in a quiet neighborhood and is a 30 min walk from the beach. Most of the time we could park our car right in front of the house. Top destinations like Den Haag, Leiden, Rotterdam are close by.
We have not met Whitney but communicating and check-in was fast and easy!

name: Large & Bright Cozy Beach Townhome
comments:
We recently stayed at Whitney's townhouse in Hoek van Holland, and it exceeded our expectations! The spacious, clean accommodations provided a comfortable retreat in a calm neighborhood.
With three levels, the townhouse offered plenty of room for our group of 5 (incl. a 2-year-old). We loved the giant sofa, perfect for lounging, and the professional coffee machine was a delightful touch. The oven/microwave combo and induction cooktop made meal prep easy, and having a washing machine and dryer was a huge bonus!
The large bathroom with a rain shower felt like a luxury spa. It was nice to have a second toilet downstairs, too. Thoughtful touches, like bath and kitchen supplies, made our stay convenient.
The decor had great surfer vibes, and while it was a 20-minute walk to the beach and restaurants, we enjoyed the stroll.
Whitney was a wonderful host, quickly responding to our questions and offering great recommendations for places to visit.
Overall, we had a fantastic stay!

name: City center apartment
comments: We really enjoyed staying at Michael’s place. The apartment is very cozy and we were able to relax in between sight seeing. Being centrally located, we appreciated that it was on a quiet and calm street. Will definitely stay here again next time we visit.

name: Sfeervolle woning uit 1920 met tuin in het centrum
comments: This is a comfortable home with many amenities in a nice neighbourhood. Walking distance to the centre of Rotterdam, groceries and restaurants. Roel was a great hostess, and very easy to communicate with. She set us up with parking on the street, which was very easy - the street gets quite full in the evening, but we always had a spot. She even helped us out when our flight home was canceled by allowing us to extend our stay. We enjoyed our time in Rotterdam!

name: Sfeervolle woning uit 1920 met tuin in het centrum
comments: Stayed here for 4 nights and everything was nice. however, I would like to highlight a few things. The bathroom has two doors between two separated rooms without any lockers. In case you travel with friend you may be caught on your private things. Beds in the child room are very squeaky, if you don’t sleep like a log, be careful) Overall, the experience was great, cats are cute, dishes are clear and quite enough for 4 persons. Flat is spacious and really cozy. The area is so quite and nice. In 3 min of walking you can find nice cafe and restaurants, groceries, park.

name: Sfeervolle woning uit 1920 met tuin in het centrum
comments: Roel amd Sane's home is fantastic.  checking in and out was all good and the cats are just delightful 😊 we felt very at home

name: Sfeervolle woning uit 1920 met tuin in het centrum
comments:
Delightful place with garden space.
We had a lovely stay . Roel was so helpful with advice.
We felt so at home

name: Nature & city life. Your vacation & home office
comments:
A beautiful and clean apartment awaits you. With a friendly check-in and good tips for things to do. The garden is a real highlight and something very special for living space in Rotterdam.
Eine wunderschöne und saubere Wohnung erwartet euch. Mit einem freundlich Check- In und guten Tipps für Unternehmungen. Der Garten ist ein echtes Highlight und etwas ganz besonderes für Wohnraum in Rotterdam.

name: Knus Tinyhouse in R’dam, dichtbij het centrum!
comments:
Carolina’s ‘Tiny House’ is a lovely, cozy and zen home away from home!
She is warm and friendly and goes out of her way to make sure that all your requirements are met.
A lot of love for details has been spent in making the house warm and inviting. The furniture is beautiful and comfortable!
The garden is gorgeous and we enjoyed our glass of wine on the terrace right next to the little moat, catching the last rats of sunlight.
Our stay was perfect!

name: Knus Tinyhouse in R’dam, dichtbij het centrum!
comments:
My parents had the pleasure of staying at this charming cottage, and we can't recommend it highly enough. From the moment they arrived, they were welcomed by Carola who was incredibly attentive to every detail, ensuring their stay was as comfortable and enjoyable as possible.
The cottage itself is simply lovely. It's cozy, well-maintained, and sends out a warm and inviting atmosphere. One of the favorite features was the beautiful garden, which provided a serene and picturesque setting to relax and unwind. Whether enjoying a morning coffee or an evening glass of wine, the garden was the perfect spot to hang out and soak in the tranquility.
Additionally, the location is fantastic. It's conveniently close to the metro, making it easy to explore the surrounding area and access all the attractions and amenities nearby.
My parents would definitely return!

name: Knus Tinyhouse in R’dam, dichtbij het centrum!
comments: This Airbnb is amazing, it was the best experience we have ever had - from the stunning property to the exceptional kindness of the hosts. Carola and her partner went above and beyond to make our wedding day a special and unforgettable experience. Their little house was very cozy, beautifully decorated and equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. We were very happy that we could use the stylish interior and their beautiful/romantic garden for our first look and photo shoot. But what stood out to us the most were all the little touches - a hook for the wedding dress (which Carola kindly installed for the occasion), personalised notes, bottles of wine/bubbles, delicious breakfast and the highlight - a garden full of candles. We would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a unique and memorable stay (especially for special occasions, such as a wedding weekend). And again a huge thank you to Carola for making this stay so magical!

name: Woolly Hotel Chloe Apartment
comments: The place is very nice and centrally located. The apartment is completely renovated and clean. The noise was not a problem at all.

name: Authentic dyke house in Old Charlois
comments:
This house is super cute! We really enjoyed our stay and appreciated the FULLY stocked kitchen with all gadgets you might need, as well as basics for cooking.
The bedroom gets a lot of light in the morning and it's very cozy. Great location for South Rotterdam, accessible by bike, easy street parking and quiet street. Very recommended!

name: Spacious & Modern Apartment with Garden
comments: We stayed for 2 nights and really enjoyed our stay in the apartment very much. The communication with Michiel was great, he is a wonderful host! The apartment is really amazing - great design and kitchen & livingroom are very spacious.  We also enjoyed the garden very much. And the price was really okay. The only thing that wasn’t perfect for us:  the bedroom is in the basement and has no window. Therefore only 4 stars.

name: Spacious & Modern Apartment with Garden
comments: Very nice and clean apartment with interesting details. Location is very comfortable, not far from center but at the same time the streets around are not crowded. Fast wi-fi and possibility to work were also much appreciated. The only thing that concerned me is that there were no windows in the bedroom, but the ventilation in the room was good and we didn't feel any discomfort during our stay. Overall we got a very nice experience and I would definitely recommend to stay in this apartment if you are searching for a quiet, modern and spacious place.

name: Stylish Private Home in Prime Rotterdam
comments: Linde's place is in the perfect location - right next to Rotterdam Central and overlooking a sweet little canal (we enjoyed watching the goslings out the window). It is also a gorgeous little apartment with lots of natural light and a very comfy bed. We had the best time and didn't want to leave.

name: Stylish Private Home in Prime Rotterdam
comments: The flat is in a great location near the station, making trips to surrounding towns easy and  access to metro and trams to reach the rest of the city. Flat is bright and airy with large dining room and sitting room. Lovely pieces of period and contemporary furniture. Toilet/shower a bit cramped and the double bedroom was small, making access to the bed a bit difficult if you have a bad back, and  no space in the bedroom for changing,. But a beautiful flat and the bed was very comfortable.

name: Stylish Private Home in Prime Rotterdam
comments:
Lovely minimalistic apartment that was clean and in a perfect location. Bright and airy space, although the bathroom is a little tiny.
Overall great communication and place to stay.

name: Authentic 30's house in the South of Rotterdam
comments: very well received in a beautiful spacious and bright house.

name: Authentic 30's house in the South of Rotterdam
comments:
We had a wonderfull stay at this house that feels like a home in an instant. Everything you need is there. Beds are good, kitchen well equiped, nice bathrooms, comfortable sitting area and an excellent little garden. And all this in a nice, quiet street close to the city.
One of the best Airbnb experiences I ever had.

name: Authentic 30's house in the South of Rotterdam
comments: A richly decorated and furnished house with all kinds of comfort. For our mother-daughter weekend in Rotterdam, we had everything we needed and far more than that, and thanks to the two bedrooms also the privacy for each of us that we wanted. The tram station is close by, also the watertaxi, which took us directly to SS Rotterdam or Delfshaven, which makes this a perfect location for a visit to Rotterdam. Anne Maike could not have been friendlier, the same is true for the neighbours. I felt perfectly safe when returning home from a festival all alone one night.

name: Authentic 30's house in the South of Rotterdam
comments:
Anne is a helpful and friendly host.
The place is located in a quiet area in the South of the city. There's not much to do there but in 15 minutes you can walk to the metro station that gets you to the city center.
The house is beautiful, it had everything we needed, and more. For example, there's a working vinyl record player and decent collection of disks, and also cinema room with a projector. It also has a nice little garden and a balcony.
The host left a book with helpful instructions for everything in the house.
We liked the place a lot, recommended

name: Authentic 30's house in the South of Rotterdam
comments: Das schöne Haus von Anne Maike liegt im urbaneren Süden von Rotterdam. Es liegt in einer ruhigen Seitenstraße. Es ist alles sehr entspannt hier. Die Altstadt und alle Highlights der Stadt sind gut mit der Bahn oder dem Fahrrad in 15 min zu erreichen. Wir haben uns vom ersten Augenblick sehr wohl in dem geschmackvoll eingerichtetem Haus gefühlt. Die Betten sind sehr bequem und in der Küche mangelt es an nichts. Neben dem kleinen Garten gibt es auch noch zwei Balkone, die zum Verweilen einladen. Wir durften auch die Fahrräder der Familie nutzen. Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt bei euch!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: knusse studio op superplek, balkon met een view: zonsopgang en deel skyline Rotterdam

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: It is a great place, I found it more spacious than the pictures led on, which is even better. It was clean, very light, good location and fast communication. We loved it and hope to be back for another short Rotterdam stay soon.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: I would  like to confirm all the positive reviews for this lovely bedroom. I did not feel lack of privacy: in the six days I spent in this room I felt like I was in a separate mini apartment. The stair although a little steep, was not a problem at all.... All very tastefully decorated, the streets around  are very quiet and beautiful gardens everywhere!!!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: We very much enjoyed our stay. Central location in quiet residential neighborhood. Rotterdam Centraal is a short bike ride away. Great renovation of the apartment. Love the shower/toilet arrangement. The coffee maker and fridge allowed us to do breakfast and organize for the day. Chromecast for TV works great. Wireless network was good. Balcony overlooks public greenspace.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: This was a great place to stay when visiting Rotterdam. It is in a nice location, and the place is cute and well decorated. Everything you need is in one room, with a balcony attached. I would definitely recommend it if you do not need a kitchen during your stay.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
Cute studio in Rotterdam, perfect for a citytrip with your spouse!
The little balcony and the big windows are fabulous when the sun comes out!
The walk to the city center is quite nice as well!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: A very well organized place with all essentials; i enjoyed the view from the balcony, bed is big and the mini fridge is very useful. place is clean and well decorated. three floors of stairs with narrow steps but you get used to it quickly.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay. The apartment was very close to the central station, which was very helpful for us. We also really liked the interior design, although we didn't expect the toilet and bathroom to be so open to the rest of the apartment. The balcony was great as well - you can also see the Rotterdam Skyline by night.
All in all we really enjoyed our stay :) thank you again

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: The studio is in a quiet neighborhood but in walking distance to cute cafés, shops and restaurants. (Walking to the train station takes about 20 mins, walking to the city center about 30 mins.) Everything was as shown in the pictures. Even though it does not have a kitchen, there's a small fridge and you can make coffee or tea in the morning. As other reviewers have mentioned before, the staircase is very steep (very common in the Netherlands) and the bathroom (shower, bathtub) does not have a door (the toilet, however, has!).Communication with Jacco and Glenn was easy, and it was convenient for me to be able to self-check-in.  I had a great stay and would definitely recommend this place.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: The best house I've ever lived in, textured decor and comfortable space, great bathroom, and a comfortable balcony, I love it, and it's close to the city.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Lovely studio flat with a private balcony. Great quiet location.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
A lovely renovated place with a narrow & long terrace overlooking the park. Location is top. 25min easy walk to the main train station and plenty of restaurants/cafes in the 15min walk neighborhood. Looks a bit smaller in real life and there are 10 light bulbs hanging from a ceiling in different areas of the room. So there is plenty of light:)
*If you are ok sleeping next to a small humming fridge placed as a night stand next to a bed, than it's all cool:)

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
Jacco’s accommodation was perfect and in a very nice and quiet neighborhood, also it was only 20 min walk from the station. Very convenient also the balcony, perfect to relax in the evening after a nice ride in the city.
I would definitely stay here the next time!!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: We had a lovely stay 😍 ! The photos correspond to the advertisement, we really appreciated all the little touches (book to discover Rotterdam, self-service coffee, tea...) If we have the opportunity to return to Rotterdam we would be delighted to be able to book this accommodation again ☺️

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Very cozy apartment, clean, with small nice balcony. 10/10

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Had a great stay at the studio. It has lovely live plants and decor. The location is beautiful neighborhood in Rotterdam. Very much enjoyed the view from the balcony. Hope to stay again!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: A lovely apartment where we felt right at home! It felt quite spacious even though it's a small place. It is nicely decorated and doesn't feel cramped. Jacco & Glenn were always very responsive and helpful. Recommend for couples or any two people who don't mind showering on front of each other :)) since the bathroom is combined with the living room (toilet is separate). The stairs to the apartment are very steep, but that's Dutch architecture for you. Quiet location overlooking a park, 4 tram stops away from Centraal. Lovely balcony, which is a great amenity for smokers, but also has a nice view of the park and some skyscrapers.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
Looking out over the sunlit open garden square from our balcony was a very nice way to start the day.
We found our way around really easily and the quiet location suited us very well.
Jacco was a star

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: This little studio flat was perfect for us as we were visiting family nearby. It was lovely and clean, very comfortable, good wifi (nice TV), nice and quiet with view over trees & a sweet balcony - and we were very comfortable. Steep Dutch stairs but quite manageable! The host was very helpful and responsive which we appreciated. Thank you for letting us stay.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: lovely apartment, on the top floor with balcony, stairs are small though but is the style in the Netherlands. location was nice an quiet, was about 20 mins walk to most places. bathroom and sink and shower are in separate areas in the apartment.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Convient place to stay for a weekend, 20min walk to Rotterdam Central station & waking distance to public transport. Nice neighborhood, very peaceful and green. The place is pretty small, not much space for privacy (bathtub & shower in the same room you sleep in, no door & very very small toilet room) but for us as a married couple who already know each other well that was alright. The balcony is nice and you can enjoy your morning coffee there. Mind the fact the flat is at the last floor and there are steep stairs to climb.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
I think I have never felt so comfortable in an Airbnb. Jacco’s place is beautifully decorated with a safari vibe and dimmable (!!) spider lights. And although there’s no kitchen, there is a kettle and a Nespresso machine, as well as tea and coffee. Despite the cold, I couldn’t resist having my morning coffee on the balcony, which, although small, is also cozy and inviting with two chairs and a table. It’s true, as other guests have mentioned, that the stairs are not for the faint of heart, but the oasis at the top is worth the climb.
This was my third visit to Rotterdam; I came for a weekend workshop at Codarts and will definitely stay at Jacco’s place again.
Privacy, peace, and beauty—all for a great price and close to the center. What more could you want?

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
A very great place to stay! The view from the balcony is great. The apartment had everything I needed (doesn't have a kitchen though if you want one), it has shampoo, towels, coffee, tea, coffee machine, kettle, hangers.
Jacco was easy to communicate with. The location is about 10 - 15 mins walking distance from the train stop, it also is 20 minutes walking distance from the Central Station.
It is a quite neighborhood.
As everyone mentioned, the stairs are steep, so big luggage might be difficult to carry, also for old-aged people or with knee issues etc, this place is probably not suitable.
To summarize, it was a great experience, would do it again for sure!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
Everything went well. Jacco also arranged an early check in, which was very helpful, as we came in the morning by night train.
The apartment was nice and clean, simple, small, but very nice. And with east-facing balcony with a nice view.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Really cute place, loved the balcony.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
Lovely little flat just north of Rotterdam city centre - ideal for a couple. Quiet, tree-lined neigbourhood, but plenty of food/shopping options within a ten minute walk - particularly recommended Harvest on Proveniersstraat as a lovely breakfast/lunch stop. Very good communication from a friendly host. Morning coffee on the sunny balcony was a nice way to start the day. Stairs are very steep, as is clearly pointed out, but nothing all that unusual for Holland and perfectly navigable. It's a very warm room in midsummer, but sleeping with the curtain across the open balcony door was fine.
Only reason this isn't five stars all round is that the flat was mislabeled as having two beds, whereas there is only one - not intentional, host was very apologetic and the listing now makes this clear, so along with this review, it hopefully won't be a surprise for future visitors. Wasn't the end of the world for us, but it made mine and my son's weekend a little more snug than we'd expected!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: Ik ben hier 2 nachten met mijn zoon geweest. Voor mij de tweede keer omdat ik vorig jaar april hier ook al ben geweest en dat beviel zo goed dat ik het weer heb geboekt. Fijne en rustige plek en prima te doen vanaf CS met tram 8. De kamer is redelijk klein maar meer heb je niet nodig voor een citytrip. Prima bed, douche en balkon met leuke view op het plantsoen. Vanaf daar lopen naar het centrum is erg leuk want je kunt de hele 'Hofbogen' aflopen. Kortom: een aanrader!

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Jacco‘s place. For our purpose – exploring the city – the accommodation was definitely sufficient and conveniently located. The staircase was a bit of a challenge with our suitcases, and cleanliness could have been slightly better. All in all, it was perfectly fine and we enjoyed our time there.

name: Hidden Gem • private entry studio + Park Balcony
comments:
A small little oasis to recoup after a day of sightseeing.
The studio has a comfy bed, bath & shower and a separate toilet. The balcony is brilliant for enjoying your morning coffee, made with the capsules provided by the host.
Jacco was very responsive & flexible.
As the listing states... a real gem!

name: Modern | Luxurious bathroom |  baby bed | Plants
comments:
We had a great stay at Michiels appartment. The rooms were decorated really nicely and we felt at home right away. Especially the kitchen and the bathroom are really pretty and modern.
As the bedrooms were located on the first and second floor and as we visited in summer it got a bit hot up there during the day. That's why we opened all the windows at night, fortunately they have mosquito nets installed which was a great relief.
The street where the house is located is not too busy but when opening the windows you could very clearly hear people walking by and talking, which didn't cause us any troubles except at night it was a bit uncomfortable.
There is a supermarket just around the corner which made it quite easy to cook our own fresh meals in the appartment. In the kitchen we found all the utensils we needed for cooking, though the kitchen cabinets were a bit messy.
There are parking spaces right in front of the house but they are only free during the evening+night. A free parking space is 15-20 minutes by foot.
All in all we enjoyed our stay there and can definitely recommend a stay there!

name: Modern | Luxurious bathroom |  baby bed | Plants
comments:
Checkin with Michiel was very uncomplicated & he was very flexible due to our arrival. House is located in a district near to the center. Parking in the street is also possible, but definately much more expensive than the recommended P&R-options.
The house has 3 floors - 1st Bedroom on the Second floor; 2nd bedroom on the 3rd. There were about 35-38 degrees on 3rd floor - extreme hot - so we slept on the sofa on the first floor, which was also quite comfy.
What is not mentioned in the Info: usually, there is a family living in the house - its used as an air-bnb-option when they're on vacation etc.
You have the house for your own.

name: Studio Staccato
comments: What a fantastic studio. Everything that you needed was there and lovely decorative touches too ( loved the starry lights above the bed). The garden seating area was also beautifully done. The studio is in a really quiet location but only 5 mins walk to the railway station for a short ride into Rotterdam centre. There was also a supermarket just round the corner for self catering. Peter and Janine were very friendly hosts and we hope to stay there again when we visit Rotterdam in the future.

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: We had an amazing experience in this cottage. It is located right at the river. The path is busy, but not with cars: mainly cyclists and people on a walk. The cottage is very well kitted out and there is an exceptionally clear manual detailing everything you would want to know about the history of the house and any practicalities. The cottage itself is really cozy and was very clean. There are also two comfortable  bikes available which is actually extremely convenient as the biking infrastructure in the neighborhood is absolutely impeccable. 20 minute bike ride to the center of Rotterdam, but there is so much wonderful nature in the immediate vicinity of the cottage: we were tempted to just bike around there. The restaurant right across the street is also very much highly recommended. Very nice experience all round.

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: My 20 year old daughter and I needed a place where she could prepare for exams, I could work online and we could enjoy time together. This house was perfect. We both thought it was even nicer in person than in the photos. It is a historic house that has been updated but maintains its charm. The kitchen is great to cook in. It is modernised, has a gas stove and oven, microwave, Nespresso machine, tea kettle and just about anything you would want to cook with. There were even things like baking paper, tupperware, ice cube trays, the list goes on. The bathroom is lovely - updated and so nice (BIG rainshower, double sink, plenty of space.) Two bikes were available which was also fantastic and the area is really lovely. There are walking and cycling trails pretty much right out the door and it is a great way to get around. The beds are very comfortable. There is a pull-out couch also, but we didn't need it. The little "guest house" out back (which has its own bathroom and mini-kitchen) provided separation of space for when we needed to both be online and working. There is a washer and dryer and a clothes line which is really convenient if you need to do laundry. The canal is right across the quiet road with birds and boats floating by. The upstairs is the bedroom in the main house and has privacy shades AND blackout curtains. I slept soooo well. Communication was very quick and easy and check-in was a breeze (I was worried because we were arriving late but it is self checkin so we didn't disturb anyone). I HIGHLY recommend this place. It is worth the price and could accommodate more than just two people. Thank you for a wonderful, relaxing  stay!

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: We are a family with a young child. We stayed 12 days in Sherry and Janneke's house. We had a great time there. The house is well located for riding a bike through nice and peaceful landscapes. We also used the bikes to go to Rotterdam, but we mostly went to the city using bus+metro, although it often takes 45 minutes due to connections (it is quicker by bike). The house is located just next to the river, in a street xhere you see many more bikes and joggers than cars, very calm. We found the house extremelly well furnished and practical, it is definitely a nice place to stay. We actually did not use the second room with a double bed, so the house is certainly suited to more than the 3 people we are. Many thanks to Sherry and Janneke for their help and fast answers!!

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: Een heerlijke plek. Doordat de tweede slaapkamer in het tuinhuis is, heb je veel privacy. De keuken is goed geëquipeerd: onder andere goede messen, altijd fijn. Het huis ligt rustig. Wat ver van de stad maar met de twee fietsen is het aangenaam fietsen naar zowel de stad als de omliggende natuur. Een aanrader.

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: Staying here was such a delight. The house catered for all of our needs. So peaceful and relaxing! Our teenage children enjoyed cycling nearby to really see the beauty of this place. Would definitely recommend.

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments: If you want a centrally located, lovely cottage from which to explore the Netherlands, this place is it.  The main house is the best appointed Airbnb we’ve stayed in. There’s also a lovely little cottage beside the main house which was perfect for our friend we were traveling with.  There’s everything you could need…the kitchen is wonderfully equipped and we enjoyed dinner on the porch when it was sunny.  I only wish we had stayed longer.  There is a fantastic restaurant across the street, and easy bike rides to groceries, pharmacy, etc. Buses and metro are “tap on, tap off” using a credit card. So easy! Just know that if you want an Uber or Bolt, they’re hard to come by during rush hour, but easy otherwise. We went to Delft, The Hague, and Amsterdam twice.  Oh, and the showers are fantastic…tall enough even for my 6’5” partner.  A gem. We’ll most certainly return when we can.

name: Dutch River Family Cottage
comments:
This was a great find in the northern part of Rotterdam and away from all the noise and busyness of the central part of the city. It was easy to walk to the Tram and the grocery store and there were great walking paths (near windmills) that were really scenic.
Sherry was also very responsive and accommodating. The home was very clean and has all the amenities that you could want.
We were very glad that we stayed here during our visit to Rotterdam and would highly recommend!

name: Serene Apartment in City Centre
comments:
We had a great stay! A little out of the centre (which is why we chose it) so it is very peaceful - also an easy bike ride to get anywhere you need. Also close to the central station and plenty within walking distance.
Lovely high ceilings and lots of light! This space was everything we needed to enjoy a few days in Rotterdam. We were visiting during covid when all bars/restaurants/cafes were closed - the kitchen facilities were enough for us to store a few days worth of groceries and prepare meals.
Excellent value!

name: Serene Apartment in City Centre
comments:
Very comfortable, an amazing location, the host is super kind. Very very steep strais! Beware bigbagtravelers. Although he did help me take them upstair, it was a workout!
Other than than 100% recomend, it was warm, pretty, a big space and nice view of typical Nederlandish homes. Thanks Michiel!

name: Serene Apartment in City Centre
comments: The apartment is cozy, in a very good location and pretty much as described in the photos! I stayed here for a whole month and there were only a few things that I’d have wished to be different. I wish the kitchen had had a microwave in addition to a full stove for one. The second was that I was unacquainted with the style of some old Dutch houses so the very steep stairs was a bit of a challenge at times! Other than that I really liked the work station in the apartment: it was a really lovely setup. Plenty of light in the apartment during the day! Also the storage space and the modern bathroom were all really nice. Initially I had some minor trouble figuring out the heating but the manager of the property sorted that out in a day and the heating worked just fine for the rest of my stay! :) Also he was kind to arrange a fan for the first few hot days right away!

name: Serene Apartment in City Centre
comments:
I really enjoyed my stay here! I had some issues with my flight and ended up checking in late. The host responded with understanding and was very helpful.
The place is very cool and has really large windows that allows for a beautiful view.

name: Serene Apartment in City Centre
comments:
Please put a picture of stair and mention about being in third floor - we had very hard time with heavy suitcase and our dog not be able to use stairs
Half of the house was extremely cold specially the bathroom - no heating in bathroom and kitchen area
House need proper de dusting , specially under bed and curtains
Pillow and duvet need ironing for making sure it kills all mites, I m not sure they were ironed

name: Double Trouble
comments:
Wonderful place to stay, amazing staff, everybody was super kind and efficient, the hotel is super clean, very nice design (we loved the red room in the lobby) and the Chinese restaurant in the hotel simply delightful, very talented and experienced chef!
We have been staying there for 2 weeks and we felt like home! ♥️

name: Double Trouble +
comments: Lovely stay at Supernova Hotel. Everyone at reception was lovely and super helpful. Suggestions for places to go, and having free bikes to borrow was perfect for exploring. The room was huge and big windows, massive bathroom. Housekeeping was great too. Was a better stay than we couldve asked for!! Thanks to the team 😊

name: Double Trouble +
comments: The room was small for the price. The room also had a strong perfume odor and was very cold when we arrived even though it was hot out.  The desk staff was very friendly and helpful. They got us bikes right away but the bikes were not in the greatest condition. We were very disappointed because the listing mentioned terrace but there was no access to it. The door/window was sealed shut. It was also strange that the large window by the toilet was clear and only had a blind that when shut blocked all outside light as well as the only opening window.  On a positive note the bed was very comfortable and we had a good night’s sleep.

name: Quadruple Room
comments:
Great balcony and lovely room. Really friendly staff. Family room was lovely and comfy beds
No phone charging spaces near beds

name: Superior room with balcony
comments: Very spacious, wonderful room in a super nice location. The rain shower is great, the bed is massive (with the TV placed right in front of it) and the balcony is amazing to have breakfast on. The only downside we found was the loud floor creaking from the room above us. Otherwise we had a good experience!

name: Super Standard
comments: It was very clean and the room was super beautiful. The only thing is that you can't open the windows, the rooms only have air conditioning.

name: Super Standard
comments: Everything was perfect. The room was cozy and minimal, great natural light coming in. Huge shower space. I also liked the common areas (well designed) and the free bike. Food and drinks have reasonable prices for being an hotel. Tram is 5 minutes walking, central station is located 15 minutes away (walking). Would recommend :)

name: Urban Oasis with terrace
comments:
We really liked the hotel and the room. The different levels in the room gave it a nice vibe. I also enjoyed the light and the doors to the balcony. The balcony had a lot of privacy as well since there were not a lot of windows looking out to it.
The staff was friendly and helpful, and overall we enjoyed our stay very much.

name: Central garden apartment on a lush boulevard.
comments: This is a lovely spacious apartment, and very comfortable. There is everything you could need and more. We especially liked the little balcony which gets the morning sun.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay and had a wonderful time. The tiny houseboat is fully equiped and we were very happy being one of the first guests. Sander and Jelle did a great job and there is really nothing missing at this lovely place!
You find anything you need (groceries, restaurants) in about 5-10 minutes by walk. Also you can find central parking places nearby or just ask Sander or Jelle if they can help you out with that, so that you can maybe park your car just in front of the houseboat!
The only thing that was quite a bit disappointing was that there is a construction site just in front of the terrace which affects the view a little.
But though we would recommend it anyway!

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
We booked it last minute and stayed in the brand new and renovated captain’s cabin for one night. The communication with Sander was perfect, he responded within minutes and made everything way too easy!! We would recommend to use the optional parking, there are parking lots just in front of the boat by standard parking fees of 4€ an hour. On deck you have a private area to chill out and enjoy the view, which is just above your cabin and you can enter from your bed. This was an amazing experience. It’s definitely the way to go if you want to explore Rotterdam. Everything important is just a stone’s throw away. You get a welcome guide in Dutch and English which gives you a proper briefing concerning your environment and functionalities. In your cabin you can use google assistant to turn of the lights in a comfortable way while lying in bed and enjoying the nightsky of Rotterdam. We can’t wait to come back and explore more of Rotterdam from our captains cabin!
P.S.: You’ve got a private access to the ship’s steering.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: The place is one in a million! The view is amazing and the jacuzzi is the cherry on the top. The location is perfect because you can get from there to any place by walking or by train, it is a very fancy area so there is a infinity of restaurants and nice places to visit around. Sandler was extremely nice and helped us even with our last-minute-petitions :). Thank you very much for everything! I hope to come back soon, until then... buen viento y buena mar.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Ons verblijf was boven verwachting goed! We hebben gebruik gemaakt van de jacuzzi alleen de privacy schermen staan precies de verkeerde kant op. Iedereen kan dus heerlijk meegenieten van de bubbels. Voor derest, genoten!

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Great place!  The hot tub was nice and toasty--especially nice for the cold, rainy, windy day I was there.  The Captain's Cabin has a cozy bed nook with fun colored lights, and the upper deck's glass-walled cockpit is great, you can have dinner there with looking out at the rain and the wind-whipped canal while still being inside.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: I run a tourism page for the Netherlands and was impressed with our stay at De Coaster. It was my husband’s 55th birthday so I wanted something unique. The weather wasn’t the best but we spent the beginning of his birthday in the jacuzzi you can rent a time slot as an additional cost. We had one small issue with a light and the host answered my text within the same minute! The only downfall was that I rented as an additional cost their small boat to see the canals but it was a bit to wet and windy to use it so I lost out on the cost of the rental. This was no fault of theirs and a fault of mine by not checking weather before renting a boat. Overall I give this place a 5/5. Great place, great hosts, clean and in a GREAT location

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Great stay. Everything you need and some fun extras like Google assistant controlling the lights or the heated bathroom floor. Nice owners. Plenty of coffee. Good location.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments:
The captain’s cabin was amazing : comfy, well equiped ... Same as the picture ! It was amazing ! You can turn lights on/off, put some music, etc using « ok google » on a tablet.
Sander answered quickly and tried to make his best to make sure that we had a nice stay.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: We had a truly lovely stay at Captain’s Cabin. We were surprised at how beautiful, peaceful and comfortable it was. Amenities were complete with a full operating kitchen. Sitting in the private glasshouse with a glass of wine and some cheese was beyond divine. The location was so close to the Market Hall, the Lawrence Church and the Cube Houses, which meant no shortage of things to do and places to eat.

name: Captain's Cabin @ De Coaster, Maritiem District
comments: Great and unique stay. Very clean and nice host. Some windows were missing blinds and the sounds were very noisy, so the privacy could've been a bit better.

name: Privé-appartement in Rotterdam West
comments: stylish apartment with a lovely balcony!

name: Privé-appartement in Rotterdam West
comments: Good communication, very good connection to the center, the apartment is suprisingly calm despite the main street. We were satisfied.

name: Privé-appartement in Rotterdam West
comments: Marlon’s place is an amazing space, it was spacious and clean and not too far of a walk from Rotterdam Central. The neighborhood is an accessible and made it easier to travel around Rotterdam.  It was a nice place to come back home to and chill with amazing amenities including a lovely balcony. Marlon is a great host :)

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments:
Dila’s apartment is lovely. Once you have negotiated the stairs, the place is bright, airy and comfortable.
It’s also right in the middle of the action in Rotterdam, a brilliant location with lots of bars and restaurants close by.
The communication with Dila and check-in were stress free.
We will definitely come back.

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments:
My stay at Dila’s was for 4 weeks and could not have been better. It’s close to so many restaurants and bars as well as in close proximity to public transportation and the train station. There was also someone who came to clean every week, which was great for an extended stay. There were times where communication could have been better in terms of when the housekeeper and a handyman were coming, but otherwise an incredible stay.
Something’s to note that didn’t bother me but might bother others: there were no paper towels or toilet paper when I arrived, so I went to the store right away. It was also on the top of three steep flights of stairs, which was difficult with my heavy luggage. Emma, who checked me in, helped upon arrival, which was very nice.

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments:
Magnificent.
The area is central to the max.
15 mins to Central Station.
5 mins to tram, metro, top museum and restaurants.
Great ambience from pubs.
A bit noisy, but close double glazed windows and you barely hear anything.
Staircase is as per usual in The Netherlands and has a solid railing; easy!
Loft itself is spacious with great
ventilation and heating.
I couldn't have wished for anything more!

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments: The apartment is very well located for exploring the city (which is itself super walkable in general). It's on a real party street, so some people may find that a bit overwhelming, but I enjoyed the liveliness of the immediate area, and it's easy to go elsewhere if you're not into it. The apartment itself is very comfortable and well organized with a legitimately cool Scandinavian vibe to the furniture and setup. Easy to control the heat/cooling depending on the season with the windows+heating. All around a good place to be. Dila was super responsive and helpful around getting in and out which was all I needed!

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments:
Kitchen was well stocked with appliances and utensils.
We were warned about the Witte street noise (buy ear plugs) and the 63 Rotterdam stairs to the top floor. Otherwise, we had an excellent stay as the location of close to metro/trams and museum/galleries.

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments: The loft is quite nice but note the stairs are something else. If you aren't prepared to carry your bag up essentially a ladder with carpet look elsewhere. This info is conveyed of course but it's still a shock when you get there if you have a heavy bag. Sticky kind of sprayed residue from previous guest on wall, blinds, lightbulbs, would benefit from a scrub and new linen also but otherwise it's a nice loft and if you want somewhere right in the heart of bars and venues then you'll enjoy it. High fitness level required to stay here, on the brightside I lost 3kgs in a week thanks to those steps.

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments: Dila’s apartment is lovely and in a great location! As listed, the street is a bit noisy at night but can easily be blocked out with some earplugs. Dila was a good host and I would recommend her place!

name: Woolly Hotel Foxy Loft
comments: I loved the place. It’s in a great location, very walkable. Yes there is some noise from the street at night and the stairs are traditional Dutch stairs. But it is as real as it can be

name: A fancy & cozy apartment in Blijdorp
comments: Yunjoo was very friendly and nice, the place is quite convenient for it is very close to the metro Blijdorp and green areas. The room's windows face the courtyard and it is fair quiet despite busy street. A little improvement such as a small mirror in the room would be really handy! Otherwise I really liked staying here ;)

name: ‘Het Dijkhuis’, comfortable room in suburban home.
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Marjolijn is literally a super host. We stayed overnight and had to leave in the Morning. Thanks Marjolijn for the lovely breakfast and for the lovely conversation. the room is clean and has a good view. Quiet place and easy to reach the city center.

name: ‘Het Dijkhuis’, comfortable room in suburban home.
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: We had a really nice stay at Marjolijn's place! It is only a short ride to the city center with public transport and all the things you need like shops etc. are close by. The accommodation offers all the amenities one needs and is really comfortable. Also the free parking in the street is convenient. The breakfast was really good and Marjolijn and her partner are super nice and friendly people!

name: ‘Het Dijkhuis’, comfortable room in suburban home.
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Fijne locatie, goed bereikbaar vanaf Ahoy waar we een evenement bezochten. Marjolijn was erg vriendelijk en gaf ons goede tips om de stad te bezoeken. De kamer was ook top, netjes schoon en veel privacy. S’morgens kregen we ook een heerlijk ontbijt met zelf gebakken brood en zelfgemaakte jam. Ik zou dit verblijf zeker aanraden!

name: Pension schip MLV Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Very good option. Compared with other options it was slightly quirky sleeping on a ship but the price was reasonable and the ship was well equipped and clean. My hosts were friendly and helpful and provided a substantial breakfast to send me on my way. many thanks.

name: Pension schip MLV Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Everything was just amazing! The ship is magnificent and everything was restored with extreme care - it’s not a normal Airbnb stay, it’s a full experience! Mario and Eelke are delightful and prepared a breakfast trey that I could enjoy on the ship deck even if I was expected to leave early. You feel at home, but in a very cool home! I will 100% book again if I will come back to Rotterdam. Thank you Mario and Eelke!

name: Pension schip MLV Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: It's on a boat obviously but very clean and comfortable plus a huge breakfast. The more people on board the less privacy there would be but I slept well and despite being very close to centre was very quiet. There are plenty of high quality but not particularly cheap options. It's a short walk of about 10 mins to the metro stop and then only a few stops to Rotterdam central.

name: Pension schip MLV Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: A very unique experience highly recommended to have. I loved the movement of the boat and the sounds it makes. I was fortunate to be there on a quiet few weekdays with just a couple of other people around. The steel construction lends itself to some unique noises, but I slept very well with my earplugs. The bed was comfortable, a ship’s bed - narrow but plenty long and raised a bit, and with cotton linens. Neat porthole windows that open and give fresh air. The breakfast Eelky made was amazing!  I usually skip hotel breakfasts - I have a bad stomach, but the variety here meant I had a lot to choose from and it was quality food with Dutch things to try.

name: Pension schip MLV Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: First things first, it’s a decommissioned warship, I think that alone speaks for more than enough itself. Being able to stay on here was super cool; all the lights functioned, the water was great, and portholes functioned just fine! I unfortunately got here on the hottest day of the year, and this ship does not have AC (it has a blower that pulls air from outside, but is only practical when it’s colder outside like at night), meaning I was cooking inside. A quick step outside onto the shaded deck fixed that issue no problem. There was also a place to swim super close. I appreciate the hosts so much, they were so unbelievably kind and I had a fantastic multi hour conversation with them. They really are friendly people. They made me a large breakfast in the morning with a personalized note on it free of charge, that alone added so much to the positive vibe I received here. Of all the places to stay, I think I would come back here if I ever get the chance to do so (I’ll just bring a fan!)

name: Island Cabin Rotterdam
comments:
Die kleine Insel war wirklich wunderschön. Sowohl der Außen- als auch der Innenbereich waren geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Das Highlight war jedoch, abends den Kamin anzuzünden und die gemütliche Atmosphäre zu genießen.
Die Anreise mit dem Tretboot war zwar etwas ganz Neues, aber definitiv schön und eine Erfahrung wert.
Nach Rotterdam gelangt man mit dem Auto in etwa 10 Minuten ins Stadtzentrum, was die Lage besonders praktisch macht.

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: We were five persons and the apartment easily fit all of us. It is super spacious, has lots of light and a wonderful roof terrace. 20mins by foot away from the central station, supermarket close by and a quite neighborhood. We would definitely return to this apartment again for another visit to Rotterdam.

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: The place was really nice and cozy. You can go to the city center by foot in around 20min. Everything was as it was described in the overview. The terrase was great to sit outside. Michiel was also very nice to us and had a view tips for Rotterdam. The apartment was a little cold as it is not well insulated, but a pullover got rid of the probpem ;)

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: House has an amazing view and in one of the most beautiful neighborhoods in Rotterdam. Host was very friendly and answered our questions immediately. Definitely recommended!

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: It was a nice location and a very friendly host. Also a great view from the city rooftop. We had a good time and like to recommend it. Thanks a lot.

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: Very restful and peaceful area. Spacious and secure building. Wished there were more light. It gets really dark at night and it was abit hard for the older adults.

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments:
2 colleagues and I stayed here for a few nights.
We loved the rooftop balcony and the lounge area.
Michiel was really helpful. Greeted us on arrival.

name: Roof terrace | Spacious & Modern | Rotterdam style
comments: We had a good stay at Michiel’s place. He (or Max) responded quickly, the location is perfect: next to the city center and stores, and with an amazing view. However, the place itself wasn’t very clean and some things were broken upon arrival.

name: Rotterdam Urban Villa
comments:
Maarten got out of his way to host us in Rotterdam. His apartment is a charming space in a multi-cultural neighborhood.
The beds are comfortable, there is no noise from the streets and all amenities work perfect.
Highly recommended.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments: Kamil is a very nice host and communicates fast and in an easy way. The room is well located but sadly there is no free parking on the street anymore.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments: Kamil and his girlfriend are wonderful hosts. The bedroom is large, clean and bright. The atmosphere of the flat is very nice. We've feel like home !!

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments:
The room was just like the picture spacious and full of light. It was on a quit street . The tram line is only a 3 minute walk from the house and it got me into the center of town in 10 minutes,
Kamil and his wife were great hosts friendly and offered advice about getting around. It's an excellent place to stay.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments: I booked Kamil’s place because it was walking distance from the Ahoy in Rotterdam and reasonable in price, but what I liked the most is that it really felt like home. Kamil and his wife were very friendly and helpful and the room was very comfortable in a beautiful old typical Dutch house in a quiet residential street. On top of that, a large desk to work and good WiFi with very friendly and cute cats to cuddle 🤗 I definitely recommend staying at his place.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments: Kamil happens to be an extremely friendly and responsive host, who cares about his guests, and respects their privacy. The accommodations are accurately described on AirBnb and the room itself is very large with a solid desk, comfortable chairs, and plenty of cloth hangers.  It was perfect for my needs, and walking distance to the Ahoy convention/event center.  I would stay at Kamil's place again for sure.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments:
Kamil's place is one of our best airbnb experiences.
Kamil's wife welcomed us in person, and they allowed for flexible check-in. They responded to all of our messages very quickly. Kamil shared amazing food with us and gave us great food recommendations. We wished we had more time to chat with Kamil.
The room is clean, spacious, stylish, airy, and with lots of natural lights. Kamil provided coffee and tea, which is a nice touch.
The property is cute and located in a quiet and beautiful street.

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments:
Great host and a very good chef. I really felt a cozy home feeling staying at Kamils home. Everything was clean and worked. The bed was comfy. I loved how they really take care of their guests and be helpful in any way.
My personal experience it could be a little noisy in the evening with all the walking and doors, so if your a light sleeper bring some ear plugs hehe :p
For the rest really happy with the stay and would recommend it to anybody

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments:
thank you Kamil 😊
I have a wonderful stay here ❤️
Kamil welcomes me with a beer and we have a very nice chat.
I think that's really the point of Airbnb, to make you meet people from different cultures and interact with the hosts. Kamil is so kind that offers me cakes for breakfast and wonderful lunch while I worked from the room.
the room is clean and bright, everything is just upgraded with two super cute cats during my stay.
thank you again and maybe our paths will cross in the future.
take care xx

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments: Amazing place, amazing host. Kamil and his beautiful comfy home was an absolute delight and break from the hustle bustle of visiting a new place. 10/10 recommendation

name: Enjoy Rotterdam
comments:
Had a great stay. Hosts are very kind and generous. The room is spacious, super comfortable, clean and quiet, in a quiet street of South Rotterdam. It’s 1 bus stop away from Northern part of the city, 4 stops from Centraal.
Loved to do some desk work on this gorgeous big wooden desk. I appreciated the taste and the character of the house and the spaces..
and the delicious food I was offered!

name: Clean, Bright & Comfy – 2 Min from Central Station
comments:
Nice apartment in a very quiet and central position! The balcony is a very nice spot for sun and sunsets in the evenings.
Twan is available and hope he would take some advice to bright it back to its best and with all the services.

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: Amber's and Robert's houseboat was  our first houseboat experience and we loved it! It's located almost in the middle of Rotterdam and you can take daily bike trips to every Rotterdam attraction easily if you want to. The houseboat itself is very nice, very comfortable bed, nice couch with an amazing view on water and boats passing by. You will probably also get a daily visit from two beautiful swan couple that come directly to your window. Big kitchen with everything you want and need and even more. Hosts also provided us with a delicious local wine and beers which we think is very nice. Houseboat has also a nice warm pellet stove that warms the place up very quickly. We stayed there for only 4 nights but I can see myself to easily stay there for a longer stay as 4 days felt too short for us. Amber and Robert were extremely nice and responsive hosts and we felt extremely welcomed as their guests. We would totally come back in the future.

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Our stay at The Flamingo Boathouse was fantastic. We flew from Chicago - Amsterdam and took the train to Rotterdam then a taxi to the boat. All very easy.
The location is on a quiet canal and we enjoyed the view as well kayaking. The 🦩 is well equipped, cozy, and very clean. In addition to a small dock there’s a large, private patio/deck.
Although there is a parking spot, we chose to spend our 5 days with just bikes. We enjoyed exploring Rotterdam and took a day trip to Delft.
Hosts Robert/Amber were very warm, welcoming, and
helpful. In addition to assisting with our bike rental arrangement, they graciously helped us when we had a flat tire.
We will absolutely be staying here again and highly recommend.

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Very cozy stay, great hosts. We enjoyed some hot summer evenings on the house boat, as well as a thunderstorm. Both were amazing. The view over the river is so cute. There’s always something going on and every boat captain waves friendly when passing by.
More than once we hopped directly from the living room into the Kayaks and paddled up the river. It’s a very nice airbnb, highly recommended.

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: The houseboat was just like the photos, everything was great and Amber is really nice and easy to contact!  The view is great and you have a direct acces to the river! Location is perfect!

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: Our stay at the houseboat was perfect. We were welcomed very nicely and Amber provided us with tips around Rotterdam. The houseboat itself is a highlight but Rotterdam is also very beautiful. We also enjoyed the Kayaks. All in all it was a perfect stay and we can definitely recommend the houseboat.

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: The houseboat is a real treat. Very light and beautiful being on the water with the water fowl swimming by.  Amber was so sweet and helpful.  She  checked in to see if I needed anything. I am very picky and was comfortable the entire visit.  I plan to return! Thank you Amber and Robert!

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: Located on Gordelweg, very close to the blijdorp metro station (10 minute walk) this bnb so lovingly created by Amber and Robert, is the perfect example of hospitality done right. First of all, it’s a beautiful bnb located on a very quiet street, but also close to civilisation. And once you enter the flamingo house, it’s a beautiful boat house with an amazing courtyard with a shaded dining area, and a nice sitting area with a coffee table. Once you enter the house, it’s a cozy space, with a lot of light but also privacy. Amber and Robert have presented a master class in hospitality, because they have provided pretty much anything you can think of and might need, along with brochures and pamphlets and maps for sightseeing. Everything was perfect, and they are as available and gracious as the best hosts are. The house itself is amazing. A beautiful sitting area on the water is the highlight, and the best place to enjoy the sunset. Will visit again for sure !

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Amber ist ein toller Host!
Sie begrüßte uns persönlich, trotz stundenlanger Verspätung. Auch während des Aufenthalts unterstützte sie und Robert erstklassig: Die Metro druckte das Ticket nicht aus und sie half, das Boot lockerte sich etwas bei Sturm (Seil knarzte) und war innerhalb von 30 min wieder fest - trotz Regen! Wirklich klasse. Selten so eine saubere und schön eingerichtetes Boot/ Unterkunft gehabt! Die Autobahn war kaum zu hören und war ok. Die Metro ist fussläufig, ebenso Albert Hejn ;)
Zu empfehlen ist "de Pizzabacker Bliedorp" in der Nähe der Metro! Sehr lecker!!! Na und die Pizzen auf der Terasse sind ein Highlight!
Schön und liebevoll eingerichtet! Wir haben den Aufenthalt genossen!

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Unser Aufenthalt bei Amber und Robert war absolut wundervoll! 💜
Wir wurden sehr herzlich empfangen - die beiden sind tolle und super freundliche Gastgeber. Sie sind jederzeit zu erreichen, und geben sehr hilfreiche Tipps für Restaurants, Bars oder Unternehmungen in der Region.
Das schöne Hausboot ist sehr gemütlich eingerichtet, super sauber und toll ausgestattet. Man fühlt sich direkt wie Zuhause.
Die Terrasse bietet sehr viel Platz und lädt zum Sonnenbaden und gemütlichen Verweilen ein.
Besonders die Möglichkeit, die zwei hauseigenen Kajaks zu nutzen hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Hier kann man Rotterdam vom Wasser aus entdecken - ein Highlight!
Bis zum nächsten Mal!🫶🏼

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments: the houseboat is unbelievable!! the view, the facilities, the location are amazing! Amber is a great host and always respond quickly!!

name: Houseboat at a unique location in Rotterdam!
comments:
Excellent host and a cosy place…
We really enjoyed our stay in the Flamingo-themed houseboat. Amber was super as our host - Fast replies, good communication and flexible on arrival - (we’re still sorry for the inconvenience due to our delay on arrival). We got a nice informative introduction to the houseboat, public transport and nearby shopping possibilities. Also - during the stay, our host checked in with us, to make sure everything is OK. Thanks for the great service :-)
A nice near-city location (Rotterdam center is 35 minutes by foot) and yet - after a day in the fast-paced city - you’re back in private, quiet surroundings with a great view, easy parking and your own private terrace. The boat is well equipped, spacious, comfy, good beds, good heating and nice/clean.
Easy access by car, located near the main-roads. Traffic is a bit noisy with open windows, but the same is the case with most city-hotels. Very silent when windows are closed.
Thanks for having us. Loved it :-)

name: Queen Room
comments: The room we booked on Airbnb was not at all the same as the one we got. We had a view of the parking lot and not of the city as shown on the site. Very very disappointing.

name: Queen Room
comments: With city views, this is an excellent spot to stay when in Rotterdam. The Rotterdam train station is only a 6-minute walk away, as are the majority of amenities.

name: Queen Room
comments: It turned out to just be a Days Inn. It was a perfectly good older hotel with a really nice view

name: Queen Room
comments: Très basique pour le prix. Petit déjeuné très très basique (viennoiserie surgelée, pas d’alternative sans lactose, peu de choix)

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: What a lovely place! We thoroughly enjoyed our time here! The place is decorated really lovely, we loved it. Nice shower, good water pressure, nothing like home. The bed is the best! Just right for us, never had such a nice bed when on a weekend break! The little garden is perfect to sit in the sun and drink a cappuccino! Everything is taken care of. We enjoyed sitting at the front window and watching street life. Conclusion, Fien made our stay memorable and it was absolutely lovely. Last thing: the local tips of where to get a beer and nice things to see were perfect to start our weekend of with. Thanks Fien!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
We had a great time at Fien’s apartment and would highly recommend it for a stay at Rotterdam.
The apartment is very well located, several tram stops are nearby but it is also possible to walk to for example the city center if you are interested in exploring the area. Bakeries, restaurants, grocery stores, bars etc. are only a few minutes away from the place, which was very convenient for us.
Although the apartment is set right next to a main street, there was barely any noise audible inside.
We really enjoyed Fien’s interior choices. There is not an excessive amount of storage space for clothes etc. but it was totally sufficient for our one week stay. The bed and the couch were super cozy. The place quickly felt like a home to us.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
We loved this bnb! We visited in late October - early November. It was so comfortable, clean, and very close to my daughter and son in law's apartment in a safe, eclectic neighborhood. Communication was excellent and check in was a breeze. It's full of well planned modern details. It was nice to have coffee, tea, and a few staples available for our use while we were there. Comfy bed and although on street level there are black out curtains that not only give total privacy, but kept out unwanted light and most street noise too. We didn't get to enjoy the cute little patio, but in nicer it would be a joy!
I have a hip issue and appreciated fewer stairs to deal with! Only one step to enter the building and 6 down to the ground level apartment. 😊
The bnb is next door to one of my daughter's favorite bakeries that also does coffee. It's about a half block from a green grocery, wine store, etcetera. There are a great variety of eateries, bars, & retailers on this street and nearby. It's very close to a pretty canal with playgrounds, dog walkers, ducks, joggers, and great walks along the water to enjoy.
We were just a half block from the Oliebollen truck! (a fried donut in ball form) I enjoyed those way too much! I think the truck is just there through the holidays.
We would definitely recommend this apt and will book it again if available!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
This apartment seems just too good to be true, and that's because it truly is! What a beautiful and perfectly located stay in the centre of Rotterdam. The host provides you with breakfast, coffee and cereals that can last you the first few days of your stay. This house contains everything you need. An oven, so you can actually bake cakes and pastries. A nespresso machine for my coffee loving husband. All kitchen utensils you need. The bathroom and toilet are amazing and provided with delicious smelling soaps and sprays.
The house is powered by Google Home, so you can turn on the lights and devices by just saying the commands. So damn cool! The bedroom is cozy, warm and perfect pitch dark at night by closing the curtains. It was actually the best night of sleep we ever had. Great bed and pillows.
Just 5 minutes walking and you find yourself in a street filled with the cutest stores, restaurants of different types of cuisine and very friendly people along the way. Another 5 minutes walking and you will reach the central station and then you can choose to walk or sit anywhere you want. Rotterdam is truly a beautiful city and this apartment is the best choice you can make to stay. Way better than any hotel!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: The apartment itself is beautiful and you are near to some cute bars and restaurants. Plus the hosts are responsive and have left great small details throughout the apartment. However, the apartment is on the ground floor on a street with a tram so it can be quite noisy especially when trying to sleep.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: What a nice place to stay in Rotterdam! Just a little gem! It is al well appointed and taken care of. Me and my daughter liked it a lot. It is nice, spacy and clean. We loved the interior which is modern. And it had a lovely little garden with party lights! The location was perfect for us as we had bikes. But with a bakery next door and small restaurants and a supermarket Roy d the corner, it is a perfect spot for a little getaway. We would highly recommend staying in this cute little place. Thanks to Fien and Manisha for their quick replies and immaculate accommodation!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Cozy flat with amazing bed, lovely terrace and a great host.
We spent three nights and we can recommend this apartment 100%. Fien is an excellent host, very kind and helping with anything - whether it’s about tips or requests :)
The flat is nice, cozy and offers everything you need - and the bed is out of this world. The street in front isn’t too noisy, there is a park nearby and you can reach the main station in 7-10 minutes. The neighborhood is full of restaurants and bars - a lot to discover here too. Enjoy your stay! :)

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: I highly recommend Fien apartment. It is very  light ,spacious and all the architectural details make the place very special. The outside area is great to eat in.
