The kitchen is well fitted with beautiful dishes. The couch and bed are very comfortable .A central location . I hope to stay again when im in Rotterdam.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: The location of the apartment was great - we could walk everywhere we wanted to go and didn't need to use the trams at all.  Fien and Manisha (and neighbour, Phil) were all very helpful - Manisha's restaurant recommendation was a big hit with us; and you just can't beat fresh bread from the Bakehouse next door.  The tram is right outside and, as other reviewers have said, does start at 5.30 in the morning.  This was only an issue for one of us - earplugs certainly helped, but if you are a very light sleeper, this may still take some getting used to.  The only reason for not giving this a five star rating all-round were some plumbing issues we experienced during our stay.  Although each one was fixed as quickly as possible, this did impact our stay somewhat - maybe we were just super-unlucky for something like this to happen more than once.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
WOW ok i’m usually not one for softer beds but the mattress makes you feel like you’re floating a cloud to begin with and then the duvet really completes the vibe that you’re wrapped up in that cloud. if you want to get good sleep, you should stay here. comfiest airbnb bed ever!
very cozy, right in the heart of rotterdam on a bustling street. tram stop practically at your doorstep. laundry, food, grocery close by. easy check-in/-out, great communication.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
The flat is in a great location - walkable to central Rotterdam (or each of its centres?) in 15-20 minutes, but not so far out that nothing is going on. So many opportunities to walk around quiet and very attractive neighbourhoods locally.
Multiple coffee places and bars/restaurants within a 3 minute walk on the road, and does not take long to find other places slightly further afield. We enjoyed breakfast from the next-door bakery every day and also recommend Roast, Arzu, Al Baik Sweets and Fou wijnbar.
Fien and Manisha were exceptionally responsive and provided a really lovely, spacious flat with a very comfy bed. We were delighted :).

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: We enjoyed staying in Fien’s apartment. The apartment is well laid out and equipped. It was lovely to find beer and oat milk in the fridge on arrival. The tram stop is nearby and there are a number of restaurants and a supermarket to hand. For visitors not used to the numbering system in The Netherlands, be aware the street itself is called “2e Middellendstraat” , we thought we were looking for Flat 2e 🙄

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: Fien's place is a gem for anyone interested in architecture--urban on the street side and garden-like in back. Great use of space and light. Very comfortable bed. Fien and Manisha were helpful with directions, and had generously left plenty of coffee and fresh oat-milk creamer. Checking in and out was flawless. Lovely place in the spirit of Rotterdam and would be happy to stay again.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: This place was in a great location - just over 1 km from the train station and on a tram line. The entrance was well marked and instructions to get in were clear. A bike rental shop was steps away. Restaurants and grocery stores were nearby. Loved sitting out on the private patio after a long day of sightseeing. The place was very clean. The bed was extremely comfortable, the kitchen was well stocked. There was the typical city noise being on a tram line but quieted down in the evening.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
My friend and I had a good stay at Fien's place.
The accomodation looked as on the pictures: it was clean, super nicely decorated and we felt cosy.
Even though the street was quiet, I would just mention the fact that the flat is at the street level (we were a little bit surprised when we arrived).

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: We loved our stay at Fien's place. The apartment is very stylishly decorated and well designed with great use of space. It was also very clean and tidy with a very comfortable sofa and bed. We also loved the lively street with great restaurants and cafes as well as easy transport links to the centre. Highly recommend.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: Fien and Manisha's apartment is beyond beautiful. It is so thoughtfully renovated, from the materials used, to the way every corner excudes light and makes the best use of the space. If you love design and architecture, make sure to visit this place ;) We definitely picked up some inspiration for our renovation downstairs. The apartment is located on a busy street with lots of cool bars and restaurants and the best thing is that inside you don't hear any of the noise and you feel completely at peace. Fien is also very communicative and will help you with any request. We would love to stay here again with our next visit to Rotterdam!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
The place was clean and we got in easily with the clear instructions that were provided. It truly felt like a home and despite the busy street, it was a quiet place to retreat from the bustling city.
Fien and her co-host are quick to reply and even quicker to help.
We had an amazing stay at Fien's apartment and hope to go again in the future.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Very nice. Good location. Bed was comfy enough. Many guests have commented on the tram/street car that passes by about 40 feet away, and it is remarkably quiet.
We found there were only four plates for meals, so this was a challenge. The apartment came with two dishwasher detergent tabs, and we wouldn't want to run it on empty anyway.
Temperature in October was a challenge, too, because the hosts control the thermostat, there's no space heater, and floors were bare and cold. Dress warmly.
The unit above is an AirBNB too, rented by the same hosts, and some of the guests would tromp loudly on the stairs or slam the door to the street. That's more of a concern than the tram/street car.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: The place was very nice, looked like the Foto’s. The only thing that we mist was curtain’s at the back of the apartment. The parking on the street was not to great we were lucky to find a spot.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Beautiful apartment not far away from the centre. Stylish, well equipped, spacious and with a very comfortable bed. Unfortunately I have not had the pleasure to meet Fien.
Maybe good to know: The apartment is half underground and at a busy street. You can hear noises from the street (tramway, pedestrians etc).

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
The apartment has very cosy, looks just like in the photos.
The hosts were very responsive and helpful, making my stay more than comfortable.
I loved how they made sure all the extra stuff are there - coffee, tea, detergent etc
Would definitely come back :)
The place is next to a street with trams, but the sound isolation is perfect, as I am a light sleeper myself.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
I had a pleasant stay in this very comfortable apartment. Would have liked to stay longer.
Parking is a bit expensive though. If you’re comfortable walking for 20-40 minutes, then lots of interesting sites are within walking distance.
The apartment is nicely renovated. It lies a little below street level in a street with shops and nice restaurants. It is not very noisy, but if you like it quiet at night, bring earplugs. Kitchen is well equipped for cooking meals. Thanks for your good care and hospitality!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: Fine’s place was exactly as presented. Beautiful, modern and well equipped. The communication was a breeze. While the apartment was in a busy street, it was remarkably quiet and we slept well for the five days that we were there. The neighborhood restaurants were delicious, definitely try Roast for breakfast and the Portuguese place for dinner. From the bed to the shower to the comfortable accommodations, the apartment was a dream. We will definitely rebook the next time we are in Rotterdam.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Modern, comfortable and convenient location.
Cool, well-appointed apartment with a well-equipped kitchen. Good light from the back patio and comfortable furnishings. Minimal steps to the door.
Fien and his team are quick to respond to questions and have helpful suggestions. An easy check in.
Great location with 3 trams within a block that go to the center. Very easy to get around the city from here. Wonderful bakery nearby with warm bread and sugary pastries and several nice restaurants within a couple blocks. Nearby grocery too.
HINT: If you're staying for more than a few days, get an OV-chipkaart at the train station. Only costs 7.5 euro and then you load it with whatever you want. Use it on transportation ANYWHERE in Netherlands. Always tap when you get on and off the tram (they sometimes check). Much easier than buying tickets to everywhere. Good for intercity travel too.
Thanks for a great stay.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
We spent a few days in Rotterdam with our 7mo daughter and Fien’s place was the perfect base to explore from and a really cosy space to relax in each evening.
There is so much natural light in the day time which is just gorgeous and the lighting set up is super considered for some nighttime ambience. It’s a beautiful space.
The kitchen was well stocked with cooking essentials and even some complimentary coffee/tea/drinks in the fridge which was a thoughtful gesture.
We’d highly recommended for a trip to Rotterdam and would certainly stay here again!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Lovely luxury place, great eclectic neighbourhood with lots of exotic eateries from very simple to modern and luxury, very central. perfect for our two days in Rotterdam. Busy street but surprisingly quiet inside. Get a bike at the station and you can go to all cool Rotterdam places.
Quiet private courtyard for evening sitting outside is excellent and unusual.
Bit of a communication glitch with host on the evening before check out but sorted in the end.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
We had a wonderful few days staying at Fien’s place just before Christmas.
The apartment is surprisingly quiet and private even though it is located on a main street. We loved the modern design with the big windows looking out onto a private courtyard garden. The location is also great, as it is within easy walking distance of the central station and the shopping area.
We also went to eat in several local restaurants and cafes around the corner from the flat, and found that they were excellent.
Fien was a marvellous host, who communicated clearly and swiftly from the beginnning. We couldn’t have felt more welcome, and can highly recommend this apartment for a comfortable and stylish stay in Rotterdam.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: Fein place is a hidden gem and a great place to stay if visiting Rotterdam. 10 min walk to central station you can take a tram to get there. Parking was a bit of an issue as I couldn't figure the street parking and had to use the garage but that was more of my issue. The place is inviting and would definitely recommend. Communication was excellent. Try the various restaurants near by as they provide some great eats.

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
Honestly we loved this rental. The location is great and although it’s on a busy street the insulation is great not noisy at all. We felt like home is nicely coated Ty bed and linen was comfortable and quality we really enjoyed our stay and if ever back in Rotterdam we are
Staying here. By the way the host was great..!!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments:
We loved our stay at Fien’s place. While being on a fairly wide street, there’s no street noise heard inside.
The place is located close to some very nice brunch places and restaurants, we definitely enjoyed the neighborhood.
Well remember this place for a next visit to Rotterdam!
Thank you Fien!

name: Architect's Hideout. Bright, Comfy, Central Luxury
comments: Beautiful lower level apartment in a quaint neighborhood of Rotterdam. I liked the location a lot. Very walkable and grocery store was only a block away. The unit itself is very nicely finished and decorated. Private back patio is a unique feature. There is a washer, but no dryer, so be prepared to hang your clothes if you plan on doing laundry (a drying rack is provided in the unit). Bed was super comfortable. Some street noise (the tram runs quite late). I normally sleep with ear plugs so this was not an issue for me. I appreciated having self check in/out and great communication from the host throughout. I recommend to anyone wanting to stay outside the traditional tourist areas in a ‘real’ neighborhood of Rotterdam.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
We had a lovely week in this flat, the localisation is perfect and architecture incredible ! It was easy to come from the train station and for getting the keys.
The bed was really comfortable and not a single noise from neighbors, thank you Fien ! :)

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: I really loved the stay. The house was beautifully decorated and I felt at home. Communication was also really good. The only thing is that the street is quite busy, but you don’t notice that inside the Airbnb!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
The apartment is really nice designed and you’ll have such a pleasant time taking a bath in that giant bathtub!
The tram stop is just outside the building, so it only takes you a couple of minutes to get to the city centre.
It’s perfect for a couple to spend some days in Rotterdam, but I wouldn’t recommend it to 3 guests, for us it was too small - also there’s only a glass door between the living room/second bedroom and the bathroom, so it can be a bit uncomfortable when travelling with 3 or even 4 people.
All in all: a great beautiful place for 2 people!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: This is a wonderful flat to stay in whilst working in or visiting Rotterdam. Fien is a great host. Easy self-check-in, clean, super quiet, all the necessities, including coffee, tea, and some drinks in the refigerator upon arrival. The bed is very comfortable and we had fun "Asking Google" to play light music throughout the day! I was in Rotterdam for work and had a busy schedule and needed a quiet place to unwind. There are lots of great restaurants in the immediate area, with a tremendous variety in cuisine. I will be back in Spring 2022 for work and will definitely try to rent this place again.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Lovely place to stay! Fien is quick to respond and the apartment catered to all our wants and needs. It was clean, modern, had an excess of facilities and was well situated within the city. Additionally, there is a lovely breakfast place across the street called "Arzu" which I'd absolutely recommend!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: We had a great couple of days in Fien's apartment in Rotterdam. The apartment is not far from most things - we rented a Donkey bike for the 48 hours we were in Rotterdam and cycled everywhere from there! If you stay make sure you visit Roast coffee house across the street - it's great! The apartment itself was lovely and clean, check in / check out was really easy and we were left to get on with our trip. We did receive all the info we needed from Fien, but I did have a couple of questions which were not responded to. But other than that - all good! I would recommend staying here for an easy fuss free trip to Rotterdam!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
This is beautiful apartment in a super convenient part of Rotterdam. Walkable from the train station, and easy to explore Delfshaven, Museumpark and even Kop van Zuid all on foot .
Apartment has a really easy check in, and is full of lovely features, high ceilings, big windows with lots of nice touches from the hosts, coffee, granola etc. Some great brunch options just opposite the flat too.
This was a great place to stay and discover what a gem of a city Rotterdam is .

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Beautiful and cost place by the tram station. It was just a little noisy from the street.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
A really thoughtfully designed space in a fantastic part of Rotterdam. We had a great coffee shop, wine bar and restaurant on our doorstep and were close enough to walk all over.
The bed was especially comfortable and we found the bath a delight! Would highly recommend the apartment for a couple travelling who want a beautiful space to rest and relax in Rotterdam.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
Even better than we had hoped looking at te pictures. Beautiful apartment with lovely colours, playful elements and thought through interior design. Very bright in front (living room) and back (bedroom).
Fast and clear communication, from check-in to parking tips to check-out.
Perfectly located: 10'-15' walk from city center and several musea, 5' by tram. Cosy brunch spot, bakery, bars and restaurants around the corner.
100% referring my friends and booking again next time we're in Rotterdam. Thanks!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Good location and easy to get around on transit from here. Mosquitos were an issue so we had to keep the windows closed which made the place very warm and stuffy. I’d suggest getting a mosquito net for the bed. Overall, nice touches such as the coffee and drinks in the fridge. I’d stay here again, but would bring citronella candles or a mosquito net.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
The flat of Fien and Manisha is very beautiful.
Many small and loving details can be found throughout the flat. Coffee, tea, drinks, spices, room spray or even bath salts to relax - all this was thought of.
The only reason why I can't give 5 stars is the room temperature of 18 degrees in winter. It was warm enough in the living room but much too cold in the bedroom/kitchen area. Especially for families with small children I imagine this could be difficult. On the first day, the temperature was raised on request but only from 18 to 19 degrees.
I was also asked to send comments privately, as they try to get only 5 star ratings. In terms of transparency, I don't think that's good.
There's a g**gle home in the bedroom and in the living area. If you are used to it, you can take advantage of it, we personally found it questionable in terms of privacy.
Away from this, the location was really great and within walking distance of many attractions. The communication was very friendly :)

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
A very comfortable place to stay. Everything was clean and fully equipped with things you may need during a short stay.
There are several nice breakfast places nearby. I recommend to check "Juffrouw van Zanten" out, which is right on the opposite side of the the street.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
We had a very enjoyable stay. The apartment is light and airy and very well equipped with many thoughtful touches. We cooked a meal one night and had everything we needed. The bed is very comfortable and located away from the street overlooking a quiet courtyard.
Location is great - in a nice neighborhood with cafes nearby ( and bakery next door). On a tram route for easy access into town - or only 15 minutes walk to museum platz (or 20 to the central station) if you like walking - which we do. we would definitely stay here again. thank you Fien and Manisha!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: We just spent a week in this lovely Airbnb. It was spacious, clean, and bright.  Checkin was very smooth with very clear instructions.  The kitchen was well stocked and we were able to prepare our meals in the kitchen.  There were a few basic food items in the kitchen to get us started.  We were usually able to communicate quickly.  Location was superb!  This place is ten minutes away from the train station, five minutes away from the tram, which runs very frequently.  There’s a great bakery next door, lots of cafes and restaurants very close by, and a grocery store and fresh produce store within minutes. The street has a lovely ambience. So does the Heemraadsingel, which has parks and playgrounds so close by.  If you walk about ten minutes north, there’s all kinds of nature, walking trails, as well as a zoo all nearby.   We would love to come back for another extended stay, and perhaps others from our family may come as well.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: A fantastic apartment in a perfect location! Explore Rotterdam by foot or bike from this central but quiet location. The apartment is on a main street but the bedroom is facing a back courtyard with lovely trees. The kitchen is very well equipped - we cooked most of our meals there. Alternatively, there is an incredible range of food offered at the many restaurants on Middellandstraat. The apartment has a very cool feel and design, cozy and sleek at the same time. Manisha was incredibly responsive and let us drop off our suitcases ahead of check in time. Overall, a great place to stay!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: A lovely comfortable , light apartment in Rotterdam. We enjoyed the coffee pods so we could enjoy a coffee on arrival.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: We stayed at Fien's space, which was amazing. It's super central with some great restaurants within walking distance. Public transit close by can take you anywhere. But, let's talk about the listing; it is nothing short of amazing. Well designed, layed out in a different way but comfortable and easy. It breaths atmosphere with the light and the way the appartment is structured makes sure you get a good night sleep, while on the front side you can overlook the streets. It's a great place to stay.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
We had such an amazing stay here. The unit was so nicely laid out with plenty of room for me and my husband. There were so many thoughtful touches and you can tell the host is very passionate about ensuring people have a great stay.
There is plenty of space in the bathroom to lay out your toiletries. I find that to be rare in many places we’ve stayed. Very much appreciated the oat-milk in the fridge ^_^
The bedroom is situated away from the street so it was quiet. The bed was very comfortable which, for us, is the most important thing. We slept so well.
The neighborhood had many shops and restaurants nearby. We had breakfast at a coffee shop called Roast. It was fabulous, although I believe they only serve food Friday-Sunday.
Walking to the city center was very fun with a lot of things to see, and it only took about 10-12 minutes.
All in all, would definitely stay here again in the future. 🥰

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
We were delighted with the apartment - spacious lounge, bedroom and bathroom, and well equipped kitchen. It is relaxing and comfortable, fun to sit in the lounge, and easy to make breakfast and light meals. Quiet in the bedroom.
It is close to good restaurants, cafes, shops and parks. (bakery next door, supermarket 5mins walk away) Delfshaven is 20 mins walk, and by tram it is 15 mins to Station Centraal, the museum quarter and Eramusbrug.
We loved using it as a base for Rotterdam and then chilling out locally.
Thanks to our hosts Fien and Manisha who suppiled good suggestions and directions ,and who made sure the apartment was welcoming for when we arrived.
All good.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Thank you Fien for sharing your amazing place!  We appreciated the location and especially the cafe across the street!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Great apartment, spacious, light, unusual layout and with well chosen detailing.  Perfect for two. Easy for public transport, although walkable to many places we wanted to visit. Many restaurants nearby, takeaways, with choices of cuisine. Really helpful tips from the hosts too in their handbook. And very comfortable bed.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
I really enjoyed staying at Fien's place because it has a lot of things going for it: it was super easy to get to from the railway station via tram. It is centrally located thus a great base for exploring Rotterdam. Locally there is a good pizza place, bakery etc. and also a bike store/hire. The host was easy to contact and responded quickly to any questions.
The apartment is cute. The lounge faces the front street, and the bedroom and kitchen are at the back. This made for a quiet space to sleep, especially with a very comfortable bed plus amazing soft linen. The flat was very clean and had everything that we needed incl. wardrobes, kitchen facilities etc. The shower was good except when it reduced to a trickle a couple of times (when neighbours using facilities) but this was short lived thankfully.
I had expected a higher level; of furnishings/finishes given how it is advertised. However overall it served well as a clean modern functional and comfortable base for our trip.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Alles prima in orde en naar wens! Privacy, leuke locatie en veel lekkere restaurantjes en ontbijtplekjes in de buurt. Wij raden dit zeker aan!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: The flat matched the photos very well. The flat is located on quite a busy street and it is on the first floor. Luckily the bedroom faced the back courtyard and was much quieter in the evening. Stairs up to the flat are quite steep so it is not the place for anyone who has accessibility issues. The listing described the flat as luxurious but we did not feel it was accurate. The flat is really nice, clean and spacious. It would have been nice to have a second set of bath towels and a few throw rugs would also help. We were there during a cold and rainy week and it was hard to get towels to dry. Location was easy for trams and not too long a walk from the main train station.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
I enjoyed my stay in this apartment. Would recommend it and come back again next time!
Keep in mind that living room is facing the street with a tram line. The noise, however, is not a problem in the bedroom as it is on the opposite side of the building. The area is great. Many nice cafes, restaurants and bakeries around. I am also very pleased with communication with the host. Great place to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
Fien & Roos’ place in Rotterdam is absolutely wonderful! From the moment we arrived, we were impressed by the stylish and thoughtfully designed interior. Every detail of the space is beautifully curated, creating a modern yet cozy atmosphere that made us feel right at home. The apartment is also incredibly comfortable and spacious, making it perfect for relaxing after a day of exploring the city.
The location is fantastic—situated in a vibrant neighborhood within easy walking distance of many of Rotterdam’s highlights. Whether you’re interested in exploring the city’s iconic architecture, cultural attractions, or shopping districts, everything is conveniently close by. The area also has a fantastic selection of restaurants, especially in the Chinatown neighborhood, offering a diverse range of delicious food options.
Fien & Roos were wonderful hosts—very kind, communicative, and always quick to respond. We would absolutely stay here again. Highly recommend!

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: We had a great stay at Fien’s for a few days. It was very handy from the Central Station, easy to find and in an area where there are lots of restaurants and cafes. The flat is warm, pleasant, full of natural light, very quiet, spacious and the bed was very comfy. We had a relaxing stay. Thank you Fien for having us.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments:
Visiting Rotterdam for the first time, my husband and I were not sure what to expect from the city. We fell in the love the pictures of the apartment and hoped that its location would also be a fit for us. It was! Delicious wood-fired pizza a block away, a green area along the canal a block away, and many excellent coffee cafes (the drink!!) within a 5-minute walk. If the weather hadn't been beautiful, we could have just walked out the door and hopped on a tram or bus.
As for the apartment--large windows, high ceilings, minimalist decor, and interesting art on the walls = a great place to stay. The kitchen was outfitted with all we needed, including some complementary drinks in the fridge! Although it is on a main thoroughfare, the living room with its large, street-facing windows, was surprisingly quiet. The bedroom is in the back, overlooking small gardens, and no street noise reached us. The bathroom was large and the radiant floor heating rocked. It is a lovely place to stay.

name: Architect’s Apartment. Central, Spacious, Luxury.
comments: Had a fantastic stay at Fien’s place, they were very communicative and made us feel right at home in Rotterdam. Would highly recommend staying here. Tram was super close and easy to get to “downtown”. Beautifully decorated and full of light

name: Cosy hostel in city center Rotterdam
comments:
Everything was very good and this is great Hostel for the Price/Comfort/Service ratio. Unfortunately the room from road side was influenced by Road work site and Tram noise so the windows do not provide enough sound isolation. It was noticeable only in the Morning hours thought.
Overall I recommend this Hostel to everyone🙂

name: Cosy hostel in city center Rotterdam
comments: Great location, great communication, comfortable bed. I’m a 34 year old female traveling alone and it was great! The bed has a USB charger port and its own light for your bed. The front desk was helpful with places to go to eat and see and slow heat English. I recommend!

name: Cosy hostel in city center Rotterdam
comments: Staying at the Room was convenient. The staff is friendly and the place is cozy. The kichen is nice. The location is very nice. The marina is just down the street. There is a cheese shop and a bakery next door. It is located in the best part of town. The lounge is very cozy. It is good for the price, no complaints.

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: We had a wonderful time with 4 adults, 4 kids  ranging from 5 to 16, and 2 dogs on the ship. It offers a brilliant experience for anyone who’s looking for something different at the best spot in Rotterdam. There are plenty of restaurants and fun places nearby. The view from the deck is constantly changing in the course of the day (and night) and it never gets boring. Whether you want to relax and have fun on the ship or explore the city of Rotterdam, the Amazone is a great choice. The communication was great, too. Erica provided all requested information very quickly and comprehensively, including specific information about charging stations for electric cars nearby. Someone was always on the ship to help in case of questions. Marijke very kindly and patiently explained the „whats, wheres, and hows“ on the ship and in person. We’ll certainly pitch Amazone again when we visit Rotterdam again.

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: Amazing location, delightful boat, great host!

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: Best place to spend NYE for a view on the fireworks!

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: What an incredible experience!  My family of five (2 adults, 3 boys ages 15, 10, 8) enjoyed our adventure aboard this historic ship in beautiful Veerhaven. The views from the deck are breathtaking and the rooms are quite cozy. There’s more than enough relaxing seating areas both inside the boat and on the deck.  We took so many beautiful photos and spent our entire evenings taking in the stunning architecture of Rotterdam. From the ship, we easily walked to Remastered, Euromast, Het Park, and the waterbus we took to Kinderdijk. Erica and Malou were wonderful hosts. Readily available and eager to make sure we had everything we needed. It’s worth mentioning that getting on and off the boat could be challenging for those with mobility issues if the tide is low but that should be a given on a boat and for our family it was fine. This stay will be a cherished memory and was such a wonderful way to experience Rotterdam!

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments:
Hier geweest met een vriendenweekend. Dit is op deze locatie echt ideaal.
Voordelen:
- Veel privacy (je kan veel lawaai maken)
- Host die snel reageert
- Top locatie
- Veel ruimte op de boot
Nadelen:
- Je moet een beetje tegen deinen kunnen.

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments:
The boat is beautiful and reasonably comfortable, but checking out was an issue.
We booked 5 nights, but checked out after 3 for a better night's sleep. Upon checkout, we left the key inside and the main door unlocked to ensure the host maintained access. I felt this was acceptable given the boat was behind a locked gate, and that the host's assistant was entering the boat during our stay (to our surprise). But this upset the host, who felt their property was at risk. In hindsight, I was naive not negligent, and could've been more cautious. I admit to misunderstanding the host's instructions, but I felt their aggressive language was unnecessary. The host later revealed in their rant they locked the boat the day of our checkout.
We felt our privacy was not respected. One time, the host's assistant made an unplanned visit and entered without knocking while I was taking a nap half-naked. The assistant was otherwise friendly and helpful. A memorable experience despite the mutual stress.

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: Wonderful stay at the boat. Kids LOVED it!!! It’s huge! Tons of space to hang and enjoy the beautiful view of Rotterdam. It’s totally safe and secure. Highly recommend for an adventure and for something unique.

name: Volledig Schip te huur Historische Veerhaven
comments: Absolutely loved my birthday party stay. Boat is absolutely stunning; location extremely easy to get to from the train station and with truly amazing views. Host is incredibly nice, helpful and responsive. Possibly best airbnb in Rotterdam!

name: Boutique hostel at great location
comments:
Very nice!
-Room: comfy beds, each spot accessorised with light and electricity point, each person has a BIG private cage box under the the bed, where you can put a locker AND in my bedroom we had other 3 additional lockers too. Bring your 🔐 or it’s for 4€
-toilets: very clean 🤩, hairdryer ✅ lots of hangers for your stuff. ⚠️ remember to bring your towel
-kitchen: small compared to the hostel and the number of guests, but ok. No washing machine, maybe more cutlery 🍴 is requested
-staff: nice, young and cheerful people 🥰
-common area: exactly as in picture you see: bohemien ambience, with a nice corner for concerts, free books to read and cozy sofas 🧚🏻‍♀️

name: Boat-apartment Fokkelina, Rotterdam city center
comments: staying in this boathouse was a special experience and fun if are ready for simple a bit spartan accomodation. getting on and off the boat is quite a journey as u need to pass via another boat, and with large suitcases can be an issue.  the location is good and staying on the canal is beautiful and relaxing.  no much breakfast options around, so better bring your own food. there are few improvements on basic light and electricity needed which I suggested the host. the kitchen area is spacious and convinient however all the rooms but one are between small to very small and three of them are cascaded so don't expect much privacy and requires some acrobat skills to pass through... the place is clean. in a nutshell, nice experience but not for everyone... :-)

name: Boat-apartment Fokkelina, Rotterdam city center
comments:
Cute, traditional houseboat only 15min from the center of Rotterdam.
We were there with 6 girls as part of a student trip and spent more time in the boat than we thought. That was fine though as there is plenty of room around the table or even outside on top of the boat (although there is no official table or anything). There is two showers and two toilets, the main was is quite spacious.
The boat a bit outside of the center but the metro or tram stop are a 5-10 min walk away. There is also 2 supermarkets, some restaurants and some local stores in the area.
Remond looked after us and he was very kind and accommodating. He always responded within 2 hours. We also had a problem with the hatch and he took care of it quickly.
The boat is very tight though, do not go if you are a tall person. Not only are the ceilings low, the bed are small too (not a problem for us, we are all short but just a heads up for other people). You also have to walk on a different boat to get onto yours, but that didn‘t really bother us. Every room has a ceiling window, but they are not covered so if you are sensitive to light bring a sleeping mask, and ear plugs if you are sensitive to sound (the wall are quite thin).
Overall though happy with our chose of accommodation in Rotterdam.

name: Boat-apartment Fokkelina, Rotterdam city center
comments: We had a great time on the boat and everything was perfectly organised. We had a bicycle stolen from the street off  the boat but even then the host was helpful in communicating with the local police.

name: Boat-apartment Fokkelina, Rotterdam city center
comments: This was a really unique stay - we’ve stayed on boats before, but nothing so spacious, and not in a big city. Although the location isn’t really central, it’s near Rotterdam South station, which is very convenient for travelling into Rotterdam, to Delft, The Hague and beyond. Walking distance from some fun parts of town, even if the area around the boat is quiet. To get to the boat you have to cross another, which is slightly inconvenient, but on the plus side it makes the boat feel even safer and quieter. The kitchen is generally really well equipped except the oven is broken, so there’s only a microwave/convection oven, which doesn’t work well for baking/roasting anything, so I’d advise to stick to the hobs, which are nice and powerful. The boat feels a little old and dated in terms of decor, but is very cosy and we slept really well on it. Be prepared for two of the rooms being accessed through others. A lovely stay though, and a relaxed and personable check-in process. Thanks!

name: Beautiful Studio on unique location
comments: nice apartment and owner. the kitchen, the shower and the lounge are perfect with there equipment (dishwasher, nice shower, Netflix and good wifi). the mezzanine is good but it's a bit small if you are tall. Good location in the city but the train station is a bit close to the apartment, so there is a bit of noise.

name: Beautiful Studio on unique location
comments:
Dafir welcomed in his wonderful house very close to the Rotterdam trainstation. His place is located in what must be one of the most cosy streets of the city. The apartment was clean and was properly equipped. The balcony is a nice little addition, certainly seeing the nice summery weather we had when staying there.
Would definitely recommend!

name: Beautiful Studio on unique location
comments: The view it this Studio ist absolutly beautiful. Definitly coming back again.

name: Country in the City
comments:
Flat is as described and depicted, very clean and located right in the center of Rotterdam (tramstop and metro within 5min walk, 15min to central train station by foot) - the street is quite busy with bars and restaurants but the sleeping rooms are facing the back side of the building and windows are fairly soundproof so inside its not to noisey. Checkin and communication was striaght forward
Kitchen and bathroom have all the most basic utils (pots, kutlery, spices, oil / towels ,showergel, hairdryer) and everything for laundry is also available (drying rack, iron+board), heating works well but no AC for cooling which is not needed anyways
Full recommendation for short & long-term stay!

name: Country in the City
comments:
Home is clean with nice comfortable beds. Living room nice and bright with big windows. The host was responsive to our difficulty getting into building and had lock replaced halfway through our stay. Handyman also helped with bathroom plumbing and fixing curtains.
Apartment is modern - wanted to open windows for a nice breeze but there are no screens so we had mosquitos and flies. Ended up keeping windows closed which made it stuffy on warmer days. One fan supplied.
Close walk to train and tram stations.

name: Loft D&A, Ruime design loft in bruisend Rotterdam.
comments: The place is freshly redone and very stylish. The design of the space is very nice with plenty of natural light and a fantastic bathroom. Daan checked me in and showed me all the features of the apartment. The location is perfect for getting around Rotterdam and super close to the park. When I arrived there were drinks in the fridge and some snacks/fruit provided which was delightful.

name: Loft D&A, Ruime design loft in bruisend Rotterdam.
comments:
Anique’s loft apartment was central (less than 30min walk or 10-20min by bus/train/tram) to many places including Rotterdam Central, Euromast, Weena playground, Market hall, Keilecafe.
The apartment was clean and shower pressure was very nice. Bed and couch were comfortable. There is a kitchen and small fridge as well. The apartment has a lot of windows which bring a lot of natural sunlight and can be opened when it gets warm.
Anique and Daan were extremely responsive. They also provided some snacks for us in the beginning, which was very nice. There are several grocery stores nearby too.

I only wish the place had a TV but I realized that was not in the listing. Also it is a loft apartment, which requires walking up about 2-3 flights of stairs, so I probably wouldn’t recommend this for people who have trouble walking. It was fine for our family.
Overall I would recommend this apartment, and it was a perfect home for our 4 day stay in Rotterdam.

name: Loft D&A, Ruime design loft in bruisend Rotterdam.
comments: Staying at D&As' place is experiencing a Great and local experience in Rotterdam: nice area, great location,  close to the metro station Coolhaven and surrounded with facilities such as a supermarket at the corner. The flat is filled of light, quiet, with nice furniture.  Daan and Anique are really reactive hosts and super flexible. They made my experience in Rotterdam memorable!!! Thank you also for the extra attentions you offer to your guests! bottle of wine, chocolate, bread, fruits... a great experience!!!

name: Cozy room Rotterdam center
comments: Judy is a great host! She made sure everything was provided at the airport and the check-in process was smooth. The apartment comes with a modern kitchen and bathroom. Room is spacious and has enough light. Very central location. Definitely recommend.

name: Cozy room Rotterdam center
comments:
The room and the whole place was super nice, clean and bright. I could feel home in that spacious room. Everything was perfect during my stay and I could count on Judy whenever I needed something she was available immediately!
I would happily stay there next time!

name: Cozy room Rotterdam center
comments:
I didn't know much about downtown Rotterdam, but let me just say this room is truly in the heart of the city. right off of Witt de Witte, a super trendy street full of great restaurants, and only a minute walk from Beurs, the only subway station with connections to all 5 of Rotterdam's subway lines.
I didn't needed to even rent a bike because everything is close and walkable. The Boijman's Depot and many other museums are within a 20 minute walk. Same with the waterfront and the Erasmus bridge. all major landmarks and social/cultural hubs are close by if you stay here. There are two major grocery stores 5 minutes away, and the price was great for my 6 week stay.
On top of that, the room is quite spacious and luminous, the kitchen & bathroom are very large, you won't feel cramped at all staying here. I loved the view with all the skyscrapers and interesting architecture around.
Lastly, Judy has been only kind, understanding and accommodating. I could not have asked for a better.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Jochem was a great host and his apartment is put together really well. If you’re staying in Rotterdam for a couple days I highly recommend. The guest room had a nice bed, desk, closet, tv, and a great view of the canal.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Really nice place in a great location, you can walk from central station and the view is lovely. Jochem is the best host, very kind and helpful. The place was very nice, just keep in mind that there are a lot of stairs and quite narrow so not recommended for heavy luggage.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Lovely place to stay. Very modern kitchen and bathroom. Might be handy to note that the bed is a foldable sofa/sleepcouch and that the trams pass by the house. So if you’re a light sleeper, you might want to bring earplugs just in case. Because the tram is so nearby, it’s an ideal location for a short stay. Lovely greenery and canal view, so perfect to come back to after a day in the bustling city. Jochem was in for a chat during meals but also let you be by yourself so I recommend this place for both introverts and extroverts :-)

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Jochem is a great and helpfull host with lots of recommendations to explore Rotterdam. His home is beautiful and very a high end and the view of the canal with swans and duck are fantastic. Great stay and I would highly recommend his Airbnb.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Jochem is a very friendly and helpful host. The room is clean, has all the necessary items and matches the pictures. The flat is also in a great location with a lovely canal view.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments:
Jochem was an amazing host, very responsive and friendly.
The house was located on a nice street and easily accessible via Tram, and on foot!
The interior decor was top notch and the Bathroom was super!

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Wonderful place to stay. The apartment is a beautiful, bright and comfortable space in a location that is quiet but near interesting bars/cafes/restaurants and an easy walk to the city center. I appreciated Jochem's responsiveness, local recommendations, and effort he put into making the stay as comfortable and convenient as possible.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: I spent a great time here. The room was cozy and in a great location. The view from the window was very peaceful. You can easily walk to the station and to the city center. The only little issue was with the self check-in but it was promptly solved and I bet it was an exception. I would definitely recommend Jochem's room!

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Jochem place was wonderfully designed, welcoming, and offered a one-of-a-kind view of Rotterdam's canals!

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: I loved this Airbnb. One of my best stays. Jochem is a great host, always responsive and helpful, , it was a pleasure to share his stylish home for a short time, there is a nice chilled out vibe in the place. The room is cosy and comfortable with a great view. Everything you need is there. I highly recommend staying here if you visit Rotterdam. The north part of the city is really cool too. Thank you Jochem! See you next time I hope. 😊

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Jochem is friendly and very responsible,  the  place it's nice not very far away from Rotterdam central station, the tram station it's close as well. The neighborhood is quiet and looks amazing with water canal view.👌

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: So happy I found this place in Rotterdam — staying here was absolutely amazing. It truly felt more like visiting a friend than staying at an Airbnb. Jochem has incredible taste, and every detail of the apartment reflects that. Hands down the best male apartment I’ve ever seen :) The neighborhood is super nice, and the guest room has an amazing canal view. I’d come back anytime!

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: Staying at Jochem's place was amazing. My room had a great canal view and comfy bed. It was exactly as shown in the photos. The sparkling water from the tap changed me forever! Jochem was lovely and gave excellent recommendations. I highly recommend this place and would return anytime!

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments: A very nice place, in a quiet, lovely part of town.  Two steep flights of stairs but the upper level space is worth it.

name: cosy guestroom with a canal view
comments:
The apartment is perfectly located: walkable distance to the station and the city center, in a quiet neighborhood afar from the noisy big streets. Jochem is a super nice host who built his place with care. The advantage of sharing the apartment is that everything is designed to be comfortable and practical for daily use.
One notice for people with restricted mobility: the apartment is on the top floor and some stairs are quite steep.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Nice and clean appartment, has everything you need. As I live in Rotterdam myself, I know the appartment is located in an amazing area, “Nieuwe Binnenweg” is a long and nice street in Rotterdam with shops, restaurants and bars and just around the corner. Marieke is a thoughtful host as she left a written postcard with a bottle of wine. I would definitely recommend:)

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Amazing apartment, beautifully decorated. On a nice quiet street, moments away from the tram stop and just a 15-20 minute walk from the centre of the city. Marieke also provided some extra touches like coffee pods, a bottle of wine and stroopwafel which was much appreciated :)
I wouldn't hesitate to stay here again! Thanks Marieke

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very convenient and super cool attic studio!  The location is great, 15 min walk from both Rotterdam Central station and the city centre.  Although you have busy streets with  lots of shops and cafes and bars in the neighborhood,  the Zwaerdecroonstraat (what a name ...) is very quiet, no noise at all during the night!  Our communication with Marieke was perfect from booking to departure.  Highly recommendable place to stay in Rotterdam :-)  And don't miss out on the fabulous  Jordy's Bakery  for breakfast/lunch at Nieuwe Binnenweg just 5 minutes walk from the apartment .....

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: A nice apartment in a good location for Rotterdam city centre and Rotterdam Ahoy (for the North Sea Jazz Festival). Easy to get to by Metro (Dijkzigt or Coolhaven) from Rotterdam Centraal Station. The flat is at the top of the building and is accessed by two flights of very steep stairs. Take care with large suitcases! The flat is well presented and clean. The flat has a balcony at the back which I liked. The toilet and shower are quite small so if you’re tall (like me) be prepared to squeeze yourself in! The host can be contacted easily and is very helpful. My partner and I were able to check in a bit early. All in all my partner and I really enjoyed our stay in this apartment and would recommend it.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Stayed for 10 nights. A great base for that time, quiet location, easy access to trains,trams, supermarkets, restaurants.  Sufficient kitchen, and a peaceful balcony for a beer at the end of each day.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment was definitely as expected based on the pictures and the description. Slept very well in the bed on my own. Contact with the host was very accurate and fast. Shes available very quickly. The apartment was very clean, spacious and had a very nice ambiance with the lightning and the furniture. Just what i needed for my staycation.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location, loads of privacy and close to the dynamics of Rotterdam.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Marieke was an excellent host and was very responsive to our messages. We brought our 4 month old and the crib was ready upon arrival, and there was some space for the pram so we didn't have to carry it up all the way. Very nice flat with everything we needed, and a great balcony for some summer night drinks! Location also great with lots of coffee places, bars etc nearby. walking distance to many forms of public transport.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment was great, cozy and very clean. The balcony has a good view and is perfect for relaxing.
If you are a bigger person or have a big suitcase beware that the apartment is on the last floor and the steps are extremely steep and narrow (normal for Netherlands, but still good to be warned)
The other downside is the VERY small toilet. If you are AVG height or taller there is no chance to sit on the toilet with the door closed, so privacy is a bit out of the question if travelling with another person.
overall the stay was very pleasant and I would definitely recommend it.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: This was probably one of the best Airbnb I ever stayed at. The loft is in the very city center, a very romantic and historic neighborhood that has a lovely view with a balcony and everything that you need in an apartment. The host Marieke was very helpful and handy when needed. I hope to return there again.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very cosy and convenient place. Centrally located but very quiet; nice, comfortable space to relax and an excellent base to discover Rotterdam. Practical, all the amenities you need are there. The small and nice balcony is a great bonus. Marieke is very helpful and very responsive, I warmly recommend her place.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Very lovely host and a beautiful compact apartment with a fantastic wee balcony. 15 min walk from the train station, nice quiet part of town.
Would love to come back 💗

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Lots of good things about this place - and two small drawbacks.
Good location, nice balcony, comfy bed, lots of space for a studio, well set up as a self catering rental place. Marieke was very responsive and a good host. I enjoyed my stay for all of these reasons.
But yes, as in other reviews, the WC is small. If you are a tall you will struggle to close the door. And also the flat is not well sound proofed from other apartments in the building - sound really travels through the old wooden doors and echoes in the hallway.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: We won't forget that relaxing and quiet balcony, with a view to the inner patios of the block.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very nice place with wondefull view and athmospher. Will come back longer :)

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great (great!) location if you are looking for something at a walking distance from the city center, quiet and yet lively, where you feel like you are actually in the city and not in some generic hotel/apt. Being so close to Depot / Kunsthal / Niewe Instituut was such a plus. And Dizzy, the jazz bar just around the corner, gave us top-notch music plus an enjoyable vibe. The space itself is unique, memorable, very well thought, and the balcony is so lovely and quiet! As other comments stated the "price" you pay for all these advantages is a small bathroom and somewhat challenging stairs, but honestly these two will be unavoidable if you want to stay on the top floor of a typical Dutch house in the inner parts of a large city here. So we would most definitely repeat our stay - a likely outcome, since we loved Rotterdam and plan to come back, and we believe Marieke's place played a no small part on our satisfaction with the city. Also: her flexibility and responsiveness were perfect 🤩

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location walking or quick Uber  distance to everything we wanted to see. Loved the Jazz bar down the street. Lots of space and beautiful views. Be mindful the stairs are tougher on the last set (wind around) and might be hard for folks with heavy bags.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: I had a fantastic stay. Marieke was very helpful and had great recommendations for the area. The balcony was lovely in the sunshine, ideal for an afternoon with a good book.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: We had a wonderful long weekend stay in Rotterdam in Marieke’s apartment. Check in was smooth and easy thanks to the instructions which Marieke had sent us. The other reviews don’t lie - there are A LOT of stairs which are rather narrow, especially once you get to the apartment itself. It was almost like climbing a ladder at points, but we weren’t too fussed, it was a quirk that I think fits the unique city of Rotterdam quite well! We really enjoyed the shower and can see why Marieke is proud of it! The bed and the sofa were also super comfortable. We were extremely happy to be greeted with a bottle of wine as we made it up to the apartment. The only minor issue we had was connecting our phones and the tv to the wifi once we had settled in - I messaged Marieke to see if she could help and she came straight up to assist us. She was super friendly and helpful and the apartment was beautiful and comfortable. We were extremely happy with our stay, thank you Marieke.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: The location was perfect for what I was doing in Rotterdam, and I really enjoyed the privacy and homeyness the place provided.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: An absolutely wonderful apartment in a quite but central location in Rotterdam. The flat has typical Dutch charm with wood beams in the pitched ceiling. The balcony overlooks a lovely set of gardens. Marieke was super friendly and very responsive to all our needs! Thank you Marieke!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Good location. Supermarket Lidl is 500-700m by walk. Good view from balkony.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Beautiful apartment. Spacious. Nice n cool (but not cold) even on warm days. Love the balcony.
The stairs are steep (at least for people from the UK), but we managed fine.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: This is a lovely apartment. It’s located very centrally but in a lovely quiet street. Marieke was very responsive and helpful. Would recommend a stay here!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: great place to stay, very peaceful and quiet, there is a balcony with a great view. walkable to bus, metro, and a short distance froma main  shops/restaurants street.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Perfectly located. Enjoyed quiet evenings on the little balcony, watching the parakeets in the backyard's lush greenery. Would come back anytime.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location, convenient to walk or take the tram to Rotterdam Centraal. Easy check-in/check-out procedure. The stairs up to the apartment were narrow/steep and the toilet room was quite small but otherwise, everything was perfect. Beautiful natural lighting!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: A really lovely place. Everything you need . Very stylish. The bathroom is pretty funny. The loo especially is so tiny of you are more than 5 foot 4 you have to leave the door open! We didn’t mind at all. The place was charming and comfortable. Enough space for my sons to join us for dinner. Lovely little balcony to sit out on. Very conveniently placed flat. We walked everywhere. Altogether a fantastic place.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: The space is lovely, clean and has a great layout if you need to work and stay for a few days. The neighborhood is green and close to museums and a lively street with lots of different restaurants and cafes plus good public transport to the train station. You might want to actually trust the warnings that the bathroom/toilet spaces are tiny and not private at all (one can not fully close the toilet space, which, well, should be amended) and the staircases are very steep, very authentic :). Marieke has been a super responsive host, we got some cookies and were able to use the laundry of the house. So overall - a lovely place to stay, if you are very comfortable with whoever you travel with.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great and cozy stay! Amazing views from the patio. So quaint and stylish. Will def book again. DO NOT bring a lot of luggage or you will have to haul it up all the stairs like we did haha.

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Appreciated the thoughtful design for a cozy space. Loved the balcony, spacious living space and comfy bed. The toilet room/shower are very compact so a little challenging for larger bodies so I was happy to be solo in the space. Overall a lovely stay and would recommend if the area suits the needs for your stay as it did for me!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is very cute and has all the necessary amenities for a short stay. As mentioned in the other reviews, the stairs are indeed challenging with luggage, and the toilet area is tiny with a door that does not close all the way. In any case I was not bothered by this, and the stay as a whole was very pleasant. There was a nice bottle of wine left as a welcome gift, and the balcony is lovely to sit in the morning with some coffee. Great location very close to the center, but on a quiet street. Overall a great place, will definitely like to stay again!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very lovely apartment, we had a really great time! It’s in a great location with all amenities required. The flat was completely spotless and the bed was super comfy. The balcony is a great addition with some lovely views. As other reviews have stated the bathroom area is completely exposed so do keep this in mind. This wasn’t a problem for us at all but you often have to go the toilet with the door open. I would be mindful that the 3 flights of stairs are incredibly steep with narrow steps, again not a problem for us but I would avoid if you have accessibility requirements. This is a feature in most Rotterdam/Amsterdam apartments so we expected it! Not a negative thing at all 😊 Thanks so much Marieke!!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Lovely little apartment in fantastic location for a weekend in buzzing Rotterdam. Clean, modern interior, balcony and a great host

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
I stayed here for 2 weeks while on a dance training close by. The house was lovely to stay in.
Everything you need.
The owner is lovely and the space has a great little balcony to hang out on as well.
As a single women I did feel a bit unsafe in the area. I was followed by a man once and there are men constantly commenting to you and whistling/ harassing. I didn’t feel comfortable at all in the area at times - though the area itself is also great in terms of location and proximity to the centre. I recommend this place !

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: This was my second time in Marieke‘s place and again, I had a great time in the super-nice apartment - this  time I could even enjoy the balcony ☀️

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay at Mariekes appartement. It's very stylish, light and, the temperature was pleasant even without using the AC. The location is also great, it's close to the city center but in a very peaceful street. Everything we needed was there and the communication with Marieke was excellent. We could even arrange an early check-in!

name: Design apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: I stayed for a week whilst attending a course. It was close to where I was going daily and also to some lovely parks and restaurants/the central shopping area also close. It was lovely and quiet at night and the balcony was nice addition. It was very comfortable and relaxing place to stay.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Marieke is really nice woman welcome me warmly!
House is in perfect location, clean , cosy and very comfortable!
Very nice Chill balcony :)
We will be probably back soon!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: A lovely little place in the center of the city of Rotterdam. Close to anything you will need, tram stop, food, etc. Marieke is a wonderful host, super helpful and always goes above and beyond to help accommodate best she can. Bedroom is lovely, spacious, and very comfy. Balcony is great, I loved the little hammock seats :)

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke is such a lovely host! Communication was really easy and smooth, we felt welcome and enjoyed the apartment a lot. Great balcony!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
We only spent a night in Marieke's place and it was super cozy and chill, with a great location. We particularly enjoyed the swing-chairs in the balcony. Also, the kitchen was neatly modern and full of useful amenities. The bedroom was spacious with a neatly integrated bathroom (shower/sink).
All in all, it was a real pleasure staying at Marieke's place and I would recommend her place to anyone coming to Rotterdam.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke's home was perfect for my long weekend in Rotterdam!  The location is excellent and the place is beautiful and cosy. Has everything you need! I especially enjoyed the hammock swings on the balcony with a nice glass of wine. Marieke was super communicative and accommodating - I will definitely stay here again the next time i'm in Rotterdam.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Lovely and elegant place to stay, it even began to feel like home because there was so much practicality and comfort in the design of the space. The kitchen was well equipped with a stove and oven, though we didn’t use the oven. We enjoyed the kitchen/dining area very much like we would’ve at home. All of the furniture was very comfortable, especially the sofa.
Marieke was very accommodating with the crib and high chair. The mattress in the crib had good support, which isn’t always the case at airbnbs or even hotels. As the flat is on the top floor, offering stunning views of the quaint street and gardens, this meant we had to climb steps. The winding stairs are steep for a stroller of our size and it did give us a bit of a fright initially, but we were able to make it work without a problem. This does mean that you’ll have to take your baby out of the pram. If you have a babyzen, it’ll be even easier but we decided to take a larger stroller for this trip.
Finally, some small details. The TV had many streaming services and local channels. It’s not always the case. There is a nespresso machine but I’m not sure if you’re meant to bring your own pods. We didn’t use it, hence didn’t look around to see if there were any pods. It wasn’t obvious, at least.
Overall, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
We really liked the flat, especially the balcony which is protected from rain and wind.
The bathroom (shower/sink) are in the befroom which was a bit confusing at first but it did not disturb us.
Nice present
Clean

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Die Wohnung ist sehr schön und hat alles, was man braucht! Unser persönliches Highlight war der Balkon. Der Ballon ist sehr gemütlich und befindet sich auf der sonnigen Seite.
Die Kommunikation mit Marieke war toll! Sie ist eine sehr nette Person.
Wir haben uns sehr wohl in der Wohnung gefühlt und würden nächstes Mal nochmal die Wohnung buchen.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Great place to stay. Some steep stairs up to the apartment but fun an adventurous. The unit had everything we needed and we loved all the big windows and the light it let in.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
the host was very friendly and very quick to communicate with.
the apartment was very nice although noice isolation from the other apartments was very poor
Anyway, for the length of my stay, it did not bother me.
I recommend nonetheless to stay here, the apartment was very clean, nicely decorated, and lots of light

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke's apartment was perfect in every way for our needs. Very convenient, clean, and spacious, with a great little balcony. Even better, Marieke is the consummate host. She went above and beyond to make our stay as pleasant as possible, despite our somewhat challenging timeline with check-in and check-out. 5 stars.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Amazing apparement with a lovely balcony 😻

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Situated on the most beautiful street in Rotterdam the flat is so stylish yet feels homely. The balcony is incredible and we loved sitting in the swing seats after a long day of cycling with a cool breeze watching the magpies and parauques fly by. We were really grateful for the fan! Loads of great amenities nearby. Loved the sounds of neighbours eating outside and children play felt very summery and soothing.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
I would recommend this place for couples visiting Rotter. Good location, city center and parks are in walking distance.
Cosy balcony with the view on the yard with bird symphonies is something.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: It was a lovely spacious place and the balcony is quite relaxing. Marieke is lovely and very easy to communicate. Highly recommend this place!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Beautiful apartement. Nice balcony and neighborhood. Stairs are really steep afeter the main entrance, but that is normal in the netherlands. :)

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
I deeply recommend this place where we had a wonderful time with our baby. The location is perfect, we have visited the city essentially by walk. The place is lovely, very clean and quiet. Also, we really appreciated the view from the balcony !
The host was available at any time to answer our questions about the place or the city.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Wonderful apartment, in a quiet street

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Great location at a nice quiet street with many amenities nearby. The apartment is tasteful and complete.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: An absolutely lovely apartment, especially the small hammocks on the balcony. Great location too.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke’s is a gem. Beautiful appartment. Stylish interior, bright with a lot of windows, equipped with everything you need. Nice and quiet neighbourhood, easy access by public transport from the station. Marieke is very helpful and always there. She lives in the same house. Flexible check in, good communication. I will be back soon!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: If I lived in Rotterdam, I would probably live in this area. A quiet street, yet close to everything. This one bedroom apartment is just perfect. The Host was delightful too.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Location: A nice and quiet residential area, near a lot of public transportation and shops for all your needs!
Apartment: clean, organised, all listed amenities available, very easy to locate
Host: provided clear and simple instructions for check in and getting settled, had complimentary wine available for us on the first day, gifted us a lovely wee container with stroopwafel and although we didn’t need to contact her for anything, she was always available if we needed her!
The ONLY thing I need to note for people who have never visited the Netherlands before, the apartment is at the top of a very steep flight of stairs, rather typical for apartments in the area, so keep that in mind for your luggage!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
The apartment is a 10-15 minute walk from the station, easily accessible and located in a quiet street. Really nice peaceful environment, with lots of restaurants, bars and access to all parts of the city.
Very spacious, incredibly clean apartment with excellent furnishings, i used this as a base for a business trip and it worked perfectly

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: The very quiet and comfortable apartment was ideal for our 5-day stay. It was roughly 20-25 minutes walking distance from the train station; tram line is less than 5 minutes away; Metro is slightly farther away. There are many supermarkets, cafès and restaurants in the vicinity. The kitchen is well equipped with Nespresso machine, capsules and variety of tea bags. We didn't cook any big meals but it was possible to do so. The oven is above the frig, so very difficult to reach for short people. We didn't make use of the small balcony because of the rainy weather. The bed and apartment were in general very comfortable. The stairs to the apartment are very steep. With a large suitcase it might be a difficult climb. Check-in/out was easy. The cleaning lady was still working when we arrived. Perhaps she felt rushed, which might explain the not too clean bathroom fixtures and mirror. But in general the apartment was clean. A bottle of wine and cookies were awaiting us...

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke’s appartment was wonderful to stay at, and she was a delightful and helpful host.   I would not hesitate in staying at her appartment, should I have an opportunity to return to Rotterdam again. The Bedroom was large, light-filled, comfortable and featured an accompanying ensuite.  The Kitchen and Living area featured new furniture, a fully equiped kitchen area and was styled beautifully.  The balcony, ajoining the dinning area, overlooked a leafy green outllook, making it a wondertful place to enjoy an afternoon wine.   Marieke was great to deal with on booking, check in and check out.   She was and extremely nice individual and offered great suggestions of local cafes and restaurants.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Loved your place Marieke thanks for letting us stay.  The street is beautiful with all the trees, flowers and scrubs.  The apartment was clean and exactly what we needed.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Great location. Well set up, comfortable and quiet..even with windows open.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke was very friendly and accommodating and the apartment was spotlessly clean, plus it was very spacious with lots of natural light. The balcony was very nice with two hammock chairs. Check in and check out were both easy. The apartment is in a perfect location, the street itself is peaceful, but round the corner from Nieuwe Binnenweg, which has lots of shops and great restaurants and leads right to the centre of Rotterdam in just 10-15 minutes of walking, or can get there by walking along the river.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Great townhouse and fantastic host. Thank you Marieke for making us feel so welcome on our first holiday with our little one.
Apartment is full of light and very comfortable. Facilities were all great. The stairs to get up to it are quite steep, which was a little tricky with bags, but I think that's life in Holland!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: This is a traditional old Dutch house and was upgraded nicely for guests. There are about 40 narrow, steep stairs to walk up, but this is not unusual for these houses. The bed, couch and chairs are very comfortable. The curtains are fantastic for darkening the room. We slept so well here. The train station is walkable and we used the Dijkzigt metro stop to go to the coast and to connect with other parts of the city. We walked to Het Park, and the art depot and to a water taxi stop. Marieke responded very quickly when we had questions.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke’s apartment was perfect. It was light filled, spacious, the bed was very comfortable, and the kitchen was easy to prepare meals in. It was also centrally located close to public transport, cafes, and supermarkets. Above all Marieke was very kind and responsive throughout. I would love to stay here again. Thank you Marieke for your warm hospitality!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke’s place was excellent for me. Beautiful light and a very good design. Easy and functional during a very busy work week where it felt like a proper home base, and fun to hang out in on the weekend when my partner joined. Marieke a lovely host and very helpful.
