The location is great. I will be back!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
We stayed at this nice apartment in Rotterdam, very central and nicely decorated.
The living room is cosy and the balcony is very cute.
Marieke is very responsive and we enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam. I recommend this place if you come for a week-end!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: lovely space, so quiet, lots of light (and  great blackout curtains for sleeping), comfortable bed, great host!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Marieke's apartment is nicely appointed with a great high tech bed/nice living room and kitchen + small balcony overlooking a lovely backyard green space.  The location on a quiet side street in the middle of busy Rotterdam is ideal--tram and metro close by.  Older clients should be aware that access to this apartment involves climbing up a steep (very Dutch) staircase.  Marieke generously offered to carry heavier bags up and down these stairs.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Really loved our stay in Rotterdam.  The apartment was lovely - gorgeous hammock chairs on the balcony!   Marieke was really helpful with dropping off luggage early with great communication.  The apartment is also ideally located - easily walkable from the main train station and easy access to everything.  Would definitely recommend (but worth noting that the stairs up to the flat are very steep - don't bring much luggage!)   A great stay - thank you.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: This place is really nice. Lots of natural sunlight, updated master bathroom, comfortable bed, plenty of outlets. The stairs are very steep and narrow which I've been told is common here. I unloaded my suitcase at the bottom of the stairs and made a few trips up. The neighborhood is very quiet and there's a large grocery store within walking distance. The bus stop (line 44) is close which made it convenient to get to the North Sea Jazz festival at the Ahoy. There was some construction going on the day I left and the one-way street was blocked so I had to walk down to the corner to meet my Uber driver but it wasn't a huge deal once I communicated with the driver. The host, Marieke, was responsive when I needed a couple of things. I would stay here again.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: One of the nicest and most helpful hosts we have ever had. The place is super cute and large. I would stay here again, only not in sumner until they install an AC unit. It was very hot and you can’t open the windows because of the mosquitoes. Also, don’t bring a bunch of luggage like we did as the stairs up are very steep and hard to bring a suitcase up. The location was great, right by the tram and good bars/restaurants.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: The apartment is in a very nice location, close to the city centre, yet in a beautiful neighbourhood. There are also many restaurants nearby. There is a lot of light in the apartment, the view is also nice, together with terace, that can be used when its not raining. The bathroom is in the bedroom, eventually very comfortable. Marieke was active and kind, always responding.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments:
Marieke's place is beautiful, confy and really stylish!
The apt is on a second floor through some really steep stairs, which is not unusual for The Netherlands. You have lots of sunlight coming from both ends, livingroom and bedroom.
The internal balcony (next to the livingroom) is really peaceful, and you can go outside and watch some internal patios and architecture of neighboring houses.
100% recommended!

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: second time staying here! Beautiful apartment to make yourself feel right at home. Great window lighting making it feel bright inside. Location is also good with walking distance from restaurants and attractions

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Lovely apartment, great balcony, great location

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: This is a very large bright space within walking distance to museums and a bit further to the Erasmus bridge, and a short walk to metro and tram stops.  It is nicely decorated but is showing its age a bit.  It has a full kitchen and nice big shower, but no washing machine, although there is a laundromat just around the corner.  The oven was not very clean (crumbs left) and the cookware is getting a bit worn.  More cooking utensils would be good, such as a spatula.  There is a panini maker that I couldn’t get to heat up.   You must ascend two staircases to reach the apartment, which would be difficult for anyone with reduced mobility.  Overall we found it to be just fine for our needs.

name: Spacious and bright apartment in heart of the city
comments: Great location, clean apartment and nice balcony

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: We really enjoyed our stay in the heart of Rotterdam, we really appreciated the fully equipped, clean, modern, spacious, nicely decorated and bright apartment ideally located with all services and amenities (parking lot, bicycles parking, gym, concierge with printing service...). We also appreciate the very kind and reactive communication from the host.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: We had an amazing time at Coco’s apartment. The location is ideal, it’s very central, there is a large grocery store and coffee/breakfast place in the same building. The tram stop is just outside the main entrance and the main high street is 5 mins away. The apartment is fully stocked with all kitchen utensils and appliances, we were able to cook easily. It is very spacious, clean and beautifully decorated. Coco is a great host, she really helped out with booking and checkin. We spent a month there and felt at home from day one, highly highly recommended.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
Coco was incredibly communicative and helpful before, during, and after our stay (when we accidentally left a coat in a closet).
The place was spacious and looked exactly like the pictures. The beds were very comfortable and the curtains blocked out the light quite well. The place is very well-equipped even for an extended stay - you've got everything you need to have a lazy day at home or cook a meal. We particularly enjoyed the big TV in the living room and the tons of storage space! The location is super-convenient for travel within Rotterdam as well as to other cities via the central station nearby.
There are plenty of restaurants, bars, and cafes in the area too. Great stay!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Coco’s place is a perfect gem in central Rotterdam. Comfortable, well-equipped and clean. We stayed with 3 small kids for 2 months and had a wonderful time (the balcony was a lifesaver). Coco was wonderful to work with. Highly recommend.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
We felt welcomed.
Perfect location to explore the city Centre easily reachable by foot, distance to Central Station 5-7min by foot.
Public transport Right in front of the building.
Very modern Building.
Spacious with a great balcony and the rooms are fine as well.
Looking forward to come again soon!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Such a great apartment with everything you need to feel comfortable. It is a generous size and I loved the view overlooking the canal and tram. The owners had great communication from booking through to departing so thanks for making this a smooth trip.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Very nice styled two bedroom apartment, right next to central station. Apartment is quiet when doors to balcony are closed.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
This spacious and modern apartment is just a 4-minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal Train Station, so GREAT location for Rotterdam museums, the theater district, and day trips to Delft and Utrecht. Super-responsive host. Well-equipped kitchen. Good choice of restaurants and coffee shops nearby. We loved sitting on the balcony and watching the bicycle traffic go by. We were very happy with our stay.
One note: the 1.5 bathrooms consist of one big marble-tiled bathroom with a double sink, shower, and tub. The one toilet is in a separate smaller bathroom.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: We had a great stay with more than enough space, a washer & dryer to use and a huge balcony for our morning coffee! The apartment had expansive sliding windows to let in the sunlight and fresh air. I expected only one toilet to be an issue with our family of four but since it was seperate from the shower & tub it worked out nicely. I also appreciated having someone meet us at check-in and Michiel was very responsive to our questions before and throughout our stay. I would highly recommend staying here! We will most certainly be back!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Spent two nights at this beautiful appartment. Very nice balcony by the way. I don‘t regret having stayed there as opposed to lodging in a hotel. Hence: a supercool experience! Thank you, Coco

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Excellent location close to Rotterdam Centraal Station and the tram stops and on the edge of Chinatown with its many brilliant Asian restaurants.  The enclosed balcony was lovely with direct views over the canal and crossroads.  Three fast lifts to the third floor apartment were a boon after a long day of sightseeing.  Responsive and positive support from Michiel throughout and a friendly greeting on our first day in the city.  Extremely comfortable memory foam bed and plenty of towels.  One of the best Airbnbs we have stayed in and we recommend it highly.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Great location, very easy to find places to eat close by and use the trams to explore Rotterdam which stop almost outside the entrance door (contactless payment via bank card very useful). On a central street walking distance from the station, but there was no noise or disturbance. Enjoyed looking out from the balcony table. We all slept very well on the comfy beds. Clean and well equipped. Secure access to the apartment 24 hrs. We would definitely stay there again.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: The apartment is beautiful and the balcony is a big big plus! The location also just perfect - we went everywhere on foot. The communication with the hosts was easy and fast. We were really happy with our stay and we can totally recommend it to anyone visiting or staying in Rotterdam!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: The apartment is very well located close to the Central Station. It is comfortable and spacious. It was nice to sit on the balcony to eat breakfast and watch city life. Some of the main museums and a variety of restaurants are within easy walking distance.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: We had good time in the apartment. The location is very convenient, 2 mins walking to central station, cafe shop, restaurant and supermarket are in the downstairs. The apartment has nice view, you can sit in the terrace to relax. I'd like to live next time if I go to Rotterdam again. Besides, the landlord is very kind.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Flat has a great location in Rotterdam! Close to the train station, grocery store and cafe outside the building, and tons of restaurants in the neighborhood. Very spacious flat with a lovely balcony/ patio. Great location so enjoy Rotterdam and all the city has to offer.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
Michiel was very responsive and flexible about anything we asked for.
The place is just like the photos clean and the apartment was big with a nice balcony on the street , we loved it.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Incredible spot. Don't hesitate to book here! My wife, 15-month-old son, and I stayed here for the Marathon weekend and had an incredible stay. The place was spacious, well-located, and had an incredible view, with a nice balcony.  Also fantastic hosts!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: This was one of my all-time fave Airbnbs. For space, comfort (great beds), amenities (sleek kitchen, washer/dryer), location, and QUIET, it was perfect for a first trip to Rotterdam. The Calypso building (2013) is a notable example of cutting-edge Rotterdam architecture, so we felt like we were staying in a real city “slice of life.” It’s super convenient to the train station, the Museum district (the Depot is a must-see), the restaurant street Witte de Withstraat, and groceries, cafes, shopping, etc., all very nearby, plus you can walk to the Maritime area, Cube Houses, Markthal, etc. The apartment is really spacious and the view out the front windows is cool, with trams, a canal (with a quote by Samuel Beckett in the water), the Euromast in the distance, and an ever-changing sky. We had good meals at Bertmans, Kaapse Maria, and Ter Marsch & Co, plus gelato at Capri IJssalon. The friendly hosts were very proactive and we had no issues at all, would stay here again in a heartbeat.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Very nice place with perfect view and location!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
We enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam! The location was walkable to many bars and restaurants. We loved sitting in the balcony and people watching. Although a busy city, it is quiet in the apartment (even when there was a festive car parade after Dutch won a game in European Championship).
Michiel was excellent in the check in process. He was very kind and thorough throughout the process.
If I return to Rotterdam, I will definitely stay in this apartment again. It was quite spacious for us and our two teenagers.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Perfectly located apartment. We loved the balcony, central location that worked well for exploring the city but also relaxing. Great restaurants nearby but easy kitchen to cook in. We used the parking which was easy and convenient. I would highly recommend.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: There were three in our group who stayed for three nights at the apartment. We were delayed on the train to Rotterdam but this wasn’t a problem for our host to greet us at the apartment entrance. The apartment is very central and the walk from the  train station was only five minutes. The apartment was very modern with two large bedrooms, a large bathroom and an open plan kitchen/ living room. There was a covered balcony outside overlooking the street which ran the length of the apartment, something that I wasn’t expecting and made a lovely addition to the space available. The kitchen was modern with all the appliances you could want but we didn’t need to use them as we ate out for all our meals. We couldn’t fault the layout, cleanliness or comfort of the apartment. It is perfectly located in the city centre and made walking to most locations very easy. I would thoroughly recommend this apartment and the communication with the host team. I can’t wait to come back!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: We were really happy staying here. You cannot get more convenient... just a few minutes from the train station, near several tram stops, and close to shopping and dining streets. We loved the kitchen and felt very comfortable in the beds. The laundry room was just what we needed. It was very clean and comfortable overall. I did not find it to quite meet the value of the price paid, however. Like one towel per person even though we were staying 3 nights (we could have washed the towels, sure, but most places give many more towels). TV didn't really have anything to watch.  Key was difficult to open the front door. But these are minor quibbles and do not take away from the overall 5 star rating. Great and friendly communication, too.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Michiel responded very quickly to our questions. Rotterdam is probably our favorite big city in The NL.  We loved this spacious, very modern flat! The kitchen was well-equipped. There was a new washer and heat-pump dryer (Samsung) in the unit. The ample storage space in the bedroom closets was greatly appreciated. We liked the enclosed balcony that ran the length of the apartment. There is a grocery store in the building. The very modern and sleek Rotterdam Central Station made traveling there and to nearby towns quite easy. We would definitely stay again on a future trip to Rotterdam.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: I cannot say enough good things about Coco’s place. I was traveling with my 78-year-old father and it was the perfect oasis after long days of sightseeing, a great home base. It was easy getting in and out and less than a five minute walk to Rotterdam Central train station, which is visible from the apartment’s open-air balcony, another awesome feature. There is a great coffee shop and a grocery store attached to the building. The beds were very comfortable. We were able to do laundry in the easy-to-operate washer and dryer. Chilling on the balcony and hanging out in the living/dining room area was peaceful and the perfect way to recharge. We absolutely loved it

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments: Beautiful space and very easy to get around Rotterdam. Bonus points due to proximity to Rotterdam Centraal - less than a 5 minute walk, which helped with our luggage! There was ample space and did not feel crowded; we were highly impressed with the luxurious bathroom and functional living/dining area. We were able to stream television/movies at our convenience, and while the weather did not agree on this trip, the balcony/patio area was beautiful with great people-watching views.

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
Coco and the team was very responsive from the booking until the check in & out time. We were explained about each of the rooms and the rules of the house very clearly since the beginning.
The rooms are beautiful and spacious for 4 people. Water & floor heating works great. The balcony is perfect for chilling, and my nephew really enjoyed the bathtub :D
If we had to give feedback, we would love it if there was more of the bathroom amenities :) But other than that the stay was perfect. Thank you so much!

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
The flat is just as described with several details that really make you spend a great time.
The balcony is amazing.
Lots of restaurants and markets around and walking distance to the main attractions in Rotterdam

name: Spacious luxury apartment next to Central Station
comments:
Ideal if you value space and location. Incredible square footage for a city center apartment. Equivalent size to 3 hotel rooms. Perfect for our family of 2 adults, 2 teens.
Pros:
-space to spread out
-Low floor so if elevator is taking long, just take the steps for 30 seconds so convenient.
-supermarket at basement
-responsive hosts. We were out of laundry detergent and they came over within 10 mins to drop some off.
Cons:
-poor quality bathroom towels. Thin and rough. This is an easy fix.
-dim lighting. Not a big deal, but also easy fix.
Would recommend if you value walkability to train station and space for group to spread out

name: Spacious Family House with Garden in City Centre.
comments: Very cosy place , well located. The decoration in the house is great. The garden is very well kept. It is very still on the street, easy to find a parking spot. The host responds very fast. Everything was clean. Really nothing negative to say. It went very well. Thank you!

name: Spacious Family House with Garden in City Centre.
comments:
Juul's home is indeed spacious and comfortable! We (me, my husband, and 18 month old son) stayed here a week. There were tons of books and toys for my son to play with, and lots of space for him to play in the living room and in the toddler bedroom upstairs. There is a nice bathtub with lots of bath toys too. There is a baby gate at the top of the stairs, a high chair, and lots of baby cutlery. The garden is beautifully done and quite spacious as well. The house is a perfect distance to Centraal Station (10 min walk through a park) in a quiet neighborhood. There aren't too many restaurants in the immediate area, but the Blijdorp subway stop is close by. Juul was incredibly accommodating to all our requests and very responsive via text for any question or need.
The room where my son slept had dark curtains, but I was glad that I brought my blackout shades from home to make it darker. We weren't able to get the heater going (as we stayed in early autumn) so had to bundle up the little one to keep him warm at night. The bed in Juul's room is quite comfortable too. The stairs are not super steep (for Dutch standards) but they do have a curved part. The kitchen was well-stocked and everything worked perfectly.
I would highly recommend Juul's place for a family with young kids. It's a perfect house for this. You'll have the space and the comfort you need, not to mention the sunlight (hard to find in Dutch houses)!

name: Spacious Family House with Garden in City Centre.
comments:
The house was great! Homey and spacious!! The beds were made and clean, the kitchen had great amenities, everything was comfortable..
one thing is the fire alarm ran out of battery and didn’t stop making noise for the night, but Juul was very helpful and responsive!
We had a lovely time🤗

name: Romantic living in tidal rivier
comments: Thomas' place is fantastic. A stylish, well-equipped house-boat in a good neighborhood. You can walk to several sights in Rotterdam, swim in the canal or take a taxi boat or bus nearby. The communication was easy and there is a very responsive, kind assistance nearby. We (family with children) enjoyed the stay, the space, the views on the water, the design of the interior...

name: Romantic living in tidal rivier
comments: Tranquil respite as home base. We used Thomas’ home as home base for exploring Netherlands. It’s well connected to bus and trains. The neighborhood always felt safe even when walking back from the train after dark. Families with kids were often playing and talking in the street and park in the evenings. But the biggest reason you should not hesitate to book is the peacefulness of this retreat. Beautifully filled with light and art, we looked forward to the view of the park as swans glided past the windows every morning and every evening. The home is unique and unforgettable. Thomas made sure we had everything we needed to enjoy our stay. He even arranged to have basic groceries provided so we didn’t have to go shopping on arrival. Beds were comfortable, the kitchen and bathroom well equipped.

name: Cozy room near  Rotterdam "AHOY " and  "Zuidplein"
comments:
Great place - the pictures do no justice at all. it is very spacious, the bed is big and comfortable and the bedroom is quite wide, with a huge window facing a wee garden. Quite lovely. Weather permitting, it’s probably the best place to finish your day with a drink.
The flat might look far from the city centre but public transport in Rotterdam is wonderful. The metro station is basically around the corner and there are bus stops everywhere. If you get a bike or something, even better. I came to attend a conference on the other side of the city and I couldn’t even manage to be late (and I did try).
For the value of this place, it’s probably one of those deals you get very rarely. I did not have the pleasure of meeting Judy but her friend was just great and lovely.
Save yourself some time and book it already ;)

name: Cozy room near  Rotterdam "AHOY " and  "Zuidplein"
comments: Attending a 5-day conference at AHOY, Judy's place offered an extremely convinient (15 min walk to the site, 9 min walk to the Metro Station Zuidplein), complete privacy, and just about every facility I needed for a 6-night stay. Judy was easy to communicate with, flexible with check-in time, and her place is very clean. For those who value commute time to AHOY, her place is it!

name: Trendy Studio Rotterdam Center
comments: Daniel was great host to us made us feel very homely from the first minutes we entered the property. Would definitely recommend and visit again, the  House was very spacious  and clean beautiful light comes into the house as soon as you enter was a very  great feeling sofa so big and comfortable makes you want to fall asleep,

name: Serene modern apartment
comments:
Arno's apartment is exactly like the photos in the publication. It is a spacious, modern space with a great view! The apartment is very well located and has excellent lighting. You have very good connectivity in the neighborhood.
The apartment is in great condition, Arno is a very friendly host, he cares about all details, everything was spotless!! We will definitely come back.

name: Serene modern apartment
comments: One of the best Airbnb I’ve stayed in ! It looks even better than on the pictures. The furnitures and the layout are really well thought out. Nice balcony as well with a view on the river. The area is quiet but within a 5-10 min drive from city center. There is a supermarket within 10min walks. Hopefully we will book it again in the future !

name: Charming & Spacious Family Home with Garden
comments:
I stayed at Sara’s place with my mum and brother. The spot was located 10 minutes by bike from the city centre and 10 minutes walking from lots of great cafes and restaurants and grocery stores.
The house was warm, bright, and inviting. The home furnishings and design were expertly thought out. The kitchen and dining area were perfect for elaborate family meals.
Could not recommend Sara’s home more highly.

name: Charming & Spacious Family Home with Garden
comments:
We absolutely loved staying at Sara's place. The location was perfect for us and Sara went out of her way to make us feel welcome and make sure we had everything we needed.
The home is stunning and full of character, but also extremely functional. It feels like you are staying at your stylish friends' house. From the beamer for fun movie nights for the kids to the very well equipped kitchen, we felt right at home and are very much hoping that we can visit again.
The location was especially perfect for us because our friends live close by, but the neighborhood is a great hub for anybody to explore the city. Public transportation is close and easy to navigate, there is a mini neighborhood market right across the street for all your essentials, lots of restaurants and bars in walking distance, and for those traveling with little ones there are plenty of playgrounds close by.

name: Moderne en stijlvolle kamer met een privé badkamer
comments: Perfect for my partner and myself. The stay was very comfortable and private. The mornings were nice having a coffee on the balcony. The host is very friendly and communication between us was easy. Would definitely come back :)

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: Lovely apartment with amazing view and everything you need. Great location too in one of the coziest neighborhoods of Rotterdam! Metro and tram nearby, as well as supermarkets and nice restaurant s and bars. Katarzyna is a perfect host too!

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: The apartment is situated in a very quiet neighborhood, with a lot of shops, cafes, and restaurants around. Very good location, near the Central Station and good starting point to visit other parts of the city. The apartment is very cozy, quiet, and spacious with a beautiful view of the river. Very well equipped. Katarzyna is a great host and communication with her is very clear and smooth.

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: We really loved our stay, Katarzyna was a great host, the flat is in a great location in a lovely part of the city, not too far from the center. The view was amazing and we really felt at home. The kitchen was really equipped as well. I recommend it to everyone!

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments:
Generally OK appartement in the Delfshaven area.
Sitting area is quite dark. No television and no curtains or anything else to close off the windows on the water side.
Wash basin in the bathroom is too small too be of practical use other then washing hands
Otherwise the apartment, clearly recently renovated, is comfortable and we enjoyed our time in Rotterdam. Good communication with the host, Kata.

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: Een thuis aan de Schie. Schoon en veel privacy. Contact met Kata was zeer prettig. De kookliefhebber kan het hart ophalen in de keuken en de badkamer is ook erg fijn. Het zijn oude karaktervolle huizen en daardoor ook gehorig. Ik heb uiteindelijk met oordopjes geslapen.

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: Really clean, comfortable and relaxing apartment with everything you need. Great view of the cannel and the location is well connected with Metro/bus/tram nearby, Katarzyna was very helpful through out and made check-in and check out super easy. Its a great place to stay, I will stay again when returning to Rotterdam.

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: Kata is extremely attentive and the space is well equipped, lots of natural light, and extremely clean. It was perfect for us and we wouldn’t change a thing! Mattress was also very comfortable - we are thinking of getting ourselves!

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: The apartment was really clean and tidy. The view on the canal is just great. Had a great time there!

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments:
Kata’s home was a wonderful home away from home for my boyfriend and I. Kata was a wonderful host - she was easily reached, provided us with answers to any questions we had, and also left us some frozen meals for when we arrived. She was truly so genuine in her care for us and the experience we had.
Her apartment is very spacious and the views are gorgeous. We loved having our windows open to let the nice breeze into the home, it was always so lovely. As someone who loved to cook and bake, we were never lacking in equipment to make anything we wanted. The apartment was just as advertised in photos and there were no unwanted surprises.
The apartment was also close to grocery stores, work out centers, restaurants, and public transit. We would gladly come back here again! Wonderful city and wonderful host!

name: River ArtHouse - unique apartment with the view
comments: Good location. Beautiful view. Katarzyna was really helpful :)

name: Bohemian apartment with garden in Rotterdam
comments: We had a wonderful stay at Sabine’s place! Communication was fantastic, it’s especially great for a family with kids, and the view of the bridge is fun too. Spacious and modern and clean. Cute patio and garden, and great rain shower, too!

name: Bohemian apartment with garden in Rotterdam
comments:
We stayed here for 4 nights including working from the apartment one day.
Sabine's place is lovely - cosy apartment with great decor - light, lots of plants, comfy couch and beds, full kitchen and good wifi. It's a unique location on a little island about 25 min walk into the centre of town. The neighbourhood is very calm and residential, and felt very safe.
Sabine was a lovely host. She even offered to pick us up from the station in her car as it was snowing when we arrived! Check in was easy and communication was great.
We would definitely recommend Sabine's for a short or longer stay!

name: Bohemian apartment with garden in Rotterdam
comments: Right on Noordereiland, the apartment was a nice, quiet base to explore the surrounding city of Rotterdam. Our kid loved being able to head over to the playgrounds right across the street. We loved being able to grab a bikeshare and hit the nearby grocery store or stop in one of the cafes or even just sit on the waterfront. Great location!

name: Bohemian apartment with garden in Rotterdam
comments: We had a brilliant long weekend in Sabine’s place. Sabine is a top host - super communicative and friendly and accommodating. The apartment is beautiful and comfortable, and our son was thrilled to find toys waiting for him (it was actually kind of hard to persuade him to leave…). The neighbourhood was very peaceful despite being so central: Sabine kindly lent us her bike, and also taking advantage of on street cargo bike rentals which always seemed to be around, we were able to cycle everywhere which was brilliant (public transport also good and the place is well served by a regular bus a short walk away). Rotterdam was great - visiting with a five year old we spent a lot of time at the Maritime Museum, kids marina, and Plaswijck park as well as the many playgrounds within easy reach. The Kunsthall and Boijmans museums were also great and super easy to get to. Thanks Sabine for being so accommodating and generous with your lovely place.

name: Bohemian apartment with garden in Rotterdam
comments: We can highly recommend Sabine’s place for a stay in Rotterdam. Sabine was very helpful at check-in and made sure we would have everything we needed during our stay, and she even left some snacks which was very thoughtful! The house is really nicely decorated and clean, even more spacious than we expected, and located in a peaceful area. The back of the house has a view of the Erasmusbridge which is super cool! Thank you Sabine for our stay!

name: Privekamer in rustige en vriendelijke omgeving.
comments: The room is quite cozy has a good living space. The garden provides a fresh view and daylight with broad windows. You have your own bath and toilet, both are just next to each other with the room. There is a train and metro station by 10 min walk which allows you to reach city center with only one vehicle within 20-25 min. Peet is one of the most attentive hosts I have seen. He even came and helped me at the train station for my arrival. It is a great place to spend the night in Rotterdam.

name: Privekamer in rustige en vriendelijke omgeving.
comments: Super gemütlich und sehr gute Ausstattung mit allem was man braucht. Vor allem ist der kleine Garten ein Highlight.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
I very much enjoyed my stay in this room. Everything was modern and I found the kitchenette very useful.
It should be noted, however, that the room is at ground level and the wall facing the street is a floor-to-ceiling window with hanging vertical blinds. This made it a tad noisy at times during the weekend. Also, while the blinds do fully cover the window, any slight breeze in the room will create gaps making it possible to see in the room from outside. This cought me by surprise a few times.
All in all it was a pleasent stay. Cheers!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: Urban lodging at its best. Outstanding and very personable communication. Very friendly people. The studio is new and equipped with everything you might need. Equipped kitchen, fantstic linnen, great bed, very nice bathroom. We even cooked a few meals in the kitchen.  I rented this for seven nights as part of a bigger trip. Perfect location in Rotterdam. Walking distance from center and station which means very easy access to the rest of the Netherlands (Rotterdam is a 40 minute train ride to Amsterdam and Dutch public transportantion is fantastic). The studio we had is ground level and facing the street. It's very well screened of though and the street noise didn't bother us at all. Highly recommended.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: Very clean room, perfect location to visit Rotterdam. Room has airco and all necessary needs. The only downside is maybe the noise from the street due to the single glass windows and the curtains for which you have to watch out that you’re not exposed to the street. Also a double bed would have been nice instead of the two single beds which were placed next to each other. But for the rest I would really recommend it, perfect base to visit this really nice city. Communication with the host was perfect! Very good service on that front!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: The flat is new, fresh and super central.  Natasja makes sure you are well looked after.  It takes a moment to get used to street front window, but then its great.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Natasja's and Mylan's. The appartement is very well located (5 min walk from the Central Station), so we could visit Rotterdam and go to The Hague, Delft, Dordrecht and Amsterdam very easily. The noise from the street was not a problem at all. Communication was really easy with Natasja, we got all the informations needed before our arrival, and she was reactive to every question we had. Besides, our return train being at 5pm, she offered to store our luggage in another room so we could enjoy our last day in the city without carrying our suitcase, which was really appreciated. Maybe one thing to improve: floor and furnitures were quite dusty. Otherwise, we recommand the studio for sure!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
The apartment was exactly like the pictures and very well located.
They let us do the check in early to drop our bags and start exploring the city.
The apartment is too small for 3 adults.
The kitchen is very small, not that good to cook meals.
The apartment is on the ground floor, with big windows directly to the street, which makes the apartment really noisy, specially during the night... and also we had bad luck with the other guests in the hotel (they were too noisy).
When we arrived at the entrance hall and to the apartment it was really bad tabaco smell that was dificult to get rid off due to the fact that there are no windows to open.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
ES: Es perfecto si necesitas estar en el centro de la ciudad, tiene todas las comodidades necesarias, todas las intrucciones son claras, cerca del transporte público y del Central Station y a pesar de estar en el centro, la calle en donde está ubicada es muy tranquila, de muy poco tránsito, ambientación muy agradable y cuidado en los detalles que hacen que te sientas bienvenido, muy buena relación precio valor, en resumen mi estadía estuvo genial!
EN: It is perfect if you need to be in the center of the city, it has all the necessary amenities, all the instructions are clear, close to public transport and the Central Station and despite being in the center, the street where it is located is very quiet, very little traffic, very pleasant setting and attention to detail that makes you feel welcome, very good value for money, in summary my stay was great!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
Very well situated within walking distance of Rotterdam Central Train Station, Tram stop and shopping area.
The accommodation was clean and had all basic requirements but it was far too small for 3 adults.
It was on the ground floor directly on the street with a fair amount of pedestrian and traffic noise. It had one way glass on the windows with blinds, but could do with thick curtains to block out the street lights.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: Clean, comfortable space with everything I needed for a short trip. The location was central yet quiet, since the hotel is on a side street. I would totally come back for a short trip!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
many thanks for a great stay in a very nice, clean and contemporary style accommodation.
excellent location and easy to walk from & to Rotterdam attractions.
Flat as drescribed and as photographs. it may take some time to get use to be on ground floor room facing street but mirror glass makes it difficult to see inside from street and curtains at night also gives the peace of mind to sleep like a baby...... no issues with this, it was funny to be able to "spy" people on the street!
only as a suggestion, it would great to have microwave, although i must say that the kitchen is well equipped.
comunication with host very fast and accesible, very friendly hosts.
many thanks for letting us stay here !

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
The location was perfect!
Although the appartment was located at the street level, it was pretty quite.
The apartment had had not windows.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: Nice and well cleaned loft located on street level of a central but quite area. I have been there for few days for business travel with no time to visit the neighborhood but the position is perfect to reach the city center in few minutes of walk.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: Nice location and arrangement. However, the room is having a big window facing the street with vertical blinds. Although the windows are single-sided, it is shocked when we first enter the room. In general, this is a good accommodation with air-con!!

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments: The place is very nearby central station but on ground floor and near street. Not a good choice if you have light sleep, good for us three.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
The room is just nice for 3 person, clean and cosy. May not be suitable for light sleeper cos it is a bit rowdy during the weekend night. It is tolerable for us though.
Thanks the host for being responsive and make it easier for my group.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
We had a wonderful experience! The place was easy to find and conveniently located very close to Central Station, allowing us to walk to most attractions. A lovely touch was the daily snacks left for us – they were absolutely delicious, thank you!
The space is small, and being on the ground floor, we were a bit hesitant to open the windows due to privacy concerns.
Overall, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would happily return in the future.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
I booked this Airbnb late at night for my father and his partner, but unfortunately, due to an unforeseen health issue, they were unable to go. The following morning, I tried to cancel the reservation, but the policy did not allow for any refund—even though it had been less than 12 hours since the booking and the host hadn’t missed out on any other guests. I also attempted to change the dates, but that wasn’t possible either.
I was disappointed by the lack of empathy, basic flexibility, and support from the host. The only compensation offered was a refund of the Airbnb service fees and a €50 voucher for a future booking. In the end, I decided to go myself, simply to avoid losing the full amount, which was more than seven times refund propose.
As for the accommodation, I found it quite overpriced. The room faced a sidewalk where people could easily pass by, offering little privacy or comfort. That said, the location is convenient and may be suitable for a very short stay.

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
This is a great location in the heart of Rotterdam. The apartment looks like the photos and check in was super easy.
The flat is on the ground floor and the entire wall facing the street is floor to ceiling glass windows. The blinds are a louvre type and left us feeling a little exposed.
Despite that we did enjoy our stay in this modern apartment and just made sure not to expose ourselves to the public through the big window ;)

name: Midtown Rotterdam Duo Deluxe
comments:
We would like to thank the host for staying true to both themselves and the details provided on the listing page. On the 3rd or 4th day of our stay, they kindly asked if we needed anything, and promptly responded to our request for cleaning and fresh towels.
The location is very central and ideal for those who enjoy walking, with many attractions easily accessible on foot. Rotterdam Central Station is just a 7-minute walk away. The windows are covered with black film and equipped with roller blinds, ensuring complete privacy at all times of the day. You can sleep safely and peacefully at night.
On our first day, the remote control battery had run out, but it was quickly replaced. However, one area that could be improved is the television. The device only supports apps, and each requires login credentials—typically the host’s email and password. We also couldn’t find any channels to watch local broadcasts. Enjoy your stay.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments:
This Airbnb was so clean and has everything you need!
Natasja was so attentive and was wonderful with checking in and making sure we had everything we needed.
There are no windows to the outside but it actually made for an incredible sleep and really helped me overcome jetlag.
This spot is also very central and within walking distance to everything you would want to explore in the city.
10/10 would recommend!

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: A true gem right in the city centre! Less than 5 mins walk from the Centraal Station, easy to find and the check-in was seamless! Natasja kindly dropped by after arrival with some additional infos. Thoughtful gestures with a bottle of good Spanish wine and complimentary snacks at the entrance. The decor and appliances were top notch (ghd hairdryer!). Bed was super comfy. If only there was a proper window it would have been close to 5 star hotel standards! Very prompt and responsive communication with Michiel regarding any query. Highly recommend and hopefully will stay there again! Thanks Michiel and Natasja!

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments:
The place is very clean and nice. Kitchen is my fav place. They have 2 IH stoves and one fridge, which is nice if you want to heat something during stay.
They have many storaging area and hangers so good if you want to stay for couple of days.
Location is very good, tram and metro all walkable distance.
Like the other review, there is no natural window and natural light, but it’s ok for me, because the lighting in the room is enough.
The only thing I hope they can change is the curtain (which you can see in their photos.) The window can be see-through from outside if you didn’t adjust the curtain well.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: The apartment was clean and quite close to Rotterdam Central Station, about a 10 minute walk. The one room apartment was easy to access and clean, the apartment was in our opinion fully equipt with all the little things you need, like shampoo, douche gel, kitchen tools etc. Unfortunately there are no windows with direct sunlight, but there is an automatic ventilation system.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: The positive images of Rotterdam are all concentrated in this place: Agreeable ambiance, coziness,  and comfort. The host is friendly, efficient and proactive. It is a 6 minute's walk from the Central Station and the neighborhood is reliable. Easily accessible to convenient facilities such as supermarkets, hair salons, shops and many more. I would recommend the place without any hesitation. The privacy-respecting check-in and check-out system is also a plus factor.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: nice place we only missed a window

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: I had a lovely stay! The room had everything we needed for a weekend away and all hotspots were on walking distance. We were with 3 people and the third bed was all set when we arrived. The only thing I missed was a window with daylight, but everything else made up for it.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: An excellent stay at a very convenient location for our needs. Apartment lacks a bit of natural light though, but it was clearly indicated in the listing.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: Our stay at Natasja & Mylan’s was incredibly satisfying and peaceful. The ambiance was serene, and the hosts were attentive to every detail. A truly delightful experience that I highly recommend to fellow travelers.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: Studio ideally located for visiting Rotterdam. Everything is very clean and modern, well equipped and the bedding is very comfortable! You can check in independently, but the host is very responsive and attentive by message. We were 3 friends and the studio was fitted out with 3 beds to accommodate us, which was perfect. No windows but that didn't bother us. I would recommend it!

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments:
The room was well situated very close to the station and centre of Rotterdam. The beds were comfortable. The shower was good and it was useful to have the kitchen area.
Unfortunately there was a lot of noise. It was also bright, there was light coming from the hallway and several appliances had led lighting which was not possible to turn off or unplug. The noise and the brightness made it difficult to sleep.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments:
In total me and my two friends had a nice and comfortable stay. Would recommend staying here if you’re only spending a couple of nights in Rotterdam and don’t have problems with noise.
The hosts are very easy to communicate with. The room is quite small for three people, but we didn’t have any problem with that. Beds are very comfortable and the kitchen is well equipped. Very central location and easy to get around.
However, the building doesn’t have too well noise isolation. You could hear the neighbor rooms when they came home in the night, disturbing the sleep. Also missed some natural light as the only window faced the hallway.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: very close to the central station. nice studio apartment,  great bathroom. close to shopping and the tram too. the only down side was the hallway could be loud and the blinds didn't block out enough light for me at night. when people into the hall the light is automatic.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: we had a great time at Natasja and Mylan's place. It was really central. The kitchen was well equipped, the beds were comfortable and the air-conditioning was great. other people have complained a bit about noise but we honestly experienced no noise. it was perfect. Thanks!

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: Bigger than a hotel room and with all the amenities for a medium term stay. I loved the privacy and also the hosts' responsiveness to queries. I would gladly book it again!

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: A great contemporary studio with a loft feeling. A few minutes walk from the station. Comfortable bed, small but modern kitchenette and a relatively spacious bathroom. Having no windows to the street was no issue as I spent the days in the city anyway.

name: Midtown Duo Private Rotterdam
comments: place was clean and tidy.  comfy mattresses,we  had a very good sleep. because of location noise is lowered to minimum. approved.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments:
I really enjoyed my stay and really appreciate how helpful the hosts were! Always available to help further and very friendly!
The only thing that i wish i knew in advance is the boxing studio next wall to my room that plays loud music and you can hear the beats well and that the windows are not facing outside the building but inside the corridors, so there is no daylight.
But other than that the apartment was very nice and clean and has a nice a modern design and nice appliances.
Thank you Natasja for your hosting me! :)

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: Everything is great, the place is nice and very well located.  The corridor along the window with the office style curtain does not offer a perfect privacy but the place is perfect for a short stay.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: The place is ok, beds very comfortable & shower is great. Superb view from the windows directly to the entrance and corridor of the building, directly on the beds - zero privacy or no windows

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: A very accessible apartment that is an easy 5 min walk from the train station and there are many eateries (local and Asian cuisine) and a mini-mart nearby. We didn't experience any issues with noise. Beds were comfortable, though the 'queen' beds were 2 singles put side by side (maybe some may prefer this set up for better sleep). Overall we had a great stay here.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments:
Cozy and modern equipped Apartment, only 5 mins. away from Rotterdam Centraal.
Comfortable and easy to follow check-in.
Not suitable for noise sensible persons who have a light sleep.
The midtown is only 5-10 mins away.
All in All, nice stay.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: The quality of all the amenities in the loft were superb. The beds, bedding, bathroom, light, mirrors, overall ambiance were luxury -esque.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: Great location, right in the heart of Rotterdam. Easy walk to everything and transportation. Comfortable room and beds. With being where it is located it is loud, hear all sorts of area noises, and can hear the gym workouts. So if you are a little sleeper this might not be the best for you.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments:
Very close to Rotterdam Centraal Station, walking distance to Market Hall and around.
The host was very responsive and nicely arranged our early luggage drop-off when housekeeping arrived. Some toiletries were missing when we arrived but it was solved within an hour. The dishwasher had leak while operating but I’m sure that the host will have it solved after we check-out. The only concerned was the noise but probably was just a temporary neighbor. Overall a pleasant stay.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: Slight problem with check-in but host was very responsive and immediately let us in manually.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: Thank you for having us! We really enjoyed the stay at your apartment. It was easy to check and out. The place is beautiful designed with interesting details as all the lights, wall details and bathroom. We also got a lot of coffee, which was perfect!

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: Very clean studio, nice accomodations, very comfortable beds, great bathroom. The kitchen had everything necessary for basic cooking. The windows are looking at the corridor, but there are shutters and also very good air conditioning and air flow. All was great.

name: Midtown Family & Friends Room
comments: The apartment was clean. Everything look like on the photos. It was only missing a window. Easy check-in and quick communication.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments: It’s a nice place to stay. 5 minutes from the Rotterdam central train station. We took the trains to Brudge and Delft. It was really convenient to be close to the train station. It was pretty quiet. I am a light sleeper and didn’t have much issues with the noise level there. It’s also close to shopping areas and restaurants. We were able to find all kinds of restaurants. It is also close to a super market. The rooms are spacious,  and equipment is brand new. Bedding sheets are comfortable. Hosts were friendly and responsive. They answered all of our questions. Overall, loved the place and will recommend.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments: We had a very good time in the Appartement. It is super clean and it’s in the Centre of Rotterdam. Despite the central location the street is quiet. As the windows directly face the sidewalk of the street, you cannot open the windows, which is understandable, but the air in the apartment gets quite thin after some time with four people in there.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments: Well equipped and comfortable accommodation in a great location, a short walk from Rotterdam train station (which suited us for our day trips out), the local supermarket and the centre. The beds were lovely. Whilst it didn't bother us, there is some noise from a gym next door. We were made to feel welcome by our hosts and overall had a very enjoyable stay.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
Very modern and good-looking apartment.
However, the walls are very thin, which makes it impossible to sleep a bit longer than 9am, due to the loud thumps of the heavy weights of the gym next door.
The apartment does also not offer any possibility of fresh air circulation, because there are no windows you can open. You can only rely on the air conditioning, which unfortunately is not working properly, especially in the bathroom.
But all in all we enjoyed our stay at this airbnb and would recommend it.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
Very friendly and extremely responsive hosts!
The apartment was very spacious and absolutely loved the lounge area where you could enjoy a glass of wine looking at people passing by opening the blinds, then closing them back up completely for privacy.
The next door gym turns on music at around 7/8am but can only be heard from the bathroom and even so it’s very quiet.
Overall an amazing stay in Rotterdam, close to the station and yet never felt so safe walking around at night!

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
Our stay in Rotterdam was amazing!
The studio is easy to find, walking distance to the station and other activities in the centre.
However, there is a gym next door, so quite loud music can be heard when they are open and also noises from the other apartments.
It didn't affect us too much as we were out and about, but the hosts were very helpful and on hand to try and help with any issues!

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
We (2 adults & 2 children) stayed at the apt for the weekend of the Rotterdam marathon.
The apartment was very clean and modern, well equipped with fridge and hob, and walkable to Rotterdam central.
The hosts were very quick to respond to all messages, and very helpful with minor issues we encountered.
Pros
- Hosts very quick to respond
- Comfy beds
- Good wifi,
- Smart TV,
- Very clean
- Coffee and snacks provided
- Walkable to Rotterdam central station and the city
Cons
- The walls are very thin and the apt is street level facing so it was very noisy on the Saturday night
- Right next to a gym which plays loud music and it was very loud on the Sunday night - (Michiel contacted the gym after I sent a message and they stopped the music)
- A little more expensive than other accommodation but had the benefit of being an equipped apartment

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
+ awesome location
+ friendly responsive host
- open shower - always strange and uncomfortable for me
- zero floor so you can't open curtains
- specifically located mirrors
- extremely poor lightning
- bad soundproof
- unable to open any window

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
It was a pleasant stay. The house was well equipped and very well located for us.
It was a surprise that it was on the first floor and we couldn't open the windows, but we got used to it quickly.

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments:
We loved it! The apartment is perfect for a couple and a daughter like us.
It was clean and exactly like the photos.
It is close to the central station and the city center.
We had a problem with the light and they came to solve the problem right away.
They were always helpful and responded quickly to our questions and needs.
We recommend it!

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments: Great place to stay! Super close to almost everything and the place was spacious and everything was great. The only inconvenience is the noise coming from the gym attached to the building early in the morning and quite late at night. However I greatly recommend for your stay in rotterdam!

name: Midtown Erasmus Royal Room
comments: Great location and exactly as pictured. Very responsive hosts. Noise from the gyn next door wasn’t much of a bother. No complaints. Will be back!

name: Kom tot rust op de fantastische Nieuwe Binnenweg
comments: Very nice flat in a lively urban street, many bars and restaurants at short walking distance, yet when you're in the flat it is perfectly quiet. The different levels of the flat make it very interesting, and everything is renovated with really good sense of style. We really enjoyed the stay.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Really lovely space with lots of light! A great place to stay if you love art. I had no problem seeing and enjoying Rotterdam from here. The owners were helpful when i had questions and provided some nice little amenities. Highlights include the garden view from the balcony, the funky lamp in the kitchen, the huge dining table which I used for crafting, and the local food. Try the  restaurant Look! I had a great time here.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: the apartment is very bright and clean.  everything you need for everyday life is there.  it is central and you can reach everything on foot.  the balcony is great in the warm months.  the kitchen is well equipped.  the bed was great.  we slept well.  the house was quiet and the view of the garden was great. we would highly recommend it!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Great place, top location, the place was clean, quirky and in a fabulous location with shops, bars, cates and restaurants near by. We loved the decor of the appartment, the kitchen had everything we needed, the long dining table was brilliant and the view from the balcony into the garden was beautiful. There was a nice touch with public transport travel cards provided though it was easy to get around on foot. Kees was very welcoming and we will be back!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: A clean, comfortable flat with lots of space. The balcony at the back is an oasis of calm and a fabulous place to sit and eat or relax. The local area is centrally placed and offers everything you need with an eclectic mix of shops, cafes and restaurants; the metro and tram are close by if you want to go anywhere else. Kees is a great host and is helpful and supportive if you have any questions or need help with anything. Warmly recommended.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Wonderful appartment full of charm, spacious and original. Loved the balcony and the windows ! Very well located, we were found of the neighourhood ! I really recommand, and want to come back !

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Extremely well located, very clean, spacious and airy apartment with balcony overlooking trees. Great for the tram and metro, both of which were a few minutes' walk and very regular timetables and within easy reach by either of Rotterdam Central Station and all the other attractions Rotterdam offers, including the coast.   Well furnished, comfortable bed, good shower and a range of eclectic wall hangings and ornaments to get you thinking about their origins! Brilliant for a short break in Rotterdam and its surroundings.  Don't forget to buy a Travelcard to use all the buses, trams, metros and waterbus for a very reasonable price.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
Clean apartment.
Good bed.
Cozy balcony.
Very cozy street with good bakers, restaurant and special shops.
Good place in town

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
Wonderful Art Deco apartment in a beautiful area of Rotterdam.
The flat location is at walking distance from the main train station, to the Markthall and the Maritime District of Rotterdam. The flat itself was exceptionally clean, beautifully decorated and was provided with a full stacked kitchen and a lovely bathroom.
The absolute highlight were the Art Deco doors and windows and the beautiful balcony overseeing a wild and green garden.
We will definitely return to stay here once back in Rotterdam.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
Kees is a kind host, the communication was fluent. Cleaning is good. Kitchen is fully prepared to cook (very cool and useful nespresso)
The location is great, walking distance from the centrum and the good places to eat and drink.
The apartment is confortable, good bed and good rest. It has an amazing balcony with a lot of natural light and a view full of plants and trees, I felt like I was in a jungle having breakfast with that view. the hood is quiet, the street were the apartment is located is now under construction so the street is closed, dirty and with a small space to reach the door.
however, I definitely recommend the place!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: We stayed for three nights & the location was very nice to explore the city. The hosts were nice and communicated quickly. On the weekend the street  was a little noisy during the night (compared to thursday), but other than that it was a very nice stay. Thank you!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: This was my second weekend at Kees's place. His place is well-situated to visit the centre of Rotterdam and at the same time very peaceful, with the garden view, and quiet at day- and night-time.  A beautiful classic building and a very convenient kitchen with suitable amenities, including the coffee machine.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
The apartment was very nice, had beautiful decorations, much place, was clean and had everything you need for a few days in Rotterdam. We also loved the big windows and the balcony with sun in the morning :)
Near the apartment are very nice and different restaurant and cafés and a supermarket.
Also the shopping street and market hall aren’t 15-20 minutes by foot and less with the train.
We were very happy to have the opportunity to stay in the apartment :)
We would highly recommend it!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Great location, great quirky appartment, spacious, and we loved the balcony for breakfasts in the sun

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
The apartment was easy to find and well located for restaurants, coffee shops and supermarkets.
The only issue we encountered was some noise from the nearby busy road but it was not overbearing. The apartment would greatly benefit from a pedestal fan for air circulation as the Summer evenings were quite warm.
We enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
I came in pretty late, but having the self check in was super nice. I met both hosts who are kind, and they helped with the water heater even though it was 22:30.
The space is open and fluid. I loved the little balcony. As for location, it's near everything you could need. For us, it was perfect. My only issue was people walking by at night, some of which were loud. Of course, this is no fault of the place but something to keep in mind if you're not used to city life.
Having the chipkaarts at our disposal was nice too despite us only using it once. It was just nice not having to buy a card.
Side note -- I suggest checking out Chicken Boulevard, Lilith, and the Cakery that's an easy walk to all. I would totally come back here when I visit Rotterdam!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: The house is very near to dijkzigt metro station,  just 1-2 minutes by walking. The furniture was desinged that I liked too much. There was a road that I heard at night some noises but it is normal for me. Kees is very kind and replied my question very quickly.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: The place is bigger than it seems on the photos. It has everything needed for a comfortable stay. Also it is easy to get to and from the central station. The little balcony is adorable.  Highly recommend!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
The tram to the centre is just around the corner, but it's also walkable. Het Park is 10 minutes walk away and is delightful.
Super comfortable bed and the chairs are more comfy than a sofa.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Very nice place to stay in Rotterdam. It is an apartment with a beautiful view on the garden, really close to the main subway lines (2mins walking) and close to the centre and Rotterdam Central Station (20min walking or less with the subway). It had everything we needed and the hosts were really nice to us.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Kees' apartment is spacious and well located just a 15 minute walk from the river and the witte de Withstraat - a bustling street of bars and restaurants. The apartment is also just a few minutes away from a metro station for easy transport. This was a good place to stay for our quick couple of days in Rotterdam

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments:
The Airbnb was actually bigger than what it seemed in the photos, that was a nice surprise.
Had lots of natural light and a good space for 2 people. Location was great close to city centre but not right in the action, gave us the experience of both. The kitchen was well stocked with spices and pans. Overall a great Airbnb with helpful hosts, would recommend!

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: This is spacious and bright.  The bedroom is overlooking the street, in a super neighbourhood: two comfy armchairs by the street-facing windows, you are somewhat elevated so you can ‘people watch’: very soothing, and equally relaxing to eat and work at the big kitchen table at the back, where the outlook is on greenery.  The flat is quiet, the heating worked well for our February stay, with clever thermostats on each radiator.  functional and well equipped kitchen for cooking up breakfast and coffee, shower with good pressure and reliable temperature control. Fab generous-size bath towels, realistic-size supply of bathroom essentials such as shower gel, shampoo and toilet paper.  Hooray for the comfortable mattress and cotton bedding washed in fragrance-free washing  products.  NB allergy sufferers, everything clean and sparkling but no cloying air fresheners. Good WiFi, the TV doubles as a radio. Minimal stairs suits us OAPs. Felt safe, brilliant door lock.  Thank you genial hosts.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Plenty of room for 2 people in a 19th century house.  Eclectic decor, everything in good working order, large windows overlooking a diverse neighborhood, restaurants and basic shopping with in walking distance. not far from the museum park and public transportation. Stairs are steep and narrow but there aren't too many of them.  Pleased to recommend.

name: Bel-Etage in the city Center
comments: Kees’ place is a very spacious and beautiful apartment, well equipped with lots of kitchen supplies. It is also in a great location, very near to Centraal station and lots of museums, bars and restaurants within walking distance, as well as a metro station 2 minutes down the street. Would highly recommend staying here for a relaxed time. Thank you!!

name: Beautiful - City centre - Park- Long Term
comments: I stayed for 4 days. Host was so kind when I check-in.  I can walk to center city and can walk around quiet streets. And there are variety of international foods and restraint!

name: Beautiful - City centre - Park- Long Term
comments: Stayed in Rotterdam to attend a conference. Had a pleasant stay in the apartment, although I was out most of the time. Travel with public transport is easy, however, next time I'll rent a bike. The apartment is spacious, well equipped and full of light (large windows). Maarten was a perfect host, communication was prompt and clear, and the apartment clean and ready to move in. I only regret not staying a couple of days longer to explore more of Rotterdam.

name: View point Erasmus bridge Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is located in an excellent and quiet location, the only problem is the unpleasant smell coming from the sewage.  otherwise the apartment is very nice and have a beautifull view. Thank s a lot !.

name: View point Erasmus bridge Rotterdam
comments:
lovely apartment in rotterdam with a great waterfront view up close, with plenty options nearby.
Easy check in, and not far from central areas

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: We had a great stay at this bnb! It’s a lovely home with a nice view on the water. It’s also close to the center of Rotterdam, which was perfect. The terrace has sun throughout the day and you can also use a parasol to block the sun from coming into the apartment. I would recommend this bnb as well as Michiel as host! We would love to come back 😊

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Really great place to stay, highly recommended! Location is super central, and so clean & well prepared it feels like you're staying in a hotel. Michiel went above and beyond to make sure I was well taken care of, and that everything was well organized. (small note: be aware that since this place is so central, you may notice some noise from street/neighbors)

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Super holidays. Very nice flat with balcony, nice furniture, we felt at home.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: We really enjoyed our stay. The location was perfect- easy for supermarket (right opposite) and sight seeing. It was nice to have the balcony - particularly fun for observing the fans’ celebrations following Feyenoord FC winning the title on Sunday!

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Jules’ place was a perfect for my trip to Rotterdam. It is nestled in a quiet neighborhood, but it is not too far away from the main shopping street and good restaurants. There is a supermarket right across the flat and a food market around a 10 minute walk from it. The place was clean, well equipped and a great place to work from home for a bit. Would definitely recommend.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Jules places is attractive, bright and airy. It overlooks a canal. It is close to the city centre, metros, trams, local shops and cafes. We enjoyed our stay and would recommend it to others.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Jule's place was a great place to stay: comfortable, clean, attractive and so well located.  The neighborhood was lively late into the night on Friday but I'm a person who enjoys some street noise.  In addition, I was steps away from the Market Hall, Main Public Library, the Janskerk, and so much.  While the ceiling light didn't work in the room with the toilet (and the person who let me into the place mentioned that to me), there was a dim motion-sensor emergency light; it would be good to have that light fixed.  More importantly, I give this place 5 stars and would definitely stay again.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Everything is great! The interior design of the place is really cool. Great location and beautiful balcony.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments: Good place to stay and see Rotterdam. Nice balcony on both sides for always fresh air and morning coffee. excellent kitchen, cooked two dinners during stay, has everything you want and more. bathroom spacious with rain shower head and spacious, has washing machine with dryery. one downside, if you plan to sleep on the couch bed be prepared to sleep without blanket.

name: J20House - 2 person downtown Rotterdam canal apt.
comments:
We have spent a week in during New Year’s holiday as a couple in this flat. This is not a typical AirBnB flat. It is an apartment that is actually being lived in. Very tastefully decorated, has all amenities that you need, situated in one of the architectural gems of Rotterdam. The location is very central, i.e. metro, tram, shops, restaurants, bars, cafes, etc. are very close. Just across the canal, there is a largish supermarket for all needs. Also very close, a great Italian market and pizzeria called Little Italy was awesome. It is also close to one of the largest street markets in Rotterdam, that is setup every Tuesday, Saturday and Sunday.
Although it is in the first floor, it has a lift. The living area is very bright, the canal Internet is very fast, Netflix and YouTube is available on TV. It even has chromecast streaming if you wish to stream music or videos.
Very highly recommended.

name: Cosy & quiet apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Really the location could not be better, directly on a nice street close to city Center and everything. The owner is so nice and helpful and the house was so beautifully decorated and very comfortable.

name: Cosy & quiet apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
A beautifull Location, in the middle of the centrum.you do not need you car.Train station and subway is all at 5 minutes walk.
Ice cream on the other side of the street.i would recommend it.
Un bellisimo posto mezzo centro di Rotterdam. Poi fare shopping,
non e bisogno avere un machina.stazione di treno e metro e tutto a 5 minuti da la apartamento .gelato dalla altra parte della strada.un posto per prenotare veramente ☺️☺️.

name: Cosy & quiet apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
A wonderful stay at Loredana's place. Me and my parents stayed for a week and found the location (10min walk to Centraal station) perfect for travelling around the many cities nearby.
The communication between us and Loredana was perfect and she was extremely informative throughout our stay.
The apartment is gorgeous and a stones throw from local shopping and a delicious ice cream place across the street!
I would highly recommend a stay here!

name: Cosy & quiet apartment in the heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Stayed at Loredana’s apartment for 3 days, excellent location and we liked having two bedrooms and a balcony.
Loredana is a good host in that she is quick to respond and available for questions.
The living experience leaves a bit to be desired in terms of communication of house rules up front (including an easier Wi-Fi password than the default) and de-cluttering the apartment a tiny bit (access restricted to some drawers by tape, filled portable clothes rack out in the bedroom, access to washer / dryer needed to be cleared, fridge door gets stuck)
Please take this as a good experience that can be elevated with some of these considerations based on my travel experience.
Thank you for hosting.

name: Gezellig appartement Rotterdam Noord, Blijdorp
comments:
Honestly, I couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay. To start, it was perfect location wise. It’s located less then a 5 minute walk to the Blijdorp Metro (a local grocery store right next to it too), along with multiple grocery stores, parks, restaurants, and even the Rotterdam Zoo all nearby that were perfectly accessible by walking.
Koen himself was also an amazing host! He was incredibly nice, responsive & helpful all along the trip.
