On top of having a list of places to go eat and visit, he made it clear that if I had any questions at all (about the stay, or I needed ideas on places to go, or just had questions about NL itself) that I could reach out at anytime as well!
The apartment itself was incredibly clean & beautiful and I felt totally at home there. I honestly will be staying there again and it will most likely become my go to stay as I continue to travel (and hopefully move) to the Netherlands!
I can’t wait to be back and drink my tea out on the balcony again!

name: Garden side studio
comments:
Very cosy loft with all the needed furniture located on a shop street where you can find all kind of things. It has a beautiful private garden.
We enjoyed our stay and the host is very friendly and reactive.

name: Garden side studio
comments: Great place to stay - large, light, comfortable and really well equipped.  Very frequent trams to Rotterdam centre right in front of the apartment, shops and supermarket on the doorstep. We didn’t take advantage of the garden as it’s February but it looks lovely.  Nathalie is very jolly and welcoming and very reactive to mails and calls.  We really enjoyed this trip.

name: Garden side studio
comments: super cosy accomodation and extremely quiet! recommended for light sleepers!

name: Garden side studio
comments: This is a gem among AirBnb's! Located in a nice and lively neighborhood with a big shopping street right at the front door. Groceries from Albert Heijn are literally next door. A lovely place, well-equipped, and wjth a super friendly and welcoming owner. To top it all off: a lovely private garden. It makes the place complete, and the best pied-a-terre one could wish for if you have plans to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Garden side studio
comments: It was a great place. The feel of the place was cozy, specially with the fireplace. The full kitchen had everything we needed. Check-in was quick and simple even with our delayed flight. Nathalie was very accommodating during our stay. We would definitely save on our favorites list.

name: Garden side studio
comments:
While the apartment itself is decent, there is room for improvement in terms of cleanliness. Unfortunately, our experience was marred by significant delays in the host's response time. Even when faced with substantial issues, it took a full day for them to address our concerns. During our stay for a conference, we encountered a day without internet, and half of the apartment lacked electricity. Regrettably, our attempts to contact the host went unanswered until the following day.
Adding to the frustration, the host entered the premises without prior notification or seeking our permission. Furthermore, there was a lack of clear check-in instructions, leaving us waiting on the street with our luggage for 30 minutes. All in all, this ranks among the most challenging Airbnb experiences we've ever had.

name: Garden side studio
comments: Very nice flat, nice comfortable furniture, very spacious with a beautiful private garden and loads of natural light. Everything was spotless, there was everything you needed and more. Loved that it had an air fryer. Very quiet and private too. You can sometimes hear the people living above but it never really disrupted me personally. I would say the flat is much better in reality than in the pics. Hosts were great too. I would defo go back.

name: Garden side studio
comments: The flat is in a vibrant and colourful neighbourhood. There is a good supermarket (Dirk) across the street and the tram stop is close by to travel into the city. It's a good base to explore Rotterdam for 2 nights. Whilst the bed is comfortable you can hear people walking around upstairs.

name: rustige, centraal gelegen woning met zonnige tuin
comments: The location of Annemarie's house is what I like the most.  It has great privacy and is located in a quiet area next to a big park.  There is a shopping mall within walking distance where there are food stores, supermarkets as well as shops for daily living which is very convenient.

name: rustige, centraal gelegen woning met zonnige tuin
comments: We enjoyed a week here, as our base to relax and explore Rotterdam and beyond. We were conveniently close to easy public transport to the centre, and driving routes to other parts of the Netherlands (highlight for us was de Biesbosch nature reserve, 40 mins drive). The house itself and local parks were great for relaxing and taking the dog for walks.

name: Beautiful apartment Rotterdam
comments:
Beautiful, clean apartment in a wonderful neighborhood. Quiet, safe, peaceful. At least three grocery stores within walking distance. Quick walk to Rotterdam Centraal. Communication with the hosts was always fast and helpful. Nice view from the windows of the corner apartment. We loved it so much there we did not want to leave.
Rotterdam is a lovely city with an animated downtown area. But once you leave Rotterdam Centraal on the walk to the house, you transition into a calm residential area surrounded by beauty everywhere.

name: Beautiful apartment Rotterdam
comments: Cosy and quirky flat in an amazing location - close to the central train station and hand for shops. Check in was really smooth as we had loads of information and the hosts were very contactable. We did get a bit tired of the very steep stairs 😁 but loved sitting in the living room with all the windows.

name: quiet 1930's apartment with lovely garden
comments: Gabbi is the most welcoming host and her flat is a delight to be in. The little details in the flat, the garden and as part of welcoming us in, made us feel at home right away and we would love to go back!

name: quiet 1930's apartment with lovely garden
comments:
Gabbi's place is one the best Airbnbs I have ever stayed in. The flat is beautifully decorated, renovated, clean, quiet, warm and super cosy. Gabbi has taken care to add so many little details that will make your stay super pleasant and comfortable. The garden is beautiful and the nice big windows lets you enjoy it even in the winter time. The bed is super comfortable and the sofa is full of nice comfy cushions.
Gabbi herself is absolutely lovely. Very welcoming, helpful but discreet, kind. She makes you feel right at home from the moment you walk in and she is super helpful with tips and recommendations. She does go above and beyond to make your stay as pleasant as possible and you can tell it comes from the heart.
The location is super too. There's a tram stop 2 min away and the city centre is walkable distance. Really nice area to be, nice restaurants and shops but also great spot to explore the whole city.
I hope I go back soon 🙏

name: quiet 1930's apartment with lovely garden
comments:
I can’t accurately put into words how amazing Gabbi’s hospitality is….I mean, just look at all the reviews she has to start. I’ve never taken reviews seriously because they can be manipulated, but everything mentioned for this Air BNB is accurate. On my arrival from a long drive, Gabbi had a full scale charcuterie board & fruit provided. As well, a delicious Dutch cake & and even a nice bone for my dog!
Gabbi provides insightful tips for the area & even a public transport card (pre-loaded!) to get around Rotterdam if you don’t have a vehicle…
I’ve always appreciated learning about the people who host me in their homes and Gabbi even took the time to show me around her incredible natural garden with so many different unique European natural plants!
I am not kidding when I say this - this was by far my best experience with an AirBNB….I am so happy to have met Gabbi and been able to feel comfortable….so much so, that I extended for an additional night!

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: The place is very unique! Clean and furnished with everything you need! We enjoyed our stay, just make sure to bring a nightmask since it can be very lightfull in the morning!

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: What a grand experience staying on a house boat! The views were perfect, and the rocking of the boat lulled you to sleep. Perfect location, as everything is within walking distance - max 30 minutes!

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Amazing experience, well located, clean & good communication. The team is friendly. Great views with the skycrapers around.

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
This houseboat has a very unique location and flare. You will love the view, the silence and the opportunity to experience the most modern and charming side of Rotterdam. Overall, our stay was great. However, I do not suggest booking for groups of 4+ people, as the house is very very tiny. The sleeping situation specifically was a bit weird as the house only provides two queen size beds (I believe) and two sofa beds that are not the best in terms of comfort. Given the size and amenities of the house, this accommodation would be perfect for 2/3 guests max in my opinion.
So, if that’s your case, go for it.
The host was polite and helpful. Communication was fast and effective. The house was generally clean but not spotless, so that could be further improved.

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: this willelboat is great location, and Nice view to stay but not suggest for children and who can be headache from boat because some wind it can make a little wave and make you not feel good. But around area is very very nice to stay. Our trip is 6 ppl it to much for this wikkelboat if you stay on 4 ppl is will be great.

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Amazing freshly new house boat in a new haven district in Rotterdam. The place is very quiet. The house boat is brand new, equipped with a lot smart features (electronic lock, beamer, lights) and all what u need for a stay in Rotterdam. Highly recommended!

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
Was a nice stay in Wikkelboat. Very cool and clean place and a nice view at night. Also the gadgets in the airbnb were amazing. You could change light colors, had a beamer, a washing mashine, tea and coffee. Amazing stuff.
But you should be prepared that you can feel the waves. I didn‘t mind at night but if you get sea sick you should consider this

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
The boat is absolutely fantastic and located close to the city Center. Interior design is very clever and there is an abundance of places to sit outside. Overall a very nice place that I would highly recommend if you want to enjoy a weekend in Rotterdam.
The basement of boat nr.2 is however used by staff as a storage place - which resulted in staff being around our place a lot, including loud noise when opening the door to the basement frequently.
For a relatively high price, we would have expected a bit more convenience in that regard.

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Super fun place to stay. We stayed here with our in-laws and everyone LOVED it. Good coffee, warm shower, nice view, and cozy beds. My daughter loved chatting with the ducks off the back deck. Will definitely stay again should we find ourselves back in Rotterdam.

name: Wikkelboat 2 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Great place, nice view! Easy access to swimming location.

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: We stayed in Wikkelboat 1 for one night. The place is brand new and it has very much potential. Location was perfect, although the given address isn’t fully accurate, we had to wander off a bit to find the floating houses. We had a problem with our access key (our own fault, we didn’t realize that we had to do the online check-in beforehand to get the access key to get into the house), and when reaching out to Sander and Wikkelboat customer service, the communication wasn’t great. They have an “emergency number” that we tried to reach but it went straight to voicemail and it took over 30min for their customer service to reach out to us. After we finally got our access key (we were even given a wrong one first) and got into the house, it was all really nicely done. There’s a lot of attention to details and it’s truly a smart home. As being brand new and just opened, we understood some things are still finding their ways to work and all of that, but the fact that the lights didn’t switch off and we had to find out from their customer service that they were aware of the problem and we weren’t told beforehand, really blew our mind. We had to twirl each light bulb off, in order to turn the lights off in the apartment. But all in all, we had a great stay, after these tiny mishaps will be fixed, we will definitely be back, just hope that their communication gets better as well!

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: We had a wonderful stay. The view was lovely as well. The boat was very neat and the beds were amazing. The host was great as wel, he was quick to respond if we had any questions regarding our stay.

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
We stayed for 4 nights. 2 day Rotterdam, 1 day Amsterdam and 1 day Den Haag. Wonderful cities!!! The communication with Sander the host was over average fast and friendly. Super nice guy!
Amazing location of the wikkelboat with a great view on the water from lying in the bed:). Straight in the city centre and probably one of the most beautiful districts of Rotterdam. Wonderful designed interior and Supermarket straight next to it.
It is actually exactly looking like on the pictures from the inserate. And to clarify: Rotterdam is an fck amazing city!

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: The place was better than expected. The cabin is very comfortable and the water view is very relaxing, I found it even therapeutic. The staff were polite and welcoming, and overall I can say that I had a great stay and would not go anywhere else to stay if I’ll come back to Rotterdam. It’s not your regular Airbnb stay but rather a memorable experience.

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Hi, the boat met our expectations. We had a problem with the electricity & the support team answered us immediately even though it was late in the evening. Very nice view. Some of us were a bit afraid to get sick of the waves but it was even relaxing. Perfect trip to Rotterdam. The river/sea was even warm enough to swim in

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Beautiful view

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
An amazing experience! The apartments had everything needed and was quite practically designed. Wondeful view towards the sea!
But you should be aware that you are/it is moving, in case you're easily getting sea sick..

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: It’s a cool and cozy place with a great waterfront view. It will definitely make your Rotterdam visit a better one!

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Fantastic accommodation, has everything you need, plus a great view and once in life experience of a floating place. Will definitely visit again once in Rotterdam.

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
It was a wonderful stay, I even extended the staying for 2 more days! I felt so good surrounded by water, such a lovely place with nice view and quiet.
Super clean and the team were so supportive during the staying.
I would recommend this place to anyone one wanna go to Rotterdam.
Thank you guys for such a hospitality ♥️.

name: Wikkelboat 1 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
We loved our stay on the Wikkelboat! We had just two of us, so this does make it relatively expensive for what it is, however we felt it was worth the spend as it's so nice to be on the water. The place was spotless and the team very clear/responsive and allowed us a much earlier check-in and held our bags all day on the last day. The home theatre/projector set-up was a nice added extra for when the weather was bad.
Note - I was a tad concerned on feeling sea sick, as I often get travel sick and others mentioned this in reviews but we were totally fine and stayed for three nights (with hangovers) and didn't have any issues.
Location is great too, we found it easy to get Lime bikes outside and it's right by the waterbus/taxi stations and metro.

name: Wikkelboat 4 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Really great place to stay in Rotterdam, with an astonishing view. And you are really floating in your house with media system, etc etc

name: Wikkelboat 4 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
I have mixed views about this booking.
Objectively it's an amazing location and a very interesting set up and I will not ever forget the visit.
The boat was clean and the comms were quick and pretty good. I have never been to Rotterdam and, if the weather is good, this is a great experience.
On the down side I made a mistake in my booking and accidentally booked a boat that was too small. These units are not cheap and I had to weather the extra cost of staying on the dock in a hotel to make my friend's life easier.
We made it clear throughout there were 4 men staying and it was assumed we'd be staying in two double beds. There was not enough bedding and this had to be sorted as soon as we arrived which was not good. The sofa bed is very uncomfortable. This place is suitable for a couple or two very close friendly couples and nothing more.
The cost is high so having a very late check-in and late check-out was not cool.
The door is very difficult to operate and we had to invite in our neighbours for two hours while theirs was fixed.
Mixed feelings. Great experience but not good value or service and quite expensive. Would only recommend as part of a road trip for 2 days max.
Finally the boat rocks like mad even on a calm day and you need to be ok with this.

name: Wikkelboat 4 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
A unique amazing night stay with our 4 kids. Size was nice as our children are small (0, 1, 2 and 7) so i can imavine it being tight for 6 adults or older children.
Slighty pricey, especially due to the size. Street parking is terrible, but i felt that across Rotterdam not exclusive to this place.
Overall i loved this place.. commuication is superb, they reply within minutes at times.
Check in the mlst easiest check in ever

name: Wikkelboat 4 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
boat was amazing, very high tech and great views, was hard to find it though because i don’t think they said which boat number it was
there was also some confusion about check out time
but the boat it’self and everything was great

name: Wikkelboat 5 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
We really had a wonderful time at the Wikkelboat and would recommend it to anyone. The location of the boat is very special and you can enjoy an amazing view from the terrace and the whirlpool. The houseboat is very cozy and offers everything that you need for you stay. The beds were very comfortable and the kitchen was well equipped.
The area has a lot of interesting spots and bars. You can reach the Euromast within 30 min walking distance and a metro station is also close to the houseboat.
All in all, the houseboat is a perfect place to enjoy a special time in Rotterdam! The communication with the host went perfectly and we would love to come back anytime.

name: Wikkelboat 5 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Absolutely stunning AirB&B. The Wikkelboat housed 5 of us very comfortably and includes all the amenities you need. We were thrilled with the hot tub and the view! Thank you to the Wikkelboat caretaker for her help!

name: Wikkelboat 5 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: really nice with lovely hot tub and kind hosts. great views and atmosphere very modern.

name: Wikkelboat 5 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Very cool place. Beautiful view, nice hot tub.

name: Wikkelboat 5 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Great fun river boar.  Very much enjoyed. 10 mins taxi to main attractions.   Loved the whole harbour view from place, not for those that like privacy.

name: Riverside house!
comments:
It’s a great location close to a lot of beautiful places and also has a nice deck at the water across the street.
The old historic house has very steep staircases and is not suitable for elderly or minor handicapped people. There is some room for the development of a cleaner environment to really feel home and welcome.

name: Riverside house!
comments:
This is an old house where things are just working but in my view it requires some maintenance
The Location is perfect to visit Rotterdam and go for a walk around the Rotte
The place probably suites a nice spring or summer day better so that you can enjoy the decking in the front of the house.
Ps this place is not really suited for elderly people who have mobility issues or for young families with very young kids due the steep stairs in and around the house

name: Riverside house!
comments: The house lies in a really nice and quiet neighbourhood with a wonderful view to the river from a private platform. The host is really nice and answers back pretty quick, if any information is needed. The only disadvantage is the 20 Min walk to the next trainstation, so you need a car / taxi to get into the town center. But summarized we had a really nice stay in the house with no problems and would like to come back any time.

name: Pitorestic place with beautiful garden.
comments:
An Enchanting Haven!
This flat exceeded all my expectations with its charming, sunlit space and tasteful furnishings. The magical garden and impeccable cleanliness added to the delightful experience, while the attentive host left no room for complaints. Happy travels!

name: Mr. & Mrs. Honeywell's Loft
comments:
We can warmly recommend this beautiful apartment! It is very cosy and the view over the skyline of Rotterdam is just stunning.
Geert-Jan is a very kind host, carrying and super easy to communicate with!
We would come back at any time:)

name: Mr. & Mrs. Honeywell's Loft
comments: Very nice place with beautiful view, not far from the centre. Mr Gerry-Jan was very friendly and helpful.

name: Mr. & Mrs. Honeywell's Loft
comments: Sehr günstig gelegene Wohnung, geschmackvoll eingerichtet, Highlight ist die Dachterrasse  und ihr Ausblick - unkomplizierter Vermieter, der schnell reagiert - Achtung- viele steile kleine Treppenstufen, aber  Jaan-Gert war behilflich mit meinem Koffer:-)

name: Mr. & Mrs. Honeywell's Loft
comments: Very nice view from the balcony, with nice kitchen

name: Mr. & Mrs. Honeywell's Loft
comments:
Placed close to everything Aldi down the block. Shopping and local eateries close by and the railway a 10 minute walk the steps are a good workout but like our host said
The they have a reward
The view is amazing and the place was comfortable and clean

name: FDhotels Rotterdam
comments:
We asked to put our two rooms on the same floor, we were promised that it happened. The next day one room on the 1st floor, second our room on 2nd floor.
There were missing the weatherproof (on the top of the window) -> there was a lot of noise and cold. The reception couldn't fix it. On the checkout day, the door was blocked 10.00 minutes before time of checkout (11.00) - it was so stressful and flustered.

name: FDhotels Rotterdam
comments: The place was as described and everything worked well, but it was too noisy, as I had a room on the first floor just above all the people on the restaurants on one of the busiest streets in Rotterdam

name: Private modern studio, quiet street in city centre
comments: Joshua and Laura’s place is definitely the one to book for a getaway in Rotterdam. The location was perfect (just 15mn walk from the train station and right in the city center but in a very quiet street). The flat is very well equipped, spacious, clean, has everything you need and most importantly is super cosy. I would recommend this Airbnb to anyone without a doubt!

name: Private modern studio, quiet street in city centre
comments: Joshua and Laura were extremely accommodating, they would always check in via msgs to make sure I was okay and even gave some recommendations! The street was quiet at night and the bed was very comfy. The location was ideal, very central and we discovered lots of independent bars and restaurants. Would absolutely stay here again, thank you!! :)

name: Private modern studio, quiet street in city centre
comments: Great location; spotless; open floor plan feels very spacious. Street is surprisingly quiet being so close to a major through way and restaurants. Josh and Laura communicate timely and often. Would definitely stay there again!

name: Private modern studio, quiet street in city centre
comments: The studio was spacious with comfortable and stylish furniture for eating, resting and sleeping.  The gas range and oven is amazing to cook with.  The neighbourhood has a great vibe and is so close to museum park and other sightseeing areas.  The hosts were remarkably kind and helpful, even coming by the apartment in short notice to help with a technical matter.  Our only critique: because the windows do not open, and there is a lot of daytime sun exposure, there is little air circulation n the apartment: a built-in hanging ceiling fan or portable floor fan might help on those summer days and evenings when the temp hits above 25 degrees. Otherwise excellent accommodation!!!

name: Private modern studio, quiet street in city centre
comments:
Laura and Joshua were extremely friendly, took initiative on everything and answered my questions with patience. The studio is perfect for a short stay. Location is great, plenty of supermarkets and restaurants nearby within walking distance. also close to the main train station, subway and tram station.
Drawbacks:
No washing machine; walls or windows not soundproofing so we heard traffic from time to time; I have a sensitive nose so I kept sneezing when I arrived, maybe due to the cold or the smell of dust in the room.(the studio do not have a opening window so there is a ventilation problem. I do not recommend if you are staying longer than a week.)
All in all, very good value. We were satisfied. Thank you Laura and Joshua!

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: We had a lovely stay in Rotterdam. Apartment is centrally located and had everything we needed. Rosana communicated with us before and during, and despite a slight hiccup during check in, it was resolved in a timely manner. Thank you for opening up your nursery room for us, made it very comfortable for us to stay there. Wouldn’t hesitate to come back to stay here again.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Gorgeous flat.  beautiful, modern, and light filled with great views down the market plaza.  a stand out place.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: It was a very nice and comfy apartment with a nice view

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Amazing location, street parking is expensive (€6/h), no elevator and located on the fourth floor, apartment is equipped with the basics, beds were very good!

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Rosana's place was spacious and well-equipped. It was perfect for me and my colleague to share, while we were visiting for a conference. The kitchen and living room are downstairs, while bedrooms are upstairs, which made it easy for us to avoid waking each other up. The neighborhood is a quiet residential street that faces a canal, but is very close to downtown and many sights.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments:
Pros :
Amazing location, basically you will be living right next to all main city attractions, metro and restaurants.
Host is proactive and ready to help with either suggestions or resolving issues you are encountering.
Cons:
Flat feels like it is either had bad guests right before us or in the middle of the renovation. Blinds on the first floor were ripped off and some weird piece of fabric was put on the window instead, you can see blinds are just laying on the floor.
Mosquito nets were also halfly ripped off on both first and second floor.
Overall really good place, would recommend to everyone. Just needs some love and repairs (maybe we were just unlucky and there were bad guests before us)

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: This is a delightful apartment, bright and airy with good sized rooms and well equipped. It's also in a fabulous location with dozens of great cafes, bars and restaurants in a 1-10 minute range, a couple literally just round the corner together with a great pizza takeaway and deli. There's also a supermarket just across the road. The centre of thcity is only a few hundred metres walk. Rosana is the perfect host, she provided all we needed and left us to get on with it, but was only a call or message away when needed. I can't recommend this place highly enough.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Amazing place, close to the center but still in a quiet street. It has everything you need and looks very cozy and beautiful. Lots of space, and character!

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments:
I live in Rotterdam but needed a place to accommodate three friends coming for the event. We were lucky to find Rosana's apartment. I had to extend the reservation 2 times but it was always confirmed immediately.
The apartment is marvelous and charming, has everything needed and is in a great location. Communication with Rosana was a pleasure, she answered all questions the same minute (the cutlery drawer is in the drawer under the hob! :) ) and was exceptionally friendly. My friends praised the quality of beds and slept well and the view on the city is amazing. Also there is an Italian shop in the same building around the corner with the best pizza in town, very affordable. Many great cafes with terraces are close too, same as Blaak railway/metro station.
All in all, that is the best stay you can find in Rotterdam.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments:
Staying there was pleasant, it was really well-placed we could access pretty much whatever we needed quite easily (groceries, restaurants, activities, etc...).
During our stay they were quite some noise from automobile drivers, apart from that it was pretty calm.
I would recommend this place without a doubt to anyone wanting to visit Rotterdam 👍

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments:
The apartment was very nice and as described. Due to the warm outdoor temperature, we needed to open the windows to get some airflow in the apartment. This unfortunately exacerbated the fact that the apartment is located in a noisy area. We heard motorcycle noise until at least 23:00 every night. We also were awoken by multiple seagulls in the early morning hours. Otherwise the apartment would be great.
Visitors should be noted that this apartment is on the fourth floor, with a traditional narrow Dutch stairway to get to the bedrooms on floor 5. We ended up leaving our luggage on the 4th floor as we were pretty tired hauling things up the stairs.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Nice place to stay with a family or few friends. 3 Bedrooms with good beds, modern kitchen and bathroom. Location is perfect, close to shopping, nightlife and all the highlights of Rotterdam with convenient but pricy parking in front. Some maintenance needed, but nothing egregious. It’s a lot of stairs to get to 4th floor and no elevator.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: This apartment is a gem in a neat area of Rotterdam with a well-stocked kitchen and comfortable living/sleeping spaces. Although Rosanna was responsive and accommodating via messaging, the oversight of the maintenance/cleaning between guests is lacking. We were given specific instructions about the window blinds, only to find they had fallen off the wall and not been repaired. Our biggest disappointment not being able to use the terraces. They have cloth furniture that gets wet leaving some covered with green slime. Bird droppings covered the ground. After we sent photos, Rosana agreed they looked horrible and offered to send someone to clean, but we felt that should have happened BEFORE our arrival. Waterproof furniture would be an excellent improvement as would a bench in the entry hallway (as shown in the photos). Finally, the water in the shower continually went from cold to warm, unless we ran the bathroom faucet at the same time which we were not informed of until we asked.

name: Spacious apartment on the Binnerotteplein hotspot
comments: Great location. keep in mind it's on the 4th floor, no elevator.  bedrooms and upstairs from main floor, and stairs are very steep. difficult to take your luggage up. left my bags in the dining room. shower a bit funny, goes hot to cold intermittent. place was amazing, close to to many coffee shops, restaurants, and street market on Tuesday and Saturday. RTM Blaak station is only 10 minutes walk. MarketHall is a great places to find all kinds of local eating places.

name: TJ - Elegant Expat Apartment w/ a Terrace
comments: This Airbnb has such a cool design and looks just like the pictures. We enjoyed our stay here and enjoyed exploring the neighborhood. The exact location is a 5ish min bike ride from the Central Station which makes it really easy to get to. The neighboorhood is up and coming with some great restaurants like Tosca and Speck. There's a cool shopping street about a 5 min walk away with vintage stores, a whiskey-only store, and a huge kitchen store.  There are two bars on the corners of the Airbnb's block with regulars that spend many hours drinking nightly, getting a bit loud, and smoking cigarettes. If you plan to sleep with the windows open you will hear the sounds and smell the cigarettes.

name: TJ - Elegant Expat Apartment w/ a Terrace
comments:
Tjula was the main host for our stay, she was very friendly throughout our stay. At the start, she helped us receive some documents that were being sent before our arrival. When we had any issues during the stay, she is very friendly and accomodating. The stairs up to the apartment was steep, but she was there to help us with our luggage up the apartment. Responsive and helpful!
The apartment is located about 15 min walk away from rotterdam central, but there are tram stops which are about 5-10 min walk away from the apartment which you can pay for. There are quite afew fast food options around and a supermarket just across the road. There is also a bar across the street but do note that the poor soundproofing of the flat may affect light sleepers especially on weekends. Noise, footsteps from unit above is also audible. Always keep windows, doors closed to keep out insects.
The apartment is well equipped, and a new sofa was added halfway through our stay. Comfortable 4 month stay!

name: Rotterdam City center Double room
comments:
We never met the host Antonio, but reception girls were friendly and helpful, nice position with buzzing street in the evening and best hamburgers!
Room very neat and modern just very small for 2 people.

name: Rotterdam City center Double room
comments: The address in Airbnb is wrong, it’s 500 far away from the correct place. The room is good. But the street in midnight was really noise, had many bar with many people drink here. One thing need to be mentioned, a “coffee shop” is under the hotel, some people smoke in the midnight(3 am) and speak loudly! And do not have air dry

name: City center street view  Double room Boxspring
comments: Great central location and the street is lined with fantastic restaurants! Close to the train station, only a 12 min walk and close to all amenities.

name: City center street view  Double room Boxspring
comments: Very easy arrival and departure, very clean room,  minor point was the noisy street.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments:
The entrance to the studio is through a large garage. The garage is turned to a bright and tidy storage, where one can place a bike overnight safely.
Albert Heijn supermarket is pretty close.
The studio is rather tiny, but very cosy and ok for 1 or maybe 2 tenants.
I enjoyed staying there because of cleanliness of the studio and bathroom.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: It was a really nice place, at walking distance from the station and well connected. Just one room but sensibly furnished and well cared for. The only thing to keep in mind is that it’s a ground floor in a really green area so if you leave the garden door/window open some animals/insects could come in!

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: Nice place to stay. Very clean and great location. Very close to the train station and easy to find.  Also even though very central, I could hear no traffic noise.  Only thing I would mention is that the fridge makes a little bit of noise but that is just because I am a light sleeper. The renovations next door are still going on and start around 7am but obviously nothing the host can do about that.  Overall a nice little place to stay.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: Lovely little studio, perfect for one or two people. Modern, comfortable, well-equipped, and very clean. Though it is on a main road, it is at the backside of the building, so it is extremely quiet. The only downside was some noise from the building site next door and the fact that the little yard could not be used because of that same construction, but, obviously, this is beyond the owner's control. The location is perfect and the host responds within minutes. Very pleased and definitely coming back.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments:
Nice Airbnb
Train Station and a lot of stores and sights in walking distance.
Adequately equipped kitchen.
Nice bathroom.
(With the big windows and the small radiator it got a little bit chilly at times)

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: Cool place to spend a couple of nightlights in Rotterdam! Super close to central station and some nice restaurants and cafes closest by.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: Located at a very convenient and quiet residential area at the back of Central Station.  Hosts are very kind and flexible with my delayed arrival due to a flight trouble.  I enjoyed staying with you.

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: Very clean and convenient. Tram is right across the street!

name: Cosy studio close to city centre
comments: I came to Rotterdam by bicycle to attend a conference. Therefore, the option to store the bike inside the entrance hall was very welcome. I spent 4 great nights at Wouter's place. The apartment had everything i needed, and the coffee machine and garden were my personal highlights. Though located next to a busy road, this place is quiet and you can easily get everywhere around Rotterdam by bike, public transport or walking. (For an evening out, I'd recommend the "Station Bergweg" food court that is only a 5 minute walk from the apartment.)

name: Modern and spacious apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We loved our stay. Great spacious apartment, nice view of the street, excellent communication! The location is also great - walking distance from shops and public transport, and across the road from a fabulous bakery open early till late. We hope to come back!

name: Modern and spacious apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We had a good stay at the airbnb all the important things were functional and was a great last minute solution. The Airbnb does feel very empty, but that is something we were aware of before booking since it is noticeable on the pictures. A few small things didn't fully work as intended, but nothing too major. The toilet light had to be turned on and off a few times for it to work for example and the fan in the shower makes quite some noise. Outside of a few of these small things it was a functional airbnb. Our biggest complaint would be that during our stay we had questions about what to do with the trash and how the check out would be handled. We never got a response to this and communication in that was very bad. The communication before the stay was great, but was very much lacking during. All in all it was a good stay with no big negatives.

name: Luxe vier kamer appartement met uitzicht op groen
comments:
Linda has an amazing apartment and we were lucky enough to be able to stay there for nearly two weeks. It is a spacious, light and comfortable apartment with everything you need for a nice holiday (including air conditioner and mosquito net in the bedroom and a beautiful big balcony.
We went on trips to the beach in Den Haag, Amsterdam and Rotterdam, but you don’t even have to do that to enjoy your time there because the area itself is absolutely beautiful with lakes, canals and forest like parks. There are also supermarkets and a lot of other stores nearby so you don’t need a car at all.
We absolutely loved our stay there and were sad when we had to leave!
100% recommended!

name: Luxe vier kamer appartement met uitzicht op groen
comments: We had a great stay at Linda’s apartment. We are a dutch family living abroad and originally from Rotterdam, so it was a total homecoming for us. Linda’s apartment is very sunny, light and therefor very friendly. It comes with all needed amenities and the neighborhood is great, with some shops - a supermarket, drugstore, artisanal bakery, butcher and more - on walking distance. Public transportation is nearby giving easy access to the city center without needing a car. The apartment Linda prepared the apartment well before our arrival and we were in contact with her throughout our stay. Our trips the Netherlands are always jam packed with activities and visits to family and friends and Linda’s apartment was for us an oasis in itself to slowdown when needed.  We will definitely return.

name: Luxe vier kamer appartement met uitzicht op groen
comments: I highly reccommeen this apartment! It was really nice to stay there, very clean and tidy.    Nice balcony and surroundings.

name: Luxe vier kamer appartement met uitzicht op groen
comments: The apartment is very comfortable and livable.  The view of the duck pond from the living room windows is really special, and one doesn't really get the full impression by looking at the photos. The bedrooms and beds are all comfortable. The neighbourhood is quiet and also very walkable. Several supermarkets within walking distance. Rotterdam city is around 25 minutes by bicycle. There are bicycle stations right outside the apartment to lock up your bicycles.  We really loved our time here and my family was sad to leave. If I find myself again going to Rotterdam I will be sure to check with this host first to see if they have an opening!

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments: Perfect location! Actually, you don't need a car to get around, the train stop is right around the corner. While we do have a car, the parking spot is right at the front door. Every time I sent a message to Krestel, I got a response in a minute! The grocery store is right at the cross street. Anyway, everything is super nice! Highly recommended.

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments: Frans and Kristel are very nice host, check-in and check-out were very easy.  In the house you can find everything you need, there is a lot of light inside, the garden is nice. Our stay was perfect. Thank you Kristel and Frans.

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments: We really enjoyed our staying in Rotterdam at Kristel and Frans guest house. It is a cozy apartment by the river with a spacious kitchen corner and a nice porch. The bathroom is new and the shower has different jets. Towels are available for guests, as well as extra blankets and pillows, and a hairdryer. The only downside, due to its location, are mosquitoes. However, there is more than one tool to get rid of them inside the house. The main room is very bright, with the glass door and three windows, one of which on the ceiling that can be darkened with curtains. The apartment is perfect for a couple, who want to spend a weekend or some more days visiting Rotterdam and the nearby cities. The guest house is close to the city center by tram (15-20 minutes). If you come by car, you can easily park it in front of the house. The communication with Kristel was perfect (she gave us every information we might need before arriving) and we were personally welcomed by Frans, who showed us the place and gave us some extra information about the windows, the bathroom and on how to cool the main room. We would definitely consider booking it again for our next trip in the area!

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments: Perfect for those who are looking for privacy and a quiet surroundings, but still close to the city center. The accommodation was very neat and clean, and it comes with an outside seating / chilling area. Owners are very friendly and easy to approach.

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments:
Kristel and Frans are very friendly and the Check in was easy (after finally finding the right place:)).
If you don't mind the traffic noise from streets and highway, you will be just fine:)
There is public transportation nearby to get to Rotterdam Center, which is convenient. It was a little bit unexpected, that you have to dispose used toilet paper into a bin instead of the toilet, but again, if you stay for Just a few days, you should be fine:)

name: Sfeervol guesthouse, privé tuin en free parking
comments: Where to start...first of all, the contact with Kristel and Frans was extremely easy and proactive. They gave us a very friendly welcome and made us feel at home. The accommodation itself is a cute little place for two people. Everything you need was there. We also spent a lot of time with Frans and had really great conversations. Kristel and Frans were very open and accommodating. We didn't lack for anything. They gave us tips on where we could eat well, what we could see and where we could fish well. We would particularly like to emphasize Frans sincerity and his positive and funny manner. Talking to him was never boring and always funny! Our highlight was on the last evening. Frans invited us to go fishing on the boat. We spent 3 hours on the water with Frans and had a really great time. We will be back and will bring a crate of beer next time. Thank you two, we won't forget you.

name: Luxurious Loft  in Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Great apartment on a perfect location in the city center of Rotterdam!
Very luxurious and clean, everything you need is available.
Check in and checkout were very personal and the communication was easy.
Great location in the center, yet a quiet street without noise at night. Shops and city market around the corner. I really recommend this place!

name: Luxurious Loft  in Rotterdam Centre
comments:
The loft looks nice and is spacious. However the large walls and concrete floor do make every noise sounding hard. People outside talking, you can hear in the bedroom. So if you are a light sleeper (like us) you will not sleep well.
Besides that nothing negative to say.

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments: Our stay was perfect, from check-in to checkout. The room had everything we needed, including some food in the fridge, a lot of varieties of tea, foam soap for the bath and hangers. The most cozy feature of the room was the projector and the dimmable, changing color lights. Great atmosphere :)

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments:
Hosts who are excellent and clear communicators, put a personal and well-thought through spot together and who value the importance of hospitality and cosiness. I can't imagine anything more pleasant! Even if the space is small (which honestly I love, it's like a den), everything is in reach and ready for you to use, from atmospheric lights to Netflix projected on the wall opposite the bed, to a nice warm bath or shower!
For me and my partner the location was perfect because its the lovely getaway close to home. Even if you are from out of town, everything else more than makes up for the location that is slightly far from the city center. Luckily, OV in Rotterdam is super accessible and easy.
I'm already looking forward to visiting again! :D

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments: An amazing place to book for a short or long time. We stayed for about two weeks and we loved every minute. The bedroom is really cozy and has a nice aesthetic to it. Some of the highlights are the projector and the big bath. Last but not least Dimitris and Eva are some of the friendliest hosts we have met on our journeys. We would definitely recommend the place to anyone looking for a relaxing stay!

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments: This is a great place to escape the city noises and still be close to Rotterdam's center by train. Every detail is well thought and Dimitriou's was extremely thoughtful and even picked us up at the central station. Highly recommend this place. Very cozy and everything is in the right place, so although small the size does not bother you at all.

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments:
Everything is nearby, green parks, lake, parking zone, metrostation, cycling-streets, supermarkets.
Dimitrios and Eva are nice and good hosts.
The apartment was clean and quiet. I could sleep very well. There is everything you need and a little extra (breakfast). They help you with questions and request. Big Thank You

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments: We had a very pleasant stay, the place it’s set up to make you feel cozy and at home. You have everything that you need plus the lighting is amazing to play with. Easy parking and quiet area to sleep tight. Thanks for sharing your place with us!

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments:
An absolutely stunning place to stay.
Dimitris and Eva are really great hosts and the place is as seen in the pictures. Smooth lights, the projector for watching movies is a highlight and the Japanese atmosphere is calming and relaxing. Location is good as well. in 20 mins you are in the center and approx. 35 at the University.
Dimitris was also kind enough to drive me to the train station on my last and Eva came one night to offer me homemade pastry bread (tsoureki) from her grandmother.
Would definitely recommend this place!

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments:
Honestly, 5 starts are just not enough to describe how amazing its this place.
Super clean and extremely cozy.
Literally spent 2 days only inside as I found there everything I needed. Dimitrios it’s a super host, very careful and paying attention to all small details. Ambient lights, video projector, a small kitchen fully equipped, shower with hot tub. In top of it I was even surprised to find breakfast with coffee and tee and tee. definitely 10 out of 10.

name: Luxurious Japandi  Room
comments:
Remarkable space with amazing space ergonomics, the projector is very catchy and gives another perspective to the space. I really enjoyed the stay and will definitely choose it again in my next visit at the Rotterdam.
As for the host, Dimitris is truly a 5 star person. Enlightening, his advice-contribution was decisive in facilitating my stay and in quickly discovering the beauties of the city

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: Lovely and spacious flat at 10 min of Rotterdam center with a nice view on the marina. Nearby shops and tram. Everything was perfect! We recommend this place for sure!

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: Great location 5 mins from the Tram station , supermarket nearby , lovely views of the canals . Very stylish .

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: Great, spacious home in a calm neighborhood of Rotterdam! Jurien and Bianca were always reachable and super responsive, checking in with us throughout our stay. The apartment is very spacious and full of light. Very well equipped from the kitchen to the working space (which I had to use and was very convenient). The backyard was very pleasant to have meals in the summer and we loved the spacious, modern kitchen as well. The beds were comfortable and everything was super clean. The bathrooms were great and with everything working perfectly.

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: 4 stories with good amount of space including multiple bathrooms. Nice backyard play area for kids. Parking is off street and free overnight but paid during the day. Walking distance to a grocery store and a few shops. Interior was remodeled in the last few years and has nice finishes, touches, and accessories (sound system you can connect to and nice bedding). Owner was very responsive, proactive and flexible with communications.

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: we would highly recommend Juriën's home, its absolutely beautiful, comfortable and peaceful. Beds are comfy, lots of fresh linen and towels. Fantastic Sonas sound sytem and comfy area to watch Netflix on the big TV. Only slight downside is the steep stairs which is common in Netherlands homes. Would love to stay again sometime.

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments: Very good place not far from the city centre. Grocery shops nearby, great view to a channel, parking is straight near the building. Jurien is a very nice host. Very clean, spacious house, where you feel like at home. Towels, nessecities provided. Whatever we asked Jurien, he provided great service. He is a real superhost.

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments:
Juriens place was just like in the pictures - super trendy and a real family home. One of the reasons we chose it as we had a real mix of adult family members of all ages.
Lovely peaceful location overlooking a canal. We didnt make use of the outside area - even though the weather was blazing, we had too much to do in Rotterdam.
Not too far from the tram, even closer to a bus. Only about a 20 minute walk to on trend area of Kartendrecht, with loads of places to eat and drink.
Did not meet Jurien as he was away but communication easy before and throughout our stay. His neighbour showed us into the house - after a late arrival with flights. It is obvious there have been many bad experiences for Jurien due to specific rules given on several points - like smoking in the house, noise, etc. I tried to be extra careful to stick to all rules but one of our group managed to break something! Luckily Jurien was understanding.
Great for a large family group.

name: Gewilde 4-laags woning Kop van Zuid, nabij centrum
comments:
I had a wonderful stay at this place! It was impeccably clean and the location couldn’t be better—just a short drive to downtown. The waterfront view was absolutely stunning and really added to the charm. The layout of the space was well-thought-out, and the kitchen was big and spacious, which made it really comfortable to prepare meals.
I also loved how bright the place was during the day thanks to the large windows letting in plenty of natural light. On top of that, the host was extremely friendly and made the check-in process super simple and clear.
Overall, it was a fantastic experience and I’d definitely recommend it!

name: Apartment in Rotterdam City Centre with balcony
comments:
Rodrigo’s place is exactly as it shows on pictures: lovely and cozy! Wonderful view of Rotterdam. Light spaces and everything you need in order to feel at home. The apartment is very closed to Central station as well as the city center. Quite neighbourhood and two supermarkets on the bottom of the building. Rodrigo is a welcoming and super responsive host! Highly recommend if you like to enjoy Rotterdam both for its sparkling center and for the chillness of the Blijdorp neighbourhood. Checkin and checkout very flexible.
For sure I am going to take Rodrigo’s place as an option when I will come back to Rotterdam. Again highly recommend!

name: Apartment in Rotterdam City Centre with balcony
comments: Gorgeous views, tons to do, and the host was super friendly. Just a great spot overall. Highly recommend!

name: Apartment in Rotterdam City Centre with balcony
comments: I enjoyed the local area. pretty much everything is in walking distance. my favorite part of this property was the view at night.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Super Ausstattung, es wurde an alles gedacht. Sogar Bademäntel waren vorhanden. Perfekte Lage, nicht weit in die Innenstadt. Das absolute Highlight war der Whirlpool, der schon bei unserem Eintreffen vorgeheizt war. Vielen Dank!

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
I would give the place a 4 of 5. They still need to work on some things in the house I stayed, their excuse was that it was the last one to be built. The door glasses from the water view side were pretty dusty, the sound boxes were not working, BIG BIG DISAPPOINTMENT, because I haven’t taken my music box with, so I def missed the vibe of enjoying the house concept as whole. Besides that, there was no tong/grill tools in the drawers (when I asked for it, they said it was in but it wasn’t) and I almost had to beg for the hammock.
The houseboat idea is amazing, the design is also great, just like a modern tiny house, u can see the people passing by, taking pictures of the houses and admiring it, therefore u don’t get a lot of privacy when all the curtains are open (but that didn’t disturb me at all). The whirlpool + the hammock are def the killer and once you lie down in bed, u fall asleep straight away, because of the motion of the water, sleeping there is also one of the highlights, I have to admit. You literally don’t feel leaving the house, you go to the supermarket (which is very close), get ur stuff and make yourselves a nice breakfast + dinner outdoor.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Great place to stay, with fantastic views.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
We loved the Wikkelboat!
Delightful design, comfortable, so great to be on the water! About a seven minute walk to a station for both tram and metro, which gets you everywhere. There’s a grocery store just around the corner. And there are some good restaurants also less than a five minute walk away.
The staff were awesome. We left three swimsuits behind. Not only did they message me while we were still nearby, they came back to the boat on 20 min notice, so we got our suits and still made our train!

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
Highlight durch und durch
Absolut empfehlenswert.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Wikkelboat 3 is amazing! The boat lies in walking distance to all the attractions of the city and with a great view, but at the same time it is so calm and relaxing, gently swaying on the water with a cozy atmosphere and a lot of thought-out details. And the jacuzzi is just wow. We can definitely recommend this place.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
The place was really nice and comfortable beds.
The view in the morning and evening was beautiful and the dock on the water with couch was perfect for a chat.
Close to everything and easy to find.
Only down side, the house is max for 2 single person or 2 couples.
But definitely recommended ❤️

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: I have stayed at some incredible homes with AirBNB, but Wikkelboat might be my favorite one of all. The views are gorgeous, especially from the hot tub at night. The restaurant up the dock, Putaine, is phenomenal, and for a Michelin, very reasonable. But living in the Wikkelboat for a night was a dream. The bed was cozy, the shower was hot, and it was a tiny house dream come true. I wish I could have stayed longer, but I will definitely come back.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
Whilst on a motorcycle tour of The Netherlands we booked a night in the Wikkel Boat. It really didn't disappoint, great location, loved that it was a floating boat / home. Very clean and modern inside with a view across the water.
The hot tub was perfect especially after a days riding, and had everything we needed inside. We would highly recommend and would stay there again when in Rotterdam.
We found the Food Hallen just across the road which was perfect. Lots of food choices from around the world! And a small local super market for water and food for the night.
Thank you!

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Very lovely location and nice design. Clean and very nice hot tub. Slightly pricey but a great experience.

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: De wikkelboat is een leuke ervaring die je eens gedaan moet hebben. De jacuzzi was heerlijk, binnen was het netjes en gezellig en alle voorzieningen waren aanwezig. Je hebt niet echt veel privacy als je buiten op het terras zit bij de jacuzzi (links en rechts van ons waren er ook andere wikkelboten met gasten). Ook voel je de wikkelboat een beetje bewegen omdat die natuurlijk op water drijft, dat kan je misschien wel een misselijk of duizelig gevoel geven. Uitchecken was volgens Airbnb voor 11 uur, maar via de check-out toepassing van Wikkelboat zelf moest dit voor 10:30 uur. Dat is wel iets waar je rekening mee moet houden. Voor de rest helemaal prima!

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
Waren für 3 Nächte zu dritt dort und es war wirklich sehr schön. Die Innenausstatung hatte alles was man brauchte und war auch gross genug. Der Wirlpool und die möglichkeit auch noch in das Wasser zu springen war ein riesen plus für uns.
Insgesamt war es ein highlight und kommen gerne wiedereinmal in die Unterkunft 😁😊👍🏼

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Ein unvergesslicher Aufenthalt auf dem Hausboot!
Wir hatten eine wundervolle Zeit auf dem Hausboot! Die Unterkunft war top – modern, gemütlich und mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht. Die zentrale Lage war perfekt: Alles war in wenigen Gehminuten erreichbar, sodass wir die Stadt entspannt erkunden konnten.
Nach einem langen Tag draußen konnten wir uns im Jacuzzi herrlich entspannen und neue Energie tanken – ein absolutes Highlight! Die Aussicht und Atmosphäre waren einfach traumhaft, besonders abends, wenn die Lichter reflektierten und das Wasser ganz ruhig war.
Eine einzigartige Unterkunft, die wir jederzeit wieder buchen würden. Absolute Empfehlung! 😊🚤✨

name: Wikkelboat 3 @ Floating Rotterdam Rijnhaven
comments: Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt, mitten in der Stadt und der Whirlpool war ein Highlight :) würden gerne wieder kommen

name: A quiet room with office space
comments: Karen was super easy to communicate with and extremely helpful throughout my stay. If I had a question, she would provide a perfect answer. The house was very neat and tidy. There was a good set of rules in place which made me more comfortable. There was an excellent respect to everyone’s privacy. Overall, it was perfect.

name: A quiet room with office space
comments:
Ho utilizzato Airbnb come sistemazione temporanea per mio figlio : la camera corrispondeva alle aspettative, era fornita però solo di bollitore. Karen ha messo a disposizione lo spazio cucina solo dalle 18.30 alle 19.15 adducendo motivi di privacy. Lo spazio a disposizione in frigorifero era minuscolo. La colazione ed il pranzo sono stati da consumare in stanza o fuori.
In un mese di soggiorno non è stato offerto il cambio lenzuola.
Per l’utilizzo della lavatrice viene richiesto un sovrapprezzo di 10€
La stanza contiene documenti di lavoro di Karen : mentre il ragazzo era a cena lei entrava in stanza per recuperare qualcosa. Violando in qualche modo la privacy altrui
A dispetto di quanto scrive sul proprio profilo l’impressione è che abbia poco interesse verso il benessere dei suoi ospiti .
Allo stesso prezzo ho trovato una sistemazione più confortevole per proseguire il soggiorno

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: It was nice to stay at Lauren's place - great view, perfect location! Thanks a lot.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Lauren was very kind and showed us everything, we instantly felt comfortable. The apartment was perfect for our weekend trip in Rotterdam, it is centrally located and we were able to reach everything easily. I felt like I was at home instantly and would definitely recommend the apartment to anyone. It was very clean, incredibly nice furnished and we could even was our clothes. The breathtaking view of the Erasmus Bridge was the highlight for us. Thank you so much for making us feel so welcome Lauren.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: We had a very nice stay at Lauren’s. Her apartment was just like the photos with a great view and close to the centre!

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Excellent stay. Stunning view from the flat. Excellent location near the city centre. Nothing missing in the flat, the owner provides everything the tenant needs. I highly recommend it. Catherine and Jenna

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Felt like home, stunning view,  Lauren is a great host!

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Perfect place to stay with stunning view.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Very friend host and was very helpful! We loved our say! The viewings were stunning and the place was very central.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Perfect location for my visit to Rotterdam.  Close to metro and events I attended.  View of the river and bridge was nice.  Appreciate the fridge being well stocked though all I needed was water.  would highly recommend Lauren's apartment.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: Lauren was very responsive and friendly. The appartment was better than the photos. Great view, clean, comfy and big bed, fast wifi, fully equipped kitchen and we were allowed to use whatever was in the fridge.

name: Luxery condo stunning view in centre of Rotterdam
comments: We had a short but enjoyable stay in Lauren’s flat. It was well equipped and have everything we needed with a few thoughtful touches. The views over the water were definitely a bonus….

name: Cocondo
comments:
By far the most unique space and most highly-designed Airbnb I’ve ever visited (and that’s over 200 stays since 2014). Cocondo also has the highest quality linens, bedding, kitchenware, glass and tableware, appliances, and bathroom/shower fixtures. Even the tea provided was local and gourmet. The adjustable lighting was very nice, and created even better atmosphere. Despite being here in winter, we were warm and cozy - thanks in no small part to Peter readily supplying extra wood pellets for the wood stove (which really kicks out heat!!) when we requested more. Peter responds to texts within minutes.
Don’t miss a short walk to and through dunes to see other nearby bunkers in the Festung Hoek van Holland; up the residential road just a minute walk is a staircase on the right (Cocondo is in a VERY nice residential area, btw). Further up that same footpath is De Jongens, an upscale pub/restaurant we recommend for dinner out, though dinner at Cocondo was romantic - real candles!

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments:
I do know Adelaide as we almost never met in the 10 days of my staying, but she seemed nice.
The room is not a room, it is a bed separate by a curtain from the living room/kitchen. So there is very little privacy and the space has almost nothing else.
The bedsheets were clean, but I cannot say the same for the kitchen and the bad.
I found the costs were way too high for the bed I got.

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments:
Adelaide was so friendly and accommodating! Her place is simple and bright: it has everything you need as a solo traveler and felt very comfortable.
It is also well-located, right next to a bunch of restaurants and bars and a 25 min walk to the train station.
Thanks for having me, Adelaide!

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments: I had a great stay at Adelaide's apartment. She was very responsive and we had great chats about Rotterdam, but also on a personal level, which I really appreciate as a great Airbnb experience. The place is located very close to the Stadsdriehoek, were there are lot's of nice places around. Adelaide gave me some nice tips on where to go, which I really liked. Even though the apartment is so central, it's in a more quiet street, which is nice after a busy day.

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments:
Adelaide is a good & very kind host. She's very welcoming, gave a tour of the space, gave good recommendations. It was important for me to have a place for women only and I had all that I needed. Adelaide's also very helpful, I forgot to bring something and she gave me hers to use. She even made me ginger tea when she heard me coughing in the morning. Kudos!
Although the bathroom wasn't clean, the very clean & comfortable bed made up for it l (I always carry bath slippers with me for travel). I liked that she had home slippers available, which made me feel right at home. Adelaide is inquisitive and a goos conversation partner too.
All in all, I had a pleasant stay and a great night rest which is important to me. Quiet neighbourhood, good privacy. Would recommend for solo women travellers ✅️
Thanks for a nice stay, Adelaide!

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments:
Adelaide is a wonderful host. She’s very open and communicative. We had a great chat the first evening but I had a full agenda and was away most of the time.
She answered all of my questions via message and gave great restaurant suggestions. I couldn’t ask for a better place. As for traveling alone, the neighborhood is bright and quiet with only a short walk to a tram stop.

name: Cozy room in the heart of Rotterdam (Women only)
comments: Adelaide is such a warm and welcoming host. Her place is easy to get to, cozy room had comfortable and sizeable space, and free to use the living room space as well.  Adelaide also made extra effort to connect, despite after a busy work day at her shop (with delicious bakes!). She's a hardworking, authentic and lovely person! Learnt about her interests and inspiring stories, and about the Dutch culture through our interaction. She had good recommendations for sights and food places, and even catered them to my interests/preferences. She was really sweet and offered for me to do laundry as I was doing a long trip. Oscar was the other highlight, he's affectionate, cuddly, fun-loving and loves attention! He is respectful of space though if you keep your room door closed. Highly recommended stay! Thank you Adelaide and Oscar for making Rotterdam memorable (:

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments: Location is super conveniently located near Central station, within walking distance of several grocers, and the room is cosy with a great living space. Shiming is a great host who lets you have privacy but up for conversation if you like it. Overall a wonderful stay

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments: Very central but quiet place, perfect for a long weekend discovering the city. Also the view from the bedroom was fabulous! The host is very nice and everything was tidy and clean.

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments: To the point, kind host. :) Good location, privacy,  and a good warm bed and room that I truly appreciate when working hard! Thank you! See you :)!

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments:
Everything was nice and clean. Good location - supermarkets, bars restaurants and trains/metro are around but it's been very quiet in the room so I had a great sleep after a challenging day with cancelled flights. Shiming was a friendly host and I could ask her everytime when I had a problem or needed a recommendation.
All in all I had nothing to complain about :)

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments:
Shiming is a very discreet person. Her place is simple but really nice and comfy. Very easy and fast to reach from the airport/train central station and quiet/silent even if placed on a big street. Shiming will give you advices if you’ll ask or totally respect your privacy otherwise, and offer you to use the kitchen and the basics in the house. She waited for my arrival even at late night and was flexible for the check out.
The room is very plain but it will give you a beautiful light all day long to work at a small desk, rest etc. Many services around (big supermarket really around the corner and many restaurants etc).
Relatively good price for a single room considering the options in the area.
Recommended.

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments: Very convenient place that does the basics right. The host gives you the privacy you need but is helpful with requests. The stay was very comfortable

name: Private bedroom 10 min walk to central station
comments:
I enjoyed my stay. The apartment is very bright thanks to the large windows but if you prefer, you can use the shutters to darken your room.
Shiming was friendly and helpful, I felt welcome right from the start.
The apartment was clean, all I needed was there and I she also offered I could make a coffee or tea in her kitchen.
The apartment is well situated, close to the central station but on the rear side of the building so that I had a view into gardens, not onto the street. This also means the apartment is quiet which I enjoyed as well.
Should I come back to Rotterdam, I would stay here again.

name: 2-bedroom condo 10-min walk from Central station
comments: Very clean, very big spacious place. Plenty of food around and great views. I highly recommend

name: 2-bedroom condo 10-min walk from Central station
comments: We had a nice stay. Communication with Shiming was very fast and the checkin was flexible. The appartment is very well located, close to the main station and has a great view to each side

name: 2-bedroom condo 10-min walk from Central station
comments: We stayed at Shiming’s place for a few days. The apartment was very spacious, and at walkable distance to city center. If you are a light sleeper, you will be woken up by the light and birds. The main bedroom is spacious, but only has a 140cm bed. Overall, you get the value for your money.

name: stylish 30s apartment with canal view!
comments: Very very lovely apartment with a beautiful view! Elise was a great host! Very kind and easy communication 💥

name: stylish 30s apartment with canal view!
comments: We had a great time at Elise’s place. Lovely view of the canal, convenient location, nicely decorated, and Elise was great at communicating and offering recommendations!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments:
We stayed here for one weekend with our dog and it was incredible! You have so much privacy, a very big and nice backyard and the host is so friendly that you directly feel at home! We definitely want to come back!
We did a chill weekend and this was the perfect spot for it!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments:
Truly a wonderful experience, we loved every second in Wibbine’s peaceful oasis with The Hague, Delft, and Rotterdam all within a 25m drive or less.
The tiny home sits in the privacy of the back yard of the property, surrounded by a variety of trees, beautiful fields of grass, a cow pasture and a little creeks. It is quiet, minimal, and has all the basics necessary for an stress-free stay.
Each day we took a walk in the sunshine through the tall grass field along the creek. Our dog was visibly smitten with the property, we had not seen her play, or prance around, the way she did in years! It was as though she went back to her younger years, our hearts melted.
Wibbine greeted us when we arrived with a big smile and very warm and welcoming energy. Once we parked she gave us a quick tour and then left us to get settled. Wibbine is a fantastic host overall, helpful, available, thoughtful and gave us space, so we felt completely comfortable. Absolutely recommend to fellow nature lovers!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: Heel verwelkomende ontvangst, fantastische plek, veel privacy en fijn in de natuur. Echt een aanrader als je weinig nodig hebt om het naar je zin te hebben!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: The cabin is a great place to find tranquility in a furthermore very much urban area. The organisation and location invite for contemplation and also small rituals. Wibbine is very warm hearted and communicative. The place is a world in itself, very nice. Then again, not for the faint of heart, it is next to a huge graveyard. But that is completely invisible. The thing that prevails is the great view, nature, and the feeling of being almost in some French countryside.

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: We had an amazing time at Wibbine’s place. The photos don’t do justice because the tiny house looks bigger and very spacious. When you’re inside you can see the fields and cows and ducks and lots of beauty in nature. Very private and the host wibbine always asked if she needed to pass by. It is important for those bringing pets to consider the temperature of the day because the house can naturally heat up. Please take the pet with you if you need to leave the house. But aside from that, beautiful location. Amazing host who is super friendly and kind, and overall we had an amazing time!!! I understand the good reviews 🩵

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: Our stay at Wibbine’s  place was amazing. The cabin we stayed at is located in the back of the farm with a lot of privacy.  She’s a great and friendly host, made us feel welcome, safe and made us laugh quite a lot. We will always remember this place. This stay is highly recommended.

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments:
Dit is dus echt top! Heerlijke plek net buiten Rotterdam. Rustig en fijn plekje met alle ruimte en privacy. Op de fiets naar centrum Rotterdam of Delft en na een dagje gezelligheid weer even de rust om te relaxen.
Wibbine is heel leuk en gastvrij. Aanrader, niet over twijfelen!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: Beautiful tiny house and huge garden! We enjoyed freshly picked blackberries and strawberries for breakfast as well as swimming in the canal just across the street. Cycling to Rotterdamm, Delft and Den Hague was very pleasant! We slept wonderfully in the quiet garden. Thanks so much, we‘ll looking forward to coming back!

name: Idyllisch Tiny House op Boerderij Driebergen
comments: Het was heerlijk om het weekend in het tiny huis bij Wibbine door te brengen. Een en al natuurschoon, rust en privacy op een steenworp afstand van Rotterdam. Een pareltje met een hartverwarmende gastvrouw.
