name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Bookcase with Bath
comments: Great cute rooms, good communication and we had a nice bath with waterstreams and colored lights. Would definitely recommend!

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Bookcase with Bath
comments: Location is great and area is quiet. Located next to central station and metro lines. Nice vibe in and around the hotel. Pleasant personnel and guests. Hotel looked great, nice interiors. What was not so great is the AC only room, no window can be opened and in our case the shower dripped. Waking you up in the middle of the night even though you didn’t used the shower yourself. Not so sure if I would come back here next year.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Bookcase with Bath
comments: The front desk reception were friendly and kind, I felt welcome. The location is close enough to walk to restaurants and pubs. The hotel room was delightful, it had a nice Jacuzzi  tub, shower, and plenty of space -- not to mention the unique entrance to the room itself.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Bookcase with Bath
comments:
Really good, would have benefited from a tv or kettle but in fairness, these were not in the advert!
My only issue was that you can open the windows so no fresh air can get in.
A lovely spot though, and the bath was a luxury!

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Candy House
comments: The room is so small that two people cannot both open average sized bags on the Floor. There are not even hooks on the wall to hang a towel or a toiletries bag. Windows only to the common area, so you have to keep the curtains permantly closed and get neither sunlight nor fresh air. Weird and appalling decorations, for over 100€ a night an absolute rip-off. Two stars for location and okay cleanliness

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Wish You a Nice Stay Medium
comments:
The hotel is located near the central station. It takes around 20 to 40 minutes to reach the sights.
The hotel was creatively decorated which was enjoyable.
Check-In & Check-Out were easy and at arrival the room was clean.
Sadly the room was not cleaned during our stay and we had to ask for new toilet paper, for the rubbish to be taken out and the towels to be changed.
The shower and the sink were in the room. The toilet was badly soundproofed and could not be locked so there was little privacy. Also the movement-sensitive lighting in toilet stall went out after 30 seconds and you had to stand up to reactivate it.
There was little shelf space, no hook for a hand towel and the room was generally quiet small.
The bed stood against the wall so only one person could get in comfortably.
Moreover the room lacked a window outside.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Wish You a Nice Stay Medium
comments: soggiorno piacevole, la camera è piccola ma dotata di tutti i confort necessari e grazie a un buon isolamento si gode di una certa privacy, buon rapporto qualità/prezzo

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Wish You a Nice Stay Medium
comments:
I think that all options in all hotels are quite overpriced in this city, but this place was for a good value for the price. If you need a short stay and you don’t want to end up sleeping in the car this option is definitely for you.
There is always someone on the reception, so I could check in very late without any problems. Host also gave me the instructions on how to park a car for a better price.
Room was clean, there were towels, douche gel, clean blankets, bedsheets and clean air, even though room had no window to outside.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Invisible Room
comments: Great spot. Toilet door hardly closed so little privacy there

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Invisible Room
comments:
Hotel not Hotel is a great place to stay to explore Rotterdam. We loved the spectacular art in the common space and we also loved the privacy of our room.
Its right next to the central station and I could have seen myself staying here for much longer to explore.
Note- this is a hotel, so don't expect a traditional airbnb "host" to welcome you in and answer your questions via text. Booking through airbnb worked great for us though and we really enjoyed our stay in this one-of-a-kind hotel.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Invisible Room
comments:
Check-in: The front desk I met first didn’t seem understand how airbnb works and insisted on double-charging me with my card which took me days to solve (after I consulted with the airbnb support), very energy-consuming for a traveller. Fortunately, the other front desk understands and problem solved finally when I arrived in Amsterdam (3 days later).
Room: It’s a small but functioning one, fairly ok for someone “petite” in the Netherlands but I’m not sure for those who reach the average height of Hollanders, 185cm that is. It’s clean and quiet, comfy bed but that’s all. You got to use the communal space to do desk work or chill out.
Communal Space: It’s the highlight of this hotel and the reason that I chose it. It’s quirky and fun but maybe not suitable for kids, I appreciate the concept of the hotel and might would like to try again with different room.
Location: It’s within walking distance from the central station, very nice for the weary guests.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Invisible Room
comments: The room was on the 2nd floor with no lift. The stairs need better lighting. There are no tea or coffee facilities for self service. Hot drinks need to be purchased. The room was quite small but was comfortable.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Red Canvas Room Small
comments: Zimmer wirklich etwas zu klein und leider war die Ablage über den Kleiderbügeln ziemlich staubig. Dusche war aber Highlight die ist super

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Red Canvas Room Small
comments: Very unique, kitchy decor , which made it quite interesting. Very colorful. The room was small, but that was fine because we needed a clean and private place to stay. I feel like I should address some concerns other reviewers mentioned. It is possible for someone to see inside the room from the one interior window, so we used our suitcase handles to keep the window cover flush with the wall. We did get one drip from the A/C unit, but then again we didn't use it. The space is in fact just right for the bed, and a bit of space for walking around it. Having the shower and toilet in the unit was very convenient, compared to having to share the space with others. upon checkout, there was delicious, iced water with lime available and we they also had a luggage storage area!

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments: Nice hotel with an interesting interior design. The highlight were the tacos at the Jesus Malverde Restaurant, which belongs to the hotel. Ideal place to hang out on a windy day in Rotterdam.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments:
Einen Tag vor Anreise haben wir nochmals Rückfragen an den Host gehabt bezüglich des Check-in, diese wurden nicht beantwortet und einfach ignoriert.
Der Check-in lief zunächst reibungslos ab, wenn auch unprofessionell durchgeführt. Als wir von der Lobby in unser Zimmer geführt wurden bemerkten wir bereits, dass das Hotel in einem schlechten Zustand ist, die Wände, Treppen und Boden sahen abgewohnt und nicht einladend aus. Unser Zimmer sah ebenfalls sehr heruntergekommen aus und nicht wie auf den Bildern. Die Wände waren voller schwarzer Schlieren und anderer Verunreinigungen, in der Dusche waren noch Wasserrückstände auf dem Boden, unter dem Waschbecken gab es eine Fuge, welche entweder nicht ordentlich gereinigt wurde oder die Schimmel beinhaltete und der Boden um das Bett herum (war vermutlich Parkett) war total kaputt und sah ebenfalls schmutzig aus. Generell sah das Zimmer aus, als wäre es nur oberflächlich gereinigt worden. Ebenfalls befand sich direkt vor dem Fenster des Zimmers ein Verbindungsweg von einer Treppe in ein anderes Gebäude. Dieser sah aus wie ein Balkon und wurde wohl absichtlich so fotografiert, dass der Eindruck entsteht das Zimmer hätte einen Balkon. Jedoch hatten wir keine Möglichkeit diesen zu nutzen, da das Fenster fest installiert ist und auch kein Kippen erlaubt. Zum Einen ist es irreführend, dass dieser Durchgang aus einem Winkel fotografiert wurde, der suggeriert man hätte einen Balkon und zum Anderen ist es unangenehm wenn jederzeit Personen am Zimmer vorbei gehen könnten und hinein sehen.
Insgesamt wirkt das Not Hotel eher wie eine in die Jahre gekommene Jugendherberge und definitiv nicht wie ein Hotel. Für den halben Preis, mit ehrlichen Bildern und einer ehrlichen Beschreibung wäre alles halb so wild, aber so wie das Hotel sich aktuell präsentiert ist ein absolutes No-Go!
Wir haben übrigens nur eine kleine Handseife und ein halb volles Duschgel erhalten, was ich sehr sparsam finde bei dem Preis für eine Nacht.
Ebenfalls hat die Kommunikation null funktioniert, sowohl als wir vor der Buchung Fragen hätten als auch als wir den AirBnB Support Kontaktierten, um eine Lösung für die Probleme zu finden hat der Host nicht geantwortet, stattdessen wurde ein (vermutlich schlechtes) Review über mich geschrieben, dies ist unprofessionell und trägt nicht zur Lösung des Problems bei.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments: Beautiful concept, we stayed at a hotel not hotel in Amsterdam as well and found this one to be more worth the money with a room attached to a bathroom as well.  The entire place is massive and lovely to walk around and look at all the different rooms.  There is a bookshelf room on 2 separate floors, so we did find someone who was drunk trying to get into our room before realizing they were on the wrong floor.  The common areas are nice, restaurant and bar attached are also lovely. The place is also very close to the train and metro station which was amazing as it wasn't a hassle to get to and leave with all our bags.  The bathroom has a sliding door with a massive crack so if you're with your partner you will hear all of the things.  The shower will also flood the toilet space if you don't close the glass door properly.. Overall I would definitely stay here again.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments:
The room is perfect if you plan on staying for a night. The service was very kind and friendly!
The room(secret library) was small but clean. What I found strange was the shower near the bed and the windows are not able to open although there is a balcony outside. The toilet is separated through a slide door, not necessarily very convenient for everyone.
You are only 5 minutes away from the central station. The hotel has a very playful interior design, really unique and beautiful. All in all I would recommend it if you plan on staying for a short amount of time.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments:
The biggest value is the location of the hotel, near Rotterdam Central. Everything is close by .
For our case, we didn't receive the room which is listed. The listed room is on the 2nd floor.
They gave us another room similar to this but on 1st floor where the main staircases are.
You can always hear noises from downstairs and whenever someone is walking on the stairs.
It's quite noisy since you can hear anything , even in late night if someone is checking in at reception.
I assume they know about this and they just play it with as they want since the room is in a bad spot and noisy.
The wc is behind a slide door, doesn't give you privacy much xd but for us was ok.
For short stays maybe is ok for some people but still this isn't mentioned anywhere that you might get another room.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Secret Book Case
comments: Tutto molto bello, alloggio carino interni particolari, camera ok unica nota negativa poca privacy per il bagno no bidet.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Eclectic Madness Landscape
comments:
Nice clean room close to the Central Station.
Unusual interior design. The window overlooking the lounge area of the hotel.

name: Hotel Not Hotel R'dam: Eclectic Madness with Bath
comments: The room was clean but very noisy outside the room There were no windows to get fresh air circulating. The breakfast was horrible and you had to wait almost 25 minutes to even get spoken to. would never stay again

name: Comfortable and neat room in a quiet neighborhood
comments: The good and small room for short trips. Very quiet district with grocery stores nearby. Good-equipped bathroom. Not enough light for a long homework in the dark time.

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: The appartment is lovely, very well fournished and clean, the room is quiet with a lot of light, and Edoardo your host is very nice !

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: Edoardo is a very friendly host. He took the time to show us around in the appartment and give explanations on the use of shower, kitchen appliances, etc. The location is near the subway (walking distance: 5 minutes) and tram and not too far from the city centre (1 metro stop) and the Blijdorp ZOO. We stayed for 1 night to visit Rotterdam and we had a very good stay. Nice bed and a very enjoyable breakfast on the balcony :-)

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: Edoardo is a very nice person and welcomed us warmly. The apartment is very well located, beautifully furnished and the room small but nice (even with balcony). Communication was straightforward and fast, check-in and check-out as well. Edoardo is a very good host, you can chat with him but also have your peace. We felt very comfortable.

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: I had a very nice stay at Lorenzo’s place. I didn’t meet him bc he was on a trip but his boyfriend Conor was there to greet me. He was friendly and nice. He gave me a metro card to load and use during my stay to save costs, and was very helpful with providing information about the apartment and the city. The apartment is beautifully decorated and very clean. The room has access to the balcony and gets nice light. The place is close to public transit.

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: I attended a four-day conference in Rotterdam. My stay at Lorenzo's place was very pleasant. They were friendly and made me feel welcome, while also respecting my privacy. I highly recommend it.

name: Artsy apartment in central Rdam (private room)
comments: Great hosts to share an apartment with - always proactive, helped me use the coffee machine and store my bike, even recommended a hair stylist! Comfortable bed, nice balcony, digital piano was a bonus. Opening the balcony door at night tended to let in mosquitoes. Grocery store nearby, some good breakfast spots to the east, more restaurant variety on the opposite side of the train station.

name: Happy Home Rotterdam Blijdorp
comments:
I was on vacation in this accommodation with three other friends. What can I say ... we found the photos proposed by Bianca misleading.
The bathroom is VERY small.
The shower and the sink are separated from the bathroom and … in front of one of the two double beds: ZERO privacy.
The hair dryer blew up in the hand of a friend of mine.
In the kitchen we found some dishes dirty and still soaked in oil.
The windows do not open, except for the kitchen.
The only positive note is the location: next to the Blijdorp underground and close to the center.

name: Happy Home Rotterdam Blijdorp
comments: Nice small AirBnB. Nice Location AH on the side of the street.

name: Modern Design Home by the Lake
comments:
Amazing double storey warehouse style apartment in 6* location. Views of the Kralingse Plas are fantastic.
Apartment has everything you need and a lot of thought has gone into the design and furniture. Coco was very easy to communicate with and replied quickly to any questions. Would highly recommend!

name: Modern Design Home by the Lake
comments: Great location! Beautiful views front and back. Plenty of space for our family and luggage. Beds were comfortable and shower is delightful even though small. Plenty of room on counter on bathroom. Kitchen is well equipped and dining table is great. I wish the living room furniture was more comfortable.

name: Colorful 120m2 apartment w/ roof terrace and cats
comments: I would highly recommend this place to stay when visiting Rotterdam, it’s in a very convenient, green part of the city. The metro station is at the end of the street for Rotterdam or The Hague but it’s also easy walking and cycling distance to R’dam city. Close by to a beautiful big park and Blijdorp Zoo too. The apartment is a big space with a few outdoor terraces, the roof terrace is amazing! Lots of greenery throughout the place and beautiful decor make it a very relaxing place to stay. There are lots of fairly steep stairs which were not a problem for us but worth noting if you find stairs a challenge. Also, our stay included taking care of Billy and Bob, two very friendly cats! Communication was excellent and very quick, the best I’ve received from any Airbnb host, we collected the key from a friend of Jolien who lived nearby and she very kindly came out to meet us late at night as our train didn’t get in til 11pm.

name: Colorful 120m2 apartment w/ roof terrace and cats
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay at Jolien's - it's a part of Rotterdam we havent really explored but we really enjoyed the view from her flat and the area itself. there is a great charity shop very close, and we had a great lunch in the pavilion cafe in the park behind the flat.
the flat itself is really comfortable and equipped with everything you might need.
we found the cats to be very chilled and easy to look after and be with. before long both would come and join us on the couch.
we had to msg Jolien a few times about some things, and she was always very responsive and helpful.

name: Nice room with space and incentre of Zuidplen Mall
comments: Sinple room with a good bed. Direct access to the balcony with great views. Excellent central location with welcoming hosts. At times some wonderful food tasting and excellent conversations.

name: Gezellige woning in rustige wijk met tuin
comments: Roomie’s apartment is larger than I expected and has a cool vibe. I felt right at home. It was quiet for my remote work days yet close to the tram and metro with a park across the street. Everything you need is a short walk away. Roomie is a great host with easy communication and special touches waiting for me when I arrived. I’ll happily stay again.

name: Gezellige woning in rustige wijk met tuin
comments:
I've visited Rotterdam many times, so I'm willing to sacrifice being in the center for the peace and quiet of great local neighborhoods. Rommie's place is perfect. Short walking distance from the Metro / tram, easily accessible, and extremely quiet. There is a beautiful canal and park just outside the front door.
The place is beautiful and I really felt at home there. I had easy access to the jazz festival, enjoyed excellent local coffee (33rd Street café!), and highly recommend the place!

name: Gezellige woning in rustige wijk met tuin
comments:
Eu e o meu namorado gostamos muito da nossa estadia! Os hosts foram muito atenciosos e sempre respondiam rapidamente. A casa era em um bairro tranquilo, uma casa ampla, espaçosa e bem equipada.
Gostaria de fazer um highlight para a cozinha que era muito linda!
A casa estava bem abastecida dos itens essenciais (papel higiênico e toalhas). O ambiente era muito agradável. Em frente à casa há um lago muito fofo com cisnes e patos, era muito lindo acordar de manhã e vê-los.
O acesso ao centro de Rotterdam se dá em poucos minutos com o tram ou metrô, e o mercado mais próximo fica a uns 10 minutos andando.

name: Ruim en licht appartement in centrum Rotterdam!
comments: This is a great apartment situated in the center of Rotterdam with shops, restaurants, and city sites on your doorstep. The apartment is spacious and light. Very comfortable and feels like home. Close to all sorts of transport options. We loved staying here!

name: Ruim en licht appartement in centrum Rotterdam!
comments: The apartment is large, spacious, bright, very well equipped with a good dishwasher and washing machine. The location is great. Very close to Blaak station and Markthal, supermarkets, and all types of services. Susan was very attentive. Everything went very well.

name: Chalet "Kick" | near the beach
comments: Wir hatten zu viert eine schöne Woche in Hoek van Holland. Die Unterkunft war ordentlich und wie beschrieben. Der Kontakt zu Robert war top. Highlight war natürlich die tolle Lage nahe am Strand und am Hafen. Mit den Fahrrädern ist alles super easy zu erreichen.

name: Cosy apartment w/ kingsizebed in citycentre
comments:
Great space for a few days in Rotterdam. It was only about 5 min walk to either tram stop, this listing is in the middle of 2. The apartment was great, plenty of natural light, plants, and a cute terrace for nice days. The views from the living room up the street were tremendous. Definitely a great location for many day trips and exploring Rotterdam, since Rotterdam Centraal was only about 15 min away by tram + walking.
It does have very steep entry stairs, so beware if you have mobility issues. As a solo female traveler I was a bit cautious about arriving back to the apartment at night since there was a hookah bar next door with many men standing around and socializing as the night went on. It was a great location in daylight but I was definitely a bit more cautious at night, and it may have been overkill honestly.

name: App nr.2 -1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: A nice comfortable stay. Ideally positioned for access to the centre of town and the station. The only slight drawback was the front communal door not locking, leaving a slight security issue. The room had been recently upgraded. Anil was very helpful at check-in, as well as responding to any queries promptly. Thanks again!

name: App nr.2 -1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: I stayed for a week in this apartment and really enjoyed my stay! It’s small but liveable and has everything you need. Some beautiful period features. The location is very quiet and peaceful despite being so close to the station. Its located on a small river with lots of trees. There’s one street nearby with cute cafes and restaurants but the area is mainly quiet. The hosts were very accommodating and went out of their ways to make this a great stay!

name: App nr.2 -1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
Very close to the train station in a decent neighborhood. The tram, which right outside the window, can be kind of loud and seems to run until late at night. A few loud neighbors, especially some jerk with a super loud motorcycle that lives on the same street. :/
The room is very small. That isn’t as big a deal if it hadn’t been so hot out when we were there. We literally had to move the windows around to move through to the toilet.

name: App nr.2 -1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
I thoroughly enjoyed my 30 days staying here.
The room had everything I needed, was comfortable, and felt safe. The location is incredibly convenient being just down the street from Rotterdam central station. Groceries and restaurants are within easy walking distance. I comfortably cooked meals in the room, with all need equipment at hand. My room had a lovely view of a small canal park.
The staff were incredibly kind, thoughtful, and generous in sharing information about Rotterdam.
In all, it was a lovely experience spending time here. I would be delighted to stay here again.

name: App nr.2 -1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Great location, can see the Rotterdam Centraal entrance from the street. (5min walk down the street). The Rotterdam Centraal exit faces the BNB and is the "back" end of the station. The front end is the other side and faces a busy street with stores and restaurants (15min walk to some great restaurants). Peaceful quiet street facing the canal. Great location if needing the train to visit other cities.  Longer walk to the Cube and other sites so we only went once and spent the other days taking the train to the other cities. Stairs going up to our room will be difficult if you can't do narrow steps.  Two washers+dryers on the first floor.  Room was smaller than anticipate and bit crowded for three adults but we were fine for a few days.  Communication with host was beyond EXCELLENT!!!  So helpful and accommodating.  We arrived at 10:45am and was allowed in and the room was ready for us and I know that's on availability and not guaranteed.  Thanks for a great stay.

name: Residential home in quiet area Rotterdam!
comments: lovely house in quiet neighbourhood. probably not ideal if you have mobility issues as the stairs are very steep. ,3 visiting hedgehogs in garden definitely a highlight. supermarket round the corner. Osterflank metro station not far. we had a great week's holiday.

name: Casa Roffa @ Historical Delfshaven Rotterdam
comments:
Yorick has exceeded what a great host is! He has gone the extra mile in many ways and his care and support has been phenomenal.
The apartment was perfect for his guests and the piano an unexpected and delightful bonus.

name: Spacious family home in Rotterdam.
comments: Everything was fine, good location, clean and you have free parking possiblities in the street

name: Spacious family home in Rotterdam.
comments:
We had a bit of bad luck with the weather, but still enjoyed our stay.
Terrace with view on the channel was super cool!
My bed was super comfy.
Communication with Dini went perfectly well.

name: Spacious family home in Rotterdam.
comments: The host was great and the place was wonderful. It was exactly as described, though maybe even more roomy than expected. It was beautiful and the perfect place for my family to stay and explore the Netherlands. One word of warning is that the house gets quite warm with the windows closed, and there are no screens on the windows. The result is a mosquito feast, with each of us having at least (literally) 30 mosquito bites.

name: Beautiful room @ Casa Roffa  Historical Delfshaven
comments: Yorick definitely deserves the best host badge. He let me check in earlier while he was still preparing the house and welcomed me with coffee! which was great after an early morning flight. Shared with me lots of tips and suggestions about the city. Photos of the house cant be more correct and you can feel touch of an artist around the entire house. Location is a bit away from the city center but in a very decent and safe area, and going to the center takes about 20 mins with the tram. By the house, there are options for markets, fast food areas etc. Definitely would stay there again! Thanks, Yorick!

name: The old butcher. Unique place in central Rotterdam
comments:
ENGLISH VERSION:
Many thanks to Lotte.
The room is located in a neighbourhood quite close to the city centre of Rotterdam in a beautiful art-deco building. The room is very bright due to the large windows, but there are thick curtains to keep the privacy during the day and at night.
Lotte welcomed us very well. She is a very smiling, kind and friendly young woman. We enjoyed it very much.
The bed is very comfortable, the decoration is cosy and shimmering. The condition of the room and the bathroom was impeccable. There is nothing to complain about. You can adjust the temperature AND the lights from your bed if you wish with connected bulbs and radiators, it's ideal.
We had a problem at one point during our stay, we asked Lotte for help, and she also contacted her neighbours to help us, it was really lovely of her and her neighbours to help us. Everyone was very nice and friendly.
I highly recommend the room, it has private access, a private bathroom, you don't feel like you are renting a simple room, but rather a small studio.
Thank you very much. :D
VERSION FRANCAISE :
Un grand merci à Lotte.
La chambre se situe dans un quartier assez proche du centre-ville de Rotterdam dans un bel immeuble art-déco. Belle luminosité grâce à ses grandes baies vitrées, mais il y a d'épais rideaux pour garder une intimité complète de jour comme de nuit.
Lotte nous a très bien reçus. C'est une jeune femme très souriante, très gentille et aimable. Nous avons beaucoup apprécié.
Le lit est très confortable, la décoration est chaleureuse et chatoyante. L'état de la chambre et de la salle de bain était impeccable. Il n'y a rien à redire. Vous pouvez régler la température ET les lumières depuis votre lit si vous le souhaitez grâce à des ampoules et radiateurs connectés, c'est l'idéal.
Nous avons eu un problème à un moment donné durant notre séjour, nous avons demandé de l'aide à Lotte, et elle a aussi contacté ses voisins pour nous aider, c'était vraiment adorable de sa part et de la part de ses voisins de nous aider. Tout le monde était très sympathique et amical.
Je recommande vivement la chambre louée par Lotte, il y a un accès privé, une salle de bain privée, vous n'avez pas l'impression de louer une simple chambre, mais plutôt un petit studio.
Merci beaucoup. :D

name: The old butcher. Unique place in central Rotterdam
comments: Lotte was an excellent host! From the moment I booked to checking out, there was consistent communication and she was was very welcoming. The place itself was great. It was clean and had plenty of privacy. It is definitely small but for a short stay in Rotterdam, it is perfect. It’s location is great being so close to shops/restaurants and if you are interested in going anywhere else, the train station is not too far. Would definitely recommend staying here!

name: The old butcher. Unique place in central Rotterdam
comments:
The space consist of a double room with a bathroom. The location in the city is good since the nord of Rotterdam is very nice and lively. You can easily walk from/to central station and metro stops. The room is clean and good for a short stay, is well cared for and the entrance is very special.
Nice details, the only uncomfortable elements are the lack of space for clothes and the position of the windows in relation to the outside. Lotte was very kind and very prompt with communications and suggestions.

name: The old butcher. Unique place in central Rotterdam
comments: Lovely stay near central Rotterdam - walkable to nearby light rail station and 20 min walk to main train station. Lotte was also really friendly and helpful in providing recommendations and responding promptly to any questions I had. Would come back if I return!

name: The old butcher. Unique place in central Rotterdam
comments: It was clean and neat and we had a nice stay :) you should mind that there is no kitchen, and also eating anything inside would not be recommended since the window doesn't directly connect to the outside but the hallway inside the building

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments: Toms apartment was perfect for us. It had everything we needed for our 3 night stay. I loved the balcony off the living room and the great views over the city at night. The huge bed was possibly the comfiest bed I have ever slept in. Would highly recommend this central apartment if you ever go to Rotterdam.

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments: We enjoyed our 3 day stay in Tom’s very spacious apartment in the centre of Rotterdam. There was a great view of the bridges and we were next to a metro stop.

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments: Great location, walking distance to the tram and supermarkets. Spacious appartment with a beautiful balcony view. Tom was very helpful and responsive.

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments:
Very good located apartment in Rotterdam Center. It’s makes easy to get around and explore the city. The apartment was also nice and clean!
Great view from the balcony, nice to sit an have a beer out there.. I can recommend this apartment for your visit in Rotterdam🙂

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments:
Fantastic location - walking distance to everything including restaurants, bars, waterside walks and great landmarks. Quiet surroundings and nice views of the city skyline.
Missing a welcome note with info on the wi-fi, central heating, where to put the rubbish and local amenities i.e. grocery store location. Saying that, Tom was able to provide this info quickly when messaged :) many thanks Tom!

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments:
Tom was as helpful host, he gave us some details and recommendation about the city and the place.
The place was great, cozy house, well equiped and nice views. Recommended!

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments: Tom was a wonderful host and we enjoyed staying at his apartment. There were great restaurants close by and the city centre and shopping were walkable. There is also a grocery store across the street which was very helpful. We will definitely like to stay here again if we are ever in Rotterdam again.

name: Mooi appartement in het hartje van Rotterdam
comments: Tom was a very helpful and responsive host. Our flight arrived earlier than expected and he was on hand to let us check in a bit earlier. He also allowed us a late check out due to our evening flight. We had no issues at all with the space or location. All was exactly as described and easy to get to. I would highly recommend Tom and his place for anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: Quiet and spacious apartment on perfect location
comments: Awesome location and great apartment. Plenty of room to relax and the balcony is a nice plus. There are so many great restaurants, shops, and cafes all within walking distance.

name: Quiet and spacious apartment on perfect location
comments: Michel was very welcoming. My flight was delayed and he was very helpful and responsive. Allowing me the flexibility to check in at a different time following my delayed flight. Thank you.

name: Quiet and spacious apartment on perfect location
comments:
As seasoned travelers who have stayed in numerous apartments, we can confidently say that this one surpasses all expectations, earning a solid 11 out of 10.
To begin with, the location is simply the best. Countless cafes, restaurants, the railway station, and shopping malls are all within walking distance. Despite this, the neighborhood itself remains peaceful and calm. We slept well, even after Rotterdam won the football game—there was no disruptive noise.
The apartment itself is equally remarkable. It boasts a highly functional design. The kitchen is equipped with everything one could possibly need, including not only a dishwasher but also an extensive selection of pots, pans, and other utensils. The spacious living room features a comfortable sofa and a charming balcony. There are also two generously sized bedrooms, offering ample space for relaxation. And the last, but not the least, Michiel is a great, responsive host! We want to come back next year!

name: AirB&B aan de rivier de Rotte
comments:
Lovely stay with really kind hosts!
20min by bike from the city center with a nice view on the rivers around and the windmill :)

name: AirB&B aan de rivier de Rotte
comments: What an incredible Air b n b this was, what was there not to love! The view of the river flowing from the main windows was the highlight of our stay here. If you are looking for somewhere peaceful, away from the city life then this is the perfect stay for you. The place was super clean, perfectly decorated and the bed was super spacious and comfy. Joke and Marc were super accomidating to suit our personal likes and needs and always happy to help. 100% reccomend.

name: AirB&B aan de rivier de Rotte
comments:
We recently stayed at Joke and Marc’s wonderful Airbnb for four nights, and we couldn’t be happier with our experience.
The property is located in a unique and typical Dutch setting right along the River Rotte. It’s an ideal area for bike rides and walks, offering both tranquility and easy access to Rotterdam and other locations via public transport.
The house itself was spacious and well-equipped with everything we needed. The quiet location and beautiful patio by the canal were highlights of our stay, providing a perfect spot to relax.
Joke and Marc were incredibly helpful and easy to communicate with, making our stay even more enjoyable. We would definitely recommend this property to anyone looking for a peaceful retreat with convenient access to the city.
Thank you, Joke and Marc, for a memorable stay!

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments: We spent a total of four days in Rotterdam.  We had a lot of fun exploring the city with the bikes. You can also discover a lot on per pedes.  Around the corner there is a river and a small park. We slept very well because it is very quiet in the apartment in the evening. It is located on a side street. Around you can find very good restaurants and cafes. I would visit Rotterdam and the accommodation again and again.

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Loved this place. The apartment is cozy and nicely designed. The location is great. Richard and his girlfriend were both really helpful. The shower is really great as well.
Only thing is I felt that place was a bit dark and should have had more lights.

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Great place to stay in Rotterdam! Superb location - as we traveled with a 4yo kid it was great to live on a quite street with the city centre only 15 min away (walking).
The room is so specious!! And even though there are no cooking facilities you’ll have a kettle, a toaster and all necessary cutlery , plates and mugs. Beautiful newly renovated place!
Richard was quick to respond via messages.
Over all we were very happy with the stay and the place itself! Recommended!

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Really great place in the heart of Rotterdam. The bikes that were put at our disposal were truly an highlight of our trip.
A small advice for Richard would be to furnish the kitchen with stoves and an oven so the guests can enjoy this great place even more

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Very comfortable and inviting place for a short stay. The piano music coming from upstairs was beautiful and the park down the street was so peaceful. Lots of stairs, as shown in the photos, so would not recommend for anyone with mobility issues, but overall 10/10 and very happy with my stay.

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Beautiful, stylish flat perfectly located in a lovely central and quiet neighbourhood. There were even two bikes for guest use. A great pizza spot - De Buffel, and a great coffee spot - Roast, are just down the street. Richard is an excellent host. There were three of us and we were very comfortable. Would highly recommend and would happily return.

name: Very nice and comfortable apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Great place to stay for a few days. Very clean and Richard was very responsive. Only slightly negative issue is the size of the toilet - if you are tall it is quite cramped but I understand that it was quite the norm in Rotterdam.

name: Colorful Family House with Garden. For Cat Lovers
comments: We loved our stay in this beautiful, spacious home. Everything was just as described. The location was perfect for us: quiet street, access to great restaurants, groceries and walking to all the sights. Our girls especially loved spending time with cheetah. If you’re able to book this spot, I would recommend without a doubt.

name: Beautiful urban design apartment
comments:
Sven's place is great.
It is truly bright, spacious and super quiet. Sven is very responsive and welcoming. We loved this area of Rotterdam. It is pretty close to everything. The train station is only 10 minutes away and the walk to Sven's place is so lovely. There is a supermarket right at the corner. We enjoyed staying there and we felt so lucky we were able to use the bikes. We'd definitely come back.

name: Spacious apartment close to Central Station
comments: We had a great time in Cordulas & Leons cozy apartment in Rotterdam. It is located in a calm neighborhood not far from the center and offers plenty of space and a nice view from the roof terrace. Cordula is an excellent host and had very helpful tips for our stay

name: Spacious apartment close to Central Station
comments: We enjoyed our stay in Cordula and Leon's apartment very much. In my opinion, the location is perfect: not too far from the city center but on a relatively quiet street that makes you forget you're in one of Europe's largest cities. The rooftop terrace offers a secluded area to relax and enjoy the nice weather in peace. The design of the apartment itself is typically Dutch with steep stairs and two floors, but feels more modern and clean than other places we had visited in the Netherlands. The electronics are state of the art and include a bluetooth speaker as well as a huge 4K-TV. All in all, we couldn't have asked for more. Cordula and Leon were very friendly and reliable hosts and we would definitely come visit again if they will have us.

name: Spacious apartment close to Central Station
comments: It was a pleasure to stay in the house of Cordula! Beautiful and bright spaces with a tasteful decor. The spaces were very comfortable for four people. Cordula was detailed and precise in the directions of the house and in the suggestions for a pleasant stay. The house is slightly out of the center, but the neighborhood is nice and great for a walk to the city center (there are also transportation a few minutes away). Not too far away there is the Saturday market, I highly recommend going there to eat some street food.

name: Spacious apartment close to Central Station
comments: Very nice 2-bedroom flat, 20 mins by tram and 35 mins walking  from the city centre. 5 mins walk from a Lidl (supermarket) and tram/bus stop. Beautiful livingroom and kitchen, super bright.

name: Spacious apartment close to Central Station
comments: We absolutely loved staying at Cordula’s place. It’s the best Airbnb home we’ve stayed in for a very long time. Perfectly situated and equipped for a a family stay. Lovely and light, a pleasure to be in this home.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: 10 out of 10 would stay here again. Views overlooking the harbor, steps from the metro, walking distance to the best coffee of our whole trip (Hopper), and that’s not even the inside of this thoughtfully designed, comfortable home. Thank you Renda! What a treat to get to share in your world for a few days.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: The flat is in a perfect location in a close proximity of almost all important sights of Rotterdam. It has a nice view of docks with ships going by. The apartment itself is very comfortable and spacious with all necessary amenities and a luxurious large kitchen. Renda is a very attentive and accommodating host.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments:
The great location.
8 minutes walk from market hall, and 2 minutes from the Erasmus bridge.
The perfect apartment. Just astonishing!
Right now, it can be a little bit noisy from the construction site from both sides of the apartment, but I understand, that this is temporarily issue.
Great view from an amazing terrace for the evening relaxation.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments:
Renda’s penthouse is beautifully designed and decorated with high quality furniture/interiors. You are surrounded by pretty plants. I felt like I was staying in a green oasis and I loved it. The apartment is clean and comfortable. It’s situated in a prime location in the city center. The views overlooking the harbor and the skyline of Rotterdam are just wow! I couldn’t get enough of it. Restaurants, shops, public transport etc. are just steps away. You can easily do a tour of the sights on foot; everything is very close.
Renda is an excellent and flexible host. Communication from booking to check-out was seamless and nice. We had a brilliant time in Rotterdam and would love to stay here again! Thank you for sharing your beautiful home with us, Renda!
Side notes for guests: If you have any restriction of mobility, check your needs/requirements with the host. Even if the building has a lift, you must be able to climb stairs.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: Renda's place ended up being the nicest place we stayed in all if Europe. If you want to see Rotterdam as a city for the first time, this is the place to do it and really take it all in. The place is situated near the harbor which makes for some great views of the inner city. Good response time which makes for a stress free stat! Thanks again

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: Amazing place to stay in a great part of the city. Modern decor and great views. Responsive and friendly host. Would recommend.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: If you are lucky enough to stay then you are in for a treat as it is a beautiful, stylish and well equipped flat over two floors with amazing views.  Climbing up the inner staircase to the top floor kitchen/diner to have breakfast looking out over the harbour was a daily joy, while the other rooms were stylish, well equipped and clean. Renda was a brilliant host, making us feel really welcome and being available on the few occasions we had a query.  Totally recommended

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: The penthouse is located within distance from major sites in Rotterdam. There are several Albert Heijn stores nearby for grocery shopping, the one at Vasteland we found the best. Public transport is right outside the building (tram, metro, watertaxi). Parking is expensive in Rotterdam, but there is street parking around the building, we parked in the Parkeergarage De Boompjes. It’s a short drive to several tourist destinations. Lots of nice bars and restaurants within 5-10 minutes walking. Renda and Leonard are extremely helpful and responsive. The penthouse is very spacious, but best suited for 2 people. Kitchen is upstairs, with a nice patio to sit outside. The kitchen is very well equipped with everything you need. Bedroom and living room are downstairs. Downsides are that it gets very warm with hot weather (many windows can be opened), there is traffic noise from the street, and there are several stairs to climb, outside and inside. Overall we had a great stay.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: Great penthouse with a lovey kitchen overlooking the old harbor.  Beautiful balcony. Perfect location in the center.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments:
When travelling from one side of the globe to the other there is always a mix of apprehension and adventure. It was comforting to arrive smoothly and be greeted by the warmth and professionalism of Renda. Her home is exactly as shown in the photos with a picturesque and ever-changing view from the main living area.
We were travelling for business and chose to stay away from the venue to give ourselves a retreat and respite. The location was perfect — we felt safe, comfortable and at ease throughout our stay. The apartment’s eclectic and bold architecture added to the fun of the experience and afternoons on the balcony were a delight.
Renda proved to be an exemplary host ensuring every detail was taken care of with hospitality that was both attentive and unobtrusive. We would not hesitate to recommend Renda and her property to any guest seeking an accommodation option that is reliable distinctive and of the highest standard.

name: Design Penthouse in centrum met airco + dakterras
comments: It was a pleasure to stay at Renda’s place. The location is perfect—within walking distance to downtown, great restaurants, and ideal for exploring the area. The apartment is very spacious and relaxing, with an amazing front window view. We highly recommend this place!

name: Ruim privé-appartement in het stadscentrum/westen
comments: Host is super friendly and a good communicator, balcony was amazing too

name: Ruim privé-appartement in het stadscentrum/westen
comments:
Overall, this is a wonderful place to stay! The apartment is locatet next to the Heemraadspark, a nice park to go for a walk. The direct neighborhood is very nice, too, with lots of beautiful houses. City centre is in walking distance or also reachable by tram and metro.
The apartment itself is very spacious, bright with a lot of sun, especially in the eveninc when you can enjoy a drink in the sun on the very nice balcony. Everything was tidy and clean so I felt very comfortable from the moment I entered.
Communication with Sam, one of the hosts, was easy and always clear. He was very flexible and always responsive. The hosts made me feel home at their place. As a conclusion, this was one of my best experiences in Rotterdam so far and I highly recommend this place.

name: Dreamy condo in West Rotterdam with sunny patio
comments:
We really loved this apartment (and Libby herself!) The flat was really beautifully decorated and spotlessly clean. It was even nicer than the photos. We didn’t find the road particularly loud (but we come from a city too) and we didn’t need earplugs, even though we are light sleepers. The bed was super comfy too!
Libby as a host was perfect - really responsive, kind and thoughtful, and really flexible about check out and check in.
The only things to note are that there isn’t an oven, although there is a perfectly functioning hob, and the apartment is up some very steep, narrow stairs.
Would definitely recommend staying here!

name: Dreamy condo in West Rotterdam with sunny patio
comments:
I had amazingly great experience with staying in Libby&Robert apartment.
I came for few days and I’d love to stay more.
The apartment 100% matches the photos and description. The house has a lively and jazzy vibe I really loved.
Both Libby and Robert provided me with a warm reception, all support I needed, local recommendations and smooth check-in. I felt really welcomed.
The terrace is amazing addition to warm house, where I could enjoy evenings and did my morning yoga.
During my stay I didn’t have any issues with the bedroom facing the street, it was quite and I could sleep well.
The location is central and the neighbourhood is nice, I could walk everywhere from there.
The communication with both hosts was smooth and friendly.
Highly recommended!

name: Dreamy condo in West Rotterdam with sunny patio
comments: The apartment is very clean and beautifully decorated - so much thought has been put into every room. It's also very centrally located, on a street full of restaurants and cafes and just a 20 minute walk from the central station, as well as on a tram line. We didn't have any issues with the bedroom facing the street and didn't need earplugs. Overall, we loved our stay here and found it the perfect base for exploring Rotterdam.

name: Dreamy condo in West Rotterdam with sunny patio
comments:
A perfect stay! I spent around 2 months here and felt so at home. The apartment itself is spacious, cosy, beautifully decorated and with great amenities. The large back terrace is so peaceful, green and was such a wonderful place to hang out, or a eat a meal, with comfortable chairs, table and umbrella too. I spent a lot of time there!
Aside from the wonderful apartment, its Hosts were fantastic: Robert and Libby were always so responsive and are just very lovely people. They went the extra mile by providing lots of tailored recommendations for the area.
This part of Rotterdam is the perfect spot: very close to a really nice park by a singel (canal) which is great for picnics. Nearby are supermarkets, lots of food options, bars, good shopping and the city centre itself. Being on a prominent street, it is busy of course, but I was never bothered by any noise. Particularly with the terrace as such a lovely quiet sanctuary.
I highly recommend this comfortable and well situated place!

name: Lovely apartment near Rotterdam city centre!
comments: I had a great stay! The apartment is beautiful and was recently completely renovated. It is distributed over two floors, with a cozy bedroom with a comfy queen size bed and great views, and a bathroom and separate toilet on the first floor and a great spacious kitchen / living room with roof top terrace on the top floor. The hosts were super friendly and welcoming, they prepared and offered some free snacks and were just lovely. Highly recommended place!

name: Lovely apartment near Rotterdam city centre!
comments: We’ve had an amazing time in Ronald’s apartment. It felt like home, furnished with love to details. The apartment is very bright and the balcony is perfect for summer evenings! Communication was super easy - Strong recommendation :)

name: Lovely apartment near Rotterdam city centre!
comments: Nice and cozy apartment and Ronald is really friendly. Especially the big terrace is a highlight!

name: Lovely located quiet condo
comments: Cosy apartment, everything you need, comfortable bed. Location is quiet with  beautiful view to the old port. Kim is very kind host.

name: Lovely located quiet condo
comments: Great listing with nice views and great cats. Recommend having a form of travel as it is a little far from the city centre.

name: Lovely located quiet condo
comments: A great flat in a beautiful area with views over canals on both sides. Kim is a great host, very responsive and friendly and met us when we arrived. location was perfect, easy to get into the city and loads of restaurants and shops nearby

name: Apartment with free bicycle 10min from city centre
comments: Really nice and cozy place, with a beautiful view from the balcony. Also it’s very kind from the owner that he let me use his bicycle

name: Apartment with free bicycle 10min from city centre
comments: Nick‘s beautiful place is tastefully furnished, quite and private and makes you feel at home right away. I loved to hang out on the balcony in the morning and evenings. There are some basics in the kitchen but if you’re planning to cook for yourself probably check the cupboards and fridge first, there are supermarkets nearby where you can everything you need. Also, if you are into coffee, there is a Nespresso machine which you might want to bring (or buy) capsules for. Interesting neighbourhood with lots of things and artsy places to discover. Nick provided a comprehensive list of restaurants, cafes and breakfast places and was super quick to respond to any additional requests. The bicycle that comes with the apartment allows you to get anywhere at any time quickly and makes you feel like being part of this fascinating city. Recommend!

name: Apartment with free bicycle 10min from city centre
comments:
I loved staying at Nick's place. Very beautifully decorated, spacious, bright, comfortable furniture, very well equipped with everything you need.
Nick was also super easy to communicate with and super flexible and accommodating with everything I needed.
There's also a little balcony at the back which gets sun for most part of the day which was a great surprise.
Only thing is that the living room looks over a busy street so there is some car noises during the day but it dies down during the night. If you're a light sleeper I would just take a pair of earplugs with you.

name: B&B Berglust
comments: Lonneke greeted us warmly. Her delightful little room has been ready earlier for check-in. As a welcome gift we received a bottle of wine, which we found very thoughtful. We had everything we needed: Fully equipped kitchen and a small rack to dry our clothes. Maybe, when it presents itself, we are happy to stay with Lonneke again when it’s not raining that much in Rotterdam to roam this city.

name: B&B Berglust
comments: This was an amazing find in Rotterdam. Set just a tram ride away from the centre, this quiet suburb is safe, friendly and we felt like we were among local Dutch families. The space is perfect for any length of stay with enough room and facilities to suit everyone. Nice pubs nearby, beautiful lake and bikes to hire at the end of most streets. Highly recommended!

name: Knusse kamer, rustige buurt, nabij het centrum.
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Lia was a lovely host and this place was exactly what I was looking for. Ok so after a week in Amsterdam I wanted some place to relax and have quiet time. This place hit the mark. It’s in a quiet neighborhood with canals and lots of ducks. About a 5-10 minute walk to the major downtown areas so convenient location. Apt on first floor. Room is separated off to right so you have privacy. Shower room is shared but it’s a great shower with full bath. Everything very clean. Also a nice back yard area to hang out. Wifi strong. You can’t go wrong with the selection. Host Lia is also super chill. Friendly and will have conversations with you but also gives you your personal time. A+ thanks for a great stay Lia

name: Knusse kamer, rustige buurt, nabij het centrum.
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Gezellige kamer gelegen in een rustige buurt vlakbij het centrum van Rotterdam. Bovendien is Lia een host die perfect de balans aanvoelt tussen privacy, gastvrijheid en af en toe een fijn babbeltje.

name: Family house in Katendrecht with free parking
comments: Great apartment, very clean and with everything we needed. Great if you have a car thanks to the free parking spot. A little noisy at night on the weekend from people partying on the streets below. Would recommend!

name: Family house in Katendrecht with free parking
comments: This apartment was perfect for our family!  clean, spacious, lots of light, nice area, easy to get around, included parking spot - all of the things we were looking for.  Our daughter loved knowing that other kids actually live there!  Also, Michiel was very helpful and easy to communicate with for check in and out. Staying here made our Rotterdam visit that much better!  Thank you!!

name: Family house in Katendrecht with free parking
comments: It's a great apartment with great price! Clean, big and comfortable! Light and big living room and kitchen. It's very convenient to go anywhere around. But there are some stairs in the apartment and also the remote of the gate for the car did not work, but you can also open the door by keys. Except these, everything is perfect! Thanks a lot for the apartment and the service!

name: Gezellig & luxe appartement op het Noordereiland
comments:
We stayed in Daan's apartment for 4 days and we loved it! It's a super cute place (with lot of plants!) , really clean, calm and cosy. You can also enjoy the great view of the river near by.
Daan is a really helpful and reactive host. It was my first time in Netherland and I definitely recommend his place to stay in Rotterdam.

name: Lovely apartment right in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Location is everything. The flat was well appointed, comfortable and nicely decorated. A bit warm in the afternoons but we kept the windows open and it was lovely. I wish we’d had more time as we would have liked to use the kitchen but the local cafes and restaurants were too good to stay away from. The flat is near the Blaak station, which was our main stop for everywhere we went. So easy to get around. Great shopping and ready air ants around it. Loved the coffee shops “Social” across the street. Bed super comfortable. Shower nice and hot and we loved the bed. Would love to stay again.

name: Lovely apartment right in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Lovely, bright place with a fully equipped kitchen. I particularly loved the work space with the height adjustable desk. The location cannot be beat!

name: Lovely apartment right in the heart of Rotterdam
comments: Perfect location! Lot of light in the appartement, would recommend.

name: Nice apartment with balcony and garden
comments: Ela’s place is truly a delight. Great location. Tons of places to get groceries from or grab a bite. Worth every penny. And Ela herself was quick with any assistance we required and friendly too.

name: Nice apartment with balcony and garden
comments: We were welcomed with fresh flowers and had a great time on Elas balcony. The flat was very clean and stylish. I really recommand!

name: Nice apartment with balcony and garden
comments: lovely stay, beautiful place, balcony and garden were great

name: Nice apartment with balcony and garden
comments:
Ela's apt in Charlois was exactly as described in the ad and pictures. Great communication from Ela, easy to get in, the apt was spotless clean and had everything you would need for a stay. 5 min walk from the tram on Frans Bekkerstraat that can take you right to the Metro in Maashaven. Also only a 5min walk to MCD & Yasam supermarkets to get anything you need food wise.
Nice comfortable couch and outside space and thanks to Ela for facilitating a late checkout on our last day as our flight was in the late afternoon
Highly recommend

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments: Anastasia’s place was great. Clean, modern, and on a quiet street near many restaurants and shops. If you’re on foot with luggage, a tram goes directly from the central station to very near the apartment. The back patio was quite nice when the weather behaved.

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments:
We stayed in Anastasia's place to spend new year's eve in Rotterdam. From the main train station we were able to comfortably reach the apartment on foot and could check-in ourselves using the code door lock.
The place is exactly like described, very clean, well equipped and has a great location. The street itself is rather quiet and residential. Nonetheless, in the parallel streets you'll find many shops, restaurants, and small parks.
Again, by foot you can easily reach the museum park or the central inner city.
The apartment made us feel right like at home and allowed us to spend a great time in Rotterdam!
I would highly recommend staying here.

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments:
Overall very happy with the stay! Only negative thing was, it was very cold inside, especially at night, we tried to turn up the heat but nothing happened. Somehow our fault as well because we ask about the heating a little too late..
Anastasia was very polite and alwys responded quickly and helpfull!
The bed was very comfy and especially at night staying in, it was very quiet.
The only downside; the bathroom ventilation didn't really work, as soon as we turn on the bathroom light, the ventilation will turn on as well, so that it smelled like really bad sewerage..
To conclude: we will come back! Many thanks to Anastasia!

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments:
Anastasia’s apartment is perfect for a visit to Rotterdam. It’s location is great as Rotterdam is a walkable city so you can pretty much get anywhere by foot.
The apartment itself is super easy to get in with a code and it’s perfect for a city break. The bed is so comfy and it has very large windows which lets in lots of light! We didn’t go out to the patio but it’s a lovely looking area. The shower is large with a waterfall setting and feels like you’re staying in a fancy hotel! Unfortunately we didn’t get around to using the bath even though we were tempted! The place is close to many amenities and around the corner is a place called BUN which does amazing sandwiches and definitely worth a visit - a recommendation from Anastasia.
We would definitely stay at Anastasia’s place again!

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments: I especially liked the location of the apartment on a cozy quiet street where there is a family atmosphere 😍

name: Lovely studio apartment with terrace
comments: Amazing neighborhood with great restaurants and bars nearby, but located on a quiet, family-friendly street. The  communication with Anastasia was great and our dog loved the park nearby. Can recommend!

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments:
We had a lovely time in vibrant Middelland, one of our favorite parts of Rotterdam. The apartment was exactly as displayed in the photos. It is on the top floor, but we found the 6 short staircases doable, even with a 2,5 y-o and a baby. We came by car, and parking on the street is expensive, but we found the parking Mathenesserplein convenient and affordable.
Louise was already waiting for us upon arrival. Very thoughtful host, with the baby bed and elaborate toy already set up, and even a Christmas tree, for a cozy (gezellig!) vibe in the season, even if we were away from home! So great! Big thanks!

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments: A lovely spacious apartment in Rotterdam with lovely hosts! We really appreciated the little details such as the umbrellas and the welcome gifts when we arrived. The apartment was very spacious for three friends and we enjoyed using the balcony when the sun was shining! We would absolutely recommend Louise and Jamal’s place to stay and will definitely book to stay here again next time we are in Rotterdam ☺️

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments: nice & cozy it was. clean and organized just like the preview. we were well received and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. highly recommended and we will return if we visit Rotterdamagain

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments: This was a great unit and neighborhood in Rotterdam.  The unit is bright and airy.  There is a balcony we used regularly and it was just a short 3 blocks to the tram.  We enjoyed being in a neighborhood versus the businesses of the city center.  Louise was a wonderful host and checked in on us regularly.  I would definitely stay there again should the opportunity to be in Rotterdam arise again.

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments: We really enjoyed our stay here. It is very quiet and relaxing despite being so central. Light and airy. Loved sitting on the balcony with morning tea above the rooftops. Highly recommend, very friendly hosts and spotlessly clean. Everything we needed for 3 night in Rotterdam visiting Erasmus.

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments: This was a wonderful home to stay in! it was very comfortable for 3 adults, and lovely to have a balcony. We slept well, and had such a close walk to the tram stop. We weren't far from anything, and felt very safe and comfortable all over Rotterdam. Would recommend!

name: Nice & cozy place near Rotterdam center!
comments:
The apartment is nicely furnished, bright and spacious. It was clean, with everything you needed.
Louise was very helpful host and was flexible in dealing with our arrival.
Highly recommend.

name: Woolly Hotel Studio Bobby
comments:
Convenient location within walking distance of many of the attractions. located on a trendy street lined with bars and patios.
3rd floor steep stairway... if you can manage the stairs you can manage the bed.
Bright room with light blocking curtains. kitchen is adequately equipped. I left salt and pepper behind.... It's a basic that can easily be left behind.
Consider the noise factor from the activity on the street til the wee hours of the morning. Ear plugs were very helpful. The high bed can be warm on warm days. no AC.
if you can deal with the pitfalls it's a decent place to stay.

name: Woolly Hotel Studio Bobby
comments: Its good studio to stay for short stay.Two min from Metro,tram,bus,Supermarkets.For one person or couple,this is the best choice.Only two things are bit challenging,one is upside Bed and two some noise of peoples as so many bars are there in the street.I can recommend this place to everyone.And host Dila is very helpful,friendly and quick responsive.

name: Studio floor with own kitchen & toilet - central
comments: Such a great place to stay. Sevim was very friendly and helpful and the studio is filled with light. A great spot!

name: Studio floor with own kitchen & toilet - central
comments:
We would definitely recommend Sevim's place! It's in an amazing location that's walking (or biking) distance from almost everywhere, and especially close to the station. The place itself is in a nice green area and had everything that we needed, we enjoyed having a small kitchen for ourselves and some nice big windows to appreciate the greenery :D
The best thing about the place was Sevim, she was extremely kind and response and willing to help with anything we needed!
We encourage you to stay at Sevim's place and to have a great time there! :)

name: Studio floor with own kitchen & toilet - central
comments: This place was perfect for me as a solo traveler. Mike and Sevim were supper nice and responsive to all questions I had. Very close to markets, coffee and restaurants. I wasn't sure by the description how private it would be, but there is no issues with privacy. Mike and Sevim are fantastic people and we were able to have a beer and break bread together on an evening or two. Fantastic stay and worth every penny.

name: Studio floor with own kitchen & toilet - central
comments:
The hosts helped us when we needed to book an Airbnb last minute in Rotterdam.
Very clean, beautiful area of the city with the canal. We hired bikes and also the tram was just outside the apartment!
Very communicative hosts! The place is shared and doesn’t have a main door to the studio, however it’s 2 flights up the stairs from the main apartment and felt very private with sliding doors.
There was cooking facilities and laundry facilities to use. Comfortable bed and very clean and easy to stay in.

name: Stylish Family House with Garden in Blijdorp
comments:
Nice apartment with canal view. Green environment and very quiet. If you are a good walker you can reach the city center by foot. Otherwise a metro station is nearby.
Very responsive hosts.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: Nothing to complain. Ibrahima is a good host. I've had enough privacy.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: Ibrahima was very helpful. Room was nice and clean. Good privacy. Central location.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: I had a good stay at Ibrahima’s place. His apartment is centrally located, 5 min walking from the Central station, and right next to shopping area, grocery store and restaurants. The place was clean with spacious bedroom with lots of light. I had lots of privacy even when he was at home. Ibrahima was very respectful and friendly.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: Ibrahima was a great host. His communication was quick and clear. My flight to Amsterdam was delayed. When I contacted him to let him know I would be arriving later than I had originally stated he got back to me straight away and then stayed in until I got there. The flat was clean, comfortable, warm and in a great location. I would recommend staying with Ibrahima in Rotterdam.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: Ibrahima was a great host. He was very responsive and helpful during my stay. He went above and beyond to make sure I felt comfortable in his apartment. The rented room is separate and on a separate floor from his space, so I had my privacy. The apartment location could not be better — very close to the train station and walkable to all the sights on my itinerary. Would highly recommend!

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Fijne kamer in het hartje van Rotterdam. Parkeergarage naast de deur en uitzicht op het plein (vanuit de woonkamer). Veel is makkelijk beloopbaar.
Kamer kwam overeen met de advertentie en was netjes en schoon. De rest van het appartement ook.
Ibrahima is ontzettend aardig en behulpzaam indien nodig. Ondanks gedeelde ruimtes veel privacy.

name: Lovely private double bedroom in Rotterdam Centre
comments: Thoughtful, kind and flexible is how I'd describe Ibrahima. Clean, central, convenient is how I'd describe his apartment. Bright, comfy and big is how I'd describe the room. Would come back!

name: Spacious two bedroom apartment, amazing location!
comments: Laura’s apartment was perfect for us! The price was affordable, it offered a spacious kitchen and living room and all rooms have big windows, so natural light was a plus! Laura was a great host as well and easy to get in touch with, from the booking until checkout. I highly recommend the place!

name: Spacious two bedroom apartment, amazing location!
comments: We stayed at Laura’s with our 6yo and 2yo and had a great time. The flat is comfortable and the check in was super easy. The neighborhood is super nice (especially for families) and it’s worth mentioning that the flat is located in a main and busy street. Laura was communicative all along and helped with any questions that came up.

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Cute studio with a nice view over the canal, just a few minutes away from the train station!

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: This stay was great 🙏🏼 the Airbnb itself was very clean, spacious, and comfortable. It’s so close to the train station, near some green space, and lots of cafes, food, and shopping nearby! Great windows and airflow, a kitchen if you want to cook, mini fridge for leftovers and afternoon colas, and coffee/hot water for tea! There was a lounge area which was the nice change from being limited just to the bedroom. Laundry was available too and they were flexible with our check in and check out. So great! Also everyone we interacted with was so kind and welcoming. I definitely plan to stay here again next visit!!

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: We highly recommend the apartment!  We would happily return on a trip to Rotterdam.  The space was immaculate and most comfortable. When our hosts learned that the stairs would be a challenge for us, they recommended our moving downstairs to another studio, which was being vacated the next day.  Vyash and Renoeska were very responsive to our many questions.  The central train station is just up the street, which provides easy travel to every part of the city. Fans were provided.  This is definitely a five star studio for your stay in Rotterdam

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Great location - very close to the centre and the station. Clean apartment, it just could use some normal light switches (we had to shower in the dark partially) and a light in the bedroom. But over all: fine!

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
Amazing accommodation! The location is perfect. Very central and easy to get anywhere either by many forms of transport or walking. The flat is perfect for a long stay and has everything you need. There’s plenty of shops and restaurants etc. I would definitely stay again and also recommend to a friend!
The host, Renoeska, is very friendly, attentive and flexible! Thank you!
The only problems were:
- The bathroom light is on a timer and so when you’re showering, the light turns off every 30 seconds and you need to open the shower door and wave your hand to turn the light on again.
- Also, the light in the toilet is triggered by the door but often it doesn’t turn on, no matter how many times you open and close the door. Especially in the middle of the night when you need the light the most. This is fine if you’re staying alone but not if you’re staying with 2 people.

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Fantastic location, very friendly hosts. Good value for money and hosts were responsive to fix small issue with lights.

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: We had a really nice stay. The train station is close by, but it's not noisy at all. They seem to stick to the automatic light although it's not the best solution- it's somehow a smart home system connected to the warm water and the heating, which feels a bit controlled tbh. The kitchen it very well equipped and clean!

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
It was a nice stay in the appartment. Renoeska was very responsive, helpful and informative. I would definitely stay again here.
The location is very near to train station. Kitchen appliances and utensils are sufficient to prepare simple meals. Bathroom and toilet is sparklingly clean. I have no issue with lights in the toilet. I have never experienced that the light went off due to inactivity as described by many past reviews. I would definitely come back and recommend this appartment.

name: App nr.3-1 bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
Sure, here is the updated text with only those specific corrections:
---
The apartment's location is great, just 3 minutes away from Rotterdam's Central Station and yet the street is quiet and the neighborhood is very nice.
The apartment was very tidy and clean; it seemed like everything was new (furniture, kitchen pots and plates) since there was hardly any wear.
We stayed for a week and the apartment was very comfortable for us because it has a fully equipped kitchen.
The only downside was that the lights for the bathroom and shower work with a motion sensor that often does not function properly.
The hosts were kind and responded to our texts. It was nice for us to be welcomed by a person (even though we arrived late at night) instead of picking up the keys from a locker when we arrived at the location.

name: Nice Room in Rotterdam near metro and big park
comments: Marten was a great host, very quickly reacted to every question and inquiry, and provided all relevant guidance. The house location was excellent - a very peaceful and beautiful area with a park. The only downside was that the window in the room was not opening, though the host provided me with an air conditioner. All in all, it was worth the money spent.

name: groot familie huis met patio.
comments: Sjoerd's place was the best introduction to Rotterdam we could have chosen. It's good for a family with kids. Neighborhood is 10/15 min from downtown and is a very quite suburb place. House location couldn't be best: on the main street (near supermarkets, restaurants, bars, pharmacies, public transport, stores). Sjoerd is a great host: answers very quick, offers lots of accommodations at his place together with suggestions for near-by parks and places to visit. The house is comfortable and well sized. It doesn't have AC, but in Rotterdam that's not a problem (you only have 5 hot days in the year). You will feel like being at home during your stay at Rotterdam.

name: Large sunny corner appartement in city center
comments:
Our short stay at Lotte's place was great.
Communication was smooth and easy going!
The apartment is big, bright and equipped with everything one would need.
The location of the apartment was also super and very central.

name: Spacious city center apartment with roof terrace
comments: Sehr empfehlenwert. Mein Highlight die Dachterrasse. Machtelt is super!

name: Spacious city center apartment with roof terrace
comments:
My stay at Machtelt’s marks one of my favorite Airbnb experiences ever. Everything was perfect! First, Machtelt made checking into the apartment very easy and she was able to accommodate my early arrival. I particularly appreciated how communicative Machtelt was before the trip.
