She even shared that she had recently purchased a used record player and that I was welcome to play the old records that she had in her house. Moreover, she offered to let me take any record I might like from one stack that she had separated out. How generous!
As for the apartment, it was notably clean, bright, spacious, nicely decorated, and free of clutter. I could not have ask for more; I had everything I needed. The apartment is also in an amazing location and yet it is a quiet street. There are many nearby restaurants, cafes, supermarkets, and even a wonderful bio market. Plus, the Markthal is very close, as is the city library and the metro. Tram lines, of course, are also just a short walking distance

name: Geweldig centraal gelegen appartement in centrum
comments: Lovely place. Really liked the decor. Very warm and intimate. Lovely big window, too. Had everything we needed and located in a very quiet part of Rotterdam. Would love to return

name: Knusse caravan met privé tuin aan zee!
comments: Super leuke stacaravan met fijne sfeer vanbinnen en ook buiten. Lekker rustig plekje aan rand camping. Veel vogeltjes en relatief veel privacy. Loopafstand duinen en strand. Genoten. Contact met joachim erg snel en fijn.

name: Sleek City Center 2BDR Apartment VP - 75 SQM
comments:
nice apartment, perfect location. free parking! good weekly cleaning.
very hot in the summer, lots of mosquitos if you leave the windows open. no ventilators (even though we requested it).
communication with host works very well.

name: Sleek City Center 2BDR Apartment VP - 75 SQM
comments: Ill start with the positives. Very nice and clean apartment easy to find great location. Nice area with plenty of shops near by. Now the rest. One of the main reasons i booked was because there was a balcony in the pictures. I was quite disappointed to be given a ground floor apartment with no balcony. The cooker broke on the 1st night and i had to throw the part cooked dinner away and buy a take away and was not offered any reimbursement. They did fix the cooker the next day though and it then worked for the next 3 days fine. Also would have been nice if there was a frying pan as i couldn't cook any fried eggs for breakfast. Then on my last day i received a message telling me the criteria to leave which included cleaning all the bedding and towels and hanging them out to dry. I was quite confused as id already paid £49.99 cleaning fee when booking which surely covers this. Through fear of being charged extra it took 3 loads of washing which was 3x 30mins washes.

name: Familyhouse close to center & garden/roof terrace.
comments: Beautiful and cozy house and nice surroundings. Provided plenty of space for our family of 2 adults and 2 school children. The kitchen worked well and the grocery shops were located within the short distance. I enjoyed the trees and flowers of the street, the garden and the balcony. Relatively short walking distances to public transportation and all activities in the city of Rotterdam and the places nearby.

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments:
Sharlene is a very nice host and provided us with information about Rotterdam! I love the appartement and the view but it's a bit to the inner city. But water! <3
All in all a great stay!

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments: Sharlene's place exceeded my expectations. The view is great and the appartement had everything you need for your stay in Rotterdam. Sharlene was helpful in her communication and friendly. I would definitely recommend staying here if you get the chance.

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments: Wonderful place, had a really great and calm stay. Light, spacious, tastefully decorated and I felt right at home. Communication with the hosts went super fast and smooth. Absolutely recommend and I’m looking forward to coming back in the future again 🙂

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments: Sharlene place was as described. Her place is spacious and has a beautiful view of the surrenders. The apartment was immaculate and well equipped. The location is close to a beautiful park and the euromast. I only found that it was far from the center. Overall our stayed was great.

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments: Sharlene's place was definitely one of my favorite places to stay in the last few years. It is super comfortable, in a great neighborhood with lovely water view and well connected to other places in Rotterdam. I would stay there again in a heartbeat and hope to do so in the future.

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments:
Large tastefully furnished , decorated suite in an amazing location . Wonderful views , fairly close to a tram line ( to get to centrum etc) . Grocery store walking distance nearby too. Walking distance to the Euromast and Museums and Metro line ; as well as , water taxi close by too.
We had a problem with Wifi for a few days which was problematic but Sharlene did her best to resolve the issue and ultimately did refund some of the cost to compensate which was kind .
Would stay here again next time in Rotterdam .

name: FabulousWaterside Apartment close to city and park
comments: Great apartment not far from Rotterdam city center, easily accessible by public transport. All as advertised, and very well equipped - felt just like home. Calm location with a nice waterway view. Sharlene is a very helpful, friendly and accommodating host. Highly recommended!

name: Cosy Room in Rotterdam West
comments:
Lisette is renting her room, which is really big and comfortable. It has a double sized bed, a sofa and a round table to eat/study. With the big windows and facing the inside court it is really quiet and nice to work.
The place is located in a nice and quiet neighborhood, really close to both the center of Rotterdam and Delft.  There are other apartment-mates, who are quiet and friendly. I found my self comfortable with the place and with Lisette and the communication with her.
I have to explain that there are two cats in the apartment, which are Lisette’s; that means that the room you are staying is also their room and they’re going to be around a lot. That wasn’t a problem for me because I also have a cat, but it is relevant to know before booking.
Overall it was a really nice experience!

name: Special stay on Rotterdams Nature-boat "Appa"
comments: Stan and his friend put together great environmentally conscious project. If you looking for unusual accomodation in close center of Rotterdam go for it. Description fits really well and communication with Stan was quick. Enclosed marina offers paid parking on the street and nice amount of privacy, whole boat was nice and clean. 👍

name: Large appartment in Rotterdam
comments: Quaint, light and well-appointed apartment right in Blijdorp. Close to transport, easy access on bikes and with car, quiet neighbors and well insulated from any street noises. Nicely decorated and comfortable.

name: 010 Studio City Center Rotterdam
comments: Great little a studio flat at walking distance from Rotterdam city center. Flat is clean, with all amenities one would need for a stay. There is also a little park across the street which was nice to have a walk etc. Fatima was really helpful and understanding, gave us help checking in and replied very fast. I would recommend to anyone. Thanks again Fatima!

name: 010 Studio City Center Rotterdam
comments: We had a spectacular stay with my husband, we felt at home, the beautiful neighborhood with a supermarket a couple of streets away and Fátima's attention was the best, recommending and we will return

name: 010 Studio City Center Rotterdam
comments: The place is enough for couple of nights, but what was off is the structure of the room...the shower was literally near the bedroom in front of the window (I mean no one can see from other side, but still), for one night it was enough for me, all the necessities were there, I would say a bit too pricey since it's more far away from the centre and that its Rotterdam, but I guess that's the situation in the Netherlands right now with the rent. The public transport was also not in the best location (about 20 minutes walk), but I guess durable. The place was clean and I used the early check-in option for 50€ so I find it very great that I could do that.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: Very good location and helpful host! It has been a delight to wander in the center and walk back to this cosy appartement, I highly recommend it

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: Beautiful apartment with a view and very spacious for a couple. With a big table and also a very comfy couch. Easy to access, and close to supermarkets, cafes and more. Absolutely recommended

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: Apartment was exactly as shown in photos, very convenient location near coffee shops and supermarket. Good wifi, smart tv, loved the windows! Host was easy to contact and very responsive, keys in lock-box. I would totally stay again.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments:
Wonderful house, lots of natural light , well equiped. we spent many evenings just laying on the couch, listening to the birds and soaking the sun .
Amenities close, great cheese store and parks around .
Wish we could stay more !

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments:
My girlfriend and I really enjoyed the attention to detail put into the design and aesthetic of Elsemarijin's place. It was really beautiful and totally my style. Having access to a washing machine truly helped us so much in between our travels!
We did however, have a difficult time with the windows needing to stay open for airflow, since there's no AC, which allowed for all kinds of insects to visit. I understand this is no ones fault, so we kept them closed shortly after realizing. I also struggled a bit with the stairs but this is also typical of these cities.
The neighborhood itself was very nice and relaxing to walk around. Lots of cute restaurants and shops nearby.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments:
Clean and fresh but also warm and comfortable with plenty of natural through light.
Very tidy and lovely apartment equipped with everything you need. A good bed, functional and well thought out kitchen and inspirational “blue” bathroom that bathes you in natural goodness.
Elsemarijn was very kind and accomodating during my stay, albeit a short weekend in Rotterdam. Check in was a breeze with easy access to the apartment.
All up, a wonderful homely space with a great design aesthetic and literature to suit.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: The house is fantastic, exactly like you see in the pics. There is a lot of light, and in cold winter times you are guaranteed to be warm! Communication was also great. The only possible limitation is the access to the double bed, that has to be accessed from the "feet-side" ;-) I hope next time my parents will visit to be lucky enough to find the apartment free again! Highly recommended!

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: Pretty cool apartment, very well designed, airy and bright during the day. Location was within 10min of the public transport so quite easy to go around. Stairs a bit tricky to go up and down with a big luggage, but is doable. :))

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments:
It’s a light spacious flat.
Apples, bananas, and condiments were really useful and appreciated. Thank you Elsemarijn.
The cutlery was hard to find, in a drawer under a unit next to the oven; but we managed.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: Elsemarijn is a very attentive host...quick to communicate when you need something. The place itself is super cozy and spacious...I love all the self-made furniture and the colors in the space. Next to this, it is also not too far from Rotterdam centraal. Would definitely recommend staying here! The only thing to keep in mind, is that it is a bit warmer in the summer, and if you sleep with the window open there is some outside noise if you are a light sleeper.

name: Appartement Rotterdam noord
comments: It is consistent with the photos, with convenient transportation, about ten minutes to the central station, the whole apartment is clean, and general household items are provided. The only problem is that it is quite noisy outside at night. Pedestrians often talk outside the house or the noise of motorcycles passing by makes it difficult for me to fall asleep. The sound insulation needs to be improved

name: Apartement at Rotterdam nearby City Center!
comments: Great place to spend couple of days. Only one problem -- not enough lights in apartment, so at autumn/winter evenings might be difficult to work/cook in main room.

name: Apartement at Rotterdam nearby City Center!
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at this accommodation! Everything was impeccably clean, and its proximity to key city spots was incredibly convenient. The heating system worked perfectly on both floors, ensuring a cozy stay. Michiel was very responsive, polite and he offered support at any time. Do note, the first bedroom and shower are on the second floor, accessed via a slightly narrow corridor, which might pose challenges for those with mobility difficulties. However, overall, our experience was fantastic, and we're already considering a return visit!

name: Apartement at Rotterdam nearby City Center!
comments: Beautiful apartment on a pretty quiet street, short walk to Rotterdam central. The space was well laid out and was great for late night hangs. Felt safe and private

name: Spacious design family home in Rotterdam
comments: Great place! It’s just like u see it in the pics! If you’re a family with a baby or toddler, this is the place to be! It has everything and more for the comfort of your little one..And if you like cozy interiors and nice, big kitchen - this is also the right place to stay! The kitchen was fully!!! equipped with everything that comes to your mind.. The hosts were very responsive and nice, also very helpful with the parking spot 🫶 The area was surprisingly good, full of small cafes, close to supermarkets, neighborhood shopping streets and the city center, but at the same time it stays away from downtown’s crowds. Overall great place! Totally worth it..

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
It was our first time staying in Rotterdam and chose Edwin’s apartment for the reasonable walk to and from the train station and beautiful aesthetic of the apartment.
Edwin and Michael were very accommodating, and communication was easy via calls and messages after our flights was slightly delayed, which meant we couldn’t make the original check in time. When arriving we found the place exceptional, with cooking amenities available if needed and everything very clean. The sofa bed had also been made for our friend, who said it was very comfortable sleep. Our bed was also very comfortable with a brilliantly firm mattress. While staying there we had particularly cold temperatures for the time of year but we were very pleased to find the place was perfectly warm too.
We also found the apartment was close to a main street with a supermarket, restaurants and pubs, which came in handy when needing somewhere to watch the England World Cup match with France. A wonderful stay overall!

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: The place has everything you need for a short stay. All the furnitures are brand new. The place is fine for a couple. It’s located not too far from the city center by transport. Not too much to do in the nearby area. Cleaning was good but not exceptional. The biggest problem was the steep stairs at the entrance if you have big luggages or a disability problem it may be a big issue. We could heard the noise of the neighbors from upstairs every morning, this also may be a bit uncomfortable. For the rest everything was fine. Great communication with the host.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
Edwin's place is amazing. Everything seems brand new and of high quality. The kitchen was very well equipped, with everything you need to cook dinner if you want to. For me it is important to have a good bathroom and shower, and this was by far one of the best showers I have ever seen. The bedroom was also a highlight, the bed is extremely comfortable, the pillows, extra pillows and blankets are incredibly good, we just couldn't get out of the bed in the morning.
Edwin is a great host, helped me when I needed and even recommended places to visit. Everything was perfect, and if we get back to Rotterdam we will for sure book the place again.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
Edwin is an excellent host. On arrival I found a very thoughtful postcard about my home country of Kenya. I was allowed to check in hours earlier, after a long night flight. There were chocolates and beers in the kitchen.
The beds are comfortable, and the lighting system very sophisticated.
One of the best Airbnb experiences I've had.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
Edwin and Michele were super host. They are very responsive in chat and also provide us with useful information such as nearest laundromat, what happen and what to see in town etc. we even been provided by chocolates for the kids and also local beers to try in the kulkas.
The unit itself is very neat and modern. The lightning system is so luxury so we feel so warm and feel like home. The kitchen is well equipped with all tools you need to cook.
One of the best airbnb experience we ever had
Thanks Edwin and Michel. See you again!

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: A lovely basement apartment that was open plan but well laid out. It was well equipt, bright and modern.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
to be honest we didn't really like theapartment. It was pretty dirty and dusty. Unfortunately you can't really open the windows unless you don't want to get bitten by mosquitoes. Furthermore in the bathroom the shower water doesn't really drain off and there is no air circulation. All this points end up in high humidity and causes mites to evolve. That's why we have chosen to leave one night earlier, because of my mite allergy. You should really install windows mosquitos net and the back windows and also clean the apartment from all the dust. The stairs were also very dirty. Furthermore one Tuesday night the people who live next door dropped a glass item and many broken glass came under the connection door from the other apartment to our apartment entrance. As a consequence the door could not be opened and closed properly until I have repaired and clean our entrance floor from the broken glass.
For the price of almost 500€ for 3nights it is way too expensive.
The rest was perfect.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
Clean, cozy place with great kitchen and situated in a wonderful neighbourhood. Would recommend!
Keep in mind, the apartment is underground, so less natural light. Also, the exit to the "backyard", while invitingly furnished for coffee or breakfast, is in a "concrete box" (see penultimate picture) beneath the level to the backyard, meaning that it is dark and somewhat moist. However, this was a detail during our stay in this great apartment.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is in a nice neighbourhood which feels safe day and night. Down the very steep steps, you’ll find a really clean, stylish and well stocked kitchen plus some welcome treats :-) the beds are comfortable and there’s plenty of spare blankets/pillows. The 2 rooms are separated by a divider so there is privacy from sight if not sound. The small outdoor terrace is cosy. Great spot to stay in if you are planning to explore Rotterdam. We had our 3 year old and there was thoughtfully bumpers on the bed and plastic bowls/cups and a bib.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: Edwin's place was a fantastic location! he gave us some really amazing recommendations,  my favourite being man with glasses cafe. This was an amazing price and he was super accommodating with check in and even provided snacks and drinks. Really nice touch! Would recommend to anyone.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
We loved our stay in the apartment. Great location, area has lovely brunch spots and vintage shops.
Sound carries, so if you’re a light sleeper bring earplugs. Otherwise an excellent stay!

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
A lovely and tastefully renovated apartment in a great location. Close to great restaurants, the brewery, and public transport.
There is some noise from the apartment above and we couldn’t control the heat or nightlight overnight.
Proactive communication with the co-hosts, and they were on time for the agreed meeting time.
Good local recommendations and welcome drinks and snacks from the hosts was a nice touch.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: Edwin’s place felt like home. Although slightly out of the city center but perfect for those who need a quiet get away. The room matched the pictures and all amenities are ready to be used. The kitchen and bathroom are spacious and comfortable. However, the room is on an underground floor/basement and has only one window right next to the bed, so it may be a bit cold and difficult for any ventilation or air flow. Regardless, Both the host and co-hosts are very helpful and responsive. We had a problem with the door knob on the first day and they helped resolved the problem quickly. Overall, it was a good stay :)

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment worked very well for three of us for a 9-night stay. We were welcomed with fresh flowers, champagne, and chocolate! The hosts were gracious, proactive, and helpful when we had questions or needs. The space is clean, well-lit, and modern, and the kitchen is well-equipped for cooking. Our daughter declared the sleep sofa the most comfortable she's ever slept on! The entry stairs are steep, but with the sturdy railing and good lighting we felt quite safe on them.
The neighborhood has gems for dining and shopping, and you can walk to the City center. A laundromat that takes credit/debit cards is 4 blocks away. Tram stops are close, and they run on a frequent schedule. Parking is limited, so renting a bike is ideal. The bike lanes and traffic signals make it safe and easy to ride throughout the city. Venturing farther is possible by renting an electric car by the hour through the MyWheels app. Their cars are conveniently parked at charging stations around the neighborhood.

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments: Great location, walking distance from central station but in a quiet street. Good quality kitchenware, appliances and very comfortable beds and pillows. And very grateful for the cold drinks left in the fridge as it was 30C when we arrived. Lovely base to explore Rotterdam

name: Prachtige moderne studio in centrum Rotterdam
comments:
Edwin’s place was extremely nice and comfortable, the kitchen was super well equipped and had honestly everything you need for a pleasant stay.
There’s a 3 minute walk to the tram from the apartment that takes you to Rotterdam centraal so the walk is super short and the neighborhood very nice to walk in!
I saw some comments regarding humidity, we noticed a faint smell but I assume it’s because the unit is an underground house so it’s not really a big issue. The only thing I would mention is: The bugs, to keep the place ventilated we had to open the windows and spiders and mosquitos were everywhere 🥲. I believe some cheap nets would do the job so the humidity smell is not an issue and the bugs aren’t either.
Make sure to shower without using the shower at full pressure since the pump cannot take that much!
Lovely place and good attention from the hosts, thank you!

name: Het leukste plekje in centrum Rotterdam.
comments: Very nice and cozy place! Camiel is very friendly. It has a great view of Rotterdam and very convenient to famous places nearby!

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments: Everything was up to standard, we had a great time with total privacy and our host helped us with great info about Rotterdam , with the service we got the place is undervalued because we left the place impressed so much that if we ever back in Rotterdam we will go back .... Thank you Kamil

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments:
La estancia con Kamil y su mujer fue excelente e inmejorable. Desde el principio nos sentimos muy acogidos, y Kamil nos explicó todo lo necesario para poder tener una estancia agradable en su piso en Rotterdam.
El piso y la localización son buenos, pero creo que debemos destacar la increíble amabilidad, paciencia y el trato excelente que nos dió Kamil los días que pasamos allí. Muy recomendado para cualquiera que quiera visitar la ciudad
---------
The stay with Kamil and his wife was excellent and second to none. From the beginning we felt very welcomed, and Kamil explained everything we needed to have a pleasant stay in his apartment in Rotterdam.
The apartment and the location are great, but I think we must highlight the incredible kindness, patience and excellent hospitality that Kamil gave us during the days we spent there. Highly recommended for anyone planning a trip to Rotterdam!

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments:
Made same day last minute booking, when I arrived it was clear that it’s not “a private apartment “ as advertised, there’s a whole family living on the first floor / in same house. I left after 15 minutes. Host said he would be ok with me canceling but didn’t gave approval after I’ve canceled through Airbnb which would make me pay for being there 15 minutes. Luckily Airbnb helped me out and refunded me the whole amount I’ve paid because they agreed that it’s not private place as advertised. Otherwise would’ve lost money for 15min staying there.
People who look for total privacy don’t rent.

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments: Beautiful and quirky home near the centre of Rotterdam. Kamil was a delightful host and made sure I felt right at home. Would recommend to anyone!

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment is cozy and sunny, well-divided and perfectly equipped.
The street is quiet and, indeed, so is the entire neighborhood, with a very nice park at a 5-minute stroll. Bus and tram stops are at a few-minute walk, one of them reaching the central station in some ten minutes.
Kamil is a most kind and thoughtful host, extremely accommodating and helpful. It was a pleasure to have him around.
Highly recommended also for long-term stays.

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments: This was an amazing stay. Both Kamil and Dorota are super friendly and very helpful. My flight arrived in the morning and they were very kind to let me check in early. They also offered me food and were very welcoming. The place has plenty of space, is very clean, and has plenty of amenities and is a great deal for the price. Using public transport to get around from there was very easy too. I would stay there again and would also highly recommend to others!

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments:
Kamil and his wife were great and friendly hosts! The place is in a residential area which is very quiet, no sounds of traffic or other noise. The amenities listed were available and Kamil was helpful with using the washing machine.
It was also very clean, with many small details present that add a nice touch to my stay.
The location is about 30mins from Rotterdam Centraal station by bus, and there is also a tram that takes you to other places.
I definitely recommend his place to others and would love to stay again in future!

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments: This was a wonderful stay in a typical Holland house with narrow winding stairs to the top making it complete. It is comfortable and the home is very well kept with everything I needed. Kamil and his wife were friendly and I even enjoyed some home made delights! Thank you for making my stay so wonderful.

name: Ahoy Rotterdam
comments: Kamil was a lovely host. Our luggage did not arrive with our flight so we had to delay our check in time, and he was flexible and accommodating. We even got to enjoy some of Dorota's delicious Polish soup when we got there! The location is convenient for an event at Ahoy, and to go into Rotterdam proper, the 44 bus will take you there. Also the 44 will take you to Rotterdam Centraal where you can go to the airport or Amsterdam. There are not restaurants or cafes nearby so plan your food accordingly (a lovely bakery about 6 minute walk and some small food markets nearby). Also they are not kidding when they say the stairs are narrow and steep- this may be a problem for people with mobility issues. And bring your eye mask for sleeping as the apartment gets very bright in the morning. We were a party of three and had plenty of room. Thank you Kamil and Dorota for a warm stay!

name: Spacious, 2 Bedroom Apartment, fully equipped!
comments: The apartment is great, recently renovated with modern design, great kitchen, spacious and modern (main) bathroom. Bedrooms also spacious, with good heat and sound insulation. Living room cosy with nice view. Also, well heated and plenty of warm water. The only remark is around making it to the apartment, as the external staircase is very steep and narrow , with small uneven stairs. A real challenge to move a heavy suitcase up or down. The neighborhood is calm, with no hype to hang around there, but reaching the center is 10 mins drive… Overall a nice place to stay and relax, in Rotterdam.

name: Spacious, 2 Bedroom Apartment, fully equipped!
comments: Dilaria’s house is extremely clean, comfortable, and designed beautifully. The appliances are top notch and it even has a built-in espresso machine! The upstairs bathroom is like a spa with a rain shower and a big bath tub. The location is perfect - close (short walk) to central station, downtown, supermarkets, and plenty of restaurants. It has two balconies, one of which opens up the kitchen. It is on a busy street but high up enough for you not be bothered by much city noise. Dilaria’s communication was prompt, clear, and friendly. We would stay here again in a heartbeat.

name: Bergpolder House - with patio
comments:
We had a really nice time at Max's place. The apartment itself is very nice - spacious, with lots of light. The location was great. It's not right in the center of the city, which for us was great because it was quiet, and at the same time the neighborhood is very nice. Some great coffee shops are within a 5-10 minute walk, a nice canal closeby, and a friendly pub on the corner. Max was responsive and even left a bottle of wine and some coffee capsules for us, which was really nice.
There were a few very small challenges: first, the steep, vertical steps in the hallway to climb, which for us wasn't a big deal. Also, it's a duplex apartment, and the beds are upstairs while the toilet is downstairs. Finally the two beds were very comfortable but they are in the same general area upstairs, divided partly by a wall, but there are not too separate bedrooms per se.
But overall a very nice stay. I would return.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Perfect location, spacious room and nice terrace for chill when the weather allows it. Only annoying thing is that the curtains  are not thick enough to block the morning sun.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: We had an excellent stay here in Rotterdam. The host was extremely helpful, available, flexible and a delight to interact with, and the room quality was excellent. Furthermore, the location was simply perfect, an easy walk to nearly everything we wanted to do. Thank you!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Die Unterkunft war wie beschrieben und der Gastgeber hat für ein schönes Ambiente gesorgt. Die Highlights der Unterkunft sind die schöne Dachterasse sowie die gute Lage! Man schläft in einer ruhigen Gegend und ist dennoch schnell in einer belebten Umgebung.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Thanks to the host Martin for the hospitality.  Very comfortable for 3 people.  Separate single room.  Cleanliness.  Privacy.  Roof terrace.  Close to central attractions.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments:
Perfect location in great neighborhood.
Very close to center.
Great view from terrace and spacious room.
Martine was super nice and helpful.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Very nice and clean place with a great view

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments:
Wir haben uns direkt wie zu Hause gefühlt 🫶🏽 aber das ist bei so einer freundlichen Gastgeberin nicht schwer. Das Zimmer ist sehr geräumig und gemütlich eingerichtet. Es gibt sogar eine kleine provisorische „Küche“ mit einem kleinen Kühlschrank, Geschirr & Besteck sowie einen Wasserkocher Tee und Kaffee. Allgemein war die Unterkunft als auch das eigene Badezimmer sehr sauber. Martine war zu jederzeit erreichbar und sehr hilfsbereit. Das Highlight ist die Dachterrasse, man hat einen super Blick über Rotterdam. Die Umgebung ist sehr ruhig, da die Unterkunft in einer Seitenstraße liegt, dennoch ist man super schnell zentral Vorort.
Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Aufenthalt und kommen sicherlich wieder :)

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments:
Wir hatten eine sehr schöne Zeit in Martines Appartement. Die Zimmer sind sehr geräumig und schön eingerichtet, eine kleine Küchenecke ist auch vorhanden um Kaffee oder Tee zuzubereiten. Die Dachterrasse ist auf jeden Fall ein Highlight, gerade bei Sonnenaufgang 🤩
Martine ist eine sehr freundliche und hilfsbereite Gastgeberin. Sie gab uns Tipps zum Parken und hat auf alle Fragen sehr schnell reagiert. Als wir sie persönlich trafen, erzählte sie uns kleine Geschichten über das Viertel und war interessiert an unseren Unternehmungen in Rotterdam. Es hat uns sehr gefreut, vielen Dank 😘

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments:
Perfekt location, Sleeping Room was comfortable, Bathroom very clean. Best part was the night view from the balcony.
Thankyou Martine, you were very welcoming and I had a great stay 😁

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Our stay at Martine's place has been perfect. She is a wonderfull  host very kind and helpful. Excellent home, bright, clean, cosy and spacious. We will come back soon!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace and parking
comments: Everything like in the description. Very clean place, beautiful view of the city, great neighbourhood (both close to the Museum Park and Rotterdam Centraal, and groceries and restaurants). Highly recommended!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Loved the apartment! Stayed 2 nights with a baby, just 4 mins walk from the station, super easy to find, has a lift. Close to everything, bagel place & supermarket downstairs and sunrise view from the balcony. Will stay again!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: I really liked this apartment - it was in the middle of central Rotterdam, but it was surprisingly quiet. It is a very large apartment with a great view. The bed was very comfortable. Coco was very helpful and flexible, which I always appreciate. I would like to stay here again.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Coco’s place was wonderful it actually exceeded our expectations. The location and proximity to everything was so convenient. The building itself has a security guard 24/7 so great for peace of mind. The apartments was bright and spacious and felt welcoming. The host was very flexible,allowing me to check in early.
I was very happy overall and highly recommend this place and hope to stay there again on my next trip.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Nice appointment in excellent location with gorgeous view from windows.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Fantastic airbnb... beautiful furniture & a great host. Very comfy, warm, and great view from 9th. For the visitors who enjoy cooking, there are lots of amenities to whip out a dish. 5 stars! will surely come back!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: A great apartment with an amazing view right in the heart of Rotterdam. Spacious and nicely organised, offers an ideal environment for both work and leisure. And most importantly is dog friendly too, so you could have all that together with your furry friend. A plus is that there a well equipped gym in the building that you can use. Highly recommended!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Michel's and Coco's place was ABSOLUTELY PERFECT for us to attend the State of Trance Festival in Rotterdam. It is smack in the middle of everything you would want - restaurants, bars, Rotterdam central station (literally a 5 min walk), China Town, shopping...you name it.
Michel met us right away and told us where to park the car and everything we needed to know. Any questions we had during our stay had an immediate response.
The flat is amazing! Clean, comfy with a beautiful view of the city! They even left us a bottle of amazing wine and coffee to help us through until we could find a store. Honestly though, we did not need to buy anything but water (you can drink the tap water no problem) and laundry detergent. There was excess toilet paper and towels if needed.
We plan on coming back next year to the festival and will definitely be on the lookout for booking this place again!
Thank you so much Michel and Coco!
Yasmine and Greg Rieck

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very clean and cosy flat. It's very bright. Great location. Comfortable bed.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Very nice place with everything you need and ample cooking utensils as well as a nice balcony view.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location, well situated. Bright comfortable space with lots of light. Very accommodating, they even met us mid-day for an early check-in. Gave lots of great suggestions of things to do. Very friendly, all-around great stay.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great to be so close to Centraal Station and easy walks to everywhere we wanted to go. Tram stop just a block away makes everything in the city accessible. Bright, great natural daylight throughout the flat. Grocery just around the corner.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
We stayed at Coco's place for two weeks in June and really felt at home. It is in a great location, 5 minutes walking distance from Central Station and right in the city center, close to many shops and restaurants. There's a super market right next door which is very convinient for self catering. The kitchen is well equipped with everything you need for a short stay. There was plenty of space in the apartment, we were even able to have friends over for dinner. The bed was very comfortable and there was lots of cupboard space in the bedroom. The apartment was very clean, and our host even arranged for an additional mid-stay cleaning at no extra costs for us which was really nice. There's also a washer and dryer in the apartment which is extremely handy for a long stay.
The only downside is that it gets fairly warm in summer because not all windows have blinds and the sun shines directly on the bed in the morning.
Overall, we had a wonderful stay and would totally stay there again.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: A very good central location with a nice Rotterdam skyline view. The apartment was spacious, clean and well equiped. A tip. You may want to bring a sleeping mask.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: The location is outstanding! center of it all. close to shopping, dining, public transport, activities. Building exterior is stunningly, modern. Interior is as pictured (well characterized) but there are some issues, which you don’t realize until you get there. It is on the loud side (street noises) and no blinds on one window in bedroom so light from city buildings comes in all night and sun comes up early. This made sleeping difficult. Bed and linens not very comfortable. Needed a few more pillows and a top sheet. Host very responsive (eg, when contacted bc there was no hand soap or detergent host delivered quickly) and great communicator. A few more items in kitchen would be great like creamer for coffee and maybe some paper towels. So the overall star rating comes from the sleep conditions more than anything and being jet lagged that was important. In sum: excellent location and host; needs work on sleeping conditions.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Me and my wife spent 3 weeks here. Great space, it became our second home. For its central location it was surprisingly quiet and neighbours were quiet and friendly. It had a great view and we appreciated the blackout curtains in the bedroom.
Useful amenities, gym and parking in the building, highly recommend if you’re looking for a fully quipped but homey space.
There were so many shops and restaurants around in the area, lots to do.
Thank you for welcoming us!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Truly enjoyed my stay at this place! Love how conveniently the apartment is located - many amenities nearby and within walking distance. Centraal train station is just 5 mins walk away. There’s a well stocked supermarket just right below the building and cool cafes too. The place was exactly like the photos, super clean and functional. It was bustling with people outside the apartment building but the balcony faces a quieter street which is nice and quiet. Check in was fuss-free, met Michiel (great host!) who is friendly and warm. I would definitely recommend this place!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Our stay at the apartment exceeded our expectations. Michiel was a great communicator & allowed us to check in several hours early, which I really appreciated after a long flight. The location is incredibly central and walking distance from most places in the city, and the train station. Everything in the apartment, from the decor to the linens, was very high quality (much nicer than I usually expect in a short-term rental) and the kitchen appliances were very well stocked. Would definitely recommend the stay!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Lovely light apartment with amazing views over the city on the ninth floor with two lifts.  The living room is spacious and the bed very comfortable. The location is excellent - five minutes walk to Rotterdam Centraal station with many trains to beautiful towns nearby. There is a useful supermarket on the ground floor in the same building and the fantastic restaurants of Chinatown are only across the road. The apartment could not be better.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: This apartment is a perfect location! A stone’s throw from the train station & nearby to great restaurants, bars, shops & easy to hop on the trams & buses to go anywhere! The apartment was clean & comfortable and the rare to find washer & dryer was a HUGE plus!! Access to a gym on first floor was wonderful, & the view of the night sky was great!

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay in the light, spacious and well-equipped apartment. It was always a pleasure getting back to a comfortable bed after a long day in the city and it was really nice to have a balcony. It was remarkably quiet for a city apartment.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Centrally located and close to the central train station. Has a gym in the building. Relatively quiet. Nice view of the city. Beautiful Vitra furniture.

name: Bright Modern Apartment in the Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great location with good views of the city

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments:
John and Marisa's place is a dream. The amenities were spotless and the view of the cannals was breathtaking every single morning. The nearest metro is 10-15 min from home and only 25 min from the central train station.
The hosts are top level. Highly communicative, making you feel at home and responded with a smile whenever we would meet on the streets nearby.

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments:
The houseboat was exactly as pictured. Gorgeous location on the canal and so bright and airy. We loved the location (quiet but walkable to the Metro, parks and Zoo). A hidden gem in the heart of the city! Use of the canoes was an added bonus and the kids loved spotting all the wildlife. Great location to visit sights around South Holland - we even got the local Metro to the beach!
The houseboat was excellently equipped and we easily cooked family meals in the evening. The garden space was perfect to enjoy the quiet surroundings. All the amenities were excellent and our hosts gave clear and fast responses.

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments: Amazing place! Simply the best place to stay if you are visiting the Netherlands, or even just Rotterdam. Located in an adorable yet spacious houseboat, and a 2 minute walk from the Vroesenpark, we felt like we truly got to experience Rotterdam. We felt very Dutch riding our bicycles to our cute houseboat on the canal!. Waking up every morning to the beautiful swans and ducks just outside our window, and waving at the small boats from our balcony as they went by was the highlight of our trip! The hosts were super friendly and helpful (they even offered us a ride to the train station on the day of our departure!) The place was perfectly clean, surprisingly spacious, but still cute and quaint. We loved it!

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments: John and Marisa's place was the best Airbnb experience that I've had so far. The place is located in a beautiful and quiet area and the view from the windows is spectacular. John and Marisa responded right away to my messages and made sure we had everything we needed during our stay.

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments: We were a family of 4 with 2 children and really enjoyed Rotterdam. Highlights were the Harbour Cruise, the cube houses and market, Delft, Den Haag and the seaside.

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments:
This boathouse offers an ideal mix of city convenience and natural beauty. Perfectly located within walking distance to metro stations, Zoo, parks, shops, restaurants and more. It's a great base for exploring. We were amazed by the diverse array of bird species we spotted right from our window. The nearby park provided a perfect setting for morning jogs and afternoon picnics. The area also offers excellent opportunities for water activities like canoeing, swimming and boating. The hosts are simply amazing and go above and beyond.
Overall a great find for those seeking both urban excitement and natural tranquility.

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments:
Marvelous house on the outskirts of Rotterdam- feels very rural, but still at the walkable distance from
the center. The canal is really beautiful - the ducks and swans swim right near the balcony. There is a a canoe that can be used to explore the surroundings. that can be used in order to visit nearby town. The house is big, much bigger than we expected, modern and very comfortable. The host is friendly and very responsive. Will be very happy to come back!

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments: Fantastisch plekje in Rotterdam, loopafstand van metrostation naar het centrum. De woonboot was groter dan we hadden verwacht met veel privacy en gratis parkeren. Super schoon en heel compleet. Dank voor een heerlijk weekend in Rotterdam (gezin met 3 kids)

name: Oase in de stad, ruime woonboot aan rand centrum
comments: The Houseboat is exceptionally nice. Spacious, very clean and well equipped. Great to sit on the little balcony or in the garden and watch the moorhens and heron. Great to have access to canoes. John is a very responsive host. Our family absolutely loved it there.

name: Beautiful centrally located apartment in Rotterdam
comments: It was a perfect stay. We were quite surprised that the apartments is very calm. Being right behind the station we thought we would hear some noise, but actually, you don’t hear absolutely anything and we were very happy about it. The apartment has everything you need, it’s nicely decorated and very comfortable. The location is perfect! We loved our stay :)

name: Beautiful centrally located apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Boris’s is very responsive to communications, personally hand over the keys right on time, even let us check in earlier and offer us to check out late. The welcome flowers, chocolate n wine is a nice treat. The apartment is airy, bright, exactly match the descriptions. It is so quiet in the neighborhood . Highly recommended for couples visiting Rotterdam and nearby towns, so close to the centraal station n all transportation. Emily n Boris are Super Hosts.

name: Beautiful centrally located apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Fantastic location, about a 5 minute walk to and from the Rotterdam Central Station. Close to the downtown area and only a short walk to many restaurants and public areas.
The apartment is as described, a large living room area with a comfortable couch, and large front windows. There is a nice size kitchen with everything you need for a nice breakfast or a large dinner plus a table for meals or remote working. The bedroom is a separate room with a very comfortable bed and a full wall of windows. The bathroom is off the bedroom with a nice shower and separate room for the toilet.
Boris and Emily were very responsive and communicated very clearly, no problems during our stay. Highly recommend this location to anyone looking to visit Rotterdam and those looking to take day trips to The Hague or Delft.

name: Beautiful centrally located apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Boris’s home was a gorgeous place to spend a week in Rotterdam! A bright, sunny, and spacious apartment just steps from the train station Close to grocery stores, restaurants, and anything else one would need. The furniture and everything else in the apartment was high quality. Boris was very helpful throughout our entire stay, going the extra distance to provide extra amenities for our longer stay.

name: TJ - Bright and Comfortable Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Tijuca is a wonderful host, the house is really nice, looks like a dolls house, nice views, nice location, nice decoration, just perfect!

name: TJ - Bright and Comfortable Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
My daughter and I had a lovely stay at Tjula’s Airbnb! It’s a cozy and comfortable spot, very clean, with everything we needed for our stay. A real bonus is the cute little balcony where you can enjoy your morning coffee and some fresh air.
Tjula was always quick to respond if we had any questions or needed help, which we really appreciated. The location is great close to Rotterdam Central, with plenty of restaurants and shops nearby.
The only small thing we missed was a microwave, but that’s just a minor detail. One thing to note: the stairs are quite steep, so keep that in mind when carrying luggage. Other than that, it was a great stay. Thank you, Tjula! 😊

name: Studio 7-Beautiful Studio in Centre Rotterdam.
comments: The apartment is in a beautiful and very quiet part of the city. It is a very easy 10 minute walk to all the charm that Rotterdam has to offer. The flat is clean, well equipped, comfortable and has a lovely view over the water opposite. The hosts communicated well and met us on arrival to give us a few hints and tips on where to find everything locally. Although the steep stairs would make it difficult for anyone with mobility issues, we enjoyed being at the top of an interesting, traditional apartment block which gave us a picturesque view of the city. Great place if you want to experience the hustle and bustle of a busy city but escape to something tranquil at the end of the day.

name: Studio 7-Beautiful Studio in Centre Rotterdam.
comments: Excellent apartment in a perfect location to visit the centre of Rotterdam. Quiet and peaceful street.

name: Studio 7-Beautiful Studio in Centre Rotterdam.
comments: The location is perfect, very close to the central station and with a beautiful view. The coffee maker, microwave, and refrigerator make the apartment a very complete option. The bed, to be honest, isn't very comfortable, and it's important to consider that the apartment is on the third floor and requires climbing very narrow stairs.

name: Lovely apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Its a nice cozy apartment. Just be aware that any noise is pretty loud because the walls to the neighbours are thin and its an old house with wooden floors. So if youre not used to noise its a bit weird to sleep at night.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment is nice, well served and the location is great. The only problem for me was the bed: surely big enough for two, but still not that big. I had some trouble sleeping as my friend who was sleeping with me kept bumping into me:( although, I am light sleeper so that should also be taken into consideration.
Overall, great value for the price!

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: Scaffold and tarpaulin up blocking light to bedroom . Painter working  sanding and painting with a torch outside bedroom window. Whilst trying to get ready to go out ! The noise was awful ( video and pictures to show) . Very intrusive and off putting . Told Loc and he said painter would stop but he didn't.  Disappointed.  Apartment was lovely but overshadowed by this .

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: It was very hot when I visited so I had to keep the windows open. As you expect in a city, it gets noisy with open windows. However, Loc very kindly brought me a fan to help! Thanks Loc!

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: Beautiful home in a great location! I loved staying here between neighborhood streets and the city life - so much to do! Perfect home with all the basic necessities.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: The place was surprisingly small and cramped at first but it grew on us. There were many positives: good water pressure, amazind shower head, enough toilet paper and toiletries, enough towels for a lifetime, the mattress was very comfortable, there was a full size mirror and a lot of amenities in the kitchen. On the other hand the wall paint showed a lot of traces of time and other tourists, the iron was dripping calcar, the stairs were VERY steep, the bed was pretty small for what we got used to and had really lumpy pillows and duvet. The lights above the mirror in the bathroom were not working, the shower design would inevitably have water splashed all over, the light in the bedroom was super dim, the tv was unable to support any streaming services. In spite of being around the corner from a not very circulated road it was pretty loud. And lastly the temperature was set to a much lower degree than it was comfortable for us and any day it got colder we would freeze inside.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments:
I stayed at Loc's apartment from September to November 2024 and had a great experience.
Loc was very kind and responsive from the moment I booked through Airbnb, always ready to help when needed. The location is excellent—just a 15-minute walk to the city center and train station, with supermarkets, bakeries, bars, restaurants, and the metro nearby.
The apartment is quiet, airy, and exactly as shown in the photos, with large windows offering a great street view. It’s well-equipped with kitchen utensils, a spacious bathroom with a fantastic shower, and a reliable washing machine.
The comfort exceeded my expectations—the bed and sofa are very comfortable, and there are both warm and light blankets available.
I highly recommend Loc's apartment for both short and long stays. It’s one of the best rental experiences I’ve had in recent years.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: I had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam at Lok's place. The apartment was spacious for me , bright, and well furnished. I was incredibly comfortable and really liked the ease of access the location afforded me to the city. I was at once, close the the main train station, and also well positioned to access the city and my friends. The most notable thing about my stay was the clarity of instructions. Step by step this was the most straightforward and easy check-in and check-out I think I have ever had. Would certainly return on future trips to Rotterdam.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: Really enjoyed our short stay in the apartment. We liked the high ceilings and large windows. The bathroom was spotless. Very convenient location, especially for Jazz Cafe Dizzy! Overall our stay was very comfortable.

name: Beautiful private apartment at center Rotterdam
comments: A nice place to say! Please bear in mind the TV is old and doesn't connect well to the interview or have smart TV!

name: Spacious and relaxing apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Liz’s place was just what we needed, a clean peaceful residential space free of traffic noise with a usable kitchen. We felt like a local - we saw a neighbour walking his tiny little kitten twice and saw local familiar faces just in a few days.
The centrepiece for our time in the apartment was Liz’s fully provisioned kitchen so cooking and preparing the odd meal was a breeze as the equipment is there - gas hob, microwave, oven, knives, plates etc. make sure u use the large table too.
A great local shop (Malinka) 4 minutes walk away with fresh fruits, veg, cheese, cakes etc
Centraal station is an easy 24 minutes away (5 quick stops) by bus - go to bus stand BB at Centraal.
A pleasant 25 minute walk to Ahoy Arena.
Quick and clear comms from Liz also.
Would love to stay next time we are in town and I would recommend this place but do bear in mind one of u may need to draw straws to sleep on the mattress on the floor which is clearly outlined in the ad.
Bedankt Liz for having us ☺

name: Luxury Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
A very nice appartment located on the outskirts of the city centre. Appartment was on the 3rd floor and people with big suit cases might struggle to get up there, since there's no elevator. About 10 min walk away from the city centre and zoo, so perfect location.
Communication overall was great, extra credit to them for delivering a hairdryer before arrival after we asked for one!
Overall a lovely appartment with a nice roof terrace that could have been slightly cleaner. Shower drainage wasn't cleaned properly and some of the kitchen utensils were dirty.
Great appartment and communication overall, definitely would go there again!

name: Luxury Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
This is a really nice property. It is located in a really nice area that is pretty quiet, but a very quick walk from shops, grocery stores, and lots of things to do. The apartment was clean and hosts communicated well.
The apartment is on the 3rd floor and the stairs are pretty steep, but it isn't too bad. It also does get relatively hot, but opening windows and using the provided fans helps a lot.
It should be noted that this is a 1 bath, not 1.5. There is a single bathroom with a sink, toilet, shower, and bathtub, but not a second toilet everywhere.
In general, it was a good place to stay and a really nice location, but be warned there is only 1 toilet.

name: Luxury Apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Lovely apartment in a quiet area but also really close to a range of shops and restaurants, as well as Rotterdam Central station. Brilliant location for exploring the city. Great communication from the hosts and they were responsive to our need for a cot for our baby. The stairs were very steep and thankfully we were made aware of this before booking but the third staircase opened into the apartment and didn’t have a door/gate at the top which seemed dangerous and for us made the apartment not very child friendly. Generally the apartment was clean, however we found some of the items in the kitchen (cutlery and glasses) were not clean and also the towels and bedding had some stains on.

name: Luxury Apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Kick & Neda’s place was lovely. Spacious, bright and comfortable. Right next to the Heemraadsingel, very peaceful and calming. It’s close to some great cafés, restaurants and Centraal station.
A great Airbnb, we will be back soon.

name: Spacious apartment with tasteful interior
comments: Karin and Michiel were such good hosts. The home was just what we were hoping for. It was spacious, clean and has everything we needed to feel at home for 4 nights. It was a great base to see so much of the beautiful Netherlands. Street parking was accessible. Karen and Michiel responded quickly to any questions or concerns we had. We loved our stay and would recommend this home most definitely.

name: Mooi Appartement in Rotterdam
comments: From the first steps, you will be surprised how beautiful the Marjolein's accommodation is! Top notch interior design, great attention to details. From start to finish, Marjolein and her husband went above and beyond to ensure our stay was very comfortable. Communication with Marjolein was more than excellent. Super comfortable to stay with child. There is a child room with all kids amenities. A lot of facilities like coffee makers, TV, HiFi, dishwasher, baby cot and even a dryerю Kitchen is full-equipped and everything is in great condition. We were delighted with our stay and strongly recommend Marjolein’s apartment. We will gladly check in again at the next trip. Deserved 5 stars :)

name: Privékamer in Rotterdam
comments: Great place and location. For me - free parking and the shopping street - were a perfect plus for my combo visit to friends in Overschie and work at the Van Nellefabriek.

name: Privékamer in Rotterdam
comments: Great spot for a quick stay, very handy location for transport. beautiful view of a stained glass window right across from the private balcony.

name: room in beautiful apartment close to the city
comments: Abel was adorable and hosted us very well. The room was perfect (and has a very good bed). Not a far walk to the center and the tram is right on the corner of the street. Would definitely recommand or go back!

name: room in beautiful apartment close to the city
comments: Abel is een zeer vriendelijke, attente host. Zeer benaderbaar, maar hij respecteert ook de privacy van de huurders. Zijn woning ligt in een rustige buurt, maar dichtbij een tramhalte en met leuke restaurants op loopafstand. Het was een zeer prettig, schoon en goed verzorgd verblijf!

name: room in beautiful apartment close to the city
comments: I had a really nice stay at Abel's place! I have to confess, in the beginning, I was not fully aware that we would share the appartment. However, Abel is a fantastic host and so kind!! He is really helpful, and foremost respectful for you as a guest. I felt really welcome. The appartment has all necessary facilities I needed. The place is pretty quiet, even though there is a school right across your bedroom: you hardly hear it. Small tip for future guests: If you're sensitive to light in the morning, bring a sleeping mask/blindfold. I will definitively come back if i'm in town again!!

name: room in beautiful apartment close to the city
comments:
Eine super Unterkunft – absolut empfehlenswert!
Abel war wirklich sehr sympathisch, hat stets schnell geantwortet und uns direkt bei der Ankunft herzlich empfangen, sodass wir uns sofort wie zu Hause gefühlt haben.
Die Unterkunft selbst war sehr sauber und gemütlich eingerichtet. Es war alles vorhanden, was man für einen angenehmen Aufenthalt benötigt – bis ins kleinste Detail durchdacht. Die Atmosphäre war so einladend, dass wir uns wirklich sehr, sehr wohl gefühlt haben.
Auch die Lage ist hervorragend. In der Nähe gibt es tolle Cafés, und die Stadt ist vielseitig und schön – ein echtes Highlight.
Diese Unterkunft ist auch für Solo Female Travelers bestens geeignet und bietet ein Gefühl von Sicherheit und Geborgenheit.
Wir würden die Unterkunft von Abel jederzeit wieder buchen und können sie definitiv weiterempfehlen<3

name: Cosy apartment Rotterdam
comments: Very nice flat. Large windows with lots of light. Perfect workspace set-up for remote working. Quite residential area with nice cafes and pubs nearby. Really enjoyed my stay

name: Luxurious apartment (65m2) in lovely neighborhood
comments: "I had an amazing week staying at the Brigitte’s apartment in Rotterdam. I really loved the place – it was cozy, the surroundings were peaceful, and the apartment itself was clean with these large windows that I adored. The kitchen also super cool .. I must say Brigitte's apartment was pretty much perfect, and the communication with Brigitte was excellent."

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments:
Sara, who works for the owners, got in touch two days before our arrival. This was reassuring and she also contacted me on the day of our arrivals with more info. She also was waiting for us when we arrived at the Appartment.
The Appartment is set in a quiet street and you wouldn’t know you are in a city. If you have mobility challenges this place is not for you. House steps in Nederland are far steeper inclined than in Scotland and could be inhibiting if you have bad knees or such like. This includes indoor and the outdoor steps. The Appartment is on the first floor and has two levels. There is a balcony on the front and two balconies on the rear. The rear ones have peaceful views over the neighbours gardens ( which are all really pretty and looked after. Some of the neighbours even looked up and chatted to us in the sunshine..
There are cafes, restaurants, bakers, Ironmongers , and Albert Heijm supermarket close by…and a metro station that we didn’t use.

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments: A fantastic location so close to the Metro, a fantastic chinese restaurant, snack bar and supermarket.  Light filled space with comfy beds, we really enjoyed staying in a home that was gezelig/cosy, outdoor area was great + neighbourhood good vibes.

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments: Azadeh’s two-floor apartment was an ideal location for our family of four, an excellent starting point from which to discover Rotterdam as well as to visit Den Haag, Delft and the Biesbosch.  The flat is welcoming and well-maintained, with many great features, including a balcony off the kitchen and a large deck off the main bedroom.  Communication with Azadeh was excellent, and we appreciated the host’s prompt and helpful responses.  Thank you for a great stay!

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments: The place was beautiful and really tastefully decorated. It suited us and our kids really well and was continently located right near the metro and an easy walk to Rotterdam Centraal. We really enjoyed staying there. The only drawback (if staying in the lighter months) was that the blinds don’t block the light. However we used eye masks so slept fine in the end.

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments: The place is beautiful. Spacious, comfortable, lots of natural light, beautifully decorated. It’s a very easy walk to public transport if you don’t want to walk, but walking is reasonable too.

name: Stijlvolle woning in populaire wijk Blijdorp.
comments:
Beautiful, spacious and clean apartment in a nice and quiet neighborhood. Metro and grocery near. Sara was helpful and a phone call away to help you with anything.
The apartment doesn't have curtains that would block the sunlight and heat so in the summer time it got very hot and bright.

name: Luxe appartement scheepvaartkwartier Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is great if you would like to visit Rotterdam or stay for work. The location is super central. The apartment has everything you may need and is located on a quiet side street. Really enjoyed the stay!

name: Luxe appartement scheepvaartkwartier Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay. Quiet street yet close to everything. Would def stay here again!

name: Luxe appartement scheepvaartkwartier Rotterdam
comments: The appartment was really nice, in a quiet street but near the city center. Desiree and Marloes were very friendly and accommodating for the check-in. I recommend!

name: Luxe appartement scheepvaartkwartier Rotterdam
comments:
We got to meet both Desiree & Marloes, they were superfriendly and helpful! Don’t hesitate to book with them.
Their place is just like in the pictures & we felt immediately at home! Our dog felt welcome too!
With a bit of luck you can find on-street parking space right outside your frontdoor.
If ever in Rotterdam again, definitely go-to place! Thanks for everything!

name: Studio M’Adam III
comments:
Our recent stay at this three-bedroom apartment was a true delight. The sleek, modern design captivated us from the moment we walked in. Each room exuded sophistication, with stylish furnishings and ample natural light.
The living area was perfect for socializing, while the kitchen boasted top-of-the-line appliances for effortless meal preparation. The bedrooms were havens of comfort, with plush bedding ensuring a restful night's sleep.
Conveniently located, the apartment offered easy access to shops and restaurants, making exploration a breeze. The host's hospitality was exceptional, adding an extra layer of enjoyment to our stay.
In summary, our time at this three-bedroom apartment was a perfect blend of luxury and convenience. We look forward to returning for another memorable stay.

name: Studio M’Adam III
comments: Lovely home, beautiful street and location.

name: Studio M’Adam III
comments: The apartment was clean, tidy, and well-equipped — overall a pleasant stay. The space is nicely arranged and feels comfortable. A few things to note: the stairs are very steep and narrow — not an issue for us, but might be for those with mobility concerns. Soundproofing is poor; on our first two mornings, loud noises started around 5:30 a.m. from the neighbor or the roof , like a pet scratching the floor. The bed sheet felt worn with noticeable pilling, which made it less comfortable. The single bathroom was a bit inconvenient for our group of five. Also, the sink was clogged when we arrived. The host said someone would come the next afternoon to fix it, but no one came and we weren’t updated. Since our stay was short, we didn’t follow up. Still, a nice apartment overall with room for improvement in details and communication.

name: Boat-hotel boot 6, Rotterdam city center
comments:
Heel leuk verblijf!
Snelle reacties op de vragen. Leuke omgeving, ruimte was leuk ingericht en genoeg plaats voor iedereen.
Grote badkamer, 2 toiletten en genoeg privacy.
Top accommodatie!
Volop genoten en Rotterdam is hele leuke stad !

name: Boat-hotel boot 6, Rotterdam city center
comments: Lovely boat. Bigger than expected. Host was lovely and very helpful with our late check in and responsive to questions. The boat was well equipped although a corkscrew would have been useful (there may have been one but we couldn’t find it).  The boat did list to one side and walking around the boat was interesting! Getting onto the boat was a little precarious as the gangway was a bit rickety but after a few glasses of wine we didn’t notice so much. The stairs into the boat are steep and not suited for anyone with mobility issues. Despite this we had a great stay in Rotterdam. The location of the boat close to the tram and metro meant getting around was very easy.

name: Boat-hotel Wilhelmina, Rotterdam city center
comments:
Excellent stay! It was our first experience on a boat and we were pleasantly surprised by how comfortable and convenient it was.
The space is remarkably well-designed, with plenty of natural light throughout. The spacious living room was perfect for meals and relaxation.
The location was very practical, making it easy to get around.
A unique and bright experience that we highly recommend!
Thanks Casper.

name: Boat-hotel Wilhelmina, Rotterdam city center
comments:
We had a wonderful stay on the boat. We had 3 generations staying together for a wedding in the area. Staying in the harbor made it easy for everyone to participate.
Also the boat is an Easy walk from the train station and a grocery store is across the street!!

name: Designers’ family home with large garden
comments: Martijn was a very helpful and friendly host in terms of communication, attentive. The accomodation was also clean and feels homely during our stay, quiet negbourhood. on a personal point of view I would like to stay there again  next visit.

name: Amazing townhouse
comments:
The place is exactly as advertised. The host was very friendly and helpful. All possible questions were answered in a timely manner. The apartment was clean and for someone with allergies, we didn’t have any extra problems with dust.
There is a supermarket, coffeeshops, train stop etc about 2 streets down; all a very walkable distance. Unfortunately no parking possibilities outside the apartment should you travel by car so budget an extra €35+/- for 24hrs but Michiel gave us options for free parking which are 30mins.+/- by train to the apartment.
All in all, beautiful peaceful place and would definitely recommend.

name: Amazing townhouse
comments:
Sweet lovely modern property/looks like pics and convenient location. Everything can be locally sourced including supermarkets, restaurants and shops. Transport to go to the central is only 5mins away from the house.
I would advise that you bring insect repellent/bug spray as we did notice a few creepy crawlies during our stay. Keep the garden door close and you should be ok. Also, for the girlies I would advise bringing mirrors/portable lights as lighting was very dim and mirrors are limited!
Host was friendly and helpful but selective with replies. Overall, a positive stay!

name: Amazing townhouse
comments:
Generally, we were happy with the accommodation as it was as described and depicted in the pictures. However, we were not happy with the general cleanliness and condition of the place. There was a lot of dust and the floors as well as the bathroom were not well cleaned. There were hairs laying around everywhere. Also we noticed that other things were not well maintained. The lights in one of the bed rooms were not working. During the stay we also noticed that there are loose tiles in the bathroom, one of the chairs in the living room was about to break apart and the sink in the small toilet was dripping the entire time. These things should be fixed and the place could really be cleaned better, especially for this price.
Very great was the communication with and the flexibility of the host. We were offered self-checkin as we were not able to be there on time. The location of the accommodation is very quiet and good reachable with public transport. Parking options are available nearby.

name: Beautiful city studio!
comments:
Check-in was straightforward, but that’s where the positives ended. On arrival the flat was dirty—trash still in bins, used linens on the beds, used towels on floor etc. The host offered another unit in the same condition (+with broken lock), then told me to stay at a nearby hotel and promised to reimburse the cost - unfortunately he did not live up to this promise.
After the apartment was cleaned it was still run-down: no soap or shampoo, broken coffee machines, no Wi-Fi details, and noise at night made sleep difficult. The host never responded to my messages, leaving Airbnb Support to step in. I’ve received only a partial refund and am still out the hotel expense. Overall, a disappointing, stressful stay that fell far below Airbnb standards.

name: Stylish apartment @ city centre
comments: We absolutely loved our stay at Sanne's place.. she was super flexible with our booking and changes throughout our stay. The space is very comfortable for a smaller apartment, and has high quality furnishings and finishes. The afternoon sun and view from the lounge is really beautiful and the location is so central that I don't think one can do better to be local to everything in town.

name: Stylish apartment @ city centre
comments: Very convenient flat with balcony in a great central location  5 mins from a metro station and tram stop, overlooking lively square full of trees and cafes. Sanne is very communicative , is on the spot and was round in a few minutes to sort out a problem.  The flat is very well provided with all the  basic things you need and the kitchen is well equipped. Highly recommend. Thank you Sanne !

name: Room 15min by metro from center!
comments: The room was comfortable and pretty. Friendly hosts and close by feet to the transports to go to Rotterdam. Easy to park in the street. I would recommend 👍

name: Space Room + Great Location 4P.
comments:
good location on the main street if you want bars and restaurants. bit noisy at night but to be expected given the area.
beds were comfortable.
space pod was very cool and futuristic.
felt safe and comfortable
close to a supermarket which is across the road.

name: Space Room + Great Location 4P.
comments:
First of all the host was very very friendly and reponsive
We checked in 2 hours before the check in
The stair to get into the space room arent the best specially when you have luggages with you
The room is not big but not small as in the photos but you can notice that it wasnt cleaned very well 2 space beds 2 normal beds windows that can view everything inside the room from the street and its not safe for children
There also was no AC and no fridge
But other than that there was shampoo and stuff like this so you wont need to buy
Location is great in a main street good neighbirhood a bit noisy at night and you might face homeless people asking for money but very good night life and restaurants nearby and close to a lot kf attractions

name: Space Room + Great Location 4P.
comments: The place was reasonably affordable for a one night stay in Rotterdam with a group of 4 friends. However, we were unaware that this was a hostel. Sinbad was very nice, but the building is clearly dated and could use some repairs. Also, it’s located on a very busy street with a ridiculous amount of noise at night.

name: Space Room + Great Location 4P.
comments:
The place was clean but very noisy. You are in the Main Street of Rotter so if you’re considering sleeping: maybe do not book this room on a weekend.
Otherwise the experience was great!
Thank you

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
