comments: Small but comfortable place that's very walkable. It's right on the street so wear earplugs if you're a light sleeper, but I didn't need them. Efficient kitchen set-up and good place to use as a home base to explore Rotterdam

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Nice small studio room, surrounded by beautiful view and easy check in.
Ideal for a couple.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments: The place is quite nice and clean! The communication with Metin was flawless. Luckily I am a heavy sleeper, otherwise i would have woken up by the construction work or by the tram and street noise.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Check-in and check-out was easy and quick, communication as well.
Location was good, directly on the street so you can hear the traffic and people walking by at night. Close to typical tourist attractions.
It was quite warm inside the apartment but we had air-conditioning to cool down. we found d the bathroom a bit small, especially the sink but totally ok for a stay of a couple of days.
Overall, I would recommend!

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments: A clean private spot that is tucked away but within walking distance of very active Rotterdam streets and restaurants. I enjoyed my stay and I would stay again in the future. The host responded to me in an appropriate fashion. A good place for one or two people.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments: The apartment was clean and in a convenient location. The tram stop is in front of the door, which makes it good for connecting to the city center but a bit noisy as the external “wall” is a glass window. Additional noise was coming from the exposed water pipes in the ceiling when water was going through.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments: Easy to reach location, apartment as described, small but with all necessary. Bathroom clean and amenity disposable. Kitchen clean too with the necessary for a simple food.  Cons: the noise from the street (few car, but the tram), the sound of water from the exposed pipes on the ceiling. Good communication and ready to solve any request. Thank you. Will come back

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Would highly recommend it!
This was a perfect stay for my partner and I for a long weekend in Rotterdam. Relativly central which allowed us the opportunity to explore the city and the outskirts of this beautiful country. The Room does open directly to the street, but it's very quiet. The check-in was smooth, Arriving to Rotterdam early we were able to leave our bags at their office, and the same for when we checked out - Thank you for having us!

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Overall, a great place for a short stay. Very detailed, clear check-in instructions, and the place was clean and comfortable. However, it was a little strange that the wall facing the street was made of glass, which made it not very cozy (see pictures). Additionally, the sound isolation was poor, and there were running water sounds from other apartments when people were showering or flushing the toilet, which was disturbing at night. Despite this, since it is on a quiet street, nighttime noise from outside was not an issue.
Overall, the experience was good and I would recommend it for a short stay.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Great location next to the Erasmus bridge. The studio is perfect to spend some days in the city. I had to get used to the fact it is located at ground floor, however thanks to milk glass privacy is ensured anythime while still letting in lots of daylight which makes the studio very brigth.
Communication with Metin was very easy, he is responsive and even gives proactive information and instructions.
I can recommend the place for people who love to stay in the city center.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
Overall, we had a pleasant experience. The location is fantastic, with a tram stop and the Erasmus bridge very close by. Rotterdam Centraal is even within walking distance if you're without luggage. The apartment itself has everything that two people would require for a comfortable stay.
However, we did encounter a few issues. During our stay, the weather was quite hot (sometimes over 30 degrees Celsius), and unfortunately, the AC didn't work well. While cooling at the front, it seemed to produce more heat in the back. Additionally, the only window that could have been opened was broken, which we weren't informed about beforehand. When we tried to contact Metin about it, we received no response and had to ask at the office to get the information. This made the apartment hot and stuffy, and we had to keep the door open at times, which opens directly onto the street, making it somewhat inconvenient.
Despite these issues, Metin's place is quite nice and practical for two people.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments:
It's a nice apartment, well located. As some comments say, there are indeed often noises of running water, etc, but this wasn't a problem for us. I'd recommend it. We have no main negative comments, the pics were accurate. We left 2 bottle of wines for the house as a way to thanks the staff.
Unexpected rules (such as "guest" prohibition) were sent a day before check-in, which was somehow disagreeable. By the way, the air conditioner really heat the apartment instead of cool it down, as said by other at the comment section.
In general, overall, we recommend it.

name: Studio14A in chique wijk
comments: The place is tidy and has everything you need for a short term stay. Curtains can be drawn for privacy. There is a big gap above the door, so expect cold nights in the Winter/Fall, radiators and an AC help.

name: Mooie studio 14B  +-30m2 bij Erasmusbr.
comments:
Metin’s place was perfect for our overnight trip. The location was amazing, next to the Erasmus bridge and easy walk to Markthal. Close to tram stop and metro station!
Because it is next to the tram, it is noisy (also being on the ground floor and the door opens onto the street), which is something to keep in mind for light sleepers. Bring earplugs!
Overall I recommend this studio!

name: Mooie studio 14B  +-30m2 bij Erasmusbr.
comments: The studio is well located in Rotterdam, it is clean and the street is very quiet. I recommend staying in this place, especially if it is your first time in the city.

name: Mooie studio 14B  +-30m2 bij Erasmusbr.
comments:
Simple space, okay to spent a night or two. Noisy, cause of bad isolation and entrance right onto the street. Bring earplugs if that bothers you. Location is quite convenient - waterbus to Kinderdijk around the corner, walkable to museums and city center, tram across the street.
So overall it's worth the price if you're looking for something basic to spent a few nights.

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments: I visit Rotterdam every year around late-January to early-February for the International Film Festival Rotterdam. Vyash's place is located in one of the dream buildings facing the canal on the back side of Central Station. It is a very clean, neat, and very thoughtfully decorated flat with a toilet, a bath, an open kitchen, and a bedroom. The flat has very large windows. My room faces a very quiet street in this quaint and comfortable neighbourhood, and I could catch a glimpse of the canal as well. All the amenities are new, including kitchenware, heating/air-conditioning,  the fridge, and furniture. The flat is very comfortable. With the brand-new thermostat, the heating kept the room at a perfect temperature. It is right behind the train station and is about 5-minute walk from de Doelen theatre, and about 15–20-minute walk to other festival venues (Cinerama; Kino). Taking the metro and the tram are also very convenient from there. I highly recommend this place to everyone.

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments: Everyone was very helpful and we could leave our luggage there after check out as our train only left in the evening. The location is fantastic, just at the back of the station but far enough to avoid the crowds and the noise. From here it is easy to get around on foot in the centre with cafes and bars and restaurants close by. The appartment is quite small but nicely done.

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments:
Very nice and clean apartment, quite well-located (right next to the train station). It's quiet here. The hostess is the most positive, friendly, and helpful one. But there were some unpleasant moments, too.
1. The same key for the apartment and the front door, which means no safety, as everyone in the building has this key...
2. The bed is too soft, it's right next to the window, and it blows from there (November outside). My wife couldn't sleep on it, so she arranged herself on the sofa, which was a bit better.
3. The automatic light in the bathroom and toilet is a real trap. It switches off when you're in, and you need to open the toilet / shower door to lit it up again. A simple movement doesn't help.
4. It may be hard to open the bathroom door after a shower. One shouldn't close it tightly.
5. There is no space in the apartment. And it's more like a studio with a separete bed, not one-bedroom...
Overall, our stay was fine, but the place is a bit odd...

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments: 100% book this place. I cannot recommend it enough. It's in the heart of Rotterdam, the view from the apartment is gorgeous, and you can get to a bus or train in minutes. It's so cozy and lovely and has all of the amenities that you could need. It was truly a highlight of my visit to Niderlands and the host is so so kind. Absolutely nothing negative to say about it. I am thrilled to have had the opportunity to stay here .

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments: The apartment is just like on the pictures. You will find there everything you need for a short (and even longer) stay. Renoeska is an excellent host - helpful and friendly. The apartement is perfectly located if you intend to travel - very close to the central railway station. There are some quirks, such as automatic (timer) on/off switching of bathroom lights, but it is easy to get used to it. One important note - the stairs leading up to the apartment (to the second floor) are steep and may cause trouble for the elderly and children. Highly recommended! I'll definitely be back here.

name: App nr.5-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen
comments: We had a good stay after initial miscommunication/unresponsive communication and apt not ready at check in time. The place is airy and bright and had all amenities.

name: App nr.6-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
Overall great experience. It is close to Rotterdam Centraal Station, and close to businesses, such as stores and restaurants. It's on a peaceful street and has beautiful surroundings. The hosts were friendly, helpful and responsive. If you have mobility issues, the stairs may be a problem, however the hosts lists pictures of the stairs in the description so it shouldn't be a surprise. Access to a washer and dryer was also beneficial for a longer stay. Although, these were quite busy, and seemed easier to use them at night or early in the morning.
There is a kitchen with stove top and fridge, and pots, dishes, etc.
On the hot days, the apartment did get rather hot, even with the fans provided.
Overall, our stay was a positive experience and we would stay there again.

name: App nr.6-1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Location was perfect, right next to the main station where you can get trams, trains and buses. Hosts are amazing at communication and apartment was clean. General hallway noise and upstairs neighbour noise but nothing disruptive. Price is extremely fair and this is definitely worth a stay

name: Old School-New Home
comments: Verwacht je aan een zeer mooie gerenoveerde woning in een oud schoolgebouw. Echt prachtig! De renovatie gebeurde met zeer kwalitatieve materialen en de woning werd met smaak ingericht. We hebben er echt met open ogen (en een tikkeltje jaloezie) naar gekeken. Echt héél mooi! Volgens mij is de woning perfect voor een klein gezin of koppels die elkaar goed kennen. Er zijn in het slaapgedeelte en de badkamer weinig deuren waardoor de privacy wat moeilijker is. De 2 dubbele bedden (1 opblaasbed) staan samen in één ruimte. Er zijn wel nog 2 aparte kamers, maar daar zijn de bedden minder ruim en niet echt geschikt voor een koppel. Aangezien er verschillende woningen in het oude schoolgebouw ondergebracht zijn, is het logisch dat er 's nachts gelet wordt op nachtlawaai. De woning is een eindje buiten het centrum, maar wie graag stapt (zoals wij) is er binnen een 40-tal minuutjes. Het openbaar vervoer is vlakbij voor wie de wandelschoenen vergeten is. Wij raden de woning zeker aan!

name: Old School-New Home
comments: Close to public transport but a quiet spot. The house was full of light, clean & spacious. Only trick is the top floor master bedroom & ensuite have no private doors, so sharing with others can be tricky. The space is well designed & beautiful.

name: Gezellig stadsappartement met tuin en kantoor.
comments: Nice place ! I recommend this place! U have privacy and the house is beautiful

name: Gezellig stadsappartement met tuin en kantoor.
comments: Die Wohnung ist sehr schön und liegt in einer ruhigen Umgebung. Jaqueline war eine super nette Gastgeberin. Ich habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt. Der schöne Garten ist ein absolutes Highlight. Auch die Lage ist prima und die wichtigsten Geschäfte sind zu Fuss sehr gut erreichbar. Sollte ich wieder nach Rotterdam reisen, würde ich auf jeden Fall wieder diese Unterkunft wählen. Ich kann Jaqueline‘s Wohnung wärmstens weiterempfehlen.

name: Designer Home with Garden - Walk to City Center
comments: We stayed here for four days and very much enjoyed the house.  It's easy to get to via the tram that stops a 2 minute walk away and is only a 20 minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal so is a perfect place to stay for exploring the city without the noise of the city centre.  The bedrooms were immaculate in their presentation and the beds incredibly comfortable to sleep in.  The bathroom features a deep bath which after a long day of walking around was perfect to relax in.  Overall its a brilliant house to stay in and would highly recommend it to other travellers to the city.

name: Studio 10-Beautiful Studio in the Centre Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is in a great location near the train station. It was very clean and the hosts provided coffee pods, water bottles, hairdryer, shampoo/body wash, etc. Everything else worked as expected. But some things could be improved - the single blanket was too thin, and the bed sagged in the middle because there were two single beds underneath. The noise insulation in the building is quite poor, so you can hear everything from the neighboring suites. Overall, it was a decent stay, but I'd suggest bringing ear plugs, especially for light sleepers.

name: Central, cosy &  luminous place
comments: She is a great host and her place is beautiful with a lot of light. 20 min walking distance to Rotterdam central. Definitely would recommend this place.

name: Central, cosy &  luminous place
comments: Lovely place, lovely person! We wish we could have stayed longer! Adriane was super welcoming and as was her bright, modern apartment, which made us feel right at home. Thanks Adriane! We'll be back :)

name: 3 rooms on an entire private floor next to Ahoy
comments: My sister and I loved staying here !! The place feels so homie, was very clean and had a balcony with a nice view of the sunset. Their cat Louis was actually adorable so friendly and loves a good cuddle :)

name: Comfortable apartment in Trendy Katendrecht
comments: Our arrival was perfect. We were introduced to rules and to the apartament. Hosts also prepared a list of recommendations. From the first moment we were amazed by the stylish furniture and cozy feeling. Upstairs bedrooms were clean and comfortable, we could perfectly rest after busy days. Kitchen downstairs was stocked with cuttlery and tools. Separated by wall, dining room, gave a little bit privacy. Living room with couch, tv full of streaming services, lot of books and a piano made a perfect place to talk in the late evenings. We could really enjoy our stay in Rotterdam.

name: Flat - Rotterdam
comments: Kind host, great location for public transport. Curtains were too thin, but maybe we did not see the rolling shutter. Quiet neighbourhood with peaceful parks.

name: Flat - Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment is nice, the host was fine. There were objective problems of particularly hot days and it was not possible to stay in the apartment . Ed the landlord try help and sent us a portable air conditioner based on Ices which did not help. Because of the difficult stay we asked to cancel the deal and look for a place where we could be with the children and sleep well at nights - he did not agree in any way.
In addition, I would not recommend coming to the apartment if you want to cook your own food. The kitchen is very crowded, requires maintenance and is uncomfortable. Cooking utensils and appliances are missing.
There are very few electrical outlets in the apartment, so for example there was a hair dryer but no outlet that could be used near any mirror. I do not recommend arriving with a car - there is no possibility to park on the street and pay with an international credit card or in cash.
The communication with Michael was not fast, and it takes time to reply.

name: Flat - Rotterdam
comments:
Location: The apartment is conveniently located a few minutes walk from Rotterdam central station and there are many restaurants in the area.
Apartment: The living room is spacious and well lit. The bedroom is also a good size with large windows and plenty of storage space. The bathroom is quite large as well. The kitchen is small but functional. All needed amenities were provided.

name: Flat - Rotterdam
comments: This apartment has a great location,  very near the central station and metro. The neighborhood is surprisingly quiet - it's near a big street, but we never heard any traffic noise. The living spaces are comfortable, though there are a couple of minor maintenance needs at floor level, particularly in the kitchen. One note: there is no elevator/lift, and there are several flights of typical Dutch stairs, which we found to be VERY steep. This made getting our full size luggage into and out of the apartment quite challenging (it wouldn't be so bad with carry-on bags).

name: Cool and cozy sun-lit apartment
comments: My stay in Roos' flat was very homely. The flat is spacious, clean, bright and very welcoming. I immediately felt at home. The area is beautiful. The apartment is situated in a quiet, sunny location, away from the main road yet only a few minutes' walk from the tram station, the beautiful park and all the cool restaurants and cafes. The communication with Roos was very uncomplicated, easy, caring and pleasant. I had a good time! Thank you Roos.

name: Cool and cozy sun-lit apartment
comments: For me, as a spanish resident, this apartment was a great chance to feel the magic atmosphere of Netherland's home. Big kitchen where I loved to cook breakfast, cute little garden on the balcony and bright and spacious living room wide windows. Me gusta!

name: Cool and cozy sun-lit apartment
comments:
Roos is a great host! I could check-in a bit earlier and check-out later than the times listed and that really helped with my flights being really early and late respectively.
Unfortunately, the hot water didn’t work on the second day of my three-night stay (which can always happen, that’s not something any host can predict or avoid), but Roos made sure to give me helpful instructions on how it may be fixable and offered to take care of it if that didn’t work.
Any questions I had were answered super quickly and I got a great description of how to find the place, about the house rules, what to see in the surrounding area and where to find great food.
The location of the place is also really good as it is in walking distance to the trams and busses, and if you don’t mind a bit of a longer walk, you can even walk to the main station by foot.

name: Spacious art room with bay window
comments:
There are trams and buses around the place. Don't forget to buy and charge the OV chipcard at the central station. It is cheap to use this card when you use transportation in Rotterdam. It is only 5 stops away from the central station to get here.
You can avoid the big crowd of the city centre.
It is my first visit to Netherlands and I was a bit nervous but Kseniia is very nice and quick to answer questions. The room is spacious and bright with a very big window.
Thank you again for your kind care, Kseniia!

name: Spacious art room with bay window
comments: Kseniia was a great host as she was always helpful and welcoming. The room I lived in was clean as well as the kitchen and bathroom. I felt private and comfortable - the house stands in a tranquil street.

name: Studio Witte de Withstraat R'dam
comments:
An excellent apartment for a single person or a couple. Not more. Located in the center of Rotterdam close to public transportation, restaurants and museum.
The apartment is well appointed.
The owner responded quickly to all requests.
Two items to consider when renting this place. 1. The very very narrow staircase to get to the second floor. Nobody with the slightest ambulatory issue and/or with large suitcase should rent
2. The nightly noise from the busy cross street. If you are a light sleeper, make sure you bring earplug because the neighbourhood is lively until 3 AM.

name: Studio Witte de Withstraat R'dam
comments: Cleaning and noise insulation should be improve

name: Studio Witte de Withstraat R'dam
comments:
Communication with the host was great, very prompt and friendly. Location is excellent, although the reviews below mentioning the noise are accurate. I recommend you bring earplugs.
The staircases to the flat are very steep and narrow, and would be difficult for a person with mobility issues. I was okay getting up them with carry on luggage, but would be hard for a shorter person with a big suitcase.
Wifi connection was not always reliable. Would be fine for leisure on your phone, but caused some difficulty when needing to work on a laptop.
Flat has all you need for a short stay, but the problem was cleanliness. It wasn't terrible, but surfaces were dusty, the floor hadn't been carefully cleaned, and the shower needs a good scrub as some red stain is left on the tile grout in the corners. Toilet had clearly not been scrubbed as it was obvious from residue that toilet cleaner had just been poured and flushed. Improvement would make a huge difference in quality of stay.

name: Studio Witte de Withstraat R'dam
comments:
The location and communication is great.
Budget friendly.
Radiator needs to be fixed as it makes noise in the night.
Shower was not cleaned.

name: Comfortabele kamer, rand centrum
comments: Nice neighbourhood, quiet with easy distances to cafes/restaurants. Having a bike or renting one is the best for rotterdam. Lovely house, the bedroom is confortable, with nice big windows, shared bathroom next door. I recommend Lynn’s place, she was very responsive and helpful

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments:
My friends & I were so honoured to be the first guests at Margriet’s place. Her beautiful 4-floor apartment has the perfect space for a group of 6, with a spacious living & dining area, 3 bedrooms & a cosy outdoor patio. We enjoyed spending our evenings together in the living room (on the extremely comfy sofa) but still had sufficient privacy when heading to our individual bedrooms at the end of the night.
Margriet was also really helpful in helping us apply for a parking permit in advance (at additional cost) as we had rented a van that wouldn’t fit in the usual parking spot.
Our entire experience went well, from booking to checking in, our 3 night stay & checking out. We’d definitely recommend Margriet’s place!

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments: We had a great time at Margriet's place. The communication was super easy and quick. Great view. Very easy to get around with public transportation and walking distance to restaurants. The place is great, very clean and has everything you need. Margriet was also very helpful since the beginning, available at all times whenever I had any questions. Totally recommend it.

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments: Stayed at Margriet’s apartment with a group of friends for a weekend break. The place is lovely and has big windows with amazing view of the canal. Kitchen is well equipped with enough glasses, plates, oil  etc for a group of six. The bottle of wine was a nice touch and enjoyed by all. Our only (very small) criticism was that the two single  beds in top floor bedroom are a bit small and uncomfortable for adults, although they would be fine for kids. Some more, and slightly larger, pillows also would have been nice. We had an amazing time though and hope to back again 😊

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments:
Peaceful with good views. Spacious for 6.
Comfortable sleep.
Note one bathroom, second toilet.
Metro 7’ walk.
Some restaurants and supermarket (jumbo) not far.

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments: This apartment was so lovely! We were excited to wake up every day to the beautiful view of the canal. Margriet was available when we arrived in Rotterdam and let us meet her (and sweet Teddy) early, drop off our bags, and use the restroom before check-in time. She recommended a nice place for drinks and snacks, so we walked the neighborhood and came back around 4:30. The home had just been cleaned and was so inviting. Margaret even left a bottle of champagne in the refrigerator to celebrate our daughter’s graduation from uni. The location is wonderful and close to a large grocery store. We had never seen the old part of Rotterdam. You will love it here!

name: Moderne woning aan de haven
comments:
Great place, very clean and modern, fully equipped with everything needed, very nice view, calm and nice neighborhood.
Margriet was very responsive and nice.

name: Budget Double Room
comments: Unfortunately it was quite hot in Rotterdam and the hotel didn't have a fan or working air conditioning. We also woke up numerous times due to lots of noise until 4am which was a bit disappointing.

name: Budget Double Room
comments: The location is perfect and accessible to everywhere, but the room didn’t meet our expectations. First, the A/C didn’t work, and the room was too hot all day. The floor is dirty with some stains, and the room was not isolated from noises. I woke up in the morning to the sound of a vacuum in the corridor. Additionally, the room was not as big as shown in the photos.

name: Budget Double Room
comments: the overall experience is not good. As our flight got cancelled, I have contacted the host to let her know and would like to know is there anything we can do. but turn out there was neither response nor awareness of our situation. Also, the air conditioning was not working and it was like sauna inside the room. We could only use the fan at last.

name: Budget Double Room
comments: Perfect little base to explore Rotterdam, the room had a huge open window which was lovely and was exactly as described. The coffee was excellent, secure bicycle storage, friendly staff. Would 100% stay here again.

name: Budget Double Room
comments: Room was fine and though small was what we expected for the money. Bathroom was spacious and everything was clean. Very friendly staff. Similar to other reviewers we did have problems with the air con and with mosquitos. This could very easily be fixed with mesh over the windows and filters changed on air con! Take bug spray!!

name: Twin Room
comments:
Very small room with a dubble bed.
If you open the door of the bathroom you could not open the door of the wardrobe,... The table and the fixed chair were difficult to sit with. They were suitable just for the size of the children.
Very expensive half-open garage underground which cost 20 euro per night (we paid 40 euro för two nights). It was much more expensive than the parkingautomat outside if you want to leave and park your car for a short time on the street . 20 euro is not logic as we had already paid a lot for booking of this uncomfortable room. We must have got the parking charge free or had paid a low amount of money. Very tight and narrow enterence to manage to drive in and out. Created us a lot of inconvenience.

Very expensive breakfast - 16 euro. Wasn't worth that money.
No good communication before starting ahead to Rotterdam. I put some questions to the landlord many times but never got any answer.

name: 4-Person Room
comments: Staying at this Airbnb was an absolute delight! From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed and at ease. The location is prime - close to local attractions yet tucked away enough to offer peace and quiet. The decor is tasteful and the amenities ensured a comfortable stay. The host went above and beyond, offering local tips and ensuring our needs were met. It truly felt like a home away from home. I would highly recommend this place to anyone seeking an authentic and pleasant stay. A gem!

name: 6-Person Room
comments: It was okay for the Price, Location Great! The Windows in the rooms are very small and only Open very narrowly

name: 6-Person Room
comments: When we checked in, the room was not cleaned, which was disappointing. The house is open space on the fourth floor, but there is no door to the third floor, you need to worry about security and privacy. I will not recommend this place to friends

name: 6-Person Room
comments:
We booked it very last minute, so it was great that they had it ready on the spot.
It’s all one big room with only one bathroom (which was a downside for us), but overall identical to the pictures.
There were also very few outlets to charge our devices.
Other than that, the place was clean, the towels and bed sheets were good. The room also has a very nice view and it was very close to Rotterdam’s central train station.

name: 6-Person Room
comments: It was unbearably hot inside the room on the 8th floor  and the AC didn't cool. It wasn't that hot of a day. We eventually opened windows and used fans, but stayed sweating like a sauna. Apart from that, fine.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: Sehr nette, sehr freundliche und offene Vermieter. Sehr sauberes Haus mit zwei getrennten Schlafzimmern und einem großen offenen Wohn- und Küchenbereich. Das Haus ist zweistöckig. Die Treppe nach oben steil. Es war warm und gemütlich. Die Tram ist in fünf Minuten zu Fuß zu erreichen. In einer guten halben Stunde ist man vom Haus aus in der Stadtmitte. Ein Highlight: Das Wohnzimmer grenzt ans Wasser. Enten und ab und zu ein paar stille Ruderer kommen vorbei. Beim Nachbarn wohnt ein Fischreiher, den wir gerne beobachtet haben. Wer kochen möchte: Das geht wunderbar, Gewürze und Essig sollte man mitbringen. Öl war vorhanden. Toll auch: ein Gefrierschrank.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: Great apartment with a stunning view on the river! Highly recommended

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments:
First of all, the houseboat is one of the best AirBnbs we have stayed in.
The boat is located in a canal of Rotterdam, which is nice in itself, as we were visited by ducks and swans every morning. We also followed Kristel's suggestion and enjoyed swimming in the canal. The houseboat also has a very nice interior and more than enough space for a family (2 adults, 2 children).
The location is also perfect in a side street with free parking. Also, the boat is close to public transportation (which takes you to the city center in about 15 minutes) and some great restaurants are nearby. We really enjoyed our 2 days in Rotterdam.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: We had a great weekend in the Houseboat.  A fantastic space with a lovely view over the water.  Tram and train options are very close and make it easy to get into the centre.  Kristel was very friendly and helpful.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments:
We had a great time in this dreamy house boat. The view on the canal from outside of the living room is magical, with water lilies, lots of birds and swans visiting every day. The house itself is clean and stylish - just like the pictures indicate. With comfy beds - and btw good water pressure (contrary to what a previous review said). Very private (apart from the boats passing by haha). A tranquil retreat inside of a busy city. Tram and grocery shops in walking distance.
There are, in fact, a few busy roads nearby and that comes with noise - which didn’t bother us and you don’t hear with closed windows at all.
Kristel and Frans gave us a warm welcome and communicated well. A great Airbnb experience throughout.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: A gorgeous place by the water!  Beautiful and comfortable, right in the canal. There's a lot of light coming and you get to watch the wildlife on the canal.  The inside is comfortable, well-designed, and beautiful. The kitchen has everything you need, and if you want to eat out there's lots of good food in walking distance, plus a grocery store a few minutes away. Kristel and Frans were the best hosts, and we felt super welcome and at home. Kristel lend us her paddle boards and we went out every day, exploring the city right from our front door.  If you need to work, there's a big table that I used as a desk, looking out at the water.  This was amazing and I highly recommend staying!

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: We loved Kristel's houseboat. It was spacious, light and airy, comfortable and well equipped. It was very relaxing after a day's sightseeing to sit on the canal and watch the wildlife. The public transport connections were close by - 5 minutes train to Rotterdam Centraal, 15 minutes on the tram into the city centre. And a handy Lidl supermarket on the corner. Kristel and Frans were very friendly and welcoming. We had a brilliant week.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: The houseboat is lovely. The views on to the waterway are completely unique - it was wonderful to sit and watch the swans, ducks, moorhens, geese, grebes and herons.

name: Unieke woonark met privétuin en free parking.
comments: Uns hat der Aufenthalt auf dem Hausboot sehr gut gefallen und wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Beschreibung und die Realität stimmen überein. Durch die Nähe zu den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln, kann man schnell zu den Highlights in Rotterdam gelangen und auch die Städte in der Umgebung leicht erreichen. Die Straße ist leider etwas zu höhren, aber da helfen auf alle Fälle Ohropax (bei Städteurlaub immer zu empfehlen).

name: Studio 8-Beautiful Studio in the Centre Rotterdam.
comments: Small, but perfectly formed!  Lovely studio apartment that fit our needs during the NSJF perfectly.  Excellent communication from our hosts, great central location (with an en suite canal and lots of interesting avian neighbours) and all the facilities we needed.  Up three flights of fairly steep stairs, but if you’re ok with that, this is a great little crashpad - thanks!

name: Studio 8-Beautiful Studio in the Centre Rotterdam.
comments:
Nice aparthotel very close to Centraal Station.
Perfect basic base for your Rotterdam trip.
Just be aware that there are 3 flights of Dutch stairs to get to the studio.

name: Studio 8-Beautiful Studio in the Centre Rotterdam.
comments: Very good location, just a few steps away from Rotterdam Central Station. Also the room is quite spacious, the lighting and the view outside the window are also nice. But please note that there is no elevator and the stairs are a bit steep, thus climbing up to the top floor with large luggages will be tiring.

name: Studio 8-Beautiful Studio in the Centre Rotterdam.
comments:
It is a very beautiful airbnb. Everything is super modern and clean. Also the location is amazing. The only problem was that the light in the toilet room didn’t work and the shower head was a bit broken. But nothing huge.
I would book it again :)

name: Studio 9 -Beautiful studio in the Centre Rotterdam
comments:
Good side: Very near to the Central station, within 10 mins walk to two supermarkets, about 20 minutes to city central. Very good bathroom. Helpful host.
Bad side: On the top floor, very very very hot in the afternoon and evening. The fan was very very noise but no wind (did not function well). Absolutely not for the one have big or heavy baggages.
Suitable for short stay or need to take early train only.

name: Studio 9 -Beautiful studio in the Centre Rotterdam
comments:
During my recent stay with Airbnb, I encountered a minor setback that impacted my overall experience. While the accommodation itself was charming and well-appointed, the bed provided did not meet the expected standard of comfort.
The mattress appeared to be worn out, leading to noticeable sagging and uneven support. This, coupled with pillows that lacked plumpness and linens that felt slightly rough, made it challenging to achieve a truly restful night's sleep.

name: Studio 9 -Beautiful studio in the Centre Rotterdam
comments: Space was a great size for 2 people, very clean and less than a 5 minute walk to Rotterdam Centraal. However, the bathroom was quite small and there are 3 flights of very narrow stairs with no elevator.

name: Studio 9 -Beautiful studio in the Centre Rotterdam
comments: The location could not be better, less than five minutes walk from the main central station in Rotterdam. The studio is comfortable for a family of two adults and one kid. We stayed there during winter time and it was very warm. You can control the heating system that can reach 29C. The flat is fully equipped with  a kitchen with all utensils so great you can cook your meals there, hair dryer, iron board and Netflix. The only ‘no’ for me (personal view) is the mattress; very soft and not so comfortable. Apart from it we had a great stay.

name: Historic city center apartment
comments: Marc’s place was in a really lovely part of Rotterdam- super easy to explore the city and all the necessities close by. Marc was very welcoming on arrival, check in and out was very smooth! If anything I would say the place looks nicer then the photos; very spacious, high ceilings and lots of natural light! We had a great time and would definitely recommend! Thanks Marc!

name: Bright apartment in the hart of Rotterdam
comments: The flat was big and bright and had a massive comfy bed. It was close to great food and bar areas, especially Kunst. F was a great host and made us feel very welcome.

name: Cozy Family apartment by Delfshaven
comments:
Gali & Yaniv’s family home is an ideal apartment for a solo traveller or a small family with everything available to make a comfortable stay.
Located within the heart of Rotterdam West, the apartment is located in an immersive and beautifully diverse community.
The apartment is generously proportioned and bathed in natural light with a small balcony overlooking the street to enjoy a meal in summer. A large desk helped with my day to day workload and was supported by a strong internet connection.
One block back from Nieuwe Binnenweg, the location is quite but within 200m of a vast array of shops, cafes, supermarkets and parks. From here, you can catch a trolley to Centraal or like me, walk to appreciate all that the neighbourhood has to offer. A short stroll across Coolhaven you will discover Delfshaven. There, you will find two incredible natural wine bars (a new local favourite during my stay in Rotterdam)!
Gali & Yaniv are great communicators which allowed me a great stay.

name: Unique 1907 cosy apartment
comments:
I had such a great stay here. Lauren was really friendly and easy to get ahold of with any questions, with easy check in. The home is beautiful, bright, clean and spacious, with great kitchen facilities and a super cute balcony.
The hosts provided lots of helpful suggestions and were kind enough to offer the use of a bike during the stay. It's also close to tram stops which make it easy to get around. I would absolutely recommend this place, thank you for a wonderful time in Rotterdam.

name: Private room in shared house
comments:
Marije and Marta were very warm and welcoming hosts!
They gave us many good tips for museums, places to eat etc.
Also we stayed with them at the apartment which led to many nice small talks or longer conversations.
The place itself is beautifully furnished and decorated. But the sunny terrace and small garden is an absolute highlight! We felt very comfortable and at ease.

name: Private room in shared house
comments: I warmly recommend this accommodation.  The apartment is very zen and peaceful, well decorated, very clean and practical. The apartment is quiet as it is located on a street with very little traffic on one side, and on a garden on the other side. Martha and Marije are excellent hosts: easy to talk to, accommodating, and resourceful when it comes to recommending local restaurants. The basement bedroom is comfortable, clean and cool (which was appreciated because I was there during a heat wave).  A good address!

name: Spacious City studio (+private parking)
comments: The stay at Femme’s place was wonderful! The studio is easily reachable with a tram stop right in front of the house, and we enjoyed the evenings on the little balcony.

name: Appartement Lombardijen
comments:
A really comfortable and nice apartment in the outskirts of Rotterdam!
If you have a car, then it is a good place to stay, because there is free and plenty of parking spots on the street in a quiet and safe neighborhood.
The apartment had all the amenities of a house, in general it was clean and tidy.
Mr. Henk, the homeowner, is super responsive and he made sure we were comfortable and everything! He even provided a small welcome gift!
If we want to visit Rotterdam again, then I would seriously consider staying here again!

name: Huisje nummer 40
comments: Heel gezellige, huiselijke en warme sfeer. Het ontbijt was gevarieerd, genoeg en lekker. Er is tijd en ruimte voor een gezellige babbel, maar ook voldoende privacy ondanks de gedeelde ruimtes. Locatie dicht bij station en bezienswaardigheden. Warm gezin. Fijn verblijf!

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments:
The apartment is super nice and very quiet for being in the center of town. The view from the balcony is very nice and the apartment keeps what the pictures promise.
The communication with the host has worked very well. I can recommend the apartment to anyone who wants to explore Rotterdam on foot or visit other cities from the nearby opportunity Central Station. Absolute recommendation!

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: It's basically one of the best places. The apartment is so fancy and has character and a lovely view. You will get all the city spirit from here. The host is super communicative and supportive, thank u for being here. It`s 10/10 I can recommend

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: Eduardo was very responsive and flexible. The apartment is well located, has a beautiful view. It was a great stay here

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: Diese zentral gelegene Wohnung in Rotterdam bietet den perfekten Ausgangspunkt, um die Highlights der Stadt zu erkunden. In unmittelbarer Nähe befinden sich die berühmte Markthal, die Erasmusbrücke sowie zahlreiche Museen, Restaurants und Geschäfte. Besonders begeistert hat uns der herrliche Blick über das Wasser, der direkt aus den großen Fenstern der Wohnung zu genießen ist. Die stilvolle Einrichtung schafft ein angenehmes Ambiente zum Entspannen nach einem Tag in der Stadt.

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: Lovely apartment with stunning views. Me and my partner felt right at home and it was in a great location near many of the public transport spots and some key locations

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: Lovely apartment. Great view. Super place to relax and watch the weather change. Fantastic location.

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: We had a great  stay at Eduardo 's! The appartement is lovely with space and everything you need. A litlle balcony allowed us to take our breakfast outside with a wonderful view. The view at night is also worth it ! It is near the main subway stations and ideally located to visit the city. Plenty of nice restaurants around and Eduardo gave us all indications for buying food or restaurants. Many thanks again Eduardo !

name: Penthouse in the heart of RTDM
comments: We cannot recommend Eduardo’s place enough! It has an amazing view, it’s got amazing natural light and the decor makes that place feel really like home. The location is also perfect. Eduardo was fantastic to communicate with and very accommodating and hospitable! The check in process was also smooth. The apartment has all you need as well! 10/10 would stay here again!

name: De Chill
comments: We really liked the place, the host was very nice and left some nice surprises in the house for us. The place was very quiet and we could watch horses from the window. The only small disadvantage was a missing wash basin in the bathroom. Though, would definitely stay again if we are in Holland.

name: De Chill
comments:
Very nice and well equipped place. Perfect for two people looking for a place outside but close to the city (both Den Haag and Rotterdam). The host was kind and friendly, communication was flawless. I'd give it a 9/10 in total.
A few things you should be aware of before booking: you will need a bike to get there on the weekends if you dont havd a car because there is no public transportation. The bus stop is quite far from the place. The water temperature in the shower is only warm and not hot. You will not get the privacy you would expect from a farm accomodation as the host family lives next door.

name: De Chill
comments:
We were so happy to stay there and be able to relax. When we wanted to go to the city, we just had to go the first P&R and the take the direct train to the city center.
We also enjoyed the morning coffee with a wonderful view.
Additionally, we had a nice tour of their farm and could even feed some sheeps.
Overall, a great place to stay

name: Hotspot in city centre
comments:
Location is extremely convenient. 7 mins by tram no 8 from Rotterdam Central n less than 5 mins walk from tram to apartment. Alternatively, it takes 15-20 mins by foot on leisure walk pace from Rotterdam Central to apartment. Supermarket is within 5 mins from Apartment and 15 mins to a street full of restaurants.
Apartment is spacious for us with 5 Adults.
we have problem with the heater when checked in on day 1, thanks to Urbian for his responsive reply and guided us through patiently and checked with us again to ensure all good with heater issue.
I have accidentally left my item in the apartment after check out and Urbian was nice to help me delivered it to my friend staying in Rotterdam too.

name: Casa al frente de parque
comments: Quiet and peaceful neighborhood with a cute little playground in front of the house. The location is on the outskirts of the Rotterdam city centre with easy access via the tram. Parking is a little hard to find if you arrive late in the evening. Street parking needs to be paid daily, which is a bit of hassle. Something to watch out for. Otherwise the unit is spacious for our family of 4. The unit is on the upper 2 floors above another unit. The stairs are a bit narrow and steep. Wasn’t an issue for us. But may be difficult for the elderly or toddlers. Kitchen is well equipped. Robert was very accommodating and emptied out the freezer space so we can use it. The bathroom is modern and spacious. We felt right at home!

name: Casa al frente de parque
comments:
We stayed in the flat for two nights and used it to explore the city. Everything we needed for our stay (supermarket, restaurants etc.) is in close walking distance and the bus/tram is also not too far away.
The appartment itself was clean, quiet and all in all perfect for our trip. Especially relaxing on the beautiful, cozy balcony after a long day of walking in the city was neat!
The host was very uncomplicated and friendly. We would definitely stay here again!

name: gratis parkeren  open haard watervilla privétuin
comments:
The place was specious,unique, peaceful, suitable for a bike riders who wants privacy and accessible to city crowds
It just needs a gateway to the waterfront …

name: Luxe beneden appartement met prachtige tuin
comments:
We had never been to Rotterdam before and had chosen Wieger’s apartment for a festival that was held in the area -Rotterdam Noord- and we loved it!
It’s a rather multi-cultural/diverse part of the city, a little alternative with great vintage shops and cafes.
Wieger warmly greeted us to hand over the keys and show us around the apartment which had everything you could have wanted -and just as on the pictures provided, spacious, light, luxurious and clean.
We especially enjoyed the enclosed garden area to sit out on a morning for coffee or at night for dinner and a glass of wine -thanks so much again for both!
Wieger is very generous about his place and we certainly felt welcome and a little like as we’ve actually lived there, I suppose.
Again, it’s a great place!

name: Luxe beneden appartement met prachtige tuin
comments:
It is my first time to write a negative review on Airbnb. I never had such unpleasant experience before.
The landlord is very rude, insecure and a control freak. In the beginning , he asked me to pay for the deposits of 1500 euro for one time which I never experienced before. I didn’t pay but it is still rude for him to ask for it. Secondly, he said he would send a cleaning lady every week to clean which was appreciated. The cleaning lady came and then complained it smell smoke indoor and landlord asked me to move out the next day which was rude. The truth was that I burned incense and I agreed not to do it after the landlord told me. The landlord got some bad information and without check without checking with me and immediately jump to a conclusion.
BTW, he will check the camera at the front door to see what you doing in and out of his house.
It is a beautiful house with an insecure heart. Be careful and think thoroughly before you book it. Strongly not recommend it.

name: Stadswoning Katendrecht
comments: Frederique and Robbert’s house is perfect! It’s very spacious, clean and beautiful, we had a lovely stay. You need to catch the metro to get to the tourist spots but it’s very fast and the location is beautiful and very peaceful. We stayed for new years and it was 2 minutes away from a park with the perfect view to the fireworks! Rotterdam is amazing and staying at their place was one of the best parts of our trip.

name: Stadswoning Katendrecht
comments:
A lovely house in a really cool area.
The space is light and airy and the kitchen dining area, which overlooks the cute garden, was great for hanging out in.
Having one main bathroom and two separate loos was really convenient.
Katendrecht is a great area, too. Lots of bars and restaurants on the doorstep but really easy to get into the city.
Frederique and Robert-Jan were really helpful.
Highly recommended!

name: Central Station Apartment
comments: The airbnb was so good for a Tourist, you have a nice view and also Everything around you is so close, for example the rotterdam Station.

name: Pension schip Castor
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
A great place to stay and get a sense of what life on a boat is like, supported by the warmth and hospitality of Eelke and Mario, who were always so very responsive, warm and welcoming.
The boat is a delight and it is moored at the always vibrant Wilhelminakade in Rotterdam, close to the bustle of Deliplein, Hotel New York, the Cruise Terminal and the Erasmus Bridge and walking distance from the city centre as well as public transport within and outside of the city of Rotterdam.
Definitely worth every euro, a home away from home and a place to come back to!
Thank you so much again, Eelke and Mario!

name: Cozy & Comfortable City App.
comments: Aimee was a wonderful host and her place was very comfortable and spacious.  I would definitely stay here again!  There were two separate bedrooms and lots of kids things, so it was a perfect place to stay with our young daughter.  The location was excellent with paid street parking right outside the front door, and it was very quiet though it was right by the main train station.  Aimee responded very quickly and was very helpful in planning for our trip, and gave some great recommendations for our visit to Rotterdam and the surrounding area.  We had a wonderful time!

name: Cozy & Comfortable City App.
comments: Perfect place to explore the Netherlands as it’s right across Rotterdam Central Station. Building is very quiet and blackout curtains allow you to sleep well. Perfect for families too with toys and a great backyard to play. Host is very responsive and super caring and nice.

name: Cozy & Comfortable City App.
comments: This was a real find.  The location was excellent, very close to Central Station but incredibly quiet. You could see the trains but not hear them. And it was close to the beautifully landscaped canals, as well as several great restaurants. The apartment itself is very comfortable, with a lovely large living room to relax in and the kitchen is better stocked with everything one could need than any other Airbnb that we've stayed in. Aimee is a lovely, responsive host and it was a pleasure to meet her in person when we arrived, rather than just impersonal instructions for a lockbox! We hope to stay there again in future. The only slight problem was opening the bathroom door, but Aimee has promised to fix that. All in all a very comfortable and enjoyable stay.

name: Cozy & Comfortable City App.
comments: This stay was incredible! Aimee & Hung were so hospitable and helpful. They were able to facilitate an early check-in for me and the communication was fast and reliable. This place felt like a home away from home for my friend and I, with a load of amenities and Aimee was very kind to have left us snacks, chocolate and complimentary drinks like coffee, tea and beer. Despite being on a busy street right across from Rotterdam Centraal, this place was very quiet! And with us being so close to the station it was perfect for us to get around. Would highly recommend!

name: Licht appartement bij centrum
comments: Absolutely wonderful stay, Sannerijn was helpful and responsive. The place was lovely, the bed was comfortable, and I loved having the balcony in the weather

name: Licht appartement bij centrum
comments: Sannerijn was a lovely host whose home was clean, comfortable and well accessible to the city Centre. She responded to messages quickly and had no issue providing plenty of local recommendations which we tried out and were spectacular. The location feels peaceful and the park across the street is also lovely. Would definitely visit again.

name: Unique private studio in city centre.
comments: I can highly recommend Carmen's apartment, it was pristine and well equipped - there was even some cooking oil that I was able to use to make some home cooked meals. The decor is spot on and furniture extremely comfortable, I managed to get a couple of nights of good sleep on a comfortable bed and eat dinner at a dining table! The fact that the room was flooded with light and I could open the windows was fantastic. I truly felt at home. The location is a short walk, about 6 minutes from the central station. The main sights were a comfortable walk away, which was great. Carmen was extremely responsive and even allowed an early check-in, which was an added bonus. I would definitely stay here again.

name: Unique private studio in city centre.
comments: We just had a lovely stay at Carmen’s - beautifully decorated flat, very kind host with great recommendations and very accommodating. The location of the flat is very convenient, close to the station and on a very pittoresque street. Special mention to the very cool interior design !

name: Unique private studio in city centre.
comments:
Staying at this Airbnb in Rotterdam was an absolute delight! The place was impeccably clean, conveniently located, and the host was fantastic. Carmens insights and tips about the city made our stay even more enjoyable.
We would definitely recommend this place for anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: Spacious light loft with skyline view!
comments:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at this fantastic Airbnb.
The space was impeccably clean, beautifully decorated, and had all the amenities I could possibly need, except an iron.
One of the highlights of my stay was the incredible view from the property. The location was okay, requires Uber/bolt to travel more centrally.
Would be happy to stay again!

name: Spacious light loft with skyline view!
comments: Lovely apartment with spectacular views

name: Spacious light loft with skyline view!
comments: As shown in photos, nice views and very close to tram stop. Happy with the stay and apartment

name: Spacious light loft with skyline view!
comments: Fantastic view of the water, clean and everything there. A very comfortable stay.  Taxis were a slight problem but the weather was bad.  Thoroughly enjoyed the city and the apartment. Thank you

name: Spacious light loft with skyline view!
comments: The grocery within the building was awesome. Close to Metro. Peaceful and quiet. Could not ask for a better place. Spacious with lots of natural light

name: Rotterdam Room(Please check the video in Photos)
comments: The stay was OK. Ray is very friendly and was very flexible with my arrival and special request for the bill of my stay and accepted me to stay with my cat in the room. The flat is well connected to transport and shopping. The sheets and toilette were clean, however, the room was not as clean as I would have expected, there was a lot of dust on the desk and floor (especially under the bed), which I had to clean upon arrival. To have keys I had to leave an ID card, which made me feel uncomfortable on arrival considering it is not mentioned in the house rules and the room is not lockable. Every night I felt cold air over my head from the window (closed) and had to sleep completely covered. When you open the window you can hear loud traffic noise, and from the room you can hear loud audio coming from the living room until 23:00, which is not very good if you are looking for rest, but this noise can be partially cancelled out by having your own audio in the room.

name: Rotterdam Room(Please check the video in Photos)
comments: Ray was very flexible with check in at night as I had a late flight. He was also very kind to allow my little dog to stay with me. Overall we had a nice overnight stay.

name: Zelfstandig appartement, Rotterdam zuid / Ahoy.
comments: Great and responsive host. fantastic location in relation to A hoy. the place has what you need and feels comfortable. it was clean and felt private enough, even if it is on the ground floor, thanks to the heavy curtains.

name: Zelfstandig appartement, Rotterdam zuid / Ahoy.
comments: We had a fantastic stay at this Airbnb, which was conveniently located just a 10-minute walk from Rotterdam Ahoy, perfect for attending the festival. The place was clean and comfortable. The only minor concern was the noise level; we weren't bothered, but we worried we might disturb the owner when returning late at night. Overall, highly recommend!

name: Zelfstandig appartement, Rotterdam zuid / Ahoy.
comments: We were very satisfied with our stay. We mainly visited for the AMRO tennis tournament and the location of the apartment is very close to the Ahoy arena (5mins footwalk). The apartment was very clean and Wigger was a great host who quickly responded to messages and had good communication in advance. The only small issue was that the walls are quite thin and it can be a bit noisy during the night. For us it was no problem but very light sleepers might find this an issue. Overall a very good stay and can only recommend

name: Zelfstandig appartement, Rotterdam zuid / Ahoy.
comments:
We really enjoyed this unique stay. Super modern technology blended with comfortable modern furniture.
It has the easiest off street access which was perfect for us.
Wigger is a great host and was really helpful.

name: Zelfstandig appartement, Rotterdam zuid / Ahoy.
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed our sray in Wigger’s place. It was a short 3 or 4 minute walk to the metro, with lots of shops including restaurants and coffee shops — even a mall — right there at the station. From there we could get anywhere. The space was cozy, arranged on three levels inside. The bedroom on the lower, the kitchenette and sitting room on the ground floor, and the bathroom a few steps higher. The door locks, the lights, and the curtains were all electronically controlled. Once we got the hang of all that, it was a very nice stay. We would definitely stay again.

name: I 1 room next to central station in city centre
comments: The host is incredibly kind and always goes out of their way to help me. My room is near a window, which means you might occasionally hear some minor outside sounds—so keeping a pair of headphones handy could make your stay even more comfortable!

name: 90m2 apartment in Rotterdam West
comments: Steyn’s apartment was exactly what I was after for a week in Rotterdam West, and well stocked with the essentials of life. A bottle of wine was a welcome and appreciated gesture. The apartment was clean, comfortable with loads of natural light in a quiet street and an easy 100m walk to Dakpark.

name: 90m2 apartment in Rotterdam West
comments: Was really comfortable and nice this few days in Rotterdam. The flat in a really good area. Was closed many food stores and restaurants too. Was easy to go to the downtown by walk. The flat full furnished and equipped. Only one difficult we were unlucky and often all night the neighbors talked under our windows.

name: 90m2 apartment in Rotterdam West
comments:
Had a great stay in Steyns apartment. Even nicer than the pictures and he was a very helpful and responsive throughout process.
Very bright and airy apartment. Everything you need for a great stay
Bed is amazing also.
Thanks for a great stay 😊

name: Urban Oasis in Rotterdam West
comments: Lynette’s apartment is a real jewel. Well located in the center of Rotterdam although super quiet, lots of facilities, cafes and restaurants are walking distance. Lynette is super friendly and very responsive and apart from a nice welcome card plus some goodies, provided clear and comprehensive house rules along with a list of indication  for nearby places for breakfast and restaurant. I tried 3 of them and all were superb. The apartment itself is charming and nicely decorated with a lot of thoughtful touches. I loved to sit on the balcony looking at flowers and backyard gardens. The kitchen it very nice and extremely well equipped, seems it was just installed. Even an expresso machine was available for guest. The bathroom is spacious and modern and extremely clean. I already recommended the apartment to friends and will definitely come again next time when I am in Rotterdam. Much nicer then staying in a hotel. Congratulations to Lylette for her good taste. Hope to be there soon again.

name: Urban Oasis in Rotterdam West
comments: What an amazing space to discover Rotterdam. Close to the city center and old Delfshaven. The space is neat with a lovely balcony. Everything is spotless as well. The local recommendations by Lylette were pretty awesome. Thanks for the lovely stay.

name: Royal apartment in city centre
comments:
I’ve stayed at many Airbnbs and Jeroen’s apartment is spectacular. I highly recommend you stay here with its artistic flare, ideal location, tranquil balcony garden and outstanding personal care from Jeroen.
5 stars!

name: Royal apartment in city centre
comments:
This was the best AirBnB we’ve ever stayed in! We couldn’t believe how breathtakingly beautiful the space is, and spent a long time looking around at all the intricate details in the apartment.
Our favourite elements have been how airy and spacious it is, with lots of light and being able to have breakfast on the balcony. Plus everything we wanted to do during the trip was within a 10 minute walk, the location couldn’t be better.
Jeroen is a great host and kept in contact to ensure we had everything we needed. We’ll definitely come back and stay here.

name: Royal apartment in city centre
comments: A really eclectic place which I found to be a nice change of pace from others. Spacious with a nice Back bedroom that opened to a nice balcony away from the front room on a busy street. Will definitely be back.

name: Royal apartment in city centre
comments:
Amazing, unique, quirky flat in the centre of Rotterdam! One of the most special one of a kind Airbnb’s I’ve ever stayed in.
It’s such a lovely experience to stay in a very much loved home! So much personality!!
Beautiful balcony full of plants and candles - loved the ambience!
Fantastic location in the heart of Rotterdam.
Highly recommended!!

name: Royal apartment in city centre
comments: The stay was fantastic! Jeroen is an exceptional host. The apartment is beautifully designed, with stylish furnishings and meticulous attention to detail. It was spotless and equipped with everything you need. The location is unbeatable, right in the heart of the city, yet incredibly quiet. The view is stunning, and the bed is super comfortable. Highly recommend for a perfect city stay!

name: Perfect Loft with Fantastic Vieuws
comments: Edith’s apartment is a great place to spend some days in Rotterdam, it is beautiful, modern, offers great views; is clean and quiet, has even a private bicycle parking-box just in front of the entrance to the apartment. There is a supermarket in the same building with lots of fresh fruit and vegetables and everything you need in daily life. We greatly enjoyed the vicinity to the museum park (Depot!) and to excellent restaurants.

name: Perfect Loft with Fantastic Vieuws
comments: Edith and her husband were amazing hosts. They were very welcoming and helpful throughout the stay. The apartment itself was very nice and the view was amazing.

name: Cozy room + private roof terrace
comments:
Max’s place is just a 15 minute walk away from the City hall. The house is right next to a Canal providing a beautiful view of the City from the huge balcony.
It’s even better when you wake up to it in the morning as the bed is directly ahead of the panorama window.
Max is a local and can provide good recommendations on what to do in Rotterdam. I never had to wait more than an hour to receive an answer when I messaged him. The Bathroom is shared but that wasn’t an issue as there was no reason to have any privacy concerns. Getting home after a few drinks is a bit difficult as the stairs are very steep and narrow and the room is at the very top but once you find the correct light switches you will be fine 😂

name: Cozy room + private roof terrace
comments:
We had a great time in Rotterdam. Max was super friendly and helpful (we even got a bottle of Prosecco for our anniversary)! The apartment was very nice and the view from the terrace was amazing! Overall, we would recommend staying in Rotterdam and staying with Max (unless you don't like climbing steep stairs).
Thank you for the nice time in your city :)

name: Peaceful cosy home near lakes and city centre
comments: The apartment was clean, light and open.  Neighbourhood was nice and calm. Easy parking in the back of the building. Overall we had a great stay. Thanks Anna for your hospitality.

name: Peaceful cosy home near lakes and city centre
comments: Thank you Anna for a wonderful stay and for being a friendly, accomodating and easy to contact host from booking through to check out. Her place was wonderfully cozy, pristine and inviting. Exceeded expectations based on the pictures. The place has fantastic windows and light. The kid’s furniture, toys and feeding chair were a bonus touch and provided entertainment and facilitated the stay for our two kidlets.

name: Waterfront studio at city center (65m2)
comments: Communication with Femma was very easy and she provides very good service and advices for the stay. The apartment is very good for a longer stay and has everything you need. The picture of the balcony should be updated since there was no hammock. Except this, the apartment looks exactly like the pictures. Overall I had a good stay and can recommend this apartment.

name: Waterfront studio at city center (65m2)
comments: I had a really nice stay at Femma's apartment for 5 weeks. The area is really nice with several cute cafés in walking distance; the apartment was great with a wonderful view. It is as described and Femmas was a very good host. She was very helpful and answered quickly. Would definitely recommend.

name: Center apartment with a view
comments: Great stay in a beautiful area with stunning views of the city and great location in the centre and close to transport networks. Very clean place also. Convenient and highly reccomend!

name: ruime lichte woning met tuin
comments:
We had a great few days at Annemarie's. We stayed as a group of 4 and were there for NYE.
Annemarie was always very responsive with her communications both in advance and during our stay. She gave clear instructions for how to check in (you need to go around the back of the building to get to the key lockbox).
The apartment was cosy and had everything we could need (crockery, glasses, cooking basics as well as stocks of pasta/oil/passata etc), she even left us a bottle of wine as a welcome gift. The beds were comfortable and the dining/living room areas was also welcoming with lots of spaces for us to relax/eat/spend time together.
Unfortunately the wifi wasn't working during our stay but Annemarie let us know this in advance and gave the chance to cancel without any loss of money but we went ahead and stayed anyway. There are a few shops around the corner to pick up anything needed and a few restaurants, we tried Bamyan Culinary and it was amazing.
We'd definitely come back again.

name: ruime lichte woning met tuin
comments:
The house was large, spacious and very nicely decorated. The beds were very comfortable. The area was easy to park in and nice and quiet. The apartment was clean.
The negatives- the WiFi does not reach the bedrooms. This is very frustrating as a visitor from abroad. No tv or radio.
There was an odd musty smell in the property. It helped having the windows open but the smell never really left.
The property is listed as disabled accessible, but it’s not really suitable for wheelchairs or mobility scooters as there are steps to get in and out of the property.

name: ruime lichte woning met tuin
comments: Annemarie’s place is fantastic, it is spacious and bright, with a large, well equipped kitchen. The neighborhood is calm, there is a lot of free parking on the street and rental bikes (essential in Rotterdam!) nearby. Many thanks for a great stay!

name: Modern appartement
comments:
We spent 3 wonderful nights in Imelda's apartment.
The apartment was clean and the communication worked great.
The covered sitting area in the "garden" was the highlight for us ;)
On the whole a great apartment!

name: Hoek van Holland aan zee
comments:
Nice place to stay for a couple of days, cosy and comfortable.
Communication with Simone was pleasant.
We enjoyed roof-top terrace.
Bathroom with a tub and window overlooking the cathedral is a big plus.
Location is good.
Supermarkets and metro station are about 8 min by foot.
Rotterdam is easily reachable via metro.
Beach is approx 45 min by foot through beautiful green areas.

name: Hoek van Holland aan zee
comments: Great place, felt very homely and comfortable. Simone home was lovely, great location, very well equipped. Enjoyed  the balcony during sunset. The place was really clean and great location, thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

name: Houseboot de pluvier Rotterdam
comments:
Staying on the Pluvier was a great experience. My colleague and I had a conference in town and wanted to try something different from a hotel. Hans was a great communicator and very helpful. He is very engaged in his properties. Having stayed on the boat for almost a week, we have a few tips. (1) remember that you’re in a boat and not a 5 star hotel. You can’t flush paper and you need to take short showers. But the view and location is worth the hassle. I would compare it to sleeping in an RV (2) the Pluvier is connected to the Nautilus, so you will be walking across their boat to get to yours. This is not difficult but requires a little extra planning (think a little more about your luggage size). (3) you can comfortably sleep in either cabin. I slept in the rear cabin and enjoyed sleeping with the ceiling vent open.
The neighborhood is quiet and close to many different transportation options. There are a few restaurants and grocery markets nearby. All in all we had a great time!

name: Houseboot de pluvier Rotterdam
comments:
H.M. met me at check-in and reviewed everything on the boat (and then answered text immediately for a follow-up question).
Boat is a short tram to/from train station, a nice walk to center of Rotterdam, a couple blocks from places to eat/shop.
Boat was clean and quiet; enjoyed reading/relaxing on the deck.
You can swim by diving right off the boat. It was cool during my visit in May, but still swam for the experience. It’ll be great in summer.

name: Houseboot de pluvier Rotterdam
comments: Hans was an excellent host, very helpful and friendly. A thoroughly enjoyable person. The Pluvier had everything needed for a comfortable stay, the lighting gives great ambiance and the location is peaceful and calm. We found several restaurants within walking distance.

name: Private apartment 97m2
comments: Marco is a nice guy and the apartment on a central/easy location. we had some struggles with getting out of the garage and opening the windows lol. just be aware and check it out before your departure.

name: Historisch pand Rotterdam Noord
comments: Rotterdam Nord is a great area in case you want some privacy and rest after a long day exploring the city. This house has everything you need to cook and relax in a big living room with a big table and couches. There is more than enough space for 6 people (3 bed rooms) and it has a nice bathroom. The owner is very friendly and flexible. She answered all of our questions to our satifsfaction and even recommended great places where to go in Rotterdam. This was our second Rotterdam visit but the first one in a private accommodation and I can only recommend it! Thanks for the great stay.

name: Modern apartment in city center
comments: This is the best Airbnb experience I have ever had. The apartment super clean and tidy, it has all the features you can need, the balcony view is amazing. The location is very convenient. The host was super friendly, helped with everything and answered all the questions extremely quickly. Thank for amazing experience.

name: Modern apartment in city center
comments: We had a great time. The apartment was spacious, comfortable, clean, and well-equipped, within walking distance from Rotterdam main train station. The terrace with a view on the canal was very enjoyable. Communicating with the host and co-host was easy, efficient, clear, and warm. Highly recommended place to stay!

name: House in Rotterdam Centrum / Central Station 300mt
comments:
Talha was very responsive, friendly and accommodating with our check-in/check-out timing. The apartment is located in a really central area with lots of transport connections all around, perfect for tourists or even business travelers. Many restaurants, shops and shopping areas just by the doorstep. The street downstairs can get a little busy/noisy but the bedroom is well insulated for a good nights sleep. The bathroom is really nice too, big bathtub and double sinks! The walk up to the apartment can be a little cumbersome (2nd floor with Dutch stairs), but you get used to it.
We felt immediately at home in this cosy apartment. The kitchen has fully equipped too and we were able to cook some basic meals with ease. Special shoutout to the coffee machine, which we made full use of! Will stay again if the need arises :)

name: House in Rotterdam Centrum / Central Station 300mt
comments:
My partner and I spent 4 nights at Elisa's place and we spend just an amazing time there. The apartment is beautiful (especially the bathroom, which is indeed exactly as shown in the picture), everything was tidy and clean. The location is super-central, everything is accessible by walking or public transport and one of our favorite restaurants is located just across the street. Even though the apartment is located on a main street, the bedroom is very calm and we slept very well. We would definitively come back and spend some days there!
Elisa is a very friendly and responsive host! He welcomed us at the apartment for the check-in and showed us everything. The apartment was very nicely prepared, fresh towels were ready for us on the bed and bouquets of tulips caught our eyes on the kitchen table and in the bedroom. We felt directly like home and would definitively recommend this location and Elisa as host!

name: House in Rotterdam Centrum / Central Station 300mt
comments: The place was great and I loved the location.  Very central and walkable to anywhere I wanted to go.  I recommended she provide paper towels, some extra hand towels to dry your hands in the bathroom.  Really did love it there but make sure you are ok with noise as it is a busy street and can be loud at times.  I would definitely stay there again.

name: VOC Zeemagazijn
comments: Nadia's home was just beautiful. Beautiful location in Delfshaven, gorgeous views of the canals and windmill, easy walking to everything you could need. The home is big and bright and airy, with an artist's eye, and incredibly easy to live in. Great cook's kitchen, comfortable beds, good shower. Nadia was super easy to communicate with and always friendly and helpful with suggestions and answers to questions. We've stayed all over the world and this was one of our favorite rentals. Five star for sure.

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments:
A fantastic stay, nice and central, light and airy, spacious and very clean!
A super option for a Rotterdam visit.

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments:
The place was wonderful and super clean. close to everything but in a really quite street.
Everything was as described and the host was helpful.
A great place to stay in Rotterdam if you want to feel like home and live the city too.
Thank you

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments: I visited Rotterdam last weekend and stayed with my family of 5 members at Gongyao's accomodation. The apartment is on three floors in a prime location in the center of the city, close to Erasmusberg bridge and the hip streets full of bars and pubs.
