The apartment was very clean, high-tech and well equipped. My family and I were very happy to stay here and we enjoyed our time in Rotterdam.

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments: A very modern apartment with an excellent location; in a quiet street but a 3 minute walk from bars, restaurants and all key amenities.

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments: spacious and full of light, well equipped kitchen, great for families, excellent location

name: Your Family Gateway to Urban Adventure!
comments:
We had a fantastic stay here with my family of 4 and my parents.
There was everything we needed and more.
Communication was fantastic and very clear instructions.
There is a play park down the street to the right which was great and restaurants and shops were a stones throw away.

name: The cat & the kettle
comments: Fleur is very interesting and interested and kind. She has a lovely flat with lots of light. An ideal example of small being beautiful and happiness being found in things that cannot be bought.

name: The cat & the kettle
comments: Even on a busy street, it felt super peaceful and quiet. I like this place alot, would recommend and will go back again. That's for sure. Thank you Fleur :)

name: The cat & the kettle
comments: Fleur is a very friendly host who at the same time grants a lot of privacy. The place is at walking distance from Rotterdam Central Station and also from the centre of Rotterdam. It provided all I needed and expected. I hope to return here next year.

name: Complete studio in Witte de Withkwartier incl. PP.
comments: We loved staying at Jelle's studio apartment. It's in a lovely quiet street yet close to some fantastic bars and cafes, the Museum quarter,  the Erasmus bridge and with good transport links. The apartment was spotless and Jelle was very quick to respond to any questions we had. We would highly recommend staying here.

name: Complete studio in Witte de Withkwartier incl. PP.
comments: The place was great for our 3 night stay. The sofa bed is comfortable and the kitchen has everything you may need. If you’re a light sleeper/like to sleep in later you may want to bring a pair of ear plugs as the noise from outside can be loud in the morning, but this is common with any place right in the centre of the city. We would definitely stay again.

name: Complete studio in Witte de Withkwartier incl. PP.
comments: Jelle's place was in a very convenient location, walkable from the train station and to many restaurants. It was clean and the sofa bed was really comfortable. It is a little loud in the mornings so be cautious of that if you are a light sleeper and want to sleep in. Overall, a great place to stay to explore the city or as a base for some day trips.

name: Complete studio in Witte de Withkwartier incl. PP.
comments: We had a perfect stay at Jelle’s place in Rotterdam ! Jelle is very responsive, flexible and gives you all the information you need for your stay in Rotterdam. The apartment is ideally located, close to the center but still in a quiet street. Thanks for everything ! I would definitely recommend 😊🙏🏼

name: Complete studio in Witte de Withkwartier incl. PP.
comments: Stayed for 2 nights on a work trip. Place is in a quiet street and close to tram stop and also close to restaurants (including a very good breakfast place recommended by the hosts). It was a very small studio but everything looks newly furnished and upscale. The bed is a sofa bed that opens up. The bed is close to the street but there is not much street noise.

name: Apartment with bamboo garden near Kralingen Park
comments:
Nice apartment in the best district of Rotterdam and close to the metro station. The kitchen is very well equipped. with a nice view of the private garden. The flat was very clean and well-organized in every aspect.
Tom has been very kind and flexible in extending the check-out time.

name: Cosy apartment close to Rotterdam central
comments: we really enjoyed our time. the natural sunlight in the living room was a big plus! The host was also very helpful and kind.

name: Harmony Spacious 3BRD Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: The apartment had a beautiful, modern decor. It was very clean and well furnished. We were very comfortable during our stay and enjoyed the patio view.

name: Harmony Spacious 3BRD Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Amazing place with a great view. Extremely clean and homie! Highly recommend!

name: Harmony Spacious 3BRD Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Slight issue getting into the building and room regarding the code as no physical key but was sorted in the end. Other than that it’s a good place, about 25minute walk from station but nice area loads of shops/bars etc…

name: Harmony Spacious 3BRD Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments:
We had a great stay at Alphabet apartments. It was our first time away with our little girl and she loved being able to crawl around the apartment. It was well located for walking to and from the station and very handy that it was directly above a supermarket.
Unfortunately we happened to travel during a heat wave and even with the fans that Martijn so kindly provided the two front bedrooms were uninhabitable on two of the nights because they were so hot (thermometer read 35°c). This is in no way the fault of Alphabet Apartments but is just something to be aware of when booking. Luckily with there only being 3 of us we were able to sleep in the slightly cooler back bedroom.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments:
Great place, really clean and with a lovely front terrace/balcony.
All house features felt top quality and not just thrown in there.
Area had many fast food joints and restaurants making getting food easy and also a “Dirk” which is a decent supermarket if you want to self cater.
5 stars

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Good spot to stay for a few nights in Rotterdam- cool view, clean, comfortable, quiet.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Excellent place, value for money. Consider that there is no elevator, need to take baggage up to 4th level. Nice view of the town from the balcony.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Lovely spacious flat, homely feel to it, everything needed & clean flat all round from bedding to bathroom. Nice and modern with a lovely balcony to sit out on when the suns shining. It does have a fair few steps to it but not enough to not stay here.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments:
Martijn' apartment was really nicely furnished. The beds comfy. The kitchen was also well equipped and even the table was set for dinner. You could open up and close all the curtains and windows to let the sun in during the day. I also enjoyed some time on the balcony.
It was probably the best air-bnb I have ever been to, also the most expensive one, but still we got quite some value for the money.
Thank you! :)

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: this Airbnb is located in a quiet neighborhood in Rotterdam close to the city centre. the Airbnb itself was clean, had all the amenities we needed as well as a lovely balcony. Martjin gave clear instructions and check in was seamless. I'd highly recommend!

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: The place was better than I had expected. It was a surprise when we went through the door as this was on the roof, but it was beautiful. It has a beautiful view of the roof tops with sunset. No lift though.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments:
Really enjoyed our stay here, flat had everything you would need for a long or short stay. Flat was quiet, if you open the windows to the street there is a bit of city noise but nothing more than you might expect but you can open the doors or windows to the inside of the complex andcyou won't hear much at all. Also everything was very clean and in good order.
Had a couple of queries and my messages were answered in a prompt and friendly manner.
There are a few places to eat nearby, Station Bergweg was great and there is a supermarket downstairs from the flat.
City Centre is a 20 minute walk but I recommend figuring out the transport system and getting a Tourist Card which is great value.
Only thing to note is that there is no lift. We were on the top floor and while I'm still fairly able bodied lugging a 23kg case up 6 flights of stairs might not be possible for some.
All in though I would recommend this place, lovely flat, great value and would definitely stay again.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments:
Excellent place, nice rooms and shower and toilet and kitchen.
Only problem was cleanness.
Dusty many spots, dirty washing and dry machine, two light bulbs were out and it took two days to change the rest things were perfect.

name: Urban Utopia 3BDR Apartment PK - 72 SQM
comments: Great location for a nice stay in Rotterdam. 10-15 minutes from Rotterdam Centraal and  the city centre. Host is very responsive. Equipment is sufficient but somewhat minimalist. Street can be busy and loud into the night, but with windows shut, absolutely no problem. In case of heat, leaving the front door open helps airing the apartment.

name: Contemporary Stylish 3BDR Apartment PKA - 86 SQM
comments:
we originally booked a top floor appartment with a balcony and view. One hour before leaving he tells me the address had changed. he reassured us it would still have everything we were promised. once arriving at the appartement. we suddenly had an appartement in a completely different area of the city. in the appartement both showers were broken, we had an overgrown and disgusting terras and there was mold in the fridge. after the contacting of the hist he said there system made a mistake and they misplaced. even do they knew they messed up we couldnt change to our requested location. when complaining he cancelled our stay and we were left homeless. after searching for 4 hours we finally found a place to stay for the night even do it was double the price.
i wouldn’t even recommend a stay with him to people i hate. this was absolutely horrific and unprofessional.

name: Contemporary Stylish 3BDR Apartment PKA - 86 SQM
comments: Alloggio nuovo grande e spazioso in una zona non bella di Rotterdam lontano un pó da tutto. Casa di grandi dimensioni con una rampa di scale ripidissima per salire all’appartamento. Cucina dotata davvero di poche pentole e rigate per la maggior larte dovrebbero sostituirle. Lw due richieste fatte non sono state esaudite. Molta confusione sul check in decine di messaggi automatici non si é capito nulla. Deposito cauzionale non necessario con air bnb ma poi ho dovuto cmq fare una transazione con la carta. C’é poca privacy con la porta di ingresso vetrata. Non consigliato

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: The place is great. Have McDonald nearby for quick food. And there is a supermarket which is 5 mins walking distance. Downstairs there is paid street parking. The only thing can be improved is that there are smell which we can feel that the house just finished renovation. But the smell may be allergy to someone and we need to keep opening the windows otherwise we kept sneezing. But one of the window cannot be opened and the host replied the technician is not available. So we cannot open the window for 5 days. Other than that, everything is good

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: It is a problem to enter the place, they take a long time to answer, my entry was at 4 and I managed to enter at 5:50, the place is very nice, pleasant and has a good view

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: Apartment itself is fairly good. Only basic furniture and some omission on the cleaning process leading to areas with dust and clothes from previous guests.  One room window is stuck and not possible to open or ventilate the area.

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: This was a spacious, light and clean apartment in a good location for working in central Rotterdam. Thank you!

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: Really amazing stay! The beds are big, lots of space and a lovely balcony to sit on in the evenings and mornings. Really easy to walk everywhere and near a local tram which helps you get directly to centraal. Would love to stay again next time I visit the Netherlands! Thanks so much!

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments:
Generally, the place was as described and I imagine could be a decent place to stay during winter.
However, during my stay at the apartment during summer, there were no fans provided in the accomodation. Even worse, all the windows were closed and locked so one room was incredibly stuffy and the living/dining area was like an oven…
What made the experience worse was the owners’ responses — Martijn informed us that it was not possible to send someone down with the key to unlock the windows on our first night, but that they would send someone down in the morning the next day to help.
After a day out, we came back to locked windows yet again. When asked, Martijn didnt reply till about 1am and said that unfortunately, they weren’t able to take care of it.
I understand the lack of fans, and I can even look past the locked windows, but the lack of care in trying to get someone to help with the windows was what really soured my stay here. Would not recommend, especially in summer.

name: Charming Retreat 3BDR Apartment PKB - 65 SQM
comments: The apartment looks just like in the photos and is very centrally located. The city center is within walking distance, and there are plenty of places to eat and shop nearby. One small downside is that the windows facing the main street can’t be opened. We asked the housekeeping team about the keys, but unfortunately haven’t received a response. Also, the terrace door is still broken and can’t be locked.

name: Roomy deco loft in city centre
comments: We had an exceptional stay at this Airbnb, thanks to the superb communication with Pascal. From the impeccable cleanliness to the charming decor, every detail was thoughtfully considered. The quiet surroundings and cosy bed provided a perfect retreat, and the high-tech features added a modern touch. The location was ideal, close to Blaak and Beurs metro stations, a vibrant shopping street, and the Markthal for delightful food experiences. Pascal's communication truly enhanced our experience, making it a highly recommended stay for anyone visiting.

name: Roomy deco loft in city centre
comments: Great stay, nice view. Close to everything with a supermarket downstairs.

name: Roomy deco loft in city centre
comments:
Pascal was the best host. Super responsive, amazing amazing AMAZING place. Fantastic decor, extremely friendly, and extremely well equipped Airbnb. Easily the best Airbnb I've ever stayed in.
The location cannot be beat, the safety, privacy, security, vibe, and honestly everything was just immaculate.
Staying here was a gift.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments: couldn’t recommend Peter highly enough. Great price, brilliant location, lovely scenery out of the bedroom window. Short walk to local markets, central station and busy part of the area for restaurants and bars. Excellent stay, and would go again. Peter was also really helpful with the instructions, and so flexible on both check in and check out.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments: An excellent location and accessibility! A cute apartment with nice views. The owner is helpful. Recommended👍🏻

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments:
Cozy apartment in the city center of Rotterdam. Easy to reach, easy and flexible check-in. The house and the apartment itself are a bit older than I expected but the apartment is really nice equipped and I felt home right away. Everything was tidy and clean so I felt really comfortable. The apartment is located at a main street but as the bedroom is located at the back side of the apartment, it is totally calm during night. I spent three nights there but could easily imagine to stay for a longer period.
Peter was a super-nice host, very responsive and helpful.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments:
Very cozy appartment, we felt home, the view on the canal was poetic and the espresso machine very appreciated.
Near the center and the station, a perfect spot to visit the town for a couple of days.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments: Easy to find and responsive host. Gets a bit noisy in the night as there are ducks and swans outside and you can hear people from the street. Comfy bed. No real issues.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments:
Apartment was spacious and clean. Matched the description. It is an easy and straight forward half hour walk from Rotterdam central station. Lovely view out the window of trees and the canal. Like many places in Holland it is up a number of flights of stairs.
We had a great stay and Peter was very helpful.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments:
The place is well positioned, near the centre, railway station, public transport... The view from the bedroom is amazing, the scenery around lovely. It is very well equipped, more then enough bed linen, towels, toilet paper, bathroom and kitchen supplies. Peter was very correct and responsive host.
However, I would recommend the place mainly for the warmer part of the year. The flat is quite spacious so it takes some time to get heated.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments: My husband, pre-teen daughter and I stayed in Peter's place for two weeks touring Belgium, Germany and the Netherlands. It was always a sweet little place to come back to at night. The loft has very nice canal and street views and it was well appointed. Bed was comfortable. The apartment was in a great location and within fifteen minutes walking distance to shops, restaurants and the major train station. The neighborhood felt very safe. We would often return late at night and never felt unsafe walking around. Finally, Peter himself was very responsive and always had a ready answer to our questions. If there were things one needed to know it would be that this is a four story WALK-UP. We are fit and active so it wasn't an issue for us but it's something to keep in mind. Also, it would be great if Peter were to install a full-length mirror and a microwave. Other than those small tweaks, we would stay again.

name: Spacious appartement in city center
comments: Great place, beautiful view and location. Great for a weekend getaway. Peter was nice.

name: Authentic home & garden near to central station
comments: This is a hidden gem pretty near the city center, in a original dutch neighborhood.  The decoration is unique, super comfy and cozy house. The garden is a perfect view from the living room and brings peace. We really enjoyed staying at their place and would gladly stay there again!

name: Appartement in oud schoolgebouw
comments: We stayed in Martine's house with two families with young kids (7 & 8 y/o). The house is very spacious & stylish and well equipped. There are a lot of toys for kids to play with. The beds are very comfortable. There is a large garden. The only thing to consider is that the bathroom has a large glass door so if you are very keen on privacy maybe this is not the house for you. The house is located close to the metro and watertaxi stops so you can be anywhere in Rotterdam quickly. Communication with Martine was very swift and she is very friendly. I highly recommend the house!

name: Appartement in oud schoolgebouw
comments: We had a great stay at Martine's,  the house was a really nice space. One thing to note is that one of the bathroom walls is glass, it is shown in the pictures, but we didn't see it at first. It's not really an issue and we managed to work around it with a group of friends.

name: Appartement in oud schoolgebouw
comments: We enjoyed Martine's  spacious and light apartment. Made a lovely base for our trip with adult children. Its worth noting for future guests that it is a family home with no privacy in the bathroom as there is a clear glass wall.

name: Appartement in oud schoolgebouw
comments:
Een prachtig en stijlvol appartement op een fijne locatie vlakbij alle highlights van Rotterdam Zuid.
We waren met 6 dames, dus het maximum aantal gasten. Hierdoor sliepen een aantal in de kinderkamer(s). De bedden waren wel helemaal in orde.
Alles wat we nodig hadden was aanwezig en de stijlvolle inrichting gaf ons verblijf net dat beetje extra.

name: Appartement in oud schoolgebouw
comments: The immediate location of this home is not great, with surrounding homes being run down. On arrival there was a rat at the kitchen window. The hosts belongings were located throughout the home with boxes stacked in the kitchen and covering the laundry. Left over food waste was left in the fridge, oven and dishwasher. There were aspects of the home that were pleasant but overall the finishing’s were rough for the price.

name: Large 3 bed appartment in center
comments: Mark was an excellent host, and informed the property was actually up for sale and he was actively looking for a buyer. The property itself had a fantastic kitchen & bathroom (as looked like recently renovated). Bedrooms were mismatched furniture wise - bedding clean but un-ironed, no iron & ironing board, no hair dryer. Windows - some wouldn't open & others couldn't be put on the latch. Excellent location 5 mins for the metro - lots of local bars/restaurants nearby

name: Large 3 bed appartment in center
comments: We had a great stay at Mark's apartment in Rotterdam. The location is very central, with all the city's highlights nearby. The space was perfect for our group to cook, relax, and hang out together. Bedrooms were comfortable, and the bathroom had a great rainforest shower. Mark was very responsive and easy to communicate with.

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments:
This place is really well located and the pictures do not do any justice to the place. It is really a beautiful place with a really great view of city center.
The hosts were available but then again I did not really need anything simply because everything was already on point and well explained.
To be done again

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments: Great stay at this nice apartment with a great view over Rotterdam

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments: This airbnb is so amazing. The bed is super comfy, the living room is very spacious and cozy. But the best part is the view, so beautiful. The airbnb is also super close to Rotterdam Central so easy traveling with public transport. I highly recommend.

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments: Fantastic view, nice flat, only it get’s very warm. Communication etc was Perfect!

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments:
Great apartment with a fantastic view of the city. Very clean and well kept.
Thanks for a great stay.

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments:
The apartment was perfect for our stay in Rotterdam with our 1-year-old kid. The location is really central and the view was amazing as described.
There was a baby cot and high chair that made it easy to stay with our son.
Host was super easy to contact and helped us get in quickly.

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments: Fantastic location a few min walk from Centraal Station. Easy access to trains, metro and trams and immediate walking access to the city. Apartment looked as advertised and had great views. Also surprisingly quiet at night - great windows kept the noise out.  Only call out is the 2nd bedroom bed is smaller than the first and may be tight for 2 adults but works fine for one adult and would be fine for 2 kids.  Very responsive hosts.  I arrived early and he let me drop my bag off several hours before check in and also sped up cleaning/check in.  Checkout super easy.

name: Sky High Sanctuary in Vibrant Rotterdam!
comments:
Great location 2min from Central Station, amazing views of Rotterdam.
Easily walk around the city from the apartment

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
Simon a un super logement pour passer un merveilleux moment au sein du quartier. Très bien placé sur cool street. Super bien équipe, propre, bonne literie, il donne envie d’y rester « to Chill ».
Merci Simon à bientôt

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: The apartment is located in the main bar and restaurant street in Rotterdam so I felt safe getting home even late during the night. The bedroom faces the yard so it’s still really quiet. The furniture and amenities are brand new and everything smells nice. Simon, my host, is extremely nice, helpful and accommodating. He responded to my messages as fast as he could and tried to help me immediately. I had issues opening the main door of the building but it seems it was just me because Simon tried three times and he could do it.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Wonderful host so helpful and friendly. Let us check out late and no issues. Apartment had wonderful window seat that overlooked street which was buzzing with so many great restaurants and bars. We had a lovely time. Thoroughly recommend

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Simon’s place is the perfect place for a weekend in Rotterdam. Located on a busy street with food and bar options. Within walking distance of lots of attractions and shops. The apartment was spotless when we arrived. Definitely recommend

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
The contact with Simon was good. He was helpful and friendly. In general the apartment looked even better than on the pictures, but it was a surprise to find the bathroom linked to the bedroom, which was not ideal for our group of three guys.
The location was perfect. You could easily reach the train station as well as the city centre. In the street itself were a lot of restaurants and bars. Sadly on the weekend extremely loud music started to play in the middle of the night which kept us awake for hours. The kitchen endowment was nice and of high quality, we would have appreciated to find basic stuff like salt and pepper, but that was not too big of a problem. All in all the stay was worth it and we would come again.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: First things first: we would come back anytime. Super central and modern apartment. It was not clear to us that this street is the party island of Rotterdam. However, sleeping room is to the other end, so fully fine but the bed in the living room can not be used (we through that our girl can sleep on the sofa, finally she slept with us in our bed). Still great place to be!

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Simon’s apartment is located in one of the most popular and beautiful streets in Rotterdam. With lots of bars and restaurants to choose from, the street is full of life. The apartment itself has a full width panoramic window overlooking at the street but still feels private and cozy. The house is furnished with style and sleeping was very comfortable. Definitely a great place to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
Absolutely Love this place. My son didn’t even want to leave. Very cute design at the living room.
The space is very bright and clean. We truly love the place and will be back!
Thank you, Simon!

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
The Simon’s place is the perfect place to stay in Rotterdam. Is perfect located in the city center, really close to bars and restaurants. The home is super clean and we love to stay on the top sofa for watch the street!
I really recommend staying at Simon's house if you have a few days to spend in Rotterdam

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
If I could give Simon 10 million stars I would. His apartment is clean, organized, and had the essentials I needed. Clean towels, water in the fridge, and extra blankets/pillows. The bed and couch were very comfy. The tv offers a lot of streaming services already ready to use, and a very comfortable viewing area out the large windows.
The location is great. It’s right in the center of a popular street, surrounded by bars and restaurants. Lots of night life so it’s a fun place to stay, and the apartment blocks out most, if not all noise from the street. It’s a short walk from the Rotterdam train station as well as the big shopping center.
The train from Rotterdam to Amsterdam is also only a 40 minute ride. So it was nice not staying in Amsterdam but only being a quick train ride away.
Once again, Simon deserves the highest rating possible. He was great and If I didn’t suck at baking, I’d make him a cake:)

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Simon's place is located in a great area, right in the heart of a bustling street with many restaurants and public transit stations nearby. We particularly enjoyed the built-in window seats in the apartment! The place was clean and modern, and everything functioned properly. If you might need more paper products than what's provided, you'll have to purchase your own. Simon was easy to communicate with, and the check in/out process was easy.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
The apartment is located near the metro and there are a lot of options for food and drinks around the area. There is a lot of natural light coming in the apartment and despite being on the 1st floor, there was no noise from the road.
We were a group of 4 friends and the accommodation was a little tight. The bathroom is inside the bedroom and it has no door or curtain so there is an issue with privacy. Also the couch doesn’t transform to a very comfortable bed for two friends (maybe couples can be “closer” to each other and face no problem)
One more issue was that the only mirror of the apartment was the one in the main bathroom, so it was a bit difficult for 4 people to get ready simultaneously (applying make-up or combining hair had to be done one-by-one).
Finally, the bedsheets and the towels had some stains on them, not from being dirty but from being over-used.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: We really enjoyed our stay at Simon’s place . It is in a great location for visiting all parts of Rotterdam . Simon was really helpful and approachable. The apartment is modern and exceptionally clean . There are many great bars and restaurants in the street . The only downside with this is that it can be a little noisy in the sitting room at the weekend .

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Our stay was very nice. About 20 mins from the train station, 20 mins from the ferry to Kinderdijk, and 15 mins to Markthal and Cube Houses. Right in the middle of the road with a ton of food choices. We stayed at Simon’s with our 2 yo and 4 mo daughter. We asked if they had a crib and Simon got a new pack n play for our stay. It’s a good place for kids. It’s up one floor on a wide set of steps. The giant window seat was a lot of fun for our child to people watch along the busy street. We had a sound machine for our kids, so I can’t comment on the loudness of the street. Same as other reviews - it’s odd that there is no shower curtain, and yes, the single toilet room is small but I’m 5’8” and it was fine. The washer dryer was a huge plus for us.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments:
We loved this one bedroom unit with a kitchen and living room and comfortable bed. It was well stocked and spacious. The only reason I did not give this air Bnb a five star review is that the front area of the apartment is right on a very noisy and lively bar scene. We were there on a weekend and the noise was loud. As long as you are aware and you can use ear plugs and sleep in the back bedroom , it is fine.
I really liked the layout and accessibility to the train station and the trams. Also several restaurants are nearby.
Simon was a great communicator as was his colleague. That was a great part of this place. They also helped lift some of our luggage up some stairs. So helpful !

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: Neat apartment for a group of friends or family with older kids. It's right in the middle of the most fun street with lots of bars, restaurants, and cafes. 15 min walk to the market hall, cube houses, Marina, waterbus and pretty much and destination in the triangle of Rotterdam. The apartment had everything needed for the stay, super clean, new and modern looking. would gladly stay again on the next visit to Rotterdam.

name: Stunning Renovated Apartment (1st floor)
comments: The location of the house is very convenient, the tram passes right next to the street and it is very close to the central station. You can get everywhere on foot. The place where the house is located is very lively and vibrant :) In the evenings we were never bored, we could easily find a place to have a drink! The house was very cozy, the interior design was perfect, bright and clean. We had no problems with cleanliness. Kitchen equipment was complete. You will never have a problem. As a recommendation, I would say that maybe a full-length mirror could be put in the house. Walking distance to the supermarket. The landlord was really interested and always helpful. I am already sure that I will definitely stay in this house when I come to Rotterdam again :)

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments:
A gem!
I am never the first guest at an airbnb, but I am glad I broke the mold this time. Tons of space and privacy in this spot on the top floor of a quiet house. You’ll have a huge,bright bedroom with a large private balcony,a bathroom with a tub and shower, and a separate toilet. Super clean and cozy. Lots of nice little touches — Toiletries in the bathroom, drawers for your clothes. The neighborhood is excellent - house is on a quiet side street and a short walk to the tram, restaurants and everything you need. Host Floris is amazing - friendly and responsive. I mentioned that extra locks on the door would be reassuring for solo travellers and he got right on with having them installed. I will definitely be staying here again!

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: lovely couple,very social  awesome place. very accessible and within the city center. would definitely recommend over and over. that balcony. Well needed.

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: Lovely room and balcony, very safe area. Shared facilities were not a problem at all. 25 minute walk from Rotterdam station and supermarkets and bakeries nearby. Very enjoyable stay!

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: It was an amazing stay in Rotterdam! The place has a great location close to a main street with lots of places to eat and drink. In the room everything is same with the pictures. My favourite part is the cute balcony where you can chill and relax while watching the city view.

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: Good location with the train station and City in reach. The communication with Floris was reliable and kind. Simple room. Balcony was Nice. There is a fridge and waterkettle but No table or Plate and cutlery to prepare Minimum food - that would be Nice to add.

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments:
⸻
Nice location to stay, close to tram and bus stops and not far from the city center.
As for the house, the bathroom was dirty and smelled bad. There was no privacy, as two couples live in the house and everyone shares the same bathroom and toilet.
Also, there is no kitchen available for use.
For example, one of the tenants walked into the bathroom twice without knocking while my girlfriend was inside and naked.
The balcony was neglected and unkempt.
We definitely had different expectations for the amount of money we paid.

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: The best thing about this place is that Floris, the owner, is always responsive and helpful. The location is not too far from the city center, and actually walkable (around 20 minutes) from it. If you want to have local grocery store, cheaper one, this unit has nearby supermarket such as Orkide Supermarkt. The unit also has a beautiful balcony with tropical umbrella and chairs, nice for couple. One should be noticed is that the room is on the second floor with steep stairs as it will be okay if you bring small luggage or bag.  Some suggestions, please provide a fan during summer as the room becomes very hot due to direct sunlight exposure; and the flowers and plants on the balcony would look even more bautiful if they were watered more frequently. Thank you Floris for letting us to stay.

name: Privé kamer vlakbij centrum
comments: Floris and his partner are very friendly and the location is convenient, the neighborhood very nice and with many bars and restaurants. The room is nice and looks like in the pictures. The terrace has a nice view but is rather neglected and not very livable. The toilet is dirty and has no windows or ventilation. I was also woken up at night by the voices of the other people in the house and one morning I had to wait almost an hour to use the bathroom. I would have e pet yes something different given the price of the room.

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments: Martijn's house is right in the city center, very easy to move around, with a beautiful play ground right opposite the house, very convenient for those who travel with kids. The apartment itself is very spacious and well equipped. Only note is that there is no way to darken the bedrooms and therefore as soon as the sun comes up, you get the sunlight straight in the face which made is difficult to rest well in the mornings.

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments: We stay at Martijn's place for almost a week and enjoyed very much our stay. The apartment was conveniently located, with great natural light coming in into the living room. Communication was always on point and receptive, and both check in and check out was smooth.

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments:
Great place and great host. Highly recommended. It’s a ground floor but with the curtains it feels very private. Rooms are quiet, however they have skylights which it wasn’t the end of the world but ideally I would’ve liked an option to cover that somehow.
The host is responsive and very friendly. The house has iron, washing machine and proper kitchen.

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments:
We really appreciated the apartment’s location. It’s walking distance to most attractions. Price-quality was good. That said, since the apartment is on the ground floor and the only window opens to the street there is some noise and little privacy.
Maintenance and cleanliness could have been better, there were no lightbulbs in most lamps in the living room and there were some stains on the bed linen.

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments: Great place in a very convenient location! The ceiling windows can be a bit bothersome since they’re right above the beds. There’s only one window in the entire apartment, and it’s on the street-level ground floor, so you can’t leave it open at night or when you’re out. As a result, it gets very hot inside, and there’s no air conditioning. Other than that everything was perfect. Thank you for everything!

name: BS3 Urban Escape 2BDR Apartment
comments: Extremely hot and stuffy apartment with only one small window you can open.The temperature stayed around 28.5°C throughout our stay, with no meaningful ventilation or fresh air. Skylights had no curtains or blinds, so the rooms stayed bright at night and we were woken at sunrise. Both of us slept very poorly as a result. When we asked to leave our luggage for just three hours after check-out (no guests were due to arrive), we were told there would be a €30 fee, then that it wasn’t possible due to “maintenance,” with no local luggage storage suggestions offered. Disappointing service, as allowing this would have been an easy gesture of goodwill. There are much better options in the area with proper air conditioning.

name: Vintage modern, spacious apartment. Amazing view!
comments: The house is located in a very nice street in the Delfshaven neighbourhood with a beautiful view of the water. Matthijs is a very friendly and attentive host, we were always asked in between if everything was ok or if we needed anything. We like the neighbourhood, the house and we felt very comfortable. Thumbs up!

name: Vintage modern, spacious apartment. Amazing view!
comments:
A very cozy place with stylish interiors and a great view of the river. Easily accessible by tram or metro.
The check in was easy and uncomplicated thanks to Matthijs' instructions.
The appartement is on three floors and feels like a real home instead of a hotel, which we enjoyed. The best thing about the stay were Matthijs reccomendations on the area. This allowed us to check out the area outside the typical tourist haunts. We would definitely come back!

name: Vintage modern, spacious apartment. Amazing view!
comments:
The apartment is spacious, perhaps more than necessary for a short stay. Its old architecture and river view are charming. However, be aware that it has steep stairs: it’s on the second floor with two additional internal flights, which could be challenging with heavy luggage.
Unfortunately, our experience was marred by cleanliness and organization issues upon arrival. The apartment was visibly dusty, with some leftover food in the kitchen sink and hairs in the bathroom sink. We also expected a more welcoming setup. For instance, the kitchen had a pile of used tea towels, and we had to search through drawers to find a clean one. Additionally, the pillows were too thin and uncomfortable, which impacted our rest.
Overall, the apartment did not feel prepared to host us. When you’re on vacation, you want to focus on enjoying your time, not worrying about problems with your accommodation. Unfortunately, this was not the case ofr us, and we did not have a comfortable stay.

name: Cozy Apartment near City Center!
comments: Very Beautiful flat in 70s style. Lots of sunlight and a big bathtub. Host reacted quickly to answer questions.

name: Cozy Apartment near City Center!
comments: We really enjoyed staying here. The flat was spacious, comfy and homely. Lovely eclectic mix of furniture and furnishings. Steep stairs as is the norm in Netherlands but good handrails installed. An ideal location to get around Rotterdam, to the station and a large supermarket 5 mins walk. Unfortunately, due to the weather we didn't use the outside balcony area, but looked fab.

name: Cozy Apartment near City Center!
comments: We were absolutely charmed by the beauty and perfect location of this accommodation! Tucked in the heart of Rotterdam, everything was within walking distance: a grocery store, superb restaurants, and lively bars. The host was extraordinarily responsive and exceedingly accommodating, making our stay even more delightful. I highly recommend this gem for an unforgettable experience in this vibrant city.

name: Cozy Apartment near City Center!
comments: Nice, clean and fully equipped appartement in quiet street. Friendly and super helpful host. We loved the 60s inspired interior. Just a little challenge to park a car in the neighbourhood without having dutch bankcard (pinpas). Recommend.

name: Fijn appartement in Rotterdam
comments: This is a nice bright and airy apartment in a peaceful neighbourhood, with good access to central Rotterdam by tram and some good local restaurants (sushimafia and Little Asia are great). There’s also a couple of supermarkets and an excellent bouldering wall (Monk bouldergym) about a 5-10 minute walk away. The place is a little rough around the edges in terms of decoration, furnishings etc, and the photo of the balcony in the listing is very misleading (it overlooks a flat roof and some walls, I never went out there), but if you are not looking for a luxury feel it is a good base.

name: Fijn appartement in Rotterdam
comments: Great walkable location.  Doing a great job rehabbing the apartment with just a few small items yet to be completed.  Just a block from the tram.  Joris was very quick to respond and easy going.  A pleasure.  Great spacious apartment.  The one flight of stairs is curved so can be a bit challenging with a suitcase, but once you’re inside, you’ll feel right at home!  Gladly give 5 stars.

name: Fijn appartement in Rotterdam
comments: Away from city center on a neighborhood high street. Close to public transport, grocery stores, and a park.

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments: The apartment was very nice with great views, however it was not clean, there were stains in the couch and sofa, bed sheets looked old and smelled, we had to spend the first day cleaning and washing the sheets,

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments:
everything was great from the moment we met the host
great apartment with a lovely view of the river and bridge
centrum is around 10 min walk

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments:
Stunning view with the river and the Erasmus Bridge.
It happened to be the mid autumn festival the last day of our stay. Really love the moon over the bridge.
Convenient transportation. The closest tram station Blaak can easily go to the airport and Hague and Amsterdam.
Many great Chinese restaurant within walking distance.

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments: Beautiful apartment with a lovely view and within walking distance to the centre of Rotterdam.

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments: Amazing  location for a family stay on a business trip to Rotterdam! View from the window is breathtaking. Place is spacious and parking is a massive bonus if you are driving. Highly recommended!

name: Riverside Luxury Retreat with Sauna and Parking
comments: This place was perfect! 3 bed room spacious apartment with epic views! i will stay here again!

name: d'Ouwe Moer Residence
comments: Erg fijn verblijf! De ruimte is echt fantastisch, wij waren erg enthousiast. Zeer ruim opgezet, super mooi interieur, privacy per kamer en op een perfecte locatie!

name: d'Ouwe Moer Residence
comments:
Wir haben hier Silvester mit fünf Personen verbracht und waren alle total begeistert von der Unterkunft. Die Location ist wunderschön und absolut einzigartig eingerichtet. Das Herzstück und Highlight war in unseren Augen definitiv die eigene Bar.
Michiel war super nett und hat uns sogar spontan etwas früher zum Check-In getroffen, da unsere Ankunftszeit sich unerwartet nach vorne verschoben hat. Auch der Check-Out war dank Schlüsselbox unkompliziert.
Die Lage direkt am Hafen war unschlagbar. Außerdem gab es direkt um die Ecke einen kleinen Supermarkt, der sogar an den Feiertagen immer bis 21 Uhr geöffnet hatte. Für das Parken direkt auf der Straße vor der Unterkunft haben wir am Parkautomaten 30€ für zwei Tage gezahlt.
Wir würden die Unterkunft auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen und jederzeit wieder buchen!

name: d'Ouwe Moer Residence
comments:
Truth is. Hans was a really good host and did he best to describe the place. It's very unique, but if you want 4 bedrooms in Rotterdam, this does it.
the only reason i am writing this is to give people a heads-up on the slight negatives. 1) its a restaurant turned-into shared workspace. So the layout reflects that. 2) the basement bedroom is musty, as others have said. 3) there was often cigarette smoke entering the large bedroom, which Hans really helped solve as he could.
An additional plus is the great location! on the water, 2-3 amazing restaurants down the block.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
Due to a plumbing issue unfortunately, it wasn't possible for us to stay at this apartment but thankfully Martijn offered us another one of his apartments. So this review is for his apartment on Pijnackerstraat in Rotterdam:
Although the apartment on Pijnackerstraat was smaller than this one, it had all we needed and everything was really clean. The communication with Martijn, the check in and the check out were nice and easy. There is a grocery store located right next to the apartment which is a big plus. The view over the rooftops from the 3rd floor was great and fortunately there were two fans in the apartment because the apartment is on the top floor and therefore it was pretty hot at nighttime.
All in all, we enjoyed our stay despite the initial difficulties and would stay there again! Would recommend!

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
It was a great stay
We got a Problem with a roof Window in one room and it was fixed in 24h which was incredible

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
Everything was fine until we found out the cleaner was entering the property a few times every day which we was told would only be the last day. Our porch was being used as the laundry room for all the other properties. They were entering was in a sneaking in way while we was sleeping and when we were out.
I told Martij this wasn’t acceptable and there was a very good reason why I didn’t want them coming in without notice. The reason….attempted kidnapping of my son a few years ago so this entering without notice became an intrusion (Airbnb’s words when I called the helpdesk, given the circumstances).
We caught her sneaking in, she dropped all the laundry in the middle of the hall and ran into another apartment. I knocked on the window and asked her not to just walk in as she wasn’t meant to be. 10 mins later her son came and threatened to kill me. Police arrived, Airbnb told me we had to move me place as kids were very scared. Got witnesses to it all. Other than that it was all fine.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments: The host was very responsive and helped to accomodate the inconveniences we had at the check-in (the house was not property cleaned at the check-in). The location is very close to the center but the street is not the best. It is dirty and does not feel safe.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments: After requesting an early check in by 60 minutes & told they would try, to then not hearing back from them so we waited outside the apartment while the “cleaner” come back forth. Once in the place was filthy, I sent photos of the stains, the pubes on the bathroom floor, the egg left on the spatula from past guest. The washing machine didnt work, the towels smelt funny, the bed smelt funny. I did message about these issues & got told someone would come round to fix them, no-one came for 2 days & when they did they let themselves into the apartment to grab the dirty laundry that is stored in the hallway. No.23 is not the same as the pictures at all. Alot of stains, missing stuff. The beds are terrible to sleep on, I am so shocked to read reviews where people say “CLEAN”

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
Our apartment became unavailable the night before were due to fly to Rotterdam. Only after many calls with both the host & Air BnB they finally offered 3 separate studios…. They were fine and we looked forward to our 2 day break. On the last night we could not access one of the studios as the electronic lock failed…. After hours on the phone with the emergency number we finally got an alternative studios at 1.30am with a promise of it being repaired in the morning at 7am as we had to fly home and our passports weee in the studio with the broken lock.
Nothing happened at 7am and we finally got through to an office number at 9.15am. … a locksmith arrived at 10.45am and we just made our flights.
Air BnB tried to help but couldn’t make contact with the host either.
All in all I could not recommend these apartments and since we came back they have ignored our complaints.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments: I loved the place however they charged us for cleaning fees and also asked us to clean the towels and dishes. Which I think it’s not correct since we were charged for cleaning already. The glass door of the shower was also broken.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments: Very close to the city centre, quiet street and easy access (code lock). Very spacious and nicely decorated. Note that the rooms have windows in the ceiling without curtains (so early light in the room, and no possibility to open). Some downsides exist... The listing seems to show double beds, they are not: they are single beds. Basic equipment is available (salt, pepper, oil), but very little cooking materials and only plates, glasses and cutlery for 4 people (while the house is for 6). Bedlinen was a bit thin and there are no spare sheets, so put socks to keep warm during the night. The floor needs to be replaced on the ground floor. One small bathroom is tight for 4, let alone for 6, and the shower is open on the side of the toilet, so the floor gets completely wet when you shower (impossible to avoid). Finally, don't count on taking pictures with the nice yellow "25": it's not there... Overall OK, but for a company that rents it out, maintenance is needed.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
A really nice AirBnB! Very spacious and clean, in a quiet and calm location. Martijn was also super responsive and friendly.
The only area for improvement is perhaps some sort of blinds on the skylight in the bedrooms. It’s difficult to get a good nights sleep when the sun comes in.
If that could be improved, then it would be a perfect AirBnB :)

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
We booked it half a year in advance and there was no issues with reservation, which is great. The apartment is decent if you don’t plan to stay indoors much. It's an ok place for the offered price, very affordable and quite spacious, but could use some improvements here and there in regards to sanitary conditions.
There’s visible water damage on the floor, lots of dust in hard-to-reach areas, and cleaning supplies stored unsafely near gas/water lines. It lacks basics like trash bags, detergent pods for the washing machine, and had minimal coffee/tea supplies for 6 guests.
The listing says 1.5 baths but there's only one—with poor ventilation, no shower curtain, and water floods the floor. Wi-Fi broke on day 3 and never worked again. Skylight above a bed has no cover, and one bed frame was broken. Bugs in lamps were also spotted. On the plus side: 2 towels per guest, responsive host (eventually), decent kitchenware, peaceful neighborhood, and great location near transit and shops.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments: Our stay in Rotterdam was lovely! I highly recommend this flat, it had plenty of space and comfy beds. It was off the main streets, so it was quiet at night. Just a few steps away from the flat were plenty of cafés and shopping to explore. The flat is in the perfect location and I wish we had more time in Rotterdam, there is so much to do. Martijn and his team were responsive and very helpful! If I get the opportunity to come back to Rotterdam, I will use their flat again.

name: Urban Elegance 3BDR Apartment BSH
comments:
We stayed at this apartment for four nights with 6 people and we faced some issues.
There is only one bathroom with no separate toilet, which requires good communication if you want to get out of the house early. There is no shower curtain, which means the entire bathroom is flooded after a shower, also no shower mat was provided. And we also did not notice any kind of ventilation in the bathroom.
In front of the bathroom the floor was giving in, I am not sure if that is related with a flooded bathroom or if the moistness comes from the ground upwards but something needs to be done there.
Sadly it was also a bit dusty, we found hair and used hairbands in the drawers.
Lastly, the table is a bit too small for 6 people and the couch allows only place for 3 unless you really like each other.
Overall the amenities and services were as described which is good. The WiFi works well and is fast. I’d say if you are less then 6 people and barely spend time in the apartment I can recommend

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: This place is even better in person than it looks in the pictures. Absolute gem! The hosts are amazing - always ready to help with anything you need. I feel like we felt in love with Rotterdam just because we stayed at such a great place. The views are incredible! The apartment itself is spotless clean, has everything you can potentially need and the interior design is perfect. We’re definitely staying here next time we’re in Rotterdam. Thanks again to the hosts for our wonderful experience!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Truly a great experience and a perfect place to experience Rotterdam. The only drawback is the whole bathroom floor gets wet when you take a shower. Other than that it was completely flawless and the hosts were great! Loved the gym and the balcony and how walkable it was to great restaurants and coffee shops

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We enjoyed our stay at Luca’s place. The apartment was very clean, very conveniently located had all the necessary amenities. We had a fantastic view of the city from the apartment and felt very cosy. Michiel and Ana who manage the apartment were also very helpful.  We would definitely recommend the place.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
We had a very nice weekend and a very fun time!
The apartment was very nice and the view over Rotterdam was a dream!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
5 stars all the way! Thats one of the best apartments ive stayed in! Superb location, 14th floor, overviewing Centraal station! If you are reading this, look no further!
Thanks guys for having us! Cheers

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Great Airbnb stay! The hosts were friendly and helpful. We loved the view, and the appartment is very well located

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Beautiful apartment with a view over almost the whole city. It is easy to find and perfectly located, everything is closeby and even in walkin distance. The apartment itself is very clean and has everything you might need. There was an unpleasant smell coming out of the shower but by opening the doors and turning on the ventilation it was not a problem. Communication and Check-In were both very easy and efficent. We‘ll make sure to book this apartment again when visiting Rotterdam. Thank you!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Wonderful high rise apartment located in the heart of Rotterdam. Easily walkable anywhere and about a 5 min walk from Rotterdam Centraal.
Place is perfect for getting around the city and view from the balcony is incredible. Thank you for making my first stay in Rotterdam so great!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Very nice place! Easy to get to from Central station!
Wonderful view!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: This place is beautiful, conveniently located near the train station, and has a great sunset view. Highly recommend!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
I really enjoyed staying at Luca’s apartment. It’s literally a stones throw from the train station. It also has the convenience of having a super market very close. You are near all the restaurants and bars it’s basically a super location to be based and explore from. The apartment itself is super modern and comfortable it has everything you would need with the added bonus of great views over the city.
The only downside for me was the bed, it was a little hard and I like a few pillows. But this is just a personal preference and in no way a distraction from what is a 5 star apartment
Luca, thank you and your team for making my stay with my wife great, hopefully see you soon !!!!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: the accommodations this amazing especially the view from the terrace at night bed and very comfortable furniture , close to many points of interest, certainly was a great choice this accommodation

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had an amazing stay at Rotterdam. The host went out of their way to welcome us on our first day and was very responsive. The place was well-located within the central station and had a lovely view of the skyline. Would love to stay again!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
The appartement is beautifully decorated and very comfortable. The view is also a great plus! We really enjoyed our weekend.
The host was very friendly and helpful.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had a lovely stay here! The location was perfect, so close to Rotterdam centraal and the tram stop. The space was large, clean,  and perfect for us to work from! The kitchen had everything we needed and the laundry worked perfect! We loved sitting on the balcony eating dinner with the groceries we bought from the building! The gym was nice too. We would recommend this place to anyone- especially for a longer stay in the Netherlands. Thank you for having us!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Absolutely amazing stay. We were on the 14th floor, so the view was amazing. The place was so clean and so stylish. There couldn't have been a better location, everything is 10 minutes away, walking distance.
Host was amazing too! Allowed us to check in early but unfortunately we had a huge train delay and he was patient enough to wait for us!
You will not regret booking here, it checks a lot of boxes.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Central, spacious, modern, and with a gorgeous view.
Everything I needed in Rotterdam. I worked from here for a week. WiFi was reliable. Place was spacious and comfortable.
Would recommend staying here.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Great place! The view from the balcony was amazing. 🤩

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
This place is comfortable, furnished nicely, gets tons of light and has a killer view of the city from its large balcony. The building is a five minute walk from Rotterdam Centraal Station and equally close to Metro and Tram service. You can pretty much get anywhere in Rotterdam efficiently from this spot.
The apartment building is prominent in the city’s skyline, making it easy to find. The lobby feels upscale and spacious. This neighborhood is noisy and has tons of activity and life. But the apartment is a quiet oasis because of its super thick windows and doors. We slept really well. We recommend staying here to anyone looking to be in the center of everything in a modern, well-designed flat with easy host communication.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: This is an excellent apartment for a stay in the centre of Rotterdam. It is well equipped, spacious, comfortable and quiet. It is very handy to the central train station and to the tram network. There are various good restaurants, cafes and shops nearby. The view from the balcony is fantastic. The hosts are very responsive. We really enjoyed our time here.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had such a wonderful stay. We come to Rotterdam every year and we would definitely choose this place again ! The host was very nice and responsive. The apartment is very clean, cozy and well equipped. The terrace and the view is stunning. We recommend it 100% ! Thank you again !

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Very beautiful view and beautiful apartment

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
We absolutely enjoyed our stay and it was very central. Easy walk to Rotterdam Centraal.
The apartment is spacious and has lovely views of the city.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
I stayed here recently for about 1.5 weeks and had a great stay.
The flat is very spacious and clean; it also has a really nice view.
The gym is well-equipped and a nice bonus.
This was a work trip, so I didn’t spend too much time in the building itself, but overall very quiet and safe.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had a great stay at Luca's. The flat was spotless and exceeded our expectations. The views and sunsets from the balcony are amazing too. We would definitely stay again.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: This is an amazing apartment!  Both the unit, the furnishings and the building as a whole feel brand new,  Surprised that the walls separating apartments appeared to be concrete so not a sound is heard from the neighbors and the gorgeous floor to ceiling windows do a great job of blocking out the sounds of the city while letting nothing but that incredible view come through!  The view is west facing so nightly sunset viewing becomes an event.  Michiel and team are terrific hosts, meeting you upon arrival to check you in comfortably and answer any questions. This place is upscale living at it's best - highly recommend.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Nice and clean flat really close to the central station. The view is amazing and it has everything you need for a short stay.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Lovely apartment, very clean, great view and very comfortable.  Wonderful view.  The apartment is very conveniently located to almost everything.  The host / co-host was responsive & friendly. Would love to comeback any time.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: Great apartment with a great view. Very clean. Had a problem with the above neighbour dropping lit cigarettes off their balcony dropping on ours but it was addressed quickly. Only feedback would be to get a fan for the bedroom. Apartment runs hot and it was a bit uncomfortable to sleep and too loud to open window. Would recommend and stay again.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
This apartment is fantastic. It is spacious, and has all we needed for a week-long stay.
The views from the balcony are amazing and the apartment lets in a lot of light during the day. But it is dark and peaceful at night.
We also appreciated the gym in the building during our stay, a great perk.
One of the best places I’ve stayed, would highly recommend. The hosts are great, I would 100% stay here again.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had a great stay at Luca's place. The apartment is very close to Rotterdam Centraal station, and the city center with all the main attractions is a walk away. The apartment was clean and very spacious, with an amazing balcony view. It's great place to stay for a few days, or even longer since it has all the necessary ammenities. Definitely would visit again.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: We had a great stay. The apartment is centered and easily assessable. It’s located on a Main Street but the apartment is very quiet as it’s on the 14th floor. The apartment included everything we needed. The host also provided us with a crib for our daughter in last minute, which we were very thankful for.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Had a great stay. Host was kind enough to make early checkin possible. Very beautiful house with stunning views from balcony. Everything was perfect except the hot water, there was no hot water in the house.
Would definitely recommend.
Thanks

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
My wife and spent a great week in Luca's 'Home'. The apartment was modern, spacious and light, with a full front balcony with magnificent views on Rotterdam and the surrounding area to the west.
Luca and her supporting team were very responsive to the little questions we.
We certainly recommend this 'Home with a view'!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments: This was one of my favorite Airbnbs ever and we’ve stayed and many. The space was airy and light and generous, and the views and sunsets are amazing!! Central location w full service building, supermarket downstairs. Great stay.

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Thank you Michiel for the wonderful hospitality and the beautiful apartment with such a high standard and the most stunning view over the city!
The bed is super comfortable and I love how cozy everything feels. Truly a perfect stay!

name: Stylish Home in City Center
comments:
Luca’s place made me felt like at home and provides everything you need including washer and dryer, clothes rack and hangers, oven and microwave and a stove with clear instructions of use. The apartment is very spacious for 2 people like us. The view from the balcony is great especially around sunset time.
They had kindly done the check in with us early which is really a great offer after a long flight. Denise greeted us so that you dun need to find any mysterious post box/safe and enter loads of passcodes to enter the apartment.
I’d highly recommend groups pf 2-4 people to stay at Luca’s place when travelling to Rotterdam. Actually Rotterdam is a lovely city and is a nice spot to do day travel to other cities e.g. Hague/Delft/Utrecht etc

name: Private Cozy space in Rotterdam
comments: De ruimte zag er schoon en netjes uit. De woning bevind zich in een heel rustige buurt in een woonwijk aan de rand van natuurgebieden. Heldere instructies om binnen te komen. De host hebben we pas ontmoet bij het vertrekken. Aardige vrouw. Je hebt er voldoende privacy. De ruimte is volledig gescheiden van de rest van de woning met zelfs een eigen opgang. We hebben heerlijk geslapen in een fantastisch lekker bed. Koffie en thee is aanwezig. We komen graag nog een keer terug.

name: Private Cozy space in Rotterdam
comments: The Airbnb is really nice, but Anna and Anton are the starts of the show - amazing hosts with great empathy and kindness. The place was clean and comfy, located in a quiet and peaceful street, surrounded by green areas. We stayed for a week with our 2 cats and felt just like home. Nearby there are some places where you can buy cheap things for your cats to scratch so you preserve all their furnitures. There are supermarkets and some restaurants nearby where you can get food and snacks. There is a bus stop very close. Highly recommend this place!

name: Private Cozy space in Rotterdam
comments: The stay was very pleasant. The accommodation is relatively small but has everything you need. The heating takes a little while to warm up, but once it does, it’s very cozy. Everything was clean and well-maintained, and the check-in process was simple. Free parking is always available on the street.

name: Private Cozy space in Rotterdam
comments: Really enjoyed our stay in this cosy and cute tiny house, so conveniently located next to pretty parks where the doggo could run free. A really nice place for a relaxing getaway, right in the city but far from the noise and chaos! Super recommended!

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: I really did love this place, and it was the cheapest available and probably better than most, the location and view is breathtaking

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Nice appartement with a good view!

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments:
A private and quiet space with a great view !
Felt like I was at home. The panini-maker came in handy for a late night snack.
Can’t recommend it enough !

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Fantastic apt right in the centre of Rotterdam with the most amazing views!! Beautiful apt and very clean and well presented! Michiel went out of his way to deliver a cot and helped us change our arrival. Thanks for everything! Would definitely recommend it!!

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Lovely spacious flat with great views of the city. Hosts were very helpful. Would definitely recommend!

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Apartment was absolutely fantastic, great view and great location, very recommendable

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Loved the place, very big apartment, beautiful view and helpful host.

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Great location, lovely view, perfect for 4 at the price. Furnishings seemed tired but adequate for a group of 3 young adults and parent while attended a week-long family event.

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Nice place with a great view.

name: Central Apartment with Skyline View
comments: Great location! Walking distance to Museumpark and Markthal. Also close to the water bus station going to Kinderdijk. The flat has nice view to the river Maas and city center.

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam West-Center
comments: Wir hatten 4 wunderbare Tage in Rotterdam und in der Wohnung von Aurore. Die Katze war unser Highlight und hat uns wie zu Hause fühlen lassen. Eine super Wohnung um relativ schnell in der Innenstadt zu sein, für einen Städtetrip ideal

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam West-Center
comments: My friend and I was very happy to stay at Aurora place. It was very nice of her to meet us and make a room tour. The apartment is big, bright and clean, in simple words just perfect, btw the cat is adorable

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam West-Center
comments: we had a nice time at Aurore's. the flat has a beautiful view on the river, and everything is clean and tidy. we enjoyed the city, but also coming back home to cuddle with the little cat. we definitely recommend this place !

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam West-Center
comments: Beautiful apartment with great views. Amazing stay and the little kitty was great company!

name: Cosy apartment in Rotterdam West-Center
comments: Lovely homely spot, great communication. Really close to tram stop and lovely view of the river. Very comfortable would stay again.

name: Ruim appartement aan de Maas
comments:
The host:
Marike is such an amazing host, warm, attentive, polite & will go to lengths to make sure your stay is comfortable. She even reached out mid stay to check all was ok. If we had any questions, she was available to answer them.
The property:
On arrival the first thing you see is an open plan living room with large windows with a beautiful view over the Maas.
The property is fully equipped with everything you will need during your stay. The bed is extremely comfortable & spacious with a lovely decking area.
The bathroom is spacious with a large bath & shower with excellent water pressure.
The kitchen is very modern with a full cooker & hob. The kitchen is fully equipped with pans, cutlery, plates/glasses.
The living room has a large flatscreen TV & an extremely comfortable sofa for nights in.
I would highly recommend this property.
Marike, thank you so much for looking after us & welcoming us into your home.
This was by far one of the best Airbnb experiences I’ve had! ❤️

name: Cool apartment in Rotterdam with garden
comments: Had a great time at the apartment, it’s well located next to a street full of life, with easy access to buses going to the centrum

name: Kleurrijk Rotterdam
comments: Brenda's place in Rotterdam is an absolute gem! It is located very centrally and yet is quiet and peaceful. The apartment is in a typical old house, designed beautifully, with stylish colorful touches. The bed was very comfortable and the bedroom opens on to a lovely balcony overlooking a lush courtyard. The kitchen is very well equiped with anything you might need for cooking a full meal. Brenda met us in person and was wonderfully helpful and friendly. In sum, a fantastic place from which to explore Rotterdam. Highly recommended!

name: Kleurrijk Rotterdam
comments: Brenda's place was beautiful!  We had such a nice time hanging out over the weekend and were able to retreat during King's Day in the evening.  She has a beautiful balcony too, which we really enjoyed.  Thank you Brenda for the lovely stay!

name: Kleurrijk Rotterdam
comments: Great apartment,  big bright windows, lovely balcony & big screen projection for Streaming was a lot of fun.  Lively walkable community with restaurants & shops with easy access to the Metro for visiting all of the venues planned. Brenda was a wonderful host and available as needed, willing to work with us on arrival time & parking our rental car.

name: A gem in the heart of the city with free parking
comments:
Thank you for everything ! The apartment was perfect for us, living room is very cool with a big sofa, balcony is amazing.
The bedrooms are very comfortable, king size bed ++
We will come back next year if possible !

name: A gem in the heart of the city with free parking
comments: Ideal place for my family of 3 with two bedrooms, living space, and covered balcony. Close to metro/tram, restaurants, bars, etc. Host is very responsive to questions and communicative throughout stay. Very comfortable stay and would return.

name: A Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge waterview room 1
comments: Maryam & Arnaud, were excellent hosts. They are very friendly and accommodating. As they are just starting Air B&B hosting they were open to suggestions about what could be improved without being offended (though they seemed to have it spot on!). Lovely place to stay overlooking the suspension bridge and around 20 minute walk to town with fabulous views. Cannot recommend this place enough. Thanks guys.

name: B Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge waterview room 2
comments:
This Airbnb place was absolutely great! The place was clean, well-maintained, and had all the amenities that I needed. The host was very welcoming and accommodating, making sure that my stay was comfortable. Overall, I would highly recommend this Airbnb place to anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in the area.
Nice view too!

name: B Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge waterview room 2
comments: Maryam welcomed us into her home and we were delighted with the way she treated us. We will definitely be returning again. She is friendly , when she's not busy will help you out with anything you need. I can't wait to comeback next year and visit again !

name: B Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge waterview room 2
comments:
It was definitively a great experience, the room and all the spaces are lovely, the view is incredible and Maryam is always really attentive and making sure everything is okay.
Surely want to come back!

name: C Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge view balcony room
comments: Maryam is a great host, she is easy to communicate with and explains everything to you about the place, the location is in the city center and the room has a great view. Can definitely recommend her place to everyone visiting Rotterdam.

name: D Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge view single room
comments:
Maryam is a sweetheart and the best host I've had. She was patient with my train delays (I arrived after midnight), handed the keys over personally and explained everything. Maryam was comforting and made me feel at home immediately. She lives right next door so she is always there to help. She is very passionate about making your stay enjoyable and takes good care, which is especially comforting as a solo traveller.
Also the rooms were spotless and so nicely kept. Slightly decorated but not too much and everything looked very new. I had everything I needed.
I felt welcome, comfortable and safe. I can only recommend her and will surely come back.

name: D Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge view single room
comments:
Maryam was a friendly and helpful host.
The room was comfortable and with a nice view. The Kitchen and bathroom were very clean.

name: D Rotterdam centre Erasmusbridge view single room
comments:
