Very kind and generous, Maryam was a great surprise for me. I didn't feel she was a host, I felt her like a friend, always there to help, bringing things that I even forgot at home (or to buy), supportive and responsive in a way I never met any host before, ofering more and even beyond!
From my experience, people matter more than the place itself, because if there is any issue, a good host will be there for you!
Location is absolutly amazing, couldn't be better, the room is simple and very clean (like in the pictures), the bathroom was to share, but the other guests were clean and respectful and Maryam came several times per day to check it and clean.
The view from the terrace during evening especially, is magnificent.
I had one of the best experiences of my life in Rotterdam and Maryam was an important part of it!

name: Riverside Rotterdam apartment
comments:
Fantastic host and apartment! I would happily stay again if given the opportunity and wholeheartedly recommend it.
Convenient and undercover access to Albert Heijn supermarket and also quick access to public transport.
The place is serene, cozy, and offers a lovely balcony view of the river which is nice to sit and enjoy the sunshine.

name: Charmante jaren 30 woning
comments: This is a great place to stay! The neighbourhood is nice and quiet, and very convenient. Within walking distance there is a beautiful lake, park as well as grocery store and local shopping street. A station for tram line 4 is less than 10 min walk away and that will take you to the centre of Rotterdam in 20 mins. Eva was a kind host and she gave nice local tips. Her place had everything we needed, and we had a very comfortable time. Thanks for a great stay!

name: Spacious House in Central Rotterdam!
comments: On the good side, communication was really excellent and proactive. The location is also excellent - walkable for much of central Rotterdam and in an interesting building. On the less good side the apartment is, as someone else has noted, soulless. It really needs some love and attention - small things like loo seats tightened, cupboards in bedrooms, a bit more furniture and maybe decoration so it does not feel quite so basic. I don't like to write somewhat negative reviews, but in this case the apartment could be so much nicer with just a bit of work.

name: Spacious House in Central Rotterdam!
comments:
Amazing apartment in the heart of Rotterdam modern city center district. Extremely central location allows for abundant exploration opportunities and city view discovery. Further, the apartment itself is specious and very well equipped.
Salwa and the co-host Michiel are a great hosts. We truly had an experience to remember!

name: Gezellig familiehuis
comments:
Celeste has a cozy, spacious house in a peaceful location. It’s walking distance from shopping street. Surrounded by walkable path for dogs and open spaces for dogs to run around. Love the backyard, the wood stove, big window to the street and wooden dining table.
Instruction was clear but incomplete. Overall we had nice time with our family and 2 little dogs.

name: Sonder Rose | Triple Room
comments: We had a great stay! Easy Check-in and check-out process, easy parking in a 2-min walk distance (25€/day). Warm welcome and kind staff. Clean room and bathroom. 24/7 water, warm beverages and a variety of fresh fruits made coming home from a rainy day very delightful. Downtown Rotterdam in a walking distance, in front of the hotel is an amazing bakery and cheese shop. We would definitely stay here again!

name: Sonder Rose | Triple Room
comments: It was incredible we didn’t expect it to be this great to be honest, the water fountain ,the location the view ,the coffee machine ... Beds were so comfortable that we didn’t wanted to go outside…

name: Sonder Rose | Lower-Level Queen Room
comments: I've already wrote a review for the other room. Overall it was good. A bit expensive but the staff was nice and everything was in order.

name: Sonder Rose | Lower-Level Queen Room
comments: Sonder Rose was a perfect stay before boarding our cruise to Norway.  The staff was so friendly and helpful after a 8 hour flight.  It started our trip in a perfect way!  Thank you

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Wij hadden moeite met het feit dat het inchecken online moest gebeuren. De website reageerde niet en het lukte niet met om onze identiteitskaarten up te loaden. Eenmaal gelukt en gearriveerd in Sonder, konden wij rechtstreeks naar onze kamer waar wij via een app de code kregen om onze kamer te openen. Zo hadden we alle privacy en moesten we geen sociaal contact houden, wat ook eens fijn is. De kamer was heel mooi en ruim. Leuke producten in de douche en de haardroger werkte prima. Het hotel is op kleine wandelafstand van de Witte De Withstraat. Wij hebben erg genoten van ons verblijf hier en zouden zeker terugboeken bij Sonder!

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Very helpful receptionists who helped when there where problems with the room. Very good design of the accomodation. Perfect location, close to the city centre’s liveliest streets and the harbour promenade. Five stars

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: the AC was locked when we arrived, and this is in august. we asked the staff through airbnb about it, and they said someone could help us tomorrow. we paid a lot for this room, a small room facing the garbage area, and AC was clearly advertised, and essential during summer. the room was hot and the staff was not helpful. we asked to switch rooms since the ac wasn’t working and they said there are 2 rooms available but we may need to pay more… i said either we pay less for this room or upgrade is for free. and they said they’re asking for approval then never got back. “wait a moment” then someone knocked early next morning, even though i had said please do not send anyone without writing us first, since we need to sleep. they sent someone anyway, broke our much-needed sleep after travel, then later came back and gave a lot of attitude about how we need to close the windows in order to unlock the AC… no one and no where was this mentioned. windows open all night and mosquito bites.

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Very nice location, central but still quiet, easy to get anywhere! The people at the front desk very helpful and polite. Regarding Parking it is available an the street or private parking lots very near to the accommodation .

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Good place, quiet outskirt location (about 20 min walk to centre). Very limited street noise so it is easy to sleep, friendly staff. Very helpful that there is a communal workspace available to guests.

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Had a great stay at Sonder - it definitely exceeded my expectations in every way! We were on the ground floor but had no problems at all with noise and the blackout curtains are AMAZING. The room and hotel were modern and nicely designed. Super comfy bed and a great modern bathroom too. Train station is a 25 min walk and there's a tram stop outside the hotel too.

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments:
We kwamen binnen en er was erg vriendelijk personeel. Helaas was de kamer viezig, teennagels op de grond, blauwe vlekken op het beddengoed en haren in het bed…. Ze konden ons helaas niet helpen dus daar hebben we in geslapen…
Ze hebben wel de helft van onze kosten terug gekregen en dat was erg netjes van hun.
Had hoge verwachtingen door de goede reviews maar zeer teleurgesteld…

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: We enjoyed the small hotel for 3 nights. Overall it was good. The view of the first room we booked was 'garbage' meaning that in front of the window there was the garbage, in the back of the hotel. The second room was ok, street view. The staff was proactive and friendly. Thank you and hope to see you next year!

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments:
Had a good time over the New Year days!
Great and safe place to stay, right at the heart of Rotterdam.
Everything is reachable by foot or with public transport.
Also wonderful to take walks along the Veerhaven, even in winter! :)
The host was always responsive and the room(s) were clean and had plenty of daylight, especially the one under the roof.
Thanks!

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments: Simple hotel based. Good location, although slightly away from the Center still plenty of restaurants and bars. Also metro is close by.

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments:
I never give bad reviews but this experience with a hotel chain and a VERY precise heating system with window handle sensors needs to be more widely known so others don’t have this experience.
My night was uncomfortable (it was -2 outside) as I discovered at 1am when I came back to my room that the heating control panel in my room said ‘centrally locked’ in Dutch and showed a spanner icon on the display - I understood sleepily at 1am that there was a maintenance fault.
But why was the heating control panel locked?
Because one of the rooms two window handles were one inch away from being perfectly vertical (although both windows were fully 100% closed) and the window handles have sensors linked to the heating system - but who knew?
The annoying part for me is I didn’t touch the windows at any time because it was freezing outside.
I asked the receptionist why don’t Sonder provide this very specific and uncommon detail about the heating in the check in process or in digital comms?

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments:
it was beautiful accomodation. But we were small so we could not close the window from above
, it was cold in the room. and the mirror was so high, we couldn't see our reflection. but all in all we had fun and would definitely recommend it to our friends

name: Sonder Rose | Double Room
comments:
I don’t usually write detailed reviews, but this stay deserves one. Sonders Rotterdam was exceptional. From the lobby and dining area to our room, everything exceeded my expectations. The location was perfect, close to shops, Chinatown, and the train station, with easy access to everywhere we wanted to go.
Most importantly, the street was peaceful and quiet at night, which made our stay even more enjoyable. A truly ideal location. I’ll definitely be coming back in the future.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
This is a tastefully furnished and well equipped apartment with a view over Rotterdam.
Capelsebrug railway station is in the immediate vicinity.
Key handover and communication with the landlord went smoothly.
We enjoyed our holiday very much and I can fully recommended the apartment.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: Great place to stay not too far from the city centre but not too close to be disturbed by city noises had a great stay and would recommend

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
Apartment and location OK
Issues: Included parking was unavailable because too complicated access procedure and hidden info by Birds Eye; obliged to park the car away in the street. Not acceptable.
Missing equipments and coffee machine out of order.
Bad, poor and unpleasant communication with BirdsEye' correspondents.
Definitely not the AirBnB spirit.
Do not recommend.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: The apartment was perfect for our family. The beds are comfortable, the place is very clean, and it is in a quiet neighborhood setting. All amenities were as described and the host was very helpful. Make sure you request a parking space in advance if you want to park onsite, otherwise you will have to park in the neighborhood across the street a ways (not really a big deal, but a bit inconvenient with a lot of luggage). I would highly recommend this place! We loved it.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
Great location, the flat is 5 min walk from the Metro station (trains come every couple of mins). The Metro station is 10 mins from the centre of town on the Metro.
Very quiet location, which also seems very safe. No restaurants near the flat but there is a small Spar store.
Flat is in pristine condition, and super comfy beds. Would very happily stay there again. Great value for money.
Only very minor comments were (1) no toaster, (2) tv mounted at head height in the lounge making it slightly awkward to watch (although the sofa can be moved to help this and the tv is top notch).

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
We had an amazing stay! Check in was simpel, communication with the host agency was very kind/ fast and we even had a parking slot in front of the main door. The AirBnB is absolutely look-alike the pictures and is very comfortable. Two separate Bed rooms with comfi beds, one with a big closet. Living area is very stylish and good for working (Good Wi-Fi) or to relax. It has a Balcony with a beautiful view and a fully equipped kitchen we enjoyed to cook in. They have a separate toilet and a bathroom with rain shower wich is nice for 4 persons. Everything was clean and nice. We appreciated that we had a home gym and a lobby with nice terrace. Also there was an washer and dryer in the flat. Detergent and tabs were available.
Thx for this nice stay! We all can really recommend it!

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: Really clean, modern place and lovely view from the balcony. Also really easy to get to using public transport! Would definitely stay here again.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: Spotless apartment 30 mins walk from Erasmus uni which is where my son is going and that’s why we rented this side of town. Taxi driver struggled to find it though as street goes in lots of different directions but has same n  as me. Apartment has everything you need and is very comfortable with local store nearby. Handful of metro stops into town. Only issue we had was the air ventilation system being faulty so very hot especially at night. But housekeeping delivered a fan within 10 mins so that helped!

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
I stayed here with a colleague while in town for a conference. We thought the place was great! It’s very clean, beautiful, and feels like home. We appreciated that there was a supermarket nearby, and the apartment is located on a beautiful street. I would definitely stay here again, and highly recommend it to anyone visiting Rotterdam.
The apartment was quite warm, but the hosts were very kind and brought us an additional fan for more ventilation. They were very helpful and communicative.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
We stayed here for few days and it has been a pleasant times!
The house location is exactly next to a metro stop, very convinient! We could even see the metro from a far as part of the view. The surrounding is really pretty and peaceful, especially with the canal. The house is super clean and super complete with the utensils and other home appliances. Even they provided us lots of nespresso and wide variety of teas!
Communication with the host team was very smooth and responsive. They gave very clear instructions. The host kindly allowed us to have a very early check in after our long haul flights and even let us to have a later time for check out as we need the space to pray. We really appreciate this kindness.
We've really enjoyed our stay! Thank you :)

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: We had a great stay! Communication with the host was smooth and friendly – he was very accommodating and even allowed us to check in early. The apartment is new, modern, and just like in the photos. It’s located in a quiet, green area only a few minutes from the metro and a grocery store. The beds, mattresses, and pillows were very comfortable, and the kitchen had everything we needed. We also appreciated the welcome bottle of wine, tea, coffee, and toiletries. The apartment was clean and cozy, though the balcony and windows had some cobwebs and spiders, which was a bit unpleasant when airing the rooms. It would also help if the towels were in different colors to tell them apart. The building also offers a gym and common lounge, which we didn’t use but found nice to have available. Overall, we were very satisfied and would definitely recommend this place!

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments:
Very nice place, comfy & modern. Nice little balcony is a quiet & peaceful neighbourhood.
Thanks
Euan

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with two bedrooms
comments: My stay with Birdseye in Rotterdam was perfect for my needs. The apartment was spacious and clean and well supplied with basics. The furniture and beds were very comfortable. Best of all, the Host was exceptionally kind and responsive. I felt like I could easily reach out if I needed help with anything. The surrounding neighborhood was also stunning. I recommend walking to the main part of town to see all the beautiful streets and homes. There is a Metro station very nearby and a great little grocery store open most hours. I will definitely stay here again.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments:
I stayed at Angela's place for 1 week. Was in Rotterdam for work. The area is nice and quiet, despite the fact that appartment windows are facing the busy street with trams, you won't hear that completely. The appartment is super clean and has everything you need.
Right in-front of the building there is a supermarket where you can buy all you need. Appartment is in the walking distance to the main Rotterdam city sights. It was a very nice stay. I'm very happy about my trip. Can recommend Angela's appartment.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments: I was in Rotterdam for some work. The location of Angela's place at Oostplein is just a stone's throw from the center of activity at Blaak and Beurs, but also resides in a quieter neighborhood. The attic studio makes for a cosy space with a lot of natural light.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments: The apartment is right at the top of the building with really nice views. The Apartment was comfortable and pretty large. The stairs were a pretty steep climb, so keep that in mind, but there were hand rails. The apartment was clean and had the basics for cooking meals, although all i did was reheat in the microwave. The neighborhood really nice- parks, cafes, and food. I would definitely stay again!

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments:
I only stayed for two nights but Angela’s apartment would have been perfect for a long weekend stay for a couple. Ideally located a few minutes walk from the tram station, I could get to the Rotterdam train station very quickly and seamlessly.
The apartment was big, clean and well-organised. It’s like an open space with perfect walls that separated the different spaces. There is sufficient kitchen appliances and crockery for simple cuisine.
There are a few restaurants right down the street, including an authentic Italian restaurant that serves delicious food!
All in all, a lovely stay in this apartment in a quiet neighbourhood of Rotterdam, far enough away from noise yet close enough to benefit from visiting other parts of the city.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments: Clean, spacious flat that’s well-located for getting around Rotterdam and in a pleasant neighbourhood. Angela was helpful and sorted out an issue with the hot water right away. The only down side was being on the top floor during a 30 degree heat wave, as it was pretty warm even with the big windows open. Other than that, it was great!

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments:
Overall a pretty good value spot. Neighborhood is nice and the apartment is minimal but has what you'd expect. Close to transit.
The couple issues were that it's an attic so it can get pretty warm, the floors are a bit slanted, and there's a bar that makes a good amount of noise late at night right next door.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments: The apartment would be great for a young couple/ single person. The location is superb, the bed is very comfortable and the bathroom large and spacious. The kitchen is basic. As stated in other reviews the stairs are VERY steep, and checking in was not helped by a 4 hour power cut in the area the night I arrived. The entrance into the actual flat is the stairs coming up through a hole in the living room floor, with no security balustrade around the edge. I nearly had a very serious fall as the flat was pitch black and I had not gotten used to the layout. The entry code on the door at street level needs the black box on the top of the handle to be slid up to reveal the keypad, which wasn’t obvious so would have been useful to know. Otherwise it was a great location, and I would recommend it to fit young people without kids.

name: Modern apartment near city center
comments: It’s an ok place to stay- it worked great for my purposes as I needed to be close to an event location nearby.   The place is in the attic with slanted ceilings which could be challenging for taller people.  It has extremely steep stairs too which can be hard to navigate.  It’s an open concept too with no separation between kitchen, bathroom, living room so you need to be comfortable with others you staying with.  Some amenities are not as described- there’s no washer, no TV, no veranda or balcony and the WiFi was spotty.

name: Gastenverblijf/studio
comments: The place is basically a one-window shop turned in a small studio. Located in a very nice and quiet street, it very clean and convenient and easy to find. We were there for the football game, and it was walking distance from the stadium. Restaurants too are not far away. Tom was very responsive and friendly. The only "challenge" was parking, as street parking was easy to find, but very expensive (3 Euro/hour), but this is the way it is in Holland!

name: Gastenverblijf/studio
comments: Great studio, very clean, very well located, and our cat Tina enjoyed very much the view.

name: Gastenverblijf/studio
comments:
Tom is a very nice and helpful host – he responded quickly to our questions, helped us get a cheaper parking ticket right away, and even shared some useful links for King’s Day. His support was really appreciated!
That said, the accommodation wasn’t quite what we expected. The pictures made the room appear much more spacious and higher than it actually is. In reality, it feels more like a private room in a shared house rather than a separate apartment or full accommodation. It’s also a bit noisy and quite bright at night, which made it harder to fully relax.
In the end, we decided to leave earlier than planned. We’d say this place can work for a short stay of 1–2 nights, but wouldn’t recommend it for a longer visit, especially for two people.

name: Uniek appartement, mét dakterras en 2 slaapkamers
comments:
Very few accommodations exceed our expectations, but Anna's place was beyond what we could have imagined. SPACIOUS, BEAUTIFUL, CLEAN, COMFORTABLE. The space is HUGE. In addition to the master bedroom balcony, the rooftop outdoor space was incredible -- nothing like it anywhere as far as the eye could see! In addition, sitting in the windows in the living room looking out into the treetops and the street below was a wonderful place to have a coffee or glass of wine at the end of a long & adventurous day.
All furniture was new & very comfortable. No cramped spaces in the entire unit. Lots of drawers and cabinets for clothes. Washer AND dryer. De' Longhi coffe machine. Plenty of silverware, glassware and dishes. Gorgeous space for cooking (which we did not use.) Great location for public transportation. Did not have to walk longer than 5 minutes in any direction to catch a bus. Beautiful parks close by.
We could have stayed forever.

name: Elegant Escape 1BDR Apartment PRH - 72 SQM
comments:
Good for 2-3 nights, or multi-week stays. Bad in between.
The positive: The apartment itself is modern and clean. Good location on an island in the river with good bus connection.
The negative:
- There were construction work right outside our window that we didn't know about beforehand.
- There is weekly cleaning on Mondays, but it's barely noticeable (they don't take out the trash, it's your job).
- Some details are just not there: The closet is a bit too small. there are two sinks, but one bottle of soap, and no extra trash bags.
- It has coffee, tea and 4 dishwasher pods for ONE TIME, better to have them on each weekly clean
- The most annoying thing: it does not have washing detergent. I stayed for 5 nights so I had go and buy overpriced washing detergent (20 pods) just to wash twice. I wish they provided this small detail.
- The check out experience was a bit stressful as you have to take out trash and do the dishes. I mean, c'mon I have a train to catch!

name: Cozy Modern Studio PRH - 44SQM
comments: Great view of the city, apartment had mostly what I needed for my stay. Location was pretty good, I managed to get around the city just fine either walking or using public transit.

name: Cozy Modern Studio PRH - 44SQM
comments:
Nice flat, we enjoyed our stay.
Bit low on dishes and cutlery. Weekly cleaning was announced however somewhat surprising. The flat is step free except for balcony and shower.

name: Cozy Modern Studio PRH - 44SQM
comments: The studio was luxurious, easy to find, the views were beautiful and the people in the building were very friendly and nice. It was a pleasant stay and maybe until soon. Thanks Martijn !

name: Cozy Modern Studio PRH - 44SQM
comments: Everything was just great! I really enjoyed my stay. Beautiful view, especially in the evening. The apartment was very clean and quiet. The hosts were absolutely friendly and fast with replies when I had questions. The neighbourhood is very calm and beautiful and perfect for strolling. Can only recommend!

name: Renewed urban style apartment with terrace
comments:
We hebben een geweldige tijd gehad. Het appartement was super gezellig ingericht, schoon en ruim groot genoeg . We hebben er op 1ste kerstdag genoten van een zelf gemaakte kerstdiner.
Het appartement ligt centraal vlak bij de Maastunnel. Op deze manier kan je de meeste highlights van Rotterdam vanuit deze plek bekijken.
Aan de hand van een tip van Nicolo hebben we gebruik gemaakt van donkey republic en fietsend door Rotterdam gegaan.
Was echt super
Joannette , Thomas & Manon

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with one bedroom
comments: Great location for a 2-person stay to visit Rotterdam. It has parking included, which is very handy since most of Rotterdam is paid parking. The host was really helpful when arriving. The appartment has a big room that is kitchen, livingroom and tv-corner so you are always "together" even when someone is cooking and the other is watching TV or reading. The curtains can be drawn such that there are no city lights coming into the bedroom, and due to the isolation, you don't hear the metro when the balcony door is closed.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with one bedroom
comments: Quiet place, appliances were brand new, and had the perfect location to visit Rotterdam. We enjoyed the view from the 5th floor and had an overall great experience. We'll be coming back for sure.

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with one bedroom
comments:
We needed a place to explore into Rotterdam for the weekend but I wanted to stay a little out of the City Centre.
Would highly recommend the apartment to anyone thinking of visiting Rotterdam - which we also absolutely loved visiting - friendly, busy, well managed public transport, lots of cultural things to do!
Pros:
- The communications leading up to our stay were really excellent
- The metro is a 2 minute walk across a small bridge, past a well stocked local shop, and it was just a few minutes until we were in central Rotterdam.
- The apartment is lovely: clean, with all facilities needed for a stay. The gym downstairs was perfect. The apartment balcony opens on to a small tree-lined canal.
- There was a good choice of restaurants close by to visit or order-in from.
Cons:
I'm struggling tbh. The metro line is not that far away but on the Sunday morning we had to check the Metro was running because we hadn't noticed any trains even with the balcony doors wide open...

name: High-end Serviced Apartment with one bedroom
comments: The host was quite responsive, they accommodated our request for an earlier check in. The apartment was clean and well equipped, exactly what we were looking for: we could cook and do laundry. The only downside was the noise from the metro running nearby, but we could sleep well as long as we kept the windows closed.

name: Beautiful house with garden
comments: Viktoriya is a friendly and helpful owner. The apartment was as expected with all necessary commodities and a small garden with balcony.

name: Tiny House Historisch Delfshaven (Galerie Petit)
comments: Stayed in Aads apartment while working a few weeks in Rotterdam. The location is perfect, walking distance to Metro and centrum (and my work), very quiet neighbourhood with view over the river Schie. The appartment is cosy and very well equipped, everything i needed in the kitchen (herbs, oil, coffee, tea, butter etc), plenty of towels, books to read and tourist brochures for inspiration .  Check-in was with Aads son, who explained everything and even borrowed me a bike for my stay. I truly enjoyed my stay and will be happy to use this appartment another time.

name: Museum park loft
comments: Great place, equipped with all the essentials plus lots of nice added extras. Clean and functional with a great outdoor terrace. Good location in a quiet residential street, about a 20 mins walk to the central station.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: I recently stayed at the rooftop studio and had a fantastic experience. The location was unbeatable, offering stunning views of the city skyline. The studio itself was cozy yet spacious enough for my needs, and the amenities provided were top-notch. The cleanliness was impeccable, and the host were incredibly friendly and accommodating. Overall, I highly recommend the rooftop studio for anyone looking for a comfortable and memorable stay.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Very nice place in a great location! The outside space is amazing. Great view and the breeze is unbeatable. Loved our stay!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: One of the best AirBnB's I've ever been to. Huge room with adjoining and private bathroom, large balcony overlooking the city, amazing location and impeccably clean. Martine was super responsive and accommodating: allowed me to drop the bags hours before check in, was patient and quick responding to my questions. The availability of a washing machine and dryer was great.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Beautiful and nice place. But the single bedroom is extremely hot and noisy, with uncomfortable bed, too thick quilt and weird pillow. No cooling equipment at all, have to open the window all night. Mosquitoes and howling seagulls.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Martine is a wonderful host and the place exceeded expectations, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay in Rotterdam and would be sure to return in the future. It’s worth mentioning that the view from the terrace is second to none!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Great location, easy to walk into the centre of Rotterdam and loads of transport links in surrrounding areas. Great place, with great views!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments:
We had a great time in Martines Airbnb, the room is lovely!
The view is as nice as the pictures.
Thank You!

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: We had a great stay at Martine’s, the room and bathroom were cozy and clean, but the real highlight was the roof terrace, which had a great view. Unfortunately the smaller bedroom can not be locked which should be communicated as there could be other people/guests in the house. Still, we had a great stay and would probably come again.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments:
Clean and comfortable space. Sharing an apartment with hosts can feel like you don’t have privacy, but having the top level to ourselves made it feel like we had our own private space. Maritine was kind and responsive. And the apartment’s location is pretty close to restaurants, bars, and grocery stores. The tram is just a few minutes away and the metro is a 10-15 minute walk, so we were able to go
from the apartment to the Hoek Van Holland Beach in under an hour.

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Martine’s place is amazing! It was very spacious and clean. The terrace was the highlight of our stay because it had the best view of the city. Martine is very friendly, helpful and responsive☺️

name: Studio with rooftop terrace, parking en extra room
comments: Beautiful space with an amazing view. Clean, comfortable, and perfect for a relaxing stay. Martine is a great host, friendly and responsive :)

name: Trendy apartment Rotterdam Zuid
comments: Had an excellent stay at James' apartment. It's furnished to a very high standard and right across the park. Unobstructed views from both sides make the apartment very well illuminated. Well connected by public transit.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: We were a group of 6 Canadians enjoying the Rotterdam film festival! We were very happy with the AirBnB. The unit is very bright. Great cafes are within 10 minute walks. Very pleased and would stay here again!

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: We had a great stay in this lovely, spacious and comfortable home - after entering through a tunnel it was light and airy, and perfect for our family of 6 (grandparents, parents and teenagers). We loved the beautiful design and appreciated the attentive and kind hosts.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: We had a great time in the interesting house. Everything was clean and there was no noise. The key situation was a bit challenging, but all in all we can recommend staying in the house fully.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: Interesting and eclectic space. The natural light is beautiful. Close to tram station, and lots of restaurants close. We enjoyed our time there.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: A fantastic house for a family holiday. Well equipped for children and babies and the place had the most gorgeous style. Definitely main character energy and is a memorable part of our trip. We went during winter and loved the large windows as it let a lot of natural light in.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: Maarten's apartment was light and clean.  There was no traffic noise and we enjoyed our stay there.  We were met by his associate Michiel who was very welcoming and explained everything we needed to know.  The entrance is slightly unusual, it might have been more difficult to find our way in the dark.

name: Spacious Family Retreat near Rotterdam's Heart!
comments: My friends and I enjoyed every thing about this flat, the sunlight, the space, the rooms, everything was on point ! I highly recommend

name: Spacious and bright apt near lake&park-Kralingen
comments: We had a very pleasant stay of 11 days. The apartment is very central and within walking distance of restaurants and bars. The living room and dining have a great view and are very well lit. All amenities were as described and upto the mark. Highly recommended for staying .

name: Spacious and bright apt near lake&park-Kralingen
comments: Great spot in Kralingse, walking distance to the park and lake and shops, with a couple of nice restaurants and a bar in the same street.

name: Riverview Apartment Rotterdam
comments:
Yat Lons apartment exceeded our expectations.
We were welcomed with a great personal introduction and good local information. We were also helped with setting everything up we needed (for example the TV).
The apartment itself is very spacious and has a beautiful view. Local transit is reachable in 8 minutes, so it has a great connection to everything necessary.
During the stay Yat Lon was very helpful, friendly and fast responding. We had a great experience and I dont just recommend the AirBnB itself but especially Yat Lon as a great host!

name: Gerenoveerd appartement in Rdam (met tuin)
comments: This apartment was absolutely perfect! Homey, luxurious, comfortable, and clean. It’s on a quiet street, but so easy to get to Centraal Station and all the exciting places of Rotterdam. Gorgeous decor, incredible backyard space, cozy bed, and a beautiful bathroom that I would love to have in my own home! Gin is a phenomenal host; simple and quick communication, accommodating, helpful, and gave great suggestions. Would highly recommend; a true 10 out of 10!

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Der Aufenthalt war schön! Es ist ein kleines, schickes Appartment. Ich fühlte mich sehr wohl. Das Highlight ist das schöne Badezimmer. Es ist sehr ruhig und angenehm. Die Lage ist ok, wenn man Ruhe möchte. Es gibt Restaurants und Supermärkte nur 5 Minuten entfernt. Zum Sightseeing ist es nicht so gut geeignet, man muss 25-30 Minuten Zeit nehmen um in die City zu kommen. Das Preis-Leistungs Verhältnis ist gut! Ich empfehle es :)

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Schone ruimte met volledige privacy (eigen douche/ toilet) in aanbouw van het huis. Goede prijs-kwaliteit verhouding. Ik kom zeker terug.

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments:
I had a good stay and I'm overall satisfied, hence four stars 🤗 The place was clean, peaceful and as described. The only minor issue I had was that there was a bit of a basement smell to the place.
There were lots of air fresheners, but instead of helping against the smell they kind of mixed with it and made the air heavy and a bit difficult to breathe. I wished the windows allowed for more airflow...

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments:
I am really sorry but this was not a good stay, within one meter of the property was a digger breaking concrete at six in the morning. Clearly Doris was not responsible for this severe noise but as the roadworks were underway prior to my arrival then she should have let me know and then I would have checked into a hotel.
really sorry to complain but this was not a happy experience.

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Great stay here. Would stay again. Shops really nearby and restaurants. 5 min walk. Also 5 min walk to nice big park. Bus stop 2 min walk. Was a bonus that there was a microwave!! Also extra curtain on door thats not shown in listing. Shower nice and shampoo etc provided. Exactly as described. Thank you. See you next year i hope!

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Doris' place is centrally located in a quiet neighborhood walkable to public transportations. The private room is very neat and tidy, well lighted and ventilated, and caters everything that you would basically need. What I loved most especially is their hospitality and thoughtfulness. I would definitely book their place again when I get the chance to return in Rotterdam!

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Very nice place. This is separate from the main house which is totally fine (extra privacy). This annex looks like it was renovated or created with high standards (Grohe tap, very good shower, looks really nice and new and very clean etc.). Even though there is no access to a kitchen, at least there is a mini fridge and microwave in the room. Doris is very friendly. It was great for what I needed.

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments: Zie mijn vele vorige reviews, want ik verblijf regelmatig bij Doris.

name: Comfortable bedroom with private shower and toilet
comments:
This functional cozy little home is perfect for a solo traveller! Very homely feeling to it, and has many little things in the home that makes life easier. Easy to get to with a bus stop closeby.
Doris is such a warm host and a delight to talk to! Very responsive and accommodating, and very sweet :)

name: Coolhaven studio
comments: Anita and her husband were very helpful and flexible with check in/out times. The flat has everything you might need and is very tastefully decorated with the highest quality in everything, including under floor heating. As  I was travelling with a niece, they arranged an extra bed in the living room.  That -and the bedding were very comfortable. The most outstanding feature of the flat, though, are the triple windows with stunning views of the canal. There is a choice of 3 cafes round the corner for breakfast. I’ll stay there again if I return to Rotterdam.

name: Gezellig appartement in Blijdorp
comments: Isa was a fantastic host, she greeted me when I arrived and gave some great local recommendations! The flat is bright, cozy and spacious. It is a one station away from Rotterdam Central Station and 3 stations away Beurs. Highly recommend!

name: Gezellig appartement in Blijdorp
comments: My partner and I were visiting as guests of the film festival, and we loved staying at Isa's place. It was such a nice vibe that we stayed in more than usual, as the place had a great vibe to cook meals and hang out in. The place was super clean and in an excellent location. Great view! Defo reccomend!

name: Sunny room with private shower
comments:
We stayed with Doris and her family for the weekend in this beautiful sunny orchid room, named after the many orchids blooming on the windowsill.
After cycling to the place from the center of Rotterdam via the blush Kralingse bos, checking in was super smooth and overall we had a pleasant stay - thank you!

name: Sunny room with private shower
comments:
I had a very good stay at Doris's place. I felt very safe in the neighborhood and the house and street are very quiet 👍🏻
The room was very clean and looked exactly like the pictures!
I would recommend this place :)

name: Sunny room with private shower
comments:
Doris had alles netjes geregeld. Fijn om een eigen opgang te hebben, veel privacy.
Ideaal voor wat ik zocht, alles wat ik nodig had was aanwezig. Bedankt!

name: Sunny room with private shower
comments:
Great host, friendly and helpful.
The place was better than expected. Well planned and conveniently furnished for short to mid stays. Had everything that we possibly needed and more (extras were a nice touch). Very bright room - big window.

name: Cozy room with king bed and large windows
comments:
Kseniia's place made for a lovely first few weeks in Rotterdam. The room was very comfortable, the heating kept it nice and warm on cooler days, and I loved the natural light. Sharing the home it was very quiet and easy to focus on study and things as needed. The Netflix account was really nice to be able to wind stay in and wind down. The washer/dryer machine was great for keeping on top of laundry. It was a very short walk to nearby supermarkets, and quite a direct route to the centre, by foot, bike or public transport.
Thank you Kseniia for a lovely stay!

name: Spacious and Comfortable Family Retreat!
comments: Its a quite neigbourhood but neighbors were quite angry about the previous tenants making noise there and had threatened to call police if we made noise after 9 pm.

name: Spacious flat near the city
comments: Thank you for a lovely stay. Clean, well maintained and modern. Location is lovely and close to the centre. Good kitchen. The second room could be a bit more comfortable to balance out it’s a futon with better pillows and a side light

name: Appartement in Rotterdam
comments:
We stayed for 4 nights and loved Fabienne’s place. The flat is very bright, fully renovated and equipped with everything we needed to cook, and do remote working. It felt like home.
The communication with Fabienne worked excellent she responded very quickly and was very helpful. Thanks!
The neighborhood is quiet and has a nice park at 5min walking distance, we enjoyed going for walks there with our dog. :)

name: Appartement in Rotterdam
comments:
The appartment of Fabienne is lovely. It feels very homey, it has a lot of lights and plants, and it is very clean and well decorated.
The place is a bit far from city center but it’s easy to go by public transport. However it’s close to parks and the old Rotterdam (Delfshaven).
Fabienne was very friendly and helpful.
Definitely recommended for a stay in Rotterdam !

name: Appartement in Rotterdam
comments: I had a lovely stay at Fabienne’s. She is a great host. The apartment is located in a quiet area with a beautiful view. It is very confortable and peaceful. Going downtown is easy and fast. I recommend it.

name: Cozy Stay: Near Centre & Central Station
comments:
Staying at this Airbnb was a delight!
The location was very close from Rotterdam central station, making it incredibly convenient for exploring the city. The space was cozy and clean, providing a comfortable retreat after a day of sightseeing. The host was friendly, making our stay even more enjoyable. Would definitely recommend!

name: Cozy Stay: Near Centre & Central Station
comments: Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Wir bekamen viele Tipps für unseren Aufenthalt, zB für das Japanische Street Food Festival, das gerade stattfand. Unsere Gastgeber waren immer ansprechbar und hilfsbereit. Begrüßt wurden wir außerdem jeden Morgen von den beiden fluffigen Katzen, die sich gerne kurz kraulen ließen.

name: Cozy Stay: Near Centre & Central Station
comments: Cesar's place is beautiful and modern, and is located in a quiet part of Rotterdam very close to the central station. The immediate surrounds really are delightful. Cesar made me feel right at home and I enjoyed my stay in the spacious condo very much indeed!

name: Zen apartment in Rotterdam
comments: It’s a spacious apartment with beautifully painted colours. The sunrise shines through the warmly in the morning and shines brightly in the afternoon.

name: Zen apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Linda’s place was perfect for us, two coworkers in Rotterdam for an event. The place is very spacious, making it easy to settle in. It has a balcony facing the quietest side! One thing to note is that the bedroom isn’t directly accessible from the main room; it’s at the end of a shared corridor. This wasn’t an issue for us, but I think it’s worth mentioning. The flat is located right in front of a tramway station, making it super accessible and easy to go out and enjoy the city!
Linda is a great host, always happy to support and help if needed! I would 100% recommend Linda’s place.

name: Cosy apartment near city center
comments: Tinnie and Elmar were wonderful. Communication was easy, and they worked with us for Check-in as our arrival time got slightly skewed due to traffic. Their home is LOVELY. It is cozy, but still bright and airy.  It was the perfect space for a weekend getaway for my husband and I. While the street outside seemed very busy, we were amazed at how quiet it was inside the apartment. Just about a five-minute walk up the street is the Tram and Metro that will take you right into the Centrum; it was quick and easy. Thank you so much for opening your beautiful home up to us.

name: Cosy apartment near city center
comments:
I stayed with a friend for three nights in the middle of May. The place was beautiful, everything was accessible and little notes in the apartment reminded us that we could use everything that was available. We felt super comfortable right away!
The only downside was that the neighbours were very loud, but that was an easy fix (using earplugs). I would recommend bringing some if your staying, just in case.
We would definitely come back though. The area was nice and green, with good train connection.
Elmar and Tinnie were easy to reach, responded quickly and were always caring and very very nice! The apartment was super well stocked and the home cinema set-up was fantastic.
We loved having breakfast on the balcony, and hanging out on the sofa in the evenings.
We had a very lovely stay and I would absolutely recommend this place to friends who are looking for a place to stay in Rotterdam.
Thank you for taking such good care of us!

name: Cozy Corner in Rotterdam
comments:
Very good apartment, clean, big and cozy. The guest is very frindly. You can ask him everything, he will help you. In the living room you have a extensible sofa. Also in the living room you have led light in the ceiling (very romantic😉). The kitchen is open space with the living room and you have everything you need if you want to cook. The bathroom is big with heating floor and good design.
The main bedroom is also big and the bed is very comfortable.
If you smoke you have a terrace.
100% we will go back.
Good apartment, good guest, very good conditions.❤️

name: Cozy Corner in Rotterdam
comments: Erjona's place was is very bright and very well located in a nice quiet yet busy neighborhood. We brought a medium sized dog  and there was a great walking area for him only 2 minutes away from the apartment. It was very clean but there needed a few finishing details.  There were two sharp screws sticking out from one of the cabinets right at the level of a small child, one of light switches looked like it would fall out any minute, and there were no dish towels to dry dishes. The place has a few amenities such as a hot water cooker but does not have a coffee maker, microwave or toaster.

name: Modern apartment for cozy stay
comments:
A warm welcome and exceptional kindness from the host who took the time to explain all best plans in and around the city.
The apartment was very well-equipped, a superb location in the city center with a very beautiful view of the port as well as the illuminated buildings by night view.
We won’t hesitate to reserve it again if we’ll be back :)

name: Comfy Urban Retreat room
comments:
It was great to stay here, the room was clean and bright the apartment is well kept and Rovshan is super friendly :)
The location is nice, there is a tram that goes straight to central station 🚉

name: Comfy Urban Retreat room
comments: Very kind, helpful and friendly. Felt welcome and comfy there. Spacious flat with large open floor for lounge, kitchen and balcony. Thank you!

name: Comfy Urban Retreat room
comments:
Rovshan is a wonderful host, the communication was always very friendly and helpful.
The old part of Schiedam (15min per foot away) is lovely, the neighborhood itself is more international, everybody is friendly and the tram and bus are close by, as is the supermarket.
While Rovshan went traveling while I was staying in the apartment, his flatmate is also friendly and easy to be around.
As a friend of the flatmate was visiting for a few weeks, there were three of us living there, which was sometimes a bit cramped.
The room has a lovely view on Rotterdam, the mattress is a bit saggy, which one can get used to.
thank you Rovshan!

name: Room in Charlois
comments: Lovely surroundings, just on the edge of Zuid-Park, and walking distance from Ahoy event venue and from Zuid-Plein metro station. Quaint apartment with green view. Gerbrich was helpful and kind. Thank you!

name: Room in Charlois
comments:
Gerbrich was a great host, very easy communication and lovely talks.
The room is spacious and the kitchen equipped with all the essentials. The location of the flat is great for taking public transport (the bus stops right at the end of the street) or going for a walk into the center.

name: Stanza a Rotterdam
comments: The room is very small. Especially for two people. The bed was uncomfortable. A sofa bed. There is little privacy. The bathroom is shared. It was ok for two days.

name: Stanza a Rotterdam
comments: A great place to stay in Rotterdam, just a walk away from the tram and bus which will take you into the city or the beach. Mario is very friendly, offering recommendations but also doesn’t get involved in your stay. Apartment is nice and clean, use of all kitchen utensils and bathrooms and a balcony. Highly recommend!

name: Vibrant City Living in Rotterdam
comments: great place very clean easy to get to lots of shopping around coffee shops very walkable area close to the center Market Hall where all the food vendors are is really close meant Street also very close for all the bars and restaurants is happening. only insure hand was a bedrooms were in the basement place was kind of cold summer just turned to fall and the heat was not working. also the shower is in the basement and the toilets are upstairs on the main floor. would have love to see a bit more amenities such as bathroom mats or floor mats in the shower they had a beautiful towel rack for keeping your towel warm but it was not working. it seems like the thermostats were locked everywhere and could not be turned on. but overall a great place highly recommended would definitely stay again. I didn't see any air conditioning so not sure how hot it would get in the summertime. had a fully functioning washer and dryer which is great. there is a store called action right next door for anything

name: Vibrant City Living in Rotterdam
comments:
We stayed at the apartment for a week. It is spacious, bright, and located in a quiet yet central part of town. Restaurants and public transportation are conveniently nearby. The self-check-in was easy and practical.
However, cooking was inconvenient because the oven didn’t function properly—it kept turning off when it got hot—and one of the pans wasn’t compatible with the induction stove.
Additionally, the apartment got quite cold at night since there were only small heaters, and the water pipes were loud.
For the price, we expected not to encounter these kinds of issues. We also would have appreciated basic necessities like shelves or cabinets, as well as more foot mats or rugs in the bathroom

name: Vibrant City Living in Rotterdam
comments:
The apartment was in a great location, easy walking distance to restaurants etc. and it was very clean.
There are however a few things that need repairing and we also didn’t realise that the bedrooms would be located in the basement so they had no windows that could be opened.

name: Vibrant City Living in Rotterdam
comments:
Great place, walking distance from the train station. Clean.
The drainage pipes run through the bedrooms so the noise can keep you up if it’s raining.
Comfy beds.

name: Vibrant City Living in Rotterdam
comments:
Positives:
1. The location was quite central, with many restaurants within walking distance.
2. The living room and the kitchen were very spacious.
Negatives:
1. When we arrived, there was no proper heating. Almost all the electric radiators were not working except for one. The hosts told us to use two small portable heaters which, clearly because they hadn’t been used for a long time, emitted a strong smell that caused headaches. When we pointed out that the listing included heating, they simply replied that this was the heating system and that we should have asked in advance what type of heating it was.
2. Every time we used the shower, a terrible sewage smell came out of the drains.
3. The walls were covered with pipes which seemed to be carrying water and made extreme noise from time to time even during sleeping hours.
4. While the apartment was generally clean, we found clothes left both in the washing machine and in the dryer, and the dishwasher was also full of dishes.

name: Cozy Stay in Historical Atmosphere
comments: Beautiful flat which has everything we needed. The flat was  very modern and chic. Lighting was lovely and lovely finishing touches with big wooden dining table. The bathroom was spotless and the shower really good. Only 5 minutes from the tunnel to get to get to the  river and the other side where the attractions are. We took bikes and cycled everywhere. We did a trip on spido to see the port which was really interesting. Thank you for a very peaceful stay.

name: Convenient Studio in Heart of Rotterdam
comments: he apartment is good and in a central location, but it's poorly soundproofed and there are a lot of noises at night. He only answered the questions that were convenient for him. I needed something and I had to ask 10 times before getting a response, and even then, he didn't give me what I wanted.

name: Convenient Studio in Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Thanks for having us.
Michael was very responsive, so was Rob.
The location suited.
The lack of windows for ventilation was tricky as days and nights were hot.
Could have benefited from a few additional cooking utensils.

name: Convenient Studio in Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Convenient location, right next to Action store with daily necessities and walkable distance to Markethaal. Take the tram or walk down to Blaak for metro. Spacious interior accessible directly from the street. Washer and dryer is helpful for longer stays. However, during my stay I often heard outside street noises and passing pedestrians talking at night.

name: Convenient Studio in Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Appartement ligt op een prima locatie en stille omgeving. Het is verbouwd winkelpand of garage. Daardoor hoog plafond en ruim maar het ontbreekt daardoor aan sfeer. Alleen aan voorkant grote raampartij, hierdoor weinig privacy en noodzaak gordijnen dicht te houden. Met andere raambekleding en meer kleine verlichting is hier makkelijk wat aan te doen. Nu een appartement voor enkele nachten maar wat minder voor langer verblijf. Appartement maakte de indruk nog niet lang in verhuur te zijn, allerlei dingen nog niet afgemaakt.

name: Convenient Studio in Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
I suffer from low blood pressure, so I require the basics in any accommodation: heating. The heating in the place was damaged, so I asked for help. The next morning, two different people came to fix it, but it stopped working again that night.
On the third day, I was told a technician would come, but no one ever showed up. For the rest of the week, I kept following up, but I received no response.
I paid a lot of money for a 7-day stay and slept poorly, covered in all my clothes and my husband’s jackets.
I requested blankets and was brought duvet covers.
The apartment is cold and gets no sunlight.
I felt very neglected, and none of my needs were addressed.

name: Central  Rotterdam Waterfront Loft I
comments:
The B&B is located in a quiet area now far from the city centre. The door lock has a slight malfunction. When we arrived the whole fridge was flooded in water (was turned off).
In one room the drain pipes kept us from sleeping.
All in all it was a solid stay near the center.

name: “Tiny Lux”met parkeren op eigen oprit
comments:
The tiny house was really clean and looked like the pictures.
The house was close to Rotterdam central city, and the environment was really good without noise.
Also close to some restaurants.
Bernadet is a really nice host, she was only one message away and was available to answer all our questions and to give us too many recommandations on the city, activities restaurant...
I 100% recommend this tiny house and would definitely like to come back!
Thanks again Bernadet🥰

name: Appartement in Calypso
comments: It was a great stay! The air bnb is near restaurants. Ant the view is amazing!

name: zonnig maisonnette woning
comments:
Marcel’s place is a lovely, peaceful flat in a local residential area. The stand-out feature, by far, for me is the spacious balcony overlooking a lush green back part of the neighbourhood. The balcony is fully furnished & is accessible from the living area and kitchen. I spent nearly all my time on the balcony!
The living area is very nice too, very generously sized & tastefully furnished, with lots of lighting options. The kitchen is fine, equipped with everything you could need.
It’s not very centrally located, but if you want to experience a real local neighbourhood then this is for you. It’s a 10-minute walk to the tram stop and frequent trams get you to the centre in 15 mins.
A few tiny details (that other reviewers have mentioned) prevent this from being 100% perfect: wobbly taps, a loose socket, etc. The bedroom was a bit stuffy but I was there during unseasonably hot weather. A warning: the staircases are very steep and narrow!
But did I mention how great the balcony is?

name: zonnig maisonnette woning
comments:
We had an easy stay at marcels apartment.
The check-in was easy and we felt very comfortable as soon as we got inside.
The balcony is very nice to sit :)

name: zonnig maisonnette woning
comments:
We had a lovely stay with Marcel. The balcony is perfect to end the day. The flat is bright and quiet in a residential area. You can be in the centre in 15 minutes by tram.
You can see that the flat is used for living. There was still food in the fridge, the flat was a bit dusty and sockets and water cranes were not completely fixed.
Overall, the flat is a perfect starting point for a city trip to Rotterdam :)

name: zonnig maisonnette woning
comments:
The apartment was pretty, however there was some faults. Broken outlets, broken toilet button, the curtains couldn't open properly. Was missing a door in the shower. Some dishes was still dirty as well, leaving us to clean them ourselves. The faucets was loose as well.
Neighborhood was nice, close to the store and a park. We were left with instructions of the apartment and where the tram was. Marcel was sweet and easy to talk to.
Overall a decent trip, minor things which can be improved upon.

name: Cozy Gem Near Central Station
comments:
The flat was beautiful, spacious, full of light. The beds were comfortable and numerous! The host met us at the flat, and showed us around. The location itself was phenomenal. I would say a no brainer, were it not for two things:
It was very hot when we were in town. The first night, we slept with windows open and were battling with mosquitos all night. The next day, we realized that there was air conditioning in the room. Of course, it's a little bit on us to not have noticed this. But our host who met us and gave us a tour of the flat did not mention it either! The person I was in touch with clearly wasn't the owner of the flat, nor did they know it very well.
The second thing is that on the first night we stayed, we heard a knock on our door at midnight. It was the downstairs neighbor, who complained that we were very loud. (We were merely unpacking and washing up.) It was disappointing that we weren't warned about the neighbor / acoustics of the flat.

name: Spacious Appartment with Terrace
comments: great place, nice and central location,  lot's of daylight, well furnished apartment.

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments:
I am writing this review because I was notified that the host wrote a review about me which I find strange because I did not stay there for more than a hour. In 10+ years I have never requested to leave and Airbnb, so this was pretty bad.
The apartment had several issues including a loose sink, broken bed, noticeable smell, and flies. I submitted a claim to Airbnb and got a refund in full plus a coupon for another time.
Host was apologetic and responsive and I am satisficed with the resolution. I would not recommend staying there until the host fixes the issues with the apartment.

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments: Really great location, light and airy space.

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments:
I was in this apartment for five days for work. The apartment is in a good location with a supermarket close by. All the utilities were there, and the balcony is quite nice during the summer days.
During my stay one of the windows couldn't close properly and neither could the door to the balcony, thus it was a bit difficult to sleep. I informed the host.

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments: Nice, spacious bright apartment in a great location. Would definitely return!

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments: It is a very nice space and location. But there is one major downside. The cigarette smell in the apartment is terrible. It has invaded walls, curtains, carpets and the mattress as well. I kept the windows open all the time, bought scent sticks, a new set of bedsheets, but nothing helped. It is a pity, because the space and the location are very nice. I would recommend a serious paint job and refurbishment of the soft finishes. Once the scent has disappeared I believe this space is value for money. But not now….

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments: Nice apartment in good location. It was a bit expensive though and as a place it could improve, e.g. the balcony doors weren't closing very well and kept opening in the middle of the night and the bed was not really comfortable.

name: Brief apartment near city center
comments: Spent 2 nights in this appartment. The place was nice and clean. Some streetnoise during nighttime and steep stairs could be a problem for people with walking dissabilities. Appartment is conveniently close to foodstore, restaurants and Metro station.

name: Sunny and cozy City Center apartment
comments: Bram’s apartment was excellent! Beautiful house and decor, great location with lots of independent restaurants, cafes and bars & very well located at the artsy heart of the city. The apartment was definitely a key highlight of our trip and I would book it again in a heartbeat! :)

name: Spacious room in Rotterdam (without kitchen)
comments: The room is very spacious, clean, and comfy. Chung welcomed me with everything I needed and ensured a pleasant stay. The house is located in a very quiet neighborhood and offers beautiful view. It is easily accessible through tram as the tram station is just 5min walk.

name: Spacious room in Rotterdam (without kitchen)
comments: Chung was extremely responsive from the get-go. The place is super clean, and the backyard view is stunning.

name: Spacious room in Rotterdam (without kitchen)
comments: Voor de derde keer 2 nachten bij Chung geweest. En het beviel mij prima. Het is een aanrader voor mensen die op privacy gesteld zijn. Volgende keer beschikbaar en ik boek hem weer.

name: App nr.4 -1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: A nice clean appartement just behind the train station, in the calm street, flexible arrival. Bonus: coffee is provided by a host (coffee machine of espresso type), and as well bathroom shampoo. We have spent a really good time.

name: App nr.4 -1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments:
The place is very near to the central station. Maybe 5 minutes walking. The layout and the quality of fittings of the apartment is very good. The rooms have large windows which allows natural light and air. The building is a heritage building with spiral staircase so people travelling with large suitcases may find it difficult to climb the stairs. The surrounding is beautiful with nature all around, a wooden bridge to cross the canal and birds chirping something unthinkable in a city. The neighbourhood is residential and safe.
I would strongly recommend this place.

name: App nr.4 -1 Bedroom apartment with kitchen.
comments: Nice place, very conveniently located behind the Central Station and a pretty view on the canal. We, however, had little issues with the couch but the host was quick to react and help. Also, we found some left behind clothing items in one drawer when we arrived. But overall, a nice stay, the 2 beds in the bedroom were very comfy.

name: App nr.1-1 bedroom Apartment in the centre Rott
comments: Flat was so clean and comfortable. So close to central station. Small but meets the expectations, such a lovely view and peaceful athmosphere

name: App nr.1-1 bedroom Apartment in the centre Rott
comments: lovely apartment in quiet road with view on green space. Very conveniently located near the train station. Would definitely recommend.

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments:
This place is absolutely beautiful. Neighbor hood is just perfect with gorgeous view, lovely coffee places etc.. Since I love this place too much, I was gonna change my travel plan to come back again. The host is always very helpful!
Extremely highly recommended!!

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments: Lovely location, as described. The bed and the bathroom are the highlights. An incredibly helpful and responsive host.

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments: I stayed with Bernadette for two weeks, and she was an exceptional host! The apartment is perfect, offering privacy with its own bathroom, a work desk, and a cozy sofa. The surrounding area is beautiful, filled with green spaces and parks perfect for walking. The location is very convenient, with a bus stop just a minute's walk away and a metro station 15-20 minutes away, providing excellent connections to all parts of Rotterdam. There's also a supermarket right in front of the metro station for all your grocery needs. I highly recommend Bernadette's place and would love to return!

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments:
I had a great stay. Bernadette was always responsive and gave really good suggestions about things to do and see in Rotterdam and about nearby cafes. I had told her beforehand that I would arrive in the morning, and she was kind enough to let me check in early.
The apartment is clean, spacious, and comfortable, and is a great find at the price point. It feels homely and offers privacy since guests have a floor of their own. As mentioned in the information about this place, the stairs are indeed steep. So, one should be a little careful when going up or down, especially with luggage.
It's near the city (walkable distance), and about 20-30 mins from Rotterdam Centraal by public transport, which is very convenient. Although I did not use them, guests can use the kitchen and laundry facilities, which are useful if one is traveling on a budget or staying for long.
Overall, I would definitely recommend this place to people looking for an Airbnb in Rotterdam.

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments: I enjoyed my stay, you get a lot of privacy, it's like your own home and everything is comfortable. Kitchen is really great and the roof top is also a gem. I recommend it!

name: Cozy apartment with ensuite bathroom
comments:
Bernadette's place is very well located, we felt immediately at home, and the host is very nice and laid back. There is a great roof terrace to enjoy good weather.
One point to note is that there is a street lamp right outside the bedroom window and the thin white blinds don't block out this light. Luckily we had eye masks.
The kitchen and especially the oven could be cleaner, and in the end we only cooked there once.

name: Groepsverblijf centrum 5 minuten van het station
comments:
on the positive side : very central location, clear instructions and safe place
on the negative side: as the host writes it's a cheap place for Rotterdam, so no miracle. Relatively dirty and dusty appartement overall, old building and directly under the rooftoop so hot when the sun shines, smelly shower, quite noisy on the street side.
what I found also particularly irritating was the fact the host tries to put a lot of pressure in his communication to force one to give a 5 star rating, writing messages like "you get a 25 EUR fee if don't report something you don't like and give a bad rating afterwards". That's simply not ok in my view.

name: Groepsverblijf centrum 5 minuten van het station
comments:
The property had a number of issues around the condition that it's in - damaged bed frames type thing, Though the mattresses were comfy which is always a big deal for me. The host was very willing to address the issues I raised.
The 3 flights of stairs up to the flat are the steepest I've ever used, and so I'd encourage anyone to check with the host if they've any uncertainty as to if they'll be able to get up them.
The location is extremely convenient for the city centre / train station, but as a heads up Rotterdam parking is very expensive ( my thanks to the host for recommending a car park to use that was $20/day ).
With some work to fix up a few things, it is a decent, basic place to base yourself out of.

name: Classic Boat Bruzer @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: The highlight of our stay! We were traveling through Europe and last minute decided to stop in Rotterdam to watch the Dutch National team play. The location could not have been more perfect! It was perfect between the downtown and the stadium and very close to public transportation. The reception we received was great we were introduced to everyone and given a tour of their facilities and everyone was incredibly nice. The boat itself was perfect! Plenty of room with all the beds, toilet, and kitchen on board. We loved staying here it was a fun experience, comfortable, and peaceful! I can’t recommend this place enough and will be the only place we stay when coming to Rotterdam!

name: Unique Cube House in heart of Rotterdam! Room 3
comments:
Mirjams listing is very well located 2 minutes from Rotterdam Blaak and she communicates very well

Unfortunately not suitable for mature travellers due to Dutch steps and uncomfortable seating in awkward shaped sitting area
Top bedroom has many windows all around and in roof which gives great view but with no window coverings or aircon can be hot and difficult to sleep due to inability to block the city lights or sun out
Would be great budget saver and experience for adventurous younger traveller or book one of the lower bedrooms

name: Apartment, Kralingen Rotterdam
comments: We had a lovely time staying at Pamela’s place! Kralingen, with the surrounding streets and the lake, is a beautiful location. The apartment is a couple minutes by bike to the city center and has everything you need for a peaceful stay.

name: Modern & Stylish Apartment, 5 min to Central Stat.
comments: Perfect location! Just 7-8 minutes walk from Rotterdam central station. The room is clean and tidy. Big and bright windows. Everything is perfect! Our family enjoyed very much. Hans is such a wonderful host!Thank him so much！Highly recommend his home!

name: Cozy apartment & best location!
comments: Across the street from the canal, 1 block from the train station, 1 block from the bars, next door to a Michelin guide restaurant. Absolute perfect location. The main roads are all walkable from here as well, less than 1 kilometer to anything you need. The WiFi was not so great in the apartment but the location was beyond perfect so it made up for it.

name: Cozy apartment & best location!
comments:
Als het enige wat je verwacht een slaapplek is, dan voldoet deze accommodatie. Ze is ideaal gelegen, op wandelafstand van het station en vlakbij allerlei leuke straten.
Als je echter ook wil koken of buiten op het terras wil zitten om te aperitieven, is het eerder een teleurstellende plek. Het heeft dringend wat liefde nodig. Het terras buiten is helemaal verwaarloosd en volgroeid met onkruid, er zijn ook geen meubeltjes. In de keuken is er wel wat materiaal om te koken (slechts één pot en één pan), er is ook afwasmiddel en een spons, maar een keukenhanddoek was er niet. Ook op vlak van ingrediënten was er niks: zelfs geen peper, zout of olie.
Er zijn twee tweepersoonsbedden: het ene staat in een kamer apart, maar het andere staat gewoon in wat eigenlijk de woonkamer is. Je hebt dus geen privacy. Als je ‘s nachts de wc wilt gebruiken, moet je dus door iemands “slaapkamer”.

name: Cozy apartment & best location!
comments: The location of the apartment is amazing. Although it is ground floor the ceilings are high and there is full of daylight coming in. It is a big luxury to have a garden in the city and it comes with a cherry tree. The beds are comfortable and it’s cool during hot days. We had come to a concert and enjoyed our time there! Max is a great host, very responsive and attentive to details. Thank you! We definitely would come back!

name: Bali cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: This was the idea stay for me, nice and relaxed, other people to meet, and great location for central Rotterdam, whilst also being outside the centre. I don’t think it’s for everyone, but I reckon the people who want to stay here will know that. Everyone was so friendly, the boat rocking (ever so slightly) helps you sleep. Decent supermarket within 5 minutes, tram within 5 minutes and only 3 stops to Beurs.  Can’t recommend enough for the relaxed traveller.

name: Herenhuis in het stadscentrum
comments: I stayed at Katy’s house with my family (in total, 7 adults ages 32-70, and 1 child). It was perfect for us—spacious, comfortable, and exactly as advertised. The location is fantastic; walkable to many parts of Rotterdam, nearby restaurants/bars/cafes/grocery stores, and a 3 minute walk to central station (the main transit point in the city). It’s on a beautiful canal, and felt residential, despite the proximity to the station (there was noise from the street at night, but we were not surprised or bothered by it). The house is nicely decorated and well stocked with appliances and household items. Katy was very responsive throughout—both in the lead-up (we had questions about the rooms) and during our stay. We had a wonderful time and only have good things to say!

name: Herenhuis in het stadscentrum
comments: Katayoun was an excellent host. We had some travel difficulties on arrival but she was very flexible and accommodating with the arrival time. The house was very spacious for our group size and we have a wonderful time there. Being close to the train station was particularly helpful. Katayoun allowed us to leave our bags in the property after our check-out tome which was extremely helpful given we had a late flight home. We all really enjoyed our stay and appreciated Katayoun's responsiveness and attentiveness as she gave us a tour of the property on arrival. She seemed very kind and was willing to help us with any questions we had regarding the city.

name: Underwater cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments:
Great value for money!
I arrived very late because of a delayed flight, but this was not an issue at all, because the host was both very flexible and responsive.

name: Underwater cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: The room was very clean and comfortable. The communal spaces were spacious, inviting and comfortable as well. I spent a couple evenings on the couch and the upper deck sitting area reading and enjoying a glass of wine. As a single female traveler staying in a shared space for the first time I was a bit nervous but the host, boat staff and other guests were friendly and welcoming. I felt 100% safe. One night there was just myself and one other female traveler staying on the boat and I appreciated the host locking up the back entrance near the cabins as an extra precautionary. Shows the level of attentiveness and care. I used this stay as a base point for many day trips to Delft, Gouda and Kinderdijk.
