Host gave several recommendations for food (cafes and restaurants) and markets. Checked in with me daily to make sure all was well with my stay. Definitely recommend staying here on your next trip to Rotterdam.

name: Jungle cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments:
I stayed 2 nights in Rotterdam and it was my first time on a airbnb boat. I loved it!
I slept on some smaller boats before but this Airbnb had a big common area and a proper kitchen. On the top is even a small terrace. I loved my stay especially with Diana, the co-host, she was lovely and so helpful, I felt welcomed right away. The kitchen is well equipped with some fresh herbs and some coffee and tea which made me very happy. I could use a separate fridge which was dedicated for guests and was outside the kitchen.
My room was small but as I only have been in my room at night to sleep I was totally fine, especially for 2 nights. I had a small window and to let air circulate I left it open before I went to sleep. You get your own key for your cabin and the restroom and shower is next door for multiple guests to use.
I leave only 4 out of 5 stars because I did only stay 2 instead of 3 nights and unfortunately got only a voucher for one night instead of money.

name: Jungle cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: Very forthcoming and hospitable host, good location to reach from Rotterdam city center both on foot and with public transport, and there were also plenty of closeby parking opportunities. The cabins were clean, so were the bathroom and common amenities. However, as the cabin windows were very small, the air was very thick and it was nearly impossible to exchange the air. We did however get a rotating fan from our hosts, which we are very thankful for. Overall, it was good stay and I can recommend the place for its unique experience.

name: Jungle cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: I stayed here with my 6 year old son, it was a really cozy boat, it gave us U-boat vibes and we loved it :) The worker was really friendly and helpful the whole time. Nice other guests. The boat was tidy and clean. My son had a great time. It can get hot inside, but we knew it from other reviews, so we took our own little battery fan with us. Make sure to check how the public transportation works because it was difficult for us. Thanks to everyone who helped us during our stay!

name: Portside cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: Loved it. It was my first stay on the boat and it was awesome. Place is functional and has everything you may need. Cozy shared areas and an amazing terrace with nice views on the city and the sunset. The crew and the guests on board were cool and wholesome!

name: Portside cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: Really enjoyed this unique place to stay. Although I live in Rotterdam, I needed a place for several days between the end of my lease and my flight. This boat house allowed me to explore Rotterdam from a different perspective and has a very friendly community of people from all around the world. It was great to be able to cook, hang around in the living room, and easily access center city. (if you're staying in the summer months I would recommend getting a mosquito repellent that plugs into the wall, from Kruidvat). Highly recommend!

name: Portside cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: Great boat, cool views, nice people.

name: Submerged cabin Bora @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: The picture in the listing is NOT what our room looked liked.  The whole boat was cluttered, dark, and old.  Our room was not clean and shiny with a curtain on the window as shown on the listing.  It was not clean.  There was dust and hairs under the mattress.   A wood bar with hangers had a thick layer of dust as did the hangers themselves.  There were stains on the walls.  The shared bathrooms were dirty with other peoples' hair in the sinks.  The floors were dirty.  The bathroom doors were warped and didn't fully close even when locked.  This would be ok for a youth hostel, but it you want a nice Airbnb to stay at, this is not the place.

name: Classic Boat Boot @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments: Nice place, something special. Very nice to sleep on the boot. Going outside from the boat after some glass of wine could be challenging)

name: Unique studio apt with terrace
comments: I loved staying in Usch's craftshop! I felt so cozy and right at home, and the location was beautiful. I loved the giant windows and the garden view right next to the bed. She was very kind, responsive and understanding with a late check-out. I would happily stay here again!

name: Unique studio apt with terrace
comments: My partner and I visited Rotterdam for a weekend and really enjoyed our stay at Usch's Airbnb. She was very friendly and helpful, for example regarding the parking fees and she also gave us a quick overview of some nice places in the nearby area and the best spots to walk our dog. Since we know how difficult it can be to find accommodations that allow dogs, we greatly appreciate this and we also really enjoyed the two sweet, curious neighbourhood cats that came to visit us upon our arrival. The equipment of the Airbnb includes everything you need for a short trip and everything was clean and tidy.

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: This was my second time in Rotterdam. A fascinating city to explore. Especially if you like architecture. I enjoyed looking at the cityscape from the balcony and convenience to the central rail station. I would be most happy to visit again.

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments:
A really nice and spacious apartment at 11th floor with good views of the city. The entire building is quite new with some of small quirks however nothing major (bad insulation of water pipes, slightly long waits for the elevator, only one water temperature at the toilet, and to weak ventilation in the bathroom that leaves the mirror steamy long after a bath). None of this should retract from the overall impression of a great apartment though.
The apartment also have a great balcony where 2 people can easily sit and eat. There is a slight noise from some ventilation system out there however given the very central location it is very peaceful. Inside the apartment we did not hear any noise from the outside during our stay. The apartment is east facing and the rooms do become fairly light in the morning so if that disturbed your sleep bring a sleep mask.
The location is close to the central station and with many restaurants close by. The is even a super market in the block.

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: Would 100% stay there again. Amazing location near the centruum station and loads of restaurants and shops near by. Super clean, great space, and a lovely view!

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: Great place with nice view and a lot of things to do around 7 minutes walking to central station . The apartment was to sunny due unavailability of blinds with curtains and not air conditioned with summer heat makes  it hot

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: We had a wonderful stay during our time in Rotterdam! The apartment is beautiful, spotless, and includes all of the comforts of home.  This was important for us as we were traveling with our 9 year old son. The location is walkable to everything. A bonus is that the apartment has a large balcony with great views of the city. Our host was welcoming and helpful. I highly recommend!

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments:
Beautiful and spacious apartment in a new building, right in the city centre. The place is fully equipped with everything you need and is close to many restaurants and shops.
The view from the apartment is stunning! Just keep in mind that it faces east, so the rooms get very bright in the morning. There’s also the option to arrange parking inside the building, which is a nice bonus!

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: Perfect location – just a short walk from the train station. Very central but still quiet. The apartment is well equipped, spotless, and has a fantastic view. The gym was excellent, and overall it offered everything one could wish for. Highly recommended!

name: Modern Comfort in Central Rotterdam – Great Views!
comments: Cocos apartment was clean, comfortable, and in the perfect location. There are lot of bars and restaurants within walking distance including the main night life streets. Also close to many tourist attractions. It looks like the pictures and has a great balcony as well. I highly recommend this listing!

name: Spacious City Loft | Sunny Garden in Rotterdam
comments: Great value, clean and a beautiful peaceful backyard. Spent most of the time in the backyard patio with lounging and working, taking in the greenery. It does get dark in the front of the house, very little light enters so something to note. great last minute booking when rest of rotterdam was booked for a conference.

name: Spacious City Loft | Sunny Garden in Rotterdam
comments: We liked the apartment, it was clean and spacious. The back garden was very nice and peaceful but we could not use it much because of the rainy weather. It is a big plus during warm and sunny weather. Since you enter the apartment directly from the street it is very easy getting in and out with no stairs. About the neighborhood, there were few restaurants and most of them close early, and most of them Turkish. When coming from Türkiye it is interesting to eat Turkish food :)  Aside from that all is well.

name: Modern en licht appartement in Delfshaven
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Annelotte's apartment. The apartment is very bright and beautifully designed! The neighborhood offers a wide variety of snack bars and restaurants (we can especially recommend Warung West, by Jarmusch, and Stadsbrouwerij De Pelgrim). There is a supermarket next to the metro station, which is about 7 minutes away. The nearest tram stop is only a minute away, making it quick and easy to get to the city. Overall, a highly recommended place to stay.

name: Grindhuisje
comments: Rustige plek, de eigenaars zijn heel réactif. Modern en mooie woning waar je privacy kan hebben. De slaapkamer is atypisch :)

name: Slow living Romantic Canal house -  city center
comments: We loved this place and were able to make the most of our short stay both because Yuval was so welcoming and helpful with recommendations, and because the place had everything we needed to not have to worry about anything. It's just like the photos--very clean and comfortable and charming. The location is delightful and perfect too. Highly recommend and hope to visit again one day :)

name: Slow living Romantic Canal house -  city center
comments: Yuval is an amazing host. She will go above and beyond to make your stay as perfect as possible. Me and my boyfriend had amazing time in Rotterdam. The appartment is really big with plenty of space for your luggage. Big kitchen allowed us to have a nice breakfast every day. The balcony with an amazing view is just a cherry on top of this amazing offer. The appartment is close to metro and tram station which makes travelling around the city very easy. You also have many local shops and restaurants near the appartment. In overall I can trully recommend staying at Yuval's place. You can feel here like at home.

name: Slow living Romantic Canal house -  city center
comments: this is a really beautiful flat in the perfect area. about the flat - lovely things were left on my arrival and I was greeted by Yuval who was very friendly and helpful. got lots of nice recommendations and she was always on hand and checked in that my stay in Rotterdam was going well. the flat is stunning. lovely big airy rooms, well equipped kitchen. living room is peaceful and the balcony is such a nice space to hang out and watch the world go by. my whole stay felt luxurious and very homely. I cannot recommend this apartment more. Yuval is an amazing host who cares about your whole experience and I can't thank her enough for making my stay in Rotterdam so special. 10/10.

name: Slow living Romantic Canal house -  city center
comments:
Summed in one word - magical. The view from the balcony - the canal and the trees on the grassy patch - captures the essence of Holland and is simply hypnotic. Whether working away on a laptop, or delving into Kapsalon with your partner, the balcony chairs are the perfect fit for every occasion.
Yuval was extremely friendly and always went above and beyond to make our stay an extremely pleasurable experience.
We loved every minute of staying here!

name: Slow living Romantic Canal house -  city center
comments: The apartment is lovely and peaceful, overlooking the canal. The rooms are bright and airy, and the little balcony is a bonus. We had everything we needed for a relaxing weekend. Yuval gave us some great recommendations, and she let us check out later, so we didn't need to rush on our last morning. I would recommend this as a cosy place to stay as a couple.

name: Beautiful condo "pearl of Roffa"
comments:
We had a great stay at Franklin's place, also we were their first guests so we are sure this AirBnb will only get better with time and suggestions.
The hosts were were responsive and kind to us. They made sure we feel at home and even though the place is shared we had no privacy issues (top floor/attic is yours and the first 3 are private).
What we liked:
- Bed was great
- Spacious and new bathroom (with natural light)
- Getting to city center is easy enough (although it does take some time especially until you get the hang of it)
What could be improved:
- There was no mention of the steep stairs, so take that into consideration if you are not fit to climb narrow spiral staircases (very difficult with any luggage)
- It is pretty minimalistic, but you can already see that from the pictures, there might be some things missing for you (eg. in the kitchen) but I am sure the gracious hosts would provide everything if asked
As a budget option, greatly recommended!

name: Beautiful condo "pearl of Roffa"
comments:
I had an enjoyable two months staying at Franklin and Liesa's loft. It was very clean, well-equipped, and provided great privacy.
The proximity to the Maastunnel made it very easy to access the city centre, especially on a bike.
Franklin and Liesa are incredible hosts. They are attentive, relaxed and friendly. We had good times having dinner together at the airbnb. I will definitely be back the next time I'm in Rotterdam :)

name: Beautiful condo "pearl of Roffa"
comments: Franklin and Liesa were wonderful hosts, welcoming and very friendly. They were quick to respond when I had questions or needed help with something. The apartment is up three flights of stairs, which might make it less accessible to some, although that wasn't a problem for me, and they did let me know about this beforehand.

name: Entire Apartment near Erasmus University & Tram
comments:
I had a peaceful stay at abdel's place. I received the instructions for check in a couple of days ahead and it was easy to follow the clips. Its a big apartment with google assistance for lights control, pretty neat. I had clean towels and clean bed, the curtains really blocked the light from outside so no problem with sleeping. 👍
The Cons: Not big deals, but the supermarket is about 13 min walking and there is not much to do around ( it is fairly close to other cool areas by tram ). There are many personal items and other stuff, so its not the typical place that only exists to be rented by Airbnb. for me it was cool, but take that into consideration ☀️

name: Entire Apartment near Erasmus University & Tram
comments: Super close to the tram stop that brings you into the city and train station. Kitchen has everything you need for cooking. Walkable to a grocery store. Really nice balcony, great for opening up the apartment for fresh air. Karim super helpful for answering all the odd questions I had! Probably better for a shorter stay as the space to put clothes is limited. A bit loud at night on the weekends with motorcycle noise, but overall a lovely stay.

name: Entire Apartment near Erasmus University & Tram
comments: Abdelwahab and and Karim are great hosts that welcome us like it was out home. I stayed one week with my parents and we felt like we never left our real home. I probably drink the best coffee in rotterdam in their house. Wahid is a semi-gourme so he has every kitchen supplies and spices you need. I couldnt figured out the smart home features but it was probably something nice :D when I mentioned we are 3 he immediately bought a pull out couch for us. The location is great. Very close to 21/24 and 7 tram lines. The view also great. I hope to see them again in December

name: Charmant en licht zolderappartement
comments:
We had a lovely stay in Sam's apartment.
The location in the historic Delfshaven is wonderful - on the one hand quiet and away from the hustle and bustle, on the other hand you have everything you need within walking distance (restaurants, supermarket, public transport, water cab, etc.) and is still very quickly in the city center.
Relaxed and fast communication, tips for the stay as well as a flexible check-in and check-out made the stay special. The apartment is very nicely furnished and also very well equipped. The quiet balcony facing the backyard invites you to linger with the sunset.
Therefore, the apartment is an absolute recommendation.

name: Charmant en licht zolderappartement
comments:
The apartment was located in a peaceful neighborhood in the “old Delfshaven” area. There were a couple of very nice cafes and restaurants nearby. The apartment itself was clean and matched with the photos.
The host was super friendly and flexible. Even when our flight was delayed about five hours, she was very patient and welcomed us with a big smile when we finally arrived. She also sent us some good tips what to do in the neighborhood and was very responsive to our messages during our five night stay.

name: Knus tiny house in het stadscentrum
comments:
The flat is very conveniently located in central Rotterdam, with many of the key sights in easy walking distance. The flat's conversion has been well done so it doesn't feel cramped. There is however very little daylight, the windows are mostly frosted over and covered with curtains that are not easy to move aside; as it is level with a walkway to multiple flats if you do open the windows & move the curtain it is very exposed.
Although the listing says there is a kitchenette and the photos clearly show a hob and oven, the host does not wish these to be used apart from the microwave, so no pots or other cooking equipment is provided. Although she was helpful in making arrangements for us, the flat would be best suited to people only coming for a short stay where you intend to eat out all the time - there isn't even a bottle opener or wine glasses if you wanted a take away with wine from the supermarket. Equally there is a washing machine but no powder.
Very good for a short stay.

name: Fully furnished apartment
comments:
Beautiful view!
Nice location!
Good for running!

name: Sunny home in quiet area of Rotterdam
comments: The most unique home I've stayed in this far. It had a really cool tropical aesthetic with the plants and surfboards. There was plenty of things left for us to use by the hosts while we were there, which I very much appreciated. also a great location since the lightrail was so close and there were plenty of supermarkets and restaurants nearby.

name: Modern Blaak Apt - 2min to Metro, Cubes & Markthal
comments: Good place to stay on the basis that it will be better cleaned next time. Nice view from the window on a basis that you can see through

name: Modern Blaak Apt - 2min to Metro, Cubes & Markthal
comments: Super lovely stay at Maarten‘s flat! I travelled with my mum (84) and the flat was very convenient in regards to elevator and shower. Maarten was spot on, responsive and very kind. We stayed from August 12-16. Our accommodation couldn’t have been better- awesome view from the balcony (9th floor), you can see the cube houses in front of you, Witte Huis and the market hall just on the right side…3 min walk to Metro and train station Blaak. Lots of restaurants and sights just around the corner and shops to get groceries. The flat is super clean and nicely decorated. The kitchen well equipped, Nespresso Maschine and more than everything what you need for your stay. Bed and couch comfy. Maarten responded quickly on TV questions (we were not used to so much electronic;-)) Definitely would love to come back to beautiful Rotterdam and Maarten‘s lovely home. Highly recommend!! Thanks Maarten!

name: Modern Blaak Apt - 2min to Metro, Cubes & Markthal
comments:
Excellent location near from everything, appartement well equipped and the balcony is a real plus.
I recommend you without any hesitation,

name: Spacious apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Loved this place! Excellent location, comfortable and light and spacious home, and Sammy is a wonderful host! The street is peaceful and quiet but very close to restaurants and shops and bars. Public transport (tram, train) was just a short walk. Rotterdam Central Station is easy to reach, good for day trips to Amsterdam and Utrecht and Gouda. Check in was easy and flexible. Especially liked the high ceilings and new furniture!

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: A+ location for this lovely apartment in Rotterdam! The place is small but well organized and full of everything you need to make it your temporary home. The location is TOP! 10 minutes walk to Station Centraal and another 10 minutes to most of the downtown attractions including Markthaal and the Museumpark. We stayed on the first floor so the stairs were not an issue. The front of the apartment overlooks a very lively street scene and it gets quite loud on the weekend. The bedroom overlooks a beautiful green courtyard with lovely trees and is surprisingly quiet given the location. The kitchen has everything you need! In sum, great apartment in the heart of Rotterdam!

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: Very nice apartment, extremely central and close to everything. Would really recommend it to people wishing to explore Rotterdam from a very central location. Nice view from the living room, very clean, bedroom positioned on the silent side of the building (opposite from the main street). We have had a very nice time in this apartment. Also the apartment was very child friendly (we traveled with our 1 year old daughter).  So only positive things about our stay in Rotterdam - really nothing to complain about. Dila was also very responsive and willing to help. Would come here again for sure.

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: A very nice looking apartment in the heart of Rotterdam. Slightly smaller than I expected it to be based on the pictures, but a very cozy apartment nonetheless that's perfect for a couple such as ourselves. Leaving the apartment it's almost a straight line for the centre so very close to everything you need. The apartment itself was clean and everything that you need is provided. Be aware of the wooden flooring in these apartments, it makes the people above you very loud. Overall would definitely visit again, perfect for a short stay!

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: Amazing place, super clean and design appartement, perfect for my visit. Only problem was the functioning of the heating system, and during weekend the noise outside is annoying until very late

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: Dila was very responsive. Small issue with the thermostat on the first day, which could have been user error. Only warning is that trams travel on the street in front of the apartment very often and they can be loud at times. Otherwise, nice place and accessible to many locations.

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: This was my first time staying in Rotterdam for an extended period, and I found the apartment to be ideal in several ways: location, quality of the interior design and amenities, and overall comfort. The location cannot be beat, with a walk of ten minutes or less from the central station and a tram stop just steps from the apartment. It is within walking distance of many stores, restaurants, and museums. You do hear some street activity outside the apartment, but this did not bother me—I knew I was staying in the center of a city, not the suburbs. There are apartments I dream of living in one day, and this apartment definitely fits that vision. It also allowed me to have a positive and enjoyable experience in Rotterdam. I only wish I lived there permanently.

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: It’s a great flat at a great location. Just be prepared that there is noise so bring ear plugs!

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: Hey! First floor, big windows, looking out on street life and the canal. I personally love the sound of the trams passing, might be nostalgia! Bed is super & at the back and a good bathroom. Earplugs were handy in the weekend but otherwise no problem at all with noise. The place is very well equipped and comfortable!

name: City Apartment Bold
comments: Place is at superb location , walkable distance from Rotterdam central station and shopping Centres and bars and restaurants . Except the weekend late night noises from coffee house , rest all nights are peaceful . We enjoyed our 11 nights stay.

name: City Apartment Curious
comments: The apartment was lovely and in a really central location with an easy walk to all the attractions. Unfortunately, there is a bar on the ground floor of the building that played extremely loud music on both nights that we were there.  The music started at about 10 and carried on all night.  We did contact Dila who was helpful and contacted the bar owner, but the noise continued.  Obviously this is really beyond the host control, but something guests need to be aware of.

name: City Apartment Curious
comments:
Dila's property is in the city center, next to Chinatown giving close and easy access to great restaurants, bars, public transit, local attractions and shopping. The apartment was renovated with modern amenities with ample space for a family of 4. We enjoyed great views of the adjacent canal through the floor to ceiling windows.
Dila is an awesome hostess - she was very communicative throughout our stay. I definitely recommend this property!

name: City Apartment Curious
comments: We stayed a week in this lovely apartment and it felt like home. Everything we needed was there: best Airbnb shower ever, great lighting, abundance of power points, plenty of clothes hangers, storage cubes for unpacking, coffee pod machine, fan for the warm nights, internet tv, quality dishwasher and washer/dryer appliances, just everything you might need is there.

name: City Apartment Darling
comments: This accommodation is nice, well-kept, and gets great sunlight. The location it’s in is great & super central. Dila is communicative and fairly easy to reach; all instructions provided are listed accurately. I’d definitely recommend this bnb to people visiting Rotterdam (who don’t mind climbing stairs to get to the top floor — it’s worth the hike) .

name: City Apartment Darling
comments: It's a gorgeous apartment in a great location. Overall, good value for money. However, it was slightly disappointing that no basic supplies were available, and that, for a place that charges as much as this place does for cleaning (and also as a safety deposit), linens and towels were only brought to the house 2 hours after check-in. Knowing that, if you're looking for a well located downtown Rotterdam stay, this was a decent choice.

name: City Apartment Darling
comments:
Wonderful stay, highly recommend
- unit was very comfortable and clean
- great kitchen for cooking
- great location
- large windows overlooking a cute street

name: City Apartment Darling
comments:
Great stay in the heart of Rotterdam. As mentioned the staircase is slim, but we only had carryon bags so it wasn’t an issue. It took us a minute to realize where the hallway light switch was, but once found it made navigating the narrow space much easier.
Dila was incredibly helpful when our train from Amsterdam got rerouted. She was quick to reply with a plan to get us to Rotterdam.
Apartment was clean and comfortable with great windows.

name: City Apartment Darling
comments: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Dila was extremely helpful and kind, when we arrived there was a heatwave and Dila made sure to organise a fan for us. She advised us on local restaurants and was overall a perfect host. The apartment was very clean and has a great bed, black out curtains and a small but very well kitted out kitchen. Thanks again!

name: City Loft Apartment Epic
comments:
I’m very grateful to Dila , she is really nice and friendly.
The apartment was clean and very comfortable. There is a beautiful terrace with access to the roof, but it's worth it! Really nice view and place.
One important thing, there is no elevator in the building, and the stairs are very narrow, be careful if you have large suitcases 🙌🏼

name: City Loft Apartment Epic
comments:
We chose Dila's place because it looked like a space that suits the way we like to live. We loved the modern and simple furnishings, smart use of space, and uncluttered decor. The large shower stall was a bit of a luxury, and having a washer and dryer in the unit came in very handy because we like to pack light. We didn't do as much cooking as we usually do, but we ate breakfast every morning and spent an evening up on the rooftop patio which felt amazing when the sun started to set. The sofa and bed were very comfortable and she supplied all linens which is really great, because I'm always amazed that some hosts expect people to travel with linens.
A note on the neighborhood: don't ignore her warnings on how busy it is. This area is incredibly busy both in terms of street and pedestrian activity. Trains run late and Rotterdamians (Rotterdamites? Rotterdammers?) are a spirited bunch even on the weeknights. If that's your vibe, then you are in the perfect spot!

name: Studio eigen ingang 300 meter van centraal station
comments: Huge thank you to Michael for hosting me before I moved into my shared apartment! Michael is extremely helpful and constantly checked in with me to make sure that my stay was comfortable. Apartment matches the photos and was well-equipped. Location is right in front of the central station and is very convenient with lots of restaurants and grocery stores around, including two asian marts across the street.

name: Studio eigen ingang 300 meter van centraal station
comments:
Michael was such a great host, super responsive and easy to communicate with. He was really flexible with my check-in and check-out times, and even helped carry my very heavy luggage up the small, narrow Dutch staircase (lifesaver!).
The location is perfect—just a short walk from Rotterdam Centraal and surrounded by lots of amazing Asian restaurants. Michael also pointed me to a few Asian supermarkets for groceries, which was super handy.
As a solo female traveller, I always pay attention to safety when walking back at night. Like in many cities, there are some sketchy people around, but as long as you avoid dimly lit streets and stay aware of your surroundings, it feels fine.
Overall, I had a really nice and fulfilling time in Rotterdam. I’d definitely recommend Michael’s place if you want to be close to the city centre and enjoy great food nearby.

name: Studio eigen ingang 300 meter van centraal station
comments:
Yeah! It was really great.
The room was very cozy and very central to a lot of the places we wanted to visit so that was good.
And the view from the window was great as well.

name: Huis met tuin, dicht bij centrum en RTM Airport
comments:
My daughter stayed at Martine’s place with her family, and this is her review of the experience.
We chose Martine’s place because we were looking for somewhere that was child-friendly to accommodate our young children. The property far exceeded our expectations. It is a lovely, cozy home that was perfect for our holiday experience. It’s fully equipped with really amazing amenities. We had a wonderful time there.
The location feels a bit on the outskirts of Rotterdam, so it’s quiet. But it has really great connectivity with busses, and in no time you can be in the centre of Rotterdam with ease. And there are lots of shops nearby, so everything you need is very close. Travelling with children is always stressful, but this place made it easier than anticipated.
Martine is an amazing, lovely, and considerate host. She was responsive to our needs and very understanding. It was very easy to communicate with her, and she made sure that we were very comfortable all the way through.

name: Geweldige plek vlak bij centrum
comments:
Floris is a great host. Highly responsive and assistive.
Note the place itself is spacious and accommodating, though it is somewhat less private since a section of the wall and the door separating the apartment from the shared hallway are made of glass with no curtains.
On the positive side, note that only the bathroom is shared, while the toilets are private. This worked fine for me and it is better than what one might expect.
All in all, great value for money!

name: Geweldige plek vlak bij centrum
comments:
Pros:
*Apartment is beautiful and very spacious.
*Supermarket and restaurants nearby.
*Easy walking/cycling to the centre of the city.
*Very quiet, the bedroom is at the back so no road noise.
*Fully equipped kitchen for cooking meals.
*Tasteful decorations and plants etc make you feel at home.
Cons:
The layout of the place was not clear beforehand and it is a lot less private than I expected. It's a 2-storey apartment and with this listing you rent the entire first floor. This is living room/bedroom/kitchen/toilet. Note that the toilet is outside of your "locked unit" in the communal hallway, so not technically private. The bathroom with shower/bath is on the second floor and shared with the other rental units. This sharing was not a problem for us.
My main issue is with all the internal windows. The dining area has a huge window to the communal hallway through which renters upstairs can look into the entire rental unit and even bedroom. Made me very uncomfortable.

name: Geweldige plek vlak bij centrum
comments: Amazing couple, amazing location and bright light. Steep stairs but worth them!

name: 5 star view luxury in the city centre
comments: CLEAN QUIET WITH A BEAUTIFUL VIEW

name: Stylish and central apartment
comments: We had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam at this cozy and inviting flat!. The living space was clean and well-designed, with thoughtful touches that made us feel right at home. Plus, being within walking distance to so many of Rotterdam's highlights and to lots of transport links added extra convenience. The hosts were extremely friendly and we highly recommend this place for anyone looking to explore Rotterdam, or to use it as a “base” to explore the rest of the Netherlands.

name: Stylish and central apartment
comments: Had a great time  staying here!! very accessible to local shops and Rotterdam centrum as well as centraal station. lovely balcony to have breakfast on when the weather's is nice too. would definitely come again for future visits to the city. thanks again!!

name: City Centre Maisonette with Charm
comments: The apartment is clean and the location is perfect. The host answered all our questions during our stay. There is no noise, the environment is very calm. It was a nice stay.

name: Happy Huisje
comments: Despite a little struggle using the key and Lock-App, we were able to solve the problem quickly with Lindi’s patient and proactive responses. The home is lovely and comfortable, decorated beautifully! The owner went out of their way to create a welcoming ambiance. It was wonderful having a kitchen and laundry machines to use during our stay. Each person had their own bed and space to retreat to. The AC was very effective, as was the electric fireplace (very nice in the evenings and on the rainy days). The home has some unique storage and lighting but Lindi was able to communicate where to find everything. Be advised that map apps try to take you the incorrect direction on the street the home is on (it’s a one-way road) but once we figured out the correct approach and only a few minutes time, it was easy. The home is located in a gorgeous area and is extremely private.

name: Cozy and light central home
comments:
I stayed for 4 nights while settling my temporary relocation to Rotterdam from Singapore.
It was a Lovely apartment and Max was an extremely friendly and responsive host- very easy to ask him questions and receive a reply almost immediately. The apartment was clean and bright, and towels were provided. There was also laundry detergent (there was a 2-in-1 washer/dryer) and dishwasher capsules provided which was nice.
Area was great, very easy for me to get to other places via Metro/tram.
Just a note to other travellers to take heed is regarding the very steep stairs up to the apartment, so do be careful if you have a lot of heavy luggage. The windows can be kept open for fresh air, but watch out for mosquitoes. There was a can of insect spray kindly provided haha.
Overall a very nice apartment in a convenient area.

name: Cozy and light central home
comments:
We stayed at Max's facility with our family. The apartment is very spacious and light. The location is very good and easy to reach and find - 1 min from Metro station and Tram stop. It is closed to the City center and many pubs and stores. The facility was clean, with minor remarks. Would be good to have a device for drying the glasses after washing. :-)
Currently there are construction works ongoing very close by, which started 07:30 in the morning on Saturday - was very noisy and disturbing.
We stayed on the top floor, which gave us a lot of light, but also a lot of challenge with the luggage - very steep staircase.
The overall experience and satisfaction is great and very important - it was worth for the money we paid.
We recommend the place and would come again, if we need accommodation.

name: Cozy and light central home
comments: The Airbnb was clean, spacious, and comfortable. Being on the top floor added to its charm, and it felt private with big windows facing onto a courtyard. The host was welcoming and had clear instructions, which was great.   We stayed during Koningsdag which made the area noisy, however I would say that shouldn’t be the norm.  To sum it up, it’s in a great centrally located spot with transit and restaurants on your doorstep.

name: Cozy and light central home
comments:
The flat is spacious and in a fantastic location but we did have a few issues. A couple of things were broken: the bathroom and shower doors were off their hinges and the mechanism to lift the handheld shower head didn't work. The flat was clean on a surface level but it needs a deep clean. There were squashed mosquitoes on the walls and curtains, so you might also want to bring repellent. Some smaller amenities listed in the description weren’t provided (dish soap, tea towels, salt and pepper, etc.) which isn’t convenient for a short stay.
I messaged Max to let him know but never heard back. While his other communication was friendly and helpful, it's not acceptable to have broken things in a rental. If these issues are fixed (or if you're unbothered by them) the flat is great for its location and space.

name: Apartment in city centre
comments: Amazing house, balcony and very centered. Marieke was very welcoming.

name: Prachtig luxe Appartement
comments: Es hat uns wirklich gut gefallen. Es ist eine sehr saubere und schöne Wohnung mit guter Lage. Alles hat unkompliziert funktioniert und der Blick vom Balkon ist wirklich ein Highlight!

name: Cozy and spacious private room
comments: Heerlijke locatie, dicht bij water en groen en gezellige straatjes! De kamer was mooi ingericht, net, het was er stil en we hadden veel privacy. Jasper, Frank en Grover hebben ons fijn ontvangen, goed voorzien en gaven ons goede tips voor in de buurt! Bedankt!

name: Mooi appartement met 2 balkons
comments: wonderful loft; bright; quiet; i warmly recommend.

name: Charming Dutch 30s Waterfront Retreat
comments:
We were in Rotterdam for working all week end with a colleague.
Appartement is good, simple, you find everything !
Communication is good.
View on the canal is very relaxing and we found easily a car park for my van every evening and night !
Small shops and some bar and restaurants are close.
I recommend!

name: Charming Dutch 30s Waterfront Retreat
comments: Spotless 1 bedroom apartment with canal view and on a quiet street. Walkable or Tram-able to the city center. Nice kitchen with all basics in.

name: Charming Dutch 30s Waterfront Retreat
comments:
It was truly a wonderful place to stay.
The view was absolutely beautiful, and the house is very quiet.
The tram and metro to the city center are close by.
If I come back to Rotterdam, I would love to stay here again.

name: Charming Dutch 30s Waterfront Retreat
comments: “Thanks, I had a great stay! The apartment was very tidy with a lovely canal view and was close to the city centre. I would absolutely recommend it to anyone visiting Rotterdam.”

name: Charming Dutch 30s Waterfront Retreat
comments: a very beautiful view, clean place, very quiet, I liked it very much, I will come back

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: Thanks so much , room was amazing and super light during the day , everything you need and nice and open planned ! Will definitely stay again !

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: The rooms have a nice feeling and an amazing view. You can reach everything by foot. The only negative thing is, that you can't open the windows, which they cannot change i guess, so it isn't that big of a problem.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: The Usual was such a lovely place to stay - really close to everything you need when staying in Rotterdam and very close to all the most popular sites and streets.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: I had a lovely time at The Usual, very conveniently next to the Beurs Metro station, lots of places to eat. Inside the hotel was good, I had a private bathroom in my accommodation. The only thing I would warn people about is it can get rather noisy outside on the roadside so if you're a light sleeper or can get easily disturbed, see if you can get a room facing away from the road. All in all I would definitely recommend and would choose this hotel again if I am to come back!

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
Review for The Usual Rotterdam Hotel
I recently had the pleasure of staying at The Usual Rotterdam Hotel for 2 nights, and I must say, everything went great. I stayed in a Double room, which was not only spacious but also exceptionally comfortable. The room was immaculate and well-appointed with all the necessary amenities to ensure a pleasant stay.
The staff were incredibly welcoming and attentive, always ready to assist with a smile. The hotel's location was convenient, making it easy to explore the vibrant city of Rotterdam. The overall experience was seamless and enjoyable, from the smooth check-in process to the quality of facilities provided.
I highly recommend The Usual Rotterdam Hotel to anyone visiting the city and look forward to returning for another delightful stay.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
Fijn hotel; vriendelijke bediening en een goede plek als je midden in de stad wilt zijn.
Voldoende privacy en fijne atmosfeer.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: Overall a disappointing stay. Boost room facing the street, no tea and coffee facilities and very hard mattress.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: The lack of any outside ventilation in the rooms was a bit overwhelming. The doors were very heavy. Every time we went out onto the street, a homeless person was asking for or offering something, which made us a bit uneasy. Its central location is nice, close to the metro, tram, and park. The lobby is nice.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
I loved this hotel and its location. The room had what I needed for a short stay. I also enjoyed using the coworking space on the first floor and they do have washing and dryer machines (paid)
There are two main things that I would highlight: The communication over Airbnb was… mostly inexistent. If you need to communicate with them it is better to go to the reception
The other thing is that the room cleaning is pretty inconsistent. It is not bad but you never know whether they will clean your room or not.
Besides these 2 points I would definitely stay here again: I liked the location, you’re close to everything and the hotel had everything I needed.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: We had a great stay. We could check in two hours early, because the room was ready. Located on a busy street, but nice and quiet inside the room. Lots to do. Great value for price! Would recommend and would stay there again next time!

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments: Het Usual is goed centraal gelegen in de buurt van de Highlights van Rotterdam, vriendelijk personeel, leuke lounge, goed ontbijt.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
Positives: Location is perfect, right in the middle of the city, easy to get to. Interesting layout with the bar and reception and very stylish.
The room I really liked, very neat and lovely lighting.
Negatives : had a double bed however it was made of 2 mattresses and that made it very uncomfortable to sleep in.
Somehow I had no normal bin, only recycling which I found strange.

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
Extremely friendly staff, the lobby was a public cafe which was super cool.
Easy check in
Everything is walkable distance, a block away from the night life so there’s privacy
Right next to the train station.
Most definitely staying there again

name: Double Room in sustainable hotel in Rotterdam
comments:
Excellent review is a must here:
- Perfect location, steps away from Beurs station, heart of the city.
- Very cozy co-working place downstairs. Not crowded, with good ambient music.
- Rooms and overall premises are very good.
- Breakfast isn't something I would recommend, but it's there if you need it.

name: Abraham Kuyperlaan II
comments:
The apartment is clean, quiet, and in a great location with a comfy bed and nice balcony. For a short stay, it’s probably fine — but for a long stay, there are some issues.
The kitchen is missing basic items for cooking. I was informed only an hour before my flight that I needed to bring my own towel, which made arrival stressful. After a long trip, the last thing you want is to figure out where to get a towel just to shower — and the host didn’t offer a solution.
There’s no full-length mirror, and the toilet/shower are outside the apartment on the main floor. I didn’t notice this clearly mentioned in the listing. There’s also no sink in the toilet area, so you need to use the kitchen sink to brush your teeth or shave.
The apartment is on the 3rd floor with steep stairs, which could be tough for some.
Elisabeth was responsive and tried to help, which I appreciated. I believe I was the first guest and hope my feedback helps improve the experience for future stays.

name: Two-bedroom apartment in Rotterdam
comments:
Die Unterkunft war sehr gemütlich eingerichtet, mit liebe zum Detail.
Das Highlight war die Dachterrasse.
Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und können sie nur empfehlen.

name: Two-bedroom apartment in Rotterdam
comments: Die Wohnung waf wirklich ein Traum, schön sauber, ruhig, alles tip top sauber, sehr gemütlich und die Dachterrasse ist ein absolutes Highlight. City oder Meer sind schnell zu erreichen. Die Lage ist perfekt. Jiska und Chris sind sehr nette Gastgeber, immer erreichbar. Wir sind höchst zufrieden, können die Wohnung nur empfehlen und bedanken uns für den tollen Aufenthalt. Wir kommen sehr gerne bald wieder. Besten Dank!😊

name: Appartment in Blijdorp (5 min central station)
comments: The place is really nice to stay. There are only minor things to consider. The balcony in the listing picture didn’t match the actualy balcony (No table and sofa). The lights were off in the apartment stairs. (It was harder with steep stairs :D) Other than that, our stay was close to perfect.

name: Appartment in Blijdorp (5 min central station)
comments: Great apartment and location.  Loved how light and bright it is, along with the view over the park.  Easy walk to Central Station, supermarkets and to many of the main sights in Rotterdam.

name: Appartment in Blijdorp (5 min central station)
comments: A cosy place in a very central location, 15 min walk from Rotterdam Central station. It's situated next to a park with a big tree right outside which is relaxing. It had everything I needed for 1 week stay on my business trip: a fully equipped kitchen, comfortable bed, nice and cosy living room, and a charming balcony with herbs. All in one, a really great and comfy stay. Just be prepared for a steep flight of stairs :)

name: Central Retreat in Lively Rotterdam
comments: Rob was very communicative and helpful. Self check in and out was simple. Location was very convenient as most areas of interest were within walking distance. Place itself was fine, sleeping arrangements in the basement, and living room/kitchen on ground floor. Lots of large windows facing the street but enough privacy and not as much noise as expected. Very good overall

name: Central Retreat in Lively Rotterdam
comments: Great location! Michiel was very helpful. Be careful if you’re planning on having a car with you as parking is expensive. We also couldn’t park in the street the apartment was on because the parking meter wouldn’t accept any of our credit cards, even our travel card so we had to park in a garage 10 mins walk away.

name: Central Retreat in Lively Rotterdam
comments: Would definitely recommend staying here. To those wondering after reading the previous reviews - the staircase / railing situation has been fixed! We spent an amazing 3 nights here, the place is in a great location and well equipped.

name: Central Retreat in Lively Rotterdam
comments: Overall good apartment and the location was fantastic. However, the apartment did get very hot during our stay, the fans in the apartment helped to alleviate the heat a little. FYI at the time of writing this review, the oven does not work.

name: Central Retreat in Lively Rotterdam
comments: Good overall location, not too far from the central station. The place was mostly clean and was decorated nicely. The place looked exactly like the pictures and the neighbourhood was nice and quiet.  We kept the curtains closed since the apartment is right off the street. The host was super responsive and quick to accommodate the change in check in due to a commute delay to the place.

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments:
Op foto's lijkt het nieuw, schoon en fris. in het echt was dat het helaas totaal niet. Van haren in badkamer en hoofdbord van het bed tot aan grote hoeveelheid kalk op de douchewand en urine op de onderkant van de wc-bril. De badkamer stonk onwijs naar kattenpis, door volgezogen wand/ vloerplaten die niet waren afgekit. Als je erop liep klonk het alsof je in het moeras liep. Sop, sop, sop. Echt onwijs ongezond. Achteraf bleek host wel op de hoogte te zijn van dit gebrek. Maar heeft dit vooraf nooit gemeld, komt aannemer voor. Voor 1 nacht, met late check-out betaalde ik 275 euro. Absoluut zijn geld niet waard. Zelfs wanneer alles op en top in orde was geweest best aan de prijs voor de locatie en afmeting etc. Ik verwachtte er dus heel wat van. Maar ben weggegaan. De klacht is door de host erkend en terugbetaling heeft gelukkig snel plaatsgevonden.
Verder wat kleine dingetjes die ik zelf zou aanpassen. Sfeerverlichting binnen, gordijn/ folie op glas van de deur, meer privacy van huis

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments:
We hebben genoten van ons verblijf bij Yorick! Het huis is mooi en comfortabel, gelegen in een redelijk afgelegen omgeving. Hoewel het dicht bij de snelweg ligt, stoorde dat niet. Het huisje deelt het terrein met een andere woning, maar er is genoeg privacy.
De communicatie met Yorick verliep erg soepel, en in het huisje lagen duidelijke instructies voor het gebruik van alle apparatuur. Een groot pluspunt was de temperatuurmeter bij de jacuzzi – zo handig om te zien hoe warm het water was, zowel vanuit binnen als terwijl je in de jacuzzi zat.
Kortom, een fijne plek om even tot rust te komen.

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments: Es war ein super Wochenende! Wir haben uns in der Unterkunft sehr wohl gefühlt und das Highlight war natürlich der Whirlpool. Super einfach in der Handhabung und sehr gut zum Entspannen nach einem langen Tag in der Stadt. Die Unterkunft ist relativ gut an die Metro angebunden (ca. 20 min zu Fuß zur Haltestelle) und von dort aus geht es direkt in die Stadt. Die angrenzende Autobahn hat uns überhaupt nicht gestört. Auf jeden Fall empfehlenswert!

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments:
Uns hat die Unterkunft sehr gut gefallen und wir würden jederzeit wieder buchen!
Es ist alles sehr modern eingerichtet und es war alles sehr sauber!
Das Highlight war der Whirlpool! Wenn der Whirlpool an ist hört man die Autobahn gar nicht mehr! Zur anderen Seite des Grundstücks liegt die Unterkunft direkt am Wald. Wir haben die Ruhe und die Lage direkt in der Natur sehr genossen!
Yorick ist ein hervorragender Gastgeber und antwortet sehr schnell!

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments:
Yoricks Unterkunft war traumhaft!
Toll ausgestattet, gut gelegen und super sauber, wir haben uns direkt wohl gefühlt.
Yorick selbst war nicht nur immer kurzfristig erreichbar, sondern auch extrem freundlich in der Kommunikation und sehr zuvorkommend.
Absolutes Highlight ist der Whirlpool, in dieser Unterkunft kann man optimal entspannen und sich erholen!

name: Forest house with hot-tub near by Rotterdam
comments: Der Gastgeber war jederzeit erreichbar, hat sehr schnell geantwortet und sich aufmerksam, aber nie aufdringlich um uns gekümmert. Wir konnten wunderbar abschalten. Der Hot Tub war ein Highlight und die Umgebung eignet sich perfekt für Spaziergänge mit dem Hund. Wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt! 😊

name: Architect's Cozy Studio in 'Oud Delfshaven'
comments: This Airbnb is located in a lovely, friendly neighborhood that I found very convenient to get around Rotterdam and also had nice bars and restaurants. I really appreciated the architecture guide to the city, provided by the host, and the flat itself had a delightful deck that a local parakeet liked to visit. The space is easy to get to, quiet and clean with lots of plants. I found a couple small things missing, such as hand soap in the bathroom, and it felt a little pricy without many amenities but I overall found it relaxing, clean, and convenient.

name: Nice studio in Rotterdam
comments: Location is great and the place is ok for the price to stay for a day or two. Bed was comfortable. Wouldnt like to stay here longer because there is no sound isolation on the doors so you will wake up when owners kids wake up, no sleeping in here. Also toilet is in the hall, there is kind of weird smell in whole building and few small things like unprotected power outlets in shower, cant really open shades as the place is below street level and windows are directly into street etc. 3,5 / 5

name: Nice studio in Rotterdam
comments: We stayed for three nights at Reginald’s studio and had a great time! Everything is as you see in the pictures, very new and clean. The only thing that’s not inside the studio is the toilet, you have to cross the hallway to get there. Both the room and the bed are big enough for two people, with three people the room would become crowded I think. The bed is comfortable too, we were very happy with that! It’s a little bit of a hassle to get out of bed when you’re on the right side and don’t want to wake up the person next to you, because of the bed’s high foot end, but it’s not a big problem. Reginald has three small and very cute daughters who you will hear from time to time, but it didn’t bother us (we sleep with ear plugs in anyway, so maybe that helped). Reginald and his wife are very friendly and respect your privacy. The location is great, in a nice neighborhood and very well connected to the rest of the city. We’d love to stay here again when we return to Rotterdam next year!

name: Family Friendly City Home
comments:
Mariël's apartment occupies the raised ground floor and basement level of a 1912 building, full of interesting architectural details and charm of the period. The place is so bright and flooded with natural light, which we loved! It was very comfortable and had a relaxed feel to it. The kitchen was equipped with anything you may need - and even if we didn't actually cook any meals, it was all there had we been so inclined. Lovely garden off the main bedroom. We felt right at home!
Mariël was very friendly and responsive, answering all messages within a few minutes, and flexible with our late check-in: we arrived later than the advertised time, but she waited for us at the apartment to show us around and even gave us recommendations on local eateries.
Freddie, the resident cat is a beautiful, friendly, tabby boy who will happily purr as you pet him ♥
We really enjoyed our few days at the apartment and would absolutely recommend it!
Go visit Delft and the windmills at Kinderdijk!

name: Family Friendly City Home
comments:
We had a wonderful two week stay at Mariël’s home in Rotterdam!
The space was light, cosy, perfectly located, and close to everything we needed.
One of the highlights was Freddie the cat, who was a lovely and low-maintenance housemate.
Mariël was a fantastic host: very responsive and thoughtful, making sure we had everything we needed throughout our stay.
We’d absolutely recommend this place to anyone visiting Rotterdam!

name: 5 minutes walk from Metro Station and 10 from Ahoy
comments:
Nice and friendly. Good communication. Fast responds.
Although, from the room you can hear neighbours and cars in the streets.

name: 5 minutes walk from Metro Station and 10 from Ahoy
comments:
super vriendelijk. voelde me zeer welkom.
veel privacy

name: 5 minutes walk from Metro Station and 10 from Ahoy
comments: A lovely stay. Everything you need, clean, peaceful, very private, bright space, calm atmosphere, comfy pillow. Near to a lovely library and theatre, transport, mall etc

name: 5 minutes walk from Metro Station and 10 from Ahoy
comments: Mona is a very helpful host, the room was cozy and there was a lot of light. The neighbourhood seemed calm. Would definitely recommend

name: 5 minutes walk from Metro Station and 10 from Ahoy
comments: Nice and clean room. Some traffic noise but not too bad.

name: Mooi appartement in herenhuis.
comments:
Hi, Marie was a really great host! Communication with her was very easy and she is really helpful. Location of the apartment is great and close to city center, there is public parking on the street in front of the apartment. Apartment was spacious which was important to us as we were traveling with a small kid and always bring our travel cot. apartment has also a small garden and is even more usefull if you visit Rotterdam in the summer.
Bad thing about apartment is that it has noticeable smell as it is actually basement. We would appreciate if it was stated somewhere that it is part of the house where people live and you can hear noise from upstairs. Good thing is that basement has separate entrance, therefore you don't interfere with others.
Overall it is a good price to offer ratio and it was a nice stay for the three of us.

name: Mooi appartement in herenhuis.
comments:
The flat is spacious well fitted and adaptable, below street level but with easy almost level access to a superb garden. In an attractive neighbourhood with easy access to very different facilities at each end of the street.
Marie Claire and Arie made our stay fascinating, Maries recommendations of places to visit, activites and travel enabled us to enjoy our stay to the full and link with life in Rotterdam. She also gave us suggestions for our next destination The Hague which did the same and enhansed the stay there. Thank you

name: Mooi appartement in herenhuis.
comments:
Marie Claire was very very helpful., friendly, and responsive. For example, the light in the bathroom did not allow me to properly put on my make up. Within hours there was a lamp in the bathroom that worked.
The apartment has details with really nice design elements and with a truly personal touch including beautiful dishes, glassware and mugs. The garden is simply gorgeous with lots of flowers. When I was there, the figs were super ripe. I was invited to partake of the figs and the plums. The pears were not quite ripe as yet!
As far as I’m concerned, the pictures do not do justice to this property nor to the garden .I would happily return here in the future

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments: Well located and clean. Unfortunately our car was broken into outside the apartment. There was nothing in the car, but perhaps a general advice future clients. The heating system is really good, but I think the apartments would benefit from double glazing. The host Martijn was very helpful and overall we were delighted with the accommodation.

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments:
Met totaal 6 mensen zijn we een nacht in dit heerlijke appartement verbleven (avond uit naar de Vrienden van Amstel). Alles was nieuw en schoon en de ruimte was zoals beschreven in de advertentie. Martijn reageerde zeer snel toen ons niet duidelijk was hoe het parkeren en de bijbehorende parkeerkaart in zijn werk ging.
Enige ‘verbeterpunt’ is dat ik, nog geen half uur na aankomst, een ‘automated message’ kreeg waar niet op gereageerd kon worden, waarin stond: “high noise levels were detected in the property”. Dat vond ik niet echt klantvriendelijk, ook omdat niet duidelijk was of het ons betrof (luid waren we namelijk allerminst). Directe communicatie heeft in zo’n geval mijn voorkeur.
Verder: goede accommodatie voor een dag of weekend in Rotterdam met meerdere mensen. Aanrader!

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments:
Eine perfekte Unterkunft – absolut empfehlenswert!
Wir haben für 3 Nächte im Alphabet Apartment in Rotterdam übernachtet und sind absolut begeistert! Die Wohnung war makellos sauber, stilvoll eingerichtet und hatte alles, was wir brauchten. Wir waren zu sechst unterwegs, und der Platz war mehr als ausreichend perfekt aufgeteilt und sehr gemütlich.
Die zentrale Lage war ein großes Highlight: Nur wenige Minuten bis zur Innenstadt, sodass wir alle Sehenswürdigkeiten und Restaurants bequem zu Fuß erreichen konnten. Auch die Kommunikation und der Check-in liefen reibungslos, was den Aufenthalt noch angenehmer machte.
Alles in allem: Eine traumhafte Unterkunft für einen Städtetrip nach Rotterdam. Wir kommen definitiv wieder!

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments: Best Airbnb experience! We were very very happy with these accommodations! Very clean, quiet, across the street from a grocery store and walking distance to train station, major sites, cafes and restaurants!  Perfect!

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments: We had a very comfortable stay. The apartment is spacious and filled with natural light. One thing to note is that the toilet is located  far from the bathroom with the shower, which may not be ideal for everyone. We also missed having a toaster—when we asked, we were told it wasn’t possible to provide one. That said, the keypad entry system was very convenient, and everything else about the stay was excellent.

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments:
Overall, it was an okay stay. Some good things, some bad things. Location was great for what we needed, and about 15 minutes from lots of great restaurants. Comfy rooms as well.
On the other side, there were some things that weren't up to standard.
The stair railings (and the stairs are very steep!) were not attached to the walls properly and so the stairs felt pretty unsafe - especially as you need the stairs to get to bedrooms with luggage
Also, on the first evening, the boiler made a huge amount of noise that it made it difficult to sleep. I tried contacting the hosts via message first - it was marked as read but I didn't receive a response. A few hours later, I called the emergency number and was told there was nothing they could do about it - though they were aware that it happens sometimes and will just stop of its own accord. This was pretty distressing and frustrating.

name: Luxurious Escape 3BDR Apartment WS
comments:
The apartment was in a good location for the Harbour, city Centre and Metro stations. There is a supermarket just over the road and lots of nice bars and restaurants within a few minutes walk.
The apartment was an odd design, with no hand basin nearby so you had to walk to the kitchen or down the corridor to the shower room to wash your hands.
There was five of us staying and one friend joined us for dinner on one of the nights. The apartment had five forks and two spoons and six knives. We were really surprised that there was a not enough cutlery for the amount of people the apartment could sit.
There was also only four dining chairs meaning two family members had to stand and perch on the back of the sofa to eat their dinner. We also have to adjust our dinner to allow for someone eating with a spoon!
Ventilation was quite poor,
Especially in the shower as there was no vents, bedroom curtains didn’t close well. The apartment was hot. Take earplugs as lots of smokers outside.

name: Spacious Room in Hoogvliet
comments: De omschrijving klopt helemaal. Rotterdam is best prijzig qua Hotels.  Kamer is super schoon . Ondanks je in hetzelfde huis zit als de bewoners, merk je er niks van . De prijs klopt dan. Ik had echt mijn privacy gevoel. Bedankt, het was top.

name: Spacious Room in Hoogvliet
comments:
Great host and fantastic location, easy access to bus and shops which are only minutes away.
House is clean and it shows that the host care about presentation. friendly people who respect your privacy. if you have any doubts, trust me and book here, you won't be disappointed.

name: Modern maisonnette near Rotterdam city centre
comments: Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt in Rogiers und Lisas Wohnung. Eine moderne, hochwertig eingerichtete Wohnung mit allem was man braucht. Die Lage ist zentral, viele Highlights Rotterdams sind zu Fuß erreichbar. Trotzdem liegt die Wohnung verhältnismäßig ruhig in einer Anliegerstraße mit wenig Verkehr. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen und würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

name: Heart of Rotterdam
comments: the location was amazing. In the heart of the city is very accurate. The view is also beautiful. Everything was clean and tidy.

name: Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
Wei is a great host. Great place to stay and everything was great.
The bed was a bit noisy (squeaky) and there is a building site right outside the windows that start hammering and making noise at 7am. As soon as the building is completed, I am sure it will return back to the usual peaceful place to sleep.
All in all a good place to stay.

name: Heart of Rotterdam
comments: Great peaceful place with central location, a lot of light and clean. Wei is also great person to speak with due to his interests and life experience. So definitely recommend 😊!

name: Heart of Rotterdam
comments:
First things first, great value compared to what other listings in airbnb was offering for short stays in a central location in Rotterdam!
I think wei is those hosts you can actually rely on anytime and he will give you the feeling that you've just come upon to a family friends place to stay instead of airbnb. He'll offer you many recommendations and will be really efficient in helping any problems you might have! He has a really tidy living space, bathroom (shared with the guest but impeccable cleanliness, lots of towels in different sizes and toiletries), bedroom gives you a really good view of a nice chunk of the city!
Everyone will feel right at home with wei's place and I think he would consider giving discounts to long time staying guests!
Such a upstanding person with a squeaky clean place!

name: City Centre Apartment with Private Garden
comments: The host was very attentive and helped us with all our problems and concerns. Since our flight arrived early, we were allowed to check in 2-3 hours earlier. The high ceilings and the presence of a balcony/garden were amazing. As we were on a family vacation, the neighborhood was perfect. However, it is not a suitable area for parties or noise. The house was very spacious. The only issue we had was with heating. The heaters were small, and we had to rely on the air conditioner to warm up the house, which took some time. Other than that, everything was great.

name: City Centre Apartment with Private Garden
comments:
The place was amazing with a lot of potential, but when we got there it seemed like the owner took off in a hurry and just left behind some of the things that made the house great.
The photos didn't really match the reality, there was a lot missing stuff and a bad smell, probably from rotten vegetables, was coming from the kitchen closet.
Also take care with the bathroom door, it literally came off from the hinges.
Also, there were a lot construction things left in the garden and under the stairs, which made the view a bit difficult to enjoy fully.
But overall we liked the house and enjoyed the surrounding view but they should invest more in this beautiful place.

name: Family Room @ Hostel Room
comments: Lovely hostel in a very charming old building in central Rotterdam. Very friendly and welcoming staff, good vibes. Family room was clean and light and airy. Can be a bit noisy, but free ear plugs are provided. They rent out bikes too.

name: Compact huisje, rustige locatie, nabij Ahoy
comments: Fleur is a wonderful host and person. It was a pleasure staying at her cabin studio apartment. The place is super clean and the fresh farm eggs were a treat everyday. She is very prompt in communication and a super helpful host. She also accommodated for an early check in as I had just arrived from an international flight. I stayed about 5 nights and it was lovely. Thanks for hosting me.

name: Gedempte Zalmhaven Appartement
comments:
Great place to stay. The apartment is well furnished, new, comfortable with an amazing view on the Rotterdam harbour.
Really recommended ! Terence was very welcoming

name: Gedempte Zalmhaven Appartement
comments: Beautiful apartment, with great views of the water!

name: Gedempte Zalmhaven Appartement
comments:
I stayed here with my girlfriend for 10 days, and it was an amazing experience. The apartment is located on the 19th floor, so the views from every room are simply breathtaking—you can even see the Erasmus Bridge through the glass windows. The place was beautifully furnished, spotless, and felt very comfortable.
Communication with the host was excellent—he was so kind that he even left me his gym card to use during my stay. The location is also perfect: a supermarket is just a 4-minute walk away, and there’s a parking garage right next door.
I give this stay 5 stars without hesitation. If I come back to Rotterdam, I’d be really disappointed if this place were already booked, that’s how much I enjoyed it.

name: Modern Retreat 3BDR Apartment WS - 95 SQM
comments:
The bedrooms were nice and beds were comfortable.
Bathroom were separate to 2 units, at opposite end of the apt. One unit has the shower and sink; the other unit has only the toilet (no sink).
It did not meet our expectations and we were glad that we only spent one night prior to boarding our cruise. Here are our areas of concerns: 1. I specifically asked if there were stairs to the apt, and got a confirmation that there were NO stairs. It is important because my party has difficulty walking the stairs, let alone carry our luggage up and down. We then found out there was a long flight of narrow, circular stairs to the apt. A couple of our party hurt themselves taking the long flight, and bringing the luggage up and down the stairs. 2. We knew there is no AC, and was told that fans would be available for us. That was not true, after checked in, we immediately requested fans and they politely told us that it would not be available. It was close to 80 degrees F that day. Frustrating!

name: Contemporary 3BDR Apartment WS - 99 SQM
comments:
The stay was awful because:
- the host is not a real person but a series of employees, and an automated messaging service
- the place is new, well refurbished and acceptable, also clean-ish, but the pictures are much more seductive than what you really get
- our sleeping rooms were in the basement of the building, without daylight! no mention of that in the description
- the host messed up our apartment, messed up our try to check-in early, and continued just sending us prewritten messages
- if you're lucky, it will be an okay stay, but it's not lovely and you don't feel welcome, it's just a company selling beds via Airbnb (and possibly other websites)

name: Contemporary 3BDR Apartment WS - 99 SQM
comments:
Lack of toilet paper, shower was clogged and noise from heating units.
Location was good, big apartment with easy locking system.

name: Contemporary 3BDR Apartment WS - 99 SQM
comments: The apartment has an excellent location — it’s close to everything you might need. It was quite clean, with a well-equipped kitchen, and the space overall is large and comfortable. However, the layout is a bit awkward: the toilet is right by the entrance, the sink is in a different part of the apartment, and the bedrooms are located upstairs. Also, it can get noisy at times since the windows face the building entrance where people often pass by and talk. Overall, I’d rate it 4.5 out of 5.

name: Contemporary 3BDR Apartment WS - 99 SQM
comments:
Positives: very clean, supermarket nearby, comfortable beds, good shower.
Negatives: we thought we were getting a different apartment with a better layout and larger couch to sit on. For 4 people the couch sat only 2 or 3 if we squeezed in.
Toilet with broken lid (this has been reported 2 x in previous reviews) has no wash basin, one has to go to the other side of the apartment to the bathroom to wash hands.
Only 1 tiny window high up that opens up. With no air con this apartment would be too hot in Summer.
If you open the curtains everyone in the carpark could see everything in the apartment, it needs sheer curtains to provide privacy and light or you are sitting in the dark with the lights on.
The bedrooms in the basement had a window high up to open but people would smoke outside so smoke came into the bedrooms below.
The last major disadvantage was that the outside door would not open with the code given. 3 other couples we met had the same problem. Would not stay again here

name: Beukels Boutique
comments:
I spent beautiful 5 days of holiday in Douwe's apartment. It's a perfect spot for longer stay as well.
It completely matched the description and looked like the photos. I can say even more stylish in the nature. The apartment is spacious, light, stylish decorated with lot of floor pots. It is very clean.
The kitchen is fully equipped + Coffee machine with grinder + Lavazza coffee as extra gift.
Bathroom is also very spacious, modern equipped and clean. All towels and bathroom linen are cotton. From bedroom is excess to balcony and courtyard, perfect for morning coffee.
Location is great, just 15 - 20 min walking to center of Rotterdam. It's peaceful and safe. Supermarkets and bars and restaurants are in neighbourhood as well.
Communication with Douwe went smoothly before and during my stay in the apartment. Douwe is friendly, generous host and responded in 5 minutes with recommendation about bars and restaurants.The apartment worth what I paid. I highly recommend it.

name: Beukels Boutique
comments: Douwe is really cool person and he resolve everything really fast. He also is very kind and encouraging to use all the things in the house, like the spices, the coffee machine, and all the nice things the apartment has to offer. The desk is very nice for working and it can be regulated. The display was also nice. There was also an amazing lighting where you don't need big lights (I'm a small lights enthusiast haha). In general, the place was so nice and the attention was amazing. Definitely coming back when going to Rotterdam again 🙌

name: Central Luxury Apartment with Style
comments: Rotterdam is a very expensive city to stay in hotels and Airbnbs. Jeronen's place is worth the cost-benefit. It is very well located, in a few minutes you can get to any part of the city, whether by tram, metro, bike or on foot. Also it is close do the Central Station. The apartment is quiet, there are no bars or noisy establishments on the street, the neighborhood is very peaceful. Jeronen and Michiel are always helpful, respond immediately to messages, ready to help with anything you need. The apartment is very clean and comfortable, with everything you need.

name: Central Luxury Apartment with Style
comments:
Jeroen's place is beautiful and spacious. Close (20 minutes walk or less) to a park, the zoo, shops, restaurants, the canal and public transport.
The huge windows let in so much light and in good weather, having them open gives a wonderful breeze. The road below isn't super busy, so the air feels clean and it isn't noisy most of the time.
The WiFi is great all over the space and it's well lit.
The kitchen is compact, but spacious at the same time with a huge fridge, freezer. There is only an induction hotplate, but it works well (we only know gas fires though, so we had to learn quickly).You'll have everything you need there, aside from a microwave and washing machine for longer stays. The compact dishwasher came in handy and the layout of the kitchen (like the rest of the apartment), was fun and relaxing.
There are local playgrounds for kids, running/walking paths by the canal and cycle paths almost everywhere.
This is great for a quiet city break and as a base to explore from.

name: Spacious apartment in Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is very spacious and bright, Wijnand and his friend Sebas were very nice and understanding, even when I had to do the check in late at night (22 pm). The kitchen is complete with everything. The positioning is nice, very tranquil, and near the buses. Will suggest everyone to stay here!

name: Spacious apartment in Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is wonderful — very spacious and easy to find. Wijnand was extremely responsive and helpful from check-in to check-out.
