We loved the plenty of natural sunlight inside, and the apartment had lots of space for our 8-month-old to crawl around. It’s also conveniently located near several supermarkets. The staircase is a bit steep, but still manageable.

name: Beautiful  family home Rotterdam
comments:
The house was perfect for stay! Located in a quiet neighbourhood. The house itself is spacious and clean. Street parking was convenient and right near the house, it made things easy since as we were traveling by car.
Also there is the adorable cat. She’s friendly and affectionate when she decides to say hello but also independent enough to not disturb your space. Her occasional visits added a warm and homey touch to our stay. Overall, it was a fantastic experience.

name: Beautiful  family home Rotterdam
comments:
Beautiful house in beautiful surroundings. The kids enjoyed exploring the house when we first arrived and we walked around to the nearest food shop which was about 10 minutes away. Easy access to central Rotterdam by tram so we enjoyed 2 days of exploring the city.
We went in August and I would advise anyone else staying here in the summer to bring some mosquito spray. The house was very warm so we had to open the windows which of course let all the mosquitoes in.
The house was a good size for a family of 4 and we soon made friends with the cat that lives there. Overall a good stay, apart from the bugs!

name: Private apartment in Rotterdam North
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments:
Dear Viewers,
hope you are doing well
I recently got an opportunity to visit Lennard's place, for a stay of 3 days, purpose being Keukenhof, Tulip Barn and Rotterdam Zoo and other places in general.
Lennard's place is located right close to the station, just a single tram stop
The location is very peaceful yet close to happenings and worth checking this out.
Most importantly about Lennard and his brother, they both are excellent guys, very new to Airbnb but indeed great hosts.
They are with you since your booking until your last day of visit and beyong- very proactive, more than being helpful- in short takes care of whatever you need.
Pretty sure they are very close to being labelled as Super Duper hosts.
Thanks and great trip ahead!!!
Regards,
Madhab

name: Private apartment in Rotterdam North
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Very helpful and friendly hosts. Great location if you want to visit Rotterdam but sill enjoy quiet nights. The hosts responded quickly to our requests during our stay. The flat is spacious and we enjoyed the balcony.  Thank you for your hospitality!

name: Cozy cabin with private Jacuzzi near by Rotterdam
comments:
Wir hatte einen wirklich super Aufenthalt.
Haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und der Jacuzzi war unser Highlight.

name: Cozy cabin with private Jacuzzi near by Rotterdam
comments: Wir haben ein sehr nettes Wochenende in Poortugaal verbracht. Man läuft eine Weile zur Bahn, aber immerhin ist der Weg idyllisch. Absolutes Highlight: Der Whirlpool! Braucht eine Weile zum heiß werden, aber sauber bequem und entspannend. Mini-Highlight: Hühner auf dem Gelände 🐓

name: Cozy cabin with private Jacuzzi near by Rotterdam
comments: Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt in der Unterkunft. Besonders der private Whirlpool war ein Highlight – leicht zu bedienen, mit ausreichend Feuerholz. Die Umgebung war ruhig, die freilaufenden Hühner der Nachbarn haben uns oft besucht – sehr idyllisch! Die Unterkunft war sauber und liebevoll eingerichtet. Der Gastgeber war sehr freundlich, schnell erreichbar und hilfsbereit. Er hat uns bei Bedarf sofort mit frischen Handtüchern versorgt. Ein paar kleine Punkte gab es dennoch: Es waren recht viele Insekten im Haus, vor allem nachts, wodurch das Lüften schwierig war. Ein Fliegengitter wäre hier sicher hilfreich. Der Toilettensitz war locker und fiel beim Zurücklehnen immer wieder nach hinten. Eine der Schlafzimmertüren ließ sich nur schwer schließen. Insgesamt aber ein angenehmer Aufenthalt in schöner Lage – wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt. ☺️

name: Cozy cabin with private Jacuzzi near by Rotterdam
comments:
Es war ein wirklich angenehmer Aufenthalt in dieser Airbnb-Unterkunft! Alles war wie beschrieben, und der Whirlpool war super, auch wenn das Chlor etwas viel war. Die Sauberkeit war in Ordnung, auch wenn sie an manchen Stellen noch etwas besser hätte sein können.
Die Lage ist top – ruhig und doch gut gelegen. Ein absolutes Highlight für die Kinder waren die freilaufenden Hühner. Auf jeden Fall zu empfehlen!

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
It was good, but sad that the reply wasn’t fast enough and also waited a long time before we could enter cause the code was not working and the reply was slow.
But it was a nice looking apartment with a nice balcony and inside decor just like the pictures

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
Very nice experience, quiet and friendly neighbourhood.
it’s too bad the balcony wasn’t covered because you’ve got such a great landscape of Feijenoord (especially at night) except when it’s raining.
but i recommend you this place 5/5

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: A stunning view, modern and clean. It has all I I was looking for and I felt right at home. Room was cleaned every day.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Great host,responsive and very easy check in sistem,clean room and bathroom and a lovely view,strongly reccomend and with the next oportunity will rent again from him.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
Overall a great comfortable place, especially at this price. You have an (outdoor) metro nearby and groceries right across the street.
Everything is very new, you get daily cleaning (they make up the bed and clean the bathroom).

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Es war ein unglaublicher Aufenthalt, da das Inserat ein Glass-Eckstudio ist. Somit hat man Blick auf die ganze Stadt, egal wo man hin guckt. Der Sonnenaufgang und Untergang ist ein Traum von diesem Apartment aus & alles nötige ist für uns vorhanden gewesen. Die Möglichkeit ROTTERDAM aus dieser Perspektive zu sehen und zu erleben ist einfach einzigartig. Direkt gegenüber des Apartments findet man ein Supermarkt und entlang der Straße auch weitere Restaurants. (Mein Tipp: Fahrt bis zur SS Rotterdam zu den Parkplätzen und genießt vom Zipfelende der „Insel“ den Ausblick auf Hafen und Stadt) Wie alles im Leben gibt es vor und Nachteile: krasses plus ist, dass man einfach auf der höchsten Etage ist, Nachteil dessen ist, dass es leider kein Dach gibt auf dem Balkon, heißt wenn es regnet, regnet es leider auch auf dem Balkon wobei das nur ein winziges Problem für uns war. Ich werde zu 1000 ￼% auch alleine wiederkommen, da mich diese Stadt und dieses Apartment einfach so verzaubert haben, danke

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Good and tidy place with a nice view, had a good experience for 2 nights here

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Spacious room and well equipped. Great view and walks at the canal nearby :)

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
The apartment is part of a group of around 15 purposely designed apartments on the top floor of a building (old warehouse) under construction. Professionally run and serviced with daily cleaning and first necessities present. Very quiet despite of location due to new construction and perfect isolation. TV will all apps and streaming option, good shower, very comfortable bed. Even an outside area with table and 2 chairs. Access via electronic codes. No safe present.
Very conveniently located next to a metro-station giving access to all Rotterdam (and beyond). Slightly dark and deserted direct surroundings because it is a developing area but no giving an unsafe feeling. Both police station and supermarket directly across the road.
All in all a truly great stay, offering good value for money. Nice semi-industrial vibe.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
Very clean and everything you need is there, secure property so felt safe with codes for the doors. Balcony had great views and had no way to fall over. Martijn was always messaging me back when I had any type of questions and always happy to help out. Cleaners were there everyday so the hallways and rooms smelt and looked very clean.
Can’t fault this place at all, 10/10, can’t wait to come back.
Thank you Martijn.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Great place for view and nice building

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Great place for a week! everything you need, furnished kitchen, comfy bed, nice decoration, right next to the metro and supermarket, nice walk to the center. the building itself and the surroundings are in construction so its not the best, some noise sometimes, elevator didn't work one day (flat is on the 7th) and the door entrance didn't open (but instant help from the host via phone). overall, perfect place to stay in Rotterdam!

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
We had a small issue with check-in at first because the code didn’t work, but the service was quick and friendly, and they fixed it right away. The apartment was very nice, clean, and even better than we expected. It felt like a hotel. The hallway was simple, but we liked it - everything was bright and clean.
We couldn’t find anything for ironing, even though it was listed. But that wasn’t a big problem. The location was great - there was a supermarket right in front, and we could easily bike to the city.
Overall, it was definitely worth the price, and we’ll come back next time we visit Rotterdam!

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Went February and had to come back in March. Place is clean and has a great balcony to look at city landscape. Less than a 5 minute walk to the metro to easily get to Rotterdam and surroundings. Martijn was easy to contact and always happy to help. Will be going back. 10/10

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
The place was really great and very practical with all the amenities and great location. The host was very responsive and nice in sorting out any issues. There were just some things that could have been improved:
- The kitchen utensils and cupboards were dirty and even after scrubbing, it wouldn’t come out;
- The listing mentioned it had an iron but this wasn’t available;
- The water pressure was really low and the overhead shower didn’t work on the first few days. However, after we contacted for support it was provided quickly.
- We were unlucky and caught the building when they had a power outage and were left with no electricity or water for a few hours and then without WiFi for 2 days and the lift didn’t work for 1 day and we had to climb 7 flights of stairs.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Absolutely fantastic place in all respects. Only issue is that we had  difficulty locating the correct building and the entry door (due to surrounding construction).  However, I must emphasize that the apartment was incredible and even had a full wrap-around balcony.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Martijn's apartment is in a great location to explore Rotterdam from. Just a short walk from metro and bus stations and can still be a 15-20 minute walk to the historical center! The apartment was very clean and modern and perfect for a solo traveler or a couple visiting! The views from the terrace are very nice as well! Only disclaimer is that the apartments are located on the top floor of a building that is still being renovated, so figuring out how to get up can be slightly confusing,  however Martijn helped us out over the phone to get checked in and even let us check in slightly early. Once you understand how the building works, everything is great! Definitely recommend staying in this upcoming area.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: We had a nice stay at this apartment. We did find the balcony door open on arrival which lead to us having quite a few mosquitos in the room though but that would be our only complaint!

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Martijns apartment was clean, easy to navigate, modern and was exactly like a home from home. This Airbnb was in an excellent location for public transport, only a minute walk to a stop,  and right next to a supermarket. This alongside the brilliant little kitchen provided made it easy to make our own meals. Communication was excellent, responding within 20 minutes to each enquiry and always polite and helpful. Daily cleaning was quick so we could just sit on the balcony while the floor was cleaned, and always left it smelling nice and clean. Would definitely visit here again, and recommend to anyone visiting Rotterdam.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments: Great apartment with a nice view! Easy to reach with public transport and close enough to walk to the city center!

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
nice place, nice view, close to the city centre.
martijn in very responsibe and helpfull.
the room is not to expensive for the location and what you get.

name: Skyline Serenity Studio BHD - 20SQM
comments:
Great place to stay. Super cosy with lovely nice windows spanning the length of room. Everything was neat and tidy, plenty of space and a theory enjoy ale and comfortable stay in Rotterdam.
Great location just next to the Metro, close to some really nice bars and a few minutes cycle to the centre.
Will defintely be staying here again.

name: Rustic Retreat 1HC Studio BHD - 25 SQM
comments:
The listing doesn't mention that these apartments are on the top floor of an empty building that is currently under renovation. When Google Maps told me I'd arrived, I was like, hm, this must be a mistake. Oh wait, it is this building?
For the unit itself: The doors only have a digital lock, which staff (who are not on site) can unlock remotely--no second bolt or physical lock. The balcony outside is common to all the rooms, so you have no idea who is immediately outside your room, and security to get into the building doesn't feel really tight. There was also a random ladder leaning on my window, which workmen started going up in the morning while I was still getting dressed. Bathroom not super clean--hairs in all the less-visible places, like cleaning was pretty cursory. Bedding feels cheap. Communication was weird.
The whole place just gave me a creepy vibe. I asked to cancel because I didn't feel comfortable and they said no. Stayed one night and moved elsewhere at my own expense.

name: Rustic Retreat 1HC Studio BHD - 25 SQM
comments:
Die Wohnung befindet sich auf dem historischen Santos Speicher in Rotterdam.
Architektonisch ausgesprochen reizvoll konzipiert. Ein Highlight für Designbegeisterte
Besucher Rotterdams.

name: Stylish Serenity 1BDR Apart BHD - 25 SQM
comments: Nice appartement with great view

name: Stylish Serenity 1BDR Apart BHD - 25 SQM
comments:
In short: Worst stay with Airbnb so far.
The apartment is nicely situated and very close to the metro. The building itself is quite unique and the flat resembles the pictures. That's where the positive ends.

They thought it would be a good idea to locate the bedroom right next to the elevator shaft. Besides the noise coming from other guests there was also a very loud banging noise coming from time to time that will awake light sleepers.
When complained about, the host said he was sorry but didn't do anything helpful. However, he managed to lie about the apartments being fully booked out even though I was still able to book a different apartment on Airbnb.
Communication - even when things are going well - is a bit annoying. You will get a lot of automatic mails asking you to check in and to check out. This process needs improvement.
Additionally, the cleaning needs improvement. Very dusty and many hairs from previous stays. The lift also was very dirty.
Definitely not recommended!

name: High-End Apartment City Center!
comments:
What a fantastic stay! The host was super friendly and incredibly helpful, making everything go smoothly. The apartment itself is luxurious and stylishly decorated, with all the amenities you could need. My friend used the foldable guest bed and found it surprisingly comfortable.
The absolute highlight is the location: right in the city center with stunning views of the canal and the Rotterdam skyline. This apartment truly has everything for a perfect stay. Highly recommended!

name: High-End Apartment City Center!
comments:
We enjoyed our stay at Skander's home. It was a easy walk from the main train station along the tram line and canal. There are plenty of food options and things to visit and do in the vicinity. It's also very close to tram and metro stops.
The inside of Skander's home matched the description and photos and it was very clean, sleek, and modern. We enjoyed having the large windows facing the canal / park. It was also nice to have a washer / dryer available during our stay.
We would definitely recommend Skander's home!

name: High-End Apartment City Center!
comments: Nice cosy appartement. Very comfortable bed. The street is busy (tram track under the window) but be isolation makes sure that it is quiet inside. I had a very good sleep. Recommendable.

name: Cozy queen bed room next to Ahoy & Zuidplein.
comments:
You're free, 😁 it's clean and Mona was so Nice. The place gave rest and had a nice view to the city. You get the feeling your home.
I will book soon again!!

name: Cozy queen bed room next to Ahoy & Zuidplein.
comments: I was really happy to have chosen to stay in Mona’s place. Everything was pleasant and satisfying from the beginning til the end of my stay. Every time I asked for something or had a question, I got replies or solutions very immediately. The instructions for my arrival were absolutely clear. She is nice and flexible too, which makes everything even smoother. The room is very clean, tidy and bright, equipped with all the things we needed plus some extra things. I had my total privacy even though it’s inside her apartment. It was a really pleasant stay. The place is close to different media of transport. There are shops and restaurants nearby, so it’s very easy to find everything I need. Mona and her place are highly recommendable!

name: Convenient home base in the city centre
comments:
I thought long and hard about booking after reading some 'not-so-great' reviews...but had a good stay. Staff were really helpful (managed to get a very early check-in). Room size was good for my stuff and needs and clean as well.
Its a simple place and I would be happy to stay again. Well-priced as well for me.

name: Convenient home base in the city centre
comments: Not worth it: the room was dusty, the bed broken and the window couldn’t open. The room had a direct view on the shops, and the air conditioning was making really loud noises. I am disappointed and i think we got the worst room possible.

name: Convenient home base in the city centre
comments: The room was very dark with a small window. The bedsheets were clean, but the room itself was dirty, specially the walls. For 90 euros per night, you can find a better option. The only positive thing was that the hotel is in the center.

name: Convenient home base in the city centre
comments:
I found the current rate of €200 to be €100 above my expectations for the provided amenities. The TV was smaller than anticipated, and the bed size was disproportionate to the room. Additionally, noise from outside and smokers near the entrance were disruptive. Housekeeping services, such as bedsheet and towel changes, required repeated requests and were not consistently provided. Price fluctuations also made the booking process less predictable.
On a positive note, the location is highly accessible, the facilities are clean, and the elevators function smoothly. The booking process was straightforward. However, I would only consider returning if more cheaper pricing were offered.

name: Accessible Double with all the essentials
comments: Loud street-side room

name: Efficient space for three
comments:
10 minutes walking from central station, rooms are small but worth the price.
The only thing negative that our room was close to main road and glass inset sound proof so very noise during night and windows couldn’t be open either.
Anyway I would go back :)

name: Tiny but cosy double in the City Centre
comments: The really high up window, the bathroom door that doubled for the shower and the toilet, as well as the conveniently placed door mirror. Very good and Cool. 😎👍

name: Tiny but cosy double in the City Centre
comments: The Location is incredible- it couldn’t be more central, you’re literally just a few minutes away from every single thing! But the hotel itself doesn’t have a nice atmosphere, the room looked kinda depressing and wasn’t the cleanest, plus the air in the room was always bad because you couldn’t open the windows (even though there’s an air conditioner). I wouldn’t recommend staying there for longer than 1 or 2 nights, but if you just need a random place to stay in the night while you explore the city during the day, it’s fine. People at the reception were really friendly tho!

name: Tiny but cosy double in the City Centre
comments: I stayed at easy hotel for two nights, the reception was nice and fluid the room and bathroom were clean, but the separation between them isn’t great so the fog from the shower gets to the small room, and the window doesn’t open, plus, there was no closet, it was uncomfortable putting all my stuff on the ground.

name: Just 15 minutes from The Hague airport
comments: It was in a very central location. Shopping areas are just behind the street. 15-20 minutes from Rotterdam Train Station. The staff was friendly. It's a nice idea to have coffee, hot water and a vending machine. The rooms and bathroom are very small, but it's an ideal place to travel during the day and just sleep.

name: Just 15 minutes from The Hague airport
comments: The other reviews on this don't really do justice. This listing was spotless, clean and pretty quiet! The staff was really nice and everything went perfectly!!

name: Rotterdam Home with Garden & Bike
comments: Really lovely hosts, easy to communicate with and super responsive. Their place is really nice! Everything feels well designed and clean. Highly recommend to anyone looking to stay slightly north of the city (it’s super easy to get to the centre).

name: Rotterdam Home with Garden & Bike
comments:
We loved our stay, the living area is spacious and we enjoyed playing the records.
Nice big dinning table and comfortable sofa, kitchen and bathroom are compact but have everything you need.
The stairs to the bedroom are typical Dutch, narrow steep steps that go on forever. We really appreciated the little motion detection lights places strategically along the stairs to light the way.
There’s a cute little courtyard as well.
The supermarket is walking distance and the tram, Metro and train are all within easy walk.
Would we stay here again or recommend it to our friends, absolutely!

name: Prachtige familiewoning in hartje Rotterdam
comments:
We have stayed at some great apartments in Rotterdam as we visit family each year. The description of this apartment was:
This bright and spacious home is the ideal base for a RELAXING stay in the city.
We agree the location is great close to the Blaak station and lots of restaurants. Aside of some flaws which we made known to the host in the early stage of our stay adding lack of iron board/ blender/ and decent wine glasses there was an ideal living and kitchen area space we enjoyed. The noise of traffic and motorcycles, however, we enjoyed far less which is the reason we would not return to this apartment. Window treatment would certainly add to the vacation pleasure and separating what is obvious the owners personal stuff.

name: Captains Cabin Baloo @bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments:
Living at BOCO for a month was one of the most incredible experiences of my life. The location is unbeatable—waking up on the water near the Erasmus Bridge and ending the day with Rotterdam’s skyline is magical.
To get to the cabin, you have to walk across boats, cables and ropes. There is a huge workshop bellow the cabin, which I loved for its “industrial chic,” though others might find it distracting the atmosphere and the otherwise incredible view. The young, open-minded community on the main boat is a joy, and the hosts, Marcel and Leo, are exceptionally kind and responsive. However, the cabin was not clean when I arrived—dusty surfaces, dirty kitchenware, and worn-out items. I had to buy basic cleaning supplies and a new pan (Marcel kindly offered to reimburse me, but forgot to do 😊). Still, the place is evolving fast, and with the hosts’ dedication, I’m sure my concerns will be resolved. It’s a unique stay best suited for open-minded, practical travellers

name: Stylish 1BR in City Centre
comments: Can only recommend the place. Beautiful view from the balcony and Vera central

name: Stylish 1BR in City Centre
comments: This Airbnb was absolutely stunning! The space is beautifully designed, modern, and spotless. The kitchen and dining area were not only functional but also had a cozy, elegant vibe—perfect for relaxing or even getting some work done. The lighting throughout the apartment added such a warm and inviting ambiance, both day and night. The living area was just as impressive, with comfortable seating and thoughtful decor that made it feel like home. Overall, a stylish and peaceful place to stay. Highly recommend!

name: Stylish 1BR in City Centre
comments:
Perfect location, very nice appartment, has everything which is needed for a nice and comfortable stay.
Only 15 minutes walk from Rotterdam Centraal Station, supermarket right across the street, 5 minute walk to the Markthalle or Cubes.
If ever going back to Rotterdam, will certainly take this appartment again.

name: Stylish 1BR in City Centre
comments: Had a great stay! The place is super comfortable and had lots of thoughtful amenities. Lovely to have a balcony and be close to the water. Amazing location!

name: Sonder Middelland | Small Double Room
comments: I really loved the place, it was beautiful, the staff was friendly, it offered extra amenities that I enjoyed like fruit, coffee, hot chocolate and more. I found the place very comfortable and it was located in a beautiful street. There are many things to do within walking distance. The station is about 20 min away too. I’d love to stay here again. I highly recommend it.

name: Sonder Middelland | Small Double Room
comments:
Wir hatten das kleine Zimmer gebucht.
Die Unterkunft ist wirklich wie ein hochklassiges Hotel. Das Zimmer war im 4. OG mit Blick auf die Straße/Kirche gegenüber. Das Zimmer war schon recht klein und auch das Bett schien mir nur ca. 1,6 m breit zu sein.
Alles in allem war die Unterkunft jedoch sehr sauber und gut ausgestattet und das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis stimmte.
Beachtet, dass das Frühstück 15 € pro Person auspreis kostet. Ein besonderes Highlight ist jedoch, dass man sich kostenfreien Kaffee nehmen darf.

name: Sonder Middelland | Small Double Room
comments: Beautiful boutique hôtel on beautiful street. Friendly, warm and helpful staff. Lovely room and bathroom, great nights rest. Would definitely stay again.

name: Sonder Middelland | Small Double Room
comments:
Check in was very easy, we did it online but I think it is also possible in the hotel itself. It is located in a nice quiet neighbourhood with a nice park 3 min away. The staff was very kind and welcoming. The bed was very comfortable and there is a tv on which you can chrome cast any show you want.
My boyfriend and I enjoyed our stay. The only negative point was the fact that our bathroom made some loud noises throughout the night, as if we could hear the pipes. It woke me up during the last night we slept there which was not very pleasant, although I think this may be an issue with a specific room and not with all of them. In overall happy and reasonable prices.

name: Ruime comfortable kamer
comments:
Richard, Blance and little Luna are very kind and sympathic hosts. Sure they like their privacy but nevertheless they are always there for you and you feel welcome and at home.
Everything is very clean and nice minimalistic arranged. Looking out auf tge windiw there is nice green around, where you also can have a nice walk.
Because the room being in the roof and the stairs are some small the place is not suitable for constrained movement.
I look forward being there once again.

name: Central and light apartment
comments:
Where do we begin!?
This apartment is in an ideal location. Within walking distances to a lot of attractions! The Tram is just across the street as well!
Max responded to any messages within minutes!! He also provided a list of must-see attractions.
The apartment was very clean and the beds VERY comfortable!
Our first time visiting Rotterdam and Max helped make our visit a positive one!!
Lots of cafes, restaurants , grocery within minutes walk! Very close!!
Thank-you for sharing this great apartment!!
🇨🇦

name: Central and light apartment
comments: Host was nice, location was convenient. Some maintenance required such as the main apartment door and the broken bathroom drawer. Hard to ventilate the room and too hot during summer, the fan was dusty and not working well as it kept falling down. It was below ground level so it could be very noisy with people chatting in front of the windows even until 2am.

name: HET dakterras appartement
comments: Maarten's home was beautiful and located in a very quiet and relaxing area. Maarten was a very responsive and friendly host, and I would highly recommend to stay here. Everything necessary for a nice stay was provided, and we felt relaxed and at home during our time here. The walk to the main centre for food is about 20 minutes but very pleasant and scenic in parts. A very bright and airy home, with a wonderful terrace for looking at the stars and relaxing after a day of exploring Rotterdam.

name: HET dakterras appartement
comments: The flat was very clean, bright and we enjoyed staying there. We very much liked the little POST-IT notes that guided us through the rooms! :) The terrace was a highlight too for sure.

name: HET dakterras appartement
comments: If you are looking for a place close to the center and central station, that is the right choice. The host is really responsible and help you with everything. The terrace has a beautiful view and 1 min from the apartment are the trams. Perfect for relaxation and short trips to the city.

name: HET dakterras appartement
comments: We had a wonderful stay in Rotterdam! The location was perfect — we could easily walk to the city center and the harbor, which made exploring very convenient. The house was spotlessly clean and decorated in a warm, homely style. Everything we needed for a comfortable stay was provided. The rooftop terrace was a real highlight; it was the perfect place to relax in the evening after a long day of walking and discovering Rotterdam. Maarten is a excellent and responsive host! Highly recommended!

name: HET dakterras appartement
comments: Wir haben ein Wochenende in Maartens Unterkunft verbracht und wir waren total begeistert! Wir haben eine selten so gut ausgestatte Wohnung erlebt, es war wirklich an alles gedacht. Die Wohnung ist total gemütlich & es war wirklich alles sehr sauber. Das Highlight ist natürlich die Dachterrasse :) wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden jederzeit wiederkommen!

name: Architects home in Rotterdam's finest street
comments:
We stayed at Chantal’s place for a week with our toddler and it was exactly what we needed.
The appartment was well equipped, really bright, in a beautiful neighborhood. It was easy to walk around Rotterdam or to take the train to other great cities in the southwest.
Chantal was really kind and we felt like at home!

name: Architects home in Rotterdam's finest street
comments: We really enjoyed our stay. The neighborhood was lovely and very convenient to the city center and train station. The flat was full of light and very nice. We struggled with the fact that the toilet was located downstairs from the bedroom and down by the entrance to the flat. Otherwise, a great flat.

name: Modern 1-Bedroom, City Center
comments: Very easy access to the train station, grocery store and restaurants. Traditional NL 3-story layout with steep stairs. Minimalist set-up. Nice traversing light in main floor. Gorgeous 360 rooftop view!

name: Noordereiland
comments: We spent three nights at Caspar's beautiful apartment (in an equally beautiful old building) and enjoyed it very much! The apartment is very spacious (two floors) with vast rooms, a little balcony (great water view!) and even a rooftop terrace (accessable from one of the two bedrooms on the upper level). There's no WC though on the upper level and the staircases are very steep. But we didn't mind that. It's a very quiet residential area with some restaurants and a JUMBO supermarket nearby. Parking spots are right in front of the house, but they cost. We would definitely recommend that apartment and would love to visit again sometime! Thank you Caspar for having us as your guests!

name: Charming Apartment near Park & Public Transport
comments: The check-in was easy and fast by a very friendly person. The neighborhood is very quiet. Everything was clean, but the flat had a strong smell of smoke. We had everything we needed (towels, coffee, pans, glassware and so on), but two rolls of toilet paper for five people is certainly not enough. There is a Senseo machine for coffee and two balconies to sit on, which is really nice. However, in one bedroom we were not able to open the window due to badly installed blinds. The shower looks very nice, but can only provide hot water (in summer with 37°C outside). When asking how to get cold water, the host did not respond to the question.

name: Licht en ruim appartement met uitzicht op de Maas
comments:
The peaceful apartment is beautiful, spacious and full of light with a great balcony to appreciate the nearby Maas river and gorgeous sunsets. The sofa and beds are so comfy.
We enjoyed our stay but experienced a couple of bumps initially which were quickly rectified by the co-host - a dirty bathroom ( hair and toothpaste ) and an inappropriate object in the bedroom side drawer of my brother’s room. There wasn’t a lot of space to put our own things, especially in the kitchen for dry goods.
Overall after the place had been cleaned it felt like a comfy and relaxing home for the remainder of our stay and we are grateful for the kindness and welcome from our host and co-host. Many thanks.

name: Licht en ruim appartement met uitzicht op de Maas
comments: Nice apartment, easy checkin, great views

name: Licht en ruim appartement met uitzicht op de Maas
comments: Lovely Apartment with amazing views of the river.  Very clean and had all the facilities we needed (although the towels were a bit on the small side). Close to the tunnel to walk to get across the river but otherwise lots of public transport required to get to the Centre.

name: Apartment in maritime district
comments: Great experience. Kevin is very nice, the apartment is near Blaak, the center of Rotterdam. It is a clean and super modern department with beautiful view.

name: Apartment in maritime district
comments: Beautiful two bedroom apartment. Great location with access to many of the major attractions, restaurants, bars, shopping and anything you need. Very relaxing accommodations with good views.

name: Apartment in maritime district
comments: Kevin's apartment is everything you want when visiting Rotterdam.  Close to everything, beautiful views, quiet yet engaging area, I was extremely pleased! I would come back in a NY minute! Thank you Kevin for being a great host and for the recommendations. Dinner was amazing!

name: Stylish Stay with Mesmerising Views
comments: Nice location with great view on the city.  Appartement is for max 4 adults (+ 2 kids). We stayed with 5 adults, not enough plates, forks, glasses available (max for 3 people). Enjoyed our city trip!  Parking spot in the basement only works for cars that have a max height of 1.5m (our car didnt fit, not communicated upfront).

name: Stylish Stay with Mesmerising Views
comments:
What to say about this place! The view was amazing, especially at night with the city lights.
The metro is right there so it was easy to explore. The host was so good. Very friendly and responsive. Will be back!

name: Stylish Stay with Mesmerising Views
comments: Very nice flat. Astonishing view on the city. I would definitely come back !

name: Stylish Stay with Mesmerising Views
comments:
Stay was good, except a few Defects.
The View and the proximity to the city are really good.

name: Bright Apartment Near Rotterdam Centre
comments: A lovely welcoming  bright and spacious apartment, an older building with newly decorated well equipped  modern kitchen and bathroom. Lovely warm shower. Good sized wardrobes. Washing machine, dryer, hairdryer and TV available. Great to have a balcony for outside space. Well identified areas for sleeping, eating and lounge. Nice quiet location with garden area opposite, close to tram/transport. Stairs to get the the second story were steep but manageable. Great communication with  owners, who were friendly and  helpful if there was anything we needed.

name: Bright Apartment Near Rotterdam Centre
comments:
Robert was very friendly in helping us with parking lots and making us a very late check in possible! We also got a drink at our arrival which was very very kind of him.
The flat itself was very cozy and has a lovely little balcony.
We wish Robert all the best and can recommend the Airbnb anytime!

name: Bright Apartment Near Rotterdam Centre
comments: Robert’s apartment is located on the second floor of a walk up apartment. Flanked by big windows overlooking the peaceful surroundings, it is bright and airy. It was spacious enough for our family of 3 and my husband slept on the sofa bed which was comfortable enough. Kitchen was well equipped and shower pressure is good and clean. It was close to the tram station that took us to the central station that took us to other parts of Netherlands on day trips. The only small improvement is we wished there was blackout curtains (as my toddler woke up almost at 6am) everyday.

name: Stijlvolle appartement in centrum van Rotterdam
comments:
We (three adults) stayed in Vyash's apartment for three nights. We liked the close proximity to the central station as we visited The Hague by train.
As the NS went on strike for one day we took the water bus to Dortrecht, highly recommended!
The view from the apartment is spectacular and we found it well equipped and comfortable.

name: Stijlvolle appartement in centrum van Rotterdam
comments:
The place was really great !
It is close to the train station and to the city ce ter by foot.
The apartment is really wonderful and offers a gorgeous view on the city!
Thanks a lot for this great place ! Strongly recommend 😊

name: Stijlvolle appartement in centrum van Rotterdam
comments: Just a few minutes from central station, fantastic views over the city. Supermarket and cafe's very close.

name: Stijlvolle appartement in centrum van Rotterdam
comments:
Very nice appartment, exceptional view and excellent location.
Very practical for us was a bicycle room in the building.
Overall excellent stay (although we had no hot water at the end of our stay due to a likely technical breakdown).

name: Stijlvolle appartement in centrum van Rotterdam
comments:
Wonderful flat with a top situation and an amazing view.
You are near the center of the city.
The flat was really clean.
The host made our arrival easy and was very pleasant.
I highly recommend!

name: Rotterdamse oud schoolgebouw
comments:
This is a spacious old house that has been renovated recently.
The living area (kitchen, dining and relaxation space) has an open floor plan: very spacious, airy and well lit. You wouldn't feel crowded even if 10-15 people were there at the same time.
There is a beautiful, large kids playroom separated by a glass door, which can serve as a quite room for a few people, or to watch TV without bothering everyone.
The bedrooms and bathrooms are very adequate. NB: one of the five beds, specifically the upper bunk-bed of the full-length 2-bed unit has a weight limit of 50kg (110 lb); it works for a petite woman or child, but not for a large man.
The house is away from the city center (in case you care to be in a "happening" neighborhood) but the metro station is an easy 6 min walk, and the tram stop is literally across the street. A few restaurants, pharmacy & grocery store are within 2-10 min walking distance.
Alwine and Guido are VERY responsive and warm hosts!
Overall, A+

name: Woolly Hotel Dahlia Loft
comments:
Excellent listing which we would recommend in a heartbeat.
The host met us at the time of check in and was very helpful and put us at ease on arrival.
The location is excellent in terms of amenities and proximity to the train station.
The only negative was the noise at night due to the restaurants and bars outside - however this was clearly communicated at the time of booking so I would recommend earplugs if you are a light sleeper.

name: Woolly Hotel Dahlia Loft
comments: Our stay was nice, however if you are more than two staying you have to know that the double bed is not in a separate room, although the kitchen separates it from the sofa bed. It is kind of an open studio but comfortable and light. Area is a bit noisy but if you don’t mind it is very well located and that was the sweetest part!

name: Woolly Hotel Dahlia Loft
comments: The location couldn't be better. Dila made me feel very welcome and the apartment interior is really well designed and laid out. I appreciated the extra useful inclusions that I've never seen in an airbnb before, like a clothes drying rack and laundry detergent, that made my stay comfortable and convenient. I enjoyed relaxing on the couch with the afternoon sun beaming in through the big windows, and the opening windows and skylights provided a nice cooling breeze. As others have noted, the street noise is loud at night but if you're prepared for that then this place is ideal.

name: 15 min center - Private bedroom new building
comments: I had a wonderful stay. The apartment was very clean, bright, and spacious. Jorge was incredibly welcoming and always ready to help with anything. It felt like home!

name: Prachtige studio in hartje Rotterdam
comments: Nice apartment, great location and very communicative and helpful host! Almost put 5 stars but our only minor complaints were that the room was a bit hot/stuffy, the host initially forgot towels (but corrected this very quickly) and slightly inconvenient not to have a bin and a sink in the separate toilet room.

name: City Escape with Canal Views
comments: Overall we really enjoyed our stay. The house and rooms were really big with a great view near the canal. It was so easy to reach out everywhere- near to bus and tram. Maybe it was our mistake but we thought place had more than one toilet we stayed as 6 people and toilet was kind of a problem for us. Also only thing that we can criticize apartment entrance was really shady with a broken door. We just wanted to mention. Place even had a smoothie blender which is cool.

name: Waterfront Retreat Near Historic Delfshaven
comments: Great place for friends and family, great view of the river , and the host very friendly and welcoming

name: Rotterdam City Centre Apartment
comments:
We really enjoyed our stay, the apartment is exactly as described: spacious, bright with beautiful natural light, clean and well located. It’s very comfortable for a weekend in Rotterdam.
If I may suggest, it would be nice to have a few basic kitchen items available (such as salt, pepper, oil). Also, a small curtain on the glass panel of the entrance door could add some privacy, since people from the building can see through when passing by.
Overall, we had a great experience and would definitely recommend this apartment for a pleasant stay in Rotterdam.

name: Portside Cabin Retreat@Bocoliving Rotterdam Marina
comments:
My wife and I traveled there by private car from Copenhagen, Denmark during the Easter vacation 2025, i.e., April 17-20. My review is as follows:
- Captain Marcel, the owner of the property, and his manager Leo are the best hosts I have ever met. They are very welcoming, respectful, and create an international environment.
- Marcel responds within 10-15 minutes to everything. He provided me with all the information I asked for very quickly.
- Since the place is in the core city area of Rotterdam, car parking is not free: €15 for 24 hours. Marcel even paid for one day's parking for me.
- Marcel is constructing the boathouse on boat 3 where we stayed, which made it a bit difficult to walk to the room. This was unexpected. Small children and elderly people are not recommended.
- The water was not drinkable on boat 3, so only boat 1 has drinkable water.
Overall, Marcel the host and his manager Leo are great guys. They are very helpful and communicative, and therefore, I recommend there.

name: Hoekappartement aan de Maas
comments:
Pim's house is excellent. Very nice location, very nice view at the river.
Close to the center of Rotterdam.
Pim and Christe is wonderful hosts, they explained everything we need...
Thanks for your hospitality!!!

name: Hoekappartement aan de Maas
comments: We had a pleasant stay at Pim's place. The building is directly beside the river and the view from the apartment was excellent. The apartment has two floors, which is spacious. The kitchen was nice and clean, and well equipped. Bathrooms are also clean and nice. The bedrooms are on the upper floor and are quite nice too. We also enjoyed sitting at the living room, watching boats coming by, while listening to music (there is a huge CD collection of classical music). There isn't many restaurants or businesses around the area; so the neighborhood was very quite.

name: Bright,funky, spacious flat in historic Delfshaven
comments: Seda’s apartment is ✔️clean, ✔️bright, ✔️spacious… and ✔️baby approved !! We felt very comfortable and it truly was a great place to stay. I recommend 💯

name: Jouw thuis
comments: BEST AIRBNB HOST EVER! Elisabeth''s apartment is super cozy, I loved the location because you could walk to the canals so easily, always felt safe, it has gorgeous natural light, everything works perfectly. Truly recommend for a couple or single person. Elisabeth was super helpful and great at solving anything.

name: Licht & charmant appartement
comments:
Se venite a Rotterdam dovete soggiornare da Niels.
Noi siamo stati benissimo.
La casa si trova in un sobborgo della citta; sembra di essere in un villaggio fuori dal tempo con le case tipiche di queste latitudini.
Il centro citta’ e’ perfettamente raggiungibile con la metro o con il taxi boat (esperienza che consigliamo a tutti di trovare)
La casa e’ una tipica old house olandese su 3 piani; una tempo era parte di una scuola e questo alloggio era la dimora del guardiano.
La casa e’ equipaggiata con tutto il necessario per uno splendido soggiorno.
Nils vi accogliera’ col sorriso e una calorosa stretta di mano; e’ stato un host premuroso, presente, ma estrememante diacreto.
Vi sentirete coccolati nella vostra privacy.
Condigliamo a tutti di vivere l’esperienza da lui a Pernis!
Grazie Niels❤️

name: Cozy and best location! 6 person
comments: Great location but unbearably hot. Sadly the fans provided were not good and only vaguely pushed air around. Even with the window wide open it was impossible to sleep. I had to borrow a fan from a friend to make it somewhat okay. I assume it will only get hotter throughout summer

name: Cozy and best location! 6 person
comments:
Fantastic location—many attractions are within walking distance, and a tram stop is just a few minutes away, making it an ideal base for exploring Rotterdam.
Although the apartment is on a busy street, we had no trouble sleeping. However, light sleepers might be affected by noise from neighbors, as it’s an older building with thinner walls. The beds were very comfortable. Max was highly responsive and helpful throughout our stay. We’d absolutely return if we visit Rotterdam again.
One thing to note: the stairs leading up to the apartment are quite steep and narrow. For older guests or anyone traveling with heavy or bulky luggage, getting in and out might be challenging.
Private parking is available a few minutes away for a reasonable price, which was a big plus.
Overall, a great stay in a super convenient location with everything you need nearby.

name: Cozy and centrally located
comments: The apartment is very well located if you want to go out and party, lots of lively bars and restaurants nearby, young neighborhood. Less suitable for a family with children however. At night, the people and atmosphere changes, if you are a woman, it can be less safe , like all big cities unfortunately You cannot open the windows of the apartment, which is worth noting. Therefore, and as it is located on the top floor, under the eaves, it is very very hot inside. No elevator either. The bedding was excellent though! The apartment is large and spacious! Pleasant to live in, but the toilets are not separated , which can be annoying if you are 5 or 6 people.

name: Cozy and centrally located
comments:
The place was nice, perfect position, clean and comfortable.
In the summer it may get quite hot. Only one window out of three opens, there is an air conditioning unit and a fan. Ongoing 24 airflow system is present.
Overall it was perfect for what we needed. We were in 4-5 people.

name: Privat modern bedroom
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Loved my stay there. Watching sunset on the rooftop terrace was definitely the highlight for me.

name: Luxurious Flat near Center
comments: Centrally located and amazing views!

name: Luxurious Flat near Center
comments:
The apartment is exactly like it looks in the photos. It was clean and we had plenty of space. The kitchen is well equipped, we enjoyed cooking there.
We really liked the neighborhood: From the windows you can see a lot going on in the harbor, especially during the weekend. Lots of shops and restaurants are a short walk away.

name: Blijdorp appartment Rotterdam
comments:
We loved our stay here. The apartment is super cozy and beautifully decorated, and just full of charm. It had everything we needed, and the hosts were very reposnive in ensuring that we were comfortable.
The apartement is surroneded in a place that is so peaceful and private, with amazing views of nature. Waking up surrounded by nature was just what we needed.
Couldn’t recommend it more if you’re after a quiet, relaxing break. We left feeling totally refreshed and already talking about coming back.

name: The Urban Riviera 3BDR apartment
comments:
Overall the apartment was good, almost in the city centre. Rather clean apartment, the kitchen is quite well equipped.
However, initially we booked a bigger apartment, but got bumped to a smaller place with fewer sleeping places. Because of this, one person from our group pulled out of the trip, since she wasn't comfortable with the sleeping arrangement anymore. Besides that the price still stayed the same as for the bigger apartment with more guests.
Besides that, we constantly got messages requesting to do a check-in and pay the deposit, even though the deposit is not applicable for Airbnb users and the rest of check-in was done at the first request.
The apartment is in the basement, so the air is quite moist there with no air conditioning. There's no view and you can here everything happening outside very loudly, because the small windows are pointing to the parking ground.
Still suitable for a comfortable stay if you're not demanding the things stated above

name: Cosy single  bedroom
comments: Vera was very welcoming. The room, while small, had everything I needed, and offered a lot of privacy. There are shops and restaurants within walking distance, and getting to the city center is just a short metro ride away.

name: Harborview Stays 2BDR Apartment
comments: The apartment is very new and in a perfect location to explore Rotterdam by foot. Self check-in worked perfectly. Sadly it wasn't the massionette apartment from the pictures with the big triangle window in the bedroom, but the one next to it which was a bit less unique. Still it was a very nice & we had a great time in Rotterdam :)

name: Harborview Stays 2BDR Apartment
comments: Very well located and freshly renovated. However, the main bedroom is missing curtains (on a huge window facing other buildings), so no privacy at all. Also, there is no direct communication with the host, only automated messages from the property management company.

name: Harborview Stays 2BDR Apartment
comments:
My review doesnt reflect this appartment, as we didnt stay here.
Although booked, there was an issue with double booking and on our journey we were informed we were unable to stay here.
The hosts very quickly and professionally offered us an alternative, which was clean and well equipped, and resolved the issue of no accommodation.

name: !bnb rents in West Bank!  i quit.
comments:
Amazing place really quirky and creative with a little creative clutter . The hosts son was amazing in giving us directions and recommendations.
Just needs a door on the bathroom and more guidance to where the light switches are as it's sometimes a hide and seek game to find it haha but was truly fun , The TV doesn't really work when we tried however there's a lot of painting activities and books so was always entertained. The area is close to most amenities and tramline takes you everywhere which is a bonus. Parking is a little difficult but doable if you just go around for a bit and find a spot but later can move it to your allocated area of parking (Tip: ask host for area number where you can park) Host was kind enough to pay for our parking during our stay which we were very grateful. Thank you for hosting us again Cesare and son.

name: The Harbor Breeze Studio - 21 SQM
comments: Great location relatively close to the Blaak train station with a lot of restaurants nearby. Unfortunately the restaurant terraces were a bit noisy in the evening, but that’s nothing to do with the host. Room was well sized for two people, kitchen had enough cutlery, plates and glasses.

name: The Harbor Breeze Studio - 21 SQM
comments: Is exactly in the centre of the town, you have acces to everything from there. A nice apartment, small but functional, a little bit noise in the area, but per total was nice!

name: The Harbor Breeze Studio - 21 SQM
comments: The apartment was fine and very suitable for one or two people. The bed was comfortable, sheets and towels were clean and rather new. The only slightly annoying thing was the noise from outside, the restaurant terraces were quite close and the room I had was in that direction.

name: The Quartz Binnenrotte Studio - 32 SQM
comments:
The stay was okay, but there were issues. Initially, there were not enough towels, and getting more took some effort. There was initially no soap in the bathroom. The ventilation in the studio was very poor, it was very hot and humid inside and you can barely open the windows. The bathroom fan didn’t work despite follow-ups.
Overall, not a place we would choose again given the price.

name: The Quartz Binnenrotte Studio - 32 SQM
comments:
The apartment was very nice inside and is in a great location for walking around the key street art and architectural wonders of Rotterdam.
Note though that the listing is a generic one for a collection of apartments in the same building on different floors. We hadn't realised that and had the impression it would be on the 1st floor from comments in reviews. It was a shock to the legs to make multiple trips up to the third floor that it turned out our apartment was on.
There are restaurants under and along the street and it's quite noisy in the evenings until after midnight.
The apartment was also quite hot although the hosts have provided a fan which helps.
Overall, we were happy but think the listing should be for a specific apartment and state the floor it's on.

name: The Quartz Binnenrotte Studio - 32 SQM
comments:
Die Wohnung ist sehr zentral gelegen, nur wenige Minuten zu Fuß von den Highlights der Stadt entfernt. Ideal für einen Städte-Trip.
Die Wohnung sah aus wie auf den Bildern. Sehr sauber und modern eingerichtet.
Insgesamt ein sehr schöner und angenehmer Aufenthalt.
Man kann allerdings bemängeln das man nur den oberen Teil der Fenster einen kleinen Spalt öffnen kann und das Klima Gerät nicht ganz mit der Lüftung hinterherkam. Außerdem haben wir das Sofa etwas verrückt und unter dem Sofa waren Fingernägel..
Ansonsten war alles wirklich hervorragend.

name: Comfortable Base to Explore Rotterdam
comments: Not completely what we had hoped for. The location was good and the apartment was fine overall. We just missed some bits and pieces here and there. For example, the apartment didn't at all feel cozy or homey. There was no decoration anywhere. The sofa had a big pink spot on it. There was no hairdryer, clothing hangers in the closet, no chairs on the balcony and no shower curtain (which caused the water to cover the floor of the bathroom). The toilet was too high and uncomfortable. Also the windows didn't really keep out a lot of noise from the street. On the other hand; we were greeted by a lovely woman and she showed us around when we arrived!

name: Woolly Hotel Studio Dexter
comments: Very clean apartment on the main street, however it is noisy at night due to all the bars and restaurants below the apartment. Location is very central and very walkable to good tourist spots.

name: Houten boshuisje aan het strand
comments: Wir haben uns in der modern eingerichteten Hütte sehr wohlgefühlt – ideal für zwei Personen. Das Bad war praktisch, die Dusche könnte nur ein kleines Update vertragen. Der große, liebevoll gestaltete Außenbereich war ein Highlight. Die ruhige Lage nahe am Meer und die Strandclubs gefielen uns sehr. Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind schnell mit dem Auto erreichbar, zudem gibt es einen kleinen Laden vor Ort. Die Anbindung an öffentliche Verkehrsmittel war super für Ausflüge, z. B. nach Rotterdam. Cher war eine nette Gastgeberin mit vielen hilfreichen Infos. Ein rundum entspannter Aufenthalt.

name: Budget-Friendly Stay in Central Rotterdam
comments: Great spot for the price. The location is excellent with a beautiful view of the canal, and it’s within walking distance to lots of great spots and restaurants. While the furnishings and household items are basic, the value and location more than make up for it.

name: Central Rotterdam Loft I
comments:
this was a nice apartment 5 minutes walking distance to local shop 15 minutes walking to Rotterdam Central,
overall stay was nice, only issues I had was the back of the toilet seat hadn't been clean so a little build up of dust and the shower hose had a massive leak so having a shower was a bit of an issue towel rail was very lose , window in 1 of the bedroom couldn't open and as we had hot weather it got very hot at night, having a fan would have been nice, and the only other thing would be to have toaster, but other than those small issues we had a lovely stay and would come back again.

name: Central Rotterdam Loft I
comments: The apartment is in a great location, 7min walk from Rotterdam city centre. The area felt safe, and had lots of on street parking (although the parking was quite expensive! About €40-€50 per day).

name: Woning in Rotterdam, Nederland
comments:
Jilles is an excellent host - very responsive. His place has many wonderful features. It is in a beautiful historic building and the main living area is spacious and bright with lovely views of the canal from the living room and a view of the park from the dining room. The upstairs bathroom does not present well but works great - plenty of hot water and great water pressure in the shower. The rooftop terrace is a little tricky to get to but worth the effort. We had a family reunion with our Dutch family and the younger people especially enjoyed having breakfast on the roof.
The only caveat for Jilles place is that the apartment is not suitable for people with mobility problems. Both the entry stairs and the stairs to the bedrooms are very steep. Also, this listing is new and was missing a few basics like a coffee maker but Jilles seems to be working on that.
A really great feature of Jilles home is the location. It is on a quiet street but close to stores and restaurants

name: Appartement in Rotterdam Blijdorp
comments: we had an amazing three days at Rogers. the places felt right at home and the 2 balcony's was a big bonus. it was close to everything, we used lime bikes which was great. he was very flexible and the place was pristine condition, like new. The bed was so comfortable, and the place was warm enough in the evenings. has everything you could want from a stay in Rotterdam! Hoping to be back soon 😊

name: The Modern City Loft
comments:
We had a wonderful stay in the apartment. We have 3 young children and maybe the only complaint was the stairs in the building to get to the apartment. They counted 55 steps up a steep and narrow gradient. So I would recommend packing light.
We brought a car. Street parking directly outside but expensive. Multi storey car parks behid the property. We used the ParkBee for overnight parking. Approximately. 30eur a day and felt safe.
We stayed for 4 nights and the location is very lively. If you are looking for a city break this is an absolutely great location.
The apartment was well kept. Everything was clean. The door to the balcony was a bit difficult to unlock and open so hopefully the host fixes that.
Water pressure was great. Hot water in the shower was great.
The host was very resposive to all my messages and was very helpful.
Overall a 10/10 experience. I hope others have the same experience we had.

name: Central Rotterdam Loft II
comments:
I stayed at this place for two weeks in August 2025. While booking this place, there were no reviews and hence I was a bit apprehensive. However, Rob as a host had many positive reviews. This provided me the confidence. The booking process was smooth and the communication was also very good. I got timely messages about the check in etc. The location of the apartment is excellent. It is at the centre of Rotterdam and you can walk to most of the tourist attractions.
The apartment is spacious with a big living/dining area. The bedrooms are also of decent size. The bathroom is big with a good shower area. The apartment was as per the pictures displayed on the website. It was clean. The kitchen is big with most of the needed equipments. The only things missing was a microwave oven and a toaster. There was also no shampoo/body wash in the bathroom. Overall a very pleasant experience and given a chance will stay in this place again. Thanks Rob.

name: Central Rotterdam Loft II
comments: We stayed 3 nights and first of all communication was good until I reported that there was a bathroom leak that soaked and flooded the whole room, ruining our stuff. If you are looking for a quiet getaway this is not the place. Noise carries very well with the neighbours and can hear the conversations without them shouting. Chairs being dragged and even them going to the toilet… the glasses were unwashed and stained white in the inside so they obviously hadn’t been cleaned. Oven didn’t work and there was no manual couldn’t even use in the morning as Rob didn’t reply. There was a lipstick stain on the door and the whole place was a sweat box with the windows on the bedrooms on the ceilings with not very good blinds.

name: Central Rotterdam Waterfront Loft IV
comments: We loved our stay in Rotterdam, this apartment was in such a good location - close to bars, restaurants and transport links, while also feeling like part of a residential neighbourhood. The apartment was easy to find (don't be put off by the no.22C next to the door!) and as described...quite minimal but that was fine. It's the perfect apartment if you're just looking for somewhere to base yourself while you're out and about in Rotterdam.  Yes, there are a few wee bits of wear and tear mentioned in other reviews that are easy fixes to make this better but it didn't put us off. The apartment was clean, plenty towels and we made good use of the the coffee machine.  Thanks.

name: Cozy Local Flat Near Ahoy
comments:
Brutta esperienza
Alloggio è evidentemente appena ristrutturato, ma non basta.
Innanzitutto mancavano dei servizi indicati: olio pepe e sapone per i piatti, anche l’estintore.
La tenda si è rotta il secondo giorno, in quanto fissata con piccole viti. La sbarra di metallo della tenda ha rischiato di colpirmi. Quindi i due giorni successivi non avevamo nessun modo di ripararci dalla luce esterna e di avere privacy.
La tenda sul salotto è anche quella mancante e quindi anche lì non si ha nessuna privacy.
Dopo di che l’alloggio non ha nessuna forma di comodità, anche le più banali, come i comodini, posti per appoggiare gli asciugamani. Negli armadi ci sono ammassati dei piumini, quindi non si possono usare per i vestiti.
Il divano è molto sporco e l’alloggio in generale non è molto pulito. I materassi non sono granché, le molle fanno molto rumore.
Le luci sono fredde e forti, creano un ambiente asettico e fastidioso durante la sera, sicuramente non “Cozy” come riporta l’annuncio.

name: Cosy appartement in oud-Charlois
comments: Peaceful place to stay. The home was a sanctuary with the sky lights, plants and zen decor. It was hard to leave the apartment…it was so relaxing. We did find the steep stairs/climb to the top floor a little cumbersome, but that is typical for the Netherlands. The space was clean, inviting and we indulged in the relaxing tub. It was our first time in Rotterdam, so it was exciting to see the diverse culture. The neighborhood was a bit away from the city center, but depending on what you’re looking to experience— that could be a plus/minus. For our family, it was great to get a local experience and the journey to the place in our bikes was fun/exciting (underwater tunnel). We enjoyed some amazing restaurants nearby (an amazing Caribbean grilled chicken takeout just downstairs). We found stores nearby. We felt safe and would easily return. Marit was very communicative and made herself available for guidance. Great energy!

name: Beautiful and Cozy Apartment on the second Floor
comments:
Loc's apartment is situated in a part of Rotterdam with good tram and metro connections.
The apartment itself could not have been better. The kitchen was spotless and had everything you could want, kettle, cooker, fridge, microwave etc.
The walk in shower was great, lovely hot water and a powerful jet. The bedroom was spacious, and as the weather was warm, the tower fan in the room came in useful!! The lounge was airy and nice.
The only slight downside were the stairs to the apartment, they are a bit narrow. When I mentioned this to Loc he even came over to help me with the luggage when I left the apartment!!. You cant get better service than that!!
All in all I had a great stay here, location and the apartment were perfect and I will use again when I visit Rotterdam next!! Thank you

name: Best location and happy place
comments: Great location with easy access to restaurants and the metro. The apartment is very new and clean. Watch out for the steep stairs. Needs a couple of new lightbulbs and the place gets really hot while we stayed there.

name: R'dam-Hillegersberg Room in spacious apartment
comments: Even though Manon didn’t have any reviews yet, I had a good feeling about her place. My friend and I needed a place to stay for a few days and we couldn’t have made a better choice! She was the friendliest and most helpful person for us, and the house was perfect with a very nice backyard. We even joined her joga lesson and it was amazing! It is a little far from the center but it’s super doable taking the tram which is around the corner. 100% recommend :) Thanks Manon for being the best host!

name: Budget-Friendly Stay in Central Rotterdam
comments: The apartment is in a fantastic location - really great surroundings, walkable to most touristic spots. The building itself is more basic, but the flat is nice and comfortable for a family with kids. A few small things could make the stay even better: there was no soap (for hands or dishes), no basic cooking staples like salt/pepper, no coffee for the machine, and no hairdryer. Also, the floors are quite squeaky, so light sleepers might notice it in the evenings. Communication with the host was very clear and responsive. Thank you!

name: Budget-Friendly Stay in Central Rotterdam
comments: Our stay at Rob’s Airbnb flat was truly a great experience and definitely value for money. It felt just like being at home but in a different country. The two bedrooms provided a peaceful and comfortable space for us to rest, and the well-equipped kitchen was perfect for preparing meals when we didn’t feel like dining out. One of our favorite parts was the lovely view from the living room window overlooking the canal, it added a special charm to our stay. Overall, we had a wonderful time as a family and truly enjoyed everything about the apartment. Highly recommended!

name: Cosy Stay near Station Alexander & Mall
property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
comments: Usame and Nur were great hosts! My flight was delayed by a couple hours and so they were flexible with my check in.  Explained everything to me once I arrived. Taught me how to use the coffee machine and even brought me homemade desserts one day which were amazing! They were very happy to help with everything else I needed. Truly one of the best hosts I've met on AirBNB. For my first time on AirBNB on my own this truly was a great experience and stay. They also were flexible with my checkout time as I had a 6 hour wait before I could make a move to my airport. Thank you very much Usame and Nur. I enjoyed my time in the Netherlands and you guys were a huge part of it!
